Visit the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior) standing on the ruins of ancient Rome, and tour the Spanish Square and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Afterwards enjoy free time and check in at the hotel to rest.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel or Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Due to the preservation of Rome's ancient city architecture, vehicles are prohibited and most areas are pedestrian zones; all the attractions in central Rome lie within the ancient city of Rome, so the day's sightseeing in Rome is on foot, with a walking distance of about 5-6 kilometers.
overview.text_zh:
上午集合，在导游的带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。之后自由活动，入住酒店休息。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注： 由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，而罗马市区内的所有景点都在古罗马城内，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel or Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor swimming pool. With cutting-edge architecture and modern interior design, the rooms feature modern or classical decorative furnishings, and all guest rooms enjoy views of the garden, the pool or the golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants offering exquisite international cuisine and traditional Italian fare; with its tranquil setting, it easily meets your diverse needs and makes an ideal choice for relaxing body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth visit to Rome, an important cradle of world culture
Search among the ancient ruins that cover about half the city area for a historical civilization that has accumulated over thousands of years. Whether it is the world-famous architectural ruins formed by the imperial Senate, triumphal arches, victory columns, the Pantheon and the Colosseum, or the many exquisite Renaissance buildings and art treasures housed in over a hundred museums, or even the city's many fountains of myriad poses represented by the Trevi Fountain, as well as the vast roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares and public baths and other public structures, all freeze art at that wondrous moment. Someone once said "architecture is flowing music"; then the architecture of ancient Rome plays a magnificent and timeless symphony.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的就是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum in the center of Rome was built in ancient Roman times to please generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was the place reserved for slave owners, nobles and free citizens to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat among slaves, and it is one of Rome's more famous historic relics. The Colosseum is a model masterpiece and marvel in architectural history, renowned worldwide for being enormous, majestic and spectacular. Although only most of its skeleton remains, its grand majesty and momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马较著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman king Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I and others rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan era and a model of the consummate building techniques of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday" and has become a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Hepburn's fresh and lovely figure seems to have merged with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory people can never shake off. The Spanish Steps - the entire Spanish Square is not large, and the crowds mainly gather near the Spanish Steps. The whole staircase has 138 steps and is the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also called the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Fountain," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology, and is grand in scale and magnificent. It is said that if you stand with your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dream will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Naples or Sorrento and take a ferry to the port of Capri. On the same day you may stroll along the seaside on your own and then visit the Blue Grotto, or take a boat to circle the island on your own to explore the Blue Grotto, or go on your own to the town of Capri to tour the Gardens of Augustus and overlook the whole bay; afterwards take the ferry back to Sorrento dock and head to the hotel to check in.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
After landing on Capri there is free time, with no transport fees included. The recommended route is Marina Grande - the old town of Capri - the Gardens of Augustus, a one-way mountain road of about 1.3 kilometers passing three important attractions; along the way there are funiculars and taxis, which require additional payment.
Note: The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction; if there is high tide, wind and waves or other factors and the local marine meteorological authority declares it closed, then it cannot be visited. The Blue Grotto admission is not included in the tour fee; to avoid misunderstanding, please follow local custom and, in addition to the Blue Grotto rower's fee, pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往那不勒斯或索伦托乘坐渡船到达卡普里岛港口。当天或自行前往海边漫步后前往蓝洞参观，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园，俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船返回索伦托码头，前往酒店入住。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
卡布里岛登岛后自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港 -卡布里古城 - 奥古斯都花园单程路线约1.3公里的山路，途径三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车，需要额外付费。
备注：卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a fine choice for enjoying Sorrento's sea views, with magnificent views of the Bay of Sorrento and Naples. Surrounded by sea views on three sides, it has a private beach and a private pier, two restaurants of different styles and a fully equipped marine SPA center. The lively seaside town center is within walking distance, and the hotel pier is the mooring point for sea-going yachts.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
The blue wonder of Capri - the "Blue Grotto"
Since ancient Roman times Capri has been a famous resort for sightseeing and recuperation. On his way back after the Eastern campaigns, Emperor Augustus once landed on the island and, won over by its beautiful surroundings and pleasant climate, did not hesitate to exchange the island of Ischia, four times larger, for Capri as his summer retreat. Capri has a limestone topography with steep, towering rocks, and among the rocks are many strange grottoes, of which the more famous is the "Blue Grotto." The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the world's seven great wonders. Its entrance lies below a cliff and is very small, accessible only by small boat. Because of the special structure of the entrance, on one hand sunlight can enter the grotto through the opening, and on the other hand it is reflected up from the water at the bottom of the grotto, so the seawater inside is a crystalline blue, mysterious and unfathomable, and even the rocks inside turn blue, hence the name "Blue Grotto." To visit the Blue Grotto you must choose the right timing: first, the weather must be clear; second, you must go at low tide; third, there must be no wind or waves.
highlights.text_zh:
卡普里岛蓝色奇观“蓝洞”
卡普里岛从古罗马时期开始,这里就是著名的旅游疗养胜地，奥古斯都大帝在东方战役结束后的归途中曾在该岛登陆，被这里的优美环境、宜人气候所折服，不惜以4倍的伊斯基亚岛换取卡普里岛，作为自己的避暑之地。卡普里岛属于石灰质地形，岩石峭立，岩石间有许多奇特的岩洞，其中较著名的就是“蓝洞”。蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一。蓝洞的洞口在悬崖的下面，洞口很小，只能乘坐小船才能进入。由于洞口的特殊结构，一方面阳光可以从洞口进入洞内，一方面又从洞内水底反射上来，因此洞内的海水一片晶蓝，神秘莫测，连洞内的岩石也变成了蓝色，故称“蓝洞”。参观蓝洞一定要选择时机:一要天气晴朗;二要在退潮的时候去，三要没有风浪。

attractions.text_en:
The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the world's seven great wonders and is Capri's more famous attraction; many people go to Capri precisely to see the wonder of the Blue Grotto. You can enter the Blue Grotto by small boat; because of the special structure of the entrance, the seawater inside is a crystalline blue. The surface seawater of the Blue Grotto shows a deep blue, while the deeper water is sky blue, and the seawater sets off the rocks inside in a sheet of azure. On clear days the Blue Grotto is exceptionally beautiful and enchanting.
The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction; if there is high tide, wind and waves or other factors and the local marine meteorological authority declares it closed, then it cannot be visited. Even when open there can be long queues, so the Blue Grotto admission is not included in the tour fee; to avoid misunderstanding, please follow local custom and, in addition to the Blue Grotto rower's fee, pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
attractions.text_zh:
蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，是卡普里较著名的景点，很多人去卡普里的目的就是为了一睹蓝洞奇观。可乘小船进入蓝洞游览，由于洞口的特殊结构，使得洞里的海水一片晶蓝。蓝洞表层的海水呈现幽幽的深蓝色，而深层海水却是天蓝色的，海水映衬得洞中的岩石也都一片蔚蓝。天气晴朗的时候，蓝洞分外的美丽和妖娆。
卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。即时开放也会出现长时间排队，因此、蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

attractions.text_en: Capri lies near the entrance to the sea at the southern part of the Bay of Naples and belongs to the Campania region of Italy. On the island are the medieval castle ruins of Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as the church dedicated to the island's patron saint San Costanzo; it is one of the famous resorts of southern Italy. Capri's forests, waters, air, sunshine and island villas - the most coveted by the world's wealthy - have attracted people from all over the world. Among them, the Blue Grotto is the attraction everyone coming to Capri will surely visit; on a clear, bright day, sunlight shines into the cave, and every corner of the deep-blue grotto is exquisitely beautiful.
attractions.text_zh: 卡普里岛位于那不勒斯湾南部入海口附近，属意大利坎佩尼亚区。岛上有巴巴罗萨和卡斯蒂利奥内两座中世纪城堡遗迹以及供奉该岛守护神圣科斯坦佑的教堂，是意大利南部著名的游览胜地之一。卡普里岛的森林、水域、空气、阳光和较令全世界富豪憧憬的岛屿别墅，曾吸引了来自世界各地的人们，其中蓝洞是每一个人来卡普里岛一定会参观的景点，天清气朗时，阳光照射入洞穴，深蓝的洞穴内每一处角落都美不胜收。

attractions.text_en: The Gardens of Augustus in the town of Capri record the ten years of Augustus's life here. One side of the garden is a cliff, and in the distance are azure waters. On the left side of the garden are the Lovers' Rocks; legend says these rocks were originally a couple deeply in love who, unable to be together, jumped into the sea one after another to die for love, and afterwards became these rocks leaning close to one another.
attractions.text_zh: 位于卡普里小镇上的奥古斯都花园记录着奥古斯都在这里居住的十年生活。花园一侧是断壁，远处则是碧蓝的海水。在花园的左侧是情人石，相传这情人石原本是相爱的恋人，因无法恋爱纷纷跳入海中殉情，之后就成了这相依相偎的石头。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, embark on a charming day cruise to explore the treasures of the Amalfi Coast. Sail to Positano to explore the enchanting cliffside village, then take the boat to Amalfi to enjoy the panorama of the Amalfi Coast town. Afterwards sail back and check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: In the event of extreme weather at sea, for the safety of guests the cruise company cancels the sailing tour to Positano and Amalfi; we will arrange a coach tour of the old town of Sorrento that day, and Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, with the sailing cruise fee refunded to guests.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，踏上迷人游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，然后乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景。之后乘船返回，入住酒店。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a fine choice for enjoying Sorrento's sea views, with magnificent views of the Bay of Sorrento and Naples. Surrounded by sea views on three sides, it has a private beach and a private pier, two restaurants of different styles and a fully equipped marine SPA center. The lively seaside town center is within walking distance, and the hotel pier is the mooring point for sea-going yachts.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
[Paradise on Earth]: the Amalfi Coast
The Amalfi Coast is a World Heritage Site and has been named by America's National Geographic magazine as one of the 51 beautiful places one must visit in a lifetime. Here there are winding coastlines and spectacular cliffs, as well as hidden medieval fishing towns, described as "highly dramatic." Here are ancient medieval towns famous for their distinctive culture and architecture. The more popular towns include Amalfi, Positano, Ravello and Maiori. In these towns you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers and temples, buildings whose history dates back several centuries, each with its own story.
highlights.text_zh:
【人间天堂】：阿马尔菲海岸
阿马尔菲海岸是一处世界文化遗产，更被美国《国家地理》杂志评为一生中必须去的51个美丽的地方之一。这里有蜿蜒的海岸线和壮观的悬崖峭壁，还隐藏着中世纪渔业小镇，被形容为“高度戏剧性”。这里有着古老的中世纪小镇，这些小镇以其独特的文化和建筑而著名。其中较受欢迎的小镇包括阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和莱马尼。在这些小镇中，你可以看到许多古老的教堂、城堡、钟楼和神殿，这些建筑物的历史可以追溯到几个世纪以前，每个建筑都有着自己的故事。

attractions.text_en: It is located on the coast of the Province of Salerno in the Campania region of southern Italy; the town closest to the coast is called Amalfi, from which it takes its name. Seen as a whole, here half is sea and half is sheer cliff, on which there are winding mountain roads and villas scattered in picturesque disorder.
attractions.text_zh: 它位于意大利南部坎帕尼亚区萨莱诺省沿海，最接近海岸的小镇叫阿马尔菲(Amalfi)，由此得名。整体看去，这里一半是大海，一半是绝壁，绝壁上是蜿蜒的盘山公路和错落有致的别墅。

attractions.text_en: Positano is a town on the Amalfi Coast in the Campania region of Italy. Its main part has its back to the mountains and faces the sea. A writer once described it thus: Positano is a dreamland - while you are there she is not quite real, but after you leave she becomes vivid and lifelike. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as Europe's beautiful shore; here the coastline winds and twists, towering mountains and islands rise majestically on the shore, valleys and headlands interlace, orchards and wild plants coexist, and within the pristine natural environment there is rich human history. Scattered through the dense mountain forests are many picturesque towns, and the more beautiful of them is called Positano.
attractions.text_zh: 波西塔诺是位于意大利坎帕尼亚大区阿马尔菲海岸‎沿岸的一个小镇。城镇主要部份背山面海，一位作家这样形容：波西塔诺是一个梦乡，你在时，她不是很真切，你离开后，她变的栩栩如生。阿马尔菲海岸被誉为欧洲美丽的海滩，这里的海岸线蜿蜒曲折，岸上山岛耸峙巍峨，山谷与海岬交错，果园与野生植物并存，原生态的自然环境中有丰富的人文历史，浓密山林中散落着许多如诗如画的小镇，而其中较漂亮的那一个叫做波西塔诺

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city of Pompeii and learn about the former Pompeian civilization. Afterwards go to Naples to tour the old town of Naples, the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and Castel Nuovo (exterior). In the afternoon head to Rome and check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel or Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明。之后前往那不勒斯游览那不勒斯老城，那不勒斯皇宫（外观）、新堡（外观）。下午前往罗马，入住酒店。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel or Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor swimming pool. With cutting-edge architecture and modern interior design, the rooms feature modern or classical decorative furnishings, and all guest rooms enjoy views of the garden, the pool or the golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants offering exquisite international cuisine and traditional Italian fare; with its tranquil setting, it easily meets your diverse needs and makes an ideal choice for relaxing body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The ancient city of Pompeii | asleep for a thousand years, still brilliant and glorious when awakened
The ancient city of Pompeii lies in the Campania region near the city of Naples in southern Italy. It was once a small fishing village, but thanks to its proximity to an important Mediterranean port, with convenient transport and gathering merchants, by the 8th century BC it had developed into the second largest city of ancient Rome. However, in 79 BC, with the eruption of Mount Vesuvius, volcanic ash and scorching lava instantly buried the ancient city of Pompeii, and the disaster killed countless living souls in a single night. Only after more than a thousand years did the ancient city of Pompeii see the light of day again.
highlights.text_zh:
庞贝古城丨沉睡千年，醒时依旧灿烂辉煌
庞贝古城位于意大利南部那不勒斯市附近的坎帕尼亚大区，曾经是一个小渔村，由于靠近地中海的重要港口，交通便利，商贾云集，在公元前8世纪，就已经发展成了古罗马城的第二大城市。然而在公元前79年，随着维苏威火山的爆发，火山灰与炽热的岩浆瞬间掩埋了庞贝古城，灾难让无数生灵一夜之间丧生。历经一千多年之后，庞贝古城方得重见天日。

attractions.text_en: The ancient city of Pompeii was once a small-to-medium town with its back to the mountains and facing the sea, destroyed in a single day by the great eruption of Mount Vesuvius to its northwest. The town's streets and houses were buried under volcanic ash, yet the scenes of Pompeian life from more than two thousand years ago were completely preserved, and this vast site was only gradually excavated later. Besides the various architectural remains, there are also some shocking casts. People who perished in the eruption, wrapped in volcanic ash, decayed until only an empty shell remained; archaeologists injected plaster into these shells to make casts, showing the world the tragic state of Pompeii at that time.
attractions.text_zh: 庞贝古城曾是一座背山面海的中小城镇，因西北边的维苏威火山大爆发而毁于一旦。城镇街道、房屋被火山灰掩埋，却完整保留了两千年多前庞贝人的生活场景，后来这座庞大的遗址才被渐渐发掘出来。除各种建筑遗迹外，还有一些触目惊心的铸像。在火山爆发时遇难的人，因被火山灰包裹而身体腐朽得只剩空壳，考古学把这些空壳注入石膏、做成铸像，向世人展示庞贝当时的惨状。

attractions.text_en: The amphitheatre at the easternmost end of the ancient city was built around the 1st century BC and could hold nearly 20,000 people. It is the oldest of the ancient Roman amphitheatres, more than 40 years earlier than the Colosseum in Rome. It has three tiers of spectator seats, and the topmost tier still retains the pillars that supported the awning of the time.
attractions.text_zh: 位于古城最东端的露天剧场建立于约公元前1世纪，可容纳近2万人，是古罗马圆形剧场中最古老的一个，比罗马的圆形竞技场还要早40余年，这里有三层观众席，最上层仍保留着当年支撑顶棚的支柱。

attractions.text_en: This is a historic site within the ancient city of Pompeii. It was once a temple, but because of its great age only broken walls and ruins remain; still, the overall outline of the temple can be made out.
attractions.text_zh: 这是庞贝古城内的一处历史遗址，这里曾经是一座寺庙，但因为年代久远只剩下残垣断壁了，但寺庙的整体轮廓还是看得出的。

attractions.text_en: For most travelers, Naples's sea, food and history are all important reasons that make people reluctant to leave. Naples was the most beloved city of the Italian writer Boccaccio; it is the birthplace of the songs "'O Sole Mio" and "Torna a Surriento," and also the origin of pizza. Naples shows different faces to travelers from all over the world throughout the four seasons. Naples is also called "Napoli," which is "Napoli" in Italian. Naples is the capital of the Campania region and of the Province of Naples, and one of Italy's most populous cities, abundantly producing lemons and grapes. At the same time, she is an important Mediterranean tourist city, known as the "City of Sun and Joy." Here is a source of inspiration for many artists and musicians, perhaps because of Mount Vesuvius, or perhaps because of Naples's simple charm.
attractions.text_zh: 对于大多数旅行者而言，那不勒斯的大海、美食及历史都是让人流连忘返的重要原因。那不勒斯是意大利作家薄伽丘最热爱的城市，这里是歌曲《我的太阳》、《重归苏莲托》的诞生地，也是披萨的起源地。那不勒斯一年四季都呈现出不同的面孔展现给来自世界各地的旅行者。那不勒斯也叫“拿波里”，意大利文是“Napoli”。那不勒斯是坎帕尼亚大区以及那不勒斯省的首府，也是意大利人口最多的城市之一，盛产柠檬和葡萄。同时，她也是地中海重要的旅游城市，被称为“阳光和欢乐之城”。这里是许多艺术家、音乐家的灵感之源，或许是因为维苏威火山(MountVesuvius)，又或许是因为那不勒斯的古朴。

attractions.text_en: Castel Nuovo, also known as the Angevin Castle, was ordered built by the first king of the Kingdom of Naples. Castel Nuovo includes the Civic Museum (Museo Civico) as well as the castle ruins. The museum (mainly displaying paintings) is on the first floor; on the second floor you can see sea views, while the ground floor is the Castel Nuovo ruins, with a transparent glass surface - travelers with a fear of heights need to take special care, as beneath the glass are ancient architectural remains and human skeletons. In addition, inside Castel Nuovo there is also a Sala Dei Baroni (literally the Barons' Hall), the architecture at the top of which is very distinctive.
attractions.text_zh: 新堡，又名安茹城堡，是那不勒斯王国第一位国王下令建立。新堡包括公民博物馆(MuseoCivico)以及城堡遗迹。博物馆(主要展示绘画)位于第一层，第二层可以看到海景，零层则为新堡遗迹，地表为透明玻璃建造，有恐高症的旅行者需要特别注意，玻璃底下则为古建筑遗迹以及人的骸骨。另外，新堡内部还有一个SalaDeiBaroni(直译为男爵的房间)，房间顶端的建筑非常有特色。

attractions.text_en: The Royal Palace of Naples stands in the bustling city center, near famous attractions such as Castel Nuovo and Castel dell'Ovo. Having gone through four dynasties, it looks quite ordinary from the outside, but if you choose to go inside, it will surely amaze you. This palace is extremely luxurious, with an overall palette of essentially gold, yellow and purple, representing royal nobility. The palace has many, many rooms - the queen's bedchamber, the council hall, the study and so on - and inside there are also many displays of royal items and paintings of the royal nobility. The most worthy of mention is the throne. The most worth-seeing place in this palace, apart from the various paintings, is precisely this; words like "noble and elegant" cannot simply describe it.
attractions.text_zh: 那不勒斯皇宫身处闹市，临近新堡、蛋堡等知名景点，历经四个朝代，外表看上去十分普通，但是，如果选择入内参观，那么一定会让你大吃一惊，这个皇宫非常奢华，整个色调基本就是金色、黄色、紫色，代表皇室的高贵。皇宫有许许多多的房间，王后的寝宫、议政厅、书房等等，里面还有很多皇室用品的展示和皇室贵族的绘画，最值得一提的就是王座。这个皇宫里面最值得一看的地方，除了各类绘画就是它了，用尊贵典雅这一类词是无法简单形容的。

overview.text_en:
In the morning set off from Rome to tour the old town of Pienza, taking free photos along the way at the cypress lane, then visit Pius II Square, Pienza Cathedral (exterior) and other sights, after which set off for Siena to tour Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, Siena Town Hall (exterior), the Torre del Mangia (exterior) and other sights.
Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城游览，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，之后游览二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点，之后出发前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。
夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel sits on a quiet hilltop surrounded by olive trees and gardens, with beautiful surroundings ideal for getting close to nature. The guest rooms have comfortable wooden floors, bright design and tasteful, stylish interior decor, and the hotel has an exquisite restaurant serving classic Italian, local and Tuscan cuisine at dinner. The hotel's outdoor pool, fitness center and sauna all offer you an even more relaxing stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，环境优美且适合亲近自然。客房铺设舒适的木质地板，设计明亮，摆设美观的时尚内装，同时酒店配有精致的餐厅，在晚餐时段供应经典的意大利、当地和托斯卡纳美食。酒店的室外泳池、健身中心以及桑拿浴室都为您提供更加放松的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
The pastoral beauty of the Val d'Orcia and the medieval old town of Pienza
Close your eyes and you will imagine the classic Tuscan scenery - blue sky and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and grapevines, and finally wheat fields - this is the perfect portrait of the Val d'Orcia. From the city walls of the old town of Pienza, overlook the scenery of the World Heritage Site, the "Val d'Orcia."
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arrayed cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast mottled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and visit.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a small town on the hills of the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. The Pienza he oversaw rebuilding in 1459 is regarded as a model of the "ideal city" and is therefore hailed as a "touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other medieval Italian towns, Pienza's distinctive feature is that from its city walls one can overlook the scenery of the World Heritage Site, the "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old town, is full of masterpieces by great artists and classical medieval architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing cobblestone alleys and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you seem to be in the medieval Europe of a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. For centuries this city has kept its complete classical appearance, as if time had stood still here since the 14th century. Besides its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of sweets. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties - the almond soft cakes ricciarelli, the nut pies panforte, the peppery spiced nut cakes pan pepato, the rice puddings budini di riso, the walnut cookies cavallucci, or the walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly opposite the square are Siena's town hall and tower; the town hall houses the Civic Museum, which holds many paintings of the Sienese School, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is Torre del Mangia; it is Siena's tallest building and the second-tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of steps for a sweeping view of the beautiful scenery of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳较高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns; it is a unique confluence of art and nature, holding rich historical marks. Its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the concept of "good government" of the Italian city-states.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

overview.text_en:
In the morning head to Pisa to tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli at the heart of Pisa's historical and cultural center. Go to tour Cinque Terre, and along the Ligurian coastline visit the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs; afterwards check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: If bad weather or factors such as a railway company strike make it impossible to tour Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically change to touring the coastal cities by coach or other means.
overview.text_zh:
上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场。前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；之后入住酒店。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Hilton Florence is a modern hotel offering a Tuscan-style experience, with a superb location for reaching Florence's commercial center and enjoying the bustle of Florence. From the terrace of the hotel's executive lounge you can enjoy magnificent views of Florence. Each guest room is decorated in a warm, modern style; wooden floors and spacious marble bathrooms provide great comfort.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店
佛罗伦萨希尔顿酒店是一家体验托斯卡纳风格的现代化酒店，地理位置优越，可前往佛罗伦萨商业中心，享受佛罗伦萨的繁华。酒店行政酒廊的露台上可欣赏到佛罗伦萨的壮丽景色。每间客房均采用温馨的现代风格装饰；木地板和宽敞的大理石浴室可获得较大的舒适度。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a haven on the cliffs
Along the long Mediterranean coastline, stop at each beautiful fishing village, watch the sun-bathed beaches, the waves quietly lapping against the rocks, and the colorful houses approaching from afar. The curiosity to gaze at the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak the moment you arrive; once off the boat, walk on foot through the village alleys, and the closer you get the more delightful the surprises. It is like savoring in detail a visual feast of five-colored delicacies, tasting bit by bit the flavor within - this scene is so beautiful it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，下得船来，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the free-standing bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli to the north of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy. It is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, named a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. It is said that in 1590 AD, Galileo performed a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's views.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, with four great buildings on the square: Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (the bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Camposanto (cemetery). Around the square the ancient city walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, ICOMOS nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa in Italy (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for the five cliffside villages and towns of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail stringing the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the world's beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers, taking around 5 hours, with the Mediterranean on one side and mountains on the other, and Italian fishing hamlets ahead - a destination many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
In the morning head to the birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence, to visit the world's third-largest cathedral - the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (exterior), Piazza della Signoria, the Old Bridge, as well as Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Afterwards head to Venice and check in at the hotel.
Overnight: voco Venice or Hilton Venice Ambassador, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往文艺复兴发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场，老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观）。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
voco Venice or Hilton Venice Ambassador, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels, with a superb location, stylish modern design, natural-toned rooms and modern interiors, offering you a comfortable and warm stay. The hotel offers an abundant breakfast, a well-equipped gym, and a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails, and the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian cuisine and delicacies.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en:
The splendor and prosperity of Florence, the shining star of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world's capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Among the blue sky and white clouds, the brightly colored walls, the dark green shutters and the deep red roofs, search for the soul of the Renaissance; in the streets and lanes, squares and churches, museums and art galleries, feel that the Renaissance never grows old. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic soul of Dante Alighieri and the painterly soul of Leonardo da Vinci still drift over Florence, still continuing to pursue the people and events of the European Renaissance..."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利·但丁的诗魂、达·芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few can be as graceful as this one. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets to the full the classicism, elegance and freedom esteemed in the Renaissance era - no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was originally the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum and has been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and many cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore lies directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno river, also called the Old Bridge, was built in 1345 and is one of Europe's earlier long-span segmental arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over the centuries it has experienced floods, social upheavals and wars yet has stood unfallen. It is one of Florence's famous landmark buildings.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to today. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce, a Gothic building that is the resting place of Italian luminaries such as Michelangelo and Galileo; its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring in detail. Around the square there are many cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals, especially in summer, when open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract large audiences. The square's open space is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling Florence's unique atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
In the morning visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings built on water, together with the winding water lanes, make Venice's romantic charm linger long. Afterwards head to the fashion capital - Milan.
Overnight: Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。之后前往时尚之都——米兰。
夜宿：皇家花园酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel sits in a lush garden with fountains, palm trees and olive trees, blending classic elegance with modern style, making it a delightful and relaxing urban resort. The hotel is within walking distance of a large nearby shopping center; its guest rooms are spacious and elegant, with large marble bathrooms with bathtubs, the buffet breakfast is abundant and varied, the Captain's Bar serves drinks and snacks all day, and the hotel has the glass-domed Blue Crab Grill restaurant serving international cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
皇家花园酒店 或同等级4星级酒店
酒店坐落在郁郁葱葱的花园中，花园内有喷泉、棕榈树和橄榄树，将经典优雅与现代风格融为一体，是一处令人愉悦而轻松的城市度假胜地。酒店可步行至附近的大型商业中心；酒店的客房宽敞而优雅，设有带浴缸的大型大理石浴室，自助早餐丰盛多样，Captain's Bar 全天供应饮料和小吃，酒店设有玻璃圆顶的 Blue Crab Grill 餐厅，供应国际美食。

highlights.text_en:
The world's beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic," still dazzlingly brilliant
As one of the major cities of the Renaissance, Venice is made up of 118 small islands, connected as one by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands" and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the world's beautiful squares, "St. Mark's Square," the beautiful Grand Canal, the phoenix-reborn La Fenice opera house, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs as written by Xu Zhimo, and breathtakingly beautiful colonnades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian School of painting, and also the filming location of segments of many films; her unique temperament leaves everyone who visits enraptured and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: Known for short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once the great church of medieval Europe, a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and at the same time a treasury rich in collected works of art.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco; all of Venice's past glory is here. Inside, what you can see is not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through small holes, rather than, like the many people on the bridge opposite, looking toward you at the Bridge of Sighs. Inside you can take photos, as long as you do not use flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was the necessary route in ancient times for escorting condemned prisoners from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is house-shaped, covered above by a vault and very tightly enclosed, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner had been tried at the Doge's Palace, serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and as they crossed this airtight bridge they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows, losing their freedom from then on, and could not help but let out a sigh. It is said that lovers who kiss beneath the bridge can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the beautiful drawing room of Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, and to the east rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times it has been the public activity center of Venice's politics, religion and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, freely visit Milan's landmark building, Milan Cathedral (exterior), and one of Europe's beautiful commercial arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon head to Zurich to tour Grossmunster (exterior), Lake Zurich, Bahnhofstrasse, and stroll along the Limmat river.
Overnight: Hotel Allegra Zurich (Limmattal) or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊。 下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观），苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街、漫步利马特河边。
夜宿：苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Hotel Allegra Zurich (Limmattal) or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel sits in the heart of the scenic Limmattal, a modern urban residence right next to Switzerland's larger shopping center. The hotel has a bar, and the guest rooms are spacious and tidy, with beautiful parquet floors and modern furniture, large wardrobes and many little ideas that make life easier. The hotel offers a buffet or continental breakfast. The hotel's surroundings of green valleys, rolling hills and the winding Limmat river provide you with a comfortable, natural stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在风景秀丽的利马塔尔中心地带，现代化的城市住宅，紧邻瑞士较大的购物中心，酒店配备酒吧，客房宽敞整洁，拥有漂亮的镶木地板和现代家具、大衣柜和许多让生活更轻松的小创意。酒店提供各类自助或欧陆式早餐。酒店周边绿意盎然的山谷、连绵起伏的丘陵和蜿蜒的利马特河，为您提供舒适自然的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
Check in at the filming location of "Crash Landing on You" and encounter romantic Zurich
The filming location of the opening of the TV drama "Crash Landing on You" is Lindenhof Park in the old town of Zurich; at the start of the main story, the perfect scene of the two passing by each other was frozen here. With the Limmat river in the foreground, the park offers a wonderful view of Zurich. The twin-towered building flashing in the drama is precisely Grossmunster, Zurich's acknowledged landmark building. Zurich's old town is also an experience not to be missed; here traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookstores and flower shops gather, along with jewelry and fashion boutiques. Stroll through the old town, wandering and pausing in every street.
highlights.text_zh:
打卡《爱的迫降》取景地，邂逅浪漫的苏黎世
《爱的迫降》电视剧片头取景地就是位于苏黎世老城的林登霍夫公园，正片开始时，定格了两人擦身而过的完美的画面。公园以利马特河为前景可以观赏到苏黎世的美妙景色。剧中闪现的双塔建筑正是苏黎世大教堂，是苏黎世公认的地标建筑。苏黎世老城区也是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰、时尚精品，漫步于老城区，在每个街道里走走停停。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Towering in the city center, Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, its hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and the white marble exterior walls are carved with thousands of statues. The interior space is vast; sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, the light is hazy, and it is full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the cathedral's crypt the remains of the original Church of San Tecla on the site are also preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most tourists who come here come to sightsee. Under the central arcade is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan; the window displays in particular are updated daily, and just standing outside the windows to admire them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele is full of quite a few high-end restaurants, cafes and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also called Station Street) is one of Europe's longer shopping boulevards and one of the world's most expensive shopping boulevards. More precisely, it is not only Zurich's truly priceless center; luxury brands from all over the world fill it, and private banks stand in rows. Walking on Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless tourists feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored what is claimed to be among the world's leading quantities of gold bars, exciting many people so that they cannot tear their feet away. Standing among it, you can clearly feel wealth, luxury and leisure permeating the air.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long; the docks on the lake's surface are packed with yachts of all kinds, just like a rich people's club. One end of Lake Zurich extends deep into the city center; on the lake surface white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere, leisurely and carefree, a scene of harmony. The north shore of Lake Zurich is where the rich live, known as the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." At the end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich. As one of the "world's livable cities," the life of true Zurichers is permeated everywhere with tranquility and ease.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Grossmunster is one of the three main churches of Zurich, Switzerland (the other two are the Fraumunster and another). The church is located near the bank of the Limmat river, begun around 1100 and inaugurated about 1220. This church, facing the Fraumunster across the river, played a pivotal role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation; the Faculty of Theology of the University of Zurich and the Reformation Museum are both established here. The stained-glass paintings inside the church are masterpieces by the modern Swiss art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

overview.text_en:
In the morning set off for Lucerne to tour the lake-and-mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, listen as the Lion Monument recounts that chapter of Swiss loyalty and perseverance, and visit sights such as the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower; afterwards head to the town of Iseltwald to tour Lake Brienz and the town's scenery; in the afternoon head to Interlaken, the town at the foot of Europe's rooftop - the "Jungfrau."
Overnight: Solbadhotel Sigriswil (snow-mountain lake-view hotel) or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点；之后前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光；下午前往欧洲屋脊-“少女峰”山脚下的小镇-因特拉肯。
夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Solbadhotel Sigriswil (snow-mountain lake-view hotel) or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the mountain ravine beside the panorama bridge of Sigriswil; all guest rooms are decorated in elegant Swiss country style, and the hotel views satisfy one's imagination of Switzerland, with rooms enjoying views of Lake Thun, the surrounding mountains, or the village of Sigriswil. Sitting in the hotel restaurant and gazing afar at the emerald waters of Lake Thun, with the snow mountains tranquilly reflected, you feel as if in a painting, free to enjoy Switzerland's idyllic, haven-like beauty.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于锡格里斯维尔（Sigriswil）全景桥旁边的山涧，所有的客房装饰为瑞士乡村典雅风格，酒店景观满足对瑞士的想象，客房客房享有图恩湖或周围群山或锡格里斯维尔村景致。坐在酒店的餐厅远眺碧绿的图恩湖水，宁静地倒影的雪山，恍然如画中，让人尽情欣赏瑞士世外桃源般的美好景致。

highlights.text_en:
The town of Iseltwald beneath the snow mountains
As the filming location of the grand happy ending of "Crash Landing on You," where the drama's hero and heroine spent their "two happiest weeks of the year," this haven so sweet it makes your teeth ache, the transcendent beauty of Lake Brienz, seems tailor-made for the drama. Lake-and-mountain scenery like paradise on earth, the unfiltered beauty of Lake Brienz - if there is a haven away from the world, it must be in Iseltwald; serene and beautiful days are nothing more than this.
highlights.text_zh:
雪山下的龙疆小镇
作为“爱的迫降”大团圆结局的取景地，剧中男女主角“一年中幸福的两周”都在这里度过，主角甜到齁的世外桃源，超然于世的龙疆湖美景，就像是为该剧量身定做的。人间天堂般的湖光山色，无滤镜的龙疆湖美景，如果有世外桃源，那一定在龙疆，岁月静好也不过如此。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Line train passes through here. Surrounded by mountains, with lush green grass, the rustic village is scattered along the shore of Lake Brienz, looking just like a haven far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled against the mountains and beside the water, Lucerne has the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance halls and mansions, as well as century-old shops and ancient streets and alleys, are everywhere. The lake-and-mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the city's beautiful sights as if illusory yet real, making it that extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small towns. Since the 19th century it has attracted many princes, nobles and men of letters to visit and live here, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: This lake's winding, zigzag shape, together with the surrounding mountains, forms typical "lake-and-mountain" scenery that has attracted large numbers of tourists to come and sightsee. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and this piece thus acquired the title "Moonlight" - although this was not Beethoven's original intention.
attractions.text_zh: 这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: This statue of a dying lion was carved into natural rock by a Danish sculptor in 1821. This lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground, a broken spear stuck in its shoulder, with a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms beside it. The statue was made to commemorate the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on August 10, 1792, to protect the safety of the family of Louis XVI in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; below the statue is text describing the course of this event. In those days Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, forced by necessity, went to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and fought bravely, but honor and money could not mask the cruelty of the mercenary system; after this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, keeping only the guard serving the Catholic Holy See, which is the famous Swiss Guard. Owing to their famous loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

overview.text_en:
In the morning visit Interlaken, set in the center of Lake Brienz and Lake Thun, said to have God's left eye and right eye; you may choose to freely tour Hoheweg and Hohematte, the tranquil village, shaded by green trees and dotted among the mountains and waters, where people and nature are one. Or, at your own expense, choose the Jungfrau panorama cable car to the summit - the Top of Europe, Europe's higher railway station, going to the "Sphinx Observation Deck" and the Aletsch Glacier; or, at your own expense, head to the Swiss alpine adventure town of First to tour the Cliff Walk peak walkway. Afterwards check in at the Novotel Geneva Port (Annemasse).
Overnight: Novotel Geneva Port (Annemasse) or Crowne Plaza, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午参观有上帝左眼与右眼之称的布里恩茨湖和图恩湖中央的因特拉肯，可选自由游览何维克街，荷黑马特，宁静的村庄，绿树掩映，点缀在山水之间，人与自然浑然一体；或者自费选择少女峰全景缆车登顶——Top of Europe欧洲较高的火车站，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”及阿莱奇冰川；或者自费前往瑞士高山探险小镇菲斯特，游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道。随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店。
夜宿：安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Novotel Geneva Port (Annemasse) or Crowne Plaza, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Novotel opened in 2020 and is a comfortable business hotel under the Accor brand, with decor in harmony with its natural surroundings. Inspired by innovative New York hotel concepts, it includes a cafe and bakery area open to hotel guests and the public. The hotel has a restaurant offering healthy seasonal cuisine. At the Rooftop 46 bar on the hotel's 8th floor, overlook the Alps and the Jura mountains and enjoy happy hour.
accommodation.text_zh:
安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店
诺富特酒店于2020年开业，是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店的装饰与其自然环境相协调。受到纽约创新酒店概念的启发，它包括一个向酒店客人和公众开放的咖啡厅和面包店区。酒店设有一间餐厅，提供健康的时令美食。在酒店8 层的 Rooftop 46 酒吧俯瞰阿尔卑斯山和侏罗山脉，享受快乐时光。

highlights.text_en:
Between two gem-clear lakes, experience the wonderland of being a person walking within a painting
God especially favored Lake Thun and Lake Brienz on the Bernese Highlands, leaving here lake waters as beautiful and precious as eyeballs. Towns and villages are scattered all around; from near to far there is an eyeful of lush, dripping green, the distant snow mountains stand tall and proud, the sunlight tickles people's noses, and the changing of the four seasons does not diminish this pastoral beauty one bit - among the mountains and waters it is all wonderful times.
highlights.text_zh:
宝石般澄澈的两湖之间，体验人在画中游的胜景
上帝特别眷顾伯尔尼高地上的图恩湖和布里恩茨湖，将如眼珠般美丽而珍贵的湖水留在这里。小镇和村庄星罗棋布，由近及远是满眼苍翠欲滴的绿意，远处的雪山挺拔，阳光在人的鼻子上挠痒痒，四季的变化没有让这田园美景减色一分，山水之间都是好时光。

attractions.text_en: Hohematte is the green square in the center of the town of Interlaken, the famous Swiss sightseeing town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery, and now the construction of any buildings is forbidden, to prevent damage to this beautiful scenery. It is the best place to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast green there is a fountain, and it is also dotted with many benches, so it is also a good place for strolling. Hohematte is also the landing site for hang gliders; at the edge of the lawn there is a reception point, and after paying, staff will take tourists to a nearby mountain for free gliding, where you can enjoy the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald, located at the northern foot of the Eiger, has the "dream slope" of Switzerland that photographers dearly love, a famous postcard-photography spot, and is also the alpine town that must be passed when touring the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau and Wengen, it forms the more grand and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeside, green grass, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow mountains together make this fascinating town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头非常爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald First attracts tourists from all directions to come and admire the magnificent scenery of the Eiger's north slope. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk peak walkway, anyone will instantly feel they are standing on top of the world. The Cliff Walk peak walkway is located at the summit of First, offering a sweeping unique panorama of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow year-round, while below the mountain it is lush green and beautiful, making it a famous Swiss sightseeing and outdoor-sports resort. The Jungfrau region was inscribed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

overview.text_en:
In the morning tour the "Flower Bridge" area beside the hotel, where Geneva's various local delicacies and specialty shops gather; visit the old town of Geneva, the Lake Geneva area, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau and other sights; in the afternoon take the coach back to Paris.
Overnight: Mercure Paris or Novotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午游览位于酒店旁的“花桥”区域，这里云集则日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店，参观日内瓦老城，日内瓦湖区，花钟和大喷泉等景点；下午乘车返回巴黎。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris or Novotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
The Mercure Paris or Novotel is a comfortable four-star hotel under the Accor brand, located near a large shopping mall, convenient for guests to dine and shop. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it provides you with a comfortable stay, deriving from distinctive brand characteristics: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a unique hotel style deeply infused with local character, and an enthusiastic management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店。
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型四星酒店，酒店位于大型商超附近，方便客人有餐购物，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
The old town of Geneva
The upper town on the shore of Lake Geneva, the charming Lake Geneva and the majestic Alps form a poetic pastoral scene; the beautiful scenery of the two countries' borderlands changes and interweaves continuously along Lake Geneva - one moment it is France's Evian and Annemasse, the other side is Geneva's old town. The whole lake area is listed as a World Heritage Site; one after another, sites of human heritage and well-preserved medieval small towns, the roads inlaid with stone slabs, and every town and city has many fountains. Traditional house architecture and modern, novel shops interweave into one wondrous, exquisitely beautiful experience after another.
highlights.text_zh:
日内瓦古城区
日内瓦湖畔的上城区，风光旖旎的日内瓦湖和雄伟的阿尔卑斯山，构成的诗意田园风光，两国国境秀丽风景沿日内瓦湖不断变化交错、一会是法国依云安娜玛斯一边是日内瓦的旧城，整个湖区被列为世界遗产，一座又一座的人类遗产以及保护得十分完好的中世纪小城，路上镶嵌着一块块的石板，每个小镇、小城都就有多处喷泉。传统的房屋建筑和摩登新颖的店家，交织成一处处美轮美奂的奇妙体验。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Leman, straddles Switzerland and France and is an important lake of Western Europe, as well as a famous scenic area and health resort. By day you can take a cruise to tour Lake Geneva, and at night be intoxicated by the flickering neon lights along the shore; luxury cruise ships often hold concerts or dances on the lake surface. You can take a cruise to enjoy the beautiful scenery along the shore of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, snow mountains and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Jet d'Eau is located on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden and is one of Geneva's more representative sights. The Jet d'Eau is like a column of water spouted by a whale, 140 meters high with a water output of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far in the city center. At night there is also a chance to see the Jet d'Eau under illumination, which is even more grand.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦较具代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous attraction in Geneva. Switzerland is known as the "garden country," and at the same time the "land of watches and clocks." Even more wondrous is that Switzerland's skilled craftsmen ingeniously combined the beauty of flowers with the manufacturing craft of clocks, originally creating the "Flower Clock."
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称“花园之国”，同时又是“钟表之乡”，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了“花钟”。

attractions.text_en: The upper town on the slope of the right bank of the Rhone, because of its higher terrain, is also called the upper town by local residents. It is not only a gathering place of churches and historic sites; in the winding alleys there are also many small, lovely antique shops, and the former residence of Rousseau, the thinker of the European Enlightenment, is also located in the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

overview.text_en:
In the morning visit the Louvre Museum, the pride of France, when a French National Gallery interpreter will give an in-depth explanation on selected themes;
in the afternoon head to tour Notre-Dame de Paris, Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine river cruise to view the Hotel des Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), Place de la Concorde and other places, touring the sights of central Paris all day.
Overnight: Mercure Paris or Novotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: [Because of the Louvre's visitor-flow limits, especially in peak season restricting guides from giving explanations inside the museum, the in-museum interpretation fee of 10 euros per guest will then be refunded]
overview.text_zh:
上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，届时、将由法兰西国家馆讲解师，精选主题深度讲解；
下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛，埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地参观，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：【由于罗浮宫限流、特别是旺季限制讲解员在馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费10欧元/每位游客】

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris or Novotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
The Mercure Paris or Novotel is a comfortable four-star hotel under the Accor brand, located near a large shopping mall, convenient for guests to dine and shop. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it provides you with a comfortable stay, deriving from distinctive brand characteristics: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a unique hotel style deeply infused with local character, and an enthusiastic management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店。
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型四星酒店，酒店位于大型商超附近，方便客人有餐购物，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
Take a Seine river cruise, feel the gentleness and romance of Paris
Aboard the famous transparent-cabin "Bateaux Mouches" cruise sailing along the Seine, which blends many attractions; the 3.2-kilometer voyage of about 1 hour passes Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Elysees, the Ile de la Cite and other famous sights. On the surface of the Seine, feel Paris's romantic night, the beautiful scenery and wonderful music; it is called "a not-to-be-missed in-depth tour of Paris."
highlights.text_zh:
乘塞纳河游船，感受巴黎的温柔与浪漫
乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西黛岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》

attractions.text_en: It is one of the world's oldest museums and a world-famous treasure house of art. The Louvre building is U-shaped, divided into a new and an old part. The glass pyramid entrance in front of the Louvre was designed by the Chinese-American architectural master I. M. Pei. Here are treasured over 400,000 art treasures, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing artworks from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria and Rome to medieval Europe and the various countries of the East, and it can be called an outstanding palace of art in human history. The itinerary includes ordinary individual-visitor tickets (without Chinese audio guide).
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品、其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。 行程包含普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。

attractions.text_en: If the Louvre witnessed the glory of the Gauls, then the Ile de la Cite, Notre-Dame de Paris and the Paris City Hall wrote down their indissoluble bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Ile de la Cite. Without the Ile de la Cite, there would be no Paris of today.
attractions.text_zh: 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: The Cathedral of Notre-Dame de Paris sits on the Ile de la Cite in the center of Paris and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The church is in the Gothic style, and visitors can climb the towers to visit; although you won't meet the "Hunchback of Notre-Dame," you can see the 17th-century great bell, get close to the mythical beasts on the church's outer walls, and overlook the beautiful scenery of the Ile de la Cite and the Seine.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西岱岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，游客可以登上塔楼参观，虽然遇不到“钟楼怪人”，但却能看到17世纪的大钟、近距离接触教堂外壁上的神兽、俯瞰西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the landmark of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en:
The Champ de Mars is a large strip-shaped park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the Ecole Militaire (Paris Military School) to its southeast.
Before the second half of the 18th century, this was an abandoned vacant lot; only after the Military School was established in 1765 did its status gradually rise, when the main purpose was to use it as a place for military training. On July 17, 1791, during the French Revolution, a massacre with bloodshed once occurred here. Later France used this venue to host several World's Fairs as well as the 1900 Olympic Games.
attractions.text_zh:
战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。
在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次的世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。

overview.text_en:
In the morning head to Paris's fashion center, Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, to freely visit the Paris Opera (exterior) and the fashion districts of Printemps, Galeries Lafayette and others.
In the afternoon head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris to tour the Palace of Versailles; return to Place d'Italie in Paris to conclude this wonderful itinerary.
overview.text_zh:
上午前往前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货，巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。
下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫；返回巴黎意大利广场结束美好行程。

accommodation.text_en: No accommodation today
accommodation.text_zh: 当天无住宿

highlights.text_en:
Stroll along Boulevard Haussmann in Paris
Boulevard Haussmann is not in Paris's bustling area, yet it comes alive because of two famous department stores: France's department store Galeries Lafayette and Printemps, famous for its home-decor boutiques. You can stroll alone and feel the living atmosphere of Boulevard Haussmann; or, together with a few friends, walk through Boulevard Haussmann and enjoy the delight of shopping.
highlights.text_zh:
漫步巴黎奥斯曼大街
奥斯曼大街不在巴黎繁华的区域内，却因为2幢著名的百货公司而生动起来：法国的百货公司———老佛爷百货(GaleriesLafayette)及以家饰精品著称的春天百货(Printemps)。你可以独自漫步，感受奥斯曼大道的生活气息；也可以与三五好友一起，穿行在奥斯曼大街上，享受购物的欣喜。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the period of France's feudal rule. In terms of content, it was not only the French court, but also the administrative center of the state, and the concrete embodiment of the political views and lifestyle of French society at the time. It was the first time since the ancient Roman Empire that Europe had shown the power of an absolutist regime capable of concentrating such enormous manpower, material resources and finances. At the time, in order to build it, Louis XIV mobilized over thirty thousand workers as well as architects, engineers and technicians; besides having to solve the complex technical problems arising from constructing a large-scale building complex, they also had to solve problems in all aspects such as water supply and roads. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully proves the progress of France's economy and technology at the time and the wisdom of the laboring people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来，第一次表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann is located between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are the two great department stores of Paris, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, author of "In Search of Lost Time," once completed most of the writing of "In Search of Lost Time" in his residence at number 102 of this street.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en: The Paris Opera was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861 and is a consummate work of eclecticism; its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms such as ancient Greco-Roman colonnades and Baroque. Grand in scale, exquisite and meticulous, resplendent and magnificent, it is hailed as a theater where painting, marble and gilding shine on one another, giving people great enjoyment. It is one of the typical buildings of Napoleon III.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎歌剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，是折衷主义登峰造极的作品，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受。是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。

overview.text_en:
After being picked up in downtown Reykjavik or at Keflavik International Airport, you will pass through the Fagradalsfjall volcanic valley, taking in by car the lava remnants left after the Fagradalsfjall volcanic eruption. Next, you will visit Seljalandsfoss, a rainbow waterfall like a bride's veil, feeling the refreshing spray and majestic grandeur of its 60-meter drop. Afterwards, you will head to the Black Sand Beach to experience an apocalyptic emptiness, with an overnight stay in Vik (the church town).
Note: Due to the unpredictability of active volcanoes, our agency cannot make any judgment regarding the tour of the Fagradalsfjall volcano, especially the instability of the Meradalir magma fissure, which causes the Fagradalsfjall volcano group to be either too stable or too frequently active. If Route 427 has not been announced as closed, you will be able to see the vast lava field remnants formed during the volcanic eruption period (new lava flowing into old lava and remnants of geothermal activity). Please note that this product is not a professional geological expedition tour, and therefore this attraction is not equipped with a professional hiking guide.
Risk warning notice: The Black Sand Beach is a high-risk area where multiple drowning accidents have occurred due to sudden huge waves.
Huge wave risk warning: The calm sea surface may at any time, without any warning, raise sudden huge waves.
Slippery ground warning: The black basalt sand has become extremely slippery from being washed by seawater over a long period.
Safety rules: Do not linger beneath the cliffs at high tide, to avoid being trapped. Watch your footing while walking to avoid slipping; people with limited mobility and the elderly should not approach the Black Sand Beach. Do not climb the slippery rocks and basalt columns, do not approach the waves, and do not take photos with your back to the sea. Do not cross the fences, and do not ignore the red/yellow warning lights. Do not linger during bad weather or at high tide.
overview.text_zh:
雷克雅未克市区或 凯夫拉维克国际机场 接机后， 途径法格拉达尔火山峡谷，车览法格拉达尔火山喷发后的熔岩遗迹，随后游览塞里雅兰瀑布，游览如同新娘面纱的彩虹瀑布，感受60米落差带来的清凉水花和恢弘气势。随后前往黑沙滩，感受末日般的空旷，夜宿教堂城。
备注：由于活火山的不可预测性，我社无法对法格拉达尔火山的游览做任何判断，特别是Meradalir岩浆裂缝的不稳定性导致法格拉达尔火山群过于稳定或过于频发，如427公路未宣布封闭， 将能看到火山喷发期间形成的广阔熔岩区遗迹（新熔岩流入旧熔岩和地热活动遗迹），请注意本产品并非专业地质探险团，因此该景点并未配备专业徒步向导。
风险提示函：黑沙滩为高风险区域，多次发生因突发巨浪而溺水事故。
巨浪风险提示：平静的海面随时会毫无征兆地掀起突发性巨浪。
湿滑地面提示：黑色玄武岩砂被海水长期冲刷变得极为湿滑。
安全守则：禁止在潮汐高位时在悬崖下逗留，以防被困。行走时注意脚下避免滑倒，行动不便者及老人请勿靠近黑沙滩，禁止攀爬湿滑的岩石和玄武岩柱，禁止靠近海浪、禁止背对大海拍照。 禁止越过围栏、禁止无视红色/黄色警示灯。禁止在恶劣天气或潮位高时逗留。

accommodation.text_en: Hotel Loki Iceland or an equivalent three- to four-star hotel. The hotel is located at the foot of the famous Eyjafjallajokull volcano in southern Iceland, offering views of the Eyjafjallajokull ice cap and the Kirkjubaejarklaustur national park. The hotel has open, wide views and beautiful scenery, far from light pollution, making it very suitable for admiring the aurora and the Milky Way starry sky. The modern rooms are built from eco-friendly materials, with a strong sense of design and a distinctive New Age of Sail architectural style, making it one of Iceland's newly emerging, famous, internet-popular scenic hotels.
accommodation.text_zh: 冰岛洛基酒店或同等级三到四星酒店 酒店位于冰岛南部著名的艾佛瑞维克火山脚下，享有埃亚菲亚德拉冰盖（Eyjafjallajökull）和基尔丘拜亚拉伊斯蒂（Kirkjubæjarklaustur）国家公园景色，酒店视野开阔，景色优美，远离杂光干扰，非常适合于欣赏极光和银河星空，环保材料建筑的现代化房间，非常具有设计感和独特的新航海时代建筑风格，为冰岛新晋的知名网红景观酒店。

attractions.text_en: Seljalandsfoss is right beside Iceland's Route 1, about 60 meters tall, and can be seen from far away on the road. The notable feature of Seljalandsfoss is that there is a walkable passage behind the water curtain, which is why it is also called the "bride's veil." In summer, you can follow a trail to walk to the back of the waterfall, which is great fun.
attractions.text_zh: 塞里雅兰瀑布就在 冰岛 一号公路的路边，高约60米，在路上远远就能看见。塞里雅兰瀑布显著的特色就是水幕后面有一条可以步行的通道 ，所以也被称为“新娘面纱”。在夏天，可以沿着一条步道走到瀑布的后方，非常有趣。

attractions.text_en: Skogafoss rainbow waterfall. Iceland has countless waterfalls, each with its own characteristics, but Skogafoss has a charm all its own. Located in southern Iceland, it is one of Iceland's magnificent waterfalls, with a width of 25 meters and a water drop of 60 meters. The momentum of the water rushing down is extremely spectacular, attracting many tourists to witness its splendor. The mountains on both sides of Skogafoss are covered with green vegetation, and the cliffs on either side enclose the waterfall in the middle; the white waterfall flow pairs perfectly with the surrounding green vegetation.
attractions.text_zh: Skogafoss彩虹瀑布 冰岛有无数的瀑布，每一个都各有特色，但是斯科加瀑布却独具魅力。它位于冰岛南部，是冰岛壮丽的瀑布之一，其宽度为25米，水流落差达60米，水流奔腾而下的气势非常壮观，吸引了很多游客来一睹它的风采。斯科加瀑布两旁的山上都长满了绿色的植物，两旁的山崖把瀑布包围在中间，白色的瀑布水流与周围的绿色植物搭配的恰到好处。

attractions.text_en: The otherworldly beauty of the basalt black sand beaches is unique to Iceland, and the boundless Reynisfjara black sand beach is absolutely one of the most beautiful among them. The rolling white waves of the Atlantic and the jet-black volcanic sand form a dreamlike color contrast, while the giant basalt columns standing amid the surging waves and the mysterious black sand beach complement each other delightfully. As early as 1991, National Geographic listed Reynisfjara black sand beach as one of the world's top ten non-tropical beaches worth visiting. Every summer, that is from May to August, tens of thousands of puffins also come to settle in the Reynisfjara black sand beach area. The puffins' adorable, lovable demeanor is endearing, and visitors have the chance to observe their cute poses up close, but always remember not to try to touch them, not to disturb their normal habitation, and not to damage their habitat. Fierce Arctic terns, as well as birds such as fulmars and seagulls, will also circle freely above the Reynisfjara black sand beach.
