Many marine creatures also call Iceland home; seals, whales, and dolphins may suddenly appear amid the stormy waves of the Atlantic.
attractions.text_zh: 玄武岩黑沙滩的异世之美为冰岛特有，一望无垠的雷尼斯黑沙滩绝对是其中美丽的一座。大西洋的滚滚白浪与黝黑火山砂石形成了梦幻般的色彩对比，于波涛中屹立的巨型玄武岩柱与神秘的黑沙滩相映成趣。早在1991年，《国家地理》就将雷尼斯黑沙滩列为世界十大值得游览的非热带沙滩之一。每年夏天，即5～8月，数以万计的海鹦还会来到雷尼斯黑沙滩地区栖居。海鹦憨态可掬的姿态惹人喜爱，游客有机会近距离观赏它们的萌姿，但一定要记得不要尝试去触摸它们，也不要打扰它们正常的栖息、破坏其栖息地。凶悍的北极燕鸥以及暴风鹱、海鸥等鸟类也会在雷尼斯黑沙滩的上空自由盘旋。许多海洋生物也以冰岛为家，海豹、鲸鱼、海豚就有可能在大西洋的惊涛中陡然现身。

attractions.text_en: The Reynisdrangar basalt stacks tower amid the Atlantic Ocean, the remains of ancient sea cliffs. They are basalt sea stacks beneath Mount Reynisfjall, near the village of Vik i Myrdal in southern Iceland. The rock columns stand proudly amid the waves, facing the rock walls of Reynisfjall, with a unique mysterious wildness and grandeur. Many films and American TV series have been shot here, including the hugely popular Game of Thrones (A Song of Ice and Fire). On one side of the coast are towering basalt cliffs, beneath which the seawater has hollowed out a peculiar basalt column cave (Halsanefshellir). Giant basalt columns rise strikingly on the beach, which, after years of impact and erosion by the seawater, have formed unique columnar rocks. The neatly arranged basalt columns along the coast resemble the pipe organ in a church, solemn and dignified. The gloomy weather, the somber black sand beach, the masterfully crafted basalt columns, together with the low-roaring white waves, create a violent beauty on the brink of doomsday, making you can't help but wonder whether you have already arrived at the end of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 雷尼斯玄武岩矗立于大西洋中，是古时海崖的遗骸。是位于南部冰岛维克（VíkíMýrdal）村附近的雷尼斯山(Reynisfjall)下的玄武岩 海叠层。岩柱在海浪中傲然挺立，与雷尼斯山的岩壁相对而望，独有一份神秘的野性与壮美。许多电影与美剧都曾在此取景，其中就包括大热的《权力的游戏(冰与火之歌)》。海岸一侧则是高高的玄武岩石柱悬崖，悬崖下被海水掏空形成奇特的玄武岩柱洞穴(Halsanefshellir)。沙滩上赫然屹立着巨大的玄武岩石柱，经过海水多年的冲击、侵蚀，行成了独特的柱状岩石。海岸边整齐排列的玄武岩柱就像教堂里的管风琴一样，庄严肃穆。阴沉沉的天气，肃穆的黑沙滩和鬼斧神工的玄武岩柱，再加上低吼的白色海浪，有一种濒临末日的狂暴美感，让你不由自主的怀疑是否已经置身世界的尽头。

attractions.text_en: Fagradalsfjall Volcanic Valley Fagradalsfjall Valley (viewed by car or from a distance; it cannot be guaranteed that the volcano will produce any geological activity). The Fagradalsfjall volcano is located on the Mid-Atlantic Ridge, the tectonic boundary where the North American and Eurasian plates meet. This geological setting has made it a center of dynamic volcanic and geothermal activity. Although Fagradalsfjall erupted frequently in 2021, 2022, and 2024, the relatively gentle and predictable nature of the eruptions allows for safe observation from a distance. This has attracted tourists, geologists, and nature lovers to witness the spectacle of flowing lava and the raw power of nature. Government agencies will also close roads based on forecasts to ensure the safety of visitors and to protect the fragile volcanic environment.
attractions.text_zh: 法格拉达尔火山峡谷 Fagradalsfjall Valley（车游或远观，无法确保火山产生任何地质活动）法格拉达尔火山位于大西洋中脊是北美和欧亚板块交汇的构造边界。 这种地质环境成为动态火山和地热活动的中心。虽然2021、2022和2024年法格拉达尔火山频繁爆发，喷发相对温和且可预测的性质允许从远处安全观察。 这吸引了游客、地质学家和自然爱好者来目睹熔岩流动的奇观和大自然的原始力量。 政府机构也会根据预测情况封闭道路，以确保游客的安全和保护脆弱的火山环境。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, set out from the hotel to visit Fjadrargljufur Canyon, then head to the glacier lagoon scenic area to tour the glacier lagoon and Diamond Beach, experience the glacier lagoon amphibious boat, and get up close to the glacier ice. Afterwards, head to the lobster town of Hofn, with an overnight stay in Hofn.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，从酒店出发前往羽毛峡谷参观，随后前往冰河湖景区，游览冰河湖与钻石沙滩，体验冰河湖两栖船，近距离接触冰河冰川，随后前往龙虾镇——霍芬，夜宿霍芬。

accommodation.text_en: Hofn Hotel Hofgardar (Glacier Hotel) or an equivalent three- to four-star hotel. The hotel is located at the Hofn harbor dock, making it convenient to reach Iceland's legendary lobster restaurant in the fishing village (Humarhofnin). The natural scenery surrounding the hotel is unparalleled; here the magnificent power of the Vatnajokull glacier flows into Hornafjordur fjord, and beneath the splendid scenic line of Skaftafell mountain, the beauty of snow mountains, ice beaches, and fjords converges. The town of Hofn, with the symbolism of the "moon," corresponds to Reykjavik.
accommodation.text_zh: 霍芬博加亚冰酒店或同等级三到四星酒店 酒店位于霍芬海港码头，方便前往冰岛传奇龙虾店渔村餐厅（Humarhofnin）。酒店周边自然景观无与伦比，在这里瓦特纳冰川的磅礴力量流动到霍尔纳峡湾（Hornafjördur），在斯卡夫塔山壮美的风景线下汇集雪山、冰滩、与峡湾的美景，霍芬镇更是因“月亮”的象征而与雷克雅未克对应。

highlights.text_en:
Glacier lagoon amphibious boat
Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon was formed by the melting of the Vatnajokull glacier, and the lagoon is filled with icebergs of all shapes and sizes. Viewed from every direction, this paradise-like environment is breathtaking, surrounded by blue icebergs of varying shapes and structures, with the glacier-carved ice tongue ahead. While cruising in the ice lagoon, watch out for the seals in the lagoon. Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon is home to these little creatures, and the scenes of seals frolicking in the water and basking in the sun on the ice are heartwarming and adorable. Cruise the extraordinarily beautiful Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon by boat, weaving among the giant ice blocks, taking in the lagoon's renowned ice scenery, and experiencing a world of ice. The English-speaking guide on board will explain in detail the relevant knowledge of the ice lagoon area, introducing its history and future development. You will also have the chance to taste ice blocks that carry thousands of years of time, gaining an unforgettable and unique experience.
highlights.text_zh:
冰河湖两栖船
杰古沙龙冰河湖由瓦特纳冰川（Vatnajokull）融化形成，湖中布满了各种形状和大小的冰山。从四面八方看去，这世外桃源般的环境都令人叹为观止，周围是形状和结构各异的蓝色冰山，前方是冰川雕刻而成的冰舌。在冰湖中畅游时，注意留心湖中的海豹。杰古沙龙冰河湖就是这些小生物的家园，海豹在水中嬉戏、在冰块上晒太阳的场景都十分温馨可爱。乘船畅游美丽非凡的杰古沙龙冰河湖（Jökulsárlón glacier lagoon），在巨型冰块间穿梭，饱览冰湖闻名遐迩的冰之胜景，体验一个冰的世界。船上的英文导游将为您详细讲解冰湖地区的相关知识，介绍其历史与未来发展。您还有机会品尝冰湖中承载了千年岁月的冰块，收获难忘的独特体验。

attractions.text_en: Fjadrargljufur Canyon is located in southeastern Iceland, 100 meters deep and about 2 kilometers long, with steep rock walls on both sides, narrow and winding. Its origin can be traced back to the cold period of the Ice Age about two million years ago. The canyon was created through gradual erosion of the palagonite rock by rocks and glacial running water over thousands of years. A waterfall flows down from the western side of the canyon and can be seen from the observation platform at the end of the hike one mile to the east. The Fjadra river flows through it; the water originates from Mount Geirlandshraun, rushing down along the cliff walls within the canyon and falling into the Skafta river. Today, the river water is not deep, and visitors can hike through the canyon, though sometimes they may need to wade forward. Deep within the canyon, if you encounter a waterfall, you need to retrace your steps. So many people choose to overlook and admire the canyon's wonders along the walking path on the upper edge of the canyon.
attractions.text_zh: 羽毛峡谷位于冰岛东南部，深100米，长约2公里，两侧是陡峭的岩壁，狭窄而弯曲，它的起源可以追溯到大约两百万年前的冰河时期的寒冷时期。峡谷创建通过逐步侵蚀由通过岩石和冰川流水橙玄玻璃上千年。瀑布从峡谷的西侧流下来，从东边一英里的远足结束时的观察平台可以看到。Fjaðrá河穿流而过，水流源自Geirlandshraun山，在峡谷里沿崖壁奔流而下，掉入Skaftá河。如今，河水已并不深，游客可徒步穿行在峡谷中，但有时会需要蹚水前进。深入到峡谷里，遇到瀑布的话，需要原路折返。所以很多人选择在峡谷的上方边缘沿着步行道俯瞰观赏峡谷奇观。

attractions.text_en: The lagoon is dotted with thousand-year-old floating ice of various shapes. This is an ice lagoon that can be admired right from the roadside; besides white, the floating ice here also appears in blue, green, as well as gray and brown colors formed by the mixing of volcanic ash. You will have ample time to admire and photograph up close, and if you are lucky you may also see sea lions basking in the sun in groups. The distant glacier looks as if it has been enchanted by the sky; what previously seemed like water flowing down from the glacier instantly all freezes into ice, as if time has stopped still at that moment.
attractions.text_zh: 湖里漂浮着形态各异的千年浮冰。这是一个可以在路边就能观赏的冰湖，除了白色，这里的浮冰还呈现出蓝色、绿色、以及由于火山灰的掺杂而形成的灰色、棕色。您有充分的时间在此近距离观赏拍摄，运气好的话还可以看到成群结队晒太阳的海狮。远处的冰川犹如被天空施加了魔法，之前还像是从冰川上流下的水，顷刻间却全冻结成了冰，时间仿佛停在那刻静止了一样。

attractions.text_en: The town of Hofn is one of the few fishing ports on Iceland's eastern coastline, so many fishing boats from the North Atlantic dock here repeatedly, which has given rise to Hofn's thriving deep-sea fishing industry. Here there are more abundant marine products than in other fishing ports, especially the Norway lobster (Nephrops lobster); due to its cold-water growth and wild-catch nature, the vast majority of lobsters are landed at Hofn town, so the quantity, quality, and freshness of the lobsters here are all impeccable. Among these, the lobster festival held between June and July each year pushes the local gourmet atmosphere to even greater heights. The "Moon" sculpture by Icelandic artist Ragne here indicates that this city is another center corresponding to Reykjavik.
attractions.text_zh: 霍芬镇是冰岛东部海岸线少数的渔港之一，因此北大西洋的很多渔船都会再次停靠，也造就了霍芬蓬勃发展的远洋渔业，这里有比其他渔港更为丰富的海洋产品，特别是挪威海龙虾 （Nephrops lobster），由于冷水生长，野生捕捞的原因，绝大多数的龙虾都是从赫本镇上岸，所以这里的龙虾数量和品质，以及新鲜程度都是完好的。其中每年6月到7月之间的龙虾节，更是将这里的美食气氛推向更高，冰岛艺术家Ragne在这里的《月亮》雕塑表明，这个城市是与雷克雅未克相对的另外一个中心。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, set out from the hotel to visit Vestrahorn, then go to visit the basalt grand canyon. Overnight stay in the town of Egilsstadir.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，从酒店出发前往西角山参观，前往参观玄武岩大峡谷。夜宿 埃伊尔斯塔迪尔镇 。

accommodation.text_en: Hotel Hofgardar (Egilsstadir) or an equivalent three- to four-star hotel. The hotel is located in the town of Egilsstadir in eastern Iceland, surrounded by verdant fields and tranquil lakes; lift your eyes and you'll see heart-stirring Nordic scenery, where nature and the small town's warm human touch blend perfectly, and you can step out the door to begin a soul-healing stroll. The restaurant features fresh local ingredients, with homemade berry jams and syrups, as well as fresh salads and vegetables; one bite makes your taste buds cheer.
accommodation.text_zh: 赫德博加亚酒店或同等级三到四星酒店 酒店坐落于冰岛东部埃伊尔斯塔迪尔镇，周围尽是青翠原野与宁静湖泊，抬眼便是让人怦然心动的北欧风光，自然与小镇的烟火气完美融合，出门就能开启一场治愈身心的漫步。餐厅主打新鲜当地食材，自制的浆果果酱、糖浆，还有新鲜沙拉、蔬菜，一口下去，味蕾欢呼。

highlights.text_en: Vestrahorn is one of the natural attractions in Iceland most beloved by photographers; the distinct, layered, sharp peaks are reflected in the tranquil bay at the foot of the mountain, and its scenery is incomparably enchanting. In summer, under the illumination of the midnight sun, Vestrahorn's scenery appears even more gentle; in winter, the aurora often quietly appears above the mountain peaks. Vestrahorn was also one of the filming locations for the Indian Bollywood film "Dil Dhadakne Do." The black sand beach at the foot of Vestrahorn and the Norwegian Sea form a stunningly beautiful natural scene.
highlights.text_zh: 西角山深受摄影师喜爱的冰岛自然景点之一，层次分明的山峰尖角倒影于山脚的宁静海湾中，其景色无比迷人。夏季时有午夜阳光的照射，西角山风光更显温柔；冬季时，则时常有北极光在山峰之顶悄然现身。西角山也曾是印度宝莱坞电影《慷慨的心》的取景地之一。西角山脚下的黑沙滩与挪威海构成一幅美轮美奂的天然景色。

attractions.text_en: Vestrahorn, also known as Batman Mountain, is 454 meters tall, with a history of 8 to 10 million years, and is one of the few gabbro mountain ranges in Iceland. Vestrahorn is located 12 kilometers east of Hofn town and is a must-visit place for photography enthusiasts. Here there is a dreamlike, surreal scene; the handsome, steep mountains rise above the boundless black sand beach, and that stunning sight is unforgettable. There are two Icelandic mountains beloved by photographers: Kirkjufell on the Snaefellsnes peninsula, and Vestrahorn beside Hofn town. Because it is not on the regular tour routes, the vast majority of tourists have never seen the true face of Vestrahorn, and can only admire this highly recognizable, uniquely shaped wondrous mountain in photographers' works.
attractions.text_zh: 西角山又称蝙蝠山，高454米，有800万至1000万年的历史，是冰岛为数不多的辉长岩山脉之一。西角山位于霍芬镇以东12公里处，是摄影爱好者的必去之处。这里有着梦幻般的超现实场景，俊美陡峭的山脉耸立在一望无际的黑沙滩上，那种震撼的景象让人过目不忘。摄影师喜爱的冰岛山川有两座－斯奈山半岛的草帽山，和霍芬镇旁的西角山。而因为不在常规旅行团线路内，绝大部分游客，都未曾见过西角山的真面目，只能在摄影师的作品中去欣赏这座辨识力高、造型独特的奇山。

attractions.text_en: The basalt grand canyon is located in the Jokuldalur valley in eastern Iceland and is one of Iceland's newly emerging "internet-famous attractions." The spectacular, giant hexagonal basalt columns are uniform and sharply defined, towering high on both sides of the rushing glacial river, creating an open and magnificent scene. The color of the water changes with the seasons. From March to July, the river water appears a beautiful blue-green, but as the nearby glacial meltwater rises, by late summer the color of the river water turns to the pale gray characteristic of glacial rivers.
attractions.text_zh: 玄武岩大峡谷坐落于冰岛东部的约屈尔河谷内，是冰岛新晋的“网红景点”之一。壮观的巨型六棱玄武岩柱整齐划一、棱角分明，高高耸立于湍急冰川河的两侧，景象开阔而壮观。水的颜色随季节而变化。从三月到七月，河水呈现美丽的蓝绿色，但随着附近冰川融水的上升，到了夏末，河水的颜色会变成冰川河流特有的浅灰色。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, head to the Krafla volcano to visit, then go to the Lake Myvatn hot springs to experience the Myvatn hot springs, afterwards tour the Dimmuborgir lava field, and then head to Godafoss. Overnight stay in Akureyri.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，前往克拉夫拉火山参观，之后前往米湖温泉体验米湖温泉，随后游览黑暗城堡熔岩群，随后前往众神瀑布。夜宿阿克雷里。

accommodation.text_en: Akureyri Hotel or an equivalent three- to four-star hotel. The hotel is located in the center of Akureyri, in a superior geographical location; step out the door and you can feel the city's lively atmosphere. It is adjacent to the Eyjafjordur fjord and Akureyri's landmark church, and you can also easily gaze at the distant snow mountains and fjord. The rooms feature a Nordic minimalist style, full of wood elements, warm and comfortable.
accommodation.text_zh: 阿克雷里酒店或同等级三到四星酒店 酒店位于阿克雷里市中心，地理位置优越，出门就能感受城市的烟火气，毗邻埃亚菲厄泽峡湾及阿克雷里地标教堂，还能轻松眺望远处的雪山与峡湾。房间主打北欧简约风，木质元素满满，温馨又舒适。

attractions.text_en: The Krafla volcano is located in the Lake Myvatn area of northern Iceland; its geological form is a caldera (also called a collapse crater) and it is part of the Krafla volcanic system. Krafla is one of Iceland's frequently erupting volcanoes, with 29 recorded eruptions since Iceland was first settled.
attractions.text_zh: 克拉夫拉火山位于冰岛北部的米湖地区，地质形态属破火山口(也称陷落火山口)，是克拉夫拉火山系统的一部分。克拉夫拉火山是冰岛喷发频繁的火山之一，自冰岛有人定居以来，已有29次喷发记录。

attractions.text_en: In Icelandic culture, lava caves are often considered the dwelling places of the legendary trolls. The Dimmuborgir lava field is one of the important filming locations of the hugely popular American TV series Game of Thrones (A Song of Ice and Fire); Mance Rayder's wildling camp was filmed at the wintertime Dimmuborgir. A Norwegian heavy metal band is also named after Dimmuborgir: Dimmu Borgir.
attractions.text_zh: 在冰岛文化中，熔岩洞穴常被认为是传说中的巨魔的栖居地，黑暗城堡熔岩群是大热美剧《权力的游戏(冰与火之歌)》的重要取景地之一，曼斯·雷德的野人阵营就取景于冬季的黑暗城堡。一支挪威重金属乐队也以黑暗城堡为名：Dimmu Borgir。

attractions.text_en: Godafoss in northeastern Iceland sits atop Iceland's fourth-largest river, Skjalfandafljot, and is one of the most popular waterfalls in Iceland among tourists. Because of the waterfall's connection to Iceland's religious history, this mythical waterfall is all the more beautiful and moving. Godafoss is one of Iceland's most representative natural treasures, located in the northeastern region of Iceland. It is part of Iceland's fourth-largest river Skjalfandafljot, exquisitely beautiful and with a long history. Godafoss is arc-shaped, about 30 meters wide with a drop of 12 meters, flowing into a tranquil, picturesque pool.
attractions.text_zh: 冰岛东北部的众神瀑布，坐落于冰岛第四大河流Skjálfandafljót之上，是受游客欢迎的冰岛瀑布之一。由于该瀑布与冰岛宗教历史的渊源，这座神话般的瀑布更加美丽动人。众神瀑布是冰岛具代表性的自然宝藏之一，位于冰岛东北部地区。它是冰岛第四大河Skjalfandafljot的一部分，美不胜收，历史悠久。众神瀑布呈弧形，宽约30米，落差12米，汇入宁静如画的水潭。

attractions.text_en: The Myvatn hot springs (Myvatn Nature Baths) are located in the Lake Myvatn scenic area of northern Iceland, about two kilometers from the small town of Reykjahlid, and are one of Iceland's popular geothermal hot spring experience spots. The Myvatn hot springs are built around a large lagoon, with the spring water temperature maintained year-round at 36 to 40 degrees Celsius. The spring water is rich in minerals such as sulfur, with notable effects in improving respiratory and skin problems.
attractions.text_zh: 米湖温泉(Mývatn Nature Baths)位于冰岛北部的米湖景区，距离雷恰利兹小镇(Reykjahlíð)两公里左右，是冰岛热门的地热温泉体验地之一。米湖温泉围绕一座大型潟湖而建，温泉水温常年维持在36～40摄氏度。温泉富含硫等矿物质，对改善呼吸道及皮肤问题有显著效果。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, set out for the Whale Church, then head to Stykkisholmur for sightseeing; afterwards, head to Kirkjufell (Church Mountain) for sightseeing, then to the internet-famous red-roofed church, with an overnight stay in Hellissandur.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，出发前往鲸鱼教堂，随后前往斯蒂基斯霍尔米游览，结束后前往教会山游览，前往网红红顶教堂，夜宿海德利桑德。

accommodation.text_en: Hellissandur Adventure Hotel or an equivalent three- to four-star hotel. The hotel is located in Hellissandur, surrounded by black sand beaches and volcanic remnants, truly a real-life end of the world. Not far out the door is the stunning scene of surging waves crashing against the black sand; any random snapshot turns out picture-perfect. The hotel rooms blend comfort and local character just right, with stone and wood elements everywhere, full of wilderness style. Avoid the crowds and enjoy Iceland's magnificent scenery all to yourself.
accommodation.text_zh: 海德利桑德冒险酒店或同等级三到四星酒店 酒店位于海德利桑德，四周被黑色沙滩、火山遗迹环绕，堪称现实版的世界尽头。出门没多远，就是汹涌海浪拍打着黑沙的震撼场景，随便一拍都出片。酒店房间把舒适和当地特色融合得恰到好处，石头、木材元素随处可见，满满的旷野风。避开人群，独享冰岛的壮丽美景。

attractions.text_en: The mailbox lighthouse, the volcano museum, and Stykkisholmur Cathedral. The small town once "played" Greenland in the film The Secret Life of Walter Mitty, becoming a must-visit place for many film fans coming to Iceland. The town has a strangely shaped church, and on a small island by the harbor there is an adorable little red lighthouse, a great place for a bird's-eye view of the whole town.
attractions.text_zh: 邮筒灯塔、火山博物馆、斯蒂基斯霍尔米大教堂.小镇曾在电影《白日梦想家》中“扮演”格陵兰，成为了很多电影迷来冰岛的必去之地。小镇上有造型奇异的教堂，港口边的小岛上有一个萌萌的红色小灯塔，是鸟瞰全镇的好地方。

attractions.text_en: The Snaefellsnes peninsula is a recognized photography paradise in Iceland. From Icelandic, the mountain's name is translated as "Church Mountain," but because this mountain is shaped like a straw hat, more people call it Straw Hat Mountain. Kirkjufell has an elevation of about 460 meters. As for getting to the classic photography spot, you need to walk five minutes along the path from the parking area across the road from Kirkjufell, cross the bridge to the other side of the waterfall, and use the Kirkjufell waterfall as the foreground.
attractions.text_zh: 斯奈山半岛是冰岛公认的摄影胜地，从冰岛语将山的名称翻译为“教会山”，但是由于这座山的形状像草帽，因此更多人叫它草帽山。草帽山海拔约460米。关于前往摄影经典机位，需要从教会山马路对面的停车区域沿路径走五分钟，过桥到瀑布到另一边，以教会山瀑布为前景。

attractions.text_en: Why is the image used in all computer optometry instruments the one with a highway, a small house, and a hot air balloon? This small house is located in Hellissandur, Iceland; in fact, it is actually a church. The church was built in 1903 and is a church constructed of cement. Every summer, lupines bloom in profusion all over the hills around the church, especially enchanting under the midnight sun. This church is also a popular spot for photographers to take pictures and for tourists to take commemorative group photos.
attractions.text_zh: 为什么所有电脑验光仪里面使用的都是那幅图一条公路一个小房子一个气球的，这个小房子位于冰岛的海德利桑德（Hellissandur），其实本体是一个教堂。教堂建于 1903 年， 是以水泥建造的教堂。每年夏季，教堂周围都会绽放漫山遍野的鲁冰花，在午夜阳光下尤其令人醉心。这座教堂也是摄影师拍照与游客合影留念的热门景点。

attractions.text_en: The official name of Iceland's Whale Church is "Blonduos Church," but because of its dark appearance and a form resembling a whale bending down over the ground, it has also earned the nickname "Whale Church." This church is located in the town of Blonduos in northwestern Iceland. Its architectural concept derives from the appearance of an Icelandic volcanic eruption, with a wall that rises up, very much like the upturned tail fin of a whale; the design is avant-garde and full of a sense of design. The church's exterior wall is black, harmonizing seamlessly with Iceland's black sand beaches and black rocks.
attractions.text_zh: 冰岛鲸鱼教堂的官方名称是“布伦迪欧斯教堂”，由于外观黝黑，造型宛如鲸鱼俯身于地面，因此又有“鲸鱼教堂”的称号。这座教堂位于冰岛西北部城镇 Blonduos，建筑概念源自于冰岛火山喷山时的模样，有个飞起来的墙，非常像鲸鱼翘起来的尾翼，造型前卫、设计感十足。教堂的外墙是黑色，和冰岛的黑沙滩、黑石头没有违和感。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, head to the black pebble beach, then to Arnarstapi for sightseeing, after which visit the Black Church and Seal Beach. Afterwards, head to downtown Reykjavik to freely tour the capital's landmark buildings such as Hallgrimskirkja (Reykjavik Cathedral), Harpa Concert Hall, the Pearl (Perlan), and to stroll by Lake Tjornin, etc., or you may freely choose to go whale watching out at sea. Overnight stay in Reykjavik.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，前往黑卵石沙滩，随后前往阿尔纳斯塔皮游览，之后参观黑教堂和海豹沙滩。结束后前往雷克雅未克市区，自由游览首都地标性建筑雷克雅未克大教堂，哈帕音乐厅、珍珠楼、在托宁湖边漫步等或可自由选择出海观鲸，夜宿雷克雅未克。

accommodation.text_en: Central Plaza Hotel or an equivalent three- to four-star hotel. The hotel's location is excellent, right in the core area of the city center, surrounded by bustling commercial streets full of trendy shops and distinctive restaurants, where you can find your desired food within a few minutes' walk. At the same time, it is very close to the landmark Hallgrimskirkja Cathedral, reachable on foot, so you can experience Iceland's unique architectural aesthetics anytime, anywhere.
accommodation.text_zh: 中央广场酒店或同等级三到四星酒店 酒店位置堪称绝佳，就处在市中心的核心地段，周边满是热闹的商业街，潮流店铺、特色餐厅一应俱全，步行几分钟就能找到心仪的美食。同时，它距离标志性的哈尔格林姆斯大教堂也很近，徒步便能抵达，随时随地都能感受冰岛独特的建筑美学。

attractions.text_en: Arnarstapi is a small fishing village on the southern coastline of Iceland's Snaefellsnes peninsula; the ancient, elegant houses by the seaside and the bizarre sea-eroded rocks along the coast are the town's cultural and natural characteristics. Arnarstapi is a small town with a natural harbor; in the past it was a lively trading center, and now it attracts numerous travelers with its unique natural scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔纳斯塔皮(Arnarstapi)是冰岛斯奈山半岛南海岸线上的一座小渔村，海滨的古老优雅房屋与沿岸的奇诡海蚀岩石是小镇的人文与自然特色。阿尔纳斯塔皮是一座有天然港口的小镇，这里从前是个热闹的交易中心，现在则以独特的自然景观吸引众多旅客的到访。

attractions.text_en: The Budir Black Church bears witness to this village's former history. In 1701, after obtaining the bishop's permission, Bent Lauridtsend prepared to build a church in Budir. Regarding the choice of the church's location, it is said that an old woman suggested choosing a man to spin in place until dizzy, then shoot three arrows into the sky, and the landing point of the third arrow would be the site for building the church. The Black Church is a very popular proposal spot in Iceland, as well as a popular place to view the midnight sun and the aurora. The church underwent two renovations in the 1950s and 1980s, but retained its original Danish design style.
attractions.text_zh: 布迪尔黑教堂见证了这座村庄曾经的历史。1701年，Bent Lauridtsend在获得主教许可后，预备在布迪尔建造教堂。 有关教堂的选址，相传有一老妇提议，选一男人原地转圈直至晕眩，然后向天空发射三支箭，第三支箭的落点就是建教堂的地点。黑教堂是很受欢迎的冰岛求婚地点，以及观赏午夜阳光及北极光的热门地点，教堂在上世纪五十及八十年代经过两次修缮，但保持了其原始的丹麦设计风格。

attractions.text_en: Seal Beach is located on the Snaefellsnes peninsula in western Iceland, situated in the middle of the peninsula's southern coast. Its Chinese name very directly reveals the reason why it is so special: the numerous seals that inhabit here make this already very special golden sand beach even more special, making it one of the spots in Iceland for watching seals.
attractions.text_zh: 海豹沙滩位于冰岛西部的斯奈山半岛之上，坐落在半岛的南海岸中段。它的中文名称已经十分直接地揭示了它为何如此特别的原因，众多海豹在此栖息让这片本身就十分特殊的金色沙滩显得更加特别，成为了冰岛观看海豹的地点之一。

attractions.text_en: It is a multifunctional scenic spot converted from 6 giant hot water storage tanks, integrating water storage, a restaurant, a bar, an exhibition hall, and an observation deck, becoming a symbol of Reykjavik.
attractions.text_zh: 它是利用6个巨大的热水储存罐改建的集储水，餐厅，酒吧，展览馆和观景台等多功能风景点，成为雷克雅未克的象征。

attractions.name_en: Harpa Concert Hall and Conference Centre
attractions.name_zh: 哈帕音乐厅和会议中心
attractions.text_en: The Harpa Concert Hall and Conference Centre is located at the boundary of land and sea in Reykjavik, the capital of Iceland, and is Iceland's newest and largest integrated concert hall and conference center, designed jointly by design firms from Iceland and Denmark. Its inspiration comes from the mysterious aurora of Iceland's winter night sky and the shapes of volcanic rocks. The building's glass exterior resembles a giant kaleidoscope; thousands of irregular geometric glass bricks reflect myriad colors that put even the rainbow to shame, changing with the color of the sky and the seasons. This top-tier modern building is a venue in Reykjavik for enjoying music and holding important conferences.
attractions.text_zh: 哈帕音乐厅和会议中心位于冰岛首都雷克雅未克的海陆交界处，是冰岛最新最大的综合音乐厅、会议中心，由冰岛和丹麦的设计公司联合设计，其灵感来自冰岛冬季夜晚神秘莫测的夜幕极光和火山石的形状。建筑的玻璃外型好比一个巨大的万花筒，上千块不规则的几何玻璃砖随着天空的颜色和季节的变化反射出令彩虹都相形见绌的万千颜色。这座顶尖的现代化建筑是雷克雅未克欣赏音乐和举办重要会议的场所。

attractions.text_en: Reykjavik Cathedral is a landmark building of the city of Reykjavik. It is a famous church located in the center of Reykjavik, the capital of Iceland. The church has a novel design with a pipe-organ structure and is one of the tallest buildings in Iceland; you can take an elevator to the top floor to overlook the entire view of the capital. The interior of the church is snow-white, with simple decoration. Its foundation was laid in 1940, and it was basically completed in the late 1960s.
attractions.text_zh: 雷克雅未克大教堂是雷克雅未克市的地标性建筑。位于冰岛首都雷克雅未克市中心的一座著名教堂。教堂设计新颖，管风琴结构，是冰岛的最高建筑之一，可乘坐电梯上顶楼俯瞰首都全貌。教堂内部雪白，装饰简洁。于1940年奠基，于20世纪60年代末基本完工。

attractions.text_en: Lake Tjornin (Tjornin) sits peacefully in the heart of Reykjavik, lending the city an eternal composure and tranquility. On Lake Tjornin, waterfowl such as swans, terns, greylag geese, and ducks inhabit here whether winter or summer, and coming to feed the birds by Lake Tjornin has also become a great pleasure for Icelanders and tourists alike. In winter, a thick layer of ice forms on Lake Tjornin, allowing people to cross the lake surface entirely, and some Icelanders even play ball games on the ice.
attractions.text_zh: 托宁湖（Tjörnin）安然坐落在雷克雅未克的中心地带，赋予了这座城市永恒的从容与平静。托宁湖上，天鹅、燕鸥、灰雁、鸭子等水禽无论冬夏栖息于此，来托宁湖边喂鸟也成为了冰岛人与游人们的一大乐趣。冬季，托宁湖上会结上一层厚厚的冰，完全可以横穿湖面，甚至还有冰岛人在冰上踢球。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, head to Iceland's Golden Circle (Gullni hringurinn) - a must-do route of Iceland tourism; it includes three famous Icelandic attractions: Thingvellir National Park (Thingvellir National Park), the Geysir geothermal area (Geysir), and Gullfoss (Gullfoss). These attractions are scattered along a loop road, and therefore it is called the tourism Golden Circle; its magnificent scenery is unique to Iceland, and for this it is world-famous. Afterwards, pass through Reykjavik to be transferred to Keflavik International Airport for departure, finally ending the itinerary at the Blue Lagoon hot springs.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，前往冰岛黄金圈(Gullni hringurinn)-冰岛旅游的必游之路；它包含了冰岛三个有名的景点：辛格维利尔国家公园（Þingvellir National Park）、盖歇尔间歇泉区（Geysir）、黄金瀑布（Gullfoss），这些景点散布在一条环形的公路上，因此被称为旅游黄金圈，其壮丽的景观为冰岛所独有，因此而闻名世界。结束后途径雷克雅未克前往凯夫拉国际机场送机，最后蓝湖温泉结束行程。

accommodation.text_en: No accommodation on this day.
accommodation.text_zh: 当天无住宿

highlights.text_en: Iceland's Golden Circle has different charms in all four seasons; Iceland, so cold and ethereal, carries an innate unyieldingness in its bones. Feel its sternness, gentleness, and passion, and fall in love with every side, every second, every frame of Iceland. The Golden Circle is a very famous tourist route in southern Iceland and is the essence of an Iceland tour, composed of three major tourist attractions: Gullfoss, the Geysir geothermal area, and Thingvellir National Park. Gullfoss has tremendous momentum and spectacular scenery; the rushing water flows down with the momentum, with a drop of more than 50 meters, producing a deafening roar. In the sunlight, amid the rising water mist, droplets of water glittering with golden light are everywhere, and a bright rainbow looms faintly, as if the entire waterfall were made of gold. At the Geysir geothermal hot springs, scalding spring water bursts out everywhere, with heat pervading the air like smoke and mist; it is one of the world's famous geysers.
highlights.text_zh: 冰岛黄金圈四季都有不同的风采，如此冷酷又飘渺的冰岛，骨子里自带着一种桀骜，感受它的冷峻、温柔与热情，爱上冰岛的每一面、每一秒、每一帧。 黄金圈是冰岛南部非常知名的旅游路线，为冰岛游的精华所在，由三大旅游景点组成：黄金瀑布、盖歇尔间歇泉地热区和辛格维利尔国家公园。金瀑布气势宏大，景色壮观，湍急的水流顺势而下，落差达50多米，发出震耳欲聋的轰鸣。阳光下，在蒸腾的水雾中，布满闪着金光的点点水滴，亮艳的彩虹若隐若现，仿佛整个瀑布是用黄金造就。盖锡尔间歇喷泉到处冒出灼热的泉水，热气弥漫，如烟如雾，为世界著名的间歇泉之一。

attractions.text_en: The national park is one of Iceland's important historical sites. Thingvellir literally means "parliament plain"; the Icelandic parliament (Althingi) was established here in 930 AD and continued operating until 1798, making it the world's first democratic parliament. Thingvellir was declared a national park in 1930. On July 2, 2004, Thingvellir National Park was inscribed on UNESCO's World Cultural Heritage List. Thingvellir is also famous for its geological characteristics. Here, you can see the rift between the Eurasian and North American plates running through Iceland's land. Due to the continuous diverging movement of these two plates, the land between them keeps sinking, and here you can see the geological boundary between Europe and North America. Crustal movement causes this rift to continuously tear open and expand at a rate of several centimeters per year. Volcanic activity is frequent in the area around Thingvellir, with many newly formed lava fields, including some lava tunnels and volcanic caves. At Thingvellir National Park, you can not only learn about Iceland's important historical sites but also explore the natural wonders found everywhere here.
attractions.text_zh: 国家公园是冰岛重要的历史遗址之一。Þingvellir字面意思为“议会平原”，冰岛议会（Alþingi）于公元930年在此成立，并一直持续运作直至1798年，这是全世界的第一个民主议会。辛格维利尔于1930年被宣布成为国家公园。2004年7月2日，辛格维利尔国家公园被录入联合国教科文组织世界文化遗产名录。辛格维利尔也因其地质特色而出名。在这里，您可以看到穿过冰岛陆地的欧亚板块和北美版块间的裂缝。因这两个板块的持续背离运动，板块间的土地不断下沉，您在这里可以看到欧洲和北美地质上的边界。地壳运动使得这条裂缝每年以数厘米的速度不断张裂扩大。辛格维利尔周边地区火山活动频繁，有许多新形成的熔岩原，包括一些熔岩隧道和火山岩洞。在辛格维利尔国家公园您不仅能了解冰岛重要的历史遗址，也能探索这里俯拾即是的自然奇景。

attractions.text_en: The geothermal area around Geysir is a world-renowned geothermal area. The English word "geyser" originates from the Geysir geyser here; the English word "Geyser" is derived from the Icelandic word "Geysir." The Geysir geyser is located in Iceland's Haukadalur valley, and this geothermal area covers about 3 square kilometers. Most of the geothermal springs are scattered over a 100-meter-wide stretch of land, flowing in one direction along the plate boundary line, from south to southwest. The Great Geysir has long been dormant now, but its neighbor, the Strokkur geyser (Strokkur), is very active. Strokkur is currently one of Iceland's active geysers. It erupts every few minutes, sometimes shooting a column of scalding steam and water up to 40 meters high, though the general eruption height is between 10 and 20 meters. Each eruption lasts 1-2 minutes, with water temperatures up to more than 100 degrees. In this natural wonder, you can explore geothermal hot springs large and small, admire geothermal water gushing out of the ground, and breathe in the strong smell of sulfur in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 盖歇尔周围的地热区是举世闻名的地热区。英语中间歇泉一词源于这里的盖歇尔间歇泉，英文单词“Geyser”就是从冰岛语“Geysir”衍生而来。盖歇尔间歇泉坐落于冰岛Haukadalur山谷，这个地热区面积约3平方公里。大多数地热泉散布在100米宽的土地上，沿着板块交界线向一个方向流动，从南向西南。大盖歇尔间歇泉现在已久未喷发，但它的邻居史托克间歇泉（Strokkur）却十分活跃。史托克间歇泉是目前冰岛活跃的喷泉之一。它每隔几分钟喷发一次，有时滚烫的蒸汽水柱高达40米，不过一般喷发高度都在10-20米之间。每次喷发持续1-2分钟，水温高达100多度。在这片自然奇观中，您可以探访大大小小的地热温泉，欣赏地热水从地面喷涌而出，呼吸空气中浓烈的硫磺味。

attractions.text_en: Gullfoss is one of Iceland's well-known waterfalls and a natural attraction that no tourist coming to Iceland can miss; the origin of the name comes from the paraphrase of the Icelandic name "golden waterfall." Gullfoss's water source, Lake Hvitarvatn, is located on the southeast side of the Langjokull glacier, which is Iceland's second-largest volcanic ice cap after the Vatnajokull glacier. The glacial water flows from Langjokull glacier into the White River (Hvita); the broad White River rushes south for about one kilometer, then turns sharply to the left, plunging down a wide "three-tier staircase," then tilting down from the two enormous steps into a deep, profound canyon 32 meters (105 feet) deep, with the two tiers having drops of 11 meters and 22 meters respectively. The canyon fissure is about 20 meters wide and 2.5 kilometers long, facing the surging, plunging river water. For first-time visitors, due to the limited view of the valley, the waterfall may appear to plunge straight toward the center of the earth.
attractions.text_zh: 黄金瀑布是冰岛知名的瀑布之一，是每一个前来冰岛的游客都不能错过的自然景观，名字的由来源于冰岛语名称的意译“金色的瀑布”。黄金瀑布的水源Hvitarvatn湖位于朗格冰川（Langjokull）的东南侧，这是在冰岛仅次于瓦特纳冰川（Vatnajokull）第二大的火山冰盖。冰川水流从朗格冰川涌入白河（Hvita），宽阔的白河向南奔流大约一公里后，急转向左，冲下一个宽阔的“三级阶梯”，再从巨大的两个台阶上倾斜而下落入32米（105英尺）深的幽深峡谷中，两级落差分别达到11米和22米深。峡谷裂缝约20米宽，2.5公里长，正对着汹涌直下的河水。对于首次到访的人，由于山谷视野有限，瀑布可能看起来像是直冲向地心。

attractions.text_en: One of the more renowned cradles of Icelandic history and one of the birthplaces of Western political life, Thingvellir National Park is known as the site of "the world's oldest democratic parliament." The scenery here is beautiful: the movement of the Eurasian and North American plates has formed a rift valley with a drop of more than ten meters, and ancient volcanic activity tore the ground apart, leaving every visitor who stands upon it deeply awed. In 2004, Thingvellir National Park was inscribed by UNESCO on the World Heritage List. Standing here you can also gaze out over the vast Thingvellir plain and the beautiful Thingvallavatn lake (Parliament Lake), its water clear and mirror-still; the gently curving pools are calm and serene, making it hard to tear yourself away.
attractions.text_zh: 冰岛历史上较负盛名的的摇篮，也是西方国家政治发源地之一，素有"世界古老的民主议会会址"之称的辛格维利尔国家公园，在这里风景优美，欧亚和美洲两大板块运动形成十余米落差的断裂谷地，古老的火山运动将地面撕裂，让每一个踏在上面的游客都震撼不已。2004年辛格维利尔国家公园被联合国教科文组织列入"世界遗产名录"。站在这里您还可以远眺广阔的辛格维利尔平原与美丽的辛格瓦尔德拉湖（国会湖），湖水清澈照人、波平如镜，弯弯的水泊平静怡然，让人流连忘返。

attractions.text_en: When you hear the Geysir geyser begin to rumble, the sound rising higher and higher, it is about to erupt! Each eruption lasts 1-2 minutes, the water temperature reaches over 100 degrees, and the spouting column of water can rise to more than 30 meters, making it the undisputed king of Iceland's geysers. What photographers love most is the geyser one second before it erupts, the full, rounded bubble of water that gushes out in the next second. And the most changeable thing of all is probably Iceland's weather: within a single day you can experience rain and snow, then hail, then sunshine.
attractions.text_zh: 听到盖锡尔间歇喷泉开始隆隆作响，声音越来越高，这就是要喷发了！每次喷发持续1-2分钟，水温高达100多度，喷出的水柱可以高达30多米，稳坐冰岛喷泉头把交椅。深受摄影师喜爱的，是喷发前一秒的间歇泉，饱满而圆润的水泡，在后一秒喷涌而出。而多变的，大概就是冰岛的天气，一日之内，从雨雪到冰雹，再到阳光，你都可以经历。

attractions.text_en: Gullfoss is as grand and majestic as its imposing, regal name. The rushing torrent plunges downward with a drop of more than 50 meters, sending up a deafening roar. In the sunlight, amid the rising mist, countless droplets glittering with golden light fill the air, and a brilliant rainbow flickers into view, as if the entire waterfall were made of gold. For this reason it has also become the filming location for many movies, such as Prometheus.
attractions.text_zh: 黄金瀑布如其霸气雍容的名字一样气势宏大。湍急的水流顺势而下，落差达50多米，发出震耳欲聋的轰鸣。阳光下，在蒸腾的水雾中，布满闪着金光的点点水滴，亮艳的彩虹若隐若现，仿佛整个瀑布是用黄金造就。所以也成为了许多电影的取景地，譬如异星前传。

attractions.text_en: The Black Sand Beach is formed of volcanic lava grit, and is itself a striking symbol of Iceland's identity as a volcanic island. It lies next to the picturesque, peaceful and harmonious little town of Vik, accompanied by the organ-pipe cliffs. Here you can enjoy the peaceful hours that remain of the day; standing before the wind-eroded columnar basalt and watching the white waves and boundless black sands collide and overlap is a rare pleasure. The American Hollywood blockbuster Noah was filmed here. The black sand beach represents the end of the world, fully revealing Iceland's sense of remoteness.
attractions.text_zh: 黑沙滩由火山熔岩砂砾构成，其本身也是冰岛火山岛屿身份的显著象征。她毗邻风景如画、安宁和睦的维克小镇，与风琴岩峭壁相伴。您可以在这享受今天余下的安宁时光，站在风蚀的圆柱玄武岩前望着白色海浪与无边黑色沙滩冲击重叠，是不可多得的享受。美国好莱坞大片诺亚方舟就在这里取景，黑沙滩代表着世界尽头，冰岛的那份遥远之感，展露无遗。

attractions.text_en: Located in southern Iceland, it is one of Iceland's largest and most magnificent waterfalls, with a width of 25 meters and a drop of 60 meters; the white cascade pairs perfectly with the surrounding green vegetation. The momentum of the water rushing down is truly spectacular, drawing many visitors to behold its splendor. Seljalandsfoss is a waterfall in southwest Iceland with a vertical height of about 60 meters, one of Iceland's most beautiful waterfalls; among its features, the secret waterfall connected to Seljalandsfoss is also a favorite of photographers' lenses, having appeared many times in books and magazines. The waterfall is bordered to the south by Iceland's Ring Road No. 1, making it easily accessible.
attractions.text_zh: 位于冰岛南部，是冰岛又大又壮丽的瀑布之一，其宽度为25米，水流落差达60米，白色的瀑布水流与周围的绿色植物搭配的恰到好处。 水流奔腾而下的气势非常壮观，吸引了很多游客来一睹它的风采。塞里雅兰瀑布是冰岛西南部一座垂直高度约为60米的瀑布，是冰岛漂亮的瀑布之一，其中、连通塞里雅兰瀑布的秘密瀑布也是摄影师镜头下的宠儿，曾多次出现在书籍和杂志中。瀑布南临冰岛一号环岛公路，交通便利。

attractions.text_en: Iceland has countless waterfalls, each with its own character, but Skogafoss has a charm all its own. Located in southern Iceland, it is one of Iceland's largest and most magnificent waterfalls, with a width of 25 meters and a drop of 60 meters; the momentum of the water rushing down is truly spectacular, drawing many visitors to behold its splendor. The mountains on both sides of Skogafoss are covered with green vegetation, and the cliffs on either side enclose the waterfall in the middle, so that the white cascade pairs perfectly with the surrounding green plants.
attractions.text_zh: 冰岛有无数的瀑布，每一个都各有特色，但是斯科加瀑布却独具魅力。它位于冰岛南部，是冰岛又大的、又壮丽的瀑布之一，其宽度为25米，水流落差达60米，水流奔腾而下的气势非常壮观，吸引了很多游客来一睹它的风采。斯科加瀑布两旁的山上都长满了绿色的植物，两旁的山崖把瀑布包围在中间，白色的瀑布水流与周围的绿色植物搭配的恰到好处。

attractions.text_en: The Reynisdrangar basalt stacks rise from the Atlantic Ocean, remnants of ancient sea cliffs. They are basalt sea stacks beneath Reynisfjall mountain, near the village of Vik i Myrdal in southern Iceland. The columns stand proudly amid the waves, facing the rock walls of Reynisfjall, possessing a mysterious wildness and grandeur all their own. Many films and TV series have been shot here, including the hugely popular Game of Thrones (A Song of Ice and Fire). On one side of the coast are high basalt columnar cliffs, and beneath the cliffs the sea has hollowed out a peculiar basalt column cave (Halsanefshellir). Gigantic basalt columns rise abruptly from the sand; after years of pounding and erosion by the sea, they have formed extremely unique columnar rocks. The neatly arranged basalt columns along the coast resemble the pipe organ in a church, solemn and dignified. The gloomy weather, the solemn black sand beach and the magnificently sculpted basalt columns, together with the low growl of the white waves, create a violent beauty as if at the brink of doomsday, leaving you unable to help but wonder whether you have already arrived at the end of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 雷尼斯玄武岩矗立于大西洋中，是古时海崖的遗骸。是位于南部冰岛维克（VíkíMýrdal）村附近的雷尼斯山(Reynisfjall)下的玄武岩 海叠层。岩柱在海浪中傲然挺立，与雷尼斯山的岩壁相对而望，独有一份神秘的野性与壮美。许多电影与美剧都曾在此取景，其中就包括大热的《权力的游戏(冰与火之歌)》。海岸一侧则是高高的玄武岩石柱悬崖，悬崖下被海水掏空形成奇特的玄武岩柱洞穴(Halsanefshellir)。沙滩上赫然屹立着巨大的玄武岩石柱，经过海水多年的冲击、侵蚀，行成了极其独特的柱状岩石。海岸边整齐排列的玄武岩柱就像教堂里的管风琴一样，庄严肃穆。阴沉沉的天气，肃穆的黑沙滩和鬼斧神工的玄武岩柱，再加上低吼的白色海浪，有一种濒临末日的狂暴美感，让你不由自主的怀疑是否已经置身世界的尽头。

attractions.text_en:
DC-3 Wreckage
On November 24, 1973, a United States Navy aircraft (C-47) was forced to land on the black sand beach of Solheimasandur in southern Iceland. The entire crew survived, but the wreckage has remained here ever since. The broken aircraft wreckage and the endless black sand beach form a magnificent yet desolate scene. Justin Bieber also filmed the music video for "I'll Show You" here, making this spot a niche internet-famous site in Iceland.
attractions.text_zh:
DC-3 Wreckage飞机残骸
1973年11月24号，一架美国海军飞机(C-47)被迫降落于冰岛南部Sólheimasandur's的黑沙滩上，机组人员全部生还，但残骸却一直留在了这里。残破的飞机残骸与一望无际的黑沙滩构成了壮丽而又凄美的景色。斯汀·比伯也在这里拍摄了《I'll Show You》音乐MV，使该地成为冰岛的小众网红景点。

attractions.text_en: Floating in the lagoon are thousand-year-old icebergs of every shape. This is an ice lake you can admire right from the roadside; besides white, the icebergs here also appear in blue, green, and in gray and brown tones formed by the mixing in of volcanic ash. You will have ample time to view and photograph up close, and with luck you may even see groups of sea lions basking in the sun. The glacier in the distance seems to have been bewitched by the sky: what was just moments ago like water flowing down from the glacier has, in an instant, all frozen into ice, as if time had stopped and stood still in that moment.
attractions.text_zh: 湖里漂浮着形态各异的千年浮冰。这是一个可以在路边就能观赏的冰湖，除了白色，这里的浮冰还呈现出蓝色、绿色、以及由于火山灰的掺杂而形成的灰色、棕色。您有充分的时间在此近距离观赏拍摄，运气好的话还可以看到成群结队晒太阳的海狮。远处的冰川犹如被天空施加了魔法，之前还像是从冰川上流下的水，顷刻间却全冻结成了冰，时间仿佛停在那刻静止了一样。

attractions.text_en: In Game of Thrones, the Wall and most of the scenes beyond the Wall were filmed in Vatnajokull National Park. Plants such as angelica and beach pea grow densely, arctic foxes roam here, ice tongues and fjords and other landforms crisscross, and traces left by ancient volcanic activity can be found everywhere. The most remarkable sight is the largest ice cap outside the polar regions in the world: the Vatnajokull ice sheet. Vatnajokull covers about 8% of Iceland's area, with an average ice thickness of 400 meters, reaching a thousand meters at its thickest. To the south of Vatnajokull lies Hvannadalshnukur volcano. In recent years Vatnajokull has begun to melt, which may be related to climate change and volcanic activity.
attractions.text_zh: 《权力的游戏》中，绝境长城及长城以北的大部分场景都是在瓦特纳冰川国家公园拍摄的。欧白芷、海湾豆等植物密布，北极狐在这里漫步，冰舌、峡湾等地貌交错纵横，远古火山活动遗留下的痕迹随处可见。 令人瞩目的景色便是世界上极地以外的冰盖——瓦特纳冰原(Vatnajökull)。瓦特纳冰原覆盖了冰岛约8%的面积，其冰层平均厚度为400米，较厚处达千米。位于瓦特纳冰原的南方是华纳达尔斯赫努克火山(Hvannadalshnúkur)。瓦特纳冰原近年开始融化，这可能与气候变更和火山活动有关。

attractions.text_en: Reykjavik Cathedral is a landmark of the city of Reykjavik, a famous church located in the center of Iceland's capital, Reykjavik. With its novel design and pipe-organ-like structure, it is one of Iceland's tallest buildings; you can take an elevator to the top floor to overlook the whole of the capital. The interior of the church is snow-white and simply decorated. Its foundation was laid in 1940, and it was largely completed in the late 1960s.
attractions.text_zh: 雷克雅未克大教堂是雷克雅未克市的地标性建筑。位于冰岛首都雷克雅未克市中心的一座著名教堂。教堂设计新颖，管风琴结构，是冰岛的高建筑之一，可乘坐电梯上顶楼俯瞰首都全貌。教堂内部雪白，装饰简洁。于1940年奠基，于20世纪60年代末基本完工。

attractions.text_en: Tjornin sits serenely in the heart of Reykjavik, lending the city an eternal composure and tranquility. On Tjornin, waterfowl such as swans, terns, greylag geese and ducks make their home here in both winter and summer, and coming to the lakeside to feed the birds has become a great pleasure for Icelanders and visitors alike. In winter, a thick layer of ice forms on Tjornin, thick enough to walk straight across the lake surface, and Icelanders even play football on the ice.
attractions.text_zh: 托宁湖（Tjörnin）安然坐落在雷克雅未克的中心地带，赋予了这座城市永恒的从容与平静。托宁湖上，天鹅、燕鸥、灰雁、鸭子等水禽无论冬夏栖息于此，来托宁湖边喂鸟也成为了冰岛人与游人们的一大乐趣。冬季，托宁湖上会结上一层厚厚的冰，完全可以横穿湖面，甚至还有冰岛人在冰上踢球。

attractions.text_en: Reykjavik has many sculptures, and the Sun Voyager (Solfar) is perhaps one of the most famous among them. This sculpture is located on Saebraut road by the seaside in Reykjavik. Shaped like a boat, it is "an ode to the sun, embodying the hope, longing, the pursuit of distant places, progress and freedom." The Sun Voyager sculpture was the winning entry in an outdoor art competition commemorating the 200th anniversary of the founding of Reykjavik. Designed by Jon Gunnar Arnason, it was unveiled in 1990. This uniquely designed work of modern Icelandic art has gradually become a landmark of Reykjavik.
attractions.text_zh: 雷克雅未克雕塑众多，太阳航海者（Sólfar）或许就是其中有名的一座。这座雕塑位于雷克雅未克海边的Sæbraut路上，形似方舟，是"一曲对太阳的颂歌，蕴含了对远方、希望、追寻、进步与自由的期许"。太阳航海者雕塑是纪念雷克雅未克建市200周年室外艺术竞赛的获奖作品，由Jón Gunnar Árnason设计，于1990年揭幕。这座设计独特的冰岛现代艺术作品也渐渐成为了雷克雅未克的标志性建筑。

attractions.name_en: Harpa Concert Hall and Conference Centre
attractions.name_zh: 哈帕音乐厅和会议中心
attractions.text_en: Harpa Concert Hall and Conference Centre is located at the meeting point of land and sea in Iceland's capital, Reykjavik, and is Iceland's newest and largest integrated concert hall and conference centre. Jointly designed by design firms from Iceland and Denmark, its inspiration comes from the mysterious, ever-shifting aurora of Iceland's winter nights and the shapes of volcanic stone. The building's glass form is like a giant kaleidoscope; thousands of irregular geometric glass blocks reflect, with the changing colors of the sky and the seasons, a myriad of colors that put even the rainbow to shame. This top-tier modern building is the place in Reykjavik to enjoy music and hold important conferences. Here you can hear the Iceland Symphony Orchestra perform and watch Icelandic theater and performances of various musical genres. Its largest concert hall can hold 1,800 people; in addition, it has two rehearsal halls, a lounge, a restaurant, a cafe, a record store and a souvenir shop.
attractions.text_zh: 哈帕音乐厅和会议中心位于冰岛首都雷克雅未克的海陆交界处，是冰岛又新又大的综合音乐厅、会议中心，由冰岛和丹麦的设计公司联合设计，其灵感来自冰岛冬季夜晚神秘莫测的夜幕极光和火山石的形状。建筑的玻璃外型好比一个巨大的万花筒，上千块不规则的几何玻璃砖随着天空的颜色和季节的变化反射出令彩虹都相形见绌的万千颜色。这座顶尖的现代化建筑是雷克雅未克欣赏音乐和举办重要会议的场所。在这里，你可以听到冰岛交响乐团的演奏，观赏冰岛戏剧和各种音乐流派演出。这里较大的音乐厅可容纳1800人，此外还设置有两个排练厅、休息厅、餐厅、咖啡店、音乐唱片店及纪念品店。

attractions.text_en: The Snaefellsnes Peninsula is a recognized photographers' paradise in Iceland. From Icelandic, the mountain's name translates as "Church Mountain," but because the mountain's shape looks just like a straw hat, more people call it Straw Hat Mountain. Kirkjufell is about 460 meters above sea level. As for reaching the classic photography spot, you need to walk five minutes along the path from the parking area across the road from Church Mountain, crossing the bridge to the other side of the waterfall, using Kirkjufell waterfall as the foreground.
attractions.text_zh: 斯奈山半岛是冰岛公认的摄影胜地，从冰岛语将山的名称翻译为"教会山"，但是由于这座山的形状像极了草帽，因此更多人叫它草帽山。草帽山海拔约460米。关于前往摄影经典机位，需要从教会山马路对面的停车区域沿路径走五分钟，过桥到瀑布到另一边，以教会山瀑布为前景。

attractions.text_en: Arnarstapi is a small fishing village on the southern coastline of Iceland's Snaefellsnes Peninsula; the old, elegant houses by the sea and the strange, bizarre sea-eroded rocks along the shore are the town's cultural and natural features. Arnarstapi is a small town with a natural harbor; it was once a bustling trading center, and now it draws many travelers with its unique natural scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔纳斯塔皮(Arnarstapi)是冰岛斯奈山半岛南海岸线上的一座小渔村，海滨的古老优雅房屋与沿岸的奇诡海蚀岩石是小镇的人文与自然特色。阿尔纳斯塔皮是一座有天然港口的小镇，这里从前是个热闹的交易中心，现在则以独特的自然景观吸引众多旅客的到访。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the fashion capital Milan to visit Sforza Castle (exterior); then tour the Milan Cathedral and stroll through the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon, travel to Lake Garda to admire the lake and mountain scenery at the foot of the Alps, then continue to Trento to check in to the hotel.
Overnight: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往时尚之都米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观）；随后游览米兰大教堂，漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色，之后前往特伦托入住酒店。
夜宿：NH特伦托酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in Trento's ultra-modern Le Albere science and culture district, a green hotel that combines sustainability with design. Designed by the Italian master architect Renzo Piano, it not only has simple and elegant exterior lines, but also uses eco-friendly materials and energy-saving systems inside, reflecting a dual respect for nature and the city. Just a few steps from the hotel is the Trento science museum MUSE. Strolling along the Adige River, you can also easily reach Trento's old town to explore the magnificent Trento Cathedral and charming medieval streets. The surrounding dining options are abundant: you can visit Michelin-recommended restaurants to taste creative northern Italian cuisine, or enjoy authentic Trento flavors at local restaurants.
accommodation.text_zh: NH特伦托酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店坐落在特伦托现代感十足的阿尔达通科学文化区（Le Albere），是一家兼具可持续理念与设计感的绿色酒店。酒店由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计，不仅外观线条简约优雅，内部也采用环保材料与节能系统，体现了对自然与城市的双重尊重。走出酒店几步之遥就是特伦托科学博物馆MUSE。沿着阿迪杰河散步，还能轻松抵达特伦托老城区，探索宏伟的特伦托大教堂和迷人的中世纪街巷。周边美食选择丰富，既可前往米其林推荐餐厅品尝创意北意料理，也能在本地餐厅享用地道特伦托风味佳肴。

highlights.text_en:
Lake Garda (Lago di Garda)
A lake within Italy, spanning the three regions of Lombardy (Lombardia), Veneto, and Trentino-Alto Adige. Lake and mountain scenery converge here, the climate is mild and pleasant, and it is one of the favorite holiday destinations in the hearts of Italians. Like a sapphire set at the foot of the Alps, it quietly shimmers with crystal-clear lake light and the languid radiance of southern Europe. It is also a treasure trove, gathering charming towns, historical relics, food, and outdoor activities. Each town has its own charm and unique attractions for visitors to enjoy.
highlights.text_zh:
加尔达湖 Lago di Garda
意大利境内的湖泊，横跨伦巴第（Lombardia）、威尼托（Veneto）与特伦蒂诺-上阿迪杰（Trentino-Alto Adige）三个大区，湖光山色交汇，气候温和宜人，是意大利人心中钟爱的度假胜地之一。它如同一颗镶嵌在阿尔卑斯山脚下的蓝宝石，静静闪耀着清澈湖光与南欧的慵懒光影。它还是一个宝库，汇聚了迷人的城镇、历史遗迹、美食和户外活动。每个城镇都有自己的魅力和独特的景点供游客欣赏。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. It is praised as one of Italy's magnificent Gothic buildings, with hundreds of spires soaring into the clouds and thousands of statues carved on its white marble exterior walls. The interior is vast and spacious; sunlight streams in through beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, creating a hazy light and a solemn religious atmosphere. The crypt of the cathedral also preserves the remains of the original Church of Saint Tecla on the site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: Built in the 19th century, this cross-shaped, glass-vaulted gallery is not only one of the oldest shopping centers in the world, but also a city-scale model of art and architecture. Here gather the flagship stores of Italian luxury brands such as Prada and Gucci, but even without shopping, strolling through it is like walking through a museum. At the historic cafes at the end of the gallery, such as Caffe Biffi or Savini Milano, you can order an espresso or taste a tiramisu dessert and experience the composure and elegance of the Italian way of life.
attractions.text_zh: 这条19世纪修建的十字形玻璃拱顶长廊不仅是世界上最古老的购物中心之一，更是一座城市级的艺术与建筑典范。这里汇聚了Prada、Gucci等意大利奢侈品牌旗舰店，但即便不购物，漫步其中也如同穿行于一座博物馆。在长廊尽头的老字号咖啡馆，如Caffè Biffi或Savini Milano，您可点一杯意式浓缩咖啡或品尝提拉米苏甜点，体会意式生活节奏的从容与优雅。

attractions.text_en: Sforza Castle is one of Milan's most important buildings and a witness to Milan's eventful history. Viewed from above, the entire castle resembles a grand duchy, with high walls on all four sides and an exquisitely planned park. Built in the 14th century by the Count of Sforza as a castle, it later became the residence of the Sforza family, witnessing the entire process from its heyday to the family's decline. The castle is now run by the Milan municipal government as museums, including the Museum of Applied Arts and Musical Instruments, the Archaeological Museum, and the Museum of Ancient Art. Its rear gate is the Arch of Peace, which was named after being remodeled by the ruler Francesco.
attractions.text_zh: 斯福尔扎城堡是米兰最重要的建筑之一，是米兰沧桑历史的见证。俯瞰整个城堡像一个大公国，有四面的高墙和精致规划过的公园。在14世纪时由斯福尔扎伯爵作为城堡而建，而后成为斯福尔扎家族的住所，见证了从鼎盛时期到家族衰败的全过程。现城堡被米兰市政府辟为博物馆，其中有应用艺术和乐曲博物馆、考古博物馆、古代艺术博物馆，他的后门是和平门，是统治者费朗西斯科改造得名的。

attractions.text_en: Lake Garda, nestled between the majestic Alps and the fertile Po Valley, is more than just a natural wonder. It is also a treasure trove, gathering charming towns, historical relics, food, and outdoor activities. Each town has its own charm and unique attractions for visitors to enjoy.
attractions.text_zh: 加尔达湖坐落在雄伟的阿尔卑斯山和肥沃的波河谷之间，不仅仅是自然奇观。它还是一个宝库，汇聚了迷人的城镇、历史遗迹、美食和户外活动。每个城镇都有自己的魅力和独特的景点供游客欣赏。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the old town of Bolzano and stroll through its old town streets. Then travel to the town of Ortisei, where you can take the cable car to the top of Seceda to overlook the Dolomite peaks, or head to the Alpe di Siusi plateau meadows to admire the alpine grassland scenery. Afterwards, travel to the Funes Valley to photograph the Church of San Giovanni in the village of Santa Maddalena (the lonely church) from the outside. After the tour, return to the hotel.
Overnight: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Since the Seceda and Alpe di Siusi cable cars are located in the high alpine areas of the Alps, in case of extreme weather or routine maintenance, operations will be suspended for safety maintenance and inspection. In such cases, the cable car cannot be ridden, and the cable car fee will be refunded to the guests.
overview.text_zh:
上午前往博尔扎诺老城漫步于老城街巷。随后前往奥蒂塞伊小镇，可乘缆车登顶刀锋山俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群，或前往休斯山高原草甸欣赏高山草原风光。之后前往富内斯山谷，外观打卡圣马达莱娜村的圣约翰教堂（孤独教堂），游览结束后返回酒店。
夜宿：NH特伦托酒店 或同等4星级酒店
注意：由于刀锋山和休斯山缆车位于阿尔卑斯山脉高山区域，如发生极端天气或例行检修，将暂停营运，以保全安全维护和检修。在此情况下，缆车将无法乘坐，缆车费用将退还给游客。

accommodation.text_en: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in Trento's ultra-modern Le Albere science and culture district, a green hotel that combines sustainability with design. Designed by the Italian master architect Renzo Piano, it not only has simple and elegant exterior lines, but also uses eco-friendly materials and energy-saving systems inside, reflecting a dual respect for nature and the city. Just a few steps from the hotel is the Trento science museum MUSE. Strolling along the Adige River, you can also easily reach Trento's old town to explore the magnificent Trento Cathedral and charming medieval streets. The surrounding dining options are abundant: you can visit Michelin-recommended restaurants to taste creative northern Italian cuisine, or enjoy authentic Trento flavors at local restaurants.
accommodation.text_zh: NH特伦特酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店坐落在特伦托现代感十足的阿尔达通科学文化区（Le Albere），是一家兼具可持续理念与设计感的绿色酒店。酒店由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计，不仅外观线条简约优雅，内部也采用环保材料与节能系统，体现了对自然与城市的双重尊重。走出酒店几步之遥就是特伦托科学博物馆MUSE。沿着阿迪杰河散步，还能轻松抵达特伦托老城区，探索宏伟的特伦托大教堂和迷人的中世纪街巷。周边美食选择丰富，既可前往米其林推荐餐厅品尝创意北意料理，也能在本地餐厅享用地道特伦托风味佳肴。

highlights.text_en:
Take the Seceda cable car to admire the magnificent jagged mountain scenery
The Seceda cable car quickly takes you up to Seceda, one of the magnificent peaks in the Dolomites, famous for its peculiar sharp ridges and vast alpine meadows. While riding the cable car, the windows offer breathtaking views of valleys and peaks; after reaching the summit, the view opens up, allowing you to overlook the rolling mountains and tranquil villages. Whether hiking in summer or skiing in winter, the natural beauty and pure air of Seceda are unforgettable, making it a paradise for nature lovers.
highlights.text_zh:
乘坐刀锋山（Seceda）缆车，欣赏锯齿状的壮丽山景
刀锋山缆车带你快速登上多洛米蒂山脉中壮丽的山峰-刀锋山，这里以奇特的锐利山脊和广阔的高山草甸闻名。乘坐缆车时，窗外尽是令人屏息的山谷和峰峦景色，抵达山顶后，视野开阔，可以俯瞰连绵起伏的群山和宁静的村庄。无论是夏季徒步还是冬季滑雪，刀锋山的自然美景和纯净空气都让人流连忘返，是大自然爱好者的天堂。

attractions.text_en: Bolzano, the capital of Italy's South Tyrol province, is located in the embrace of the Alps and blends Italian and Austrian cultural characteristics. The city is famous for its well-preserved medieval old town, rich historical relics, and beautiful natural scenery. You can stroll through the cobblestone streets of the old town, admire Gothic and Renaissance-style buildings, and experience the fusion of Italian and German languages. Walther Square in the city center is the heart of the city, surrounded by historic buildings and cafes, and is an ideal place to feel the local life.
attractions.text_zh: 博尔扎诺（Bolzano），意大利南蒂罗尔省的首府，位于阿尔卑斯山脉的怀抱中，融合了意大利和奥地利的文化特色。这座城市以其保存完好的中世纪老城区、丰富的历史遗迹和美丽的自然景观而闻名。您可以漫步于老城区的鹅卵石街道，欣赏哥特式和文艺复兴风格的建筑，体验意大利和德国语言的交融。市中心的瓦尔特广场是城市的心脏，周围环绕着历史建筑和咖啡馆，是感受当地生活的理想场所。

attractions.text_en: The lonely Church of Santa Maddalena in the Dolomites is a small wooden church located in the Funes Valley of the Italian Alps, backed by the jagged Geisler peaks. This Baroque-style church was built in 1744, surrounded by vast pastures and forests, with scenery that varies through the four seasons: lush green in spring and summer, golden in autumn, and covered in white snow in winter. Because of its secluded location and superb mountain backdrop, the church has become a popular spot for photographers and an ideal starting point for hiking and exploring the valley. The nearby town of Santa Maddalena offers convenient transportation and viewing angles, allowing visitors to easily admire this iconic Dolomite landscape.
attractions.text_zh: 多洛米蒂山脉的马达莱娜孤独教堂是一座小巧的木质教堂，坐落在意大利阿尔卑斯山的富内斯山谷中，背靠锯齿状的盖斯勒峰。这座巴洛克风格的教堂建于1744年，周围是广阔的牧场和森林，四季景色各异，春夏绿意盎然，秋季金黄一片，冬季则被白雪覆盖。教堂因其遗世独立的位置和绝佳的山景背景，成为摄影师的热门取景地，也是徒步探索山谷的理想起点。附近的Santa Maddalena小镇提供便利的交通和观景视角，让游客能轻松欣赏这一多洛米蒂的标志性景观。

attractions.text_en: The town of Ortisei, an elegant town located in the Val Gardena valley, blends the dual cultural characteristics of Italy and Austria. Its cobblestone streets, traditional wood-carving craftsmanship, and painted houses present travelers with the unique charm of South Tyrol. It is also a famous art and handicraft center in the Dolomites region. After lunch, take a short walk, visit the local craft shops, or enjoy a cup of Alpine-flavored hot chocolate at an outdoor cafe.
attractions.text_zh: 奥蒂塞伊小镇，这座位于加尔代纳山谷（Val Gardena）山谷中的典雅城镇，融合了意大利与奥地利的双重文化特色。其鹅卵石街道、传统木雕工艺和彩绘房舍为旅人呈现出南蒂罗尔独有的风情。这里也是多洛米蒂地区著名的艺术与手工艺中心，不妨在午餐后稍作散步，参观当地的工艺店铺，或是在露天咖啡座享受一杯阿尔卑斯风味的热巧克力。

attractions.text_en: Seceda is one of the most iconic peaks in the Dolomites, with its unique jagged ridge and vast plateau scenery that is breathtaking. Taking the cable car from Ortisei directly to the Seceda ridge is one of the best ways to explore the Dolomites. Seceda is famous for its blade-like peak lines and is a paradise for photographers. The summit offers an open view, where you can enjoy a short hike or simply quietly admire the vast alpine meadows and strangely-shaped rock peaks, experiencing the tranquility and grandeur of nature.
attractions.text_zh: 刀锋山（Seceda） 是多洛米蒂最具标志性的山峰之一，其独特的锯齿状山脊和辽阔的高原风光令人叹为观止。从奥蒂塞伊搭乘缆车直达刀锋山脊，是探索多洛米蒂山的最佳方式之一。刀锋山以其刀锋状的山峰线条闻名，是摄影师的天堂。山顶视野开阔，您可享受简短的徒步或只是静静欣赏辽阔的高山草原与奇岩峰丛，体验自然的宁静与壮观。

attractions.text_en:
Alpe di Siusi, located between the Val Gardena valley and the Sciliar peak, borders the Sciliar-Catinaccio Nature Park to the west. Although it is called a mountain, it is more like an alpine meadow, undulating like waves, forming a drop of about 300 meters. This area has always been excellent pasture, and paired with the iconic Dolomite rock, it is even more eye-catching. Europe's high-altitude alpine meadow is the Alpe di Siusi plateau in the Italian Dolomites; in spring and summer, it is a sea of flowers; in winter, it is a vast white skiing paradise. Due to its vast expanse, you can also admire many nearby mountain ranges, such as the Sella group, the Rosengarten massif, and the Langkofel, and so on.
Note: The Alpe di Siusi plateau cable car is an optional experience that requires a separate ticket purchase. The related cost is not included in the itinerary, please be aware.
attractions.text_zh:
休斯山，位于加尔代纳山谷和施勒恩峰之间，西部与施勒恩峰-卡提纳自然公园接壤。虽然说它是山，却更像是高山草甸，如波浪般起伏，形成300米左右的落差。这一地区一直是优良牧场，搭配上标志性的白云岩，便更加吸引眼球。欧洲的高海拔高山草甸是在意大利多洛米蒂休斯高原，春夏，这里是一片花海；冬天则是白茫茫的滑雪圣地。由于地域广阔，还能欣赏到附近的很多山脉，比如塞拉山组，玫瑰花园闪族和长石山等等。
注意：休斯高原缆车属于可选体验项目，需另行购票，相关费用不包含在行程内，敬请知悉

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the water city of Venice. Upon arrival, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). Afterwards, travel to Rimini and check in to the hotel. In the evening, freely explore the Rimini city center, immerse yourself in the lively local nightlife, and taste the local cuisine!
Overnight: Hotel Fellini Parco or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往水城威尼斯，到达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观）。之后前往里米尼入住酒店，晚上自由游览里米尼市区，融入当地热闹的夜生活，品尝当地美食！
夜宿：费里尼帕尔科酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Hotel Fellini Parco or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in the heart of Rimini, Italy, adjacent to the famous Parco Federico Fellini and just steps from the Adriatic Sea beach. In the morning, you can enjoy a hearty breakfast in the historic lobby of the Grand Hotel or on the garden terrace. The hotel has a private beach in Rimini, with a beach restaurant and bar where guests can enjoy lunch or a sunset aperitif. In addition, the hotel's "La Dolce Vita" spa center is equipped with a heated massage pool, sauna, Turkish bath, and fitness area, providing a comprehensive relaxation experience. The hotel is surrounded by rich attractions; you can walk to the Rimini Ferris wheel (La Ruota di Rimini) and the Fountain of the Four Horses (Fontana dei Quattro Cavalli). There are several recommended restaurants near the hotel. "La Casina del Bosco" is famous for its traditional Italian flatbread and fresh local ingredients. "Osteria e Pataca" serves authentic Emilia-Romagna regional cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh: 费里尼帕尔科酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店坐落于意大利里米尼的心脏地带，毗邻著名的费德里科·费里尼公园（Parco Federico Fellini），距离亚得里亚海海滩仅数步之遥。早晨您可以在Grand Hotel历史悠久的大厅或花园露台上享用丰盛的早餐。酒店拥有里米尼的私人海滩，设有海滩餐厅和酒吧，宾客可在此享用午餐或日落时的开胃酒。此外，酒店的“La Dolce Vita”水疗中心配备加热按摩泳池、桑拿、土耳其浴和健身区，提供全方位的放松体验。酒店周边景点丰富，步行即可到达里米尼摩天轮（La Ruota di Rimini）和四匹马喷泉（Fontana dei Quattro Cavalli）。酒店附近有多家值得推荐的餐厅。“La Casina del Bosco”以其传统的意式薄饼和新鲜的本地食材而闻名。“Osteria e Pataca”提供地道的艾米利亚-罗马涅地区菜肴。

highlights.text_en:
The world's beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic," remains dazzlingly brilliant
As one of the important cities of the Renaissance, Venice is composed of 118 small islands, connected into one by 177 canals and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands," and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the world's beautiful squares, "St. Mark's Square," the beautiful Grand Canal, the reborn La Fenice opera house, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs described by the poet Xu Zhimo, and breathtakingly beautiful cloisters. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting and also the filming location of many movie scenes. Her unique temperament makes everyone who visits intoxicated and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: St. Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco), also known as the central square of Venice, has always been the center for Venice's political, religious, and traditional festival public activities. St. Mark's Square is a rectangular square enclosed by buildings such as the Doge's Palace, St. Mark's Basilica, St. Mark's Campanile, the new and old Procuratie buildings, the Napoleonic Wing connecting the two buildings, the quadrangular campanile of St. Mark's Basilica, and the Marciana Library, as well as the Venice Grand Canal. It is about 170 meters long, about 80 meters wide on the east side, and about 55 meters wide on the west side. The buildings surrounding the square are all exquisite Renaissance buildings.
attractions.text_zh: 圣马可广场(Plazza San Marco) 又称威尼斯中心广场，一直是威尼斯的政治、宗教和传统节日的公共活动中心。圣马可广场是由公爵府、圣马可大教堂、圣马可钟楼、新、旧行政官邸大楼、连接两大楼的拿破仑翼大楼、圣马可大教堂的四角形钟楼和圣马可图书馆等建筑和威尼斯大运河所围成的长方形广场，长约170米，东边宽约80米，西侧宽约55米。广场四周的建筑都是文艺复兴时期的精美建筑。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: This magnificent Byzantine-style church is famous for its five onion-shaped domes and golden mosaic decorations, embodying the glorious history of Venice's golden age and its trade with the East. The exterior is rich in detail, blending Eastern and Western artistic languages, and is a landmark not to be missed in Venice.
attractions.text_zh: 这座拜占庭风格的华丽教堂，以其五座洋葱形圆顶和金色马赛克装饰而闻名，体现了威尼斯黄金时代与东方贸易的辉煌历史。外观细节丰富，融合东方与西方的艺术语言，是威尼斯不可错过的地标。

attractions.text_en: Adjacent to St. Mark's Basilica, it was the residence and government center of the former Doge of the Republic of Venice. This Gothic building made of pink marble has an exquisitely beautiful exterior; the details of the arcades and sculptures are full of power and elegance, and it is a symbol of Venetian politics and art.
attractions.text_zh: 紧邻圣马可大教堂，是昔日威尼斯共和国总督的官邸与政府中心。这座粉色大理石打造的哥特式建筑外观精美绝伦，拱廊与雕塑细节充满力量与优雅，是威尼斯政治与艺术的象征。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was the route through which condemned prisoners had to pass in ancient times when they were escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered with a vault on the upper part, very tightly enclosed, with only two small windows facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and while passing through this airtight bridge, they could only see the blue sky through the small windows. From then on they lost their freedom and involuntarily let out sighs. It is said that lovers who kiss under the bridge can stay together forever, and the movie "A Little Romance" was filmed here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head south along the coast from Rimini, passing through Pescara in the Abruzzo region. In the afternoon, travel to Bari in the Puglia region to check in, and freely visit the Basilica di San Nicola (exterior), or stroll through the flagstone streets of the old town, the pedestrian shopping street, and so on, to feel the relaxed pace of southern Italy.
Overnight: Mercure Bari Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早晨从里米尼沿海南下，途经阿布鲁佐大区佩斯卡拉。午后前往普利亚大区巴里入住，自由参观圣尼古拉大教堂（外观），或漫步于老城区石板街巷，购物步行街等感受南意的松弛感。
夜宿：巴里美居酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Mercure Bari Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The Mercure Bari Hotel is located in an ancient park, surrounded by greenery. The hotel is adjacent to "Old Bari," the Petruzzelli Theatre, the seaside promenade, the shopping street, and the bar street. The hotel has a large outdoor swimming pool and a fitness center with a gym, sauna, and Turkish bath. The hotel offers a restaurant with an open kitchen, serving Puglia-style cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh: 巴里美居酒店 或同等4星级酒店 巴里美居酒店坐落在古老的公园中，周围绿荫环绕，酒店毗邻："老巴里"、Petruzzelli 剧院、滨海长廊、购物街和酒吧街。酒店配有大型室外游泳池，设有健身中心，内设健身房、桑拿房和土耳其浴缸。酒店提供带开放式厨房的餐厅，供应普利亚风味美食。

highlights.text_en: Pescara is a seaside town full of Mediterranean charm, where sunshine, waves, and food together weave a lazy and charming holiday atmosphere. The seafood restaurants of Pescara are an experience absolutely not to be missed. You can taste fish caught the same day, clam pasta drizzled with olive oil and lemon juice, or a whole charcoal-grilled sea bass, paired with a glass of the local specialty Montepulciano wine, turning dinner into a true feast for the taste buds. Whether strolling through the city or lying on the beach sunbathing, you can immerse yourself in the leisure and deliciousness of Italian life.
highlights.text_zh: 佩斯卡拉是一座充满地中海风情的海滨小城，在这里，阳光、海浪与美食共同编织出慵懒而迷人的假日氛围。佩斯卡拉的海鲜餐厅是绝对不能错过的体验。可以品尝到当天捕捞的鲜鱼，淋上橄榄油和柠檬汁的蛤蜊意面，或是炭烤的整条海鲈鱼，搭配一杯本地特产的蒙特普尔恰诺葡萄酒，让晚餐变成一场真正的味觉盛宴。无论是漫步城市还是躺在沙滩上享受日光浴，可以沉浸在意式生活的闲适与美味中。

attractions.text_en: Pescara is a seaside town full of Mediterranean charm, where sunshine, waves, and food together weave a lazy and charming holiday atmosphere. The seafood restaurants of Pescara are an experience absolutely not to be missed. You can taste fish caught the same day, clam pasta drizzled with olive oil and lemon juice, or a whole charcoal-grilled sea bass, paired with a glass of the local specialty Montepulciano wine, turning dinner into a true feast for the taste buds. Whether strolling through the city or lying on the beach sunbathing, you can immerse yourself in the leisure and deliciousness of Italian life.
attractions.text_zh: 佩斯卡拉是一座充满地中海风情的海滨小城，在这里，阳光、海浪与美食共同编织出慵懒而迷人的假日氛围。佩斯卡拉的海鲜餐厅是绝对不能错过的体验。可以品尝到当天捕捞的鲜鱼，淋上橄榄油和柠檬汁的蛤蜊意面，或是炭烤的整条海鲈鱼，搭配一杯本地特产的蒙特普尔恰诺葡萄酒，让晚餐变成一场真正的味觉盛宴。无论是漫步城市还是躺在沙滩上享受日光浴，可以沉浸在意式生活的闲适与美味中。

attractions.text_en: Located in the old town of Bari, Italy, the Basilica di San Nicola was built in 1807. Backed by the Adriatic coast, the church was built to commemorate Saint Nicholas. Saint Nicholas is the prototype of today's Christmas Santa Claus. He was a kind bishop who lived in Asia Minor in the 4th century. Beginning in the 6th century, Saint Nicholas had many believers in Turkey, and later the worship spread to churches in Greece and Russia. By the 10th century, Italy as well as Western European countries such as Germany, Britain, and France also began to have believers. His holy remains were brought to Bari, Italy, in 1087 and buried in this church. Today, this church is still a religious holy site of Bari and indeed of Italy.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落于意大利巴里老城里的圣尼古拉大教堂建造于1807年。教堂背靠亚德里亚海滨，是为纪念圣人圣尼古拉斯而建造。圣尼古拉斯就是现在圣诞节圣诞老人的原形．他是一位生活在４世纪小亚细亚的善良主教。公元六世纪开始，圣尼古拉斯在土耳其就有不少的信仰者，后来在希腊与俄罗斯的教堂也开始流传，到了十世纪时，意大利以及西欧的国家如德国、英国、法国也都开始有信仰者。他的圣遗体则于公元1087年被带到意大利的巴利埋葬于此教堂。现在，这座教堂仍是巴里，乃至意大利的宗教圣地。

attractions.text_en: Bari is the capital of Italy's Puglia region, enjoying the scenery along the Adriatic coast, with tree-lined boulevards of tall palm trees, blending historical relics, seaside leisure, and authentic cuisine. The old town has a strong historical atmosphere, with medieval tunnels and relics, the Swabian Castle, and the Cathedral of San Sabino, where you can feel the "city beneath the city." The most representative is the exterior of the Basilica di San Nicola; this 11th-century Romanesque church is a pilgrimage site shared by both Catholics and Orthodox Christians, with a solemn and tranquil interior atmosphere. However, Bari Vecchia (the old town of Bari), with its narrow and winding alleys and mottled white stone walls, is the most authentic portrayal of southern Italy.
attractions.text_zh: 巴里（Bari）是意大利普利亚大区的首府，坐拥亚得里亚海沿岸风光，高大棕榈树的林荫大道、融合了历史遗迹、海滨休闲和地道美食，其中老城区具有浓郁的历史氛围——中世纪的隧道和遗迹，斯瓦比亚城堡、圣萨比诺大教堂，感受“城市之下的城市”。最具代表性的圣尼古拉大教堂外观（Basilica di San Nicola），这座11世纪的罗马式教堂是天主教与东正教共同朝圣之地，内部气氛庄严宁静。然而巴里老城（Bari Vecchia），这里巷弄狭窄曲折、白石墙面斑驳，是最真实的南意写照。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off from Bari to the cliffside town of Polignano a Mare, then travel to the fairytale white-stone town of Alberobello. In the afternoon, arrive at the ancient stone city of Matera to explore Matera's "Sassi" old town and take a deep stroll through the classic scenery of Puglia.
Overnight: UNA Hotel Matera or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午从巴里出发，前往悬崖小镇滨海波利尼亚诺，随后前往童话白石小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛，下午抵达石头古城马泰拉，探索马泰拉的「Sassi」老城区，深度漫步普利亚经典风光。
夜宿：马泰拉UNA酒店 或同级4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: UNA Hotel Matera or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The UNA Hotel is located in a 5-hectare park on the hills of Lucania. From the hotel's terrace and every corner of the garden, you can admire the lush park surrounding the entire hotel. Here, the azure sky and the verdant green of the surrounding mountains complement each other, forming a beautiful picture. The hotel has indoor and outdoor pools as well as a SPA area, and the hotel's 5 restaurants of different flavors provide specialty cuisine to satisfy your taste buds.
accommodation.text_zh: 马泰拉UNA酒店 或同级4星级酒店 UNA酒店坐落于卢卡尼亚山丘上占地 5 公顷的公园内，从酒店的露台和花园的每个角落，都能欣赏到环绕整个酒店的葱郁公园。在这里，蔚蓝的天空与周围群山的翠绿交相辉映，构成一幅美轮美奂的画卷。酒店设有室内外泳池以及SPA区域，酒店不同风味的 5 间餐厅，为您提供满足味蕾的特色美食。

highlights.text_en:
World Cultural Heritage - the Alberobello mushroom houses
Alberobello, located in the Puglia region of southern Italy, is a charming town that seems to have stepped out of a fairy tale, famous worldwide for its unique Trulli architecture. These stone houses with white walls and gray conical roofs date back as early as the 14th century, and were listed as a World Cultural Heritage site by UNESCO in 1996. Such buildings are constructed of dry-stacked stone without cement bonding, and the roofs are often painted with mysterious symbols, representing the traditional dwellings of southern Italy. Stroll freely and easily through the town, photographing the fairytale scenes of rows of Trulli stone houses set against the sunset glow.
highlights.text_zh:
世界文化遗产-阿尔贝罗贝洛磨菇屋
阿尔贝罗贝洛（Alberobello）位于意大利南部普利亚大区，是一座仿佛从童话中走出的迷人小镇，以其独特的特鲁利（Trulli）建筑而闻名于世。这些白色墙体、灰色圆锥形屋顶的石屋，最早可追溯至14世纪，1996年被联合国教科文组织列为世界文化遗产。此类建筑以干式石砌叠成，无使用水泥黏合，屋顶多画有神秘符号，是意大利南部传统民居的代表。自由在镇区内轻松散步，拍摄成排Trulli石屋与晚霞交映的童话画面。

attractions.text_en: This town atop the cliffs is hailed as the "Mediterranean balcony of Puglia." White houses are built against the rock walls, overlooking the azure Adriatic Sea. Its most famous landscape is the Polignano a Mare cove (Lama Monachile) -- a deeply cut rocky inlet connecting a stone arch bridge and a natural cave, a classic scene for travelers to photograph. Throughout the town you can also see verses written on walls, in front of doors, and on steps, showing Polignano's title of the "town of poetry." You can slowly stroll along the city walls, gazing into the distance at the scenery where the blue sea and rocks intersect, or stop briefly at a sea-view cafe.
attractions.text_zh: 这座悬崖之上的小镇，被誉为「普利亚的地中海阳台」。白色房屋依岩壁而建，俯瞰湛蓝的亚得里亚海，最著名的景观是波利尼亚诺阿马雷海湾 ( Lama Monachile )—— 一道深切的岩峡口，连接着石拱桥与天然岩洞，是旅人拍照打卡的经典画面。小镇中也可见许多诗句写在墙上、门前、台阶上，展现波利尼亚诺「诗意之镇」的称号。您可沿城墙缓缓漫步，远眺碧海与岩石交错的风景，或在海景咖啡馆短暂停留。

attractions.text_en: Italy's paradise town -- the town of Alberobello. In Italian, Alberobello means "beautiful tree," so some people also call Alberobello the Town of Beautiful Trees. The Trulli stone house settlement is Alberobello's most representative architectural landscape in Puglia, famous for its expanse of Trulli (mushroom-shaped white stone houses). The stone houses are built of dry-laid limestone, with conical roofs, white walls and gray tops, and a unique style. The Alberobello area was originally the most barren wasteland with the worst natural conditions. The earliest stone houses can be traced back to the 12th century, and when people first began living here is unknown. Beginning in the 16th century, more and more refugees fleeing natural and man-made disasters fled here and built houses with locally sourced limestone, which are the dome-topped stone houses with conical "hat" roofs we see today. In 1797, the refugees petitioned the local King of Taranto for legal settlement; with the refugees being numerous and powerful, the king reluctantly allowed this type of easily-demolished dome-roofed stone house to exist legally, forming the unique Trulli village of the Alberobello area. The typical Trulli-style building is one where residents use square limestone blocks to enclose a circular house without pillars or beams, build it to an appropriate height, then stack flat stone slabs upward, each piece gradually narrowing toward the top to form a conical pointed roof -- this is one of humanity's most primitive house-building methods. The limestone-block houses are sturdy, dry, warm in winter, and cool in summer.
attractions.text_zh: 意大利的天堂小镇——阿尔贝罗贝洛小镇，Alberobello在意大利语里是“美丽的树”的意思，因此也有人称阿尔贝罗贝洛为丽树镇。Trulli石屋聚落是阿尔贝罗贝洛是普利亚最具代表性的建筑景观，以成片的Trulli（蘑菇型白石屋）而闻名。石屋采用干式石灰岩砌成，屋顶为圆锥状结构，白墙灰顶，风格独特。阿尔贝罗贝洛地区，原是自然条件最差的不毛之地，最早的石屋可追溯至12世纪，何时开始有人居住已无从可考。16世纪开始，越来越多逃避天灾人祸的难民逃到这里，就地取材用石灰岩建屋，也就是我们现在看到的带有斗笠圆顶的石屋。1797年难民向塔兰托当地的旁波国王请愿合法定居，难民人多势众，国王勉为其难，允许容易拆除的这一类型圆顶石屋合法存在，形成了阿尔贝罗贝洛地区独特的陶尔利村落。典型的陶尔利风格建筑，是居民利用方形石灰岩块，围成无柱无梁的圆形房舍，建至适当高度，再用片状岩片向上堆砌，每片逐步收窄封顶，成圆锥形尖顶，这是一种人类最原始的建屋方法。石灰岩块的房舍，坚固、干燥、冬暖夏凉。

attractions.text_en: The distinctive cave restaurants in Matera's Sassi old town (Sassi di Matera) are mostly converted from original cave dwellings or granaries, retaining the natural stone walls, arched structures, and dim yellow lighting. They are divided into two areas -- Sasso Caveoso and Sasso Barisano. The buildings were carved from natural rock and have been inhabited since ancient times, making it one of the oldest inhabited places on Earth. Common dishes at the distinctive cave restaurants include handmade pasta with sauce (such as Orecchiette), goat cheese, roasted vegetables, bean puree, country bread, regional wines (such as Aglianico), or homemade desserts.
attractions.text_zh: 马泰拉Sassi 老城区（Sassi di Matera）中的特色洞穴餐厅多改建自原始洞穴民宅或粮仓，保留天然石壁、拱形结构与昏黄灯光，分为两个区域——Sasso Caveoso 和 Sasso Barisano。其建筑由天然岩石雕凿而成，自古便有人居住，是地球上最古老的居住地之一。特色洞穴餐厅菜色常见包括手工意面配酱汁（如Orecchiette）、山羊乳酪、烤蔬菜、豆泥、乡村面包、地区葡萄酒（如Aglianico）或自制甜点。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Salerno and take a boat to tour Positano to explore the colorful town on the cliffs, passing by Amalfi, the most charming coastal pearl of southern Italy. Stroll through the blue sea, white sand, and romantic streets, then take a boat back to Salerno and travel to Sorrento to check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: In case of extreme weather conditions at sea, for the safety of guests, if the cruise company cancels the sea excursion to Positano, our agency will arrange a bus tour of the old town of Salerno or Sorrento that day, and Positano cannot be visited. The sea cruise fee will be refunded to the guests.
overview.text_zh:
上午前往萨勒诺，乘船游览波西塔诺，探索悬崖上的彩色小镇，途经意大利南部最迷人的海岸明珠-阿马尔菲。漫步蓝海、白沙与浪漫街巷，随后乘船返回萨勒诺，前往索伦托入住酒店。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺活动，我社将安排当天乘坐车参观萨勒诺或索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺，出海游船费用将退还给游客

accommodation.text_en: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is an excellent choice for admiring the Sorrento sea views, with magnificent views of the Bay of Sorrento and Naples. The hotel is surrounded by sea views on three sides, has a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles, and a fully-equipped marine SPA center. It is within walking distance of the bustling seaside town center, and the hotel pier is the docking point for sea-going yachts.
accommodation.text_zh: 索伦托海岸酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
The bright pearl of the Amalfi Coast - Positano
Positano sits on the cliffs of the Amalfi Coast in southern Italy and is a colorful, romantic, and charming seaside town. The terraced houses are built along the mountain, with pink-orange, bright yellow, and azure blue interweaving into a gorgeous Mediterranean scroll. Strolling among the winding flagstone alleys, the air is filled with the fragrance of lemons and the sea breeze; walking down to the seaside, the golden sand and the azure water shine in contrast, making it an excellent place for vacation, photography, and enjoying leisurely time. Positano is not only a dream paradise for photographers and couples, but also the best place to experience the slow life of Italy.
highlights.text_zh:
阿马尔菲海岸的明珠亮-波西塔诺
波西塔诺坐落在意大利南部阿马尔菲海岸峭壁上，是一座色彩斑斓、浪漫迷人的海滨小镇。层叠的房屋沿山而建，粉橙、明黄、湛蓝交织成一幅绚丽的地中海画卷。漫步在蜿蜒的石板小巷间，空气中弥漫着柠檬与海风的清香；走到海边，金色沙滩与碧蓝海水交相辉映，是度假、拍照与享受悠闲时光的绝佳之地。、波西塔诺不仅是摄影师和情侣的梦幻天堂，更是感受意大利慢生活的最佳去处。

attractions.text_en: Positano is a town located along the Amalfi Coast in the Campania region of Italy. The main part of the town backs onto the mountains and faces the sea. A writer described it this way: Positano is a dreamland; when you are there, she is not quite real, but after you leave, she becomes vivid and lifelike. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as the beautiful coast of Europe, with a winding and twisting coastline, towering mountain islands rising up on the shore, valleys and headlands interlacing, orchards and wild plants coexisting. Within this pristine natural environment there is rich cultural history, and many picturesque towns are scattered through the dense mountain forests, of which the more beautiful one is called Positano.
attractions.text_zh: 波西塔诺是位于意大利坎帕尼亚大区阿马尔菲海岸‎沿岸的一个小镇。城镇主要部份背山面海，一位作家这样形容：波西塔诺是一个梦乡，你在时，她不是很真切，你离开后，她变的栩栩如生。阿马尔菲海岸被誉为欧洲美丽的海滩，这里的海岸线蜿蜒曲折，岸上山岛耸峙巍峨，山谷与海岬交错，果园与野生植物并存，原生态的自然环境中有丰富的人文历史，浓密山林中散落着许多如诗如画的小镇，而其中较漂亮的那一个叫做波西塔诺

attractions.text_en: The Amalfi Coast, rated by the National Geographic magazine as one of the 50 places most worth visiting in a lifetime, has the most charming coastline in Naples and indeed in the whole world.
