It was once also the capital of the powerful Maritime Republic of Amalfi, a very important city in Mediterranean trade at the time. Amalfi is also listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Here there are ancient medieval towns famous for their unique culture and architecture. Popular towns include Amalfi, Positano, Ravello, and Maiori. In these towns, you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers, and temples; the history of these buildings can be traced back several centuries, and each building has its own story.
attractions.text_zh: 阿马尔菲海岸，被联合国地理杂志评为一生中最值得去的50个地方之一，拥有着那不勒斯乃至全世界最迷人的海岸线，同时它也曾经是强大阿马尔菲航海共和国的首都，是当时地中海贸易中的一个非常重要的城市。阿马尔菲同时也被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产。这里有着古老的中世纪小镇，这些小镇以其独特的文化和建筑而著名。受欢迎的小镇包括阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和莱马尼。在这些小镇中，你可以看到许多古老的教堂、城堡、钟楼和神殿，这些建筑物的历史可以追溯到几个世纪以前，每个建筑都有着自己的故事。

attractions.text_en: This is a city that combines historical heritage and beautiful scenery. Salerno is located on the charming Amalfi Coast, with ancient churches, a Norman castle, and a picturesque seafront. At the seaside restaurants and local eateries, taste the local Campania cuisine featuring fresh seafood and traditional dishes.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一座集历史底蕴与美景于一身的城市。萨莱诺位于迷人的阿马尔菲海岸（Amalfi Coast），拥有古老的教堂、诺曼城堡和风景如画的海滨，在海边餐馆和当地小吃店品尝以新鲜海鲜和传统菜肴为特色的坎帕尼亚当地美食。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Sorrento and stroll through the small city built on the seaside cliffs; then take a ferry from Sorrento to the island of Capri. On the day, you may stroll along the seaside on your own and then visit the Blue Grotto, or take a boat around the island on your own to explore the Blue Grotto, or go on your own into the town of Capri to visit the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) and overlook the entire bay; afterwards, take a ferry to the Sorrento pier and ride back to the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往索伦托，漫步筑于海滨峭壁上的小城；之后在索伦托坐渡船前往卡普里岛。当天或自行前往海边漫步后前往蓝洞游览，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园（外观），俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船抵达索伦托码头，乘车返回酒店。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is an excellent choice for admiring the Sorrento sea views, with magnificent views of the Bay of Sorrento and Naples. The hotel is surrounded by sea views on three sides, has a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles, and a fully-equipped marine SPA center. It is within walking distance of the bustling seaside town center, and the hotel pier is the docking point for sea-going yachts.
accommodation.text_zh: 索伦托海岸酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
Capri's blue wonder, the "Blue Grotto"
The island of Capri has been a famous tourist and resort destination since ancient Roman times. On his return journey after the eastern campaign, Emperor Augustus landed on this island and, captivated by its beautiful environment and pleasant climate, did not hesitate to exchange the island of Ischia at four times the value for the island of Capri to use as his summer retreat. The island of Capri has a limestone terrain with steep rocks, and among the rocks there are many peculiar caves, the most famous of which is the "Blue Grotto." The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the world's seven great wonders. The entrance to the Blue Grotto is below the cliff; the entrance is very small, and one can only enter by small boat. Due to the special structure of the entrance, on one hand sunlight can enter the cave through the entrance, and on the other hand it is reflected up from the bottom of the water inside the cave, so the seawater inside the cave is crystal blue, mysterious and unfathomable, and even the rocks inside the cave turn blue, hence the name "Blue Grotto." To visit the Blue Grotto, you must choose the right time: first, the weather should be clear; second, go at low tide; and third, there should be no wind or waves.
highlights.text_zh:
卡普里岛蓝色奇观“蓝洞”
卡普里岛从古罗马时期开始,这里就是著名的旅游疗养胜地，奥古斯都大帝在东方战役结束后的归途中曾在该岛登陆，被这里的优美环境、宜人气候所折服，不惜以4倍的伊斯基亚岛换取卡普里岛，作为自己的避暑之地。卡普里岛属于石灰质地形，岩石峭立，岩石间有许多奇特的岩洞，其中较著名的就是“蓝洞”。蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一。蓝洞的洞口在悬崖的下面，洞口很小，只能乘坐小船才能进入。由于洞口的特殊结构，一方面阳光可以从洞口进入洞内，一方面又从洞内水底反射上来，因此洞内的海水一片晶蓝，神秘莫测，连洞内的岩石也变成了蓝色，故称“蓝洞”。参观蓝洞一定要选择时机:一要天气晴朗;二要在退潮的时候去，三要没有风浪。

attractions.text_en:
The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the world's seven great wonders and is the more famous attraction of Capri; many people go to Capri precisely to witness the wonder of the Blue Grotto. You can enter the Blue Grotto by small boat to tour it. Due to the special structure of the entrance, the seawater inside the cave is crystal blue. The surface seawater of the Blue Grotto presents a deep, profound blue, while the deeper seawater is sky blue, and the seawater sets off the rocks in the cave to be all azure as well. On clear days, the Blue Grotto is exceptionally beautiful and enchanting.
Capri's Blue Grotto is a natural attraction; if there is high tide, wind and waves, or other factors causing the local marine meteorological agency to announce closure, then it cannot be visited inside. The Blue Grotto tour fee is not included in the tour group. To avoid misunderstanding, please, in accordance with local customs, in addition to the Blue Grotto rowboat boatman fee, pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
attractions.text_zh:
蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，是卡普里较著名的景点，很多人去卡普里的目的就是为了一睹蓝洞奇观。可乘小船进入蓝洞游览，由于洞口的特殊结构，使得洞里的海水一片晶蓝。蓝洞表层的海水呈现幽幽的深蓝色，而深层海水却是天蓝色的，海水映衬得洞中的岩石也都一片蔚蓝。天气晴朗的时候，蓝洞分外的美丽和妖娆。
卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。 蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

attractions.text_en: The island of Capri is located near the southern entrance to the Bay of Naples and belongs to the Campania region of Italy. On the island there are the medieval castle ruins of Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as a church dedicated to the island's patron saint, Saint Costanzo. It is one of the famous tourist destinations of southern Italy. Capri's forests, waters, air, sunshine, and the island villas most coveted by the world's wealthy have attracted people from all over the world. Among them, the Blue Grotto is an attraction that everyone who comes to Capri will definitely visit; on clear, bright days, sunlight shines into the cave, and every corner of the deep blue cave is exquisitely beautiful.
attractions.text_zh: 卡普里岛位于那不勒斯湾南部入海口附近，属意大利坎佩尼亚区。岛上有巴巴罗萨和卡斯蒂利奥内两座中世纪城堡遗迹以及供奉该岛守护神圣科斯坦佑的教堂，是意大利南部著名的游览胜地之一。卡普里岛的森林、水域、空气、阳光和较令全世界富豪憧憬的岛屿别墅，曾吸引了来自世界各地的人们，其中蓝洞是每一个人来卡普里岛一定会参观的景点，天清气朗时，阳光照射入洞穴，深蓝的洞穴内每一处角落都美不胜收。

attractions.text_en: Located in the town of Capri, the Gardens of Augustus record the ten years of Augustus's life living here. One side of the garden is a sheer cliff, and in the distance is the azure sea. On the left side of the garden is the Lovers' Rock; legend has it that the Lovers' Rock was originally a pair of lovers who, unable to be together, threw themselves into the sea one after another to die for love, and afterwards became these rocks leaning against and snuggling each other.
attractions.text_zh: 位于卡普里小镇上的奥古斯丁花园记录着奥古斯丁在这里居住的十年生活。花园一侧是断壁，远处则是碧蓝的海水。在花园的左侧是情人石，相传这情人石原本是相爱的恋人，因无法恋爱纷纷跳入海中殉情，之后就成了这相依相偎的石头。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city of Pompeii and learn about the former Pompeii civilization. Afterwards, travel to Naples to tour the old town of Naples, the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior), and Castel Nuovo (exterior). In the afternoon, travel to Rome to check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Hotel Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明。之后前往那不勒斯游览那不勒斯老城，那不勒斯皇宫（外观）、新堡（外观）。下午前往罗马入住酒店。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Hotel Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course, and an outdoor swimming pool. The hotel has cutting-edge architectural style and modern interior design; the rooms are furnished with modern or classical decor, and all guest rooms enjoy views of the garden, swimming pool, or golf course. In addition, the hotel has multiple restaurants offering exquisite international cuisine and traditional Italian fare; the hotel environment is tranquil, easily meeting your diverse needs, making it an ideal choice for you to relax body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh: 罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The ancient city of Pompeii | Slumbering for a thousand years, still splendid and glorious upon awakening
The ancient city of Pompeii is located in the Campania region near Naples in southern Italy. It was once a small fishing village, but because it was close to an important Mediterranean port with convenient transportation and gathering merchants, by the 8th century BC it had already developed into the second-largest city of ancient Rome. However, in 79 BC, with the eruption of Mount Vesuvius, volcanic ash and scorching lava instantly buried the ancient city of Pompeii, and the disaster caused countless lives to perish overnight. After more than a thousand years, the ancient city of Pompeii finally saw the light of day again.
highlights.text_zh:
庞贝古城丨沉睡千年，醒时依旧灿烂辉煌
庞贝古城位于意大利南部那不勒斯市附近的坎帕尼亚大区，曾经是一个小渔村，由于靠近地中海的重要港口，交通便利，商贾云集，在公元前8世纪，就已经发展成了古罗马城的第二大城市。然而在公元前79年，随着维苏威火山的爆发，火山灰与炽热的岩浆瞬间掩埋了庞贝古城，灾难让无数生灵一夜之间丧生。历经一千多年之后，庞贝古城方得重见天日。

attractions.text_en: For most travelers, Naples's sea, food, and history are all important reasons that make people reluctant to leave. Naples is the most beloved city of the Italian writer Boccaccio; this is the birthplace of the songs "O Sole Mio" and "Torna a Surriento," and also the origin of pizza. Naples presents different faces to travelers from all over the world throughout the four seasons. Naples is also called "Napoli," which is "Napoli" in Italian. Naples is the capital of the Campania region and the province of Naples, and one of the most populous cities in Italy, abundant in lemons and grapes. At the same time, she is also an important tourist city of the Mediterranean, known as the "city of sunshine and joy." This is a source of inspiration for many artists and musicians, perhaps because of Mount Vesuvius, or perhaps because of the simple, rustic quality of Naples.
attractions.text_zh: 对于大多数旅行者而言，那不勒斯的大海、美食及历史都是让人流连忘返的重要原因。那不勒斯是意大利作家薄伽丘最热爱的城市，这里是歌曲《我的太阳》、《重归苏莲托》的诞生地，也是披萨的起源地。那不勒斯一年四季都呈现出不同的面孔展现给来自世界各地的旅行者。那不勒斯也叫“拿波里”，意大利文是“Napoli”。那不勒斯是坎帕尼亚大区以及那不勒斯省的首府，也是意大利人口最多的城市之一，盛产柠檬和葡萄。同时，她也是地中海重要的旅游城市，被称为“阳光和欢乐之城”。这里是许多艺术家、音乐家的灵感之源，或许是因为维苏威火山(MountVesuvius)，又或许是因为那不勒斯的古朴。

attractions.text_en: The Royal Palace of Naples is located in the bustling downtown, close to famous attractions such as Castel Nuovo and Castel dell'Ovo. Having gone through four dynasties, its exterior looks quite ordinary, but if you choose to go inside to visit, it will surely greatly surprise you. This palace is extremely luxurious; the entire color scheme is basically gold, yellow, and purple, representing the nobility of the royal family. The palace has many, many rooms -- the queen's bedchamber, the council hall, the study, and so on -- and inside there are also many displays of royal items and paintings of the royal nobility. Most worthy of mention is the throne. The most worth-seeing place inside this palace, besides the various paintings, is this; words like noble and elegant cannot simply describe it.
attractions.text_zh: 那不勒斯皇宫身处闹市，临近新堡、蛋堡等知名景点，历经四个朝代，外表看上去十分普通，但是，如果选择入内参观，那么一定会让你大吃一惊，这个皇宫非常奢华，整个色调基本就是金色、黄色、紫色，代表皇室的高贵。皇宫有许许多多的房间，王后的寝宫、议政厅、书房等等，里面还有很多皇室用品的展示和皇室贵族的绘画，最值得一提的就是王座。这个皇宫里面最值得一看的地方，除了各类绘画就是它了，用尊贵典雅这一类词是无法简单形容的。

attractions.text_en: Castel Nuovo, also known as Maschio Angioino (the Angevin Keep), was ordered built by the first king of the Kingdom of Naples. Castel Nuovo includes the Civic Museum (Museo Civico) as well as the castle ruins. The museum (mainly displaying paintings) is on the first floor; on the second floor you can see sea views; and the ground floor is the Castel Nuovo ruins, with the floor surface built of transparent glass -- travelers with a fear of heights need to pay special attention, as beneath the glass are the ancient building ruins and human skeletons. In addition, inside Castel Nuovo there is also a Sala Dei Baroni (literally "the Barons' Hall"); the architecture at the top of the room is very distinctive.
attractions.text_zh: 新堡，又名安茹城堡，是那不勒斯王国第一位国王下令建立。新堡包括公民博物馆(MuseoCivico)以及城堡遗迹。博物馆(主要展示绘画)位于第一层，第二层可以看到海景，零层则为新堡遗迹，地表为透明玻璃建造，有恐高症的旅行者需要特别注意，玻璃底下则为古建筑遗迹以及人的骸骨。另外，新堡内部还有一个SalaDeiBaroni(直译为男爵的房间)，房间顶端的建筑非常有特色。

attractions.text_en: The ancient city of Pompeii was once a small-to-medium-sized town backing onto the mountains and facing the sea, which was destroyed in an instant by the great eruption of Mount Vesuvius to its northwest. The town's streets and houses were buried by volcanic ash, yet it completely preserved the living scenes of the Pompeians of more than two thousand years ago, and this vast site was only gradually excavated later. Besides various building ruins, there are also some shocking casts. People who perished during the volcanic eruption, having been enveloped by volcanic ash, decayed until only empty shells of their bodies remained; archaeology injected plaster into these empty shells to make casts, showing the world the tragic state of Pompeii at the time.
attractions.text_zh: 庞贝古城曾是一座背山面海的中小城镇，因西北边的维苏威火山大爆发而毁于一旦。城镇街道、房屋被火山灰掩埋，却完整保留了两千年多前庞贝人的生活场景，后来这座庞大的遗址才被渐渐发掘出来。除各种建筑遗迹外，还有一些触目惊心的铸像。在火山爆发时遇难的人，因被火山灰包裹而身体腐朽得只剩空壳，考古学把这些空壳注入石膏、做成铸像，向世人展示庞贝当时的惨状。

attractions.text_en: This is a historical site within the ancient city of Pompeii. Here was once a temple, but because of its great age only broken walls and ruins remain; however, the overall outline of the temple can still be made out.
attractions.text_zh: 这是庞贝古城内的一处历史遗址，这里曾经是一座寺庙，但因为年代久远只剩下残垣断壁了，但寺庙的整体轮廓还是看得出的。

attractions.name_en: Forum at the Temple of Apollo
attractions.text_en: Also called the public Forum, this was once the political, economic, and religious center of former Pompeii. On the square, the square basilica still retains some brick-built column bases; this place was the former courthouse and commercial trading venue. Opposite the basilica is a Temple of Apollo, in which the 48 Corinthian columns are well preserved, and there are also many exquisite frescoes. On the north side of the square there is a Temple of Jupiter with its back to Mount Vesuvius, from which Mount Vesuvius can be clearly seen in the distance.
attractions.text_zh: 也称公共广场，这里曾经是昔日庞贝的政治、经济、宗教中心，广场上的方形会堂还残留着一些砖砌的圆柱底座，此处是以前的法院与商业交易场所。会堂的对面是一座阿波罗神殿，里面的48根科林斯式圆柱保存完好，还有许多精美的壁画。广场北侧有一座背对着维苏威火山的丘比特神殿，可以清楚的眺望维苏威火山。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, begin touring the world-famous historical and cultural city of Rome. This is the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, called the "Eternal City" because of its long history. Visit the Colosseum and the Pantheon standing on the ruins of the ancient Roman capital, tour the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), and then freely visit the Rome city center.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Hotel Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel
[The main attractions within Rome's ancient city area are all within Rome's restricted traffic zone (ZTL). The Rome ancient city is toured on foot that day, with a round-trip walking itinerary of about 5 kilometers. Please wear light and comfortable clothing.]
overview.text_zh:
上午开始游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“ 。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场、万神殿，游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观），之后自由参观罗马市区。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
【罗马古城区内的主要景点，均在罗马车辆禁行区内（ZTL）。罗马古城当天为步行游览，往返步行行程约为5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。】

accommodation.text_en: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Hotel Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course, and an outdoor swimming pool. The hotel has cutting-edge architectural style and modern interior design; the rooms are furnished with modern or classical decor, and all guest rooms enjoy views of the garden, swimming pool, or golf course. In addition, the hotel has multiple restaurants offering exquisite international cuisine and traditional Italian fare; the hotel environment is tranquil, easily meeting your diverse needs, making it an ideal choice for you to relax body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh: 罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth visit to Rome, an important cradle of world culture
Seek out the historical civilization accumulated over thousands of years within the ancient ruins that occupy about half of the city area. Whether it is the world-famous architectural ruins composed of the Imperial Senate, the triumphal arches, the commemorative columns, the Pantheon, and the great Colosseum, or the numerous exquisite Renaissance buildings and art treasures housed in over a hundred museums, or even the many fountains in the city in myriad poses represented by the Trevi Fountain, as well as the large-scale roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares, public baths and other public buildings -- all freeze art in that wonderful instant. Someone said "architecture is flowing music," and so the architecture of ancient Rome must surely play a majestic and meaningful movement.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的必然是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum located in the center of Rome was built by ancient Rome at the time to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great ancient Roman Empire. It was a place exclusively for slave owners, nobles, and free citizens to watch animal fights or slave gladiatorial combat, and is Rome's most famous historical relic. The Colosseum is a masterpiece and miracle that can be considered a model in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for being huge, majestic, and spectacular. Although only a little more than half of the skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and grand momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en:
The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman king Vittorio Emanuele II, and Umberto I rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, the son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of ancient Rome's exquisite construction technology, and was praised by Michelangelo as the "design of angels."
Tip: Because the Pantheon is a religious site, if you need to go inside to visit please observe the rules: clothing must not bare the shoulders or back; shorts and short skirts are not allowed (they must cover the knees); and you may not bring food or drink inside.
attractions.text_zh:
万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。
提示：因万神殿属于宗教场所，如果您需入内参观请遵守例：着装不能露肩、露背 短裤、短裙不行（必须 盖过膝盖 ），不可携带饮食进入。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes of the movie "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and beautiful figure seems to have already merged into one with the Spanish Square and the beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never erase. The Spanish Steps -- the entire Spanish Square is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The entire staircase has 138 steps in total and is the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god in Roman mythology, and is altogether majestic in momentum and grand in scale. It is said that if you stand with your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and if it lands in the water, your dream can come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off from Rome to tour the ancient town of Pienza, freely photographing along the cypress lane on the way, then tour the Piazza Pio II, Pienza Cathedral (exterior), and other attractions. Afterwards, set off for Siena to tour Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, Siena Town Hall (exterior), the Torre del Mangia (exterior), and other attractions.
Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城游览，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，之后游览二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点，之后出发前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。
夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located on a quiet hilltop, surrounded by olive trees and gardens, with beautiful surroundings ideal for getting close to nature. The guest rooms are laid with comfortable wooden floors, brightly designed and furnished with beautiful, stylish interior decor. The hotel also has an exquisite restaurant serving classic Italian, local, and Tuscan cuisine during dinner. The hotel's outdoor pool, fitness center, and sauna all provide you with an even more relaxing stay experience.
accommodation.text_zh: 锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，环境优美且适合亲近自然。客房铺设舒适的木质地板，设计明亮，摆设美观的时尚内装，同时酒店配有精致的餐厅，在晚餐时段供应经典的意大利、当地和托斯卡纳美食。酒店的室外泳池、健身中心以及桑拿浴室都为您提供更加放松的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
The pastoral beauty of the Val d'Orcia and the medieval ancient town - Pienza
Close your eyes and you will imagine the classic scenery of Tuscany -- blue skies and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and grapevines, and finally wheat fields -- this is the perfect portrayal of the Val d'Orcia. From the city walls of the ancient town of Pienza, overlook the scenery of the World Heritage site "Val d'Orcia."
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding and twisting cypress lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypress trees, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypress trees on both sides of the road cast mottled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that attracts countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and check in.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a town located on the hills of the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. The Pienza he rebuilt under his direction in 1459 is regarded as a model of an "ideal city," and is therefore hailed as the "touchstone of Renaissance urban life." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, Pienza's unique feature is that you can overlook the scenery of the World Heritage site "Val d'Orcia" from its city walls.
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its picture-postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns. This is a unique intersection of art and nature, harboring rich historical traces; its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the concept of "good governance" of the Italian city-states.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval ancient city, is full of masterpieces by great artists and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient and crisscrossing flagstone alleys and the deep, secluded courtyards hidden in various places, you seem to find yourself in medieval Europe of a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. Over the centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time has been frozen here since the 14th century. Besides its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties -- almond soft biscuits ricciarelli, nut tarts panforte, peppered spiced nut cakes pan pepato, rice puddings budini di riso, walnut biscuits cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: The Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena. Directly opposite the square are the Siena Town Hall and the tower. Inside the Town Hall is the Civic Museum, which houses numerous paintings of the Sienese school, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is the Torre del Mangia; it is the second-tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height reaching 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of stairs to take in the beautiful views of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the birthplace of the Renaissance - Florence, to visit the world's third-largest cathedral - the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, the Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, as well as the Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica di Santa Croce (exterior). Afterwards, travel to a five-star hotel in the Tuscany region to check in.
Overnight: Tuscany Montecatini Estate SPA Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往文艺复兴发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、领主广场、维奇奥桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后前往托斯卡纳地区五星酒店入住。
夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼庄园SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Tuscany Montecatini Estate SPA Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel. The hotel is located in Montecatini, a famous wellness tourism resort in Tuscany. The design is unique, the rooms are elegantly decorated, blending modern and classical, very comfortable and chic. The spa area has 2 pools (indoor and outdoor), and the sauna enjoys a unique forest view. The hotel's private park and ring garden are a natural extension of the Terme Tettuccio park, with the same trees, picturesque scenery, hot springs, and a wide variety of flora and fauna, covering an area of 40,000 square meters: as if being in a corner of a natural paradise. The hotel's NO|MORE Bistrot restaurant changes its menu with the seasons, and the food has a rich and varied taste.
accommodation.text_zh: 托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼庄园SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店 酒店位于托斯卡纳著名的康养旅游度假地-蒙特卡蒂尼，设计独特，房间装潢典雅，融合了现代与古典，非常舒适和别致。 水疗区设有 2 个泳池（室内和室外），桑拿浴室享有独特的森林景观。酒店的私人公园和环形花园是 Terme Tettuccio 公园的自然延续，同样的树木、如画的景色、温泉、种类繁多的动植物，占地 40,000 平方米：仿佛置身于自然天堂的一隅。酒店的NO|MORE Bistrot 餐厅随季节变化菜单，食物口感丰富多样。

highlights.text_en:
The glory and prime of Florence, the shining starlight of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world's art capital and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Among the blue skies and white clouds, the brightly colored walls, the dark-green shutters, and the deep-red rooftops, seek the soul of the Renaissance; in the streets and alleys, squares and churches, museums and galleries, feel that the Renaissance never grows old. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic soul of Dante Alighieri and the painting soul of Da Vinci still drift over the skies of Florence, still continuing to pursue the people and events of the European Renaissance period....."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利·但丁的诗魂、达·芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore
attractions.text_en: The Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is the indisputable symbol of Florence, with its iconic red dome dominating the city skyline. The most stunning part of this architectural miracle lies in observing its facade up close -- the geometric patterns composed of white, green, and pink marble are like a giant inlaid carpet, with every piece of stone precisely calculated. Especially when the sunlight shines obliquely, the green serpentine stone glows with an emerald-like luster, transitioning gently with the pink marble, making it the most gorgeous "stone embroidery" of the Renaissance period.
attractions.text_zh: 圣母百花大教堂是佛罗伦萨无可争议的象征，其标志性的红色穹顶主宰着城市天际线。这座建筑奇迹最震撼之处在于近距离观察其外立面——白、绿、粉三色大理石组成的几何图案如同巨型拼花地毯，每一块石料都经过精密计算。尤其当阳光斜照时，绿色蛇纹石会泛出翡翠般的光泽，与粉色大理石温柔过渡，堪称文艺复兴时期最华丽的"石头刺绣"。

attractions.text_en: Like an open-air sculpture gallery, it condenses the political and art history of Florence. The Fountain of Neptune in the center of the square is often overlooked by tourists, but when the muscular lines of its bronze mermen and steeds are illuminated by spotlights in the twilight, it suddenly bursts forth with Baroque dramatic tension. And in front of the Town Hall, where Michelangelo's "David" replica stands, it is to this day still a gathering place for citizens, where for six hundred years the contest of power and art has frozen into eternity here.
attractions.text_zh: 像一座露天的雕塑美术馆，浓缩了佛罗伦萨的政治与艺术史。广场中央的海神喷泉虽常被游客忽略，但其青铜人鱼与骏马的肌肉线条在暮色中被射灯照亮时，会突然迸发出巴洛克式的戏剧张力。而米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品所在的市政厅门前，至今仍是市民集会的地点，六百年来权力与艺术的角力在此凝固成永恒。

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier large-span circular-arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his feelings of longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over several hundred years, it has experienced floods, social turmoil, and wars yet has stood unwavering. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the city center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance period to the present. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica di Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are several cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for holding various cultural activities and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间 ， 广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Pisa to tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli at the historical and cultural center of Pisa. Travel to tour Cinque Terre, touring the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs along the Ligurian coastline; then travel to Milan, ending the wonderful itinerary.
Note: If, due to factors such as bad weather or a railway company strike, Cinque Terre cannot be toured, the itinerary will automatically change to touring the coastline cities by bus or other means.
overview.text_zh:
上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场。前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；随后前往米兰， 结束美好行程。
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en: No accommodation that day
accommodation.text_zh: 当天无住宿

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a paradise on the cliffs
Along the long Mediterranean coastline, the little train stops at each beautiful fishing village; watching the sun-bathed beaches, the waves quietly lapping against the rocks, and the colorful houses coming closer from afar, the curiosity to gaze upon the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak at the moment of arrival. Hiking through the alleys of the fishing villages, the closer you walk the more delightful the surprises. It is like savoring a five-colored visual feast of delicacies, savoring the flavors within bit by bit -- this scene is so beautiful that it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线小火车在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa, Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany province of Italy. It is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, selected by UNESCO as a World Heritage site. Legend has it that in 1590 AD, Galileo once conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, part of which is grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square there are four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Camposanto (cemetery). Around the square the ancient city walls and city gates are also preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa, and cemetery) as a World Heritage site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for the five cliffside villages and towns of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking route that strings the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the world's beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers, requiring about 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean Sea, on the other side are the mountains, and in front are the Italian fishing hamlets, making it a destination that countless hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
On this day, take the French TGV high-speed train on your own to the South of France (no guide accompanies you on the train); the train journey lasts about 2 to 3 hours. After arrival, gather together and begin the tour of the Provence villages, visiting in turn: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the ancient town of Gordes, and Sénanque Abbey (exterior), then check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Avignon Nord or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Important terms:
1. The itinerary of the last day and the first day of this product may be adjusted according to the train schedule; in that case the entire itinerary will be shifted by one day, the touring content will be exactly the same, only the order of visits will be adjusted. This is regarded as an equivalent itinerary and is not regarded as an itinerary change.
2. Because high-speed train seats in the Provence region are in tight supply during summer and are subject to cancellation risks such as suspension due to high temperatures, strikes, and delays, the itinerary of the French rail operator SNCF may, depending on availability, be adjusted to the Pont-du-Gard station or the Montpellier Sud de France station; in that case a shuttle bus will be provided to connect the different train stations in the South of France, and the order of the first-day and last-day itineraries may be adjusted. This is regarded as an equivalent itinerary and is not regarded as an itinerary change.
3. Some departure dates of this product may include the Marne-la-Vallée train station, which is a 38-minute ride from Paris Gare de Lyon (Paris light rail Line A); please consult sales before purchase.
4. During the Avignon Theatre Festival from July 4 to July 25, 2026, the hotel location may be adjusted; the actual details are subject to the departure notice.
5. There is no guide on the high-speed train; please board the train with your ticket on your own. Train tickets are issued under real names, so you need to carry your passport and an electronic version of the train ticket.
overview.text_zh:
当天自行乘坐法国高铁TGV前往南法（高铁上无导游陪同），高铁时长约2至3小时。 抵达后集合，开启普罗旺斯小镇之旅，依次游览：泉水小镇、高德古城、塞南克修道院（外观），随后入住酒店。
夜宿：阿维尼翁北部诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店
重要条款：
1.本产品的最后一天和第一天的行程，可能会根据火车班次调整，届时所有行程将调整一天，游览内容完全一致，游览先后顺序将会调整，视为同等行程，不视为行程调整。
2.由于普罗旺斯地区的夏季高铁位置紧张、受到高温停运、罢工、延期等取消风险，法国铁路运输公司SNCF的行程，根据可用性可能会调整到嘉尔站（Pont-du-Gard）或蒙彼利埃（Montpellier Sud de France）站，届时将提供穿梭巴士衔接南法不同火车站，可能会调整第一天和最后一天的行程的先后顺序，视为同等行程，不视为行程调整。
3.本产品的部分团期可能会包含马恩河谷火车站， 距离巴黎里昂火车站38分钟车程（巴黎轻轨A线）敬请 购买前咨询销售。
4.2026年7月4日至7月25日阿维尼翁戏剧节期间，酒店位置可能会有调整，具体以出团通知书为准。
5.高铁无导游陪同，请自行持票乘坐高铁，火车票为实名制，需要携带护照及电子版火车票。

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Avignon Nord or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The Novotel Avignon Nord is set in the green heart of Provence, about a 15-minute drive from Avignon's historic city center, making it an ideal base for exploring the City of the Popes and the Provençal countryside. The hotel adopts an overall modern minimalist style blended with Provence's natural atmosphere, in a quiet setting, with spacious and bright guest rooms and family rooms, fully equipped facilities; the restaurant features fresh local ingredients and French cuisine, while the bar and terrace area are an ideal space to relax over a drink and enjoy the sunshine of the South of France.
accommodation.text_zh: 阿维尼翁城北诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店 阿维尼翁城北诺富特酒店坐落于绿意环绕的普罗旺斯腹地，距离阿维尼翁历史城区约15分钟车程，是探索教皇之城与普罗旺斯乡村的理想下榻之选。酒店整体采用现代简约风格，融合普罗旺斯自然气息，环境宁静，拥有宽敞明亮的客房与家庭房，房间设施齐全，餐厅主打当地新鲜食材与法式料理，酒吧及露台区域是放松小酌、享受南法阳光的理想空间。

highlights.text_en:
Visit the ancient town of Gordes — the prototype of Hayao Miyazaki's "Castle in the Sky"
The town's buildings were all built in the Middle Ages; winding cobblestone paths climb upward, ivy-wrapped stone benches sit before doorways, fresh flowers stand before the abbey. With its unique style, this tranquil and rustic town is like a history book, vividly displaying the look and feel of the Middle Ages.
Avignon Street Art and Theatre Festival
Every July, Avignon transforms into the capital of theatre and street art, with brilliant puppet shows, operas, contemporary street art performances, and concerts; all-night street theatre performances light up the entire Avignon night.
highlights.text_zh:
拜访宫崎骏笔下《天空之城》的原型——高德古城
城中建筑均建于中世纪，蜿蜒而上的碎石路，青藤环绕的门前石凳，修道院前的鲜花，独特的风格，宁谧古朴的小镇仿佛一部史书，将中世纪的风貌活灵活现的展示。
阿维尼翁街头艺术戏剧节
每年的7月份阿维尼翁摇身一变成为了戏剧及街头艺术的首都，精彩绝伦的木偶剧，歌剧，当代街头艺术表演及音乐会，通宵的街头戏剧表演点亮整个阿维尼翁的夜晚。

attractions.text_en: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse in Provence is about half an hour from Avignon. It is a well-known spring resort village in the South of France, with a distinctive Provençal charm. The town is rustic and small, nestling quietly by the spring. In the scorching summer, the residents here do not feel the unbearable heat; the cool spring water flowing down from the mountains carries away the burning air and brings wave upon wave of refreshing coolness.
attractions.text_zh: 普罗旺斯泉水小镇（Fontaine de vaucluse），离 Avignon 大约半小时的路程，它是南法知名的泉水度假小村，具有别致的普罗旺斯风情，小镇古朴而小巧，静静的依偎在泉水之畔。炎炎夏日，这里的居民却体会不到那份酷暑难当，从山中流淌来的清凉泉水，带走了炙热的空气，送来了一波波爽人清凉。

attractions.text_en: In the valley opposite the Luberon mountains stands an ancient town built against the hillside; stone walls, houses, slopes, and a castle set off against the blue sky and white clouds — this is the very famous tourist destination in Provence, Gordes (also translated as "Gaode"). This hilltop ancient town once drew many artists to stay here; at the summit, the 16th-century Château de Gordes stands prominently, housing the works of many artists. In French towns, the artistic atmosphere is everywhere — a signboard, a shop window, all appear so exquisite. Colorful handicrafts and postcards catch the children's eyes; what a joyful thing it is to browse the little shops.
attractions.text_zh: 在吕贝隆山区对面的山谷里，有一座依山而建的古城，石壁、房屋、山坡、城堡，映衬着蓝天白云，这就是普罗旺斯地区非常著名的旅游胜地——勾禾德，也有译作“高德”。这座山丘古城曾经吸引了许多艺术家在此停留，山顶上16世纪的高德城堡卓然矗立，里面收藏了许多艺术家的作品。法国的小镇，艺术气息无处不在，一个招牌，一个橱窗，都显得那么的精致。色彩绚丽的手工艺品和明信片吸引着孩子们的眼球，逛小店是件多么开心的事情啊。

attractions.text_en: Sénanque Abbey is located 2 kilometers north of the stone town. It was built by the monks of Mazan Abbey in 1148; the entire abbey is hidden in a tranquil valley, and it is also the backdrop of the book "A Year in Provence." This place is called one of "the most beautiful valleys in all of France," and most postcards are shot here. Even so, the lavender fields here are relatively small in scale, and sometimes there are quite a lot of tourists, so please try to keep quiet when visiting.
attractions.text_zh: 塞南克修道院位于石头城小镇北方 2 公里处, 它是由 Mazan 修道院的僧侣们修建于 1148 年，整个修道院隐藏在宁静的山谷中，也是《山居岁月》一书的故事背景。这里被称为“全法国最美丽的山谷”之一，大部分明信片都取景于此。尽管如此，这里的薰衣草花田规模却相对较小，有时候游客较为密集，参观的时候请尽量保持安静。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, tour the old town of Avignon on your own: the Pont d'Avignon (the broken bridge over the Rhône) (exterior), the Palais des Papes (Popes' Palace) (exterior), then head to the Pont de Gau Ornithological Park and the South-of-France town of Aigues-Mortes, and ride the Aigues-Mortes sightseeing train to tour the pink salt lake. In the afternoon, head to the city of Marseille for sightseeing; Marseille gives one a sense of unadorned, wild charm. You may choose to visit Palais Longchamp park, the Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde, and the Old Port of Marseille. Afterward, check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Marseille or Crowne Plaza, an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，自行参观阿维尼翁古城，罗纳河断桥（外观），阿维尼翁教皇宫（外观），随后前往蓬德高鸟类公园和南法小镇艾格莫尔特、随后乘坐艾格莫尔特观光火车游览粉红盐湖，下午前往马赛市区游览，马赛让人有一种没有过多修饰的野性风情感，可选择参观隆尚宫公园，守护圣母圣殿，马赛旧港。之后入住酒店。
夜宿：马赛诺富特酒店或皇冠酒店同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Marseille or Crowne Plaza, an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in a prime spot in the center of Marseille, with easy access to the Old Port, the city center, and the major attractions of the Côte d'Azur. The hotel has an overall modern and comfortable style, with spacious and bright guest rooms and complete facilities. The hotel has an in-house restaurant and bar offering an abundant breakfast and light-meal options, making it an ideal choice for exploring the urban charm of Marseille and the Mediterranean ambiance.
accommodation.text_zh: 马赛诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店同等4星级酒店 酒店位于马赛市中心优越地段，轻松前往老港、市中心及蔚蓝海岸各大景点。酒店整体风格现代舒适，客房宽敞明亮，设施齐全。酒店内设餐厅与酒吧，提供丰富早餐及轻食选择，是探索马赛城市魅力与地中海风情的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The Camargue wetlands are a protected delta region where the southern French coast meets the rivers, and are also an important habitat for flamingos. Together with the rustic Aigues-Mortes and the algae-rich pink lake waters, they form a rosy-hued Mediterranean coast holiday paradise.
Dreamy pink salt lake
Thanks to salt-loving algae and high salinity, a natural pink landscape forms; rich in layers under the sunlight, with white salt mounds up to several meters high, it is extremely visually striking. The pink lake surface, blue sky, and white salt mountains make for highly photogenic shots — a popular, Instagram-style check-in spot. Along the way you can see flamingos, wetland vegetation, and the salt-pan ecosystem — a unique attraction combining nature, industrial heritage, and regional culture.
Pont de Gau Ornithological Park
Flocks of flamingos can be seen all year round; they are the most representative birds of the Camargue. Lakes, reed beds, and salt marshes interweave, fully presenting the natural wetland ecosystem of the Camargue. It is a habitat for 300+ bird species such as egrets, gray herons, pelicans, and white ibises, with wild birds frequently appearing. Visits follow pristine-ecology trails, with boardwalks and loop paths that are gentle throughout, suitable for all ages — it is a renowned European holy land for bird photography and nature observation.
highlights.text_zh:
卡马格湿地是南法海滨和河流交接的三角洲保护区，也是火烈鸟的重要栖息地，与古朴的艾格莫尔特，富含藻类的粉红湖水，一共构成的玫瑰色的地中海海岸的度假圣地。
梦幻粉色盐湖
因嗜盐藻与高盐度形成天然粉色景观，阳光下层次丰富，高达数米的白色盐丘，极具视觉冲击力；粉色湖面 、 蓝天 、白盐山，出片率极高，网红ins风打卡地， 沿途可见火烈鸟、湿地植被、盐田生态系统， 结合自然、工业遗产与地域文化的独特景点。
蓬格高鸟类公园
全年可见成群的火烈鸟，是卡马格最具代表性的鸟类；湖泊、芦苇荡、盐沼交错，完整呈现卡马格自然 湿地生态系统 ；鹭鸟、苍鹭、鹈鹕、白鹮等 300+种鸟类栖息地， 野生鸟类频繁出没；原生态步道参观，木栈道与环形步道，全程平缓，适合各年龄段，是欧洲知名鸟类 摄影与自然观察圣地 。

attractions.text_en: The Pont de Gau Ornithological Park is located in the heart of the Camargue wetlands. It is an important flamingo habitat and is famous around the world for flamingo viewing. The flamingos near the salt lake feed on the algae and shrimp in the lake, and their feathers turn a faint pink, lively and beautiful. The withered yellow reed fields, the white herds of horses, the pink salt marshes and flamingos, and the dark marsh lakes are all worth stopping for, lingering amid this unique natural scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 蓬德高鸟类公园位于卡马格湿地中心地带，是重要的火烈鸟栖息地，也因火烈鸟观赏而闻名于世界。盐湖附近的火烈鸟以湖中的藻类和虾为食，羽毛也会变成淡淡的粉红色，灵动唯美。枯黄的芦苇地、白色的马群、粉红色的盐沼和火烈鸟、深色的沼泽湖泊，都值得我们停下脚步，流连于这独特的自然风光。

attractions.text_en: Board the sightseeing little train of the pink salt lake for a tour of more than an hour in the central area of the Aigues-Mortes salt lake. The pink lake water blends with the snow-white quartz sand beaches along the shore, like strawberry ice cream. Prolonged sunlight and the high salt content of the lake water produce a large quantity of the β-carotene-rich Dunaliella salina algae in the lake, making the surface of the salt lake appear pink.
attractions.text_zh: 登上粉红盐湖的观光小火车，在艾格莫尔盐湖的中心地区进行一个多小时的游览。粉红的湖水与岸边雪白的石英沙滩相交融，如同草莓雪糕。长期光照和高含盐量湖水，令湖中产生大量丰富的β-胡萝卜素的杜氏盐藻，使得盐湖表面呈现粉红色。

attractions.text_en: Aigues-Mortes is a town that lies between "salt" and "sea," named for the marshes and stagnant pink lake waters that surround it. Aigues-Mortes is a traditional pink-salt-producing place in France, and also one of France's earliest representative attractions of agricultural civilization. The ancient town, blue sky, and pink salt lake complement one another; humanity and nature together paint this fairy-tale-like picture.
attractions.text_zh: 艾格莫尔特是处于“盐”与“海”之间的小镇，因其四周环布沼泽与不流动的粉红湖水而得名。艾格莫尔是法国传统的粉盐生产的地，也是法国最早的农业文明代表景点。古城、蓝天，粉红盐湖相映相成，人与自然共同描绘了这幅童话般的画面。

attractions.text_en: The Old Port of Marseille is one of the most iconic and historically significant places in this Mediterranean city. Ever since the ancient Greeks founded Marseille in 600 BC, the Old Port has been the heart of this city. Today, the Old Port is not only a mooring place for fishing boats and yachts, but also a popular gathering spot for locals and tourists. The two sides of the Old Port are surrounded by beautiful seaside promenades, lined with cafés, restaurants, and bars — an excellent place to enjoy the flavors of Marseille cuisine and leisure time. Whether it is the morning fish market, the bustling market, or the lights and music at night, this place is full of unique charm and vitality.
attractions.text_zh: 马赛老港是这座地中海城市最具标志性和历史意义的地点之一。自古希腊人于公元前600年建立马赛以来，老港一直是这座城市的心脏。如今，老港不仅是渔船和游艇的停泊地，也是当地居民和游客的热门聚集地。老港两侧环绕着美丽的滨海大道，沿岸布满了咖啡馆、餐馆和酒吧，是享受马赛风味美食和休闲时光的绝佳场所。无论是清晨的渔市、热闹的市场，还是夜晚的灯光与音乐，这里都充满了独特的魅力和活力。

attractions.name_en: Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde, Marseille
attractions.text_en: There are countless churches in Europe, but Marseille's Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde is absolutely one not to be missed. The golden statue of the Madonna and Child atop the church is the symbol of Marseille, and at the same time the patron protector of sailors, fishermen, and all the people of Marseille. The Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde sits on a small hill 154 meters high, with an observation deck outside, making it an excellent spot to view Marseille and the islands of the Mediterranean.
attractions.text_zh: 欧洲的教堂数不胜数，马赛的守护圣母教堂是绝对不能错过的一座。教堂顶上的圣母圣子金像是马赛的象征，同时也是水手、渔民和所有马赛人的保护神。守护圣母教堂座落在一座154米高的小山丘上，外设有观景台，是观赏马赛和地中海小岛的绝佳地点。

attractions.text_en: The Palais Longchamp is an arc-shaped building, combining Baroque, Roman, and Oriental styles in one, and is very magnificent. At its center is a group of sculptures and a fountain themed "Ode to Water," with a colonnade extending out to each side. Newlyweds often come here to take wedding photos; ladies who like to travel with wedding dresses may well pay a visit.
attractions.text_zh: 隆尚宫是一座弧形的建筑，集巴洛克、罗马及东方风格为一体，十分宏伟。它的中央是以“水之赞歌”为主题的群雕和喷泉，两边各延伸出去一段回廊，经常有新人来此拍摄婚纱照，喜欢带婚纱旅游的MM不妨一游。

attractions.text_en: Avignon is a world-famous historical and cultural city, the heart of Provence, and is also known as the "City of the Popes." It is also the venue of the world-famous Avignon Theatre Festival; every July this place becomes a holy land for theatre lovers. The old town of Avignon is encircled by city walls; within the city are the Palais des Papes (Popes' Palace) and the square, while outside the city is the Pont d'Avignon (broken bridge). These are all historical buildings from the medieval period, full of cultural weight and a sense of history!
attractions.text_zh: 阿维尼翁Avigon，是世界历史文化名城，普罗旺斯的心脏，还被称为“教皇之城”。这里还是世界著名戏剧节阿维尼翁戏剧节的举办地，每年的7月这里就成为了戏剧爱好者的圣地。阿维尼翁老城由城墙环绕，城内有阿维尼翁教皇宫、广场，城外有阿维尼翁断桥，都是中世纪时期的历史建筑，充满了文化的厚重感与历史感！

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off for the lavender fields of Valensole and the D907 road (during the lavender flowering season); immerse yourself in the romantic sea of flowers and leave behind purple memories. In the afternoon, head to Cannes, the film capital and seaside town of the South of France, to visit the Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame, and stroll freely along the Cannes seaside promenade. Then head to Saint-Paul-de-Vence, a medieval art village perched on a hilltop. In the evening, head to Antibes and tour the old town of Antibes on your own. Afterward, check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Antibes Sophia Antipolis or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Starting from mid-to-late May each year, Provence blooms with a large quantity of purple lupines (Lupinus Violet); depending on temperature differences, the lavender will bloom in mid-to-late June, varying by altitude and cultivated variety, and is generally harvested by late July. If the lavender cannot be visited within the tour dates, it will be changed to a visit to the ceramics town.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路的薰衣草花田（薰衣草花期期间），置身浪漫花海，留下紫色记忆；下午 前往南法电影重镇及海滨小城-戛纳，参观影节宫、星光大道，自由漫步戛纳海滨大道，随后 前往坐落在山顶上的中世纪艺术村庄圣保罗德旺斯。傍晚前往昂提布，自行游览昂提布老城。之后入住酒店。
夜宿：诺富特安提比斯索非亚安蒂波利斯或同等4星酒店
备注：每年5月中下旬开始、普罗旺斯盛开大量的紫色鲁冰花（Lupinus Violet），根据不同的气温薰衣草将会在6月中下旬绽放，不同海拔高度和种植品种、一般截止到7月下旬收割。如团期内无法参观薰衣草，则更改为参观陶瓷小镇。

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Antibes or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in the core heart of the Côte d'Azur, surrounded by greenery, in a quiet and tranquil setting. The hotel offers very convenient access to the old town of Antibes and the Mediterranean coastline. The hotel has an overall modern and elegant style, integrating Mediterranean natural elements, with spacious and bright guest rooms. The hotel restaurant LE Fedor and the bar area provide an abundant breakfast, Mediterranean-style lunch/dinner, and relaxing drink service; guests may choose to dine in the restaurant, on the terrace, or in their rooms — it is a high-quality hotel combining modern style with the natural scenery of the Mediterranean.
accommodation.text_zh: 昂提布诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店 酒店坐落于蔚蓝海岸核心腹地，绿意环绕、环境静谧。酒店前往昂提布老城及地中海海岸线也十分便捷，酒店整体风格现代雅致，融入地中海自然元素，客房空间宽敞明亮，酒店餐厅 LE Fedor 和酒吧区域提供丰盛的早餐、地中海风味午餐/晚餐及轻松饮品服务，宾客可选择在餐厅、露台或客房内用餐，是一处兼具现代格调与地中海自然风光的高品质酒店。

highlights.text_en:
Flower fields stitched into a sea, pursuing the romantic flower language of lavender
Every summer, the lavender fields of Provence bloom in vast expanses, and the whole air is filled with the faint fragrance of lavender. Check in at the romantic and beautiful filming location of Chiung Yao's "Dream Behind the Curtain Again," pursue lavender's flower language of waiting for love, and immerse yourself in the sea-like flower fields…
highlights.text_zh:
花田连缀成海，追寻薰衣草浪漫花语
每年入夏，普罗旺斯的薰衣草花田就会大片盛开，整个空气里都弥漫着薰衣草淡淡的花香，打卡琼瑶《又见一帘幽梦》浪漫唯美的拍摄地，追寻着薰衣草等待爱情的花语，沉浸如海花田……

attractions.text_en: Valensole has the beautiful lavender fields of the Provence region. It was selected by National Geographic as one of the most beautiful places in the world; at the same time, it is also the filming location of Chiung Yao's eponymous novel "Dream Behind the Curtain" and "Dream Behind the Curtain Again."
attractions.text_zh: 瓦朗索勒拥有普罗旺斯地区美丽的薰衣草花田。国家地理杂志评选为世界上美丽的地方之一，同时，这里也是琼瑶同名小说《一帘幽梦》和《又见一帘幽梦》的拍摄地。

attractions.name_en: Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame
attractions.text_en: Built in 1982, it is the important venue of the Cannes Film Festival, where the highly anticipated Palme d'Or is awarded. The Palais des Festivals currently has a total exhibition area of 44,000 square meters, containing 15 auditoriums. The Walk of Fame is one of the attractions not to be missed in Cannes; located next to the Palais des Festivals, here you can see the handprints that many stars have pressed onto the sidewalk, now accumulating to more than 300.
attractions.text_zh: 建于 1982 年，是戛纳影展的重要会议地点，备受注目的金棕榈奖即在此颁发。电影宫目前总共有 44000 平方米的展览面积，内含 15 个音乐厅星光大道是到戛纳不可错过的景点之一，位于电影宫旁，可以在这里看到许多明星在这里的人行道上按下的手印，现在已经累计了有300 多个了。

attractions.text_en: Antibes was honored as a European City of Tourism and Culture in 2007. The old town's fish market, the fortifications located on the beach, and the myriad small vendors and bistros within the old city make it not only a seaside paradise but also a city with an excellent humanistic atmosphere. The old-town market and fish market, together with this city, were inscribed as a UNESCO protected heritage of humanity. Many shops and eateries are spread along both sides of the stone-paved streets, and the Provençal market in the city is a famous fresh-produce market. Provençal charm and the vitality of the Côte d'Azur blend together here.
attractions.text_zh: 昂蒂布在2007年获得欧洲旅游文化之城的美誉，老城鱼市及位于海滩上的城防堡垒，以及古城内琳琳总总的小商贩，小酒馆，不仅是海滨的天堂也是人文气息极好的一个城市，老城集市和鱼市与这个城市一起载入联合国人类保护遗产，很多商铺和食肆遍布在石板路两侧，城中的普罗旺斯市场是著名生鲜市场。普罗旺斯风情和蔚蓝海岸的活力在这里融合。

attractions.text_en: Saint-Paul-de-Vence is one of the most artistic medieval hilltop towns on France's Côte d'Azur, perched on the heights between Nice and Antibes. It is famous for its well-preserved stone walls, winding narrow alleys, and the galleries spread throughout, and once attracted many artists such as Marc Chagall and Pablo Picasso to live and create here for long periods. The town blends history, art, and natural scenery; looking out from the city walls, one can overlook the Mediterranean and the Provençal hills — a classic destination that is both romantic and rich in cultural heritage.
attractions.text_zh: 圣保罗德旺斯是法国蔚蓝海岸最具艺术气息的中世纪山城之一，坐落在尼斯与昂提布之间的高地上。这里以保存完好的石砌城墙、蜿蜒狭窄的小巷和遍布的画廊而闻名，曾吸引 Marc Chagall 、 Pablo Picasso 等众多艺术家长期居住与创作。小镇融合了历史、艺术与自然风光，从城墙远眺可俯瞰地中海与普罗旺斯丘陵，是一个既浪漫又充满文化底蕴的经典目的地。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off from Antibes to Menton to tour the "Lemon Town," then head to the beautiful scenic line of the Côte d'Azur, the Princess Grace of Monaco Avenue. Drive along the Moyenne Corniche, the famous cliff road of the South of France, admiring Villefranche-sur-Mer, known as a city of beautiful seaside scenery, and visit Monaco and the yacht harbor. In the afternoon, head to the clifftop town of Èze to look out over the Mediterranean, visit the perfume museum to learn about the production and blending process of perfume, then return to Nice to tour freely the Baie des Anges (Bay of Angels) beach and the Promenade des Anglais of Nice. Afterward, check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Antibes Sophia Antipolis or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早上从昂提布出发前往 芒通游览“柠檬小镇”，随后 前往蔚蓝海岸美丽的风景线摩纳哥格雷斯公主大道。随车行走在Moyenne Corniche南法出名的峭壁之路，欣赏有海滨美景城之称的海滨自由城，参观摩纳哥及游艇码头。 下午前往 悬崖小镇-埃兹俯眺地中海，拜访香水博物馆了解香水的生产调配过程，随后返回尼斯，自由参观尼斯天使湾沙滩、尼斯英格兰海滨大道。随后入住酒店。
夜宿： 诺富特 昂提布斯索非亚安蒂波利斯或同等4星 酒店

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Antibes or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in the core heart of the Côte d'Azur, surrounded by greenery, in a quiet and tranquil setting. The hotel offers very convenient access to the old town of Antibes and the Mediterranean coastline. The hotel has an overall modern and elegant style, integrating Mediterranean natural elements, with spacious and bright guest rooms. The hotel restaurant LE Fedor and the bar area provide an abundant breakfast, Mediterranean-style lunch/dinner, and relaxing drink service; guests may choose to dine in the restaurant, on the terrace, or in their rooms — it is a high-quality hotel combining modern style with the natural scenery of the Mediterranean.
accommodation.text_zh: 昂提布诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店 酒店坐落于蔚蓝海岸核心腹地，绿意环绕、环境静谧。酒店前往昂提布老城及地中海海岸线也十分便捷，酒店整体风格现代雅致，融入地中海自然元素，客房空间宽敞明亮，酒店餐厅 LE Fedor 和酒吧区域提供丰盛的早餐、地中海风味午餐/晚餐及轻松饮品服务，宾客可选择在餐厅、露台或客房内用餐，是一处兼具现代格调与地中海自然风光的高品质酒店。

highlights.text_en:
Drive the cliff road, seeking beautiful photo spots
This cliff road named after Princess Grace of Monaco, AV. PRINCESSE DE GRACE, passes through the beautiful scenery of the Côte d'Azur at Villefranche-sur-Mer and the top of Villefranche; driving along the coastline on the cliff road, stopping and going by the seaside, it seeks out beautiful seaside photo spots for you.
Visit the perfume museum, learn the past and present of perfume
Visit the distillation process of perfume, the perfume laboratory, and the manufacturing workshop; these places will unveil the mysterious veil of perfume making, showing everyone the "secrets" of making perfume, lotion, and soap.
highlights.text_zh:
行车峭壁公路，找寻美丽拍摄点
这条以摩纳哥格蕾丝公主命名的峭壁公路 AV.PRINCESSE DE GRACE 途径蔚蓝海岸美丽风景Villefranche sur mer以及海滨自由城的顶端，行车在峭壁公路海岸线上的海滨测停停走走，为你找寻美丽海滨的拍摄点。
探访香水博物馆，了解香水的前世今生
参观香水的蒸馏过程、香水实验室和制造车间，这些场所将揭开香水制作的神秘面纱，向大家展示制造香水、化妆水以及香皂的“秘密”。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Nice has well preserved various styles of old buildings from the 18th century onward, such as Baroque-style churches and Italian-style buildings. Walking into the labyrinth-like old town, strolling through the rising-and-falling, winding, crisscrossing alleys, admiring the brightly colored and distinctively styled buildings, and treasure-hunting in the variously characterful little shops. If you walk to the Cours Saleya square market, all kinds of bright fruits, candies, and fresh flowers immediately come into view, dazzling the eye.
attractions.text_zh: 尼斯的老城区，这里完好地保留了18世纪以来的各种风格的古老建筑，如巴洛克风格的教堂，意大利风格的建筑物等。走进迷宫般的老城区，在高低蜿蜒，纵横曲折的小巷中漫步，欣赏颜色鲜明，风格各异的建筑，在各具特色的小店中淘宝。如果走到萨雷雅的广场集市(CoursSaleya)，各种鲜艳的水果、糖果、鲜花立刻映入眼帘，令人目不暇接。

attractions.name_en: Baie des Anges (Bay of Angels), Nice
attractions.text_en: The Bay of Angels is right next to the Promenade des Anglais, named for its resemblance to an angel's wings. The sea here is extremely azure, a great place to spend the summer. Nice's beaches are very special, all paved with pebbles; stepping on them is a bit prickly to the feet, but it has a charm all its own. Climbing up to the castle and looking down from the east is an advantageous angle for admiring the Bay of Angels.
attractions.text_zh: 天使湾紧邻英国人漫步大道，因形似天使的翅膀而得名，这里的海十分湛蓝，是消夏的好地方 。尼斯的海滩很特别，都是由鹅卵石铺成的，踩上去有些扎脚，却别有一番趣味。 爬上城堡从东面俯瞰是欣赏天使湾的有利角度。

attractions.text_en: Just like the citrus fruits abundantly produced locally, Menton is wrapped in lemon tones. Whether it is the long beaches, the buildings of all kinds, or the expanses of citrus orchards, all seem to become nature's palette, dyeing this seaside town a special yellow in the height of summer. Get lost at the crossroads of Menton's old town, walk through narrow and quiet streets between light and shadow, admire the Baroque-style architecture, feel the sea breeze weaving between the houses, and set foot on the "Lemon Road" — it will make you linger and forget to leave.
attractions.text_zh: 和当地盛产的柑橘类水果一样，芒东被柠檬色调所包裹。无论是修长的海滩，各式各样的建筑，还是成片的柑橘果园，仿佛都成为了自然的调色板，在盛夏时节为这座海滨小镇染上了特别的黄色。迷失在芒东老城区的十字路口，走过光与影之间狭窄而安静的街道，欣赏巴洛克式风格的建筑，感受穿梭在房屋之间的海风，踏上“柠檬之路”将会让你流连忘返。

attractions.text_en: As one of the most densely populated countries in the world and a classic micro-state, Monaco has a land area of only 2 square kilometers. Benefiting from its income from urban sightseeing and seaside tourism, Monaco is also one of the wealthiest countries; among them, Monaco's yacht harbor and Monte Carlo are the most representative touring areas.
attractions.text_zh: 作为世界上人口稠密的国家和经典的微型国家，摩纳哥国土面积仅有2平方公里，得利于城市观光及海滨观光收入，摩纳哥也是最富裕的国家之一、其中摩纳哥的游艇海港和蒙特卡洛为最具有代表性的游览区域。

attractions.text_en: The distinctive Mediterranean-charm "eagle's nest" town — the Èze Exotic Garden, a town of pure classic Monaco style; at its summit a Mediterranean garden is planted, and it also occupies a fine spot for viewing the cliff-edge scenery. At the same time, it is the back garden of France's famous Château de la Chèvre d'Or (Golden Goat) hotel, and a wonderful spot for a bird's-eye view of the Mediterranean scenery. All kinds of Mediterranean-characteristic plants correspond with the classic little town.
attractions.text_zh: 特有的地中海风情“鹫巢”小镇——埃兹异国风情花园，纯古典摩纳哥风格的小镇，山顶种植有地中海花园，也坐落着观看悬崖美景的佳位，同时是法国有名的金羊酒店的后花园，也是鸟瞰地中海美景的美妙位置。各种地中海特色植物与古典小镇相应。

attractions.text_en: The perfume museum, set at the foot of the Èze mountain, quietly and serenely tells people the story of perfume. The museum was completed in 1983 and is full of the flavor of the Mediterranean. The perfume museum aims to preserve France's renowned perfume industry and to promote its international development. The museum has exhibition halls with 18th-century architectural style, mainly divided into three main areas: the production-process area, the perfume-history area, and the fragrance-collection area. Here, people can not only learn about the historical development of perfume, the blending process and production methods of perfume, but also discover rare perfume varieties found in few places in the world.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落在埃兹山下的香水博物馆，宁静安详的向人们诉说着香水的故事。该馆于1983年落成，充满了地中海的味道。香水博物馆，旨在保存法国享有盛名的香水工业和促进其香水工业在国际上的发展。馆中有着十八世纪建筑风格的展览厅，主要分三个主要区域：生产过程区，香水历史区和香料收藏品区。在这里，人们不仅可以了解香水的历史发展，香水的调配过程和生产方式，还可以发现世界上少有的香水品种。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off from Antibes on the Côte d'Azur and head along the Mediterranean toward the charming Cassis, taking a cruise to admire the steep cliffs, azure waters, and the unique coastal landforms. Then head to the historic city of Arles to explore the ancient Roman amphitheatre and the classic scenes from Van Gogh's paintings. In the afternoon, arrive at Nîmes, stroll through the old town, and feel the well-preserved Roman ruins and the charm of the South of France, then check in to the hotel in Nîmes.
Overnight: Best Western Orangery hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，从蔚蓝海岸的昂提布出发，沿地中海驶向迷人的卡西斯，乘坐游轮欣赏险峻悬崖、碧蓝海水与海岸独特地貌。随后前往历史名城阿尔勒，探索古罗马竞技场与梵高笔下的经典景观。下午抵达尼姆，漫步古城，感受保存完好的罗马遗迹与南法风情，随后入住尼姆酒店。
夜宿：贝斯特韦斯特橘园酒店或同等4星酒店

accommodation.text_en: Best Western Orangery hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is set within a private garden in the historic French city of Nîmes, in a quiet and elegant setting, only a few minutes' drive from the old town of Nîmes and the Roman amphitheatre. The hotel cleverly avoids the noise of the city while maintaining an ideal distance from the core attractions. The hotel was converted from an elegant historic building, with an overall style blending traditional French charm and modern comfortable design. The hotel's dining focuses mainly on fresh, healthy Mediterranean flavors, and the terrace dining experience is especially pleasant — it is an ideal place to stay for exploring the ancient Roman heritage of Nîmes and the charm of the South of France.
accommodation.text_zh: 贝斯特韦斯特橘园酒店或同等4星酒店 酒店坐落于法国历史名城尼姆的一片私密花园之中，环境安静优雅，距离尼姆古城与罗马竞技场仅数分钟车程。酒店巧妙避开城市喧嚣，同时又与核心景点保持理想距离，酒店由典雅的历史建筑改造而成，整体风格融合传统法式韵味与现代舒适设计。酒店餐饮以新鲜、健康的地中海风味为主，露台用餐体验尤为惬意，是探索尼姆古罗马遗产与南法风情的理想下榻之选。

highlights.text_en:
Calanques cruise
Along France's Côte d'Azur, take a boat to enjoy the most classic calanque scenery of the French Côte d'Azur, admiring along the way the tranquil waters of the Port-Miou calanque, the pink limestone cliffs of the Port-Pin calanque, and the most famous Calanque En-Vau calanque with its magnificent azure waters and cliffs. You can both photograph the stunning coastal scenery and experience the natural wonders of the Mediterranean — it is the must-choose highlight route for touring Cassis.
highlights.text_zh:
卡朗格峡湾游船
沿着法国蔚蓝海岸，乘船畅法国蔚蓝海岸最经典的峡湾景观，沿途欣赏 Port-Miou 港口峡湾的宁静水面、Port-Pin 峡湾的粉色石灰岩悬崖，以及最著名的Calanque En-Vau 峡湾的壮丽碧水与峭壁。既能拍摄绝美海岸风光，又能体验地中海自然奇观，是卡西斯游览的必选精华路线。

attractions.text_en: Arles is one of the important destinations of Provence tourism, rustic and full of artistic atmosphere. Apart from a series of attractions related to Van Gogh, it is also a city where the ancient Roman ruins of the South of France are concentrated, hailed as the "Little Rome of the Gauls." Arles prospered because of Julius Caesar's occupation, and became world-famous because of Van Gogh's paintings. Van Gogh is the symbol and pride of this town. He not only painted here, but also walked the final stretch of his life here. Most of the prototypes of his paintings originate from here. Everywhere here, one can feel Van Gogh's footsteps.
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔勒是普罗旺斯旅游的重要目的地之一，古朴而充满着艺术气息，这里除了一系列与梵高有关的景点以外，还是南法古罗马遗迹集中的城市，被誉为“高卢人的小罗马”。Arles因凯撒大帝的占领，而得到繁荣；因梵高的画作，而蜚声世界。梵高是这个小镇的象征和骄傲。他不仅仅在这里作画，人生的终途也是在这里走过的。他画作的大部分原型都是源于这里。在这里随处都能感受到梵高的足迹。

attractions.text_en: The Calanques are located in the southeast of France's Côte d'Azur, a group of natural inlets composed of limestone cliffs and azure Mediterranean waters. The calanques here are long, narrow, and deep, with steep cliffs and water as clear as gemstones; the scenery is magnificent, and they are hailed as the "secret realm of the Mediterranean." Visitors can take a boat to explore the hidden small coves and grottoes up close, admiring the pristine natural scenery along the way, and can also experience Provençal charm and local cuisine in the shoreside town of Cassis.
attractions.text_zh: 卡朗格峡湾位于法国蔚蓝海岸东南部，是一片由石灰岩峭壁和碧蓝地中海水域组成的天然峡湾群。这里的峡湾狭长幽深、悬崖险峻，水色清澈如宝石，景色壮丽，被誉为“地中海的秘境”。游客可乘船近距离探索隐秘小湾和岩洞，沿途欣赏原始自然风光，也可在岸边小镇卡西斯体验南法风情与当地美食。

attractions.text_en: Set within the Côte d'Azur National Park, Cassis is a colorful fishing village embraced by mountains and sea, a seaside holiday spot beloved by the French. Cassis is surrounded by mountains on three sides and faces the sea on one side; colorful houses are built by the water, and the small harbor moors fishing boats and yachts — a landscape unique to the Provence region. This is a long, narrow valley that was eroded by rivers and then partially submerged by seawater, forming the cliffs that now stand tall and the hidden, amphibious little coves. Combining the three major features of land, sea, and city surroundings in one, this national park has more than 900 species of wild plants and abundant marine life.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落于蔚蓝海岸国家公园的卡西斯 是一个山海相拥的彩色渔村， 法国人喜爱的海滨度假地。卡西斯三面环山，一面临海，五彩缤纷的房屋临水而建，小巧的港口停泊着渔船和游艇，是普罗旺斯地区的特有景观，这里是被河流侵蚀后又部分被海水淹没的狭长山谷，形成了现在耸立的峭壁和隐蔽海陆两栖的小海湾，集陆地、海洋和城市周边三大特点于一身的国家公园，拥有900多种野生植物和丰富的海洋生物。

overview.text_en:
On this day, tour on foot the old town of Nîmes, the city of water sprites, exploring the glory and mystery of ancient Rome and the mysterious garden, then set off from the Nîmes or Avignon train station and take the French TGV high-speed train on your own; after arrival (no guide accompanies you on the train), conclude the journey through the South of France.
Important terms:
Because high-speed train seats in the Provence region are in tight supply during summer and are subject to cancellation risks such as suspension due to high temperatures, strikes, and delays, the itinerary of the French rail operator SNCF may, depending on availability, be adjusted to the Avignon station (Gare Avignon) or the Montpellier Sud de France station; in that case a shuttle bus will be provided to connect the different train stations in the South of France, and the order of the first-day and last-day itineraries may be adjusted. This is regarded as an equivalent itinerary and is not regarded as an itinerary change.
overview.text_zh:
当天徒步参观水精灵之城尼姆古城，探索古罗马的辉煌和神秘花园，随后从尼姆或阿维尼翁火车站出发，自行乘坐法国TGV高铁抵达后（高铁上无导游陪同），结束南法旅程。
重要条款：
由于普罗旺斯地区的夏季高铁位置紧张、受到高温停运、罢工、延期等取消风险，法国铁路运输公司SNCF的行程，根据可用性可能会调整到阿维尼翁站（Gare Avignon）或蒙彼利埃（Montpellier Sud de France）站，届时将提供穿梭巴士衔接南法不同火车站，可能会调整第一天和最后一天的行程的先后顺序，视为同等行程，不视为行程调整。

accommodation.text_en: No accommodation on this day
accommodation.text_zh: 当天无住宿

highlights.text_en:
Explore the city of water sprites
Starting from the Avenue Feuchères (the spring-water avenue) at the Nîmes train station, learn about the architectural structure of the ancient Roman aqueduct bridge from the Roman period, then head to the mysterious garden and explore on foot the glory of ancient Rome.
highlights.text_zh:
探索水精灵之城
从尼姆火车站的水泉大道Avenue feucheres了解古罗马时期水渠桥的建筑结构开始前往神秘花园，徒步探索古罗马的辉煌。

attractions.text_en: A historic ancient city from the ancient Roman period, Nîmes gathers too many amazing crystallizations of ancient Roman wisdom: the well-preserved ancient Roman amphitheatre; the historic-courtyard spring-side park (le Jardin de la Fontaine), as if hinting that Nîmes is a warm city that lives by its springs; and on the hills, the ancient Roman watchtower, the Tour Magne (la Tour de Magne) — climbing high and looking afar, one can take in the boundless scenery in a single view.
attractions.text_zh: 古罗马时期的历史古城，尼姆汇集了太多古罗马人令人惊叹的智慧结晶：保存完好的古罗马竞技场；古迹庭院泉边公园(le Jardin de la Fontaine)，像在暗示尼姆即是一座以泉为生的暖城；还有丘陵上的古罗马瞭望塔马涅塔(la Tour de Magne)，登高远望，可将无限风光尽收眼底。

attractions.text_en: The architectural feature of the Maison Carrée is its Corinthian columns. This building is about 17 meters high and 26 meters deep, built in the 1st century BC during the era of Emperor Augustus (Auguste). It has preserved the form of a Roman-period temple exactly as it was. After the temple was built, it once served as the city hall and a church, and now it is an antiquities museum (Musée des Antiques).
attractions.text_zh: 方形神殿的建筑特色是科林斯式的圆柱。这座建筑高约17米，深26米，建于公元前1世纪的奥古斯都大帝(Auguste)时代，它把罗马时期的神殿形式原原本本的保留了下来。神殿建成后曾作为市政府大楼和教堂，现在则为古代博物馆(Musee des Antigues)。

attractions.text_en: Built more than a thousand years ago, the mysterious garden — the historic-courtyard spring-side park — can be called a great architectural marvel; the well-preserved ancient Roman building complex and woodland-garden landscape. Because the Nîmes of that time was a city that developed centered around its spring water, people firmly believed that the spring water had sprites, and the spring-side park was the garden that people of that time built to dedicate to the spirits of the spring water.
attractions.text_zh: 建于一千多年前的神秘花园——古迹庭院泉边公园，堪称一大建筑奇迹；保存完好的古罗马建筑群和林园景观，因当时的尼姆是以泉水为中心发展而成的都市，所以人们深信泉水是有精灵的，而泉边公园就是当时人们为了奉献给泉水的精灵而建造出来的庭园。

attractions.text_en: Trondheim is Norway's third-largest city, home to one of the most renowned research universities in the Nordic region, and full of youthful energy. It was also the coronation site and ancient capital of Norway's first king, and was once the religious and political center of medieval Norway. With the solemnity of Nidaros Cathedral, the colorfulness of the Bakklandet wooden houses, and the clear waters of the Nidelva River as its backdrop, it is a city that perfectly blends profound history with vibrant energy. There is no need to rush from checkpoint to checkpoint—simply slow your pace and feel another deep charm of Norway beyond its natural fjords, amid the dignity of the old church, the colorfulness of the old wooden houses, and the vitality of the university town.
attractions.text_zh: 特隆赫姆是挪威第三大城市，拥有北欧著名的研究型大学之一，充满年轻活力。同时它也是挪威第一任国王的加冕地与古都，曾是中世纪挪威的宗教与权力中心。以尼德罗斯主教座堂的深沉、巴克兰德木屋的缤纷和尼德尔河的清澈为底色，一座将厚重历史与鲜活动力完美融合的城市。您无需匆忙打卡，只需放慢脚步，在古教堂的庄严、老木屋的缤纷和大学城的朝气中，感受挪威除了自然峡湾之外的另一种深厚韵味。

attractions.text_en: Norway's national cathedral and an important medieval cathedral in the Nordic region, it is the coronation church of Norwegian kings, with magnificent and imposing architecture. First built in 1070, it stands atop the tomb of Saint Olaf, Norway's patron saint. Having survived several fires and reconstructions, it is a rare cathedral of pure Gothic style in the Nordic region.
attractions.text_zh: 挪威的国家圣堂，北欧重要的中世纪大教堂，挪威国王的加冕教堂，建筑雄伟壮观。始建于1070年，坐落在挪威守护神圣奥拉夫的墓葬之上，历经数次大火与重建，是北欧罕见的一座纯粹哥特式风格的大教堂。

attractions.text_en: This red wooden bridge is often called the "Gate of Happiness," connecting the city center with the traditional neighborhoods of the old town. Standing on the bridge and looking to one side, you see the colorful warehouses neatly arranged along the riverbank; to the other side, the slowly flowing Nidelva River and its reflections on the water. Early morning and dusk are the most beautiful moments here.
attractions.text_zh: 这座红色木桥常被称为“幸福之门”，连接着市中心与老城的传统街区。站在桥上，向一侧望去，是整齐排列在河畔的彩色仓库；向另一侧，则是缓缓流淌的尼德河与水中倒影。清晨和傍晚是这里最美的时刻。

attractions.text_en: Kristiansund is located on 4 small islands in the North Sea in western Norway and enjoys beautiful coastal scenery. The opera house in Kristiansund is one of Norway's oldest opera houses, first built in 1914. It is a beautiful Art Nouveau-style building and one of the few buildings that survived World War II. The Innlandet district is the old town of Kristiansund, where you can see unique and beautiful seaside architecture, and the few buildings that survived World War II have all been well preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 克里斯蒂安松位于挪威西部北海中的4个小岛上，享有美丽的海岸景观。克里斯蒂安松市内的歌剧院，是挪威古老的歌剧院之一，始建于1914年，是一座美丽的新艺术运动风格建筑，是在二战中幸存的少数建筑之一。Innlandet区是克里斯蒂安松的老城区，可以看到独特而美丽的海边建筑，二战中幸存的少数建筑也都得以完善保存。

attractions.text_en: The Atlantic Road is a monumental construction of Norway, 36 kilometers in total length, running from Kårvåg to Bud. In 2011, the Atlantic Road was named by Britain's The Guardian as one of the world's best road trip destinations. The Atlantic Road not only has its ingenious engineering design, but the scenery on both sides of the road is also breathtaking, and visitors can take in the beautiful natural landscapes and ecological environment of the Atlantic Ocean along this road.
attractions.text_zh: 大西洋公路是挪威世纪性建筑，全程36公里，是从 Kårvåg 到 Bud之间的一段路线。2011年，大西洋公路被英国《卫报》评选为世界最佳公路旅行目的地之一。大西洋公路不仅有其匠心独运的工程设计，公路两旁的风景也令人叹为观止，游客们可以在这条路上饱览大西洋美丽的自然景观和生态环境。

attractions.text_en: The City of Midnight Sun—Molde is located on the riverbank at the wide estuary of the Romsdalsfjord, and is a city in the northwestern region of Norway. When Molde is mentioned, the first thing Norwegians think of is jazz. Every July, the International Midnight Jazz Festival is held here, one of the longest-running jazz festivals in Europe. During the festival, visitors from countries across the European continent come because of its fame. Standing on the Varden viewpoint at an altitude of 407 meters, you can take in the beautiful views of the city, the fjord, and the islands, and also enjoy the Molde panorama famous for its 222 snow-covered mountain peaks.
attractions.text_zh: 午夜阳光之城——莫尔德位于罗姆达尔峡湾（Romsdalsfjord）宽阔河口处的河岸上，是挪威西北部地区城市。提到莫尔德，挪威人首先会想到的就是爵士乐。每年七月，国际午夜爵士音乐节在此举行，这是欧洲历史悠久的爵士音乐节。音乐节期间，来自欧洲大陆各国的游客慕名而来。站在海拔407米的瓦尔登观景台上可以一览城市、峡湾、岛屿的美景还可以欣赏以222座被白雪覆盖的山峰闻名的莫尔德全景。

attractions.text_en: The Flydalsjuvet cliff viewpoint is a scenic spot that frequently appears on postcards. From the Flydalsjuvet cliff viewpoint, you can take in the entire view of the small town of Geiranger in the valley, the Geirangerfjord, and the cruise ships at port. A protruding cliff beside the viewpoint is often called the Geiranger Rock by travelers, and is mentioned together with Preikestolen/Pulpit Rock, Kjeragbolten, and Trolltunga.
attractions.text_zh: 弗里达斯悬崖观景台是明信片上经常出现的一个景点，在弗里达斯悬崖观景台可以将峡谷中的盖朗厄尔小城和盖朗厄尔峡湾以及靠港的邮轮尽收眼底。观景台旁一座突出的悬崖经常被旅行者称为盖朗厄尔石(盖朗格石)，与布道石/祈祷峰、奇迹石和山妖之舌一起被提及。

attractions.text_en: Located north of Bergen on the southwestern coast of Norway, it is one of the most beautiful and mysterious of Norway's fjords. The fjord is 16 kilometers long in total, with mountains rising over 1,500 meters above sea level on both banks, making it one of the world's premier sightseeing destinations. At the head of the fjord is the village of Geiranger, reachable only by a 1,000-meter-long road winding down the hillside; in summer, many tourists come on foot to vacation. Besides the Geiranger Fjord Church built in 1842, the village also has the Flydalsjuvet viewpoint frequently visited by photographers and the Dalsnibba viewpoint at an altitude of 1,500 meters.
attractions.text_zh: 位于挪威西南岸的卑尔根北部，是挪威峡湾中美丽而神秘的一处。峡湾全长16公里，两岸耸立着海拔1500米以上的群山，是世界上数一数二的观光胜地，峡湾顶端是盖朗厄尔村，到该村仅靠一条沿山坡蜿蜒而下的长1000米的道路，夏季徒步前来度假的游客很多。村里除1842年建造的盖朗厄尔峡湾教堂外，还有摄影师经常光顾的弗里达尔斯尤威展望台和海拔1500米高的达尔斯尼巴展望台。

attractions.text_en: Geirangerfjord is famous for its many waterfalls, and the Seven Sisters Waterfall is the most dazzling star among them. The Seven Sisters Waterfall (Norwegian: De Syv Søstrene or Dei Sju Systrene or Knivsflåfossen) is Norway's 39th-highest waterfall and is part of the Geiranger World Heritage Site. Seven distinct waterfalls cascade down through the air together, like sisters dancing together. One of the falls has a drop of 250 meters. Opposite the Seven Sisters Waterfall is the Suitor (the Suitor or Frieren), forever courting the Seven Sisters without cease. These waterfalls are most spectacular between May and July.
attractions.text_zh: 盖朗厄尔峡湾以瀑布众多闻名，而七姐妹瀑布则是这些瀑布中最亮眼的明星。七姐妹瀑布（挪威语DeSyvSøstrene或DeiSjuSystrene或Knivsflåfossen）是挪威第39高的瀑布，也是盖朗厄尔世界遗产的组成部分。七条明显的瀑布从空中一起飞流而下，像是一起舞蹈的姐妹们。其中一条瀑布有250米落差。七姐妹瀑布的对面，就是求婚者瀑布(thesuitor或Frieren)，永不停歇的对七姐妹展开追求。这些瀑布在5月至7月间最为壮观。

attractions.text_en: The Eagle Road (Ørnevegen) is Route 63 located between Geiranger and Eidsdal, famous for its succession of 11 hairpin bends. This imposing name comes from the fact that every year, in the days before the road opens, eagles often gather near the viewpoint at the summit of the hairpin bends—Eagle's Wing (Ørnesvingen, 620 meters).
