The Eagle Road is open year-round, while the rest of the Trollstigen (Troll Road) section is only open to traffic from May to October. The routes have many architecturally distinctive viewpoints (such as Flydalsjuvet, Ørnesvingen, Gudbrandsjuvet, etc.), which are advantageous spots for overlooking the fjord.
attractions.text_zh: 老鹰之路(Ørnevegen)是位于盖朗厄尔和埃兹达尔(Eidsdal)之间的63号公路，以接连11个发夹弯所闻名。这个霸气的名字，是因为每年在公路开放之前几天，在发夹弯的顶峰——老鹰之翼(Ørnesvingen，620米)观景台附近经常有老鹰聚集。老鹰之路常年开放，其余的精灵之路路段只在5月到10月通车。线路都不少很有建筑特色的观景台( 例如Flydalsjuvet , Ørnesvingen, Gudbrandsjuvet等)，是俯瞰峡湾的有利地点。

attractions.text_en: The Briksdal Glacier is a branch of the Jostedalsbreen—the largest glacier on the European continent by volume. Located in the Jostedal Glacier National Park, it is a particularly popular glacier attraction within it. The Jostedal Glacier covers 486 square meters, can reach up to 400 meters deep at its deepest, and is 1,950 meters above sea level. The Briksdal Glacier possesses incomparably spectacular natural wonders; here visitors will see the 1,200-meter-high glacier plunging straight into the riverbed from top to bottom, set against the lush forest on one side, magnificent beyond compare.
attractions.text_zh: 布里克斯达尔冰川是欧洲大陆体量占首位的冰川——约斯特达尔布林冰川（Jostedalsbreen）的分支，位于乔斯特达尔冰川国家公园（Jostedal Glacier National Park）中，是其中特别受欢迎的冰川景点。乔斯特达尔冰川占地486平米，深处可达400米深，高于海平面1950米。布里克斯达尔冰川拥有无比壮观的自然奇景，游客在此会看到1200米高的冰川从上到下直入河道，衬着一旁茂盛的森林，无比壮丽。

attractions.text_en: One of the most beautiful and steepest mountain railways in the world, running from the mountain region of Myrdal at an altitude of 865 meters straight down to the depths of the Aurlandsfjord—Flåm, with a total length of 20 kilometers. 80% of this railway is built on hillsides with a 55% gradient. First begun in 1923 and completed after 20 years, it is called Norway's greatest engineering miracle. Admiring the scenic pictures composed of valleys, waterfalls, cliffs, and snow-capped mountains from the train will absolutely be one of the most unforgettable experiences of your fjord journey. At the railway museum next to the Flåm station, you can learn more about the history of this railway's construction.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上最美，最陡峭的高山铁路之一，从865米海拔的米达尔(Myrdal)山区直下到艾于兰峡湾的深处——弗洛姆，全长20公里。这段铁路的80％路段建在55％坡度的山坡上。始建于1923年，历时20年完成，被称为挪威最伟大的工程奇迹。在火车上欣赏山谷、瀑布、悬崖、雪山构成的这一幅幅风景画绝对会是您峡湾之旅最难忘的经历之一。在弗洛姆站旁边的火车博物馆里，可以了解到更多关于这段铁路建造的历史。

attractions.text_en: Sognefjord is Norway's largest fjord and also the most famous fjord in the world, with a total length of up to 204 kilometers and a maximum depth of 1,308 meters. Sognefjord is the most accessible of the four major fjords. National Geographic and travel magazines have ranked the fjord first among the world's best-preserved and most travel-worthy destinations. In summer you cannot see glaciers, but there are still waterfalls, calm lakes, and sheer cliffs that dazzle the eye.
attractions.text_zh: 松恩峡湾是挪威第一大峡湾，也是世界上最著名的峡湾，全长达204公里，最深处达1308米。松恩峡湾是四大峡湾中交通最便利的一个，被国家地理和旅游杂志把峡湾排在世界上保存最完好、最值得旅游的目的地第一名。夏天里看不到冰川，但仍有瀑布、平湖、绝壁让人目不暇接。

attractions.text_en: Voss is hailed as one of the most beautiful fjord towns, located in the heart of the fjord region, beside a beautiful small lake, where the railway from Oslo to Bergen passes through. It is a place in Norway where you can find sports and recreational activities in all four seasons, equipped with most modern leisure and entertainment facilities, just a short distance from many top-tier sports venues, and in addition it possesses charming lake and mountain scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 沃斯（Voss）号称最美的峡湾小镇之一，位于峡湾地区的中心，在一座美丽的小湖边，奥斯陆到卑尔根的铁路经过这里。它是挪威一个四季都可以找到运动娱乐项目的地方，配备了大部分现代化的休闲娱乐设施，离很多顶尖的运动场地也只有短短的距离，此外还拥有迷人的湖光山色。

attractions.text_en: The Flåm Railway Museum not only has a detailed introduction to the construction process of Europe's steepest railway line, but also analyzes the technical challenges encountered during construction and the people behind it. The museum displays a real El9 locomotive, an old electric switching engine, and numerous carts used during track surveying. The museum also has various exhibitions combining charts, text, physical objects, and audiovisual material. Visitors can also gain an in-depth understanding of the Flåm train journey through video displays. The shop at the museum exit has all kinds of souvenirs and merchandise printed with the Flåm Railway brand.
attractions.text_zh: 弗洛姆铁路博物馆不仅有欧洲最陡峭铁路线的详细建设过程介绍，还会分析修建过程中遭遇的技术挑战和背后的人物。馆内展出真实的El9火车头，古老的电力转线引擎、众多轨道勘测时使用的推车。馆内还有各种图、文、实物和影音并茂的展览。游客还可以借由视频展示，深入了解弗洛姆火车之旅。博物馆出口处的商店内有各色纪念品和印有弗洛姆铁路品牌的商品。

attractions.text_en: Bryggen is a series of Hanseatic League commercial buildings arranged along the eastern side of the Bergen fjord in Norway. Bryggen has been listed as a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage Site since 1979. Its name shares the same origin as the Belgian city of Bruges. Bryggen is the oldest part of the city. In 1360, the Hanseatic League established a trading station here, and Bergen developed into an important trading center. Today, these old buildings with their colorful facades facing the harbor, the maze-like wooden houses, and the commercial streets have become the symbol of the city of Bergen.
attractions.text_zh: 布吕根是排列在挪威卑尔根峡湾东侧的一系列汉萨同盟商业建筑。布吕根自1979年被联合国教科文组织列为世界文化遗产。其名称与比利时城市布鲁日为同一来源。 布吕根为城市古老的部分。1360年，汉萨同盟在此建立贸易站，卑尔根也发展成一个重要的贸易中心。如今，这些老建筑面对海港的彩色墙面，如同迷宫般的木质房屋和商业街道已经成为了卑尔根的城市象征。

attractions.text_en: Bergen is Norway's great port; more than half of Norway's fish catch and seafood processed products are exported to the whole world via the port of Bergen. In addition, this is also a place that must be passed on the Atlantic and Arctic Ocean shipping routes, and all kinds of fresh seafood are sold at the Bergen fish market. Therefore, if you have the chance to come to Bergen, you must come to the fish market to feast. The Bergen fish market is located right by the wharf on the south bank of the Bergen harbor, facing the World Heritage old town of Bryggen across the inner harbor. The fish market is divided into two parts: an indoor fish center and an open-air market. You can buy the freshest catch of the day, from cod, salmon, lobster, crab, North Sea king crab, scallops, Arctic sweet shrimp, to whale meat—everything you could want.
attractions.text_zh: 卑尔根是挪威大港，挪威有超过一半的渔货与海鲜加工制品是经由卑尔根港口外销到全世界。除此之外，这里也是大西洋与北极海航线的必经之路，各种新鲜海产都会在卑尔根鱼市场贩卖。因此，有机会来卑尔根一趟，一定要来鱼市场大快朵颐一番。卑尔根鱼市场就位在卑尔根港南岸的码头边，与世界遗产布吕根老城隔着内港遥遥相对。渔市场有分室内渔货中心与露天市场两个部分。可以买到当天最新鲜的鱼货，从鳕鱼、鲑鱼、龙虾、螃蟹、北海帝王蟹、干贝、北极甜虾到鲸鱼肉，应有尽有。

attractions.text_en: We can take the Fløibanen funicular from the city center, and in a few minutes it will bring you to the viewpoint of Mount Fløyen. This funicular will mark the big day of its 100th year of operation in 2018. From the mountaintop you can overlook the panorama of Bergen city. The harbor, the fjord, and the entire city's neatly arranged wooden houses, as well as the mountain peaks surrounding Bergen, are all taken in at a glance. On the mountain there are also family activities such as a children's playground and treasure hunting. The lower city-center station of the funicular is only about 200 meters from the fish market (Fisktorget).
attractions.text_zh: 我们可以从市中心乘坐弗罗伊索道，几分钟就能将你带到弗罗伊恩山(Fløyen)的观景台。这座缆车在2018年将迎来它运营100岁的大日子。在山顶能够俯瞰卑尔根市的全景。海港、峡湾以及整座城市整齐排列的木房子和环绕卑尔根的山头全部尽收眼底。山上还有儿童游乐场和寻宝等亲子活动。索道的山下市中心站距离鱼市(Fisktorget)仅200米左右。

attractions.text_en: Hardangerfjord is the gentlest of the four major fjords, a fjord with pastoral scenery. About 800 years ago, monks came here to plant apple trees and apricot trees, which bloom every May and bear fruit in summer. Worth seeing are waterfalls, nature parks, glaciers, and more.
attractions.text_zh: 哈当厄尔峡湾，四大峡湾中最为平缓，有田园般风景的峡湾。约800年前僧侣到此地种植了苹果树和杏树，每到5月便开花，夏季结果。值得一看的有瀑布、自然公园，冰河等。

attractions.text_en: It is one of Norway's renowned waterfall areas. The great waterfall located in Norheimsund rushes mightily down from a nearly vertical hillside, shrouding the cliff edge in a veil of thin mist, creating an ever-changing, never-ending rainbow effect that enchants the onlooker. Nature lovers can find endless pleasure at Hardangerfjord. With the grand and majestic beauty of the fjord and the waterfall here, there are many sightseeing tour options available—you can hike around the fjord, or take a kayak to explore the fjord from a brand-new angle. The mountain road is a not-to-be-missed scenic spot. The mountain road winds up the steep hillside, with the waterfall cascading among it, especially spectacular in May and June each year. A must-visit attraction of Hardangerfjord, the unique feature of this waterfall is that travelers can pass behind the waterfall without getting wet at all.
attractions.text_zh: 是挪威闻名的瀑布区之一，位于诺海姆桑德(Norheimsund)的大瀑布从近乎垂直的山坡浩浩荡荡奔腾而下，瀑布使悬崖边笼上一帘轻纱般的薄雾，在营造了一番变幻莫测、永不落幕的虹彩效果，让看客为之陶醉。大自然爱好者可以在哈当厄尔峡湾获得无穷乐趣。这里峡湾和瀑布的雄浑壮美，有多个观光游览行程可供选择，您可在峡湾四周徒步远足，或是乘坐皮艇，从全新的角度探索峡湾。山路是不容错过的景点。山路沿着陡峭的山坡蜿蜒而上，瀑布飞流其间，每年5、6月份的时候尤为壮观。哈当厄尔峡湾必去景点，这座瀑布的独特之处是旅行者可以从后面穿过瀑布，身上却一点都不被打湿。

attractions.text_en: Odda is the gateway town leading to Norway's two famous fjords. Although small and quiet, it possesses an important status and unique charm like a "fjord living room." Odda sits at the deepest part of Hardangerfjord, surrounded by mountains, waterfalls, and glaciers. It is the gateway base leading to Hardangerfjord and the Folgefonna Glacier, and is also the starting point for exploring multiple classic hiking trails of Norway's "giant's road." The town's temperament: tranquil, simple, and full of outdoor adventure spirit.
attractions.text_zh: 奥达是通往挪威两大著名峡湾的门户小镇，虽然小巧宁静，却拥有“峡湾客厅”般的重要地位和独特的魅力。奥达坐落在哈当厄尔峡湾最深处，被群山、瀑布和冰川环绕。通往哈当厄尔峡湾和布吕根冰川的门户基地，也是探索挪威“巨人之路” 多条经典徒步路线的起点。小镇的气质：宁静、古朴，充满户外探险精神。

attractions.text_en: Also called Pulpit Rock, it gets its name because its shape resembles the pulpit of a church preacher. Preikestolen is located in the middle of Lysefjord. It is a giant stone platform formed naturally in mid-air, with a vertical drop of 604 meters from the platform top to the fjord below. Protruding more than 30 meters from the connected mountain ridge, it stands abruptly and upright among the lofty mountains deep within the fjord, extremely spectacular and astonishing. The flat surface of the rock has an area of about 600 square meters. The hiking trail leading to Preikestolen is 3.8 kilometers in total length, with about a 330-meter uphill from the starting point. There are red T-shaped markers along the way. The round trip from the starting point takes about 4-5 hours, at moderate intensity. Among the 50 most magnificent views in the world selected by the travel and lifestyle website under America's CNN, Pulpit Rock ranked first. It is also one of the best places to overlook Lysefjord and appreciate the beauty of the fjord.
attractions.text_zh: 又叫布道台，由于形状类似教堂牧师的讲台而得名。布道石位于吕瑟峡湾中部，是一块天然凌空形成的巨型石台，台顶与下方的峡湾垂直落差604米，从接连的山脊突出30多米，突兀地直立于峡湾深处的崇山峻岭中，十分壮观，令人惊叹。岩石平面的面积约600平方米。通往布道石的登山径全长3.8公里，从起点开始有大约330米的上坡。沿途都有红色T字标记。从起点来回大概4-5小时，中等强度。美国CNN旗下旅游生活网站评选出的全球50处最壮丽景色，布道台位列第一。也是俯瞰吕瑟峡湾，领略峡湾之美的最佳地点之一。

attractions.text_en: Lysefjord is far from the sea, reaching deep inland, with water so still it is like a mirror surface, without a single wave. There are no waves or surges of the sea here, only the reflections of high mountains and cliffs in the fjord—sometimes you cannot tell which layer is the reflection and which is the real scene. There is not a single sound, only tranquility. Occasionally a small boat travels through the fjord, its bow pushing open the water surface to form a wave that splits to both sides of the boat, the edges of the wave rippling with tiny white foam; after the small boat passes, the water surface quickly returns to calm.
attractions.text_zh: 吕瑟峡湾远离大海，深入内陆，水静得如同镜面，没有一丝波浪。这里没有大海的波涛和汹涌，只有高山悬崖在峡湾中的倒影，有时分不清哪个层面是倒影，哪个层面是实景。没有一点声音，只有宁静。偶尔会有一只小船行进在峡湾中，船头推开水面，形成一道波浪，分在船的两边，波浪的边缘泛着小小的白色浪花，小船过后，水面很快又恢复了平静。

attractions.text_en: Haugesund is located in southwestern Norway and is a city in Rogaland county. It sits on the Karmøy peninsula, facing the North Sea. The history of Haugesund can be traced back to the Viking Age, when this was an important trading and seafaring center. The city's name comes from the sea god Hauge in Norse mythology, meaning "the mountain of the sea god."
attractions.text_zh: 海于格松位于挪威西南部，是罗加兰郡的一个城市。它坐落在卡尔达伦半岛上，面临北海。海于格松的历史可以追溯到维京时代，当时这里是重要的贸易和航海中心。城市的名字来源于挪威神话中海神海格，意为“海神的山”。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Stavanger is located on the west side of Stavanger harbor and consists of 173 wooden houses built in the late 18th and early 19th centuries. The wooden houses mainly came from the settlement of fishing and canning industry workers in Stavanger. However, the small area on the west side of the harbor, usually called "Old Stavanger," is regarded as representative of the entire Stavanger wooden-house town. The two Michelin restaurants in the town, Renaa and Sabi Omakase, tirelessly pursue the creation of fresh local cuisine, inspiring other restaurants throughout the Stavanger region.
attractions.text_zh: 斯塔万格老城区位于斯塔万格港西侧，由建于18世纪末19世纪初的173套木质房屋组成。木质房屋主要来自渔业和罐头业工人在斯塔万格定居点。但是，通常是称为“老斯塔万格”的港口西侧那一小块区域被视为整个斯塔万格木屋城的代表。城中的两家米其林餐厅Renaa和Sabi Omakase孜孜不倦地追求制作出新鲜的当地美食，激励着整个斯塔万格地区的其他餐厅。

attractions.text_en: The Giant Sword Monument located on the seaside of Stavanger commemorates the "Battle of Hafrsfjord." The sculpture consists of three Viking giant swords over ten meters high, separately representing peace, unity, and freedom. The swords have ancient swords found from across the country melted into them, which can be called "forging swords into a sword." It is now also the city symbol of Stavanger.
attractions.text_zh: 位于斯塔万格海边的巨剑阵纪念碑，纪念“Hafrsfjord之战”的雕塑由三把十几米高的维京巨剑组成，分表代表和平、统一和自由。剑中熔入了从全国各地发现的古剑，可谓“铸剑为剑”。现在也是斯塔万格的城市标志。

attractions.text_en: Getting to know Norway anew should begin with the Fargegaten district of Stavanger. This colorful district overturns the stereotypical impression of Norway. The Fargegaten district is completely different from the equally beautiful old town. The ancient wooden houses are painted in various colors in a vivid, lifelike combination, making Fargegaten look more distinctive. Along the street are cafés, restaurants, small bars, and shops selling all kinds of gifts and candy—a famous district very much worth sightseeing. It has now become a street with a very high appearance rate in the Nordic region.
attractions.text_zh: 重新认识挪威应该从斯塔万格的法格卡腾街区开始，色彩缤纷的街区，颠覆挪威刻板的印象，法格卡腾街区与同样美丽的老城区截然不同，古老的木质房屋被粉刷成各类颜色栩栩如生的组合，使得法格卡腾看起来更与众不同，沿街都是咖啡馆、餐厅、小酒吧和各类礼品、糖果的商店，非常值得观光游览的著名街区。现在已经成为北欧出镜率很高的街头。

attractions.text_en: Kristiansand is a dazzling pearl of southern Norway, famous for its natural beauty, beaches, and vibrant cultural life. As Norway's fifth-largest city, Kristiansand is a perfect travel destination.
attractions.text_zh: 克里斯蒂安桑（Kristiansand）是挪威南部一颗璀璨的明珠，以其自然美景、海滩和活跃的文化生活而闻名。作为挪威第五大城市，克里斯蒂安桑是一个完美的旅游目的地。

attractions.text_en: Oslo City Hall is a brick-red building, completed in 1950 to celebrate the 900th anniversary of the founding of Oslo. It was only completed after Norwegian artists continuously decorated and refined it between 1900 and 1950. The multiple halls inside the City Hall separately display the works of 323 artists, comprehensively showing people the history and culture of Norway as well as people's work and life. Each room here has a special display, from furniture arrangements to figure murals and the sea views visible through the windows—everywhere makes the tourist feel its historical atmosphere. In addition, the Nobel Prize award ceremony is held here every year on December 10.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆市政厅是一座砖红色的建筑，是于1950年为庆祝奥斯陆建城900年而建成，它由挪威的艺术家们从1900年至1950年间不断地装饰和润色才得以完工。市政厅内部的多个大厅分别展出着323位艺术家的作品，全面地向人们展示了挪威的历史、文化以及人们的工作和生活。这里的每个房间都有特别的展示，从家具摆设到人物壁画以及可以透过窗户看到的海景，无处不让观光客感受到其历史的氛围。另外，每年12月10日诺贝尔奖的颁奖仪式在这里举行。

attractions.text_en: The Oslo Royal Palace (1825–1848) was built in the 19th century and is the office location of King Harald. The palace is built on a piece of high ground, directly facing the city's main street—Karl Johans gate. Surrounding the palace are 330 mu of woodland and parks, and the public avenue passing through here leads straight to the commercial district in the city center.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆皇宫（1825年－1848年）建于19世纪，是哈拉尔国王的办公地。皇宫建在一片高地，正对面是市区主要街道-卡尔·约翰大街，环绕王宫的是330亩林地和公园，穿过这里的公共大道直通市中心的商业区。

attractions.text_en: The Oslo Opera House faces directly onto the Oslo small fjord, with an architectural style like a ship. It is, after Nidaros Cathedral (Nidarosdomen Cathedral) built in early 14th-century Trondheim, a renowned cultural building within Norway. Seen from the outside, the most striking feature is the white sloping stone roof rising up from the Oslofjord; visitors can stroll on top of the roof and take in the beautiful cityscape of Oslo. Sometimes there are free open-air concerts outside the opera house, and visitors can sit on the platform enjoying the sea view while enjoying music.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆歌剧院正对着奥斯陆小峡湾，建筑风格像一艘船，它是继14世纪初建造于特隆赫姆（Trondheim） 的 尼德罗斯大教堂（Nidarosdomen Cathedral）后，挪威国内著名的文化建筑。从剧院外面看，最显著的特征是白色的斜坡状石制屋顶从奥斯陆峡湾（Oslofjord）中拔地而起，游客可以在屋顶上面漫步，饱览奥斯陆的市容美景。有时候歌剧院室外会有免费的露天音乐会，游客可以坐在平台上一边欣赏海景，一边享受音乐。

attractions.text_en: Vigeland Sculpture Park is named after the famous master sculptor Gustav Vigeland. The park has a total of 192 sculptures, totaling 650 figure statues. The central idea of all the statues in Vigeland Sculpture Park concentrates on highlighting one theme—"life," depicting the various stages of a person from birth to death, giving visitors many insights into life, and therefore it is also called the "Journey of Life Park."
attractions.text_zh: 维尔兰雕塑公园是以著名雕塑大师古斯塔夫.维格兰（Gustav Vigeland）的名字命名的，公园共有192座雕塑，总计650个人物雕像。维格兰雕塑公园里所有雕像的中心思想，集中突出一个主题——“人生”，表 现了人从出生至死的各个阶段，给游客以许多人生启迪，因此也被称为“人生旅途公园”。

attractions.text_en: The construction of Akershus Fortress began in 1299, built on the orders of King Haakon V, and has witnessed more than 700 years of Oslo's history. You can stroll among the massive stone walls, towers, and courtyards, feeling the sturdiness and vicissitudes of the medieval fortress—this fortress has never been conquered in history. Standing on the ancient walls, you can gaze out unobstructed: Oslo City Hall and the Bygdøy peninsula, the busy Oslofjord and the distant mountains, the city-center wharf (Aker Brygge), and the opera house area.
attractions.text_zh: 阿克斯胡斯城堡建造始于1299年，由哈康五世国王下令修建，见证了奥斯陆700多年的历史。您可以漫步在厚重的石头城墙、塔楼和庭院中，感受中世纪堡垒的坚固与沧桑，这座堡垒在历史上从未被攻克过。站在古老的城墙上，您可以毫无遮挡地眺望：奥斯陆市政厅和比格迪半岛，繁忙的奥斯陆峡湾和远处的群山，市中心码头（Aker Brygge）和歌剧院区域。

overview.text_en:
After assembling in Venice on the day, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful structures built upon the water, together with the winding water lanes, make Venice's romantic charm linger long in the heart. Here you can also savor a three-course Venetian specialty feast of cuttlefish-ink pasta (at your own expense).
Overnight: Voco Venice Intercontinental Hotel or Hilton Ambassador Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
威尼斯当天集合后，参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝到威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Voco Venice Intercontinental Hotel or Hilton Ambassador Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
This is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels, enjoying an excellent location with stylish modern design. The guest rooms feature natural tones and modern interiors, offering you a comfortable and warm stay. The hotel provides a hearty breakfast, a fully equipped gym, and a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails. The hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian delicacies and fine cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en:
The world's beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic" still dazzles brilliantly
As one of the major cities of the Renaissance, Venice is made up of 118 small islands, linked together by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands," and the "City of Bridges." Here stands one of the world's beautiful squares, "St. Mark's Square," along with the beautiful Grand Canal, the phoenix-reborn La Fenice Opera House, the sorrowful Bridge of Sighs depicted by the poet Xu Zhimo, and breathtakingly beautiful arcades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting and the filming location of many movie scenes. Her unique character leaves every visitor enchanted and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: This is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, while to the east rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the center of Venice's political, religious, and traditional festival public activities.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Commonly known as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt between 1043 and 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe. It is a classic masterpiece of Venetian architectural art, and at the same time a treasury holding a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you walk across the Bridge of Sighs, and you can look out through the small openings, rather than being looked at by the many people on the bridge opposite who come to view the Bridge of Sighs. Photography is allowed inside, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the path that death-row prisoners had to take when escorted from the court to the prison. It is built in the early Baroque style, shaped like a house with a vaulted roof, very tightly enclosed, with only two small windows facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried in the Doge's Palace, those convicted of serious crimes were taken to the dungeon. While crossing this airtight bridge, they could only glimpse the blue sky through the small windows, losing their freedom from then on, and involuntarily letting out sighs. It is said that lovers who kiss beneath the bridge will be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, and visit the sights of Florence's old town: the world's third-largest cathedral, Santa Maria del Fiore (the Cathedral of Saint Mary of the Flower), Piazza della Signoria, the Old Bridge, as well as Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), then check into the hotel.
Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观佛罗伦萨老城景点：世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后入住酒店。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Hilton Florence Hotel is a modern hotel that lets you experience the Tuscan style, with an excellent location giving access to Florence's business center where you can enjoy the city's bustle. From the terrace of the hotel's executive lounge you can admire magnificent views of Florence. Each guest room is decorated in a warm modern style; the wooden floors and spacious marble bathrooms provide a high degree of comfort.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会或同等4星级酒店
佛罗伦萨希尔顿酒店是一家体验托斯卡纳风格的现代化酒店，地理位置优越，可前往佛罗伦萨商业中心，享受佛罗伦萨的繁华。酒店行政酒廊的露台上可欣赏到佛罗伦萨的壮丽景色。每间客房均采用温馨的现代风格装饰；木地板和宽敞的大理石浴室可获得较大的舒适度。

highlights.text_en:
The splendor and glory of Florence, the shining radiance of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world's capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Amid blue skies and white clouds, brightly colored walls, dark green shutters, and deep red rooftops, seek the soul of the Renaissance. In the streets, alleys, squares, churches, museums, and art galleries, feel the Renaissance forever young. As the writer Chen Yunhe said: "The poetic spirit of Dante Alighieri and the painterly spirit of Leonardo da Vinci still drift above Florence, still continue to pursue the people and events of the European Renaissance..."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利·但丁的诗魂、达·芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earliest large-span circular-arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, later pouring his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over the centuries, it has withstood floods, social upheavals, and wars while remaining standing. It is one of Florence's famous landmark structures.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.name_en: Santa Maria del Fiore Cathedral (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and magnificent churches in the world, but few are as graceful as this one. This beautiful cathedral, faced with white, red, and green granite, vividly interprets the classicism, elegance, and freedom esteemed in the Renaissance era. No wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the building of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of an open-air sculpture museum, and has been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Santa Maria del Fiore Cathedral lies directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to today. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce, a Gothic building that is the resting place of Italian luminaries such as Michelangelo and Galileo. Its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring slowly. The square is surrounded by many cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract large audiences. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off to tour Cinque Terre, traveling along the Ligurian coastline to visit the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs. In the afternoon, head to Pisa to tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli at the heart of Pisa's historical and cultural center, then proceed to Siena to check into the hotel.
Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: If touring Cinque Terre becomes impossible due to factors such as bad weather or railway company strikes, the itinerary will automatically change to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means.
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。
夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Four Points by Sheraton Siena, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel sits on a quiet hilltop, surrounded by olive trees and gardens, with beautiful surroundings ideal for getting close to nature. The guest rooms are laid with comfortable wooden floors, brightly designed and beautifully furnished with stylish interiors. The hotel also has an exquisite restaurant serving classic Italian, local, and Tuscan cuisine during dinner hours. The hotel's outdoor pool, fitness center, and sauna all provide you with a more relaxing stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，环境优美且适合亲近自然。客房铺设舒适的木质地板，设计明亮，摆设美观的时尚内装，同时酒店配有精致的餐厅，在晚餐时段供应经典的意大利、当地和托斯卡纳美食。酒店的室外泳池、健身中心以及桑拿浴室都为您提供更加放松的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a paradise on the cliffs
Along the long Mediterranean coastline, the little train stops at each beautiful fishing village. Watching the sun-bathed beaches, the waves gently lapping against the rocks, and the colorful houses drawing nearer from afar, curiosity to gaze upon the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak the moment you arrive. Walking on foot through the alleys of the fishing villages, the closer you get, the more delightful the surprises. It is like savoring a five-colored, delicious visual feast, tasting each flavor little by little, the scene so beautiful it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线小火车在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of Pisa in Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli north of the city of Pisa in Tuscany, Italy. It is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, selected by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. According to legend, in 1590 AD, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment from the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly laid out as lawn. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of Pisa, with four major structures on the square: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (cemetery). The square is also surrounded by remnants of ancient city walls and gates. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower, and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for the five cliffside villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that links the five villages together, built along the coast. It is one of the world's beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers and taking around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other side are the mountains, and ahead are the Italian fishing villages, making it a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997, it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage list.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off for the old town of Siena to tour sights such as Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, Siena Town Hall (exterior), and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). After lunch, head to the old town of Pienza to visit Piazza Pio II, Pienza Cathedral (exterior), then proceed to Rome, taking free photos along the Cypress Path on the way. Upon arriving in Rome, check into the hotel.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Mantegna Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Due to building conservation in Rome, vehicles are prohibited, and most areas are pedestrian zones. On this day, you will tour the west bank of Rome on foot, with a walking distance of about 5-6 kilometers.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。午餐后前往皮恩扎古城参观游览二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观），之后前往罗马，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后入住酒店。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：由于罗马建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，当天徒步参观罗马西岸，步行行程约为5-6公里。

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Mantegna Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course, and an outdoor swimming pool. It has cutting-edge architectural style and modern interior design, with rooms furnished in modern or classical decor, and all guest rooms enjoy views of the garden, pool, or golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants offering exquisite international dishes and traditional Italian cuisine. The hotel's tranquil environment easily meets your diverse needs, making it an ideal choice for relaxing body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The pastoral beauty of the Val d'Orcia and the medieval old town of Pienza
Close your eyes and you will imagine the classic Tuscan scenery - blue skies and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and grapevines, and finally the wheat fields - this is the perfect portrayal of the Val d'Orcia. From the walls of the old town of Pienza, overlook the scenery of the World Heritage Site, the "Val d'Orcia."
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old town, is filled with masterpieces by great artists and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient and crisscrossing stone-paved alleys and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you are immersed in medieval Europe a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. For centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the fourteenth century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also preserves a series of traditions, including the making of confections. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties - almond soft cakes ricciarelli, nut tarts panforte, peppery spiced nut cakes pan pepato, rice pudding budini di riso, walnut cookies cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly opposite the square are Siena's Town Hall and tower. The Town Hall houses the Civic Museum, which holds many paintings of the Sienese school, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is Torre del Mangia. It is the tallest building in Siena and the second-tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height reaching 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of steps and take in the beautiful scenery of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存至大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳至高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: Pienza is a small town on a hill in the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany. It is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. In 1459, the Pienza he oversaw the rebuilding of was regarded as a model of the "ideal city," and it was therefore hailed as the "touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, Pienza's uniqueness lies in the fact that from its city walls one can overlook the scenery of the World Heritage Site, the "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding Cypress Path, a country road lined with Italian cypress trees on both sides, with its uniquely shaped bends and neatly arranged cypresses, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypress trees on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that attracts countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come for a check-in.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, led by the guide, tour on foot the world-famous historical and cultural city of Rome. This is the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, called the "Eternal City" for its long history. Visit the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior) standing on the ruins of ancient Rome, and tour the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior).
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Mantegna Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Due to building conservation in Rome's old city, vehicles are prohibited, and most areas are pedestrian zones. All the attractions within Rome's city center are inside the ancient city of Rome. On this day, you will tour Rome on foot, with a walking distance of about 5-6 kilometers.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，在导游的带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注： 由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，而罗马市区内的所有景点都在古罗马城内，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Mantegna Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course, and an outdoor swimming pool. It has cutting-edge architectural style and modern interior design, with rooms furnished in modern or classical decor, and all guest rooms enjoy views of the garden, pool, or golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants offering exquisite international dishes and traditional Italian cuisine. The hotel's tranquil environment easily meets your diverse needs, making it an ideal choice for relaxing body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth visit to Rome, an important birthplace of world culture
Among the ancient ruins that occupy about half of the city's area, seek out the historical civilization that has accumulated over thousands of years. Whether it is the imperial Senate, triumphal arches, commemorative columns, the Pantheon, and the great Colosseum that make up world-famous architectural ruins, or the many exquisite Renaissance buildings and art treasures housed in hundreds of museums, or even the city's many fountains of myriad postures, represented by the Trevi Fountain, as well as the vast roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares, public baths, and other public structures - all of these freeze art in a wonderful moment. Someone said "architecture is flowing music," and the architecture of ancient Rome plays a grand and timeless movement.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的就是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum in the center of Rome was built by the ancient Romans to please triumphant generals and soldiers and to extol the great Roman Empire. It was a place specially provided for slave owners, nobles, and free men to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat among slaves, and is one of Rome's most famous historical relics. The Colosseum can be called a model masterpiece and marvel in architectural history, renowned the world over for being enormous, majestic, and spectacular. Although only most of its skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and grand momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马较著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is the best-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman kings Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, among others, rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of the exquisite architectural techniques of ancient Rome, and was praised by Michelangelo as the "design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: Piazza di Spagna once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and beautiful figure seems to have merged with Piazza di Spagna and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. The Spanish Steps - the whole Piazza di Spagna is not large in area, and the crowds mainly gather near the Spanish Steps. The steps have 138 steps in total and are the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Fountain," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology. The whole is majestic and grand. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dreams will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Naples/Sorrento and take a ferry to the port of Capri. On the day, you may stroll along the seaside on your own and then visit the Blue Grotto, or take a boat on your own to circle the island and explore the Blue Grotto, or head on your own to the town of Capri to tour the Gardens of Augustus and overlook the entire bay. Afterward, take the ferry back to the Sorrento pier and head to the hotel to check in.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: After landing on Capri, activities are free, and no transportation costs are included. The recommended route is the Marina Grande - the old town of Capri - the Gardens of Augustus, a one-way mountain road of about 1.3 kilometers passing three important sights. Cable cars and taxis are available along the way and require additional payment.
The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction. If it is declared closed by the local maritime weather authorities due to high tide, wind and waves, or other factors, entry for touring will not be possible. The Blue Grotto touring fee is not included in the tour group. To avoid misunderstanding, please follow local custom: in addition to the Blue Grotto manual boatman fee, please pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往那不勒斯/索伦托乘坐渡船到达卡普里岛港口。当天或自行前往海边漫步后前往蓝洞参观，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园，俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船返回索伦托码头，前往酒店入住。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
备注：卡布里岛登岛后自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港 -卡布里古城 - 奥古斯都花园单程路线约1.3公里的山路，途径三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车，需要额外付费。
卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a quality choice for admiring the Sorrento seascape, enjoying magnificent views of the Bay of Naples at Sorrento. The hotel is surrounded by sea views on three sides, with a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles, and a fully equipped marine SPA center. The bustling seaside town center is within walking distance, and the hotel's pier is the mooring point for the boats setting out to sea.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
Capri's blue wonder, the "Blue Grotto"
Since the time of ancient Rome, Capri has been a famous tourist and resort destination. On his return journey after the eastern campaigns, Emperor Augustus once landed on this island. Captivated by its beautiful environment and pleasant climate, he did not hesitate to trade the island of Ischia, four times its size, for Capri, making it his summer retreat. Capri is of limestone terrain, with steep rocks among which there are many strange caves. The most famous of these is the "Blue Grotto." The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world. The entrance to the Blue Grotto is below the cliff, and it is very small, so it can only be entered by small boat. Due to the special structure of the entrance, on one hand sunlight can enter the cave through the opening, and on the other hand it reflects up from the bottom of the water inside the cave. Therefore, the seawater inside the cave is a crystalline blue, mysterious and unfathomable, and even the rocks inside the cave turn blue, hence the name "Blue Grotto." When visiting the Blue Grotto, you must choose the right timing: first, the weather must be clear; second, you must go at low tide; third, there must be no wind or waves.
highlights.text_zh:
卡普里岛蓝色奇观“蓝洞”
卡普里岛从古罗马时期开始,这里就是著名的旅游疗养胜地，奥古斯都大帝在东方战役结束后的归途中曾在该岛登陆，被这里的优美环境、宜人气候所折服，不惜以4倍的伊斯基亚岛换取卡普里岛，作为自己的避暑之地。卡普里岛属于石灰质地形，岩石峭立，岩石间有许多奇特的岩洞，其中较著名的就是“蓝洞”。蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一。蓝洞的洞口在悬崖的下面，洞口很小，只能乘坐小船才能进入。由于洞口的特殊结构，一方面阳光可以从洞口进入洞内，一方面又从洞内水底反射上来，因此洞内的海水一片晶蓝，神秘莫测，连洞内的岩石也变成了蓝色，故称“蓝洞”。参观蓝洞一定要选择时机:一要天气晴朗;二要在退潮的时候去，三要没有风浪。

attractions.text_en: The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world and is Capri's most famous attraction. The purpose of many people's trip to Capri is to behold the wonder of the Blue Grotto. You can take a small boat into the Blue Grotto to tour it. Due to the special structure of the entrance, the seawater inside the cave is a crystalline blue. The surface seawater of the Blue Grotto presents a deep, mysterious dark blue, while the deeper seawater is sky blue, and the seawater sets off the rocks in the cave to also be all blue. When the weather is clear, the Blue Grotto is exceptionally beautiful and enchanting. Note: The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction. If it is declared closed by the local maritime weather authorities due to high tide, wind and waves, or other factors, entry for touring will not be possible. The Blue Grotto touring fee is not included in the tour group. To avoid misunderstanding, please follow local custom: in addition to the Blue Grotto manual boatman fee, please pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
attractions.text_zh: 蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，是卡普里最著名的景点，很多人去卡普里的目的就是为了一睹蓝洞奇观。可乘小船进入蓝洞游览，由于洞口的特殊结构，使得洞里的海水一片晶蓝。蓝洞表层的海水呈现幽幽的深蓝色，而深层海水却是天蓝色的，海水映衬得洞中的岩石也都一片蔚蓝。天气晴朗的时候，蓝洞分外的美丽和妖娆。备注：卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

attractions.text_en: Capri is located near the southern entrance to the Bay of Naples and belongs to the Campania region of Italy. On the island there are two medieval castle ruins, Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as a church dedicated to the island's patron saint, San Costanzo. It is one of the most famous tourist destinations in southern Italy. Capri's forests, waters, air, sunshine, and the island villas most longed for by the world's wealthy have attracted people from all over the world. Among them, the Blue Grotto is an attraction that everyone who comes to Capri will definitely visit. When the sky is clear, sunlight shines into the cave, and every corner of the deep blue cave is exquisitely beautiful.
attractions.text_zh: 卡普里岛位于那不勒斯湾南部入海口附近，属意大利坎佩尼亚区。岛上有巴巴罗萨和卡斯蒂利奥内两座中世纪城堡遗迹以及供奉该岛守护神圣科斯坦佑的教堂，是意大利南部最著名的游览胜地之一。卡普里岛的森林、水域、空气、阳光和最令全世界富豪憧憬的岛屿别墅，曾吸引了来自世界各地的人们，其中蓝洞是每一个人来卡普里岛一定会参观的景点，天清气朗时，阳光照射入洞穴，深蓝的洞穴内每一处角落都美不胜收。

attractions.text_en: The Gardens of Augustus, located in the town of Capri, record the ten years of Augustus's life living here. One side of the garden is a sheer cliff, and in the distance is the azure sea. On the left side of the garden are the Lovers' Rocks. According to legend, these Lovers' Rocks were originally lovers in love who, unable to be together, leapt into the sea one after another to die for love, and afterward became these rocks leaning against and nestling close to each other.
attractions.text_zh: 位于卡普里小镇上的奥古斯都花园记录着奥古斯丁在这里居住的十年生活。花园一侧是断壁，远处则是碧蓝的海水。在花园的左侧是情人石，相传这情人石原本是相爱的恋人，因无法恋爱纷纷跳入海中殉情，之后就成了这相依相偎的石头。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, embark on a charming one-day boat tour to explore the treasures of the Amalfi Coast. Take a boat to Positano to explore the enchanting cliff village, then take a boat to Amalfi to admire the panoramic view of the Amalfi Coast town. Afterward, take the boat back and check into the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: In the event of extreme weather at sea, out of consideration for tourists' safety, the boat company will cancel the sea tour activities to Positano and Amalfi. In that case, our agency will arrange a coach tour of Sorrento's old town that day, and Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited. The sea cruise fee will be refunded to the tourists.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，踏上迷人游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，然后乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景。之后乘船返回，入住酒店。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a quality choice for admiring the Sorrento seascape, enjoying magnificent views of the Bay of Naples at Sorrento. The hotel is surrounded by sea views on three sides, with a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles, and a fully equipped marine SPA center. The bustling seaside town center is within walking distance, and the hotel's pier is the mooring point for the boats setting out to sea.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
[Paradise on Earth]: The Amalfi Coast
The Amalfi Coast is a World Cultural Heritage Site, and was named by America's "National Geographic" magazine as one of the 51 beautiful places one must visit in a lifetime. Here there is a winding coastline and spectacular cliffs, hiding medieval fishing towns, described as "highly dramatic." Here are ancient medieval towns famous for their unique culture and architecture. Among the most popular towns are Amalfi, Positano, Ravello, and Maiori. In these towns, you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers, and temples, structures whose history can be traced back several centuries, each with its own story.
highlights.text_zh:
【人间天堂】：阿马尔菲海岸
阿马尔菲海岸是一处世界文化遗产，更被美国《国家地理》杂志评为一生中必须去的51个美丽的地方之一。这里有蜿蜒的海岸线和壮观的悬崖峭壁，还隐藏着中世纪渔业小镇，被形容为“高度戏剧性”。这里有着古老的中世纪小镇，这些小镇以其独特的文化和建筑而著名。其中较受欢迎的小镇包括阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和莱马尼。在这些小镇中，你可以看到许多古老的教堂、城堡、钟楼和神殿，这些建筑物的历史可以追溯到几个世纪以前，每个建筑都有着自己的故事。

attractions.text_en: Positano is a small town located along the Amalfi Coast in the Campania region of Italy. The main part of the town backs onto the mountain and faces the sea. A writer described it this way: Positano is a dreamland; when you are there, she is not quite real, but after you leave, she becomes vivid and lifelike. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as the most beautiful beach in Europe. Here the coastline twists and winds, with towering and majestic mountains and islands rising along the shore, valleys and headlands interlacing, orchards coexisting with wild plants. In the pristine natural environment there is rich human history, and scattered among the dense forests are many picturesque towns, of which the most beautiful is called Positano.
attractions.text_zh: 波西塔诺是位于意大利坎帕尼亚大区阿马尔菲海岸‎沿岸的一个小镇。城镇主要部份背山面海，一位作家这样形容：波西塔诺是一个梦乡，你在时，她不是很真切，你离开后，她变的栩栩如生。阿马尔菲海岸被誉为欧洲最美丽的海滩，这里的海岸线蜿蜒曲折，岸上山岛耸峙巍峨，山谷与海岬交错，果园与野生植物并存，原生态的自然环境中有丰富的人文历史，浓密山林中散落着许多如诗如画的小镇，而其中最漂亮的那一个叫做波西塔诺。

attractions.text_en: It is located on the coast of the Province of Salerno in the Campania region of southern Italy. The town closest to the coast is called Amalfi, from which the area takes its name. Looking at it as a whole, here half is sea and half is sheer cliff, on which there are winding mountain roads and well-arranged villas.
attractions.text_zh: 它位于意大利南部坎帕尼亚区萨莱诺省沿海，最接近海岸的小镇叫阿马尔菲(Amalfi)，由此得名。整体看去，这里一半是大海，一半是绝壁，绝壁上是蜿蜒的盘山公路和错落有致的别墅。

attractions.text_en: The Amalfi Coast was named by the United Nations geographic magazine as one of the 50 most worthwhile places to visit in a lifetime. It has the most enchanting coastline in Naples and indeed the whole world, and it was also once the capital of the powerful Maritime Republic of Amalfi, a very important city in Mediterranean trade at the time. To this day, one can still see many abandoned factories in Amalfi, such as paper mills. Amalfi is also inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage list.
attractions.text_zh: 阿马尔菲海岸，被联合国地理杂志评为一生中最值得去的50个地方之一，拥有着那不勒斯乃至全世界最迷人的海岸线，同时它也曾经是强大阿马尔菲航海共和国的首都，是当时地中海贸易中的一个非常重要的城市。至今，仍然可以看到在阿马尔菲有许多废弃的工厂，如造纸厂等，阿马尔菲同时也被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city of Pompeii and learn about the Pompeian civilization of the past. Then head to Naples to tour the old town of Naples, the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior), and Castel Nuovo (exterior). In the afternoon, head to Rome, and then conclude this wonderful journey in Rome.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明。之后前往那不勒斯游览那不勒斯老城，那不勒斯皇宫（外观）、新堡（外观）。下午前往罗马，之后在罗马结束美好行程。

highlights.text_en:
Ancient Pompeii | Sleeping for a thousand years, still brilliant and glorious upon waking
The ancient city of Pompeii is located in the Campania region near the city of Naples in southern Italy. It was once a small fishing village, but because it was close to an important Mediterranean port with convenient transportation where merchants gathered, by the 8th century BC it had already developed into the second-largest city of ancient Rome. However, in 79 BC, with the eruption of Mount Vesuvius, volcanic ash and scorching lava instantly buried the ancient city of Pompeii, the disaster causing countless lives to perish overnight. Only after more than a thousand years did the ancient city of Pompeii see the light of day again.
highlights.text_zh:
庞贝古城丨沉睡千年，醒时依旧灿烂辉煌
庞贝古城位于意大利南部那不勒斯市附近的坎帕尼亚大区，曾经是一个小渔村，由于靠近地中海的重要港口，交通便利，商贾云集，在公元前8世纪，就已经发展成了古罗马城的第二大城市。然而在公元前79年，随着维苏威火山的爆发，火山灰与炽热的岩浆瞬间掩埋了庞贝古城，灾难让无数生灵一夜之间丧生。历经一千多年之后，庞贝古城方得重见天日。

attractions.text_en: Located at the easternmost end of the ancient city, the amphitheater was built around the 1st century BC and could hold nearly 20,000 people. It is the oldest of the ancient Roman amphitheaters, more than 40 years earlier than the Colosseum in Rome. There are three tiers of audience seating here, and the topmost tier still retains the pillars that once supported the canopy of those days.
attractions.text_zh: 位于古城最东端的露天剧场建立于约公元前1世纪，可容纳近2万人，是古罗马圆形剧场中最古老的一个，比罗马的圆形竞技场还要早40余年，这里有三层观众席，最上层仍保留着当年支撑顶棚的支柱。

attractions.text_en: The ancient city of Pompeii was once a small-to-medium town backing onto the mountain and facing the sea, destroyed in an instant by the great eruption of Mount Vesuvius to its northwest. The town's streets and houses were buried by volcanic ash, yet it completely preserved the living scenes of the Pompeians of more than two thousand years ago. Later this vast ruin was gradually excavated. In addition to various architectural remains, there are also some shocking casts. Those who perished when the volcano erupted, their bodies decayed under the wrapping of volcanic ash leaving only hollow shells. Archaeology injected these hollow shells with plaster to make casts, showing the world the tragic state of Pompeii at that time.
attractions.text_zh: 庞贝古城曾是一座背山面海的中小城镇，因西北边的维苏威火山大爆发而毁于一旦。城镇街道、房屋被火山灰掩埋，却完整保留了两千年多前庞贝人的生活场景，后来这座庞大的遗址才被渐渐发掘出来。除各种建筑遗迹外，还有一些触目惊心的铸像。在火山爆发时遇难的人，因被火山灰包裹而身体腐朽得只剩空壳，考古学把这些空壳注入石膏、做成铸像，向世人展示庞贝当时的惨状。

attractions.text_en: This is a historical site within the ancient city of Pompeii. Here was once a temple, but because of its great age only ruined walls remain. Nevertheless, the overall outline of the temple can still be made out.
attractions.text_zh: 这是庞贝古城内的一处历史遗址，这里曾经是一座寺庙，但因为年代久远只剩下残垣断壁了，但寺庙的整体轮廓还是看得出的。

attractions.name_en: Central Forum of the Temple of Apollo
attractions.text_en: Also called the public forum, this was once the political, economic, and religious center of Pompeii of the past. The square hall on the forum still retains some brick-built column bases at the bottom; this place was formerly the court and the venue for commercial transactions. Opposite the hall is a Temple of Apollo, in which the 48 Corinthian columns are well preserved, and there are also many exquisite frescoes. On the north side of the forum is a Temple of Jupiter with its back to Mount Vesuvius, from where one can clearly gaze at Mount Vesuvius.
attractions.text_zh: 也称公共广场，这里曾经是昔日庞贝的政治、经济、宗教中心，广场上的方形会堂还残留着一些砖砌的圆柱底座，此处是以前的法院与商业交易场所。会堂的对面是一座阿波罗神殿，里面的48根科林斯式圆柱保存完好，还有许多精美的壁画。广场北侧有一座背对着维苏威火山的丘比特神殿，可以清楚的眺望维苏威火山。

attractions.text_en: For most travelers, the sea, cuisine, and history of Naples are all important reasons that make people reluctant to leave. Naples was the most beloved city of the Italian writer Boccaccio. It is the birthplace of the songs "O Sole Mio" and "Torna a Surriento" (Come Back to Sorrento), and also the origin of pizza. Naples presents a different face to travelers from all over the world in every season of the year. Naples is also called "Napoli," which is "Napoli" in Italian. Naples is the capital of the Campania region and the Province of Naples, and one of the most populous cities in Italy, abundant in lemons and grapes. At the same time, she is also an important tourist city of the Mediterranean, known as the "City of Sunshine and Joy." Here is a source of inspiration for many artists and musicians, perhaps because of Mount Vesuvius, or perhaps because of Naples's rustic simplicity.
attractions.text_zh: 对于大多数旅行者而言，那不勒斯的大海、美食及历史都是让人流连忘返的重要原因。那不勒斯是意大利作家薄伽丘最热爱的城市，这里是歌曲《我的太阳》、《重归苏莲托》的诞生地，也是披萨的起源地。那不勒斯一年四季都呈现出不同的面孔展现给来自世界各地的旅行者。那不勒斯也叫“拿波里”，意大利文是“Napoli”。那不勒斯是坎帕尼亚大区以及那不勒斯省的首府，也是意大利人口最多的城市之一，盛产柠檬和葡萄。同时，她也是地中海重要的旅游城市，被称为“阳光和欢乐之城”。这里是许多艺术家、音乐家的灵感之源，或许是因为维苏威火山(MountVesuvius)，又或许是因为那不勒斯的古朴。

attractions.text_en: The Royal Palace of Naples is situated in a bustling district, close to famous sights such as Castel Nuovo and Castel dell'Ovo. It has gone through four dynasties. Its exterior looks quite ordinary, but if you choose to go inside to visit, it will surely astonish you. This palace is extremely luxurious; the entire color scheme is basically gold, yellow, and purple, representing the nobility of the royal family. The palace has many, many rooms - the queen's bedchamber, the council chamber, the study, and so on. Inside there are also many displays of royal household items and paintings of the royal nobility. Most worth mentioning is the throne. This is the place in the palace most worth seeing, apart from the various paintings - words like noble and elegant cannot simply describe it.
attractions.text_zh: 那不勒斯皇宫身处闹市，临近新堡、蛋堡等知名景点，历经四个朝代，外表看上去十分普通，但是，如果选择入内参观，那么一定会让你大吃一惊，这个皇宫非常奢华，整个色调基本就是金色、黄色、紫色，代表皇室的高贵。皇宫有许许多多的房间，王后的寝宫、议政厅、书房等等，里面还有很多皇室用品的展示和皇室贵族的绘画，最值得一提的就是王座。这个皇宫里面最值得一看的地方，除了各类绘画就是它了，用尊贵典雅这一类词是无法简单形容的。

attractions.text_en: Castel Nuovo, also known as the Angevin Keep, was ordered built by the first king of the Kingdom of Naples. Castel Nuovo includes the Civic Museum (Museo Civico) as well as the ruins of the castle. The museum (mainly displaying paintings) is on the first floor; from the second floor you can see the sea view; the ground floor is the ruins of Castel Nuovo, with a surface built of transparent glass, so travelers with a fear of heights need to be especially careful, as beneath the glass are the ruins of ancient buildings and human bones. In addition, inside Castel Nuovo there is also a Sala dei Baroni (literally the Barons' Hall), the structure at the top of the room being very distinctive.
attractions.text_zh: 新堡，又名安茹城堡，是那不勒斯王国第一位国王下令建立。新堡包括公民博物馆(MuseoCivico)以及城堡遗迹。博物馆(主要展示绘画)位于第一层，第二层可以看到海景，零层则为新堡遗迹，地表为透明玻璃建造，有恐高症的旅行者需要特别注意，玻璃底下则为古建筑遗迹以及人的骸骨。另外，新堡内部还有一个SalaDeiBaroni(直译为男爵的房间)，房间顶端的建筑非常有特色。

overview.text_en:
On this day, join the tour at the B&B Nice Arenas hotel (B&B Hotel Nice Aéroport Arenas), then travel to Menton to visit the "Lemon Town," and afterwards proceed to the Principality of Monaco to visit Monaco and its yacht harbour. Then continue to the clifftop town of Èze, overlooking the Mediterranean from the "eagle's nest" full of Mediterranean charm; after the visit, return to Nice and freely visit the Bay of Angels beach in Nice, the Promenade des Anglais and other sights.
Overnight: B&B Nice Arenas hotel or an equivalent 3-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
当天在B B尼斯竞技场酒店（B B Hotel Nice Aéroport Arenas）上团，随后前往芒通游览“柠檬小镇”，随后前往摩纳哥公国，参观摩纳哥及游艇码头。随后前往悬崖小镇-埃兹，从充满地中海风情的“鹫巢”俯眺地中海；参观结束返回尼斯，自由参观尼斯天使湾沙滩、尼斯英格兰海滨大道等景点。
夜宿：B B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: B&B Nice Arenas hotel or an equivalent 3-star hotel. The hotel enjoys an excellent location, adjacent to the Phoenix Park and the Museum of Asian Art, close to the beach and the old town of Nice; the Promenade des Anglais and the beach are just a few minutes away by transport, letting you fully enjoy the charming scenery. The hotel's overall decor is modern and minimalist, with a clean and bright environment; all rooms are equipped with Bultex bedding to ensure you a comfortable sleep. There is a restaurant serving French-style cuisine where you can enjoy local specialties; the hotel's buffet breakfast is plentiful and delicious, not to be missed.
accommodation.text_zh: B B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店 酒店地理位置优越，毗邻凤凰园和亚洲艺术博物馆，靠近海滩、尼斯老城区，距离盎格鲁大道，只需几分钟的交通即可抵达海滩，尽享迷人景色。酒店整体装修风格现代简约，环境整洁明亮，所有客房均配备 Bultex 床上用品，确保您拥有舒适睡眠。拥有一间供应法式风味美食的餐厅，可以享用当地的特色美食；酒店的自助早餐丰盛美味，不容错过。

highlights.text_en:
Côte d'Azur clifftop road
This clifftop road named after Monaco's Princess Grace (AV. PRINCESSE DE GRACE) passes through the beautiful scenery of the Côte d'Azur and the top of the seaside town of Villefranche-sur-Mer. Drive along the coastline of the clifftop road, stopping and going by the seaside to seek out beautiful spots for photography.
highlights.text_zh:
蔚蓝海岸峭壁公路
这条以摩纳哥格蕾丝公主命名的峭壁公路 （AV.PRINCESSE DE GRACE） 途径蔚蓝海岸美丽风景和海滨自由城的顶端，行车在峭壁公路海岸线上的海滨测停停走走，寻找美丽海滨的拍摄点。

attractions.text_en: The "eagle's nest" town of distinctive Mediterranean charm — the Èze Exotic Garden, a town in pure classic Monaco style. A Mediterranean garden is planted at the hilltop, which is also a fine vantage point for viewing the cliff scenery, and at the same time the back garden of France's famous Château Eza hotel, as well as a wonderful spot for a bird's-eye view of the Mediterranean. Various Mediterranean plants complement the classic town.
attractions.text_zh: 特有的地中海风情“鹫巢”小镇——埃兹异国风情花园，纯古典摩纳哥风格的小镇，山顶种植有地中海花园，也坐落着观看悬崖美景的佳位，同时是法国有名的金羊酒店的后花园，也是鸟瞰地中海美景的美妙位置。各种地中海特色植物与古典小镇相应。

attractions.text_en: The Perfume Museum, located at the foot of the Èze hill, tells the story of perfume to people in quiet serenity. The museum was completed in 1983 and is full of the flavour of the Mediterranean. The Perfume Museum aims to preserve France's renowned perfume industry and to promote its international development. The museum has exhibition halls in 18th-century architectural style, mainly divided into three principal areas: the production-process area, the perfume-history area and the fragrance-collection area. Here, people can not only learn about the historical development of perfume, the blending process and methods of production, but also discover rare perfume varieties found nowhere else in the world.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落在埃兹山下的香水博物馆，宁静安详的向人们诉说着香水的故事。该馆于1983年落成，充满了地中海的味道。香水博物馆，旨在保存法国享有盛名的香水工业和促进其香水工业在国际上的发展。馆中有着十八世纪建筑风格的展览厅，主要分三个主要区域：生产过程区，香水历史区和香料收藏品区。在这里，人们不仅可以了解香水的历史发展，香水的调配过程和生产方式，还可以发现世界上少有的香水品种。

attractions.text_en: As one of the world's most densely populated countries and a classic micro-state, Monaco has a land area of only 2 square kilometres. Thanks to income from city sightseeing and seaside tourism, Monaco is also one of the wealthiest countries; among its attractions, Monaco's yacht harbour and Monte Carlo are the most representative sightseeing areas.
attractions.text_zh: 作为世界上人口稠密的国家和经典的微型国家，摩纳哥国土面积仅有2平方公里，得利于城市观光及海滨观光收入，摩纳哥也是最富裕的国家之一、其中摩纳哥的游艇海港和蒙特卡洛为最具有代表性的游览区域。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Nice, where old buildings of various styles since the 18th century are well preserved, such as Baroque-style churches and Italian-style buildings. Step into the labyrinth-like old town, stroll through the winding, crisscrossing alleys that rise and fall, admire the brightly coloured buildings of differing styles, and hunt for treasures in the distinctive little shops. If you reach the Cours Saleya market square, all kinds of vibrant fruits, candies and fresh flowers immediately come into view, dazzling the eye.
attractions.text_zh: 尼斯的老城区，这里完好地保留了18世纪以来的各种风格的古老建筑，如巴洛克风格的教堂，意大利风格的建筑物等。走进迷宫般的老城区，在高低蜿蜒，纵横曲折的小巷中漫步，欣赏颜色鲜明，风格各异的建筑，在各具特色的小店中淘宝。如果走到萨雷雅的广场集市(CoursSaleya)，各种鲜艳的水果、糖果、鲜花立刻映入眼帘，令人目不暇接。

attractions.text_en: Like the citrus fruits abundantly grown locally, Menton is enveloped in lemon tones. Whether the long beaches, the buildings of all kinds, or the stretches of citrus orchards, all seem to become nature's palette, dyeing this seaside town a special yellow at the height of summer. Lose yourself at the crossroads of Menton's old town, walk through the narrow and quiet streets between light and shadow, admire the Baroque-style architecture, feel the sea breeze weaving between the houses, and set foot on the "Lemon Route" — it will make you reluctant to leave.
attractions.text_zh: 和当地盛产的柑橘类水果一样，芒东被柠檬色调所包裹。无论是修长的海滩，各式各样的建筑，还是成片的柑橘果园，仿佛都成为了自然的调色板，在盛夏时节为这座海滨小镇染上了特别的黄色。迷失在芒东老城区的十字路口，走过光与影之间狭窄而安静的街道，欣赏巴洛克式风格的建筑，感受穿梭在房屋之间的海风，踏上“柠檬之路”将会让你流连忘返。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, travel to the major Côte d'Azur seaside town of Saint-Raphaël, then go to Sainte-Maxime to board a boat and cruise out to sea along the Mediterranean, all the way to the city of marine art, Saint-Tropez;
Then take a bus to Arles, visit the old town of Arles and Van Gogh's café, and admire the brilliant sunflower fields under the sky.
In the evening arrive at the city of water nymphs, Nîmes, and check into the hotel.
Overnight: ibis Styles Nîmes Gare Centre hotel or an equivalent 3-star hotel
Note: The sunflower blooming season is June–July. If the weather is hot and the sunflowers are harvested early, the sunflower fields cannot be visited.
overview.text_zh:
早上前往蔚蓝海岸海滨重镇-圣拉斐尔，随后前往圣马克西姆乘船出海巡游地中海，直达海洋艺术之城圣特罗佩；
随后乘坐巴士前往阿尔勒，参观阿尔勒老城区，梵高咖啡馆，欣赏天空下灿烂的向日葵花田。
傍晚抵达水精灵之城-尼姆，入住酒店。
夜宿：尼姆火车站中心宜必思尚品酒店或同等3星级酒店
备注：向日葵花期6月-7月，如气候炎热，向日葵提前收割，则无法游览向日葵花田。

accommodation.text_en: ibis Styles Nîmes Gare Centre hotel or an equivalent 3-star hotel. The hotel is located in the city centre of Nîmes, with an excellent location just steps from the train station and the old town. You can walk to Les Jardins de la Fontaine and the Nîmes Arena, where you can explore architectural treasures such as the well-preserved ancient Roman arena, the Maison Carrée, the Tour Magne, the Roman museum and the Nîmes theatre, letting you feel as if time is turning back and appreciate the charming scenery. The hotel rooms are clean and comfortable, fully equipped, with modern-style architecture, providing you with a comfortable stay. The restaurant serves a hearty buffet breakfast every day, and there is also a café, bar and games room to meet guests' diverse needs.
accommodation.text_zh: 尼姆火车站中心宜必思尚品酒店或同等3星级酒店 酒店位于尼姆市区，地理位置优越，距火车站和老城仅几步之遥，可步行到达内毛苏斯和尼姆竞技场，您可以在此探索建筑瑰宝，例如保存完好的古罗马竞技场、方形神殿、马涅塔、罗马博物馆和尼姆剧院，让您感受时光倒流，领略迷人的风光。酒店客房简洁舒适，设施齐全，拥有现代风格的建筑，为您提供舒适的住宿体验。餐厅每天提供丰盛的自助早餐，同时配备咖啡厅、酒吧、游戏厅，满足客人的多样需求。

highlights.text_en:
A stroke of blue forgotten by God
Cruise across the Côte d'Azur by boat to the laid-back holiday resort of Sainte-Maxime and to Saint-Tropez, known as France's brilliant summer "city of the sun." Savour the charm of the Côte d'Azur and embrace the Mediterranean (the cruise lasts about 20 minutes).
highlights.text_zh:
上帝遗忘的一抹蓝
乘船横渡蔚蓝海岸的松弛感度假地圣马克西姆与拥有法国璀璨夏天“太阳城”之称的圣特罗佩，品味蔚蓝海岸风情，拥抱地中海（游船时长约20分钟）。

attractions.text_en: Hiking 15 minutes from the harbour of Fréjus along the beaches of the Côte de Roses brings you to Saint-Raphaël. Quite different from tranquil Fréjus, Saint-Raphaël has very lively bars, restaurants, boutique shops, and sea-bathing beaches crowded with people everywhere, which is why Saint-Raphaël is called the carnival of the southern French coastal hinterland.
attractions.text_zh: 从弗雷瑞斯海港沿着玫瑰海岸的沙滩徒步15分钟到达圣拉斐尔，与宁静的弗雷瑞斯大为不同，圣拉斐尔拥有非常热闹的酒吧，餐厅，精品小店，及四处充满人流的海水浴场，因此圣拉斐尔被成为南法海岸腹地的狂欢节。

attractions.text_en: Saint-Tropez is a town in the Var department of France's Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur region, about 100 kilometres from the regional capital Marseille, with the nickname "city of the sun." This small city on the Côte d'Azur claims to have France's most beautiful beaches. The beaches here do not stretch for tens of kilometres like other tourist destinations, but are made up of nearly a hundred small beaches of around a thousand square metres each. Luxury hotels and private villas occupy these silver-sand beaches, and once high summer arrives the bays here are filled with long, elegant yachts, especially the 1930s-style Italian Riva speedboats.
attractions.text_zh: 圣特罗佩是法国普罗旺斯-阿尔卑斯-蓝色海岸大区瓦尔省的一个镇，距离大区首府马赛约100公里，别称“太阳城”。这座位于蔚蓝海岸的小城，号称拥有法国美丽的海滩。这里的海滩并不像其他旅游地一样绵延几十公里，而是由近百个近千平方米的小型海滩组成。豪华的酒店和私人别墅占据了这些银沙满地的海滩，一到盛夏季节，那里的海湾便泊满了修长优雅的游艇，尤其以20世纪30年代风格的意大利Riva快艇居多。

attractions.text_en: Arles is one of the important destinations of Provence tourism, simple and rustic yet full of artistic atmosphere. Besides a series of sights connected to Van Gogh, it is also a city where ancient Roman remains of southern France are concentrated, hailed as "the little Rome of the Gauls." Arles prospered thanks to its occupation by Julius Caesar, and became world-famous because of Van Gogh's paintings. Van Gogh is the symbol and pride of this small town. He not only painted here, but also walked the final stretch of his life here. Most of the prototypes of his paintings originated here. Everywhere here one can feel Van Gogh's footprints.
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔勒是普罗旺斯旅游的重要目的地之一，古朴而充满着艺术气息，这里除了一系列与梵高有关的景点以外，还是南法古罗马遗迹集中的城市，被誉为“高卢人的小罗马”。Arles因凯撒大帝的占领，而得到繁荣；因梵高的画作，而蜚声世界。梵高是这个小镇的象征和骄傲。他不仅仅在这里作画，人生的终途也是在这里走过的。他画作的大部分原型都是源于这里。在这里随处都能感受到梵高的足迹。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, visit the old city of the water nymphs, Nîmes, on foot, exploring the glory of ancient Rome and its mysterious garden. Then head to Avignon to begin a journey through the stunning towns of Provence, visiting in turn: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the old town of Gordes, and Sénanque Abbey. After that, return to Avignon to visit on your own the old city of Avignon, the broken bridge over the Rhône (exterior), and the Palais des Papes of Avignon (exterior), then check into the hotel.
Overnight: ibis Avignon Centre Pont de l'Europe hotel or ibis Avignon Sud hotel or an equivalent 2–3 star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，徒步参观水精灵之城尼姆古城，探索古罗马的辉煌和神秘花园。之后前往阿维尼翁，开启普罗旺斯绝美小镇之旅，依次游览：泉水小镇、高德古城、塞南克修道院。 之后前往阿维尼翁，自行参观阿维尼翁古城，罗纳河断桥（外观），阿维尼翁教皇宫（外观），随后入住酒店。
夜宿： 阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店或阿维尼翁南宜必思酒店或同等2-3星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: ibis Avignon Centre Pont de l'Europe hotel or ibis Avignon Sud hotel or an equivalent 2–3 star hotel. The carefully chosen, excellently located ibis Avignon old-town hotel is within walking distance of the Palais des Papes, conveniently allowing you to freely visit the old city of Avignon, the ramparts encircling the city, the broken bridge over the Rhône, the Palais des Papes of Avignon and other sights in the evening — especially during the Avignon Festival. Every July this becomes the capital of theatre and street art: brilliant puppet shows, operas, contemporary street-art performances and concerts, with all-night street theatre lighting up the entire Avignon night. Hotels outside the old city simply cannot satisfy the immersive experience of the festival's liveliness and the enjoyment of its performances.
accommodation.text_zh: 阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店或阿维尼翁南宜必思酒店或同等2-3星级酒店 精心选择位置优越的阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店，可步行到达教皇宫，为您晚上自由参观阿维尼翁古城，环城护城墙，罗纳河断桥，阿维尼翁教皇宫等景点提供便利，尤其是阿维尼翁戏剧节期间,每年的7月份这里是戏剧及街头艺术的首都，精彩绝伦的木偶剧，歌剧，当代街头艺术表演及音乐会，通宵的街头戏剧表演点亮整个阿维尼翁的夜晚，古城外的酒店根本无法满足沉浸式体验戏剧节的热闹和观赏戏剧节的表演。

highlights.text_en:
Visit the old town of Gordes — the prototype of the "Castle in the Sky" depicted by Hayao Miyazaki
The buildings in the town are all built in the Middle Ages: the winding gravel paths climbing upward, the green-vine-encircled stone benches before the doors, the flowers in front of the abbey, the unique style. This quiet and rustic small town is like a history book, vividly displaying the appearance of the Middle Ages.
highlights.text_zh:
拜访宫崎骏笔下《天空之城》的原型——高德古城
城中建筑均建于中世纪，蜿蜒而上的碎石路，青藤环绕的门前石凳，修道院前的鲜花，独特的风格，宁谧古朴的小镇仿佛一部史书，将中世纪的风貌活灵活现的展示。

attractions.text_en: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the Provence spring town, is about half an hour's journey from Avignon. It is a well-known spring-water holiday village in southern France, with a quaint Provençal charm; the town is simple and small, nestling quietly beside the spring. In the scorching summer, the residents here do not feel that oppressive heat — the cool spring water flowing down from the mountains carries away the sweltering air and brings wave after wave of refreshing coolness.
attractions.text_zh: 普罗旺斯泉水小镇（Fontaine de vaucluse），离 Avignon 大约半小时的路程，它是南法知名的泉水度假小村，具有别致的普罗旺斯风情，小镇古朴而小巧，静静的依偎在泉水之畔。炎炎夏日，这里的居民却体会不到那份酷暑难当，从山中流淌来的清凉泉水，带走了炙热的空气，送来了一波波爽人清凉。

attractions.text_en: In the valley across from the Luberon mountains, there is an ancient town built against the hillside — stone walls, houses, slopes and a castle set against the blue sky and white clouds. This is the very famous tourist destination of the Provence region — Gordes (also translated as "Gaode"). This hilltop ancient town once attracted many artists to stay here; the 16th-century Château de Gordes stands prominently at the hilltop, housing the works of many artists. In the small towns of France, the artistic atmosphere is everywhere — a signboard, a shop window — all appear so exquisite. The brightly coloured handicrafts and postcards catch the children's eyes; browsing the little shops is such a delightful thing.
attractions.text_zh: 在吕贝隆山区对面的山谷里，有一座依山而建的古城，石壁、房屋、山坡、城堡，映衬着蓝天白云，这就是普罗旺斯地区非常有名的旅游胜地——勾禾德，也有译作“高德”。这座山丘古城曾经吸引了许多艺术家在此停留，山顶上16世纪的高德城堡卓然矗立，里面收藏了许多艺术家的作品。法国的小镇，艺术气息无处不在，一个招牌，一个橱窗，都显得那么的精致。色彩绚丽的手工艺品和明信片吸引着孩子们的眼球，逛小店是件多么开心的事情啊。

attractions.text_en: Sénanque Abbey is located 2 kilometres north of the stone town. It was built in 1148 by the monks of Mazan Abbey. The entire abbey is hidden in a tranquil valley and is also the backdrop of the book "A Year in Provence." It is called one of "the most beautiful valleys in all of France," and most postcards are shot here. Even so, the lavender fields here are relatively small in scale, and sometimes the tourists are rather dense; please try to stay quiet when visiting.
attractions.text_zh: 塞南克修道院位于石头城小镇北方 2 公里处, 它是由 Mazan 修道院的僧侣们修建于 1148 年，整个修道院隐藏在宁静的山谷中，也是《山居岁月》一书的故事背景。这里被称为“全法国美丽山谷”之一，大部分明信片都取景于此。尽管如此，这里的熏衣草花田规模却相对较小，有时候游客较为密集，参观的时候请尽量保持安静。

attractions.text_en: Avignon (called Yawennong in Taiwan) is a world-famous historical and cultural city, the heart of Provence, also known as the "city of popes." It is also the venue of the world-renowned Avignon Festival; every July this becomes a holy land for theatre lovers. Not far east of the city of Avignon lies the Luberon region (Luberon), the setting of the book "A Year in Provence," dotted with distinctive towns and stretches of lavender fields; to the west of the city are Arles, where Van Gogh once lived, and Saint-Rémy-de-Provence, as well as the sunflowers depicted in his paintings, and many Roman remains such as the Pont du Gard and the Arènes de Nîmes; to the north of the city is Châteauneuf-du-Pape, the new favourite of wine lovers in recent years.
attractions.text_zh: 阿维尼翁Avigon(台湾称亚维农)，她是世界历史文化名城，普罗旺斯的心脏，还被称为“教皇之城”。这里还是世界著名戏剧节阿维尼翁戏剧节的举办地，每年的7月这里就成为了戏剧爱好者的圣地。阿维尼翁城东不远处，便是《山居岁月》一书的背景地——吕贝隆山区(Luberon)，其间布满各具特色的小镇和一片片的熏衣草花田；城市往西则是梵高当年居住的阿尔勒和圣雷米(Saint-Rémy-de-provence)，以及他画中描绘的向日葵，还有很多罗马遗迹，比如：加尔桥(Pontdugard)、尼姆竞技场(ArènesdeNîmes)等；城市北方则是近年葡萄酒爱好者的新宠——教皇新堡。

attractions.text_en: An ancient historic city from the ancient Roman period, Nîmes brings together so many astonishing fruits of ancient Roman ingenuity: the well-preserved ancient Roman arena; the historic courtyard spring-side park (le Jardin de la Fontaine), as if hinting that Nîmes is a warm city living off its springs; and the ancient Roman watchtower on the hill, the Tour Magne (la Tour de Magne) — climb to the heights and gaze afar, and you can take in the boundless scenery.
