attractions.text_zh: 古罗马时期的历史古城，尼姆汇集了太多古罗马人令人惊叹的智慧结晶：保存完好的古罗马竞技场；古迹庭院泉边公园(le Jardin de la Fontaine)，像在暗示尼姆即是一座以泉为生的暖城；还有丘陵上的古罗马瞭望塔马涅塔(la Tour de Magne)，登高远望，可将无限风光尽收眼底。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off for Valensole and the lavender fields along the D907 road (during the lavender season), immersing yourself in the romantic sea of flowers and leaving a purple memory. In the afternoon, visit the European canyon — the Verdon Gorge and the Lac de Sainte-Croix. Then proceed to the southern French film hub and seaside city of Cannes, visit the Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame, and freely stroll along the Cannes seaside promenade. Arrive in Nice in the evening.
Overnight: B&B Nice Arenas hotel or an equivalent 3-star hotel
Note: Depending on the temperature, the lavender will bloom in mid-to-late June; depending on altitude and the cultivated variety, it is generally harvested by late July. If the lavender cannot be visited during the tour period, it will be changed to a visit to the ceramic town.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路的薰衣草花田（薰衣草花期期间），置身浪漫花海，留下紫色记忆；下午前往游览欧洲峡谷——凡尔登大峡谷以及圣十字湖。随后前往南法电影重镇及海滨小城-戛纳，参观影节宫、星光大道，自由漫步戛纳海滨大道。傍晚抵达尼斯。
夜宿：B B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店
备注：根据不同的气温薰衣草将会在6月中下旬绽放，不同海拔高度和种植品种、一般截止到7月下旬收割。如团期内无法参观薰衣草，则更改为参观陶瓷小镇。

accommodation.text_en: B&B Nice Arenas hotel or an equivalent 3-star hotel. The hotel enjoys an excellent location, adjacent to the Phoenix Park and the Museum of Asian Art, close to the beach and the old town of Nice; the Promenade des Anglais and the beach are just a few minutes away by transport, letting you fully enjoy the charming scenery. The hotel's overall decor is modern and minimalist, with a clean and bright environment; all rooms are equipped with Bultex bedding to ensure you a comfortable sleep. There is a restaurant serving French-style cuisine where you can enjoy local specialties; the hotel's buffet breakfast is plentiful and delicious, not to be missed.
accommodation.text_zh: B B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店 酒店地理位置优越，毗邻凤凰园和亚洲艺术博物馆，靠近海滩、尼斯老城区，距离盎格鲁大道，只需几分钟的交通即可抵达海滩，尽享迷人景色。酒店整体装修风格现代简约，环境整洁明亮，所有客房均配备 Bultex 床上用品，确保您拥有舒适睡眠。拥有一间供应法式风味美食的餐厅，可以享用当地的特色美食；酒店的自助早餐丰盛美味，不容错过。

highlights.text_en:
Flower fields joining into a sea, in pursuit of the romantic floral language of lavender
Every year as summer begins, the lavender fields of Provence bloom in vast stretches, and the whole air is filled with the faint fragrance of lavender. Check in at the romantic, beautiful filming location of Chiung Yao's "Deep in the Clouds Once More," pursue the floral language of lavender awaiting love, and immerse yourself in the sea-like flower fields……
highlights.text_zh:
花田连缀成海，追寻薰衣草浪漫花语
每年入夏，普罗旺斯的薰衣草花田就会大片盛开，整个空气里都弥漫着薰衣草淡淡的花香，打卡琼瑶《又见一帘幽梦》浪漫唯美的拍摄地，追寻着薰衣草等待爱情的花语，沉浸如海花田……

attractions.text_en: Valensole has the most beautiful lavender fields in the Provence region. Driving from the Valensole lavender ocean (Valensole Lavande) to the Lac de Sainte-Croix takes about 40 minutes. It was selected by National Geographic magazine as one of the most beautiful places in the world, and at the same time it is the filming location of Chiung Yao's novels of the same name, "Deep in the Clouds" and "Deep in the Clouds Once More."
attractions.text_zh: 瓦朗索勒拥有普罗旺斯地区美丽的薰衣草花田。开车从瓦朗索勒薰衣草海洋Valensole Lavande 到Lac de Sainte-Croix圣十字湖，大约需要40分钟左右。国家地理杂志评选为世界上美丽的地方之一，同时，这里也是琼瑶同名小说《一帘幽梦》和《又见一帘幽梦》的拍摄地。

attractions.name_en: Verdon Gorge and Lac de Sainte-Croix
attractions.name_zh: 凡尔登大峡谷和圣十字湖
attractions.text_en: The Verdon Gorge is the world's second-largest canyon. This gorge, 25 kilometres long and 700 metres deep, lies in the Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur region and is famous throughout Europe for its magnificent scenery. From a commanding, distinctive vantage point, the Lac de Sainte-Croix is like a smooth piece of emerald set among the mountains. Here there are towering sheer cliffs, gurgling streams, lake water so clear you can see the bottom, and stretching ranges of mountains. Sitting on the cliff-edge viewing platform between the gorge and the lake surface, in that moment you will forget the entire world.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔登大峡谷是世界第二大峡谷，这座25公里长，700米深的峡谷就在普罗旺斯-蔚蓝海岸大区里，因其壮美的景色而闻名于欧洲。以居高临下独特的视角，圣十字湖仿佛一片平整的翡翠，镶嵌在群山之中。这里有万丈的绝壁，潺潺的小溪，清可见底的湖水，更有连绵的山峦。坐在峡谷于湖面的悬崖景观台上，这一刻会忘记整个世界。

attractions.name_en: Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame
attractions.text_en: Built in 1982, it is an important venue of the Cannes Film Festival, where the much-watched Palme d'Or is awarded. The Palais des Festivals currently has a total of 44,000 square metres of exhibition space, containing 15 concert/auditorium halls. The Walk of Fame is one of the not-to-be-missed sights in Cannes; located beside the Palais des Festivals, here you can see the handprints pressed into the pavement by many stars, now totalling more than 300.
attractions.text_zh: 建于 1982 年，是戛纳影展的重要会议地点，备受注目的金棕榈奖即在此颁发。电影宫目前总共有 44000 平方米的展览面积，内含 15 个音乐厅星光大道是到戛纳不可错过的景点之一，位于电影宫旁，可以在这里看到许多明星在这里的人行道上按下的手印，现在已经累计了有300 多个了。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, each honoured guest may choose to sleep in until they wake naturally and check out and leave on their own, or join the group to disperse in the city centre of Nice, ending this wonderful journey!
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，各位贵宾可选择睡到自然醒自行退房离开，或者可跟团到尼斯市区解散，结束美好旅行！

accommodation.text_en:
None. No accommodation on this day
Fee description
accommodation.text_zh:
无 当天无住宿
费用说明

overview.text_en:
Today is a full free day in Milan, and you may arrange your own sightseeing activities. We recommend visiting on your own Milan's iconic landmark Milan Cathedral (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades. Afterwards, gather with the guide in downtown Milan and head to the hotel in Milan to check in.
Overnight: Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
当天米兰全天自由活动，可自行安排各项游览活动。当天建议自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。 之后与导游在米兰市区集合，前往米兰酒店入住。
夜宿：皇家花园酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel sits amid lush gardens with fountains, palm trees and olive trees, blending classic elegance with a modern style — a delightful and relaxing urban resort. Guests can walk to a large nearby shopping center; the rooms are spacious and elegant, featuring large marble bathrooms with bathtubs, and the breakfast buffet is rich and varied. The Captain's Bar serves drinks and snacks all day, and the hotel's glass-domed Blue Crab Grill restaurant offers international cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
皇家花园酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在郁郁葱葱的花园中，花园内有喷泉、棕榈树和橄榄树，将经典优雅与现代风格融为一体，是一处令人愉悦而轻松的城市度假胜地。酒店可步行至附近的大型商业中心；酒店的客房宽敞而优雅，设有带浴缸的大型大理石浴室，自助早餐丰盛多样，Captain's Bar 全天供应饮料和小吃，酒店设有玻璃圆顶的 Blue Crab Grill 餐厅，供应国际美食。

highlights.text_en:
Behold Milan Cathedral, built over 500 years and renowned worldwide for its many exquisite carvings and Gothic spires
Construction began in 1386, and it is the iconic landmark in the center of Milan. The main body of the cathedral took more than four centuries, being largely completed in 1812, while detailed work continued until the installation of a bronze door of the cathedral in 1960. The passing years have not only given it a sense of historical vicissitude but also created multiple styles for it — Gothic spires paired with Baroque-style carvings, lavish from top to bottom.
highlights.text_zh:
瞻仰历经500年建成，以众多精美的雕刻和哥特式的塔尖而闻名于世的米兰大教堂
始建于1386年，是米兰市中心的标志性建筑。教堂主体历经4个多世纪才于1812年基本完工，而细节工程则一直持续到1960年安装完成教堂的一扇铜门为止。岁月不仅赋予了它历史的沧桑，同时也为它营造出多重的风格样式，哥特式的尖塔搭配巴洛克风格的雕饰，自上而下，极尽奢华。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most visitors come here for sightseeing. Beneath the central arcade is a Prada boutique whose scale and window displays are among the finest in Milan; the window displays in particular are updated daily, and simply standing outside to admire them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is dotted with many upscale restaurants, cafés and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱二世拱廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Although its name, Duomo, means "dome," Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Towering in the city center, Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as a magnificent example of Italian Gothic architecture, its hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and its white marble façade is carved with thousands of statues. The interior is vast and spacious; sunlight filters through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, casting a dim light filled with a solemn religious atmosphere. The crypt still preserves the remains of the Church of San Tecla that originally stood on the site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, depart for the water city of Venice. Upon arrival, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings constructed on the water, together with the winding water lanes, make the romantic charm of Venice linger long. Here you can also savor a Venetian specialty feast — a three-course cuttlefish-ink pasta (at your own expense).
Overnight: voco Venice or Hilton Ambasciatori Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往水城威尼斯，到达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝到威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
voco Venice or Hilton Ambasciatori Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels, with an excellent location, stylish modern design, rooms in natural tones with contemporary interiors, offering you a comfortable and warm stay. The hotel serves a rich breakfast, has a fully equipped gym, a lounge bar offering wine and cocktails, and the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian delicacies and fine cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en:
The most beautiful city in the world, Venice — the "Pearl of the Adriatic" — still dazzles brilliantly
As one of the major cities of the Renaissance, Venice is made up of 118 small islands, linked together by 177 canals and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands," and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the world's most beautiful squares, St. Mark's Square, along with the beautiful Grand Canal, the phoenix-like reborn La Fenice opera house, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs immortalized by the poet Xu Zhimo, and breathtakingly beautiful colonnades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting and the filming location of many movie scenes. Her unique temperament leaves every visitor enchanted and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once described by Napoleon as "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, while to the east rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the public hub of Venice's political, religious and traditional festival activities.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Known for short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe. It is a classic work of Venetian architectural art and at the same time a treasury housing a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco, where all the past glory of Venice is gathered. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through a small opening — rather than being among the crowds on the opposite bridge looking over at the Bridge of Sighs. Photography is allowed inside, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route along which condemned prisoners were escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is of early Baroque style, shaped like a house, covered by a vault above and tightly sealed, with only two small windows facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried in the Doge's Palace, a serious offender would be taken to the dungeon; passing over this airtight bridge, he could only gaze at the blue sky through the small windows, losing his freedom from that moment, and would involuntarily let out a sigh. It is said that if lovers kiss beneath the bridge, they will be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, depart for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance. Visit the sights of Florence's old town: the world's third-largest cathedral — the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, Piazza della Signoria, the Old Bridge, as well as Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), then check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观佛罗伦萨老城景点：世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后入住酒店。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Hilton Florence is a modern hotel offering a Tuscan-style experience, with an excellent location giving access to Florence's commercial center so you can enjoy the bustle of Florence. From the terrace of the hotel's executive lounge you can admire magnificent views of Florence. Each room is decorated in a warm, modern style; the wood floors and spacious marble bathrooms provide a high degree of comfort.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会或同等4星级酒店
佛罗伦萨希尔顿酒店是一家体验托斯卡纳风格的现代化酒店，地理位置优越，可前往佛罗伦萨商业中心，享受佛罗伦萨的繁华。酒店行政酒廊的露台上可欣赏到佛罗伦萨的壮丽景色。每间客房均采用温馨的现代风格装饰；木地板和宽敞的大理石浴室可获得较大的舒适度。

highlights.text_en:
The splendor and prosperity of Florence, where the starlight of the Renaissance shines
In Florence, the world's capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Amid the blue skies and white clouds, the brightly colored walls, the dark-green shutters and the deep-red rooftops, seek out the soul of the Renaissance. In the streets and lanes, the squares and churches, the museums and galleries, feel the timeless Renaissance. As the writer Chen Yunhe said: "The poetic spirit of Dante Alighieri and the painterly spirit of Leonardo da Vinci still drift over the skies of Florence, still continuing to seek out the people and events of the European Renaissance....."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利·但丁的诗魂、达·芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earliest large-span circular-arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, later pouring his longing for her into "The Divine Comedy." Over several centuries it has survived floods, social upheavals and wars while remaining standing. It is one of Florence's famous landmark structures.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few are as graceful as this one. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, perfectly interprets the classical, elegant and free spirit cherished in the Renaissance era — no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new cathedral, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and it has been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and numerous cafés and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore lies directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce. This Gothic building is the resting place of Italian notables such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring slowly. Around the square are many cafés and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract large audiences. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, taking in the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, depart to tour Cinque Terre, following the Ligurian coastline to visit the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs. In the afternoon, head to Pisa to visit the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli at the heart of Pisa's historical and cultural center, then proceed to Siena to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: In the event of bad weather or factors such as a railway company strike that make it impossible to tour Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically change to touring the coastal cities by coach or other means.
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。
夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located on a quiet hilltop surrounded by olive trees and gardens, with beautiful surroundings ideal for getting close to nature. The rooms feature comfortable wood flooring, a bright design and tastefully appointed stylish interiors. The hotel also has an exquisite restaurant serving classic Italian, local and Tuscan cuisine at dinner. The hotel's outdoor pool, fitness center and sauna all provide you with an even more relaxing stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，环境优美且适合亲近自然。客房铺设舒适的木质地板，设计明亮，摆设美观的时尚内装，同时酒店配有精致的餐厅，在晚餐时段供应经典的意大利、当地和托斯卡纳美食。酒店的室外泳池、健身中心以及桑拿浴室都为您提供更加放松的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's most beautiful fishing villages, a paradise on the cliffs
Along the long Mediterranean coastline, the little train stops at each beautiful fishing village. Watching the sun-bathed beaches, the waves quietly lapping against the rocks, and the colorful houses drawing nearer from afar, your curiosity to gaze upon the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak the moment you arrive. Walking on foot through the village lanes, the closer you get, the more delightful the surprises. It is like savoring a visual feast of five exquisite flavors, tasting each subtlety bit by bit — this scene is so beautiful it makes the heart flutter.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线小火车在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral in the city of Pisa, Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy. It is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, and has been designated a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. Legend has it that in 1590 AD, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa, overturning the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly laid out as lawn. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square stand four major structures: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of San Giovanni, and the Camposanto cemetery. Ancient city walls and gates are also preserved around the square. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five cliffside villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that links the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the world's most beautiful hiking routes, about 15–20 kilometers long and taking around 5 hours, with the Mediterranean on one side, the mountains on the other, and Italian fishing villages ahead — a destination coveted by countless hiking enthusiasts. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, depart for the old town of Siena to visit Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, Siena City Hall (exterior), the Torre del Mangia (exterior) and other sights. After lunch, head to the old town of Pienza to tour Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), then proceed to Rome, taking free photos along the way on the cypress lane, and check in at the hotel upon arrival in Rome.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Mantegna Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。午餐后前往皮恩扎古城参观游览二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观），之后前往罗马，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后入住酒店。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Mantegna Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor swimming pool. It has cutting-edge architecture and modern interior design, with rooms furnished in modern or classical decor, and all rooms enjoy views of the garden, the pool or the golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants offering exquisite international dishes and traditional Italian cuisine; the hotel environment is tranquil, easily meeting your varied needs, making it an ideal choice for relaxing your body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The idyllic scenery of the Val d'Orcia and the medieval old town of Pienza
Close your eyes and you will picture the classic Tuscan scenery — blue skies and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and grapevines, and finally wheat fields. This is the perfect portrait of the Val d'Orcia. From the city walls of the old town of Pienza, look down on the scenery of the World Heritage Site, the "Val d'Orcia."
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old town, is filled with masterpieces by great artists and classical medieval architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing stone-paved lanes and the deep courtyards hidden here and there, you feel as if you are in the European Middle Ages of a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. Over the centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time had stood still here since the 14th century. Apart from its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also preserves a series of traditions, including the making of confections. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties — almond soft cookies (ricciarelli), nut tarts (panforte), peppery spiced nut cake (pan pepato), rice pudding (budini di riso), walnut cookies (cavallucci), or walnut wafers (copate)!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly facing the square are Siena's City Hall and the tower; inside the City Hall is the Civic Museum, which houses many paintings of the Sienese school, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower, fully named Torre del Mangia, is the tallest building in Siena and the second-tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of steps to take in the beautiful scenery of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存至大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳至高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: Pienza is a small town on the hills of the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany. It is the birthplace of Pope Pius II, who oversaw its rebuilding in 1459; Pienza is regarded as a model of the "ideal city" and is therefore hailed as a "touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, Pienza is unique in that from its city walls one can look down on the scenery of the World Heritage Site, the "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypress trees, with its distinctively shaped curves and neatly arranged cypresses, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypress trees on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows in the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that attracts countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and check in.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, led by the guide, take a walking tour of the world-famous historical and cultural city of Rome. This is the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, called the "Eternal City" because of its long history. Visit the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior), which stand on the ruins of the ancient Roman capital, and tour the Spanish Square and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Afterwards, free time, heading to the hotel at around 16:30.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Mantegna Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Due to the protection of the buildings of ancient Rome, vehicles are prohibited, and most areas are pedestrian zones; since all the attractions in central Rome are within the ancient Roman city, today's tour of Rome is on foot, with a walking distance of about 5–6 kilometers.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，在导游的带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。之后自由活动，16点30左右前往酒店。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注： 由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，而罗马市区内的所有景点都在古罗马城内，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Mantegna Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor swimming pool. It has cutting-edge architecture and modern interior design, with rooms furnished in modern or classical decor, and all rooms enjoy views of the garden, the pool or the golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants offering exquisite international dishes and traditional Italian cuisine; the hotel environment is tranquil, easily meeting your varied needs, making it an ideal choice for relaxing your body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth exploration of Rome, an important cradle of world culture
Among the ancient ruins that occupy about half the area of the city, seek out a historical civilization that has accumulated over thousands of years. Whether it is the world-famous architectural ruins formed by the Imperial Senate, the triumphal arches, the commemorative columns, the Pantheon and the Colosseum, or the many exquisite Renaissance buildings and art treasures housed in over a hundred museums, or even the city's many fountains of every form, represented by the Trevi Fountain, as well as the vast roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares and public baths and other public buildings — all freeze art at a wonderful moment. Some say "architecture is flowing music"; then the architecture of ancient Rome plays a grand and timeless movement.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的就是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum, located in the center of Rome, was built by the ancient Romans to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great ancient Roman Empire. It was a place reserved for slave owners, nobles and freemen to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat between slaves, and is one of Rome's most famous historical relics. The Colosseum is a model masterpiece and marvel in architectural history, renowned for being huge, majestic and spectacular. Although only the greater part of its skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and grand momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马较著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman king Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, among others, rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, the son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be regarded as a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of the exquisite architectural technology of ancient Rome, and was praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and radiant figure seems to have merged with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. The whole Spanish Square is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The steps total 138 in number and are the widest steps in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain," or the "Wishing Fountain," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god in Roman mythology, and is full of grandeur and magnificence. It is said that if you stand with your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dreams will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Naples/Sorrento to take a ferry to the port of Capri. Today, you may either go on your own to stroll by the sea and then visit the Blue Grotto, or take a boat around the island on your own to explore the Blue Grotto, or go on your own to the town of Capri to tour the Gardens of Augustus and look down over the entire bay; afterwards, take the ferry back to Sorrento's dock and head to the hotel to check in.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: After landing on Capri, it is free time, and no transportation fees are included. The recommended route is the Marina Grande – old town of Capri – Gardens of Augustus, a one-way mountain route of about 1.3 kilometers passing three important attractions; there are cable cars and taxis along the way, which require an extra fee.
The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction; if the local marine meteorological authority declares it closed due to high tide, wind and waves, or other factors, it cannot be visited. The cost of visiting the Blue Grotto is not included in the tour. To avoid misunderstanding, please follow local customs and, in addition to the manual boatman's fee for the Blue Grotto, pay a tip of 2–5 euros.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往那不勒斯/索伦托乘坐渡船到达卡普里岛港口。当天或自行前往海边漫步后前往蓝洞参观，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园，俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船返回索伦托码头，前往酒店入住。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
备注：卡布里岛登岛后自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港 -卡布里古城 - 奥古斯都花园单程路线约1.3公里的山路，途径三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车，需要额外付费。
卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a top choice for enjoying the sea views of Sorrento, with magnificent views of the Bay of Sorrento and Naples. The hotel is surrounded by sea views on three sides, with a private beach and a private dock, two restaurants of different styles and a fully equipped marine spa center. It is within walking distance of the bustling seaside town center, and the hotel's dock is the mooring point for boat excursions.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
Capri's blue wonder, the "Blue Grotto"
Since the ancient Roman period, Capri has been a famous tourist and health resort. On his way back after the end of his eastern campaign, Emperor Augustus landed on the island and, captivated by its beautiful surroundings and pleasant climate, did not hesitate to exchange the island of Ischia, four times larger, for Capri as his own summer retreat. Capri is of limestone terrain, with steep, jagged rocks among which there are many peculiar caves, the most famous being the "Blue Grotto." The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the world's seven great wonders. The entrance to the Blue Grotto is below the cliff and is very small, accessible only by small boat. Due to the special structure of the entrance, on the one hand sunlight can enter the cave through the opening, and on the other hand it is reflected back up from the bottom of the water inside the cave, so the seawater inside the cave is a crystalline blue, mysterious and unfathomable, and even the rocks inside the cave turn blue — hence the name "Blue Grotto." To visit the Blue Grotto, you must choose the right time: first, the weather must be clear; second, go at low tide; and third, there must be no wind or waves.
highlights.text_zh:
卡普里岛蓝色奇观“蓝洞”
卡普里岛从古罗马时期开始,这里就是著名的旅游疗养胜地，奥古斯都大帝在东方战役结束后的归途中曾在该岛登陆，被这里的优美环境、宜人气候所折服，不惜以4倍的伊斯基亚岛换取卡普里岛，作为自己的避暑之地。卡普里岛属于石灰质地形，岩石峭立，岩石间有许多奇特的岩洞，其中较著名的就是“蓝洞”。蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一。蓝洞的洞口在悬崖的下面，洞口很小，只能乘坐小船才能进入。由于洞口的特殊结构，一方面阳光可以从洞口进入洞内，一方面又从洞内水底反射上来，因此洞内的海水一片晶蓝，神秘莫测，连洞内的岩石也变成了蓝色，故称“蓝洞”。参观蓝洞一定要选择时机:一要天气晴朗;二要在退潮的时候去，三要没有风浪。

attractions.text_en: The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the world's seven great wonders and is Capri's most famous attraction; many people go to Capri precisely to behold the spectacle of the Blue Grotto. You can enter the Blue Grotto by small boat to tour it. Due to the special structure of the entrance, the seawater inside the cave is a crystalline blue. The surface water of the Blue Grotto shows a deep, gloomy blue, while the deeper seawater is sky-blue, and the seawater sets off the rocks in the cave so that they too appear blue all over. When the weather is clear, the Blue Grotto is exceptionally beautiful and enchanting. Note: The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction; if the local marine meteorological authority declares it closed due to high tide, wind and waves, or other factors, it cannot be visited. The cost of visiting the Blue Grotto is not included in the tour. To avoid misunderstanding, please follow local customs and, in addition to the manual boatman's fee for the Blue Grotto, pay a tip of 2–5 euros.
attractions.text_zh: 蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，是卡普里最著名的景点，很多人去卡普里的目的就是为了一睹蓝洞奇观。可乘小船进入蓝洞游览，由于洞口的特殊结构，使得洞里的海水一片晶蓝。蓝洞表层的海水呈现幽幽的深蓝色，而深层海水却是天蓝色的，海水映衬得洞中的岩石也都一片蔚蓝。天气晴朗的时候，蓝洞分外的美丽和妖娆。备注：卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

attractions.text_en: Capri is located near the southern entrance of the Bay of Naples and belongs to the Campania region of Italy. On the island are the ruins of two medieval castles, Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as a church dedicated to the island's patron saint, Santa Costanza. It is one of the most famous tourist resorts in southern Italy. Capri's forests, waters, air, sunshine and the island villas most coveted by the world's wealthy have attracted people from all over the world. Among them, the Blue Grotto is an attraction that everyone who comes to Capri will surely visit; when the sky is clear, sunlight shines into the cave, and every corner of the deep-blue cave is exquisitely beautiful.
attractions.text_zh: 卡普里岛位于那不勒斯湾南部入海口附近，属意大利坎佩尼亚区。岛上有巴巴罗萨和卡斯蒂利奥内两座中世纪城堡遗迹以及供奉该岛守护神圣科斯坦佑的教堂，是意大利南部最著名的游览胜地之一。卡普里岛的森林、水域、空气、阳光和最令全世界富豪憧憬的岛屿别墅，曾吸引了来自世界各地的人们，其中蓝洞是每一个人来卡普里岛一定会参观的景点，天清气朗时，阳光照射入洞穴，深蓝的洞穴内每一处角落都美不胜收。

attractions.text_en: Located in the town of Capri, the Gardens of Augustus record the ten years of life that Augustus spent living here. On one side of the garden are sheer cliffs, while in the distance is the azure-blue sea. To the left of the garden are the Lovers' Rocks; legend has it that these Lovers' Rocks were originally a couple in love who, unable to be together, jumped into the sea one after another to die for love, and afterwards became these rocks leaning against and nestling close to each other.
attractions.text_zh: 位于卡普里小镇上的奥古斯都花园记录着奥古斯丁在这里居住的十年生活。花园一侧是断壁，远处则是碧蓝的海水。在花园的左侧是情人石，相传这情人石原本是相爱的恋人，因无法恋爱纷纷跳入海中殉情，之后就成了这相依相偎的石头。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set out on a charming boat day tour to explore the treasures of the Amalfi Coast. Take a boat to Positano to explore the charming cliffside village, then take a boat to Amalfi to admire the panorama of the Amalfi Coast town. Afterwards, take the boat back and check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: In the event of extreme weather at sea, out of consideration for tourists' safety, the cruise company will cancel the boat excursion to Positano and Amalfi; we will instead arrange for a coach that day to visit the old town of Sorrento, and it will not be possible to visit Positano and Amalfi, in which case the boat excursion fee will be refunded to the tourists.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，踏上迷人游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，然后乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景。之后乘船返回，入住酒店。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a top choice for enjoying the sea views of Sorrento, with magnificent views of the Bay of Sorrento and Naples. The hotel is surrounded by sea views on three sides, with a private beach and a private dock, two restaurants of different styles and a fully equipped marine spa center. It is within walking distance of the bustling seaside town center, and the hotel's dock is the mooring point for boat excursions.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
[Paradise on Earth]: The Amalfi Coast
The Amalfi Coast is a World Heritage Site, and was rated by America's National Geographic magazine as one of the 51 most beautiful places one must visit in a lifetime. Here are a winding coastline and spectacular cliffs, hiding medieval fishing towns, described as "highly dramatic." Here are ancient medieval towns, famous for their unique culture and architecture. Among the most popular towns are Amalfi, Positano, Ravello and Maiori. In these towns, you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers and temples, structures whose history dates back several centuries, each with its own story.
highlights.text_zh:
【人间天堂】：阿马尔菲海岸
阿马尔菲海岸是一处世界文化遗产，更被美国《国家地理》杂志评为一生中必须去的51个美丽的地方之一。这里有蜿蜒的海岸线和壮观的悬崖峭壁，还隐藏着中世纪渔业小镇，被形容为“高度戏剧性”。这里有着古老的中世纪小镇，这些小镇以其独特的文化和建筑而著名。其中较受欢迎的小镇包括阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和莱马尼。在这些小镇中，你可以看到许多古老的教堂、城堡、钟楼和神殿，这些建筑物的历史可以追溯到几个世纪以前，每个建筑都有着自己的故事。

attractions.text_en: Positano is a small town along the Amalfi Coast in the Campania region of Italy. The main part of the town backs onto the mountains and faces the sea. As one writer described it: Positano is a dreamland — while you are there she does not feel quite real, but after you leave she becomes vividly lifelike. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as the most beautiful beach in Europe; here the coastline winds and twists, with towering, majestic mountains and islands rising on the shore, valleys interlacing with headlands, orchards coexisting with wild plants, a pristine natural environment rich in human history, and dense forests scattered with many picturesque small towns — and the most beautiful of them all is called Positano.
attractions.text_zh: 波西塔诺是位于意大利坎帕尼亚大区阿马尔菲海岸‎沿岸的一个小镇。城镇主要部份背山面海，一位作家这样形容：波西塔诺是一个梦乡，你在时，她不是很真切，你离开后，她变的栩栩如生。阿马尔菲海岸被誉为欧洲最美丽的海滩，这里的海岸线蜿蜒曲折，岸上山岛耸峙巍峨，山谷与海岬交错，果园与野生植物并存，原生态的自然环境中有丰富的人文历史，浓密山林中散落着许多如诗如画的小镇，而其中最漂亮的那一个叫做波西塔诺。

attractions.text_en: It is located on the coast of the Province of Salerno in the Campania region of southern Italy; the town closest to the coast is called Amalfi, from which it takes its name. Seen as a whole, here one half is the sea and one half is sheer cliffs, on which wind mountain roads and well-spaced, scattered villas.
attractions.text_zh: 它位于意大利南部坎帕尼亚区萨莱诺省沿海，最接近海岸的小镇叫阿马尔菲(Amalfi)，由此得名。整体看去，这里一半是大海，一半是绝壁，绝壁上是蜿蜒的盘山公路和错落有致的别墅。

attractions.text_en: The Amalfi Coast was rated by the United Nations geographic magazine as one of the 50 most worthwhile places to visit in a lifetime. It has the most charming coastline in Naples and indeed in the whole world, and it was once the capital of the powerful Maritime Republic of Amalfi, a very important city in Mediterranean trade at the time. To this day, one can still see many abandoned factories in Amalfi, such as paper mills, and Amalfi is likewise inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 阿马尔菲海岸，被联合国地理杂志评为一生中最值得去的50个地方之一，拥有着那不勒斯乃至全世界最迷人的海岸线，同时它也曾经是强大阿马尔菲航海共和国的首都，是当时地中海贸易中的一个非常重要的城市。至今，仍然可以看到在阿马尔菲有许多废弃的工厂，如造纸厂等，阿马尔菲同时也被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city of Pompeii and learn about the once-flourishing Pompeian civilization. Afterwards, head to Naples to tour the old town of Naples, the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and the Castel Nuovo (exterior). In the afternoon, head to Rome, and then end this wonderful journey in Rome.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明。之后前往那不勒斯游览那不勒斯老城，那不勒斯皇宫（外观）、新堡（外观）。下午前往罗马，之后在罗马结束美好行程。

highlights.text_en:
The ancient city of Pompeii | Asleep for a thousand years, still splendid and glorious when it awoke
The ancient city of Pompeii is located in the Campania region near the city of Naples in southern Italy. Once a small fishing village, thanks to its proximity to an important Mediterranean port, convenient transportation and a gathering of merchants, by the 8th century BC it had already developed into the second-largest city of the ancient Roman world. However, in 79 BC, with the eruption of Mount Vesuvius, volcanic ash and scorching lava instantly buried the ancient city of Pompeii, and the disaster claimed countless lives overnight. Only after more than a thousand years did the ancient city of Pompeii see the light of day again.
highlights.text_zh:
庞贝古城丨沉睡千年，醒时依旧灿烂辉煌
庞贝古城位于意大利南部那不勒斯市附近的坎帕尼亚大区，曾经是一个小渔村，由于靠近地中海的重要港口，交通便利，商贾云集，在公元前8世纪，就已经发展成了古罗马城的第二大城市。然而在公元前79年，随着维苏威火山的爆发，火山灰与炽热的岩浆瞬间掩埋了庞贝古城，灾难让无数生灵一夜之间丧生。历经一千多年之后，庞贝古城方得重见天日。

attractions.text_en: Located at the easternmost end of the ancient city, the amphitheatre was built around the 1st century BC and could hold nearly 20,000 people. It is the oldest of the ancient Roman amphitheatres, more than 40 years earlier than the Colosseum in Rome. It has three tiers of spectator seating, and the topmost tier still preserves the pillars that once supported the awning of that era.
attractions.text_zh: 位于古城最东端的露天剧场建立于约公元前1世纪，可容纳近2万人，是古罗马圆形剧场中最古老的一个，比罗马的圆形竞技场还要早40余年，这里有三层观众席，最上层仍保留着当年支撑顶棚的支柱。

attractions.text_en: The ancient city of Pompeii was once a small-to-medium-sized town backing onto the mountains and facing the sea, destroyed in a single day by the great eruption of Mount Vesuvius to its northwest. The town's streets and houses were buried by volcanic ash, yet the living scenes of the Pompeians from more than two thousand years ago were completely preserved, and only later was this vast site gradually excavated. In addition to various architectural ruins, there are also some shocking casts. People who perished during the eruption were wrapped in volcanic ash, and as their bodies decayed only the hollow shells remained; archaeology injected plaster into these shells to make casts, displaying to the world the tragic state of Pompeii at the time.
attractions.text_zh: 庞贝古城曾是一座背山面海的中小城镇，因西北边的维苏威火山大爆发而毁于一旦。城镇街道、房屋被火山灰掩埋，却完整保留了两千年多前庞贝人的生活场景，后来这座庞大的遗址才被渐渐发掘出来。除各种建筑遗迹外，还有一些触目惊心的铸像。在火山爆发时遇难的人，因被火山灰包裹而身体腐朽得只剩空壳，考古学把这些空壳注入石膏、做成铸像，向世人展示庞贝当时的惨状。

attractions.text_en: This is a historical site within the ancient city of Pompeii. It was once a temple, but because of its great age only ruined walls remain; nevertheless, the overall outline of the temple can still be made out.
attractions.text_zh: 这是庞贝古城内的一处历史遗址，这里曾经是一座寺庙，但因为年代久远只剩下残垣断壁了，但寺庙的整体轮廓还是看得出的。

attractions.name_en: Central Forum of the Temple of Apollo
attractions.text_en: Also called the public forum, this was once the political, economic and religious center of Pompeii in days past. On the square, the rectangular basilica still has some brick column bases remaining; this was the former court and place of commercial transactions. Opposite the basilica is a Temple of Apollo, where the 48 Corinthian columns are well preserved, and there are also many exquisite frescoes. On the north side of the square is a Temple of Jupiter with its back to Mount Vesuvius, from which one can clearly gaze upon Mount Vesuvius.
attractions.text_zh: 也称公共广场，这里曾经是昔日庞贝的政治、经济、宗教中心，广场上的方形会堂还残留着一些砖砌的圆柱底座，此处是以前的法院与商业交易场所。会堂的对面是一座阿波罗神殿，里面的48根科林斯式圆柱保存完好，还有许多精美的壁画。广场北侧有一座背对着维苏威火山的丘比特神殿，可以清楚的眺望维苏威火山。

attractions.text_en: For most travelers, the sea, the cuisine and the history of Naples are all important reasons that make it hard to leave. Naples was the most beloved city of the Italian writer Boccaccio; it is the birthplace of the songs "'O Sole Mio" and "Torna a Surriento," and also the birthplace of pizza. Naples presents a different face to travelers from all over the world throughout the four seasons of the year. Naples is also called "Napoli," which in Italian is "Napoli." Naples is the capital of the Campania region and the Province of Naples, and one of the most populous cities in Italy, abundant in lemons and grapes. At the same time, she is an important tourist city of the Mediterranean, known as the "City of Sun and Joy." Here is a source of inspiration for many artists and musicians — perhaps because of Mount Vesuvius, or perhaps because of the simple, rustic charm of Naples.
attractions.text_zh: 对于大多数旅行者而言，那不勒斯的大海、美食及历史都是让人流连忘返的重要原因。那不勒斯是意大利作家薄伽丘最热爱的城市，这里是歌曲《我的太阳》、《重归苏莲托》的诞生地，也是披萨的起源地。那不勒斯一年四季都呈现出不同的面孔展现给来自世界各地的旅行者。那不勒斯也叫“拿波里”，意大利文是“Napoli”。那不勒斯是坎帕尼亚大区以及那不勒斯省的首府，也是意大利人口最多的城市之一，盛产柠檬和葡萄。同时，她也是地中海重要的旅游城市，被称为“阳光和欢乐之城”。这里是许多艺术家、音乐家的灵感之源，或许是因为维苏威火山(MountVesuvius)，又或许是因为那不勒斯的古朴。

attractions.text_en: The Royal Palace of Naples is set in the bustling city, close to famous attractions such as the Castel Nuovo and Castel dell'Ovo. Having spanned four dynasties, its exterior looks quite ordinary; however, if you choose to go inside, it will surely astonish you. This palace is extremely luxurious, with an overall color scheme basically of gold, yellow and purple, representing the nobility of the royal family. The palace has many, many rooms — the queen's bedchamber, the council hall, the study and so on — and inside there are also many displays of royal articles and paintings of royal nobility, the most noteworthy being the throne. The most worth-seeing place inside this palace, apart from the various paintings, is it; words such as "noble and elegant" cannot simply describe it.
attractions.text_zh: 那不勒斯皇宫身处闹市，临近新堡、蛋堡等知名景点，历经四个朝代，外表看上去十分普通，但是，如果选择入内参观，那么一定会让你大吃一惊，这个皇宫非常奢华，整个色调基本就是金色、黄色、紫色，代表皇室的高贵。皇宫有许许多多的房间，王后的寝宫、议政厅、书房等等，里面还有很多皇室用品的展示和皇室贵族的绘画，最值得一提的就是王座。这个皇宫里面最值得一看的地方，除了各类绘画就是它了，用尊贵典雅这一类词是无法简单形容的。

attractions.text_en: The Castel Nuovo, also known as the Maschio Angioino (Angevin Castle), was ordered to be built by the first king of the Kingdom of Naples. The Castel Nuovo includes the Civic Museum (Museo Civico) as well as the castle ruins. The museum (mainly displaying paintings) is on the first floor; from the second floor you can see sea views, while the ground floor is the Castel Nuovo ruins, where the surface is built of transparent glass — travelers with a fear of heights need to take special note — beneath the glass are ancient architectural ruins and human bones. In addition, inside the Castel Nuovo there is also a Sala dei Baroni (literally the Barons' Hall), and the structure at the top of the hall is very distinctive.
attractions.text_zh: 新堡，又名安茹城堡，是那不勒斯王国第一位国王下令建立。新堡包括公民博物馆(MuseoCivico)以及城堡遗迹。博物馆(主要展示绘画)位于第一层，第二层可以看到海景，零层则为新堡遗迹，地表为透明玻璃建造，有恐高症的旅行者需要特别注意，玻璃底下则为古建筑遗迹以及人的骸骨。另外，新堡内部还有一个SalaDeiBaroni(直译为男爵的房间)，房间顶端的建筑非常有特色。

overview.text_en:
After gathering on the day, we set off for Monet's Garden in the small town of Giverny, then cross the Pont de Normandie to Honfleur, the classic Impressionist town, to tour the quaint fishing port the painters depicted. Afterwards we visit the twin cities of Deauville and Trouville, which preserve the most complete Norman-Anglo architectural ensembles, discovering the origins of Norman civilization from the perspective of architectural aesthetics. In the evening we head to Caen, the gastronomic capital of Normandy, and check in at the Ivan Vautier Hotel, where the Ivan Vautier three-course dinner set is recommended.
Overnight: Ivan Vautier Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel
Important notice:
1. Depending on the arrangement of departure dates, the touring order of some departures may be adjusted forward or backward, with the outbound and return sequence reversed, but the touring content remains the same. The change of itinerary does not affect the overall experience; the specific itinerary arrangement is subject to the departure notice.
2. Monet's Garden and former residence is closed in winter, open for visits from early April to the end of October each year; the specific opening times are subject to the notice on the official website of Monet's Garden and former residence.
overview.text_zh:
当天集合后出发前往吉维尼小镇的莫奈花园游览，随后横跨诺曼底大桥前往印象派经典小镇——翁弗勒尔，游览画家笔下古色古香的渔村城市。之后前往游览城市保留完整的诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群的双子之城——多维尔和特鲁维尔，从建筑美学的角度发现诺曼底的文明起源，当晚前往诺曼底的美食之都——卡昂，入住伊万沃蒂尔酒店，推荐伊万沃蒂尔三道式晚宴套餐。
夜宿：伊万沃蒂尔酒店或同等5星级酒店
重要提醒：
1、根据团期排列情况，部分团期的行程游览顺序或将前后调整，行程往返次序相反，但游览内容一致，行程改变不影响全程体验，具体行程安排以出团通知书为准。
2、莫奈花园故居冬季关闭，每年自四月初起至十月末参观，具体开放时间以莫奈花园故居官网通知为准。

accommodation.text_en: Ivan Vautier Michelin Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel. This Spa hotel, created by Michelin-starred chef Ivan Vautier, is a five-star hotel with a unique classical courtyard setting, featuring a Michelin-starred restaurant, a gourmet tearoom, and a spa center with a Turkish bath and body therapy services. Located in the old town of Caen, it is within walking distance of famous sights such as the Church of Saint-Ouen, the old Church of Saint-Étienne, and the Abbaye aux Hommes (Men's Abbey) of Caen. The rooms are designed in a contemporary Norman art style, and some rooms are decorated with arched windows characteristic of Normandy.
accommodation.text_zh: 伊万沃蒂尔米其林酒店或同等5星级酒店 由米其林星级主厨伊万沃捷创建的这间Spa酒店，是一所拥有独特的古典庭院景观的五星级酒店，配有米其林星级餐厅、美食茶室和土耳其浴室、身体理疗服务的spa中心，位于卡昂古城区、比邻著名景点圣旺教堂、圣艾蒂安老教堂和卡昂男子修道院均可步行距离到达。房间设计充满的当代诺曼底艺术风格，部分房间内饰有诺曼底特有拱形窗。

highlights.text_en:
Ivan Vautier Michelin Restaurant
The homecoming masterpiece of renowned Norman chef Ivan Vautier in his hometown. The refinement and oil-painting-like brilliance are also key reasons for the success of the restaurant's dishes. The collision of Norman seafood with fresh truffle, seasonal vegetables and stunning desserts, in imaginative creative combinations, presents a dual art of taste and presentation. "I only choose ingredients from Normandy, because I only understand the characteristics of Norman farm produce." — Ivan Vautier.
The restaurant is closed for lunch and dinner on Mondays and for dinner on Sundays, and does not accept reservations
highlights.text_zh:
伊万沃蒂尔米其林餐厅
诺曼底知名主厨——伊万沃蒂尔（Ivan Vautier）在家乡的出山之作，精致、如同油画般的绚丽也是餐厅菜品获得成功的重要理由，诺曼底的海产与清松露的碰撞、当季的蔬菜与惊艳的甜品，奇思妙想的创意组合呈现味蕾与造型的双重艺术。“我只选择诺曼底的食材，因为我只懂得诺曼底的农产品的特性”——伊万沃蒂尔。
餐厅每周一午晚餐、周日晚餐休息，不接受预定

attractions.text_en: Honfleur lies at the gateway of the Côte Fleurie (Flower Coast). The flower-filled harbor, the old bell-tower district, and the maze-like old town form the magnificent scenery painted by many Impressionist masters; this ancient thousand-year-old fishing port is an ideal vacation spot. Honfleur has been a historic city and an important maritime port of Normandy since the Middle Ages. From Honfleur you can gaze upon the spectacular Pont de Normandie, and strolling through the quaint streets and alleys of the town center, you can appreciate the exquisite romance and charming character of this seaside town on the Flower Coast.
attractions.text_zh: 翁弗勒尔位于鲜花海岸的门户地带，鲜花海港、古钟楼区和迷宫般的老城，是诸多印象派画师的笔下盛景、这个古老的千年渔港是理想的度假地。翁弗勒尔既是诺曼底中世纪以来历史悠久的城市和重要的航海港口。从翁弗勒尔可以眺望壮观的诺曼底大桥，漫步于市中心的古色古香街道和小巷，可以体会这座鲜花海岸的海滨城市的精致浪漫和迷人之处。

attractions.text_en: Deauville is a city that appears again and again in travel and architecture magazines, possessing the most completely preserved Norman-Anglo architectural ensemble to this day. Along the coastal areas of Deauville, old-style Norman timber-framed mansions can be seen everywhere; it is a popular high-end summer vacation resort.
attractions.text_zh: 多维尔 (Deauville)这座在旅游杂志和建筑杂志上反复出现的城市，拥有至今保留最完整的诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群，多维尔沿岸地区，处处可见老式的诺曼底样式、木质骨架结构的宅邸，是个热门的夏季高级度假胜地。

attractions.text_en: The Norman town of Trouville sits at the mouth of the Touques River, adjacent to Deauville, but the styles of the two cities differ. Deauville, the work of masters and a gathering place of celebrities, appears courtly and noble, while Trouville offers elegance, seaside scenery, and fairy-tale-like colorful castles. Together the two cities form the protected zone of the Norman-Anglo architectural ensemble.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落在图克河入海口的诺曼底小镇特鲁维尔，毗邻多维尔Deauville，但是两座城市的风格不尽相同。多维尔是大师手笔名流云集，显得宫廷贵气，而特鲁维尔的优雅、海滨景致，童话般的彩色城堡。两城共同构成了诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群保护区。

attractions.text_en: Monet's Garden is located 88 kilometers northwest of Paris, in the Upper Normandy province. In 1883, Monet was captivated by this place as he passed by on the train, so he moved here to live. Over 43 years, Monet spent half his life here, creating countless works. Monet called "the garden my most beautiful work." Today, 85 years after Monet's passing, the place is still maintained in the original state of Monet's day. From the tulips when the garden opens in April, to the most famous water lilies in midsummer, to the chrysanthemums before it closes in October, here you can find the colors from Monet's paintings.
attractions.text_zh: 莫奈花园位于巴黎西北方向88公里，属于上诺曼底省。1883年，莫奈坐火车经过这里时被这里所吸引，于是搬来此居住。43年的时间，莫奈一半的人生在这里度过，创作了无数著作。莫奈自称“花园是我最美的作品”。莫奈走了85年后的今天，这里依旧按照莫奈当年生活的原状维护着。从4月开园时的郁金香，到盛夏最著名的睡莲，10月闭馆前的菊花，你在这里可以找到莫奈画中的色彩。

attractions.text_en: The Pont de Normandie is 2 kilometers long, spanning the left and right banks of the Seine near the river mouth, connecting Le Havre and Honfleur. The two "V"-shaped guardrails of the bridge are very eye-catching, making the whole bridge look like a giant work of art.
attractions.text_zh: 诺曼底大桥长达2公里，横跨入海口附近的塞纳河左右两岸，将勒阿弗尔和翁弗勒尔连接起来。桥身的两个“V”形护栏非常引人瞩目，整个桥就像一件巨大的艺术品。

overview.text_en:
In the morning we head to the isolated island off the coast of Normandy — Mont Saint-Michel, to tour the Mont Saint-Michel scenic area. Depending on the tides, we view the mirror-like shallow tidal flats of the Norman seawater at the foot of the mount. Afterwards we head to the Devil's City — Saint-Malo, to tour the old town of Saint-Malo and the seaside city district, then head to the Loire Valley region to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Château de la Tortinière or an equivalent 5-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
当天上午前往诺曼底海滩的独立小岛——圣米歇尔山，游览圣米歇尔山景区，根据潮汐情况游览位于山脚下如同镜片的诺曼底海水浅水滩涂，之后前往魔鬼城——圣马洛，游览圣马洛老城及海滨城中区，随后前往卢瓦河谷大区入住酒店。
夜宿：达赫蒂涅城堡酒店 或同等5星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Château de la Tortinière or an equivalent 5-star hotel. The Château de la Tortinière is set in 25 hectares of French-style gardens, adjacent to the Château de Chenonceau in the Loire Valley. People can easily see this majestic art château built of white stone from afar, with Doric granite columns and several Romanesque wall lamps embedded on the walls, presenting a resplendent and elegantly magnificent appearance. The main part of the château was designed by the famous 17th-century architect Jean-Michel Chevotet. The château once received Queen Elizabeth of England. The hotel rooms preserve the style of the François era and antique furniture, with conference salons and a hunting hall, and the restaurant offers Louis-era style cuisine and banquet customs. The château provides an ultimate luxurious aristocratic experience.
(Our agency selects elegant double rooms for guests, which may be distributed in three areas of the château: the banquet hall, the attic, and the gazebo. If guests have specific requirements regarding room type or area, please contact customer service to upgrade the room type before registration.)
accommodation.text_zh:
达赫蒂涅城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店 达赫蒂涅城堡酒店坐落在25公顷的法式花园中，毗邻卢瓦尔河谷舍农索城堡，人们可以轻易从远处看到这座雄伟的由白色石头堆砌的艺术城堡，陶立克式花岗石立柱及嵌挂于壁上的数盏罗马式风灯，金碧辉煌和典雅华丽的风貌。城堡的主体部分为十七世纪著名建筑师Jean-Michel Chevotet设计，城堡曾经接待过英国伊丽莎白女王，酒店房间保留弗朗索瓦时期的风格和古董家具，会议沙龙及狩猎厅，餐厅为路易时期风格菜品和宴会习俗，城堡提供极致奢华的贵族体验。
（我社为宾客选择典雅大床房，可能分布在城堡的宴会、阁楼、凉亭三个区域，如宾客对房型或区域有指定要求、敬请在报名前联系客服升级房型）

highlights.text_en:
The Old City of Saint-Malo
This ancient Breton city, built in the Middle Ages, is a renowned European vacation resort. Not only because the old town is surrounded by towering pirate walls and was a transit point for the slave trade, today Saint-Malo is a city of gastronomy. The ancient buildings within the four square kilometers of the old town center are all filled with all sorts of gourmet restaurants, each with its own character, each looking like good business, each filled at any time with gourmands from various countries. The naval spirit, the red-topped lighthouse, all kinds of cafés, bars, gourmet restaurants, and vivid specialty shops are everywhere. "The fish-market quay is the truly outstanding atmosphere of Brittany; travel is about bringing your eyes and your stomach." — Faut pas Rêver, the world-famous travel program.
highlights.text_zh:
圣马洛古城
这座建设于中世纪的布列塔尼古城，作为欧洲知名的度假胜地。不仅仅是由于老城区被高耸的海盗城墙环绕和贩卖奴隶的中转站，今天、圣马洛是一所美食之城，古城中心四平方公里的古建筑屋内全部是各种各样的美食餐厅，每一家餐厅都各具特色，每一家餐厅看着都生意很好，每一家餐厅无论何时都填充着各国的饕餮们，海军魂、红顶灯塔、各种咖啡、酒吧、美食餐厅、活色生香的特色店铺比比皆是。“鱼市码头才是布列塔尼的卓越气氛，旅游是要带着眼睛和肚子。”——世界知名旅游节目Faut pas Rêver。

attractions.text_en: A pilgrimage site for Catholics, with the famous Abbey of Saint-Michel built on the summit. In the 8th century, the cardinal Aubert built it dedicated to the Archangel Michael, making it a pilgrimage center, hence the name Mont Saint-Michel. The small island where Mont Saint-Michel is located is conical in shape, 900 meters in circumference, formed of towering granite, and is often surrounded by vast sandy shores, becoming an island only at high tide.
attractions.text_zh: 天主教徒的朝圣地，山顶建有著名的圣弥额尔山隐修院。公元8世纪，红衣主教奥贝为奉献给天使长米歇尔所建，成为朝圣中心，故称米歇尔山。圣米歇尔山所处的小岛呈圆锥形，周长900米，由耸立的花岗岩构成，经常被大片沙岸包围，仅涨潮时才成为岛。

attractions.text_en: The Abbey of Mont Saint-Michel is located on Mont Saint-Michel. Shaped by nature, Mont Saint-Michel is one of the great wonders of the world, and the abbey and great cathedral on the mount hold a supreme status in the hearts of Christians. Aubert built a small chapel on a high point of the island, dedicated to the Archangel Michael, making it a pilgrimage center. During Napoleon's reign, the abbey also served as a state prison. To this day, although the abbey has been designed and rebuilt by many architects, it still maintains a plain, unadorned, quaint and antique style.
attractions.text_zh: 圣米歇尔山修道院位于圣米歇尔山上。圣米歇尔山经大自然的造化，是世界的一大奇观，山上的修道院和大教堂更在基督教徒的心目中有着无上的地位。奥伯特在岛上高处修建一座小教堂，奉献给大天使米歇尔，成为朝圣中心。拿破仑执政期间，修道院也曾作为国家监狱。到如今，修道院虽然经诸多建筑师设计改建，但依旧保持着朴实无华、古色古香的格调。

attractions.text_en: Saint-Malo is well preserved in medieval style. Because it once had to defend against pirate attacks, it is also called the "Pirate City," and today many ancient sailing ships are still moored in the harbor. Strolling through the old town, the narrow alleys and ancient buildings make one feel as if in a medieval city. You can also climb the city walls to gaze upon the vast beach, lie on the beach to sunbathe, play in the waves, and explore the reefs in the distance. Because this is the river mouth, separated from the old town by the sea, there are special cruise boats that ferry between the two cities. As a tourist city, Saint-Malo not only has a profound sense of history, but its various souvenir shops, supermarkets, and hotels provide very convenient modern services for travelers, so this is absolutely the best choice for a vacation.
attractions.text_zh: 圣马洛是保存完好的中世纪风格，这里曾经因为要抵御海盗的袭击，故又称为“海盗城”，今天在港口中还停靠着很多古代帆船。漫步在老城中，狭窄的小巷，古老的建筑让人仿佛置身中世纪的古城。还可以登上城墙眺望辽阔的海滩，也可以躺在海滩上晒太阳，踏浪玩耍，还可以去探访远处的礁石。因为这里是入海口，并且和老城隔海相望，当地还有专门的游轮在两个城之间摆渡。作为旅游城市，圣马洛不仅有厚重的历史感，各种纪念品商店超市酒店为游人提供非常方便的现代服务，所以这里绝对是度假的最佳选择。

attractions.name_en: The Beach and Coastal Fortifications of Saint-Malo
attractions.name_zh: 圣马洛海滩和海防工事
attractions.text_en: The coastal fortifications form a long ring, a completely preserved medieval coastal military fortress, encircling the old town, gazing toward the Devil's Isle and the British island of Jersey, the old slave prison, with large numbers of seabirds circling and sailing ships surging one after another. Going from the city of Saint-Malo into the pedestrian street within the city walls, then coming to the beach side, is very pleasant. Not far from the beach is the French national defense line, a square fortress, which can be walked to on foot at low tide. The whole city of Saint-Malo gives a very comfortable feeling, a medieval pirate city worthy of its name.
attractions.text_zh: 海防工事环形的长长的一片，保持完整的中世纪海防军事要塞、环绕古城、眺望魔鬼导和英国的泽西岛屿，奴隶古监狱，大量的海鸟盘旋和一艘艘帆船涌动，从圣马洛市里进入到城墙中的步行街，再来到海滩这边，非常舒服，离海滩不远处有法国国土防线，为方形堡垒，可以在退潮的时候步行前往，整个圣马洛城给人的感觉很舒服，名副其实中世纪海盗城。

overview.text_en: In the morning we visit the Château de Chenonceau, a château built on the water in the Loire Valley. Afterwards we head north, visiting along the way the exquisite and quaint old town of Blois, and finally visit the Château de Chambord in the Loire Valley. Along the D952 riverside avenue, in the pristine Loire Valley region, untamed roe deer and wild boar hide in the woods, and the most magnificent château in all of France — the Château de Chambord — rises majestically. Its layout is also the typical medieval château layout, a hunting palace of the kings of France. Afterwards we return to Paris and check in at the hotel.
overview.text_zh: 上午前往游览卢瓦尔河谷里一座建在水上的城堡——舍农索城堡，之后北上沿途参观精致古朴的布洛瓦老城，最后参观卢瓦尔河谷香波堡，沿着D952河畔大道在原生态卢瓦河谷地区的丛林里隐藏着从未被驯服的獐鹿、野猪，巍然耸立着全法兰西最恢弘的城堡--香波堡，布局也是中世纪典型的古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫，之后返回巴黎，入住酒店。

accommodation.text_en: Mercure Paris Gare de Lyon or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located next to the Gare de Lyon railway station. The Mercure Paris Gare de Lyon TGV is an ideal choice for business travelers, with five meeting rooms and a Coworking Station collaborative space. You can work out in the gym or relax at the Corner Station café and its private terrace. Enjoy a rich breakfast, either buffet or in-room dining. In the center of Paris, start a colorful city tour!
accommodation.text_zh: 巴黎里昂车站美居酒店或同等4星级酒店 酒店位于里昂火车站旁，Mercure Paris Gare de Lyon TGV 是商务旅客的理想选择，设有五间会议室和 Coworking Station 协作空间。您可以在健身房锻炼，或在 Corner Station 咖啡厅及其私人露台放松身心。享用丰富的早餐，自助或客房送餐均可。在巴黎市中心，开启多彩的城市之旅！

highlights.text_en:
World Cultural Heritage — The Loire Valley Château District
The Loire Valley châteaux display the most classical and traditional charm of France. As one of France's larger tourist regions, the Loire Valley offers you a tourist route of 280 kilometers, from Sully-sur-Loire in the Loiret department to Chalonnes-sur-Loire in Anjou. Harmony is perhaps the most notable feature here, whether the châteaux built upon the rivers or the gardens hidden deep in the forests, all reflecting one another along the banks of the Loire — the lush green grapevines on both banks of the valley, the quaint towns, and the châteaux as brilliant as the stars. "The Loire is another galaxy, and the châteaux are those stars." — Anjelica Huston.
highlights.text_zh:
世界文化遗产——卢瓦尔河谷城堡区
卢瓦尔河谷城堡群，展现着法兰西最古典与传统的风情，卢瓦尔河谷作为法国较大的旅游景区：从卢瓦雷省（leLoiret）的叙利（SullysurLoire）到安茹（Anjou）的沙洛那（ChalonnessurLoire），卢瓦尔河谷为您提供了一条长达280公里的旅游线路。和谐也许是这里最显著的一个特征，无论是建筑在河流上的城堡，还是躲藏在深林中的花园，在卢瓦河沿岸交相辉映，河谷两岸郁郁葱葱的葡萄树，古朴的小镇，还有灿若星辰的城堡。“卢瓦河是另一个银河，而城堡是那些星星。”——蕙兰·休斯顿

attractions.text_en: Although the old town of Blois was almost completely destroyed during World War II, the restored city architecture is still well worth seeing. Especially the bell-and-drum tower of the church, which glows brilliantly under the light projection at night. Across from the church is the House of the Acrobats, decorated with wood carvings of clowns from medieval farces, one of the few 15th-century old houses that survived the war.
attractions.text_zh: 尽管布洛瓦老城区在二战时几乎被毁于一旦，但修复后的城市建筑依然非常值得一看。尤其是教堂的钟鼓楼，在 晚上的灯光投影下光彩熠熠。教堂对面是杂技演员之家，装饰着中世纪滑稽戏中的小丑木雕，是战争中幸存下来 的为数不多的15世纪古屋。

attractions.text_en: Architecture of the 15th and 16th centuries, gardens planted full of Mediterranean plants, and two huge knight's towers. Linked together by the main keep, the gallery, the terrace, and the round tower, it spans the surface of the Cher River, a tributary of the Loire, and is the most romantic "water château" among the Loire Valley châteaux, likened to a ship moored on the Cher River. The Château de Chenonceau is also called the "Ladies' Château," because the owners of this château over several generations were all women, both noblewomen and heroines. This is a three-story château, whose great feature is that it spans the river. This happens to match the tender, water-like gentleness of Chenonceau as the Ladies' Château. Here you can admire the magnificent scenery along the Loire.
attractions.text_zh: 15世纪和16世纪的建筑, 种满地中海植物的花园和两座庞大的骑士塔楼。由主堡垒 、长廊 、平台和圆塔串联而 成，横跨卢瓦尔河支流希尔河河面，是卢瓦尔河谷宫堡群中最富有浪漫情调的"水上城堡"，被喻为停泊在希尔河 上的航船。舍农索城堡又被称为“女人堡”。因为这座城堡的几代主人全是女的，既是贵妇又是女中豪杰。这是 一座三层的城堡，其大特色是城堡是横跨河上的。这正好与舍农梭堡是女人堡的柔情似水相吻合。这里可以观 赏到卢瓦尔河畔的壮丽景色。

attractions.text_en: One of the Loire Valley châteaux, with a relatively typical medieval château layout, a hunting palace of the kings of France. The Château de Chambord was built during the reign of François I. In its layout, form, and style of decoration, it reflects the traditional architectural art of France, while also being influenced by the Italian Renaissance, becoming one of the representative works of the French Renaissance period. It is regarded by the French as a national treasure worth showing off. In 1981, the Château de Chambord was inscribed on the World Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 卢瓦尔河谷城堡群中的一个，较为典型的中世纪古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫。香博堡兴建于弗朗斯瓦 一世时期。它在布局 、造型 、风格装饰上反映了法国传统的建筑艺术，同时又受到意大利文艺复兴的影响，成 为法国文艺复兴时期的代表作之一。被法国人视为值得炫耀的国宝。1981年，香博堡列入了世界遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
On the day, take the French high-speed train TGV to Southern France on your own (no tour guide accompanying on the train), with a journey of about 2 to 3 hours. After arrival, gather and begin the tour of Provençal towns, visiting in turn: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the old town of Gordes, and the Abbaye de Sénanque (exterior), then check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Avignon Nord or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Important terms:
1. Due to tight high-speed train availability in summer in the Provence region, subject to cancellation risks from high-temperature shutdowns, strikes, and delays, the itineraries of the French railway company SNCF may, depending on availability, be adjusted to the Pont-du-Gard station or the Montpellier Sud de France station, in which case shuttle buses will be provided to connect the different train stations in Southern France. The order of the first and last days of the itinerary may be adjusted; this is regarded as an equivalent itinerary and not as an itinerary change.
2. Some departures of this product may include the Marne-la-Vallée train station, 38 minutes by car from the Gare de Lyon in Paris (Paris RER Line A); please consult sales before purchase.
3. During the Avignon Theatre Festival from July 4 to July 25, 2026, hotel locations may be adjusted; the specifics are subject to the departure notice.
4. There is no tour guide accompanying on the high-speed train; please board the train with your ticket on your own. Train tickets are issued under real names, requiring you to carry your passport and an electronic version of the train ticket.
overview.text_zh:
当天自行乘坐法国高铁TGV前往南法（高铁上无导游陪同），高铁时长约2至3小时。 抵达后集合，开启普罗旺斯小镇之旅，依次游览：泉水小镇、高德古城、塞南克修道院（外观），随后入住酒店。
夜宿：阿维尼翁北部诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店
重要条款：
1. 由于普罗旺斯地区的夏季高铁位置紧张、受到高温停运、罢工、延期等取消风险，法国铁路运输公司SNCF的行程，根据可用性可能会调整到嘉尔站（Pont-du-Gard）或蒙彼利埃（Montpellier Sud de France）站，届时将提供穿梭巴士衔接南法不同火车站，可能会调整第一天和最后一天的行程的先后顺序，视为同等行程，不视为行程调整。
2.本产品的部分团期可能会包含马恩河谷火车站， 距离巴黎里昂火车站38分钟车程（巴黎轻轨A线）敬请 购买前咨询销售。
3.2026年7月4日至7月25日阿维尼翁戏剧节期间，酒店位置可能会有调整，具体以出团通知书为准。
4.高铁无导游陪同，请自行持票乘坐高铁，火车票为实名制，需要携带护照及电子版火车票。

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Avignon Nord or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The Novotel Avignon Nord is set in the green-surrounded heartland of Provence, about 15 minutes by car from the historic city center of Avignon, making it an ideal place to stay for exploring the city of the popes and the Provençal countryside. The hotel adopts an overall modern minimalist style, blending the natural atmosphere of Provence, with a tranquil environment, spacious and bright guest rooms and family rooms, fully equipped room facilities, a restaurant featuring local fresh ingredients and French cuisine, and a bar and terrace area that are ideal spaces to relax over a drink and enjoy the Southern French sunshine.
accommodation.text_zh: 阿维尼翁城北诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店 阿维尼翁城北诺富特酒店坐落于绿意环绕的普罗旺斯腹地，距离阿维尼翁历史城区约15分钟车程，是探索教皇之城与普罗旺斯乡村的理想下榻之选。酒店整体采用现代简约风格，融合普罗旺斯自然气息，环境宁静，拥有宽敞明亮的客房与家庭房，房间设施齐全，餐厅主打当地新鲜食材与法式料理，酒吧及露台区域是放松小酌、享受南法阳光的理想空间。

highlights.text_en:
Visit the prototype of Miyazaki's "Castle in the Sky" — the old town of Gordes
The buildings in the town were all built in the Middle Ages, with winding gravel paths leading up, stone benches in front of doors wreathed in green vines, and flowers in front of the abbey. Its unique style, and the tranquil, quaint town, are like a history book, vividly displaying the medieval scene.
Avignon Street Art Theatre Festival
Every July, Avignon transforms into the capital of theatre and street art, with spectacular puppet shows, operas, contemporary street art performances, and concerts. All-night street theatre performances light up the entire night of Avignon.
highlights.text_zh:
拜访宫崎骏笔下《天空之城》的原型——高德古城
城中建筑均建于中世纪，蜿蜒而上的碎石路，青藤环绕的门前石凳，修道院前的鲜花，独特的风格，宁谧古朴的小镇仿佛一部史书，将中世纪的风貌活灵活现的展示。
阿维尼翁街头艺术戏剧节
每年的7月份阿维尼翁摇身一变成为了戏剧及街头艺术的首都，精彩绝伦的木偶剧，歌剧，当代街头艺术表演及音乐会，通宵的街头戏剧表演点亮整个阿维尼翁的夜晚。

attractions.text_en: The Provençal spring town of Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, about half an hour's journey from Avignon, is a renowned spring resort village in Southern France with a distinctive Provençal charm. The town is quaint and small, nestling quietly beside the spring. In the scorching summer, the residents here do not experience the unbearable heat; the cool spring water flowing down from the mountains carries away the burning air and brings wave after wave of refreshing coolness.
attractions.text_zh: 普罗旺斯泉水小镇（Fontaine de vaucluse），离 Avignon 大约半小时的路程，它是南法知名的泉水度假小村，具有别致的普罗旺斯风情，小镇古朴而小巧，静静的依偎在泉水之畔。炎炎夏日，这里的居民却体会不到那份酷暑难当，从山中流淌来的清凉泉水，带走了炙热的空气，送来了一波波爽人清凉。

attractions.text_en: In the valley facing the Luberon mountains, there is an ancient city built against the mountain, with stone walls, houses, hillsides, and a castle, set off against the blue sky and white clouds — this is the very famous tourist destination of the Provence region, Gordes, also translated as "Gaode." This hilltop ancient city once attracted many artists to stay here, and the 16th-century Château de Gordes stands prominently on the hilltop, housing many works by artists. In the towns of France, the artistic atmosphere is everywhere; a signboard, a shop window, all appear so exquisite. The brightly colored handicrafts and postcards attract children's eyes — what a delightful thing it is to browse the small shops.
attractions.text_zh: 在吕贝隆山区对面的山谷里，有一座依山而建的古城，石壁、房屋、山坡、城堡，映衬着蓝天白云，这就是普罗旺斯地区非常著名的旅游胜地——勾禾德，也有译作“高德”。这座山丘古城曾经吸引了许多艺术家在此停留，山顶上16世纪的高德城堡卓然矗立，里面收藏了许多艺术家的作品。法国的小镇，艺术气息无处不在，一个招牌，一个橱窗，都显得那么的精致。色彩绚丽的手工艺品和明信片吸引着孩子们的眼球，逛小店是件多么开心的事情啊。

attractions.text_en: The Abbaye de Sénanque is located 2 kilometers north of the stone-town of Gordes. It was built in 1148 by the monks of the Mazan Abbey. The entire abbey is hidden in a tranquil valley and is also the story setting of the book "A Year in Provence." This place is known as one of "the most beautiful valleys in all of France," and most postcards are photographed here. Even so, the lavender fields here are relatively small in scale, and sometimes tourists are quite dense; please try to keep quiet during the visit.
attractions.text_zh: 塞南克修道院位于石头城小镇北方 2 公里处, 它是由 Mazan 修道院的僧侣们修建于 1148 年，整个修道院隐藏在宁静的山谷中，也是《山居岁月》一书的故事背景。这里被称为“全法国最美丽的山谷”之一，大部分明信片都取景于此。尽管如此，这里的薰衣草花田规模却相对较小，有时候游客较为密集，参观的时候请尽量保持安静。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, tour the old city of Avignon on your own, the Pont d'Avignon (the Broken Bridge) (exterior), and the Palais des Papes (Palace of the Popes) (exterior), then head to the Pont de Gau Ornithological Park and the Southern French town of Aigues-Mortes, then take the Aigues-Mortes sightseeing train to tour the pink salt lake. In the afternoon we head to the city center of Marseille for sightseeing; Marseille gives a sense of unembellished wild charm. You can choose to visit the Palais Longchamp park, the Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde, and the Old Port of Marseille. Afterwards check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Marseille or Crowne Plaza, an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，自行参观阿维尼翁古城，罗纳河断桥（外观），阿维尼翁教皇宫（外观），随后前往蓬德高鸟类公园和南法小镇艾格莫尔特、随后乘坐艾格莫尔特观光火车游览粉红盐湖，下午前往马赛市区游览，马赛让人有一种没有过多修饰的野性风情感，可选择参观隆尚宫公园，守护圣母圣殿，马赛旧港。之后入住酒店。
夜宿：马赛诺富特酒店或皇冠酒店同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Marseille or Crowne Plaza, an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in a prime location in the center of Marseille, with easy access to the Old Port, the city center, and the major sights of the Côte d'Azur. The hotel's overall style is modern and comfortable, with spacious and bright guest rooms and complete facilities. The hotel has a restaurant and bar, offering a rich breakfast and light meal options, making it an ideal choice for exploring the urban charm of Marseille and the Mediterranean ambiance.
accommodation.text_zh: 马赛诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店同等4星级酒店 酒店位于马赛市中心优越地段，轻松前往老港、市中心及蔚蓝海岸各大景点。酒店整体风格现代舒适，客房宽敞明亮，设施齐全。酒店内设餐厅与酒吧，提供丰富早餐及轻食选择，是探索马赛城市魅力与地中海风情的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The Camargue wetlands are a delta conservation area where the Southern French coast meets the rivers, and are an important habitat for flamingos. Together with the quaint Aigues-Mortes and the algae-rich pink lake water, they form a rose-colored Mediterranean coast vacation paradise.
Dreamy Pink Salt Lake
