A natural pink landscape formed by salt-loving algae and high salinity, rich in layers under the sun, with white salt mounds up to several meters high, extremely visually striking; the pink lake surface, blue sky, and white salt mountains have an extremely high photogenic rate, a popular Instagram check-in spot. Along the way you can see flamingos, wetland vegetation, and the salt-field ecosystem — a unique scenic spot combining nature, industrial heritage, and regional culture.
Pont de Gau Ornithological Park
Flocks of flamingos can be seen all year round, the most representative birds of the Camargue; lakes, reed beds, and salt marshes interweave, fully presenting the natural wetland ecosystem of the Camargue; a habitat for 300+ bird species such as egrets, gray herons, pelicans, and white ibises, with wild birds frequently appearing; visit on pristine trails, with boardwalks and circular paths, gentle throughout, suitable for all ages, a renowned European holy land for bird photography and nature observation.
highlights.text_zh:
卡马格湿地是南法海滨和河流交接的三角洲保护区，也是火烈鸟的重要栖息地，与古朴的艾格莫尔特，富含藻类的粉红湖水，一共构成的玫瑰色的地中海海岸的度假圣地。
梦幻粉色盐湖
因嗜盐藻与高盐度形成天然粉色景观，阳光下层次丰富，高达数米的白色盐丘，极具视觉冲击力；粉色湖面 、 蓝天 、白盐山，出片率极高，网红ins风打卡地， 沿途可见火烈鸟、湿地植被、盐田生态系统， 结合自然、工业遗产与地域文化的独特景点。
蓬格高鸟类公园
全年可见成群的火烈鸟，是卡马格最具代表性的鸟类；湖泊、芦苇荡、盐沼交错，完整呈现卡马格自然 湿地生态系统 ；鹭鸟、苍鹭、鹈鹕、白鹮等 300+种鸟类栖息地， 野生鸟类频繁出没；原生态步道参观，木栈道与环形步道，全程平缓，适合各年龄段，是欧洲知名鸟类 摄影与自然观察圣地 。

attractions.text_en: The Pont de Gau Ornithological Park is located in the heart of the Camargue wetlands and is an important flamingo habitat, also famous worldwide for flamingo viewing. The flamingos near the salt lake feed on the algae and shrimp in the lake, and their feathers turn a faint pink, lively and beautiful. The withered yellow reed beds, the white herds of horses, the pink salt marshes and flamingos, and the dark marsh lakes are all worth stopping for, lingering in this unique natural scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 蓬德高鸟类公园位于卡马格湿地中心地带，是重要的火烈鸟栖息地，也因火烈鸟观赏而闻名于世界。盐湖附近的火烈鸟以湖中的藻类和虾为食，羽毛也会变成淡淡的粉红色，灵动唯美。枯黄的芦苇地、白色的马群、粉红色的盐沼和火烈鸟、深色的沼泽湖泊，都值得我们停下脚步，流连于这独特的自然风光。

attractions.text_en: Board the sightseeing train of the pink salt lake for a tour of over an hour in the central area of the Aigues-Mortes salt lake. The pink lake water blends with the snow-white quartz-sand beach on the shore, like a strawberry ice cream. Long-term sunlight and the high-salinity lake water cause the lake to produce large amounts of the β-carotene-rich Dunaliella salina algae, making the surface of the salt lake appear pink.
attractions.text_zh: 登上粉红盐湖的观光小火车，在艾格莫尔盐湖的中心地区进行一个多小时的游览。粉红的湖水与岸边雪白的石英沙滩相交融，如同草莓雪糕。长期光照和高含盐量湖水，令湖中产生大量丰富的β-胡萝卜素的杜氏盐藻，使得盐湖表面呈现粉红色。

attractions.text_en: Aigues-Mortes is a town between "salt" and "sea," named for the marshes and the still pink lake water surrounding it on all sides. Aigues-Mortes is a traditional pink-salt production place in France, and also one of France's earliest representative sights of agricultural civilization. The ancient city, blue sky, and pink salt lake set each other off, with people and nature jointly depicting this fairy-tale-like scene.
attractions.text_zh: 艾格莫尔特是处于“盐”与“海”之间的小镇，因其四周环布沼泽与不流动的粉红湖水而得名。艾格莫尔是法国传统的粉盐生产的地，也是法国最早的农业文明代表景点。古城、蓝天，粉红盐湖相映相成，人与自然共同描绘了这幅童话般的画面。

attractions.text_en: The Old Port of Marseille is one of the most iconic and historically significant places in this Mediterranean city. Since the Greeks founded Marseille in 600 BC, the Old Port has been the heart of the city. Today, the Old Port is not only a mooring place for fishing boats and yachts, but also a popular gathering place for local residents and tourists. Beautiful seaside avenues surround both sides of the Old Port, lined with cafés, restaurants, and bars, making it an excellent place to enjoy the flavorful cuisine of Marseille and leisure time. Whether the early-morning fish market, the lively market, or the lights and music at night, this place is full of unique charm and vitality.
attractions.text_zh: 马赛老港是这座地中海城市最具标志性和历史意义的地点之一。自古希腊人于公元前600年建立马赛以来，老港一直是这座城市的心脏。如今，老港不仅是渔船和游艇的停泊地，也是当地居民和游客的热门聚集地。老港两侧环绕着美丽的滨海大道，沿岸布满了咖啡馆、餐馆和酒吧，是享受马赛风味美食和休闲时光的绝佳场所。无论是清晨的渔市、热闹的市场，还是夜晚的灯光与音乐，这里都充满了独特的魅力和活力。

attractions.name_en: Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde, Marseille
attractions.text_en: Europe's churches are countless, but Marseille's Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde is one absolutely not to be missed. The gilded statue of the Madonna and Child atop the church is the symbol of Marseille, and also the patron saint of sailors, fishermen, and all Marseille people. The Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde sits atop a small hill 154 meters high, with an observation deck outside, making it an excellent place to view Marseille and the Mediterranean islands.
attractions.text_zh: 欧洲的教堂数不胜数，马赛的守护圣母教堂是绝对不能错过的一座。教堂顶上的圣母圣子金像是马赛的象征，同时也是水手、渔民和所有马赛人的保护神。守护圣母教堂座落在一座154米高的小山丘上，外设有观景台，是观赏马赛和地中海小岛的绝佳地点。

attractions.text_en: The Palais Longchamp is an arc-shaped building, integrating Baroque, Roman, and Oriental styles, and is very magnificent. At its center is a group of sculptures and a fountain on the theme of "Hymn to Water," with a gallery extending out on each side. Newlyweds often come here to take wedding photos, so young ladies who enjoy traveling in wedding dresses might as well take a tour.
attractions.text_zh: 隆尚宫是一座弧形的建筑，集巴洛克、罗马及东方风格为一体，十分宏伟。它的中央是以“水之赞歌”为主题的群雕和喷泉，两边各延伸出去一段回廊，经常有新人来此拍摄婚纱照，喜欢带婚纱旅游的MM不妨一游。

attractions.text_en: Avignon is a world-famous historic and cultural city, the heart of Provence, and is also called the "City of the Popes." It is also the venue of the world-famous Avignon Theatre Festival, and every July it becomes a holy land for theatre lovers. The old city of Avignon is surrounded by city walls, within which are the Palais des Papes (Palace of the Popes) and the square, and outside the city is the Pont d'Avignon (the Broken Bridge of Avignon) — all medieval historical buildings, full of cultural weight and a sense of history!
attractions.text_zh: 阿维尼翁Avigon，是世界历史文化名城，普罗旺斯的心脏，还被称为“教皇之城”。这里还是世界著名戏剧节阿维尼翁戏剧节的举办地，每年的7月这里就成为了戏剧爱好者的圣地。阿维尼翁老城由城墙环绕，城内有阿维尼翁教皇宫、广场，城外有阿维尼翁断桥，都是中世纪时期的历史建筑，充满了文化的厚重感与历史感！

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off for the lavender fields of Valensole and the D907 road (during the lavender blooming season), immersing yourself in the romantic sea of flowers and leaving behind purple memories; in the afternoon head to the Southern French film hub and seaside town of Cannes, visiting the Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame, and freely strolling the Cannes seaside avenue, then head to the medieval art village of Saint-Paul-de-Vence sitting atop a mountain. In the evening head to Antibes and tour the old town of Antibes on your own. Afterwards check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Antibes Sophia Antipolis or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Each year from mid-to-late May, large amounts of purple lupines (Lupinus Violet) bloom in Provence. Depending on the varying temperatures, the lavender will bloom in mid-to-late June, and depending on the different altitudes and cultivated varieties, it is generally harvested by late July. If the lavender cannot be visited during the departure period, the visit will be changed to the ceramic town.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路的薰衣草花田（薰衣草花期期间），置身浪漫花海，留下紫色记忆；下午 前往南法电影重镇及海滨小城-戛纳，参观影节宫、星光大道，自由漫步戛纳海滨大道，随后 前往坐落在山顶上的中世纪艺术村庄圣保罗德旺斯。傍晚前往昂提布，自行游览昂提布老城。之后入住酒店。
夜宿：诺富特安提比斯索非亚安蒂波利斯或同等4星酒店
备注：每年5月中下旬开始、普罗旺斯盛开大量的紫色鲁冰花（Lupinus Violet），根据不同的气温薰衣草将会在6月中下旬绽放，不同海拔高度和种植品种、一般截止到7月下旬收割。如团期内无法参观薰衣草，则更改为参观陶瓷小镇。

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Antibes or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is set in the core heartland of the Côte d'Azur, surrounded by greenery, in a tranquil environment. The hotel offers very convenient access to the old town of Antibes and the Mediterranean coastline. The hotel's overall style is modern and elegant, incorporating Mediterranean natural elements, with spacious and bright guest rooms. The hotel restaurant LE Fedor and the bar area offer a rich breakfast, Mediterranean-flavored lunch/dinner, and relaxing drink service. Guests can choose to dine in the restaurant, on the terrace, or in their rooms — a high-quality hotel combining modern style with the natural scenery of the Mediterranean.
accommodation.text_zh: 昂提布诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店 酒店坐落于蔚蓝海岸核心腹地，绿意环绕、环境静谧。酒店前往昂提布老城及地中海海岸线也十分便捷，酒店整体风格现代雅致，融入地中海自然元素，客房空间宽敞明亮，酒店餐厅 LE Fedor 和酒吧区域提供丰盛的早餐、地中海风味午餐/晚餐及轻松饮品服务，宾客可选择在餐厅、露台或客房内用餐，是一处兼具现代格调与地中海自然风光的高品质酒店。

highlights.text_en:
Flower fields stretching into a sea, pursuing the romantic flower language of lavender
Every year at the start of summer, the lavender fields of Provence bloom in vast stretches, and the whole air is suffused with the faint fragrance of lavender. Check in at the romantic and beautiful filming location of Chiung Yao's "Dream Behind the Curtain II," pursuing the lavender's flower language of waiting for love, immersed in the sea-like flower fields……
highlights.text_zh:
花田连缀成海，追寻薰衣草浪漫花语
每年入夏，普罗旺斯的薰衣草花田就会大片盛开，整个空气里都弥漫着薰衣草淡淡的花香，打卡琼瑶《又见一帘幽梦》浪漫唯美的拍摄地，追寻着薰衣草等待爱情的花语，沉浸如海花田……

attractions.text_en: Valensole has the beautiful lavender fields of the Provence region. It was selected by National Geographic magazine as one of the most beautiful places in the world, and it is also the filming location of Chiung Yao's eponymous novels "Dream Behind the Curtain" and "Dream Behind the Curtain II."
attractions.text_zh: 瓦朗索勒拥有普罗旺斯地区美丽的薰衣草花田。国家地理杂志评选为世界上美丽的地方之一，同时，这里也是琼瑶同名小说《一帘幽梦》和《又见一帘幽梦》的拍摄地。

attractions.name_en: Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame
attractions.text_en: Built in 1982, it is an important meeting venue of the Cannes Film Festival, where the much-watched Palme d'Or is awarded. The Palais des Festivals currently has a total exhibition area of 44,000 square meters, containing 15 concert halls. The Walk of Fame is one of the sights not to be missed in Cannes; located beside the Palais des Festivals, here you can see the handprints pressed into the pavement by many stars, now totaling more than 300.
attractions.text_zh: 建于 1982 年，是戛纳影展的重要会议地点，备受注目的金棕榈奖即在此颁发。电影宫目前总共有 44000 平方米的展览面积，内含 15 个音乐厅星光大道是到戛纳不可错过的景点之一，位于电影宫旁，可以在这里看到许多明星在这里的人行道上按下的手印，现在已经累计了有300 多个了。

attractions.text_en: Antibes was honored as the European City of Tourism and Culture in 2007. The old town's fish market, the coastal fortress on the beach, and the countless small vendors and bistros within the old city make it not only a seaside paradise but also a city with an excellent humanistic atmosphere. The old town market and fish market, together with this city, were inscribed in the UNESCO heritage of humanity. Many shops and eateries are spread on both sides of the cobblestone streets, and the Provençal market in the city is a famous fresh-produce market. Provençal charm and the vitality of the Côte d'Azur blend here.
attractions.text_zh: 昂蒂布在2007年获得欧洲旅游文化之城的美誉，老城鱼市及位于海滩上的城防堡垒，以及古城内琳琳总总的小商贩，小酒馆，不仅是海滨的天堂也是人文气息极好的一个城市，老城集市和鱼市与这个城市一起载入联合国人类保护遗产，很多商铺和食肆遍布在石板路两侧，城中的普罗旺斯市场是著名生鲜市场。普罗旺斯风情和蔚蓝海岸的活力在这里融合。

attractions.text_en: Saint-Paul-de-Vence is one of the most artistic medieval hill towns on the French Côte d'Azur, set on the highlands between Nice and Antibes. It is famous for its well-preserved stone city walls, winding narrow alleys, and the galleries spread throughout, and once attracted many artists such as Marc Chagall and Pablo Picasso to live and create here for long periods. The town blends history, art, and natural scenery; from the city walls one can overlook the Mediterranean and the Provençal hills — a classic destination both romantic and full of cultural depth.
attractions.text_zh: 圣保罗德旺斯是法国蔚蓝海岸最具艺术气息的中世纪山城之一，坐落在尼斯与昂提布之间的高地上。这里以保存完好的石砌城墙、蜿蜒狭窄的小巷和遍布的画廊而闻名，曾吸引 Marc Chagall 、 Pablo Picasso 等众多艺术家长期居住与创作。小镇融合了历史、艺术与自然风光，从城墙远眺可俯瞰地中海与普罗旺斯丘陵，是一个既浪漫又充满文化底蕴的经典目的地。

overview.text_en:
In the morning we set off from Antibes to tour Menton, the "Lemon Town," then head to the beautiful scenic route of the Côte d'Azur, the Avenue Princesse Grace of Monaco. Driving along the Moyenne Corniche, the famous cliff road of Southern France, admire Villefranche-sur-Mer, known as the city of beautiful seaside scenery, and visit Monaco and the yacht harbor. In the afternoon we head to the cliff town of Èze to overlook the Mediterranean, visit the perfume museum to learn about the production and blending process of perfume, then return to Nice to freely visit the Baie des Anges (Bay of Angels) beach and the Promenade des Anglais in Nice. Afterwards check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Antibes Sophia Antipolis or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早上从昂提布出发前往 芒通游览“柠檬小镇”，随后 前往蔚蓝海岸美丽的风景线摩纳哥格雷斯公主大道。随车行走在Moyenne Corniche南法出名的峭壁之路，欣赏有海滨美景城之称的海滨自由城，参观摩纳哥及游艇码头。 下午前往 悬崖小镇-埃兹俯眺地中海，拜访香水博物馆了解香水的生产调配过程，随后返回尼斯，自由参观尼斯天使湾沙滩、尼斯英格兰海滨大道。随后入住酒店。
夜宿： 诺富特 昂提布斯索非亚安蒂波利斯或同等4星 酒店

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Antibes or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is set in the core heartland of the Côte d'Azur, surrounded by greenery, in a tranquil environment. The hotel offers very convenient access to the old town of Antibes and the Mediterranean coastline. The hotel's overall style is modern and elegant, incorporating Mediterranean natural elements, with spacious and bright guest rooms. The hotel restaurant LE Fedor and the bar area offer a rich breakfast, Mediterranean-flavored lunch/dinner, and relaxing drink service. Guests can choose to dine in the restaurant, on the terrace, or in their rooms — a high-quality hotel combining modern style with the natural scenery of the Mediterranean.
accommodation.text_zh: 昂提布诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店 酒店坐落于蔚蓝海岸核心腹地，绿意环绕、环境静谧。酒店前往昂提布老城及地中海海岸线也十分便捷，酒店整体风格现代雅致，融入地中海自然元素，客房空间宽敞明亮，酒店餐厅 LE Fedor 和酒吧区域提供丰盛的早餐、地中海风味午餐/晚餐及轻松饮品服务，宾客可选择在餐厅、露台或客房内用餐，是一处兼具现代格调与地中海自然风光的高品质酒店。

highlights.text_en:
Driving the cliff road, seeking out beautiful photo spots
This cliff road named after Princess Grace of Monaco, AV.PRINCESSE DE GRACE, passes through the beautiful scenery of the Côte d'Azur at Villefranche-sur-Mer and the top of the seaside town of Villefranche. Driving along the coastline of the cliff road, stopping and going along the seaside, seeks out beautiful seaside photo spots for you.
Visit the perfume museum to learn the past and present of perfume
Visit the distillation process of perfume, the perfume laboratory, and the manufacturing workshop. These places will lift the mysterious veil of perfume-making, showing everyone the "secrets" of making perfume, toilet water, and soap.
highlights.text_zh:
行车峭壁公路，找寻美丽拍摄点
这条以摩纳哥格蕾丝公主命名的峭壁公路 AV.PRINCESSE DE GRACE 途径蔚蓝海岸美丽风景Villefranche sur mer以及海滨自由城的顶端，行车在峭壁公路海岸线上的海滨测停停走走，为你找寻美丽海滨的拍摄点。
探访香水博物馆，了解香水的前世今生
参观香水的蒸馏过程、香水实验室和制造车间，这些场所将揭开香水制作的神秘面纱，向大家展示制造香水、化妆水以及香皂的“秘密”。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Nice, which completely preserves various styles of ancient buildings since the 18th century, such as Baroque-style churches and Italian-style structures. Walking into the maze-like old town, strolling through the high-and-low, winding, twisting alleys, admiring the brightly colored buildings of various styles, treasure-hunting in the distinctive small shops. If you walk to the Cours Saleya square market, all kinds of brightly colored fruits, candies, and fresh flowers immediately come into view, dazzling the eye.
attractions.text_zh: 尼斯的老城区，这里完好地保留了18世纪以来的各种风格的古老建筑，如巴洛克风格的教堂，意大利风格的建筑物等。走进迷宫般的老城区，在高低蜿蜒，纵横曲折的小巷中漫步，欣赏颜色鲜明，风格各异的建筑，在各具特色的小店中淘宝。如果走到萨雷雅的广场集市(CoursSaleya)，各种鲜艳的水果、糖果、鲜花立刻映入眼帘，令人目不暇接。

attractions.name_en: Baie des Anges (Bay of Angels), Nice
attractions.text_en: The Bay of Angels lies next to the Promenade des Anglais, named for its resemblance to angel's wings. The sea here is very azure, a good place to spend the summer. The beaches of Nice are very special, all paved with pebbles, which are a bit prickly to step on, yet have a special charm. Climbing up the castle and overlooking from the east is an advantageous angle for admiring the Bay of Angels.
attractions.text_zh: 天使湾紧邻英国人漫步大道，因形似天使的翅膀而得名，这里的海十分湛蓝，是消夏的好地方 。尼斯的海滩很特别，都是由鹅卵石铺成的，踩上去有些扎脚，却别有一番趣味。 爬上城堡从东面俯瞰是欣赏天使湾的有利角度。

attractions.text_en: Like the citrus fruits produced abundantly here, Menton is wrapped in lemon tones. Whether the long beaches, the diverse architecture, or the stretches of citrus orchards, all seem to become nature's palette, dyeing this seaside town a special yellow in the height of summer. Get lost at the crossroads of the old town of Menton, walking the narrow and quiet streets between light and shadow, admiring the Baroque-style architecture, feeling the sea breeze passing through the houses, and setting foot on the "Lemon Route" will make you linger and forget to leave.
attractions.text_zh: 和当地盛产的柑橘类水果一样，芒东被柠檬色调所包裹。无论是修长的海滩，各式各样的建筑，还是成片的柑橘果园，仿佛都成为了自然的调色板，在盛夏时节为这座海滨小镇染上了特别的黄色。迷失在芒东老城区的十字路口，走过光与影之间狭窄而安静的街道，欣赏巴洛克式风格的建筑，感受穿梭在房屋之间的海风，踏上“柠檬之路”将会让你流连忘返。

attractions.text_en: As one of the world's most densely populated countries and a classic microstate, Monaco has a national territory of only 2 square kilometers. Benefiting from city sightseeing and seaside tourism income, Monaco is also one of the wealthiest countries, of which Monaco's yacht harbor and Monte Carlo are the most representative touring areas.
attractions.text_zh: 作为世界上人口稠密的国家和经典的微型国家，摩纳哥国土面积仅有2平方公里，得利于城市观光及海滨观光收入，摩纳哥也是最富裕的国家之一、其中摩纳哥的游艇海港和蒙特卡洛为最具有代表性的游览区域。

attractions.text_en: The distinctive Mediterranean-charm "eagle's nest" town — the Èze exotic garden, a town in pure classical Monaco style. A Mediterranean garden is planted on the hilltop, which is also an excellent spot for viewing the cliff scenery, and is at the same time the back garden of France's famous Château de la Chèvre d'Or (Golden Goat) hotel, as well as a wonderful position for a bird's-eye view of the Mediterranean scenery. Various Mediterranean-characteristic plants correspond with the classical town.
attractions.text_zh: 特有的地中海风情“鹫巢”小镇——埃兹异国风情花园，纯古典摩纳哥风格的小镇，山顶种植有地中海花园，也坐落着观看悬崖美景的佳位，同时是法国有名的金羊酒店的后花园，也是鸟瞰地中海美景的美妙位置。各种地中海特色植物与古典小镇相应。

attractions.text_en: The perfume museum, set at the foot of the Èze mountain, tranquilly and serenely tells people the story of perfume. The museum was completed in 1983 and is full of the flavor of the Mediterranean. The perfume museum aims to preserve France's renowned perfume industry and promote the international development of its perfume industry. The museum has exhibition halls in 18th-century architectural style, mainly divided into three principal areas: the production-process area, the perfume-history area, and the fragrance-collection area. Here, people can not only learn about the historical development of perfume, the blending process of perfume, and the production methods, but also discover rare perfume varieties found nowhere else in the world.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落在埃兹山下的香水博物馆，宁静安详的向人们诉说着香水的故事。该馆于1983年落成，充满了地中海的味道。香水博物馆，旨在保存法国享有盛名的香水工业和促进其香水工业在国际上的发展。馆中有着十八世纪建筑风格的展览厅，主要分三个主要区域：生产过程区，香水历史区和香料收藏品区。在这里，人们不仅可以了解香水的历史发展，香水的调配过程和生产方式，还可以发现世界上少有的香水品种。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off from Antibes on the Côte d'Azur, sailing along the Mediterranean toward the charming Cassis, and take a cruise to admire the steep cliffs, azure waters, and the unique coastal landforms. Afterwards head to the historic city of Arles, exploring the ancient Roman amphitheater and the classic landscapes painted by Van Gogh. In the afternoon arrive at Nîmes, stroll the old city, and feel the well-preserved Roman ruins and Southern French charm, then check in at the Nîmes hotel.
Overnight: Best Western Hotel L'Orangerie or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，从蔚蓝海岸的昂提布出发，沿地中海驶向迷人的卡西斯，乘坐游轮欣赏险峻悬崖、碧蓝海水与海岸独特地貌。随后前往历史名城阿尔勒，探索古罗马竞技场与梵高笔下的经典景观。下午抵达尼姆，漫步古城，感受保存完好的罗马遗迹与南法风情，随后入住尼姆酒店。
夜宿：贝斯特韦斯特橘园酒店或同等4星酒店

accommodation.text_en: Best Western Hotel L'Orangerie or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is set within a private garden in the historic city of Nîmes, France, in a quiet and elegant environment, just a few minutes by car from the old city of Nîmes and the Roman amphitheater. The hotel cleverly avoids the city's hustle and bustle while maintaining an ideal distance from the core sights. The hotel was converted from an elegant historic building, with an overall style blending traditional French charm with modern comfortable design. The hotel's dining mainly features fresh, healthy Mediterranean flavors, and the terrace dining experience is especially pleasant, making it an ideal place to stay for exploring Nîmes's ancient Roman heritage and Southern French charm.
accommodation.text_zh: 贝斯特韦斯特橘园酒店或同等4星酒店 酒店坐落于法国历史名城尼姆的一片私密花园之中，环境安静优雅，距离尼姆古城与罗马竞技场仅数分钟车程。酒店巧妙避开城市喧嚣，同时又与核心景点保持理想距离，酒店由典雅的历史建筑改造而成，整体风格融合传统法式韵味与现代舒适设计。酒店餐饮以新鲜、健康的地中海风味为主，露台用餐体验尤为惬意，是探索尼姆古罗马遗产与南法风情的理想下榻之选。

highlights.text_en:
Calanques Boat Cruise
Along the French Côte d'Azur, take a boat to enjoy the most classic calanque (inlet) scenery of the French Côte d'Azur, admiring along the way the tranquil waters of the Port-Miou calanque, the pink limestone cliffs of the Port-Pin calanque, and the magnificent azure waters and steep cliffs of the most famous Calanque d'En-Vau. You can both photograph the stunning coastal scenery and experience the natural wonders of the Mediterranean — an essential highlight route for touring Cassis.
highlights.text_zh:
卡朗格峡湾游船
沿着法国蔚蓝海岸，乘船畅法国蔚蓝海岸最经典的峡湾景观，沿途欣赏 Port-Miou 港口峡湾的宁静水面、Port-Pin 峡湾的粉色石灰岩悬崖，以及最著名的Calanque En-Vau 峡湾的壮丽碧水与峭壁。既能拍摄绝美海岸风光，又能体验地中海自然奇观，是卡西斯游览的必选精华路线。

attractions.text_en: Arles is one of the important destinations of Provence tourism, quaint and full of an artistic atmosphere. Apart from a series of sights related to Van Gogh, it is also a city where the ancient Roman ruins of Southern France are concentrated, hailed as the "Little Rome of the Gauls." Arles flourished due to Caesar's occupation, and became world-famous due to Van Gogh's paintings. Van Gogh is the symbol and pride of this small town. He not only painted here, but also walked the final journey of his life here. Most of the originals of his paintings originate from here. Everywhere here you can feel Van Gogh's footsteps.
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔勒是普罗旺斯旅游的重要目的地之一，古朴而充满着艺术气息，这里除了一系列与梵高有关的景点以外，还是南法古罗马遗迹集中的城市，被誉为“高卢人的小罗马”。Arles因凯撒大帝的占领，而得到繁荣；因梵高的画作，而蜚声世界。梵高是这个小镇的象征和骄傲。他不仅仅在这里作画，人生的终途也是在这里走过的。他画作的大部分原型都是源于这里。在这里随处都能感受到梵高的足迹。

attractions.text_en: The Calanques are located in the southeastern part of the French Côte d'Azur, a group of natural inlets composed of limestone cliffs and the azure waters of the Mediterranean. The calanques here are long, narrow, and deep, with steep cliffs, the water clear as gemstones, and the scenery magnificent, hailed as the "secret realm of the Mediterranean." Visitors can take a boat to explore the hidden coves and caves up close, admiring the pristine natural scenery along the way, and can also experience Southern French charm and local cuisine in the coastal town of Cassis.
attractions.text_zh: 卡朗格峡湾位于法国蔚蓝海岸东南部，是一片由石灰岩峭壁和碧蓝地中海水域组成的天然峡湾群。这里的峡湾狭长幽深、悬崖险峻，水色清澈如宝石，景色壮丽，被誉为“地中海的秘境”。游客可乘船近距离探索隐秘小湾和岩洞，沿途欣赏原始自然风光，也可在岸边小镇卡西斯体验南法风情与当地美食。

attractions.text_en: Set in the Côte d'Azur national park, Cassis is a colorful fishing village embraced by mountains and sea, a seaside vacation spot beloved by the French. Cassis is surrounded by mountains on three sides and faces the sea on one, with colorful houses built by the water and a small harbor where fishing boats and yachts are moored — a landscape unique to the Provence region. This is a long, narrow valley eroded by rivers and then partly submerged by seawater, forming the now-towering cliffs and hidden amphibious coves. A national park integrating the three major features of land, sea, and city surroundings, it has more than 900 species of wild plants and rich marine life.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落于蔚蓝海岸国家公园的卡西斯 是一个山海相拥的彩色渔村， 法国人喜爱的海滨度假地。卡西斯三面环山，一面临海，五彩缤纷的房屋临水而建，小巧的港口停泊着渔船和游艇，是普罗旺斯地区的特有景观，这里是被河流侵蚀后又部分被海水淹没的狭长山谷，形成了现在耸立的峭壁和隐蔽海陆两栖的小海湾，集陆地、海洋和城市周边三大特点于一身的国家公园，拥有900多种野生植物和丰富的海洋生物。

overview.text_en:
On the day, tour the old city of Nîmes, the City of Water Spirits, on foot, exploring the glory and mystery of ancient Rome and the Mysterious Garden, then depart from the Nîmes or Avignon train station and take the French TGV high-speed train on your own (no tour guide accompanying on the train). After arrival, the Southern France journey ends.
Important terms:
Due to tight high-speed train availability in summer in the Provence region, subject to cancellation risks from high-temperature shutdowns, strikes, and delays, the itineraries of the French railway company SNCF may, depending on availability, be adjusted to the Gare Avignon station or the Montpellier Sud de France station, in which case shuttle buses will be provided to connect the different train stations in Southern France. The order of the first and last days of the itinerary may be adjusted; this is regarded as an equivalent itinerary and not as an itinerary change.
overview.text_zh:
当天徒步参观水精灵之城尼姆古城，探索古罗马的辉煌和神秘花园，随后从尼姆或阿维尼翁火车站出发，自行乘坐法国TGV高铁抵达后（高铁上无导游陪同），结束南法旅程。
重要条款：
由于普罗旺斯地区的夏季高铁位置紧张、受到高温停运、罢工、延期等取消风险，法国铁路运输公司SNCF的行程，根据可用性可能会调整到阿维尼翁站（Gare Avignon）或蒙彼利埃（Montpellier Sud de France）站，届时将提供穿梭巴士衔接南法不同火车站，可能会调整第一天和最后一天的行程的先后顺序，视为同等行程，不视为行程调整。

accommodation.text_en: No accommodation on the day
accommodation.text_zh: 当天无住宿

highlights.text_en:
Explore the City of Water Spirits
Starting from the Avenue Feuchères water-spring avenue at the Nîmes train station, learn about the architectural structure of the ancient Roman aqueduct bridge, then head to the Mysterious Garden, exploring the glory of ancient Rome on foot.
highlights.text_zh:
探索水精灵之城
从尼姆火车站的水泉大道Avenue feucheres了解古罗马时期水渠桥的建筑结构开始前往神秘花园，徒步探索古罗马的辉煌。

attractions.text_en: A historic ancient city of the ancient Roman period, Nîmes gathers all too many astonishing crystallizations of ancient Roman wisdom: the well-preserved ancient Roman amphitheater; the Jardin de la Fontaine, a garden by the spring of the ancient site, as if hinting that Nîmes is a warm city living on its spring; and the ancient Roman watchtower on the hill, the Tour de Magne, from whose heights one can take in boundless scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 古罗马时期的历史古城，尼姆汇集了太多古罗马人令人惊叹的智慧结晶：保存完好的古罗马竞技场；古迹庭院泉边公园(le Jardin de la Fontaine)，像在暗示尼姆即是一座以泉为生的暖城；还有丘陵上的古罗马瞭望塔马涅塔(la Tour de Magne)，登高远望，可将无限风光尽收眼底。

attractions.text_en: The architectural feature of the Maison Carrée is its Corinthian columns. This building is about 17 meters high and 26 meters deep, built in the 1st century BC during the era of Emperor Augustus, preserving the Roman-period temple form exactly as it was. After the temple was built, it once served as a city hall and a church, and is now the Museum of Antiquities (Musée des Antiques).
attractions.text_zh: 方形神殿的建筑特色是科林斯式的圆柱。这座建筑高约17米，深26米，建于公元前1世纪的奥古斯都大帝(Auguste)时代，它把罗马时期的神殿形式原原本本的保留了下来。神殿建成后曾作为市政府大楼和教堂，现在则为古代博物馆(Musee des Antigues)。

attractions.text_en: The Mysterious Garden, built more than a thousand years ago — the Jardin de la Fontaine, a garden by the spring of the ancient site — can be called a great architectural miracle; the well-preserved ancient Roman architectural ensemble and forest-park landscape. Because the Nîmes of that time was a city developed centered on the spring water, people firmly believed the spring water had spirits, and the garden by the spring was the garden built by people of that time to dedicate to the spirits of the spring water.
attractions.text_zh: 建于一千多年前的神秘花园——古迹庭院泉边公园，堪称一大建筑奇迹；保存完好的古罗马建筑群和林园景观，因当时的尼姆是以泉水为中心发展而成的都市，所以人们深信泉水是有精灵的，而泉边公园就是当时人们为了奉献给泉水的精灵而建造出来的庭园。

attractions.text_en: The magnificent Colosseum, located in the center of Rome, was built by the ancient Romans to entertain victorious returning generals and soldiers and to glorify the great ancient Roman Empire. It was a place exclusively for slave owners, nobles and free citizens of the ancient Roman Empire to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat between slaves, and is Rome's most famous historical relic. The Colosseum is regarded as a model masterpiece and marvel in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for being huge, majestic and spectacular. Although only most of its skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and magnificent momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman emperor Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, among others, are laid to rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of the exquisite construction technology of ancient Rome, and was praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday" and has become a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and beautiful figure seems to have already merged with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never let go of. The Spanish Steps – the entire Spanish Square is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The steps have a total of 138 levels and are the widest steps in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.text_en:
Also known as the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the victorious return of Neptune, the sea god in Roman mythology, with a grand and magnificent overall momentum. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dream will come true.
Starting from 2025, the Rome city hall plans to charge a photography fee at the Wishing Pool. If this bill passes, visitors will need to pay the photography fee for visiting the Wishing Pool themselves, expected to be 2 euros.
attractions.text_zh:
又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。
自2025年开始，罗马市政厅计划在许愿池收取拍照费用，如该法案通过，则游客需要自行支付预计为2欧元的许愿池参观拍照费用。

attractions.text_en:
The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the world's seven great wonders and is one of Capri's most famous attractions. Many people's purpose in going to Capri is just to behold the wonder of the Blue Grotto. You can take a small boat to enter and tour the Blue Grotto. Due to the special structure of the cave entrance, the seawater inside the cave is crystal blue. The surface seawater of the Blue Grotto shows a deep blue color, while the deeper seawater is sky blue, and the seawater sets off the rocks in the cave so that they are all a shade of azure. When the weather is clear, the Blue Grotto is exceptionally beautiful and enchanting.
The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural landscape; if there is a high tide, wind and waves, or other factors causing the local marine meteorological authority to declare it closed, it cannot be entered for touring. The Blue Grotto tour fee is not included in the tour package. To avoid misunderstanding, please follow local custom and, in addition to the Blue Grotto manpower boatman fee, pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
attractions.text_zh:
蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，是卡普里较著名的景点，很多人去卡普里的目的就是为了一睹蓝洞奇观。可乘小船进入蓝洞游览，由于洞口的特殊结构，使得洞里的海水一片晶蓝。蓝洞表层的海水呈现幽幽的深蓝色，而深层海水却是天蓝色的，海水映衬得洞中的岩石也都一片蔚蓝。天气晴朗的时候，蓝洞分外的美丽和妖娆。
卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

attractions.text_en: Capri Island is located near the southern entrance of the Gulf of Naples, belonging to the Campania region of Italy. On the island there are the medieval castle ruins of Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as a church dedicated to the island's patron saint, Saint Costanzo. It is one of the famous tourist resorts of southern Italy. Capri Island's forests, waters, air, sunshine and the island villas longed for by the world's wealthy have attracted people from all over the world. Among them, the Blue Grotto is an attraction that everyone who comes to Capri Island will definitely visit; when the sky is clear and the air is fresh, sunlight shines into the cave, and every corner of the deep-blue cave is exquisitely beautiful.
attractions.text_zh: 卡普里岛位于那不勒斯湾南部入海口附近，属意大利坎佩尼亚区。岛上有巴巴罗萨和卡斯蒂利奥内两座中世纪城堡遗迹以及供奉该岛守护神圣科斯坦佑的教堂，是意大利南部著名的游览胜地之一。卡普里岛的森林、水域、空气、阳光和较令全世界富豪憧憬的岛屿别墅，曾吸引了来自世界各地的人们，其中蓝洞是每一个人来卡普里岛一定会参观的景点，天清气朗时，阳光照射入洞穴，深蓝的洞穴内每一处角落都美不胜收。

attractions.text_en: The Gardens of Augustus, located in the town of Capri, record the ten years of life that Augustine spent living here. One side of the garden is a cliff, while in the distance lies the azure sea. On the left side of the garden are the Lovers' Rocks; legend has it that these Lovers' Rocks were originally lovers in love who, unable to be together, threw themselves into the sea one after another to die for love, and afterwards became these rocks leaning and nestling against each other.
attractions.text_zh: 位于卡普里小镇上的奥古斯都花园记录着奥古斯丁在这里居住的十年生活。花园一侧是断壁，远处则是碧蓝的海水。在花园的左侧是情人石，相传这情人石原本是相爱的恋人，因无法恋爱纷纷跳入海中殉情，之后就成了这相依相偎的石头。

attractions.text_en: Sorrento is a small town in the Campania region of southern Italy, also known as the "Lemon Town." The town is built on cliffs by the sea, with beautiful scenery, and the whole city is full of the passionate, intense and relaxed feel of southern Italy. From here you can easily reach Naples and Pompeii. While in the town of Sorrento, you can overlook the Gulf of Naples, gaze at Mount Vesuvius and Capri Island, or stroll through the streets of Sorrento and taste the locally abundant limoncello.
attractions.text_zh: 索伦托(Sorrento)是意大利南部坎帕尼亚大区的一个小镇，也被称为“柠檬小镇”，城镇建造在海边的崖壁之上，风光秀丽，整座城充满着南意热情浓烈的松弛感，从这里可轻松抵达那不勒斯和庞贝。身处索伦托镇可以俯瞰那不勒斯湾、眺望维苏威火山和卡普里岛，也可在索伦托街头闲逛，品尝当地盛产柠檬酒。

attractions.text_en: The ancient city of Pompeii was once a small-to-medium town backed by mountains and facing the sea, destroyed in an instant by the great eruption of Mount Vesuvius to its northwest. The town's streets and houses were buried by volcanic ash, yet it completely preserved the living scenes of the people of Pompeii from more than two thousand years ago, and later this vast site was gradually excavated. In addition to various architectural remains, there are also some shocking cast figures. The people who perished during the volcanic eruption, because their bodies were wrapped in volcanic ash, decayed until only empty shells remained; archaeology injected plaster into these empty shells to make cast figures, showing the world the tragic state of Pompeii at the time.
attractions.text_zh: 庞贝古城曾是一座背山面海的中小城镇，因西北边的维苏威火山大爆发而毁于一旦。城镇街道、房屋被火山灰掩埋，却完整保留了两千年多前庞贝人的生活场景，后来这座庞大的遗址才被渐渐发掘出来。除各种建筑遗迹外，还有一些触目惊心的铸像。在火山爆发时遇难的人，因被火山灰包裹而身体腐朽得只剩空壳，考古学把这些空壳注入石膏、做成铸像，向世人展示庞贝当时的惨状。

attractions.text_en: This is a historical site within the ancient city of Pompeii. It was once a temple, but due to its great age only ruined walls remain, though the overall outline of the temple can still be made out.
attractions.text_zh: 这是庞贝古城内的一处历史遗址，这里曾经是一座寺庙，但因为年代久远只剩下残垣断壁了，但寺庙的整体轮廓还是看得出的。

attractions.name_en: Central Forum of the Temple of Apollo
attractions.text_en: Also called the public forum, this was once the political, economic and religious center of bygone Pompeii. The square's rectangular basilica still retains some brick-built column bases; this place was formerly the court and the venue for commercial transactions. Opposite the basilica is a Temple of Apollo, whose 48 Corinthian columns are well preserved, along with many exquisite frescoes. On the north side of the square is a Temple of Jupiter with its back to Mount Vesuvius, from which one can clearly gaze at Mount Vesuvius.
attractions.text_zh: 也称公共广场，这里曾经是昔日庞贝的政治、经济、宗教中心，广场上的方形会堂还残留着一些砖砌的圆柱底座，此处是以前的法院与商业交易场所。会堂的对面是一座阿波罗神殿，里面的48根科林斯式圆柱保存完好，还有许多精美的壁画。广场北侧有一座背对着维苏威火山的丘比特神殿，可以清 清楚的眺望维苏威火山。

attractions.text_en: Positano is a small town along the Amalfi Coast in the Campania region of Italy. The main part of the town is backed by mountains and faces the sea. A writer described it this way: Positano is a dreamland; when you are there, she does not seem very real, but after you leave, she becomes vivid and lifelike. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as one of Europe's most beautiful coastlines, where the coastline winds and twists, mountains and islands tower majestically along the shore, valleys interlace with headlands, and orchards coexist with wild plants. The pristine natural environment is rich in human history, and many picturesque small towns are scattered among the dense forested mountains, the most beautiful of which is called Positano.
attractions.text_zh: 波西塔诺是位于意大利坎帕尼亚大区阿马尔菲海岸沿岸的一个小镇。城镇主要部份背山面海，一位作家这样形容：波西塔诺是一个梦乡，你在时，她不是很真切，你离开后，她变的栩栩如生。阿马尔菲海岸被誉为欧洲美丽的海滩，这里的海岸线蜿蜒曲折，岸上山岛耸峙巍峨，山谷与海岬交错，果园与野生植物并存，原生态的自然环境中有丰富的人文历史，浓密山林中散落着许多如诗如画的小镇，而其中较漂亮的那一个叫做波西塔诺

attractions.text_en: The Amalfi Coast, rated by the National Geographic of the United Nations as one of the 50 places most worth visiting in a lifetime, has the most charming coastline of Naples and indeed the whole world. It was also once the capital of the powerful Amalfi maritime republic, a very important city in Mediterranean trade at the time. Amalfi has also been listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Here there are ancient medieval towns, famous for their unique culture and architecture. Popular towns include Amalfi, Positano, Ravello and Maiori. In these towns, you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers and temples, whose history can be traced back several centuries, each building having its own story.
attractions.text_zh: 阿马尔菲海岸，被联合国地理杂志评为一生中最值得去的50个地方之一，拥有着那不勒斯乃至全世界最迷人的海岸线，同时它也曾经是强大阿马尔菲航海共和国的首都，是当时地中海贸易中的一个非常重要的城市。阿马尔菲同时也被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产。这里有着古老的中世纪小镇，这些小镇以其独特的文化和建筑而著名。受欢迎的小镇包括阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和莱马尼。在这些小镇中，你可以看到许多古老的教堂、城堡、钟楼和神殿，这些建筑物的历史可以追溯到几个世纪以前，每个建筑都有着自己的故事。

attractions.text_en: This is a city that combines historical depth with beautiful scenery. Salerno is located on the charming Amalfi Coast, with ancient churches, a Norman castle and a picturesque seafront. At seaside restaurants and local eateries you can taste local Campania cuisine featuring fresh seafood and traditional dishes.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一座集历史底蕴与美景于一身的城市。萨莱诺位于迷人的阿马尔菲海岸（Amalfi Coast），拥有古老的教堂、诺曼城堡和风景如画的海滨，在海边餐馆和当地小吃店品尝以新鲜海鲜和传统菜肴为特色的坎帕尼亚当地美食。

attractions.text_en: Bari is the capital of the Puglia region of Italy, embraced by the scenery of the Adriatic coast. With boulevards lined by tall palm trees, it blends historical relics, seaside leisure and authentic cuisine. Among them, the old town has a strong historical atmosphere – medieval tunnels and relics, the Swabian Castle, the Cathedral of San Sabino – letting you feel the "city beneath the city." The most representative is the exterior of the Basilica di San Nicola; this 11th-century Romanesque church is a pilgrimage site shared by Catholicism and Eastern Orthodoxy, with a solemn and tranquil interior atmosphere. As for Bari Vecchia (the old town of Bari), here the alleys are narrow and winding and the white stone walls are mottled – the most authentic portrait of southern Italy.
attractions.text_zh: 巴里（Bari）是意大利普利亚大区的首府，坐拥亚得里亚海沿岸风光，高大棕榈树的林荫大道、融合了历史遗迹、海滨休闲和地道美食，其中老城区具有浓郁的历史氛围——中世纪的隧道和遗迹，斯瓦比亚城堡、圣萨比诺大教堂，感受“城市之下的城市”。最具代表性的圣尼古拉大教堂外观（Basilica di San Nicola），这座11世纪的罗马式教堂是天主教与东正教共同朝圣之地，内部气氛庄严宁静。然而巴里老城（Bari Vecchia），这里巷弄狭窄曲折、白石墙面斑驳，是最真实的南意写照。

attractions.text_en: This small town atop a cliff is hailed as the "Mediterranean balcony of Puglia." White houses are built along the rock walls, overlooking the azure Adriatic Sea. The most famous landscape is the bay of Polignano a Mare (Lama Monachile) – a deeply cut rocky inlet connecting a stone arch bridge and a natural rock cave, a classic picture for travelers to photograph and check in. In the town you can also see many verses written on walls, in front of doors and on the steps, displaying Polignano's title of "town of poetry." You can stroll slowly along the city wall, gazing into the distance at the scenery of azure sea interlacing with rocks, or make a brief stop at a sea-view café.
attractions.text_zh: 这座悬崖之上的小镇，被誉为「普利亚的地中海阳台」。白色房屋依岩壁而建，俯瞰湛蓝的亚得里亚海，最著名的景观是波利尼亚诺阿马雷海湾 ( Lama Monachile )—— 一道深切的岩峡口，连接着石拱桥与天然岩洞，是旅人拍照打卡的经典画面。小镇中也可见许多诗句写在墙上、门前、台阶上，展现波利尼亚诺「诗意之镇」的称号。您可沿城墙缓缓漫步，远眺碧海与岩石交错的风景，或在海景咖啡馆短暂停留。

attractions.text_en: Italy's paradise town – the town of Alberobello. "Alberobello" in Italian means "beautiful tree," so some people also call Alberobello the Beautiful Tree Town. The Trulli stone-house settlement is Alberobello's most representative architectural landscape in Puglia, famous for its swathes of Trulli (mushroom-shaped white stone houses). The stone houses are built of dry-laid limestone, with conical roof structures, white walls and grey tops, and a unique style. The Alberobello region was originally the most barren land with the worst natural conditions; the earliest stone houses can be traced back to the 12th century, and when people began to live there is no longer traceable. From the 16th century, more and more refugees fleeing natural and man-made disasters fled here and built houses with locally sourced limestone – which is the conical-domed stone houses with their coolie-hat tops that we see now. In 1797, the refugees petitioned the local King of Bamba in Taranto for legal settlement; the refugees were numerous and powerful, and the king reluctantly allowed this type of easily demolishable domed stone house to exist legally, forming the unique Trulli village of the Alberobello region. The typical Trulli-style building is one where residents use square limestone blocks to enclose a round house with no columns or beams; building to an appropriate height, they then use slab-like rock pieces stacked upward, each piece gradually narrowing to seal the top, forming a conical pointed roof – this is one of humanity's most primitive house-building methods. The limestone-block houses are sturdy, dry, warm in winter and cool in summer.
attractions.text_zh: 意大利的天堂小镇——阿尔贝罗贝洛小镇，Alberobello在意大利语里是“美丽的树”的意思，因此也有人称阿尔贝罗贝洛为丽树镇。Trulli石屋聚落是阿尔贝罗贝洛是普利亚最具代表性的建筑景观，以成片的Trulli（蘑菇型白石屋）而闻名。石屋采用干式石灰岩砌成，屋顶为圆锥状结构，白墙灰顶，风格独特。阿尔贝罗贝洛地区，原是自然条件最差的不毛之地，最早的石屋可追溯至12世纪，何时开始有人居住已无从可考。16世纪开始，越来越多逃避天灾人祸的难民逃到这里，就地取材用石灰岩建屋，也就是我们现在看到的带有斗笠圆顶的石屋。1797年难民向塔兰托当地的旁波国王请愿合法定居，难民人多势众，国王勉为其难，允许容易拆除的这一类型圆顶石屋合法存在，形成了阿尔贝罗贝洛地区独特的陶尔利村落。典型的陶尔利风格建筑，是居民利用方形石灰岩块，围成无柱无梁的圆形房舍，建至适当高度，再用片状岩片向上堆砌，每片逐步收窄封顶，成圆锥形尖顶，这是一种人类最原始的建屋方法。石灰岩块的房舍，坚固、干燥、冬暖夏凉。

attractions.text_en: The distinctive cave restaurants in Matera's Sassi old town (Sassi di Matera) are mostly converted from original cave dwellings or granaries, retaining the natural stone walls, arched structures and dim yellow lighting. They are divided into two areas – Sasso Caveoso and Sasso Barisano. The architecture is carved from natural rock and has been inhabited since ancient times, making it one of the oldest inhabited places on Earth. Common dishes at the distinctive cave restaurants include handmade pasta with sauce (such as Orecchiette), goat cheese, roasted vegetables, bean purée, country bread, regional wine (such as Aglianico) and homemade desserts.
attractions.text_zh: 马泰拉Sassi 老城区（Sassi di Matera）中的特色洞穴餐厅多改建自原始洞穴民宅或粮仓，保留天然石壁、拱形结构与昏黄灯光，分为两个区域——Sasso Caveoso 和 Sasso Barisano。其建筑由天然岩石雕凿而成，自古便有人居住，是地球上最古老的居住地之一。特色洞穴餐厅菜色常见包括手工意面配酱汁（如Orecchiette）、山羊乳酪、烤蔬菜、豆泥、乡村面包、地区葡萄酒（如Aglianico）或自制甜点。

attractions.text_en: Messina is located at the northeastern tip of Sicily, a city with a rich historical and cultural heritage, usually regarded as the gateway to Sicily. We especially enjoy visiting the cathedral's astronomical clock and the Orion Fountain; this Renaissance masterpiece attracts many curious tourists every day. The regional museum, which houses works by art masters such as Caravaggio, is also a pleasant surprise.
attractions.text_zh: 墨西拿位于西西里岛东北端，是一座拥有丰富历史和文化遗产的城市，通常被视为通往西西里岛的门户。我们尤其喜欢参观大教堂的天文钟和猎户座喷泉，这座文艺复兴时期的杰作每天都吸引着众多好奇的游客。收藏有卡拉瓦乔等艺术大师作品的地区博物馆也是一个惊喜。

attractions.text_en: Cosenza, set in the heart of Calabria, is a charming city woven together from its millennium-old history and vibrant modern atmosphere. Strolling through the narrow streets of the old town center, you can feel an authentic ambience, where ancient stones shine in contrast with the bright colors of handicraft shops and open-air cafés. Its history is rooted in the ancient Greek era, witnessed by archaeological sites and the spectacular Norman-Swabian Castle, which overlooks the entire city and offers stunning views of the surrounding valleys.
attractions.text_zh: 科森扎，镶嵌在卡拉布里亚的心脏地带，是一座以其千年历史与充满活力的现代气息交织而成的魅力城市。漫步于古城中心狭窄的街道，能感受到一种纯正的氛围，古老的石头与手工艺品店和露天咖啡馆鲜艳的色彩交相辉映。它的历史根植于古希腊时代，这一点由考古遗址和壮观的诺曼-斯韦沃城堡所见证，城堡俯瞰全城，提供了周围山谷的惊艳景致。

attractions.name_en: Piazza IX Aprile (Square of April Ninth)
attractions.text_en: Piazza IX Aprile is a square with typical Sicilian style, with distinctive black-and-white floor tiles, and the Ionian Sea and Mount Etna visible in the distance. On the other side of the square are the pre-Gothic Church of San Agostino and the 17th-century Church of San Giuseppe.
attractions.text_zh: 四月九日广场是一个具有典型西西里岛风格的广场，独具特色的黑白地砖，远处可见的爱奥尼亚海和埃特纳火山。广场另一边则是前哥特风的圣奥古斯丁教堂和17世纪的圣约瑟夫教堂。

attractions.text_en: The Greek open-air amphitheatre is a U-shaped theatre built in the 3rd century BC, suspended between sea and sky. It is the second largest theatre in Sicily after Syracuse, and its unique location makes it one of the most distinctive Greek-style theatres in the world. In summer, this theatre is the venue for the Taormina Arts Festival.
attractions.text_zh: 希腊露天圆形剧场是一座建于公元前3世纪的U形剧院，悬浮于海天之间，是西西里仅次于锡拉库纥的第二大剧院，由于其独特的位置使其成为世界上最具特色的希腊式剧院。夏季，该剧院是陶尔米纳艺术节的举办场所。

attractions.text_en: The town is built high on a mountain. Beautiful, tranquil and spotlessly clean, some call it a pearl by the Ionian Sea. Here, one side is a cliff and the other faces the great sea; the city is built upon layer after layer of mountain rock, forming its momentum of reaching up to the blue sky above and looking down on the sea below, standing loftily and towering. At night, viewed from afar, its scattered lights and the myriad stars in the sky merge completely into one, so that one cannot tell which is heaven and which is the human world. Stroll along Corso Umberto; admire the charming Ionian seaside scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 小镇建在高高的山上。美丽、宁静，一尘不染。有人称它为爱奥尼亚海边的一颗珍珠。这里一面是悬崖，一面临大海，城市建筑在层层山石之上，形成它那上接青天，下临大海，岿然耸立的气势。夜晚，远远望去，它的点点灯火和天上的繁星完全连成一片，使人分不清哪是天上，哪是人间。漫步于科索安不托大道；欣赏迷人的伊奥尼亚海滨风光。

attractions.text_en: Mount Etna, located on the east coast of Sicily, Italy, has an altitude of 3,323 meters and an area of 1,200 square kilometers. It is a large basaltic stratovolcano, a composite volcano, with about 700,000 people living around it. Mount Etna is also one of the most active volcanoes in the world. Etna lies at the junction of the Eurasian Plate and the African Plate, giving rise to the volcanic-ash geology unique to the surrounding region; together with the warm climate, this land is fertile and abundant. The Mount Etna area has rocks, shrubs, grasslands and forests; there is even a wetland.
attractions.text_zh: 埃特纳火山（Etna），位于意大利西西里岛东海岸，海拔3323米，面积1200平方千米，是一座大型玄武岩层火山，为成层火山，约有70万人居住。埃特纳火山也是世界上很活跃的火山之一。埃特纳火山处于亚欧板块和非洲板块交汇处，孕育出周边地域独有的火山灰地质，加之温暖的气候，这片土地肥沃而富饶。埃特纳火山地区有岩石、灌木丛、草地和森林；甚至还有一个湿地。

attractions.text_en: It is the most beautiful Frederick castle on the island, named after George Maniakes, the commander who built fortifications during the Byzantine period to defend the southern port of the island. According to research, the castle originally had walls 18 meters high and 3.5 meters thick, with the main façade facing Ortigia and the two sides located on the sea, until the Spanish remodeled it in the 16th century. The vaults, passages, platforms and battlements within the castle all let one feel the loftiness of this fortification in those years and the staunch role it played in resisting foreign enemies.
attractions.text_zh: 是岛上最美的腓特烈城堡，名字来源于拜占庭时期建筑防御工事、保卫岛南部端口的指挥官乔治•马尼亚切。据考证城堡原先墙高18米，厚3.5米，主立面面向奥尔提伽，两侧面位于海上，直到十六世纪西班牙人对它进行了改造。城堡内的拱顶，通道，平台，垛子都能让人感到这座防御工事当年的巍峨和抵御外敌时发挥的坚挺作用。

attractions.name_en: Fountain of Arethusa (Spring of the Wood Nymph)
attractions.text_en: The Fountain of Arethusa is a freshwater spring. According to records, the wood nymph Arethusa, attendant of Artemis (goddess of the moon and the hunt), was pursued by a river god; she begged Artemis to turn her into spring water in order to escape the loathsome river god. Today, the fountain is a refuge for wild ducks, mullet and papyrus, and is also a tranquil and beautiful scene.
attractions.text_zh: 阿勒图萨喷泉是个淡水泉眼。据记载，阿耳特弥斯(月神和狩猎女神)的侍女——林中仙女Aretusa被河神追逐，她请求阿耳特弥斯将自己变成了泉水，以摆脱掉讨厌的河神。如今，喷泉里是野鸭、胭脂鱼和纸莎草的安身之地，也是一处宁静美丽的风景。

attractions.text_en: The city of Ortigia was once described by Cicero as "the greatest and most beautiful city of Greece." The colonists of that time left many ancient-Greek-style buildings in the city, all with histories of more than a thousand years, including the ruins of the Temple of Apollo, the Temple of Athena (which has been converted into a cathedral), the beautiful Spring of the Wood Nymph, the broad Greek theatre, and so on. Beside the Greek theatre there is a huge rock cave called the Ear of Dionysius, shaped like an ear, with enormous echoes. In addition, the city has many churches from the Christian period, mostly Romanesque and Baroque. These buildings, differing in age and style, are all witnesses to the long history of the ancient city; today, they still stand there quietly.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔提伽城曾被西塞罗描述为“希腊最伟大、最美丽的城市”。当时的殖民者在城内留下了许多古希腊风格建筑物，历史都有千年以上，其中包括阿波罗神庙遗址、已被改造成大教堂的雅典娜神庙、美丽的林仙泉、宽广的希腊剧场等等。在希腊剧场旁有一个被成为狄俄尼索斯之耳的巨大岩洞，形如耳朵，回声巨大。另外，城里还有许多基督教时期的教堂，大多是罗马式和巴洛克式。这些年代和风格都不尽相同的建筑物，都是古城悠久历史的见证者，如今，它们依然静静地矗立在那里。

attractions.text_en: The cathedral was once a Greek temple, and became a church after Sicily was Christianized in the 7th century. In the 18th century AD, the magnificent Baroque façade designed by Andrea Palma covered the former Temple of Athena, but one can still make out the huge 6×14 Doric columns built in the 5th century BC. It is the square where the heroine of the film "Malèna" (Sicily's beautiful legend) often appeared.
attractions.text_zh: 大教堂曾经是一座希腊庙宇，7世纪西西里岛基督化后成为教堂。公元18世纪由AndreaPalma设计的华丽巴洛克式外观掩盖了曾经的雅典娜神庙，但还是能够看出公元前5世纪修建的6*14规模巨大的多利克柱式。电影《西西里岛的美丽传说》中，女主角经常出现的广场。

attractions.text_en: Catania is located on the east coast of Sicily, Italy, and is the second largest city on the island. The city sits at the foot of Mount Etna; historically this volcano has brought devastating harm to Catania, but it has made the soil here exceptionally fertile, suitable for growing grapes for winemaking. The whole city has elegant architecture and broad avenues, facing the sparkling, rippling Ionian Sea, which gives the city yet another flavor.
attractions.text_zh: 卡塔尼亚(Catania)位于意大利西西里岛的东岸，是西西里岛上的第二大城市。城市就坐落在埃特纳火山的山脚下，在历史上这座火山曾给卡塔尼亚带来过毁灭性的伤害，但使得这里的土壤份外肥沃，适合种植葡萄酿酒。整座城市有着典雅的建筑、宽广的大道，面临着碧波粼粼的爱奥尼亚海，也让这座城市有了另一番风味。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Agrigento is a region full of historical charm, famous for its rich ancient Greek relics and medieval architecture. The old town sits on a lofty hill, from which one can overlook the surrounding fields and the Mediterranean Sea. The city's history can be traced back to the 6th century BC, when it was called Akragas, an important Greek city-state. Over time, the city went through many changes, including Roman, Byzantine, Arab and Norman rule, and the influences of these different cultures have left their traces in the city's architecture and urban layout.
attractions.text_zh: 阿格里真托老城是一个充满历史魅力的地区，以其丰富的古希腊遗迹和中世纪建筑而闻名。老城区坐落在一座高耸的山丘上，从这里可以俯瞰周围的田野和地中海。这座城市的历史可以追溯到公元前6世纪，当时称为阿克拉加斯（Akragas），是古希腊的一个重要城邦。随着时间的推移，城市经历了多次变迁，包括罗马、拜占庭、阿拉伯和诺曼人的统治，这些不同文化的影响在城市的建筑和城市布局中留下了痕迹。

attractions.text_en: The [Valley of the Temples], 2 kilometers outside the town of Agrigento, has been one of the world's most important archaeological sites since 1998 and is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. On the ridge, many Greek-style temple buildings are preserved, first built in the 5th century BC, which have stood on this land for two thousand years, and it is also one of the most famous ancient Greek architectural complexes outside Italy. The temples are located atop verdant green mountains, overlooking the azure sea and gazing into the distance at the boundless firmament.
attractions.text_zh: 距离阿格里真托城镇2公里开外的【神殿之谷】，是自1998年来世界最重要的考古遗址之一，是联合国教科文组织世界遗产之一。在山脊上保留了许多希腊式神庙建筑，始建于公元前五世纪，两千年来一直屹立在这片土地之上，这里也是意大利境外最著名的古希腊建筑群之一。神殿位于翠绿的山峦之上，俯瞰着碧蓝的大海，远望无边界的苍穹。

attractions.text_en: Cefalù is a seaside town in the north-central part of Sicily, situated below the cliffs of Rocca hill. The tranquil town is built by the sea and dwells by the water, with beautiful scenery. It is also a filming location of "Cinema Paradiso." Cefalù was founded by the ancient Greeks. Its name was also given by the Greeks, because on the east side of the town of Cefalù is a stone mountain that rises straight from the ground with a very steep terrain. It juts out into the Mediterranean Sea, forming a landform surrounded by water on three sides. The whole mountain top looks like a bald-headed person. So the Greeks called this place Cefalù, which actually means "head" in Greek.
attractions.text_zh: 切法卢位于西西里岛正北部的一座海滨小镇，坐落于洛卡山的悬崖峭壁之下，宁静的小镇临海而建，靠水而居，风光秀丽。这里也是《天堂电影院》的取景地哦。切法卢是古希腊人建立的。名字也是希腊人所取，因为切法卢市区的东侧是一座拔地而起，山势很陡峭的石头山。探入到地中海，形成了一个三面环水的地形。整个山头看起来像一个光头的人。于是希腊人称这里为切法卢，其实就是希腊语“头”的意思。

attractions.text_en: The cathedral, first built in 1184, was finally completed in the 18th century, blending multiple architectural styles. From the 13th century it was influenced by Gothic, and in the 15th century it incorporated Spanish architectural style; the Gothic double-tier pointed-arch windows and arches, the Catalan-style porch and columns, and the Muslim-style geometric patterns of the apse are all perfectly fused together. The interior of the church is a Norman semicircular hall, very large and empty, and is the burial place of the Norman royal family. The underground treasure of the church displays all kinds of jewelry and accessories.
attractions.text_zh: 始建于1184年的大教堂，至18世纪最后完成，融合了多种建筑风格。13世纪开始受到哥特式影响，15世纪又融合了西班牙建筑风格；哥特式的双层尖顶窗和拱门，加泰罗尼亚风格的门廊和柱子，后殿穆斯林风格的几何图案，都完美地融合在了一起。教堂内部是诺曼式的半圆形殿堂，很大很空旷，是诺曼皇室的墓地所在。教堂的地下宝藏陈列着各种各样的珠宝首饰。

attractions.text_en: The Norman Palace was originally built in the 9th century, when it was an Arab fortress, and was later expanded into a royal palace by the Norman conquerors in the 12th century. This palace was the political and administrative center of the Norman kings, and later also became the royal residence of the Kingdom of Sicily. The palace's architecture blends Arab, Byzantine and Norman styles, displaying the fusion of multiple cultures.
attractions.text_zh: 诺曼王宫最初建于9世纪，当时为阿拉伯的一个要塞，后来在12世纪由诺曼征服者扩建成为王宫。这座宫殿是诺曼国王的政治和行政中心，后来也成为西西里王国的皇家居所。宫殿的建筑融合了阿拉伯、拜占庭和诺曼风格，展现了多元文化的交融。

attractions.text_en:
The heart of Palermo · the meeting point of Baroque art
Quattro Canti is located in the center of Palermo's old town. The Four Corners Square is the meeting point connecting the city's two main streets running north-south and east-west, hailed as "the heart of Palermo." The four sides of the square are symmetrical Baroque-style façades, each corner decorated with fountains and statues, symbolizing the four patron saints of Sicily, four Spanish kings, and the rotation of the four seasons. Sunlight falls on the golden stone walls, the carvings and arched windows reflecting elegant light and shadow, making it the most representative photo and check-in spot. Strolling here, it is as if you travel back to the glorious years of the 17th century.
attractions.text_zh:
巴勒莫的心脏 · 巴洛克艺术的交汇点
四角广场位于巴勒莫老城区中心，四角广场是连接城市南北、东西两条主要街道的交汇点，被誉为“巴勒莫的心脏”。广场四面为对称的巴洛克风格立面，每一角都装饰着喷泉与雕像，象征着四位西西里守护圣人、四位西班牙国王、以及四季更替。阳光洒落在金色石墙上，雕刻与拱窗辉映出优雅的光影，是最具代表性的拍照打卡地。漫步此处，仿佛穿越回17世纪的辉煌岁月。

attractions.text_en: Teatro Massimo is one of the famous theatres of Italy and Europe. This theatre is renowned for its magnificent architecture and excellent acoustic design, and is an important venue for the performing arts. Construction began in 1875, and the designer was the Italian architect Giovanni Battista Basile. The building adopts a neoclassical style; its exterior is grand and spectacular, especially its huge dome and rich decorative carvings, making it one of the landmark buildings of the city of Palermo. The interior of Teatro Massimo is equally magnificent, with a huge auditorium decorated with gorgeous marble, gold leaf and exquisite frescoes. The hall is designed in a horseshoe shape and can accommodate nearly 1,400 spectators. Its stage was one of the largest in the world at the time, very suitable for large-scale opera and ballet performances. Teatro Massimo became even more internationally famous due to its appearance in the film "The Godfather Part III."
attractions.text_zh: 马西莫剧院是意大利和欧洲著名的剧院之一。这座剧院以其宏伟的建筑和卓越的声学设计闻名，是表演艺术的重要场所。建设始于1875年，设计者是意大利建筑师乔瓦尼·巴蒂斯塔·巴斯莱（Giovanni Battista Basile）。建筑采用新古典主义风格，其外观雄伟壮观，特别是其巨大的穹顶和丰富的装饰性雕刻，使其成为巴勒莫市的标志性建筑之一。马西莫剧院内部同样壮丽，拥有一个巨大的观众大厅，装饰着华丽的大理石、金箔和精美的壁画。大厅设计成马蹄形，可容纳近1,400名观众。其舞台是当时世界上较大的舞台之一，非常适合大型歌剧和芭蕾舞表演。马西莫剧院因其在电影《教父3》中的露面而在国际上更加知名。

attractions.text_en: Authentic local snacks, a colorful market, a noisy and bustling crowd, all kinds of spices, nuts and seafood, with enthusiastic vendors shouting loudly in the market, inviting you to taste their products.
attractions.text_zh: 地道的特色小吃，色彩斑斓的集市、喧闹忙碌的人群，各种香料、坚果、海鲜、热情的摊贩在市场上大声喊叫，邀请您品尝他们的产品。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Bellini and the Church of Santa Maria dell'Ammiraglio (the Admiral's Saint Mary Church), as a UNESCO World Heritage Site, blend Byzantine, Arab and Baroque architectural styles together with gorgeous Rococo decoration into one, a delight to behold.
attractions.text_zh: 贝里尼广场和海军元帅圣母教堂，作为联合国教科文组织世界遗产，它融合了 拜占庭、阿拉伯、巴洛克的 建筑风格和华丽洛可可装饰为一体，令人赏心悦目。

attractions.text_en: The Blue Lagoon geothermal spa in Iceland sits in one of the regions of Earth where underground magmatic activity is most frequent. This activity heats the Blue Lagoon, causing the water to steam. The bathing and swimming lagoon area of the Blue Lagoon has an average water temperature of around 40 °C, and the water is rich in minerals. After soaking in the Blue Lagoon you usually feel your skin tighten all over, which is because the silica has a skin-care effect. In winter, everything around is a world of ice and snow, while steam rises from the lake, and the boundless volcanic lava is covered with moss, as if the earth were spread with a layer of soft carpet. Even in the winter when snowflakes drift down, the lake surface remains shrouded in steam, like smoke and mist. Immersed in it, you feel as though you are sinking into a hazy, dreamlike world.
attractions.text_zh: 冰岛蓝湖地热温泉所在地是地球上地下岩浆活动频繁的区域之一，这种活动加热了蓝湖，使得水体蒸腾。蓝湖洗浴和游泳的礁湖地区水温平均在40 ℃左右，水体有丰富矿物质，通常在蓝湖泡完温泉后会感到全身皮肤紧绷，那是因为硅有护肤之功效。冬天，四周一片冰天雪地，而湖里冒着热气，一望无际的火山融岩上长满苔藓植物，像是大地铺上一层软软的地毯。即使在雪花飘飞的冬季，湖面依旧热气弥漫，如烟似雾。融入其中，感觉仿佛沉浸在迷蒙世界里。

attractions.text_en: Seljalandsfoss waterfall is right by the roadside of Iceland's Route 1, about 60 meters high, and can be seen from far away on the road. Seljalandsfoss's most distinctive feature is the walkable passage behind the curtain of water, which is why it is also called the "Bridal Veil." In summer, you can follow a trail to walk behind the waterfall, which is great fun.
attractions.text_zh: 塞里雅兰瀑布就在 冰岛 一号公路的路边，高约60米，在路上远远就能看见。塞里雅兰瀑布显著的特色就是水幕后面有一条可以步行的通道 ，所以也被称为“新娘面纱”。在夏天，可以沿着一条步道走到瀑布的后方，非常有趣。

attractions.text_en: Skogafoss rainbow waterfall. Iceland has countless waterfalls, each with its own character, but Skogafoss has a charm all its own. Located in southern Iceland, it is one of Iceland's most magnificent waterfalls, with a width of 25 meters and a water drop of 60 meters. The momentum of the water rushing down is extremely spectacular, attracting many tourists to come and witness its splendor. The hills on both sides of Skogafoss are covered with green plants, and the cliffs on either side surround the waterfall in the middle, so the white cascade of water pairs perfectly with the surrounding green vegetation.
attractions.text_zh: Skogafoss彩虹瀑布 冰岛有无数的瀑布，每一个都各有特色，但是斯科加瀑布却独具魅力。它位于冰岛南部，是冰岛壮丽的瀑布之一，其宽度为25米，水流落差达60米，水流奔腾而下的气势非常壮观，吸引了很多游客来一睹它的风采。斯科加瀑布两旁的山上都长满了绿色的植物，两旁的山崖把瀑布包围在中间，白色的瀑布水流与周围的绿色植物搭配的恰到好处。

attractions.text_en: The otherworldly beauty of the basalt black sand beaches is unique to Iceland, and the boundless Reynisfjara black sand beach is definitely one of the most beautiful among them. The rolling white waves of the Atlantic and the jet-black volcanic sand form a dreamlike color contrast, and the giant basalt columns standing amid the waves complement the mysterious black sand beach. As early as 1991, National Geographic listed Reynisfjara black sand beach as one of the world's top ten non-tropical beaches worth visiting. Every summer, from May to August, tens of thousands of puffins also come to inhabit the Reynisfjara black sand beach area. The puffins' endearing, comical postures are very lovable, and visitors have the chance to observe their adorable poses up close, but you must remember not to try to touch them, nor to disturb their normal nesting or destroy their habitat. Fierce Arctic terns, as well as fulmars, gulls and other birds, also wheel freely over the skies of Reynisfjara black sand beach. Many marine creatures also make Iceland their home, and seals, whales and dolphins may suddenly appear amid the surging waves of the Atlantic.
attractions.text_zh: 玄武岩黑沙滩的异世之美为冰岛特有，一望无垠的雷尼斯黑沙滩绝对是其中美丽的一座。大西洋的滚滚白浪与黝黑火山砂石形成了梦幻般的色彩对比，于波涛中屹立的巨型玄武岩柱与神秘的黑沙滩相映成趣。早在1991年，《国家地理》就将雷尼斯黑沙滩列为世界十大值得游览的非热带沙滩之一。每年夏天，即5～8月，数以万计的海鹦还会来到雷尼斯黑沙滩地区栖居。海鹦憨态可掬的姿态惹人喜爱，游客有机会近距离观赏它们的萌姿，但一定要记得不要尝试去触摸它们，也不要打扰它们正常的栖息、破坏其栖息地。凶悍的北极燕鸥以及暴风鹱、海鸥等鸟类也会在雷尼斯黑沙滩的上空自由盘旋。许多海洋生物也以冰岛为家，海豹、鲸鱼、海豚就有可能在大西洋的惊涛中陡然现身。

attractions.text_en: The Reynisdrangar basalt stacks rise from the Atlantic Ocean and are the remains of ancient sea cliffs. They are the basalt sea stacks below Reynisfjall mountain near the village of Vík í Mýrdal in southern Iceland. The stacks stand proudly amid the waves, facing the rock walls of Reynisfjall, possessing a unique mysterious wildness and grandeur. Many films and American TV dramas have been shot here, including the hugely popular "Game of Thrones (A Song of Ice and Fire)." On one side of the coast are tall basalt column cliffs, beneath which the seawater has hollowed out a peculiar basalt-column cave (Halsanefshellir). On the beach stand striking giant basalt columns, which over many years of seawater pounding and erosion have formed unique columnar rocks. The neatly arranged basalt columns along the shore look like the pipe organ in a church, solemn and dignified. The gloomy weather, the somber black sand beach and the wondrous, masterfully-crafted basalt columns, together with the low-roaring white waves, give off a kind of apocalyptic, violent beauty, making you can't help but wonder whether you have already arrived at the end of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 雷尼斯玄武岩矗立于大西洋中，是古时海崖的遗骸。是位于南部冰岛维克（Vík í Mýrdal）村附近的雷尼斯山(Reynisfjall)下的玄武岩 海叠层。岩柱在海浪中傲然挺立，与雷尼斯山的岩壁相对而望，独有一份神秘的野性与壮美。许多电影与美剧都曾在此取景，其中就包括大热的《权力的游戏(冰与火之歌)》。海岸一侧则是高高的玄武岩石柱悬崖，悬崖下被海水掏空形成奇特的玄武岩柱洞穴(Halsanefshellir)。沙滩上赫然屹立着巨大的玄武岩石柱，经过海水多年的冲击、侵蚀，行成了独特的柱状岩石。海岸边整齐排列的玄武岩柱就像教堂里的管风琴一样，庄严肃穆。阴沉沉的天气，肃穆的黑沙滩和鬼斧神工的玄武岩柱，再加上低吼的白色海浪，有一种濒临末日的狂暴美感，让你不由自主的怀疑是否已经置身世界的尽头。

attractions.text_en: Fagradalsfjall Volcanic Valley (driving tour or distant viewing; there is no guarantee the volcano will produce any geological activity). Fagradalsfjall volcano lies on the Mid-Atlantic Ridge, the tectonic boundary where the North American and Eurasian plates meet. This geological environment has made it a center of dynamic volcanic and geothermal activity. Although Fagradalsfjall erupted frequently in 2021, 2022 and 2024, the relatively gentle and predictable nature of the eruptions allows safe observation from a distance. This attracts tourists, geologists and nature enthusiasts to come and witness the spectacle of flowing lava and the raw power of nature. Government agencies also close roads according to forecasts to ensure visitor safety and protect the fragile volcanic environment.
attractions.text_zh: 法格拉达尔火山峡谷 Fagradalsfjall Valley（车游或远观，无法确保火山产生任何地质活动）法格拉达尔火山位于大西洋中脊是北美和欧亚板块交汇的构造边界。 这种地质环境成为动态火山和地热活动的中心。虽然2021、2022和2024年法格拉达尔火山频繁爆发，喷发相对温和且可预测的性质允许从远处安全观察。 这吸引了游客、地质学家和自然爱好者来目睹熔岩流动的奇观和大自然的原始力量。 政府机构也会根据预测情况封闭道路，以确保游客的安全和保护脆弱的火山环境。

attractions.text_en: Floating in the lake are thousand-year-old icebergs of all different shapes. This is a glacier lagoon that can be viewed right from the roadside. Besides white, the icebergs here also appear blue, green, as well as grey and brown formed by the admixture of volcanic ash. You will have ample time to observe and photograph up close here, and if you are lucky you may even see sea lions sunbathing in groups. In the distance, the glacier looks as if it had been enchanted by the sky—what was just now like water flowing down from the glacier instantly froze entirely into ice, as if time had stopped still at that moment.
attractions.text_zh: 湖里漂浮着形态各异的千年浮冰。这是一个可以在路边就能观赏的冰湖，除了白色，这里的浮冰还呈现出蓝色、绿色、以及由于火山灰的掺杂而形成的灰色、棕色。您有充分的时间在此近距离观赏拍摄，运气好的话还可以看到成群结队晒太阳的海狮。远处的冰川犹如被天空施加了魔法，之前还像是从冰川上流下的水，顷刻间却全冻结成了冰，时间仿佛停在那刻静止了一样。

attractions.text_en: The town of Hofn is one of the few fishing ports along Iceland's eastern coastline, so many fishing vessels of the North Atlantic dock here repeatedly, which has also given rise to Hofn's thriving deep-sea fishing industry. Here there are richer marine products than at other fishing ports, especially the Norway lobster (Nephrops lobster); because they grow in cold water and are wild-caught, the vast majority of the lobsters are landed at the town of Hofn, so the quantity, quality and freshness of the lobsters here are all impeccable. Among these, the Lobster Festival held each year between June and July pushes the local culinary atmosphere to an even higher level. Icelandic artist Ragne's "Moon" sculpture here indicates that this city is another center counterbalancing Reykjavik.
attractions.text_zh: 霍芬镇是冰岛东部海岸线少数的渔港之一，因此北大西洋的很多渔船都会再次停靠，也造就了霍芬蓬勃发展的远洋渔业，这里有比其他渔港更为丰富的海洋产品，特别是挪威海龙虾 （Nephrops lobster），由于冷水生长，野生捕捞的原因，绝大多数的龙虾都是从赫本镇上岸，所以这里的龙虾数量和品质，以及新鲜程度都是完好的。其中每年6月到7月之间的龙虾节，更是将这里的美食气氛推向更高，冰岛艺术家Ragne在这里的《月亮》雕塑表明，这个城市是与雷克雅未克相对的另外一个中心。

attractions.text_en: Feather Canyon is located in southeastern Iceland, 100 meters deep and about 2 kilometers long, with steep rock walls on both sides, narrow and winding. Its origin can be traced back to the cold period of the Ice Age about two million years ago. The canyon was created through gradual erosion of the palagonite rock by water and glacial meltwater flowing over the rock over thousands of years. The waterfall flows down from the western side of the canyon and can be seen from the viewing platform at the end of the hike one mile to the east. The river Fjaðrá flows through it, its waters originating from the Geirlandshraun mountain, rushing down along the cliff walls in the canyon and falling into the Skaftá river. Today the river is no longer deep, and visitors can hike through the canyon, though sometimes they need to wade forward. Deep inside the canyon, if you encounter the waterfall, you need to retrace your steps. So many people choose to look down on the canyon's wonders from the walking trail along the upper edge of the canyon.
attractions.text_zh: 羽毛峡谷位于冰岛东南部，深100米，长约2公里，两侧是陡峭的岩壁，狭窄而弯曲，它的起源可以追溯到大约两百万年前的冰河时期的寒冷时期。峡谷创建通过逐步侵蚀由通过岩石和冰川流水橙玄玻璃上千年。瀑布从峡谷的西侧流下来，从东边一英里的远足结束时的观察平台可以看到。Fjaðrá河穿流而过，水流源自Geirlandshraun山，在峡谷里沿崖壁奔流而下，掉入Skaftá河。如今，河水已并不深，游客可徒步穿行在峡谷中，但有时会需要蹚水前进。深入到峡谷里，遇到瀑布的话，需要原路折返。所以很多人选择在峡谷的上方边缘沿着步行道俯瞰观赏峡谷奇观。

attractions.text_en: Vestrahorn, also known as Batman Mountain, is 454 meters high and has a history of 8 to 10 million years, making it one of Iceland's few gabbro mountain ranges. Vestrahorn is located 12 kilometers east of the town of Hofn and is a must-visit for photography enthusiasts. Here there is a dreamlike, surreal scene, with handsome, steep mountains rising over the boundless black sand beach—a stunning sight that is unforgettable. There are two Icelandic mountains beloved by photographers: Kirkjufell (Hat Mountain) on the Snaefellsnes Peninsula, and Vestrahorn beside the town of Hofn. Because it is not on the regular tour routes, the vast majority of tourists have never seen the true appearance of Vestrahorn and can only appreciate this highly recognizable, uniquely shaped wondrous mountain in photographers' works.
attractions.text_zh: 西角山又称蝙蝠山，高454米，有800万至1000万年的历史，是冰岛为数不多的辉长岩山脉之一。西角山位于霍芬镇以东12公里处，是摄影爱好者的必去之处。这里有着梦幻般的超现实场景，俊美陡峭的山脉耸立在一望无际的黑沙滩上，那种震撼的景象让人过目不忘。摄影师喜爱的冰岛山川有两座－斯奈山半岛的草帽山，和霍芬镇旁的西角山。而因为不在常规旅行团线路内，绝大部分游客，都未曾见过西角山的真面目，只能在摄影师的作品中去欣赏这座辨识力高、造型独特的奇山。

attractions.text_en: The basalt grand canyon is located within the Jokuldalur valley in eastern Iceland and is one of Iceland's newly emerging "internet-famous attractions." The spectacular giant hexagonal basalt columns are neat and uniform, with sharp, distinct edges, standing tall on both sides of the rushing glacial river, creating an open and magnificent scene. The color of the water changes with the seasons. From March to July, the river water appears a beautiful blue-green, but as the nearby glacial meltwater rises, by late summer the color of the river water turns to the light grey characteristic of glacial rivers.
attractions.text_zh: 玄武岩大峡谷坐落于冰岛东部的约屈尔河谷内，是冰岛新晋的“网红景点”之一。壮观的巨型六棱玄武岩柱整齐划一、棱角分明，高高耸立于湍急冰川河的两侧，景象开阔而壮观。水的颜色随季节而变化。从三月到七月，河水呈现美丽的蓝绿色，但随着附近冰川融水的上升，到了夏末，河水的颜色会变成冰川河流特有的浅灰色。

attractions.text_en: Krafla volcano is located in the Myvatn area of northern Iceland. Its geological form is a caldera (also called a collapse crater), and it is part of the Krafla volcanic system. Krafla is one of Iceland's most frequently erupting volcanoes, with 29 recorded eruptions since Iceland was first settled.
attractions.text_zh: 克拉夫拉火山位于冰岛北部的米湖地区，地质形态属破火山口(也称陷落火山口)，是克拉夫拉火山系统的一部分。克拉夫拉火山是冰岛喷发频繁的火山之一，自冰岛有人定居以来，已有29次喷发记录。

attractions.text_en: In Icelandic culture, lava caves are often believed to be the dwelling places of the legendary trolls. The Dimmuborgir lava field is one of the important filming locations of the hugely popular American TV drama "Game of Thrones (A Song of Ice and Fire)," with Mance Rayder's wildling camp filmed at the wintertime Dimmuborgir. A Norwegian heavy metal band also takes Dimmuborgir as its name: Dimmu Borgir.
attractions.text_zh: 在冰岛文化中，熔岩洞穴常被认为是传说中的巨魔的栖居地，黑暗城堡熔岩群是大热美剧《权力的游戏(冰与火之歌)》的重要取景地之一，曼斯·雷德的野人阵营就取景于冬季的黑暗城堡。一支挪威重金属乐队也以黑暗城堡为名：Dimmu Borgir。

attractions.text_en: Godafoss in northeastern Iceland sits atop Iceland's fourth-largest river, the Skjálfandafljót, and is one of the most popular waterfalls in Iceland among tourists. Because of the waterfall's connection to Iceland's religious history, this mythical waterfall is all the more beautiful and moving. Godafoss is one of Iceland's most representative natural treasures, located in the northeastern region of Iceland. It is part of Iceland's fourth-largest river, the Skjalfandafljot, breathtakingly beautiful and rich in history. Godafoss is arc-shaped, about 30 meters wide with a drop of 12 meters, flowing into a tranquil, picturesque pool.
attractions.text_zh: 冰岛东北部的众神瀑布，坐落于冰岛第四大河流Skjálfandafljót之上，是受游客欢迎的冰岛瀑布之一。由于该瀑布与冰岛宗教历史的渊源，这座神话般的瀑布更加美丽动人。众神瀑布是冰岛具代表性的自然宝藏之一，位于冰岛东北部地区。它是冰岛第四大河Skjalfandafljot的一部分，美不胜收，历史悠久。众神瀑布呈弧形，宽约30米，落差12米，汇入宁静如画的水潭。

attractions.text_en: The Myvatn Nature Baths are located in the Myvatn scenic area of northern Iceland, about two kilometers from the small town of Reykjahlíð, and are one of Iceland's popular geothermal hot spring experiences. The Myvatn baths are built around a large lagoon, and the spring water temperature is maintained year-round at 36–40 degrees Celsius. The hot spring is rich in minerals such as sulphur, with a notable effect in improving respiratory and skin problems.
attractions.text_zh: 米湖温泉(Mývatn Nature Baths)位于冰岛北部的米湖景区，距离雷恰利兹小镇(Reykjahlíð)两公里左右，是冰岛热门的地热温泉体验地之一。米湖温泉围绕一座大型潟湖而建，温泉水温常年维持在36～40摄氏度。温泉富含硫等矿物质，对改善呼吸道及皮肤问题有显著效果。

attractions.text_en: Mailbox lighthouse, volcano museum, Stykkisholmur church. This small town once "played" Greenland in the movie "The Secret Life of Walter Mitty," becoming a must-visit place for many film fans coming to Iceland. The small town has a peculiarly shaped church, and on a small island by the harbor there is an adorable little red lighthouse, which is a great place for a bird's-eye view of the whole town.
attractions.text_zh: 邮筒灯塔、火山博物馆、斯蒂基斯霍尔米大教堂.小镇曾在电影《白日梦想家》中“扮演”格陵兰，成为了很多电影迷来冰岛的必去之地。小镇上有造型奇异的教堂，港口边的小岛上有一个萌萌的红色小灯塔，是鸟瞰全镇的好地方。

attractions.text_en: The Snaefellsnes Peninsula is a recognized photography paradise in Iceland. Translated from Icelandic, the mountain's name means "Church Mountain," but because the mountain is shaped like a straw hat, more people call it Hat Mountain. Kirkjufell is about 460 meters above sea level. As for reaching the classic photography spot, you need to walk five minutes along the path from the parking area across the road from Church Mountain, cross the bridge to the other side of the waterfall, and use the Church Mountain waterfall as the foreground.
attractions.text_zh: 斯奈山半岛是冰岛公认的摄影胜地，从冰岛语将山的名称翻译为“教会山”，但是由于这座山的形状像草帽，因此更多人叫它草帽山。草帽山海拔约460米。关于前往摄影经典机位，需要从教会山马路对面的停车区域沿路径走五分钟，过桥到瀑布到另一边，以教会山瀑布为前景。

attractions.text_en: Why is it that all the images used in computerized vision testing machines are the one with a road, a small house and a balloon? This little house is located in Hellissandur, Iceland; in fact its true identity is a church. The church was built in 1903 and is constructed of cement. Every summer, fields of lupines bloom all around the church, especially enchanting under the midnight sun. This church is also a popular spot for photographers to take pictures and for tourists to pose for souvenir photos.
attractions.text_zh: 为什么所有电脑验光仪里面使用的都是那幅图一条公路一个小房子一个气球的，这个小房子位于冰岛的海德利桑德（Hellissandur），其实本体是一个教堂。教堂建于 1903 年， 是以水泥建造的教堂。每年夏季，教堂周围都会绽放漫山遍野的鲁冰花，在午夜阳光下尤其令人醉心。这座教堂也是摄影师拍照与游客合影留念的热门景点。

attractions.text_en: The official name of Iceland's Whale Church is "Blonduos Church." Because of its dark appearance and a form resembling a whale lying face-down on the ground, it has also earned the nickname "Whale Church." This church is located in the town of Blonduos in northwestern Iceland. Its architectural concept derives from the shape of an Icelandic volcano during eruption, with a wall that flies up, very much like the upturned tail fin of a whale—avant-garde in form and full of design flair. The exterior wall of the church is black, in harmony with Iceland's black sand beaches and black stones.
attractions.text_zh: 冰岛鲸鱼教堂的官方名称是“布伦迪欧斯教堂”，由于外观黝黑，造型宛如鲸鱼俯身于地面，因此又有“鲸鱼教堂”的称号。这座教堂位于冰岛西北部城镇 Blonduos，建筑概念源自于冰岛火山喷山时的模样，有个飞起来的墙，非常像鲸鱼翘起来的尾翼，造型前卫、设计感十足。教堂的外墙是黑色，和冰岛的黑沙滩、黑石头没有违和感。

attractions.text_en: Arnarstapi is a small fishing village on the southern coastline of Iceland's Snaefellsnes Peninsula. The ancient, elegant seaside houses and the bizarre sea-eroded rocks along the shore are the town's cultural and natural features. Arnarstapi is a small town with a natural harbor; it was once a bustling trading center, and now attracts numerous travelers with its unique natural landscape.
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔纳斯塔皮(Arnarstapi)是冰岛斯奈山半岛南海岸线上的一座小渔村，海滨的古老优雅房屋与沿岸的奇诡海蚀岩石是小镇的人文与自然特色。阿尔纳斯塔皮是一座有天然港口的小镇，这里从前是个热闹的交易中心，现在则以独特的自然景观吸引众多旅客的到访。

attractions.text_en: The Budir Black Church bears witness to the village's former history. In 1701, Bent Lauridtsend, after obtaining the bishop's permission, prepared to build a church at Budir. Regarding the choice of the church's location, legend has it that an old woman proposed having a man spin in place until dizzy and then shoot three arrows into the sky, with the landing point of the third arrow being the site for building the church. The Black Church is a very popular Icelandic proposal spot, as well as a popular place to view the midnight sun and the aurora. The church underwent two renovations in the 1950s and 1980s but has retained its original Danish design style.
attractions.text_zh: 布迪尔黑教堂见证了这座村庄曾经的历史。1701年，Bent Lauridtsend在获得主教许可后，预备在布迪尔建造教堂。 有关教堂的选址，相传有一老妇提议，选一男人原地转圈直至晕眩，然后向天空发射三支箭，第三支箭的落点就是建教堂的地点。黑教堂是很受欢迎的冰岛求婚地点，以及观赏午夜阳光及北极光的热门地点，教堂在上世纪五十及八十年代经过两次修缮，但保持了其原始的丹麦设计风格。

attractions.text_en: The Seal Beach is located on Iceland's western Snaefellsnes Peninsula, sitting in the middle section of the peninsula's southern coast. Its Chinese name very directly reveals the reason why it is so special: the many seals that inhabit here make this already very special golden sand beach even more special, making it one of the spots in Iceland for watching seals.
attractions.text_zh: 海豹沙滩位于冰岛西部的斯奈山半岛之上，坐落在半岛的南海岸中段。它的中文名称已经十分直接地揭示了它为何如此特别的原因，众多海豹在此栖息让这片本身就十分特殊的金色沙滩显得更加特别，成为了冰岛观看海豹的地点之一。

attractions.text_en: It is a multifunctional scenic spot converted from 6 giant hot water storage tanks, integrating water storage, a restaurant, a bar, an exhibition hall and an observation deck, and has become a symbol of Reykjavik.
attractions.text_zh: 它是利用6个巨大的热水储存罐改建的集储水，餐厅，酒吧，展览馆和观景台等多功能风景点，成为雷克雅未克的象征。

attractions.text_en: Reykjavik Cathedral is a landmark building of the city of Reykjavik—a famous church located in the center of Reykjavik, the capital of Iceland. The church has a novel design with a pipe-organ structure and is one of the tallest buildings in Iceland; you can take an elevator up to the top floor to overlook the whole capital. The interior of the church is snow-white, with simple decoration. Its cornerstone was laid in 1940, and it was largely completed by the late 1960s.
attractions.text_zh: 雷克雅未克大教堂是雷克雅未克市的地标性建筑。位于冰岛首都雷克雅未克市中心的一座著名教堂。教堂设计新颖，管风琴结构，是冰岛的高建筑之一，可乘坐电梯上顶楼俯瞰首都全貌。教堂内部雪白，装饰简洁。于1940年奠基，于20世纪60年代末基本完工。

attractions.name_en: Harpa Concert Hall and Conference Centre
attractions.name_zh: 哈帕音乐厅和会议中心
attractions.text_en: Harpa Concert Hall and Conference Centre is located at the meeting point of sea and land in Reykjavik, the capital of Iceland, and is Iceland's comprehensive concert hall and conference center. It was jointly designed by Icelandic and Danish design firms, inspired by the mysterious aurora of Iceland's winter night skies and the shapes of volcanic rock. The building's glass form is like a giant kaleidoscope; thousands of irregular geometric glass bricks reflect, with the changing colors of the sky and seasons, myriad colors that put even rainbows to shame. This top-tier modern building is the venue in Reykjavik for enjoying music and holding important conferences.
attractions.text_zh: 哈帕音乐厅和会议中心位于冰岛首都雷克雅未克的海陆交界处，是冰岛的综合音乐厅、会议中心，由冰岛和丹麦的设计公司联合设计，其灵感来自冰岛冬季夜晚神秘莫测的夜幕极光和火山石的形状。建筑的玻璃外型好比一个巨大的万花筒，上千块不规则的几何玻璃砖随着天空的颜色和季节的变化反射出令彩虹都相形见绌的万千颜色。这座顶尖的现代化建筑是雷克雅未克欣赏音乐和举办重要会议的场所。

attractions.text_en: Tjörnin lake sits peacefully in the heart of Reykjavik, endowing this city with timeless composure and tranquility. On Tjörnin, waterfowl such as swans, terns, greylag geese and ducks inhabit here in both winter and summer, and coming to the shores of Tjörnin to feed the birds has become a great pleasure for Icelanders and tourists alike. In winter, a thick layer of ice forms over Tjörnin, completely allowing one to cross the lake surface, and some Icelanders even play ball games on the ice.
attractions.text_zh: 托宁湖（Tjörnin）安然坐落在雷克雅未克的中心地带，赋予了这座城市永恒的从容与平静。托宁湖上，天鹅、燕鸥、灰雁、鸭子等水禽无论冬夏栖息于此，来托宁湖边喂鸟也成为了冰岛人与游人们的一大乐趣。冬季，托宁湖上会结上一层厚厚的冰，完全可以横穿湖面，甚至还有冰岛人在冰上踢球。

attractions.text_en: The national park is one of Iceland's important historical sites. Þingvellir literally means "assembly plains." The Icelandic parliament (Alþingi) was established here in the year 930 and continued to operate until 1798—this was the world's first democratic parliament. Thingvellir was declared a national park in 1930. On July 2, 2004, Thingvellir National Park was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
