Thingvellir is also famous for its geological features. Here you can see the rift running through the land of Iceland between the Eurasian plate and the North American plate. Because of the continuous diverging movement of these two plates, the land between the plates keeps sinking, and here you can see the geological boundary between Europe and North America. Crustal movement causes this rift to keep tearing open and expanding at a rate of several centimeters per year. The area around Thingvellir has frequent volcanic activity, with many newly formed lava fields, including some lava tunnels and volcanic caves. At Thingvellir National Park you can not only learn about Iceland's important historical site, but also explore the natural wonders that are everywhere here.
attractions.text_zh: 国家公园是冰岛重要的历史遗址之一。Þingvellir字面意思为“议会平原”，冰岛议会（Alþingi）于公元930年在此成立，并一直持续运作直至1798年，这是全世界的第一个民主议会。辛格维利尔于1930年被宣布成为国家公园。2004年7月2日，辛格维利尔国家公园被录入联合国教科文组织世界文化遗产名录。辛格维利尔也因其地质特色而出名。在这里，您可以看到穿过冰岛陆地的欧亚板块和北美版块间的裂缝。因这两个板块的持续背离运动，板块间的土地不断下沉，您在这里可以看到欧洲和北美地质上的边界。地壳运动使得这条裂缝每年以数厘米的速度不断张裂扩大。辛格维利尔周边地区火山活动频繁，有许多新形成的熔岩原，包括一些熔岩隧道和火山岩洞。在辛格维利尔国家公园您不仅能了解冰岛重要的历史遗址，也能探索这里俯拾即是的自然奇景。

attractions.text_en: The geothermal area around Geysir is a world-famous geothermal region. The English word "geyser" originates from the Geysir geyser here—the English word "Geyser" is derived from the Icelandic "Geysir." The Geysir geyser is located in Iceland's Haukadalur valley, and this geothermal area covers about 3 square kilometers. Most of the geothermal springs are scattered over a 100-meter-wide strip of land, flowing in one direction along the plate boundary line, from south to southwest. The Great Geysir geyser has long ceased to erupt, but its neighbor, the Strokkur geyser, is very active. Strokkur is currently one of Iceland's active geysers. It erupts every few minutes, sometimes with a scalding column of steam and water reaching up to 40 meters high, though the usual eruption height is between 10 and 20 meters. Each eruption lasts 1–2 minutes, and the water temperature reaches over 100 degrees. In this natural wonder, you can explore geothermal hot springs large and small, watch the geothermal water gushing out from the ground, and breathe in the strong smell of sulphur in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 盖歇尔周围的地热区是举世闻名的地热区。英语中间歇泉一词源于这里的盖歇尔间歇泉，英文单词“Geyser”就是从冰岛语“Geysir”衍生而来。盖歇尔间歇泉坐落于冰岛Haukadalur山谷，这个地热区面积约3平方公里。大多数地热泉散布在100米宽的土地上，沿着板块交界线向一个方向流动，从南向西南。大盖歇尔间歇泉现在已久未喷发，但它的邻居史托克间歇泉（Strokkur）却十分活跃。史托克间歇泉是目前冰岛活跃的喷泉之一。它每隔几分钟喷发一次，有时滚烫的蒸汽水柱高达40米，不过一般喷发高度都在10-20米之间。每次喷发持续1-2分钟，水温高达100多度。在这片自然奇观中，您可以探访大大小小的地热温泉，欣赏地热水从地面喷涌而出，呼吸空气中浓烈的硫磺味。

attractions.text_en: Gullfoss is one of Iceland's most famous waterfalls, a natural sight that no tourist coming to Iceland should miss. Its name comes from the free translation of the Icelandic name "golden waterfall." Gullfoss's water source, Lake Hvitarvatn, is located on the southeastern side of the Langjokull glacier, which is Iceland's second-largest volcanic ice cap after the Vatnajokull glacier. Glacial meltwater pours from Langjokull into the Hvita (White River); the broad White River rushes south for about one kilometer, then turns sharply to the left and plunges down a wide "three-tier staircase," before tilting down from two enormous steps into a deep canyon 32 meters (105 feet) deep, with the two drops measuring 11 meters and 22 meters deep respectively. The canyon fissure is about 20 meters wide and 2.5 kilometers long, facing the surging river that plunges straight down. For first-time visitors, because of the limited view of the valley, the waterfall may look as if it were plunging straight toward the center of the earth.
attractions.text_zh: 黄金瀑布是冰岛知名的瀑布之一，是每一个前来冰岛的游客都不能错过的自然景观，名字的由来源于冰岛语名称的意译“金色的瀑布”。黄金瀑布的水源Hvitarvatn湖位于朗格冰川（Langjokull）的东南侧，这是在冰岛仅次于瓦特纳冰川（Vatnajokull）第二大的火山冰盖。冰川水流从朗格冰川涌入白河（Hvita），宽阔的白河向南奔流大约一公里后，急转向左，冲下一个宽阔的“三级阶梯”，再从巨大的两个台阶上倾斜而下落入32米（105英尺）深的幽深峡谷中，两级落差分别达到11米和22米深。峡谷裂缝约20米宽，2.5公里长，正对着汹涌直下的河水。对于首次到访的人，由于山谷视野有限，瀑布可能看起来像是直冲向地心。

overview.text_en:
After gathering on the day, tour Rome, the world-famous historic and cultural city. This is the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, and because of its long history it is called the "Eternal City." Visit the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior) standing on the site of the ancient Roman capital, and tour the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). After 14:00 on the day you may check into the hotel on your own with your order, or leave your luggage at the hotel front desk in advance.
Overnight: Rome Hotel San Martino or Hotel Moderno, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
[The main attractions in Rome's ancient city area are all within Rome's vehicle restricted zone (ZTL). The hotel is conveniently located for exploring each attraction on foot. Rome will be toured on foot on the day, with a round-trip walking distance of about 5 kilometers; please dress lightly and comfortably.]
overview.text_zh:
当天集合后游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“ 。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观），当天14点后可凭订单自行入住酒店或提前寄存行李在酒店前台。
夜宿：罗马圣马丁酒店或现代酒店 或同等4星级酒店
【罗马古城区内的主要景点，均在罗马车辆禁行区内（ZTL）。酒店所在位置方便步行游览各个景点，罗马当天为步行游览，往返步行行程约为5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。】

accommodation.text_en:
Rome Hotel San Martino or Hotel Moderno, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
This elegant hotel enjoys a superb location, with the metro or train conveniently reaching downtown Rome or the airport. The hotel's stylish guest rooms all feature original and reproduction Art Deco-style furniture, decorated in warm tones. The hotel serves a hearty buffet breakfast every day. The restaurant and bar serve classic Italian cuisine and Roman specialties, with vegetarian and gluten-free options available.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马圣马丁酒店或现代酒店 或同等4星级酒店
这间典雅的酒店地理位置优越，地铁或火车方便前往罗马市区或机场，酒店时尚的客房均设有原创的和复制的装饰艺术风格家具，采用暖色调装饰。酒店每天供应丰盛的自助早餐。餐厅和酒吧供应经典的意大利风味美食和罗马特色佳肴，可提供素食和无麸质美食。

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth visit to Rome, an important cradle of world culture
Seek out a historical civilization that has settled over thousands of years amid the ancient ruins that occupy roughly half of the city. Whether it is the world-famous architectural ruins formed by the Imperial Senate, the triumphal arches, the commemorative columns, the Pantheon, and the great amphitheater, or the many exquisite Renaissance buildings and art treasures housed in hundreds of museums, or even the city's many fountains of myriad postures represented by the Trevi Fountain, and the vast roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares, public baths, and other public buildings—all freeze art in that wonderful moment. Someone said, "Architecture is flowing music"; the architecture of ancient Rome must then play a magnificent and timeless movement.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的必然是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The magnificent Colosseum located in the center of Rome was built by the ancient Romans to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was a place exclusively for slave owners, nobles, and free citizens to watch animal fights or slave gladiatorial combat, and is Rome's most famous historic relic. The Colosseum is a model masterpiece and marvel in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for being huge, majestic, and spectacular. Although only most of the skeleton remains, its heroic spirit and magnificent momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman kings Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, and others rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of ancient Rome's exquisite construction techniques, and was praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza di Spagna once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and beautiful figure seems to have merged into one with the Piazza di Spagna and lovely Rome, becoming a memory people can never shake off. The Spanish Steps—the entire Piazza di Spagna is not large in area, and the crowds mainly gather near the Spanish Steps. The whole staircase has 138 steps in total and is the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also called the "Fountain of the Maiden," or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the victorious return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology, with an overall momentum that is magnificent and grand. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dream will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
Depart in the morning to tour Florence. Visit the world's third-largest cathedral—the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, the Piazza della Signoria, the Old Bridge (Ponte Vecchio), as well as Florence's Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Afterward, check into a hotel in the Tuscany region.
Overnight: Tuscany Montecatini SPA Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发游览佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥以及佛罗伦萨-圣十字广场，圣十字教堂（外观）。之后入住托斯卡纳地区酒店。
夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Tuscany Montecatini SPA Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel
The hotel is located in Montecatini Terme, Tuscany's famous wellness, rest, and holiday resort. The hotel has been renovated, with a unique design and elegantly decorated rooms blending the modern and the ancient—very comfortable and charming. The spa area is very modern, with 2 swimming pools (indoor and outdoor), and the sauna enjoys a unique forest view. The hotel's private park and circular garden are a natural continuation of the Terme Tettuccio park—the same trees, picturesque scenery, hot springs, and a wide variety of flora and fauna—covering 40,000 square meters: as if in a corner of a natural paradise. The hotel's NO|MORE Bistrot restaurant changes its menu with the seasons, with dishes varying according to climate and temperature, richly aromatic, and offering varied and abundant flavors.
accommodation.text_zh:
托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店
酒店位于托斯卡纳著名的康养休息旅游度假地-蒙特卡蒂尼泰尔梅，酒店经过重新装修，设计独特，房间装潢典雅，融合了现代与古老，非常舒适和别致。 水疗区非常现代化，设有 2 个泳池（室内和室外），桑拿浴室享有独特的森林景观。酒店的私人公园和环形花园是 Terme Tettuccio 公园的自然延续，同样的树木、如画的景色、温泉、种类繁多的动植物，占地 40,000 平方米：仿佛置身于自然天堂的一隅。酒店的NO|MORE Bistrot 餐厅随季节变化菜单，菜肴根据气候和温度而变化，香气浓郁浓郁，食物口感丰富多样。

highlights.text_en:
Florence's glorious prime, the shining brilliance of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world's capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Among the blue sky and white clouds, the brightly colored walls, the dark green shutters, and the deep red roofs, seek out the soul of the Renaissance; in the streets and lanes, the squares and churches, the museums and galleries, feel the agelessness of the Renaissance. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic spirit of Dante Alighieri and the painting spirit of Da Vinci still drift over the skies of Florence, still continuing to pursue the people and events of the European Renaissance..."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利．但丁的诗魂、达．芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....”

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few churches are so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red, and green granite, interprets to the fullest the classicism, elegance, and freedom esteemed by the Renaissance era—no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flowers." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to finally complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才最终建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi (Mercenaries' Loggia), and many cafés and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier long-span circular-arch bridges. It is said that Dante met the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over several centuries, it has stood firm through the floods, social upheavals, and wars it has experienced. It is one of Florence's famous landmark structures.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce. This Gothic building is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are many cafés and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine—an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural activities and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The square's open space is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间 ， 广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
Depart in the morning for Cinque Terre. Along the Ligurian coastline, tour the five beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs. In the afternoon, head to Pisa to tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli in Pisa's historic and cultural center.
Overnight: Tuscany Montecatini SPA Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel
Note: If Cinque Terre cannot be visited due to factors such as bad weather or a railway company strike, the itinerary will automatically be changed to touring the coastal cities by coach or other means.
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的五座美丽渔村，下午前往比萨,游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场。
夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Tuscany Montecatini SPA Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel
The hotel is located in Montecatini Terme, Tuscany's famous wellness, rest, and holiday resort. The hotel has been renovated, with a unique design and elegantly decorated rooms blending the modern and the ancient—very comfortable and charming. The spa area is very modern, with 2 swimming pools (indoor and outdoor), and the sauna enjoys a unique forest view. The hotel's private park and circular garden are a natural continuation of the Terme Tettuccio park—the same trees, picturesque scenery, hot springs, and a wide variety of flora and fauna—covering 40,000 square meters: as if in a corner of a natural paradise. The hotel's NO|MORE Bistrot restaurant changes its menu with the seasons, with dishes varying according to climate and temperature, richly aromatic, and offering varied and abundant flavors.
accommodation.text_zh:
托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店
酒店位于托斯卡纳著名的康养休息旅游度假地-蒙特卡蒂尼泰尔梅，酒店经过重新装修，设计独特，房间装潢典雅，融合了现代与古老，非常舒适和别致。 水疗区非常现代化，设有 2 个泳池（室内和室外），桑拿浴室享有独特的森林景观。酒店的私人公园和环形花园是 Terme Tettuccio 公园的自然延续，同样的树木、如画的景色、温泉、种类繁多的动植物，占地 40,000 平方米：仿佛置身于自然天堂的一隅。酒店的NO|MORE Bistrot 餐厅随季节变化菜单，菜肴根据气候和温度而变化，香气浓郁浓郁，食物口感丰富多样。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a paradise on the cliffs
Along the Mediterranean's long coastline, stop at each beautiful fishing village. Watch the sun-bathed beaches, the waves quietly lapping the rocks, and the colorful houses approaching from afar; the curiosity of gazing at the beautiful fishing villages from a distance reaches its peak at the moment of arrival. Disembarking from the boat, walk on foot through the alleys of the fishing villages—the closer you walk, the more surprises there are. It is like savoring a visual feast of five colors and flavors, slowly tasting the flavors within, a scene so beautiful it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到至高点，下得船来，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in Italy's Liguria region, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five cliffside villages and towns: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together, built along the coast—one of the world's beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers, requiring around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other are the mountains, and ahead lie the Italian fishing hamlets—a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997, it was inscribed on UNESCO's World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral in the city of Pisa, Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in Tuscany Province, Italy. It is a world-famous sight and one of Italy's symbols, designated a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. Legend has it that in 1590 AD, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's views.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area, partly grassland, in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, with four major buildings on the square: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Camposanto (cemetery). Around the square, ancient city walls and gates are still preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli in the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa, and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Venice and visit at leisure St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings constructed on the water, together with the winding water lanes, make Venice's romantic charm linger long and refuse to fade.
Overnight: Venice voco Hotel or Hilton Garden Inn (Hilton Ambassador), or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往威尼斯，自由参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Venice voco Hotel or Hilton Garden Inn (Hilton Ambassador), or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels, with a superb location, stylish modern design, and guest rooms with natural tones and modern interior décor, offering you a comfortable and warm stay. The hotel offers a hearty breakfast and a well-equipped gym; the lounge bar serves wine and cocktails, and the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian cuisine and international fare.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和国际美食。

highlights.text_en:
The world's beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic" still dazzling and resplendent
As one of the important towns of the Renaissance, Venice is composed of 118 small islands, linked together by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands," and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the world's most magnificent squares, "St. Mark's Square," the beautiful Grand Canal, the Phoenix Opera House reborn from fire, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs of Xu Zhimo's writing, the breathtakingly beautiful arcades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting, and also the filming location for many movie scenes. Her unique and incomparable temperament makes every visitor intoxicated and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上壮丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的无与伦比的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by magnificent palaces, while to the east rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the center of public activities for Venice's politics, religion, and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Known in short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe—a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and also a treasure house holding a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the necessary route for the court to escort condemned prisoners to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered with a dome on the upper part, sealed very tightly, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried in the Doge's Palace, the serious offender was taken to the dungeon. When passing over this airtight bridge, he could only look at the blue sky through the small window, losing his freedom from then on, and involuntarily letting out a sigh. It is said that lovers who kiss under the bridge can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory is gathered. Inside, you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. When going to the dungeon you walk across the Bridge of Sighs and can look outside through small holes, rather than being like the many people on the opposite bridge looking over at you on the Bridge of Sighs. You can take photos inside, as long as you don't use the flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

overview.text_en:
Depart in the morning for Milan, Italy's fashion capital. Visit the Sforza Castle (exterior), a fortress from the Middle Ages to the Renaissance, then go to visit Milan's iconic building, the Milan Cathedral (exterior), and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful commercial arcades.
Overnight: UNA Hotel Milano (Milan Center), or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往意大利时尚之都-米兰,参观米兰中世纪到文艺复兴时期的堡垒-斯福尔扎古堡（外观），之后前往参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊，
夜宿：米兰中心UNA酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
UNA Hotel Milano, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the center of Milan, just a 10-minute drive from the Duomo Cathedral and only a few minutes' walk from the metro station and shopping streets, making it convenient for guests to reach all the attractions. The hotel's interior is mainly in a warm Italian style and authentic Milanese style, offering a hearty buffet breakfast, as well as high-tech meeting and fitness facilities. The guest rooms feature light-toned modern décor with elegant flooring, and the restaurant serves Italian and international specialties.
accommodation.text_zh:
米兰UNA酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于米兰市中心，距离米兰大教堂（Duomo Cathedral）仅10分钟车程，距离地铁站以及购物街仅几分钟路程，方便客人前往所有的景点。酒店内装以热情的意大利式款和正宗的米兰风格为主、提供丰盛的自助早餐，还设有高科技会议和健身设施。客房享有浅色调的现代装饰，铺有优雅的地板，餐厅供应意大利和国际特色菜肴。

highlights.text_en:
Behold the Milan Cathedral, built over 500 years and renowned worldwide for its many exquisite carvings and Gothic spires
First built in 1387, the Milan Cathedral is a Gothic building that took 500 years to complete. The cathedral has 135 spires large and small, each topped with a statue, making it also the Gothic church with the most statues in the world, totaling more than 6,000 marble statues.
highlights.text_zh:
瞻仰历经500年建成，以众多精美的雕刻和哥特式的塔尖而闻名于世的米兰大教堂
始建于1387年，历经500年时间才完成是哥特式建筑米兰大教堂，教堂上共有135大小尖塔，每个塔上都有一座雕像，因此它也是世界上雕像最多的哥特式教堂，共有大理石雕像约6000多座。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Towering in the city center, the Milan Cathedral was first built in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as Italy's most magnificent Gothic building, its hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and thousands of statues are carved on its white marble exterior walls. The interior space is vast, with sunlight streaming in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, the light hazy, full of a solemn religious atmosphere. The cathedral's crypt also preserves the relics of the original Church of San Tecla on the site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most tourists who come here come for sightseeing. Under the central arcade is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan—especially the window displays, which are updated daily; just standing outside the windows to admire them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is filled with many upscale restaurants, cafés, and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。伊曼纽尔二世拱廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Sforza Castle is one of Milan's most important buildings and a witness to Milan's vicissitudes of history. Overlooking the whole castle, it is like a grand duchy, with high walls on four sides and a meticulously planned park. Built as a castle by Count Sforza in the 14th century, it later became the residence of the Sforza family, witnessing the whole process from its heyday to the family's decline. The castle is now turned into a museum by the Milan municipal government, including the Museum of Applied Arts and Musical Instruments, the Archaeological Museum, and the Museum of Ancient Art. Its back gate is the Arch of Peace (Porta del Sempione), so named after it was remodeled by the ruler Francesco.
attractions.text_zh: 斯福尔扎城堡是米兰最重要的建筑之一，是米兰沧桑历史的见证。俯瞰整个城堡像一个大公国，有四面的高墙和精致规划过的公园。在14世纪时由斯福尔扎伯爵作为城堡而建，而后成为斯福尔扎家族的住所，见证了从鼎盛时期到家族衰败的全过程。现城堡被米兰市政府辟为博物馆，其中有应用艺术和乐曲博物馆、考古博物馆、古代艺术博物馆，他的后门是和平门，是统治者费朗西斯科改造得名的。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Lucerne and tour the lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, listen to the Lion Monument recount that period of history of the Swiss people's loyalty and steadfastness, as well as the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and the octagonal Water Tower and other sights. Afterward, take the GoldenPass scenic train to Lungern—a journey of about 1 hour, crossing mountains and ridges, admiring the beautiful scenery along the way. Tour Lake Lungern and the small-town scenery. Then head to Interlaken, where you can freely tour the Höheweg, the Höhematte, and the tranquil villages, set off by green trees and dotted among the mountains and waters, with people and nature blending into one. Afterward, check into the hotel.
Overnight: Sigriswil Panorama Snow Mountain Lake View Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点。之后乘坐金色山口观光列车前往龙疆，1小时左右的车程，穿山越岭，一路上欣赏美丽的风景。游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。之后前往因特拉肯，因特拉肯自由游览何维克街，荷黑马特，宁静的村庄，绿树掩映，点缀在山水之间，人与自然浑然一体，之后入住酒店。
夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Sigriswil Snow Mountain Lake View Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in a mountain ravine next to the panoramic bridge of Sigriswil. All guest rooms are decorated in an elegant Swiss countryside style, and the hotel's views fulfill one's imagination of Switzerland. Guest rooms enjoy views of Lake Thun, the surrounding mountains, or the village of Sigriswil. Sitting in the hotel's restaurant gazing into the distance at the emerald-green waters of Lake Thun and the snow mountains tranquilly reflected, you feel as if in a painting, letting you fully enjoy Switzerland's paradise-like beautiful scenery.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于锡格里斯维尔（Sigriswil）全景桥旁边的山涧，所有的客房装饰为瑞士乡村典雅风格，酒店景观满足对瑞士的想象，客房客房享有图恩湖或周围群山或锡格里斯维尔村景致。坐在酒店的餐厅远眺碧绿的图恩湖水，宁静地倒影的雪山，恍然如画中，让人尽情欣赏瑞士世外桃源般的美好景致。

highlights.text_en:
Experience the GoldenPass scenic train and admire Switzerland's natural scenic scroll along the way
The golden line of the GoldenPass scenic train is the section taking the GoldenPass from Lucerne to Lungern. The towns and villages along the route are all exquisite scenery full of fantasy. All the way it travels through the Alps. The train is like a red ribbon, stringing together the sapphire-blue lakes, the snow-capped mountains, and the agate-like red-tiled colorful houses, taking you on a tour of a wonderful fairyland. Sitting on the train, the panoramic, bright, huge glass windows let you take in the scenery along the route from every angle. From the first minute the train starts, you will be drawn into ever-changing splendid scenery; you are reluctant to blink an eye, for fear of missing every changing view.
highlights.text_zh:
体验金色山口观光列车，一路欣赏瑞士的自然景观画卷
金色山口观光列车的黄金线，是乘坐金色山口号从卢塞恩前往龙疆段。沿线的城镇村庄，都是充满奇幻的精致景色。一路穿行于阿尔卑斯山脉之中。列车如一道红色的彩线，串起蓝宝石的湖泊，白雪皑皑的群山，玛瑙般的红瓦彩屋，带你畅游美妙的神仙境界。坐上列车，全景敞亮巨大的玻璃光窗，让你从各个角度，都能尽揽沿线风光美景。从列车启动的第一分钟起，就会被带入变幻无穷的胜景之中，你不舍得眨一下眼睛，生怕错过每一个变化的景色。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland, belonging to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled among mountains and waters, Lucerne possesses the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance palaces and mansions, as well as century-old shops and long streets and ancient lanes are everywhere. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the city's beautiful scenery into an image both illusory and real, making it an extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small cities. Since the 19th century, it has attracted many princes, nobles, and men of letters to come and tour and live, and artists have gained endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: Switzerland's GoldenPass train shuttles through the beautiful regions of the Alps, taking in charming lake and mountain scenery all the way. One of the most beautiful sections is the GoldenPass train (Luzern-Lungern Express) on the stretch from Lungern to Lucerne. Along the way are graceful villages, azure lake waters, lush vegetation, vast pastures, leisurely cattle and sheep, and the snow-capped Alps; the scenery changing from the foot of the mountains to the summit makes one marvel that this is a fairyland on earth.
attractions.text_zh: 瑞士的黄金列车穿梭于阿尔卑斯美丽的区域，一路总览迷人的湖光山色。其中美丽的一段就是龙疆（Lungern）到卢塞恩（Luzern）这一段的金色山口列车（Luzren-Lungern Express），沿途秀美的村庄，碧蓝的湖水，茂密的植被，广袤的牧场，悠闲的牛羊，还有白雪皑皑的阿尔卑斯山脉，从山脚到山顶变幻的风景，让人感叹这就是人间仙境。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass train passes through here. Here is found Switzerland's purest alpine lake water, surrounded by mountains, with lush green grass. The quaint villages are scattered along the shore of Lake Lungern, just like a paradise far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口列车就会从这里经过。这里拥有瑞士最为纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: The Höhematte is the green-space square in the center of Interlaken, Switzerland's famous sightseeing town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery; now the construction of any buildings is prohibited, to prevent damage to this beautiful landscape. This is the best place to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast green space there are fountains, also dotted with many benches, so it is also a good place for strolling. The Höhematte is also a landing site for paragliders; there is a reception point on the edge of the lawn—after paying, staff will take tourists to a nearby mountain to glide freely, allowing one to admire the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Interlaken is a small town at the foot of the Jungfrau, located between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, also known as the town between the lakes. It is famous for its intoxicating scenery in all four seasons. Geographically it belongs to the center of the Bernese Highlands.
attractions.text_zh: 因特拉肯是少女峰山脚下的一个小镇，位于图恩湖及布里恩茨湖之间，又名湖间镇，以一年四季的醉人风景著名，在地理上它属于伯尔尼高地的中心。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to visit the town of Grindelwald and the Dreamland slopes (First), then ascend to the summit to visit the Jungfrau, the Alps' famous scenic area. Take the cable car to the top of the charming Jungfrau, and head to the "Sphinx Observation Deck" to overlook the snow-capped Jungfrau and Europe's "Aletsch Glacier." Afterward, take a coach to Zurich and check into the hotel.
Overnight: Crowne Plaza Zurich or Fassbind, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往参观格林德尔瓦尔德小镇、梦幻山坡，之后登顶参观阿尔卑斯山著名的风景区-少女峰，乘坐缆车登顶迷人的少女峰，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”上俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰和欧洲的“阿莱奇冰川”(Aletsch)。随后乘车前往苏黎世，入住酒店。
夜宿：苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或法斯宾德或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Crowne Plaza Zurich or Fassbind, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is situated in Zurich's lively commercial district, with shops, bars, and restaurants all within walking distance. The spacious and stylish guest rooms can relieve a whole day's fatigue, and the clean and bright interior décor brings guests a day of good mood. The hotel has complete facilities; guests can enjoy dinner at the hotel's à la carte restaurant or sample snacks and drinks at the hotel's bar.
accommodation.text_zh:
苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或法斯宾德或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落于苏黎世热闹的商业街区，步行可达的距离遍布商店、酒吧和餐馆。宽敞时尚的客房能解除您一整天的疲累，简洁明快室内装饰带给客人一天的好心情，酒店设施完备，客人可在酒店内的单点菜肴餐厅享用晚餐或在酒店的酒吧品尝小吃和饮品。

highlights.text_en:
The Jungfrau Region
As one of Switzerland's famous representative tourist destinations, the Jungfrau is not a single snow mountain, but a series of different Swiss scenery combinations surrounding the Jungfrau and Interlaken, containing a variety of different snow-mountain experiences, which have created the wonderful and rich scenic areas of the Swiss Jungfrau, First, Grindelwald, and other sights. The Jungfrau summit scenic cable car lets you experience several different journeys. The First Cliff Walk adventure park, as the originator of aerial-adventure tourism projects, and the high-altitude paragliding not only adorn the snow mountains but also bring many exciting activities to the younger crowd.
highlights.text_zh:
少女峰地区
作为瑞士著名的代表性旅游胜地，少女峰不是座雪山，而是围绕着少女峰、因特拉肯的一系列不同的瑞士风景组合，包含多种不同的雪山体验，成就了精彩而丰富的瑞士少女峰 、菲斯特，格兰维尔德等景点旅游景区。 少女峰登顶景观缆车，可以感受多程不同的体验。菲斯特空天冒险乐园，作为空天探险类旅游项目的始祖，而高空滑翔伞不仅仅装饰了雪山，还给年轻群体带来了许多的刺激活动。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald has extraordinarily magnificent mountain scenery, with a glacier running across it. At the end of the 18th century, a group of tourists from England first came to this beautiful place. Local mountain guides in Grindelwald led the tourists from England to climb almost all the peaks of this region, and winter tourism began to flourish from then on. Walking all the way along the high-altitude Pfälchüechliweg route from Holenstein to Brandegg is an extremely unforgettable experience. This route leads to lush green pastures, flower-filled meadows, and charming forests. As your Grindelwald hike comes to an end, you will surely treat yourself well at the Brandegg mountain restaurant—and of course the famous Pfälchüechli (a kind of apple fritter) is indispensable.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦有着非同寻常的奇伟壮丽的山景，一条冰河横穿其中，18世纪末，来自英国的一批游客首次来到这片美丽的地方，格林德尔瓦尔德当地的登山向导引领来自英国的游客们登遍了这个地区的几乎所有山峰，冬季旅游业自此开始蓬勃发展。沿着从Holenstein到Brandegg的pfelchüechliwg高海拔线路一路前行是一种十分难忘的体验。这条线路通往绿草繁茂的牧场、鲜花盛开的草地还有那迷人的森林。在格林德尔瓦尔德徒步旅行步入尾声时，您一定会在Brandegg高山饭店好好犒赏自己一番，当然著名的pfelchüechli（一种苹果油炸饼）是必不可少的。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow year-round, while below the mountain it is lush and green with beautiful scenery—a famous Swiss destination for sightseeing and outdoor sports. The Jungfrau region was inscribed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Aletsch region has been inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage List. Also known as the "Great Aletsch Glacier," the ice here weighs over 1.1 billion tons, making it the largest and longest glacial landform of the Alps. The glacier extends from the north slopes of the Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau toward the canton of Valais. The glacial meltwater flows into the Rhône River through the pristine Massa Gorge, so the region grows all kinds of rare plants and is the habitat of many rare animals, as well as an excellent spot for hiking, skiing, and other activities; the magnificent scenery is hard to describe in words.
attractions.text_zh: 阿莱奇(Aletsch)地区已被联合国教科文组织列入世界遗产名录，又称为“大阿莱奇冰川”，这里冰重超过11亿吨，是阿尔卑斯山脉至大至长的冰川地貌。冰川从艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰的北坡向瓦莱州延伸，冰川融水通过原始的马萨峡谷(Massa Gorge)流入罗纳河，因而该地区生长着各种珍稀植物，是许许多多珍稀动物的栖息地，也是徒步和滑雪等项目的绝佳地点，壮丽的风景难以用语言描述。

attractions.text_en: The Sphinx Observation Deck is the observation deck on the Jungfrau, the Top of Europe, with Switzerland's high-speed elevator. At an altitude of 3,571 meters is the Sphinx Observation Deck, from which one can admire a breathtaking panorama of the Alps: the magnificent Aletsch Glacier, 23.6 kilometers long and covering an area of 117 square kilometers, the most magnificent glacier in the Alps; and part of the magnificent Alps in the cantons of Bern and Valais and the Jura mountain region. On clear days, you can even see the Vosges mountains far away in France and the Black Forest far away in Germany.
attractions.text_zh: 斯芬克斯观景台是欧洲屋脊少女峰上的观景台，拥有瑞士高速的升降机。在海拔3571米高处是斯芬克斯观景台，由此可观赏到阿尔卑斯山惊心动魄的全景图长23.6公里，覆盖面积达117平方公里的雄奇的阿莱契冰川，它是阿尔卑斯山中壮丽的冰川；有壮丽的阿尔卑斯山在伯尔尼州、瓦莱州及汝拉山脉地区的一部分。天气晴朗的日子，甚至能看到远在法国境内的浮日山脉及远在德国境内的黑森林。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, tour Zurich's Old Town, the Grossmünster (Zurich Cathedral) (exterior), Lake Zurich, and Bahnhofstrasse. Afterward, head to Colmar, one of France's romantic, fairy-tale-like small towns. This is also the prototype for Hayao Miyazaki's film "Howl's Moving Castle" and the real filming location for "Chinese Restaurant 2." Tour the beautiful Old Town of Colmar, the Maison des Têtes (House of Heads), and Colmar's beautiful building the Maison Pfister, and other sights.
Overnight: Burgundy Castle Hotel, or Oceania Dijon (downtown), or an equivalent downtown 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午游览苏黎世老城、苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖和班霍夫大街。之后后前往法国浪漫、童话般的小镇之一科尔马，这里也是宫崎骏电影《哈尔的移动城堡》原型及《中餐厅2》的实景拍摄地，游览美丽的科尔马老城区，人头屋和科尔马漂亮的建筑普菲斯泰屋等景点。
夜宿：勃艮第古堡酒店 或 第戎市区大洋洲 或市区同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Burgundy Castle Hotel
The Burgundy castle is located in a Grand Cru wine region, in the center of a magnificent park covering 27 hectares. The castle recalls the bygone elegance of the aristocracy with classic décor: Louis-Philippe red, exquisite celadon green, precious brocade, bathrooms with low wainscoting and mosaic floors, and views enjoying the Burgundy horizon—all these unique details ensure the restoration of a unique medieval experience. The restaurant is located in a former 14th-century building with magnificent vaulted ceilings, where you can taste classic specialty cuisine.
Oceania Dijon (downtown), or an equivalent downtown 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the center of Dijon, within walking distance of Dijon Cathedral. The hotel's design is warm and comfortable, with complete supporting facilities. You can enjoy abundant holiday amenities such as an indoor swimming pool, hot tub, and steam room, or head to the café and order a favorite drink for a hearty round.
accommodation.text_zh:
勃艮第古堡酒店
勃艮第古堡位于特级葡萄产区，占地 27 公顷的雄伟公园中央，古堡回味旧事贵族的雅致与经典的装饰，从路易菲利普红色、精致的青瓷绿色、珍贵的锦缎、低镶板和马赛克地板的浴室、享受勃艮第地平线的景色，所有这些独特的细节确保还原中世纪的独特体验。餐厅位于一栋具有宏伟的拱形天花板凡的前14世纪建筑，可以在此品尝经典的特色美食。
第戎市区大洋洲 或市区同等4星级酒店
酒店位于第戎市中心，可步行前往第戎大教堂。酒店设计温馨舒适，配套设施齐全。您可享受室内游泳池、热水浴缸和蒸汽浴室等丰富度假设施，也可前往咖啡厅，点一杯喜欢的饮品，畅饮一番。

highlights.text_en:
Step into the fairy-tale world of Hayao Miyazaki's writing
The Ill River flows quietly through the small city of Colmar—small bridges and flowing water, deep narrow lanes, the clear canal and flower boats, the brightly colored wooden houses—exuding a strong sense of history. As one of France's romantic small cities, Colmar is called the "Venice of France." The small city still well preserves its 16th-century architectural style—half-timbered houses, one after another, with multi-faceted roofs built of timber, unique in design, each with its own personal taste. This town full of rich Alsatian charm has had a glorious history; the city is full of cultural atmosphere, and the ancient architectural heritage quietly blooms its beauty in every historical period.
highlights.text_zh:
走进宫崎骏笔下的童话世界
伊尔河从科尔马小城中静静淌过，小桥流水，幽幽窄巷，清清的运河与花船，色彩绚烂的木屋，散发出浓厚的历史气息。科尔马作为法国浪漫的小城之一，被称为“法国的威尼斯”。小城目前仍然完好地保留着16世纪的建筑风格—木筋屋，一间间木屋由木材搭建的多面形屋顶，独特的设计，皆具个人品味。充满着浓郁阿尔萨斯风情的小镇有过辉煌的历史，城市充满文化气息，古老的建筑遗产在每一个历史时期，把美丽静静绽放。

attractions.text_en: The twin towers of the Grossmünster are Zurich's landmark building. According to legend, Charlemagne (Charlemagne the Great, king of the Carolingian dynasty of the Frankish Kingdom and founder of the Holy Roman Empire) built the twin towers on the graves of Zurich's patron saints Felix and Regula. Other sights worth seeing also include: St. Peter's Church, which has the largest clock face in Europe, and the Fraumünster (Zurich's Church of Our Lady), famous for the stained-glass windows painted by Giacometti (the Swiss existentialist master sculptor and painter) and Chagall (the surrealist painter).
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂的双塔是苏黎世的地标性建筑。根据传说，查理曼（查理曼大帝，法兰克王国卡洛林王朝国王，神圣罗马帝国的奠基人）将双塔建在了苏黎世主保圣人Felix和Regula的墓地之上。其他值得一看的景点还包括：拥有欧洲至大钟面的圣彼得教堂和苏黎世圣母大教堂，该教堂因贾科梅蒂（瑞士超存在主义雕塑大师，画家）和夏卡尔（超现实主义画家）绘制的彩色玻璃窗而闻名。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. The piers on the lake are packed with yachts of all kinds, just like a rich people's club. One end of the Lake Zurich section reaches deep into the city center; white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere on the lake, leisurely and carefree, a harmonious scene. The north shore of Lake Zurich is where the rich live, dubbed the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." The end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich. As one of the "world's most livable cities," the life of true Zurichers is permeated everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also known as Station Street) is one of Europe's longer shopping avenues, and also one of the world's most expensive shopping avenues. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless center of Zurich, where luxury brands from all over the world are everywhere and private banks stand in rows. Walking on Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless visitors will feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored gold bars said to be among the world's top in quantity, exciting many people so much that they cannot move their feet. Immersed in it, you can clearly feel that the air is permeated with the aura of wealth, luxury, and languor.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: Colmar is located in the northeastern corner of France, only a stone's throw from Germany, with the Rhine River waters encircling the small city. Its hidden geographical location and stunning scenery have earned Colmar the name of a picture-like small town. At the border of France and Germany, Colmar blends the tenderness of the Latin peoples and the diligence of the Germanic peoples. Most of Colmar's houses inherit the architectural characteristics of south-central Germany, with the walls covered in horizontal, vertical, and diagonal wooden stripes, beautiful and exquisite, just like the little houses in fairy tales. Filling in those tangram-like gaps with various colors—perhaps this is the romance that only the most imaginative French could have. Precisely because of this, Colmar won the honor of the "Street Art Society Award," making people flock to it.
attractions.text_zh: 科尔马地处法国东北角，与德国只有咫尺之遥，莱茵河水环绕小城。隐秘的地理位置以及绝美的景致使得科尔马被称之为画一般的小镇。在法、德交界，科尔马融合了拉丁民族的缠绵和日耳曼民族的勤奋。科尔马的房屋大都承袭了德国中南部的建筑特色，墙身布满横、直、斜相间的木条条纹，漂亮精致，宛如童话中的小屋。而在那形如七巧板的空当儿中添满各种颜色，或许是极尽想象力的法国人才有的浪漫吧。正因如此，科尔马获得了“街道艺术学会奖”的殊荣，让人们趋之若鹜。

attractions.text_en: The Maison des Têtes is located on a 14th-century ancient street, built in 1609. It is a Renaissance building, and the 105 vividly varied human-face head sculptures carved on its facade make it the most eye-catching building in the Old Town. The 19th-century bronze statue standing on the roof came from the hand of Bartholdi—the designer of the Statue of Liberty.
attractions.text_zh: 人头屋位于十四世纪的古街道，建于1609年，是文艺复兴时期的建筑，其正面墙壁上雕刻的105颗表情生动各异的人面头像，是老城中惹眼的建筑。立在屋顶的19世纪青铜雕像，则出自自由女神像的设计者——巴托尔迪之手。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the wine-producing region of the Burgundy region, and visit the courtyard, production workshop, vineyard, and cellar of a Burgundy winery. Then head to Burgundy, the capital of France's famous wine region, and begin a gourmet-and-red-wine journey—Dijon, the place of origin of escargot, rose mustard, and the white Charolais cattle. Visit the Old Town of Dijon and the Cathedral of Notre-Dame de Dijon. In the afternoon, head to Paris and check into the hotel.
Overnight: Mercure Paris or Novotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往勃垦地大区葡萄产区，参观勃艮第酒庄的庭院，生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖。随后前往法国产酒名区勃艮第首府及开始美食红酒之旅，蜗牛，玫瑰芥末及白牛的原产地第戎，参观第戎老城，第戎圣母院。下午前往巴黎，入住酒店。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris or Novotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Mercure Paris or Novotel is a comfortable business hotel under Accor. The hotel is located in the safer south of Paris, with a convenient location for travel. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it provides you with a comfortable stay experience, stemming from unique brand characteristics: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a unique hotel style deeply rooted in local character, and an enthusiastic management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店位于更为安全的巴黎南部，地理位置方便出行，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
The Burgundy wine route and a tasting at a famous estate
Burgundy's Côte de Nuits and Golden Slope (Côte d'Or) region is located in the hill region of central France, and is France's ancient wine-producing region. The wines of the Burgundy region are powerful, full-bodied, and tenacious—the very opposite of the smoothness of Bordeaux wines—and are called the "King of French Wines." On the day, visit a famous estate, taste red wine, and explore the production process of how French red wine goes from grape to a fine wine in the glass. The estate run by the de Vogüé family is located in the La Romanée-Conti wine-producing area, which is also one of France's premier estate regions. The vineyard is the most beautiful production area in this region. Visit the estate's courtyard, production workshop, vineyard, and the cellar where wine is stored; the estate's professional sommelier is in charge of the wine service and in-depth explanation, with a light tasting of three to five glasses of red and white wine—a key recommended red-wine art journey experience project on the local wine tourism route.
highlights.text_zh:
勃艮第红酒之路与名庄品鉴
勃艮第的夜丘与金岭地区位于法国中部山丘地区，是法国古老的葡萄酒产区，勃艮第产区的葡萄酒力道浑厚坚韧，与波尔多葡萄酒的柔顺恰相对立，被称为"法国葡萄酒之王"。 当天参观名庄，品鉴红酒，探究法国红酒如何从葡萄到杯中美酒的生产过程。偌梧家族经营的酒庄位于罗曼尼·康帝 （La Romanee Comti）葡萄酒产区，也是法国庄园高级产区之一。葡萄园是该地区漂亮的产区，参观酒庄的庭院，生产工坊、葡萄园和藏酒酒窖，酒庄专业待酒师负责待酒服务和深度讲解，三到五杯红酒及白酒浅尝，是当地葡萄酒旅游路线重点推荐的红酒艺术之旅体验项目。

attractions.text_en: The traditional Gothic building Notre-Dame de Dijon was built in the 13th century. On the church facade, three rows of animal-shaped false gargoyles are separated by two rows of slender columns, and the church has a 14th-century chiming clock. For the majority of the people of Dijon, Notre-Dame de Dijon is an approachable church building; over these recent centuries, the church has always been the people of Dijon's main spiritual and soulful comfort.
attractions.text_zh: 哥特式的传统建筑第戎圣母院建造于13世纪，教堂门面上三列兽形假排水口由两排纤细的圆柱分开，教堂上有一座14世纪的报时钟。对于大多数的第戎人民而言，第戎圣母院是一座具有亲和力的教堂建筑，在这近几个世纪以来，圣母院一直是第戎人民主要的精神、心灵的抚慰。

attractions.text_en: Dijon, located in the Burgundy region, the home of wine, was the capital of the Duchy of Burgundy from the 11th to the 15th centuries. Especially in the 14th and 15th centuries, it flourished thanks to several outstanding leaders, becoming an important political, economic, and cultural-artistic center of Europe at the time. Today, Dijon's Old Town is still scattered with many historic buildings of different periods. In addition to luxurious palaces, solemn churches, lavish glazed-tile roofs, and many quaint half-timbered houses, there are also palaces and monasteries converted into museums and art galleries. Fine wine and cuisine, matched with the artistic atmosphere all over the city, make it a city with a great deal of French charm.
attractions.text_zh: 位于葡萄酒故乡勃艮第地区的第戎，11到-15世纪曾是勃艮第公国的首府，特别在14、15世纪时因几位优秀领导人而盛极一时，成为当时欧洲重要的政治经济和文化艺术中心。如今第戎的老城区仍散布着许多不同时期的历史建筑，除了豪华的宫殿、庄严的教堂、彩釉屋顶的豪华和许多古朴的木框架房屋，也有宫殿和修道院改装成的博物馆和美术馆。美酒、美食搭配满城艺术分为，是非常具有法国风情的一座城市。

attractions.text_en: This destination that combines winemaking and tourism in one is a place not to be missed by wine lovers, art lovers, and gourmets. Choose a winery of Burgundy products for a visit, where you can see the aging and maturing process of the wine and the storage and fermentation process inside the cellar. With luck, you can witness the wine-making process (depending on the grape harvest period).
attractions.text_zh: 这个集酿酒与旅游于一身的胜地是葡萄酒爱好者、艺术爱好者和美食爱好者所不容错过的地方。选择勃艮第产品的酒庄进行参观，在此可参观葡萄酒的陈酿熟化过程及酒窖内储存发酵过程，运气好的时候可参观葡萄酒的酿造过程（取决葡萄的产期）。

overview.text_zh:
上午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫；
下午前往参观巴黎圣母院、西岱岛，之后参观塞纳河边的战神广场及埃菲尔铁塔（外观），乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、奥赛博物馆（外观）等地，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris or Novotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Mercure Paris or Novotel is a comfortable business hotel under Accor. The hotel is located in the safer south of Paris, with a convenient location for travel. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it provides you with a comfortable stay experience, stemming from unique brand characteristics: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a unique hotel style deeply rooted in local character, and an enthusiastic management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店位于更为安全的巴黎南部，地理位置方便出行，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
Take a Seine River cruise and feel the tenderness and romance of Paris
Take the famous transparent-cabin "Bateaux Mouches" cruise sailing along the banks of the Seine, which blends together many attractions. The 3.2-kilometer, roughly 1-hour journey passes Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées, the Île de la Cité, and other famous attractions. On the surface of the Seine, feel Paris's romantic night scenery, beautiful views, and wonderful music—it is called "a Paris in-depth tour project not to be missed."
highlights.text_zh:
乘塞纳河游船，感受巴黎的温柔与浪漫
乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

attractions.text_en: Île de la Cité (exterior). If the Louvre witnessed the glory of the Gauls, then the Île de la Cité, Notre-Dame de Paris, and the Hôtel de Ville de Paris wrote down their indissoluble bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Île de la Cité. Without the Île de la Cité, there would be no present-day Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 西岱岛（外观）如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: The Champ de Mars is a large, strip-shaped park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, lying between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the École militaire (Paris military school) to its southeast.
attractions.text_zh: 战神广场战神广场（Champ-de-Mars）是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔，以及在其东南方的巴黎军校（Ecole militaire）之间。

attractions.text_en: The Cathedral of Notre-Dame de Paris is situated on the Île de la Cité in the center of Paris, and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The church is in the Gothic style, and visitors can climb the towers to visit. Although you won't meet the "Hunchback of Notre-Dame," you can see the 17th-century great bell, get up close to the mythical beasts on the church's outer walls, and overlook the beautiful scenery of the Île de la Cité and the Seine.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西堤岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，游客可以登上塔楼参观，虽然遇不到“钟楼怪人”，但却能看到17世纪的大钟、近距离接触教堂外壁上的神兽、俯瞰西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the symbol of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of France's feudal-rule historical period. In terms of content, it was not only the French court, but also the nation's administrative center, and a concrete embodiment of French society's political views and way of life at the time. It was the first time since the ancient Roman Empire that Europe demonstrated the power of an absolutist regime able to concentrate such enormous manpower, material resources, and financial resources. At the time, in order to build it, Louis XIV mobilized more than 30,000 workers and architects, engineers, and technicians. Besides having to solve the complex technical problems arising from constructing large-scale building complexes, they also had to solve problems in all aspects such as water supply and roads. Thus it can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully proves the progress of France's economy and technology at the time and the wisdom of the laboring people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来，第一次表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, visit the Louvre Museum, the pride of France;
Then head to Paris's fashion center, Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, and visit at leisure the Palais Garnier (Paris Opera House) (exterior) and Printemps department store, the Paris Galeries Lafayette, and other fashion districts.
Afterward, the itinerary ends at the beautiful Place d'Italie in Paris.
[Due to the Louvre's visitor-flow limits, especially restrictions on guides giving explanations inside the museum during peak season, the in-museum explanation fee of EUR 20 per traveler will be refunded at that time]
overview.text_zh:
上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆；
随后前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货，巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。
之后在美丽的巴黎意大利广场结束行程。
【由于罗浮宫限流、特别是旺季限制讲解员在馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费20欧元/每位游客】

accommodation.text_en: No hotel
accommodation.text_zh: 无酒店

highlights.text_en:
Stroll along Boulevard Haussmann in Paris
Boulevard Haussmann is not in the most bustling area of Paris, yet it comes alive because of 2 famous department stores: France's larger department store—Galeries Lafayette—and Printemps, renowned for its home-furnishing fine goods. You can stroll alone and feel the life atmosphere of Boulevard Haussmann; or together with a few friends, walk along Boulevard Haussmann and enjoy the delight of shopping.
highlights.text_zh:
漫步巴黎奥斯曼大街
奥斯曼大街不在巴黎最繁华的区域内，却因为2幢著名的百货公司而生动起来：法国较大的百货公司———老佛爷百货(GaleriesLafayette)及以家饰精品著称的春天百货(Printemps)。你可以独自漫步，感受奥斯曼大街的生活气息；也可以与三五好友一起，穿行在奥斯曼大街上，享受购物的欣喜。

attractions.text_en: It is one of the world's oldest museums and a world-famous treasure house of art. The Louvre building is in a "U" shape, divided into two parts, new and old. The glass pyramid entrance in front of the Louvre was designed by the Chinese-American master architect I. M. Pei. Here are treasured more than 400,000 art treasures, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing artworks from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria, and Rome to medieval Europe and the various countries of the East—it can be called an outstanding palace of art in human history. The itinerary includes ordinary individual-traveler tickets (without a Chinese audio guide).
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品、其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。 行程包含普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。

attractions.text_en: The Paris Opera House was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861, and is the consummate masterpiece of eclecticism. Its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms such as the ancient Greco-Roman colonnade and the Baroque, grand in scale, exquisitely detailed, magnificent and resplendent, hailed as a theater where painting, marble, and gilding shine on one another, giving people great enjoyment. It is one of the typical buildings of Napoleon III.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎歌剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，是折衷主义登峰造极的作品，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受。是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一

attractions.text_en: Gathering the Paris Opera House, the Galeries Lafayette department store, Printemps, and the Café de la Paix, wander the streets and lanes of Boulevard Haussmann and savor the world's fashionable trends and window-display art.
attractions.text_zh: 云集了巴黎歌剧院，老佛爷百货商店，巴黎春天，和平咖啡馆，穿街走巷奥斯曼大街上，品味这个世界上时尚的潮流趋势及橱窗艺术。

overview.text_en:
After gathering in Venice, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings constructed upon the water, together with the winding water lanes, make Venice's romantic charm linger long in your memory. Here you can also savor Venice's signature feast, the three-course cuttlefish ink pasta (at your own expense).
Overnight: Voco Venice Mestre Hotel or Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
威尼斯集合后，参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝到威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Voco Venice Mestre Hotel or Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels. It enjoys an excellent location, with a stylish modern design, natural tones in the guest rooms and contemporary interiors that offer you a comfortable and cozy stay. The hotel provides a hearty breakfast, a fully equipped gym, and a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails, while the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant offers Italian delicacies and fine cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en:
The world's beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic" still dazzling and resplendent
As one of the major cities of the Renaissance, Venice is composed of 118 small islands, linked together by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands," and the "City of Bridges." Here you find one of the world's beautiful squares, "St. Mark's Square," the beautiful Grand Canal, the Phoenix Opera House reborn from the flames, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs as written by Xu Zhimo, and breathtakingly beautiful arcades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting and the filming location of many movie scenes. Her unique character leaves every visitor enchanted and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: This is the central square of Venice, once called "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe" by Napoleon. The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, while to the east rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the public hub of Venice's political, religious, and traditional festival activities.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Known in short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt between 1043 and 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe. It is a classic masterpiece of Venetian architectural art and at the same time a treasure trove housing a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weaponry. On the way to the dungeon you walk across the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through the small openings, rather than being looked at by the many people on the bridge opposite gazing toward the Bridge of Sighs. You may take photos inside, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route by which the court escorted condemned prisoners to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is built in the early Baroque style, shaped like a house, with a domed top and very tightly enclosed, having only two small windows facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, those guilty of serious crimes were taken to the dungeon, and as they passed over this airtight bridge they could only glimpse the blue sky through the small windows, losing their freedom from that moment on and involuntarily letting out sighs. It is said that if lovers kiss beneath the bridge they can be together forever, and the movie "A Little Romance" was filmed here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

overview.text_en:
In the morning depart for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, to visit the sights of Florence's old town: the world's third-largest church, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, the Piazza della Signoria, the Old Bridge, as well as Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Afterwards check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观佛罗伦萨老城景点：世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后入住酒店。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Hilton Florence is a modern hotel offering a Tuscan-style experience, with an excellent location that gives access to Florence's commercial center so you can enjoy the bustle of Florence. From the terrace of the hotel's executive lounge you can admire magnificent views of Florence. Each guest room is decorated in a warm, modern style; the wooden floors and spacious marble bathrooms provide great comfort.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会或同等4星级酒店
佛罗伦萨希尔顿酒店是一家体验托斯卡纳风格的现代化酒店，地理位置优越，可前往佛罗伦萨商业中心，享受佛罗伦萨的繁华。酒店行政酒廊的露台上可欣赏到佛罗伦萨的壮丽景色。每间客房均采用温馨的现代风格装饰；木地板和宽敞的大理石浴室可获得较大的舒适度。

highlights.text_en:
The brilliance and splendor of Florence, the radiance of the Renaissance shining bright
In Florence, the world's capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Amid the blue skies and white clouds, the vividly colored walls, the dark green shutters, and the deep red rooftops, seek out the soul of the Renaissance. In the streets and lanes, the squares and churches, the museums and galleries, feel the Renaissance that never grows old. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic spirit of Dante Alighieri and the painterly spirit of Da Vinci still drift over the skies of Florence, still continue to pursue the people and events of Europe's Renaissance..."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利·但丁的诗魂、达·芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio, situated over the Arno River, is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earliest large-span segmental arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the young woman Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into the "Divine Comedy." Over the centuries it has endured floods, social upheavals, and wars yet remains standing. It is one of Florence's famous landmark structures.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few can be so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red, and green granite, interprets to the fullest the classical, elegant, and free spirit so admired in the Renaissance era. No wonder it was named "Holy Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new cathedral, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria enjoys the reputation of an open-air sculpture museum and has been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has endured from the Renaissance to the present. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce, a Gothic building that is the resting place of Italian notables such as Michelangelo and Galileo; its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring in detail. Around the square are many cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste the local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, taking in the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
In the morning depart to tour Cinque Terre, traveling along the Ligurian coastline to visit the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs; in the afternoon head to Pisa to visit the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli at the heart of Pisa's history and culture, then proceed to Siena to check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: If touring Cinque Terre becomes impossible due to factors such as bad weather or a railway company strike, the itinerary will automatically be changed to touring the coastal cities by coach or other means.
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。
夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is set on a quiet hilltop, surrounded by olive trees and gardens, with a beautiful environment ideal for getting close to nature. The guest rooms are laid with comfortable wooden floors and feature a bright design with tasteful, fashionable interiors. The hotel is also equipped with an exquisite restaurant serving classic Italian, local, and Tuscan cuisine during dinner. The hotel's outdoor pool, fitness center, and sauna all provide you with an even more relaxing stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，环境优美且适合亲近自然。客房铺设舒适的木质地板，设计明亮，摆设美观的时尚内装，同时酒店配有精致的餐厅，在晚餐时段供应经典的意大利、当地和托斯卡纳美食。酒店的室外泳池、健身中心以及桑拿浴室都为您提供更加放松的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a paradise on the cliffs
Along the long Mediterranean coastline the little train stops at each beautiful fishing village. You watch the sun-bathed beaches as the waves quietly lap against the rocks, and the colorful houses come into view from far to near. The curiosity to gaze upon the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak the moment you arrive; walking on foot through the village alleys, the closer you get the more delightful it becomes. It is like savoring a visual feast of five colorful flavors, tasting each subtle note bit by bit, a scene so lovely it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线小火车在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of Pisa, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli to the north of the city of Pisa in Tuscany, Italy. It is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, designated a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. Legend has it that in 1590 AD, Galileo performed a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly covered with grass. Piazza dei Miracoli is the heart of the city of Pisa, and the square holds four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (the bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Cemetery. Ancient city walls and gates are still preserved around the square. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa, and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five clifftop villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together: built along the coast, it is one of the world's beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers long and requiring around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other are the mountains, and ahead lie the Italian fishing villages, making it a destination that countless hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage list.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast depart for the old city of Siena to visit sights such as Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the Siena Town Hall (exterior), and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Afterwards proceed to the old town of Pienza to visit Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), then head to Rome, taking free photos along the cypress lane on the way. Upon arriving in Rome, check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Sheraton Medici) or Mantegna Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。之后前往皮恩扎古城参观游览二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观），之后前往罗马，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后入住酒店。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel (Sheraton Medici) or Mantegna Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course, and an outdoor swimming pool. It features cutting-edge architectural style and modern interior design, with rooms furnished in modern or classical decor; all guest rooms enjoy views of the garden, swimming pool, or golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants offering you exquisite dishes of international flavor and traditional Italian cuisine. The hotel's tranquil setting easily meets your diverse needs and makes it an ideal choice for relaxing body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The pastoral beauty of the Val d'Orcia and the medieval old town of Pienza
Close your eyes and you will imagine the classic scenery of Tuscany - blue skies and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and grapevines, and finally wheat fields - this is the perfect portrait of the Val d'Orcia. From the walls of the old town of Pienza you can look down upon the scenery of the World Heritage "Val d'Orcia."
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old city, is filled with the masterpieces of art masters and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing cobblestone alleys and the deep, secluded courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you have stepped into the European Middle Ages of a thousand years ago, where every detail brings you a delightful surprise. Over the centuries this city has maintained an intact classical appearance, as if time had stood still here since the 14th century.
