Beyond its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also preserves a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties - the almond soft cookies ricciarelli, the nut-filled cake panforte, the peppery spiced nut cake pan pepato, the rice puddings budini di riso, the walnut cookies cavallucci, or the walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: The town hall that forms the base of the square is the most glorious example of Sienese Gothic architecture. Inside the town hall, the Museo Civico holds exquisite frescoes. The 102-meter-high Torre del Mangia tower was built in 1297 and rises high above the square. The town hall was first built at the end of the 13th century, originally serving as the office of the republican government. The lower level of this building is made of stone and the upper level of brick; the facade is slightly curved, with neat eye-shaped openings evenly distributed across it. The central part of the town hall's facade has two levels of Gothic pointed triple-arched windows, and the second floor on both sides and at the top is lined with Lombard-style blind arches. The town hall is now home to the civic museum, which displays many paintings and sculptures related to the city's history, including the famous series of frescoes "Good Government, Bad Government" in the museum's Hall of the Nine (La Sala dei Nove).
attractions.text_zh: 构成广场基础的市政厅是锡耶纳哥特式建筑最辉煌的范例。市政厅内的MuseoCivico藏有精美的壁画。102米高的TorredelMangia塔建于1297年，高高耸立在广场的上方。市政厅始建于13世纪末，原是作为共和政府的办公场所。这座建筑物下层是石造，上层是砖造，立面稍微弯曲，上面均匀分步着整齐的眼洞。市政厅的立面中部有两层哥特式的尖拱三孔窗户，二层两边和顶部都排列着伦巴第风格的盲拱。市政厅现在是市立博物馆的所在地，里面展示着许多与城市历史相关的绘画和雕塑，其中包括博物馆的九人会议厅(LaSaladeiNove)中的著名的系列壁画《好政府，坏政府》。

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a small town on a hill in the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. In 1459 the Pienza he oversaw rebuilding was regarded as a model of the "ideal city," and it was therefore hailed as the "touchstone of Renaissance urban life." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, Pienza's unique feature is that you can look down from the city walls upon the scenery of the World Heritage "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypress trees, with its uniquely shaped curve and neatly arranged cypresses, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows in the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that attracts countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and check in.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage list in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is renowned for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns. It is a unique convergence of art and nature, holding a rich imprint of history, and its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the Italian city-states' ideal of "good government."
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, led by the guide, take a walking tour of the world-famous historic and cultural city of Rome. This is the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire and, owing to its long history, is called the "Eternal City." Visit the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior) standing on the ruins of the ancient Roman capital, and tour the Spanish Square and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Free time, after which the pleasant journey comes to an end!
Note: Due to the protection of Rome's ancient city architecture, vehicles are prohibited, and most areas are pedestrian zones, while all the attractions within the Rome city area are inside the ancient Roman city. The walking tour of Rome that day covers about 5-6 kilometers on foot.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，在导游的带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。自由活动，之后结束愉快旅程！
备注： 由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，而罗马市区内的所有景点都在古罗马城内，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth exploration of Rome, an important birthplace of world culture
Among the ancient ruins that occupy roughly half of the city area, seek out the historical civilization that has settled over thousands of years. Whether it is the world-famous architectural ruins formed by the Imperial Senate, the Triumphal Arches, the Commemorative Columns, the Pantheon, and the Colosseum, or the many exquisite Renaissance buildings and art masterpieces housed in hundreds of museums, or even the city's many fountains of myriad postures represented by the Trevi Fountain, and the vast-scale public works such as roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares, and public baths - all of them freeze art in that wondrous moment. Someone once said, "Architecture is flowing music"; then the architecture of ancient Rome performs a grand and timeless symphony.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的就是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is the best-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman king Victor Emmanuel II, and Umberto I, among others, rest in eternal sleep here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, the son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of the exquisite construction techniques of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum located in the center of Rome was built by the ancient Romans at the time to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great ancient Roman Empire. It was the place where the ancient Roman Empire provided slave owners, nobles, and free citizens with a venue to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat among slaves, and it is Rome's most famous historic relic. The Colosseum can be regarded as a model masterpiece and marvel in the history of architecture, renowned throughout the world for being vast, majestic, and spectacular. Although only a little more than half of its skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and magnificent momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in a scene of the movie "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome that everyone knows. Hepburn's fresh and lovely figure seems to have already merged with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. As for the Spanish Steps, the entire Spanish Square is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The steps total 138 in all and are the widest steps in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also called the "Maiden Fountain," or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology, with a grand and magnificent overall presence. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dream will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Mont-Saint-Michel, an isolated little island off the Normandy coast, to tour the Mont-Saint-Michel site and its abbey. Depending on the tides, explore the mirror-like shallow tidal flats of the Normandy waters at the foot of the mount, then proceed to a popular photo spot to capture the healing scene of the winding little river, the holy mount, and flocks of sheep. Afterwards, head to Rennes to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Rennes or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
当天上午前往诺曼底海滩的独立小岛——圣米歇尔山，游览圣米歇尔山景区和修道院，根据潮汐情况游览位于山脚下如同镜片的诺曼底海水浅水滩涂， 之后前往热门拍照点， 拍摄弯弯的小河、圣山、羊群的治愈画面， 之后前往雷恩入住酒店。
夜宿：雷恩诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Rennes or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Novotel Rennes is located in the Alma commercial district in the south of Rennes, surrounded by an abundance of dining, supermarkets and shopping malls, away from the crowds of the old town, while being only about a 10-minute drive from the city center and core attractions such as the Parliament of Brittany. It combines urban convenience with a quiet environment. The hotel offers spacious, modern guest rooms with a clean, comfortable design. Its in-house facilities are well-appointed, featuring a French restaurant and bar, a seasonal outdoor pool and a large garden space. The overall atmosphere is relaxed yet of high quality, also offering a resort-style experience of relaxation.
accommodation.text_zh: 雷恩诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店 雷恩诺富特酒店位于雷恩南部Alma商业区，周围餐饮、超市、商场一应俱全，远离老城拥挤，同时距市中心、布列塔尼议会宫等核心景点仅约10分钟车程，兼具城市便捷与静谧环境。酒店拥有宽敞现代化客房，设计简洁舒适。内部配套完善，设有法式餐厅与酒吧、季节性室外泳池及大面积花园空间。整体氛围轻松而品质感强，也提供度假式的放松体验。

highlights.text_en:
Mysterious Lone Island - Mont-Saint-Michel
Mont-Saint-Michel is the third-largest Catholic holy site, with a thousand years of history. At high tide it becomes an island, and at low tide it turns into a peninsula - mysterious and dreamlike. According to legend, in the year 708 AD, the Archangel Michael appeared to a bishop in a dream and told him to build an abbey here. Later, it became a prison in the Napoleonic era, and to this day monks and nuns still reside there permanently. At night, hymns echo through the mountain, deeply moving all who hear them.
highlights.text_zh:
神秘孤岛-圣米歇尔山
圣米歇尔山是天主教第三大圣地，拥有千年历史，涨潮时是岛，退潮变半岛，神秘又梦幻。相传公元708年，大天使米歇尔托梦给主教，让他在这里建造修道院。后来，它成了拿破仑时代的监狱，如今仍有修士修女常住，夜晚的圣歌回荡山间，令人动容。

attractions.text_en: Mont-Saint-Michel sits on a lone island off the Normandy coast, two kilometers from the shore. With its remarkable phenomenon of being an island at high tide and connected to land at low tide, it has been inscribed by UNESCO on the World Heritage List. Mont-Saint-Michel is a famous French historical monument and a Christian holy site, located on a small island in the Manche department, two kilometers from the coast. The island is cone-shaped, with a circumference of 900 meters, formed of towering granite. At an elevation of 88 meters, it is often surrounded by vast stretches of sand, becoming an island only at high tide. In ancient times this was a place where the Celts worshipped their gods. In the 8th century AD, the cardinal Aubert built a small chapel-fortress at the highest point of the island, dedicating it to the Archangel Michael, and it later became a pilgrimage center, hence the name Mont-Saint-Michel. It is a 'World Cultural and Natural Heritage' site.
attractions.text_zh: 圣米歇尔山位于诺曼底海滩上的一座孤岛上，距海岸两公里，涨潮时为海岛，退潮时为陆地的奇特景观，被联合国教科文组列入世界人类遗产。圣米歇尔山是法国著名古迹和基督教圣地，位于芒什省一小岛上，距海岸两公里。小岛呈圆锥形，周长900米，由耸立的花岗石构成。海拔88米，经常被大片沙岸包围，仅涨潮时才成为岛。古时这里是凯尔特人祭神的地方。公元8世纪，红衣主教奥贝在岛上最高处修建一座小教堂城堡，奉献给天使长米歇尔，如今成为朝圣中心，故称圣米歇尔山，是“世界文化与自然遗产”景点。

attractions.text_en: Mont-Saint-Michel Abbey is located atop Mont-Saint-Michel. Shaped by the forces of nature, Mont-Saint-Michel is one of the great wonders of the world, and the abbey and great church upon it hold a supreme place in the hearts of Christians. Aubert built a small chapel on the island, dedicating it to the Archangel Michael, and it became a pilgrimage center. During Napoleon's reign, the abbey also served as a national prison. To this day, although the abbey has been redesigned and rebuilt by many architects, it still retains its plain, unadorned and antique style.
attractions.text_zh: 圣米歇尔山修道院位于圣米歇尔山上。圣米歇尔山经大自然的造化，是世界的一大奇观，山上的修道院和大教堂更在基督教徒的心目中有着至高无上的地位。奥伯特在岛上修建一座小教堂，奉献给大天使米歇尔，成为朝圣中心。拿破仑执政期间，修道院也曾作为国家监狱。到如今，修道院虽然经诸多建筑师设计改建，但依旧保持着朴实无华、古色古香的格调。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, head to Rennes, the capital of the Brittany region and a charming city of history and vitality. Tour the old town of Rennes, the beautiful Thabor Park, and the Parliament of Brittany (exterior). Then proceed to visit Chateau de Chambord in the Loire Valley. Along the D952 riverside avenue, in the pristine Loire Valley region's woodlands hide untamed roe deer and wild boar, while standing majestically is the most magnificent castle in all of France - Chateau de Chambord. Its layout is also the typical medieval castle layout, having been a hunting lodge of the French kings. Afterwards, return to Paris and conclude this wonderful journey.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，前往布列塔尼大区首府，历史与活力的魅力之城-雷恩，游览雷恩老城，美丽的他泊花园，布列塔尼议会宫（外观），随后前往参观卢瓦尔河谷香波堡，沿着D952河畔大道在原生态卢瓦河谷地区的丛林里隐藏着从未被驯服的獐鹿、野猪，巍然耸立着全法兰西最恢宏的城堡--香波堡，布局也是中世纪典型的古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫，之后返回巴黎，结束美好旅行。

accommodation.text_en: No accommodation this evening
accommodation.text_zh: 当晚无住宿

highlights.text_en:
World Cultural Heritage - The Castle Region of the Loire Valley
The castles of the Loire Valley display the most classical and traditional charm of France. As France's largest tourist region, the Loire Valley offers a tourist route stretching 280 kilometers, from Sully-sur-Loire in the Loiret to Chalonnes-sur-Loire in Anjou. Harmony is perhaps the most striking feature here. Whether the castles built upon the river or the gardens hidden in the deep woods, they shine in concert along the banks of the Loire, with lush vineyards on both sides of the valley, quaint little towns, and castles as brilliant as the stars. 'The Loire is another Milky Way, and the castles are those stars.' - Walter Houston
highlights.text_zh:
世界文化遗产——卢瓦尔河谷城堡区
卢瓦尔河谷城堡群，展现着法兰西最古典与传统的风情，卢瓦尔河谷作为法国最大的旅游景区：从卢瓦雷省（leLoiret）的叙利（SullysurLoire）到安茹（Anjou）的沙洛那（ChalonnessurLoire），卢瓦尔河谷为您提供了一条长达280公里的旅游线路。和谐也许是这里最显著的一个特征，无论是建筑在河流上的城堡，还是躲藏在深林中的花园，在卢瓦河沿岸交相辉映，河谷两岸郁郁葱葱的葡萄树，古朴的小镇，还有灿若星辰的城堡。“卢瓦河是另一个银河，而城堡是那些星星。”——蕙兰·休斯顿

attractions.text_en: The largest of the castles in the Loire Valley, it is a fairly typical example of medieval castle layout and was a hunting lodge of the French kings. Chateau de Chambord was built during the reign of Francis I. In its layout, form, style and decoration it reflects traditional French architectural art, while also being influenced by the Italian Renaissance, making it one of the representative works of the French Renaissance period and regarded by the French as a national treasure worthy of pride. In 1981, Chateau de Chambord was inscribed on the World Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 卢瓦尔河谷城堡群中最大的一个，较为典型的中世纪古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫。香波堡兴建于弗朗斯瓦一世时期。它在布局、造型、风格装饰上反映了法国传统的建筑艺术，同时又受到意大利文艺复兴的影响，成为法国文艺复兴时期的代表作之一，被法国人视为值得炫耀的国宝。1981年，香博堡列入了世界遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Rennes is the most charming area of this Brittany capital, preserving a great many 16th-17th century half-timbered houses (timber-frame buildings) - colorful, with slanting lines and full of medieval character. Strolling through it, the cobblestone streets, arched doorways and ancient squares intertwine into a rich historical atmosphere. This is not only the center of history and culture, but also the most lively part of Rennes, lined with cafes, restaurants and distinctive little shops, where the university-town atmosphere fills the ancient district with youthful vitality. Whether for in-depth cultural tours, architectural photography, or a slow-paced stroll, the old town of Rennes is well worth savoring.
attractions.text_zh: 雷恩老城是这座布列塔尼首府最具魅力的区域，保存着大量16–17世纪的木筋房（半木结构建筑），色彩斑斓、线条倾斜，极具中世纪风情。漫步其间，石板街道、拱形门洞与古老广场交织成浓厚的历史氛围。这里不仅是历史文化中心，也是雷恩最具生活气息的地方，咖啡馆、餐厅、特色小店林立，大学城氛围让古老街区充满年轻活力。无论是文化深度游、建筑摄影还是慢节奏漫步，雷恩老城都值得细细品味。

attractions.text_en: Thabor Park is one of Rennes' most famous and most worth-visiting urban green spaces. Covering about 10 hectares, it blends a French geometric garden, an English-style natural landscape area, a vast rose garden and a botanical garden, making it suitable in all four seasons and a popular spot for locals and tourists to take leisurely walks. The park originally developed from the gardens of a Benedictine abbey, and was later relaid out in the 19th century by the renowned landscape designer Denis Buhler, forming the refined yet natural landscape structure of today. It is home to over 3,000 species of plants and more than 2,000 varieties of roses, and also features a bandstand, an aviary, fountains and a children's playground. It regularly hosts concerts, festival events and cultural exhibitions, making it a place not to be missed for experiencing the natural and cultural life of Rennes. The best times for a stroll are during the spring and summer flowering season and the autumn maple-leaf season, and it is also suitable for families, couples or photography enthusiasts to come and explore.
attractions.text_zh: 他泊花园是雷恩著名且最值得一访的城市绿地之一，面积约 10 公顷，融合了法式几何庭园、英式自然风景区、庞大的玫瑰园与植物园，四季皆宜，是当地人和游客休闲散步的热门场所。公园最初由本笃会修道院的庭园发展而来，后于19世纪由著名景观设计师 Denis Bühler 重新布局，形成如今既精致又自然的景观结构。这里拥有超过 3000种植物 和 2000余种玫瑰，还设有 音乐亭、鸟舍、喷泉与儿童游乐区，常年举办音乐会、节庆活动和文化展览，是体验雷恩自然与文化生活不可错过的地点。最佳漫步时间为春夏花季及秋日枫叶时节，同时也适合家庭、情侣或摄影爱好者前来探访。

attractions.text_en: The Parliament of Brittany (exterior) is one of the most representative historical landmarks of Rennes. Built in the 17th century, it is a masterpiece of French classical architecture. It was once the seat of the judicial institution of the Brittany region, bearing witness to the region's important place in French history. The building's exterior is solemn and elegant, while its interior is sumptuously decorated, especially famous for its ceiling murals and gold reliefs, displaying a combination of royal power and local tradition. Today it is still used as a courthouse, but is open for guided tours during specific times, where visitors can gain an in-depth understanding of Brittany's political, legal and cultural history through the commentary. As one of the core attractions of the old town of Rennes, the Parliament is surrounded by squares, cafes and medieval lanes. It is a symbol of where the city's history and modern life converge, and an important stop not to be missed on an in-depth cultural tour.
attractions.text_zh: 布列塔尼议会宫（ 外观 ）是雷恩最具代表性的历史地标之一，建于17世纪，是法国古典主义建筑的典范之作。这里曾是布列塔尼地区司法机构所在地，见证了该地区在法国历史中的重要地位。建筑外观庄重典雅，内部装饰华丽，尤其以天花板壁画和金色浮雕闻名，展现了王权与地方传统的结合。如今这里仍作为法院使用，但在特定时段开放导览参观，游客可通过讲解深入了解布列塔尼的政治、法律与文化历史。作为雷恩老城核心景点之一，议会宫周边环绕着广场、咖啡馆和中世纪街巷，是城市历史与现代生活交汇的象征，也是文化深度游不可错过的重要一站。

overview.text_en:
Gather in the morning and, led by the guide, take a walking tour of Rome, the world-famous historical and cultural city. This is the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, and because of its long history it is known as the "Eternal City." Visit the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior), which stand on the ruins of ancient Rome, and tour the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Afterwards enjoy free time, then check in at the hotel to rest.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel or Mentana Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Due to the protection of Rome's ancient city buildings, vehicles are prohibited and most areas are pedestrian zones; all the attractions in the Rome city center are within the ancient Roman city, so the walking tour of Rome that day covers about 5-6 kilometers on foot.
[For some departure dates the order of the sightseeing in the itinerary may be adjusted, but the content remains the same and does not affect the overall experience. The specific arrangements are subject to the departure notice and the actual itinerary.]

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel or Mentana Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor swimming pool. It features cutting-edge architecture and modern interior design, with rooms furnished in modern or classical decor, all enjoying views of the garden, swimming pool or golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants offering exquisite international cuisine and traditional Italian fare; the tranquil setting effortlessly meets your varied needs, making it an ideal choice to relax body and mind.

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth exploration of Rome, a major birthplace of world civilization
Within the ancient ruins that occupy roughly half of the city area, seek out the historical civilization accumulated over thousands of years. Whether it is the world-famous architectural sites formed by the Imperial Senate, the triumphal arches, the commemorative columns, the Pantheon and the Colosseum, or the countless exquisite Renaissance buildings and art treasures held in the hundreds of museums, or even the many fountains of myriad postures throughout the city represented by the Trevi Fountain, as well as the vast public works of roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares and public baths — all freeze art in that wonderful moment. As someone once said, "Architecture is frozen music," and the architecture of ancient Rome plays out a magnificent and timeless movement.

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum in the center of Rome was built by the ancient Romans to please generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was the place where slave owners, nobles and free citizens watched beast fights and gladiatorial combats by slaves, and it is one of Rome's more famous historical relics. The Colosseum is a masterpiece and marvel in the history of architecture, renowned worldwide for its enormous scale, grandeur and magnificence. Although only most of its skeleton remains, its imposing majesty and grand momentum still endure.

The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman kings Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, among others, rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan era and a model of the exquisite building techniques of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."

The Piazza di Spagna once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Hepburn's fresh and beautiful figure seems to have merged with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. The Piazza di Spagna itself is not large, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The whole flight of steps has 138 steps in total and is the widest staircase in Europe.

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Fountain," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology, and is altogether imposing and magnificent. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dream will come true.

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Naples/Sorrento and take a ferry to the port of Capri. On the day, either stroll along the seaside on your own and then visit the Blue Grotto, or take a boat on your own to circle the island and explore the Blue Grotto, or go on your own into the town of Capri to visit the Gardens of Augustus and overlook the entire bay; afterwards take the ferry back to the Sorrento pier and check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: After landing on Capri you have free time; no transport fees are included. The recommended route is Marina Grande - the old town of Capri - the Gardens of Augustus, a one-way mountain route of about 1.3 kilometers passing three important sights, with funiculars and taxis available along the way at an additional cost.
The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction; if a high tide, wind and waves, or other factors cause the local marine weather authority to declare it closed, it cannot be visited. The Blue Grotto visit fee is not included in the tour. To avoid misunderstanding, in accordance with local custom, in addition to the manual boatman fee for the Blue Grotto, please pay a tip of 2-5 euros.

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a quality choice for enjoying the Sorrento sea views, with magnificent views of the Bay of Sorrento and Naples. Surrounded by sea on three sides, it has a private beach and a private pier, two restaurants of different styles and a fully equipped marine spa center, and is within walking distance of the lively seaside town center; the hotel's pier is the mooring point for boat trips out to sea.

highlights.text_en:
The azure wonder of Capri — the "Blue Grotto"
Since ancient Roman times, Capri has been a famous resort for tourism and recuperation. On his way back from a campaign in the East, Emperor Augustus once landed on this island and was so won over by its beautiful environment and pleasant climate that he did not hesitate to exchange the island of Ischia, four times the size, for Capri, to use as his summer retreat. Capri is of limestone terrain, with steep cliffs, and among the rocks are many peculiar caves, the most famous of which is the "Blue Grotto." The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world. The entrance of the Blue Grotto is below the cliff and is very small, so it can only be entered by small boat. Because of the special structure of the entrance, on one hand sunlight can enter the cave through the opening, and on the other hand it is reflected up from the water at the bottom of the cave, so the seawater inside the cave is crystal blue, mysterious and unfathomable, and even the rocks inside the cave turn blue, hence the name "Blue Grotto." To visit the Blue Grotto you must choose the right moment: first, the weather must be clear; second, you must go at low tide; and third, there must be no wind or waves.

attractions.text_en:
The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world and is a famous attraction of Capri; many people go to Capri precisely to behold the wonder of the Blue Grotto. You can enter the Blue Grotto to tour it by small boat. Because of the special structure of the entrance, the seawater inside the cave is crystal blue. The surface seawater of the Blue Grotto shows a deep, serene blue, while the deeper seawater is sky blue, and the seawater sets off the rocks in the cave as all blue as well. When the weather is clear, the Blue Grotto is exceptionally beautiful and enchanting.
Note: The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction; if a high tide, wind and waves, or other factors cause the local marine weather authority to declare it closed, it cannot be visited. The Blue Grotto visit fee is not included in the tour. To avoid misunderstanding, in accordance with local custom, in addition to the manual boatman fee for the Blue Grotto, please pay a tip of 2-5 euros.

Capri is located near the southern entrance to the Bay of Naples and belongs to the Campania region of Italy. On the island are the remains of two medieval castles, Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as the church dedicated to San Costanzo, the island's patron saint; it is one of the famous tourist destinations of southern Italy. Capri's forests, waters, air, sunshine and the island villas coveted by the wealthy of the world have attracted people from all over the globe. Among them, the Blue Grotto is the attraction that everyone who comes to Capri will surely visit; when the sky is clear, sunlight shines into the cave, and every corner of the deep-blue cave is breathtakingly beautiful.

Located in the town of Capri, the Gardens of Augustus record the ten years Augustus lived here. On one side of the garden is a sheer cliff, and in the distance is the azure sea. On the left side of the garden is the Lovers' Rock; legend has it that this Lovers' Rock was originally a couple in love who, unable to be together, threw themselves into the sea one after another to die for love, and afterwards became these rocks leaning on and embracing each other.

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, embark on a charming day cruise to explore the treasures of the Amalfi Coast. Take a boat to Positano to explore the enchanting clifftop village, then take a boat to Amalfi to enjoy a panoramic view of the town on the Amalfi Coast. Afterwards take the boat back and check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: In the event of extreme weather at sea, for the safety of tourists, the cruise company will cancel the sea excursion to Positano and Amalfi. We will arrange a coach trip that day to visit the old town of Sorrento; Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the cruise fee will be refunded to the tourists.

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a quality choice for enjoying the Sorrento sea views, with magnificent views of the Bay of Sorrento and Naples. Surrounded by sea on three sides, it has a private beach and a private pier, two restaurants of different styles and a fully equipped marine spa center, and is within walking distance of the lively seaside town center; the hotel's pier is the mooring point for boat trips out to sea.

highlights.text_en:
[Paradise on Earth]: the Amalfi Coast
The Amalfi Coast is a World Heritage Site and has been rated by the American magazine National Geographic as one of the 51 beautiful places one must visit in a lifetime. Here there is a winding coastline and spectacular cliffs, and hidden medieval fishing towns, described as "highly dramatic." Here there are ancient medieval towns, famous for their distinctive culture and architecture. Among the popular towns are Amalfi, Positano, Ravello and Maiori. In these towns, you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers and temples, buildings whose history dates back several centuries, each with its own story.

attractions.text_en: Positano is a small town along the Amalfi Coast in the Campania region of Italy. The main part of the town sits with its back to the mountain and faces the sea. One writer described it this way: Positano is a dreamland; when you are there, she is not quite real, but after you leave, she comes vividly to life. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as the beautiful coast of Europe, with a winding and twisting coastline, towering and majestic mountains and islands rising from the shore, valleys interlocking with headlands, orchards coexisting with wild plants — within this pristine natural environment lies rich human history, and scattered through the dense mountain forests are many picturesque towns, the more beautiful of which is called Positano.

It is located along the coast of the province of Salerno in the Campania region of southern Italy; the town near the coast is called Amalfi, from which it takes its name. Seen as a whole, here half is the sea and half is sheer cliffs, on which are winding mountain roads and villas scattered in pleasing disarray.

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city of Pompeii and learn about the former Pompeian civilization. Afterwards head to Naples to tour the old town of Naples, the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and the Castel Nuovo (exterior). In the afternoon head to Rome and check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel or Mentana Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel or Mentana Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor swimming pool. It features cutting-edge architecture and modern interior design, with rooms furnished in modern or classical decor, all enjoying views of the garden, swimming pool or golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants offering exquisite international cuisine and traditional Italian fare; the tranquil setting effortlessly meets your varied needs, making it an ideal choice to relax body and mind.

highlights.text_en:
The ancient city of Pompeii | Asleep for a thousand years, still brilliant and resplendent when it awoke
The ancient city of Pompeii is located in the Campania region near the city of Naples in southern Italy. It was once a small fishing village, but because it was near an important Mediterranean port, with convenient transport and gathering merchants, by the 8th century BC it had already developed into the second largest city of the ancient Roman world. However, in 79 BC, with the eruption of Mount Vesuvius, volcanic ash and scorching lava instantly buried the ancient city of Pompeii, and the disaster claimed countless lives overnight. Only after more than a thousand years did the ancient city of Pompeii see the light of day again.

attractions.text_en: The amphitheatre at the eastern end of the ancient city was built around the 1st century BC and could hold nearly 20,000 people. It is one of the oldest among the ancient Roman amphitheatres, more than 40 years older than the Colosseum of Rome. It has three tiers of spectator seating, and the upper tier still preserves the pillars that once supported the canopy.

The ancient city of Pompeii was once a small-to-medium town with its back to the mountain and facing the sea, destroyed in an instant by the great eruption of Mount Vesuvius to the northwest. The town's streets and houses were buried by volcanic ash, yet the living scenes of the Pompeians of more than two thousand years ago were completely preserved, and only later was this vast site gradually excavated. Apart from various architectural relics, there are also some startling casts. People who perished in the eruption, their bodies wrapped in volcanic ash, decayed until only empty shells remained; archaeology injected plaster into these empty shells to make casts, showing the world the tragic state of Pompeii at the time.
This is a historical site within the ancient city of Pompeii. It was once a temple, but due to its great age only ruined walls remain, though the overall outline of the temple can still be made out.

attractions.name_en: Forum at the Temple of Apollo
attractions.text_en: Also called the public forum, this was once the political, economic and religious center of old Pompeii. The square hall on the square still retains some brick column bases; this was the former courthouse and place of commercial transactions. Opposite the hall is a Temple of Apollo, whose 48 Corinthian columns are well preserved, along with many exquisite frescoes. On the north side of the square is a Temple of Jupiter facing away from Mount Vesuvius, from which Mount Vesuvius can be clearly seen in the distance.

For most travelers, Naples's sea, cuisine and history are all important reasons that make them reluctant to leave. Naples was the most beloved city of the Italian writer Boccaccio; it is the birthplace of the songs "O Sole Mio" and "Torna a Surriento," and also the origin of pizza. Naples presents a different face to travelers from all over the world throughout the four seasons. Naples is also called "Napoli," which in Italian is "Napoli." Naples is the capital of the Campania region and the province of Naples, one of the most populous cities in Italy, abundant in lemons and grapes. At the same time, she is also an important tourist city of the Mediterranean, known as the "city of sun and joy." This is a source of inspiration for many artists and musicians, perhaps because of Mount Vesuvius, or perhaps because of Naples's quaint simplicity.

Castel Nuovo, also known as the Angevin Castle, was ordered to be built by the first king of the Kingdom of Naples. Castel Nuovo includes the Civic Museum (Museo Civico) as well as the castle ruins. The museum (mainly displaying paintings) is on the first floor; from the second floor you can see sea views; and the ground level is the Castel Nuovo ruins, with a transparent glass floor — travelers with a fear of heights should take particular care, as beneath the glass are the ancient architectural ruins and human bones. In addition, inside Castel Nuovo there is a Sala Dei Baroni (literally the Barons' Hall), the construction at the top of the room being very distinctive.

The Royal Palace of Naples sits in the bustling downtown, close to famous attractions such as Castel Nuovo and Castel dell'Ovo. Having gone through four dynasties, it looks very ordinary from the outside, but if you choose to go inside to visit, it will surely amaze you — this palace is extremely lavish, the whole color scheme being basically gold, yellow and purple, representing the nobility of the royal family. The palace has many, many rooms — the queen's bedchamber, the council hall, the study, and so on — and inside there are also many displays of royal items and paintings of the royal nobility. The most worth mentioning is the throne. Of all the things in this palace worth seeing, apart from the various paintings, it is this; words such as noble and elegant cannot simply describe it.

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off from Rome to tour the old town of Pienza, taking free photos along the cypress lane on the way, then tour Pius II Square, Pienza Cathedral (exterior) and other sights, before setting off for Siena to tour Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, Siena City Hall (exterior), the Torre del Mangia (exterior) and other sights.
Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel

accommodation.text_en:
Four Points by Sheraton Siena Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located on a quiet hilltop, surrounded by olive trees and gardens, with beautiful scenery and well suited to being close to nature. The rooms are laid with comfortable wooden floors, brightly designed and furnished with attractive, stylish interiors. At the same time the hotel has an exquisite restaurant serving classic Italian, local and Tuscan cuisine during dinner. The hotel's outdoor pool, fitness center and sauna all offer you an even more relaxing stay.

highlights.text_en:
The pastoral beauty of the Val d'Orcia and the medieval old town of Pienza
Close your eyes, and you will picture the classic scenery of Tuscany — blue sky and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and grapevines, and finally wheat fields — this is the perfect portrayal of the Val d'Orcia. From the city walls of the old town of Pienza, overlook the scenery of the World Heritage Site "Val d'Orcia."

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped bends and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of the Tuscan pastoral landscape. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows in the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and check in.

Pienza, a small town on the hills of the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. The Pienza that he presided over rebuilding in 1459 is regarded as a model of the "ideal city," and it is therefore hailed as "a touchstone of Renaissance urban life." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, Pienza's uniqueness lies in the fact that from its city walls one can overlook the scenery of the World Heritage Site "Val d'Orcia."

Siena, this medieval old town, is filled with masterpieces of great artists and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing stone-paved alleys and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you have stepped into medieval Europe a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprise. This city has, over several centuries, maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the 14th century. Apart from its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of sweets. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties — almond soft cookies ricciarelli, nut tart panforte, peppery spiced nut cake pan pepato, rice pudding budini di riso, walnut cookies cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!

The Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and is one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly opposite the square are the Siena City Hall and the tower; inside the City Hall is the Civic Museum, which holds numerous paintings of the Sienese School, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is the Torre del Mangia; it is the tallest building in Siena and the second tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via a staircase of 55 flights to take in the beautiful scenery of the city of Siena.

overview.text_en:
In the morning head to Pisa to tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli, the historical and cultural center of Pisa. Head to tour the Cinque Terre, touring the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs along the Ligurian coastline; afterwards check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: If bad weather, a railway company strike or other factors make it impossible to tour the Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically be changed to touring the coastal cities by coach or other means.

accommodation.text_en:
Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Hilton Florence is a modern hotel offering a Tuscan-style experience, with an excellent location giving access to Florence's business center to enjoy the city's bustle. From the terrace of the hotel's executive lounge you can admire magnificent views of Florence. Each guest room is decorated in a warm modern style; wooden floors and a spacious marble bathroom provide a high degree of comfort.

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a haven on the cliffs
Along the long Mediterranean coastline, stop at each beautiful fishing village, watch the sunlit beaches and the waves quietly lapping the rocks, as the colorful houses draw nearer from afar, and your curiosity to gaze upon the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak the moment you arrive. Once off the boat, walk on foot through the alleys of the fishing village; the closer you get, the more delightful the surprise. It is like savoring a visual feast of five colors and flavors, tasting each nuance bit by bit, the scene so beautiful it moves the heart.

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the free-standing bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy. Located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, it is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, and it has been selected by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. According to legend, in 1590 AD Galileo performed a free-fall experiment from the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.

Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square stand four great buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of San Giovanni, and the Pisa Cemetery (Camposanto). Around the square the ancient city walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa in Italy (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.

The Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five clifftop villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the world's beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers and taking around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other are the mountains, and ahead are the Italian fishing villages — it is a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, visit Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, to see the world's third-largest cathedral — the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (exterior), the Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, as well as the Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Afterwards head to Venice and check in at the hotel.
Overnight: voco Venezia by IHG or Hilton Garden Inn Venice, or an equivalent 4-star hotel

accommodation.text_en:
voco Venezia by IHG or Hilton Garden Inn Venice, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of the newly renovated hotels in Venice, with an excellent location, stylish modern design, and guest rooms with natural tones and modern interiors, offering you a comfortable and warm stay. The hotel offers a hearty breakfast, a well-equipped gym, and a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails; the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian dishes and cuisine.

highlights.text_en:
The glory and prosperity of Florence, the radiant brilliance of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Among the blue sky and white clouds, the brightly colored walls, the dark green shutters and the deep red roofs, seek the soul of the Renaissance, and in the streets and alleys, the squares and churches, the museums and art galleries, feel the agelessness of the Renaissance. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic spirit of Dante Alighieri and the painting spirit of Leonardo da Vinci still drift above Florence, still continuing to seek out the people and events of the European Renaissance..."

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few churches can be so charming. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets to the fullest the classical, elegant and free ideals championed by the Renaissance — no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.

The Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.

The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earlier large-span circular-arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over several centuries, it has stood unfallen through floods, social upheavals and wars. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.

The Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian luminaries such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring carefully. Around the square are many cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. The Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural activities and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.

overview.text_en:
In the morning, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior); these beautiful buildings built on the water, together with the winding water lanes, make Venice's romance linger long and refuse to fade. Afterwards head to Milan, the fashion capital.
Overnight: Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel

accommodation.text_en:
Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is set in a lush garden with fountains, palm trees and olive trees, blending classic elegance with modern style, making it a pleasant and relaxing city retreat. The hotel is within walking distance of a nearby large shopping center; the hotel's guest rooms are spacious and elegant, with a large marble bathroom with a bathtub, and the buffet breakfast is rich and varied. The Captain's Bar serves drinks and snacks all day, and the hotel has the glass-domed Blue Crab Grill restaurant serving international cuisine.

highlights.text_en:
Beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic," still dazzling and resplendent
Venice, as one of the major cities of the Renaissance, is made up of 118 small islands, connected together by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on the Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands" and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the world's beautiful squares, "St. Mark's Square," the beautiful Grand Canal, the phoenix-reborn La Fenice opera house, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs of Xu Zhimo's writing, and the breathtakingly beautiful loggias. This is the birthplace of the Venetian School of painting and also the filming location of many movie scenes; her unique character leaves every visitor utterly enchanted and reluctant to leave.

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Known in short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe and is a classic of Venetian architectural art; at the same time it is also a treasure house holding a rich collection of artworks.

This is a museum located in Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory is on display. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons; on the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look out through small holes — rather than, as on the bridge opposite, being one of the many people looking over at you crossing the Bridge of Sighs. Photos are allowed inside, as long as you do not use a flash.

The Bridge of Sighs was, in ancient times, the path that condemned prisoners had to take when escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style, shaped like a house, covered with a vault on top and tightly enclosed, with only two small windows facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried in the Doge's Palace, the felon was taken to the dungeon, and as he passed over this airtight bridge, he could only look at the blue sky through the small window — from then on losing his freedom and involuntarily letting out sighs. It is said that if lovers kiss beneath the bridge, they will be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.

It is the central square of Venice and was once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room of Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by magnificent palaces, and on the east side stand the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Church. Since ancient times, it has been the public activity center of Venice's politics, religion and traditional festivals.

overview.text_en: After breakfast, freely visit Milan's landmark building, the Milan Cathedral (exterior), and one of Europe's beautiful commercial arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, then conclude this wonderful journey.

accommodation.text_en: No hotel

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete; hailed as a magnificent Gothic building of Italy, its hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and its white marble exterior walls are carved with thousands of statues. The interior space is broad, and sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, the light dim and full of solemn religious atmosphere. In the crypt of the cathedral the remains of the Church of Santa Tecla on the original site are also preserved.

This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most tourists who come here come to sightsee. Under the central arcade there is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan, especially as the window displays are updated daily — simply standing outside the windows to admire them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is dotted with quite a few high-end restaurants, cafes and shops.

overview.text_en:
In the morning, visit the Louvre Museum, the pride of France, where a lecturer from the French National Museum will give an in-depth, curated thematic lecture.
In the afternoon, tour Notre-Dame de Paris, Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine River cruise to view Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), Place de la Concorde and other sites, spending the whole day touring the central attractions of Paris.
Overnight: Mercure Paris or Novotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，届时、将由法兰西国家馆讲解师，精选主题深度讲解；
下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛，埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris or Novotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Mercure or Novotel in Paris is a comfortable business hotel under the Accor group, located in the safer southern part of Paris with a convenient location for getting around. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers you a comfortable stay, drawing on its distinctive brand characteristics: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality monitoring, a unique hotel style deeply rooted in local character, and an enthusiastic management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店位于更为安全的巴黎南部，地理位置方便出行，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
Take a Seine River cruise and feel the gentleness and romance of Paris
Board the famous glass-cabin "Bateaux Mouches" cruise boat and sail along the Seine, which weaves together many sights. The 3.2-kilometer voyage of about 1 hour passes Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Elysees, Ile de la Cite and other famous sights. On the surface of the Seine you can feel the romantic night of Paris, the beautiful scenery and wonderful music; it is called "the in-depth tour of Paris not to be missed."
highlights.text_zh:
乘塞纳河游船，感受巴黎的温柔与浪漫
乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

attractions.text_en: If the Louvre witnessed the glory of the Gauls, then Ile de la Cite, Notre-Dame de Paris and the Paris City Hall wrote down the indissoluble bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Ile de la Cite. Without Ile de la Cite, there would be no Paris as it is today.
attractions.text_zh: 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: Notre-Dame Cathedral sits on Ile de la Cite in the heart of Paris and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The church is in the Gothic style, and visitors can climb the towers; although you will not meet the "Hunchback of Notre-Dame," you can see the 17th-century great bell, get up close to the mythical beasts on the church's exterior walls, and overlook the beautiful scenery of Ile de la Cite and the Seine.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西岱岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，游客可以登上塔楼参观，虽然遇不到“钟楼怪人”，但却能看到17世纪的大钟、近距离接触教堂外壁上的神兽、俯瞰西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。

attractions.text_en: It is one of the oldest museums in the world and a world-famous treasure house of art. The Louvre building is U-shaped, divided into a new part and an old part. The entrance at the glass pyramid in front of the Louvre was designed by the Chinese-American architectural master I.M. Pei. Here are housed more than 400,000 art treasures, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing art from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria, Rome to medieval Europe and the various countries of the East, making it an outstanding palace of art in human history. The itinerary includes standard individual-visitor tickets (without a Chinese audio guide).
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品、其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。 行程包含普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。

attractions.text_en:
The Champ de Mars is a large strip-shaped park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, lying between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the Ecole Militaire (Military School) to its southeast.
Before the second half of the 18th century, this was an abandoned open space; only after the Military School was established in 1765 did its status gradually rise, when its main purpose was to serve as a place for military training. On 17 July 1791, during the French Revolution, a massacre and bloodshed took place here. Later, France used this site to host several world expositions and the 1900 Olympic Games.
attractions.text_zh:
战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。
在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次的世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the symbol of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en: Board the famous glass-cabin "Bateaux Mouches" cruise boat and sail along the Seine, which weaves together many sights. The 3.2-kilometer voyage of about 1 hour passes Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Elysees, Ile de la Cite and other famous sights. On the surface of the Seine you can feel the romantic night of Paris, the beautiful scenery and wonderful music; it is called "the in-depth tour of Paris not to be missed."
attractions.text_zh: 乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the fashion center of Paris, Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, and freely visit fashionable districts such as the Paris Opera (exterior), Printemps department store, and Galeries Lafayette.
In the afternoon, head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris and tour the Palace of Versailles; then check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Mercure Paris or Novotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货，巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。
下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫；之后入住酒店。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris or Novotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Mercure or Novotel in Paris is a comfortable business hotel under the Accor group, located in the safer southern part of Paris with a convenient location for getting around. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers you a comfortable stay, drawing on its distinctive brand characteristics: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality monitoring, a unique hotel style deeply rooted in local character, and an enthusiastic management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店位于更为安全的巴黎南部，地理位置方便出行，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
Boulevard Haussmann in Paris
Boulevard Haussmann is a core area of Paris, with magnificent Haussmann-style architecture and a bustling commercial atmosphere, as well as a rich artistic ambiance. Galeries Lafayette and Printemps, the Paris Opera, the Hotel de la Paix, the Louvre pyramid, the Sainte-Anne gourmet district - here you can stroll and feel the commercial spirit of Paris, walking along Boulevard Haussmann and enjoying the delight of food, art and shopping.
highlights.text_zh:
巴黎奥斯曼大街
奥斯曼大街是巴黎的核心区域，这里有华丽的奥斯曼建筑群和繁华的商业氛围，以及浓郁艺术气息，老佛爷及巴黎春天，巴黎歌剧院，和平酒店、罗浮宫金字塔，圣安娜美食区，在这里可以漫步感受巴黎的商业气息，穿行在奥斯曼大街上，享受美食艺术和购物的欣喜。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the era of feudal rule in France. In terms of content it was not only the French court but also the administrative center of the state, and a concrete embodiment of the social and political views and way of life of France at the time. It was a manifestation of the power of an absolutist regime able to concentrate such enormous manpower, materials and finances as had not been seen in Europe since the ancient Roman Empire. At the time, in order to build it, Louis XIV employed more than 30,000 workers as well as architects, engineers and technicians. In addition to solving the complex technical problems arising from building such a large-scale complex, they also had to solve problems of water supply, roads and so on. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully demonstrates the progress of French economy and technology at the time and the wisdom of the working people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann is located between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are two major department stores, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, the author of "In Search of Lost Time," completed most of his writing of "In Search of Lost Time" in his residence at No. 102 on this street.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en:
Paris Opera [exterior]
The opera house was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861. Its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms such as the ancient Greco-Roman colonnade and the Baroque. Grand in scale, exquisite and meticulous, resplendent and magnificent, it is hailed as an opera house where painting, marble and gilding shine on one another, giving people great enjoyment. It is one of the typical buildings of Napoleon III.
attractions.text_zh:
巴黎歌剧院 【外观】
剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受。是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for Geneva, the capital of the French-speaking region of Switzerland. On arrival, tour the Old Town of Geneva, the Lake Geneva area, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau, and tour the "Flower Bridge" district where various local delicacies and specialty shops of Geneva gather. Then check in to the Novotel Geneva Port at Annemasse.
Overnight: Novotel Geneva Port at Annemasse or Crowne Plaza or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦，到达后游览日内瓦老城，日内瓦湖区，花钟和大喷泉景点，游览云集日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店“花桥”区域。随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店。
夜宿：安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Novotel Geneva Port at Annemasse or Crowne Plaza or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Novotel opened in 2020 and is a comfortable business hotel under the Accor group, with decor in harmony with its natural surroundings. Inspired by New York's innovative hotel concept, it includes a cafe and bakery area open to hotel guests and the public. The hotel has a restaurant offering healthy seasonal cuisine. At the Rooftop 46 bar on the 8th floor of the hotel, overlook the Alps and the Jura Mountains and enjoy happy hour.
accommodation.text_zh:
安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店
诺富特酒店于2020年开业，是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店的装饰与其自然环境相协调。受到纽约创新酒店概念的启发，它包括一个向酒店客人和公众开放的咖啡厅和面包店区。酒店设有一间餐厅，提供健康的时令美食。在酒店8 层的 Rooftop 46 酒吧俯瞰阿尔卑斯山和侏罗山脉，享受快乐时光。

highlights.text_en:
Old Town of Geneva
The upper town on the shore of Lake Geneva, with the scenic Lake Geneva and the majestic Alps, forms a poetic pastoral landscape. The beautiful scenery on the borders of the two countries changes and interweaves continuously along Lake Geneva - on one side Evian and Annemasse in France, on the other the old town of Geneva. The entire lake region is listed as a World Heritage Site, with one human heritage site after another and well-preserved medieval towns, the roads inlaid with stone slabs, and every small town and city having several fountains. Traditional house architecture and modern, novel shops interweave into one marvelous and exquisite experience after another.
highlights.text_zh:
日内瓦古城区
日内瓦湖畔的上城区，风光旖旎的日内瓦湖和雄伟的阿尔卑斯山，构成的诗意田园风光，两国国境秀丽风景沿日内瓦湖不断变化交错、一边是法国依云安娜玛斯一边是日内瓦的旧城，整个湖区被列为世界遗产，一座又一座的人类遗产以及保护得十分完好的中世纪小城，路上镶嵌着一块块的石板，每个小镇、小城都就有多处喷泉。传统的房屋建筑和摩登新颖的店家，交织成一处处美轮美奂的奇妙体验。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Leman, straddles Switzerland and France and is an important lake in Western Europe, as well as a famous scenic area and health resort. During the day you can take a cruise to tour Lake Geneva, and at night be intoxicated by the flickering neon lights along the shore; luxury cruise ships often hold concerts or balls on the lake. You can take a cruise to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shores of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, snow-capped mountains and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Jet d'Eau is located on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden and is one of the more representative sights of Geneva. The Jet d'Eau is like a column of water spouted by a whale, 140 meters high with a water flow of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away in the city center. At night there is also a chance to see the Jet d'Eau illuminated by lights, which is even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦比较具有代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous attraction in Geneva. Switzerland is known as the "Garden Country" and also the "Land of Clocks and Watches," and what is even more marvelous is that Switzerland's skilled craftsmen ingeniously combined the beauty of flowers with the craftsmanship of clock-making, originally creating the "Flower Clock."
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称“花园之国”，同时又是“钟表之乡”，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了“花钟”。

attractions.text_en: The upper town on the hillside on the right bank of the Rhone, because of its higher terrain, is also called the upper town by local residents. This is not only a gathering place of churches and historical monuments, but also has many small and lovely antique shops among the winding alleys. The former residence of Rousseau, a thinker of the European Enlightenment, is also located in the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Interlaken, located in the middle of Lake Brienz and Lake Thun, known as the "left and right eyes of God." You may freely tour Hoheweg Street, the Hohematte, the tranquil village dotted with green trees among mountains and waters where people and nature merge into one; or take the coach to the Grindelwald and Wilderswil Jungfrau mountain attractions; or take the panoramic cable car at your own expense to the summit of the Jungfrau - the Top of Europe, the higher railway station in Europe, and go to the "Sphinx Observation Deck" and the Aletsch Glacier; or go at your own expense to the Swiss alpine adventure town of First and tour the cliff Tissot Peak Walk. Then check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Sigriswil Snow Mountain Lake View Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往有“上帝左眼与右眼”之称的布里恩茨湖和图恩湖中央的因特拉肯，可自由游览何维克街，荷黑马特，宁静的村庄，绿树掩映，点缀在山水之间，人与自然浑然一体；或者随车前往格林德尔瓦尔德及维尔德斯维尔少女峰山区景点，或者自费乘坐全景缆车登顶少女峰——Top of Europe欧洲较高的火车站，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”及阿莱奇冰川；或者自费前往瑞士高山探险小镇菲斯特，游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道。之后前往入住酒店。
夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Sigriswil Snow Mountain Lake View Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the mountain ravine beside the panoramic bridge of Sigriswil. All rooms are decorated in an elegant Swiss country style, and the hotel's views satisfy one's imagination of Switzerland, with rooms enjoying views of Lake Thun, the surrounding mountains or the village of Sigriswil. Sitting in the hotel restaurant and gazing into the distance at the emerald waters of Lake Thun and the quiet reflection of the snow mountains, as if in a painting, lets one fully appreciate the wonderful, Shangri-La-like scenery of Switzerland.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于锡格里斯维尔（Sigriswil）全景桥旁边的山涧，所有的客房装饰为瑞士乡村典雅风格，酒店景观满足对瑞士的想象，客房客房享有图恩湖或周围群山或锡格里斯维尔村景致。坐在酒店的餐厅远眺碧绿的图恩湖水，宁静地倒影的雪山，恍然如画中，让人尽情欣赏瑞士世外桃源般的美好景致。

highlights.text_en:
The Jungfrau Region
As a famous representative tourist destination of Switzerland, the Jungfrau is not a single snow mountain, but a series of different Swiss landscapes surrounding the Jungfrau and Interlaken, encompassing various different snow mountain experiences and forming the wonderful and rich tourist areas of the Swiss Jungfrau, First, Grindelwald and other attractions. The Jungfrau summit panoramic cable car lets you feel all kinds of different experiences. The First aerial adventure park, as the originator of aerial adventure tourism projects, and the high-altitude paragliding not only adorn the snow mountains but also bring many thrilling activities to the younger crowd.
highlights.text_zh:
少女峰地区
作为瑞士著名的代表性旅游胜地，少女峰不是座雪山，而是围绕着少女峰、因特拉肯的一系列不同的瑞士风景组合，包含多种不同的雪山体验，成就了 精彩而丰富的瑞士少女峰 、 菲斯特，格兰维尔德等景点旅游景区。 少女峰登顶景观缆车，可以感受各种不同的体验。菲斯特空天冒险乐园，作为空天探险类旅游项目的始祖，而高空滑翔伞不仅仅装饰了雪山，还给年轻群体带来了许多的刺激活动。

attractions.text_en: The Hohematte is a green meadow square in the center of the town of Interlaken, the famous Swiss sightseeing town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery, and now any construction of buildings is prohibited to prevent the destruction of this beautiful landscape. This is a good place to view the Jungfrau; on the vast green meadow there is a fountain dotted with many benches, so it is also a good place for strolling. The Hohematte is also a landing spot for paragliding; at the edge of the lawn there is a reception point, and after paying, staff will take visitors to a nearby mountain for free flight, where you can enjoy the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is home to the famous postcard-photography spot of the Swiss "dream slope" most beloved by photographers, and is also an Alpine town that must be passed through when touring the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen and others, it forms the more magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing destination, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeside, green grass, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow mountains together make up this fascinating town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头较为喜爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald First attracts visitors from all directions to admire the magnificent scenery of the north slope of the Eiger. Standing on the famous First cliff Tissot Peak Walk, anyone will immediately feel they are standing at the top of the world. The cliff Tissot Peak Walk is located at the summit of First, where you can take in a unique panorama of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow all year round, while at the foot of the mountain the grass is lush and the scenery is beautiful, making it a famous sightseeing and outdoor sports destination in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the small town of Lungern and tour Lake Lungern and the town scenery. Then head to Lucerne and tour the lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, listen to the Lion Monument tell that piece of history of the Swiss people's loyalty and steadfastness, and visit the Chapel Bridge, the octagonal water tower and other attractions. Then head to Zurich and check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Zurich Limmattal Harry's Home Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。之后前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点。之后前往苏黎世入住酒店。
夜宿：苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Zurich Limmattal Harry's Home Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the scenic heart of the Limmattal, a modern urban residence next to one of the larger shopping centers in Switzerland. The hotel is equipped with a bar, and the rooms are spacious and tidy, with beautiful parquet floors and modern furniture, large wardrobes and many small ideas that make life easier. The hotel offers various buffet or continental breakfasts. The surrounding green valleys, rolling hills and the winding Limmat River provide you with a comfortable and natural stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在风景秀丽的利马塔尔中心地带，现代化的城市住宅，紧邻瑞士较大的购物中心，酒店配备酒吧，客房宽敞整洁，拥有漂亮的镶木地板和现代家具、大衣柜和许多让生活更轻松的小创意。酒店提供各类自助或欧陆式早餐。酒店周边绿意盎然的山谷、连绵起伏的丘陵和蜿蜒的利马特河，为您提供舒适自然的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
The Town of Lungern Beneath the Snow Mountains
As the filming location for the grand reunion ending of "Crash Landing on You," where the male and female leads spent "the happiest two weeks of the year," the saccharine-sweet Shangri-La of the protagonists, the transcendent beauty of Lake Lungern, seems tailor-made for that drama. The lake and mountain scenery like a paradise on earth, the filter-free beauty of Lake Lungern - if there is a Shangri-La, it must be in Lungern; the peaceful passing of time is nothing more than this.
highlights.text_zh:
雪山下的龙疆小镇
作为“爱的迫降”大团圆结局的取景地，剧中男女主角“一年中幸福的两周”都在这里度过，主角甜到齁的世外桃源，超然于世的龙疆湖美景，就像是为该剧量身定做的。人间天堂般的湖光山色，无滤镜的龙疆湖美景，如果有世外桃源，那一定在龙疆，岁月静好也不过如此。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous Golden Pass Line train passes through here. Surrounded by mountains, with lush green grass, the simple and unadorned village is scattered along the shores of Lake Lungern, just like a Shangri-La far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en:
Lake Lucerne
This lake's winding shape, together with the surrounding mountains, forms the classic scenery of "lakes and mountains" that has attracted large numbers of tourists. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's Piano Sonata No. 14 as the moonlight of Lake Lucerne, and so this piece acquired the title "Moonlight" - although this was not Beethoven's original intention.
attractions.text_zh:
卢塞恩湖
这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled against the mountains and water, Lucerne has the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance palaces and mansions, as well as century-old shops, long streets and ancient alleys are everywhere. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the beautiful scenery of the city in a way both illusory and real, making it the extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small towns. Since the 19th century, it has attracted many princes, nobles and men of letters to visit and reside, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: This dying lion sculpture was carved into the natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground, with a broken spear thrust into its shoulder, and beside it a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms. This sculpture commemorates the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on 10 August 1792 to protect the safety of the Louis XVI family in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; below the sculpture there is text describing the course of this event. In those years, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, pressed by their livelihood, went to serve as mercenaries in various European countries.
