Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave in battle, but honor and money could not cover up the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, retaining only the guards serving the Catholic Holy See, which is the famous Swiss Guard. Because of their famous loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has continued to serve to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving sculpture in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, tour the attractions of Zurich's old town: Grossmunster (exterior), Lake Zurich, Bahnhofstrasse. Then set off for the fashion capital, Milan. On arrival, freely visit Milan's iconic building, the Milan Cathedral (exterior), and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of the most beautiful shopping arcades in Europe.
Overnight: Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，游览苏黎世老城景点：苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街。之后出发前往时尚之都-米兰，到达后自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。
夜宿：皇家花园酒店 或同等 4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is set in a lush garden with fountains, palm trees and olive trees, blending classic elegance with modern style, making it a delightful and relaxing urban resort. The hotel is within walking distance of a nearby large commercial center; the hotel's rooms are spacious and elegant, with large marble bathrooms with bathtubs. The buffet breakfast is rich and varied, the Captain's Bar offers drinks and snacks all day, and the hotel has the glass-domed Blue Crab Grill restaurant serving international cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
皇家花园酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在郁郁葱葱的花园中，花园内有喷泉、棕榈树和橄榄树，将经典优雅与现代风格融为一体，是一处令人愉悦而轻松的城市度假胜地。酒店可步行至附近的大型商业中心；酒店的客房宽敞而优雅，设有带浴缸的大型大理石浴室，自助早餐丰盛多样，Captain's Bar 全天供应饮料和小吃，酒店设有玻璃圆顶的 Blue Crab Grill 餐厅，供应国际美食。

highlights.text_en:
Behold the Milan Cathedral, Which Took 500 Years to Build and Is World-Famous for Its Many Exquisite Carvings and Gothic Spires
Construction began in 1386, and it is an iconic building in the center of Milan. The main body of the cathedral took more than four centuries before being essentially completed in 1812, while detail work continued until 1960 when a bronze door of the cathedral was installed. The passage of time has not only endowed it with the vicissitudes of history, but has also created multiple styles for it - Gothic spires paired with Baroque carvings, extravagant from top to bottom.
highlights.text_zh:
瞻仰历经500年建成，以众多精美的雕刻和哥特式的塔尖而闻名于世的米兰大教堂
始建于1386年，是米兰市中心的标志性建筑。教堂主体历经4个多世纪才于1812年基本完工，而细节工程则一直持续到1960年安装完成教堂的一扇铜门为止。岁月不仅赋予了它历史的沧桑，同时也为它营造出多重的风格样式，哥特式的尖塔搭配巴洛克风格的雕饰，自上而下，极尽奢华。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. The docks on the lake are filled with all kinds of yachts, just like a rich people's club. One end of Lake Zurich extends deep into the city center; on the lake surface white swans and wild ducks are everywhere, leisurely and carefree, a harmonious scene. The north shore of Lake Zurich is a residential area for the wealthy, known as the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." The end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich; as a "world's most livable city," the life of true Zurichers is permeated everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also called Station Street) is one of the longer shopping avenues in Europe and one of the most expensive shopping avenues in the world. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless center of Zurich, where luxury brands from all over the world are everywhere and private banks stand in rows. Walking along Bahnhofstrasse in Zurich, countless tourists feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored a quantity of gold bars said to be among the world's largest, making many people too excited to move their feet. Immersed in it, you can clearly feel the air filled with the aura of wealth, luxury and ease.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: The Grossmunster is one of the three main churches in Zurich, Switzerland (the other two are the Fraumunster and Zurich's). The church is located near the bank of the Limmat River; construction began around 1100 and it was inaugurated around 1220. This church, which faces the Fraumunster across the river, played a pivotal role in the Swiss Reformation of the 16th century; the theology faculty of the University of Zurich and the Museum of the Reformation are both established here. The stained glass inside the church is a masterpiece by the Swiss modern art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most tourists who come here come for sightseeing. Under the central arcade there is a Prada boutique whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan; in particular the window displays are updated daily, and just standing outside the windows to admire them is a great pleasure. The Galleria is full of high-end restaurants, cafes and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete; it is hailed as a magnificent Gothic building of Italy, with hundreds of spires soaring into the clouds and thousands of statues carved on its white marble exterior walls. The interior space is vast; sunlight enters through the beautiful stained glass mosaics on the windows, the light is hazy and full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the crypt of the cathedral there still remain the ruins of the original Church of St. Thecla on the site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for the water city of Venice. On arrival, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings built on the water, together with the winding waterways, make the romantic charm of Venice linger long. Here you can also taste Venice's specialty cuisine, the three-course cuttlefish ink pasta (at your own arrangement).
Overnight: voco Venice InterContinental Hotel or Hilton Ambassador Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往水城威尼斯，到达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝到威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
voco Venice InterContinental Hotel or Hilton Ambassador Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of the newly renovated hotels in Venice, with an excellent location and stylish modern design. The rooms have natural tones and modern interiors, offering you a comfortable and cozy stay. The hotel offers a hearty breakfast, a fully equipped gym, a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails, and the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian dishes and delicacies.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en:
The Most Beautiful Venice in the World, the "Pearl of the Adriatic" Still Dazzlingly Resplendent
Venice, as one of the important towns of the Renaissance, is made up of 118 small islands, connected into one by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "city on the water," "city of a hundred islands," and "city of bridges." Here is "St. Mark's Square," one of the most beautiful squares in the world, the beautiful Grand Canal, the phoenix-reborn La Fenice opera house, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs from Xu Zhimo's writings, and corridors so beautiful they take your breath away. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting, and also the filming location of many movie scenes; her unique temperament makes everyone who visits enchanted and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Known in short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. Begun in 829 AD and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe and is a classic of Venetian architectural art; it is also a treasure house with a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through small holes, rather than having so many people on the bridge opposite looking at you on the Bridge of Sighs. Inside you are allowed to take photos, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was, in ancient times, the route that death-row prisoners had to pass when being escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered with a vault on top and very tightly enclosed, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was sentenced at the Doge's Palace, the serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and when passing this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows, losing their freedom from then on and involuntarily letting out a sound of sighs. It is said that lovers who kiss under the bridge can be together forever, and the movie "A Little Romance" was filmed here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe" by Napoleon. The square is surrounded on three sides by magnificent palaces, and on the east side rise the tall campanile and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the public activity center for Venice's politics, religion and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for the birthplace of the Renaissance - Florence. Visit the attractions of Florence's old town: the third largest church in the world - the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), then check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观佛罗伦萨老城景点：世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥、圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后入住酒店。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Hilton Florence Metropole Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Hilton Florence is a modern hotel experiencing the Tuscan style, with an excellent location to reach Florence's commercial center and enjoy the prosperity of Florence. The terrace of the hotel's executive lounge offers magnificent views of Florence. Each room is decorated in a warm modern style; the wooden floors and spacious marble bathrooms provide greater comfort.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店
佛罗伦萨希尔顿酒店是一家体验托斯卡纳风格的现代化酒店，地理位置优越，可前往佛罗伦萨商业中心，享受佛罗伦萨的繁华。酒店行政酒廊的露台上可欣赏到佛罗伦萨的壮丽景色。每间客房均采用温馨的现代风格装饰；木地板和宽敞的大理石浴室可获得较大的舒适度。

highlights.text_en:
The Glory and Prosperity of Florence, the Shining Brilliance of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Search for the soul of the Renaissance among the blue sky and white clouds, brightly colored walls, dark green shutters and deep red roofs; feel the timelessness of the Renaissance in the streets and alleys, squares and churches, museums and art galleries. As the writer Chen Yunhe said: "The poetic soul of Dante Alighieri and the painting soul of Da Vinci still drift in the skies of Florence, still continuing to seek out the people and events of the European Renaissance period....."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利．但丁的诗魂、达．芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queue required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few churches can be so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets the classicism, elegance and freedom esteemed in the Renaissance era to the fullest, so it is no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located just to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River is also called the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earlier large-span arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante met the maiden Beatrice here and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over the centuries, it has experienced floods, social upheavals and wars yet remained standing. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space continuing from the Renaissance to the present day. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce, a Gothic building that is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo; the frescoes and sculptures inside are worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are several cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural activities and festivals, especially in summer, when open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture and feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off to tour Cinque Terre, traveling along the Ligurian coastline to tour the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs; in the afternoon, head to Pisa and tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli in Pisa's historical and cultural center, then head to Siena and check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: If Cinque Terre cannot be toured due to factors such as bad weather or a railway company strike, the itinerary will automatically be changed to touring the coastal cities by coach or other means.
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。
夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located on a quiet hilltop, surrounded by olive trees and gardens, with a beautiful environment suitable for getting close to nature. The rooms are laid with comfortable wooden floors, with a bright design and beautifully arranged stylish interiors. The hotel also has an exquisite restaurant serving classic Italian, local and Tuscan cuisine during dinner. The hotel's outdoor pool, fitness center and sauna all provide you with a more relaxing stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，环境优美且适合亲近自然。客房铺设舒适的木质地板， 设计明亮，摆设美观的时尚内装，同时酒店配有精致的餐厅，在晚餐时段供应经典的意大利、当地和托斯卡纳美食。酒店的室外泳池、健身中心以及桑拿浴室都为您提供更加放松的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's Beautiful Fishing Villages, a Shangri-La on the Cliffs
Along the long coastline of the Mediterranean, the little train stops at each beautiful fishing village. Watching the sun-bathed beaches, the waves quietly lapping against the rocks, the colorful houses approaching from afar, the curiosity of looking out at the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak at the moment of arrival. Walking on foot through the alleys of the fishing villages, the closer you get the more surprised you are. It is like savoring carefully a colorful, delicious visual feast, bit by bit tasting the flavor within; this scene is so beautiful it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线小火车在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located along the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for the five cliffside villages and towns of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that links the five villages together, built along the coast; it is one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 kilometers, taking around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other side are the mountains, and ahead are the Italian fishing villages, making it a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the free-standing bell tower of the Cathedral of Pisa, Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in Tuscany, Italy. It is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, and was selected as a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. Legend has it that in 1590 AD, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, with four major buildings on the square: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (cemetery). Around the square, the ancient city walls and gates are still preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off for the old town of Siena and tour Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, Siena Town Hall (exterior), the Torre del Mangia (exterior) and other attractions. After lunch, head to the old town of Pienza to tour Piazza Pio II, Pienza Cathedral (exterior), then head to Rome, taking free photos along the cypress path on the way. After arriving in Rome, check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Mantegna Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。午餐后前往皮恩扎古城参观游览二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观），之后前往罗马，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后入住酒店。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Mantegna Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor swimming pool, with a cutting-edge architectural style and modern interior design. The rooms are furnished with modern or classical decor, and all rooms enjoy views of the garden, swimming pool or golf course. In addition, the hotel has multiple restaurants offering exquisite dishes of international flavors and traditional Italian cuisine; the hotel environment is tranquil, easily satisfying your diverse needs, all making it an ideal choice for you to relax body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The Pastoral Scenery of the Val d'Orcia and the Medieval Old Town of Pienza
Close your eyes and you will imagine the classic scenery of Tuscany - blue sky and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and grapevines, and finally wheat fields - this is the perfect portrayal of the Val d'Orcia. From the walls of the old town of Pienza, overlook the scenery of the World Heritage Site "Val d'Orcia."
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old town, is full of the masterpieces of art masters and classical medieval architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing stone-paved alleys and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you seem to be transported to medieval Europe a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprise. Over the centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the 14th century. In addition to its unique scenery and artistic collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, do not forget to taste the local specialties - ricciarelli almond soft cookies, panforte nut tarts, pan pepato peppery spiced nut cake, budini di riso rice pudding, cavallucci walnut cookies, or copate walnut wafers!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the larger existing medieval squares in Europe. Directly opposite the square is the Siena Town Hall and tower; inside the town hall is the Civic Museum, which houses many paintings of the Sienese school, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is the Torre del Mangia; it is the tallest building in Siena and the second tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 levels of steps and take in the beautiful scenery of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳较高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: The Torre del Mangia is adjacent to the town hall and is one of the tallest medieval towers in Italy. In the mid-14th century, the outbreak of the Black Death in the city claimed nearly two-thirds of the population and dealt a huge blow to the city's development. After the disaster, the survivors added a marble loggia to the tower to commemorate the Virgin Mary. There are 332 narrow steps inside the tower, allowing one to climb to the top and take in the scenery of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 曼吉亚塔楼紧邻市政厅，是意大利中世纪较高的塔楼。14世纪中期，城内黑死病的爆发夺走了近2/3的人口，也使城市发展受到巨大打击。灾难过后，幸存者们为塔楼加上一个大理石的凉廊，以此来纪念圣母玛利亚。楼内共有332级狭窄的台阶，可以攀登到顶，一览锡耶纳风光。

attractions.text_en: Pienza is a municipality in the Province of Siena, Tuscany region, central Italy, adjacent to Montalcino. It was the earliest ideal town of the Renaissance, founded by Pope Pius II, whose purpose at the time was to renovate his poor hometown and use it as the Pope's summer retreat. In 1996, it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List. The architecture here is in the Gothic style and is influenced by the German style. The town's main square is Piazza Pio II, which contains the major 15th-century buildings, such as the cathedral (built 1459-1462), the Piccolomini Palace, the Bishop's Palace, and the town hall with a crenellated tower (built 1462).
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎（Pienza）是意大利中部托斯卡纳大区锡耶纳省的一个市镇，毗邻蒙塔尔奇诺，它是文艺复兴时期最早的理想小镇，由罗马教皇PiusII创立，当时创立的目的是为了翻新给他贫穷的家乡并把此作为罗马教皇的避暑地。1996年，被列入联合国世界遗产名录。这里的建筑呈哥特风，并受德式风格的影响。小镇的主要广场是PiazzaPioII，广场里包含15世纪的主要建筑，如教堂（建于1459-1462）、皮科洛米尼宫（PiccolominiPalace、主教宫、带有锯齿形塔的大会堂（建于1462）。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress path, a country road lined with Italian cypresses on both sides, with uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and check in.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns. It is a unique meeting of art and nature, containing rich historical traces; its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the Italian city-state concept of "good government."
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, led by a guide, tour on foot the world-famous historical and cultural city of Rome. This is the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, called the "Eternal City" because of its long history. Visit the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior) standing on the ruins of the ancient Roman capital, and tour the Spanish Square and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Afterwards, free activities; head to the hotel to check in around 16:30.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Mantegna Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Due to the protection of the buildings of ancient Rome, vehicles are prohibited from driving, and most areas are pedestrian zones. All attractions in the Rome city area are within the ancient city of Rome, and the day's tour of Rome is on foot, with a walking distance of about 5-6 kilometers.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，在导游的带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。后自由活动，16:30左右前往入住酒店。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注： 由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，而罗马市区内的所有景点都在古罗马城内，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Mantegna Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor swimming pool, with a cutting-edge architectural style and modern interior design. The rooms are furnished with modern or classical decor, and all rooms enjoy views of the garden, swimming pool or golf course. In addition, the hotel has multiple restaurants offering exquisite dishes of international flavors and traditional Italian cuisine; the hotel environment is tranquil, easily satisfying your diverse needs, all making it an ideal choice for you to relax body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
An In-Depth Visit to Rome, an Important Birthplace of World Culture
In the ancient ruins that occupy about half the area of the city district, seek out the historical civilization sedimented over thousands of years. Whether it is the world-famous architectural ruins formed by the imperial Senate, triumphal arches, victory columns, the Pantheon and the Colosseum, or the many exquisite Renaissance buildings and art treasures housed in over a hundred museums, or even the city's many fountains in myriad poses represented by the Trevi Fountain, or the vast roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares, public baths and other public buildings, all freeze art in that wonderful moment. Someone said "architecture is flowing music," and the architecture of ancient Rome plays a vigorous and timeless movement.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的就是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum located in the center of Rome was built by ancient Rome to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great ancient Roman Empire. It was a place exclusively for slave owners, nobles and freemen to watch beast fights or slave gladiatorial combat, and is one of the more famous historical ruins of Rome. The Colosseum can be called a model masterpiece and miracle in architectural history, famous throughout the world for being huge, majestic and spectacular. Although only most of the skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and magnificent momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马较著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is the best-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman king Vittorio Emanuele II, Umberto I and others rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, the son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus, and can be called a classic building of the Augustan period. It is a model of the consummate building techniques of ancient Rome, and was praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in a scene of the movie "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Hepburn's fresh and beautiful figure seems to have merged with the Spanish Square and the beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never erase. The whole Spanish Square is not large in area; the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The whole flight of steps has 138 levels and is the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also called the "Maiden Fountain," or the "Wishing Pool," with the theme of the sea god Neptune from Roman mythology returning victorious; the whole thing is grand in momentum and majestic. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, if you can throw it into the water, your dream will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Naples or Sorrento and take a ferry to the port of Capri. On the same day, either walk along the seaside on your own, or go on your own to tour the Blue Grotto, or take a boat on your own to circle the island and explore the Blue Grotto, or go on your own into the town of Capri to tour the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) and overlook the entire bay; afterwards, take the ferry back to the Sorrento pier and head to the hotel to check in.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
After landing on Capri, free activities, with no transportation fees included. The recommended route is the one-way route Marina Grande - the old town of Capri - the Gardens of Augustus, a mountain road of about 1.3 kilometers passing through three important attractions; there are cable cars and taxis along the way, requiring additional payment.
The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural landscape; if it is closed due to high tide, wind and waves or other factors as announced by the local marine meteorological agency, it cannot be visited. The Blue Grotto tour fee is not included in the tour group; to avoid misunderstanding, according to local custom, in addition to the Blue Grotto boatman's fee, please pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往那不勒斯或索伦托乘坐渡船到达卡普里岛港口。当天或自行前往海边漫步后或自行前往蓝洞游览，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园（外观），俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船返回索伦托码头，前往酒店入住。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
卡布里岛登岛后自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港 -卡布里古城 - 奥古斯都花园单程路线约1.3公里的山路，途径三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车，需要额外付费。
卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is an excellent choice for enjoying the sea views of Sorrento, with magnificent views of the Bay of Sorrento and Naples. The hotel is surrounded by sea views on three sides, with a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles and a fully equipped marine SPA center. It is within walking distance of the lively seaside town center, and the hotel pier is the mooring point for sea-going yachts.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
The Blue Wonder of Capri, the "Blue Grotto"
Since ancient Roman times, Capri has been a famous tourist and health resort. Emperor Augustus, on his way back after concluding his campaign in the East, once landed on this island and was so won over by its beautiful environment and pleasant climate that he did not hesitate to exchange the island of Ischia, four times the size, for Capri as his own summer retreat. Capri has a limestone terrain, with sheer cliffs and many peculiar caves among the rocks, of which the more famous is the "Blue Grotto." The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world. The entrance to the Blue Grotto is at the bottom of a cliff; the entrance is very small and can only be entered by small boat. Due to the special structure of the entrance, on one hand sunlight can enter the cave through the entrance, and on the other hand it is reflected up from the bottom of the water inside the cave, so the seawater inside the cave is a crystal blue, mysterious and unfathomable, and even the rocks inside the cave turn blue, hence the name "Blue Grotto." To visit the Blue Grotto you must choose the right timing: first the weather must be clear; second you must go at low tide; third there must be no wind or waves.
highlights.text_zh:
卡普里岛蓝色奇观“蓝洞”
卡普里岛从古罗马时期开始,这里就是著名的旅游疗养胜地，奥古斯都大帝在东方战役结束后的归途中曾在该岛登陆，被这里的优美环境、宜人气候所折服，不惜以4倍的伊斯基亚岛换取卡普里岛，作为自己的避暑之地。卡普里岛属于石灰质地形，岩石峭立，岩石间有许多奇特的岩洞，其中较著名的就是“蓝洞”。蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一。蓝洞的洞口在悬崖的下面，洞口很小，只能乘坐小船才能进入。由于洞口的特殊结构，一方面阳光可以从洞口进入洞内，一方面又从洞内水底反射上来，因此洞内的海水一片晶蓝，神秘莫测，连洞内的岩石也变成了蓝色，故称“蓝洞”。参观蓝洞一定要选择时机:一要天气晴朗;二要在退潮的时候去，三要没有风浪。

attractions.text_en:
The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world and is the more famous attraction of Capri; many people's purpose in going to Capri is just to behold the wonder of the Blue Grotto. You can take a small boat into the Blue Grotto to tour it; due to the special structure of the entrance, the seawater inside the cave is a crystal blue. The surface water of the Blue Grotto presents a deep, dark blue, while the deeper seawater is sky blue, and the seawater sets off the rocks in the cave as also entirely azure. When the weather is clear, the Blue Grotto is exceptionally beautiful and enchanting.
The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural landscape; if it is closed due to high tide, wind and waves or other factors as announced by the local marine meteorological agency, it cannot be visited. The Blue Grotto tour fee is not included in the tour group; to avoid misunderstanding, according to local custom, in addition to the Blue Grotto boatman's fee, please pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
attractions.text_zh:
蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，是卡普里较著名的景点，很多人去卡普里的目的就是为了一睹蓝洞奇观。可乘小船进入蓝洞游览，由于洞口的特殊结构，使得洞里的海水一片晶蓝。蓝洞表层的海水呈现幽幽的深蓝色，而深层海水却是天蓝色的，海水映衬得洞中的岩石也都一片蔚蓝。天气晴朗的时候，蓝洞分外的美丽和妖娆。
卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

attractions.text_en: Capri is located near the southern entrance to the Bay of Naples and belongs to the Campania region of Italy. On the island there are the medieval castle ruins of Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as the church dedicated to the island's patron saint, San Costanzo, making it one of the famous tourist destinations of southern Italy. Capri's forests, waters, air, sunshine and the island villas most longed for by the world's rich have attracted people from all over the world. Among them, the Blue Grotto is an attraction that everyone who comes to Capri will surely visit; when the sky is clear and the air fresh, sunlight shines into the cave, and every corner of the deep blue cave is beautiful beyond compare.
attractions.text_zh: 卡普里岛位于那不勒斯湾南部入海口附近，属意大利坎佩尼亚区。岛上有巴巴罗萨和卡斯蒂利奥内两座中世纪城堡遗迹以及供奉该岛守护神圣科斯坦佑的教堂，是意大利南部著名的游览胜地之一。卡普里岛的森林、水域、空气、阳光和较令全世界富豪憧憬的岛屿别墅，曾吸引了来自世界各地的人们，其中蓝洞是每一个人来卡普里岛一定会参观的景点，天清气朗时，阳光照射入洞穴，深蓝的洞穴内每一处角落都美不胜收。

attractions.text_en: The Gardens of Augustus, located in the town of Capri, record the ten years of Augustus's life living here. One side of the garden is a cliff, and in the distance is the azure sea. On the left side of the garden are the Lovers' Rocks; legend has it that these Lovers' Rocks were originally lovers in love who, unable to be together, threw themselves into the sea one after another to die for love, and afterwards became these rocks leaning on and clinging to each other.
attractions.text_zh: 位于卡普里小镇上的奥古斯都花园记录着奥古斯都在这里居住的十年生活。花园一侧是断壁，远处则是碧蓝的海水。在花园的左侧是情人石，相传这情人石原本是相爱的恋人，因无法恋爱纷纷跳入海中殉情，之后就成了这相依相偎的石头。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, embark on a charming day tour of the Amalfi Coast and explore the treasures of the Amalfi Coast. Take a boat to Positano and explore the charming cliffside village, then take a boat to Amalfi to admire the panorama of the Amalfi Coast town. Afterwards, take the boat back and check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: In case of extreme weather conditions at sea, for the safety of tourists, the cruise company will cancel the sea tour activities to Positano and Amalfi, and our agency will arrange a coach tour of the old town of Sorrento that day, with Positano and Amalfi unable to be visited; the sea cruise fee will be refunded to the tourists.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，踏上迷人的阿马尔菲海岸一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，然后乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景。之后乘船返回，入住酒店。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is an excellent choice for enjoying the sea views of Sorrento, with magnificent views of the Bay of Sorrento and Naples. The hotel is surrounded by sea views on three sides, with a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles and a fully equipped marine SPA center. It is within walking distance of the lively seaside town center, and the hotel pier is the mooring point for sea-going yachts.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
[Paradise on Earth]: The Amalfi Coast
The Amalfi Coast is a World Cultural Heritage Site, and was rated by America's "National Geographic" magazine as one of the 51 beautiful places one must visit in a lifetime. Here there are winding coastlines and spectacular cliffs, as well as hidden medieval fishing towns, described as "highly dramatic." Here there are ancient medieval towns famous for their unique culture and architecture. Among the more popular towns are Amalfi, Positano, Ravello and Maiori. In these towns, you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers and temples, whose history dates back several centuries, and each building has its own story.
highlights.text_zh:
【人间天堂】：阿马尔菲海岸
阿马尔菲海岸是一处世界文化遗产，更被美国《国家地理》杂志评为一生中必须去的51个美丽的地方之一。这里有蜿蜒的海岸线和壮观的悬崖峭壁，还隐藏着中世纪渔业小镇，被形容为“高度戏剧性”。这里有着古老的中世纪小镇，这些小镇以其独特的文化和建筑而著名。其中较受欢迎的小镇包括阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和莱马尼。在这些小镇中，你可以看到许多古老的教堂、城堡、钟楼和神殿，这些建筑物的历史可以追溯到几个世纪以前，每个建筑都有着自己的故事。

attractions.text_en: Positano is a small town located along the Amalfi Coast in the Campania region of Italy. The main part of the town backs onto the mountains and faces the sea; a writer described it thus: Positano is a dreamland - when you are there, it does not seem very real, but after you leave, it becomes vivid and lifelike. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as the most beautiful beach in Europe; here the coastline winds and twists, with mountains and islands rising majestically along the shore, valleys interlacing with headlands, orchards coexisting with wild plants. In the pristine natural environment there is a rich human history, and many picturesque towns are scattered among the dense mountain forests, and the most beautiful one is called Positano.
attractions.text_zh: 波西塔诺是位于意大利坎帕尼亚大区阿马尔菲海岸‎沿岸的一个小镇。城镇主要部份背山面海，一位作家这样形容：波西塔诺是一个梦乡，你在时，她不是很真切，你离开后，她变的栩栩如生。阿马尔菲海岸被誉为欧洲美丽的海滩，这里的海岸线蜿蜒曲折，岸上山岛耸峙巍峨，山谷与海岬交错，果园与野生植物并存，原生态的自然环境中有丰富的人文历史，浓密山林中散落着许多如诗如画的小镇，而其中较漂亮的那一个叫做波西塔诺。

attractions.text_en: It is located on the coast of the Province of Salerno in the Campania region of southern Italy; the small town near the coast is called Amalfi, hence the name. Looking at it as a whole, here one half is the sea and the other half is sheer cliffs, on which are winding mountain roads and villas arranged in a scattered, picturesque manner.
attractions.text_zh: 它位于意大利南部坎帕尼亚区萨莱诺省沿海，接近海岸的小镇叫阿马尔菲(Amalfi)，由此得名。整体看去，这里一半是大海，一半是绝壁，绝壁上是蜿蜒的盘山公路和错落有致的别墅。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city of Pompeii and learn about the once-thriving Pompeian civilization. Then head to Naples to tour the old town of Naples, the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and the Castel Nuovo (exterior). In the afternoon, head to Rome to end this pleasant journey.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明。之后前往那不勒斯游览那不勒斯老城，那不勒斯皇宫（外观）、新堡（外观）。下午前往罗马，结束愉快旅程。

accommodation.text_en: No hotel
accommodation.text_zh: 无酒店

highlights.text_en:
The Ancient City of Pompeii | Slumbering for a Thousand Years, Still Brilliant and Resplendent When It Awoke
The ancient city of Pompeii is located in the Campania region near the city of Naples in southern Italy. It was once a small fishing village, but because it was near an important port of the Mediterranean, with convenient transportation and gathered merchants, by the 8th century BC it had already developed into the second largest city of ancient Rome. However, in 79 BC, with the eruption of Mount Vesuvius, the volcanic ash and scorching lava instantly buried the ancient city of Pompeii, and the disaster cost countless lives in a single night. Only after more than a thousand years did the ancient city of Pompeii see the light of day again.
highlights.text_zh:
庞贝古城丨沉睡千年，醒时依旧灿烂辉煌
庞贝古城位于意大利南部那不勒斯市附近的坎帕尼亚大区，曾经是一个小渔村，由于靠近地中海的重要港口，交通便利，商贾云集，在公元前8世纪，就已经发展成了古罗马城的第二大城市。然而在公元前79年，随着维苏威火山的爆发，火山灰与炽热的岩浆瞬间掩埋了庞贝古城，灾难让无数生灵一夜之间丧生。历经一千多年之后，庞贝古城方得重见天日。

attractions.text_en: The ancient city of Pompeii was once a small-to-medium town backing onto mountains and facing the sea, which was destroyed overnight by the great eruption of Mount Vesuvius to its northwest. The town's streets and houses were buried by volcanic ash, yet the living scenes of the Pompeians of more than two thousand years ago were completely preserved, and later this vast site was gradually excavated. In addition to various architectural ruins, there are also some shocking cast figures. The people who perished when the volcano erupted, their bodies decayed by being wrapped in volcanic ash leaving only empty shells; archaeology injected these empty shells with plaster to make cast figures, showing the world the tragic state of Pompeii at the time.
attractions.text_zh: 庞贝古城曾是一座背山面海的中小城镇，因西北边的维苏威火山大爆发而毁于一旦。城镇街道、房屋被火山灰掩埋，却完整保留了两千年多前庞贝人的生活场景，后来这座庞大的遗址才被渐渐发掘出来。除各种建筑遗迹外，还有一些触目惊心的铸像。在火山爆发时遇难的人，因被火山灰包裹而身体腐朽得只剩空壳，考古学把这些空壳注入石膏、做成铸像，向世人展示庞贝当时的惨状。

attractions.text_en: This is a historical site within the ancient city of Pompeii. It was once a temple, but because of its great age only broken walls and remnants remain; however, the overall outline of the temple is still discernible
attractions.text_zh: 这是庞贝古城内的一处历史遗址，这里曾经是一座寺庙，但因为年代久远只剩下残垣断壁了，但寺庙的整体轮廓还是看得出的

attractions.name_en: Forum at the Center of the Temple of Apollo
attractions.text_en: Also called the public forum, this was once the political, economic and religious center of old Pompeii. The square basilica on the square still retains some brick-built column bases; this was the former site of the law court and commercial trading. Opposite the basilica is a Temple of Apollo, inside which the 48 Corinthian columns are well preserved, along with many exquisite frescoes. On the north side of the square is a Temple of Jupiter with its back to Mount Vesuvius, from which Mount Vesuvius can be clearly viewed.
attractions.text_zh: 也称公共广场，这里曾经是昔日庞贝的政治、经济、宗教中心，广场上的方形会堂还残留着一些砖砌的圆柱底座，此处是以前的法院与商业交易场所。会堂的对面是一座阿波罗神殿，里面的48根科林斯式圆柱保存完好，还有许多精美的壁画。广场北侧有一座背对着维苏威火山的丘比特神殿，可以清楚的眺望维苏威火山。

attractions.text_en: For most travelers, the sea, food and history of Naples are all important reasons that make people reluctant to leave. Naples is the most beloved city of the Italian writer Boccaccio; this is the birthplace of the songs "O Sole Mio" and "Torna a Surriento," and also the origin of pizza. Naples presents different faces in all four seasons of the year to travelers from all over the world. Naples is also called "Napoli," which in Italian is "Napoli." Naples is the capital of the Campania region and the Province of Naples, and is also one of the most populous cities in Italy, abundant in lemons and grapes. At the same time, it is an important tourist city of the Mediterranean, called the "City of Sunshine and Joy." This is a source of inspiration for many artists and musicians, perhaps because of Mount Vesuvius, or perhaps because of the simplicity and antiquity of Naples.
attractions.text_zh: 对于大多数旅行者而言，那不勒斯的大海、美食及历史都是让人流连忘返的重要原因。那不勒斯是意大利作家薄伽丘最热爱的城市，这里是歌曲《我的太阳》、《重归苏莲托》的诞生地，也是披萨的起源地。那不勒斯一年四季都呈现出不同的面孔展现给来自世界各地的旅行者。那不勒斯也叫“拿波里”，意大利文是“Napoli”。那不勒斯是坎帕尼亚大区以及那不勒斯省的首府，也是意大利人口最多的城市之一，盛产柠檬和葡萄。同时，她也是地中海重要的旅游城市，被称为“阳光和欢乐之城”。这里是许多艺术家、音乐家的灵感之源，或许是因为维苏威火山(MountVesuvius)，又或许是因为那不勒斯的古朴。

attractions.text_en: The Royal Palace of Naples is set in the bustling downtown, close to well-known attractions such as the Castel Nuovo and the Castel dell'Ovo. Having gone through four dynasties, its exterior looks quite ordinary, but if you choose to go inside, you will surely be greatly amazed. This palace is extremely luxurious; the overall color scheme is basically gold, yellow and purple, representing the nobility of the royal family. The palace has many, many rooms - the queen's bedchamber, the council hall, the study, and so on - and inside there are also many displays of royal items and paintings of the royal nobility. The most worthy of mention is the throne. The most worth-seeing place inside this palace, apart from the various paintings, is it; words like noble and elegant cannot simply describe it.
attractions.text_zh: 那不勒斯皇宫身处闹市，临近新堡、蛋堡等知名景点，历经四个朝代，外表看上去十分普通，但是，如果选择入内参观，那么一定会让你大吃一惊，这个皇宫非常奢华，整个色调基本就是金色、黄色、紫色，代表皇室的高贵。皇宫有许许多多的房间，王后的寝宫、议政厅、书房等等，里面还有很多皇室用品的展示和皇室贵族的绘画，最值得一提的就是王座。这个皇宫里面最值得一看的地方，除了各类绘画就是它了，用尊贵典雅这一类词是无法简单形容的。

attractions.text_en: Castel Nuovo, also called the Castle of Anjou, was ordered to be built by the first king of the Kingdom of Naples. Castel Nuovo includes the Civic Museum (Museo Civico) as well as the castle ruins. The museum (mainly displaying paintings) is located on the first floor, the second floor offers sea views, and the ground floor is the ruins of Castel Nuovo, with the ground surface built of transparent glass; travelers with a fear of heights need to pay special attention, as beneath the glass are the ruins of ancient buildings and human bones. In addition, inside Castel Nuovo there is also a Sala dei Baroni (literally the room of the barons), whose ceiling architecture is very distinctive.
attractions.text_zh: 新堡，又名安茹城堡，是那不勒斯王国第一位国王下令建立。新堡包括公民博物馆(MuseoCivico)以及城堡遗迹。博物馆(主要展示绘画)位于第一层，第二层可以看到海景，零层则为新堡遗迹，地表为透明玻璃建造，有恐高症的旅行者需要特别注意，玻璃底下则为古建筑遗迹以及人的骸骨。另外，新堡内部还有一个SalaDeiBaroni(直译为男爵的房间)，房间顶端的建筑非常有特色。

overview.text_zh:
当天上午在雷克雅未克市区集合，前往凯夫拉维克机场集合，随后前往蓝湖温泉景区(Blue Lagoon)可选择享受蓝湖温泉门票套票；或随车前往雷克雅未克选择中午出海观鲸；当天下午后途径凯夫拉维克机场后前往雷克雅未克。夜宿雷克雅未克格蓝迪中央酒店或同等四星级酒店。
当日行程安排：
1.集合时间地点：09:00雷克雅未克市区（推荐选择蓝湖温泉或观鲸二选一）；
2.集合时间地点：09:45凯夫拉维克机场（推荐选择蓝湖温泉 或观鲸二选一 ）；
3.集合时间地点：16:00 雷克雅未克市区 （无法选择蓝湖温泉）；
4.集合时间地点：16:45 凯夫拉维克机场 （无法选择蓝湖温泉）。
根据不同的团期，游览先后顺序有变化，但全部游览内容一致，不影响全程体验，视为团期行程路线一致，具体时间顺序以《出团通知书》为准。
由于蓝湖温泉地处偏僻并且游览时间较长、如果不入内蓝湖温泉，则无法安排在蓝湖景区周围游览和休息。

accommodation.text_en: Reykjavik Grandi Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. This hotel enjoys an excellent location, set in Iceland's creative cultural district. It is not only by the harbor, within walking distance of the whale-watching tour harbor, but also adjacent to downtown Reykjavik, where sightseeing and all kinds of dining needs can be met within walking distance. The hotel has a comfortable atmosphere, with distinctive Nordic modern decor and the luxurious Grandi Spa center, featuring multiple hot-spring pools and sauna steam rooms, as well as a stunning open skylight above the pools where you can gaze at Iceland's twinkling starlight from within the warm bathing pools. The hotel lobby provides lockers for storing luggage, which can be used to store your luggage at the hotel after check-out if needed.
accommodation.text_zh: 雷克雅未克格蓝迪酒店或同等4星级酒店 这家酒店地理位置优越，坐落于冰岛创意文化区，不仅位于港口距赏鲸之旅港口步行即可抵达。而且毗邻雷克市中心，步行距离内即可满足游览和各类饮食需求。酒店氛围舒适，独特的北欧现代风装饰和豪华的格蓝迪Spa中心，多个温泉浴池和桑拿蒸汽房，以及令人惊叹的位于浴池上方的开放型天窗，在温暖的汤池内可以冰岛的星光闪耀，酒店大堂提供储物柜供存放行李，退房后如需要将行李寄存在酒店时可以使用。

highlights.text_en: We will spend a whole day savoring the scenery of Iceland's Blue Lagoon hot spring area, this magical gift bestowed upon humanity by nature, a phenomenal geothermal retreat. The rugged lava landscape surrounds this expanse of pale blue water shrouded in mist, dreamlike and unique. The Lava Restaurant within the Blue Lagoon scenic area sits by the Blue Lagoon, offering quality local specialty cuisine at reasonable prices. Iceland's famous Michelin restaurant, the Moss Restaurant, is also one of the world's top-ranked creative restaurants. At the same time, the Blue Lagoon has 5-7 restaurants and fast-food outlets of different grades, providing high-quality Icelandic specialty cuisine while you enjoy the Blue Lagoon hot spring.
highlights.text_zh: 我们将一整天细细品味冰岛蓝湖温泉风景区，这所由大自然赐给人类的神奇的礼物，地热现象级的疗养胜地，周围嶙峋的熔岩地貌环绕着这片雾气缭绕的淡蓝湖水，梦幻而独特。蓝湖风景区内的岩浆餐厅（Lava 餐厅），坐落于蓝湖之畔，提供优质当地特色美食，并且价格合理，冰岛著名的米其林餐厅——苔藓餐厅（Moss 餐厅）也是世界排名前列的创意餐厅，同时、蓝湖温泉拥有5-7所不同等级的餐厅和快餐店，在享受蓝湖温泉的同时、也提供高质量的冰岛特殊美食。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, head to Iceland's Golden Circle (Gullni hringurinn): Thingvellir National Park (Þingvellir National Park), the Geysir geothermal area (Geysir), and Gullfoss (Golden Waterfall). These attractions are spread along a ring-shaped road, which is why it is called the tourist Golden Circle. Its magnificent landscapes are unique to Iceland and thus world-renowned. Afterwards, return to Reykjavik. Overnight at the Reykjavik Grandi Central Hotel or an equivalent four-star hotel.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，前往冰岛黄金圈(Gullni hringurinn)：辛格维利尔国家公园（Þingvellir National Park）、盖歇尔间歇泉区（Geysir）、黄金瀑布（Gullfoss），这些景点散布在一条环形的公路上，因此被称为旅游黄金圈，其壮丽的景观为冰岛所独有，因此而闻名世界。结束后返回雷克雅未克，夜宿雷克雅未克格蓝迪中央酒店或同等四星级酒店。

accommodation.text_en: Reykjavik Grandi Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. This hotel enjoys an excellent location, set in Iceland's creative cultural district. It is not only by the harbor, within walking distance of the whale-watching tour harbor, but also adjacent to downtown Reykjavik, where sightseeing and all kinds of dining needs can be met within walking distance. The hotel has a comfortable atmosphere, with distinctive Nordic modern decor and the luxurious Grandi Spa center, featuring multiple hot-spring pools and sauna steam rooms, as well as a stunning open skylight above the pools where you can gaze at Iceland's twinkling starlight from within the warm bathing pools. The hotel lobby provides lockers for storing luggage, which can be used to store your luggage at the hotel after check-out if needed.
accommodation.text_zh: 雷克雅未克格蓝迪酒店或同等4星级酒店 这家酒店地理位置优越，坐落于冰岛创意文化区，不仅位于港口距赏鲸之旅港口步行即可抵达。而且毗邻雷克市中心，步行距离内即可满足游览和各类饮食需求。酒店氛围舒适，独特的北欧现代风装饰和豪华的格蓝迪Spa中心，多个温泉浴池和桑拿蒸汽房，以及令人惊叹的位于浴池上方的开放型天窗，在温暖的汤池内可以冰岛的星光闪耀，酒店大堂提供储物柜供存放行李，退房后如需要将行李寄存在酒店时可以使用。

highlights.text_en: Iceland's Golden Circle has a different charm in every season. Such a cold and ethereal Iceland carries an innate defiance in its bones; feel its severity, gentleness and passion, and fall in love with every facet, every second, every frame of Iceland. The Golden Circle is a very famous tourist route in southern Iceland and the essence of an Iceland tour, made up of three major attractions: Gullfoss (Golden Waterfall), the Geysir geothermal area and Thingvellir National Park. Gullfoss is grand and magnificent in scenery; the turbulent water rushes down with a drop of over 50 meters, producing a deafening roar. In the sunlight, amid the rising mist, countless droplets glinting with golden light spread out, and a brilliant rainbow flickers in and out of view, as if the entire waterfall were forged from gold. The Geysir intermittent spring spouts scorching spring water everywhere, with steam pervading like smoke and mist, making it one of the world's famous geysers.
highlights.text_zh: 冰岛黄金圈四季都有不同的风采，如此冷酷又飘渺的冰岛，骨子里自带着一种桀骜，感受它的冷峻、温柔与热情，爱上冰岛的每一面、每一秒、每一帧。 黄金圈是冰岛南部非常知名的旅游路线，为冰岛游的精华所在，由三大旅游景点组成：黄金瀑布、盖歇尔间歇泉地热区和辛格维利尔国家公园。黄金瀑布气势宏大，景色壮观，湍急的水流顺势而下，落差达50多米，发出震耳欲聋的轰鸣。阳光下，在蒸腾的水雾中，布满闪着金光的点点水滴，亮艳的彩虹若隐若现，仿佛整个瀑布是用黄金造就。盖歇尔间歇喷泉到处冒出灼热的泉水，热气弥漫，如烟如雾，为世界著名的间歇泉之一。

attractions.text_en: A rather renowned cradle in Icelandic history and one of the birthplaces of Western political systems, Thingvellir National Park is known as the "site of the world's oldest democratic parliament". The scenery here is beautiful; the movement of the two great tectonic plates, Eurasia and the Americas, has formed a rift valley with a drop of more than ten meters, and ancient volcanic activity tore the ground apart, leaving every visitor who treads upon it utterly awestruck. In 2004, Thingvellir National Park was inscribed on UNESCO's "World Heritage List". Standing here, you can also gaze into the distance at the vast Thingvellir plain and the beautiful Thingvallavatn lake (Parliament Lake), whose clear water mirrors all, calm as a mirror; the gently curving pool is serene and tranquil, making it hard to tear yourself away.
attractions.text_zh: 冰岛历史上较负盛名的的摇篮，也是西方国家政治发源地之一，素有“世界古老的民主议会会址”之称的辛格维利尔国家公园，在这里风景优美，欧亚和美洲两大板块运动形成十余米落差的断裂谷地，古老的火山运动将地面撕裂，让每一个踏在上面的游客都震撼不已。2004年辛格维利尔国家公园被联合国教科文组织列入“世界遗产名录”。站在这里您还可以远眺广阔的辛格维利尔平原与美丽的辛格瓦尔德拉湖（国会湖），湖水清澈照人、波平如镜，弯弯的水泊平静怡然，让人流连忘返。

attractions.text_en: Hearing the Geysir intermittent spring begin to rumble, the sound rising higher and higher—this means it is about to erupt! Each eruption lasts 1-2 minutes, with water temperatures reaching over 100 degrees and the spouting water column reaching over 30 meters high, firmly holding the top spot among Iceland's geysers. What photographers love most is the geyser one second before eruption, with full, rounded bubbles that gush forth the next second. And what is most changeable is probably Iceland's weather—within a single day, from rain and snow to hail and then to sunshine, you can experience it all.
attractions.text_zh: 听到盖锡尔间歇喷泉开始隆隆作响，声音越来越高，这就是要喷发了！每次喷发持续1-2分钟，水温高达100多度，喷出的水柱可以高达30多米，稳坐冰岛喷泉头把交椅。深受摄影师喜爱的，是喷发前一秒的间歇泉，饱满而圆润的水泡，在后一秒喷涌而出。而多变的，大概就是冰岛的天气，一日之内，从雨雪到冰雹，再到阳光，你都可以经历。

attractions.text_en: Gullfoss is as grand and magnificent as its imposing, dignified name. The turbulent water rushes down with a drop of over 50 meters, producing a deafening roar. In the sunlight, amid the rising mist, countless droplets glinting with golden light spread out, and a brilliant rainbow flickers in and out of view, as if the entire waterfall were forged from gold. It has therefore also become a filming location for many movies, such as Prometheus.
attractions.text_zh: 黄金瀑布如其霸气雍容的名字一样气势宏大。湍急的水流顺势而下，落差达50多米，发出震耳欲聋的轰鸣。阳光下，在蒸腾的水雾中，布满闪着金光的点点水滴，亮艳的彩虹若隐若现，仿佛整个瀑布是用黄金造就。所以也成为了许多电影的取景地，譬如异星前传。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, head to Seljalandsfoss and Skogafoss (Rainbow Waterfall), then proceed to Vik. You may choose to hike to the beach where the plane wreckage lies, or take the dedicated electric shuttle car, or take an ATV all-terrain off-road vehicle across the black sand beach for photos and sightseeing—the broken, rough metal fuselage set against the dark sand and gravel appears all the more poignant and striking. Afterwards, visit the black sand beach and the Reynisdrangar sea stacks. Once finished, head to the Glacier Lagoon. Overnight at the Glacier Lagoon Hotel or an equivalent four-star hotel.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，前往塞里雅兰瀑布、彩虹瀑布，随后前往维克，可选择徒步抵达飞机残骸所在的沙滩，或选择搭乘专用电瓶摆渡车、或选择ATV全地形越野车穿越黑沙滩，拍照游览，残破的粗糙金属机身在黝黑砂石的映衬下更显凄美与震撼，之后游览黑沙滩及雷尼斯岩柱群。结束之后前往冰河湖，夜宿冰河泻湖酒店或同等四星级酒店。

accommodation.text_en: Glacier Lagoon Hotel or another hotel of equivalent grade. The hotel's exterior is in typical Nordic architectural style, with rustic brick and stone paired with a wooden structure, blending into the surrounding mountains and lakes. The interior is decorated in a minimalist Nordic style, and the natural, pristine glacier landscape lies just outside the window. The signature dishes of the hotel's own restaurant are cod and lobster, both transported from the nearby fishing port early that morning; even simply pan-fried or grilled, they burst with fresh and tender flavor. If you are lucky, you can observe the aurora through the hotel's huge floor-to-ceiling windows.
accommodation.text_zh: 冰河泻湖酒店或同等级其他酒店 酒店外观是典型的北欧建筑风格，质朴的砖石搭配木质结构，和周围的山川湖泊融为一体。整体为简约的北欧风格装修，窗外即是自然原始的冰川风貌。酒店自带餐厅的招牌菜为鳕鱼和龙虾，都是当天清晨从附近渔港运来，即使简单煎烤，也能迸发鲜嫩的口感。幸运的话可以在酒店巨大的落地窗前观测到极光。

highlights.text_en:
The DC3 hiking miracle:
Treading on the fine gravel road, admiring Iceland's barren vastness, the contest between nature's beauty and human will, you reach the DC3 plane wreckage on the black sand beach in the cold wind. In this silent world, feel the charm that belongs uniquely to Iceland and this trendy internet-famous spot.
highlights.text_zh:
DC3徒步奇迹：
踩在细碎的石子路上，欣赏冰岛一无所有的广阔，大自然的美与人类意志的对抗在寒风中抵达黑沙滩上的DC3飞机残骸。在这片寂静的世界里感受独属于冰岛的魅力和时尚的网红景点。

attractions.text_en: The black sand beach is composed of volcanic lava grit, and it is itself a striking symbol of Iceland's identity as a volcanic island. It adjoins the picturesque, peaceful and harmonious town of Vik, accompanied by organ-rock cliffs. Here you can enjoy the rest of the peaceful hours of the day; standing before the wind-eroded columnar basalt, watching the white waves and the boundless black sand beach surge and overlap, is a rare pleasure. The American Hollywood blockbuster Noah was filmed here; the black sand beach represents the end of the world, and Iceland's sense of remoteness is laid bare without reserve.
attractions.text_zh: 黑沙滩由火山熔岩砂砾构成，其本身也是冰岛火山岛屿身份的显著象征。她毗邻风景如画、安宁和睦的维克小镇，与风琴岩峭壁相伴。您可以在这享受今天余下的安宁时光，站在风蚀的圆柱玄武岩前望着白色海浪与无边黑色沙滩冲击重叠，是不可多得的享受。美国好莱坞大片诺亚方舟就在这里取景，黑沙滩代表着世界尽头，冰岛的那份遥远之感，展露无遗。

attractions.text_en: Located in southern Iceland, it is one of Iceland's larger and most magnificent waterfalls, with a width of 25 meters and a water drop of 60 meters; the white waterfall stream pairs perfectly with the surrounding green vegetation. The momentum of the water surging down is very spectacular, attracting many tourists to come and take in its splendor. Seljalandsfoss is a waterfall in southwestern Iceland with a vertical height of about 60 meters and is one of Iceland's beautiful waterfalls; among them, the secret waterfall connected to Seljalandsfoss is also a favorite under photographers' lenses and has appeared many times in books and magazines. The waterfall is to the south bordering Iceland's Ring Road No. 1, making it convenient to reach.
attractions.text_zh: 位于冰岛南部，是冰岛较大的、壮丽的瀑布之一，其宽度为25米，水流落差达60米，白色的瀑布水流与周围的绿色植物搭配的恰到好处。 水流奔腾而下的气势非常壮观，吸引了很多游客来一睹它的风采。塞里雅兰瀑布是冰岛西南部一座垂直高度约为60米的瀑布，是冰岛漂亮的瀑布之一，其中、连通塞里雅兰瀑布的秘密瀑布也是摄影师镜头下的宠儿，曾多次出现在书籍和杂志中。瀑布南临冰岛一号环岛公路，交通便利。

attractions.text_en: Iceland has countless waterfalls, each with its own character, but Skogafoss has a unique charm. Located in southern Iceland, it is one of Iceland's larger and most magnificent waterfalls, with a width of 25 meters and a water drop of 60 meters; the momentum of the water surging down is very spectacular, attracting many tourists to come and take in its splendor. The mountains on both sides of Skogafoss are covered with green vegetation, and the cliffs on both sides enclose the waterfall in the middle; the white waterfall stream pairs perfectly with the surrounding green vegetation.
attractions.text_zh: 冰岛有无数的瀑布，每一个都各有特色，但是斯科加瀑布却独具魅力。它位于冰岛南部，是冰岛较大的、壮丽的瀑布之一，其宽度为25米，水流落差达60米，水流奔腾而下的气势非常壮观，吸引了很多游客来一睹它的风采。斯科加瀑布两旁的山上都长满了绿色的植物，两旁的山崖把瀑布包围在中间，白色的瀑布水流与周围的绿色植物搭配的恰到好处。

attractions.text_en: The Reynisdrangar basalt stands in the Atlantic Ocean, the remains of an ancient sea cliff. It is a basalt sea stack beneath Reynisfjall mountain near the village of Vik (Vík í Mýrdal) in southern Iceland. The stacks stand proudly amid the waves, facing the rock walls of Reynisfjall, possessing a unique mysterious wildness and grandeur. Many movies and American TV series have been filmed here, including the hit Game of Thrones (A Song of Ice and Fire). One side of the coast is a high basalt-column cliff, and beneath the cliff the seawater has hollowed out a peculiar basalt-column cave (Halsanefshellir). Towering on the beach are huge basalt columns, which, after years of seawater impact and erosion, have formed extremely distinctive columnar rocks. The neatly arranged basalt columns along the coast resemble the pipe organ in a church, solemn and stately. Under the gloomy weather, the solemn black sand beach and the uncanny basalt columns, together with the low-roaring white waves, create a violent beauty on the brink of doomsday, leaving you unable to help wondering whether you have already arrived at the end of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 雷尼斯玄武岩矗立于大西洋中，是古时海崖的遗骸。是位于南部冰岛维克（Vík í Mýrdal）村附近的雷尼斯山(Reynisfjall)下的玄武岩 海叠层。岩柱在海浪中傲然挺立，与雷尼斯山的岩壁相对而望，独有一份神秘的野性与壮美。许多电影与美剧都曾在此取景，其中就包括大热的《权力的游戏(冰与火之歌)》。海岸一侧则是高高的玄武岩石柱悬崖，悬崖下被海水掏空形成奇特的玄武岩柱洞穴(Halsanefshellir)。沙滩上赫然屹立着巨大的玄武岩石柱，经过海水多年的冲击、侵蚀，行成了极其独特的柱状岩石。海岸边整齐排列的玄武岩柱就像教堂里的管风琴一样，庄严肃穆。阴沉沉的天气，肃穆的黑沙滩和鬼斧神工的玄武岩柱，再加上低吼的白色海浪，有一种濒临末日的狂暴美感，让你不由自主的怀疑是否已经置身世界的尽头。

attractions.text_en:
DC-3 Wreckage
On November 24, 1973, a US Navy aircraft (C-47) was forced to land on the black sand beach at Sólheimasandur in southern Iceland. The crew all survived, but the wreckage has remained here ever since. The broken plane wreckage and the boundless black sand beach form a magnificent yet poignant scene. Justin Bieber also filmed the "I'll Show You" music video here, making this site a niche internet-famous spot in Iceland.
attractions.text_zh:
DC-3 Wreckage飞机残骸
1973年11月24号，一架美国海军飞机(C-47)被迫降落于冰岛南部Sólheimasandur's的黑沙滩上，机组人员全部生还，但残骸却一直留在了这里。残破的飞机残骸与一望无际的黑沙滩构成了壮丽而又凄美的景色。斯汀·比伯也在这里拍摄了《I'll Show You》音乐MV，使该地成为冰岛的小众网红景点。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, you may choose to head to the foot of Vatnajökull Glacier National Park and, led by a professional guide, experience a glacier hike and explore the blue ice cave. Alternatively, you can choose to ride a glacier jeep to reach the blue ice cave. In the afternoon, visit the jewel in the crown of Vatnajökull Glacier—the Jökulsárlón Glacier Lagoon—as well as the Diamond Beach. Overnight at the Glacier Lagoon Hotel or an equivalent four-star hotel.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，可选择前往瓦特纳冰川国家公园脚下，由专业向导带领体验冰川徒步，探索蓝冰洞。或选择乘坐冰川吉普车，到达蓝冰洞。下午前往游览瓦特纳冰川皇冠上的明珠-杰古沙龙冰河湖以及钻石沙滩。夜宿冰河泻湖酒店或同等四星级酒店。

accommodation.text_en: Glacier Lagoon Hotel or another hotel of equivalent grade. The hotel's exterior is in typical Nordic architectural style, with rustic brick and stone paired with a wooden structure, blending into the surrounding mountains and lakes. The interior is decorated in a minimalist Nordic style, and the natural, pristine glacier landscape lies just outside the window. The signature dishes of the hotel's own restaurant are cod and lobster, both transported from the nearby fishing port early that morning; even simply pan-fried or grilled, they burst with fresh and tender flavor. If you are lucky, you can observe the aurora through the hotel's huge floor-to-ceiling windows.
accommodation.text_zh: 冰河泻湖酒店或同等级其他酒店 酒店外观是典型的北欧建筑风格，质朴的砖石搭配木质结构，和周围的山川湖泊融为一体。整体为简约的北欧风格装修，窗外即是自然原始的冰川风貌。酒店自带餐厅的招牌菜为鳕鱼和龙虾，都是当天清晨从附近渔港运来，即使简单煎烤，也能迸发鲜嫩的口感。幸运的话可以在酒店巨大的落地窗前观测到极光。

highlights.text_en:
Explore the crystal blue ice cave
Witness one of the world's rare natural phenomena: the crystal blue ice cave. You will stand inside an ancient glacier, where there is a natural blue ice cave with blues of different shades and structures. We will take you on the road to the "no man's land", heading to the mysterious cave; the road is rugged and uneven, and the scenery is incredibly beautiful. This is a wonderful winter experience in Vatnajökull Glacier National Park. Experienced glacier guides take you across the mysterious wilderness, sharing fascinating stories about the area and geological insights along the way.
highlights.text_zh:
探索水晶蓝冰洞
见证世界稀有自然现象之一：水晶蓝冰洞。您将站在一个古老的冰川内，那里有一个天然的蓝色冰洞，有着不同颜色的蓝色和结构。我们将带您踏上“无人区”的道路，前往神秘的洞穴，道路崎岖不平，景色美得令人难以置信。这是在瓦特纳冰川国家公园的一次美妙的冬季体验。经验丰富的冰川导游带您穿越神秘的荒野，分享有关该地区的迷人故事以及沿途的地质见解。

attractions.text_en: Floating in the lake are thousand-year-old drifting ice floes of various shapes. This is an ice lake that can be admired right from the roadside; besides white, the ice floes here also appear blue, green, and—due to the mixing of volcanic ash—gray and brown. You will have ample time to view and photograph up close, and if you are lucky you may even see groups of sea lions basking in the sun. The distant glacier seems as though it has been enchanted by the sky—what was just now like water flowing down from the glacier instantly all froze into ice, as if time had stopped still at that moment.
attractions.text_zh: 湖里漂浮着形态各异的千年浮冰。这是一个可以在路边就能观赏的冰湖，除了白色，这里的浮冰还呈现出蓝色、绿色、以及由于火山灰的掺杂而形成的灰色、棕色。您有充分的时间在此近距离观赏拍摄，运气好的话还可以看到成群结队晒太阳的海狮。远处的冰川犹如被天空施加了魔法，之前还像是从冰川上流下的水，顷刻间却全冻结成了冰，时间仿佛停在那刻静止了一样。

attractions.text_en: In Game of Thrones, the Wall and most of the scenes north of the Wall were filmed in Vatnajökull Glacier National Park. Plants such as angelica and beach pea grow densely, Arctic foxes roam here, landforms such as ice tongues and fjords crisscross, and traces left by ancient volcanic activity can be seen everywhere. The most striking scenery is the largest ice cap outside the polar regions—the Vatnajökull ice cap (Vatnajökull). The Vatnajökull ice cap covers about 8% of Iceland's area, with an average ice thickness of 400 meters and up to a thousand meters at its thickest. To the south of the Vatnajökull ice cap lies the Hvannadalshnúkur volcano (Hvannadalshnúkur). The Vatnajökull ice cap has begun to melt in recent years, which may be related to climate change and volcanic activity.
attractions.text_zh: 《权力的游戏》中，绝境长城及长城以北的大部分场景都是在瓦特纳冰川国家公园拍摄的。欧白芷、海湾豆等植物密布，北极狐在这里漫步，冰舌、峡湾等地貌交错纵横，远古火山活动遗留下的痕迹随处可见。 令人瞩目的景色便是世界上极地以外的冰盖——瓦特纳冰原(Vatnajökull)。瓦特纳冰原覆盖了冰岛约8%的面积，其冰层平均厚度为400米，较厚处达千米。位于瓦特纳冰原的南方是华纳达尔斯赫努克火山(Hvannadalshnúkur)。瓦特纳冰原近年开始融化，这可能与气候变更和火山活动有关。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, take the coach back to Reykjavik, then freely visit Hallgrimskirkja (Reykjavik Cathedral) (if an event is being held inside the church that day, entry for visits may not be possible), the Harpa Concert Hall, take a stroll by Lake Tjörnin, the Sun Voyager sculpture, and wander through the old Grandi harbor district of Reykjavik. You may also choose to end the tour in downtown Reykjavik, or choose to follow the coach to Keflavik Airport, then conclude this wonderful trip.
Itinerary arrangement for the day:
1. Gathering/dispersal time and place: 15:30 downtown Reykjavik;
2. Gathering/dispersal time and place: 17:00 Keflavik Airport.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，乘车返回雷克雅未克，随后自由参观雷克雅未克大教堂（当日如遇教堂内举办活动，可能无法入内参观）、哈帕音乐厅、托宁湖边漫步、太阳航海者雕塑，游走在雷克雅未克格蓝迪旧港地区。 也 可选择雷克雅未克市区下团或选择跟随大巴车前往凯夫拉维克机场，随后结束美好行程。
当日行程安排：
1. 集散时间地点：15:30 雷克雅未克市区；
2. 集散时间地点：17:00 凯夫拉维克机场。

accommodation.text_en: No accommodation on this day
accommodation.text_zh: 当天无住宿

attractions.text_en: Reykjavik Cathedral is a landmark building of the city of Reykjavik. It is a famous church located in the center of Iceland's capital, Reykjavik. With its novel design and pipe-organ-like structure, it is one of Iceland's taller buildings; you can take an elevator to the top floor to overlook the whole capital. The interior of the church is snow-white and simply decorated. Its foundation stone was laid in 1940, and it was essentially completed in the late 1960s.
attractions.text_zh: 雷克雅未克大教堂是雷克雅未克市的地标性建筑。位于冰岛首都雷克雅未克市中心的一座著名教堂。教堂设计新颖，管风琴结构，是冰岛的较高建筑之一，可乘坐电梯上顶楼俯瞰首都全貌。教堂内部雪白，装饰简洁。于1940年奠基，于20世纪60年代末基本完工。

attractions.text_en: Lake Tjörnin (Tjörnin) sits peacefully in the heart of Reykjavik, lending the city an eternal composure and tranquility. On Lake Tjörnin, waterfowl such as swans, terns, greylag geese and ducks dwell here all year round, in both winter and summer, and coming to feed the birds by Lake Tjörnin has become a great delight for Icelanders and tourists alike. In winter, a thick layer of ice forms over Lake Tjörnin, allowing people to cross the lake surface entirely, and some Icelanders even play football on the ice.
attractions.text_zh: 托宁湖（Tjörnin）安然坐落在雷克雅未克的中心地带，赋予了这座城市永恒的从容与平静。托宁湖上，天鹅、燕鸥、灰雁、鸭子等水禽无论冬夏栖息于此，来托宁湖边喂鸟也成为了冰岛人与游人们的一大乐趣。冬季，托宁湖上会结上一层厚厚的冰，完全可以横穿湖面，甚至还有冰岛人在冰上踢球。

attractions.text_en: Reykjavik has many sculptures, and the Sun Voyager (Sólfar) is perhaps one of the more famous among them. This sculpture is located on Sæbraut road by the seaside of Reykjavik, resembling an ark; it is "an ode to the sun, embodying hopes for the distant, hope, pursuit, progress and freedom". The Sun Voyager sculpture was the winning work of an outdoor art competition commemorating the 200th anniversary of the founding of the city of Reykjavik; designed by Jón Gunnar Árnason, it was unveiled in 1990. This uniquely designed work of Icelandic modern art has gradually become a landmark of Reykjavik as well.
attractions.text_zh: 雷克雅未克雕塑众多，太阳航海者（Sólfar）或许就是其中较有名的一座。这座雕塑位于雷克雅未克海边的Sæbraut路上，形似方舟，是“一曲对太阳的颂歌，蕴含了对远方、希望、追寻、进步与自由的期许”。太阳航海者雕塑是纪念雷克雅未克建市200周年室外艺术竞赛的获奖作品，由Jón Gunnar Árnason设计，于1990年揭幕。这座设计独特的冰岛现代艺术作品也渐渐成为了雷克雅未克的标志性建筑。

attractions.name_en: Harpa Concert Hall and Conference Centre
attractions.name_zh: 哈帕音乐厅和会议中心
attractions.text_en: The Harpa Concert Hall and Conference Centre is located at the junction of land and sea in Iceland's capital, Reykjavik, and is Iceland's new and large integrated concert hall and conference center. Jointly designed by Icelandic and Danish design firms, its inspiration comes from the mysterious aurora of Iceland's winter nights and the shape of volcanic rock. The building's glass form is like a giant kaleidoscope; thousands of irregular geometric glass bricks reflect, as the color of the sky and the seasons change, myriad colors that even put rainbows to shame. This top-tier modern building is the venue in Reykjavik for enjoying music and holding important conferences. Here, you can hear performances by the Iceland Symphony Orchestra and watch Icelandic theater and performances of various music genres. The larger concert hall here can accommodate 1,800 people; in addition, there are two rehearsal halls, a lounge, a restaurant, a cafe, a music record store and a souvenir shop.
attractions.text_zh: 哈帕音乐厅和会议中心位于冰岛首都雷克雅未克的海陆交界处，是冰岛又新又大的综合音乐厅、会议中心，由冰岛和丹麦的设计公司联合设计，其灵感来自冰岛冬季夜晚神秘莫测的夜幕极光和火山石的形状。建筑的玻璃外型好比一个巨大的万花筒，上千块不规则的几何玻璃砖随着天空的颜色和季节的变化反射出令彩虹都相形见绌的万千颜色。这座顶尖的现代化建筑是雷克雅未克欣赏音乐和举办重要会议的场所。在这里，你可以听到冰岛交响乐团的演奏，观赏冰岛戏剧和各种音乐流派演出。这里较大的音乐厅可容纳1800人，此外还设置有两个排练厅、休息厅、餐厅、咖啡店、音乐唱片店及纪念品店。

attractions.text_en: Located in Burgundy, the heartland of wine, Dijon was the capital of the Duchy of Burgundy from the 11th to the 15th century. It flourished especially in the 14th and 15th centuries under several outstanding rulers, becoming an important political, economic, and cultural-artistic center of Europe at the time. Today the old town of Dijon is still dotted with many historical buildings from different periods—lavish palaces, solemn churches, opulent glazed-tile roofs, and many quaint timber-framed houses, as well as museums and art galleries converted from palaces and monasteries. With fine wine, fine food, and an atmosphere of art throughout the city, it is a town full of French charm.
attractions.text_zh: 位于葡萄酒故乡勃艮第地区的第戎，11到15世纪曾是勃艮第公国的首府，特别在14、15世纪时因几位优秀领导人而盛极一时，成为当时欧洲重要的政治经济和文化艺术中心。如今第戎的老城区仍散布着许多不同时期的历史建筑，除了豪华的宫殿、庄严的教堂、彩釉屋顶的豪华和许多古朴的木框架房屋，也有宫殿和修道院改装成的博物馆和美术馆。美酒、美食搭配满城艺术分为，是非常具有法国风情的一座城市。

attractions.text_en: Notre-Dame de Dijon was built in the 13th century. On the church's façade, three rows of gargoyles are separated by two rows of slender columns, and the church has a 14th-century chiming clock. For most of the people of Dijon, Notre-Dame de Dijon is an approachable church building; over the past several centuries it has remained the main spiritual and emotional comfort of the people of Dijon.
attractions.text_zh: 第戎圣母院建造于13世纪，教堂门面上三列兽形假排水口由两排纤细的圆柱分开，教堂上有一座14世纪的报时钟。对于大多数的第戎人民而言，第戎圣母院是一座具有亲和力的教堂建筑，在这近几个世纪以来，圣母院一直是第戎人民主要的精神、心灵的抚慰。

attractions.text_en: This destination, combining winemaking with tourism, is a place not to be missed by wine lovers, art lovers, and food lovers alike. Visit an estate producing Burgundy wines, where you can see the aging and maturing process of the wine and the fermentation and storage process inside the cellar. With a bit of luck, you may even witness the winemaking process itself (depending on the grape harvest season).
attractions.text_zh: 这个集酿酒与旅游于一身的胜地是葡萄酒爱好者、艺术爱好者和美食爱好者所不容错过的地方。选择勃艮第产品的酒庄进行参观，在此可参观葡萄酒的陈酿熟化过程及酒窖内储存发酵过程，运气好的时候可参观葡萄酒的酿造过程（取决葡萄的产期）。

attractions.text_en: Lausanne is the capital of the canton of Vaud, situated at the center of the northern shore of Lake Geneva. It prospered as a former Roman military port. Through continuous development, the modern city of Lausanne has become one of Switzerland's most important railway hubs. Most trains heading to major cities such as Geneva, Bern, and Zurich converge here, and it is also a transport center linking Paris and Milan. Lausanne is also known as the Olympic Capital, as both the International Olympic Committee and the Olympic Museum are located here.
attractions.text_zh: 洛桑是沃州的首府，位于日内瓦湖畔北部沿岸的中心，因曾是罗马的军港而繁荣。经过不断地发展，洛桑这座现代化的城市已经成为瑞士最重要的铁路枢纽之一。大多数通往日内瓦、伯尔尼、苏黎世等大城市的火车都在此交汇，它同时也是连接巴黎及米兰的交通中心。洛桑也被人们称为奥林匹克之都，国际奥林匹克委员会和奥林匹克博物馆均在此地。

attractions.text_en: Lausanne was the city designated by Baron Coubertin, the father of the modern Olympics, as the seat of the International Olympic Committee (IOC). To carry on Coubertin's will of spreading the Olympic spirit throughout the world, former IOC president Samaranch had a first-of-its-kind Olympic museum established in Lausanne in 1993. The Olympic Museum in Lausanne houses and exhibits tens of thousands of treasured items from the first Athens Olympics to the present day, and is a documentation center for the Olympic movement. The museum is located on the picturesque shore of Lake Geneva in a superb setting; from the lush courtyard or the restaurant terrace, one can gaze upon the beautiful lake and mountain scenery of Lausanne.
attractions.text_zh: 洛桑是近代奥林匹克之父顾拜旦（Coubertin）男爵为国际奥林匹克委员会（IOC）根据地所指定的城市，为继承顾拜旦将奥林匹克的精神传播到世界各地的意志，由前任奥委会主席萨马兰奇指定，于1993年在洛桑建立了世界上一座奥林匹克博物馆。洛桑奥林匹克博物馆（Olympic Museum）收藏并展示了从第一届雅典奥运会至今的上万件珍藏品，是奥林匹克运动资料中心。博物馆坐落在风光绰约的日内瓦湖畔，环境极佳，从葱郁的庭院或餐厅的阳台上可以眺望洛桑美丽的湖光山色。

attractions.text_en: The Lavaux Vineyard Terraces, inscribed on the World Cultural Heritage List, have a history of 800 years to this day.
