Thanks to abundant sunshine and the humid lakeside climate, the grapes grown here are not only very sweet, but the area has also become a famous wine-producing region of Switzerland. When the grapes ripen, the air is filled with the fragrance of wine.
attractions.text_zh: 被列入世界文化遗产名录的拉沃葡萄园梯田，迄今为止已有800年的历史。凭借充足的阳光和湖畔湿润的气候，不但让这里产出的葡萄非常甘甜，而且还使当地成为瑞士著名的葡萄酒产地。葡萄成熟的季节，空气里都弥漫着葡萄酒的香气。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Léman, spans Switzerland and France. It is an important lake of Western Europe, as well as a famous scenic spot and health resort. During the day you can take a cruise to tour Lake Geneva, and at night you can be enchanted by the shimmering neon lights along the shore. Luxury cruise ships frequently host concerts or dances on the lake. You may take a cruise to admire the beautiful scenery along the shores of Lake Geneva, where the lake water, snow-capped mountains, and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: Chillon Castle is located at the foot of the Alps on the shore of the charming Lake Geneva, and is Switzerland's iconic medieval "floating-on-water" castle. The foundation stones of Chillon Castle are built on the lakebed, giving the impression that it floats on the surface of the lake, yet the castle appears remarkably solid. Byron's poem "The Prisoner of Chillon" made this castle even more renowned.
attractions.text_zh: 西庸城堡位于阿尔卑斯山脚下，充满魅力的日内瓦湖湖畔，是瑞士标志性的中世纪"水上漂"城堡。西庸城堡的基石建在湖底，给人一种漂浮在湖面上的感觉，但城堡看起来异常坚固，拜伦挥笔下的《西庸的囚徒》更是让这座城堡声名远扬。

attractions.text_en: Lake Thun, set in the Bernese Highlands, has deep blue waters and is known as the "Right Eye of God." Standing on the shore of Lake Thun, before your eyes lie beautiful villages and a solemn castle, while at the far end of the lake the Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau peaks slowly emerge. As your gaze shifts between telephoto and wide-angle views, each frame of picture-perfect scenery is captured in your heart.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落于伯尔尼高地上的图恩湖，拥有深蓝色的湖水，被称之为"上帝的右眼"。驻足于图恩湖畔，眼前的美丽村落，庄严的城堡，湖畔尽头的慢慢浮现的艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰，视线在长焦与广角之间切换，在心中定格每一帧如画风景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau lies some twenty to thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. Its summit is covered with snow and ice all year round, while at its foot the grass is green and the scenery beautiful, making it a famous destination for sightseeing and outdoor sports in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was inscribed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is home to the famous postcard photography spot of Switzerland's "dreamy hillside," a favorite of photographers, and is also the Alpine town one must pass through to visit the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen, Lauterbrunnen, and others, it forms the most magnificent and beautiful scenic route of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing destination, and in summer it is a paradise for hikers. The lakeside, green meadows, waterfalls, dairy cows, and snow-capped mountains together make up this enchanting town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头最爱的瑞士"梦幻山坡"著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、劳特布龙嫩（Lauterbrunnen）等一起组成了少女峰地区最为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Lauterbrunnen lies to the west of the Jungfrau region. More than 70 waterfalls and streams cascade down from the cliffs, so the German name Lauterbrunnen literally means "many springs," and the town is truly a town of waterfalls. Among them, the Staubbach Falls is the village's iconic sight, praised in poems by the poets Goethe and Wordsworth. In addition, the Mürren Falls and the Trümmelbach Falls—which rush down from a cave as high as ten stories—should not be missed either. From Lauterbrunnen you can take the WAB railway to reach Wengen, Kleine Scheidegg, the Jungfrau, and other places. At the same time, by taking the cable car via Mürren, you can reach the Schilthorn and other places to take in the magnificent scenery of the Bernese Highlands.
attractions.text_zh: 劳特布龙嫩(Lauterbrunnen)位于少女峰地区的西面，从山崖上落下来70多个瀑布和小河，所以劳特布龙嫩的德语直译是很多的泉水，这个小镇是名副其实的瀑布镇。其中施陶河瀑布是村子的标志性景观，诗人歌德和伍德·沃斯曾写诗来赞美它。此外还有米伦瀑布和从十层楼高的山洞里飞奔而下的特吕默尔河瀑布，也不可错过。从劳特布龙嫩出发可以乘WAB铁路到达翁根、克莱纳谢德格、少女峰等地。同时，乘坐缆车经米伦，可到达雪朗峰等地，饱览伯尔尼高地的雄伟风光。

attractions.text_en: Lake Brienz, at the northern foot of the Alps, has waters of blue tinged with green—a hue compared to a premium Tiffany blue—and enjoys the reputation of the "Left Eye of God." Lake Brienz holds Switzerland's purest waters. The book "Around the World (Switzerland)" describes it thus: "A serene village rich in character, with charming streets and buildings, azure lake waters, mysterious lakes, dense forests, lovely steam locomotives, and a panorama of the Alps—all the various charms of Switzerland concentrated here"...
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔卑斯山北麓的布里恩茨湖，湖水蓝中带绿，被称为Tiffany高级蓝的湖水，有着"上帝的左眼"的美誉。布里恩茨湖是瑞士最为纯净的湖水，《走遍全球（瑞士）》书上这么描述："一个极富风情的恬静村子，富有情趣的街道建筑、蔚蓝色的湖水、神秘的湖泊、茂密的森林、可爱的蒸汽机车和阿尔卑斯全景图，瑞士的各种魅力在这里浓缩"......

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is the green parkland in the center of Interlaken, Switzerland's famous sightseeing town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery, and now no construction of any building is permitted on it, in order to prevent the destruction of this beautiful scenery. This is the best place to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast green there are fountains and many benches, so it is also a wonderful place for a stroll. Höhematte is also a landing site for paragliders. There is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, where, after paying a fee, staff will take visitors to a nearby mountain for free gliding, allowing them to admire the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high up.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Interlaken is a town at the foot of the Jungfrau, situated between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, also known as the town between the lakes. It is famous for its enchanting scenery throughout the four seasons, and geographically it belongs to the center of the Bernese Highlands.
attractions.text_zh: 因特拉肯是少女峰山脚下的一个小镇，位于图恩湖及布里恩茨湖之间，又名湖间镇，以一年四季的醉人风景著名，在地理上它属于伯尔尼高地的中心。

attractions.text_en: Switzerland's GoldenPass train winds through the beautiful regions of the Alps, taking in enchanting lake and mountain scenery all along the way. One of its most beautiful stretches is the GoldenPass section from Lungern to Lucerne (Luzern–Lungern). Along the route are charming villages, azure lake waters, lush vegetation, vast pastures, leisurely cattle and sheep, and the snow-capped Alps. As the scenery transforms from the foot of the mountains to the summit, one cannot help but marvel that this is paradise on earth.
attractions.text_zh: 瑞士的黄金列车穿梭于阿尔卑斯美丽的区域，一路总览迷人的湖光山色。其中美丽的一段就是龙疆（Lungern）到卢塞恩（Luzern）这一段的金色山口列车（Luzren-Lungern），沿途秀美的村庄，碧蓝的湖水，茂密的植被，广袤的牧场，悠闲的牛羊，还有白雪皑皑的阿尔卑斯山脉，从山脚到山顶变幻的风景，让人感叹这就是人间仙境。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking part of the country. Nestled between mountains and water, Lucerne possesses a beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance palaces and mansions, as well as century-old shops and ancient lanes are everywhere. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the city's beauty in a way both dreamlike and real, making it an extraordinary jewel among Switzerland's many beautiful towns. Since the 19th century it has attracted numerous princes, nobles, and men of letters to visit and reside, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: Situated between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass train passes through here. The town has Switzerland's purest alpine lake waters, surrounded by mountains and green meadows. The quaint village is scattered along the shore of Lake Lungern, like a Shangri-La far removed from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口列车就会从这里经过。这里拥有瑞士最为纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Lake Lucerne has a winding, irregular shape, and together with the surrounding mountains forms the classic "lake and mountain" scenery, attracting large numbers of tourists. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once likened the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" to the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and so the piece acquired the title "Moonlight"—although this was not Beethoven's original intent.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩湖这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的"湖光山色"景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: This dying lion sculpture was carved into natural rock by a Danish sculptor in 1821. The lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground with a broken spear in its shoulder, and beside it is a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms. The sculpture commemorates the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on August 10, 1792, protecting the safety of the family of Louis XVI in the Tuileries Palace in Paris. Below the sculpture, an inscription describes the course of this event. In those days, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, forced by their livelihoods, went to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and fought bravely, but honor and money could not conceal the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland ceased exporting mercenaries, retaining only the guards serving the Holy See—the famous Swiss Guard. Because of their renowned loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has continued to serve to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and hailed the "dying lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将"濒死的琉森狮子"誉为"世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像"。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Zurich is an experience not to be missed. Here you will find traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookshops and flower stalls, as well as jewelry and fashion boutiques, and of course no shortage of Zurich's own local brands. Famous streets and lanes such as Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg, Niederdorf, and Augustine Lane are all located in the old town. Strolling through the old town at night, you will find that it transforms into a place of entertainment for the public.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世的老城区是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰，时尚精品，当然也少不了苏黎世本土品牌。班霍夫大街(Bahnhofstrasse)、伦韦格街(Rennweg)、尼德道尔夫(Niederdorf)与圣奥古斯丁巷(Augustine Lane)等著名街巷都位于老城区。晚上漫步于老城区，会发现这里又变成了民众的娱乐场所。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. The piers on the lake are filled with yachts of all kinds, like a club for the rich. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center, where white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere on the water, leisurely and at ease, a picture of harmony. The northern shore of Lake Zurich is where the wealthy live, dubbed the "Gold Coast," while the southern shore is called the "Silver Coast." At the end of Bahnhofstrasse lies Lake Zurich. As a "world's most livable city," the life of true Zurichers is suffused everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称"金岸"，而南岸则称之为"银岸"。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为"世界宜居的城市"，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Lindenhof means "the courtyard of the linden trees." The park sits on a small hill covered with linden trees in the center of Zurich's old town. Before you lies the Limmat River, making it an ideal place to admire the Grossmünster (Zurich Cathedral) and the scenery of the right bank. It is also where, at the start of the drama "Crash Landing on You," the perfect scene of the two protagonists brushing past each other was captured.
attractions.text_zh: 林登霍夫(Lindenhof)，意思为菩提树的中庭，公园坐落于苏黎世老城中心一片被菩提树覆盖的小山丘上。眼前就是利马特河，是欣赏苏黎世大教堂和右岸风光的理想之地。也是为《爱的迫降》的正片开始时，定格了两人擦身而过的完美的画面。

attractions.text_en: The Limmat River flows out from the northern end of Lake Zurich, then passes through the center of Zurich, and flows another 35 kilometers to the northwest before finally emptying into the Aare River. Walking along the Limmat River, watching the slowly flowing water, is another quiet and peaceful day—this is probably what the feeling of serene, tranquil time is like. Swans in the river inadvertently break into tourists' photos, adding a touch of liveliness and playfulness to the calm waters.
attractions.text_zh: 利马特河从苏黎世湖北端引出，然后流经苏黎世市中心，再向西北方流35公里，最后注入阿勒河（Aare）。行走在利马特河边，看着缓慢流动的河水，又是静谧而祥和的一天，这大概就是岁月静好的感觉，河里天鹅在游人拍照时不经意的闯入，又为这平静的河水增添一丝灵动和跳脱之感。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, its hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and its white marble exterior walls are carved with thousands of statues. The interior space is vast, and sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, creating a hazy light full of solemn religious atmosphere. In the church's crypt, the remains of the Church of Santa Tecla, which stood on the original site, are still preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是"圆顶"的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This cross-shaped, glass-vaulted arcade built in the 19th century is not only one of the world's oldest shopping centers, but also a city-scale model of art and architecture. Here you will find the flagship stores of Italian luxury brands such as Prada and Gucci, but even if you don't shop, strolling through it is like passing through a museum. At the historic cafés at the end of the arcade, such as Caffè Biffi or Savini Milano, you can order an espresso or savor a tiramisu dessert, experiencing the ease and elegance of the Italian pace of life.
attractions.text_zh: 这条19世纪修建的十字形玻璃拱顶长廊不仅是世界上最古老的购物中心之一，更是一座城市级的艺术与建筑典范。这里汇聚了Prada、Gucci等意大利奢侈品牌旗舰店，但即便不购物，漫步其中也如同穿行于一座博物馆。在长廊尽头的老字号咖啡馆，如Caffè Biffi或Savini Milano，您可点一杯意式浓缩咖啡或品尝提拉米苏甜点，体会意式生活节奏的从容与优雅。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: This magnificent Byzantine-style church, famous for its five onion-shaped domes and golden mosaic decorations, embodies the glorious history of Venice's golden age and its trade with the East. Rich in exterior detail and blending the artistic languages of East and West, it is a landmark of Venice not to be missed.
attractions.text_zh: 这座拜占庭风格的华丽教堂，以其五座洋葱形圆顶和金色马赛克装饰而闻名，体现了威尼斯黄金时代与东方贸易的辉煌历史。外观细节丰富，融合东方与西方的艺术语言，是威尼斯不可错过的地标。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on the Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside, you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through small openings—rather than, like the many people on the bridge across the way, looking toward you at the Bridge of Sighs. You are allowed to take photos inside, as long as you don't use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was the route by which the court escorted condemned prisoners to prison in ancient times. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style, shaped like a house, with a vaulted upper part, very tightly enclosed, with only two small windows facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and as they passed over this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows, losing their freedom from then on, involuntarily letting out sighs. It is said that lovers who kiss beneath the bridge will be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was filmed here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: Piazza San Marco, also known as Venice's central square, has always been the center of Venice's political, religious, and traditional festival public activities. St. Mark's Square is a rectangular square surrounded by buildings such as the Doge's Palace, St. Mark's Basilica, St. Mark's Campanile, the new and old Procuratie buildings, the Napoleonic Wing connecting the two buildings, the square bell tower of St. Mark's Basilica, and the Marciana Library, together with the Grand Canal of Venice. It is about 170 meters long, about 80 meters wide on the east side, and about 55 meters wide on the west side. The buildings around the square are all exquisite Renaissance architecture.
attractions.text_zh: 圣马可广场(Plazza San Marco) 又称威尼斯中心广场，一直是威尼斯的政治、宗教和传统节日的公共活动中心。圣马可广场是由公爵府、圣马可大教堂、圣马可钟楼、新、旧行政官邸大楼、连接两大楼的拿破仑翼大楼、圣马可大教堂的四角形钟楼和圣马可图书馆等建筑和威尼斯大运河所围成的长方形广场，长约170米，东边宽约80米，西侧宽约55米。广场四周的建筑都是文艺复兴时期的精美建筑。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few churches can be so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red, and green granite, perfectly interprets the classicism, elegance, and freedom championed by the Renaissance—no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为"花之圣母"。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria enjoys the reputation of an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (the Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and numerous cafés and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore lies directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio on the Arno River is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier large-span circular-arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over the course of several centuries, it has withstood floods, social upheavals, and wars, yet still stands firm. It is one of Florence's famous landmark buildings.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Located in the southeast of Florence, Piazzale Michelangelo is a famous spot for overlooking the beautiful panorama of the city. In the center of the square stands a replica of Michelangelo's immortal work, "David." From the square you can see the full appearance of the entire city: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, Giotto's Bell Tower, the Bargello Museum, the Old Bridge, and more are all in view. This is also a good place to watch the sunrise and sunset; as the light changes, you can see Florence radiate different splendors.
attractions.text_zh: 位于佛罗伦萨东南的米开朗基罗广场是著名的俯瞰城市美丽全景的地点，广场中央安放着米开朗基罗的不朽之作——《大卫》的复制品，广场上可以看到全城的风貌：圣母百花大教堂、乔托钟楼、巴杰罗美术馆、老桥等尽收眼底。这里也是观赏日出和日落的好位置，随着光线的变幻，看佛罗伦萨焕发出不同的光彩。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five clifftop villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is especially notable is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together, built along the coast—one of the world's most beautiful hiking routes, about 15–20 kilometers long, taking around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other side mountains, and ahead lie the Italian fishing villages—a destination that countless hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the World Cultural Heritage List by UNESCO.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of Pisa in Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy. It is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, named a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. According to legend, in the year 1590, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment from the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's view.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly laid out as grass. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square stand four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (the bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto Monumentale (cemetery). Around the square, ancient city walls and gates are still preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa, and the cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Torre Grossa is a tower in San Gimignano that is open to the public, and is also the taller of the towers, with a total height of 54 meters, first built in the early 14th century. It was once part of the new Palazzo del Podestà, and from the tower one can take in the beautiful scenery of San Gimignano and the Tuscan hill country.
attractions.text_zh: 格罗萨塔楼是圣吉米亚诺中一个对公众开放的塔楼，也是较高的塔楼，总高为54米，始建于14世纪初。它曾是新的波德斯塔宫宫的一部分，塔楼可以一览圣吉米亚诺和托斯卡纳丘陵山区的美景。

attractions.text_en: This medieval walled town of towers, inscribed as a World Heritage Site, may be small, yet it concentrates the very best of Tuscan scenery. The Piazza della Cisterna is its absolute core—this triangular square is paved with cobblestones, surrounded by 13th-century stone towers and arcades, with an ancient well in the center that was once the lifeline of the whole town. Standing here looking up at the dense forest of towers, you can directly feel where the title "Medieval Manhattan" comes from.
attractions.text_zh: 这座被列入世界遗产的中世纪塔城虽小，却浓缩了托斯卡纳最精华的景观。水井广场是绝对核心，这个三角形广场由鹅卵石铺就，四周环绕着13世纪的石塔与拱廊，中央的古井曾是全城命脉。站在这里仰视林立的塔楼，能直观感受"中世纪曼哈顿"的称号从何而来。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old city, is filled with masterpieces by great artists and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing cobblestone lanes and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you are set back in the European Middle Ages of a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you a surprise. For several centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the 14th century. Besides its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also preserves a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties—the almond soft cookies ricciarelli, the nut tart panforte, the peppery spiced nut cake pan pepato, the rice pudding budini di riso, the walnut cookies cavallucci, or the walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: The Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena. Directly facing the square is Siena's town hall and tower; inside the town hall is the Civic Museum, which houses numerous paintings of the Sienese School, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is the Torre del Mangia; it is Siena's iconic building, and also the second-highest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of stairs to take in the beautiful scenery of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳标志性建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: Pienza is a small town on a hill in the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany. It is the birthplace of Pope Pius II, who in 1459 oversaw the rebuilding of Pienza, regarded as a model of the "ideal city," and is therefore hailed as the "touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other medieval Italian towns, Pienza's unique feature is that from its city walls one can overlook the scenery of the World Heritage Site—the "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为"理想城市"的典范，因此被誉为"文艺复兴都市生活的试金石"。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress trail, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows in the sunlight, creating a serene and poetic atmosphere that attracts countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and take photos.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum in the center of Rome was built by ancient Rome to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was a place exclusively for slave owners, nobles, and free citizens to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat between slaves, and is one of Rome's famous historical relics. The Colosseum is a model masterpiece and marvel in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for being huge, magnificent, and spectacular. Although only a little more than half its skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and grand momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years to this day. The artist Raphael, the Roman king Vittorio Emanuele II, and Umberto I, among others, rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of ancient Rome's masterful building techniques, and was praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为"天使的设计"。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza di Spagna once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to all. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and radiant figure seems to have merged with the Piazza di Spagna and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never erase. The Spanish Steps—the whole Piazza di Spagna is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The steps have 138 steps in all, and are among the wider staircases in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲较宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Fountain," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology—imposing in momentum and grand in scale. It is said that if you stand with your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and the coin lands in the water, your dream will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称"少女喷泉"，或者"许愿池"，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off for the soul of Tuscany — take free photos at the Cypress Lane, then visit Pienza's old town to tour Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior). After lunch, head to the old town of Siena and tour Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, Siena Town Hall (exterior), the Torre del Mangia (exterior) and other attractions, then proceed to the Tuscany region to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Montecatini SPA Hotel in Tuscany or an equivalent 5-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，出发前往托斯卡纳的灵魂- 丝柏树小径自由拍照，在 皮恩扎古城参观游览二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观），午餐后 出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点，随后前往托斯卡纳大区入住酒店。
夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Montecatini SPA Hotel in Tuscany or an equivalent 5-star hotel. The hotel is located in Montecatini, Tuscany's famous wellness and holiday resort. Its design is distinctive, with elegantly decorated rooms that blend the modern with the classical, making it very comfortable and refined. The spa area has 2 pools (indoor and outdoor), and the sauna enjoys a unique forest view. The hotel's private park and circular garden are a natural extension of the Terme Tettuccio park — the same trees, picturesque scenery, hot springs, and a wide variety of flora and fauna, covering 40,000 square meters: as if you were in a corner of a natural paradise. The hotel's NO|MORE Bistrot restaurant changes its menu with the seasons, offering food that is rich and varied in taste.
accommodation.text_zh: 托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店 酒店位于托斯卡纳著名的康养旅游度假地-蒙特卡蒂尼，设计独特，房间装潢典雅，融合了现代与古典，非常舒适和别致。 水疗区设有 2 个泳池（室内和室外），桑拿浴室享有独特的森林景观。酒店的私人公园和环形花园是 Terme Tettuccio 公园的自然延续，同样的树木、如画的景色、温泉、种类繁多的动植物，占地 40,000 平方米：仿佛置身于自然天堂的一隅。酒店的NO|MORE Bistrot 餐厅随季节变化菜单，食物口感丰富多样。

highlights.text_en:
The pastoral beauty of Val d'Orcia and the medieval old town of Pienza
Close your eyes and you will picture the classic Tuscan landscape — blue skies and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and vines, and finally wheat fields. This is the perfect portrait of Val d'Orcia. From the city walls of Pienza's old town, look down upon the scenery of the World Heritage Site "Val d'Orcia."
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old town, is full of masterpieces by great artists and classical medieval architecture. As you wander through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing cobblestone alleys and the deep courtyards hidden throughout, you feel as if you have been transported to the European Middle Ages of a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. Over the centuries, this city has retained its complete classical appearance, as if time had stood still here since the 14th century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties — almond soft cookies ricciarelli, nut tarts panforte, peppered spice nut cakes pan pepato, rice puddings budini di riso, walnut cookies cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly opposite the square stand Siena's Town Hall and tower; the Town Hall houses the Civic Museum, which holds many paintings of the Sienese School, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is Torre del Mangia; it is Siena's tallest building and the second-tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of stairs to take in the beautiful views of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存至大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳至高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: Pienza is a small town on a hill in the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany. It is the birthplace of Pope Pius II, who in 1459 oversaw the rebuilding of Pienza, which is regarded as a model of the "ideal city" and is therefore hailed as a "touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, what makes Pienza unique is that from its city walls you can look down upon the scenery of the World Heritage Site "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding Cypress Lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its distinctively shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscany's pastoral scenery. Lit by the sun, the cypresses on either side of the road cast dappled shadows, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that draws countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and check in.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for La Spezia to tour the Cinque Terre, traveling along the Ligurian coastline to visit the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs; in the afternoon, head to Pisa to tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli in Pisa's historical and cultural center, then proceed to the Tuscany region to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Montecatini SPA Hotel in Tuscany or an equivalent 5-star hotel
Note: If the Cinque Terre cannot be visited due to factors such as bad weather or a railway company strike, the itinerary will automatically be changed to touring the coastal cities by coach or other means.
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前拉斯佩齐亚游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场，之后前往托斯卡纳大区入住酒店。
夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en: Montecatini SPA Hotel in Tuscany or an equivalent 5-star hotel. The hotel is located in Montecatini, Tuscany's famous wellness and holiday resort. Its design is distinctive, with elegantly decorated rooms that blend the modern with the classical, making it very comfortable and refined. The spa area has 2 pools (indoor and outdoor), and the sauna enjoys a unique forest view. The hotel's private park and circular garden are a natural extension of the Terme Tettuccio park — the same trees, picturesque scenery, hot springs, and a wide variety of flora and fauna, covering 40,000 square meters: as if you were in a corner of a natural paradise. The hotel's NO|MORE Bistrot restaurant changes its menu with the seasons, offering food that is rich and varied in taste.
accommodation.text_zh: 托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店 酒店位于托斯卡纳著名的康养旅游度假地-蒙特卡蒂尼，设计独特，房间装潢典雅，融合了现代与古典，非常舒适和别致。 水疗区设有 2 个泳池（室内和室外），桑拿浴室享有独特的森林景观。酒店的私人公园和环形花园是 Terme Tettuccio 公园的自然延续，同样的树木、如画的景色、温泉、种类繁多的动植物，占地 40,000 平方米：仿佛置身于自然天堂的一隅。酒店的NO|MORE Bistrot 餐厅随季节变化菜单，食物口感丰富多样。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a hidden paradise on the cliffs
Along the long Mediterranean coastline, the little train stops at each beautiful fishing village. Watching the sun-bathed beaches, the waves quietly lapping the rocks, and the colorful houses growing nearer from afar, your curiosity to gaze upon the beautiful villages peaks the moment you arrive. Walking on foot through the alleys of the fishing villages, the closer you get the more delightful it becomes. It is like savoring a five-colored visual feast of delicacies, tasting each flavor bit by bit — a scene so beautiful it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线小火车在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy. Located on the Piazza dei Miracoli to the north of the city of Pisa in Tuscany, Italy, it is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, and has been designated a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. It is said that in the year 1590, Galileo carried out a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's view.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly covered with lawn. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square stand four great buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (the bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Cemetery. Ancient city walls and gates are also preserved around the square. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa, and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five cliffside villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 kilometers long and taking roughly 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other the mountains, and ahead the Italian fishing villages — a destination that countless hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage list.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, and visit the sights of Florence's old town: the world's third-largest cathedral — Santa Maria del Fiore (the Cathedral of Saint Mary of the Flower), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, as well as Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), then proceed to Venice to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Voco Venice (InterContinental) Hotel or Hilton Ambassador Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观佛罗伦萨老城景点：世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。
夜宿： 威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Voco Venice (InterContinental) Hotel or Hilton Ambassador Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels. It enjoys an excellent location, with a stylish modern design, natural-toned guest rooms, and modern interiors that offer you a comfortable and cozy stay. The hotel provides a hearty breakfast, a fully equipped gym, and a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails. The hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian cuisine and delicacies.
accommodation.text_zh: 威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店或同等4星级酒店 酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en:
The glory and splendor of Florence, the radiant brilliance of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world's capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Search for the soul of the Renaissance among blue skies and white clouds, vividly colored walls, dark green shutters, and deep red rooftops; feel the timelessness of the Renaissance in the streets and alleys, the squares and churches, the museums and art galleries. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic spirit of Dante Alighieri and the painting spirit of Da Vinci still drift over the skies of Florence, still continuing to seek out the people and events of the European Renaissance.....''
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利·但丁的诗魂、达·芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier large-span circular-arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the young Beatrice here, and later poured his longing for her into "The Divine Comedy." Over the centuries, it has withstood floods, social unrest, and wars and remained standing. It is one of Florence's famous landmark buildings.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.name_en: Santa Maria del Fiore (Cathedral of Saint Mary of the Flower) (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and magnificent churches in the world, but few are as graceful as this one. This beautiful church, faced with white, red, and green granite, expresses to the fullest the classicism, elegance, and freedom esteemed in the Renaissance era — no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of a new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (the Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and numerous cafés and bars. The famous Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian notables such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring carefully. Around the square are several cafés and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste the local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals, especially in summer, when open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, and for feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off for the water city of Venice. Upon arrival, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings built upon the water, together with the winding water lanes, leave Venice's romantic charm lingering for a long time. Here you can also taste Venice's specialty grand meal — a three-course cuttlefish-ink pasta (at your own expense). Then proceed to Trento to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，出发前往水城威尼斯，到达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝到威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理），随后前往特伦托入住酒店。
夜宿：NH特伦托酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel sits in Trento's ultra-modern science and culture district Le Albere (Le Albere), and is a green hotel that combines a sustainability concept with a sense of design. The hotel was designed by the Italian master architect Renzo Piano; not only are its exterior lines simple and elegant, but its interior also uses eco-friendly materials and energy-saving systems, embodying a dual respect for both nature and the city. Just a few steps out of the hotel is the Trento science museum MUSE, whose highly futuristic architecture and interactive exhibits are impressive. Strolling along the Adige River, you can also easily reach Trento's old town to explore the magnificent Trento Cathedral and charming medieval streets and alleys. If you wish to savor the local cuisine, we recommend walking to Osteria Le Due Spade; this Michelin-recommended restaurant blends traditional Northern Italian flavors with modern culinary techniques, perfect for rewarding your palate after sightseeing; or at the more down-to-earth Ristorante al Vo, try authentic Trentino braised beef and home-brewed wine, also a favorite choice of the locals.
accommodation.text_zh: NH特伦托酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店坐落在特伦托现代感十足的阿尔达通科学文化区（Le Albere），是一家兼具可持续理念与设计感的绿色酒店。酒店由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计，不仅外观线条简约优雅，内部也采用环保材料与节能系统，体现了对自然与城市的双重尊重。走出酒店几步之遥就是特伦托科学博物馆MUSE，极具未来感的建筑与互动展览令人印象深刻。沿着阿迪杰河散步，还能轻松抵达特伦托老城区，探索宏伟的特伦托大教堂和迷人的中世纪街巷。若想品味当地美食，推荐步行前往 Osteria Le Due Spade，这家米其林推荐餐厅融合传统北意风味与现代料理手法，适合在游览后犒赏味蕾；或在更接地气的 Ristorante al Vo 尝一尝地道的Trentino炖牛肉与自酿葡萄酒，也是当地人钟爱的选择。

highlights.text_en:
The world's most beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic" still dazzlingly resplendent
Venice, as one of the major cities of the Renaissance, is made up of 118 small islands, linked together by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on the Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands," and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the most beautiful squares in the world, "St. Mark's Square"; there is the beautiful Grand Canal, the Fenice Opera House reborn from the flames, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs of Xu Zhimo's writings, and breathtakingly beautiful cloisters. This is the birthplace of the Venetian School of painting, and also the filming location of segments of many movies. Her unique temperament leaves every visitor enchanted and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, and to the east rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the center of public activities for Venice's politics, religion, and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: St. Mark's Basilica for short, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in the year 829 and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe and is a classic work of Venetian architectural art; it is at the same time a treasure house holding a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco; Venice's past glory is all here. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you walk across the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through small holes, rather than being like the many people on the bridge opposite looking over toward you at the Bridge of Sighs. Photos are allowed inside, as long as you don't use the flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the path along which the court escorted condemned prisoners to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is of an early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered above by a dome and sealed up very tightly, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and as they passed over this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows — from then on losing their freedom and involuntarily letting out sighs. It is said that lovers who kiss beneath the bridge can be together forever, and the movie "A Little Romance" was filmed here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the old town of Bolzano and stroll through its old-town streets and alleys. Then go to the town of Ortisei, where you can take the cable car to the top of Seceda to look down upon the Dolomite peaks, or go to the Alpe di Siusi plateau meadows to admire the alpine grassland scenery. After that, head to the Val di Funes; upon arriving at the village of Santa Maddalena, take photos of the exterior of St. John's Church (the Lonely Church) in Santa Maddalena, and after the tour return to the hotel.
Overnight: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Since the Seceda and Alpe di Siusi cable cars are located in the high-mountain area of the Alps, in the event of extreme weather or routine maintenance, operations will be suspended in the interest of safety upkeep and maintenance. In such cases, the cable cars cannot be ridden, and the cable car fees will be refunded to the guests.
overview.text_zh:
上午前 往 博尔扎诺老城漫步 于老城街巷。 随后前往奥蒂塞伊小镇，可乘缆车登顶刀锋山俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群，或前往休斯山高原草甸欣赏高山草原风光。之后前往富内斯山谷，抵达圣马达莱娜村后，外观打卡圣马达莱娜村的圣约翰教堂（孤独教堂），游览结束后返回酒店。
夜宿：NH特伦托酒店 或同等4星级酒店
注意：由于刀锋山和休斯山缆车位于阿尔卑斯山脉高山区域，如发生极端天气或例行检修，将暂停营运，以保全安全维护和检修。在此情况下，缆车将无法乘坐，缆车费用将退还给游客。

accommodation.text_en: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel sits in Trento's ultra-modern science and culture district Le Albere (Le Albere), and is a green hotel that combines a sustainability concept with a sense of design. The hotel was designed by the Italian master architect Renzo Piano; not only are its exterior lines simple and elegant, but its interior also uses eco-friendly materials and energy-saving systems, embodying a dual respect for both nature and the city. Just a few steps out of the hotel is the Trento science museum MUSE, whose highly futuristic architecture and interactive exhibits are impressive. Strolling along the Adige River, you can also easily reach Trento's old town to explore the magnificent Trento Cathedral and charming medieval streets and alleys. If you wish to savor the local cuisine, we recommend walking to Osteria Le Due Spade; this Michelin-recommended restaurant blends traditional Northern Italian flavors with modern culinary techniques, perfect for rewarding your palate after sightseeing; or at the more down-to-earth Ristorante al Vo, try authentic Trentino braised beef and home-brewed wine, also a favorite choice of the locals.
accommodation.text_zh: NH特伦特酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店坐落在特伦托现代感十足的阿尔达通科学文化区（Le Albere），是一家兼具可持续理念与设计感的绿色酒店。酒店由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计，不仅外观线条简约优雅，内部也采用环保材料与节能系统，体现了对自然与城市的双重尊重。走出酒店几步之遥就是特伦托科学博物馆MUSE，极具未来感的建筑与互动展览令人印象深刻。沿着阿迪杰河散步，还能轻松抵达特伦托老城区，探索宏伟的特伦托大教堂和迷人的中世纪街巷。若想品味当地美食，推荐步行前往 Osteria Le Due Spade，这家米其林推荐餐厅融合传统北意风味与现代料理手法，适合在游览后犒赏味蕾；或在更接地气的 Ristorante al Vo 尝一尝地道的Trentino炖牛肉与自酿葡萄酒，也是当地人钟爱的选择。

highlights.text_en:
Ride the Seceda cable car and admire the magnificent jagged mountain scenery
The Seceda cable car takes you quickly up to one of the magnificent peaks of the Dolomites — Seceda — known for its peculiar sharp ridges and vast alpine meadows. As you ride the cable car, outside the windows is breathtaking valley and peak scenery; after reaching the summit, the view opens wide, and you can look down upon the rolling ranges of mountains and the tranquil villages. Whether hiking in summer or skiing in winter, Seceda's natural beauty and pure air make people reluctant to leave — it is a paradise for nature lovers.
highlights.text_zh:
乘坐刀锋山（Seceda）缆车，欣赏锯齿状的壮丽山景
刀锋山缆车带你快速登上多洛米蒂山脉中壮丽的山峰-刀锋山，这里以奇特的锐利山脊和广阔的高山草甸闻名。乘坐缆车时，窗外尽是令人屏息的山谷和峰峦景色，抵达山顶后，视野开阔，可以俯瞰连绵起伏的群山和宁静的村庄。无论是夏季徒步还是冬季滑雪，刀锋山的自然美景和纯净空气都让人流连忘返，是大自然爱好者的天堂。

attractions.text_en: The town of Ortisei, this elegant town located in the Val Gardena valley, blends the dual cultural characteristics of Italy and Austria. Its cobblestone streets, traditional wood-carving crafts, and painted houses present travelers with the distinctive charm of South Tyrol. This is also a renowned art and handicraft center of the Dolomites region; after lunch, you might take a short stroll, visit the local craft shops, or enjoy a cup of Alpine-flavored hot chocolate at an outdoor café.
attractions.text_zh: 奥蒂塞伊小镇，这座位于加尔代纳山谷（Val Gardena）山谷中的典雅城镇，融合了意大利与奥地利的双重文化特色。其鹅卵石街道、传统木雕工艺和彩绘房舍为旅人呈现出南蒂罗尔独有的风情。这里也是多洛米蒂地区著名的艺术与手工艺中心，不妨在午餐后稍作散步，参观当地的工艺店铺，或是在露天咖啡座享受一杯阿尔卑斯风味的热巧克力。

attractions.text_en: Seceda is one of the most iconic peaks of the Dolomites; its distinctive jagged ridge and vast plateau scenery are breathtaking. Taking the cable car from Ortisei straight up to the Seceda ridge is one of the best ways to explore the Dolomites. Seceda is famous for its blade-like peak lines and is a paradise for photographers. The summit has a wide-open view, where you can enjoy a short hike or simply quietly admire the vast alpine meadows and the clusters of peculiar rocky peaks, experiencing the tranquility and grandeur of nature.
attractions.text_zh: 刀锋山（Seceda） 是多洛米蒂最具标志性的山峰之一，其独特的锯齿状山脊和辽阔的高原风光令人叹为观止。从奥蒂塞伊搭乘缆车直达刀锋山脊，是探索多洛米蒂山的最佳方式之一。刀锋山以其刀锋状的山峰线条闻名，是摄影师的天堂。山顶视野开阔，您可享受简短的徒步或只是静静欣赏辽阔的高山草原与奇岩峰丛，体验自然的宁静与壮观。

attractions.text_en:
The Alpe di Siusi, located between the Val Gardena valley and the Sciliar peak, borders to the west on the Sciliar-Catinaccio Nature Park. Although it is called a mountain, it is more like an alpine meadow, undulating like waves and forming a drop of around 300 meters. This area has always been excellent pastureland, and paired with the iconic dolomite rock, it is all the more eye-catching. Europe's highest-altitude alpine meadow is on the Alpe di Siusi plateau in the Dolomites of Italy; in spring and summer, this is a sea of flowers; in winter it is a snow-white skiing paradise. Because of its vast expanse, you can also admire many nearby mountain ranges, such as the Sella group, the Catinaccio (Rosengarten) massif, and the Langkofel mountains, and so on.
Note: The Alpe di Siusi plateau cable car is an optional experience and requires a separately purchased ticket; the related fees are not included in the itinerary, please be aware.
attractions.text_zh:
休斯山，位于加尔代纳山谷和施勒恩峰之间，西部与施勒恩峰-卡提纳自然公园接壤。虽然说它是山，却更像是高山草甸，如波浪般起伏，形成300米左右的落差。这一地区一直是优良牧场，搭配上标志性的白云岩，便更加吸引眼球。欧洲的高海拔高山草甸是在意大利多洛米蒂休斯高原，春夏，这里是一片花海；冬天则是白茫茫的滑雪圣地。由于地域广阔，还能欣赏到附近的很多山脉，比如塞拉山组，玫瑰花园闪族和长石山等等。
注意：休斯高原缆车属于可选体验项目，需另行购票，相关费用不包含在行程内，敬请知悉

attractions.text_en: In the heart of the Dolomites in northern Italy — the Val di Funes — the Santa Maddalena Church stands quietly on a small hillside. With its Gothic Revival gray stone walls and tall, upright square bell tower, without ostentatious ornamentation, it forms a wholly natural picture together with the surrounding emerald meadows and the craggy Geisler (Odle) peaks. The morning mist wraps around the foot of the mountains, and the setting sun dyes the mountain body a gentle gold (Enrosadira, the alpenglow on the mountains). Here there is no hubbub, only the sound of bells and the mountain wind — it is a tranquil haven for hikers to rest, and a panoramic vantage point that photographers are unwilling to miss.
attractions.text_zh: 在意大利北部多洛米蒂的心脏 —— 富内斯山谷，圣玛达莱娜教堂静立在小山坡上。哥特复兴的灰色石墙、挺拔的方形钟楼，没有浮夸的装饰，却与四周的翠绿草甸、嶙峋的盖斯勒峰群构成一幅浑然天成的画卷。清晨的薄雾缠绕山脚，夕阳将山体染成温柔的金色（Enrosadira 日照金山），这里没有喧嚣，只有钟声与山风，是徒步者歇脚的宁静港湾，也是摄影师不愿错过的全景机位。

attractions.name_zh: 圣约翰小教堂（孤独教堂）
attractions.text_en: The Maddalena Lonely Church in the Dolomites is a small wooden church, nestled in the Val di Funes in the Italian Alps, with the jagged Geisler peaks at its back. This Baroque-style church was built in 1744, surrounded by vast pastures and forests, with scenery that varies through the four seasons — lush green in spring and summer, golden in autumn, and covered in white snow in winter. Because of its secluded, solitary location and superb mountain backdrop, the church has become a popular spot for photographers, and an ideal starting point for hiking and exploring the valley. The nearby town of Santa Maddalena offers convenient transport and viewing angles, allowing visitors to easily admire this iconic landscape of the Dolomites.
attractions.text_zh: 多洛米蒂山脉的马达莱娜孤独教堂是一座小巧的木质教堂，坐落在意大利阿尔卑斯山的富内斯山谷中，背靠锯齿状的盖斯勒峰。这座巴洛克风格的教堂建于1744年，周围是广阔的牧场和森林，四季景色各异，春夏绿意盎然，秋季金黄一片，冬季则被白雪覆盖。教堂因其遗世独立的位置和绝佳的山景背景，成为摄影师的热门取景地，也是徒步探索山谷的理想起点。附近的Santa Maddalena小镇提供便利的交通和观景视角，让游客能轻松欣赏这一多洛米蒂的标志性景观。

attractions.text_en: Bolzano, the capital of the province of South Tyrol in Italy, lies in the embrace of the Alps and blends the cultural characteristics of Italy and Austria. This city is famous for its well-preserved medieval old town, rich historical relics, and beautiful natural scenery. You can stroll through the cobblestone streets of the old town, admire the Gothic and Renaissance-style architecture, and experience the blending of the Italian and German languages. Walther Square in the city center is the heart of the city, surrounded by historic buildings and cafés, and is an ideal place to feel the local life.
attractions.text_zh: 博尔扎诺（Bolzano），意大利南蒂罗尔省的首府，位于阿尔卑斯山脉的怀抱中，融合了意大利和奥地利的文化特色。这座城市以其保存完好的中世纪老城区、丰富的历史遗迹和美丽的自然景观而闻名。您可以漫步于老城区的鹅卵石街道，欣赏哥特式和文艺复兴风格的建筑，体验意大利和德国语言的交融。市中心的瓦尔特广场是城市的心脏，周围环绕着历史建筑和咖啡馆，是感受当地生活的理想场所。

overview.text_en: In the morning, head to Lake Garda to admire the lake and mountain scenery at the foot of the Alps. In the afternoon, tour Milan, the famous Northern Italian city that combines classical temperament with modern vitality; visit Sforza Castle (exterior); then tour the Gothic masterpiece, the Milan Cathedral, and stroll through the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II to feel the refinement and luxury of Milan. Finally, the pleasant journey comes to an end.
overview.text_zh: 上午 前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色，下午游览 兼具古典气质与现代活力的北意名城米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观）；随后游览哥特式杰作米兰大教堂，漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊，感受米兰的精致与奢华。最后结束愉快旅行 。

accommodation.text_en: No hotel accommodation on this day
accommodation.text_zh: 当天无酒店住宿

highlights.text_en:
Lake Garda (Lago di Garda)
A lake within Italy, it spans the three regions of Lombardy (Lombardia), Veneto (Veneto), and Trentino-Alto Adige (Trentino-Alto Adige). With its lake and mountain scenery converging and its mild, pleasant climate, it is one of the holiday resorts dear to the hearts of Italians. Like a sapphire set at the foot of the Alps, it quietly shines with clear lake light and the languid glow of Southern Europe. It is also a treasure trove, bringing together charming towns, historical relics, fine cuisine, and outdoor activities. Each town has its own charm and unique sights for visitors to admire.
highlights.text_zh:
加尔达湖 Lago di Garda
意大利境内的湖泊，横跨伦巴第（Lombardia）、威尼托（Veneto）与特伦蒂诺-上阿迪杰（Trentino-Alto Adige）三个大区，湖光山色交汇，气候温和宜人，是意大利人心中钟爱的度假胜地之一。它如同一颗镶嵌在阿尔卑斯山脚下的蓝宝石，静静闪耀着清澈湖光与南欧的慵懒光影。它还是一个宝库，汇聚了迷人的城镇、历史遗迹、美食和户外活动。每个城镇都有自己的魅力和独特的景点供游客欣赏。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping arcade, though most tourists who come here come for sightseeing. Under the central arcade is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the very best in Milan, and especially the window displays are updated daily — just standing outside the windows to admire them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is filled with many high-end restaurants, cafés, and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱二世拱廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was first built in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as Italy's most magnificent Gothic architecture, hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and its white marble exterior walls are carved with thousands of statues. The interior space is vast, and sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, the light hazy and full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the cathedral's crypt, relics of the Church of Santa Tecla that stood on the original site are also preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: Sforza Castle is one of Milan's most important buildings and a witness to Milan's turbulent history. Seen from above, the whole castle is like a grand duchy, with high walls on four sides and an exquisitely planned park. Built in the 14th century by Count Sforza as a castle, it later became the residence of the Sforza family, witnessing the whole process from the family's heyday to its decline. The castle is now turned by the Milan municipal government into a museum, which includes the Museum of Applied Arts and Music, the Archaeological Museum, and the Museum of Ancient Art. Its rear gate is the Arch of Peace, named after the renovation by the ruler Francesco.
attractions.text_zh: 斯福尔扎城堡是米兰最重要的建筑之一，是米兰沧桑历史的见证。俯瞰整个城堡像一个大公国，有四面的高墙和精致规划过的公园。在14世纪时由斯福尔扎伯爵作为城堡而建，而后成为斯福尔扎家族的住所，见证了从鼎盛时期到家族衰败的全过程。现城堡被米兰市政府辟为博物馆，其中有应用艺术和乐曲博物馆、考古博物馆、古代艺术博物馆，他的后门是和平门，是统治者费朗西斯科改造得名的。

attractions.text_en: Lake Garda is set between the majestic Alps and the fertile Po Valley. This is one of the most beautiful lakes in Europe, surrounded all around by mountains and small towns, and it is more than just a natural wonder. It is also a treasure trove, bringing together charming towns, historical relics, fine cuisine, and outdoor activities. Wandering along the lake, every casual snapshot is a masterpiece.
attractions.text_zh: 加尔达湖坐落在雄伟的阿尔卑斯山和肥沃的波河谷之间，这里是欧洲最美的湖泊之一，四周被群山和小镇环绕，不仅仅是自然奇观。它还是一个宝库，汇聚了迷人的城镇、历史遗迹、美食和户外活动。漫游湖边，随手一拍都是大片。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lac Léman, straddles Switzerland and France and is an important lake of Western Europe, as well as a renowned scenic area and health resort. During the day you can take a pleasure boat to tour Lake Geneva, and at night you can be enchanted by the shimmering neon lights along the shore; luxury cruise ships also frequently host concerts or dances on the lake. You can take a boat to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shores of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, the snow-capped mountains and the blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Jet d'Eau is located on the waters of Lake Geneva near the English Garden, and is one of the more representative sights of Geneva. The great fountain resembles the spout of a whale, reaching 140 meters high with a water output of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away in the city center. At night there is also a chance to see the fountain illuminated by lights, which is even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦比较具有代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous attraction in Geneva. Switzerland is renowned as the "Garden Country" and at the same time as the "Land of Clocks and Watches." Even more wonderfully, Switzerland's skilled artisans have ingeniously combined the beauty of flowers with the craftsmanship of watchmaking, creating the original "Flower Clock."
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称“花园之国”，同时又是“钟表之乡”，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了“花钟”。

attractions.text_en: The upper town, on the slopes of the right bank of the Rhône, is also called the upper city by local residents because of its higher elevation. It is not only a gathering place of churches and historic sites; among the winding alleys there are also many small and charming antique shops, and the former residence of Rousseau, the thinker of the European Enlightenment era, is also located within the Old Town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is the green-space square in the town center of Interlaken, Switzerland's famous sightseeing town. This greensward was once the garden of a monastery, and now the construction of any buildings on it is forbidden in order to prevent the destruction of this beautiful landscape. This is a great place to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast greensward there is a fountain, dotted with many benches, so it is also a good place for a stroll. Höhematte is also a landing site for hang gliders; there is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, and after paying, staff will take visitors to a nearby mountain for free gliding, from which one can enjoy the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald, located at the northern foot of the Eiger, is a famous postcard-photography spot of the Swiss "dream slopes" beloved by photographers, and is also the Alpine town one must pass through when touring the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen and others, it forms the more magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-watching resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hikers; lakeside, green meadows, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow-capped mountains together make up this captivating town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald)，这里有摄影家心头较为喜爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald First attracts visitors from all directions to come and admire the magnificent scenery of the Eiger's north face. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk by Tissot, anyone will immediately feel they are standing at the top of the world. The Cliff Walk by Tissot is located at the summit of First, where one can take in the unique panorama of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located about twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an elevation of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. Its summit is covered with ice and snow all year round, while at its foot the grass is lush and the scenery beautiful, making it a famous sightseeing and outdoor-sports resort of Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was inscribed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Line train passes through here. Surrounded by mountains and lush with green grass, the rustic village is scattered along the shores of Lake Lungern, looking just like a paradise far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en:
Lake Lucerne
This lake has a winding shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms the classic "lake-and-mountain" scenery, attracting large numbers of tourists to come sightseeing. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight on Lake Lucerne, and so this piece acquired the title "Moonlight" — although this was not Beethoven's own intention.
attractions.text_zh:
卢塞恩湖
这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Set against mountains and water, Lucerne possesses the unique beauty of the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance palaces and mansions, as well as century-old shops and long streets and ancient lanes are everywhere. The lake-and-mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the city's beautiful sights in a dreamlike yet real way, making it the extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small towns. Since the 19th century, it has attracted numerous princes, nobles and literati to come for sightseeing and to reside, and artists have found inexhaustible artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: This statue of a dying lion was carved into the natural rock by a Danish sculptor in 1821. This lion, 10 meters long and more than 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground, a broken spear lodged in its shoulder, with a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms beside it. The statue was made to commemorate the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on August 10, 1792, while protecting the safety of the family of Louis XVI in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; below the statue there is text describing the course of this event. In those days, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, forced by livelihood, went to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave and skilled in battle, but honor and money could not conceal the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this incident, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, retaining only the guard serving the Catholic Holy See, which is the famous Swiss Guard. Because of their famous loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised "the dying lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long; the docks on the lake are filled with all kinds of yachts, looking just like a club for the rich. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center, and on the lake white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere, leisurely and carefree, a scene of harmony. The north shore of Lake Zurich is the residential area of the rich, known as the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." At the end of Bahnhofstrasse lies Lake Zurich; as a "world's most livable city," the lives of true Zurichers are imbued everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also called Station Street) is one of Europe's longer shopping boulevards and one of the most expensive shopping boulevards in the world. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless center of Zurich; here luxury brands from all over the world abound and private banks stand in rows. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless visitors feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet is stored a quantity of gold bars said to be among the world's largest, which makes many people too excited to move their feet. Immersed within it, you can clearly feel the air pervaded with the aura of wealth, luxury and indolence.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: The Grossmünster is one of the 3 main churches of Zurich, Switzerland (the other two being the Fraumünster and ). The church is located near the bank of the Limmat River, with construction begun around 1100 and inaugurated around 1220. This church, facing the Fraumünster across the river, played a pivotal role in the Swiss Reformation of the 16th century; both the Zurich University Faculty of Theology and the Reformation Museum are established here. The stained-glass windows inside the church are masterpieces of the modern Swiss art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most tourists who come here come for sightseeing. Beneath the central arcade there is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the very best in Milan; in particular, the window displays are updated daily, and just standing outside to admire the windows is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele is filled with quite a few high-end restaurants, cafés and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Towering in the city center, Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete; it is praised as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, with hundreds of spires soaring into the clouds and thousands of statues carved on its white marble exterior walls. The interior space is vast, and sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaic paintings on the windows, the light hazy, full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the church's crypt, the relics of the Church of St. Tecla, which once stood on the site, are still preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Abbreviated as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in AD 829 and rebuilt in 1043–1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe and is a classic work of Venetian architectural art; it is at the same time a treasury holding a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco; all of Venice's past glory is here.
