Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons; when going to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, and you can look outside through the small holes, rather than being like the many people on the bridge opposite who look toward you at the Bridge of Sighs. You can take photos inside, as long as you don't use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route by which condemned prisoners were escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is of early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, its upper part covered by a vault and very tightly enclosed, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the gravely guilty were taken to the dungeons; when passing over this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows, and from then on lost their freedom, involuntarily letting out sighs. It is said that lovers who kiss beneath the bridge will be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, and on the east stand the tall campanile and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the public activity center of Venice's political, religious and traditional festival life.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_en: Florence Cathedral (Santa Maria del Fiore) (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but very few churches can be so charming. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets the classicism, elegance and freedom esteemed in the Renaissance era to the fullest; no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of Florence Cathedral was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of a new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria enjoys the reputation of an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and numerous cafés and bars. The famous Florence Cathedral (Santa Maria del Fiore) is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River is also called the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earlier large-span circular-arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing for her into "The Divine Comedy." Over several hundred years, it has stood firm through the floods, social upheavals and wars it experienced. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: The Basilica of Santa Croce is an important church in Florence; it is the church of the Franciscan order and also a fairly standard minor basilica, and the internal structure of most European Catholic churches developed on the basis of this church's form. The Basilica of Santa Croce was designed and built starting in 1294 by Arnolfo di Cambio, and was not preliminarily completed and put into use until 1443, but the entire façade of the church was only added in 1863, and in 1842 the Gothic bell tower behind the church was also added. Inside the church there are monuments and tombs of some heavyweight Florentine celebrities, such as Dante, Michelangelo, Galileo, Machiavelli, Rossini and so on.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字教堂是佛罗伦萨一座重要的教堂，它是圣方济各教派的教堂还是一座相当标准的次级主座教堂，大部分的欧洲天主教堂的内部结构均是在这个教堂的形式基础上发展的。圣十字教堂由阿莫尔福·迪坎比奥于1294年开始设计和建造的，直到1443年才初步完工开始启用，但教堂的整个立面是1863年才增建的，1842年还增建了教堂后面的哥特式钟楼。教堂内有一些发佛罗伦萨重量级名人的纪念碑和陵墓，例如：但丁、米开朗基罗、伽利略、马基维利、罗西尼等等。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for these five cliffside villages and towns: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that links the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15–20 kilometers long, taking about 5 hours, with the Mediterranean on one side, the mountains on the other, and Italian fishing villages ahead — a place that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa, Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany province of Italy. It is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, selected by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. It is said that in AD 1590, Galileo once performed a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa, and overturned Aristotle's viewpoint.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa; on the square there are four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (campanile), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto Monumentale (cemetery). Around the square the ancient city walls and gates are still preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval ancient city, is full of the masterpieces of art masters and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient and crisscrossing stone-slab alleys and the deep, secluded courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you are placed in the European Middle Ages of a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprise. This city has, for several centuries, maintained a complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the fourteenth century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the culinary preparation of desserts. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties — almond soft biscuits ricciarelli, nut tart panforte, peppery spiced nut cake pan pepato, rice pudding budini di riso, walnut biscuits cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: The Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena, one of the larger surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly opposite the square are the Siena city hall and tower; inside the city hall is the civic museum, which holds numerous paintings of the Sienese school, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is the Torre del Mangia; it is the tallest building in Siena and the second tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of steps to take in the beautiful scenery of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳较高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: The Torre del Mangia is adjacent to the city hall and is the tallest tower of medieval Italy. In the mid-14th century, the outbreak of the Black Death in the city took away nearly 2/3 of the population and also dealt a huge blow to the city's development. After the disaster, the survivors added a marble loggia to the tower to commemorate the Virgin Mary. Inside the tower there are 332 narrow steps in all, and one can climb to the top to take in the scenery of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 曼吉亚塔楼紧邻市政厅，是意大利中世纪较高的塔楼。14世纪中期，城内黑死病的爆发夺走了近2/3的人口，也使城市发展受到巨大打击。灾难过后，幸存者们为塔楼加上一个大理石的凉廊，以此来纪念圣母玛利亚。楼内共有332级狭窄的台阶，可以攀登到顶，一览锡耶纳风光。

attractions.text_en: Pienza is a comune in the Province of Siena in the Tuscany region of central Italy, adjacent to Montalcino. It is one of the earliest ideal towns of the Renaissance, founded by the Roman Pope Pius II; the purpose of its founding at the time was to renovate his poor hometown and use it as a summer retreat for the Roman Pope. In 1996, it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List. The architecture here is Gothic in style and influenced by German style. The town's main square is the Piazza Pio II, which contains the main 15th-century buildings, such as the cathedral (built 1459–1462), the Piccolomini Palace, the Bishop's Palace, and the council hall with a crenellated tower (built 1462).
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎（Pienza）是意大利中部托斯卡纳大区锡耶纳省的一个市镇，毗邻蒙塔尔奇诺，它是文艺复兴时期最早的理想小镇，由罗马教皇PiusII创立，当时创立的目的是为了翻新给他贫穷的家乡并把此作为罗马教皇的避暑地。1996年，被列入联合国世界遗产名录。这里的建筑呈哥特风，并受德式风格的影响。小镇的主要广场是PiazzaPioII，广场里包含15世纪的主要建筑，如教堂（建于1459-1462）、皮科洛米尼宫（PiccolominiPalace、主教宫、带有锯齿形塔的大会堂（建于1462）。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road planted on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of the Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and check in.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns; it is a unique convergence of art and nature, holding abundant historical imprints. Its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the concept of "good government" of the Italian city-states.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum, located in the center of Rome, was built by ancient Rome at the time to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was a place exclusively for slave owners, nobles and free men to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat of slaves, and is one of the more famous historical relics of Rome. The Colosseum can be called a model masterpiece and miracle in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for being huge, grand and spectacular. Although only a little more than half of its skeleton remains, its grandeur of spirit and its majestic momentum still survive.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马较著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years to this day; the artist Raphael, the Roman king Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, among others, rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, the son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called the classic building of the Augustan period, a model of ancient Rome's superb architectural technology, and was praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Hepburn's fresh and bright figure seems to have already merged with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. The whole Spanish Square is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The Steps have 138 steps in all, and are the widest steps in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also called the "Maiden Fountain," or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the victorious return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology; the whole is imposing and grand. It is said that if you stand with your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and if you can toss it into the water, your dream will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
On the afternoon of the day you will join the tour at the Ibis Budget Avignon Centre in the old town of Avignon, then begin a journey through Provence's stunning little towns, visiting in turn: Fontaine de Vaucluse, the old town of Gordes, and Sénanque Abbey. Afterwards you will head to Avignon to explore the old town of Avignon on your own, the Pont d'Avignon (broken bridge over the Rhône) (exterior), and the Palais des Papes (Papal Palace) (exterior), then check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Ibis Avignon Centre Pont de l'Europe or Ibis Avignon Sud or an equivalent 2-3 star hotel
overview.text_zh:
当天下午在 阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店（Ibis Budget Avignon Centre） 上团，之后开启普罗旺斯绝美小镇之旅，依次游览：泉水小镇、高德古城、塞南克修道院。 之后前往阿维尼翁，自行参观阿维尼翁古城，罗纳河断桥（外观），阿维尼翁教皇宫（外观），随后入住酒店。
夜宿： 阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店或阿维尼翁南宜必思酒店或同等2-3星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Ibis Avignon Centre old town or Ibis Avignon Sud or an equivalent 2-3 star hotel. The carefully selected Ibis Avignon Centre old town hotel is superbly located, within walking distance of the Palais des Papes, making it convenient for you to freely explore the old town of Avignon, the city ramparts, the broken bridge over the Rhône, the Palais des Papes and other sights in the evening. This is especially true during the Avignon Theatre Festival: every July this place becomes the capital of theatre and street art, with magnificent puppet shows, operas, contemporary street art performances and concerts, and all-night street theatre performances lighting up the entire Avignon night. Hotels outside the old town simply cannot deliver the immersive experience of the festival's lively atmosphere and the enjoyment of its performances.
accommodation.text_zh: 阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店或阿维尼翁南宜必思酒店或同等2-3星级酒店 精心选择位置优越的阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店，可步行到达教皇宫，为您晚上自由参观阿维尼翁古城，环城护城墙，罗纳河断桥，阿维尼翁教皇宫等景点提供便利，尤其是阿维尼翁戏剧节期间,每年的7月份这里是戏剧及街头艺术的首都，精彩绝伦的木偶剧，歌剧，当代街头艺术表演及音乐会，通宵的街头戏剧表演点亮整个阿维尼翁的夜晚，古城外的酒店根本无法满足沉浸式体验戏剧节的热闹和观赏戏剧节的表演。

highlights.text_en:
Visit the old town of Gordes — the prototype of the "Castle in the Sky" depicted by Hayao Miyazaki
The buildings in the town were all built in the Middle Ages; the winding cobblestone roads climbing upward, the ivy-wrapped stone benches before the doorways, the flowers in front of the abbey, the distinctive style — this tranquil and rustic little town is like a history book, vividly displaying the appearance of the Middle Ages.
highlights.text_zh:
拜访宫崎骏笔下《天空之城》的原型——高德古城
城中建筑均建于中世纪，蜿蜒而上的碎石路，青藤环绕的门前石凳，修道院前的鲜花，独特的风格，宁谧古朴的小镇仿佛一部史书，将中世纪的风貌活灵活现的展示。

attractions.text_en: Fontaine de Vaucluse, the Provence spring-water town, is about half an hour's drive from Avignon. It is a well-known spring-water resort village in southern France, with a distinctive Provençal charm. The town is rustic and small, nestling quietly beside the spring water. In the scorching summer, however, the residents here never feel that oppressive heat: the cool spring water flowing down from the mountains carries away the sweltering air and brings wave upon wave of refreshing coolness.
attractions.text_zh: 普罗旺斯泉水小镇（Fontaine de vaucluse），离 Avignon 大约半小时的路程，它是南法知名的泉水度假小村，具有别致的普罗旺斯风情，小镇古朴而小巧，静静的依偎在泉水之畔。炎炎夏日，这里的居民却体会不到那份酷暑难当，从山中流淌来的清凉泉水，带走了炙热的空气，送来了一波波爽人清凉。

attractions.text_en: In a valley across from the Luberon mountains stands an ancient town built into the hillside — stone walls, houses, slopes and a castle, set against the blue sky and white clouds. This is the very famous tourist destination of the Provence region — Gordes, also translated as "Gaode". This hilltop ancient town once drew many artists to linger here; the 16th-century Gordes castle stands prominently at the summit, housing the works of many artists. In the small towns of France, an artistic atmosphere is everywhere — a signboard, a shop window, all appear so exquisite. The brightly coloured handicrafts and postcards catch children's eyes; how delightful it is to browse the little shops.
attractions.text_zh: 在吕贝隆山区对面的山谷里，有一座依山而建的古城，石壁、房屋、山坡、城堡，映衬着蓝天白云，这就是普罗旺斯地区非常有名的旅游胜地——勾禾德，也有译作“高德”。这座山丘古城曾经吸引了许多艺术家在此停留，山顶上16世纪的高德城堡卓然矗立，里面收藏了许多艺术家的作品。法国的小镇，艺术气息无处不在，一个招牌，一个橱窗，都显得那么的精致。色彩绚丽的手工艺品和明信片吸引着孩子们的眼球，逛小店是件多么开心的事情啊。

attractions.text_en: Sénanque Abbey is located 2 kilometres north of the stone town. It was built in 1148 by the monks of Mazan Abbey. The entire abbey is hidden in a tranquil valley and is also the backdrop for the story in the book "A Year in Provence". It is hailed as one of the "most beautiful valleys in all of France", and most postcards are shot here. Even so, the scale of the lavender fields here is relatively small, and sometimes there are quite dense crowds of tourists, so please try to stay quiet during your visit.
attractions.text_zh: 塞南克修道院位于石头城小镇北方 2 公里处, 它是由 Mazan 修道院的僧侣们修建于 1148 年，整个修道院隐藏在宁静的山谷中，也是《山居岁月》一书的故事背景。这里被称为“全法国美丽山谷”之一，大部分明信片都取景于此。尽管如此，这里的熏衣草花田规模却相对较小，有时候游客较为密集，参观的时候请尽量保持安静。

attractions.text_en: Avignon (called Yawennong in Taiwan) is a world-famous historical and cultural city, the heart of Provence, and is also known as the "City of Popes". It is also the venue of the world-famous Avignon Theatre Festival; every July this place becomes a holy land for theatre lovers. Not far to the east of the city of Avignon lies the setting of the book "A Year in Provence" — the Luberon mountains (Luberon), dotted with distinctive towns and stretches of lavender fields. To the west of the city are Arles and Saint-Rémy-de-Provence, where Van Gogh once lived, along with the sunflowers he depicted in his paintings, as well as many Roman remains, such as the Pont du Gard and the Arènes de Nîmes (Nîmes Arena). To the north of the city is the new favourite of wine lovers in recent years — Châteauneuf-du-Pape.
attractions.text_zh: 阿维尼翁Avigon(台湾称亚维农)，她是世界历史文化名城，普罗旺斯的心脏，还被称为“教皇之城”。这里还是世界著名戏剧节阿维尼翁戏剧节的举办地，每年的7月这里就成为了戏剧爱好者的圣地。阿维尼翁城东不远处，便是《山居岁月》一书的背景地——吕贝隆山区(Luberon)，其间布满各具特色的小镇和一片片的熏衣草花田；城市往西则是梵高当年居住的阿尔勒和圣雷米(Saint-Rémy-de-provence)，以及他画中描绘的向日葵，还有很多罗马遗迹，比如：加尔桥(Pontdugard)、尼姆竞技场(ArènesdeNîmes)等；城市北方则是近年葡萄酒爱好者的新宠——教皇新堡。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off for the lavender fields of Valensole and along the D907 road (during the lavender blooming season). Immerse yourself in the romantic sea of flowers and leave behind purple memories. In the afternoon, visit Europe's canyon — the Verdon Gorge and Lake Sainte-Croix. Then head to Cannes, the film capital and seaside town of southern France, to visit the Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame, and stroll freely along the Cannes seafront promenade. In the evening arrive at Nice.
Overnight: B&B Hôtel Nice Arénas or an equivalent 3 star hotel
Note: Depending on the temperature, the lavender will bloom in mid-to-late June, varying with altitude and the cultivated variety, and is generally harvested by late July. If the lavender cannot be visited during the tour dates, it will be changed to a visit to the pottery town.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路的薰衣草花田（薰衣草花期期间），置身浪漫花海，留下紫色记忆；下午前往游览欧洲峡谷——凡尔登大峡谷以及圣十字湖。随后前往南法电影重镇及海滨小城-戛纳，参观影节宫、星光大道，自由漫步戛纳海滨大道。傍晚抵达尼斯。
夜宿：B B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店
备注：根据不同的气温薰衣草将会在6月中下旬绽放，不同海拔高度和种植品种、一般截止到7月下旬收割。如团期内无法参观薰衣草，则更改为参观陶瓷小镇。

accommodation.text_en: B&B Hôtel Nice Arénas or an equivalent 3 star hotel. The hotel is superbly located, adjacent to the Phoenix Park and the Museum of Asian Art, close to the beach and the old town of Nice, and just a few minutes' travel from the Promenade des Anglais to reach the beach and enjoy the charming scenery. The hotel's overall décor style is modern and minimalist, with a clean and bright environment; all rooms are equipped with Bultex bedding to ensure you a comfortable sleep. It has a restaurant serving French-flavoured cuisine where you can enjoy local specialities; the hotel's buffet breakfast is rich and delicious, not to be missed.
accommodation.text_zh: B B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店 酒店地理位置优越，毗邻凤凰园和亚洲艺术博物馆，靠近海滩、尼斯老城区，距离盎格鲁大道，只需几分钟的交通即可抵达海滩，尽享迷人景色。酒店整体装修风格现代简约，环境整洁明亮，所有客房均配备 Bultex 床上用品，确保您拥有舒适睡眠。拥有一间供应法式风味美食的餐厅，可以享用当地的特色美食；酒店的自助早餐丰盛美味，不容错过。

highlights.text_en:
The flower fields join together into a sea, chasing the romantic flower language of lavender
Every year as summer arrives, the lavender fields of Provence burst into bloom over vast stretches, the entire air filled with the faint fragrance of lavender. Check in at the romantic and beautiful filming location of Chiung Yao's "Deep in the Cloudy Curtain Once More", chase the flower language of lavender awaiting love, and immerse yourself in the sea-like flower fields...
highlights.text_zh:
花田连缀成海，追寻薰衣草浪漫花语
每年入夏，普罗旺斯的薰衣草花田就会大片盛开，整个空气里都弥漫着薰衣草淡淡的花香，打卡琼瑶《又见一帘幽梦》浪漫唯美的拍摄地，追寻着薰衣草等待爱情的花语，沉浸如海花田……

attractions.text_en: Valensole has the beautiful lavender fields of the Provence region. Driving from the Valensole Lavande lavender sea to Lac de Sainte-Croix (Lake Sainte-Croix) takes about 40 minutes. It was selected by National Geographic magazine as one of the most beautiful places in the world, and it is also the filming location of Chiung Yao's novels of the same name, "Dreams Behind a Curtain" and "Dreams Behind a Curtain Once More".
attractions.text_zh: 瓦朗索勒拥有普罗旺斯地区美丽的薰衣草花田。开车从瓦朗索勒薰衣草海洋Valensole Lavande 到Lac de Sainte-Croix圣十字湖，大约需要40分钟左右。国家地理杂志评选为世界上美丽的地方之一，同时，这里也是琼瑶同名小说《一帘幽梦》和《又见一帘幽梦》的拍摄地。

attractions.name_en: The Verdon Gorge and Lake Sainte-Croix
attractions.name_zh: 凡尔登大峡谷和圣十字湖
attractions.text_en: The Verdon Gorge is the world's second-largest canyon. This canyon, 25 kilometres long and 700 metres deep, lies within the Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur region and is famous throughout Europe for its magnificent scenery. From a commanding, unique vantage point, Lake Sainte-Croix looks like a flat piece of emerald set among the mountains. Here there are sheer cliffs, gurgling streams, lake water clear to the bottom, and continuous rolling mountains. Sitting on the cliff-side viewing platform above the gorge and the lake, in this moment you will forget the entire world.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔登大峡谷是世界第二大峡谷，这座25公里长，700米深的峡谷就在普罗旺斯-蔚蓝海岸大区里，因其壮美的景色而闻名于欧洲。以居高临下独特的视角，圣十字湖仿佛一片平整的翡翠，镶嵌在群山之中。这里有万丈的绝壁，潺潺的小溪，清可见底的湖水，更有连绵的山峦。坐在峡谷于湖面的悬崖景观台上，这一刻会忘记整个世界。

attractions.name_en: The Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame
attractions.text_en: Built in 1982, it is an important meeting venue for the Cannes Film Festival, where the much-anticipated Palme d'Or is awarded. The Palais des Festivals currently has a total exhibition area of 44,000 square metres, containing 15 concert halls. The Walk of Fame is one of the not-to-be-missed sights in Cannes; located beside the Palais des Festivals, here you can see the handprints pressed into the pavement by many stars, now accumulated to more than 300.
attractions.text_zh: 建于 1982 年，是戛纳影展的重要会议地点，备受注目的金棕榈奖即在此颁发。电影宫目前总共有 44000 平方米的展览面积，内含 15 个音乐厅星光大道是到戛纳不可错过的景点之一，位于电影宫旁，可以在这里看到许多明星在这里的人行道上按下的手印，现在已经累计了有300 多个了。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Menton to visit the "Lemon Town", then proceed to the Principality of Monaco to visit Monaco and the yacht marina. Afterwards head to the cliff town of Èze and gaze down at the Mediterranean from the "eagle's nest" full of Mediterranean flavour. After the visit, return to Nice and freely visit the Angel's Bay beach in Nice, the Promenade des Anglais in Nice and other sights.
Overnight: B&B Hôtel Nice Arénas or an equivalent 3 star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往芒通游览“柠檬小镇”，随后前往摩纳哥公国，参观摩纳哥及游艇码头。随后前往悬崖小镇-埃兹，从充满地中海风情的“鹫巢”俯眺地中海；参观结束返回尼斯，自由参观尼斯天使湾沙滩、尼斯英格兰海滨大道等景点。
夜宿：B B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: B&B Hôtel Nice Arénas or an equivalent 3 star hotel. The hotel is superbly located, adjacent to the Phoenix Park and the Museum of Asian Art, close to the beach and the old town of Nice, and just a few minutes' travel from the Promenade des Anglais to reach the beach and enjoy the charming scenery. The hotel's overall décor style is modern and minimalist, with a clean and bright environment; all rooms are equipped with Bultex bedding to ensure you a comfortable sleep. It has a restaurant serving French-flavoured cuisine where you can enjoy local specialities; the hotel's buffet breakfast is rich and delicious, not to be missed.
accommodation.text_zh: B B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店 酒店地理位置优越，毗邻凤凰园和亚洲艺术博物馆，靠近海滩、尼斯老城区，距离盎格鲁大道，只需几分钟的交通即可抵达海滩，尽享迷人景色。酒店整体装修风格现代简约，环境整洁明亮，所有客房均配备 Bultex 床上用品，确保您拥有舒适睡眠。拥有一间供应法式风味美食的餐厅，可以享用当地的特色美食；酒店的自助早餐丰盛美味，不容错过。

highlights.text_en:
The cliff road of the Côte d'Azur
This cliff road named after Monaco's Princess Grace (AV. PRINCESSE DE GRACE) passes through the beautiful scenery of the Côte d'Azur and the summit of the seaside town of Villefranche-sur-Mer. Driving along the coastline of the cliff road, stopping and going at the seaside, you search for beautiful seaside photo spots.
highlights.text_zh:
蔚蓝海岸峭壁公路
这条以摩纳哥格蕾丝公主命名的峭壁公路 （AV.PRINCESSE DE GRACE） 途径蔚蓝海岸美丽风景和海滨自由城的顶端，行车在峭壁公路海岸线上的海滨测停停走走，寻找美丽海滨的拍摄点。

attractions.text_en: The distinctively Mediterranean "eagle's nest" town of Èze — its exotic garden, a town of pure classical Monégasque style, has a Mediterranean garden planted at its summit and also occupies a prime position for viewing the magnificent cliff scenery. It is at the same time the back garden of the famous French Chèvre d'Or hotel, and also a wonderful spot for a bird's-eye view of the beautiful Mediterranean scenery. Various Mediterranean-characteristic plants complement the classical town.
attractions.text_zh: 特有的地中海风情“鹫巢”小镇——埃兹异国风情花园，纯古典摩纳哥风格的小镇，山顶种植有地中海花园，也坐落着观看悬崖美景的佳位，同时是法国有名的金羊酒店的后花园，也是鸟瞰地中海美景的美妙位置。各种地中海特色植物与古典小镇相应。

attractions.text_en: The Perfume Museum, located at the foot of Èze mountain, quietly and serenely tells people the story of perfume. The museum was completed in 1983 and is full of the flavour of the Mediterranean. The Perfume Museum aims to preserve France's renowned perfume industry and promote the development of its perfume industry internationally. The museum has exhibition halls in the 18th-century architectural style, mainly divided into three principal areas: the production process area, the perfume history area, and the spice collection area. Here, people can not only learn about the historical development of perfume, the blending process and production methods of perfume, but also discover rare perfume varieties found in few places in the world.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落在埃兹山下的香水博物馆，宁静安详的向人们诉说着香水的故事。该馆于1983年落成，充满了地中海的味道。香水博物馆，旨在保存法国享有盛名的香水工业和促进其香水工业在国际上的发展。馆中有着十八世纪建筑风格的展览厅，主要分三个主要区域：生产过程区，香水历史区和香料收藏品区。在这里，人们不仅可以了解香水的历史发展，香水的调配过程和生产方式，还可以发现世界上少有的香水品种。

attractions.text_en: As the most densely populated country in the world and a classic micro-state, Monaco has a land area of only 2 square kilometres. Benefiting from its city sightseeing and seaside sightseeing income, Monaco is also one of the wealthiest countries; among them, Monaco's yacht harbour and Monte Carlo are the most representative tour areas.
attractions.text_zh: 作为世界上人口稠密的国家和经典的微型国家，摩纳哥国土面积仅有2平方公里，得利于城市观光及海滨观光收入，摩纳哥也是最富裕的国家之一、其中摩纳哥的游艇海港和蒙特卡洛为最具有代表性的游览区域。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Nice has perfectly preserved various styles of ancient buildings dating from the 18th century onward, such as Baroque-style churches and Italian-style buildings. Walk into the labyrinth-like old town and stroll through the high-and-low winding, crisscrossing lanes, admiring the brightly coloured buildings of varied styles, and hunting for treasures in the distinctive little shops. If you walk to the Cours Saleya market square, all sorts of vivid fruits, candies and fresh flowers immediately come into view, dazzling the eyes.
attractions.text_zh: 尼斯的老城区，这里完好地保留了18世纪以来的各种风格的古老建筑，如巴洛克风格的教堂，意大利风格的建筑物等。走进迷宫般的老城区，在高低蜿蜒，纵横曲折的小巷中漫步，欣赏颜色鲜明，风格各异的建筑，在各具特色的小店中淘宝。如果走到萨雷雅的广场集市(CoursSaleya)，各种鲜艳的水果、糖果、鲜花立刻映入眼帘，令人目不暇接。

attractions.text_en: Just like the citrus fruits abundantly produced locally, Menton is wrapped in lemon tones. Whether the long beaches, the various styles of buildings, or the stretches of citrus orchards, all seem to have become nature's palette, dyeing this seaside town a special yellow in the height of summer. Lose yourself at the crossroads of Menton's old town, walk through the narrow and quiet streets between light and shadow, admire the Baroque-style architecture, feel the sea breeze weaving among the houses, and setting foot on the "Lemon Route" will make you reluctant to leave.
attractions.text_zh: 和当地盛产的柑橘类水果一样，芒东被柠檬色调所包裹。无论是修长的海滩，各式各样的建筑，还是成片的柑橘果园，仿佛都成为了自然的调色板，在盛夏时节为这座海滨小镇染上了特别的黄色。迷失在芒东老城区的十字路口，走过光与影之间狭窄而安静的街道，欣赏巴洛克式风格的建筑，感受穿梭在房屋之间的海风，踏上“柠檬之路”将会让你流连忘返。

overview.text_en:
In the morning head to Saint-Raphaël, a major seaside town on the Côte d'Azur, then proceed to Sainte-Maxime to board a boat and cruise the Mediterranean, sailing directly to the city of marine art, Saint-Tropez;
Afterwards take a bus to Arles to visit the old town of Arles and the Van Gogh Café, and admire the brilliant sunflower fields under the sky.
In the evening arrive at the city of the water spirit — Nîmes — and check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Ibis Styles Nîmes Gare Centre or an equivalent 3 star hotel
Note: The sunflower blooming period is June-July; if the climate is hot and the sunflowers are harvested early, the sunflower fields cannot be visited.
overview.text_zh:
早上前往蔚蓝海岸海滨重镇-圣拉斐尔，随后前往圣马克西姆乘船出海巡游地中海，直达海洋艺术之城圣特罗佩；
随后乘坐巴士前往阿尔勒，参观阿尔勒老城区，梵高咖啡馆，欣赏天空下灿烂的向日葵花田。
傍晚抵达水精灵之城-尼姆，入住酒店。
夜宿：尼姆火车站中心宜必思尚品酒店或同等3星级酒店
备注：向日葵花期6月-7月，如气候炎热，向日葵提前收割，则无法游览向日葵花田。

accommodation.text_en: Ibis Styles Nîmes Gare Centre or an equivalent 3 star hotel. The hotel is located in the urban area of Nîmes, superbly positioned, just a few steps from the train station and the old town, within walking distance of the Nemausus and the Nîmes Arena. Here you can explore architectural treasures, such as the well-preserved ancient Roman arena, the Maison Carrée (square temple), the Tour Magne, the Roman Museum and the Nîmes theatre, letting you feel as if time has turned back and appreciate the charming scenery. The hotel rooms are clean and comfortable, fully equipped, with modern-style architecture, providing you a comfortable stay. The restaurant offers a rich buffet breakfast every day, and there is also a café, bar and games room to meet guests' diverse needs.
accommodation.text_zh: 尼姆火车站中心宜必思尚品酒店或同等3星级酒店 酒店位于尼姆市区，地理位置优越，距火车站和老城仅几步之遥，可步行到达内毛苏斯和尼姆竞技场，您可以在此探索建筑瑰宝，例如保存完好的古罗马竞技场、方形神殿、马涅塔、罗马博物馆和尼姆剧院，让您感受时光倒流，领略迷人的风光。酒店客房简洁舒适，设施齐全，拥有现代风格的建筑，为您提供舒适的住宿体验。餐厅每天提供丰盛的自助早餐，同时配备咖啡厅、酒吧、游戏厅，满足客人的多样需求。

highlights.text_en:
A touch of blue forgotten by God
Take a boat across the Côte d'Azur to the laid-back holiday spot of Sainte-Maxime and Saint-Tropez, which is known as the "City of the Sun" of France's brilliant summer, savouring the charm of the Côte d'Azur and embracing the Mediterranean (cruise duration about 20 minutes).
highlights.text_zh:
上帝遗忘的一抹蓝
乘船横渡蔚蓝海岸的松弛感度假地圣马克西姆与拥有法国璀璨夏天“太阳城”之称的圣特罗佩，品味蔚蓝海岸风情，拥抱地中海（游船时长约20分钟）。

attractions.text_en: A 15-minute walk from the harbour of Fréjus along the sandy beach of the Côte des Roses (Rose Coast) brings you to Saint-Raphaël. Very different from the tranquil Fréjus, Saint-Raphaël has very lively bars, restaurants, boutique shops, and seaside bathing beaches crowded with people everywhere, so Saint-Raphaël is called the carnival of the hinterland of the southern French coast.
attractions.text_zh: 从弗雷瑞斯海港沿着玫瑰海岸的沙滩徒步15分钟到达圣拉斐尔，与宁静的弗雷瑞斯大为不同，圣拉斐尔拥有非常热闹的酒吧，餐厅，精品小店，及四处充满人流的海水浴场，因此圣拉斐尔被成为南法海岸腹地的狂欢节。

attractions.text_en: Saint-Tropez is a town in the Var department of France's Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur region, about 100 kilometres from the regional capital Marseille, with the nickname "City of the Sun". This small city on the Côte d'Azur is said to have the most beautiful beaches in France. The beaches here do not stretch for dozens of kilometres like other tourist destinations, but are made up of nearly a hundred small beaches of nearly a thousand square metres each. Luxury hotels and private villas occupy these silver-sanded beaches; once the height of summer arrives, the bays there are moored full of long, elegant yachts, especially the 1930s-style Italian Riva speedboats.
attractions.text_zh: 圣特罗佩是法国普罗旺斯-阿尔卑斯-蓝色海岸大区瓦尔省的一个镇，距离大区首府马赛约100公里，别称“太阳城”。这座位于蔚蓝海岸的小城，号称拥有法国美丽的海滩。这里的海滩并不像其他旅游地一样绵延几十公里，而是由近百个近千平方米的小型海滩组成。豪华的酒店和私人别墅占据了这些银沙满地的海滩，一到盛夏季节，那里的海湾便泊满了修长优雅的游艇，尤其以20世纪30年代风格的意大利Riva快艇居多。

attractions.text_en: Arles is one of the important destinations of Provence tourism, rustic and full of artistic atmosphere. Besides a series of sights related to Van Gogh, it is also a city where ancient Roman remains of southern France are concentrated, hailed as the "Little Rome of the Gauls". Arles prospered because of Julius Caesar's occupation; it became world-renowned because of Van Gogh's paintings. Van Gogh is the symbol and pride of this small town. He not only painted here, but the final stage of his life was also spent here. Most of the prototypes of his paintings originate from here. Here you can feel Van Gogh's footprints everywhere.
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔勒是普罗旺斯旅游的重要目的地之一，古朴而充满着艺术气息，这里除了一系列与梵高有关的景点以外，还是南法古罗马遗迹集中的城市，被誉为“高卢人的小罗马”。Arles因凯撒大帝的占领，而得到繁荣；因梵高的画作，而蜚声世界。梵高是这个小镇的象征和骄傲。他不仅仅在这里作画，人生的终途也是在这里走过的。他画作的大部分原型都是源于这里。在这里随处都能感受到梵高的足迹。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, take a walking tour of the old town of Nîmes, the city of the water spirit, exploring the glory and mystery of ancient Rome and the mysterious garden. Then set off from Nîmes to the Ibis Budget Avignon Centre in the old town of Avignon to end the tour, concluding the southern France journey.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后徒步参观水精灵之城尼姆古城，探索古罗马的辉煌和神秘花园。随后从尼姆出发前往阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店（Ibis Budget Avignon Centre）下团，结束南法旅程。

accommodation.text_en: No accommodation on this day
accommodation.text_zh: 当天无住宿

highlights.text_en:
Explore the city of the water spirit
Starting from the Avenue Feuchères (the water spring avenue) at the Nîmes train station, learn about the architectural structure of the ancient Roman aqueduct bridge, then head to the mysterious garden to explore the glory of ancient Rome on foot.
highlights.text_zh:
探索水精灵之城
从尼姆火车站的水泉大道Avenue feucheres了解古罗马时期水渠桥的建筑结构开始前往神秘花园，徒步探索古罗马的辉煌。

attractions.text_en: An ancient historical city of the ancient Roman period, Nîmes brings together so many astonishing crystallisations of ancient Roman wisdom: the well-preserved ancient Roman arena; the historic courtyard spring-side park (le Jardin de la Fontaine), as if hinting that Nîmes is a warm city that lives by its springs; and the ancient Roman watchtower on the hill, the Tour Magne (la Tour de Magne) — climb high and gaze far, and you can take in the boundless scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 古罗马时期的历史古城，尼姆汇集了太多古罗马人令人惊叹的智慧结晶：保存完好的古罗马竞技场；古迹庭院泉边公园(le Jardin de la Fontaine)，像在暗示尼姆即是一座以泉为生的暖城；还有丘陵上的古罗马瞭望塔马涅塔(la Tour de Magne)，登高远望，可将无限风光尽收眼底。

attractions.text_en: The architectural feature of the Maison Carrée is its Corinthian columns. This building is about 17 metres high and 26 metres deep, built in the 1st century BC in the era of Emperor Augustus (Auguste). It preserved the form of a Roman-period temple exactly as it was. After the temple was built, it once served as the city hall and a church, and now it is the Museum of Antiquities (Musée des Antiques).
attractions.text_zh: 方形神殿的建筑特色是科林斯式的圆柱。这座建筑高约17米，深26米，建于公元前1世纪的奥古斯都大帝(Auguste)时代，它把罗马时期的神殿形式原原本本的保留了下来。神殿建成后曾作为市政府大楼和教堂，现在则为古代博物馆(Musee des Antigues)。

attractions.text_en: The mysterious garden built over a thousand years ago — the historic courtyard spring-side park — can be called a great architectural marvel; a well-preserved complex of ancient Roman buildings and parkland scenery. Because Nîmes at that time was a city that developed centred around its spring water, people firmly believed that the spring water had a spirit, and the spring-side park was the garden built by the people of that time to dedicate to the spirit of the spring.
attractions.text_zh: 建于一千多年前的神秘花园——古迹庭院泉边公园，堪称一大建筑奇迹；保存完好的古罗马建筑群和林园景观，因当时的尼姆是以泉水为中心发展而成的都市，所以人们深信泉水是有精灵的，而泉边公园就是当时人们为了奉献给泉水的精灵而建造出来的庭园。

attractions.text_en: Senja Island is a dazzling jewel of northern Norway. Because the island encompasses Norway's various landscapes, it is hailed as a "miniature" of Norway. Senja is renowned for its magnificent natural scenery, its long-lasting aurora outbreak season, abundant wild marine animals, and Norway's uniquely tranquil fishing villages, making it a paradise for adventure lovers and nature enthusiasts.
attractions.text_zh: 塞尼亚岛（Senja）是挪威北部的一颗璀璨明珠，因为岛上拥有挪威的各种地貌，被誉为挪威的“缩影”。塞尼亚岛以其壮丽的自然风光、长时段的北极光爆发期、丰富的野生海洋动物、挪威独特的宁静的渔村而闻名，是探险爱好者和自然爱好者的天堂。

attractions.text_en: Tungeneset Viewpoint is located at the tip of the headland between Steinsfjord and the Elf Fjord (Ersfjord). This section of footbridge made of Siberian larch spans the rocks, offering views of the sharp peaks of the Okshornan range (Okshornan) on Senja Island in northern Norway, also known as the "Devil's Teeth".
attractions.text_zh: 奇迹山峦瞭望台（Tungeneset） 位于 斯坦斯峡湾（Steinsfjord） 和精灵峡湾（ Ersfjord） 之间的岬角顶端。这一段被西伯利亚落叶松制成的人行桥横跨岩石，可欣赏到位于挪威北部 塞尼雅岛上的欧克斯曼群峰 （Okshornan） 的锋利山峰，也被称为“恶魔之齿”。

attractions.text_en: Bergsbotn Viewpoint is set in the picturesque scenery of Skaland, Norway, and is a must-visit for all nature lovers and travelers who want to immerse themselves in magnificent views. This scenic overlook sits high above the surrounding terrain, providing a vantage point that showcases the region's breathtaking natural beauty. Visitors can enjoy spectacular views of fjords, mountains, and lush green vegetation, making it an ideal place for photography, picnicking, or simply soaking up the tranquil atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh: 贝格斯景观台（Bergsbotn）坐落在挪威斯卡兰风景如画的风景中，是所有自然爱好者和想要沉浸在壮丽景色中的旅行者的必游之地。这个风景优美的观景点位于周围地形的高处，提供了一个展示该地区令人惊叹的自然美景的有利位置。游客可以欣赏峡湾、山脉和郁郁葱葱的绿色植物的壮丽景色，使其成为摄影、野餐或只是沉浸在宁静氛围中的理想场所。

attractions.text_en: A dreamy beach with white sand, set in a sheltered bay, where you can relax and immerse yourself in the tranquil beauty of this pristine beach with its fine white sand and crystal-clear water. It is the perfect spot to unwind and take beautiful photos. Don't forget to visit the unique golden toilet and take a quirky photo to add a touch of fun to your adventure.
attractions.text_zh: 梦幻般的海滩，有白色的沙滩，位于一个受庇护的海湾中，在这里您可以放松身心，沉浸在这片原始海滩的宁静美景中，这里有细白的沙滩和清澈的海水。这是放松身心和拍摄精美照片的完美地点。别忘了参观独特的金色厕所，拍一张奇特的照片，为您的冒险增添一丝乐趣。

attractions.name_zh: 波特汉姆极地峡湾渡轮 Botnhamn Ferjekai
attractions.text_en: Along the way, enjoy on one side the beauty of the Arctic fjord scenery, and on the other side the magnificence and awe of the Arctic Ocean. The sky changes color according to different moods, with birds and schools of fish following along the way. The deep blue of the fjord contrasts with the vast white glaciers of the Arctic Ocean, and at sunset it becomes a beautiful landscape.
attractions.text_zh: 沿途欣赏一遍的北极峡湾风景的秀美，另外一遍北冰洋的壮观与震撼，天空根据不同的心情而更改色彩，沿途的鸟类与鱼群跟随，深邃的峡湾蓝色与白茫茫的北冰洋巨大冰川对应，落霞时，成为美丽的风景。

attractions.text_en: The famous Nordic culinary mecca Harstad — here you will find unforgettable nature and food experiences, local cuisine prepared by excellent chefs, genuine shops, music festivals, unspoiled archipelagos, and more! Called the most romantic place in Norway, in summer you can see the midnight sun, and in winter it lies in the middle of the aurora belt. Food is an important reason for travelers from around the world to head to Harstad. Here you can not only taste all kinds of seafood from the North Atlantic and the Arctic Ocean, but every dish also leaves a deep impression on visitors with its artistry.
attractions.text_zh: 北欧著名的美食圣地 哈尔斯塔 —— 这里有令人难忘的自然体验和美食体验、由优秀厨师烹制的当地美食、货真价实的商店、音乐节、未受破坏的群岛等等！称为挪威最浪漫的地方，夏季可见午夜的阳光，冬季位于北极光带的中间，美食是全球游客前往哈尔斯塔的重要目的，在这里不仅可以品尝来自北大西洋和北冰洋的各种海鲜，同时每道菜都将艺术性也给游客留下了深刻的印象。

attractions.text_en: Svolvær is the capital city of the Lofoten Islands and also an important port city of Lofoten. With the magnificent views of the cold ocean and the vast expanse of snow-capped mountains, the panorama from anywhere in the city is unparalleled. The bustling docks are crowded with people coming one after another, and every restaurant carefully displays its catch of the day. All kinds of small shops make this place full of vitality. The dock of the Hurtigruten expedition cruise has become a sacred spot for tourists to take photos, and the lone island Anker Brygge water-house hotel in the city center also draws many photographers here to visit and take pictures.
attractions.text_zh: 斯沃尔维尔是 罗弗敦 群岛的首府城市，同样也是 罗弗敦 重要的港口城市，冰冷海洋的壮丽景色和白雪皑皑的山脉的广阔景色，城市中任何地方的全景都是无与伦比，热闹的码头人群熙熙攘攘接踵而至，每一家餐厅都精心拿摆出自己当天的渔获，各式各样的小商店让这里生机勃勃，海达路德探险邮轮的码头成为游客取景的圣地，城市中心独岛安克尔布里嘉水屋酒店也有很多摄影师来这里参观拍照。

attractions.text_en: This small fishing village of only 500 people also has a football pitch, located atop a rocky islet, surrounded by beautiful fjords and azure waters, adding a touch of tranquility and beauty. The football pitch came to be in order to fulfill the wish of a local child of 14, which makes one yearn for it while at the same time deeply admiring the innocence and kindness of the Norwegians.
attractions.text_zh: 这个仅有500人的小渔村还拥有一座的足球场，位于一处岛礁之上，被优美的峡湾和湛蓝的海水所包围，多了一番宁静和唯美。足球场的由来是为了当地一个14孩子的心愿而建，可谓让人心生向往的同时又无比羡慕挪威人的纯真与善良。

attractions.text_en: Henningsvær is a fishing village located on the Lofoten Islands of Norway. Thanks to its traditional fishing-village architecture, it attracts many tourists from all over the world. The village is located about 20 kilometers (12 miles) southwest of the town of Svolvær.
attractions.text_zh: 亨宁斯韦尔是坐落挪威的罗弗敦群岛上的一个渔村，由于它的传统渔村的建筑，吸引着全世界的许多游客。该村位于约20公里斯沃尔韦尔镇（12英里）西南。

attractions.text_en: Heading up from the steep Reine pass is a vantage point for admiring Reine, followed by a trip to the village of Hamnøy. This small village has only one restaurant and a fisherman's cabin, and it is also one of the classic scenes for photography. The bridge at the west of the village entrance leading toward Reine offers an advantageous shooting angle. If on the day, due to weather, physical condition, or because children cannot climb Reine Mountain, you head to Hamnøy village that day to shoot, here you can also capture classic themes such as the sea, fjords, snow mountains, and fishing villages.
attractions.text_zh: 从陡峭的雷纳山口前往,是欣赏雷纳有利地点,随后前往哈姆诺伊村（Hamnøy）这条小村只有一家餐厅及一个渔民小屋，同样也是摄影的经典场景之一，在村口西面前往雷讷的桥上就是有利的拍摄角度，当天如果因为天气原因、体力原因、或儿童无法攀雷纳山，当天前往哈姆诺伊村拍摄，在这里也能拍到海水、峡湾、雪山、渔村等经典主题。

attractions.text_en: Hamnøy Fishing Village (Hamnoy) is one of three beautiful pristine fishing villages on Moskenes Island. When you stand inside Hamnøy fishing village in Lofoten, there is a feeling of tranquility, as if crossing into another world. In the globally stunning photographs of 2014, Hamnøy fishing village was among them.
attractions.text_zh: 哈姆诺伊渔村（Hamnoy）是莫斯克斯内斯岛上三个美丽的原生态渔村之一，当你站在罗弗敦 哈姆诺伊渔村 里面的时候，有一种恍如隔世般宁静穿越的感觉。在2014年全球震撼的照片里， 哈姆诺伊渔村 渔村就位列其中。

attractions.text_en: Å Town (Å), the town with the shortest name in the world, "Å" is the last syllable character in Norwegian, representing the end of everything and a place of restart. Å Town lies at the end of the Lofoten Islands road, and is a protected traditional fishing village. It is also a paradise for photographers. Upon first arriving in the town of Å, one is immediately attracted by the red Norwegian fishermen's cabin buildings in the town. These fishermen's cabins, built in the nineteenth century and still preserved today, have outer walls painted dark red; there are single-story bungalows as well as two-story buildings, all built entirely of wood, standing out very conspicuously on the Lofoten Islands.
attractions.text_zh: 奥镇（Å）世界上名字短的小镇，“Å”在挪威语中是最后一个音节字符，代表着一切的结束和重启之地。奥镇在罗弗敦群岛公路的尽头，是一个受到保护的传统渔村。这里也是摄影师的天堂，初到Å小镇时，立刻会被镇上红色的挪威渔人小屋建筑所吸引。这些建于十九世纪仍保存到现在的渔人小屋样式，外墙漆着深红色的颜色，有单层的平房，也有双层的建筑，全数都是以木头建造，十分显眼地伫立在罗弗敦岛上。

attractions.text_en: Yellow houses: located on the famous Lofoten island of Sakrisøy, this island is renowned for the contrasting scenery formed by rows of yellow fishing houses dotted with other colors amid the snowstorm. Most of the houses on the island are painted in a bright, glossy yellow. The dazzling colors reflected on the calm surface of the fjord, combined with a white blizzard backdrop, will be a beautiful postcard of Lofoten.
attractions.text_zh: 黄房子：位于罗弗敦著名的岛屿Sakrisøy，这个岛屿以一排排黄色渔屋点缀着其他的色彩在暴风雪中形成的反差风景而闻名，岛上大部分的房屋都涂上颜色鲜艳油亮色黄色渔屋，炫丽的色彩倒影在峡湾的平静海面上，如果配合白色的暴雪背景，将是 罗弗敦 美丽的明信片。

attractions.text_en: Hailed as the "Arctic Charm", Tromsø is a city that blends vibrant nightlife, Nordic culture, polar scientific research, and Sami tradition. Here, the long winter nights (September to April of the following year) greatly increase the chances of encountering the aurora, while the summer polar day (May to July) brings 24 hours of daylight for all-day outdoor sightseeing. The temperature is pleasant all year round, and it is an important whale-watching departure point. Tromsø is renowned for its bustling nightlife and its various restaurants serving fresh Arctic produce. Tromsø is a flourishing multicultural city, gathering residents from more than 100 countries; it serves both local specialty cuisine and plenty of new-style bistros offering local food. Although the city of Tromsø has only been established for about 200 years, humans had already settled in this region thousands of years ago. After the city was founded, Tromsø quickly became a hunting center of the Arctic region, and at the beginning of the 20th century it was also the starting point for expeditions to the Arctic, earning it the name of the Gateway to the Arctic.
attractions.text_zh: 被誉为“北极魅力”的特罗姆瑟，融合活力夜生活、北欧文化、极地科研与萨米传统的城市，这里！漫长冬夜（9月-次年4月）大幅提升极光邂逅概率，夏季极昼（5月-7月）24小时白昼，全天候户外游览。全年气温宜人，是重要的出海观鲸地。特罗姆瑟以熙熙攘攘的夜生活和各种供应北极生鲜物产的餐厅著称。特罗瑟姆多元文化鼎盛，汇集了来自100多个国家的居民，既供应当地特色美食，也不乏供应当地美食的新式小餐馆。虽然特罗姆瑟城建立至今仅200年左右，但早在数千年以前就已经有人类定居在这一地区。建城后，特罗姆瑟很快成为了北极地区的狩猎中心，而且在20世纪之初，这里还是前往北极地区考察的出发点，并因此得名的北极门户。

overview.text_en:
Gather in Rome in the morning and set off for the ancient town of Pienza. On the way, take free photos at the Cypress Lane, then visit the Piazza Pio II, Pienza Cathedral (exterior) and other sights. Afterwards depart for Siena to visit Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, Siena Town Hall (exterior), Torre del Mangia (exterior) and other sights.
Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午罗马集合，出发前往皮恩扎古城游览，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，之后游览皮恩扎二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点，之后出发前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。
夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Four Points by Sheraton Siena Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel sits on a quiet hilltop, surrounded by olive trees and gardens, with beautiful scenery ideal for getting close to nature. The guest rooms are laid with comfortable wooden floors, brightly designed and furnished with attractive stylish interiors. The hotel also has an exquisite restaurant that serves classic Italian, local and Tuscan cuisine during dinner. The hotel's outdoor pool, fitness center and sauna all provide you with a more relaxing stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，环境优美且适合亲近自然。客房铺设舒适的木质地板，设计明亮，摆设美观的时尚内装，同时酒店配有精致的餐厅，在晚餐时段供应经典的意大利、当地和托斯卡纳美食。酒店的室外泳池、健身中心以及桑拿浴室都为您提供更加放松的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
Pastoral beauty of Val d'Orcia and the medieval ancient town of Pienza
Close your eyes and you will picture the classic scenery of Tuscany - blue sky and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and grapevines, and finally wheat fields - this is the perfect portrait of Val d'Orcia. From the city walls of the ancient town of Pienza, look down upon the scenery of the World Heritage Site "Val d'Orcia".
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding Cypress Lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypress trees, with its uniquely shaped curve and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypress trees on both sides of the road cast mottled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and take pictures.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: Pienza is a town in the Province of Siena in the Tuscany region of central Italy, adjacent to Montalcino. It was the earliest ideal town of the Renaissance, founded by Pope Pius II, with the original purpose of renovating his impoverished hometown and making it a summer retreat for the Pope. In 1996 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List. The architecture here is Gothic in style and influenced by German style. The main square of the town is Piazza Pio II, which contains the major 15th-century buildings, such as the cathedral (built 1459-1462), the Piccolomini Palace, the Bishop's Palace, and the assembly hall with a crenellated tower (built 1462).
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎（Pienza）是意大利中部托斯卡纳大区锡耶纳省的一个市镇，毗邻蒙塔尔奇诺，它是文艺复兴时期最早的理想小镇，由罗马教皇PiusII创立，当时创立的目的是为了翻新给他贫穷的家乡并把此作为罗马教皇的避暑地。1996年，被列入联合国世界遗产名录。这里的建筑呈哥特风，并受德式风格的影响。小镇的主要广场是PiazzaPioII，广场里包含15世纪的主要建筑，如教堂（建于1459-1462）、皮科洛米尼宫（PiccolominiPalace、主教宫、带有锯齿形塔的大会堂（建于1462）。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval ancient city is filled with masterpieces of artistic masters and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient and crisscrossing cobblestone alleys and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you are placed in medieval Europe of a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you a surprise. Over the centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the 14th century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also preserves a series of traditions, including the making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, do not forget to taste the local specialties - the almond soft cookies ricciarelli, the nut-filled cake panforte, the spiced peppered nut cake pan pepato, the rice pudding budini di riso, the walnut cookies cavallucci, or the walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the larger surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly facing the square are the Siena Town Hall and the tower. Inside the Town Hall is the Civic Museum, which houses many paintings of the Sienese School, including the "Allegory of Good Government" and the "Allegory of Bad Government". The full name of the tower is Torre del Mangia. It is the tallest building in Siena and the second tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of stairs to take in the beautiful scenery of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔，它是锡耶纳较高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns. It is a unique convergence of art and nature, holding rich historical imprints. Its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the concept of "good government" of the Italian city-states.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Pisa to visit the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli in the historical and cultural center of Pisa. Then go to visit Cinque Terre, touring the beautiful cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast; afterwards check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: If the visit to Cinque Terre cannot take place due to factors such as bad weather or a strike by the railway company, the itinerary will automatically be changed to touring the coastal cities by coach or in another form.
overview.text_zh:
上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场。前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；之后入住酒店。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Hilton Florence Metropole Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Hilton Florence is a modern hotel that lets you experience Tuscan style. With its superior location, it offers access to the Florence business center to enjoy the bustle of Florence. From the terrace of the hotel's executive lounge you can admire the magnificent views of Florence. Each guest room is decorated in a warm, modern style; wooden floors and a spacious marble bathroom provide greater comfort.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店
佛罗伦萨希尔顿酒店是一家体验托斯卡纳风格的现代化酒店，地理位置优越，可前往佛罗伦萨商业中心，享受佛罗伦萨的繁华。酒店行政酒廊的露台上可欣赏到佛罗伦萨的壮丽景色。每间客房均采用温馨的现代风格装饰；木地板和宽敞的大理石浴室可获得较大的舒适度。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a paradise on the cliffs
Stopping at each beautiful fishing village along the long Mediterranean coastline, watching the sun-bathed beaches, the waves quietly lapping against the rocks, and the colorful houses from far to near, your curiosity to gaze upon the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak at the moment of arrival. Disembarking from the boat and walking on foot through the alleys of the fishing village, the closer you walk the more delightful the surprise. It is like savoring a visual feast of five colors and flavors, tasting each one bit by bit; this scene is so beautiful it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，下得船来，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy. It is located on the Piazza dei Miracoli to the north of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy. It is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, designated as a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. It is said that in the year 1590, Galileo once carried out a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square there are four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (cemetery). Ancient city walls and gates are also preserved around the square. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa in Italy (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for the five cliffside villages and towns of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together. Built along the coast, it is one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 kilometers, requiring around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other side are the mountains, and ahead are the Italian fishing hamlets. It is a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, visit Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, to see the world's third-largest cathedral - the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (exterior), the Piazza della Signoria, the Old Bridge, as well as the Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Afterwards head to Venice to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: voco Venice Hotel or Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后文艺复兴发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场，老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观）。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
voco Venice Hotel or Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels. With a superior location, it features a stylish modern design, and the guest rooms with natural tones and modern interiors offer you a comfortable and warm stay. The hotel provides a hearty breakfast, a fully equipped gym, and a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails. The hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian dishes and delicacies.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en:
The splendor and prosperity of Florence, the radiant brilliance of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world's capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Among the blue sky and white clouds, the brightly colored walls, the dark green shutters, and the dark red roofs, search for the soul of the Renaissance, and amid the streets and alleys, the squares and churches, the museums and art galleries, feel the agelessness of the Renaissance. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic soul of Dante Alighieri, the painting soul of Da Vinci, still drift above Florence, still continue to pursue those people and matters of the European Renaissance..."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说"阿利盖利·但丁的诗魂、达·芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (entry requires queuing)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and magnificent churches in the world, but very few churches can be so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets the classical, elegant and free spirit revered in the Renaissance era to the fullest, so it is no wonder it was named the "Cathedral of the Flower". The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为"花之圣母"。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and it has also been the center of the city's political life for centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David", and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and many cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earlier large-span circular arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his feelings of admiration into the "Divine Comedy". Over several centuries, it has stood firm through floods, social upheavals and wars it has experienced. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of the city of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce. This Gothic building is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and the frescoes and sculptures inside are worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are many cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste the local flavors. The Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for holding various cultural events and festivals, especially in summer, when open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings built upon the water, together with the winding water lanes, make the romantic charm of Venice linger for a long time and refuse to dissipate. Afterwards, head to the fashion capital - Milan.
Overnight: Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。之后前往时尚之都——米兰。
夜宿：皇家花园酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is set in a lush garden with fountains, palm trees and olive trees, blending classic elegance with modern style. It is a delightful and relaxing urban retreat. The hotel is within walking distance of a nearby large commercial center; the hotel's guest rooms are spacious and elegant, with a large marble bathroom with a bathtub. The buffet breakfast is rich and varied, the Captain's Bar serves drinks and snacks all day, and the hotel has the glass-domed Blue Crab Grill restaurant serving international cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
皇家花园酒店 或同等级4星级酒店
酒店坐落在郁郁葱葱的花园中，花园内有喷泉、棕榈树和橄榄树，将经典优雅与现代风格融为一体，是一处令人愉悦而轻松的城市度假胜地。酒店可步行至附近的大型商业中心；酒店的客房宽敞而优雅，设有带浴缸的大型大理石浴室，自助早餐丰盛多样，Captain's Bar 全天供应饮料和小吃，酒店设有玻璃圆顶的 Blue Crab Grill 餐厅，供应国际美食。

highlights.text_en:
The world's beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic" still dazzling and resplendent
As one of the important towns of the Renaissance, Venice is composed of 118 small islands, connected into one by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water", the "City of a Hundred Islands", and the "City of Bridges". Here is one of the world's most beautiful squares, "St. Mark's Square", the beautiful Grand Canal, the phoenix-reborn La Fenice Opera House, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs from the pen of Xu Zhimo, and the breathtakingly beautiful colonnades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian School of painting, and also the filming location of many film scenes. Her unique temperament intoxicates everyone who visits, making them reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，"亚得里亚海明珠"依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有"水上都市"、"百岛城"、"桥城"之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一"圣马可广场"，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: Known in short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of the city of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe. It is a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and at the same time it is a treasure house housing a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located in Piazza San Marco; the past glory of Venice is all here. Inside, you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs and can look outside through a small hole, instead of having so many people on the bridge opposite looking over at you at the Bridge of Sighs. You can take photos inside, as long as you do not use the flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the only route by which death-row prisoners were escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style. The bridge is shaped like a house, with the upper part covered by a vault and very tightly enclosed. There are only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and when passing over this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small window. From then on they lost their freedom and involuntarily let out sounds of sighing. It is said that if lovers kiss under the bridge they can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe". The square is surrounded on three sides by magnificent and splendid palaces, and on the east side rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the center of public activities for Venice's politics, religion and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作"欧洲美丽的客厅"。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, freely visit Milan's iconic building, the Milan Cathedral (exterior), and one of Europe's most beautiful commercial arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon, head to Zurich to visit the Grossmünster (exterior), Lake Zurich, Bahnhofstrasse, and stroll along the Limmat River.
Overnight: Hotel Hari's Home Zurich Limmattal or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊。 下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观），苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街、漫步利马特河边。
夜宿：苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Hotel Hari's Home Zurich Limmattal or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is set in the scenic heart of Limmattal, a modern urban residence adjacent to one of Switzerland's larger shopping centers. The hotel has a bar, and the guest rooms are spacious and clean, with beautiful parquet floors and modern furniture, large wardrobes and many small touches that make life easier. The hotel offers various buffet or continental breakfasts. The lush green valleys, rolling hills and the winding Limmat River around the hotel provide you with a comfortable and natural stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在风景秀丽的利马塔尔中心地带，现代化的城市住宅，紧邻瑞士较大的购物中心，酒店配备酒吧，客房宽敞整洁，拥有漂亮的镶木地板和现代家具、大衣柜和许多让生活更轻松的小创意。酒店提供各类自助或欧陆式早餐。酒店周边绿意盎然的山谷、连绵起伏的丘陵和蜿蜒的利马特河，为您提供舒适自然的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
Visit the filming location of "Crash Landing on You", encounter romantic Zurich
The filming location of the opening of the TV drama "Crash Landing on You" is the Lindenhof park in Zurich's old town. When the main story begins, it freezes on the perfect image of the two passing by each other. With the Limmat River as the foreground, the park offers wonderful views of Zurich. The twin-tower building that flashes by in the show is precisely the Grossmünster, recognized as a landmark building of Zurich. Zurich's old town district is also a place of experience not to be missed. Here gather traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookstores and flower shops, as well as jewelry and fashion boutiques. Stroll through the old town district, walking and pausing in each street.
highlights.text_zh:
打卡《爱的迫降》取景地，邂逅浪漫的苏黎世
《爱的迫降》电视剧片头取景地就是位于苏黎世老城的林登霍夫公园，正片开始时，定格了两人擦身而过的完美的画面。公园以利马特河为前景可以观赏到苏黎世的美妙景色。剧中闪现的双塔建筑正是苏黎世大教堂，是苏黎世公认的地标建筑。苏黎世老城区也是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰、时尚精品，漫步于老城区，在每个街道里走走停停。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome", the Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was first built in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as a magnificent Gothic building of Italy, hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and the white marble exterior walls are carved with thousands of statues. The interior space is broad, and sunlight enters through the beautiful stained-glass mosaic paintings on the windows, the light dim, full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the crypt of the cathedral the remains of the Church of St. Tecla, on the original site, are also preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是"圆顶"的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most tourists who come here come for sightseeing. Under the central arcade is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are second to none in Milan. The window displays in particular are updated daily, and just standing outside the windows to admire them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele is filled with many high-end restaurants, cafes and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also known as Station Street) is one of the longer shopping avenues in Europe and one of the most expensive shopping avenues in the world. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless center of Zurich; luxury brands from all over the world are spread throughout, and private banks line the street. Walking on Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless tourists feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored quantities of gold bars said to rank among the foremost in the world, which makes many people so excited they cannot tear their feet away. Immersed in it, you can clearly feel that the air is permeated with the atmosphere of wealth, luxury and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. The piers on the lake surface are filled with all kinds of yachts, looking just like a rich people's club. The end of one section of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center. On the lake surface, white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere, leisurely and carefree, a scene of harmony. The north shore of Lake Zurich is a residence for the wealthy, known as the "Gold Coast", while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast". At the end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich. As one of the "world's most livable cities", the life of the true people of Zurich is permeated everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称"金岸"，而南岸则称之为"银岸"。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为"世界宜居的城市"，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: The Grossmünster is one of the 3 main churches of Zurich, Switzerland (the other two being the Fraumünster and another). The church is located near the bank of the Limmat River, first built around 1100 and inaugurated around 1220. This church, facing the Fraumünster across the river, played a pivotal role in the Swiss Reformation of the 16th century. The Faculty of Theology of the University of Zurich and the Reformation Museum are both established here. The stained-glass paintings inside the church are masterpieces by the modern Swiss art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for Lucerne to enjoy the lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, listen to the Lion Monument recount that period of history of the Swiss people's loyalty and steadfast resolve, as well as the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower and other sights; then head to the town of Iseltwald to tour Lake Iseltwald and the town's scenery; in the afternoon, head to Interlaken, the town at the foot of Europe's rooftop, the "Jungfrau".
Overnight: Solbadhotel Sigriswil (Snow Mountain and Lake View) or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点；之后前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光；下午前往欧洲屋脊-"少女峰"山脚下的小镇-因特拉肯。
夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Solbadhotel Sigriswil (Snow Mountain and Lake View) or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the mountain gorge beside the panorama bridge of Sigriswil. All guest rooms are decorated in an elegant Swiss country style, and the hotel's views satisfy one's imagination of Switzerland. The guest rooms enjoy views of Lake Thun or the surrounding mountains or the village of Sigriswil. Sitting in the hotel's restaurant and gazing out at the emerald-green waters of Lake Thun and the tranquilly reflected snow mountains, it is as if you are in a painting, letting you fully admire the paradise-like beautiful scenery of Switzerland.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于锡格里斯维尔（Sigriswil）全景桥旁边的山涧，所有的客房装饰为瑞士乡村典雅风格，酒店景观满足对瑞士的想象，客房客房享有图恩湖或周围群山或锡格里斯维尔村景致。坐在酒店的餐厅远眺碧绿的图恩湖水，宁静地倒影的雪山，恍然如画中，让人尽情欣赏瑞士世外桃源般的美好景致。

highlights.text_en:
The town of Iseltwald beneath the snow mountains
As the filming location of the grand happy ending of "Crash Landing on You", the "happiest two weeks of the year" of the male and female leads in the drama were all spent here. The paradise so sweet it makes your teeth ache, the otherworldly beauty of Lake Iseltwald, is as if tailor-made for this drama. The heaven-on-earth lake and mountain scenery, the filter-free beauty of Lake Iseltwald - if there is a paradise, it must be in Iseltwald; serene and peaceful years are nothing more than this.
highlights.text_zh:
雪山下的龙疆小镇
作为"爱的迫降"大团圆结局的取景地，剧中男女主角"一年中幸福的两周"都在这里度过，主角甜到齁的世外桃源，超然于世的龙疆湖美景，就像是为该剧量身定做的。人间天堂般的湖光山色，无滤镜的龙疆湖美景，如果有世外桃源，那一定在龙疆，岁月静好也不过如此。

attractions.text_en: Situated between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Express train passes through here. Surrounded by mountains, with lush green grass, the rustic village is scattered along the shore of Lake Iseltwald, just like a paradise far from the hustle and bustle.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled against mountains and water, Lucerne possesses the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance palaces and mansions, as well as century-old shops, long streets and ancient alleys, are everywhere. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the city's beautiful scenery in a way that is half-illusion and half-real, making it an extraordinary jewel among Switzerland's many beautiful small cities. Since the 19th century, it has attracted many princes, nobles and literati to come and tour and reside, and artists have gained endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
