attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳标志性建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: Torre Grossa is the tower in the small town of San Gimignano that is open to the public, with a total height of 54 meters; its construction began in the early 14th century. It was once part of the new Palazzo del Podestà, and from the tower one can enjoy a panoramic view of San Gimignano and the hilly mountain region of Tuscany.
attractions.text_zh: 格罗萨塔楼是圣吉米亚诺小城对公众开放的塔楼，总高为54米，始建于14世纪初。它曾是新的波德斯塔宫宫的一部分，塔楼可以一览圣吉米亚诺和托斯卡纳丘陵山区的美景。

attractions.text_en: Although this medieval tower town listed as a World Heritage site is small, it concentrates the finest scenery of Tuscany. Piazza della Cisterna is the absolute core; this triangular square is paved with cobblestones and surrounded by 13th-century stone towers and arcades, and the ancient well in the center was once the lifeline of the whole town. Standing here and looking up at the densely packed towers, you can intuitively feel where the title "Medieval Manhattan" comes from.
attractions.text_zh: 这座被列入世界遗产的中世纪塔城虽小，却浓缩了托斯卡纳最精华的景观。水井广场是绝对核心，这个三角形广场由鹅卵石铺就，四周环绕着13世纪的石塔与拱廊，中央的古井曾是全城命脉。站在这里仰视林立的塔楼，能直观感受“中世纪曼哈顿”的称号从何而来。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for these five cliffside villages and towns: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking route that strings the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 kilometers and taking around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other side are the mountains, and in front are the Italian fishing villages, making it a place that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the World Cultural Heritage List by UNESCO.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy. It is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, and has been designated a World Heritage site by UNESCO. According to legend, in 1590 AD, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square there are four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Cemetery (Camposanto). The square is also surrounded by ancient city walls and gates that still remain. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa and cemetery) as a World Heritage site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (entry requires queuing)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂(需排队进入)
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but very few churches can be so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets to the fullest the classicism, elegance and freedom revered in the Renaissance era; no wonder it was named the "St. Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to finally complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才最终建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earliest large-span circular-arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his feelings of longing into the "Divine Comedy." Over the centuries, it has experienced floods, social unrest and wars, yet has stood firm. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Located in the southeast of Florence, Piazzale Michelangelo is a famous spot for overlooking the beautiful panorama of the city. In the center of the square stands a replica of Michelangelo's immortal work - "David." From the square you can see the whole appearance of the city: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, Giotto's Bell Tower, the Bargello Museum, the Old Bridge and more are all in view. This is also a good location for viewing the sunrise and sunset; as the light changes, watch Florence radiate different splendor.
attractions.text_zh: 位于佛罗伦萨东南的米开朗基罗广场是著名的俯瞰城市美丽全景的地点，广场中央安放着米开朗基罗的不朽之作——《大卫》的复制品，广场上可以看到全城的风貌：圣母百花大教堂、乔托钟楼、巴杰罗美术馆、老桥等尽收眼底。这里也是观赏日出和日落的好位置，随着光线的变幻，看佛罗伦萨焕发出不同的光彩。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂 (外观)
attractions.text_en: Abbreviated as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe. It is a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and it is also a treasure house holding a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, while to the east rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the center of public activity for Venice's politics, religion and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.text_en: Adjacent to St. Mark's Basilica, it was once the residence of the Doge of the Republic of Venice and the center of government. This Gothic building made of pink marble has an exquisitely beautiful exterior, with the details of its arcades and sculptures full of power and elegance, making it a symbol of Venetian politics and art.
attractions.text_zh: 紧邻圣马可大教堂，是昔日威尼斯共和国总督的官邸与政府中心。这座粉色大理石打造的哥特式建筑外观精美绝伦，拱廊与雕塑细节充满力量与优雅，是威尼斯政治与艺术的象征。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the only route by which condemned prisoners were escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style. The bridge is shaped like a house, with the upper part covered by a dome and very tightly enclosed; only on the side facing the canal are there two small windows. After a prisoner had been tried in the Doge's Palace, the felons were taken to the dungeon. When passing over this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows, and from then on they lost their freedom, involuntarily letting out sounds of sighing. It is said that if lovers kiss under the bridge they can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, Milan Cathedral was first built in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Praised as a magnificent Gothic building of Italy, its hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and its white marble exterior walls are carved with thousands of statues. The interior space is vast, and sunlight pours in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, the light dim and hazy, full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the crypt of the church there are also preserved the relics of the Church of St. Tecla that stood on the original site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a gorgeous shopping mall, although most tourists who come here come for sightseeing. Under the central arcade there is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan, especially the window displays which are updated daily; just standing outside the windows admiring them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele is full of many high-end restaurants, cafes and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. The docks on the lake are full of yachts of all kinds, like a rich people's club. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center; on the lake, white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere, leisurely and carefree, a harmonious scene. The north shore of Lake Zurich is the residence of the rich, known as the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." At the end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich. As one of the "most livable cities in the world," the life of the true people of Zurich is permeated with tranquility and leisure everywhere.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: The twin towers of the Grossmünster are a landmark building of Zurich. According to legend, Charlemagne (Charlemagne the Great, king of the Carolingian dynasty of the Frankish Kingdom and founder of the Holy Roman Empire) built the twin towers on the graves of Zurich's patron saints Felix and Regula. Other sights worth seeing also include: St. Peter's Church, which has the largest clock face in Europe, and the Fraumünster of Zurich, which is famous for the stained-glass windows painted by Giacometti (the Swiss surrealist-existentialist master sculptor and painter) and Chagall (the surrealist painter).
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂的双塔是苏黎世的地标性建筑。根据传说，查理曼（查理曼大帝，法兰克王国卡洛林王朝国王，神圣罗马帝国的奠基人）将双塔建在了苏黎世主保圣人Felix和Regula的墓地之上。其他值得一看的景点还包括：拥有欧洲较大钟面的圣彼得教堂和苏黎世圣母大教堂，该教堂因贾科梅蒂（瑞士超存在主义雕塑大师，画家）和夏卡尔（超现实主义画家）绘制的彩色玻璃窗而闻名。

attractions.text_en: The Old Town of Zurich is a not-to-be-missed place for an experience. Here are gathered traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookstores and flower shops, as well as jewelry, fashion boutiques, and of course no shortage of Zurich's local brands. Famous streets and lanes such as Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg, Niederdorf and Augustine Lane are all located in the Old Town. Strolling through the Old Town at night, you will find that it has turned into an entertainment venue for the public.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世的老城区是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰，时尚精品，当然也少不了苏黎世本土品牌。班霍夫大街(Bahnhofstrasse)、伦韦格街(Rennweg)、尼德道尔夫(Niederdorf)与圣奥古斯丁巷(Augustine Lane)等著名街巷都位于老城区。晚上漫步于老城区，会发现这里又变成了民众的娱乐场所。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Lucerne, nestled against mountains and water, possesses the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance-era palace halls and mansions, as well as century-old shops, long streets and ancient lanes, are everywhere. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the beautiful scenery of the city in an almost dreamlike, almost real way, making it that extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small cities. Since the 19th century, it has attracted many princes, nobles and men of letters to come for sightseeing and to live, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: Switzerland's GoldenPass train shuttles through the beautiful regions of the Alps, taking in charming lake and mountain scenery all the way. One of the most beautiful sections is the GoldenPass Line train (Luzren-Lungern Express) from Lucerne (Luzern) to Lungern. Along the way are pretty villages, azure lake water, lush vegetation, vast pastures, leisurely cattle and sheep, as well as the snow-capped Alps. The scenery changing from the foot of the mountains to the summit makes one marvel that this is a fairyland on earth.
attractions.text_zh: 瑞士的黄金列车穿梭于阿尔卑斯美丽的区域，一路总览迷人的湖光山色。其中美丽的一段就是卢塞恩（Luzern）到龙疆（Lungern）这一段的金色山口列车（Luzren-Lungern Express），沿途秀美的村庄，碧蓝的湖水，茂密的植被，广袤的牧场，悠闲的牛羊，还有白雪皑皑的阿尔卑斯山脉，从山脚到山顶变幻的风景，让人感叹这就是人间仙境。

attractions.text_en: Lake Lucerne is winding in shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms typical "lake and mountain" scenery, attracting large numbers of tourists to come and sightsee. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight of Lake Lucerne, and this piece thus acquired the title "Moonlight" - although this was not Beethoven's original intention.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩湖这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Line train passes through here. This place has the purest alpine lake water in Switzerland, surrounded by mountains, with lush green grass, and the quaint villages scattered along the shores of Lake Lungern, just like a paradise far away from the hustle and bustle.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口列车就会从这里经过。这里拥有瑞士最为纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: This statue of a dying lion was carved on natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and more than 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground, a broken spear stuck in its shoulder, with a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms beside it. This statue was made to commemorate the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died on August 10, 1792, protecting the safety of the family of Louis XVI in the Tuileries Palace in Paris. Beneath the statue there is text describing the course of this event. In those days, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, forced by livelihood, went to various European countries to serve as mercenaries one after another. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave in battle, but honor and money could not cover up the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, retaining only the guards serving the Catholic Holy See, which is the famous Swiss Guard. Because of their famous loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served right up to the present. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "dying lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving statue in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow all year round, while at the foot of the mountain the grass is lush green and the scenery is beautiful, making it a famous sightseeing and outdoor sports destination in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was inscribed as a World Natural Heritage site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is the place where photographers most love the famous postcard photo spot of Switzerland's "dreamy slope." It is also the Alpine town one must pass through to visit the Jungfrau, and together with First, Jungfrau, Wengen, Lauterbrunnen and others, it forms the most magnificent and beautiful scenic line in the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-watching resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts. The lakeside, green grasslands, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow mountains together make this fascinating town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头最爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、劳特布龙嫩（Lauterbrunnen）等一起组成了少女峰地区最为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Lauterbrunnen is located to the west of the Jungfrau region. More than 70 waterfalls and small rivers fall down from the cliffs, so the literal translation of Lauterbrunnen from German is "many springs," and this town is truly a town of waterfalls. Among them, the Staubbach Falls is the landmark scenery of the village, and the poets Goethe and Wordsworth wrote poems to praise it. In addition, the Mürren Falls and the Trümmelbach Falls, which rush down from caves as high as a ten-story building, should also not be missed. From Lauterbrunnen you can take the WAB railway to Wengen, Kleine Scheidegg, the Jungfrau and other places. At the same time, by taking the cable car via Mürren, you can reach the Schilthorn and other places, and feast your eyes on the magnificent scenery of the Bernese Highlands.
attractions.text_zh: 劳特布龙嫩(Lauterbrunnen)位于少女峰地区的西面，从山崖上落下来70多个瀑布和小河，所以劳特布龙嫩的德语直译是很多的泉水，这个小镇是名副其实的瀑布镇。其中施陶河瀑布是村子的标志性景观，诗人歌德和伍德·沃斯曾写诗来赞美它。此外还有米伦瀑布和从十层楼高的山洞里飞奔而下的特吕默尔河瀑布，也不可错过。从劳特布龙嫩出发可以乘WAB铁路到达翁根、克莱纳谢德格、少女峰等地。同时，乘坐缆车经米伦，可到达雪朗峰等地，饱览伯尔尼高地的雄伟风光。

attractions.text_en: Lake Brienz at the northern foot of the Alps, with its blue-green water known as the high-grade Tiffany blue, has the reputation of being "the left eye of God." Lake Brienz is the purest lake water in Switzerland. The book "Travel the World (Switzerland)" describes it like this: "A village full of charm and tranquility, with delightful street architecture, azure lake water, a mysterious lake, dense forests, lovely steam locomotives and a panorama of the Alps - all the various charms of Switzerland are concentrated here"......
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔卑斯山北麓的布里恩茨湖，湖水蓝中带绿，被称为Tiffany高级蓝的湖水，有着“上帝的左眼”的美誉。布里恩茨湖是瑞士最为纯净的湖水，《走遍全球（瑞士）》书上这么描述：“一个极富风情的恬静村子，富有情趣的街道建筑、蔚蓝色的湖水、神秘的湖泊、茂密的森林、可爱的蒸汽机车和阿尔卑斯全景图，瑞士的各种魅力在这里浓缩”......

attractions.text_en: Lausanne is the capital of the Canton of Vaud, located in the center of the northern shore of Lake Geneva, and it once flourished because it was a Roman military port. Through continuous development, this modern city of Lausanne has become one of the most important railway hubs in Switzerland. Most of the trains heading to major cities such as Geneva, Bern and Zurich converge here, and it is at the same time a transportation center connecting Paris and Milan. Lausanne is also called the Olympic Capital; both the International Olympic Committee and the Olympic Museum are located here.
attractions.text_zh: 洛桑是沃州的首府，位于日内瓦湖畔北部沿岸的中心，因曾是罗马的军港而繁荣。经过不断地发展，洛桑这座现代化的城市已经成为瑞士最重要的铁路枢纽之一。大多数通往日内瓦、伯尔尼、苏黎世等大城市的火车都在此交汇，它同时也是连接巴黎及米兰的交通中心。洛桑也被人们称为奥林匹克之都，国际奥林匹克委员会和奥林匹克博物馆均在此地。

attractions.text_en: Lausanne is the city designated by Baron de Coubertin, the father of the modern Olympics, as the home base of the International Olympic Committee (IOC). To carry on Coubertin's will to spread the Olympic spirit to all parts of the world, the world's first Olympic Museum was established in Lausanne in 1993, as designated by former IOC President Samaranch. The Lausanne Olympic Museum collects and displays tens of thousands of treasured items from the first Athens Olympics to the present, and it is the world's center of Olympic movement resources. The museum is located on the picturesque shore of Lake Geneva in an excellent environment, and from the verdant courtyard or the restaurant terrace one can gaze at the beautiful lake and mountain scenery of Lausanne.
attractions.text_zh: 洛桑是近代奥林匹克之父顾拜旦（Coubertin）男爵为国际奥林匹克委员会（IOC）根据地所指定的城市，为继承顾拜旦将奥林匹克的精神传播到世界各地的意志，由前任奥委会主席萨马兰奇指定，于1993年在洛桑建立了世界上一座奥林匹克博物馆。洛桑奥林匹克博物馆（Olympic Museum）收藏并展示了从第一届雅典奥运会至今的上万件珍藏品，是世界的奥林匹克运动资料中心。博物馆坐落在风光绰约的日内瓦湖畔，环境极佳，从葱郁的庭院或餐厅的阳台上可以眺望洛桑美丽的湖光山色。

attractions.text_en: The Lavaux Vineyard Terraces, inscribed on the World Cultural Heritage List, have a history of 800 years so far. Thanks to abundant sunshine and the humid climate by the lake, not only do the grapes produced here become very sweet, but the area has also become a famous wine-producing region of Switzerland. In the season when the grapes ripen, the air is filled with the aroma of wine.
attractions.text_zh: 被列入世界文化遗产名录的拉沃葡萄园梯田，迄今为止已有800年的历史。凭借充足的阳光和湖畔湿润的气候，不但让这里产出的葡萄非常甘甜，而且还使当地成为瑞士著名的葡萄酒产地。葡萄成熟的季节，空气里都弥漫着葡萄酒的香气。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Léman, straddles Switzerland and France. It is an important lake of Western Europe, and also a famous scenic area and health resort. During the day you can take a pleasure boat to tour Lake Geneva, and at night be intoxicated by the flickering neon lights along the shore, and there are often luxury cruise ships holding concerts or balls on the lake. You can take a pleasure boat to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shore of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, snow mountains and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: Chillon Castle is located at the foot of the Alps, on the shore of the charming Lake Geneva, and is a landmark medieval "floating on water" castle of Switzerland. The foundation stones of Chillon Castle are built on the lake bottom, giving people a feeling that it floats on the surface of the lake, yet the castle looks extraordinarily solid. Byron's "The Prisoner of Chillon," written with his pen, made this castle even more famous.
attractions.text_zh: 西庸城堡位于阿尔卑斯山脚下，充满魅力的日内瓦湖湖畔，是瑞士标志性的中世纪“水上漂”城堡。西庸城堡的基石建在湖底，给人一种漂浮在湖面上的感觉，但城堡看起来异常坚固，拜伦挥笔下的《西庸的囚徒》更是让这座城堡声名远扬。

attractions.text_en: Located in Dijon in the Burgundy region, the homeland of wine, Dijon was once the capital of the Duchy of Burgundy from the 11th to the 15th centuries. Especially in the 14th and 15th centuries, it flourished due to several outstanding leaders, becoming an important political, economic, cultural and artistic center of Europe at that time. Today, Dijon's old town is still scattered with many historical buildings from different periods. In addition to luxurious palaces, solemn churches, lavish glazed-tile roofs and many quaint timber-framed houses, there are also museums and art galleries converted from palaces and monasteries. Fine wine and fine food paired with an artistic atmosphere throughout the city make it a city with a very French character.
attractions.text_zh: 位于葡萄酒故乡勃垦第地区的第戎，11到-15世纪曾是勃垦第公国的首府，特别在14、15世纪时因几位优秀领导人而盛极一时，成为当时欧洲重要的政治经济和文化艺术中心。如今第戎的老城区仍散布着许多不同时期的历史建筑，除了豪华的宫殿、庄严的教堂、彩釉屋顶的豪华和许多古朴的木框架房屋，也有宫殿和修道院改装成的博物馆和美术馆。美酒、美食搭配满城艺术分为，是非常具有法国风情的一座城市。

attractions.text_en: Notre-Dame de Dijon was built in the 13th century. On the facade of the church, three rows of animal-shaped false gargoyles are separated by two rows of slender columns, and on the church there is a 14th-century jacquemart (striking clock). For most of the people of Dijon, Notre-Dame de Dijon is a church building with a sense of affinity, and over these several recent centuries, Notre-Dame has always been the main spiritual and emotional comfort of the people of Dijon.
attractions.text_zh: 第戎圣母院建造于13世纪，教堂门面上三列兽形假排水口由两排纤细的圆柱分开，教堂上有一座14世纪的报时钟。对于大多数的第戎人民而言，第戎圣母院是一座具有亲和力的教堂建筑，在这近几个世纪以来，圣母院一直是第戎人民主要的精神、心灵的抚慰。

attractions.text_en: This destination that combines winemaking and tourism in one is a place not to be missed by wine lovers, art lovers and food lovers. Choose a winery producing Burgundy products for a visit, where you can see the aging and maturing process of the wine and the storage and fermentation process in the cellar, and if you are lucky you can see the winemaking process of the wine (depending on the grape season).
attractions.text_zh: 这个集酿酒与旅游于一身的胜地是葡萄酒爱好者、艺术爱好者和美食爱好者所不容错过的地方。选择勃艮第产品的酒庄进行参观，在此可参观葡萄酒的陈酿熟化过程及酒窖内储存发酵过程，运气好的时候可参观葡萄酒的酿造过程（取决葡萄的产期）。

overview.text_en:
After gathering on this day, tour the world-famous historical and cultural city of Rome, the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, known as the "Eternal City" for its long history. Visit the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior) standing on the ruins of ancient Rome, and tour the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). After 14:00 on this day, check in to the hotel on your own with your booking, or store your luggage at the hotel front desk in advance.
Overnight: Rome Hotel San Martino or Hotel Moderno, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
[The main attractions within Rome's old town are all within the Rome vehicle restricted zone (ZTL). The hotel's location is convenient for exploring each attraction on foot. The tour in Rome on this day is on foot, with a round-trip walking distance of about 5 kilometers, so please wear light and comfortable clothing.]
Note: [For some departure dates, the order of sightseeing on the itinerary may be adjusted, but the content of the tour remains consistent and does not affect the overall experience. The specific arrangements are subject to the departure notice and the actual itinerary.]
overview.text_zh:
当天集合后游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“ 。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观），当天14点后凭订单自行入住酒店或提前寄存行李在酒店前台。
夜宿：罗马圣马丁酒店或现代酒店 或同等4星级酒店
【罗马古城区内的主要景点，均在罗马车辆禁行区内（ZTL）。酒店所在位置方便步行游览各个景点，罗马当天为步行游览，往返步行行程约为5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。】
备注：【部分团期行程游览的先后次序有所调整，但游览内容一致，不影响全程体验，具体安排以出团通知书及实际行程为准】

accommodation.text_en:
Rome Hotel San Martino or Hotel Moderno, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
This elegant hotel enjoys an excellent location, with convenient access to downtown Rome or the airport by metro or train. The hotel's stylish rooms all feature original and reproduction Art Deco furniture, decorated in warm tones. The hotel serves a generous buffet breakfast daily. The restaurant and bar offer classic Italian cuisine and Roman specialties, with vegetarian and gluten-free options available.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马圣马丁酒店或现代酒店 或同等4星级酒店
这间典雅的酒店地理位置优越，地铁或火车方便前往罗马市区或机场，酒店时尚的客房均设有原创的和复制的装饰艺术风格家具，采用暖色调装饰。酒店每天供应丰盛的自助早餐。餐厅和酒吧供应经典的意大利风味美食和罗马特色佳肴，可提供素食和无麸质美食。

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth exploration of Rome, one of the world's most important cradles of culture
Seek out the historical civilization that has settled over thousands of years among the ancient ruins that occupy about half of the city. Whether it is the world-famous architectural ruins formed by the Imperial Senate, triumphal arches, victory columns, the Pantheon and the Colosseum, or the many exquisite Renaissance buildings and art treasures housed in hundreds of museums, or even the many fountains of varied form throughout the city represented by the Trevi Fountain, as well as the vast roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares, public baths and other public buildings—all freeze art in that wonderful moment. Someone once said "architecture is flowing music"; the architecture of ancient Rome must then play a grand and timeless movement.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的必然是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The magnificent Colosseum in the center of Rome was built by the ancient Romans to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was a place reserved for slave owners, nobles and free citizens to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat by slaves, and is Rome's most famous historical relic. The Colosseum is a masterpiece and marvel that ranks as a model in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for being huge, majestic and magnificent. Although only most of its skeleton remains, its majestic bearing and grand momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman kings Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, and others rest here for eternity. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of the ancient Romans' exquisite architectural technique, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes from the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to all. Hepburn's fresh and beautiful figure seems to have merged with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. The Spanish Steps—the entire Spanish Square is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The steps have a total of 138 levels and are the widest steps in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maidens' Fountain" or the "Wishing Fountain," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology, with an imposing and grand momentum. It is said that if you stand with your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dream will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
Depart in the morning to tour Florence, visiting the world's third-largest church—the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, the Piazza della Signoria, the Old Bridge, as well as Florence's Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Check in to a hotel in the Tuscany region.
Overnight: Tuscany Montecatini Spa Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发游览佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥以及佛罗伦萨-圣十字广场，圣十字教堂（外观）。入住托斯卡纳地区的酒店。
夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Tuscany Montecatini Spa Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel
The hotel is located in Montecatini Terme, a famous wellness and resort destination in Tuscany. The hotel has been renovated, with a unique design and elegantly decorated rooms blending the modern and the ancient, very comfortable and tasteful. The spa area is very modern, with 2 swimming pools (indoor and outdoor), and the sauna enjoys a unique forest view. The hotel's private park and circular garden are a natural extension of Terme Tettuccio park—the same trees, picturesque scenery, hot springs, and a wide variety of flora and fauna, covering 40,000 square meters: as if in a corner of natural paradise. The menu of the hotel's NO|MORE Bistrot restaurant changes with the seasons, with dishes varying according to climate and temperature, richly aromatic and offering a rich and varied taste.
accommodation.text_zh:
托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店
酒店位于托斯卡纳著名的康养休息旅游度假地-蒙特卡蒂尼泰尔梅，酒店经过重新装修，设计独特，房间装潢典雅，融合了现代与古老，非常舒适和别致。 水疗区非常现代化，设有 2 个泳池（室内和室外），桑拿浴室享有独特的森林景观。酒店的私人公园和环形花园是 Terme Tettuccio 公园的自然延续，同样的树木、如画的景色、温泉、种类繁多的动植物，占地 40,000 平方米：仿佛置身于自然天堂的一隅。酒店的NO|MORE Bistrot 餐厅随季节变化菜单，菜肴根据气候和温度而变化，香气浓郁浓郁，食物口感丰富多样。

highlights.text_en:
Florence in its glorious heyday, the star of the Renaissance shining bright
In Florence, the world's capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Among the blue skies and white clouds, brightly colored walls, dark green shutters and dark red roofs, seek out the soul of the Renaissance; in the streets and alleys, squares and churches, museums and galleries, feel the Renaissance that never grows old. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic spirit of Dante Alighieri and the painterly spirit of Da Vinci still drift over Florence, still continue to seek out the people and events of the European Renaissance period..."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利．但丁的诗魂、达．芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....”

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few are as enchanting as this one. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, fully interprets the classicism, elegance and freedom celebrated in the Renaissance era—no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of a new church, which took 175 years to finally complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才最终建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria enjoys the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and numerous cafés and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno river, also known as the Old Bridge, was built in 1345 and is one of the earlier large-span circular-arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over several centuries, it has withstood floods, social unrest and wars without falling, and is one of Florence's famous landmark buildings.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce. This Gothic building is the resting place of Italian luminaries such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring carefully. Around the square are many cafés and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. The Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural activities and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract large audiences. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
Depart in the morning for Cinque Terre, touring the five beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs in turn along the Ligurian coastline. In the afternoon, head to Pisa to tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli in Pisa's historical and cultural center.
Overnight: Tuscany Montecatini Spa Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel
Note: If bad weather or factors such as a railway company strike make it impossible to tour Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically change to touring the coastal cities by coach or other means.
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，依次游览悬崖上的五座美丽渔村。 下午前往比萨,游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场。
夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Tuscany Montecatini Spa Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel
The hotel is located in Montecatini Terme, a famous wellness and resort destination in Tuscany. The hotel has been renovated, with a unique design and elegantly decorated rooms blending the modern and the ancient, very comfortable and tasteful. The spa area is very modern, with 2 swimming pools (indoor and outdoor), and the sauna enjoys a unique forest view. The hotel's private park and circular garden are a natural extension of Terme Tettuccio park—the same trees, picturesque scenery, hot springs, and a wide variety of flora and fauna, covering 40,000 square meters: as if in a corner of natural paradise. The menu of the hotel's NO|MORE Bistrot restaurant changes with the seasons, with dishes varying according to climate and temperature, richly aromatic and offering a rich and varied taste.
accommodation.text_zh:
托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店
酒店位于托斯卡纳著名的康养休息旅游度假地-蒙特卡蒂尼泰尔梅，酒店经过重新装修，设计独特，房间装潢典雅，融合了现代与古老，非常舒适和别致。 水疗区非常现代化，设有 2 个泳池（室内和室外），桑拿浴室享有独特的森林景观。酒店的私人公园和环形花园是 Terme Tettuccio 公园的自然延续，同样的树木、如画的景色、温泉、种类繁多的动植物，占地 40,000 平方米：仿佛置身于自然天堂的一隅。酒店的NO|MORE Bistrot 餐厅随季节变化菜单，菜肴根据气候和温度而变化，香气浓郁浓郁，食物口感丰富多样。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a paradise on the cliffs
Along the long Mediterranean coastline, stop at each beautiful fishing village, watching the sun-drenched beaches, the waves quietly lapping against the rocks, and the colorful houses coming closer from afar. The curiosity to gaze upon the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak the moment you arrive; disembarking from the boat, you walk on foot through the alleys of the fishing villages, and the closer you get, the more delightful the surprises. It is like savoring a visual feast of five colors and flavors, slowly tasting each nuance—this scene is so beautiful it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到较高点，下得船来，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy. Built along the winding Mediterranean coastline, it is the collective name for five cliffside villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking route that strings the five villages together. Built along the coast, it is one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 kilometers long and taking around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other the mountains, and ahead the Italian fishing hamlets—a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on UNESCO's World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy. Located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Province of Tuscany, it is a world-famous landscape and one of Italy's symbols, designated a World Heritage Site by the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization. It is said that in the year 1590, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment from the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's view.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Piazza del Duomo, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, part of which is lawn. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa. On the square stand four great buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of San Giovanni, and the Camposanto (cemetery). The ancient city walls and gates are also preserved around the square. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

overview.text_en:
In the morning head to Venice and freely visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings built upon the water, together with the winding water lanes, make Venice's romantic charm linger long and never fade.
Overnight: Venice voco Hotel or Hilton Ambassador Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往威尼斯，自由参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Venice voco Hotel or Hilton Ambassador Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels, with an excellent location, stylish modern design, natural tones in the guest rooms and modern interiors, offering you a comfortable and warm stay. The hotel provides a generous breakfast, a well-equipped gym, a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails, and the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian and international cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和国际美食。

highlights.text_en:
The most beautiful Venice in the world, the "Pearl of the Adriatic" still dazzling and resplendent
As one of the major cities of the Renaissance period, Venice is made up of 118 small islands, connected into one by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands" and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the most magnificent squares in the world, "St. Mark's Square," the beautiful Grand Canal, the phoenix-reborn La Fenice Opera House, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs immortalized by Xu Zhimo, and breathtakingly beautiful arcades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting, and the filming location for many movie scenes. Her unique and incomparable temperament leaves every visitor enchanted and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上壮丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的无与伦比的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe" by Napoleon. The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, with the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica rising on the east side. Since ancient times, it has been the public activity center for Venice's political, religious and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Known simply as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in the year 829 and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe and is a classic work of Venetian architectural art. It is also a treasure house holding a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was the path that condemned prisoners had to take in ancient times when escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style, shaped like a house, covered on top with a vault and very tightly enclosed, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried in the Doge's Palace, serious offenders were taken to the dungeons, and as they crossed this airtight bridge, they could only glimpse the blue sky through the small windows, losing their freedom from then on and involuntarily letting out sighs. It is said that lovers who kiss beneath the bridge can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on the Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you walk across the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through the small openings, rather than being one of the many people on the bridge opposite looking over at you. Photography is allowed inside, as long as you don't use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

overview.text_en:
Depart in the morning for Milan, Italy's capital of fashion. Visit Sforza Castle (exterior), a fortress from medieval to Renaissance times in Milan, then head to visit Milan's landmark building, Milan Cathedral (exterior), and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of the most beautiful commercial arcades in Europe.
Overnight: Milan Center UNA/BW Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往意大利时尚之都-米兰,参观米兰中世纪到文艺复兴时期的堡垒-斯福尔扎古堡（外观），之后前往参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。
夜宿：米兰中心UNA/BW酒店 或同等级4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Milan Center UNA/BW Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the center of Milan, just a 10-minute drive from the Duomo Cathedral, and guests can conveniently take the tram and metro to the city's landmarks. It offers modern guest rooms, free WiFi covering all areas and a generous buffet breakfast, as well as high-tech meeting facilities. The guest rooms feature modern decor in light tones, with elegant wooden floors, and the restaurant serves Italian and international specialties.
accommodation.text_zh:
米兰中心UNA/BW酒店或同等级4星级酒店
酒店位于米兰市中心，距离米兰大教堂（Duomo Cathedral）仅10分钟车程，客人可方便乘坐电车和地铁前往市区的地标。提供现代客房、覆盖各处的免费WiFi和丰盛的自助早餐，还设有高科技会议设施。客房享有浅色调的现代装饰，铺有优雅的木地板，餐厅供应意大利和国际特色菜肴。

highlights.text_en:
Behold Milan Cathedral, which took 500 years to build and is renowned throughout the world for its many exquisite carvings and Gothic spires
Construction began in 1387, and it took 500 years to complete the Gothic Milan Cathedral. The cathedral has 135 spires large and small, each topped with a statue, making it the Gothic church with the most statues in the world, with a total of more than 6,000 marble statues.
highlights.text_zh:
瞻仰历经500年建成，以众多精美的雕刻和哥特式的塔尖而闻名于世的米兰大教堂
始建于1387年，历经500年时间才完成是哥特式建筑米兰大教堂，教堂上共有135大小尖塔，每个塔上都有一座雕像，因此它也是世界上雕像最多的哥特式教堂，共有大理石雕像约6000多座。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, Milan Cathedral was first built in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Praised as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and the white marble facade is carved with thousands of statues. The interior space is broad and spacious; sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaic windows, the light hazy, full of a solemn religious atmosphere. The cathedral's crypt also preserves the remains of the Church of San Tecla that originally stood on the site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most tourists who come here are sightseeing. Under the central arcade is the Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan—especially the window displays, which are updated daily; just standing outside the windows to admire them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is filled with many upscale restaurants, cafés and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。伊曼纽尔二世拱廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Sforza Castle is one of Milan's most important buildings and a witness to Milan's eventful history. Looking down, the entire castle resembles a grand duchy, with high walls on four sides and a carefully planned park. Built as a castle in the 14th century by the Count of Sforza, it later became the residence of the Sforza family, witnessing the whole process from the heyday to the family's decline. The castle has now been converted by the Milan city government into museums, including the Museum of Applied Arts and Musical Instruments, the Archaeological Museum and the Museum of Ancient Art. Its rear gate is the Arch of Peace, which was named for the renovations by the ruler Francesco.
attractions.text_zh: 斯福尔扎城堡是米兰最重要的建筑之一，是米兰沧桑历史的见证。俯瞰整个城堡像一个大公国，有四面的高墙和精致规划过的公园。在14世纪时由斯福尔扎伯爵作为城堡而建，而后成为斯福尔扎家族的住所，见证了从鼎盛时期到家族衰败的全过程。现城堡被米兰市政府辟为博物馆，其中有应用艺术和乐曲博物馆、考古博物馆、古代艺术博物馆，他的后门是和平门，是统治者费朗西斯科改造得名的。

overview.text_en:
Depart in the morning for Lucerne, touring the lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, listening to the Lion Monument tell that chapter of Swiss loyalty and steadfastness, as well as attractions such as the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal water tower. Then take the GoldenPass panoramic train to Lungern—a journey of about 1 hour, traversing mountains and ridges, enjoying the beautiful scenery along the way. Tour Lake Lungern and the town's scenery. Then head to Interlaken to freely explore Höheweg and Höhematte, peaceful villages nestled among greenery, dotted between mountains and waters, where man and nature blend into one. Then check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Sigriswil Snow Mountain Lake View Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点。之后乘坐金色山口观光列车前往龙疆，1小时左右的车程，穿山越岭，一路上欣赏美丽的风景。游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。之后前往因特拉肯，自由游览何维克街，荷黑马特，宁静的村庄，绿树掩映，点缀在山水之间，人与自然浑然一体。之后入住酒店。
夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Sigriswil Snow Mountain Lake View Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in a mountain ravine beside the panoramic bridge of Sigriswil. All guest rooms are decorated in elegant Swiss country style, and the hotel's views fulfill every imagining of Switzerland, with rooms enjoying views of Lake Thun, the surrounding mountains or the village of Sigriswil. Sitting in the hotel's restaurant gazing out at the emerald-green waters of Lake Thun, with the snowy mountains quietly reflected, it is as if you are in a painting, allowing you to fully appreciate the beautiful, paradise-like scenery of Switzerland.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于锡格里斯维尔（Sigriswil）全景桥旁边的山涧，所有的客房装饰为瑞士乡村典雅风格，酒店景观满足对瑞士的想象，客房客房享有图恩湖或周围群山或锡格里斯维尔村景致。坐在酒店的餐厅远眺碧绿的图恩湖水，宁静地倒影的雪山，恍然如画中，让人尽情欣赏瑞士世外桃源般的美好景致。

highlights.text_en:
Experience the GoldenPass panoramic train and enjoy a scroll of Switzerland's natural scenery all the way
The golden line of the GoldenPass panoramic train is the GoldenPass section from Lucerne to Lungern. The towns and villages along the route are all exquisite scenery full of wonder, traveling all the way through the Alps. The train is like a red ribbon, stringing together sapphire-blue lakes, snow-capped mountains, and agate-red tiled, colorful houses, taking you on a wonderful journey through a fairyland realm. Boarding the train, the panoramic, bright, huge glass windows allow you to take in the scenery along the route from every angle. From the first minute the train starts, you will be drawn into an ever-changing array of magnificent scenes; you won't want to blink, for fear of missing every changing view.
highlights.text_zh:
体验金色山口观光列车，一路欣赏瑞士的自然景观画卷
金色山口观光列车的黄金线，是乘坐金色山口号从卢塞恩前往龙疆段。沿线的城镇村庄，都是充满奇幻的精致景色。一路穿行于阿尔卑斯山脉之中。列车如一道红色的彩线，串起蓝宝石的湖泊，白雪皑皑的群山，玛瑙般的红瓦彩屋，带你畅游美妙的神仙境界。坐上列车，全景敞亮巨大的玻璃光窗，让你从各个角度，都能尽揽沿线风光美景。从列车启动的第一分钟起，就会被带入变幻无穷的胜景之中，你不舍得眨一下眼睛，生怕错过每一个变化的景色。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland, in the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled against the mountains and beside the water, Lucerne has a beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance palaces and mansions, as well as century-old shops and long streets and ancient alleys—all are everywhere. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the city's beautiful views in an almost dreamlike, real way, making it an extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful towns. Since the 19th century, it has attracted many princes, nobles and literary figures to visit and reside, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: Lake Lucerne, with its winding shape, forms a classic "lake and mountain" landscape together with the surrounding mountains, attracting large numbers of tourists to visit. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight on Lake Lucerne, and thus this piece acquired the title "Moonlight"—although this was not Beethoven's intent.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩湖这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: This dying lion statue was carved into the natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and more than 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground, a broken spear thrust into its shoulder, with a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms beside it. This statue commemorates the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died on August 10, 1792, protecting the safety of the family of Louis XVI in the Tuileries Palace in Paris. Below the statue, text describes the course of this event. In those years, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, driven by livelihood, went to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave in battle, but honor and money could not mask the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, retaining only the guard serving the Catholic Holy See—the famous Swiss Guard. Owing to their famous loyalty and courage, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

attractions.text_en: Switzerland's golden train shuttles through the beautiful Alpine region, taking in the charming lake and mountain scenery all the way. One of its most beautiful sections is the GoldenPass train (Luzern-Lungern Express) from Lungern to Luzern. Along the way are graceful villages, azure-blue lake water, dense vegetation, vast pastures, leisurely cattle and sheep, and the snow-capped Alps, with scenery that changes from the foot of the mountain to the summit, making people exclaim that this is a fairyland on earth.
attractions.text_zh: 瑞士的黄金列车穿梭于阿尔卑斯美丽的区域，一路总览迷人的湖光山色。其中美丽的一段就是龙疆（Lungern）到卢塞恩（Luzern）这一段的金色山口列车（Luzren-Lungern Express），沿途秀美的村庄，碧蓝的湖水，茂密的植被，广袤的牧场，悠闲的牛羊，还有白雪皑皑的阿尔卑斯山脉，从山脚到山顶变幻的风景，让人感叹这就是人间仙境。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass train passes through here. This place has Switzerland's purest alpine lake water, surrounded by mountains and lush green grass, with quaint villages scattered along the shores of Lake Lungern—truly a paradise far from the hustle and bustle.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口列车就会从这里经过。这里拥有瑞士最为纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Interlaken is a small town at the foot of the Jungfrau, located between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, also known as the town between the lakes. Famous for its intoxicating scenery throughout the four seasons, geographically it belongs to the heart of the Bernese Oberland.
attractions.text_zh: 因特拉肯是少女峰山脚下的一个小镇，位于图恩湖及布里恩茨湖之间，又名湖间镇，以一年四季的醉人风景著名，在地理上它属于伯尔尼高地的中心。

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is the green meadow square in the center of Interlaken, the famous Swiss sightseeing town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery, and now no buildings may be constructed on it, to prevent damage to this beautiful landscape. This is the best place to gaze at the Jungfrau; the vast green meadow has a fountain and is dotted with many benches, so it is also a good place for strolling. Höhematte is also the landing site for paragliders; there is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, and after paying, staff will take visitors to the nearby mountains for free flight, allowing them to enjoy the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the sky.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

overview.text_en:
In the morning visit the town of Grindelwald and the Dreamy Hillside (Bort), then ascend to visit the Jungfrau, the Alps' famous scenic area. Take the cable car to the summit of the enchanting Jungfrau and head to the "Sphinx Observation Deck" to look down upon the snow-capped Jungfrau and Europe's "Aletsch Glacier." Then head to Zurich to check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Crowne Plaza Zurich or Fassbind, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往参观格林德尔瓦尔德小镇、梦幻山坡，之后登顶参观阿尔卑斯山著名的风景区-少女峰，乘坐缆车登顶迷人的少女峰，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”上俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰和欧洲的“阿莱奇冰川”(Aletsch)。之后前往苏黎世入住酒店。
夜宿：苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或法斯宾德或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Crowne Plaza Zurich or Fassbind, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in Zurich's bustling commercial district, with shops, bars and restaurants within walking distance. The spacious and stylish guest rooms can relieve a full day's fatigue, and the clean, bright interior decor brings guests a good mood for the day. The hotel is fully equipped, and guests can enjoy dinner at the hotel's à la carte restaurant or sample snacks and drinks at the hotel bar.
accommodation.text_zh:
苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或法斯宾德或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落于苏黎世热闹的商业街区，步行可达的距离遍布商店、酒吧和餐馆。宽敞时尚的客房能解除您一整天的疲累，简洁明快室内装饰带给客人一天的好心情，酒店设施完备，客人可在酒店内的单点菜肴餐厅享用晚餐或在酒店的酒吧品尝小吃和饮品。

highlights.text_en:
The Jungfrau Region
As one of Switzerland's famous representative tourist destinations, the Jungfrau is not a single snowy mountain, but a series of different Swiss landscape combinations around the Jungfrau and Interlaken, encompassing many different snow-mountain experiences, creating the wonderful and rich scenic areas of the Swiss Jungfrau, First, Grindelwald and other attractions. The Jungfrau summit panoramic scenic cable car lets you experience multiple different journeys. The First Cliff Walk adventure park, as the originator of aerial adventure tourism projects, and high-altitude paragliding not only adorn the snowy mountains, but also bring many thrilling activities to the younger crowd.
highlights.text_zh:
少女峰地区
作为瑞士著名的代表性旅游胜地，少女峰不是座雪山，而是围绕着少女峰、因特拉肯的一系列不同的瑞士风景组合，包含多种不同的雪山体验，成就了精彩而丰富的瑞士少女峰 、菲斯特，格兰维尔德等景点旅游景区。 少女峰登顶景观缆车，可以感受多程不同的体验。菲斯特空天冒险乐园，作为空天探险类旅游项目的始祖，而高空滑翔伞不仅仅装饰了雪山，还给年轻群体带来了许多的刺激活动。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald has extraordinary, magnificent mountain scenery, with a glacier running through it. At the end of the 18th century, a group of tourists from England first came to this beautiful place, and the local mountain guides of Grindelwald led the English tourists to climb almost all the peaks in this region, and winter tourism flourished from then on. Walking along the high-altitude Pfälchüechliweg route from Holenstein to Brandegg is an unforgettable experience. This route leads to lush green pastures, flower-filled meadows and enchanting forests. As your hiking trip in Grindelwald comes to an end, you will surely reward yourself well at the Brandegg mountain restaurant, and of course the famous Pfälchüechli (a kind of apple fritter) is indispensable.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦有着非同寻常的奇伟壮丽的山景，一条冰河横穿其中，18世纪末，来自英国的一批游客首次来到这片美丽的地方，格林德尔瓦尔德当地的登山向导引领来自英国的游客们登遍了这个地区的几乎所有山峰，冬季旅游业自此开始蓬勃发展。沿着从Holenstein到Brandegg的pfelchüechliwg高海拔线路一路前行是一种十分难忘的体验。这条线路通往绿草繁茂的牧场、鲜花盛开的草地还有那迷人的森林。在格林德尔瓦尔德徒步旅行步入尾声时，您一定会在Brandegg高山饭店好好犒赏自己一番，当然著名的pfelchüechli（一种苹果油炸饼）是必不可少的。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located about twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an elevation of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered in ice and snow year-round, while below the mountain it is lush and green with beautiful scenery, making it a famous Swiss destination for sightseeing and outdoor sports. The Jungfrau region was inscribed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Sphinx Observation Deck is the observation deck on the Jungfrau, the Top of Europe, and has Switzerland's high-speed elevators. The Sphinx Observation Deck is at an elevation of 3,571 meters, from which you can admire the breathtaking panorama of the Alps and the magnificent Aletsch Glacier, 23.6 kilometers long and covering an area of 117 square kilometers—it is the most magnificent glacier in the Alps; there are the magnificent Alps in the cantons of Bern and Valais and part of the Jura mountains region. On clear days, you can even see the Vosges mountains far away in France and the Black Forest far away in Germany.
attractions.text_zh: 斯芬克斯观景台是欧洲屋脊少女峰上的观景台，拥有瑞士高速的升降机。在海拔3571米高处是斯芬克斯观景台，由此可观赏到阿尔卑斯山惊心动魄的全景图长23.6公里，覆盖面积达117平方公里的雄奇的阿莱契冰川，它是阿尔卑斯山中的壮丽冰川；有壮丽的阿尔卑斯山在伯尔尼州、瓦莱州及汝拉山脉地区的一部分。天气晴朗的日子，甚至能看到远在法国境内的浮日山脉及远在德国境内的黑森林。

attractions.text_en: The Aletsch region has been inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage List. Also known as the "Great Aletsch Glacier," the ice here weighs more than 1.1 billion tons, a glacial landform of the Alps. The glacier extends from the northern slopes of the Eiger, the Mönch and the Jungfrau toward the canton of Valais, and the glacial meltwater flows into the Rhône through the pristine Massa Gorge. As a result, various rare plants grow in this region, which is the habitat of many rare animals, and also an excellent place for hiking, skiing and other activities, with magnificent scenery that is hard to describe in words.
attractions.text_zh: 阿莱奇(Aletsch)地区已被联合国教科文组织列入世界遗产名录，又称为“大阿莱奇冰川”，这里冰重超过11亿吨，是阿尔卑斯山脉的冰川地貌。冰川从艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰的北坡向瓦莱州延伸，冰川融水通过原始的马萨峡谷(Massa Gorge)流入罗纳河，因而该地区生长着各种珍稀植物，是许许多多珍稀动物的栖息地，也是徒步和滑雪等项目的绝佳地点，壮丽的风景难以用语言描述。

overview.text_en:
In the morning tour the old town of Zurich, Zurich Cathedral (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse and other attractions. Then head to Colmar, one of France's romantic, fairy-tale-like towns, which is also the inspiration for Hayao Miyazaki's film "Howl's Moving Castle" and the filming location of "Chinese Restaurant 2." Tour the beautiful old town of Colmar, the Maison des Têtes and the beautiful building of Colmar, the Maison Pfister, and other attractions.
Overnight: Burgundy Castle Hotel; Oceania Dijon city center, or an equivalent 4-star hotel in the city center
overview.text_zh:
上午游览苏黎世老城、苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖和班霍夫大街等景点。 后前往法国浪漫、童话般的小镇之一科尔马，这里也是宫崎骏电影《哈尔的移动城堡》原型及《中餐厅2》的实景拍摄地，游览美丽的科尔马老城区，人头屋和科尔马漂亮的建筑普菲斯泰屋等景点。
夜宿：勃垦第古堡酒店 第戎市区大洋洲 或市区同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Burgundy Castle Hotel
The Burgundy Castle is located in the center of a magnificent 27-hectare park in a grand cru wine-growing area. The castle recalls the elegance and classic decor of the old-time aristocracy—from Louis Philippe red, exquisite celadon green, precious brocade, low wainscoting and mosaic-floored bathrooms, to enjoying the views of the Burgundy horizon, all these unique details ensure the recreation of a unique medieval experience. The restaurant is located in a former 14th-century building with grand vaulted ceilings, where you can sample classic specialty cuisine.
Oceania Dijon city center, or an equivalent 4-star hotel in the city center
The hotel is located in the center of Dijon, within walking distance of Dijon Cathedral. The hotel design is warm and comfortable, with complete supporting facilities. You can enjoy rich resort amenities such as an indoor swimming pool, hot tub and steam room, and you can also go to the café to order a favorite drink and enjoy a refreshing sip.
accommodation.text_zh:
勃艮第古堡酒店
勃艮第古堡位于特级葡萄产区，占地 27 公顷的雄伟公园中央，古堡回味旧事贵族的雅致与经典的装饰，从路易菲利普红色、精致的青瓷绿色、珍贵的锦缎、低镶板和马赛克地板的浴室、享受勃艮第地平线的景色，所有这些独特的细节确保还原中世纪的独特体验。餐厅位于一栋具有宏伟的拱形天花板凡的前14世纪建筑，可以在此品尝经典的特色美食。
第戎市区大洋洲 或市区同等4星级酒店
酒店位于第戎市中心，可步行前往第戎大教堂。酒店设计温馨舒适，配套设施齐全。您可享受室内游泳池、热水浴缸和蒸汽浴室等丰富度假设施，也可前往咖啡厅，点一杯喜欢的饮品，畅饮一番。

highlights.text_en:
Step into the fairy-tale world of Hayao Miyazaki
The Ill river flows quietly through the small town of Colmar—little bridges over flowing water, deep and narrow alleys, the clear canal and flower boats, brightly colored timber houses—exuding a rich historical atmosphere. As one of France's romantic small towns, Colmar is called the "Venice of France." The town still well preserves the 16th-century architectural style—half-timbered houses, each built of wood with multi-faceted roofs, with unique designs that all reflect personal taste. This town full of rich Alsatian charm has had a glorious history; the city is full of cultural atmosphere, and the ancient architectural heritage has quietly displayed its beauty in every historical period.
highlights.text_zh:
走进宫崎骏笔下的童话世界
伊尔河从科尔马小城中静静淌过，小桥流水，幽幽窄巷，清清的运河与花船，色彩绚烂的木屋，散发出浓厚的历史气息。科尔马作为法国浪漫的小城之一，被称为“法国的威尼斯”。小城目前仍然完好地保留着16世纪的建筑风格—木筋屋，一间间木屋由木材搭建的多面形屋顶，独特的设计，皆具个人品味。充满着浓郁阿尔萨斯风情的小镇有过辉煌的历史，城市充满文化气息，古老的建筑遗产在每一个历史时期，把美丽静静绽放。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Zurich is a not-to-be-missed place to experience. Here gather traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookstores and flower shops, as well as jewelry and accessories, fashion boutiques, and of course Zurich's own local brands. Famous streets and alleys such as Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg, Niederdorf and Augustine Lane are all located in the old town. Strolling through the old town in the evening, you will find it has turned into the people's entertainment venue.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世的老城区是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰，时尚精品，当然也少不了苏黎世本土品牌。班霍夫大街(Bahnhofstrasse)、伦韦格街(Rennweg)、尼德道尔夫(Niederdorf)与圣奥古斯丁巷(Augustine Lane)等著名街巷都位于老城区。晚上漫步于老城区，会发现这里又变成了民众的娱乐场所。

attractions.text_en: The twin towers of Zurich Cathedral (Grossmünster) are a landmark of Zurich. According to legend, Charlemagne (Charlemagne the Great, king of the Carolingian dynasty of the Frankish kingdom and founder of the Holy Roman Empire) built the twin towers upon the graves of Felix and Regula, the patron saints of Zurich. Other sights worth seeing include St. Peter's Church, which has the largest clock face in Europe, and the Fraumünster of Zurich, which is famous for its stained-glass windows painted by Giacometti (the Swiss surrealist sculpture master and painter) and Chagall (the surrealist painter).
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂的双塔是苏黎世的地标性建筑。根据传说，查理曼（查理曼大帝，法兰克王国卡洛林王朝国王，神圣罗马帝国的奠基人）将双塔建在了苏黎世主保圣人Felix和Regula的墓地之上。其他值得一看的景点还包括：拥有欧洲至大钟面的圣彼得教堂和苏黎世圣母大教堂，该教堂因贾科梅蒂（瑞士超存在主义雕塑大师，画家）和夏卡尔（超现实主义画家）绘制的彩色玻璃窗而闻名。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also known as Station Street) is one of the longer shopping avenues in Europe and one of the most expensive shopping avenues in the world. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless heart of Zurich—luxury brands from all over the world are everywhere here, and private banks stand in rows. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless tourists feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored gold bars reputed to be among the largest quantities in the world, making many people so excited they can't move their feet. Immersed in it, you can clearly feel the air filled with the scent of wealth, luxury and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long, and the docks on the lake are full of yachts of all kinds, like a rich people's club. One end of Lake Zurich extends deep into the city center, and white swans and wild ducks are seen everywhere on the lake, leisurely and carefree, a harmonious scene. The north shore of Lake Zurich is where the rich live, known as the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." At the end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich, and as a "most livable city in the world," the life of the true Zurichers is everywhere imbued with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Colmar is located in the northeastern corner of France, just a stone's throw from Germany, with the waters of the Rhine encircling the small town. Its secluded geographical location and exquisite scenery have earned Colmar the name of a picture-like town. At the border of France and Germany, Colmar blends the tenderness of the Latin peoples with the diligence of the Germanic peoples. Most of Colmar's houses inherit the architectural features of south-central Germany, with the walls covered in horizontal, vertical and diagonal wooden strips, beautiful and exquisite, like the little houses in fairy tales. And filling the tangram-like gaps with various colors is perhaps the romance only the imaginative French could have. It is precisely for this reason that Colmar won the honor of the "Street Art Society Award," making people flock to it.
attractions.text_zh: 科尔马地处法国东北角，与德国只有咫尺之遥，莱茵河水环绕小城。隐秘的地理位置以及绝美的景致使得科尔马被称之为画一般的小镇。在法、德交界，科尔马融合了拉丁民族的缠绵和日耳曼民族的勤奋。科尔马的房屋大都承袭了德国中南部的建筑特色，墙身布满横、直、斜相间的木条条纹，漂亮精致，宛如童话中的小屋。而在那形如七巧板的空当儿中添满各种颜色，或许是极尽想象力的法国人才有的浪漫吧。正因如此，科尔马获得了“街道艺术学会奖”的殊荣，让人们趋之若鹜。

attractions.text_en: The Maison des Têtes is located on a 14th-century old street and was built in 1609. It is a Renaissance building, and the 105 vividly expressive human-face heads carved on its front wall make it the most eye-catching building in the old town. The 19th-century bronze statue standing on the roof was created by Bartholdi—the designer of the Statue of Liberty.
attractions.text_zh: 人头屋位于十四世纪的古街道，建于1609年，是文艺复兴时期的建筑，其正面墙壁上雕刻的105颗表情生动各异的人面头像，是老城中惹眼的建筑。立在屋顶的19世纪青铜雕像，则出自自由女神像的设计者——巴托尔迪之手。

overview.text_en: In the morning head to the wine-growing area of the Burgundy region, visiting the courtyard, production workshop, vineyards and wine cellar of a Burgundy winery. Then head to Dijon, the capital of France's famous wine region of Burgundy, and begin a gourmet and red-wine journey—Dijon, the place of origin of escargot, rose mustard and the white ox. Visit the old town of Dijon and the Dijon Cathedral (Notre-Dame de Dijon). In the afternoon head to Paris, and upon arriving in Paris, conclude the wonderful itinerary at the Place d'Italie.
overview.text_zh: 上午前往勃垦地大区葡萄产区，参观勃艮第酒庄的庭院，生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖。随后前往法国产酒名区勃艮第首府及开始美食红酒之旅，蜗牛，玫瑰芥末及白牛的原产地第戎，参观第戎老城，第戎圣母院。下午前往巴黎，到达巴黎后意大利广场结束美好行程。

accommodation.text_en: No hotel accommodation
accommodation.text_zh: 无酒店住宿

highlights.text_en:
The Burgundy Wine Route and tasting at famous estates
Burgundy's Côte de Nuits and Côte d'Or regions are located in the hill country of central France and are an ancient French wine-producing region. The wines of the Burgundy region are full-bodied and tenacious, in direct contrast to the smoothness of Bordeaux wines, and are called the "king of French wines." On this day, visit a famous estate, taste red wine, and explore the production process of how French red wine goes from grape to fine wine in the glass. The estate run by the Reault family is located in the wine region of La Romanée-Conti, also one of France's premier estate regions. The vineyards are the most beautiful production area in this region. Visit the estate's courtyard, production workshop, vineyards and wine-storage cellar, where the estate's professional sommelier is responsible for the wine service and in-depth explanation, with a light tasting of three to five glasses of red and white wine—a highly recommended red-wine art journey experience on the local wine tourism route.
highlights.text_zh:
勃艮第红酒之路与名庄品鉴
勃艮第的夜丘与金岭地区位于法国中部山丘地区，是法国古老的葡萄酒产区，勃艮第产区的葡萄酒力道浑厚坚韧，与波尔多葡萄酒的柔顺恰相对立，被称为"法国葡萄酒之王"。 当天参观名庄，品鉴红酒，探究法国红酒如何从葡萄到杯中美酒的生产过程。偌梧家族经营的酒庄位于罗曼尼·康帝 （La Romanee Comti）葡萄酒产区，也是法国庄园高级产区之一。葡萄园是该地区漂亮的产区，参观酒庄的庭院，生产工坊、葡萄园和藏酒酒窖，酒庄专业待酒师负责待酒服务和深度讲解，三到五杯红酒及白酒浅尝，是当地葡萄酒旅游路线重点推荐的红酒艺术之旅体验项目。

attractions.text_en: The Gothic traditional building Notre-Dame de Dijon was built in the 13th century. Three rows of beast-shaped false gargoyles on the church facade are separated by two rows of slender columns, and the church has a 14th-century chiming clock. For most of the people of Dijon, Notre-Dame de Dijon is a church building with great approachability, and over these recent centuries, Notre-Dame has been the main spiritual and emotional comfort of the people of Dijon.
attractions.text_zh: 哥特式的传统建筑第戎圣母院建造于13世纪，教堂门面上三列兽形假排水口由两排纤细的圆柱分开，教堂上有一座14世纪的报时钟。对于大多数的第戎人民而言，第戎圣母院是一座具有亲和力的教堂建筑，在这近几个世纪以来，圣母院一直是第戎人民主要的精神、心灵的抚慰。

attractions.text_en: Dijon, located in Burgundy, the hometown of wine, was the capital of the Duchy of Burgundy from the 11th to 15th centuries. Especially in the 14th and 15th centuries, it flourished for a time thanks to several outstanding leaders, becoming an important political, economic and cultural-artistic center of Europe at that time. Today, the old town of Dijon is still scattered with many historical buildings from different periods. In addition to luxurious palaces, solemn churches, the luxury of glazed-tile roofs and many quaint timber-framed houses, there are also museums and art galleries converted from palaces and monasteries. With fine wine, fine food and an atmosphere of art throughout the city, it is a city very much in the French style.
attractions.text_zh: 位于葡萄酒故乡勃垦第地区的第戎，11到-15世纪曾是勃垦第公国的首府，特别在14、15世纪时因几位优秀领导人而盛极一时，成为当时欧洲重要的政治经济和文化艺术中心。如今第戎的老城区仍散布着许多不同时期的历史建筑，除了豪华的宫殿、庄严的教堂、彩釉屋顶的豪华和许多古朴的木框架房屋，也有宫殿和修道院改装成的博物馆和美术馆。美酒、美食搭配满城艺术分为，是非常具有法国风情的一座城市。

attractions.text_en: This destination that combines winemaking and tourism in one is a place not to be missed by wine lovers, art lovers and gourmets. Choose a winery producing Burgundy products to visit, where you can see the aging and maturation process of the wine and the storage and fermentation process within the cellar. If you are lucky, you may see the winemaking process (depending on the grape harvest season).
attractions.text_zh: 这个集酿酒与旅游于一身的胜地是葡萄酒爱好者、艺术爱好者和美食爱好者所不容错过的地方。选择勃艮第产品的酒庄进行参观，在此可参观葡萄酒的陈酿熟化过程及酒窖内储存发酵过程，运气好的时候可参观葡萄酒的酿造过程（取决葡萄的产期）。

attractions.text_en: Trondheim is Norway's third-largest city and home to one of Scandinavia's renowned research universities, brimming with youthful energy. It is also the coronation site of Norway's first king and an ancient capital, once the religious and power center of medieval Norway. Set against the gravity of Nidaros Cathedral, the colorful wooden houses of Bakklandet, and the clear waters of the Nidelva River, it is a city that perfectly blends weighty history with vibrant vitality. You need not rush to tick off sights; simply slow your pace and feel another deep charm of Norway beyond its natural fjords, amid the solemnity of the ancient church, the colors of the old wooden houses, and the freshness of the university town.
attractions.text_zh: 特隆赫姆是挪威第三大城市，拥有北欧著名的研究型大学之一，充满年轻活力。同时它也是挪威第一任国王的加冕地与古都，曾是中世纪挪威的宗教与权力中心。以尼德罗斯主教座堂的深沉、巴克兰德木屋的缤纷和尼德尔河的清澈为底色，一座将厚重历史与鲜活动力完美融合的城市。您无需匆忙打卡，只需放慢脚步，在古教堂的庄严、老木屋的缤纷和大学城的朝气中，感受挪威除了自然峡湾之外的另一种深厚韵味。

attractions.text_en: Norway's national cathedral, an important medieval cathedral in Scandinavia and the coronation church of Norwegian kings, magnificent and grand in architecture.
