Begun in 1070, it stands atop the tomb of Saint Olav, Norway's patron saint. Having endured several fires and reconstructions, it is a rare purely Gothic-style cathedral in Scandinavia.
attractions.text_zh: 挪威的国家圣堂，北欧重要的中世纪大教堂，挪威国王的加冕教堂，建筑雄伟壮观。始建于1070年，坐落在挪威守护神圣奥拉夫的墓葬之上，历经数次大火与重建，是北欧罕见的一座纯粹哥特式风格的大教堂。

attractions.text_en: This red wooden bridge is often called the "Gate of Happiness," connecting the city center with the traditional neighborhoods of the old town. Standing on the bridge and looking to one side, you see colorful warehouses neatly lined along the riverbank; to the other side, the gently flowing Nidelva River and its reflections in the water. Early morning and evening are the most beautiful moments here.
attractions.text_zh: 这座红色木桥常被称为“幸福之门”，连接着市中心与老城的传统街区。站在桥上，向一侧望去，是整齐排列在河畔的彩色仓库；向另一侧，则是缓缓流淌的尼德河与水中倒影。清晨和傍晚是这里最美的时刻。

attractions.text_en: The Atlantic Ocean Road is a century-defining piece of Norwegian construction, 36 kilometers in total length, a stretch of route between Kårvåg and Bud. In 2011, the Atlantic Ocean Road was named by Britain's The Guardian as one of the world's best road-trip destinations. The Atlantic Ocean Road not only boasts ingenious engineering design, but the scenery on both sides of the road is also breathtaking. Travelers can take in the beautiful natural landscapes and ecological environment of the Atlantic along this route.
attractions.text_zh: 大西洋公路是挪威世纪性建筑，全程36公里，是从 Kårvåg 到 Bud 之间的一段路线。2011年，大西洋公路被英国《卫报》评选为世界最佳公路旅行目的地之一。大西洋公路不仅有其匠心独运的工程设计，公路两旁的风景也令人叹为观止，游客们可以在这条路上饱览大西洋美丽的自然景观和生态环境。

attractions.text_en: The City of the Midnight Sun—Molde is located on the riverbank at the broad estuary of the Romsdalsfjord, a city in northwestern Norway. When Molde is mentioned, the first thing Norwegians think of is jazz. Every July, the International Midnight Jazz Festival is held here, one of Europe's longest-running jazz festivals. During the festival, visitors come from across continental Europe drawn by its fame. Standing on the Varden viewpoint at an elevation of 407 meters, you can take in the beauty of the city, fjord, and islands, and also admire the panorama of Molde, famous for its 222 snow-capped peaks.
attractions.text_zh: 午夜阳光之城——莫尔德位于罗姆达尔峡湾（Romsdalsfjord）宽阔河口处的河岸上，是挪威西北部地区城市。提到莫尔德，挪威人首先会想到的就是爵士乐。每年七月，国际午夜爵士音乐节在此举行，这是欧洲历史悠久的爵士音乐节。音乐节期间，来自欧洲大陆各国的游客慕名而来。站在海拔407米的瓦尔登观景台上可以一览城市、峡湾、岛屿的美景还可以欣赏以222座被白雪覆盖的山峰闻名的莫尔德全景。

attractions.text_en: Kristiansund is located on four small islands in the North Sea in western Norway, enjoying beautiful coastal scenery. The opera house in Kristiansund is one of Norway's oldest opera houses, begun in 1914. It is a beautiful Art Nouveau-style building and one of the few buildings to survive World War II. The Innlandet district is the old town of Kristiansund, where you can see unique and beautiful seaside architecture; the few buildings that survived World War II have also been well preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 克里斯蒂安松位于挪威西部北海中的4个小岛上，享有美丽的海岸景观。克里斯蒂安松市内的歌剧院，是挪威古老的歌剧院之一，始建于1914年，是一座美丽的新艺术运动风格建筑，是在二战中幸存的少数建筑之一。Innlandet区是克里斯蒂安松的老城区，可以看到独特而美丽的海边建筑，二战中幸存的少数建筑也都得以完善保存。

attractions.text_en: The Briksdal Glacier is a branch of the Jostedalsbreen—the largest glacier on the European mainland by volume—located within Jostedal Glacier National Park and one of its especially popular glacier attractions. The Jostedal Glacier covers 486 square kilometers, reaches depths of up to 400 meters, and rises 1,950 meters above sea level. The Briksdal Glacier offers an incomparably spectacular natural wonder, where visitors will see a 1,200-meter-high glacier plunging straight down into the riverbed, set against the lush forest alongside—magnificent beyond compare.
attractions.text_zh: 布里克斯达尔冰川是欧洲大陆体量占首位的冰川——约斯特达尔布林冰川（Jostedalsbreen）的分支，位于乔斯特达尔冰川国家公园（Jostedal Glacier National Park）中，是其中特别受欢迎的冰川景点。乔斯特达尔冰川占地486平米，深处可达400米深，高于海平面1950米。布里克斯达尔冰川拥有无比壮观的自然奇景，游客在此会看到1200米高的冰川从上到下直入河道，衬着一旁茂盛的森林，无比壮丽。

attractions.text_en: The Flydalsjuvet cliff viewpoint is a sight that frequently appears on postcards. From the Flydalsjuvet cliff viewpoint, you can take in the entire view of the small town of Geiranger in the valley, the Geirangerfjord, and the cruise ships docked in the harbor. A protruding cliff beside the viewpoint is often called the Geiranger Rock by travelers, mentioned together with Pulpit Rock/Preikestolen, Kjeragbolten, and Trolltunga.
attractions.text_zh: 弗里达斯悬崖观景台是明信片上经常出现的一个景点，在弗里达斯悬崖观景台可以将峡谷中的盖朗厄尔小城和盖朗厄尔峡湾以及靠港的邮轮尽收眼底。观景台旁一座突出的悬崖经常被旅行者称为盖朗厄尔石(盖朗格石)，与布道石/祈祷峰、奇迹石和山妖之舌一起被提及。

attractions.text_en: Located north of Bergen on the southwestern coast of Norway, it is one of the most beautiful and mysterious of Norway's fjords. The fjord is 16 kilometers long, flanked by mountains rising over 1,500 meters in elevation, and is one of the world's premier sightseeing destinations. At the head of the fjord lies the village of Geiranger, reached only by a 1,000-meter road winding down the mountain slope. In summer, many tourists come to vacation on foot. Besides the Geiranger Fjord Church built in 1842, the village also has the Flydalsjuvet viewpoint, frequented by photographers, and the Dalsnibba viewpoint at an elevation of 1,500 meters.
attractions.text_zh: 位于挪威西南岸的卑尔根北部，是挪威峡湾中美丽而神秘的一处。峡湾全长16公里，两岸耸立着海拔1500米以上的群山，是世界上数一数二的观光胜地，峡湾顶端是盖朗厄尔村，到该村仅靠一条沿山坡蜿蜒而下的长1000米的道路，夏季徒步前来度假的游客很多。村里除1842年建造的盖朗厄尔峡湾教堂外，还有摄影师经常光顾的弗里达尔斯尤威展望台和海拔1500米高的达尔斯尼巴展望台。

attractions.text_en: The Geirangerfjord is famous for its many waterfalls, and the Seven Sisters Waterfall is the most dazzling star among them. The Seven Sisters Waterfall (Norwegian: De Syv Søstrene or Dei Sju Systrene or Knivsflåfossen) is the 39th-highest waterfall in Norway and part of the Geiranger World Heritage Site. Seven distinct waterfalls cascade down through the air together, like sisters dancing in unison. One of the falls has a drop of 250 meters. Opposite the Seven Sisters is the Suitor Waterfall (the Suitor or Frieren), forever courting the Seven Sisters without rest. These waterfalls are at their most spectacular between May and July.
attractions.text_zh: 盖朗厄尔峡湾以瀑布众多闻名，而七姐妹瀑布则是这些瀑布中最亮眼的明星。七姐妹瀑布（挪威语 De Syv Søstrene 或 Dei Sju Systrene 或 Knivsflåfossen）是挪威第39高的瀑布，也是盖朗厄尔世界遗产的组成部分。七条明显的瀑布从空中一起飞流而下，像是一起舞蹈的姐妹们。其中一条瀑布有250米落差。七姐妹瀑布的对面，就是求婚者瀑布(the suitor 或 Frieren)，永不停歇的对七姐妹展开追求。这些瀑布在5月至7月间最为壮观。

attractions.text_en: The Eagle Road (Ørnevegen) is Route 63 between Geiranger and Eidsdal, famous for its eleven consecutive hairpin bends. This commanding name comes from the fact that, in the days before the road opens each year, eagles often gather near the viewpoint at the summit of the hairpin bends—Eagle Bend (Ørnesvingen, 620 meters). The Eagle Road is open year-round, while the rest of the Trollstigen (Troll's Path) section is only open to traffic from May to October. The route has many architecturally distinctive viewpoints (such as Flydalsjuvet, Ørnesvingen, Gudbrandsjuvet, etc.), making it an advantageous spot for overlooking the fjord.
attractions.text_zh: 老鹰之路(Ørnevegen)是位于盖朗厄尔和埃兹达尔(Eidsdal)之间的63号公路，以接连11个发夹弯所闻名。这个霸气的名字，是因为每年在公路开放之前几天，在发夹弯的顶峰——老鹰之翼(Ørnesvingen，620米)观景台附近经常有老鹰聚集。老鹰之路常年开放，其余的精灵之路路段只在5月到10月通车。线路都不少很有建筑特色的观景台(例如 Flydalsjuvet, Ørnesvingen, Gudbrandsjuvet 等)，是俯瞰峡湾的有利地点。

attractions.text_en: One of the most beautiful and steepest mountain railways in the world, descending from the mountain region of Myrdal at 865 meters elevation straight down into the depths of the Aurlandsfjord—Flåm, a total length of 20 kilometers. 80% of this railway is built on slopes with a 55% gradient. Begun in 1923 and completed after 20 years, it is hailed as Norway's greatest engineering miracle. Admiring the scenic paintings formed by valleys, waterfalls, cliffs, and snow-capped mountains from the train will absolutely be one of the most unforgettable experiences of your fjord journey. In the railway museum next to Flåm station, you can learn more about the history of this railway's construction.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上最美，最陡峭的高山铁路之一，从865米海拔的米达尔(Myrdal)山区直下到艾于兰峡湾的深处——弗洛姆，全长20公里。这段铁路的80％路段建在55％坡度的山坡上。始建于1923年，历时20年完成，被称为挪威最伟大的工程奇迹。在火车上欣赏山谷、瀑布、悬崖、雪山构成的这一幅幅风景画绝对会是您峡湾之旅最难忘的经历之一。在弗洛姆站旁边的火车博物馆里，可以了解到更多关于这段铁路建造的历史。

attractions.text_en: The Sognefjord is Norway's largest fjord and the most famous fjord in the world, with a total length of 204 kilometers and a maximum depth of 1,308 meters. The Sognefjord is the most accessible of the four major fjords, and was ranked by National Geographic Traveler magazine as the world's best-preserved and most worthwhile destination to visit. In summer you cannot see glaciers, but there are still waterfalls, calm lakes, and sheer cliffs to dazzle the eye.
attractions.text_zh: 松恩峡湾是挪威第一大峡湾，也是世界上最著名的峡湾，全长达204公里，最深处达1308米。松恩峡湾是四大峡湾中交通最便利的一个，被国家地理和旅游杂志把峡湾排在世界上保存最完好、最值得旅游的目的地第一名。夏天里看不到冰川，但仍有瀑布、平湖、绝壁让人目不暇接。

attractions.text_en: Voss is renowned as one of the most beautiful fjord towns, located in the heart of the fjord region, beside a beautiful small lake, with the Oslo-Bergen railway passing through here. It is a place in Norway where you can find recreational and sporting activities in all four seasons, equipped with most modern leisure and entertainment facilities, and only a short distance from many top-tier sports venues. In addition, it boasts charming lake and mountain scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 沃斯（Voss）号称最美的峡湾小镇之一，位于峡湾地区的中心，在一座美丽的小湖边，奥斯陆到卑尔根的铁路经过这里。它是挪威一个四季都可以找到运动娱乐项目的地方，配备了大部分现代化的休闲娱乐设施，离很多顶尖的运动场地也只有短短的距离，此外还拥有迷人的湖光山色。

attractions.text_en: The Flåm Railway Museum not only offers a detailed account of the construction process of Europe's steepest railway line, but also analyzes the technical challenges encountered during construction and the people behind it. On display in the museum is a genuine El9 locomotive, an old electric switching engine, and numerous carts used in track surveying. The museum also has various exhibits combining diagrams, text, physical objects, and audiovisual media. Visitors can also gain an in-depth understanding of the Flåm train journey through video presentations. The shop at the museum exit sells various souvenirs and merchandise bearing the Flåm Railway brand.
attractions.text_zh: 弗洛姆铁路博物馆不仅有欧洲最陡峭铁路线的详细建设过程介绍，还会分析修建过程中遭遇的技术挑战和背后的人物。馆内展出真实的El9火车头，古老的电力转线引擎、众多轨道勘测时使用的推车。馆内还有各种图、文、实物和影音并茂的展览。游客还可以借由视频展示，深入了解弗洛姆火车之旅。博物馆出口处的商店内有各色纪念品和印有弗洛姆铁路品牌的商品。

attractions.text_en: Bryggen is a series of Hanseatic League commercial buildings lined up on the eastern side of the Bergen fjord in Norway. Bryggen has been listed as a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage Site since 1979. Its name shares the same origin as the Belgian city of Bruges. Bryggen is the oldest part of the city. In 1360, the Hanseatic League established a trading post here, and Bergen developed into an important trading center. Today, these old buildings with their colorful walls facing the harbor, their maze-like wooden houses and commercial streets, have become a symbol of the city of Bergen.
attractions.text_zh: 布吕根是排列在挪威卑尔根峡湾东侧的一系列汉萨同盟商业建筑。布吕根自1979年被联合国教科文组织列为世界文化遗产。其名称与比利时城市布鲁日为同一来源。布吕根为城市古老的部分。1360年，汉萨同盟在此建立贸易站，卑尔根也发展成一个重要的贸易中心。如今，这些老建筑面对海港的彩色墙面，如同迷宫般的木质房屋和商业街道已经成为了卑尔根的城市象征。

attractions.text_en: Bergen is a major port of Norway, and over half of Norway's catch and processed seafood products are exported worldwide via the port of Bergen. In addition, it is also a place that ships on the Atlantic and Arctic sea routes must pass through, and all kinds of fresh seafood are sold at the Bergen fish market. Therefore, if you have the chance to come to Bergen, you must visit the fish market and feast to your heart's content. The Bergen fish market is located right by the wharf on the south bank of Bergen harbor, facing the World Heritage Bryggen old town across the inner harbor. The fish market is divided into two parts: an indoor seafood center and an open-air market. You can buy the freshest catch of the day, from cod, salmon, lobster, crab, North Sea king crab, scallops, and Arctic sweet shrimp to whale meat—everything you could want.
attractions.text_zh: 卑尔根是挪威大港，挪威有超过一半的渔货与海鲜加工制品是经由卑尔根港口外销到全世界。除此之外，这里也是大西洋与北极海航线的必经之路，各种新鲜海产都会在卑尔根鱼市场贩卖。因此，有机会来卑尔根一趟，一定要来鱼市场大快朵颐一番。卑尔根鱼市场就位在卑尔根港南岸的码头边，与世界遗产布吕根老城隔着内港遥遥相对。渔市场有分室内渔货中心与露天市场两个部分。可以买到当天最新鲜的鱼货，从鳕鱼、鲑鱼、龙虾、螃蟹、北海帝王蟹、干贝、北极甜虾到鲸鱼肉，应有尽有。

attractions.text_en: We can take the Fløibanen funicular from the city center, which whisks you up to the viewpoint of Mount Fløyen in just a few minutes. This funicular celebrated 100 years of operation in 2018. From the summit you can overlook the panorama of the city of Bergen. The harbor, the fjord, the neatly arranged wooden houses of the entire city, and the mountain peaks surrounding Bergen all come into view. On the mountain there are also family activities such as a children's playground and treasure hunts. The funicular's lower city-center station is only about 200 meters from the fish market (Fisketorget).
attractions.text_zh: 我们可以从市中心乘坐弗罗伊索道，几分钟就能将你带到弗罗伊恩山(Fløyen)的观景台。这座缆车在2018年将迎来它运营100岁的大日子。在山顶能够俯瞰卑尔根市的全景。海港、峡湾以及整座城市整齐排列的木房子和环绕卑尔根的山头全部尽收眼底。山上还有儿童游乐场和寻宝等亲子活动。索道的山下市中心站距离鱼市(Fisktorget)仅200米左右。

attractions.text_en: The Hardangerfjord, the gentlest of the four major fjords, is a fjord with pastoral scenery. About 800 years ago, monks came here and planted apple and apricot trees, which blossom every May and bear fruit in summer. Worth seeing are waterfalls, nature parks, glaciers, and more.
attractions.text_zh: 哈当厄尔峡湾，四大峡湾中最为平缓，有田园般风景的峡湾。约800年前僧侣到此地种植了苹果树和杏树，每到5月便开花，夏季结果。值得一看的有瀑布、自然公园，冰河等。

attractions.text_en: It is one of Norway's renowned waterfall areas. Located in Norheimsund, the great waterfall surges mightily down a nearly vertical slope, shrouding the cliff edge in a veil-like mist and creating an ever-changing, never-ending rainbow effect that enchants onlookers. Nature lovers can find boundless enjoyment in the Hardangerfjord. With the majestic grandeur of the fjord and waterfalls here, there are multiple sightseeing tours to choose from—you can hike around the fjord, or take a kayak to explore the fjord from a brand-new perspective. The mountain road is a sight not to be missed. The mountain road winds up the steep slope with waterfalls cascading in between, especially spectacular in May and June each year. A must-visit attraction of the Hardangerfjord, this waterfall's unique feature is that travelers can walk behind it without getting wet at all.
attractions.text_zh: 是挪威闻名的瀑布区之一，位于诺海姆桑德(Norheimsund)的大瀑布从近乎垂直的山坡浩浩荡荡奔腾而下，瀑布使悬崖边笼上一帘轻纱般的薄雾，在营造了一番变幻莫测、永不落幕的虹彩效果，让看客为之陶醉。大自然爱好者可以在哈当厄尔峡湾获得无穷乐趣。这里峡湾和瀑布的雄浑壮美，有多个观光游览行程可供选择，您可在峡湾四周徒步远足，或是乘坐皮艇，从全新的角度探索峡湾。山路是不容错过的景点。山路沿着陡峭的山坡蜿蜒而上，瀑布飞流其间，每年5、6月份的时候尤为壮观。哈当厄尔峡湾必去景点，这座瀑布的独特之处是旅行者可以从后面穿过瀑布，身上却一点都不被打湿。

attractions.text_en: Odda is a small town in Norway's Hardangerfjord, whose orchards are listed as a World Cultural Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 奥达（Odda）是挪威哈当厄尔峡湾中的一座小镇，其中的果园被列入世界文化遗产。

attractions.text_en: Also called the Pulpit, it gets its name from its shape resembling a church preacher's pulpit. Preikestolen is located in the middle of the Lysefjord, a giant natural stone platform formed in mid-air, with a vertical drop of 604 meters from the platform top to the fjord below. It juts out more than 30 meters from the connecting ridge, standing abruptly upright amid the towering mountains deep in the fjord—extremely spectacular and awe-inspiring. The flat surface of the rock has an area of about 600 square meters. The hiking trail leading to Preikestolen is 3.8 kilometers in total length, with about 330 meters of ascent from the starting point. There are red T-shaped markings along the way. A round trip from the starting point takes about 4-5 hours, of medium intensity. Among the 50 most magnificent views in the world selected by the travel-and-leisure website under America's CNN, the Pulpit ranked first. It is also one of the best places to overlook the Lysefjord and appreciate the beauty of the fjord.
attractions.text_zh: 又叫布道台，由于形状类似教堂牧师的讲台而得名。布道石位于吕瑟峡湾中部，是一块天然凌空形成的巨型石台，台顶与下方的峡湾垂直落差604米，从接连的山脊突出30多米，突兀地直立于峡湾深处的崇山峻岭中，十分壮观，令人惊叹。岩石平面的面积约600平方米。通往布道石的登山径全长3.8公里，从起点开始有大约330米的上坡。沿途都有红色T字标记。从起点来回大概4-5小时，中等强度。美国CNN旗下旅游生活网站评选出的全球50处最壮丽景色，布道台位列第一。也是俯瞰吕瑟峡湾，领略峡湾之美的最佳地点之一。

attractions.text_en: The Lysefjord is far from the open sea, reaching deep inland, its water as still as a mirror surface, without a single wave. There are none of the sea's surging billows here, only the reflections of the high mountains and cliffs in the fjord—sometimes you cannot tell which layer is the reflection and which is the real scene. There is not a single sound, only tranquility. Occasionally a small boat travels through the fjord, its bow pushing open the water surface to form a wave that parts to both sides of the boat, the edges of the wave flecked with tiny white ripples. After the small boat passes, the water surface quickly returns to calm.
attractions.text_zh: 吕瑟峡湾远离大海，深入内陆，水静得如同镜面，没有一丝波浪。这里没有大海的波涛和汹涌，只有高山悬崖在峡湾中的倒影，有时分不清哪个层面是倒影，哪个层面是实景。没有一点声音，只有宁静。偶尔会有一只小船行进在峡湾中，船头推开水面，形成一道波浪，分在船的两边，波浪的边缘泛着小小的白色浪花，小船过后，水面很快又恢复了平静。

attractions.text_en: Haugesund is located in southwestern Norway and is a city in Rogaland county. It sits on the Karmøy peninsula, facing the North Sea. The history of Haugesund can be traced back to the Viking Age, when it was an important trade and seafaring center. The city's name comes from the sea god Hauge in Norse mythology, meaning "the sea god's mountain."
attractions.text_zh: 海于格松位于挪威西南部，是罗加兰郡的一个城市。它坐落在卡尔达伦半岛上，面临北海。海于格松的历史可以追溯到维京时代，当时这里是重要的贸易和航海中心。城市的名字来源于挪威神话中海神海格，意为“海神的山”。

attractions.text_en: Old Town Stavanger is located on the west side of Stavanger harbor, composed of 173 wooden houses built in the late 18th and early 19th centuries. The wooden houses mainly came from the settlement of fishing-industry and cannery workers in Stavanger. However, it is usually the small area on the west side of the harbor known as "Old Stavanger" that is regarded as representative of the entire Stavanger wooden-house town. The two Michelin restaurants in the town, Renaa and Sabi Omakase, tirelessly pursue the creation of fresh local cuisine, inspiring other restaurants throughout the Stavanger region.
attractions.text_zh: 斯塔万格老城区位于斯塔万格港西侧，由建于18世纪末19世纪初的173套木质房屋组成。木质房屋主要来自渔业和罐头业工人在斯塔万格定居点。但是，通常是称为“老斯塔万格”的港口西侧那一小块区域被视为整个斯塔万格木屋城的代表。城中的两家米其林餐厅Renaa和Sabi Omakase孜孜不倦地追求制作出新鲜的当地美食，激励着整个斯塔万格地区的其他餐厅。

attractions.text_en: Located on the seaside of Stavanger, the giant sword monument commemorates the "Battle of Hafrsfjord." The sculpture consists of three Viking swords over ten meters tall, representing peace, unity, and freedom respectively. The swords incorporate ancient swords found from all over the country, truly a case of "forging swords into swords." It is now also a symbol of the city of Stavanger.
attractions.text_zh: 位于斯塔万格海边的巨剑阵纪念碑，纪念“Hafrsfjord之战”的雕塑由三把十几米高的维京巨剑组成，分表代表和平、统一和自由。剑中熔入了从全国各地发现的古剑，可谓“铸剑为剑”。现在也是斯塔万格的城市标志。

attractions.text_en: Getting to know Norway anew should begin with Stavanger's Fargegaten district. This colorful neighborhood overturns the rigid impression of Norway. The Fargegaten district is utterly different from the equally beautiful old town—the old wooden houses are painted in all kinds of colors in vivid, lifelike combinations, making Fargegaten look all the more distinctive. The street is lined with cafés, restaurants, small bars, and shops selling all kinds of gifts and candy—a famous district very much worth sightseeing. It has now become one of the most photographed streets in Scandinavia.
attractions.text_zh: 重新认识挪威应该从斯塔万格的法格卡腾街区开始，色彩缤纷的街区，颠覆挪威刻板的印象，法格卡腾街区与同样美丽的老城区截然不同，古老的木质房屋被粉刷成各类颜色栩栩如生的组合，使得法格卡腾看起来更与众不同，沿街都是咖啡馆、餐厅、小酒吧和各类礼品、糖果的商店，非常值得观光游览的著名街区。现在已经成为北欧出镜率很高的街头。

attractions.text_en: Kristiansand is a dazzling pearl of southern Norway, famous for its natural beauty, beaches, and vibrant cultural life. As Norway's fifth-largest city, Kristiansand is a perfect travel destination.
attractions.text_zh: 克里斯蒂安桑（Kristiansand）是挪威南部一颗璀璨的明珠，以其自然美景、海滩和活跃的文化生活而闻名。作为挪威第五大城市，克里斯蒂安桑是一个完美的旅游目的地。

attractions.text_en: Oslo City Hall is a brick-red building, completed in 1950 to celebrate the 900th anniversary of the founding of Oslo. It was finished only through the continuous decoration and embellishment by Norwegian artists from 1900 to 1950. The various halls inside the city hall display works by 323 artists, comprehensively showing people Norway's history and culture as well as people's work and life. Each room here has special displays, from furniture arrangements to figure murals and the sea views visible through the windows—everywhere lets tourists feel its historical atmosphere. In addition, the Nobel Prize award ceremony is held here every December 10.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆市政厅是一座砖红色的建筑，是于1950年为庆祝奥斯陆建城900年而建成，它由挪威的艺术家们从1900年至1950年间不断地装饰和润色才得以完工。市政厅内部的多个大厅分别展出着323位艺术家的作品，全面地向人们展示了挪威的历史、文化以及人们的工作和生活。这里的每个房间都有特别的展示，从家具摆设到人物壁画以及可以透过窗户看到的海景，无处不让观光客感受到其历史的氛围。另外，每年12月10日诺贝尔奖的颁奖仪式在这里举行。

attractions.text_en: The Oslo Royal Palace (1825-1848) was built in the 19th century and is the office of King Harald. The palace is built on a height, directly facing the city's main street—Karl Johans gate. Surrounding the palace are 330 acres of woodland and parks, and the public avenue passing through here leads straight to the commercial district in the city center.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆皇宫（1825年－1848年）建于19世纪，是哈拉尔国王的办公地。皇宫建在一片高地，正对面是市区主要街道-卡尔·约翰大街，环绕王宫的是330亩林地和公园，穿过这里的公共大道直通市中心的商业区。

attractions.text_en: The Oslo Opera House faces the small Oslo fjord, with an architectural style like a ship. It is a famous cultural building in Norway, second only to the Nidaros Cathedral built in Trondheim in the early 14th century. Viewed from outside the theater, the most striking feature is the white sloping stone roof rising up out of the Oslofjord, where visitors can stroll on the roof and take in the beautiful cityscape of Oslo. Sometimes there are free open-air concerts outside the opera house, where visitors can sit on the platform enjoying the sea view while savoring the music.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆歌剧院正对着奥斯陆小峡湾，建筑风格像一艘船，它是继14世纪初建造于特隆赫姆（Trondheim）的尼德罗斯大教堂（Nidarosdomen Cathedral）后，挪威国内著名的文化建筑。从剧院外面看，最显著的特征是白色的斜坡状石制屋顶从奥斯陆峡湾（Oslofjord）中拔地而起，游客可以在屋顶上面漫步，饱览奥斯陆的市容美景。有时候歌剧院室外会有免费的露天音乐会，游客可以坐在平台上一边欣赏海景，一边享受音乐。

attractions.text_en: The Vigeland Sculpture Park is named after the famous master sculptor Gustav Vigeland. The park has a total of 192 sculptures, comprising 650 figure statues. The central theme of all the statues in the Vigeland Sculpture Park focuses on and highlights one subject—"life," expressing the various stages of a person from birth to death and offering visitors much inspiration about life. It is therefore also called the "Park of Life's Journey."
attractions.text_zh: 维尔兰雕塑公园是以著名雕塑大师古斯塔夫.维格兰（Gustav Vigeland）的名字命名的，公园共有192座雕塑，总计650个人物雕像。维格兰雕塑公园里所有雕像的中心思想，集中突出一个主题——“人生”，表现了人从出生至死的各个阶段，给游客以许多人生启迪，因此也被称为“人生旅途公园”。

attractions.text_en: The castle was built in 1299 and sits beside the city hall. During the reign of Christian IV, the castle was converted into a royal residence. During the 17th and 18th centuries, the castle gradually fell into decline, and the work of repair and reconstruction only began in 1899. Here visitors can feel the history of Oslo, and from a high point can also overlook the harbor of Aker Brygge—the scenery is very beautiful.
attractions.text_zh: 城堡建于1299年，坐落在市政厅旁。克里斯蒂安四世在位期间把城堡改造成皇家的官邸。在17和18世纪期间，城堡逐渐走向衰落，而维修重建的工作在1899年才开始。游客在这里可以感受奥斯陆的历史，登高处还可以俯瞰AkerBrygge的海港，景色十分优美。

attractions.text_en: Built in the 16th century, Aalborghus Castle was originally a defensive fortress and later became a Danish royal residence. Today, although only part of the buildings and underground passages remain, as a symbol of intertwined royal and city history, its tranquil courtyard and waterside location still attract many visitors to take photos, picnic, and stroll.
attractions.text_zh: 建于16世纪的奥尔堡城堡原为防御性要塞，后成为丹麦王室官邸。如今，虽然仅余部分建筑和地下通道，但作为一段王室与城市历史交织的象征，其宁静庭院与临水位置仍吸引众多游客拍照、野餐与漫步。

attractions.text_en: Begun in the 14th century, it is one of the most important churches in Aalborg, in typical Gothic architectural style, with its church tower standing tall above the city-center skyline. Inside there are exquisite organs and stained glass, a place that lovers of religion and architecture should not miss.
attractions.text_zh: 始建于14世纪，是奥尔堡最重要的教堂之一，典型哥特式建筑风格，教堂塔楼矗立在市中心天际线之上。内部有精致的管风琴与彩绘玻璃，是宗教与建筑爱好者不可错过之地。

attractions.name_en: Old Town Lane and Pedestrian Street of Aalborg
attractions.text_en:
Old Town Lane: This is a fairytale-like alley, with colorful low houses neatly arranged, flowerpots and sculptures placed on the windowsills, as if you have stepped into an Andersen fairy tale. Although its location is understated, its charming appeal makes it a hidden hot spot for photography and walking.
Pedestrian Street: Aalborg's main commercial district, preserving a large number of brick-and-timber structures from the 16th to 19th centuries, combining shopping, food, coffee, and art boutiques in one—a place where tourists' daily sightseeing and locals' lives meet. Street performers and outdoor markets are common on the street, and during festivals there are even colorful lights and traditional dances, making it the best window for experiencing the local cultural atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh:
杜赫芬老街：这是一条童话般的小巷，色彩斑斓的低矮房屋排列整齐，窗台摆放着花盆与雕塑，仿佛走入安徒生童话。虽然地理位置低调，但其迷人魅力使其成为摄影与散步的隐藏热门地。
杜赫芬步行街：奥尔堡的主要商业街区，保留了大量16世纪至19世纪的砖木结构建筑，集购物、美食、咖啡与艺术小店于一体，是游客日常游览与本地人生活交汇之地。街上常见路边艺人表演和户外市集，节庆期间更有彩灯装饰与传统舞会，是体验本地文化氛围的最佳窗口。

attractions.text_en: Masthugget Church is located on a small hill in Gothenburg. From the platform in front of the church, you can see half of the city of Gothenburg, making it the best choice for overlooking Gothenburg. The church was completed in 1914, and its interior is like an upside-down ship. It is considered a well-preserved nostalgic National Romantic style building from the medieval and Viking periods within Sweden, its hallmark being the church bell tower over 60 meters tall. This is one of the most noteworthy buildings in Gothenburg, and together with the Lipstick Building and the statue of the sea god Poseidon, it is known as one of the three major landmarks of Gothenburg.
attractions.text_zh: 马斯塔盖教堂位于哥德堡的一座小山坡上，从教堂前的平台上可以看到哥德堡半个城市的风景，是俯瞰哥德堡的不二选择。教堂于1914年竣工，内部像个倒扣着的船，被认为是瑞典境内保存完好的中世纪和维京时期的怀旧民族浪漫风格建筑，其标志是60多米高的教堂钟楼。这是哥德堡引人注意的建筑物之一，和口红楼，海王波塞冬雕像，并称为哥德堡三大地标。

attractions.text_en: The statue was completed in 1931 and is a symbol of Swedish maritime supremacy and the age of sail. The Poseidon statue is heroic and extraordinary, displaying a graceful masculine form, and is one of the most famous statues in Gothenburg.
attractions.text_zh: 雕像完成于1931年，是瑞典海上霸权和航海时代的象征。波塞冬雕像英武不凡，展现出优美的男性曲线，是哥德堡最著名的雕像之一。

attractions.text_en: Avenyn Boulevard, in the city center of Gothenburg, is a main thoroughfare of the city of Gothenburg. Both sides of the street are lined with shops, cafés, restaurants, and more. At the end of Avenyn Boulevard are the Poseidon statue and the Gothenburg Museum of Art, so this has also become Gothenburg's main sightseeing boulevard.
attractions.text_zh: 哥德堡的市中心的-Avenyn大道，是哥德堡市的一条主干道。街道两旁都是商铺、咖啡馆、餐厅等，在Avenyn大道的尽头是波塞冬雕像和哥德堡艺术博物馆，因此这里也成为了哥德堡的主要观光大道。

attractions.text_en: The Andersen Museum—a dreamlike space where fairy tale and reality intertwine; the new building, designed by Japanese architectural master Kengo Kuma, opened in 2021 and is the well-deserved cultural heart of Odense; two-thirds of the building is underground, and above ground is a maze-like green garden, as if "an oasis where reality and imagination intertwine." Inspired by "The Tinderbox," it creates an immersive experience from the tiniest world to the macroscopic universe; 18 themed exhibition rooms display over 2,000 manuscripts, letters, drawings, and personal items, including Andersen's old patched leather suitcase, top hat, and walking stick. In the multimedia room you can listen to translations of Andersen's fairy tales in 96 languages from 68 countries; the 8 circular murals in the 11th cylindrical hall recreate important scenes of his life.
attractions.text_zh: 安徒生博物馆——童话与现实交织的梦幻空间；2021年由日本建筑大师隈研吾设计的新馆开幕，是欧登塞当之无愧的文化心脏；建筑三分之二位于地下，地上是迷宫般的绿意花园，仿佛“真实与想象交织的绿洲”。以《打火匣》为灵感，创造从微小世界到宏观宇宙的沉浸体验；18间主题陈列室，展出2000余件手稿、信件、画稿及私人物品，包括安徒生那只有补丁的旧皮箱、礼帽、手杖。多媒体室可聆听68国96种语言的安徒生童话译本；第11间圆柱形大厅的8幅环形壁画，再现其人生重要场景。

attractions.text_en: Located at No. 3 Munkemøllestræde, this small yellow house of only 18 square meters is where Andersen was born in 1805 and spent his childhood. The surrounding residents were mostly from the lowest rungs of society—soldiers, dock workers, and those living on relief. The shoemaker's son who came out of this slum eventually became an honored guest of European royalty; the interior of the home is rather small, but standing in front of the house and imagining how that sensitive boy went from here out into the world is the most moving way to understand Andersen.
attractions.text_zh: 位于蒙基莫莱街3号，这座仅18平方米的黄色小屋，是安徒生1805年诞生的地方，他在这里度过童年，周边居住的多是社会最底层——士兵、码头工人、靠救济度日者。从这片贫民窟走出的鞋匠之子，最终成为欧洲王室的座上宾；故居内部较小，但站在屋前，想象那个敏感的少年如何从这里走向世界，是理解安徒生最动人的方式。

attractions.text_en: This is a Gothic cathedral built in the 14th century, and it well reflects Odense's wealth and status during the medieval period. The interior is pure white, with an elaborately decorated Rococo-style pulpit, a dazzling 16th-century altar carving, and over 300 sculptural works. Denmark's King Knud was assassinated in St. Alban's Church in 1086 and was later buried in this church named after him.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个建于14世纪的哥特式大教堂，它很能反映出欧登塞在中世纪时期的财富和地位。内部是纯白色的，有个精心装饰的洛可可式讲道坛、一个让人眼花缭乱的16世纪的圣坛雕刻以及300多个雕塑作品。丹麦的国王Knud于1086年在圣阿班教堂遇刺，后来就被埋葬在以他命名的这个教堂里。

attractions.text_en: Funen Village—the Funen open-air museum, located in an old-fashioned cluster of buildings. These are rural buildings left over from the 18th and 19th centuries, later reconstructed into a complete village. Inside it really does look like a small village, with pens, duck ponds, apple trees, gardens, and more. It presents the original ecological life of Denmark, like a complete picture of full rural life. Visiting here not only lets you experience Danish rural life, but also lets you personally take part, getting close to nature and animals. The Danish attitude of living in harmony with nature can be seen in Funen Village. During holidays, many events recreating history are also held here. When you see the people living here wearing old folk costumes and toiling diligently, it makes you mistakenly think you have returned to the manor of Andersen's time.
attractions.text_zh: 菲英村——菲英岛露天博物馆，位于一个老式的建筑群中。这些是18世纪和19世纪遗留的乡村建筑，后来被重建成一个完整的村庄。里面看起来的确像一个小乡村，有畜栏、养鸭塘、苹果树和花园等。呈现出丹麦原生态的生活风貌，如同一个完整的乡村生活的全貌。来此参观不仅能够体验丹麦的乡村生活，还能亲身参与进去，亲近自然和动物。丹麦所表达的与自然和谐共处的生活态度能在英菲村里看得出来。假日期间，这里还会举行很多重现历史的活动。当看到生活在这里的人们穿着古老民服，辛勤劳作，会让人误以为回到了安徒生时代的庄园。

attractions.text_en: An artificial canal built between 1669 and 1673, it brought seawater directly into Kongens Nytorv (King's New Square), thereby promoting economic development. It is composed of many colorful residences (built in the 17th and early 18th centuries), bars, cafés, and restaurants, and has therefore become a landmark tourist spot of Copenhagen. Though the place is not large, Nyhavn in summer is exquisitely beautiful—the glittering river surface, with the various boats on both sides and the colorful houses reflecting one another.
attractions.text_zh: 建于1669年至1673年间的一条人工运河，她将海水直接引进国王新广场，从而促进了经济的发展。它由许多颜色鲜艳住宅（建造于第17和18世纪初）、酒吧、咖啡馆和餐馆所构成，因此也成为哥本哈根地标性的旅游场所，地方虽不大，但夏天的新港美不胜收——波光粼粼的河面，两边各式的船只和彩色的房子交相辉映.

attractions.text_en: The Little Mermaid statue is located on the harbor rocks of Langelinie park in Copenhagen, Denmark, and is one of Copenhagen's famous tourist attractions. The Little Mermaid statue was commissioned in 1909 by Carl Jacobsen, son of the founder of Carlsberg, because he was fascinated by a ballet based on the fairy tale. So in 1912, Danish sculptor Edvard Eriksen sculpted this Little Mermaid statue based on Andersen's fairy tale and modeled on his wife Eline Eriksen.
attractions.text_zh: 美人鱼雕像位于丹麦哥本哈根长堤公园的港口岩石上，是哥本哈根著名的观光景点之一。美人鱼雕像在1909年时受到嘉士伯创办人的儿子卡尔·雅布克森的委托，因为他以童话故事为题材的芭蕾舞感到着迷。于是在1912年，丹麦雕塑家爱德华·艾瑞克森根据安徒生童话并以妻子爱琳·埃里克森为蓝本，雕塑了这尊美人鱼雕像。

attractions.name_en: Changing of the Royal Guard at Amalienborg Palace
attractions.name_zh: 阿美琳堡宫皇家卫队换岗
attractions.text_en: The guards pacing back and forth in the square outside Amalienborg Palace wear tall black hats, shoulder rifles, and walk expressionlessly from one street corner to another, then walk back from that corner. They look very adorable—if you want to take a photo with them, remember to keep a distance of 1.5 meters!
attractions.text_zh: 阿美琳堡宫外在广场上来回走动的卫兵，他们带着高高的黑色帽子，扛着枪，面无表情的从这个街角走到那个街角，然后再从那个街角走回来。看起来非常萌，如果要和他们合影，记得保持1.5米的距离哦！

attractions.text_en: In Langelinie park at the harbor of Copenhagen, the Gefion Fountain is as world-famous as the Little Mermaid bronze statue. The fountain consists of a group of bronze sculptures of the goddess Gefion and four oxen with a plow. The inspiration for this fountain comes from a beautiful folk legend: Gefion asked heaven to grant her a piece of land to survive on, and heaven said, however much land you can plow in one day, I will give you. So the goddess Gefion turned her four sons into fierce oxen, plowing the land day and night without stopping.
attractions.text_zh: 在哥本哈根港口的长堤公园里，吉菲昂女神喷泉和小美人鱼铜像一样闻名于世。喷泉由吉菲昂女神和四条牛及套犁等一组铜塑组成，这座喷泉的灵感来源于一个美丽的民间传说：吉菲昂请求上天赐予他一片土地以求生存，上天说，你一天能犁多少地，我就送你多少，于是吉菲昂女神把他的四个儿子都变成了猛牛，日夜不停地犁地。

attractions.text_en: Frederik's Church is Denmark's most famous verdigris-domed church, facing Amalienborg Palace across the road. Due to the extensive use of marble produced in Denmark and Norway, locals call it the "Marble Church." The Marble Church was begun in 1779, but due to funding problems, it was not completed and opened until 1894. The church's huge dome, 31 meters in diameter inside, is supported by 12 columns. The dome is painted with portraits of Jesus's 12 apostles, and the entire interior decoration and paintings are solemn, grand, majestic, and sacred. The tall figure sculptures on the exterior of the church give it an even greater sense of historical vicissitude.
attractions.text_zh: 腓特烈教堂是丹麦最著名的铜绿色圆顶教堂，与阿美琳堡王宫隔路相望。由于大量使用了丹麦和挪威出产的大理石，因此当地人称之为“大理石教堂”(MarbleChurch)。大理石教堂始建于1779年，但由于资金的问题，直到1894年才得以竣工和开放。教堂内部直径为31米的巨大圆顶是由12根圆柱支撑的，圆顶上绘有耶稣的12个使徒的画像，整个内部装饰与绘画庄重、大气、威严，神圣。教堂外部高大的人物雕塑，使得教堂更加具有历史的沧桑感。

attractions.text_en: This was once a Nordic defensive fortification and has now become a modern military base of Denmark. Its exterior is in the shape of a five-pointed star, very obvious on a map. Right next to it is the Little Mermaid statue, so this is the necessary route to reach the Little Mermaid, and it can also be considered a landmark building. Since it involves military matters, visitors can only tour and take photos in the public areas, and must follow the icon signs inside the fortress.
attractions.text_zh: 这里曾是北欧的防御工事，现在成为丹麦的现代军事基地，外观呈五角星形，在地图上非常明显。其隔壁就是小美人鱼雕像，所以这里是到达小美人鱼的必经之地，也算是地标一样的建筑。由于涉及到军事方面，所以游客只可以在公共区域进行参观和拍照，并要遵守城堡内的图标指示。

attractions.text_en: The Round Tower (Rundetårn) was built by Christian IV and is the first part of the Trinitatis Church complex. For 17th-century scholars, it combined the three most important facilities in one: an observatory, a student church, and a university library. The oldest observatory in Europe still in use—the observatory at the top of the Round Tower—housed an excellent astronomical telescope, where anyone could gaze at the stars during the winter months or at certain times in summer. This observatory was originally built for the university and was used as a place for astronomical observation and tracking comets, until it was moved to a newer and more modern observatory after 1861.
attractions.text_zh: 圆塔(Rundetårn)由克里斯钦四世修建，是三一教堂建筑群的第一部分，对17世纪的学者来说，它集三种最重要的设施于一身：天文台、学生教堂和大学图书馆。欧洲古老的仍在使用中的天文台——位于圆塔顶部的天文台里容纳了一个极佳的天文望远镜，在这里任何人都能在冬天的几个月或者夏天的某些时间凝视星空。这座天文台原本是为大学修建，一直作为天文观测以及追踪彗星的场所，1861年以后搬去更新更现代的天文台。

attractions.text_en: The Royal Library is one of the most important landmark buildings on the Copenhagen waterfront. Its surface is covered with black granite, with clean, crisp lines and a glittering facade, and is hailed by the world as the "Black Diamond," one of the architectural treasures of Copenhagen. The library has seven floors and a basement. The solid black cube is split in two by a huge glass atrium, which houses most of the public functions. This central space offers a panoramic view of the waterfront and also serves as an important source of daylight, distributed throughout the building. If you are interested in architecture and history, you can go to the Danish Royal Library for a cup of coffee and experience the waterscape.
attractions.text_zh: 皇家图书馆是哥本哈根滨水最重要的标志性建筑之一。表面覆盖着黑色花岗岩，线条简洁利落、立面闪闪发亮，被世人誉为“黑钻石”，是哥本哈根的建筑瑰宝之一。图书馆有七层和一个地下室。实心的黑色立方体被一个巨大的玻璃中庭一分为二，中庭容纳了大部分公共功能。这个中心空间，可以欣赏滨水的全景，也作为一个重要的日光来源，分散到整个建筑中。如果您对建筑和历史感兴趣，您可以前往丹麦语皇家图书馆喝杯咖啡，体验水景。

attractions.text_en: A landmark building of Malmö. Literally translated as "Turning Torso," it has 54 floors and is 190 meters high, divided into 9 segments. Each segment twists slightly, making the entire building rotate 90 degrees. In 2012, it was named by America's Travel + Leisure magazine as one of the "Top Five Skyscrapers Worldwide of 2012."
attractions.text_zh: 马尔默地标性建筑。直译为“扭动的腰”，共54层高190米，共分9个区层，每区层旋转少许，使整栋大楼旋转了90度。2012年曾经被美国Travel Leisure杂志评为“2012年摩天大楼全球前五强”

attractions.text_en: Ribersborg Beach is located by the Øresund strait, very close to Malmö Castle. The beach is about 2 kilometers long, with large expanses of greenery alongside the sand. From here you can also gaze into the distance at the long Øresund Bridge.
attractions.text_zh: 里伯斯堡海滩位于厄勒海峡旁，距马尔默城堡很近。海滩长约2公里，沙滩旁是大片的绿地。这里还能远眺长长的厄勒海峡大桥。

attractions.name_zh: 马尔默圣彼得大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: This 14th-century Gothic church is one of the oldest preserved buildings in the city. At that time Malmö was still under the control of the Hanseatic League, so the church's design was modeled on the Marienkirche in Lübeck, Germany. The church interior is decorated with magnificent murals, and it has an 88-meter-high spire and a small chapel built for medieval merchants. The spire of St. Peter's Church, built in the 14th century, is 105 meters high, and citizens love to hold weddings here. The style is Baltic Gothic. The oldest and most special part of the church is the small chapel on the north side, whose ceiling medieval murals date from the 15th century and were only rediscovered during the church's repair in the early 20th century. The reason is the Lutheran pursuit of plain religious ceremonies and architectural styles during the 16th-century Reformation, which rejected such decorations that looked ostentatious at the time. The 15-meter-high altar in the church is the foremost wooden altar in Scandinavia, completed in 1611 after four years of careful crafting.
attractions.text_zh: 这座14世纪的哥特式教堂是城里保存下来的年代相当久远的建筑。那时马尔默还在汉萨联盟的控制下，所以当时教堂的设计以德国吕贝克的玛丽亚教堂为样本。教堂内部装饰有华丽的壁画，有一个88米高的尖塔，一个为中世纪商人们建造的小礼拜堂。建于14世纪的圣彼得教堂的尖塔有105米高，市民都很喜欢在这里举办婚礼。风格为波罗的海哥特式。教堂最古老也最特别的部分是北边的小礼拜堂，其屋顶的中世纪壁画源于15世纪，20世纪初维修教堂的时候才重被发现。其原因是16世纪宗教改革时路德宗对朴实的宗教仪式和建筑风格的追求，拒绝此类当时看上去浮华的装饰。教堂里的高达15米的祭坛是北欧第一的木质祭坛，1611年经历了四年的精心制作后完工。

attractions.text_en: Built in 1591, it is surrounded by half-timbered houses from the 16th to 18th centuries. Originally this was the city's main marketplace, and today it has become the liveliest place in Malmö, as well as the most concentrated area of restaurants, cafés, and gift shops. On the square there is a giant table lamp, completed in 2006, 5.8 meters tall. Standing beneath this huge table lamp, you feel as if you have walked into a fairytale world. The original intention of building this table lamp was to provide passersby a place to rest. It has now become a place not to be missed in the city of Malmö.
attractions.text_zh: 建于1591年，四周都是16至18世纪半木结构的房子。最早这里是城里主要的集市，如今这里成为马尔默最热闹的地方，也是餐馆、咖啡馆和礼品店最集中的地方。广场上有座巨型台灯，建成于2006年，高5.8米。站在这座巨大的台灯下，仿佛走到了一个童话的世界。建造这座台灯，设计初衷是想提供路人一个歇脚的地方。现在已经成了马尔默市区一个不可错过的地方了。

attractions.name_zh: 斯托特广场与市政厅（外观）
attractions.text_en: This is the oldest square in the city. It was built more than 470 years ago by order of the then-mayor Kock. His former residence is near the square, a typical Hanseatic-style brown-red building. The City Hall (Rådhuset) on the east side of the square was built in 1546 and is a Dutch Renaissance-style building. In the middle of the square is an equestrian statue of Swedish King Karl X—the very king who defeated Denmark and turned Malmö thoroughly into a Swedish city. The bronze equestrian statue of King Karl X stands on the great square of Malmö, surrounded by clusters of ancient buildings. The Dutch Renaissance-style City Hall was begun in the 16th century, and its magnificent exterior decoration is very eye-catching.
attractions.text_zh: 这是城里最古老的广场。470多年前由当时的市长库克下令兴建的。他的故居就在广场附近，是座典型的汉萨风格的棕红色建筑。广场东侧的市政厅（Rådhuset）建于1546年是幢荷兰文艺复兴式样的建筑。广场中间是瑞典国王卡尔十世的骑像，就是他战胜了丹麦把马尔默彻底变成了瑞典的城市。马尔默大广场上矗立着国王卡尔十世的青铜骑像，四周围绕着古老的建筑群。荷兰文艺复兴样式的市政厅始建于16世纪，其华丽的外部装饰很是抢眼。

attractions.text_en: Jönköping is located in the Småland region of southern Sweden, on the shore of the vast Lake Vättern. It was a famous match-manufacturing center of 19th-century Europe and has a unique match museum. The town is surrounded by azure lakes and verdant greenery, with beautiful scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 延雪平位于瑞典南部的斯莫兰地区，地处浩瀚的韦特恩湖畔，是欧洲19世纪有名的火柴制造中心，拥有一座独特的火柴博物馆。城镇被蔚蓝的湖泊和青翠的绿地环绕，景色优美。

attractions.text_en: Stockholm City Hall is located on the shore of Lake Mälaren in the city center of the Swedish capital. It is the image and representation of Stockholm, and also the office of the city's municipal council. Built in 1911 and completed after 12 years, it is an important work of Swedish architecture. The building borders the water on two sides, with a towering tower standing in stark contrast to the lower wing spread out along the water surface. Together with the highly decorative vertical strip windows, the entire building resembles a great ship in sail, magnificent and majestic.
attractions.text_zh: 斯德哥尔摩市政厅位于瑞典首都市中心的梅拉伦湖畔，是斯德哥尔摩的形象和代表，也是该市市政委员会的办公场所。建于1911年，历时12年才完成，是瑞典建筑中重要的作品。建筑两边临水，一座巍然矗立着的塔楼，与沿水面展开的裙房形成强烈的对比，加之装饰性很强的纵向长条窗，整个建筑犹如一艘航行中的大船，宏伟壮丽。

attractions.name_zh: 斯德哥尔摩瓦萨沉船博物馆
attractions.text_en: Stockholm's Vasa Museum is built near the site of the Vasa, which unfortunately encountered strong winds and sank just 2 kilometers from the port on its maiden voyage in 1628. The Vasa is the world's only well-preserved 17th-century ship. Its legendary salvage process is as fascinating as the history of its sinking; moreover, all the precious items in the museum were salvaged from the seabed. The museum also explains how the Vasa was built, how it sank, and how it was salvaged from the dark Lake Mälaren in Stockholm and preserved intact for later generations to admire.
attractions.text_zh: 斯德哥尔摩的瓦萨沉船博物馆建于瓦萨号遗址附近，1628年首航时不幸遭遇强风沉没在距离港口仅2公里处。瓦萨号是世界上独有保存完好的17世纪船舶。富有传奇色彩的打捞过程和她的沉没历史同样引人入胜；而且博物馆中所有珍贵的物品都是从海底打捞上来的。馆内还介绍了瓦萨号是如何建造、如何沉船、以及如何从斯德哥尔摩阴暗的梅拉伦湖中打捞出来，并保存完整供后人景仰。

attractions.text_en: The Old Town of Stockholm was established in the 13th century and still retains its historical atmosphere to this day. The city has medieval alleys, cobblestone streets, and antique architecture, deeply influenced by North Germanic style. Strolling the old town streets, the ancient churches, the long, long cobblestone alleys, the aroma of coffee suffusing the air—time stands still. Besides historical relics, the old town also has many cafés, restaurants, and handicraft shops, the most famous being SALUHALL, the traditional market where the Stockholm old-town fish market is located, open every day from 10:00 to 16:00, where you can fully experience Nordic cuisine.
attractions.text_zh: 斯德哥尔摩老城区建立于13世纪，至今还保留着历史的风气，城内有中世纪小巷、圆石街道和古式的建筑，深受北日耳曼式风格影响。漫步在老城街道，古老的教堂，悠长悠长的鹅卵石小巷，空气中氤氲着咖啡的香气，让时间停留。老城区除了历史遗迹外，还有许多咖啡馆、餐厅和手工艺品店、其中有名的是斯德哥尔摩老城鱼市所在的SALUHALL传统市集，每天从10点营业到16点，尽情体验北欧美食。

attractions.text_en: Drottningholm (Queen's Island) is located in the western suburbs of Stockholm. The palace on the island is right beside Lake Mälaren, where the Swedish king and queen currently reside. Hailed as the "Versailles of Sweden," it blends French Baroque style with English refinement; the palace gardens are open free of charge, divided into French and English parts. The Baroque garden, adjacent to the palace, has geometrically symmetrical patterns, exquisite fountains, and sculptures; the English garden is more natural and wild, with large lawns and woodland paths, suitable for relaxing. Strolling through the Baroque garden, admiring the blend of lake-and-mountain scenery and royal grandeur, this half-day tour will surely become one of the most unforgettable memories of your trip to "Stockholm."
attractions.text_zh: 皇后岛位于斯德哥尔摩西部郊区，岛上的皇宫就在梅拉伦湖湖畔，目前瑞典国王王后居住在这里，被誉为“瑞典的凡尔赛”，融合了法式巴洛克风格与英伦风范；宫廷花园免费开放，分为法式和英式两个部分，巴洛克式花园，紧邻宫殿，拥有几何对称的图案、精美的喷泉和雕塑；英式花园：更自然野趣，有大片草坪和林间小径，适合放松。漫步在巴洛克式花园中，欣赏湖光山色与皇家气度交融，这半天的游览一定会成为您“斯京”之行中最难忘的回忆之一。

attractions.text_en: The cathedral is the most famous building in Helsinki, located in Senate Square, a Lutheran church. Helsinki Cathedral was built in 1852, exquisite in structure and extraordinary in bearing, and can be called the essence of Finnish architectural art. On the square in front of the cathedral stands a bronze statue of Tsar Alexander II, erected in 1894 to commemorate the broad autonomy he granted to Finland.
attractions.text_zh: 大教堂是赫尔辛基最著名的建筑，位于议会广场，是一座路德派教堂。赫尔辛基大教堂建于1852年，结构精美，气宇非凡，堪称芬兰建筑艺术上的精华。大教堂前的广场上竖立着建于1894年的沙皇亚历山大二世铜像，以纪念他给予芬兰广泛自治。

attractions.text_en: The political, religious, scientific, and commercial centers of central Helsinki are all located at Senate Square. Senate Square is a historic district of Helsinki, and the famous landmarks of this area include Helsinki Cathedral, the Government Palace, the main building of the University of Helsinki, and other buildings.
attractions.text_zh: 赫尔辛基市中心的政治、宗教、科学和商业中心都位于参议院广场。参议院广场是赫尔辛基历史悠久的地区，这一地区的著名地标包括赫尔辛基大教堂、政府宫、赫尔辛基大学的主楼等建筑。

attractions.text_en: Built between 1862 and 1868, its golden-green dome and red brick walls are very striking, in Russian architectural style. The color and style of the church are full of mysterious hues; the conspicuous golden dome and the church built of red brick appear especially solemn, with two large trees beside it complementing the church—precisely a testament to Russian flavor seeping into Finnish history. The finely crafted vaulted ceilings and granite columns are the two major features of Uspenski Cathedral. The paintings inside the church were all completed by Russian painters, fully preserving the artistic style of traditional Orthodox churches.
attractions.text_zh: 建于1862至1868年间，外观的金绿圆顶和红砖墙很为醒目，具有俄罗斯的建筑风格。教堂的颜色和式样都充满着神秘的色彩，显眼的金圆顶和红砖砌成的教堂显得格外凝重，旁边两棵大树与教堂交相辉映，正好是俄罗斯风情渗入芬兰历史的见证。精雕细琢的拱顶和花岗岩石柱是乌斯本斯基大教堂的两大特色，教堂内部的绘画都是由俄国画家完成的，完全保留了传统东正教堂的艺术风格。

attractions.text_en: The Market Square District is the historical heart of Helsinki, where old and new cultures collide to produce wonderful sparks. This seaside district is adjacent to the Market Square and Senate Square, giving Helsinki vitality and a new urban culture.
attractions.text_zh: 广场街区是赫尔辛基的历史中心，新老文化碰撞出精彩的火花，这个海滨街区紧邻集市广场和参议院广场，赋予了赫尔辛基活力与新的城市文化。

attractions.text_en: Oslo City Hall is a brick-red building completed in 1950 to celebrate the 900th anniversary of the founding of Oslo. It was decorated and refined continuously by Norwegian artists from 1900 to 1950 before it was finally finished. The various halls inside the City Hall display the works of 323 artists, comprehensively presenting Norway's history and culture as well as people's work and life. Every room here has a special exhibition, from furnishings to figure murals and the sea views that can be seen through the windows, all of which let tourists feel its historic atmosphere. In addition, the Nobel Prize award ceremony is held here every year on 10 December.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆市政厅是一座砖红色的建筑，是于1950年为庆祝奥斯陆建城900年而建成，它由挪威的艺术家们从1900年至1950年间不断地装饰和润色才得以完工。市政厅内部的多个大厅分别展出着323位艺术家的作品，全面地向人们展示了挪威的历史、文化以及人们的工作和生活。这里的每个房间都有特别的展示，从家具摆设到人物壁画以及可以透过窗户看到的海景，无处不让观光客感受到其历史的氛围。另外，每年12月10日诺贝尔奖的颁奖仪式在这里举行。

attractions.text_en: The Oslo Royal Palace (1825-1848) was built in the 19th century and is the place of work of King Harald. The palace is built on a height, directly facing the city's main street - Karl Johans gate. Surrounding the palace are 330 mu of woodland and parks, and the public avenue running through here leads straight to the commercial district in the city centre.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆皇宫（1825年－1848年）建于19世纪，是哈拉尔国王的办公地。皇宫建在一片高地，正对面是市区主要街道-卡尔·约翰大街，环绕王宫的是330亩林地和公园，穿过这里的公共大道直通市中心的商业区。

attractions.text_en: The Oslo Opera House faces the small Oslofjord, and its architectural style resembles a ship. It is a famous cultural building in Norway, following the Nidaros Cathedral (Nidarosdomen Cathedral) built in Trondheim in the early 14th century. Seen from outside the theatre, its most striking feature is the white sloping stone roof rising up out of the Oslofjord, where visitors can stroll on the roof and take in the beautiful cityscape of Oslo. Sometimes there are free open-air concerts outside the opera house, where visitors can sit on the platform and enjoy the music while admiring the sea view.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆歌剧院正对着奥斯陆小峡湾，建筑风格像一艘船，它是继14世纪初建造于特隆赫姆（Trondheim） 的 尼德罗斯大教堂（Nidarosdomen Cathedral）后，挪威国内著名的文化建筑。从剧院外面看，最显著的特征是白色的斜坡状石制屋顶从奥斯陆峡湾（Oslofjord）中拔地而起，游客可以在屋顶上面漫步，饱览奥斯陆的市容美景。有时候歌剧院室外会有免费的露天音乐会，游客可以坐在平台上一边欣赏海景，一边享受音乐。

attractions.text_en: The Vigeland Sculpture Park is named after the famous master sculptor Gustav Vigeland. The park has a total of 192 sculptures, amounting to 650 figure statues. The central idea of all the statues in the Vigeland Sculpture Park concentrates on highlighting one theme - "life" - representing the various stages of a person from birth to death and giving visitors many insights into life, which is why it is also called the "Park of the Journey of Life".
attractions.text_zh: 维尔兰雕塑公园是以著名雕塑大师古斯塔夫.维格兰（Gustav Vigeland）的名字命名的，公园共有192座雕塑，总计650个人物雕像。维格兰雕塑公园里所有雕像的中心思想，集中突出一个主题——“人生”，表 现了人从出生至死的各个阶段，给游客以许多人生启迪，因此也被称为“人生旅途公园”。

attractions.text_en: The castle was built in 1299 and is located next to the City Hall. During the reign of Christian IV, the castle was transformed into a royal residence. During the 17th and 18th centuries, the castle gradually fell into decline, and the work of repair and reconstruction did not begin until 1899. Here visitors can feel the history of Oslo, and from the heights one can also overlook the harbour of Aker Brygge, with very beautiful scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 城堡建于1299年，坐落在市政厅旁。克里斯蒂安四世在位期间把城堡改造成皇家的官邸。在17和18世纪期间，城堡逐渐走向衰落，而维修重建的工作在1899年才开始。游客在这里可以感受奥斯陆的历史，登高处还可以俯瞰AkerBrygge的海港，景色十分优美。

attractions.text_en: Built in the 16th century, Aalborghus Castle was originally a defensive fortress and later became a residence of the Danish royal family. Today, although only part of the buildings and underground passages remain, as a symbol of intertwined royal and city history, its tranquil courtyard and waterside location still attract many visitors to take photos, picnic and stroll.
attractions.text_zh: 建于16世纪的奥尔堡城堡原为防御性要塞，后成为丹麦王室官邸。如今，虽然仅余部分建筑和地下通道，但作为一段王室与城市历史交织的象征，其宁静庭院与临水位置仍吸引众多游客拍照、野餐与漫步。

attractions.text_en: First built in the 14th century, it is one of the most important churches in Aalborg, in typical Gothic architectural style, with the church tower standing above the skyline of the city centre. Inside there is an exquisite pipe organ and stained glass, making it a place not to be missed by lovers of religion and architecture.
attractions.text_zh: 始建于14世纪，是奥尔堡最重要的教堂之一，典型哥特式建筑风格，教堂塔楼矗立在市中心天际线之上。内部有精致的管风琴与彩绘玻璃，是宗教与建筑爱好者不可错过之地。

attractions.name_en: Hjelmerstald Old Street and Pedestrian Street
attractions.text_en:
Hjelmerstald Old Street: This is a fairytale-like lane, with colourful low houses arranged neatly, flower pots and sculptures placed on the window sills, as if walking into a Hans Christian Andersen fairy tale. Although its location is low-key, its charming appeal makes it a hidden hot spot for photography and walking.
Hjelmerstald Pedestrian Street: Aalborg's main commercial district, retaining a large number of brick-and-timber structure buildings from the 16th to 19th centuries, integrating shopping, food, coffee and art boutiques, it is where tourists' everyday sightseeing and locals' lives intersect. Street performers and outdoor markets are commonly seen on the street, and during festivals there are even colourful light decorations and traditional balls, making it the best window for experiencing the local cultural atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh:
杜赫芬老街：这是一条童话般的小巷，色彩斑斓的低矮房屋排列整齐，窗台摆放着花盆与雕塑，仿佛走入安徒生童话。虽然地理位置低调，但其迷人魅力使其成为摄影与散步的隐藏热门地。
杜赫芬步行街：奥尔堡的主要商业街区，保留了大量16世纪至19世纪的砖木结构建筑，集购物、美食、咖啡与艺术小店于一体，是游客日常游览与本地人生活交汇之地。街上常见路边艺人表演和户外市集，节庆期间更有彩灯装饰与传统舞会，是体验本地文化氛围的最佳窗口。

attractions.text_en: Masthugget Church is located on a small hillside in Gothenburg. From the platform in front of the church you can see the scenery of half of Gothenburg, making it the perfect choice for overlooking Gothenburg. The church was completed in 1914, and its interior looks like an upturned ship. It is considered a well-preserved National Romantic style building of the medieval and Viking periods within Sweden, its hallmark being the church bell tower of over 60 metres high. This is one of Gothenburg's eye-catching buildings, and together with the Lipstick Building and the statue of the sea god Poseidon, the three are known as Gothenburg's three major landmarks.
attractions.text_zh: 马斯塔盖教堂位于哥德堡的一座小山坡上，从教堂前的平台上可以看到哥德堡半个城市的风景，是俯瞰哥德堡的不二选择。教堂于1914年竣工，内部像个倒扣着的船，被认为是瑞典境内保存完好的中世纪和维京时期的怀旧民族浪漫风格建筑，其标志是60多米高的教堂钟楼。这是哥德堡引人注意的建筑物之一，和口红楼，海王波塞冬雕像，并称为哥德堡三大地标。

attractions.text_en: The statue was completed in 1931 and is a symbol of Sweden's maritime supremacy and the age of seafaring. The Poseidon statue is heroic and extraordinary, displaying beautiful masculine contours, and is one of Gothenburg's most famous statues.
attractions.text_zh: 雕像完成于1931年，是瑞典海上霸权和航海时代的象征。波塞冬雕像英武不凡，展现出优美的男性曲线，是哥德堡最著名的 雕像之一。

attractions.text_en: Avenyn Boulevard in the city centre of Gothenburg is a main thoroughfare of Gothenburg. Both sides of the street are lined with shops, cafes, restaurants and so on, and at the end of Avenyn Boulevard are the Poseidon statue and the Gothenburg Museum of Art, which is why this has also become the main sightseeing boulevard of Gothenburg.
attractions.text_zh: 哥德堡的市中心的-Avenyn大道，是哥德堡市的一条主干道。街道两旁都是商铺、咖啡馆、餐厅等，在Avenyn大道的尽头是波塞冬雕像和哥德堡艺术博物馆，因此这里也成为了哥德堡的主要观光大道。

attractions.text_en: Hans Christian Andersen Museum - a dreamlike space where fairy tale and reality intertwine. The new building, designed by the Japanese master architect Kengo Kuma, opened in 2021 and is the well-deserved cultural heart of Odense. Two-thirds of the building is located underground, while above ground is a maze-like green garden, as if an "oasis where reality and imagination intertwine". Inspired by "The Tinderbox", it creates an immersive experience from the tiny world to the macroscopic universe. The 18 themed exhibition rooms display more than 2,000 manuscripts, letters, sketches and personal items, including Andersen's old patched leather suitcase, top hat and walking stick. In the multimedia room you can listen to translations of Andersen's fairy tales in 96 languages from 68 countries. The 8 ring-shaped murals in the cylindrical hall, the 11th room, recreate the important scenes of his life.
attractions.text_zh: 安徒生博物馆——童话与现实交织的梦幻空间；2021年由日本建筑大师隈研吾设计的新馆开幕，是欧登塞当之无愧的文化心脏；建筑三分之二位于地下，地上是迷宫般的绿意花园，仿佛“真实与想象交织的绿洲”。以《打火匣》为灵感，创造从微小世界到宏观宇宙的沉浸体验；18间主题陈列室，展出2000余件手稿、信件、画稿及私人物品，包括安徒生那只有补丁的旧皮箱、礼帽、手杖。多媒体室可聆听68国96种语言的安徒生童话译本；第11间圆柱形大厅的8幅环形壁画，再现其人生重要场景。

attractions.text_en: Located at No. 3 Munkemollestraede, this yellow little house of only 18 square metres is the place where Andersen was born in 1805. He spent his childhood here, and most of the people living nearby were from the lowest rungs of society - soldiers, dock workers, those living on relief. The shoemaker's son who came out of this slum eventually became an honoured guest of European royal families. The interior of the former residence is rather small, but standing in front of the house and imagining how that sensitive boy went from here out into the world is the most moving way to understand Andersen.
attractions.text_zh: 位于蒙基莫莱街3号，这座仅18平方米的黄色小屋，是安徒生1805年诞生的地方，他在这里度过童年，周边居住的多是社会最底层——士兵、码头工人、靠救济度日者。从这片贫民窟走出的鞋匠之子，最终成为欧洲王室的座上宾；故居内部较小，但站在屋前，想象那个敏感的少年如何从这里走向世界，是理解安徒生最动人的方式。

attractions.text_en: This is a Gothic cathedral built in the 14th century, which well reflects the wealth and status of Odense during the medieval period. The interior is pure white, with an elaborately decorated Rococo pulpit, a dazzling 16th-century altar carving and more than 300 sculptural works. King Knud of Denmark was assassinated in St. Alban's Church in 1086, and was later buried in this church named after him.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个建于14世纪的哥特式大教堂，它很能反映出欧登塞在中世纪时期的财富和地位。内部是纯白色的，有个精心装饰的洛可可式讲道坛、一个让人眼花缭乱的16世纪的圣坛雕刻以及300多个雕塑作品。丹麦的国王Knud于1086年在圣阿班教堂遇刺，后来就被埋葬在以他命名的这个教堂里。

attractions.text_en: Funen Village - the Funen Island open-air museum, is located in an old-fashioned cluster of buildings. These are rural buildings left over from the 18th and 19th centuries, which were later reconstructed into a complete village. It does indeed look like a small village inside, with corrals, duck ponds, apple trees and gardens. It presents Denmark's original ecological way of life, like the complete picture of an entire rural life. A visit here not only allows you to experience Danish rural life, but also to take part in it yourself, getting close to nature and animals. The Danish attitude of living in harmony with nature can be seen in Funen Village. During holidays, many activities recreating history are also held here. When you see the people living here wearing ancient folk costumes and working diligently, it will make you mistakenly think you have returned to a manor of Andersen's era.
attractions.text_zh: 菲英村——菲英岛露天博物馆，位于一个老式的建筑群中。这些是18世纪和19世纪遗留的乡村建筑，后来被重建成一个完整的村庄。里面看起来的确像一个小乡村，有畜栏、养鸭塘、苹果树和花园等。呈现出丹麦原生态的生活风貌，如同一个完整的乡村生活的全貌。来此参观不仅能够体验丹麦的乡村生活，还能亲身参与进去，亲近自然和动物。丹麦所表达的与自然和谐共处的生活态度能在英菲村里看得出来。假日期间，这里还会举行很多重现历史的活动。当看到生活在这里的人们穿着古老民服，辛勤劳作，会让人误以为回到了安徒生时代的庄园。

attractions.text_en: The Mermaid statue is located on the harbour rocks of Langelinie Park in Copenhagen, Denmark, and is one of Copenhagen's famous sightseeing attractions. The Mermaid statue was commissioned in 1909 by Carl Jacobsen, son of the founder of Carlsberg, because he was fascinated by a ballet based on the fairy tale. So in 1912, the Danish sculptor Edvard Eriksen sculpted this Mermaid statue based on Andersen's fairy tale and modelled on his wife Eline Eriksen.
attractions.text_zh: 美人鱼雕像位于丹麦哥本哈根长堤公园的港口岩石上，是哥本哈根著名的观光景点之一。 美人鱼雕像在1909年时受到嘉士伯创办人的儿子卡尔·雅布克森的委托，因为他以童话故事为题材的芭蕾舞感到着迷。 于是在1912年，丹麦雕塑家爱德华·艾瑞克森根据安徒生童话并以妻子爱琳·埃里克森为蓝本，雕塑了这尊美人鱼雕像。

attractions.text_en: In Langelinie Park at the harbour of Copenhagen, the Gefion Fountain is as world-famous as the Little Mermaid bronze statue. The fountain is composed of a group of bronze sculptures of the goddess Gefion with four oxen and a plough. The inspiration for this fountain comes from a beautiful folk legend: Gefion asked heaven to grant her a piece of land to survive on, and heaven said, as much land as you can plough in one day, that is how much I will give you. So the goddess Gefion turned her four sons into fierce oxen, ploughing the land day and night without stopping.
attractions.text_zh: 在哥本哈根港口的长堤公园里，吉菲昂女神喷泉和小美人鱼铜像一样闻名于世。喷泉由吉菲昂女神和四条牛及套犁等一组铜塑组成，这座喷泉的灵感来源于一个美丽的民间传说：吉菲昂请求上天赐予他一片土地以求生存，上天说，你一天能犁多少地，我就送你多少，于是吉菲昂女神把他的四个儿子都变成了猛牛，日夜不停地犁地。

attractions.text_en: This was once a Nordic fortification and has now become a modern military base of Denmark. Its exterior takes the shape of a five-pointed star, very obvious on a map. Next to it is the Little Mermaid statue, so this is the route one must pass to reach the Little Mermaid, and it counts as a landmark-like building. Because it involves military matters, visitors may only sightsee and take photos in the public areas, and must observe the icon instructions within the fortress.
attractions.text_zh: 这里曾是北欧的防御工事，现在成为丹麦的现代军事基地，外观呈五角星形，在地图上非常明显。其隔壁就是小美人鱼雕像，所以这里是到达小美人鱼的必经之地，也算是地标一样的建筑。由于涉及到军事方面，所以游客只可以在公共区域进行参观和拍照，并要遵守城堡内的图标指示。

attractions.name_en: Changing of the Royal Guard at Amalienborg Palace
attractions.name_zh: 阿美琳堡宫皇家卫队换岗
attractions.text_en: The guards walk back and forth on the square outside Amalienborg Palace, wearing tall black hats and carrying rifles, walking expressionlessly from one street corner to another, and then walking back from that corner. They look very adorable. If you want to take a photo with them, remember to keep a distance of 1.5 metres!
attractions.text_zh: 阿美琳堡宫外在广场上来回走动的卫兵，他们带着高高的黑色帽子，扛着枪，面无表情的从这个街角走到那个街角，然后再从那个街角走回来。看起来非常萌，如果要和他们合影，记得保持1.5米的距离哦！

attractions.text_en: Frederik's Church is Denmark's famous verdigris-domed church, facing Amalienborg Palace across the road. Because a large amount of marble produced in Denmark and Norway was used, the locals call it the "Marble Church". The Marble Church was begun in 1779, but due to financial problems it was not completed and opened until 1894. The enormous dome inside the church, 31 metres in diameter, is supported by 12 columns, and the dome is painted with portraits of the 12 apostles of Jesus. The entire interior decoration and paintings are dignified, grand, majestic and sacred. The tall figure sculptures on the exterior of the church make the church even more imbued with a sense of the vicissitudes of history.
attractions.text_zh: 腓特烈教堂是丹麦著名的铜绿色圆顶教堂，与阿美琳堡王宫隔路相望。由于大量使用了丹麦和挪威出产的大理石，因此当地人称之为“大理石教堂”(MarbleChurch)。大理石教堂始建于1779年，但由于资金的问题，直到1894年才得以竣工和开放。教堂内部直径为31米的巨大圆顶是由12根圆柱支撑的，圆顶上绘有耶稣的12个使徒的画像，整个内部装饰与绘画庄重、大气、威严，神圣。教堂外部高大的人物雕塑，使得教堂更加具有历史的沧桑感。

attractions.text_en: The Round Tower (Rundetarn) was built by Christian IV and is the first part of the Trinitatis Church complex. For 17th-century scholars, it combined the three most important facilities in one: an observatory, a student church and a university library. The oldest still-functioning observatory in Europe - the observatory at the top of the Round Tower houses an excellent astronomical telescope, where anyone can gaze at the stars during the winter months or at certain times in summer. This observatory was originally built for the university and was always used as a place for astronomical observation and tracking comets, before moving to a newer and more modern observatory after 1861.
attractions.text_zh: 圆塔(Rundetårn)由克里斯钦四世修建，是三一教堂建筑群的第一部分，对17世纪的学者来说，它集三种最重要的设施于一身：天文台、学生教堂和大学图书馆。欧洲古老的仍在使用中的天文台——位于圆塔顶部的天文台里容纳了一个极佳的天文望远镜，在这里任何人都能在冬天的几个月或者夏天的某些时间凝视星空。这座天文台原本是为大学修建，一直作为天文观测以及追踪彗星的场所，1861年以后搬去更新更现代的天文台。

attractions.text_en: The Royal Library is one of the most important landmark buildings on the Copenhagen waterfront. Its surface is covered with black granite, with clean and crisp lines and a glittering facade, and it is praised by the world as the "Black Diamond", one of Copenhagen's architectural treasures. The library has seven floors and a basement. The solid black cube is divided into two by a huge glass atrium, which accommodates most of the public functions. This central space, which offers a panoramic view of the waterfront, also serves as an important source of daylight, dispersed throughout the entire building. If you are interested in architecture and history, you can go to the Royal Danish Library for a cup of coffee and experience the water view.
attractions.text_zh: 皇家图书馆是哥本哈根滨水最重要的标志性建筑之一。表面覆盖着黑色花岗岩，线条简洁利落、立面闪闪发亮，被世人誉为“黑钻石”，是哥本哈根的建筑瑰宝之一。图书馆有七层和一个地下室。实心的黑色立方体被一个巨大的玻璃中庭一分为二，中庭容纳了大部分公共功能。这个中心空间，可以欣赏滨水的全景，也作为一个重要的日光来源，分散到整个建筑中。如果您对建筑和历史感兴趣，您可以前往丹麦语皇家图书馆喝杯咖啡，体验水景。

attractions.text_en: An artificial canal built between 1669 and 1673, it brought seawater directly into Kongens Nytorv (the King's New Square), thereby promoting economic development. It is composed of many brightly coloured houses (built in the late 17th and early 18th centuries), bars, cafes and restaurants, and has therefore also become a landmark tourist place in Copenhagen. Although the place is not big, Nyhavn in summer is exquisitely beautiful - the sparkling water surface, with the various boats on both sides and the colourful houses setting each other off.
attractions.text_zh: 建于1669年至1673年间的一条人工运河，她将海水直接引进国王新广场，从而促进了经济的发展。它由许多颜色鲜艳住宅（建造于第17和18世纪初）、酒吧、咖啡馆和餐馆所构成，因此也成为哥本哈根地标性的旅游场所，地方虽不大，但夏天的新港美不胜收——波光粼粼的河面，两边各式的船只和彩色的房子交相辉映.

attractions.text_en: A landmark building of Malmo. Literally translated as "the twisting waist", it has 54 floors and is 190 metres high, divided into 9 zone segments, with each zone segment rotating a little, making the entire building rotate by 90 degrees. In 2012 it was named by the American magazine Travel + Leisure as one of the "Top Five Skyscrapers in the World of 2012".
attractions.text_zh: 马尔默地标性建筑。直译为“扭动的腰”，共54层高190米，共分9个区层，每区层旋转少许，使整栋大楼旋转了90度。2012年曾经被美国Travel Leisure杂志评为“2012年摩天大楼全球前五强”

attractions.text_en: Ribersborg Beach is located beside the Oresund strait, very close to Malmo Castle. The beach is about 2 kilometres long, and beside the sand is a large expanse of green space. From here you can also gaze into the distance at the long Oresund Bridge.
attractions.text_zh: 里伯斯堡海滩位于厄勒海峡旁，距马尔默城堡很近。海滩长约2公里，沙滩旁是大片的绿地。这里还能远眺长长的厄勒海峡大桥。

attractions.name_zh: 马尔默圣彼得大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: This 14th-century Gothic church is the rather ancient building preserved in the city. At that time Malmo was still under the control of the Hanseatic League, so the church's design then was modelled on St. Mary's Church in Lubeck, Germany. The interior of the church is decorated with magnificent murals, has an 88-metre-high spire, and a small chapel built for medieval merchants. St. Peter's Church, built in the 14th century, has a spire 105 metres high, and citizens very much like to hold weddings here. The style is Baltic Gothic. The oldest and most special part of the church is the small chapel on the north side, whose medieval murals on the ceiling date from the 15th century and were only rediscovered during the repair of the church in the early 20th century. The reason was that during the 16th-century Reformation, the Lutheran pursuit of plain religious ceremonies and architectural style rejected such decorations that looked flashy at the time. The altar in the church, up to 15 metres high, is the foremost wooden altar in Northern Europe, completed in 1611 after four years of careful crafting.
attractions.text_zh: 这座14世纪的哥特式教堂是城里保存下来的年代相当久远的建筑。那时马尔默还在汉萨联盟的控制下，所以当时教堂的设计以德国吕贝克的玛丽亚教堂为样本。教堂内部装饰有华丽的壁画，有一个88米高的尖塔，一个为中世纪商人们建造的小礼拜堂。建于14世纪的圣彼得教堂的尖塔有105米高，市民都很喜欢在这里举办婚礼。风格为波罗的海哥特式。教堂最古老也最特别的部分是北边的小礼拜堂，其屋顶的中世纪壁画源于15世纪，20世纪初维修教堂的时候才重被发现。其原因是16世纪宗教改革时路德宗对朴实的宗教仪式和建筑风格的追求，拒绝此类当时看上去浮华的装饰。教堂里的高达15米的祭坛是北欧第一的木质祭坛，1611年经历了四年的精心制作后完工。

attractions.text_en: Built in 1591, it is surrounded on all sides by half-timbered houses from the 16th to 18th centuries. Originally this was the city's main market, and today this has become the liveliest place in Malmo, and also where restaurants, cafes and gift shops are most concentrated. On the square there is a giant table lamp, completed in 2006, 5.8 metres high. Standing under this huge table lamp, it is as if you have walked into a fairy-tale world. The original intention in building this table lamp was to provide passers-by with a place to rest their feet. It has now become a place not to be missed in the city of Malmo.
attractions.text_zh: 建于1591年，四周都是16至18世纪半木结构的房子。最早这里是城里主要的集市，如今这里成为马尔默最热闹的地方，也是餐馆、咖啡馆和礼品店最集中的地方。广场上有座巨型台灯，建成于2006年，高5.8米。站在这座巨大的台灯下，仿佛走到了一个童话的世界。建造这座台灯，设计初衷是想提供路人一个歇脚的地方。现在已经成了马尔默市区一个不可错过的地方了。

attractions.name_zh: 斯托特广场与市政厅（外观）
attractions.text_en: This is the oldest square in the city. It was built more than 470 years ago by order of the then mayor Kock. His former residence is right near the square, a typical Hanseatic-style brown-red building. The City Hall (Radhuset) on the east side of the square was built in 1546 and is a building in the Dutch Renaissance style. In the middle of the square is the equestrian statue of the Swedish King Charles X, who defeated Denmark and turned Malmo thoroughly into a Swedish city. On the main square of Malmo stands the bronze equestrian statue of King Charles X, surrounded by ancient building clusters. The City Hall in the Dutch Renaissance style was first built in the 16th century, and its magnificent exterior decoration is very eye-catching.
attractions.text_zh: 这是城里最古老的广场。470多年前由当时的市长库克下令兴建的。他的故居就在广场附近，是座典型的汉萨风格的棕红色建筑。广场东侧的市政厅（Rådhuset）建于1546年是幢荷兰文艺复兴式样的建筑。广场中间是瑞典国王卡尔十世的骑像，就是他战胜了丹麦把马尔默彻底变成了瑞典的城市。马尔默大广场上矗立着国王卡尔十世的青铜骑像，四周围绕着古老的建筑群。荷兰文艺复兴样式的市政厅始建于16世纪，其华丽的外部装饰很是抢眼。

attractions.text_en: Jonkoping is located in the Smaland region of southern Sweden, set on the shore of the vast Lake Vattern. It was a famous match-manufacturing centre in 19th-century Europe and has a unique match museum. The town is surrounded by azure lakes and lush green spaces, with beautiful scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 延雪平位于瑞典南部的斯莫兰地区，地处浩瀚的韦特恩湖畔，是欧洲19世纪有名的火柴制造中心，拥有一座独特的火柴博物馆。城镇被蔚蓝的湖泊和青翠的绿地环绕，景色优美。

attractions.text_en: Stockholm City Hall is located on the shore of Lake Malaren in the city centre of Sweden's capital. It is the image and representation of Stockholm, and also the office of the city's municipal council. Built in 1911, it took 12 years to complete and is an important work of Swedish architecture. The building borders the water on two sides, with a towering tower forming a strong contrast with the lower wings spread out along the water surface. Together with the highly decorative vertical long strip windows, the entire building is like a great ship in sail, magnificent and grand.
attractions.text_zh: 斯德哥尔摩市政厅位于瑞典首都市中心的梅拉伦湖畔，是斯德哥尔摩的形象和代表，也是该市市政委员会的办公场所。建于1911年，历时12年才完成，是瑞典建筑中重要的作品。建筑两边临水，一座巍然矗立着的塔楼，与沿水面展开的裙房形成强烈的对比，加之装饰性很强的纵向长条窗，整个建筑犹如一艘航行中的大船，宏伟壮丽。

attractions.text_en: Stockholm Old Town was established in the 13th century and still retains the air of history to this day. Within the town are medieval alleys, cobblestone streets and old-style buildings, deeply influenced by the North Germanic style. Strolling along the streets of the old town, with ancient churches, long, long cobblestone lanes, and the aroma of coffee lingering in the air, makes time stand still. Apart from the historic relics, the old town also has many cafes, restaurants and handicraft shops, among which the famous one is the SALUHALL traditional market where the Stockholm Old Town fish market is located, open every day from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m., where you can fully experience Nordic cuisine.
attractions.text_zh: 斯德哥尔摩老城区建立于13世纪，至今还保留着历史的风气，城内有中世纪小巷、圆石街道和古式的建筑，深受北日耳曼式风格影响。漫步在老城街道，古老的教堂，悠长悠长的鹅卵石小巷，空气中氤氲着咖啡的香气，让时间停留。老城区除了历史遗迹外，还有许多咖啡馆、餐厅和手工艺品店、其中有名的是斯德哥尔摩老城鱼市所在的SALUHALL传统市集，每天从10点营业到16点，尽情体验北欧美食。

attractions.name_zh: 斯德哥尔摩瓦萨沉船博物馆
attractions.text_en: Stockholm's Vasa Museum was built near the site of the Vasa, which on its maiden voyage in 1628 unfortunately encountered a strong wind and sank just 2 kilometres from the harbour. The Vasa is the only well-preserved 17th-century ship in the world. The legendary salvage process and the history of her sinking are equally fascinating; moreover, all the precious items in the museum were salvaged from the seabed. The museum also explains how the Vasa was built, how it sank, and how it was salvaged from the murky waters of Lake Malaren in Stockholm and preserved intact for posterity to admire.
attractions.text_zh: 斯德哥尔摩的瓦萨沉船博物馆建于瓦萨号遗址附近，1628年首航时不幸遭遇强风沉没在距离港口仅2公里处。瓦萨号是世界上独有保存完好的17世纪船舶。富有传奇色彩的打捞过程和她的沉没历史同样引人入胜；而且博物馆中所有珍贵的物品都是从海底打捞上来的。馆内还介绍了瓦萨号是如何建造、如何沉船、以及如何从斯德哥尔摩阴暗的梅拉伦湖中打捞出来，并保存完整供后人景仰。

attractions.text_en: Drottningholm (Queen's Island) is located in the western suburbs of Stockholm, and the palace on the island is right on the shore of Lake Malaren. The King and Queen of Sweden currently live here, and it is praised as the "Versailles of Sweden", blending French Baroque style with British elegance. The palace garden is open free of charge and is divided into French and English parts. The Baroque garden, immediately adjacent to the palace, has geometrically symmetrical patterns, exquisite fountains and sculptures; the English garden is more natural and wild, with large lawns and woodland paths, suitable for relaxing. Strolling in the Baroque garden, admiring the blend of lake-and-mountain scenery with royal grandeur, this half-day of touring is sure to become one of the most unforgettable memories of your trip to the "Capital of the North".
attractions.text_zh: 皇后岛位于斯德哥尔摩西部郊区，岛上的皇宫就在梅拉伦湖湖畔，目前瑞典国王王后居住在这里，被誉为 “瑞典的凡尔赛” ，融合了法式巴洛克风格与英伦风范；宫廷花园免费开放，分为法式和英式两个部分，巴洛克式花园，紧邻宫殿，拥有几何对称的图案、精美的喷泉和雕塑 ；英式花园：更自然野趣，有大片草坪和林间小径，适合放松。漫步在巴洛克式花园中，欣赏湖光山色与皇家气度交融，这半天的游览一定会成为您“斯京”之行中最难忘的回忆之一。

attractions.text_en: If the Louvre bears witness to the glory of the Gauls, then the Île de la Cité, Notre-Dame de Paris, and the Hôtel de Ville write the inseparable bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Île de la Cité. Without the Île de la Cité, there would be no Paris as it is today.
attractions.text_zh: 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: The Cathedral of Notre-Dame de Paris stands on the Île de la Cité in the heart of Paris and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The church is Gothic in style, and visitors can climb the towers. Although you won't meet the "Hunchback of Notre-Dame," you can see the 17th-century great bell, get up close to the mythical beasts on the church's exterior walls, and overlook the beautiful scenery of the Île de la Cité and the Seine.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西岱岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，游客可以登上塔楼参观，虽然遇不到“钟楼怪人”，但却能看到17世纪的大钟、近距离接触教堂外壁上的神兽、俯瞰西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。

attractions.text_en:
The Champ de Mars is a large ribbon-shaped park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, lying between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the École Militaire (Military School) to its southeast.
Before the second half of the 18th century, this was an abandoned plot of land. It was not until the Military School was established in 1765 that its status gradually rose, when it was mainly used as a place for military training. On 17 July 1791, during the French Revolution, a bloody massacre took place here. Later, France used this site to host several World's Fairs as well as the Olympic Games of 1900.
attractions.text_zh:
战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。
在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次的世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the emblem of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en: Take the famous "Bateaux Mouches" cruise with its transparent cabins, sailing along the banks of the Seine that bring together many attractions. The 3.2-kilometer, roughly 1-hour voyage passes Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées, and the Île de la Cité, among other famous sights. On the surface of the Seine, you can experience Paris's romantic night views, beautiful scenery, and wonderful music. It is hailed as "the in-depth touring experience in Paris not to be missed."
attractions.text_zh: 乘坐着名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

attractions.text_en: It is one of the world's oldest museums and a world-renowned treasure house of art. The Louvre building is "U"-shaped, divided into two parts, new and old. The glass pyramid entrance in front of the Louvre was designed by the Chinese-American master architect I. M. Pei. Here are preserved more than 400,000 art treasures, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing works from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria, and Rome to medieval Europe and the countries of the East — truly an outstanding palace of art in human history. The itinerary includes a standard individual-visitor ticket (no Chinese audio guide).
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品、其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。 行程包含普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the era of France's feudal rule. In terms of its content, it was not only the French court but also the administrative center of the state, and a concrete embodiment of the social, political views and lifestyle of France at the time. It represented the power of an absolutist regime able to concentrate such enormous manpower, material resources, and finances on a scale unseen in Europe since the ancient Roman Empire. At that time, in order to build it, Louis XIV mobilized more than thirty thousand workers as well as architects, engineers, and technicians. Besides solving the complex technical problems arising from constructing such a large-scale building complex, they also had to resolve various issues such as water supply and roads. Clearly, the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully demonstrates the economic and technological progress of France at that time and the wisdom of its working people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann lies between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are the two great department stores, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, author of In Search of Lost Time, completed most of the writing of In Search of Lost Time in his residence at number 102 on this street.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en: The Paris Opera was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861. Its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms, including the ancient Greco-Roman colonnade and the Baroque. Grand in scale, exquisite and refined, resplendent and magnificent, it is hailed as a theater where painting, marble, and gold ornamentation shine upon one another, offering great enjoyment. It is one of the typical buildings of Napoleon III's era.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎歌剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受。是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Mont Saint-Michel is located on a solitary island on the Normandy coast, two kilometers from the shore. With its remarkable phenomenon of becoming a sea island at high tide and joining the mainland at low tide, it has been listed by UNESCO as a World Heritage of mankind. Mont Saint-Michel is a famous French monument and a Christian holy site, situated on a small island in the Manche department, two kilometers from the coast. The island is cone-shaped, with a circumference of 900 meters, formed of towering granite. At an elevation of 88 meters, it is often surrounded by vast stretches of sandbank and only becomes an island at high tide. In ancient times this was a place where the Celts worshipped their gods. In the 8th century AD, the cardinal Aubert built a small chapel-castle on the highest point of the island, dedicated to the Archangel Michael, which has now become a center of pilgrimage, hence the name Mont Saint-Michel. It is a "World Cultural and Natural Heritage" site.
