attractions.text_zh: 圣米歇尔山位于诺曼底海滩上的一座孤岛上，距海岸两公里，涨潮时为海岛，退潮时为陆地的奇特景观，被联合国教科文组列入世界人类遗产。圣米歇尔山是法国著名古迹和基督教圣地，位于芒什省一小岛上，距海岸两公里。小岛呈圆锥形，周长900米，由耸立的花岗石构成。海拔88米，经常被大片沙岸包围，仅涨潮时才成为岛。古时这里是凯尔特人祭神的地方。公元8世纪，红衣主教奥贝在岛上最高处修建一座小教堂城堡，奉献给天使长米歇尔，如今成为朝圣中心，故称圣米歇尔山，是“世界文化与自然遗产”景点。

attractions.text_en: The Abbey of Mont Saint-Michel is located on Mont Saint-Michel. Shaped by nature, Mont Saint-Michel is one of the world's great wonders, and the abbey and great church atop it hold a supreme place in the hearts of Christians. Aubert built a small chapel on the island, dedicated to the Archangel Michael, and it became a center of pilgrimage. During Napoleon's rule, the abbey also served as a state prison. To this day, although the abbey has been designed and rebuilt by many architects, it still retains a plain, unadorned, and antique style.
attractions.text_zh: 圣米歇尔山修道院位于圣米歇尔山上。圣米歇尔山经大自然的造化，是世界的一大奇观，山上的修道院和大教堂更在基督教徒的心目中有着至高无上的地位。奥伯特在岛上修建一座小教堂，奉献给大天使米歇尔，成为朝圣中心。拿破仑执政期间，修道院也曾作为国家监狱。到如今，修道院虽然经诸多建筑师设计改建，但依旧保持着朴实无华、古色古香的格调。

attractions.text_en: The largest of the châteaux of the Loire Valley, with a fairly typical medieval castle layout, it was a hunting lodge for the kings of France. Château de Chambord was built during the reign of Francis I. In its layout, form, and decorative style, it reflects France's traditional architectural art, while also being influenced by the Italian Renaissance, making it one of the representative works of the French Renaissance period, regarded by the French as a national treasure worth boasting of. In 1981, Château de Chambord was inscribed on the World Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 卢瓦尔河谷城堡群中最大的一个，较为典型的中世纪古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫。香波堡兴建于弗朗斯瓦一世时期。它在布局、造型、风格装饰上反映了法国传统的建筑艺术，同时又受到意大利文艺复兴的影响，成为法国文艺复兴时期的代表作之一，被法国人视为值得炫耀的国宝。1981年，香博堡列入了世界遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Old Town of Rennes is the most charming district of this capital of Brittany, preserving a large number of 16th–17th century half-timbered houses — colorful and with leaning lines, full of medieval flavor. Strolling among them, the stone streets, arched gateways, and ancient squares interweave into a rich historical atmosphere. This is not only the historical and cultural center but also the most lively part of Rennes; cafés, restaurants, and specialty shops abound, and the university-town atmosphere fills the old district with youthful energy. Whether for in-depth cultural touring, architectural photography, or a slow-paced stroll, the Old Town of Rennes is well worth savoring in detail.
attractions.text_zh: 雷恩老城是这座布列塔尼首府最具魅力的区域，保存着大量16–17世纪的木筋房（半木结构建筑），色彩斑斓、线条倾斜，极具中世纪风情。漫步其间，石板街道、拱形门洞与古老广场交织成浓厚的历史氛围。这里不仅是历史文化中心，也是雷恩最具生活气息的地方，咖啡馆、餐厅、特色小店林立，大学城氛围让古老街区充满年轻活力。无论是文化深度游、建筑摄影还是慢节奏漫步，雷恩老城都值得细细品味。

attractions.text_en: Parc du Thabor is one of the most famous and most worth-visiting urban green spaces in Rennes, covering about 10 hectares. It combines a French geometric garden, an English-style natural landscape area, a vast rose garden, and a botanical garden, suitable for all four seasons, and is a popular spot for locals and tourists to relax and stroll. The park originally developed from the garden of a Benedictine abbey, and was later redesigned in the 19th century by the renowned landscape designer Denis Bühler, forming the refined yet natural landscape structure it has today. Here there are more than 3,000 species of plants and over 2,000 varieties of roses, as well as a music pavilion, an aviary, fountains, and a children's play area, and it regularly hosts concerts, festival events, and cultural exhibitions — a place not to be missed for experiencing the natural and cultural life of Rennes. The best times to stroll are during the spring and summer flowering season and the autumn maple-leaf season; it is also suitable for families, couples, or photography enthusiasts to visit.
attractions.text_zh: 他泊花园是雷恩著名且最值得一访的城市绿地之一，面积约 10 公顷，融合了法式几何庭园、英式自然风景区、庞大的玫瑰园与植物园，四季皆宜，是当地人和游客休闲散步的热门场所。公园最初由本笃会修道院的庭园发展而来，后于19世纪由著名景观设计师 Denis Bühler 重新布局，形成如今既精致又自然的景观结构。这里拥有超过 3000种植物 和 2000余种玫瑰，还设有 音乐亭、鸟舍、喷泉与儿童游乐区，常年举办音乐会、节庆活动和文化展览，是体验雷恩自然与文化生活不可错过的地点。最佳漫步时间为春夏花季及秋日枫叶时节，同时也适合家庭、情侣或摄影爱好者前来探访。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of the Parliament of Brittany (exterior) is one of the most representative historical landmarks of Rennes. Built in the 17th century, it is a model work of French classical architecture. This was once the seat of the judicial institution of the Brittany region, witnessing the region's important status in French history. The building's exterior is dignified and elegant, while its interior decoration is sumptuous, especially famous for its ceiling murals and golden reliefs, displaying the combination of royal power and local tradition. Today it still functions as a court of law, but it is open for guided tours at certain times, and visitors can gain an in-depth understanding of Brittany's political, legal, and cultural history through the commentary. As one of the core attractions of the Old Town of Rennes, the Parliament Palace is surrounded by squares, cafés, and medieval streets and lanes, a symbol of the convergence of the city's history and modern life, and an important stop not to be missed on an in-depth cultural tour.
attractions.text_zh: 布列塔尼议会宫（ 外观 ）是雷恩最具代表性的历史地标之一，建于17世纪，是法国古典主义建筑的典范之作。这里曾是布列塔尼地区司法机构所在地，见证了该地区在法国历史中的重要地位。建筑外观庄重典雅，内部装饰华丽，尤其以天花板壁画和金色浮雕闻名，展现了王权与地方传统的结合。如今这里仍作为法院使用，但在特定时段开放导览参观，游客可通过讲解深入了解布列塔尼的政治、法律与文化历史。作为雷恩老城核心景点之一，议会宫周边环绕着广场、咖啡馆和中世纪街巷，是城市历史与现代生活交汇的象征，也是文化深度游不可错过的重要一站。

attractions.text_en: The magnificent Colosseum, located in the center of Rome, was built by the ancient Romans to entertain the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was the place where slave owners, nobles and free citizens of the ancient Roman Empire watched beast fights or gladiatorial combat between slaves, and it is one of Rome's more famous historical relics. The Colosseum is a masterpiece and miracle of architectural history, renowned throughout the world for being huge, majestic and magnificent. Although only the greater part of its skeleton remains, its grand bearing and imposing momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马较著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman king Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, among others, rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of the exquisite building techniques of ancient Rome, and was praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels".
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为"天使的设计"。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday", becoming a calling card of Rome that everyone knows. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and beautiful figure seems to have merged with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. The Spanish Square itself is not large, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The steps have 138 levels in total, the widest steps in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Fountain of the Maiden" or the "Wishing Pool", it takes as its theme the return of the sea god Neptune in victory from Roman mythology, with a magnificent and grand momentum. It is said that if you stand with your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dream will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称"少女喷泉"，或者"许愿池"，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined with Italian cypresses on both sides, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of the pastoral scenery of Tuscany. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast mottled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that attracts countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and take photos.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a small town located on a hill in the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. In 1459, Pienza, which he presided over rebuilding, was regarded as a model of the "ideal city", and was therefore hailed as the "touchstone of Renaissance urban life". Unlike other Italian medieval towns, the unique feature of Pienza is that one can look out from the city walls over the scenery of the World Heritage site - the "Val d'Orcia".
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为"理想城市"的典范，因此被誉为"文艺复兴都市生活的试金石"。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval ancient city, is full of masterpieces by great artists and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing stone-paved alleys and the deep courtyards hidden in various places, you seem to be transported back to medieval Europe a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. For several centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time stopped here in the fourteenth century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties - almond soft cakes ricciarelli, nut tart panforte, peppered spiced nut cake pan pepato, rice pudding budini di riso, walnut cakes cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because it resembles a shell) is the center of the city of Siena, and one of the larger surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly opposite the square are the Siena Town Hall and the tower. Inside the Town Hall is the Civic Museum, which houses numerous paintings of the Sienese School, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government". The tower's full name is Torre del Mangia. It is the taller building in Siena and the second-tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of stairs and take in the beautiful views of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳较高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns. It is a unique convergence of art and nature, holding rich historical traces. Its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the concept of "good government" of the Italian city-states.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦"良政"的理念。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the Italian city of Pisa. Located on the Square of Miracles on the north side of the city of Pisa in the province of Tuscany, Italy, it is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, and was selected as a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. It is said that in 1590 AD, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, part of which is grassland. The Square of Miracles is the center of the city of Pisa, with four major buildings on the square: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Cemetery. Around the square, the ancient city walls and city gates are also preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Square of Miracles of the Italian city of Pisa (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy. Built along the winding Mediterranean coastline, it is the collective name for five clifftop villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the world's beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers, taking about 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other side are the mountains, and ahead are the Italian fishing villages, making it a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.name_en: Florence Cathedral (Santa Maria del Fiore) (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few can be so charming. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets the classical, elegant and free style admired in the Renaissance era to the fullest, so it is no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower". The original site of Florence Cathedral was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the building of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为"花之圣母"。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria enjoys the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David", and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Florence Cathedral (Santa Maria del Fiore) is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also called the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earlier large-span circular-arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his feelings of longing into "The Divine Comedy". Over the centuries, it has withstood floods, social upheavals and wars while remaining standing. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce. This Gothic building is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and the frescoes and sculptures inside are worth savoring in detail. There are several cafes and restaurants around the square, offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural activities and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, experiencing the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

attractions.text_en: Known for short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe. It is a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and at the same time a treasury rich in artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside, you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. When going to the dungeon, you walk across the Bridge of Sighs, and you can look outside through small holes, rather than having so many people on the bridge opposite looking over at you. You can take photos inside, as long as you don't use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the only route by which condemned prisoners were escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in early Baroque style. The bridge is shaped like a house, with a vaulted top, and is very tightly sealed; there are only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the felon would be taken to the dungeon. When passing over this airtight bridge, he could only look at the blue sky through the small window, and from then on lost his freedom, involuntarily letting out sounds of sighing. It is said that if lovers kiss under the bridge, they can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was filmed here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room of Europe". The square is surrounded on three sides by magnificent palaces, and to the east stand the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the center of public activity for Venetian politics, religion and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作"欧洲美丽的客厅"。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome", Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, Milan Cathedral was first built in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as a magnificent Gothic building of Italy, hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and thousands of statues are carved on the white marble exterior walls. The interior space is broad and spacious, with sunlight streaming in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaic paintings on the windows, the light dim, full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the church's crypt, the remains of the Church of St. Tecla on the original site are also preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是"圆顶"的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a gorgeous shopping arcade, but most tourists who come here are sightseeing. Under the central arcade there is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan, especially the window displays, which are updated daily; just standing outside the windows to admire them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele is dotted with quite a few high-end restaurants, cafes and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also called Station Street) is one of the longer shopping avenues in Europe, and also one of the most expensive shopping avenues in the world. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless center of Zurich, where luxury brands from all over the world are spread out and private banks stand in rows. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless visitors will feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored gold bars whose quantity is said to be among the world's foremost, leaving many people too excited to move their feet. Immersed in it, you can clearly feel the air filled with the aura of wealth, luxury and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. The docks on the lake are filled with yachts of all kinds, like a rich people's club. One end of Lake Zurich extends deep into the city center. On the lake surface, white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere, leisurely and carefree, a harmonious scene. The north bank of Lake Zurich is the residence of the rich, known as the "Gold Coast", while the south bank is called the "Silver Coast". The end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich. As one of the "world's most livable cities", the life of true Zurich people is everywhere imbued with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称"金岸"，而南岸则称之为"银岸"。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为"世界宜居的城市"，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: The Grossmünster is one of the 3 main churches of Zurich, Switzerland (the other two are the Fraumünster of Zurich and another). The church is located near the bank of the Limmat River, first built around 1100 and inaugurated around 1220. This church, facing the Fraumünster across the river, played a pivotal role in the Swiss Reformation of the 16th century; both the Faculty of Theology of the University of Zurich and the Museum of the Reformation are established here. The stained-glass paintings inside the church are masterpieces by the Swiss modern art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Line train passes through here. Surrounded by mountains, with lush green grass, the quaint village is scattered along the shore of Lake Lungern, like a paradise far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled between mountains and water, Lucerne possesses the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance halls and mansions, as well as century-old shops, long streets and ancient lanes, all abound. The lakes and mountains of Lake Lucerne reflect the beautiful scenery of the city in a way both illusory and real, making it that extraordinary pearl among the many beautiful small cities of Switzerland. Since the 19th century, it has attracted many princes, nobles and literati to come and visit and reside, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: This lake has a winding shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms typical "lake and mountain" scenery, attracting a large number of tourists to come sightseeing. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the misty atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and this piece thus acquired the title "Moonlight" - although this was not Beethoven's original intention.
attractions.text_zh: 这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的"湖光山色"景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: This dying lion statue was carved into the natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and more than 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground, with a broken spear stuck in its shoulder, and beside it is a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms. This statue was made to commemorate the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on August 10, 1792, while protecting the safety of the family of Louis XVI in the Tuileries Palace in Paris. Below the statue, an inscription describes the course of this event. In those days, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, forced by livelihood, went one after another to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers, brave and skilled in battle, but honor and money could not conceal the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, leaving only the guard serving the Holy See, which is that famous Swiss Guard. Owing to their famous loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served right up to the present. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving statue in the world".
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将"濒死的琉森狮子"誉为"世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像"。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is a famous postcard photo-shooting location of the Swiss "dream hillside" that photographers especially love, and is also the Alpine town one must pass through when visiting the Jungfrau. Together with First, Jungfrau, Wengen and others, it forms the more magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-watching destination, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts. The lakeside, green grasslands, waterfalls, dairy cows and snowy mountains together make up this fascinating town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头非常爱的瑞士"梦幻山坡"著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald First attracts tourists from all directions to come and admire the magnificent scenery of the north slope of the Eiger. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk by Tissot, anyone will immediately feel that they are standing on top of the world. The Cliff Walk by Tissot is located at the summit of First, where you can take in a unique panorama of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow all year round, while at the foot of the mountain the grass is green and the scenery is beautiful, making it a famous Swiss sightseeing and outdoor sports destination. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is the green-space square in the center of the town of Interlaken, a famous Swiss sightseeing town. This green space was the garden of a former monastery, and is now prohibited from any construction of buildings, in order to prevent damage to this beautiful landscape. This is a good place to gaze at the Jungfrau. On the vast green space there is a fountain, also dotted with many benches, so it is also a good place for strolling. Höhematte is also a landing site for hang-gliding; there is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, and after paying, staff will take tourists to a nearby mountain for free gliding, from which you can admire the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Léman, straddles Switzerland and France. It is an important lake of Western Europe, and also a famous scenic area and health resort. During the day you can take a pleasure boat to tour Lake Geneva, and in the evening be intoxicated by the flickering neon lights along the shore. There are also often luxury cruise ships holding concerts or balls on the lake surface. You can take a pleasure boat to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shore of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, snowy mountains and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The great fountain is located on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden, and is one of the more representative landmarks of Geneva. The great fountain is like a column of water spouted by a whale, 140 meters high with 500 liters of water output, and its magnificent sight can be seen from very far away in the city center. At night there is also a chance to see the great fountain under the illumination of lights, which is even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦较具代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous attraction in Geneva. Switzerland is known as the "land of gardens", and at the same time it is the "home of clocks and watches". What is even more wonderful is that Switzerland's skilled craftsmen ingeniously combined the beauty of flowers with the manufacturing craftsmanship of clocks and watches, originally and creatively producing the "Flower Clock".
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称"花园之国"，同时又是"钟表之乡"，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了"花钟"。

attractions.text_en: The upper town on the hillside on the right bank of the Rhône is, because of the higher terrain, also called the upper town by the local residents. This is not only a gathering place of churches and historical sites; among the winding alleys there are also many small and lovely antique shops, and the former residence of Rousseau, the thinker of the European Enlightenment, is also located in the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

attractions.text_en: Senja Island (Senja) is a dazzling jewel of northern Norway. Because the island possesses all of Norway's varied landforms, it is known as the "miniature" of Norway. Senja Island is famous for its magnificent natural scenery, its long northern-lights burst season, its abundant wild marine life, and the uniquely tranquil fishing villages of Norway, making it a paradise for adventure lovers and nature enthusiasts.
attractions.text_zh: 塞尼亚岛（Senja）是挪威北部的一颗璀璨明珠，因为岛上拥有挪威的各种地貌，被誉为挪威的“缩影”。塞尼亚岛以其壮丽的自然风光、长时段的北极光爆发期、丰富的野生海洋动物、挪威独特的宁静的渔村而闻名，是探险爱好者和自然爱好者的天堂。

attractions.text_en: The Tungeneset Miracle Mountain Viewpoint (Tungeneset) is located at the tip of the headland between Steinsfjord (Steinsfjord) and the Elf Fjord (Ersfjord). On this stretch a footbridge made of Siberian larch spans the rocks, from which you can admire the sharp peaks of the Okshornan range (Okshornan) on Senja Island in northern Norway, also known as the "Devil's Teeth".
attractions.text_zh: 奇迹山峦瞭望台（Tungeneset） 位于 斯坦斯峡湾（Steinsfjord） 和精灵峡湾（ Ersfjord） 之间的岬角顶端。这一段被西伯利亚落叶松制成的人行桥横跨岩石，可欣赏到位于挪威北部 塞尼雅岛上的欧克斯曼群峰 （Okshornan） 的锋利山峰，也被称为“恶魔之齿”。

attractions.text_en: The Bergsbotn Viewing Platform (Bergsbotn) sits amid the picturesque scenery of Skaland in Norway, and is a must-visit for all nature lovers and travelers who want to immerse themselves in magnificent views. This scenic viewpoint is located high above the surrounding terrain, offering a vantage point that showcases the region's stunning natural beauty. Visitors can admire magnificent views of fjords, mountains, and lush green vegetation, making it an ideal spot for photography, picnicking, or simply soaking in the tranquil atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh: 贝格斯景观台（Bergsbotn）坐落在挪威斯卡兰风景如画的风景中，是所有自然爱好者和想要沉浸在壮丽景色中的旅行者的必游之地。这个风景优美的观景点位于周围地形的高处，提供了一个展示该地区令人惊叹的自然美景的有利位置。游客可以欣赏峡湾、山脉和郁郁葱葱的绿色植物的壮丽景色，使其成为摄影、野餐或只是沉浸在宁静氛围中的理想场所。

attractions.text_en: A dreamlike beach with white sand, set in a sheltered bay, where you can relax and immerse yourself in the tranquil beauty of this pristine beach, with fine white sand and crystal-clear waters. It is the perfect place to relax and take beautiful photos. Don't forget to visit the unique golden toilet and take a quirky photo to add a touch of fun to your adventure.
attractions.text_zh: 梦幻般的海滩，有白色的沙滩，位于一个受庇护的海湾中，在这里您可以放松身心，沉浸在这片原始海滩的宁静美景中，这里有细白的沙滩和清澈的海水。这是放松身心和拍摄精美照片的完美地点。别忘了参观独特的金色厕所，拍一张奇特的照片，为您的冒险增添一丝乐趣。

attractions.name_en: Botnhamn Arctic Fjord Ferry – Botnhamn Ferjekai
attractions.name_zh: 波特汉姆极地峡湾渡轮 Botnhamn Ferjekai
attractions.text_en: Along the way you take in the elegant beauty of the Arctic fjord scenery on one side, and the grandeur and awe of the Arctic Ocean on the other. The sky changes color according to its mood, birds and shoals of fish follow along the route, the deep blue of the fjord corresponds to the vast white glaciers of the Arctic Ocean, and at sunset it becomes a beautiful scene.
attractions.text_zh: 沿途欣赏一遍的北极峡湾风景的秀美，另外一遍北冰洋的壮观与震撼，天空根据不同的心情而更改色彩，沿途的鸟类与鱼群跟随，深邃的峡湾蓝色与白茫茫的北冰洋巨大冰川对应，落霞时，成为美丽的风景。

attractions.text_en: The renowned Nordic culinary paradise of Harstad — here there are unforgettable nature experiences and dining experiences, local cuisine prepared by excellent chefs, genuine shops, music festivals, unspoiled archipelagos, and much more! Called the most romantic place in Norway, in summer you can see the midnight sun, and in winter it lies in the middle of the northern-lights belt. Gastronomy is an important reason that travelers from around the globe come to Harstad. Here you can not only taste a wide variety of seafood from the North Atlantic and the Arctic Ocean, but every dish also leaves visitors with a deep impression of its artistry.
attractions.text_zh: 北欧著名的美食圣地 哈尔斯塔 —— 这里有令人难忘的自然体验和美食体验、由优秀厨师烹制的当地美食、货真价实的商店、音乐节、未受破坏的群岛等等！称为挪威最浪漫的地方，夏季可见午夜的阳光，冬季位于北极光带的中间，美食是全球游客前往哈尔斯塔的重要目的，在这里不仅可以品尝来自北大西洋和北冰洋的各种海鲜，同时每道菜都将艺术性也给游客留下了深刻的印象。

attractions.text_en: Svolvær is the capital city of the Lofoten Islands, and is also an important port city of Lofoten. With magnificent views of the cold ocean and sweeping vistas of the snow-capped mountains, the panorama from anywhere in the city is unrivaled. The bustling quay is thronged with crowds coming one after another, every restaurant carefully displays its catch of the day, and all kinds of little shops fill the place with vitality. The Hurtigruten expedition cruise quay has become a sacred spot for visitors to take in the view, and the lone island Anker Brygge water-cabin hotel in the city center also draws many photographers to visit and take pictures.
attractions.text_zh: 斯沃尔维尔是罗弗敦群岛的首府城市，同样也是罗弗敦重要的港口城市，冰冷海洋的壮丽景色和白雪皑皑的山脉的广阔景色，城市中任何地方的全景都是无与伦比，热闹的码头人群熙熙攘攘接踵而至，每一家餐厅都精心拿摆出自己当天的渔获，各式各样的小商店让这里生机勃勃，海达路德探险邮轮的码头成为游客取景的圣地，城市中心独岛安克尔布里嘉水屋酒店也有很多摄影师来这里参观拍照。

attractions.text_en: This small fishing village of only 500 people also has a football pitch, located on a skerry, surrounded by beautiful fjords and azure sea water, with an added measure of tranquility and beauty. The football pitch came about to fulfill the wish of a local 14-year-old child, which is heartwarming and at the same time makes one envy the innocence and kindness of Norwegians.
attractions.text_zh: 这个仅有500人的小渔村还拥有一座的足球场，位于一处岛礁之上，被优美的峡湾和湛蓝的海水所包围，多了一番宁静和唯美。足球场的由来是为了当地一个14孩子的心愿而建，可谓让人心生向往的同时又无比羡慕挪威人的纯真与善良。

attractions.text_en: Henningsvær is a fishing village set on the Lofoten Islands of Norway. Thanks to its traditional fishing-village architecture, it attracts many visitors from all over the world. The village is located about 20 kilometers (12 miles) southwest of the town of Svolvær.
attractions.text_zh: 亨宁斯韦尔是坐落挪威的罗弗敦群岛上的一个渔村，由于它的传统渔村的建筑，吸引着全世界的许多游客。该村位于约20公里斯沃尔韦尔镇（12英里）西南。

attractions.text_en: Setting off from the steep Reine pass is a great vantage point to admire Reine, after which you head to the village of Hamnøy (Hamnøy). This little village has only one restaurant and one fisherman's cabin, and it is likewise one of the classic photography scenes. The bridge on the west side at the entrance of the village leading toward Reine is a great shooting angle. If on the day, due to weather, physical condition, or because children cannot climb Reine mountain, you head to Hamnøy village that day to shoot, here too you can capture classic themes such as the sea, fjords, snow-capped mountains, and fishing villages.
attractions.text_zh: 从陡峭的雷纳山口前往,是欣赏雷纳有利地点,随后前往哈姆诺伊村（Hamnøy）这条小村只有一家餐厅及一个渔民小屋，同样也是摄影的经典场景之一，在村口西面前往雷讷的桥上就是有利的拍摄角度，当天如果因为天气原因、体力原因、或儿童无法攀雷纳山，当天前往哈姆诺伊村拍摄，在这里也能拍到海水、峡湾、雪山、渔村等经典主题。

attractions.text_en: Hamnøy Fishing Village (Hamnoy) is one of three beautiful pristine fishing villages on Moskenesøya Island. When you stand inside Lofoten's Hamnøy fishing village, there is a feeling of tranquil time travel, as if from another world. In the globally stunning photographs of 2014, Hamnøy fishing village was among them.
attractions.text_zh: 哈姆诺伊渔村（Hamnoy）是莫斯克斯内斯岛上三个美丽的原生态渔村之一，当你站在罗弗敦 哈姆诺伊渔村 里面的时候，有一种恍如隔世般宁静穿越的感觉。在2014年全球震撼的照片里， 哈姆诺伊渔村 渔村就位列其中。

attractions.text_en: Å Town (Å), the town with the shortest name in the world. "Å" is the last syllabic character in the Norwegian language, representing the end and the place of restarting of all things. Å Town lies at the end of the Lofoten Islands highway and is a protected traditional fishing village. It is also a paradise for photographers. When you first arrive at the little town of Å, you are immediately drawn to the red Norwegian fisherman's cabins of the town. These fisherman's cabin styles, built in the nineteenth century and still preserved today, have outer walls painted in deep red, with single-story bungalows as well as two-story buildings, all built entirely of wood, standing out very conspicuously on the Lofoten Islands.
attractions.text_zh: 奥镇（Å）世界上名字短的小镇，“Å”在挪威语中是最后一个音节字符，代表着一切的结束和重启之地。奥镇在罗弗敦群岛公路的尽头，是一个受到保护的传统渔村。这里也是摄影师的天堂，初到Å小镇时，立刻会被镇上红色的挪威渔人小屋建筑所吸引。这些建于十九世纪仍保存到现在的渔人小屋样式，外墙漆着深红色的颜色，有单层的平房，也有双层的建筑，全数都是以木头建造，十分显眼地伫立在罗弗敦岛上。

attractions.text_en: The yellow houses: located on the famous Lofoten island of Sakrisøy, this island is renowned for the contrasting scenery formed by rows of yellow fishing houses dotted with other colors against the snowstorm. Most of the houses on the island are painted in bright, glossy yellow fishing-house color, with the brilliant colors reflected on the calm sea surface of the fjord. Combined with a white snowstorm background, it makes a beautiful Lofoten postcard.
attractions.text_zh: 黄房子：位于罗弗敦著名的岛屿Sakrisøy，这个岛屿以一排排黄色渔屋点缀着其他的色彩在暴风雪中形成的反差风景而闻名，岛上大部分的房屋都涂上颜色鲜艳油亮色黄色渔屋，炫丽的色彩倒影在峡湾的平静海面上，如果配合白色的暴雪背景，将是罗弗敦美丽的明信片。

attractions.text_en: Hailed as "the charm of the Arctic", Tromsø is a city that blends vibrant nightlife, Nordic culture, polar scientific research, and Sami tradition. Here! The long winter nights (September to the following April) greatly increase the chances of encountering the northern lights, while the summer polar day (May to July) brings 24-hour daylight and round-the-clock outdoor sightseeing. The temperature is pleasant all year round, and it is an important whale-watching destination by sea. Tromsø is famous for its bustling nightlife and its various restaurants offering fresh Arctic produce. Tromsø boasts a flourishing multiculturalism, gathering residents from more than 100 countries, offering both distinctive local cuisine and plenty of new-style bistros serving local fare. Although the city of Tromsø was only founded about 200 years ago, humans had already settled in this region thousands of years earlier. After its founding, Tromsø quickly became the hunting center of the Arctic region, and at the beginning of the 20th century it was also the departure point for expeditions to the Arctic region, earning it the name Gateway to the Arctic.
attractions.text_zh: 被誉为“北极魅力”的特罗姆瑟，融合活力夜生活、北欧文化、极地科研与萨米传统的城市，这里！漫长冬夜（9月-次年4月）大幅提升极光邂逅概率，夏季极昼（5月-7月）24小时白昼，全天候户外游览。全年气温宜人，是重要的出海观鲸地。特罗姆瑟以熙熙攘攘的夜生活和各种供应北极生鲜物产的餐厅著称。特罗瑟姆多元文化鼎盛，汇集了来自100多个国家的居民，既供应当地特色美食，也不乏供应当地美食的新式小餐馆。虽然特罗姆瑟城建立至今仅200年左右，但早在数千年以前就已经有人类定居在这一地区。建城后，特罗姆瑟很快成为了北极地区的狩猎中心，而且在20世纪之初，这里还是前往北极地区考察的出发点，并因此得名的北极门户。

attractions.text_en: Storgata has always played an important role in many of the great polar expeditions in history. On the Storgata old-town pedestrian street in the town of Tromsø, you can see views from the water across to the Arctic Cathedral, and distinctive polar architecture — Tromsø's buildings are predominantly Viking-style wooden houses, with many practical, functionalist-style buildings added as well. Among the statues and monuments, you can find the statue of Roald Amundsen, who gave Tromsø its nickname "the Gateway to the Arctic". Walking through Tromsø's Storgata district, where Viking culture gathers, with beer, food, art, the waterside quay and concerts, turns this place into a Nordic city that never sleeps.
attractions.text_zh: 斯托加塔在许多历史上伟大的极地探险中始终发挥着重要作用，在特罗姆瑟镇斯托加塔老城街区步行道上，可以看到水面到北极大教堂的景色，独特的极地建筑，特罗姆瑟的建筑以维京式木屋为主，同时增加了许多实用主义风格建筑，雕像和纪念碑发现特罗姆瑟的绰号“通往北极的门户”罗尔德阿蒙森的雕像上。行走在维京文化聚集的特罗姆瑟斯托加塔街区集合啤酒，美食，艺术和街边的码头和音乐会，把这里变成一个北欧不夜城。

attractions.text_en: Built in 1958, the Tromsø Bridge is a magnificent structure within the Arctic. Spanning Tromsø and the troll town, it is a landmark structure of Tromsø. On one side of the cross-sea bridge is the snow-mountain town with its distinctive and striking snow-peak-shaped silhouette. Many postcards of Tromsø are photographed here.
attractions.text_zh: 建于1958年的特罗姆瑟大桥是北极内壮观的建筑，横跨特罗姆瑟和山妖小镇，是特罗姆瑟的标志性建筑，跨海大桥的一侧是雪山峰式外形别致鲜明雪山小镇，许多关于特罗姆瑟的明信片都是在此拍摄。

attractions.text_en: Located in the city center across from the cross-sea bridge, the snow-mountain-shaped Arctic Cathedral, built in 1965, is a landmark structure of Tromsø. The cathedral is a modern-feeling church designed to organically combine Tromsø's winter and the northern lights. At the rear of the cathedral, between the largest stained-glass window in Northern Europe — 12 meters high and weighing 6 tons — stands Jesus with arms outstretched. The beautiful light radiating from its weighty, deep solemnity is soul-stirring. If you happen upon a concert at the Arctic Cathedral, quietly appreciating it before the beautiful stained glass will be a very special experience.
attractions.text_zh: 位于市中心跨海大桥对面的，建于1965年雪山造型的极地教堂是特罗姆瑟的标志建筑。教堂将特罗姆瑟的冬天和极光有机结合而设计的具有现代感的教堂，其中教堂后部高12米重6吨的北欧大的彩色玻璃窗之间是张开双臂站立的耶稣，那重厚沉稳散发出的美丽光芒令人心魄，如遇北极海大教堂音乐会，在美丽的彩绘玻璃前静静欣赏将是一种很特别的体验。

attractions.name_en: Gateway to the Arctic (Porten til Ishavet)
attractions.name_zh: 北极之门 Porten til Ishavet
attractions.text_en: The Gateway to the Arctic sits beside the Arctic Cathedral and the Tromsø Bridge, facing the sea, symbolizing the gateway to the Arctic waters. Its design draws inspiration from the northern lights and the culture of the local Sami people. Through this enormous, colorful mosaic installation-art structure, you can perfectly photograph the Tromsø Bridge and the famous Arctic Cathedral in the background through the arch, making it a newly emerged landmark structure of Tromsø.
attractions.text_zh: 北极之门坐落在北极大教堂及特罗姆瑟大桥旁，面向大海，象征着通往北极海域的门户。 其设计灵感来自于北极光和当地萨米人的文化，这个巨大的彩色斑斓的马赛克装置艺术建筑物，可以透过拱门完美地拍摄到背景中的特罗姆瑟大桥和著名的北极大教堂，成为新晋特罗姆瑟地标建筑。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lac Léman, straddles Switzerland and France and is an important lake of Western Europe, as well as a famous scenic area and health resort. During the day you can take a pleasure boat to tour Lake Geneva, and at night you can be enchanted by the twinkling neon lights along the shore, while luxury cruise ships often host concerts or dances on the lake. You can take a pleasure boat to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shores of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, the snow-capped mountains and the blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Grand Fountain is located on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden and is one of the more representative sights of Geneva. The Grand Fountain resembles a column of water spouted by a whale, standing 140 meters high with a water output of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away in the city center. At night there is also a chance to see the Grand Fountain illuminated by lights, which is even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦比较具有代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous attraction in Geneva. Switzerland is known as the "Garden Country" and also as the "Land of Watches and Clocks," and what is even more wonderful is that Switzerland's skilled craftsmen have marvelously combined the beauty of flowers with the craftsmanship of watchmaking, ingeniously creating the "Flower Clock."
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称“花园之国”，同时又是“钟表之乡”，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了“花钟”。

attractions.text_en: The upper town district on the hillside on the right bank of the Rhône is also called the upper town by the local residents because of its higher elevation. This place is not only a gathering place of churches and historic sites, but also has many small and lovely antique shops scattered among the winding alleys; the former residence of Rousseau, the thinker of the European Enlightenment era, is also located within the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is the green square in the center of Interlaken, Switzerland's famous tourist town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery, and now the construction of any buildings on it is forbidden to prevent damage to this beautiful landscape. This is one of the best places to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast green there is a fountain, and it is also dotted with many garden chairs, so it is a great place for a stroll. Höhematte is also a landing site for hang gliders; there is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, and after paying, staff will take visitors to the nearby mountains for free gliding, where you can enjoy the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the sky.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is home to the famous postcard photography spot of Switzerland's "dream hillside" beloved by photographers, and is also an Alpine town that must be passed through when visiting the Jungfrau. Together with First, Jungfrau, Wengen and others, it forms the more magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeside, green grass, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow-capped mountains together make up this enchanting town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头较为喜爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald First attracts visitors from all directions to come and admire the magnificent scenery of the north face of the Eiger. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk by Tissot, anyone will immediately feel as if they are standing at the top of the world. The Cliff Walk by Tissot is located at the summit of First, where you can take in the unique panorama of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located about twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow all year round, while at the foot of the mountain the grass is lush and the scenery is beautiful, making it a well-known sightseeing and outdoor sports resort in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: Situated between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Line train passes through here. Surrounded by mountains and covered with green grass, the simple and rustic village is scattered along the shores of Lake Lungern, just like a paradise far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en:
Lake Lucerne
This lake is winding in shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms the classic scenery of "lake and mountain views," attracting large numbers of tourists to come sightseeing. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "14th Piano Sonata" as the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and so this piece acquired the title "Moonlight"—although this was not Beethoven's original intention.
attractions.text_zh:
卢塞恩湖
这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled against the mountains and beside the water, Lucerne possesses the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance-era halls and mansions, as well as century-old shops and long streets and ancient lanes can be seen everywhere. The lake and mountain views of Lake Lucerne reflect the city's beautiful scenery in a dreamlike and yet real way, making it that extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small towns. From the 19th century onward, it has attracted numerous princes, nobles and literary figures to come and visit and reside, and artists have gained endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: This dying lion sculpture was carved into the natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies on the ground in agony, with a broken spear stuck in its shoulder and beside it a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms. This sculpture was made to commemorate the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on August 10, 1792, to protect the safety of the Louis XVI family in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; beneath the sculpture there is text describing the course of this event. In those years, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, forced by livelihood, went one after another to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave and skilled in battle, but honor and money could not cover up the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, retaining only the Guard serving the Catholic Holy See, which is the famous Swiss Guard. Owing to their famous loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served right up to the present. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long; the docks on the lake are filled with all kinds of yachts, just like a club for the rich. One end of Lake Zurich extends deep into the city center, and on the lake surface white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere, leisurely and carefree, a scene of harmony. The north shore of Lake Zurich is the residential area of the rich, known as the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." At the end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich; as a "livable city of the world," the lives of true Zurichers are imbued everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also known as Station Street) is one of Europe's longer shopping avenues and also one of the world's most expensive shopping avenues; more precisely, it is not only the truly priceless center of Zurich—luxury brands from all over the world are everywhere here, and private banks stand in rows. Walking on Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless tourists will feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored quantities of gold bars said to rank among the world's foremost, which makes many people too excited to move their feet; being there, you can clearly feel the air permeated with the atmosphere of wealth, opulence and indolence.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: The Grossmünster is one of the three main churches in Zurich, Switzerland (the other two being the Fraumünster and another). The church is located near the bank of the Limmat River, with construction begun around 1100 and inaugurated around 1220. This church, facing the Fraumünster across the river, played a pivotal role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation; the Theological Faculty of the University of Zurich and the Reformation Museum are both established here. The stained glass inside the church is a masterpiece of the modern Swiss art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, although most tourists who come here are sightseeing. Under the central arcade there is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan, and especially its window displays are updated daily, so even just standing outside the windows to admire them is a great pleasure. The Emanuele gallery is filled with quite a few high-end restaurants, cafés and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete, and is hailed as a magnificent Gothic building of Italy, with hundreds of spires soaring into the clouds and thousands of statues carved on its white marble exterior walls. The interior space is vast, and sunlight enters through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, with the light hazy and full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the church's crypt the remains of the Church of St. Tecla that stood on the original site are also preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Abbreviated as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. It was first built in 829 AD and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071; it was once the great church of medieval Europe, a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and at the same time it is a treasure house with a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco; Venice's past glory is all here. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons; on the way to the dungeon you walk across the Bridge of Sighs, and you can look out through small holes, rather than having so many people on the bridge opposite looking toward you at the Bridge of Sighs. Inside you are allowed to take photos, as long as you do not use flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route that had to be taken when escorting condemned prisoners from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is of an early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, with the upper part covered by a vault, sealed very tightly, with only two small windows facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and when passing this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows; from then on they lost their freedom, and involuntarily let out sounds of sighing. It is said that if lovers kiss under the bridge they can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, and on the east side stand the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Church. Since ancient times, it has been the center for public activities of Venetian politics, religion and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few can be so charming. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets to the fullest the classical, elegant and free qualities esteemed in the Renaissance era—no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries; on the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open-style Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and numerous cafés and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also called the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier large-span circular-arch bridges; it is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here and later poured his feelings of longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over the centuries, it has stood unfallen through floods, social upheavals and wars. It is one of Florence's famous landmark structures.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and the frescoes and sculptures inside are worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are several cafés and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for holding all kinds of cultural events and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract numerous audiences. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline; it is the collective name for these five cliff-side villages and towns: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking route that strings the five villages together, built along the coast, which is one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 kilometers and requiring about 5 hours; on one side is the Mediterranean and on the other are the mountains, while ahead are the Italian fishing villages, making it a resort that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of the city of Pisa, Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Province of Tuscany; it is a world-famous landmark and one of Italy's symbols, and was selected as a World Heritage Site by the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization. It is said that in 1590 AD, Galileo once performed a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly lawn. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa; on the square there are four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (cemetery). Around the square ancient city walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa in Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval ancient city is full of masterpieces by art masters and medieval classical architecture; shuttling through Siena's ancient and crisscrossing stone-slab alleys and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you seem to find yourself in the European Middle Ages a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. For several centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the 14th century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties—almond soft cakes ricciarelli, nut tarts panforte, peppered spiced nut cakes pan pepato, rice puddings budini di riso, walnut cookies cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena, and is one of the larger surviving medieval squares in Europe; directly opposite the square are Siena's town hall and tower. Inside the town hall is the Civic Museum, which houses numerous paintings of the Sienese School, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is the Torre del Mangia; it is the tallest building in Siena and the second tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height reaching 102 meters, and visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of stairs to take in the beautiful scenery of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳较高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: The Torre del Mangia is right next to the town hall and is the tallest medieval tower in Italy. In the mid-14th century, the outbreak of the Black Death in the city claimed nearly two-thirds of the population and dealt a huge blow to the city's development. After the disaster, the survivors added a marble loggia to the tower to commemorate the Virgin Mary. Inside the tower there are a total of 332 narrow steps, by which you can climb to the top to take in the scenery of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 曼吉亚塔楼紧邻市政厅，是意大利中世纪较高的塔楼。14世纪中期，城内黑死病的爆发夺走了近2/3的人口，也使城市发展受到巨大打击。灾难过后，幸存者们为塔楼加上一个大理石的凉廊，以此来纪念圣母玛利亚。楼内共有332级狭窄的台阶，可以攀登到顶，一览锡耶纳风光。

attractions.text_en: Pienza is a municipality in the Province of Siena in the Tuscany region of central Italy, adjacent to Montalcino; it is one of the earliest ideal towns of the Renaissance period, founded by the Roman Pope Pius II, with the purpose at the time of founding being to renovate his poor hometown and use it as the summer retreat of the Roman Pope. In 1996, it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List. The architecture here is in the Gothic style and influenced by the German style. The main square of the town is Piazza Pio II, which contains the major 15th-century buildings, such as the church (built 1459-1462), the Piccolomini Palace, the Bishop's Palace, and the town hall with the crenellated tower (built 1462).
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎（Pienza）是意大利中部托斯卡纳大区锡耶纳省的一个市镇，毗邻蒙塔尔奇诺，它是文艺复兴时期最早的理想小镇，由罗马教皇PiusII创立，当时创立的目的是为了翻新给他贫穷的家乡并把此作为罗马教皇的避暑地。1996年，被列入联合国世界遗产名录。这里的建筑呈哥特风，并受德式风格的影响。小镇的主要广场是PiazzaPioII，广场里包含15世纪的主要建筑，如教堂（建于1459-1462）、皮科洛米尼宫（PiccolominiPalace、主教宫、带有锯齿形塔的大会堂（建于1462）。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of the Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast mottled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and check in.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns; it is a unique convergence of art and nature, holding rich historical imprints, and its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the concept of "good government" of the Italian city-states.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

attractions.text_en: The magnificent Colosseum, located in the center of Rome, was built by the ancient Romans to please generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was the place where slave masters, nobles and freemen exclusively watched beast fights or gladiatorial combat between slaves, and is one of Rome's more famous historical relics. As a masterpiece and marvel in the history of architecture, the Colosseum is renowned throughout the world for being massive, majestic and spectacular. Although only the greater part of its skeleton remains, its grand spirit and magnificent momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马较著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, Roman kings Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, among others, rest here in eternal repose. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period and a model of the exquisite architectural technology of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza di Spagna once appeared in a scene from the film "Roman Holiday" and has become a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and lovely figure seems to have merged into one with the Piazza di Spagna and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never erase. The whole Piazza di Spagna is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The entire flight of steps has 138 steps in total, and is one of the wider staircases in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲较宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Fountain," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology, with an overall majestic and grand momentum. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dreams will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

attractions.text_en: Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is renowned for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns. This is a unique meeting of art and nature, holding rich historical imprints. Its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the Italian city-states' ideal of "good governance."
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscany's pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast mottled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and take pictures.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a small town located on the hills of the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. The Pienza he oversaw rebuilding in 1459 is regarded as a model of the "ideal city," and it is thus praised as "the touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, Pienza's uniqueness lies in the fact that from the city walls one can overlook the scenery of the World Heritage site "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old city, is filled with the masterpieces of great artists and classical medieval architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient and crisscrossing cobblestone alleys and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you have stepped into medieval Europe of a thousand years ago, and every detail brings you surprises. Over the centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the fourteenth century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also preserves a series of traditions, including the making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties - almond soft cakes ricciarelli, nut tart panforte, peppery spiced nut cake pan pepato, rice pudding budini di riso, walnut cookies cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly opposite the square are the Siena Town Hall and tower; inside the Town Hall is the Civic Museum, which houses numerous paintings of the Sienese School, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is Torre del Mangia; it is the tallest building in Siena and the second tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of stairs and take in the beautiful views of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存至大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳至高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of Pisa, Italy. Located on the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) on the north side of Pisa in the province of Tuscany, Italy, it is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, and has been designated a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. It is said that in the year 1590 AD, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment from the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's viewpoint.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Piazza del Duomo (Cathedral Square), it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, part of which is lawn.
