The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and the square holds four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (cemetery). Around the square the ancient city walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, ICOMOS (the International Council on Monuments and Sites) nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa, and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five cliffside villages and towns: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together: built along the coast, it is one of the world's beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers and requiring around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other side are the mountains, and ahead are Italian fishing villages, making it a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: The Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is the indisputable symbol of Florence, its iconic red dome dominating the city skyline. The most stunning aspect of this architectural marvel is observing its facade up close - the geometric patterns formed by white, green, and pink marble are like a giant parquet carpet, with every piece of stone precisely calculated. Especially when the sunlight shines at an angle, the green serpentine stone takes on an emerald-like luster, transitioning gently with the pink marble, making it the most magnificent "stone embroidery" of the Renaissance.
attractions.text_zh: 圣母百花大教堂是佛罗伦萨无可争议的象征，其标志性的红色穹顶主宰着城市天际线。这座建筑奇迹最震撼之处在于近距离观察其外立面——白、绿、粉三色大理石组成的几何图案如同巨型拼花地毯，每一块石料都经过精密计算。尤其当阳光斜照时，绿色蛇纹石会泛出翡翠般的光泽，与粉色大理石温柔过渡，堪称文艺复兴时期最华丽的"石头刺绣"。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also called the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earlier long-span segmental arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the young maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over the centuries, it has withstood floods, social unrest, and wars while standing firm. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi (Mercenaries' Loggia), and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are many cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural activities and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract numerous audiences. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, experiencing Florence's unique atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

attractions.text_en: Known as St. Mark's Basilica for short, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once the great church of medieval Europe and is a classic work of Venetian architectural art. At the same time it is also a treasure house with a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco; all of Venice's past glory is here. Inside, there is not only frescoes and the like to see, but also medieval weapons. When going to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through a small hole, rather than having so many people on the bridge opposite looking over at you at the Bridge of Sighs. You can take photos inside, as long as you don't use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was, in ancient times, the route that had to be taken when escorting condemned prisoners from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is of an early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered by a dome on top and sealed very tightly, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the serious offender was taken to the dungeon, and when passing through this airtight bridge, could only look at the blue sky through the small window. From then on losing their freedom, they would involuntarily let out a sound of sighing. It is said that if lovers kiss under the bridge they can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: This is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." Three sides of the square are surrounded by magnificent and splendid palaces, and on the east side stand the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the center of public activity for Venice's political, religious, and traditional festival life.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lac Léman, straddles Switzerland and France. It is a major lake of Western Europe and a renowned scenic and health-resort area. By day you can take a pleasure boat to tour Lake Geneva, and by night you can lose yourself in the shimmering neon lights along the shore, while luxury cruise ships frequently host concerts or dance parties on the water. You can take a boat to appreciate the beauty of the shores of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, the snow-capped mountains, and the blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Upper Town, set on the hillside on the right bank of the Rhône, is also called the Upper Town by local residents because of its higher elevation. Not only is it a gathering place for churches and historic sites, but among its winding little alleys there are also many small, charming antique shops. The former residence of Rousseau, the thinker of the European Enlightenment, is also located within the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

attractions.text_en:
Geneva Water Fountain
The great fountain sits on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden, and is one of Geneva's most iconic sights. The great fountain resembles a column of water spouted by a whale, standing 140 meters high with a discharge of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away in the city center. At night you may also have the chance to see the great fountain illuminated by lights, which is even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh:
日内瓦喷泉
大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦最具代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en:
Flower Clock
The Flower Clock is located by the shore of Lake Geneva, on the west side of the English Garden. The combination of flowers and clockwork showcases Geneva's renowned reputation as the "capital of watchmaking," and for this reason it has become a symbol of Geneva. Although flower clocks can also be seen in other Swiss cities, Geneva's Flower Clock is the true progenitor of all flower clocks.
attractions.text_zh:
花钟
花钟坐落在日内瓦湖畔、英国花园的西边。鲜花与钟表的结合使得它彰显出了日内瓦“钟表之都”的美名，也因此成为了日内瓦的一个象征。虽然在瑞士的其他城市也能见到花钟的身影，但是日内瓦的花钟才是真正的花钟始祖。

attractions.text_en: Set in the Bernese Highlands, Lake Thun has deep-blue waters and is known as "the right eye of God." Lingering by the shores of Lake Thun, you see the beautiful villages before you, the solemn castle, and the Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau peaks gradually emerging at the far end of the lake. Your gaze shifts between telephoto and wide angle, freezing every frame of picturesque scenery in your heart.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落于伯尔尼高地上的图恩湖，拥有深蓝色的湖水，被称之为“上帝的右眼”。驻足于图恩湖畔，眼前的美丽村落，庄严的城堡，湖畔尽头的慢慢浮现的艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰，视线在长焦与广角之间切换，在心中定格每一帧如画风景。

attractions.text_en: At the northern foot of the Alps, Lake Brienz has waters that are blue tinged with green—called the Tiffany high-grade blue waters—and enjoys the reputation of being "the left eye of God." Lake Brienz has the purest waters in Switzerland. The book Around the Globe (Switzerland) describes it thus: "An extraordinarily charming, tranquil village, with characterful street architecture, azure lake waters, a mysterious lake, dense forests, an adorable steam locomotive, and a panorama of the Alps—the various charms of Switzerland are concentrated here."
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔卑斯山北麓的布里恩茨湖，湖水蓝中带绿，被称为Tiffany高级蓝的湖水，有着“上帝的左眼”的美誉。布里恩茨湖是瑞士最为纯净的湖水，《走遍全球（瑞士）》书上这么描述：“一个极富风情的恬静村子，富有情趣的街道建筑、蔚蓝色的湖水、神秘的湖泊、茂密的森林、可爱的蒸汽机车和阿尔卑斯全景图，瑞士的各种魅力在这里浓缩。

attractions.text_en: In German, "Bern" means "bear," and the bear is the emblem of Bern, which is therefore also fondly called "the bear city." The old town of Bern, first built in the 12th century, is not only gentle, serene, and exceedingly beautiful, but also full of unique little touches: more than 100 fountains in various forms, arcaded walkways, soaring towers, the Bear Pit where bears appear... and the ingeniously designed astronomical calendar clock. On every hour the bell sounds, the golden rooster atop the clock cranes its neck and crows, a troop of little figures emerges in response, and finally the topmost figure strikes the bronze bell—a series of performances that is especially delightful.
attractions.text_zh: 伯尔尼在德语中即是“熊”的意思，“熊”就是伯尔尼的代表，故而也有“熊城”的美誉。始建于12世纪的伯尔尼老城，不但温润静谧、风景极美，而且城中还有很多独特的小巧思：100多处形式各异的喷泉，带拱廊的走道，高耸的塔楼，熊出没的熊苑......还有设计精巧的天文日历钟，每逢整点敲响钟声，钟上的金鸡引颈长鸣，一群小人应声而出，最后，最上面的小人将铜铃敲响，一系列的表演格外有趣。

attractions.text_en: This clock tower was originally part of the western city gate; its current appearance is the form rebuilt after a fire in the 15th century. On the clock tower is a set of multifunctional astronomical clocks which, besides displaying the time, the seasons, and the astronomical phenomena, also put on a wonderful puppet time-telling show about 4 minutes before every hour.
attractions.text_zh: 这座钟楼原本是西城门的一部分，目前大家所看到的外观，是15世纪火灾之后重建的模样。钟楼上有一组多功能的天文钟，除了显示时间、季节、星象之外，每逢整点前4分钟左右，还会有精彩的玩偶报时秀。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau lies some twenty to thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an elevation of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. Its summit is covered in ice and snow all year round, while at its foot the grass is verdant and the scenery beautiful—a famous Swiss destination for sightseeing and outdoor sports. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Aletsch region has been inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage List. Also known as the "Great Aletsch Glacier," the ice here weighs over 1.1 billion tons and is the famous, spectacular glacial landscape of the Alps. The glacier extends from the northern slopes of the Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau toward the canton of Valais, and the glacial meltwater flows through the pristine Massa Gorge into the Rhône. Because of this, all kinds of rare plants grow in the region, which is also the habitat of many rare animals, and an excellent place for activities such as hiking and skiing—its magnificent scenery is difficult to put into words.
attractions.text_zh: 阿莱奇(Aletsch)地区已被联合国教科文组织列入世界遗产名录，又称为“大阿莱奇冰川”，这里冰重超过11亿吨，是阿尔卑斯山脉著名壮观的冰川地貌。冰川从艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰的北坡向瓦莱州延伸，冰川融水通过原始的马萨峡谷(Massa Gorge)流入罗纳河，因而该地区生长着各种珍稀植物，是许许多多珍稀动物的栖息地，也是徒步和滑雪等项目的绝佳地点，壮丽的风景难以用语言描述。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is home to the famous postcard photography spot of the Swiss "dreamy hillside" that is a favorite of photographers, and is also the Alpine town one must pass through to visit the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen, Lauterbrunnen, and others, it forms the most magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing destination, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeside, green grassy meadows, waterfalls, dairy cows, and snow-capped mountains together make this an enchanting town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头最爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、劳特布伦嫩（Lauterbrunnen）等一起组成了少女峰地区最为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Lauterbrunnen lies on the western side of the Jungfrau region. More than 70 waterfalls and streams cascade down from the cliffs, so the literal translation of Lauterbrunnen from German is "many springs"—this town is a veritable town of waterfalls. Among them, the Staubbach Falls is the village's iconic sight, which the poets Goethe and Wordsworth wrote verses to praise. In addition, there are the Mürren Falls and the Trümmelbach Falls, which surge down from a cave ten stories high—not to be missed. From Lauterbrunnen you can take the WAB railway to reach Wengen, Kleine Scheidegg, the Jungfrau, and other places. At the same time, by taking the cable car via Mürren you can reach the Schilthorn and other places, and feast your eyes on the majestic scenery of the Bernese Highlands.
attractions.text_zh: 劳特布龙嫩(Lauterbrunnen)位于少女峰地区的西面，从山崖上落下来70多个瀑布和小河，所以劳特布龙嫩的德语直译是很多的泉水，这个小镇是名副其实的瀑布镇。其中施陶河瀑布是村子的标志性景观，诗人歌德和伍德·沃斯曾写诗来赞美它。此外还有米伦瀑布和从十层楼高的山洞里飞奔而下的特吕默尔河瀑布，也不可错过。从劳特布龙嫩出发可以乘WAB铁路到达翁根、克莱纳谢德格、少女峰等地。同时，乘坐缆车经米伦，可到达雪朗峰等地，饱览伯尔尼高地的雄伟风光。

attractions.text_en: Kleine Scheidegg lies between the Eiger and the Lauberhorn in the Bernese Highlands of Switzerland. The name means "little watershed," but in reality Kleine Scheidegg is actually higher than the nearby Grosse Scheidegg. In winter, Kleine Scheidegg is the center of the skiing area around Grindelwald and Wengen, and in summer it is one of the most popular hiking routes in the Alps. At the same time, Kleine Scheidegg is also the starting point of the Jungfrau Railway, and trains to and from the Jungfrau must transfer at Kleine Scheidegg.
attractions.text_zh: 小夏戴克位于瑞士伯恩高地的艾格峰和劳伯角峰（Lauberhorn）之间，这个名字的意思是“小分水岭”，但实际上小夏戴克比附近的大戴夏克（Grosse Scheidegg）还来的高。小夏戴克冬季是格林德尔瓦尔德和稳根周围滑雪区域的中心，夏季是阿尔卑斯山最受欢迎的徒步路线。同时，小夏戴克也是少女峰铁路的起点，往返于少女峰的列车必须在小夏戴客换乘。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne (Luzern) means "city of lights" in German. Legend has it that a lantern-bearing angel guided Lucerne's earliest settlers to choose the location of the church. Lucerne was originally just a small fishing village, but because it is set by a beautifully scenic lake, embraced by legend-filled mountains, and complemented by the medieval water tower and the Chapel Bridge (also called the Kapellbrücke, or Mill Bridge) that have stood for centuries in the river by the lake, it radiates a charm unique to Switzerland. From the 13th to the 19th century, Lucerne, as the main gateway in and out of the Alps, accumulated considerable wealth. Later, its medieval old town and the surrounding beautiful scenery became one of Switzerland's major tourist attractions.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩（Luzern）在德语中是光明之城之意（cityoflights），传说一位掌灯天使指引卢塞恩最早的定居者选定了教堂的位置。卢塞恩原本只是一座小渔村，但因座落在风景优美的湖边，被充满传奇色彩的群山环抱，与那在湖畔河中站立了数百年的中世纪水塔与教堂桥（又名卡贝尔桥，磨房桥）交相辉映，散发着瑞士特有的魅力。13至19世纪期间，卢塞恩作为进出阿尔卑斯山的主要门户，累积了相当的财富。而后，她的中世纪老城与周边的美景更成为了瑞士的主要旅游景点之一。

attractions.text_en: Zurich Cathedral, also called the twin-towered church. This abbey church was first built around 1100; its architectural style is famous for its Romanesque twin towers, which serve as a landmark of Zurich. This church, which faces the Fraumünster across the river, played a pivotal role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation, and the Faculty of Theology of the University of Zurich and the Museum of the Reformation are both established here. The stained-glass windows inside the church are the masterpieces of Giacometti, the master of Swiss modern art.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂，又称为双塔教堂。这座修道院教堂始建于1100年前后，其建筑风格以罗曼式的双塔闻名，并以此作为苏黎世的地标。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

attractions.text_en: The Limmat River is drawn from the northern end of Lake Zurich, then flows through the center of Zurich, and continues northwest for 35 kilometers before finally emptying into the Aare. Walking along the Limmat, watching the slowly flowing river water, is yet another quiet and peaceful day—this is probably the feeling of life being serene and good. The swans in the river inadvertently wander into travelers' photos, adding a touch of liveliness and playfulness to this calm river.
attractions.text_zh: 利马特河从苏黎世湖北端引出，然后流经苏黎世市中心，再向西北方流35公里，最后注入阿勒河（Aare）。行走在利马特河边，看着缓慢流动的河水，又是静谧而祥和的一天，这大概就是岁月静好的感觉，河里天鹅在游人拍照时不经意的闯入，又为这平静的河水增添一丝灵动和跳脱之感。

attractions.text_en: Situated between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Express passes through here. It has the purest alpine lake waters in Switzerland, embraced by mountains amid verdant green grass, with a quaint village scattered along the shores of Lake Lungern—truly a Shangri-la far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处琉森与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里拥有瑞士最为纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Lindenhof means "the courtyard of the linden trees." The park sits on a small hill covered with linden trees in the center of Zurich's old town. Before you is the Limmat River, making it an ideal place to admire Zurich Cathedral and the scenery of the right bank.
attractions.text_zh: 林登霍夫(Lindenhof)，意思为菩提树的中庭，公园坐落于苏黎世老城中心一片被菩提树覆盖的小山丘上。眼前就是利马特河，是欣赏苏黎世大教堂和右岸风光的理想之地。

attractions.text_en: Take a boat to tour Lake Lucerne; the Alpine region of central Switzerland can also be explored by waterway, enjoying the perfect fusion of lake-and-mountain scenery with magnificent peaks. (This product is included only from November to March each year, as a substitute for the Interlaken cruise during its maintenance season.)
attractions.text_zh: 乘船游览琉森湖，连通瑞士中部的阿尔卑斯山区也可以通过水路探索，乐享湖光山色与壮丽山峦的完美融合。（此产品仅每年11月到3月份包含，作为因特拉肯游船维修季的替代项目）

attractions.text_en:
Zurich's old town is a not-to-be-missed place to experience. Here gather traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookstores and flower shops, as well as jewelry and accessories, fashion boutiques, and of course Zurich's own local brands. Famous streets and lanes such as Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg, Niederdorf, and Augustine
Lane are all located in the old town.
attractions.text_zh:
苏黎世的老城区是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰，时尚精品，当然也少不了苏黎世本土品牌。班霍夫大街(Bahnhofstrasse)、伦韦格街(Rennweg)、尼德道尔夫(Niederdorf)与圣奥古斯丁巷(Augustine
Lane)等著名街巷都位于老城区。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. The piers on the lake are packed with yachts of all kinds, looking just like a club for the rich. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center, and white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere on the water, leisurely and at ease—a scene of complete harmony. The northern shore of Lake Zurich is where the rich live, dubbed the "Gold Coast," while the southern shore is called the "Silver Coast." The end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich; as one of the "world's most livable cities," the life of true Zurichers is everywhere imbued with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Milan, the northern Italian city that combines classical elegance with modern vitality, and visit Sforza Castle (exterior); then tour the Gothic masterpiece, Milan Cathedral, and stroll through the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon, head to Lake Garda to enjoy the lake and mountain scenery at the foot of the Alps, then proceed to Trento to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往兼具古典气质与现代活力的北意名城米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观）；随后游览哥特式杰作米兰大教堂，漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊，下午前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色，之后前往特伦托入住酒店。
夜宿：NH特伦托酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in Trento's ultra-modern Le Albere science and culture district, and is a green hotel that combines sustainability concepts with design sensibility. Designed by the Italian master architect Renzo Piano, the hotel features not only simple and elegant exterior lines but also uses eco-friendly materials and energy-saving systems internally, reflecting a dual respect for nature and the city. Just a few steps from the hotel is Trento's MUSE Science Museum. Walking along the Adige River, you can also easily reach Trento's old town to explore the magnificent Trento Cathedral and the charming medieval alleys. The surrounding dining options are abundant: you can go to a Michelin-recommended restaurant to taste creative northern Italian cuisine, or enjoy authentic Trento-flavored delicacies at local restaurants.
accommodation.text_zh: NH特伦托酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店坐落在特伦托现代感十足的阿尔达通科学文化区（Le Albere），是一家兼具可持续理念与设计感的绿色酒店。酒店由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计，不仅外观线条简约优雅， 内部也 采用环保材料与节能系统 ，体现 了对自然与城市的双重尊重。走出酒店几步之遥就是特伦托科学博物馆MUSE。沿着阿迪杰河散步，还能轻松抵达特伦托老城区，探索宏伟的特伦托大教堂和迷人的中世纪街巷。 周边美食选择丰富，既可前往米其林推荐餐厅品尝创意北意料理，也能在本地餐厅享用地道特伦托风味佳肴。

highlights.text_en:
Lake Garda (Lago di Garda), spanning the three regions of Lombardy, Veneto, and Trentino-Alto Adige, is a cherished holiday retreat treasured by the Italian people.
It is like a gentle and crystal-clear sapphire at the foot of the Alps, its waters reflecting the distant mountains and cloud shadows, with a mild and pleasant climate that blends lake-and-mountain scenery with the languid romance of southern Europe. Scattered along the lakeshore are ancient towns each with their own distinctive character, hiding historical relics steeped in the passage of time and authentic local flavors. You can stroll leisurely along the lakeside, where every step reveals a poetic scene, and every bay and stretch of water is full of tenderness.
highlights.text_zh:
加尔达湖（Lago di Garda），纵贯伦巴第、威尼托与特伦蒂诺 - 上阿迪杰三大区，是意大利人心头珍藏的度假秘境。
它宛如阿尔卑斯山脚下一颗温润澄澈的蓝宝石，湖水映着远山云影，气候温润舒朗，将湖光山色与南欧慵懒浪漫揉成一体。湖畔散落着风情各异的古老城镇，藏着岁月沉淀的历史遗迹与地道风味，您可在漫步湖边闲游，一步一景皆是诗意，一湾一水尽是温柔。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping arcade, though most visitors who come here are sightseers. Beneath the central arcade is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the finest in Milan; the window displays in particular are refreshed daily, and simply standing outside the windows to admire them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is filled with many upscale restaurants, cafes, and shops. This is a place where history and fashion coexist: century-old establishments stand side by side with top luxury brands, the aroma of coffee interweaves with modern light and shadow, and every step reveals a scene resonating with art and luxury. To stroll through it is to immerse yourself in the most refined poetry of Milanese life.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱二世拱廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。这里是历史与时尚的共生地：百年老店与顶奢品牌比邻而居，咖啡香气与摩登光影交织，一步一景皆是艺术与奢华的共鸣，漫步其间，便是沉浸于米兰最精致的生活诗篇。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, its hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and its white marble exterior walls are carved with thousands of statues. The interior space is vast, with sunlight filtering through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, creating a hazy light filled with a solemn religious atmosphere. The cathedral crypt also preserves the remains of the Church of Santa Tecla that stood on the original site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: Sforza Castle is one of Milan's most important buildings and a witness to Milan's turbulent history. Viewed from above, the whole castle resembles a grand duchy, with high walls on four sides and an exquisitely planned park. Built in the 14th century by Count Sforza as a castle, it later became the residence of the Sforza family, witnessing the entire process from the family's heyday to its decline. The castle has now been turned into a museum by the Milan municipal government, containing the Museum of Applied Arts and Musical Instruments, the Archaeological Museum, and the Museum of Ancient Art. Its rear gate is the Arch of Peace, which was named after being remodeled by the ruler Francesco.
attractions.text_zh: 斯福尔扎城堡是米兰最重要的建筑之一，是米兰沧桑历史的见证。俯瞰整个城堡像一个大公国，有四面的高墙和精致规划过的公园。在14世纪时由斯福尔扎伯爵作为城堡而建，而后成为斯福尔扎家族的住所，见证了从鼎盛时期到家族衰败的全过程。现城堡被米兰市政府辟为博物馆，其中有应用艺术和乐曲博物馆、考古博物馆、古代艺术博物馆，他的后门是和平门，是统治者费朗西斯科改造得名的。

attractions.text_en: Lake Garda sits between the majestic Alps and the fertile Po Valley. As one of the most beautiful lakes in Europe, surrounded by mountains and small towns, it is not merely a natural wonder. It is also a treasure trove, bringing together charming towns, historical relics, gourmet food, and outdoor activities. Wander along the lakeside, and every casual snapshot turns out to be a masterpiece.
attractions.text_zh: 加尔达湖坐落在雄伟的阿尔卑斯山和肥沃的波河谷之间，这里是欧洲最美的湖泊之一，四周被群山和小镇环绕，不仅仅是自然奇观。它还是一个宝库，汇聚了迷人的城镇、历史遗迹、美食和户外活动。漫游湖边，随手一拍都是大片。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Bolzano and stroll through the streets and alleys of the old town. Then proceed to the town of Ortisei, where you can take the cable car to the summit of Seceda to overlook the Dolomite peaks, or go to the Alpe di Siusi high plateau meadows to enjoy the alpine grassland scenery. After that, head to the Funes Valley; upon arriving at the village of Santa Maddalena, take photos of the exterior of the Church of San Giovanni in Santa Maddalena (the Lonely Church). After the tour, return to the hotel.
Overnight: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note:
Since the Seceda and Alpe di Siusi cable cars are located in the high-altitude alpine area of the Alps, in the event of extreme weather or routine maintenance, operations will be suspended to ensure safety maintenance and inspection. In such cases, the cable car cannot be taken, and the cable car fee will be refunded to the traveler.
overview.text_zh:
上午前往博尔扎诺，漫步 于老城街巷。 随后前往奥蒂塞伊小镇，可乘缆车登顶刀锋山俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群，或前往休斯山高原草甸欣赏高山草原风光。之后前往富内斯山谷，抵达圣马达莱娜村后，外观打卡圣马达莱娜村的圣约翰教堂（孤独教堂），游览结束后返回酒店。
夜宿：NH特伦托酒店 或同等4星级酒店
注意：
由于刀锋山和休斯山缆车位于阿尔卑斯山脉高山区域，如发生极端天气或例行检修，将暂停营运，以保全安全维护和检修。在此情况下，缆车将无法乘坐，缆车费用将退还给游客。

accommodation.text_en: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in Trento's ultra-modern Le Albere science and culture district, and is a green hotel that combines sustainability concepts with design sensibility. Designed by the Italian master architect Renzo Piano, the hotel features not only simple and elegant exterior lines but also uses eco-friendly materials and energy-saving systems internally, reflecting a dual respect for nature and the city. Just a few steps from the hotel is Trento's MUSE Science Museum. Walking along the Adige River, you can also easily reach Trento's old town to explore the magnificent Trento Cathedral and the charming medieval alleys. The surrounding dining options are abundant: you can go to a Michelin-recommended restaurant to taste creative northern Italian cuisine, or enjoy authentic Trento-flavored delicacies at local restaurants.
accommodation.text_zh: NH特伦特酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店坐落在特伦托现代感十足的阿尔达通科学文化区（Le Albere），是一家兼具可持续理念与设计感的绿色酒店。酒店由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计，不仅外观线条简约优雅， 内部也 采用环保材料与节能系统 ，体现 了对自然与城市的双重尊重。走出酒店几步之遥就是特伦托科学博物馆MUSE。沿着阿迪杰河散步，还能轻松抵达特伦托老城区，探索宏伟的特伦托大教堂和迷人的中世纪街巷。 周边美食选择丰富，既可前往米其林推荐餐厅品尝创意北意料理，也能在本地餐厅享用地道特伦托风味佳肴。

highlights.text_en:
Take the Seceda cable car to admire the magnificent jagged mountain scenery
The Seceda cable car quickly takes you up to Seceda, a magnificent peak in the Dolomites, famous for its uniquely sharp ridges and vast alpine meadows. While riding the cable car, breathtaking views of valleys and peaks fill the windows; after reaching the summit, the field of view opens up, and you can overlook the rolling mountains and tranquil villages. Whether hiking in summer or skiing in winter, the natural beauty and pure air of Seceda are unforgettable, making it a paradise for nature lovers.
highlights.text_zh:
乘坐刀锋山（Seceda）缆车，欣赏锯齿状的壮丽山景
刀锋山缆车带你快速登上多洛米蒂山脉中壮丽的山峰-刀锋山，这里以奇特的锐利山脊和广阔的高山草甸闻名。乘坐缆车时，窗外尽是令人屏息的山谷和峰峦景色，抵达山顶后，视野开阔，可以俯瞰连绵起伏的群山和宁静的村庄。无论是夏季徒步还是冬季滑雪，刀锋山的自然美景和纯净空气都让人流连忘返，是大自然爱好者的天堂。

attractions.text_en: The town of Ortisei, this elegant town located in the Val Gardena valley, blends the dual cultural characteristics of Italy and Austria. Its cobblestone streets, traditional wood-carving craftsmanship, and painted houses present travelers with the unique charm of South Tyrol. It is also a renowned center for art and handicrafts in the Dolomites region. After lunch, you may take a short stroll, visit the local craft shops, or enjoy a cup of Alpine-style hot chocolate at an open-air cafe.
attractions.text_zh: 奥蒂塞伊小镇，这座位于加尔代纳山谷（Val Gardena）山谷中的典雅城镇，融合了意大利与奥地利的双重文化特色。其鹅卵石街道、传统木雕工艺和彩绘房舍为旅人呈现出南蒂罗尔独有的风情。这里也是多洛米蒂地区著名的艺术与手工艺中心，不妨在午餐后稍作散步，参观当地的工艺店铺，或是在露天咖啡座享受一杯阿尔卑斯风味的热巧克力。

attractions.text_en: Seceda is one of the most iconic peaks in the Dolomites, with its distinctive jagged ridges and vast plateau scenery that leave one in awe. Taking the cable car from Ortisei directly to the Seceda ridge is one of the best ways to explore the Dolomites. Seceda is famous for its blade-like mountain peak lines and is a paradise for photographers. The summit offers an open field of view, where you can enjoy a short hike or simply quietly admire the vast alpine meadows and the strange rock peaks, experiencing the tranquility and grandeur of nature.
attractions.text_zh: 刀锋山（Seceda） 是多洛米蒂最具标志性的山峰之一，其独特的锯齿状山脊和辽阔的高原风光令人叹为观止。从奥蒂塞伊搭乘缆车直达刀锋山脊，是探索多洛米蒂山的最佳方式之一。刀锋山以其刀锋状的山峰线条闻名，是摄影师的天堂。山顶视野开阔，您可享受简短的徒步或只是静静欣赏辽阔的高山草原与奇岩峰丛，体验自然的宁静与壮观。

attractions.text_en:
The Alpe di Siusi, located between the Val Gardena valley and the Sciliar peak, borders the Sciliar-Catinaccio Nature Park to the west. Although it is called a mountain, it is more like an alpine meadow, undulating like waves, forming a drop of about 300 meters. This area has always been excellent pasture, and paired with the iconic Dolomite rock, it is even more eye-catching. Europe's high-altitude alpine meadow is the Alpe di Siusi plateau in the Italian Dolomites; in spring and summer, it is a sea of flowers, while in winter it is a snow-white skiing paradise. Due to its vast expanse, you can also admire many nearby mountain ranges, such as the Sella group, the Rosengarten group, and Langkofel, among others.
Note: The Alpe di Siusi plateau cable car is an optional experience item that requires a separate ticket purchase; the relevant fee is not included in the itinerary. Please be aware.
attractions.text_zh:
休斯山，位于加尔代纳山谷和施勒恩峰之间，西部与施勒恩峰-卡提纳自然公园接壤。虽然说它是山，却更像是高山草甸，如波浪般起伏，形成300米左右的落差。这一地区一直是优良牧场，搭配上标志性的白云岩，便更加吸引眼球。欧洲的高海拔高山草甸是在意大利多洛米蒂休斯高原，春夏，这里是一片花海；冬天则是白茫茫的滑雪圣地。由于地域广阔，还能欣赏到附近的很多山脉，比如塞拉山组，玫瑰花园闪族和长石山等等。
注意：休斯高原缆车属于可选体验项目，需另行购票，相关费用不包含在行程内，敬请知悉

attractions.text_en: In the heart of the Dolomites in northern Italy — the Funes Valley — the Church of Santa Maddalena stands quietly on a small hillside. With its Gothic Revival gray stone walls and tall square bell tower, free of ostentatious decoration, it forms a naturally harmonious picture together with the surrounding lush green meadows and the rugged Geisler peaks. In the morning, thin mist wraps around the foot of the mountains, and at sunset, the mountains are dyed a gentle gold (Enrosadira, the alpenglow). Here there is no clamor, only the sound of bells and the mountain wind. It is a tranquil haven where hikers rest, and a panoramic spot that photographers are unwilling to miss.
attractions.text_zh: 在意大利北部多洛米蒂的心脏 —— 富内斯山谷，圣玛达莱娜教堂静立在小山坡上。哥特复兴的灰色石墙、挺拔的方形钟楼，没有浮夸的装饰，却与四周的翠绿草甸、嶙峋的盖斯勒峰群构成一幅浑然天成的画卷。清晨的薄雾缠绕山脚，夕阳将山体染成温柔的金色（Enrosadira 日照金山），这里没有喧嚣，只有钟声与山风，是徒步者歇脚的宁静港湾，也是摄影师不愿错过的全景机位。

attractions.name_en: Church of San Giovanni (the Lonely Church) (exterior)
attractions.name_zh: 圣约翰小教堂（孤独教堂）（外观）
attractions.text_en: The Lonely Church of Maddalena in the Dolomites is a small wooden church, located in the Funes Valley in the Italian Alps, with the jagged Geisler peaks behind it. This Baroque-style church was built in 1744 and is surrounded by vast pastures and forests, with scenery that varies through the four seasons: lush green in spring and summer, golden in autumn, and covered in white snow in winter. Owing to its secluded, standalone location and superb mountain backdrop, the church has become a popular spot for photographers, and is also an ideal starting point for hiking and exploring the valley. The nearby town of Santa Maddalena offers convenient transportation and scenic vantage points, allowing visitors to easily admire this iconic landscape of the Dolomites.
attractions.text_zh: 多洛米蒂山脉的马达莱娜孤独教堂是一座小巧的木质教堂，坐落在意大利阿尔卑斯山的富内斯山谷中，背靠锯齿状的盖斯勒峰。这座巴洛克风格的教堂建于1744年，周围是广阔的牧场和森林，四季景色各异，春夏绿意盎然，秋季金黄一片，冬季则被白雪覆盖。教堂因其遗世独立的位置和绝佳的山景背景，成为摄影师的热门取景地，也是徒步探索山谷的理想起点。附近的Santa Maddalena小镇提供便利的交通和观景视角，让游客能轻松欣赏这一多洛米蒂的标志性景观。

attractions.text_en: Bolzano, the capital of Italy's South Tyrol province, is nestled in the embrace of the Alps and blends the cultural characteristics of Italy and Austria. This city is famous for its well-preserved medieval old town, rich historical relics, and beautiful natural scenery. You can stroll through the cobblestone streets of the old town, admire the Gothic and Renaissance-style architecture, and experience the blending of the Italian and German languages. Walther Square in the city center is the heart of the city, surrounded by historic buildings and cafes, making it an ideal place to feel local life.
attractions.text_zh: 博尔扎诺（Bolzano），意大利南蒂罗尔省的首府，位于阿尔卑斯山脉的怀抱中，融合了意大利和奥地利的文化特色。这座城市以其保存完好的中世纪老城区、丰富的历史遗迹和美丽的自然景观而闻名。您可以漫步于老城区的鹅卵石街道，欣赏哥特式和文艺复兴风格的建筑，体验意大利和德国语言的交融。市中心的瓦尔特广场是城市的心脏，周围环绕着历史建筑和咖啡馆，是感受当地生活的理想场所。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for the water city of Venice. Upon arrival, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings constructed on water, together with the winding water lanes, make the romantic charm of Venice linger long in the memory. Here you can also taste the Venetian specialty feast of squid-ink pasta in three courses (at your own expense).
Overnight: voco Venice / Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre San Giuliano or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往水城威尼斯，到达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝到威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
voco Venice / Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre San Giuliano or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels, with an excellent location, stylish modern design, and guest rooms with natural tones and modern interiors, offering you a comfortable and cozy stay. The hotel provides a hearty breakfast, a well-equipped gym, a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails, and the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serving Italian cuisine and gourmet food.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en:
The most beautiful Venice in the world, the "Pearl of the Adriatic," remains dazzling and resplendent
As one of the important centers of the Renaissance, Venice is composed of 118 small islands, connected into one by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It has the names "city on water," "city of a hundred islands," and "city of bridges." Here is one of the most beautiful squares in the world, "St. Mark's Square," the beautiful Grand Canal, the Phoenix Opera House reborn from fire, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs as written by Xu Zhimo, and the breathtakingly beautiful cloisters. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting, and also the filming location of segments of many movies. Her unique temperament makes every visitor intoxicated and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: This is the central square of Venice, once called "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe" by Napoleon. The square is surrounded on three sides by magnificent and majestic palaces, with the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica rising on the east side. Since ancient times, it has been the public activity center for Venice's politics, religion, and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Known simply as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe. It is a classic masterpiece of Venetian architectural art, and at the same time a treasure trove housing a rich collection of works of art.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located in Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside, you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon, you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through a small hole, rather than having so many people on the bridge opposite looking over at you at the Bridge of Sighs. Inside, you are allowed to take photos, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route that condemned prisoners had to take when being escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is of an early Baroque style, shaped like a house, covered with a dome on top, and tightly enclosed, with only two small windows facing the canal side. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the felons were taken to the dungeon, and when passing through this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small window, losing their freedom from then on and involuntarily letting out a sound of sighing. It is said that if lovers kiss beneath the bridge, they can be together forever, and the movie "A Little Romance" was filmed here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance. Visit the attractions of Florence's old town: the world's third-largest cathedral, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, Piazza della Signoria, the Old Bridge, as well as Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), then check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Tuscany Montecatini SPA hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观佛罗伦萨老城景点：世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后入住酒店。
夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Tuscany Montecatini SPA hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel. The hotel is located in Montecatini, Tuscany's famous wellness tourism resort destination. With a unique design and elegantly decorated rooms blending the modern and the classical, it is extremely comfortable and tasteful. The spa area has 2 swimming pools (indoor and outdoor), and the sauna enjoys a unique forest view. The hotel's private park and ring garden are a natural extension of the Terme Tettuccio park, with the same trees, picturesque scenery, hot springs, and a wide variety of flora and fauna, covering 40,000 square meters: as if you were in a corner of a natural paradise. The hotel's NO|MORE Bistrot restaurant changes its menu with the seasons, offering food that is rich and varied in taste.
accommodation.text_zh: 托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店 酒店位于托斯卡纳著名的康养旅游度假地-蒙特卡蒂尼，设计独特，房间装潢典雅，融合了现代与古典，非常舒适和别致。 水疗区设有 2 个泳池（室内和室外），桑拿浴室享有独特的森林景观。酒店的私人公园和环形花园是 Terme Tettuccio 公园的自然延续，同样的树木、如画的景色、温泉、种类繁多的动植物，占地 40,000 平方米：仿佛置身于自然天堂的一隅。酒店的NO|MORE Bistrot 餐厅随季节变化菜单，食物口感丰富多样。

highlights.text_en:
The glory and prosperity of Florence, the shining radiance of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Search for the soul of the Renaissance amid the blue skies and white clouds, the brightly colored walls, the dark green shutters, and the dark red rooftops, and feel the agelessness of the Renaissance among the streets and alleys, the squares and churches, the museums and art galleries. As the writer Chen Yunhe said: "The poetic soul of Dante Alighieri and the artistic soul of Da Vinci still float above the skies of Florence, still continuing to pursue the people and events of the European Renaissance period..."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利·但丁的诗魂、达·芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earlier large-span circular-arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing affection into "The Divine Comedy." Over the centuries, it has experienced floods, social upheavals, and wars yet stood unfallen. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few churches can be so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red, and green granite, interprets to the fullest the classicism, elegance, and freedom championed by the Renaissance era — no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria enjoys the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance period to the present day. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce. This Gothic building is the resting place of Italian luminaries such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and the frescoes and sculptures inside are worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are many cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, allowing you to feel the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off to tour the Cinque Terre, traveling along the Ligurian coastline to visit the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs; in the afternoon, head to Pisa to tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli in Pisa's historical and cultural center, then proceed to the Tuscany region to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Tuscany Montecatini SPA hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel
Note: If, due to factors such as bad weather or a railway company strike, it is impossible to tour the Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically change to touring the coastal cities by coach or other forms.
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场，之后前往托斯卡纳大区入住酒店。
夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en: Tuscany Montecatini SPA hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel. The hotel is located in Montecatini, Tuscany's famous wellness tourism resort destination. With a unique design and elegantly decorated rooms blending the modern and the classical, it is extremely comfortable and tasteful. The spa area has 2 swimming pools (indoor and outdoor), and the sauna enjoys a unique forest view. The hotel's private park and ring garden are a natural extension of the Terme Tettuccio park, with the same trees, picturesque scenery, hot springs, and a wide variety of flora and fauna, covering 40,000 square meters: as if you were in a corner of a natural paradise. The hotel's NO|MORE Bistrot restaurant changes its menu with the seasons, offering food that is rich and varied in taste.
accommodation.text_zh: 托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店 酒店位于托斯卡纳著名的康养旅游度假地-蒙特卡蒂尼，设计独特，房间装潢典雅，融合了现代与古典，非常舒适和别致。 水疗区设有 2 个泳池（室内和室外），桑拿浴室享有独特的森林景观。酒店的私人公园和环形花园是 Terme Tettuccio 公园的自然延续，同样的树木、如画的景色、温泉、种类繁多的动植物，占地 40,000 平方米：仿佛置身于自然天堂的一隅。酒店的NO|MORE Bistrot 餐厅随季节变化菜单，食物口感丰富多样。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a paradise on the cliffs
Along the long coastline of the Mediterranean, the little train stops at each beautiful fishing village. Watching the sunlit beaches, the waves quietly lapping against the rocks, and the colorful houses approaching from far to near, the curiosity to gaze upon the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak the moment you arrive. Hiking through the alleys of the fishing villages, the closer you get, the more surprises there are. It is like carefully savoring a five-colored, delicious visual feast, slowly relishing the flavors within. This sight and scene is so beautiful that it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线小火车在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of Pisa, Italy. Located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, it is a world-famous attraction and one of the symbols of Italy, and has been designated a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. Legend has it that in 1590 AD, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly covered with grass. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square stand four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Camposanto. Around the square, the ancient city walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli in the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa, and the camposanto) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy. Built along the winding Mediterranean coastline, it is the collective name for the five cliffside villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is especially distinctive is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 kilometers long and taking around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other side are the mountains, and ahead are the Italian fishing villages — it is a destination that countless hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997, it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off for the ancient city of Siena to tour attractions such as Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the Siena Town Hall (exterior), and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). After lunch, head to the ancient city of Pienza to visit Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), then proceed to Rome, taking free photos along the way at the cypress path. After arriving in Rome, check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma / Hotel Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Due to the protection of Rome's architecture, vehicles are prohibited from driving, and most areas are pedestrian zones. That day, the tour of Rome's west bank is on foot, with a walking distance of about 5-6 kilometers.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。午餐后前往皮恩扎古城参观游览二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观），之后前往罗马，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后入住酒店。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：由于罗马建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，当天徒步参观罗马西岸，步行行程约为5-6公里。

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma / Hotel Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course, and an outdoor swimming pool. The hotel has cutting-edge architectural style and modern interior design, with rooms furnished in modern or classical decor, and all guest rooms enjoying views of the garden, swimming pool, or golf course. In addition, the hotel has multiple restaurants offering you exquisite international-flavored dishes and traditional Italian cuisine. The hotel environment is tranquil, easily satisfying your varied needs, all of which will make it an ideal choice for relaxing your body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The pastoral beauty of the Val d'Orcia and the medieval ancient town of Pienza
Close your eyes, and you will picture the classic scenery of Tuscany — blue skies and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and grapevines, and finally wheat fields — this is the perfect portrait of the Val d'Orcia. Overlook the scenery of the World Heritage Site "Val d'Orcia" from the city walls of the ancient town of Pienza.
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval ancient city, is filled with masterpieces by art masters and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient and crisscrossing flagstone alleys and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you were in the medieval Europe of a thousand years ago, where every detail will bring you surprises. Over the centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time had stood still here since the 14th century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the culinary preparation of sweets. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties — almond soft cookies ricciarelli, nut tart panforte, peppered spiced nut cake pan pepato, rice pudding budini di riso, walnut cookies cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because it resembles a shell) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly facing the square are the Siena Town Hall and the tower; inside the town hall is the Civic Museum, which houses numerous paintings of the Sienese school, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "The Allegory of Good Government" and "The Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is the Torre del Mangia; it is the tallest building in Siena and the second tallest tower in Italy, reaching a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of steps for a panoramic view of the beautiful scenery of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存至大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳至高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a small town located on the hills of the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. In 1459, the Pienza that he oversaw the rebuilding of was regarded as a model of the "ideal city," and was therefore hailed as the "touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, Pienza's unique feature is that you can overlook the scenery of the World Heritage Site "Val d'Orcia" from the city walls.
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress path, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypress trees, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscany's pastoral scenery. The cypress trees on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows in the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and take photos.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, led by the guide, take a walking tour of Rome, the world-famous historical and cultural city. This is the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, and because of its long history is called the "Eternal City." Visit the Colosseum (exterior) standing on the site of the ancient Roman capital, and the Pantheon (included); tour the Spanish Steps square and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Then conclude the pleasant journey.
Note: Due to the protection of the ancient city architecture of Rome, vehicles are prohibited from driving, and most areas are pedestrian zones. All the attractions in Rome's city area are within the ancient Roman city, so that day the tour of Rome is on foot, with a walking distance of about 5-6 kilometers.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，在导游的带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（包含），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。随后结束愉旅程。
备注： 由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，而罗马市区内的所有景点都在古罗马城内，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。

accommodation.text_en: No hotel accommodation that day
accommodation.text_zh: 当天无酒店住宿

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth visit to Rome, an important birthplace of world culture
Among the ancient relics that occupy about half the area of the city, search for the historical civilization that has accumulated over thousands of years. Whether it is the world-famous architectural ruins composed of the Imperial Senate, triumphal arches, commemorative columns, the Pantheon, and the great Colosseum, or the numerous exquisite Renaissance-era buildings and art treasures housed in over a hundred museums, or even the city's many fountains of myriad postures represented by the Trevi Fountain, as well as the vast roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares, public baths, and other public buildings — all of these freeze art in a wonderful moment. Someone once said "architecture is flowing music"; if so, then the architecture of ancient Rome plays a grand and timeless movement.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的就是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum located in the center of Rome was built by the ancient Romans at the time to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great ancient Roman Empire. It was the place exclusively for slave owners, nobles, and freemen to watch beast-fighting or gladiatorial combat between slaves, and is one of Rome's most famous historical relics. The Colosseum is a model masterpiece and marvel in architectural history, renowned the world over for being immense, majestic, and spectacular. Although only most of its skeleton remains, its majestic momentum and magnificent grandeur still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马较著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en:
The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman emperors Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, among others, rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, the son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, and is a model of the exquisite architectural techniques of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
Note: Since the Pantheon is a religious site, if you need to enter to visit, please observe the rules: clothing cannot expose the shoulders or back; shorts and short skirts are not allowed (they must cover past the knees); and you may not bring food or drink inside.
attractions.text_zh:
万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。
提示：因万神殿属于宗教场所，如果您需入内参观请遵守例：着装不能露肩、露背 短裤、短裙不行（必须 盖过膝盖 ），不可携带饮食进入。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes of the movie "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Hepburn's fresh and beautiful figure seems to have merged into one with the Spanish Square and the beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. The Spanish Steps — the whole Spanish Square is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The whole staircase has 138 steps in total, and is the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god in Roman mythology, and is altogether magnificent in momentum and grand in scale. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and if it lands in the water, your dreams will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

attractions.text_en: Harstad is located on Hinnøya, one of the islands of the Lofoten archipelago. Here you will find unforgettable natural experiences, local cuisine prepared by excellent chefs, genuine shops, music festivals, an unspoiled archipelago, and much more! As the most romantic place in Norway, where you can see the midnight sun, located in the middle of the aurora belt, Harstad is also ready to entice you. For travellers, the rich culinary experience has become an important part of the visit for many, just as much as the unique sights and unforgettable activities. Harstad has become a destination where travellers seek out delicious food. Here you can not only taste a variety of seafood from the archipelago, but every dish also leaves a deep impression on visitors with its artistry. Harstad's cuisine, rooted in centuries of local traditional culture and the warm hospitality of the people of northern Norway, has earned it the title of Norway's Nordic culinary capital.
attractions.text_zh: 哈尔斯塔位于罗浮墩群岛屿 Hinnøya，这里有令人难忘的自然体验、由优秀厨师烹制的当地美食、货真价实的商店、音乐节、未受破坏的群岛等等！ 挪威最浪漫的地方，可以看到午夜的阳光，位于北极光带的中间——哈尔斯塔也准备好引诱您 对游客而言，丰富的美食体验已成为许多游客的重要体验，与独特的景点和令人难忘的活动一样，美食也是如此。哈尔斯塔已成为游客寻访美味佳肴的目的地，不仅可以品尝来自群岛的各种海鲜，每道菜都将艺术性也给游客留下了深刻的印象。哈尔斯塔美食源自数个世纪的当地传统文化和挪威北部人的热情好客，为他赢得了挪威北欧美食之都的称号。

attractions.text_en: Setting off from the steep Reine mountain pass, which is a vantage point for admiring Reine, you then head to the village of Hamnøy. This small village has only one restaurant and a fishermen's cabin, and is also one of the classic photography scenes. The bridge on the west side at the village entrance, on the way to Reine, offers an advantageous shooting angle. If on the day, due to weather, physical condition, or because children cannot climb Reine mountain, you go to Hamnøy village to shoot, here you can also capture classic themes such as the sea, fjords, snow mountains and fishing villages.
attractions.text_zh: 从陡峭的雷纳山口前往,是欣赏雷纳有利地点,随后前往哈姆诺伊村（Hamnøy）这条小村只有一家餐厅及一个渔民小屋，同样也是摄影的经典场景之一，在村口西面前往雷讷的桥上就是有利的拍摄角度，当天如果因为天气原因、体力原因、或儿童无法攀雷纳山，当天前往哈姆诺伊村拍摄，在这里也能拍到海水、峡湾、雪山、渔村等经典主题。

attractions.text_en: Hamnøy Fishing Village is one of the three beautiful, pristine fishing villages on the island of Moskenesøya. When you stand inside the Hamnøy fishing village of Lofoten, there is a feeling of tranquil, otherworldly time travel. Among the photographs that astonished the world in 2014, the Hamnøy fishing village was among them.
attractions.text_zh: 哈姆诺伊渔村（Hamnoy）是莫斯克斯内斯岛上三个美丽的原生态渔村之一，当你站在罗弗敦哈姆诺伊渔村里面的时候，有一种恍如隔世般宁静穿越的感觉。在2014年全球震撼的照片里，哈姆诺伊渔村渔村就位列其中。

attractions.text_en: Å, the town with the shortest name in the world. "Å" is the last syllabic character in the Norwegian language, representing the place where everything ends and begins anew. Å lies at the very end of the Lofoten road, and is a protected traditional fishing village. It is also a paradise for photographers. When you first arrive in the town of Å, you are immediately drawn to the red Norwegian fishermen's cabin buildings in the town. These fishermen's cabins, built in the nineteenth century and still preserved today, have outer walls painted in deep red. There are single-storey bungalows as well as two-storey buildings, all constructed from wood, standing out very conspicuously on the Lofoten Islands.
attractions.text_zh: 奥镇（Å）世界上名字短的小镇，“Å”在挪威语中是最后一个音节字符，代表着一切的结束和重启之地。奥镇在罗弗敦群岛公路的尽头，是一个受到保护的传统渔村。这里也是摄影师的天堂，初到Å小镇时，立刻会被镇上红色的挪威渔人小屋建筑所吸引。这些建于十九世纪仍保存到现在的渔人小屋样式，外墙漆着深红色的颜色，有单层的平房，也有双层的建筑，全数都是以木头建造，十分显眼地伫立在罗弗敦岛上。

attractions.text_en: Yellow houses: located on the famous Lofoten island of Sakrisøy, this island is renowned for the contrasting scenery formed by rows of yellow fishermen's cabins dotted with other colours against the snowstorm. Most of the houses on the island are painted in bright, glossy yellow. The dazzling colours reflected on the calm fjord waters, combined with a white snowstorm backdrop, make a beautiful Lofoten postcard.
attractions.text_zh: 黄房子：位于罗弗敦著名的岛屿Sakrisøy，这个岛屿以一排排黄色渔屋点缀着其他的色彩在暴风雪中形成的反差风景而闻名，岛上大部分的房屋都涂上颜色鲜艳油亮色黄色渔屋，炫丽的色彩倒影在峡湾的平静海面上，如果配合白色的暴雪背景，将是罗弗敦美丽的明信片。

attractions.text_en: This small fishing village of only 500 people also has a football stadium, located on a skerry, surrounded by beautiful fjords and azure-blue waters, adding an air of tranquillity and beauty. The stadium was built to fulfil the wish of a local 14-year-old child, which makes one yearn for it while at the same time deeply admiring the innocence and kindness of the Norwegian people.
attractions.text_zh: 这个仅有500人的小渔村还拥有一座的足球场，位于一处岛礁之上，被优美的峡湾和湛蓝的海水所包围，多了一番宁静和唯美。足球场的由来是为了当地一个14孩子的心愿而建，可谓让人心生向往的同时又无比羡慕挪威人的纯真与善良。

attractions.text_en: Henningsvær is a fishing village located on the Lofoten Islands of Norway. Because of its traditional fishing village architecture, it attracts many tourists from all over the world. The village is located about 20 kilometres (12 miles) southwest of the town of Svolvær.
attractions.text_zh: 亨宁斯韦尔是坐落挪威的罗弗敦群岛上的一个渔村，由于它的传统渔村的建筑，吸引着全世界的许多游客。该村位于约20公里斯沃尔韦尔镇（12英里）西南。

attractions.text_en: Ofotfjorden. The Ofot Fjord is located at Evenes, which is the gateway to the Vesterålen islands. Driving along the fjord, you will admire more postcard-like beautiful scenery, magnificent views, and snow mountains overlooking the sea.
attractions.text_zh: 奥福特峡湾（Ofotfjorden）奥福特峡湾位于埃沃内斯，这里是通往韦斯特罗伦群岛的门户，将沿着峡湾行驶，欣赏更多如明信片般美丽的风景，您将欣赏壮丽的景色，欣赏俯瞰大海的雪山。

attractions.text_en: Narvik, shrouded under the aurora belt at 68 degrees north latitude, is a fjord town surrounded by mountains and a famous Norwegian ski resort. On the journey extending north from Abisko, the scenery changes constantly, from boundless white ice fields to typical fjord landscapes, all making one marvel at how gentle the light of the Arctic Circle is. The Narvik railway station in particular is the northernmost railway station on Earth, reaching the northernmost end of human railways. At the same time, here you can taste an extremely rich variety of seafood, including whale meat, large halibut, purple sea urchin and other specialty foods, which has attracted many tourists.
attractions.text_zh: 位于北极光带笼罩下的纳尔维克，北纬68度，被群山环绕的峡湾小城，是挪威著名滑雪胜地，从阿比斯库往北延伸的路途中风景变化多端，由一望无际的白色冰原直到典型的峡湾风光，无不令人赞叹北极圈的日色如此温柔，特别是纳尔维克火车站，是地球最北的火车站，抵达了人类火车的最北端。同时、在这里可以品尝到极为丰富的海鲜，包含鲸鱼肉、大型比目鱼、紫色海胆等特色美食，因而吸引了不少游客。

attractions.text_en: Tungeneset Viewpoint is located at the tip of the headland between Steinsfjord and Ersfjord (the Elf Fjord). This stretch of footbridge, made of Siberian larch, spans the rocks, offering a view of the sharp peaks of Okshornan on Senja Island in northern Norway, also known as "the Devil's Teeth".
attractions.text_zh: 奇迹山峦瞭望台（Tungeneset） 位于 斯坦斯峡湾（Steinsfjord） 和精灵峡湾（ Ersfjord） 之间的岬角顶端。这一段被西伯利亚落叶松制成的人行桥横跨岩石，可欣赏到位于挪威北部 塞尼雅岛上的欧克斯曼群峰 （Okshornan） 的锋利山峰，也被称为“恶魔之齿”。

attractions.text_en: Bergsbotn Viewpoint is set in the picturesque landscape of Skaland in Norway, and is a must-visit for all nature lovers and travellers who want to immerse themselves in magnificent scenery. This scenic viewpoint is located high above the surrounding terrain, providing a vantage point to showcase the area's stunning natural beauty. Visitors can admire magnificent views of fjords, mountains and lush green vegetation, making it an ideal place for photography, picnics, or simply immersing oneself in the tranquil atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh: 贝格斯景观台（Bergsbotn）坐落在挪威斯卡兰风景如画的风景中，是所有自然爱好者和想要沉浸在壮丽景色中的旅行者的必游之地。这个风景优美的观景点位于周围地形的高处，提供了一个展示该地区令人惊叹的自然美景的有利位置。游客可以欣赏峡湾、山脉和郁郁葱葱的绿色植物的壮丽景色，使其成为摄影、野餐或只是沉浸在宁静氛围中的理想场所。

attractions.text_en: A dreamlike beach with white sands, located in a sheltered bay, where you can relax and immerse yourself in the tranquil beauty of this pristine beach, with fine white sands and clear waters. This is the perfect spot to relax and take exquisite photos. Don't forget to visit the unique golden toilet and take a quirky photo to add a touch of fun to your adventure.
attractions.text_zh: 梦幻般的海滩，有白色的沙滩，位于一个受庇护的海湾中，在这里您可以放松身心，沉浸在这片原始海滩的宁静美景中，这里有细白的沙滩和清澈的海水。这是放松身心和拍摄精美照片的完美地点。别忘了参观独特的金色厕所，拍一张奇特的照片，为您的冒险增添一丝乐趣。

attractions.text_en: Built in 1958, the Tromsø Bridge is a spectacular structure within the Arctic, spanning Tromsø and the troll town. It is an iconic landmark of Tromsø. On one side of the cross-sea bridge is a snow-mountain town with distinctive, vivid snow-peak shapes. Many postcards of Tromsø are taken here.
attractions.text_zh: 建于1958年的特罗姆瑟大桥是北极内壮观的建筑，横跨特罗姆瑟和山妖小镇，是特罗姆瑟的标志性建筑，跨海大桥的一侧是雪山峰式外形别致鲜明雪山小镇，许多关于特罗姆瑟的明信片都是在此拍摄。

attractions.text_en: Located opposite the cross-sea bridge in the city centre, the snow-mountain-shaped Arctic Cathedral, built in 1965, is an iconic building of Tromsø. The cathedral is a modern-feeling church designed by organically combining Tromsø's winter with the aurora. The large Nordic stained-glass window at the rear of the cathedral, 12 metres high and weighing 6 tonnes, depicts Christ standing with arms outstretched. The beautiful light radiating from its weighty, calm presence is soul-stirring. If you encounter a concert at the Arctic Cathedral, quietly appreciating it in front of the beautiful stained glass would be a very special experience.
attractions.text_zh: 位于市中心跨海大桥对面的，建于1965年雪山造型的极地教堂是特罗姆瑟的标志建筑。教堂将特罗姆瑟的冬天和极光有机结合而设计的具有现代感的教堂，其中教堂后部高12米重6吨的北欧大的彩色玻璃窗之间是张开双臂站立的耶稣，那重厚沉稳散发出的美丽光芒令人心魄，如遇北极海大教堂音乐会，在美丽的彩绘玻璃前静静欣赏将是一种很特别的体验。

attractions.name_en: The Gateway to the Arctic Ocean
attractions.text_en: The iconic landmark on the Tromsø coastline, The Gateway to the Arctic Ocean, is the work of the artist Marit Bockelie. The Gateway to the Arctic Ocean takes the form of a towering Gothic arch. The main body of the sculpture is composed of metal and blue glass mosaic, with an overall tone dominated by blue and black, with warm-coloured light shining out from inside.
attractions.text_zh: 特罗姆瑟海岸线上的标志性景观北极之门(《thegateway to the Arctic ocean )是艺术家MaritBockelie的作品。北极之门呈现出高耸的哥特式拱门形态，雕塑主体由金属和蓝色玻璃马赛克组成，整体色调以蓝色和黑色为主，内部透出的暖色灯光。

attractions.name_en: Boat Tour of Seal and Sea Eagle Habitats
attractions.name_zh: 乘船游览海豹，海鹰栖息地
attractions.text_en: An Arctic Ocean-specialty sea eagle-watching boat trip out to sea: take a boat deep into the Norwegian fjords to look for gathering places of seals and habitats of sea eagles. Along the way, the boat will stop several times at these magnificent sea surfaces and cliffsides, offering close-up observation points of this wildlife. The highlight of the summer trip is undoubtedly watching the Arctic sea eagle unique to the Arctic Ocean, whose wingspan can reach 2.65 metres, soaring in the sky right before your eyes. In winter, you will surely witness a live record of seals courting during the mating season. All of this will bring you a truly unforgettable experience.
attractions.text_zh: 北冰洋特色的出海观看海鹰之旅，乘船前往挪威峡湾深处，寻找海豹的聚集地和海鹰栖息地，沿途会在这些壮丽的海面和悬崖畔多次停靠，提供的这些野生动物的近距离观察点，夏季的行程的亮点无疑是观赏北冰洋独有的北极海鹰，其翼展可达2.65米，翱翔于近在咫尺的空中，冬季一定是观察出于交配季节的海豹求偶的实录，都会您带来真正难忘的体验。

attractions.text_en: The Lyngen channel of the Norwegian Sea, influenced by warm currents, does not freeze over in winter, and large schools of herring pour in, attracting whales to come and hunt and breed. We follow experienced crew members to explore the mysterious deep-sea whales. In winter there is a chance to see different kinds of "overlords" of the seabed, such as orcas, humpback whales and fin whales. Sometimes they are also very curious about us and will try to approach us, giving us the chance to observe the whales' activity up close. Every time they surface and dive is so real, no longer the image we imagine in our minds or see on television.
attractions.text_zh: 挪威海的灵恩海峡受暖流影响，冬季不会冰封，大量鲱鱼群涌入吸引鲸鱼前来捕猎及繁殖。我们跟随经验丰富的船员，探索神秘的深海鲸鱼，冬季有机会看到不同种类的海底“霸主”，比如虎鲸，座头鲸和长须鲸。它们有时对我们也十分好奇，会尝试接近我们，让我们有机会近距离观察鲸鱼的活动，每次出水入水都如此真实，不再是我们脑中想象或是电视里的画面。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. Its docks are filled with yachts of every kind, much like a rich people's club. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center, where white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere on the water, leisurely and carefree, presenting a harmonious scene. The north shore of Lake Zurich is where the wealthy live, dubbed the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." Bahnhofstrasse ends at Lake Zurich. As a "world's most livable city," the life of true Zurich residents is permeated everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: The twin towers of Zurich Cathedral are the landmark building of Zurich. According to legend, Charlemagne (Charlemagne the Great, king of the Carolingian dynasty of the Frankish Kingdom and the founder of the Holy Roman Empire) built the twin towers above the graves of Zurich's patron saints Felix and Regula. Other sights worth seeing include St. Peter's Church, which has the largest clock face in Europe, and the Fraumünster of Zurich, the latter famous for its stained-glass windows designed by Giacometti (Switzerland's master existentialist sculptor and painter) and Chagall (the surrealist painter).
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂的双塔是苏黎世的地标性建筑。根据传说，查理曼（查理曼大帝，法兰克王国卡洛林王朝国王，神圣罗马帝国的奠基人）将双塔建在了苏黎世主保圣人Felix和Regula的墓地之上。其他值得一看的景点还包括：拥有欧洲至大钟面的圣彼得教堂和苏黎世圣母大教堂，该教堂因贾科梅蒂（瑞士超存在主义雕塑大师，画家）和夏卡尔（超现实主义画家）绘制的彩色玻璃窗而闻名。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also known as Station Street) is one of Europe's longest shopping avenues and one of the most expensive shopping avenues in the world. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless heart of Zurich, lined with luxury brands from around the world and private banks. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless visitors feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored gold bars said to be among the largest quantities in the world, making many people too thrilled to move their feet. Standing among it, you can clearly feel the air filled with the scent of wealth, opulence, and languor.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland, in the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled between mountains and water, Lucerne possesses the unique beauty of the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance-era palaces and mansions, as well as century-old shops and ancient streets and alleys are everywhere. The scenery of Lake Lucerne, with its mountains and water, reflects the city's beautiful views in an almost dreamlike, almost real way, making it an extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small towns. Since the 19th century, it has attracted many princes, nobles, and literati to visit and live here, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: Switzerland's GoldenPass train travels through the beautiful regions of the Alps, taking in charming lake and mountain scenery all along the way. One of its most beautiful stretches is the GoldenPass train (Luzern-Lungern Express) from Lungern to Lucerne (Luzern). Along the way are picturesque villages, azure lake waters, dense vegetation, vast pastures, leisurely cattle and sheep, and the snow-capped Alps. The ever-changing scenery from the foot to the summit of the mountains makes one marvel that this is a paradise on earth.
attractions.text_zh: 瑞士的黄金列车穿梭于阿尔卑斯美丽的区域，一路总览迷人的湖光山色。其中美丽的一段就是龙疆（Lungern）到卢塞恩（Luzern）这一段的金色山口列车（Luzren-Lungern Express），沿途秀美的村庄，碧蓝的湖水，茂密的植被，广袤的牧场，悠闲的牛羊，还有白雪皑皑的阿尔卑斯山脉，从山脚到山顶变幻的风景，让人感叹这就是人间仙境。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass train passes through here.
