This place has Switzerland's purest alpine lake waters, surrounded by mountains, with lush green grass. The quaint village is scattered along the shore of Lake Lungern, making it a veritable paradise far removed from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口列车就会从这里经过。这里拥有瑞士最为纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Lake Thun, located in the Bernese Oberland, has deep blue waters and is called the "right eye of God." Standing on the shore of Lake Thun, before your eyes are beautiful villages, solemn castles, and at the far end of the lake the slowly emerging Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau peaks. Your gaze switches between telephoto and wide angle, freezing each frame of picturesque scenery in your heart.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落于伯尔尼高地上的图恩湖，拥有深蓝色的湖水，被称之为“上帝的右眼”。驻足于图恩湖畔，眼前的美丽村落，庄严的城堡，湖畔尽头的慢慢浮现的艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰，视线在长焦与广角之间切换，在心中定格每一帧如画风景。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald, located at the northern foot of the Eiger, is the famous postcard photography spot of Switzerland's "dreamy hillside" beloved by photographers, and also the Alpine town one must pass through to visit the Jungfrau. Together with First, Jungfrau, Wengen, Lauterbrunnen and others, it forms the most magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-watching destination, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts. The lakeside, green grasslands, waterfalls, dairy cows, and snow-capped mountains together make this a fascinating town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头最爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、劳特布伦嫩（Lauterbrunnen）等一起组成了少女峰地区最为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located about twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow year-round, while at the foot of the mountain the grass is green and the scenery beautiful, making it a famous sightseeing and outdoor sports destination in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Aletsch region has been listed by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. Also called the "Great Aletsch Glacier," the ice here weighs over 1.1 billion tons and is the famous and spectacular glacial landform of the Alps. The glacier extends from the northern slopes of the Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau toward the canton of Valais. The glacial meltwater flows into the Rhône River through the pristine Massa Gorge, so the region grows all kinds of rare plants and is the habitat of many rare animals. It is also an excellent location for activities such as hiking and skiing, with magnificent scenery that is hard to describe in words.
attractions.text_zh: 阿莱奇(Aletsch)地区已被联合国教科文组织列入世界遗产名录，又称为“大阿莱奇冰川”，这里冰重超过11亿吨，是阿尔卑斯山脉著名壮观的冰川地貌。冰川从艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰的北坡向瓦莱州延伸，冰川融水通过原始的马萨峡谷(Massa Gorge)流入罗纳河，因而该地区生长着各种珍稀植物，是许许多多珍稀动物的栖息地，也是徒步和滑雪等项目的绝佳地点，壮丽的风景难以用语言描述。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald First attracts visitors from all directions to admire the magnificent scenery of the north face of the Eiger. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk by Tissot, anyone will instantly feel that they are standing at the top of the world. The Cliff Walk by Tissot is located at the summit of First, offering a unique panoramic view of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The heart of the Alps, Switzerland's land of purity. In the car-free fairytale town of Zermatt, a unique atmosphere of tranquility and pure holiday is created. Facing the legendary Matterhorn, every breath is the freshest greeting of the Alps. Hike the five lakes to encounter reflections, take the cog railway straight up into the clouds, and explore in the ice palace. This is the ultimate place to fulfill outdoor dreams, with the unique "King of the Mountains" experience: this is one of Zermatt's core features. Capture the "classic image" — the perfect reflection of the Matterhorn in Riffelsee, the most iconic view.
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔卑斯之心，瑞士的纯净之境。在无汽车的童话小镇采尔马特，更营造了独一无二的宁静、纯净度假氛围。与传奇的马特洪峰对望。每一次呼吸，都是阿尔卑斯山最清新的问候，徒步五湖邂逅倒影，乘齿轮火车直上云霄，在冰宫探险。这里是户外梦想的终极实践地，独特的“群山之王”体验：这是采尔马特的核心特色之一。抓住“经典画面”——马特洪峰在利菲尔湖的完美倒影，这是最具标志性的景观。

attractions.text_en: The Matterhorn is located in the town of Zermatt in the canton of Valais, Switzerland, at an altitude of 4,478 meters. It is the most beautiful peak of the Alps and a symbol that Switzerland takes pride in. With its single-pillar-holding-up-the-sky posture, it points straight to the heavens, and its special triangular pyramid shape has become a representative of the Alps. Whenever the morning glow or evening light shines upon it, the perennially snow-covered mountain body refracts a metallic luster.
attractions.text_zh: 马特宏峰（Matterhorn）位于瑞士瓦莱州小镇采尔马特，海拔 4478 米，是阿尔卑斯山最美丽的山峰，也是瑞士引以为骄傲的象征，以其一柱擎天之姿，直指天际，其特殊的三角锥造型，更成为阿尔卑斯山的代表，每当朝晖夕映，长年积雪的山体折射出金属般的光芒。

attractions.name_zh: 马特洪峰冰川天堂（自费）
attractions.text_en: Take the cable car from the town of Zermatt to the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise, where you can overlook the snow-capped Alps from high up. The iconic Matterhorn rises majestically on the horizon, making the glacial landscape an unforgettable experience. This peak is surrounded by 38 imposing four-thousand-meter peaks and 14 magnificent glaciers spanning three countries, with a unique world of peaks that is fascinating. Glacier Paradise has an impressive ice palace, a comfortable cinema lounge, an impressive viewing platform, and Europe's highest alpine restaurant, making it an unforgettable visiting destination in the Swiss Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 从采尔马特小镇乘坐缆车前往马特宏峰冰川天堂乐园，您可以从高处俯瞰白雪皑皑的阿尔卑斯山。标志性的马特宏峰雄伟地耸立在地平线上，使冰川景观成为令人难忘的体验。这座山峰被 38 座气势磅礴的四千米高峰和横跨三个国家的 14 条雄伟冰川所环绕，其独特的山峰世界令人着迷。冰川天堂乐园有令人印象深刻的冰川宫殿、舒适的影院休息室、令人印象深刻的观景平台和欧洲高山餐厅，使其成为瑞士阿尔卑斯山令人难忘的游览胜地。

attractions.text_en: The red twelve minutes leading to the silent mountain summit — the Zermatt shuttle train, a ritual journey into purity welcomes you onto the platform of Täsch station. Board the train to keep a lifelong appointment with the King of the Mountains. Next, please entrust your journey to a unique alpine railway. This leg of the journey is the first baptism carefully arranged for you by the world-famous "car-free pure land" of Zermatt — a ceremonial transition through time and space, traveling from the mundane world into the Alpine sanctuary, reaching the glorious end point of the snow-mountain route.
attractions.text_zh: 通往寂静山巅的红色十二分钟——泽尔玛特专列，一段驶入纯净的仪式欢迎登上泰施（Täsch）车站的站台。登上火车，来赴一场与山之王的终身约会了。接下来，请将旅程交托给一条独特的高山铁路，段旅程是世界闻名的“无车净土”采尔马特（Zermatt）为你精心安排的第一场洗礼，一场从凡俗世界驶入阿尔卑斯圣境的、充满仪式感的时空转换到达雪山路线的荣耀终点

attractions.text_en:
The Simplon Pass connects the canton of Valais from the valley of the town of Brig to Domodossola in northern Italy. It is hailed as the most beautiful pass of the Alps, with scenery along the way changing with altitude, including both magnificent mountains and rivers and charming villages and towns. The most special of these is the Simplon Pass car-train service, an experience of the unique Swiss mountain crossing, allowing you to ride the train with both passengers and car, crossing through the mountain tunnel. The road runs through narrow and magnificent granite gorges, traveling back and forth between Brig in Switzerland and Iselle in Italy.
(The car-on-rail service Ferroutage within this itinerary will not be available after heavy snowstorms or under the risk of mudslides triggered by rainfall. We kindly ask for your understanding!)
attractions.text_zh:
辛普朗山口将瓦莱州从布里格镇的山谷和意大利北部的多莫多索拉连接起来，被誉为阿尔卑斯山最美丽的山口，沿途的风景随海拔变化，既有壮阔的山川，也有别致的村镇，其中最为特别的是：辛普朗山口的汽车列车服务，体验独特的瑞士翻山体验，让你能连人带车乘坐火车穿越山体隧道，公路穿行于狭窄壮丽的花岗岩峡谷中，往返于瑞士布里格和意大利伊塞尔之间。
（本行程内的铁路汽车服务Ferroutage，在强暴雪后或者降雨引发泥石流的风险下，将无法体验，敬请谅解！）

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as Italy's most magnificent Gothic building, hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and the white marble exterior walls are carved with thousands of statues. The interior space is vast, and sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, creating dim light and a solemn religious atmosphere. The crypt of the cathedral still preserves the remains of the Church of St. Tecla that stood on the original site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most tourists who come here come for sightseeing. Under the central arcade is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan, especially the window displays which are updated daily. Just standing outside the windows to admire them is also a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is filled with quite a few high-end restaurants, cafés, and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱二世拱廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Sforza Castle is one of Milan's most important buildings and a witness to Milan's vicissitudinous history. Overlooking the entire castle, it resembles a grand duchy, with high walls on four sides and a meticulously planned park. Built as a castle by Count Sforza in the 14th century, it later became the residence of the Sforza family, witnessing the entire process from the family's heyday to its decline. The castle is now opened by the Milan municipal government as a museum, including the Museum of Applied Arts and Music, the Archaeological Museum, and the Museum of Ancient Art. Its back gate is the Arch of Peace, which was named after the ruler Francesco renovated it.
attractions.text_zh: 斯福尔扎城堡是米兰最重要的建筑之一，是米兰沧桑历史的见证。俯瞰整个城堡像一个大公国，有四面的高墙和精致规划过的公园。在14世纪时由斯福尔扎伯爵作为城堡而建，而后成为斯福尔扎家族的住所，见证了从鼎盛时期到家族衰败的全过程。现城堡被米兰市政府辟为博物馆，其中有应用艺术和乐曲博物馆、考古博物馆、古代艺术博物馆，他的后门是和平门，是统治者费朗西斯科改造得名的。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Known simply as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe and is a classic work of Venetian architectural art. It is also a treasure house with a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon, you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can see the outside through a small hole, rather than having so many people on the opposite bridge looking over at you. You can take photos inside, as long as you don't use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route the court had to take to escort condemned prisoners to prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style. The bridge is shaped like a house, with a vault covering the upper part, tightly enclosed, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After prisoners were tried at the Doge's Palace, serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and when crossing this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows, losing their freedom from then on, and involuntarily letting out sighs. It is said that lovers who kiss under the bridge can stay together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was filmed here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: This is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, and on the east side stand the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the public activity center for Venice's political, religious, and traditional festival events.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five cliffside villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. Particularly special is the hiking trail that strings together the five villages, built along the coast, which is one of the world's most beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers, taking around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other side mountains, and ahead are Italian fishing villages, making it a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Pisa Cathedral in Italy. Located on the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) to the north of the city of Pisa in the province of Tuscany, Italy, it is a world-famous sight and one of Italy's symbols, and was chosen by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. It is said that in 1590 AD, Galileo once performed a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's views.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点

attractions.text_en: Also called the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and the square has four major buildings: Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Camposanto (cemetery). Around the square the ancient city walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa, and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but very few churches can be so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red, and green granite, interprets the classical, elegant, and free spirit revered in the Renaissance era to the fullest. No wonder it was named "St. Mary of the Flowers." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and numerous cafés and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier large-span circular-arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the young maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over the centuries, it has withstood floods, social upheavals, and wars while remaining standing. It is one of Florence's famous landmark buildings.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: The Basilica of Santa Croce is an important church in Florence. First, it is the largest church of the Franciscan order; second, this church is also a fairly standard minor basilica, and the interior structure of most European Catholic churches developed on the basis of this church's form. The Basilica of Santa Croce was designed and built starting in 1294 by Arnolfo di Cambio, and was not preliminarily completed and put into use until 1443, but the entire facade of the church was added only in 1863, and the Gothic bell tower behind the church was also added in 1842. Inside the church are monuments and tombs of some of Florence's heavyweight celebrities, such as Dante, Michelangelo, Galileo, Machiavelli, Rossini, and so on.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字教堂是佛罗伦萨一座重要的教堂，首先它是圣方济各教派至大的教堂，其次这座教堂还是一座相当标准的次级主座教堂，大部分的欧洲天主教堂的内部结构均是在这个教堂的形式基础上发展的。圣十字教堂由阿莫尔福·迪坎比奥于1294年开始设计和建造的，直到1443年才初步完工开始启用，但教堂的整个立面是1863年才增建的，1842年还增建了教堂后面的哥特式钟楼。教堂内有一些发佛罗伦萨重量级名人的纪念碑和陵墓，例如：但丁、米开朗基罗、伽利略、马基维利、罗西尼等等。

attractions.text_en: Located in the heart of Rome, the magnificent Colosseum was built by the ancient Romans to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was a place reserved for slave owners, nobles and free citizens to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat among slaves, and it is one of Rome's more famous historical relics. The Colosseum is a masterpiece and a marvel that can be considered a model in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for its immensity, grandeur and spectacle. Although only a large part of its skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and magnificent momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马较著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman kings Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, among others, rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be regarded as a classic building of the Augustan period and a model of the exquisite architectural techniques of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels".
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: Piazza di Spagna once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday", becoming a Roman landmark known to everyone. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and lovely figure seems to have already merged with Piazza di Spagna and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. The Spanish Steps - the whole Piazza di Spagna is not large, and the crowds mainly gather near the Spanish Steps. The whole staircase has 138 steps in total, making it one of the widest staircases in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲较宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain", or the "Wishing Pool", it takes as its theme the sea god Neptune from Roman mythology returning victorious, with an overall imposing and magnificent grandeur. It is said that if you stand with your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and the coin lands in the water, your dreams will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns. This is a unique convergence of art and nature, holding rich historical imprints. Its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the Italian city-states' ideal of "good governance".
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress path, a country road lined with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that attracts countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and take photos.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a small town on the hills of the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. In 1459, the Pienza that he oversaw the reconstruction of was regarded as a model of the "ideal city", and was therefore hailed as "the touchstone of Renaissance urban life". Unlike other Italian medieval towns, Pienza's uniqueness lies in the fact that from its city walls one can overlook the scenery of the World Heritage Site - the "Val d'Orcia".
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old city is filled with masterpieces of art masters and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing cobblestone alleys and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you are in medieval Europe a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. Over the centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the fourteenth century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the making of confections. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties - almond soft cookies ricciarelli, nut tart panforte, peppered spiced nut cake pan pepato, rice pudding budini di riso, walnut cookies cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena, and one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly opposite the square are Siena's town hall and tower. Inside the town hall is the civic museum, which houses many paintings of the Sienese School, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government". The tower's full name is Torre del Mangia; it is the tallest building in Siena and the second tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of stairs and take in the beautiful views of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存至大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳至高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of Pisa in Italy. Located on the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, it is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, designated as a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. According to legend, in the year 1590 AD, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's views.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as Piazza del Duomo (Cathedral Square), it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly covered in grass. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and the square holds four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (cemetery). The square is also surrounded by ancient city walls and gates. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa in Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy. Built along the winding Mediterranean coastline, it is the collective name for five clifftop villages and towns: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together. Built along the coast, it is one of the world's most beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers long and taking around 5 hours, with the Mediterranean on one side, the mountains on the other, and Italian fishing villages ahead - a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. It was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List in 1997.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.name_en: Cattedrale di Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: The Cattedrale di Santa Maria del Fiore is the undisputed symbol of Florence, its iconic red dome dominating the city skyline. The most stunning aspect of this architectural marvel lies in observing its facade up close - the geometric patterns formed by white, green and pink marble are like a giant inlaid carpet, with every piece of stone precisely calculated. Especially when the sunlight shines at an angle, the green serpentine stone takes on an emerald-like luster, transitioning gently with the pink marble - it can be called the most gorgeous "stone embroidery" of the Renaissance.
attractions.text_zh: 圣母百花大教堂是佛罗伦萨无可争议的象征，其标志性的红色穹顶主宰着城市天际线。这座建筑奇迹最震撼之处在于近距离观察其外立面——白、绿、粉三色大理石组成的几何图案如同巨型拼花地毯，每一块石料都经过精密计算。尤其当阳光斜照时，绿色蛇纹石会泛出翡翠般的光泽，与粉色大理石温柔过渡，堪称文艺复兴时期最华丽的"石头刺绣"。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier large-span segmental arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy". Over the centuries, it has withstood floods, social unrest and wars while remaining standing. It is one of Florence's famous landmark structures.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria enjoys the reputation of an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David", and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi (Mercenaries' Loggia) and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Cattedrale di Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of the city of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce. This Gothic building is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring in detail. There are several cafes and restaurants around the square, offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals, especially in summer, when open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The square's open space is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, experiencing Florence's unique atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

attractions.text_en: Known in short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe. It is a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and at the same time a treasure house holding a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, and you can look outside through small openings, rather than having so many people on the bridge opposite looking over at you on the Bridge of Sighs. Photos are allowed inside, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route by which death-row prisoners were escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is house-shaped, covered by a vault on top and very tightly enclosed, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and when passing through this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows, losing their freedom from then on, and involuntarily letting out a sound of sighing. It is said that lovers who kiss under the bridge can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe". The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, while on the east side rises the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the center of public activity for Venice's political, religious and traditional festivities.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome", Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, Milan Cathedral was first built in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as Italy's most magnificent Gothic building, hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and its white marble exterior walls are carved with thousands of statues. The interior space is vast, and sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, the light dim, full of a solemn religious atmosphere. The crypt of the cathedral also preserves the remains of the Church of St. Tecla that stood on the original site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a gorgeous shopping mall, though most tourists who come here are sightseeing. Under the central arcade there is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan; in particular the window displays are updated daily, and simply standing outside the windows to admire them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is full of high-end restaurants, cafes and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。伊曼纽尔二世拱廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: It is one of the oldest museums in the world and a world-renowned treasure house of art. The Louvre building is in a "U" shape, divided into a new part and an old part. The entrance with the glass pyramid in front of the Louvre was designed by the Chinese-American master architect I. M. Pei. It holds more than 400,000 art treasures, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing artworks from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria, and Rome to medieval Europe and the various countries of the East, making it a magnificent palace of art in human history. The itinerary includes a standard individual-visitor ticket (without a Chinese audio guide).
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品、其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。 行程包含普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。

attractions.text_en: Île de la Cité (exterior) If the Louvre bore witness to the glory of the Gauls, then the Île de la Cité, Notre-Dame de Paris, and the Paris City Hall recorded the inseparable bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Île de la Cité. Without the Île de la Cité, there would be no Paris as it is today.
attractions.text_zh: 西岱岛（外观）如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the symbol of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en: Champ de Mars The Champ de Mars (Champ-de-Mars) is a large strip-shaped park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the Paris Military Academy (École militaire) to its southeast.
attractions.text_zh: 战神广场战神广场（Champ-de-Mars）是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔，以及在其东南方的巴黎军校（Ecole militaire）之间。

attractions.text_en: The Notre-Dame de Paris cathedral sits on the Île de la Cité in the center of Paris and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The church is in Gothic style, and visitors can climb the towers; although you won't encounter the "Hunchback of Notre-Dame," you can see the great bell from the 17th century, get up close to the mythical beasts on the church's exterior walls, and overlook the beautiful scenery of the Île de la Cité and the Seine.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西岱岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，游客可以登上塔楼参观，虽然遇不到“钟楼怪人”，但却能看到17世纪的大钟、近距离接触教堂外壁上的神兽、俯瞰西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。

attractions.text_en: Take the famous "Bateaux Mouches" cruise with its transparent cabin, sailing along the banks of the Seine which blend many attractions. The 3.2-kilometer, approximately 1-hour voyage passes Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées, the Île de la Cité, and other famous sights. On the surface of the Seine you can feel the romantic night colors of Paris, the beautiful scenery, and wonderful music—it is called "the in-depth sightseeing program of Paris not to be missed."
attractions.text_zh: 乘坐着名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等着名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the period of France's feudal rule. In terms of content, it was not only the French court but also the administrative center of the state, and a concrete embodiment of the political views and way of life of French society at the time. It was the first time since the ancient Roman Empire that Europe demonstrated the power of an autocratic regime able to concentrate such enormous manpower, material resources, and financial resources. At the time, in order to build it, Louis XIV mobilized more than thirty thousand workers as well as architects, engineers, and technicians. Apart from solving the complex technical problems arising from building a large-scale architectural complex, they also had to solve various problems such as water supply and roads. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully proved the progress of France's economy and technology at the time and the wisdom of the laboring people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来，第一次表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: The opera house was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861 and is a masterpiece of eclecticism at its peak. Its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms such as the ancient Greco-Roman colonnade and the Baroque; grand in scale, exquisite and meticulous, resplendent and magnificent, it is hailed as an opera house where painting, marble, and gold ornamentation shine in mutual splendor, giving people great enjoyment. It is one of the representative buildings of Napoleon III's era.
attractions.text_zh: 剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，是折衷主义登峰造极的作品，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受。是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann gathers the Paris Opera House, the Galeries Lafayette department store, Printemps, the Café de la Paix, and more. Strolling through the streets and lanes of Boulevard Haussmann, savor the trends of fashion in this world and the art of its shop windows.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街云集了巴黎歌剧院，老佛爷百货商店，巴黎春天，和平咖啡馆，穿街走巷奥斯曼大街上，品味这个世界上时尚的潮流趋势及橱窗艺术。

attractions.text_en: The traditional Gothic building Notre-Dame de Dijon was built in the 13th century. On the church facade, three rows of animal-shaped false gargoyles are separated by two rows of slender columns, and the church has a 14th-century chiming clock. For most of the people of Dijon, Notre-Dame de Dijon is a church building with an approachable quality; over these recent centuries, the church has always been the main spiritual and emotional comfort of the people of Dijon.
attractions.text_zh: 哥特式的传统建筑第戎圣母院建造于13世纪，教堂门面上三列兽形假排水口由两排纤细的圆柱分开，教堂上有一座14世纪的报时钟。对于大多数的第戎人民而言，第戎圣母院是一座具有亲和力的教堂建筑，在这近几个世纪以来，圣母院一直是第戎人民主要的精神、心灵的抚慰

attractions.text_en: Located in the Burgundy region, the homeland of wine, Dijon was the capital of the Duchy of Burgundy from the 11th to the 15th century. It flourished especially in the 14th and 15th centuries thanks to several outstanding leaders, becoming an important political, economic, and cultural-artistic center of Europe at the time. Today, the old town of Dijon is still dotted with many historical buildings from different periods—besides luxurious palaces, solemn churches, opulent glazed-tile roofs, and many quaint timber-framed houses, there are also museums and art galleries converted from palaces and monasteries. Fine wine and fine food paired with an artistic atmosphere filling the city make it a city with a very distinctive French charm.
attractions.text_zh: 位于葡萄酒故乡勃艮第地区的第戎，11到-15世纪曾是勃艮第公国的首府，特别在14、15世纪时因几位优秀领导人而盛极一时，成为当时欧洲重要的政治经济和文化艺术中心。如今第戎的老城区仍散布着许多不同时期的历史建筑，除了豪华的宫殿、庄严的教堂、彩釉屋顶的豪华和许多古朴的木框架房屋，也有宫殿和修道院改装成的博物馆和美术馆。美酒、美食搭配满城艺术分为，是非常具有法国风情的一座城市。

attractions.text_en: This destination that combines winemaking and tourism is a place not to be missed by wine lovers, art lovers, and food lovers. Choose a winery of Burgundy products to visit; here you can see the aging and maturation process of the wine and the storage and fermentation process inside the cellar, and if you are lucky, you may see the wine-making process (depending on the grape harvest season).
attractions.text_zh: 这个集酿酒与旅游于一身的胜地是葡萄酒爱好者、艺术爱好者和美食爱好者所不容错过的地方。选择勃艮第产品的酒庄进行参观，在此可参观葡萄酒的陈酿熟化过程及酒窖内储存发酵过程，运气好的时候可参观葡萄酒的酿造过程（取决葡萄的产期）。

attractions.text_en: Colmar is located in the northeastern corner of France, just a stone's throw from Germany, with the waters of the Rhine surrounding the little town. Its secluded geographic location and exquisitely beautiful scenery have earned Colmar the name of a picture-perfect town. On the Franco-German border, Colmar blends the tenderness of the Latin peoples with the diligence of the Germanic peoples. Most of Colmar's houses inherit the architectural features of south-central Germany, their walls covered with horizontal, vertical, and diagonal timber stripes, beautiful and exquisite, like cottages out of a fairy tale. And to fill the gaps shaped like tangram pieces with various colors is perhaps the romance that only the French, with their boundless imagination, possess. It is precisely for this reason that Colmar won the honor of the "Street Art Society Award," making people flock to it.
attractions.text_zh: 科尔马地处法国东北角，与德国只有咫尺之遥，莱茵河水环绕小城。隐秘的地理位置以及绝美的景致使得科尔马被称之为画一般的小镇。在法、德交界，科尔马融合了拉丁民族的缠绵和日耳曼民族的勤奋。科尔马的房屋大都承袭了德国中南部的建筑特色，墙身布满横、直、斜相间的木条条纹，漂亮精致，宛如童话中的小屋。而在那形如七巧板的空当儿中添满各种颜色，或许是极尽想象力的法国人才有的浪漫吧。正因如此，科尔马获得了“街道艺术学会奖”的殊荣，让人们趋之若鹜。

attractions.text_en: The Maison des Têtes is located on an ancient street of the 14th century. Built in 1609, it is a Renaissance building. The 105 vividly varied human-face heads carved on its front wall make it the most eye-catching building in the old town. The 19th-century bronze statue standing on the roof came from the hand of Bartholdi—the designer of the Statue of Liberty.
attractions.text_zh: 人头屋位于十四世纪的古街道，建于1609年，是文艺复兴时期的建筑，其正面墙壁上雕刻的105颗表情生动各异的人面头像，是老城中惹眼的建筑。立在屋顶的19世纪青铜雕像，则出自自由女神像的设计者——巴托尔迪之手。

attractions.text_en: Zurich's old town is a place of experience not to be missed. Here gather traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookstores and flower shops, as well as jewelry and accessories, fashion boutiques, and of course Zurich's local brands. Famous streets and lanes such as Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg, Niederdorf, and Augustine Lane are all located in the old town. Strolling through the old town at night, you will find that it has turned into a place of entertainment for the public.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世的老城区是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰，时尚精品，当然也少不了苏黎世本土品牌。班霍夫大街(Bahnhofstrasse)、伦韦格街(Rennweg)、尼德道尔夫(Niederdorf)与圣奥古斯丁巷(Augustine Lane)等着名街巷都位于老城区。晚上漫步于老城区，会发现这里又变成了民众的娱乐场所。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also called Station Street) is one of Europe's longer shopping avenues and also one of the world's most expensive shopping avenues. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless center of Zurich where every inch of land is worth its weight in gold—here are spread luxury brands from all over the world, with private banks standing in rows. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless tourists feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored what is said to be among the world's leading quantities of gold bars, which makes many people so excited they cannot move their feet. Immersed in it, you can clearly feel the air filled with the aura of wealth, opulence, and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. The piers on the lake are filled with all kinds of yachts, just like a rich people's club. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center; on the lake's surface, white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere, leisurely and at ease, a scene of harmony. The north shore of Lake Zurich is where the wealthy live, called the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." At the end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich. As one of the "world's most livable cities," the lives of the true people of Zurich are imbued with tranquility and leisure everywhere.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: The twin towers of the Grossmünster are the landmark building of Zurich. According to legend, Charlemagne (Charlemagne the Great, king of the Carolingian dynasty of the Frankish kingdom and founder of the Holy Roman Empire) built the twin towers atop the graves of Zurich's patron saints Felix and Regula. Other sights worth seeing include: St. Peter's Church, which has the largest clock face in Europe, and the Fraumünster of Zurich, which is famous for the stained-glass windows created by Giacometti (the Swiss surrealist-existentialist master sculptor and painter) and Chagall (the surrealist painter).
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂的双塔是苏黎世的地标性建筑。根据传说，查理曼（查理曼大帝，法兰克王国卡洛林王朝国王，神圣罗马帝国的奠基人）将双塔建在了苏黎世主保圣人Felix和Regula的墓地之上。其他值得一看的景点还包括：拥有欧洲至大钟面的圣彼得教堂和苏黎世圣母大教堂，该教堂因贾科梅蒂（瑞士超存在主义雕塑大师，画家）和夏卡尔（超现实主义画家）绘制的彩色玻璃窗而闻名。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is home to the famous postcard photography spot of the Swiss "dream hillside" beloved by photographers, and it is also the Alpine town one must pass through to visit the Jungfrau. Together with First, Jungfrau, Wengen, Lauterbrunnen, and others, it forms the most magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-watching resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeside, green grass, waterfalls, dairy cows, and snow-capped mountains together make this a fascinating town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头最爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”着名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、劳特布龙嫩（Lauterbrunnen）等一起组成了少女峰地区最为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是着名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located some twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is the rooftop of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow all year round, while at the foot of the mountain the grass is lush green and the scenery beautiful, making it a famous sightseeing and outdoor sports resort in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was inscribed as a World Natural Heritage site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的屋脊。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Sphinx Observatory is the observation deck atop the Jungfrau, the rooftop of Europe, and has Switzerland's fastest elevator. At an altitude of 3,571 meters is the Sphinx Observation Deck, from which you can admire the breathtaking panorama of the Alps: the magnificent Aletsch Glacier, 23.6 kilometers long and covering an area of 117 square kilometers, the most magnificent glacier in the Alps; and a part of the magnificent Alps in the cantons of Bern, Valais, and the Jura mountain region. On clear days, you can even see the Vosges mountains far away in France and the Black Forest far away in Germany.
attractions.text_zh: 斯芬克斯观景是欧洲屋脊少女峰上的观景台，拥有瑞士高速的升降机。在海拔3571米高处是斯芬克斯观景台，由此可观赏到阿尔卑斯山惊心动魄的全景图长23.6公里，覆盖面积达117平方公里的雄奇的阿莱契冰川，它是阿尔卑斯山中壮丽的冰川；有壮丽的阿尔卑斯山在伯尔尼州、瓦莱州及汝拉山脉地区的一部分。天气晴朗的日子，甚至能看到远在法国境内的浮日山脉及远在德国境内的黑森林。

attractions.text_en: The Aletsch region has been inscribed on the World Heritage List by UNESCO, and is also called the "Great Aletsch Glacier." Here the ice weighs more than 1.1 billion tons; it is the glacial landform of the Alps. The glacier extends from the northern slopes of the Eiger, the Mönch, and the Jungfrau toward the canton of Valais, and the glacial meltwater flows into the Rhône through the pristine Massa Gorge. Because of this, various rare plants grow in this region, which is the habitat of many rare animals, as well as an excellent location for hiking, skiing, and other activities; the magnificent scenery is hard to describe in words.
attractions.text_zh: 阿莱奇(Aletsch)地区已被联合国教科文组织列入世界遗产名录，又称为“大阿莱奇冰川”，这里冰重超过11亿吨，是阿尔卑斯山脉的冰川地貌。冰川从艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰的北坡向瓦莱州延伸，冰川融水通过原始的马萨峡谷(Massa Gorge)流入罗纳河，因而该地区生长着各种珍稀植物，是许许多多珍稀动物的栖息地，也是徒步和滑雪等项目的绝佳地点，壮丽的风景难以用语言描述。

attractions.text_en: Interlaken is a small town at the foot of the Jungfrau, located between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, also called the town between the lakes. It is famous for its intoxicating scenery in all four seasons, and geographically it belongs to the center of the Bernese Highlands.
attractions.text_zh: 因特拉肯是少女峰山脚下的一个小镇，位于图恩湖及布里恩茨湖之间，又名湖间镇，以一年四季的醉人风景着名，在地理上它属于伯尔尼高地的中心。

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is the green-meadow square in the center of Interlaken, Switzerland's famous sightseeing town. This greenland was once the garden of a monastery, and now the construction of any building is forbidden in order to prevent damage to this beautiful landscape. This is the best place to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast greenland there is a fountain, and it is also dotted with many benches, so it is also a good place for strolling. Höhematte is also the landing site for paragliding; there is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, and after paying, staff will take visitors to the nearby mountains for free gliding, where you can enjoy the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the sky.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士着名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass train passes through here. Here are Switzerland's purest alpine lake waters, surrounded by mountains, with lush green grass, and quaint villages scattered along the shore of Lake Lungern, just like a paradise removed from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，着名的金色山口列车就会从这里经过。这里拥有瑞士最为纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.name_zh: 金色山口列车（Lungern - Luzren Express)
attractions.text_en: Switzerland's GoldenPass train shuttles through the beautiful regions of the Alps, taking in the charming lake and mountain scenery all the way. One of the most beautiful sections is the GoldenPass train (Lungern - Luzren Express) from Lungern to Lucerne (Luzern). Along the way, the charming villages, azure lake waters, dense vegetation, vast pastures, leisurely cattle and sheep, and the snow-capped Alps, with the scenery changing from the foot to the top of the mountains, make people sigh that this is a fairyland on earth.
attractions.text_zh: 瑞士的黄金列车穿梭于阿尔卑斯美丽的区域，一路总览迷人的湖光山色。其中美丽的一段就是龙疆（Lungern）到卢塞恩（Luzern）这一段的金色山口列车（Lungern - Luzren Express），沿途秀美的村庄，碧蓝的湖水，茂密的植被，广袤的牧场，悠闲的牛羊，还有白雪皑皑的阿尔卑斯山脉，从山脚到山顶变幻的风景，让人感叹这就是人间仙境。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Lucerne, nestled against the mountains and beside the water, possesses the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance halls and mansions, as well as century-old shops and long streets and ancient lanes—they are everywhere. The scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the city's beautiful sights in a way both dreamlike and real, making it that extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful little cities. Since the 19th century, it has attracted many princes, nobles, and literary figures to visit and live here, and artists have gained boundless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: Lake Lucerne, this lake of winding shape, together with the surrounding mountains forms the typical scenery of "lake and mountain views," attracting a large number of tourists to come sightseeing. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and thus this piece acquired the title "Moonlight"—although this was not Beethoven's original intent.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩湖这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: This statue of a dying lion was carved into natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground, a broken spear stuck in its shoulder, with a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms beside it. This statue was made to commemorate the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on August 10, 1792, to protect the safety of Louis XVI's family in the Tuileries Palace of Paris; below the statue there is text describing the course of this event. In those days, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, pressed by livelihood, went one after another to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers, brave and skilled in battle, but honor and money could not cover up the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, retaining only the guard serving the Catholic Holy See—that famous Swiss Guard. Because of their renowned loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "Dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving statue in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支着名的瑞士卫队。由于着名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Towering in the city center, the Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and thousands of statues are carved on the white marble exterior walls. The interior space is vast; sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaic paintings on the windows, the light is hazy, full of a solemn religious atmosphere. The crypt of the church still preserves the remains of the Church of St. Tecla that stood on the original site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, although most tourists who come here come for sightseeing. Under the central arcade there is a Prada boutique whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan; in particular, the window displays are updated daily, so even just standing outside the window to admire them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is full of many high-end restaurants, cafés, and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱二世拱廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Sforza Castle is one of the most important buildings in Milan and a witness to Milan's vicissitudes of history. Looking down, the whole castle is like a grand duchy, with high walls on four sides and an exquisitely planned park. It was built in the 14th century as a castle by the Count of Sforza, and later became the residence of the Sforza family, witnessing the entire process from the heyday to the decline of the family. The castle is now opened by the Milan municipal government as a museum, which includes the Museum of Applied Arts and Music, the Archaeological Museum, and the Museum of Ancient Art; its back gate is the Arch of Peace, named after the renovation by the ruler Francesco.
attractions.text_zh: 斯福尔扎城堡是米兰最重要的建筑之一，是米兰沧桑历史的见证。俯瞰整个城堡像一个大公国，有四面的高墙和精致规划过的公园。在14世纪时由斯福尔扎伯爵作为城堡而建，而后成为斯福尔扎家族的住所，见证了从鼎盛时期到家族衰败的全过程。现城堡被米兰市政府辟为博物馆，其中有应用艺术和乐曲博物馆、考古博物馆、古代艺术博物馆，他的后门是和平门，是统治者费朗西斯科改造得名的。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room of Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, and to the east stand the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the public activity center of Venice's politics, religion, and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Abbreviated as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in AD 829 and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe, a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and at the same time a treasure house with a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route that had to be taken when escorting condemned prisoners from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in an early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered with a vault on top, sealed very tightly, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the serious offenders were taken to the dungeon. When passing this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small window, and from then on they lost their freedom and involuntarily uttered sighs. It is said that if lovers kiss under the bridge, they can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco; the past glory of Venice is all here. Inside, what can be seen is not only murals and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon, you pass over the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through small holes, rather than like the many people on the opposite bridge who are looking at the Bridge of Sighs from your side. Inside you are allowed to take photos, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five cliff-side villages and towns: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that links the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 kilometers, taking around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other are mountains, and ahead are Italian fishing villages, making it a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on UNESCO's World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the free-standing bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa, Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in the province of Tuscany, Italy. It is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, and was selected as a World Heritage site by UNESCO. It is said that in AD 1590, Galileo once performed a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also called the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa. The square has four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Cemetery. Ancient city walls and gates are also preserved around the square. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa, and cemetery) as a World Heritage site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but very few churches can be so charming. This beautiful church, faced with white, red, and green granite, interprets the classicism, elegance, and freedom esteemed in the Renaissance era to the fullest—no wonder it was named "St. Mary of the Flowers." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of a new church, which took 175 years before it was finally completed.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才最终建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria enjoys the reputation of an open-air sculpture museum and has been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square sit the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a copy of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and many cafés and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also called the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier large-span circular-arch bridges. It is said that Dante met the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over hundreds of years, it has experienced floods, social unrest, and wars yet stood unfallen. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space continuing from the Renaissance to the present. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and the murals and sculptures inside are worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are many cafés and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The square's open space is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum located in the center of Rome was built by ancient Rome to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great ancient Roman Empire. It was a place specially provided for slave owners, nobles, and free men to watch beast fights or slave gladiatorial combat, and it is Rome's most famous historical relic. The Colosseum can be called a model masterpiece and miracle in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for being huge, majestic, and spectacular. Although only most of its skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and magnificent momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is the best-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman king Vittorio Emanuele II, and Umberto I, among others, rest here in eternal sleep. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, the son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of the consummate building technology of ancient Rome, and was praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Hepburn's fresh and lovely figure seems to have merged with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome into one, becoming a memory people can never erase. The Spanish Steps—the entire Spanish Square is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The whole staircase has a total of 138 steps and is the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also called the "Maiden's Fountain," or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the victorious return of Neptune, the sea god in Roman mythology, with imposing momentum and grand magnificence. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and if you can toss it into the water, your dreams can come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂 （外观）
attractions.text_en: Known for short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the heart of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt between 1043 and 1071, it was once the great church of medieval Europe and is a classic masterpiece of Venetian architectural art. It is also a treasure house holding a rich collection of works of art.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weaponry. On the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, and you can look out through small openings, rather than being among the many people on the opposite bridge looking over at you on the Bridge of Sighs. Photography is allowed inside, as long as you don't use flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by magnificent palaces, while to the east rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Church. Since ancient times it has been the public center of Venice's political, religious, and traditional festival activities.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route by which the court escorted condemned prisoners to prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style; shaped like a house, covered with a vault on top, it is tightly sealed, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the felon was taken to the dungeon, and while crossing this airtight bridge could only glimpse the blue sky through the small windows, losing freedom from then on and involuntarily letting out a sigh. It is said that if lovers kiss beneath the bridge they will be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.

It is the collective name for five villages on the cliffs' edge: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 kilometers and taking around 5 hours, with the Mediterranean on one side, mountains on the other, and Italian fishing villages ahead. It is a destination that countless hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of Pisa in Italy. Located on the Piazza dei Miracoli north of the city of Pisa in Italy's Tuscany province, it is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, selected by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. Legend has it that in 1590 AD, Galileo performed a free-fall experiment from the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's view.

On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (the Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture David, and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore lies directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio on the Arno River is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earliest large-span circular-arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into The Divine Comedy. Over several hundred years, it has withstood floods, social upheaval, and wars while remaining standing. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of the city of Florence, Italy, an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian notables such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are several cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also the venue for various cultural activities and festivals, especially in summer, when open-air concerts and theatrical performances draw many spectators. The square's open space is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间 ， 广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum in the center of Rome was built by the ancient Romans of the time to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to praise the great ancient Roman Empire. It was a place exclusively for slave-owners, nobles, and freemen to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat among slaves, and is Rome's most famous historical relic. The Colosseum can be called a model masterpiece and miracle in the history of architecture, famed throughout the world for being huge, majestic, and spectacular. Although only most of the skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and grand momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2000 years. Artists such as Raphael and the Roman kings Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of ancient Rome's superb architectural technology, and was praised by Michelangelo as the "design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Hepburn's fresh and lovely figure seems to have merged into one with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. The Spanish Steps - the whole Spanish Square is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The whole flight of steps has 138 steps in all, and it is the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.text_en:
Also known as the "Fountain of the Maiden," or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the sea god Neptune of Roman mythology returning in triumph, with grand, majestic momentum on the whole. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dream will come true.
Starting in 2025, the Rome city hall plans to charge a photo fee at the Wishing Pool; if this bill passes, visitors will need to pay an expected fee of 2 euros to visit and photograph the Wishing Pool themselves.
attractions.text_zh:
又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。
自2025年开始，罗马市政厅计划在许愿池收取拍照费用，如该法案通过，则游客需要自行支付预计为2欧元的许愿池参观拍照费用。

attractions.text_en:
The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world and is the more famous attraction of Capri. Many people go to Capri precisely to behold the wonder of the Blue Grotto. You can enter the Blue Grotto by small boat to tour it; due to the special structure of the cave mouth, the seawater inside the cave is a crystalline blue. The surface seawater of the Blue Grotto shows a deep, dim blue, while the deeper seawater is sky blue, and the seawater sets off the rocks in the cave to be a sheet of azure too. On clear days, the Blue Grotto is exceptionally beautiful and enchanting.
The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction; if there is high tide, wind and waves, or other factors and the local maritime meteorological agency declares it closed, then it cannot be entered for touring. The cost of touring the Blue Grotto is not included in the tour group. To avoid misunderstanding, please follow local custom: apart from the Blue Grotto rowing boatman's fee, please pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
attractions.text_zh:
蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，是卡普里较著名的景点，很多人去卡普里的目的就是为了一睹蓝洞奇观。可乘小船进入蓝洞游览，由于洞口的特殊结构，使得洞里的海水一片晶蓝。蓝洞表层的海水呈现幽幽的深蓝色，而深层海水却是天蓝色的，海水映衬得洞中的岩石也都一片蔚蓝。天气晴朗的时候，蓝洞分外的美丽和妖娆。
卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

attractions.text_en: Capri Island lies near the southern mouth of the Gulf of Naples, belonging to Italy's Campania region.
