On the island are the medieval castle ruins of Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as a church dedicated to the island's patron saint, San Costanzo. It is one of the famous tourist destinations of southern Italy. Capri's forests, waters, air, sunshine, and the island villas that the world's wealthy yearn for have attracted people from all over the world. Among these, the Blue Grotto is the attraction that everyone who comes to Capri is sure to visit; when the sky is clear, sunlight shines into the cave, and every corner of the deep-blue cave is exquisitely beautiful.
attractions.text_zh: 卡普里岛位于那不勒斯湾南部入海口附近，属意大利坎佩尼亚区。岛上有巴巴罗萨和卡斯蒂利奥内两座中世纪城堡遗迹以及供奉该岛守护神圣科斯坦佑的教堂，是意大利南部著名的游览胜地之一。卡普里岛的森林、水域、空气、阳光和较令全世界富豪憧憬的岛屿别墅，曾吸引了来自世界各地的人们，其中蓝洞是每一个人来卡普里岛一定会参观的景点，天清气朗时，阳光照射入洞穴，深蓝的洞穴内每一处角落都美不胜收。

attractions.text_en: Located in the town of Capri, the Gardens of Augustus record the ten years that Augustine lived here. One side of the garden is a cliff, and in the distance is the azure sea. On the left side of the garden are the Lovers' Rocks; legend has it that these Lovers' Rocks were originally lovers in love who, unable to be together, jumped one after another into the sea to die for love, and afterward became these rocks leaning against each other.
attractions.text_zh: 位于卡普里小镇上的奥古斯都花园记录着奥古斯丁在这里居住的十年生活。花园一侧是断壁，远处则是碧蓝的海水。在花园的左侧是情人石，相传这情人石原本是相爱的恋人，因无法恋爱纷纷跳入海中殉情，之后就成了这相依相偎的石头。

attractions.text_en: Sorrento is a small town in Italy's southern Campania region, also known as the "Lemon Town." The town is built on cliffs by the sea, with beautiful scenery, and the whole town is full of the passionate, intense, and relaxed feel of southern Italy. From here you can easily reach Naples and Pompeii. Standing in the town of Sorrento you can overlook the Gulf of Naples and gaze at Mount Vesuvius and Capri Island, or stroll the streets of Sorrento and taste the limoncello that is abundantly produced locally.
attractions.text_zh: 索伦托(Sorrento)是意大利南部坎帕尼亚大区的一个小镇，也被称为“柠檬小镇”，城镇建造在海边的崖壁之上，风光秀丽，整座城充满着南意热情浓烈的松弛感，从这里可轻松抵达那不勒斯和庞贝。身处索伦托镇可以俯瞰那不勒斯湾、眺望维苏威火山和卡普里岛，也可在索伦托街头闲逛，品尝当地盛产柠檬酒。

attractions.text_en: The ancient city of Pompeii was once a small-to-medium town with mountains at its back and the sea before it, destroyed in an instant by the great eruption of Mount Vesuvius to its northwest. The town's streets and houses were buried by volcanic ash, yet the living scenes of the Pompeians of more than two thousand years ago were completely preserved, and later this vast ruin was gradually excavated. Apart from various architectural relics, there are also some shocking casts. People who died when the volcano erupted, their bodies decayed leaving only an empty shell because they were wrapped in volcanic ash; archaeology injected plaster into these empty shells to make casts, showing the world the tragic state of Pompeii at the time.
attractions.text_zh: 庞贝古城曾是一座背山面海的中小城镇，因西北边的维苏威火山大爆发而毁于一旦。城镇街道、房屋被火山灰掩埋，却完整保留了两千年多前庞贝人的生活场景，后来这座庞大的遗址才被渐渐发掘出来。除各种建筑遗迹外，还有一些触目惊心的铸像。在火山爆发时遇难的人，因被火山灰包裹而身体腐朽得只剩空壳，考古学把这些空壳注入石膏、做成铸像，向世人展示庞贝当时的惨状。

attractions.text_en: This is a historical site within the ancient city of Pompeii. It was once a temple, but because of its great age only ruined walls remain; still, the overall outline of the temple can be made out.
attractions.text_zh: 这是庞贝古城内的一处历史遗址，这里曾经是一座寺庙，但因为年代久远只剩下残垣断壁了，但寺庙的整体轮廓还是看得出的。

attractions.name_en: Forum at the Temple of Apollo
attractions.text_en: Also called the public forum, this was once the political, economic, and religious center of bygone Pompeii. The square hall on the square still has some brick-built column bases remaining; this was the former courthouse and place of commercial trading. Opposite the hall is a Temple of Apollo, whose 48 Corinthian columns are well preserved, along with many exquisite frescoes. On the north side of the square is a Temple of Jupiter with its back to Mount Vesuvius, from which one can clearly gaze at Mount Vesuvius.
attractions.text_zh: 也称公共广场，这里曾经是昔日庞贝的政治、经济、宗教中心，广场上的方形会堂还残留着一些砖砌的圆柱底座，此处是以前的法院与商业交易场所。会堂的对面是一座阿波罗神殿，里面的48根科林斯式圆柱保存完好，还有许多精美的壁画。广场北侧有一座背对着维苏威火山的丘比特神殿，可以清 清楚的眺望维苏威火山。

attractions.text_en: Positano is a small town along the Amalfi Coast in Italy's Campania region. The main part of the town has mountains at its back and the sea before it. A writer described it thus: Positano is a dreamland - while you are there, she is not very real; after you leave, she becomes vivid and lifelike. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as the most beautiful beach in Europe; here the coastline winds and twists, mountains and islands stand towering on the shore, valleys and headlands interlace, orchards and wild plants coexist, and in the pristine natural environment there is rich cultural history, with many picturesque small towns scattered in the dense mountain forests, and the prettier one of them is called Positano.
attractions.text_zh: 波西塔诺是位于意大利坎帕尼亚大区阿马尔菲海岸‎沿岸的一个小镇。城镇主要部份背山面海，一位作家这样形容：波西塔诺是一个梦乡，你在时，她不是很真切，你离开后，她变的栩栩如生。阿马尔菲海岸被誉为欧洲美丽的海滩，这里的海岸线蜿蜒曲折，岸上山岛耸峙巍峨，山谷与海岬交错，果园与野生植物并存，原生态的自然环境中有丰富的人文历史，浓密山林中散落着许多如诗如画的小镇，而其中较漂亮的那一个叫做波西塔诺

attractions.text_en: The Amalfi Coast, rated by the National Geographic magazine of the UN as one of the 50 places most worth visiting in one's lifetime, has the most charming coastline of Naples and indeed the whole world. At the same time it was once the capital of the powerful Maritime Republic of Amalfi, a very important city in the Mediterranean trade of that time. Amalfi is also inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage list. Here there are ancient medieval towns, famous for their unique culture and architecture. Popular towns include Amalfi, Positano, Ravello, and Maiori. In these towns, you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers, and temples; the history of these buildings can be traced back several centuries, and each building has its own story.
attractions.text_zh: 阿马尔菲海岸，被联合国地理杂志评为一生中最值得去的50个地方之一，拥有着那不勒斯乃至全世界最迷人的海岸线，同时它也曾经是强大阿马尔菲航海共和国的首都，是当时地中海贸易中的一个非常重要的城市。阿马尔菲同时也被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产。这里有着古老的中世纪小镇，这些小镇以其独特的文化和建筑而著名。受欢迎的小镇包括阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和莱马尼。在这些小镇中，你可以看到许多古老的教堂、城堡、钟楼和神殿，这些建筑物的历史可以追溯到几个世纪以前，每个建筑都有着自己的故事。

attractions.text_en: This is a city that combines historical depth and beautiful scenery. Salerno lies on the enchanting Amalfi Coast, with ancient churches, a Norman castle, and a picturesque seaside. At seaside restaurants and local snack shops you can taste local Campanian cuisine featuring fresh seafood and traditional dishes.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一座集历史底蕴与美景于一身的城市。萨莱诺位于迷人的阿马尔菲海岸（Amalfi Coast），拥有古老的教堂、诺曼城堡和风景如画的海滨，在海边餐馆和当地小吃店品尝以新鲜海鲜和传统菜肴为特色的坎帕尼亚当地美食。

attractions.text_en: Bari is the capital of Italy's Apulia region, embracing the scenery of the Adriatic coast, with boulevards lined by tall palm trees, blending historical relics, seaside leisure, and authentic cuisine. Among these, the old town has a rich historical atmosphere - medieval tunnels and relics, the Swabian Castle, and Bari Cathedral - giving a feel of the "city beneath the city." The most representative is the exterior of the Basilica di San Nicola; this 11th-century Romanesque church is a place of pilgrimage shared by Catholics and Orthodox, and its interior atmosphere is solemn and peaceful. As for Bari Vecchia (Old Bari), here the lanes are narrow and winding and the white stone walls mottled - it is the most authentic portrayal of southern Italy.
attractions.text_zh: 巴里（Bari）是意大利普利亚大区的首府，坐拥亚得里亚海沿岸风光，高大棕榈树的林荫大道、融合了历史遗迹、海滨休闲和地道美食，其中老城区具有浓郁的历史氛围——中世纪的隧道和遗迹，斯瓦比亚城堡、圣萨比诺大教堂，感受“城市之下的城市”。最具代表性的圣尼古拉大教堂外观（Basilica di San Nicola），这座11世纪的罗马式教堂是天主教与东正教共同朝圣之地，内部气氛庄严宁静。然而巴里老城（Bari Vecchia），这里巷弄狭窄曲折、白石墙面斑驳，是最真实的南意写照。

attractions.text_en: This small town atop a cliff is hailed as the "Mediterranean balcony of Apulia." White houses are built against the rock face, overlooking the deep-blue Adriatic Sea. The most famous sight is the Polignano a Mare bay (Lama Monachile) - a deeply cut rock gorge connecting a stone arch bridge with a natural cave, a classic picture for travelers' check-in photos. In the town you can also see many lines of verse written on walls, in front of doors, and on steps, showing Polignano's title of "town of poetry." You can stroll slowly along the city walls, gazing into the distance at the scenery where azure sea and rocks interlace, or pause briefly at a seaview cafe.
attractions.text_zh: 这座悬崖之上的小镇，被誉为「普利亚的地中海阳台」。白色房屋依岩壁而建，俯瞰湛蓝的亚得里亚海，最著名的景观是波利尼亚诺阿马雷海湾 ( Lama Monachile )—— 一道深切的岩峡口，连接着石拱桥与天然岩洞，是旅人拍照打卡的经典画面。小镇中也可见许多诗句写在墙上、门前、台阶上，展现波利尼亚诺「诗意之镇」的称号。您可沿城墙缓缓漫步，远眺碧海与岩石交错的风景，或在海景咖啡馆短暂停留。

attractions.text_en: Italy's paradise town - the town of Alberobello. Alberobello means "beautiful tree" in Italian, so some people also call Alberobello the Town of Beautiful Trees. The Trulli stone-house settlement is Alberobello's, indeed Apulia's, most representative architectural landscape, famous for its expanses of Trulli (mushroom-shaped white stone houses). The stone houses are built with dry limestone, the roofs are conical structures, white walls and grey roofs, in a unique style. The Alberobello area was originally a barren land with the worst natural conditions; the earliest stone houses can be traced back to the 12th century, and when people first began to live there can no longer be ascertained. From the 16th century, more and more refugees fleeing natural and man-made disasters fled here, using local limestone to build houses on the spot, which are the conical-domed stone houses with bamboo-hat-like roofs that we see today. In 1797 the refugees petitioned the local king of Taranto to legally settle; the refugees were many and powerful, and the king reluctantly allowed this type of easily-demolished conical-domed stone house to exist legally, forming the unique Trulli village of the Alberobello area. The typical Trulli-style building is one in which residents use square limestone blocks to enclose a circular house with no columns or beams, building to an appropriate height, then using flat slabs of rock stacked upward, each piece gradually narrowing to seal the top into a conical pointed roof - this is one of humanity's most primitive house-building methods. The limestone-block houses are sturdy, dry, warm in winter and cool in summer.
attractions.text_zh: 意大利的天堂小镇——阿尔贝罗贝洛小镇，Alberobello在意大利语里是“美丽的树”的意思，因此也有人称阿尔贝罗贝洛为丽树镇。Trulli石屋聚落是阿尔贝罗贝洛是普利亚最具代表性的建筑景观，以成片的Trulli（蘑菇型白石屋）而闻名。石屋采用干式石灰岩砌成，屋顶为圆锥状结构，白墙灰顶，风格独特。阿尔贝罗贝洛地区，原是自然条件最差的不毛之地，最早的石屋可追溯至12世纪，何时开始有人居住已无从可考。16世纪开始，越来越多逃避天灾人祸的难民逃到这里，就地取材用石灰岩建屋，也就是我们现在看到的带有斗笠圆顶的石屋。1797年难民向塔兰托当地的旁波国王请愿合法定居，难民人多势众，国王勉为其难，允许容易拆除的这一类型圆顶石屋合法存在，形成了阿尔贝罗贝洛地区独特的陶尔利村落。典型的陶尔利风格建筑，是居民利用方形石灰岩块，围成无柱无梁的圆形房舍，建至适当高度，再用片状岩片向上堆砌，每片逐步收窄封顶，成圆锥形尖顶，这是一种人类最原始的建屋方法。石灰岩块的房舍，坚固、干燥、冬暖夏凉。

attractions.text_en: The distinctive cave restaurants in Matera's Sassi old town (Sassi di Matera) are mostly converted from original cave dwellings or granaries, retaining natural stone walls, arched structures, and dim yellow lighting, divided into two areas - Sasso Caveoso and Sasso Barisano. Its buildings are carved from natural rock; people have lived here since ancient times, and it is one of the oldest inhabited places on earth. Dishes at the distinctive cave restaurants commonly include handmade pasta with sauce (such as Orecchiette), goat cheese, roasted vegetables, bean puree, country bread, regional wine (such as Aglianico), or homemade desserts.
attractions.text_zh: 马泰拉Sassi 老城区（Sassi di Matera）中的特色洞穴餐厅多改建自原始洞穴民宅或粮仓，保留天然石壁、拱形结构与昏黄灯光，分为两个区域——Sasso Caveoso 和 Sasso Barisano。其建筑由天然岩石雕凿而成，自古便有人居住，是地球上最古老的居住地之一。特色洞穴餐厅菜色常见包括手工意面配酱汁（如Orecchiette）、山羊乳酪、烤蔬菜、豆泥、乡村面包、地区葡萄酒（如Aglianico）或自制甜点。

attractions.text_en: Messina lies at the northeastern tip of Sicily, a city with rich historical and cultural heritage, usually regarded as the gateway to Sicily. We especially enjoy visiting the cathedral's astronomical clock and the Fountain of Orion; this Renaissance masterpiece attracts many curious visitors every day. The regional museum, which holds works by art masters such as Caravaggio, is also a surprise.
attractions.text_zh: 墨西拿位于西西里岛东北端，是一座拥有丰富历史和文化遗产的城市，通常被视为通往西西里岛的门户。我们尤其喜欢参观大教堂的天文钟和猎户座喷泉，这座文艺复兴时期的杰作每天都吸引着众多好奇的游客。收藏有卡拉瓦乔等艺术大师作品的地区博物馆也是一个惊喜。

attractions.text_en: Cosenza, set in the heart of Calabria, is a charming city woven from its thousand-year history and vibrant modern atmosphere. Strolling the narrow streets of the old town center, you can feel an authentic atmosphere, where ancient stones and the bright colors of craft shops and open-air cafes set each other off. Its history is rooted in the ancient Greek era, witnessed by archaeological sites and the spectacular Norman-Swabian Castle, which overlooks the whole city and offers stunning views of the surrounding valleys.
attractions.text_zh: 科森扎，镶嵌在卡拉布里亚的心脏地带，是一座以其千年历史与充满活力的现代气息交织而成的魅力城市。漫步于古城中心狭窄的街道，能感受到一种纯正的氛围，古老的石头与手工艺品店和露天咖啡馆鲜艳的色彩交相辉映。它的历史根植于古希腊时代，这一点由考古遗址和壮观的诺曼-斯韦沃城堡所见证，城堡俯瞰全城，提供了周围山谷的惊艳景致。

attractions.text_en: Piazza IX Aprile is a square with typical Sicilian style, with distinctive black-and-white floor tiles, and in the distance the Ionian Sea and Mount Etna can be seen. On the other side of the square are the pre-Gothic Church of Sant'Agostino and the 17th-century Church of San Giuseppe.
attractions.text_zh: 四月九日广场是一个具有典型西西里岛风格的广场，独具特色的黑白地磚，远处可见的爱奥尼亚海和埃特纳火山。广场另一边则是前哥特风的圣奥古斯丁教堂和17世纪的圣约瑟夫教堂。

attractions.text_en: The Greek open-air amphitheatre is a U-shaped theatre built in the 3rd century BC, suspended between sea and sky. It is the second-largest theatre in Sicily after Syracuse, and due to its unique location it is one of the most distinctive Greek-style theatres in the world. In summer, this theatre is the venue for the Taormina Arts Festival.
attractions.text_zh: 希腊露天圆形剧场是一座建于公元前3世纪的U形剧院，悬浮于海天之间，是西西里仅次于锡拉库扎的第二大剧院，由于其独特的位置使其成为世界上最具特色的希腊式剧院。夏季，该剧院是陶尔米纳艺术节的举办场所。

attractions.text_en: The town is built high on a mountain. Beautiful, tranquil, spotlessly clean. Some call it a pearl on the shore of the Ionian Sea. Here one side is a cliff, the other faces the sea, and the city is built on layer upon layer of mountain rock, forming its momentum of reaching up to the blue sky above and looking down on the sea below, standing towering and lofty. At night, viewed from afar, its scattered lights connect completely into one with the myriad stars in the sky, so that one cannot tell which is heaven and which is the human world. Stroll along Corso Umberto; admire the enchanting Ionian seaside scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 小镇建在高高的山上。美丽、宁静，一尘不染。有人称它为爱奥尼亚海边的一颗珍珠。这里一面是悬崖，一面临大海，城市建筑在层层山石之上，形成它那上接青天，下临大海，巋然耸立的气势。夜晚，远远望去，它的点点灯火和天上的繁星完全连成一片，使人分不清哪是天上，哪是人间。漫步于科索安不托大道；欣赏迷人的伊奥尼亚海滨风光。

attractions.text_en: Mount Etna (Etna), located on the east coast of Sicily, Italy, has an altitude of 3323 meters and an area of 1200 square kilometers. It is a large basaltic stratovolcano, a layered volcano, with about 700,000 people living there. Mount Etna is also one of the most active volcanoes in the world. Mount Etna lies at the junction of the Eurasian Plate and the African Plate, breeding the volcanic-ash geology unique to the surrounding region; together with the warm climate, this land is fertile and rich. The Mount Etna area has rocks, scrubland, grassland, and forests; there is even a wetland.
attractions.text_zh: 埃特纳火山（Etna），位于意大利西西里岛东海岸，海拔3323米，面积1200平方千米，是一座大型玄武岩层火山，为成层火山，约有70万人居住。埃特纳火山也是世界上很活跃的火山之一。埃特纳火山处于亚欧板块和非洲板块交汇处，孕育出周边地域独有的火山灰地质，加之温暖的气候，这片土地肥沃而富饶。埃特纳火山地区有岩石、灌木丛、草地和森林；甚至还有一个湿地。

attractions.text_en: It is the most beautiful Frederician castle on the island. The name comes from George Maniakes, the commander who in the Byzantine period built defensive fortifications and guarded the southern port of the island. According to research, the castle's walls were originally 18 meters high and 3.5 meters thick, with the main facade facing Ortigia and the two sides at sea, until the Spanish remodeled it in the 16th century. The vaults, passages, platforms, and battlements inside the castle all allow people to sense the loftiness of this fortification in those years and the firm role it played in resisting foreign enemies.
attractions.text_zh: 是岛上最美的腓特烈城堡，名字来源于拜占庭时期建筑防御工事、保卫岛南部端口的指挥官乔治•马尼亚切。据考证城堡原先墙高18米，厚3.5米，主立面面向奥尔提伽，两侧面位于海上，直到十六世纪西班牙人对它进行了改造。城堡内的拱顶，通道，平台，垛子都能让人感到这座防御工事当年的巍峨和抵御外敌时发挥的坚挺作用。

attractions.name_en: Fountain of Arethusa (Spring of the Forest Nymph)
attractions.text_en: The Fountain of Arethusa is a freshwater spring. According to records, Aretusa, the forest nymph attendant of Artemis (goddess of the moon and the hunt), was chased by a river god, and she begged Artemis to turn her into a spring to shake off the loathsome river god. Today, the fountain is the home of wild ducks, mullet, and papyrus, and is also a tranquil and beautiful scene.
attractions.text_zh: 阿勒图萨喷泉是个淡水泉眼。据记载，阿耳特弥斯(月神和狩猎女神)的侍女——林中仙女Aretusa被河神追逐，她请求阿耳特弥斯将自己变成了泉水，以摆脱掉讨厌的河神。如今，喷泉里是野鸭、胭脂鱼和纸莎草的安身之地，也是一处宁静美丽的风景。

attractions.text_en: The city of Ortigia was once described by Cicero as "the greatest and most beautiful city of Greece." The colonizers of the time left many ancient-Greek-style buildings within the city, all with histories of over a thousand years, including the ruins of the Temple of Apollo, the Temple of Athena that has been converted into the cathedral, the beautiful Spring of the Forest Nymph, the spacious Greek theatre, and so on. Beside the Greek theatre there is a huge cave called the Ear of Dionysius, shaped like an ear, with enormous echoes. In addition, the city also has many churches from the Christian era, mostly Romanesque and Baroque. These buildings, differing in age and style, are all witnesses to the ancient city's long history; today, they still stand quietly there.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔提伽城曾被西塞罗描述为“希腊最伟大、最美丽的城市”。当时的殖民者在城内留下了许多古希腊风格建筑物，历史都有千年以上，其中包括阿波罗神庙遗址、已被改造成大教堂的雅典娜神庙、美丽的林仙泉、宽广的希腊剧场等等。在希腊剧场旁有一个被成为狄俄尼索斯之耳的巨大岩洞，形如耳朵，回声巨大。另外，城里还有许多基督教时期的教堂，大多是罗马式和巴洛克式。这些年代和风格都不尽相同的建筑物，都是古城悠久历史的见证者，如今，它们依然静静地矗立在那里。

attractions.text_en: The cathedral was once a Greek temple, becoming a church after Sicily was Christianized in the 7th century. The magnificent Baroque facade designed by Andrea Palma in the 18th century AD conceals the former Temple of Athena, but one can still make out the massive Doric columns of 6 by 14 built in the 5th century BC. It is the square where the heroine often appears in the film "Malena."
attractions.text_zh: 大教堂曾经是一座希腊庙宇，7世纪西西里岛基督化后成为教堂。公元18世纪由AndreaPalma设计的华丽巴洛克式外观掩盖了曾经的雅典娜神庙，但还是能够看出公元前5世纪修建的6*14规模巨大的多利克柱式。电影《西西里岛的美丽传说》中，女主角经常出现的广场。

attractions.text_en: Catania lies on the east coast of Sicily, Italy, and is the second-largest city on Sicily. The city sits at the foot of Mount Etna; in history this volcano once brought devastating harm to Catania, but it made the soil here exceptionally fertile, suitable for growing grapes to make wine. The whole city has elegant architecture and broad avenues, facing the sparkling Ionian Sea, which also gives the city another kind of flavor.
attractions.text_zh: 卡塔尼亚(Catania)位于意大利西西里岛的东岸，是西西里岛上的第二大城市。城市就坐落在埃特纳火山的山脚下，在历史上这座火山曾给卡塔尼亚带来过毁灭性的伤害，但使得这里的土壤份外肥沃，适合种植葡萄酿酒。整座城市有着典雅的建筑、宽广的大道，面临着碧波粼粼的爱奥尼亚海，也让这座城市有了另一番风味。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Agrigento is an area full of historical charm, famous for its rich ancient Greek relics and medieval architecture. The old town sits on a high hill, from which one can overlook the surrounding fields and the Mediterranean Sea. The city's history can be traced back to the 6th century BC, when it was called Akragas, an important Greek city-state. As time passed, the city underwent many changes, including rule by Romans, Byzantines, Arabs, and Normans, and the influences of these different cultures left their marks in the city's architecture and urban layout.
attractions.text_zh: 阿格里真托老城是一个充满历史魅力的地区，以其丰富的古希腊遗迹和中世纪建筑而闻名。老城区坐落在一座高耸的山丘上，从这里可以俯瞰周围的田野和地中海。这座城市的历史可以追溯到公元前6世纪，当时称为阿克拉加斯（Akragas），是古希腊的一个重要城邦。随着时间的推移，城市经历了多次变迁，包括罗马、拜占庭、阿拉伯和诺曼人的统治，这些不同文化的影响在城市的建筑和城市布局中留下了痕迹。

attractions.text_en: The [Valley of the Temples], 2 kilometers outside the town of Agrigento, has been one of the most important archaeological sites in the world since 1998 and is one of the UNESCO World Heritage Sites. On the ridge are preserved many Greek-style temple buildings, first built in the 5th century BC, which have stood on this land for two thousand years, and it is also one of the most famous ancient Greek architectural complexes outside Italy. The temples lie atop verdant hills, overlooking the azure sea, gazing into the boundless firmament in the distance.
attractions.text_zh: 距离阿格里真托城镇2公里开外的【神殿之谷】，是自1998年来世界最重要的考古遗址之一，是联合国教科文组织世界遗产之一。在山脊上保留了许多希腊式神庙建筑，始建于公元前五世纪，两千年来一直屹立在这片土地之上，这里也是意大利境外最著名的古希腊建筑群之一。神殿位于翠绿的山峦之上，俯瞰着碧蓝的大海，远望无边界的苍穹。

attractions.text_en: Cefalu is a seaside town on the northern part of Sicily, sitting beneath the cliffs of La Rocca. The tranquil town is built by the sea and dwells by the water, with beautiful scenery. It is also a filming location of "Cinema Paradiso." Cefalu was founded by the ancient Greeks, and its name was also given by the Greeks, because on the east side of the urban area of Cefalu there is a steep rocky mountain that rises straight up. Jutting into the Mediterranean, it forms a topography surrounded by water on three sides. The whole mountaintop looks like a bald-headed person. So the Greeks called this place Cefalu, which actually means "head" in Greek.
attractions.text_zh: 切法卢位于西西里岛正北部的一座海滨小镇，坐落于洛卡山的悬崖峭壁之下，宁静的小镇临海而建，靠水而居，风光秀丽。这里也是《天堂电影院》的取景地哦。切法卢是古希腊人建立的。名字也是希腊人所取，因为切法卢市区的东侧是一座拔地而起，山势很陡峭的石头山。探入到地中海，形成了一个三面环水的地形。整个山头看起来像一个光头的人。于是希腊人称这里为切法卢，其实就是希腊语“头”的意思。

attractions.text_en: The cathedral, first built in 1184 and finally completed in the 18th century, blends multiple architectural styles. From the 13th century it was influenced by the Gothic, and in the 15th century it also incorporated Spanish architectural style; the Gothic double-tier pointed-arch windows and archways, the Catalan-style porch and columns, and the Muslim-style geometric patterns of the apse are all perfectly blended together. The interior of the church is a Norman semicircular hall, very large and empty, the burial place of the Norman royal family. The underground treasury of the church displays all kinds of jewelry and ornaments.
attractions.text_zh: 始建于1184年的大教堂，至18世纪最后完成，融合了多种建筑风格。13世纪开始受到哥特式影响，15世纪又融合了西班牙建筑风格；哥特式的双层尖顶窗和拱门，加泰罗尼亚风格的门廊和柱子，后殿穆斯林风格的几何图案，都完美地融合在了一起。教堂内部是诺曼式的半圆形殿堂，很大很空旷，是诺曼皇室的墓地所在。教堂的地下宝藏陈列着各种各样的珠宝首饰。

attractions.text_en: The Norman Palace was originally built in the 9th century, at that time an Arab fortress, and was later expanded into a royal palace by the Norman conquerors in the 12th century. This palace was the political and administrative center of the Norman kings, and later also became the royal residence of the Kingdom of Sicily. The palace's architecture blends Arab, Byzantine, and Norman styles, displaying the fusion of multiple cultures.
attractions.text_zh: 诺曼王宫最初建于9世纪，当时为阿拉伯的一个要塞，后来在12世纪由诺曼征服者扩建成为王宫。这座宫殿是诺曼国王的政治和行政中心，后来也成为西西里王国的皇家居所。宫殿的建筑融合了阿拉伯、拜占庭和诺曼风格，展现了多元文化的交融。

attractions.text_en:
The heart of Palermo - the meeting point of Baroque art
Quattro Canti lies in the center of Palermo's old town; it is the meeting point connecting the city's two main streets running north-south and east-west, and is hailed as the "heart of Palermo." The four sides of the square are symmetrical Baroque-style facades, each corner decorated with fountains and statues, symbolizing the four patron saints of Sicily, the four kings of Spain, and the changing of the four seasons. Sunlight falls on the golden stone walls, and the carvings and arched windows reflect elegant light and shadow, making it the most representative spot for check-in photos. Strolling here, it is as if you travel back to the glorious years of the 17th century.
attractions.text_zh:
巴勒莫的心脏 · 巴洛克艺术的交汇点
四角广场位于巴勒莫老城区中心，四角广场是连接城市南北、东西两条主要街道的交汇点，被誉为“巴勒莫的心脏”。广场四面为对称的巴洛克风格立面，每一角都装饰着喷泉与雕像，象征着四位西西里守护圣人、四位西班牙国王、以及四季更替。阳光洒落在金色石墙上，雕刻与拱窗辉映出优雅的光影，是最具代表性的拍照打卡地。漫步此处，仿佛穿越回17世纪的辉煌岁月。

attractions.text_en: Teatro Massimo is one of the famous theatres of Italy and Europe. This theatre is famous for its magnificent architecture and excellent acoustic design, and is an important venue for the performing arts. Construction began in 1875, and the designer was the Italian architect Giovanni Battista Basile. The building adopts the Neoclassical style; its exterior is majestic and spectacular, especially its huge dome and rich decorative carvings, making it one of the landmark buildings of the city of Palermo. The interior of Teatro Massimo is equally magnificent, with a huge auditorium decorated with gorgeous marble, gold leaf, and exquisite frescoes. The hall is designed in a horseshoe shape and can hold nearly 1,400 spectators. Its stage was one of the largest in the world at the time, very suitable for large opera and ballet performances. Teatro Massimo became even more internationally known for its appearance in the film "The Godfather Part III."
attractions.text_zh: 马西莫剧院是意大利和欧洲著名的剧院之一。这座剧院以其宏伟的建筑和卓越的声学设计闻名，是表演艺术的重要场所。建设始于1875年，设计者是意大利建筑师乔瓦尼·巴蒂斯塔·巴斯莱（Giovanni Battista Basile）。建筑采用新古典主义风格，其外观雄伟壮观，特别是其巨大的穹顶和丰富的装饰性雕刻，使其成为巴勒莫市的标志性建筑之一。马西莫剧院内部同样壮丽，拥有一个巨大的观众大厅，装饰着华丽的大理石、金箔和精美的壁画。大厅设计成马蹄形，可容纳近1,400名观众。其舞台是当时世界上较大的舞台之一，非常适合大型歌剧和芭蕾舞表演。马西莫剧院因其在电影《教父3》中的露面而在国际上更加知名。

overview.text_en:
After gathering in the morning, freely visit Milan's iconic landmark, the Milan Cathedral (exterior), and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades. In the afternoon, head to Zurich and tour the Grossmünster (Zurich Cathedral) (exterior), Lake Zurich, Bahnhofstrasse, and stroll along the Limmat River.
Overnight: Harry's Home Hotel Zürich-Limmattal or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Gather around 09:00 at the tour bus parking stop of Castello Sforzesco in Milan. Address: Castello Sforzesco Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza 20121 Milano MI, Italie
overview.text_zh:
上午集合后自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊。 下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观），苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街、漫步利马特河边。
夜宿：苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：09:00左右在米兰斯福尔扎城堡旅游大巴停车站集合，地址：CastelloSforzescoParcheggiobusturisticiLanza20121MilanoMI,Italie

accommodation.text_en:
Harry's Home Hotel Zürich-Limmattal or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is set in the heart of the scenic Limmattal, a modern urban residence right next to one of Switzerland's larger shopping centers. The hotel has a bar, and the rooms are spacious and clean, featuring beautiful parquet flooring and modern furniture, large wardrobes, and many little creative touches that make life easier. The hotel offers a variety of buffet or continental breakfasts. Surrounded by lush green valleys, rolling hills, and the meandering Limmat River, it provides a comfortable and natural stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在风景秀丽的利马塔尔中心地带，现代化的城市住宅，紧邻瑞士较大的购物中心，酒店配备酒吧，客房宽敞整洁，拥有漂亮的镶木地板和现代家具、大衣柜和许多让生活更轻松的小创意。酒店提供各类自助或欧陆式早餐。酒店周边绿意盎然的山谷、连绵起伏的丘陵和蜿蜒的利马特河，为您提供舒适自然的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
Visit the filming location of "Crash Landing on You" and encounter romantic Zurich
The opening filming location of the TV drama "Crash Landing on You" is Lindenhof Park in Zurich's old town, where the show's start freezes on the perfect frame of the two leads brushing past each other. With the Limmat River in the foreground, the park offers wonderful views of Zurich. The twin-tower building flashing through the drama is the Grossmünster (Zurich Cathedral), Zurich's acknowledged landmark. Zurich's old town is also an experience not to be missed—here gather traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookstores and flower shops, as well as jewelry and fashion boutiques. Strolling through the old town, you can wander and pause along every street.
highlights.text_zh:
打卡《爱的迫降》取景地，邂逅浪漫的苏黎世
《爱的迫降》电视剧片头取景地就是位于苏黎世老城的林登霍夫公园，正片开始时，定格了两人擦身而过的完美的画面。公园以利马特河为前景可以观赏到苏黎世的美妙景色。剧中闪现的双塔建筑正是苏黎世大教堂，是苏黎世公认的地标建筑。苏黎世老城区也是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰、时尚精品，漫步于老城区，在每个街道里走走停停。

attractions.text_en: Although its name, Duomo, means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as a magnificent example of Italian Gothic architecture, its hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and its white marble exterior walls are carved with thousands of statues. The interior is vast, and sunlight filters through the beautiful stained-glass windows, casting a hazy light full of solemn religious atmosphere. The crypt of the cathedral still preserves the remains of the Church of San Tecla that once stood on the site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a gorgeous shopping mall, though most visitors come here for sightseeing. Under the central arcade is a Prada boutique whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan; the window displays in particular are refreshed every day, and even just standing outside to admire them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele is full of upscale restaurants, cafés, and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also known as Station Street) is one of Europe's longer shopping avenues and one of the world's most expensive shopping streets. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless center of Zurich—lined with luxury brands from around the world and private banks. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless visitors feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored gold bars reputed to be among the world's largest in quantity, leaving many people too thrilled to move. Immersed in it, you can clearly feel the air filled with the aura of wealth, opulence, and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long, with the harbor on its surface packed with all kinds of yachts, like a rich men's club. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center, where white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere on the water, leisurely and carefree—a harmonious scene. The northern shore of Lake Zurich is the residence of the wealthy, known as the "Gold Coast," while the southern shore is called the "Silver Coast." The end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich. As one of "the world's most livable cities," the lives of true Zurich residents are imbued everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: The Grossmünster is one of the three main churches in Zurich, Switzerland (the other two being the Fraumünster and the Predigerkirche). The church is located near the bank of the Limmat River, begun around 1100 and inaugurated about 1220. This church, facing the Fraumünster across the river, played a pivotal role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation; the theology faculty of the University of Zurich and the Reformation Museum are both established here. The stained-glass windows inside the church are masterpieces by the modern Swiss art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for Lucerne to enjoy the scenery of lakes and mountains around Lake Lucerne, listen to the Lion Monument recount that chapter of Swiss loyalty and steadfastness, as well as visit attractions such as the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower; then head to the small town of Iseltwald to tour Lake Brienz and the town scenery; in the afternoon, head to Interlaken, the town at the foot of the "Jungfrau," the Roof of Europe.
Overnight: Solbadhotel Sigriswil (snow-mountain lake-view hotel) or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点；之后前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光；下午前往欧洲屋脊-“少女峰”山脚下的小镇-因特拉肯。
夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Solbadhotel Sigriswil (snow-mountain lake-view hotel) or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the mountain ravine next to the panorama bridge of Sigriswil, with all rooms decorated in an elegant Swiss countryside style. The hotel's views match every imagination of Switzerland, and the rooms enjoy views of Lake Thun, the surrounding mountains, or the village of Sigriswil. Sitting in the hotel restaurant gazing afar at the emerald waters of Lake Thun, with the snow mountains tranquilly reflected, it feels like being inside a painting, letting you fully savor Switzerland's idyllic, paradise-like beauty.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于锡格里斯维尔（Sigriswil）全景桥旁边的山涧，所有的客房装饰为瑞士乡村典雅风格，酒店景观满足对瑞士的想象，客房客房享有图恩湖或周围群山或锡格里斯维尔村景致。坐在酒店的餐厅远眺碧绿的图恩湖水，宁静地倒影的雪山，恍然如画中，让人尽情欣赏瑞士世外桃源般的美好景致。

highlights.text_en:
The town of Iseltwald beneath the snow mountains
As the filming location for the grand happy ending of "Crash Landing on You," where the male and female leads spend "the two happiest weeks of the year," the protagonists' utterly sweet paradise and the transcendent beauty of Lake Brienz seem tailor-made for the drama. With its heavenly lakes and mountains and the unfiltered beauty of Lake Brienz, if there is a paradise on earth, it must be in Iseltwald—peaceful and serene to perfection.
highlights.text_zh:
雪山下的龙疆小镇
作为“爱的迫降”大团圆结局的取景地，剧中男女主角“一年中幸福的两周”都在这里度过，主角甜到齁的世外桃源，超然于世的龙疆湖美景，就像是为该剧量身定做的。人间天堂般的湖光山色，无滤镜的龙疆湖美景，如果有世外桃源，那一定在龙疆，岁月静好也不过如此。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Express passes through here. Surrounded by mountains and lush green grass, the rustic village is scattered along the shore of Lake Brienz, like a paradise far from the hustle and bustle.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne lies in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled among mountains and water, Lucerne possesses the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance halls and mansions, as well as century-old shops, long streets and ancient alleys—they are everywhere. The lakes and mountains of Lake Lucerne reflect the city's beautiful scenery as if real and illusory, making it an extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small towns. Since the 19th century, it has attracted numerous nobles and men of letters to visit and reside, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: This lake has a winding shape, which together with the surrounding mountains forms the classic scenery of "lakes and mountains," attracting large numbers of tourists to visit. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and the piece thus acquired the title "Moonlight"—though this was not Beethoven's original intention.
attractions.text_zh: 这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: This dying lion sculpture was carved into natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground, with a broken spear lodged in its shoulder and, beside it, a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms. The sculpture commemorates the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on August 10, 1792, protecting the safety of Louis XVI's family in the Tuileries in Paris; an inscription beneath the sculpture describes the course of this event. In those days, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, driven by the need to make a living, went to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave in battle, but honor and money could not conceal the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, keeping only the guard serving the Catholic Holy See—the famous Swiss Guard. Owing to their renowned loyalty and valor, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "Dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, visit Interlaken, set in the center between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun, known as God's left eye and right eye. You may freely tour Höheweg and Höhematte, the tranquil village dotted with greenery and nestled between mountains and waters, where man and nature blend as one; or, at your own expense, take the Jungfrau panorama cable car to the summit—Top of Europe, Europe's higher railway station—and visit the "Sphinx Observation Deck" and the Aletsch Glacier; or, at your own expense, head to First, Switzerland's alpine adventure town, and tour the First Cliff Walk. Afterwards, check in at the Novotel Genève Centre Gare in Annemasse.
Overnight: Novotel Genève or Crowne Plaza Hotel in Annemasse near Geneva Harbor or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午参观有上帝左眼与右眼之称的布里恩茨湖和图恩湖中央的因特拉肯，可选自由游览何维克街，荷黑马特，宁静的村庄，绿树掩映，点缀在山水之间，人与自然浑然一体；或者自费选择少女峰全景缆车登顶——Top of Europe欧洲较高的火车站，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”及阿莱奇冰川；或者自费前往瑞士高山探险小镇菲斯特，游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道。随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店。
夜宿：安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Novotel Genève or Crowne Plaza Hotel in Annemasse near Geneva Harbor or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Novotel opened in 2020 and is a comfort-class business hotel under the Accor brand, with decor that harmonizes with its natural surroundings. Inspired by New York's innovative hotel concept, it includes a café and bakery area open to both hotel guests and the public. The hotel has a restaurant serving healthy seasonal cuisine. At the Rooftop 46 bar on the 8th floor of the hotel, overlook the Alps and the Jura Mountains and enjoy happy hour.
accommodation.text_zh:
安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店
诺富特酒店于2020年开业，是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店的装饰与其自然环境相协调。受到纽约创新酒店概念的启发，它包括一个向酒店客人和公众开放的咖啡厅和面包店区。酒店设有一间餐厅，提供健康的时令美食。在酒店8 层的 Rooftop 46 酒吧俯瞰阿尔卑斯山和侏罗山脉，享受快乐时光。

highlights.text_en:
Between the two gem-clear lakes, experience the wonderland of traveling as if within a painting
God especially favored Lake Thun and Lake Brienz on the Bernese Oberland, leaving here lake waters as beautiful and precious as eyeballs. Towns and villages are scattered all around, and from near to far is a vista of lush, dripping greenery, with the snow mountains standing tall in the distance and sunlight tickling the tip of your nose. The changing of the four seasons does not diminish this pastoral beauty in the slightest—between the mountains and waters, every moment is a good time.
highlights.text_zh:
宝石般澄澈的两湖之间，体验人在画中游的胜景
上帝特别眷顾伯尔尼高地上的图恩湖和布里恩茨湖，将如眼珠般美丽而珍贵的湖水留在这里。小镇和村庄星罗棋布，由近及远是满眼苍翠欲滴的绿意，远处的雪山挺拔，阳光在人的鼻子上挠痒痒，四季的变化没有让这田园美景减色一分，山水之间都是好时光。

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is the green square in the town center of Interlaken, Switzerland's famous sightseeing town. This green expanse was once a monastery garden, and now any construction is forbidden here to prevent damage to this beautiful landscape. It is a great place to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast green field there is a fountain and many benches dotted about, making it also a fine place for strolling. Höhematte is also a landing site for paragliders; there is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, where, after paying, staff will take visitors to a nearby mountain for free gliding, allowing you to admire the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is home to the photographer's beloved "dreamy hillside" of Switzerland, a famous postcard photo spot, and is also the Alpine town one must pass through to visit the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen, and others, it forms the most magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-watching resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeside, green grass, waterfalls, dairy cows, and snow mountains together make this an enchanting town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头非常爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald First attracts visitors from all directions to admire the magnificent scenery of the Eiger's north face. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk, anyone will instantly feel they are standing atop the world. The First Cliff Walk is located at the summit of First, offering a unique panorama of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located twenty to thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow all year round, while at the foot of the mountain the grass is lush and the scenery beautiful, making it a renowned sightseeing and outdoor sports resort in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, tour the "flower bridge" area next to the hotel, where Geneva's various local delicacies and specialty shops gather, and visit the old town of Geneva, the Lake Geneva area, and attractions such as the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau (Great Fountain); in the afternoon, take a coach to Paris.
Overnight: Mercure or Novotel Hotel in Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午游览位于酒店旁的“花桥”区域，这里云集则日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店，参观日内瓦老城，日内瓦湖区，花钟和大喷泉等景点；下午乘车前往巴黎。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure or Novotel Hotel in Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Paris Mercure or Novotel is a comfort-class four-star hotel under the Accor brand, located near a large shopping mall, making it convenient for guests to dine and shop. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers a comfortable stay, thanks to its distinctive brand characteristics: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a unique hotel style deeply rooted in local character, and an enthusiastic management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型四星酒店，酒店位于大型商超附近，方便客人有餐购物，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
The old town of Geneva
The upper town on the shore of Lake Geneva, with the beautiful Lake Geneva and the majestic Alps, forms a poetic pastoral landscape. The beautiful scenery on the borders of the two countries changes and interweaves continuously along Lake Geneva—on one side is France's Évian and Annemasse, on the other is Geneva's old town. The entire lake area is listed as a World Heritage Site, with one piece of human heritage after another and well-preserved medieval small towns; the roads are inlaid with cobblestones, and every town and small city has several fountains. Traditional architecture and modern, novel shops interweave into wonderful experiences of breathtaking beauty.
highlights.text_zh:
日内瓦古城区
日内瓦湖畔的上城区，风光旖旎的日内瓦湖和雄伟的阿尔卑斯山，构成的诗意田园风光，两国国境秀丽风景沿日内瓦湖不断变化交错、一会是法国依云安娜玛斯一边是日内瓦的旧城，整个湖区被列为世界遗产，一座又一座的人类遗产以及保护得十分完好的中世纪小城，路上镶嵌着一块块的石板，每个小镇、小城都就有多处喷泉。传统的房屋建筑和摩登新颖的店家，交织成一处处美轮美奂的奇妙体验。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Léman, straddles Switzerland and France and is an important lake in Western Europe, as well as a famous scenic spot and health resort. During the day you can take a cruise boat to tour Lake Geneva, and at night be intoxicated by the flickering neon lights along the shore; luxury cruise ships also often hold concerts or dances on the lake. You can take a cruise boat to enjoy the beautiful scenery along the shore of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, snow mountains, and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Great Fountain is located on Lake Geneva near the English Garden and is one of Geneva's most representative landscapes. The Great Fountain resembles a water column spouted by a whale, 140 meters high with a water output of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away from the city center. At night there is also a chance to see the Great Fountain illuminated by lights, which is even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦较具代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous attraction in Geneva. Switzerland is known as the "Garden Country" and at the same time the "Land of Watches and Clocks," and even more wonderfully, Switzerland's skilled craftsmen ingeniously combine the beauty of flowers with the craftsmanship of clockmaking, creating the "Flower Clock" with great originality.
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称“花园之国”，同时又是“钟表之乡”，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了“花钟”。

attractions.text_en: The upper town on the hillside on the right bank of the Rhône is also called the upper town by local residents because of its relatively high terrain. This is not only a gathering place of churches and historic sites; among the winding alleys there are also many small and charming antique shops, and the former residence of Rousseau, a thinker of the European Enlightenment, is also located in the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, visit the Louvre Museum, the pride of France, where a guide from the French National Pavilion will give an in-depth, themed commentary on selected highlights;
In the afternoon, tour Notre-Dame de Paris, Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior), and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine River cruise to tour Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), Place de la Concorde, and other sites—a full day touring the central attractions of Paris.
Overnight: Mercure or Novotel Hotel in Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: [Because the Louvre limits visitor flow, especially restricting in-gallery guide commentary during peak season, the in-gallery commentary fee of 10 euros per visitor will then be refunded]
overview.text_zh:
上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，届时、将由法兰西国家馆讲解师，精选主题深度讲解；
下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛，埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地参观，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：【由于罗浮宫限流、特别是旺季限制讲解员在馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费10欧元/每位游客】

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure or Novotel Hotel in Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Paris Mercure or Novotel is a comfort-class four-star hotel under the Accor brand, located near a large shopping mall, making it convenient for guests to dine and shop. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers a comfortable stay, thanks to its distinctive brand characteristics: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a unique hotel style deeply rooted in local character, and an enthusiastic management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型四星酒店，酒店位于大型商超附近，方便客人有餐购物，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
Take a Seine River cruise and feel the tenderness and romance of Paris
Take the famous transparent-cabin "Bateaux Mouches" cruise sailing along the Seine, which blends together numerous attractions. The roughly 1-hour, 3.2-kilometer voyage passes famous sites such as Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées, and Paris's Île de la Cité. On the surface of the Seine, feel Paris's romantic night, the beautiful scenery, and the wonderful music—it is called "the in-depth tour of Paris not to be missed."
highlights.text_zh:
乘塞纳河游船，感受巴黎的温柔与浪漫
乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西黛岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》

attractions.text_en: It is one of the world's oldest museums and a world-famous treasure house of art. The Louvre building is U-shaped, divided into new and old parts. The glass pyramid entrance in front of the Louvre was designed by the master Chinese-American architect I. M. Pei. Here are treasured more than 400,000 art treasures, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing artworks from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria, and Rome to European Middle Ages and various Eastern countries—it can be called an outstanding art palace in human history. The itinerary includes ordinary individual-traveler admission tickets (no Chinese audio guide).
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品、其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。 行程包含普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。

attractions.text_en: If the Louvre witnessed the glory of the Gauls, then Île de la Cité, Notre-Dame de Paris, and the Paris City Hall wrote down the indissoluble bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Île de la Cité. Without Île de la Cité, there would be no Paris as it is today.
attractions.text_zh: 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: Notre-Dame de Paris Cathedral is located on Île de la Cité in the center of Paris and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The church is in the Gothic style, and visitors can climb the towers to visit; although you won't meet the "Hunchback of Notre-Dame," you can see the 17th-century great bell, get up close to the mythical beasts on the church's outer walls, and overlook the beautiful scenery of Île de la Cité and the Seine.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西岱岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，游客可以登上塔楼参观，虽然遇不到“钟楼怪人”，但却能看到17世纪的大钟、近距离接触教堂外壁上的神兽、俯瞰西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the symbol of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en:
The Champ de Mars is a large strip-shaped park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the École Militaire (Paris Military School) to its southeast.
Before the second half of the 18th century, this was an abandoned open space, and only after the Military School was established in 1765 did its status gradually rise, when its main purpose was to serve as a place for military training. During the French Revolution, on July 17, 1791, a massacre and bloodshed once took place here. Later, France used this site to host several World's Fairs as well as the 1900 Olympic Games.
attractions.text_zh:
战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。
在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次的世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Paris's fashion center, Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, and freely visit the Palais Garnier (Paris Opera House) (exterior) and fashion districts such as Printemps and Galeries Lafayette.
In the afternoon, head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris to tour the palace; return to Place d'Italie in Paris to conclude the wonderful journey.
overview.text_zh:
上午前往前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货，巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。
下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫；返回巴黎意大利广场结束美好行程。

accommodation.text_en: No accommodation on this day
accommodation.text_zh: 当天无住宿

highlights.text_en:
Stroll along Boulevard Haussmann in Paris
Boulevard Haussmann is not in Paris's bustling district, yet it comes alive thanks to two famous department stores: France's Galeries Lafayette and Printemps, renowned for its home-furnishing boutiques. You can stroll alone and feel the everyday vibe of Boulevard Haussmann; or, together with a few friends, walk along Boulevard Haussmann and enjoy the delight of shopping.
highlights.text_zh:
漫步巴黎奥斯曼大街
奥斯曼大街不在巴黎繁华的区域内，却因为2幢著名的百货公司而生动起来：法国的百货公司———老佛爷百货(GaleriesLafayette)及以家饰精品著称的春天百货(Printemps)。你可以独自漫步，感受奥斯曼大道的生活气息；也可以与三五好友一起，穿行在奥斯曼大街上，享受购物的欣喜。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the historical period of France's feudal rule. In terms of content, it was not only the French court, but also the administrative center of the state, as well as a concrete embodiment of the political views and lifestyle of French society at the time. It was the first time in Europe since the ancient Roman Empire that the power of an autocratic regime could concentrate such enormous manpower, material, and financial resources. At that time, in order to build it, Louis XIV mobilized more than 30,000 workers as well as architects, engineers, and technicians; besides solving the complex technical problems arising from constructing a large-scale architectural complex, they also had to solve problems in various aspects such as water supply and roads. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully proves the progress of France's economy and technology at the time, as well as the wisdom of the laboring people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来，第一次表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann is located between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are the two major department stores, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, the author of "In Search of Lost Time," completed most of the writing of "In Search of Lost Time" in his residence at No. 102 on this street.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en: The Paris Opera House was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861 and is the pinnacle work of eclecticism. Its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms, including the ancient Greek and Roman colonnade and Baroque; grand in scale, exquisite and meticulous, resplendent and magnificent, it is hailed as a theater where painting, marble, and gold ornamentation shine in mutual splendor, giving people great enjoyment. It is one of the typical buildings of Napoleon III.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎歌剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，是折衷主义登峰造极的作品，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受。是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Trondheim is Norway's third-largest city, home to one of Northern Europe's renowned research universities, and full of youthful vitality. It is also the coronation site and ancient capital of Norway's first king, once the religious and political center of medieval Norway. With the solemnity of Nidaros Cathedral, the colorful Bakklandet wooden houses, and the clear waters of the Nidelva River as its backdrop, it is a city that perfectly blends weighty history with vibrant energy. There is no need to rush through a checklist; simply slow your pace and feel another profound charm of Norway beyond the natural fjords, amid the grandeur of the old cathedral, the colorful old wooden houses, and the freshness of the university town.
attractions.text_zh: 特隆赫姆是挪威第三大城市，拥有北欧著名的研究型大学之一，充满年轻活力。同时它也是挪威第一任国王的加冕地与古都，曾是中世纪挪威的宗教与权力中心。以尼德罗斯主教座堂的深沉、巴克兰德木屋的缤纷和尼德尔河的清澈为底色，一座将厚重历史与鲜活动力完美融合的城市。您无需匆忙打卡，只需放慢脚步，在古教堂的庄严、老木屋的缤纷和大学城的朝气中，感受挪威除了自然峡湾之外的另一种深厚韵味。

attractions.text_en: Norway's national cathedral, an important medieval cathedral of Northern Europe and the coronation church of Norwegian kings, magnificent and grand in architecture. First built in 1070, it sits atop the tomb of Saint Olav, Norway's patron saint. Having endured several fires and reconstructions, it is a rare purely Gothic-style cathedral in Northern Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 挪威的国家圣堂，北欧重要的中世纪大教堂，挪威国王的加冕教堂，建筑雄伟壮观。始建于1070年，坐落在挪威守护神圣奥拉夫的墓葬之上，历经数次大火与重建，是北欧罕见的一座纯粹哥特式风格的大教堂。

attractions.text_en: This red wooden bridge is often called the "Gate of Happiness," connecting the city center with the traditional quarters of the old town. Standing on the bridge and looking to one side, you see the colorful warehouses neatly arranged along the river; to the other side, the slowly flowing Nidelva River and the reflections in the water. Early morning and dusk are the most beautiful moments here.
attractions.text_zh: 这座红色木桥常被称为“幸福之门”，连接着市中心与老城的传统街区。站在桥上，向一侧望去，是整齐排列在河畔的彩色仓库；向另一侧，则是缓缓流淌的尼德河与水中倒影。清晨和傍晚是这里最美的时刻。

attractions.text_en: The Atlantic Road is a landmark Norwegian construction of the century, 36 kilometers in total, a stretch of route between Kårvåg and Bud. In 2011, the Atlantic Road was named by the UK's The Guardian as one of the world's best road trip destinations. The Atlantic Road not only features ingenious engineering design, but the scenery on both sides of the road is also breathtaking. Visitors can take in the beautiful natural landscapes and ecological environment of the Atlantic along this road.
attractions.text_zh: 大西洋公路是挪威世纪性建筑，全程36 公里，是从 Kårvåg 到 Bud之间的一段路线。2011年，大西洋公路被英国《卫报》评选为世界最佳公路旅行目的地之一。大西洋公路不仅有其匠心独运的工程设计，公路两旁的风景也令人叹为观止，游客们可以在这条路上饱览大西洋美丽的自然景观和生态环境。

attractions.text_en: The City of the Midnight Sun — Molde is located on the riverbank at the broad estuary of the Romsdalsfjord, a city in the northwestern region of Norway. When Norwegians think of Molde, the first thing that comes to mind is jazz. Every July, the International Midnight Sun Jazz Festival is held here, one of the long-established jazz festivals in Europe. During the festival, visitors from across continental European countries come drawn by its reputation. Standing on the Varden viewpoint at an altitude of 407 meters, you can take in views of the city, the fjord, and the islands, and also enjoy the Molde panorama famous for its 222 snow-covered peaks.
attractions.text_zh: 午夜阳光之城——莫尔德位于罗姆达尔峡湾（Romsdalsfjord）宽阔河口处的河岸上，是挪威西北部地区城市。提到莫尔德，挪威人首先会想到的就是爵士乐。每年七月，国际午夜爵士音乐节在此举行，这是欧洲历史悠久的爵士音乐节。音乐节期间，来自欧洲大陆各国的游客慕名而来。站在海拔407米的瓦尔登观景台上可以一览城市、峡湾、岛屿的美景还可以欣赏以222座被白雪覆盖的山峰闻名的莫尔德全景 。

attractions.text_en: Kristiansund is located on 4 small islands in the North Sea in western Norway, enjoying beautiful coastal scenery. The opera house in Kristiansund is one of Norway's oldest opera houses, first built in 1914. It is a beautiful Art Nouveau-style building and one of the few buildings that survived World War II. The Innlandet district is the old town of Kristiansund, where you can see unique and beautiful seaside architecture, and the few buildings that survived World War II have all been well preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 克里斯蒂安松位于挪威西部北海中的4个小岛上，享有美丽的海岸景观。克里斯蒂安松市内的歌剧院，是挪威古老的歌剧院之一，始建于1914年，是一座美丽的新艺术运动风格筑，是在二战中幸存的少数建筑之一。Innlandet区是克里斯蒂安松的老城区，可以看到独特而美丽的海边建筑，二战中幸存的少数建筑也都得以完善保存。

attractions.text_en: Briksdal Glacier is a branch of Jostedalsbreen, the largest glacier on the European continent by volume. Located in Jostedal Glacier National Park, it is one of its particularly popular glacier attractions. Jostedal Glacier covers 486 square meters, reaching depths of up to 400 meters and 1950 meters above sea level. Briksdal Glacier boasts an incomparably spectacular natural wonder; here visitors will see the 1200-meter-high glacier descending straight into the riverbed from top to bottom, set against the lush forest on one side, magnificent beyond compare.
attractions.text_zh: 布里克斯达尔冰川是欧洲大陆体量占首位的冰川——约斯特达尔布林冰川（Jostedalsbreen）的分支，位于乔斯特达尔冰川国家公园（Jostedal Glacier National Park）中，是其中特别受欢迎的冰川景点。乔斯特达尔冰川占地486平米，深处可达400米深，高于海平面1950米。布里克斯达尔冰川拥有无比壮观的自然奇景，游客在此会看到1200米高的冰川从上到下直入河道，衬着一旁茂盛的森林，无比壮丽。

attractions.text_en: The Flydalsjuvet cliff viewpoint is a scene that frequently appears on postcards. From the Flydalsjuvet cliff viewpoint, you can take in the entire view of the small town of Geiranger in the valley, the Geirangerfjord, and the cruise ships docked at port. A protruding cliff beside the viewpoint is often called the Geiranger Rock by travelers, mentioned together with Pulpit Rock/Preikestolen, Kjeragbolten, and Trolltunga.
attractions.text_zh: 弗里达斯悬崖观景台是明信片上经常出现的一个景点，在弗里达斯悬崖观景台可以将峡谷中的盖朗厄尔小城和盖朗厄尔峡湾以及靠港的邮轮尽收眼底。观景台旁一座突出的悬崖经常被旅行者称为盖朗厄尔石(盖朗格石)，与布道石/祈祷峰、奇迹石和山妖之舌一起被提及。

attractions.text_en: Located north of Bergen on the southwestern coast of Norway, it is one of the most beautiful and mysterious of Norway's fjords. The fjord is 16 kilometers long in total, with mountains over 1500 meters above sea level rising on both banks. It is one of the world's foremost sightseeing destinations. At the head of the fjord is the village of Geiranger, reachable only by a 1000-meter-long road winding down the mountainside. In summer, many tourists come on foot for holidays. Besides the Geirangerfjord church built in 1842, the village also has the Flydalsjuvet viewpoint frequented by photographers and the Dalsnibba viewpoint at an altitude of 1500 meters.
attractions.text_zh: 位于挪威西南岸的卑尔根北部，是挪威峡湾中美丽而神秘的一处。峡湾全长16公里，两岸耸立着海拔1500 米以上的群山，是世界上数一数二的观光胜地，峡湾顶端是盖朗厄尔村，到该村仅靠一条沿山坡蜿蜒而下的长1000米的道路，夏季徒步前来度假的游客很多。村里除1842年建造的盖朗厄尔峡湾教堂外，还有摄影师经常光顾的弗里达尔斯尤威展望台和海拔1500米高的达尔斯尼巴展望台。

attractions.text_en: The Geirangerfjord is famous for its many waterfalls, and the Seven Sisters Waterfall is the brightest star among them. The Seven Sisters Waterfall (Norwegian: De Syv Søstrene or Dei Sju Systrene or Knivsflåfossen) is Norway's 39th highest waterfall and a component of the Geiranger World Heritage Site. Seven distinct waterfalls plunge down together from the air, like sisters dancing together. One of the falls has a 250-meter drop. Opposite the Seven Sisters Waterfall is the Suitor Waterfall (the Suitor or Frieren), forever pursuing the Seven Sisters without rest. These waterfalls are most spectacular between May and July.
attractions.text_zh: 盖朗厄尔峡湾以瀑布众多闻名，而七姐妹瀑布则是这些瀑布中最亮眼的明星。七姐妹瀑布（挪威语DeSyvSøstrene或DeiSjuSystrene或Knivsflåfossen）是挪威第39高的瀑布，也是盖朗厄尔世界遗产的组成部分。七条明显的瀑布从空中一起飞流而下，像是一起舞蹈的姐妹们。其中一条瀑布有250米落差。七姐妹瀑布的对面，就是求婚者瀑布(thesuitor或Frieren)，永不停歇的对七姐妹展开追求。这些瀑布在5月至7月间最为壮观。

attractions.text_en: The Eagle Road (Ørnevegen) is Route 63 located between Geiranger and Eidsdal, famous for its eleven consecutive hairpin bends. This commanding name comes from the fact that, a few days before the road opens each year, eagles often gather near the viewpoint at the summit of the hairpin bends — the Eagle's Bend (Ørnesvingen, 620 meters). The Eagle Road is open year-round, while the rest of the Trollstigen (Troll Road) section is only open to traffic from May to October. The route has many viewpoints with distinctive architecture (for example Flydalsjuvet, Ørnesvingen, Gudbrandsjuvet, etc.), which are advantageous spots for overlooking the fjord.
attractions.text_zh: 老鹰之路(Ørnevegen)是位于盖朗厄尔和埃兹达尔(Eidsdal)之间的63号公路，以接连11个发夹弯所闻名。这个霸气的名字，是因为每年在公路开放之前几天，在发夹弯的顶峰——老鹰之翼(Ørnesvingen，620米)观景台附近经常有老鹰聚集。老鹰之路常年开放，其余的精灵之路路段只在5月到10月通车。线路都不少很有建筑特色的观景台( 例如Flydalsjuvet , Ørnesvingen, Gudbrandsjuvet等)，是俯瞰峡湾的有利地点。

attractions.text_en: One of the most beautiful and steepest mountain railways in the world, descending from the mountain area of Myrdal at 865 meters altitude straight down to Flåm, deep in the Aurlandsfjord, 20 kilometers in total. 80% of this railway is built on slopes with a 55% gradient. First built in 1923, it took 20 years to complete and is called Norway's greatest engineering miracle. Admiring the scenic paintings formed by valleys, waterfalls, cliffs, and snow-capped mountains from the train will absolutely be one of the most unforgettable experiences of your fjord journey. In the railway museum next to Flåm station, you can learn more about the history of this railway's construction.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上最美，最陡峭的高山铁路之一，从865米海拔的米达尔(Myrdal)山区直下到艾于兰峡湾的深处——弗洛姆，全长20公里。这段铁路的80％路段建在55％坡度的山坡上。始建于1923年，历时20年完成，被称为挪威最伟大的工程奇迹。在火车上欣赏山谷、瀑布、悬崖、雪山构成的这一幅幅风景画绝对会是您峡湾之旅最难忘的经历之一。在弗洛姆站旁边的火车博物馆里，可以了解到更多关于这段铁路建造的历史。

attractions.text_en: The Sognefjord is Norway's largest fjord and the world's most famous fjord, reaching 204 kilometers in total length and a maximum depth of 1308 meters. The Sognefjord is the most accessible of the four major fjords, ranked first by National Geographic and a travel magazine as the world's best-preserved and most worthwhile travel destination. Although you cannot see glaciers in summer, there are still waterfalls, calm lakes, and sheer cliffs to dazzle the eyes.
attractions.text_zh: 松恩峡湾是挪威第一大峡湾，也是世界上最著名的峡湾，全长达204公里，最深处达1308米。松恩峡湾是四大峡湾中交通最便利的一个，被国家地理和旅游杂志把峡湾排在世界上保存最完好、最值得旅游的目的地第一名。夏天里看不到冰川，但仍有瀑布、平湖、绝壁让人目不暇接。

attractions.text_en: Voss is hailed as one of the most beautiful fjord towns, located in the center of the fjord region, by a beautiful small lake, through which the Oslo-to-Bergen railway passes. It is a place in Norway where sports and entertainment activities can be found in all four seasons, equipped with most modern leisure and entertainment facilities, only a short distance from many top sports venues, and it also boasts charming lake and mountain scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 沃斯（Voss）号称最美的峡湾小镇之一，位于峡湾地区的中心，在一座美丽的小湖边，奥斯陆到卑尔根的铁路经过这里。它是挪威一个四季都可以找到运动娱乐项目的地方，配备了大部分现代化的休闲娱乐设施，离很多顶尖的运动场地也只有短短的距离，此外还拥有迷人的湖光山色。

attractions.text_en: The Flåm Railway Museum not only offers a detailed introduction to the construction process of Europe's steepest railway line, but also analyzes the technical challenges encountered during construction and the people behind them. On display in the museum is a real El9 locomotive, an old electric track-switching engine, and numerous carts used during track surveying. The museum also has various exhibitions combining charts, text, physical objects, and audiovisuals. Visitors can also gain in-depth understanding of the Flåm train journey through video presentations. The shop at the museum exit has a variety of souvenirs and merchandise printed with the Flåm Railway brand.
attractions.text_zh: 弗洛姆铁路博物馆不仅有欧洲最陡峭铁路线的详细建设过程介绍，还会分析修建过程中遭遇的技术挑战和背后的人物。馆内展出真实的El9火车头，古老的电力转线引擎、众多轨道勘测时使用的推车。馆内还有各种图、文、实物和影音并茂的展览。游客还可以借由视频展示，深入了解弗洛姆火车之旅。博物馆出口处的商店内有各色纪念品和印有弗洛姆铁路品牌的商品。

attractions.text_en: Bryggen is a series of Hanseatic League commercial buildings arranged on the eastern side of the Bergen fjord in Norway. Bryggen has been listed as a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage Site since 1979. Its name shares the same origin as the Belgian city of Bruges. Bryggen is the oldest part of the city. In 1360, the Hanseatic League established a trading station here, and Bergen developed into an important trading center. Today, the colorful facades of these old buildings facing the harbor, the maze-like wooden houses, and commercial streets have become the city symbol of Bergen.
attractions.text_zh: 布吕根是排列在挪威卑尔根峡湾东侧的一系列汉萨同盟商业建筑。布吕根自1979年被联合国教科文组织列为世界文化遗产。其名称与比利时城市布鲁日为同一来源。 布吕根为城市古老的部分。1360年，汉萨同盟在此建立贸易站，卑尔根也发展成一个重要的贸易中心。如今，这些老建筑面对海港的彩色墙面，如同迷宫般的木质房屋和商业街道已经成为了卑尔根的城市象征。

attractions.text_en: Bergen is a major Norwegian port, and more than half of Norway's fish catch and processed seafood products are exported to the world via the port of Bergen. In addition, this is also a necessary passage on the Atlantic and Arctic Ocean shipping routes, and all kinds of fresh seafood are sold at the Bergen fish market. Therefore, if you have a chance to visit Bergen, you must come to the fish market to feast. The Bergen fish market is located right by the wharf on the south bank of the Bergen harbor, facing the World Heritage Bryggen old town across the inner harbor. The fish market is divided into two parts: an indoor fish center and an open-air market. You can buy the freshest fish of the day, from cod, salmon, lobster, crab, North Sea king crab, scallops, and Arctic sweet shrimp to whale meat, everything is available.
attractions.text_zh: 卑尔根是挪威大港，挪威有超过一半的渔货与海鲜加工制品是经由卑尔根港口外销到全世界。除此之外，这里也是大西洋与北极海航线的必经之路，各种新鲜海产都会在卑尔根鱼市场贩卖。因此，有机会来卑尔根一趟，一定要来鱼市场大快朵颐一番。卑尔根鱼市场就位在卑尔根港南岸的码头边，与世界遗产布吕根老城隔著内港遥遥相对。渔市场有分室内渔货中心与露天市场两个部分。可以买到当天最新鲜的鱼货，从鳕鱼、鲑鱼、龙虾、螃蟹、北海帝王蟹、干贝、北极甜虾到鲸鱼肉，应有尽有。

attractions.text_en: We can take the Fløibanen funicular from the city center, which will bring you to the viewpoint of Mount Fløyen in just a few minutes. This funicular celebrated the milestone of its 100th year of operation in 2018. At the summit, you can overlook the panorama of the city of Bergen. The harbor, the fjord, and the neatly arranged wooden houses of the entire city, along with the mountains surrounding Bergen, are all taken in. On the mountain there are also family activities such as a children's playground and treasure hunting. The lower city-center station of the funicular is only about 200 meters from the fish market (Fisketorget).
attractions.text_zh: 我们可以从市中心乘坐弗罗伊索道，几分钟就能将你带到弗罗伊恩山(Fløyen)的观景台。这座缆车在2018年将迎来它运营100岁的大日子。在山顶能够俯瞰卑尔根市的全景。海港、峡湾以及整座城市整齐排列的木房子和环绕卑尔根的山头全部尽收眼底。山上还有儿童游乐场和寻宝等亲子活动。索道的山下市中心站距离鱼市(Fisktorget)仅200米左右。

attractions.text_en: The Hardangerfjord is the gentlest of the four major fjords, a fjord with pastoral scenery. About 800 years ago, monks came here and planted apple and apricot trees, which bloom every May and bear fruit in summer. Worth seeing are waterfalls, natural parks, glaciers, and more.
attractions.text_zh: 哈当厄尔峡湾，四大峡湾中最为平缓，有田园般风景的峡湾。约800年前僧侣到此地种植了苹果树和杏树，每到5月便开花，夏季结果。值得一看的有瀑布、自然公园，冰河等。

attractions.text_en: It is one of Norway's renowned waterfall areas. Located in Norheimsund, the great waterfall rushes down mightily from a nearly vertical slope, shrouding the cliff edge in a thin veil of mist, creating an ever-changing, never-ending rainbow effect that enchants onlookers. Nature lovers can find endless joy at the Hardangerfjord. With the magnificent grandeur of the fjord and waterfalls here, there are multiple sightseeing itineraries to choose from; you can hike around the fjord, or take a kayak to explore the fjord from a fresh perspective. The mountain road is an attraction not to be missed. The mountain road winds up the steep slope, with the waterfall cascading among it, especially spectacular every May and June. A must-visit attraction of the Hardangerfjord, the unique feature of this waterfall is that travelers can pass behind it without getting wet at all.
attractions.text_zh: 是挪威闻名的瀑布区之一，位于诺海姆桑德(Norheimsund)的大瀑布从近乎垂直的山坡浩浩荡荡奔腾而下，瀑布使悬崖边笼上一帘轻纱般的薄雾，在营造了一番变幻莫测、永不落幕的虹彩效果，让看客为之陶醉。大自然爱好者可以在哈当厄尔峡湾获得无穷乐趣。这里峡湾和瀑布的雄浑壮美，有多个观光游览行程可供选择，您可在峡湾四周徒步远足，或是乘坐皮艇，从全新的角度探索峡湾。山路是不容错过的景点。山路沿着陡峭的山坡蜿蜒而上，瀑布飞流其间，每年5、6月份的时候尤为壮观。哈当厄尔峡湾必去景点，这座瀑布的独特之处是旅行者可以从后面穿过瀑布，身上却一点都不被打湿。

attractions.text_en: Odda is a small town in Norway's Hardangerfjord, whose orchards are listed as a World Cultural Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 奥达（Odda）是挪威哈当厄尔峡湾中的一座小镇，其中的果园被列入世界文化遗产。

attractions.text_en: Also called the Pulpit, named for its shape resembling a church preacher's pulpit. Pulpit Rock is located in the middle of the Lysefjord, a giant natural stone platform formed suspended in midair. The top of the platform has a vertical drop of 604 meters to the fjord below, protruding more than 30 meters from the connected ridge, standing abruptly and upright among the towering mountains deep in the fjord, extremely spectacular and astonishing. The flat surface of the rock has an area of about 600 square meters. The hiking trail leading to Pulpit Rock is 3.8 kilometers in total, with about 330 meters of uphill from the starting point. There are red T-marks all along the way. The round trip from the starting point takes about 4-5 hours, of medium intensity. Among the world's 50 most magnificent views selected by the travel-and-lifestyle website under America's CNN, Pulpit Rock ranked first. It is also one of the best spots to overlook the Lysefjord and appreciate the beauty of the fjord.
attractions.text_zh: 又叫布道台，由于形状类似教堂牧师的讲台而得名。布道石位于吕瑟峡湾中部，是一块天然凌空形成的巨型石台，台顶与下方的峡湾垂直落差604米，从接连的山脊突出30多米，突兀地直立于峡湾深处的崇山峻岭中，十分壮观，令人惊叹。岩石平面的面积约600平方米。通往布道石的登山径全长3.8公里，从起点开始有大约330米的上坡。沿途都有红色T字标记。从起点来回大概4-5小时，中等强度。美国CNN旗下旅游生活网站评选出的全球50处最壮丽景色，布道台位列第一。也是俯瞰吕瑟峡湾，领略峡湾之美的最佳地点之一。

attractions.text_en: The Lysefjord is far from the sea, reaching deep inland, with water as still as a mirror, without a single wave. There are no surging waves of the sea here, only the reflections of the high mountains and cliffs in the fjord — at times you cannot tell which layer is the reflection and which is the real scene. There is not a single sound, only tranquility. Occasionally a small boat travels through the fjord, its bow parting the water surface, forming a wave that divides on either side of the boat, the edges of the wave shimmering with tiny white foam. After the small boat passes, the water surface quickly returns to calm again.
attractions.text_zh: 吕瑟峡湾远离大海，深入内陆，水静得如同镜面，没有一丝波浪。这里没有大海的波涛和汹涌，只有高山悬崖在峡湾中的倒影，有时分不清哪个层面是倒影，哪个层面是实景。没有一点声音，只有宁静。偶尔会有一只小船行进在峡湾中，船头推开水面，形成一道波浪，分在船的两边，波浪的边缘泛着小小的白色浪花，小船过后，水面很快又恢复了平静。

attractions.text_en: Haugesund is located in southwestern Norway, a city in Rogaland county. It sits on the Karmøy peninsula, facing the North Sea. Haugesund's history can be traced back to the Viking Age, when it was an important trade and maritime center. The city's name comes from Haug in Norse mythology, meaning "the mountain of the sea god."
attractions.text_zh: 海于格松位于挪威西南部，是罗加兰郡的一个城市。它坐落在卡尔达伦半岛上，面临北海。海于格松的历史可以追溯到维京时代，当时这里是重要的贸易和航海中心。城市的名字来源于挪威神话中海神海格，意为“海神的山”。

attractions.text_en: The giant sword monument located by the seaside of Stavanger, commemorating the "Battle of Hafrsfjord." The sculpture is composed of three Viking giant swords over ten meters high, respectively representing peace, unity, and freedom. Ancient swords found from all over the country were melted into the swords, which can be called "forging swords into swords." It is now also the city symbol of Stavanger.
attractions.text_zh: 位于斯塔万格海边的巨剑阵纪念碑，纪念“Hafrsfjord之战”的雕塑由三把十几米高的维京巨剑组成，分表代表和平、统一和自由。剑中熔入了从全国各地发现的古剑，可谓“铸剑为剑”。现在也是斯塔万格的城市标志。

attractions.text_en: Getting to know Norway anew should begin with Stavanger's Fargegaten district. The colorful district overturns the rigid impression of Norway. The Fargegaten district is completely different from the equally beautiful old town; the old wooden houses are painted in all kinds of vivid color combinations, making Fargegaten look more distinctive. Along the street are cafés, restaurants, small bars, and various gift and candy shops, a famous district very much worth sightseeing. It has now become a much-photographed street in Northern Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 重新认识挪威应该从斯塔万格的法格卡腾街区开始，色彩缤纷的街区，颠覆挪威刻板的印象，法格卡腾街区与同样美丽的老城区截然不同，古老的木质房屋被粉刷成各类颜色栩栩如生的组合，使得法格卡腾看起来更与众不同，沿街都是咖啡馆、餐厅、小酒吧和各类礼品、糖果的商店，非常值得观光游览的著名街区。现在已经成为北欧出镜率很高的街头。

attractions.text_en: Stavanger Old Town is located on the western side of the Stavanger harbor, consisting of 173 wooden houses built in the late 18th and early 19th centuries. The wooden houses mainly came from fishing and canning workers settling in Stavanger. However, the small area on the western side of the harbor, usually called "Old Stavanger," is regarded as the representative of the entire Stavanger wooden-house city. The two Michelin restaurants in the city, Renaa and Sabi Omakase, tirelessly pursue the creation of fresh local cuisine, inspiring other restaurants throughout the Stavanger region.
attractions.text_zh: 斯塔万格老城区位于斯塔万格港西侧，由建于18世纪末19世纪初的173套木质房屋组成。木质房屋主要来自渔业和罐头业工人在斯塔万格定居点。但是，通常是称为“老斯塔万格”的港口西侧那一小块区域被视为整个斯塔万格木屋城的代表。城中的两家米其林餐厅Renaa和Sabi Omakase孜孜不倦地追求制作出新鲜的当地美食，激励着整个斯塔万格地区的其他餐厅。

attractions.text_en: Kristiansand is a dazzling pearl in southern Norway, famous for its natural beauty, beaches, and vibrant cultural life. As Norway's fifth-largest city, Kristiansand is a perfect travel destination.
attractions.text_zh: 克里斯蒂安桑（Kristiansand）是挪威南部一颗璀璨的明珠，以其自然美景、海滩和活跃的文化生活而闻名。作为挪威第五大城市，克里斯蒂安桑是一个完美的旅游目的地。

attractions.text_en: Oslo City Hall is a brick-red building, completed in 1950 to celebrate Oslo's 900th anniversary of founding. It was finished by Norwegian artists who continuously decorated and embellished it from 1900 to 1950. The multiple halls inside the City Hall display the works of 323 artists, comprehensively showing people the history, culture, and the work and life of the Norwegian people. Each room here has a special display, from furniture arrangements to figural murals and the sea views visible through the windows — everywhere makes tourists feel its historical atmosphere. In addition, the Nobel Prize award ceremony is held here every December 10.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆市政厅是一座砖红色的建筑，是于1950年为庆祝奥斯陆建城900年而建成，它由挪威的艺术家们从1900年至1950年间不断地装饰和润色才得以完工。市政厅内部的多个大厅分别展出着323位艺术家的作品，全面地向人们展示了挪威的历史、文化以及人们的工作和生活。这里的每个房间都有特别的展示，从家具摆设到人物壁画以及可以透过窗户看到的海景，无处不让观光客感受到其历史的氛围。另外，每年12月10日诺贝尔奖的颁奖仪式在这里举行。

attractions.text_en: The Oslo Royal Palace (1825–1848) was built in the 19th century and is the working place of King Harald. The palace is built on a high ground, directly facing the main downtown street — Karl Johans gate. Surrounding the palace are 330 acres of woodland and parks, with the public avenue passing through here leading straight to the commercial district in the city center.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆皇宫（1825年－1848年）建于19世纪，是哈拉尔国王的办公地。皇宫建在一片高地，正对面是市区主要街道-卡尔·约翰大街，环绕王宫的是330亩林地和公园，穿过这里的公共大道直通市中心的商业区。

attractions.text_en: The Oslo Opera House faces the Oslo inlet directly, its architectural style resembling a ship. It is Norway's famous cultural building following the Nidaros Cathedral (Nidarosdomen Cathedral) built in Trondheim in the early 14th century. Seen from outside the theater, the most striking feature is the white sloping stone roof rising up from the Oslofjord; visitors can stroll on the roof and take in the beautiful cityscape of Oslo. Sometimes there are free open-air concerts outside the opera house, where visitors can sit on the platform enjoying the sea view while enjoying the music.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆歌剧院正对着奥斯陆小峡湾，建筑风格像一艘船，它是继14世纪初建造于特隆赫姆（Trondheim） 的 尼德罗斯大教堂（Nidarosdomen Cathedral）后，挪威国内著名的文化建筑。从剧院外面看，最显著的特征是白色的斜坡状石制屋顶从奥斯陆峡湾（Oslofjord）中拔地而起，游客可以在屋顶上面漫步，饱览奥斯陆的市容美景。有时候歌剧院室外会有免费的露天音乐会，游客可以坐在平台上一边欣赏海景，一边享受音乐。

attractions.text_en: The Vigeland Sculpture Park is named after the famous master sculptor Gustav Vigeland. The park has a total of 192 sculptures, totaling 650 figural statues. The central idea of all the statues in the Vigeland Sculpture Park concentrates on highlighting one theme — "life" — depicting the various stages of a person from birth to death, giving visitors many insights into life, and it is therefore also called the "Park of the Journey of Life."
