Sitting in the hotel's restaurant and gazing into the distance at the emerald-green waters of Lake Thun and the snow-capped mountains tranquilly reflected in it, it is as if you are within a painting, allowing you to fully appreciate Switzerland's idyllic, paradise-like beautiful scenery.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于锡格里斯维尔（Sigriswil）全景桥旁边的山涧，所有的客房装饰为瑞士乡村典雅风格，酒店景观满足对瑞士的想象，客房客房享有图恩湖或周围群山或锡格里斯维尔村景致。坐在酒店的餐厅远眺碧绿的图恩湖水，宁静地倒影的雪山，恍然如画中，让人尽情欣赏瑞士世外桃源般的美好景致。

highlights.text_en:
The Jungfrau region
As a famous, iconic tourist destination of Switzerland, the Jungfrau is not a single snow mountain, but a series of different Swiss scenic combinations surrounding the Jungfrau and Interlaken, including many different snow-mountain experiences, which together create the splendid and rich tourist scenic areas of Switzerland's Jungfrau, First, Grindelwald and so on. The Jungfrau summit panoramic cable car lets you experience all kinds of different things. First's Cliff Adventure Park, as the originator of aerial-adventure-type tourism projects, and the high-altitude paragliding not only adorn the snow mountains but also bring many thrilling activities to the younger crowd.
highlights.text_zh:
少女峰地区
作为瑞士著名的代表性旅游胜地，少女峰不是座雪山，而是围绕着少女峰、因特拉肯的一系列不同的瑞士风景组合，包含多种不同的雪山体验，成就了 精彩而丰富的瑞士少女峰 、 菲斯特，格兰维尔德等景点旅游景区。 少女峰登顶景观缆车，可以感受各种不同的体验。菲斯特空天冒险乐园，作为空天探险类旅游项目的始祖，而高空滑翔伞不仅仅装饰了雪山，还给年前群体带来了许多的刺激活动。

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is a green meadow square in the center of Interlaken, the famous Swiss sightseeing town. This green expanse was once the garden of a monastery; now the construction of any buildings on it is forbidden in order to prevent the destruction of this beautiful landscape. This is a good place from which to gaze at the Jungfrau. On the vast green expanse there are fountains and it is also dotted with many benches, so it is also a good place for a walk. Höhematte is also the landing place for hang-gliding/paragliding; there is a reception point on the edge of the lawn, and after payment staff will take visitors to the nearby mountains for free gliding, where you can appreciate the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is home to the famous postcard photography spot of Switzerland's "dreamy hillside," a favorite in the hearts of photographers, and is also an Alpine town through which one must pass when touring the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen and others, it forms the more magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeside, green grass, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow-capped mountains together make up this fascinating town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头较为喜爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald-First attracts visitors from all directions who come to admire the magnificent scenery of the north face of the Eiger. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk peak trail, anyone will immediately feel that they are standing on the summit of the world. The Cliff Walk peak trail is located at the summit of First, where you can take in a unique panorama of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered by ice and snow all year round, while at the foot of the mountain there is lush green grass and beautiful scenery; it is a well-known sightseeing and outdoor-sports resort in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the town of Lauterbrunnen and tour Lake Lauterbrunnen and the town scenery. Afterward, go to Lucerne and tour the scenery of Lake Lucerne, listen to the Lion Monument recount that period of Swiss history of loyalty and steadfastness, as well as the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and the octagonal water tower and other attractions. Then head to Zurich.
Overnight: Zurich Limmattal Haus zum Hirschen Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。之后前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点。之后前往苏黎世。
夜宿：苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Zurich Limmattal Haus zum Hirschen Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the picturesque heart of the Limmattal, a modern urban residence next to Switzerland's larger shopping center. The hotel is equipped with a bar; the guest rooms are spacious and tidy, with beautiful parquet floors and modern furniture, large wardrobes and many small ideas that make life easier. The hotel offers various buffet or continental breakfasts. The verdant valley, rolling hills and winding Limmat River around the hotel provide you with a comfortable, natural stay experience.
accommodation.text_zh:
苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在风景秀丽的利马塔尔中心地带，现代化的城市住宅，紧邻瑞士较大的购物中心，酒店配备酒吧，客房宽敞整洁，拥有漂亮的镶木地板和现代家具、大衣柜和许多让生活更轻松的小创意。酒店提供各类自助或欧陆式早餐。酒店周边绿意盎然的山谷、连绵起伏的丘陵和蜿蜒的利马特河，为您提供舒适自然的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
The town of Lauterbrunnen beneath the snow mountains
As the filming location for the happy-reunion ending of "Crash Landing on You," where the leading man and woman of the drama spent "the happiest two weeks of the year," the protagonists' paradise that is sweet to the point of cloying, the transcendent beautiful scenery of Lake Lauterbrunnen, seems tailor-made for the drama. The heavenly lakes and mountains, the unfiltered beauty of Lake Lauterbrunnen—if there is a paradise on earth, it must be in Lauterbrunnen; serene, peaceful years are nothing more than this.
highlights.text_zh:
雪山下的龙疆小镇
作为“爱的迫降”大团圆结局的取景地，剧中男女主角“一年中幸福的两周”都在这里度过，主角甜到齁的世外桃源，超然于世的龙疆湖美景，就像是为该剧量身定做的。人间天堂般的湖光山色，无滤镜的龙疆湖美景，如果有世外桃源，那一定在龙疆，岁月静好也不过如此。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Express passes through here. Here it is surrounded by mountains, with lush green grass, and quaint villages scattered along the shores of Lake Lauterbrunnen, truly a paradise far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en:
Lake Lucerne
This lake has a winding, twisting shape, and together with the surrounding mountains forms typical "lake and mountain" scenery, attracting large numbers of tourists who come to sightsee. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight on Lake Lucerne, and so this piece acquired the title "Moonlight"—although this was not Beethoven's own intention.
attractions.text_zh:
卢塞恩湖
这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled between mountains and water, Lucerne has the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance palaces and mansions, as well as century-old shops, long streets and ancient lanes can be seen everywhere. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne all the more reflects the city's beautiful scenery in an illusory yet real way; it is the extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful little towns. From the 19th century onward, it attracted numerous princes, nobles and men of letters to come to tour and reside, and artists obtained endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: This dying lion sculpture was carved into the natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground, with a broken spear thrust into its shoulder and a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms beside it. This sculpture was made to commemorate the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on 10 August 1792, protecting the safety of the Louis XVI family in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; below the sculpture there is text describing the course of this event. In those days, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, driven by the need to make a living, went to various European countries one after another to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and fought bravely and skillfully, but honor and money could not cover up the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, leaving only the guard serving the Holy See of the Catholic Church—that is the famous Swiss Guard. Owing to their famous loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has continued in service to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and hailed the "dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving sculpture in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, tour attractions such as the Grossmünster (Zurich Cathedral, exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse. Afterward, set off for the fashion capital—Milan. After arriving, freely visit Milan's iconic building, the Milan Cathedral (Duomo, exterior), and one of Europe's beautiful commercial arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, then conclude this wonderful journey.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街等景点。之后出发前往时尚之都-米兰，到达后自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊，然后结束美好行程。

accommodation.text_en: No accommodation
accommodation.text_zh: 无住宿

highlights.text_en:
Pay homage to the Milan Cathedral, which took 500 years to complete and is renowned throughout the world for its numerous exquisite carvings and Gothic spires
Construction began in 1386, and it is the iconic building of the center of Milan. The main body of the cathedral took more than four centuries to be essentially completed in 1812, while the detail work continued until 1960 when one of the cathedral's bronze doors was installed. The years have not only endowed it with the vicissitudes of history, but have also created for it a manifold variety of styles: Gothic spires paired with Baroque-style carvings, from top to bottom, extravagant in the extreme.
highlights.text_zh:
瞻仰历经500年建成，以众多精美的雕刻和哥特式的塔尖而闻名于世的米兰大教堂
始建于1386年，是米兰市中心的标志性建筑。教堂主体历经4个多世纪才于1812年基本完工，而细节工程则一直持续到1960年安装完成教堂的一扇铜门为止。岁月不仅赋予了它历史的沧桑，同时也为它营造出多重的风格样式，哥特式的尖塔搭配巴洛克风格的雕饰，自上而下，极尽奢华。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. The piers on the lake surface are filled with all kinds of yachts, like a rich people's club. One end of the Lake Zurich stretch reaches deep into the city center, and on the lake surface white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere, leisurely and content, a harmonious scene. The north shore of Lake Zurich is the residence of the wealthy, known as the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." The end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich. As a "most livable city in the world," the life of true Zurichers is permeated everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also called Station Street) is one of Europe's longer shopping avenues and one of the most expensive shopping avenues in the world. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless, valuable-as-gold center of Zurich—here luxury brands from all over the world are spread everywhere, and private banks line the street. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless tourists will feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored a quantity of gold bars said to be among the largest in the world, which makes many people so excited they cannot tear themselves away. Being in the midst of it, you can clearly feel that the air is permeated with the aura of wealth, luxury and languor.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: The Grossmünster is one of the three main churches of Zurich, Switzerland (the other two being the Fraumünster and the Church of St. Peter). The church is located near the bank of the Limmat River; construction began around 1100 and it was inaugurated around 1220. This church, which faces the Fraumünster across the river, played a pivotal role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation; both the theology faculty of the University of Zurich and the Reformation Museum were established here. The stained-glass windows inside the church are masterpieces of the Swiss modern art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, although most of the tourists who come here come to sightsee. Under the central arcade there is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the very best in Milan—especially the window displays, which are updated daily; simply standing outside the windows and admiring them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is filled with quite a few high-end restaurants, cafés and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱二世拱廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Although its name, Duomo, means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Towering over the city center, the Milan Cathedral began construction in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, its hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and its white marble exterior walls are carved with thousands of statues. The interior space is broad and vast; sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaic pictures on the windows, the light hazy, full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the cathedral's crypt are also preserved the remains of the Church of St. Tecla that stood on the original site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

overview.text_en:
On this day, make your own way to Oslo Airport according to your flight time and take a direct flight to Evenes. Upon arrival, the guide will meet you at the airport and take you to Svolvær.
Overnight: Anker Brygge Hotel or an equivalent five-star hotel
(Anker Brygge Hotel earns its status as a traditional five-star hotel through the protection and development of the traditional pristine fishing village culture and the rorbu cabin architecture of Lofoten, rather than relying on luxury and extravagance. The rorbu cabins chosen for this product are traditional Norwegian fishing village buildings; each building contains standard rooms with private bathrooms, and each rorbu cabin is shared by two to three groups of travelers, where the interior of the room is private space and the public areas outside the room are shared space used by all travelers.)
overview.text_zh:
当天根据航班时间自行前往奥斯陆机场乘坐航班直飞埃沃内斯，抵达后导游接机前往斯沃尔维尔。
夜宿：安克尔布里嘉酒店或同等五星级酒店
（安克尔布里嘉酒店获得传统五星级酒店归结于传统原生态渔村文化和罗浮顿水木屋结构建筑的保护与发展，并非依靠奢侈与豪华，本产品选择的水木屋为挪威传统渔村建筑，每栋建筑分包含拥有独立卫生间的标准间，每栋水木屋供两到三组游客使用，其中房间内为私人空间，房间外的公共区域为全体游客共同使用空间）

accommodation.text_en: Anker Brygge Hotel or an equivalent five-star hotel. Located at the harbor in the center of Svolvær, the Anker Brygge Hotel has become a five-star classic hotel by virtue of its classical beauty and distinctive fishing village culture. This famous Norwegian traditional fishing village rorbu (cabin) hotel has rooms that all carry a profound sense of history. The hotel enjoys magnificent mountain and sea views, picturesque scenery perfect for photography, and seagulls even come to visit from time to time. The interior features quaint timber decor with antique kitchenware as decoration, warm and cozy. The hotel's restaurant and harbor bar are the most popular dining spots in town, serving a hearty breakfast and delicious traditional local Lofoten cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh: 安克尔布里嘉酒店或同等五星级酒店 位于斯沃尔韦尔市中心码头的安克尔布里嘉酒店，凭借古典之美和特色的渔村文化成为五星级古典酒店，这所著名的挪威传统渔村水木屋酒店，所有房间都沉重的历史感，酒店享有壮丽的山景和海景，风景如画，非常适合拍照，还时有海鸥来串门。内部古色古香原木装潢，古董厨具做装饰，温馨，酒店的餐厅和码头酒吧是镇上最受欢迎餐厅，提供丰盛的早餐，美味罗弗敦当地传统的菜肴。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, head to the end of the European highway, the city with the world's shortest name - Å, then set off for Reine to take in the magnificent scenery of Reine; head to Hamnøy, Norway's iconic red-house village, as well as the yellow fishing huts. Afterwards return to the traditional fishing village of Svolvær. Overnight at the Anker Brygge Hotel or an equivalent five-star hotel.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，前往欧洲公路的尽头，世界上最短的名称的城市-奥镇，随后出发前往雷纳，全览雷讷壮丽景色；前往挪威标志红房子小镇-哈姆诺伊以及黄色渔屋。随后返回斯沃尔维尔传统渔村 。夜宿安克尔布里嘉酒店或同等五星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Anker Brygge Hotel or an equivalent five-star hotel. Located at the harbor in the center of Svolvær, the Anker Brygge Hotel has become a five-star classic hotel by virtue of its classical beauty and distinctive fishing village culture. This famous Norwegian traditional fishing village rorbu (cabin) hotel has rooms that all carry a profound sense of history. The hotel enjoys magnificent mountain and sea views, picturesque scenery perfect for photography, and seagulls even come to visit from time to time. The interior features quaint timber decor with antique kitchenware as decoration, warm and cozy. The hotel's restaurant and harbor bar are the most popular dining spots in town, serving a hearty breakfast and delicious traditional local Lofoten cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh: 安克尔布里嘉酒店或同等五星级酒店 位于斯沃尔韦尔市中心码头的安克尔布里嘉酒店，凭借古典之美和特色的渔村文化成为五星级古典酒店，这所著名的挪威传统渔村水木屋酒店，所有房间都沉重的历史感，酒店享有壮丽的山景和海景，风景如画，非常适合拍照，还时有海鸥来串门。内部古色古香原木装潢，古董厨具做装饰，温馨，酒店的餐厅和码头酒吧是镇上最受欢迎餐厅，提供丰盛的早餐，美味罗弗敦当地传统的菜肴。

attractions.text_en: Approaching from the steep Reine mountain pass, this is an excellent vantage point for admiring Reine. Afterwards head to the village of Hamnøy, a small village with only one restaurant and one fisherman's hut, and likewise one of the classic photography scenes; the bridge on the west side at the village entrance heading toward Reine is an advantageous shooting angle. On the day, if due to weather, physical condition, or because children cannot climb the Reine mountain, you will instead go to Hamnøy village to take photos, where you can also capture classic themes such as the sea, fjords, snowy mountains and fishing villages.
attractions.text_zh: 从陡峭的雷纳山口前往,是欣赏雷纳有利地点,随后前往哈姆诺伊村这条小村只有一家餐厅及一个渔民小屋，同样也是摄影的经典场景之一，在村口西面前往雷讷的桥上就是有利的拍摄角度，当天如果因为天气原因、体力原因、或儿童无法攀雷纳山，当天前往哈姆诺伊村拍摄，在这里也能拍到海水、峡湾、雪山、渔村等经典主题。

attractions.text_en: Hamnøy fishing village is one of the three beautiful pristine fishing villages on the island of Moskenesøya. When you stand inside the Hamnøy fishing village of Lofoten, there is a feeling of tranquil time travel, as if from another world. Among the photos that stunned the world in 2014, Hamnøy fishing village was one of them.
attractions.text_zh: 哈姆诺伊渔村是莫斯克斯内斯岛上三个美丽的原生态渔村之一，当你站在罗弗敦 哈姆诺伊渔村 里面的时候，有一种恍如隔世般宁静穿越的感觉。在2014年全球震撼的照片里， 哈姆诺伊渔村 渔村就位列其中。

attractions.text_en: Å is the town with the shortest name in the world. "Å" is the last syllabic character in Norwegian, representing the place where everything ends and begins anew. Å lies at the very end of the Lofoten Islands highway and is a protected traditional fishing village. It is also a paradise for photographers. On first arriving at the town of Å, you will immediately be drawn to the red Norwegian fishermen's hut buildings in the town. These fishermen's huts, built in the nineteenth century and still preserved to this day, have outer walls painted deep red; there are both single-story bungalows and two-story buildings, all built of wood, standing out conspicuously on the Lofoten islands.
attractions.text_zh: 奥镇世界上名字短的小镇，“Å”在挪威语中是最后一个音节字符，代表着一切的结束和重启之地。奥镇在罗弗敦群岛公路的尽头，是一个受到保护的传统渔村。这里也是摄影师的天堂，初到Å小镇时，立刻会被镇上红色的挪威渔人小屋建筑所吸引。这些建于十九世纪仍保存到现在的渔人小屋样式，外墙漆着深红色的颜色，有单层的平房，也有双层的建筑，全数都是以木头建造，十分显眼地伫立在罗弗敦岛上。

attractions.text_en: Yellow houses: located on the famous Lofoten island of Sakrisøy, this island is renowned for the row upon row of yellow fishing huts that, dotted among other colors, create contrasting scenery against the snowstorms. Most of the houses on the island are painted in bright, glossy yellow as fishing huts. The dazzling colors reflect on the calm fjord waters, and combined with a white blizzard backdrop, make for a beautiful Lofoten postcard.
attractions.text_zh: 黄房子：位于罗弗敦著名的岛屿Sakrisøy，这个岛屿以一排排黄色渔屋点缀着其他的色彩在暴风雪中形成的反差风景而闻名，岛上大部分的房屋都涂上颜色鲜艳油亮色黄色渔屋，炫丽的色彩倒影在峡湾的平静海面上，如果配合白色的暴雪背景，将是罗浮顿美丽的明信片。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, you may choose to go sea fishing for North Atlantic cod with the local fishermen, or freely explore the urban area of Svolvær. Afterwards head to the town of Henningsvær to visit the small-island football pitch built on the rocks. Then follow the E10 highway to Harstad. Overnight: Scandic Harstad Hotel or an equivalent four-star hotel.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，可选择跟随当地渔民海钓北大西洋鳕鱼，或自由游览斯沃尔维尔市区，之后前往亨宁斯韦尔小镇，参观修建在岩石上的小岛足球场。随后沿着E10公路前往哈尔斯塔。夜宿：斯堪迪克哈尔斯塔酒店或同等四星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Scandic Harstad Hotel or an equivalent four-star hotel. Scandic, a famous Nordic hotel chain brand, is located in the old-town commercial district of Harstad. The hotel faces the harbor, adjacent to the fjord wharf. With modern architecture and comfortable interior spaces, the hotel is surrounded by several famous restaurants, and the renowned Umani restaurant is within walking distance. The hotel offers an abundant Nordic buffet breakfast, including freshly baked bread, cold cuts, Norwegian specialty sea fish, a variety of fruits and vegetables, and many kinds of beverages.
accommodation.text_zh: 斯堪迪克哈尔斯塔酒店或同等4星级酒店 北欧著名连锁品牌斯康迪克酒店位于哈尔斯塔老城商业街区，酒店面向海港，比邻峡湾码头。现代化的建筑，舒适的内部空间，酒店周围环绕着多家著名餐厅，步行可达著名的Umani 餐厅。酒店提供丰富的北欧自助早餐，涵盖新鲜现烤面包、冷切肉类、挪威特色海鱼、各种果蔬与多款饮品。

attractions.text_en: This small fishing village of only 500 people also has a football pitch, located on a rocky islet, surrounded by beautiful fjords and azure sea, lending it an added tranquility and beauty. The football pitch came about to fulfill the wish of a local 14-year-old child. It makes one feel a longing while at the same time being utterly envious of the innocence and kindness of the Norwegians.
attractions.text_zh: 这个仅有500人的小渔村还拥有一座的足球场，位于一处岛礁之上，被优美的峡湾和湛蓝的海水所包围，多了一番宁静和唯美。足球场的由来是为了当地一个14孩子的心愿而建，可谓让人心生向往的同时又无比羡慕挪威人的纯真与善良。

attractions.text_en: Whether seen on a map or experienced first-hand on the spot, it is a beautiful little town with a fairyland feel, like a celestial terrace upon the sea.
attractions.text_zh: 无论从地图上看还是到现场身临其境，都是一座有着海上瑶台般仙境感的美丽小镇。

attractions.text_en: Harstad is located on Hinnøya in the Lofoten archipelago. Here there are unforgettable natural experiences, local cuisine prepared by excellent chefs, genuine shops, music festivals, unspoiled archipelagos, and more! The most romantic place in Norway, where you can see the midnight sun, located in the middle of the aurora belt — Harstad is also ready to entice you. For travelers, a rich culinary experience has become an important experience for many visitors, just like the unique attractions and unforgettable activities, and so too is the food. Harstad has become a destination for travelers seeking delicious cuisine, where you can not only taste a variety of seafood from the archipelago, but every dish also leaves a deep impression on travelers with its artistry. Harstad's cuisine originates from centuries of local traditional culture and the warm hospitality of the people of northern Norway, which has earned it the title of Norway's Nordic capital of cuisine.
attractions.text_zh: 哈尔斯塔位于罗浮墩群岛屿 Hinnøya，这里有令人难忘的自然体验、由优秀厨师烹制的当地美食、货真价实的商店、音乐节、未受破坏的群岛等等！ 挪威最浪漫的地方，可以看到午夜的阳光，位于北极光带的中间——哈尔斯塔也准备好引诱您 对游客而言，丰富的美食体验已成为许多游客的重要体验，与独特的景点和令人难忘的活动一样，美食也是如此。哈尔斯塔已成为游客寻访美味佳肴的目的地，不仅可以品尝来自群岛的各种海鲜，每道菜都将艺术性也给游客留下了深刻的印象。哈尔斯塔美食源自数个世纪的当地传统文化和挪威北部人的热情好客，为他赢得了挪威北欧美食之都的称号。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, head to Senja island, touring the Senja peninsula loop along the way as part of Norway's National Tourist Routes. The first stop is the Bergsbotn viewpoint, followed by the Tungeneset viewpoint, the best spot to admire the "Devil's Teeth," and finally Ersfjord beach, where the beautiful sandy beach has a famed "golden toilet." Afterwards take the polar fjord ferry to Sommarøy island. Overnight: Tromsø Sommarøy Arctic Hotel or an equivalent four-star hotel.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，前往塞尼亚岛，沿途游览挪威国家公园旅游路线塞尼亚环半岛之旅，第一站抵达贝格斯观景台，接着来到欣赏恶魔之齿的最佳地点奇迹山峦瞭望台，最后来到精灵峡湾海滩，美丽的沙滩上有一座享有“黄金厕所”，随后乘坐极地峡湾渡轮前往索玛罗伊岛，夜宿：特罗姆瑟索玛罗伊北极酒店或同等四星级酒店。

accommodation.text_en: Tromsø Sommarøy Arctic Hotel or an equivalent four-star hotel. Located in the Arctic Ocean region of Tromsø, the Sommarøy Arctic Hotel is hailed as the "Polar Caribbean" hotel, set amid magnificent Arctic natural scenery with an exceptionally favorable geographical location. In summer you can enjoy the midnight sun, while in winter you can witness the magical aurora borealis — this inspiring land offers attendees ample space to give full play to their creativity. Winter storms are equally spectacular, with Norway's traditional colorful wooden houses forming a unique polar landscape under the Arctic Ocean wind and snow.
accommodation.text_zh: 特罗姆瑟索玛罗伊北极酒店或同等四星级酒店 位于特罗姆瑟的北冰洋地区的索玛罗伊北极酒店，被誉为“极地加勒比”酒店，坐拥壮丽的北极自然风光，地理位置得天独厚，夏季可欣赏午夜阳光，冬季则可欣赏到神奇的北极光——这片激发灵感的土地为与会者提供了充分发挥创造力的空间。冬季的暴风雨也同样壮观，挪威传统的彩色木屋在北冰洋风雪下组成独特的极地风景线。

highlights.text_en:
Senja Archipelago
Until now, for many travelers, Senja island remains a hidden gem — here, you can experience the charm of nature first-hand. It includes Tungeneset, Bergsbotn, Mefjord, Ersfjord, and the views of the historic fishing hot spot and the wharf hotel, all utterly captivating. The Senja archipelago scenic route is surely one of the famous routes among the 18 routes.
highlights.text_zh:
塞尼亚群岛
直到现在，对于许多旅行者来说，塞尼亚岛仍然是一块隐藏的宝石——在这里，你可以亲身领略大自然的魅力。包含奇迹山峦（Tungeneset）、贝格斯景观台（Bergsbotn）、美孚峡湾（Mefjord）、精灵峡湾（Ersfjord）和历史悠久的渔业胜地以及码头酒店的景色令人着迷。塞尼亚群岛风景路线一定是 18 条路线中著名的一条。

attractions.text_en: Senja island is a brilliant pearl in northern Norway. Because the island possesses all kinds of Norwegian landforms, it is hailed as a "miniature" of Norway. Senja island is famous for its magnificent natural scenery, its long periods of aurora activity, its abundant wild marine animals, and Norway's uniquely tranquil fishing villages, making it a paradise for adventure lovers and nature enthusiasts.
attractions.text_zh: 塞尼亚岛是挪威北部的一颗璀璨明珠，因为岛上拥有挪威的各种地貌，被誉为挪威的“缩影”。塞尼亚岛以其壮丽的自然风光、长时段的北极光爆发期、丰富的野生海洋动物、挪威独特的宁静的渔村而闻名，是探险爱好者和自然爱好者的天堂。

attractions.text_en: The Tungeneset viewpoint is located at the tip of the headland between Steinsfjord and Ersfjord. This section of boardwalk made of Siberian larch spans across the rocks, offering views of the sharp peaks of the Okshornan range on Senja island in northern Norway, also known as the "Devil's Teeth."
attractions.text_zh: 奇迹山峦瞭望台 位于 斯坦斯峡湾（Steinsfjord） 和精灵峡湾（ Ersfjord） 之间的岬角顶端。这一段被西伯利亚落叶松制成的人行桥横跨岩石，可欣赏到位于挪威北部 塞尼雅岛上的欧克斯曼群峰 （Okshornan） 的锋利山峰，也被称为“恶魔之齿”。

attractions.text_en: The Bergsbotn viewpoint is set amid the picturesque scenery of Skaland, Norway, and is a must-visit for all nature lovers and travelers who want to immerse themselves in magnificent views. This scenic vantage point is located high above the surrounding terrain, providing a position to showcase the region's stunning natural beauty. Visitors can enjoy magnificent views of the fjords, mountains and lush green vegetation, making it an ideal place for photography, picnics, or simply immersing oneself in the tranquil atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh: 贝格斯景观台坐落在挪威斯卡兰风景如画的风景中，是所有自然爱好者和想要沉浸在壮丽景色中的旅行者的必游之地。这个风景优美的观景点位于周围地形的高处，提供了一个展示该地区令人惊叹的自然美景的有利位置。游客可以欣赏峡湾、山脉和郁郁葱葱的绿色植物的壮丽景色，使其成为摄影、野餐或只是沉浸在宁静氛围中的理想场所。

attractions.text_en: A dreamlike beach with white sand, located in a sheltered bay, where you can relax and immerse yourself in the tranquil beauty of this pristine beach with its fine white sand and crystal-clear water. This is the perfect place to relax and take exquisite photos. Don't forget to visit the unique golden toilet and take a quirky photo to add a touch of fun to your adventure.
attractions.text_zh: 梦幻般的海滩，有白色的沙滩，位于一个受庇护的海湾中，在这里您可以放松身心，沉浸在这片原始海滩的宁静美景中，这里有细白的沙滩和清澈的海水。这是放松身心和拍摄精美照片的完美地点。别忘了参观独特的金色厕所，拍一张奇特的照片，为您的冒险增添一丝乐趣。

attractions.name_zh: 波特汉姆极地峡湾渡轮
attractions.text_en: Along the way you admire on one side the beauty of the Arctic fjord scenery, and on the other the grandeur and impact of the Arctic Ocean. The sky changes its colors according to different moods, with birds and schools of fish following along the way; the deep blue of the fjords corresponds with the vast white glaciers of the Arctic Ocean, and at sunset, it becomes beautiful scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 沿途欣赏一遍的北极峡湾风景的秀美，另外一遍北冰洋的壮观与震撼，天空根据不同的心情而更改色彩，沿途的鸟类与鱼群跟随，深邃的峡湾蓝色与白茫茫的北冰洋巨大冰川对应，落霞时，成为美丽的风景。

attractions.text_en: Sommarøy island here is hailed as the "land without time." The island's residents have abandoned the traditional 24-hour system and have even hung clocks on the bridge leading onto the island. Here you need not worry about the passage of time. There is no fixed schedule, no tasks that must be completed; everything follows your own wishes. You can decide when to get up, when to eat, and when to sleep according to your own feelings. In addition to its unique notion of time, Sommarøy island also possesses astonishing natural scenery. Towering mountains, crystal-clear lakes, dense forests and vast grasslands — every place is full of primitive and pure beauty.
attractions.text_zh: 索玛诺伊岛这里被誉为“无时间之境”，岛上的居民们摒弃了传统的24小时制，甚至将钟表悬挂在了进岛的桥上。在这里你无需担心时间的流逝。这里没有固定的时间表，没有必须完成的任务，一切都随心所欲。你可以根据自己的感觉来决定何时起床、何时用餐、何时入睡。除了独特的时间观念，索玛诺伊岛还拥有令人惊叹的自然风光。巍峨的山峦，清澈的湖泊，茂密的森林以及广袤的草原，每一处都充满了原始而纯净的美。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, head to the harbor wharf of Tromsø. Here you can either tour the pedestrian street of the urban area of this Gateway-to-the-Arctic city and visit the Arctic library, or choose to take a sightseeing boat out to sea at your own expense to watch the polar fjords and the migration of large whales. Afterwards head to Narvik. Overnight: Quality Hotel Grand Royal Narvik or an equivalent four-star hotel.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，前往特罗姆瑟海港码头，在这里或游览北极门户之城市区步行街，北极图书馆游览，或选择自费乘坐观光船出海，观赏极地峡湾及大型鲸鱼迁移，随后前往纳尔维克。 夜宿：纳尔维克斯皇家品质酒店或同等四星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Quality Hotel Grand Royal Narvik or an equivalent four-star hotel. This historic gathering hotel — the Grand Royal Hotel is an important part of Narvik's history. The hotel was built in the early 20th century and once served as a military base during World War II. Over the years, the hotel has been carefully upgraded, blending tradition with modern comfort. The hotel has two restaurants that are deeply loved by locals and travelers alike. At the Rallar'n Pub Kro restaurant, you can savor tender, juicy steaks and classic dishes in a relaxed and pleasant atmosphere. The Linken Restaurant Bar on the top floor of the hotel enjoys magnificent views of the mountains and fjords. The hotel's modern, airy decor lets you relax in the lobby or bar between meetings and admire the magnificent views of the azure waters of Ofotfjord.
accommodation.text_zh: 纳尔维克斯皇家品质酒店或同等四星级酒店 这所历史性的聚会酒店 ——皇家品质酒店是纳尔维克历史的重要组成部分，酒店建于 20 世纪初，曾作为二战期间的军事基地。多年来，酒店经过精心升级，将传统与现代舒适融为一体。酒店拥有两所在深受当地人和游客喜爱的餐厅，Rallar'n Pub Kro餐厅，您可以在轻松愉悦的氛围中品尝鲜嫩多汁的牛排和经典菜肴。酒店顶层的Linken Restaurant Bar餐厅，坐拥壮丽的山脉和峡湾景致，酒店现代通风的装饰让您在会议间隙在大堂或酒吧放松身心，欣赏奥福特峡湾湛蓝海水的壮丽景色。

highlights.text_en:
A polar fjord whale-watching journey, encountering the gentle giants of the ocean.
The boat will cruise around the beautiful fjords and islands to seek out and watch these enormous mammals turning freely in the ocean, splashing up beautiful sprays of water. Along the way, you will discover some interesting behaviors of the whales, since whales often appear near the boat — you may get splashed by the seawater, but in return you will capture incredible photos! After the cruise is about to end, you will visit the city of Tromsø.
About 5-7 hours of going out to sea to watch whales: a foraging whale leaps out, open up the aperture to freeze the scene, share the frame with the "overlord of the seabed." Winter Tromsø is like a colorful "Winterfell," a forgotten gem of the Art Nouveau movement and structural functionalism; experience the rich nightlife of this big city in northern Norway. During the cruise, the guide will introduce you to information about the whales, and you will be able to watch this great marine mammal up close. Although we cannot guarantee that you will definitely see whales, the success rate of recent whale-watching cruises has remained very high. Therefore, this will be a wonderful and rare opportunity to watch these gentle giant whales approach the coast to feed on the schools of herring that gather in winter.
highlights.text_zh:
极地峡湾观鲸之旅，邂逅海洋中温柔的庞然大物。
游船将围绕美丽的峡湾和岛屿巡航，去探寻观看这些巨大的哺乳动物在海洋里自由翻转，溅起漂亮的水花。一路上，你会发现鲸鱼一些有趣的行为，因为鲸鱼经常会在船的附近出没，你可能会被海水溅湿，但是相应地你会拍摄到让人难以置信的照片！巡航即将结束后参观特罗姆瑟城市。
5-7小时左右的出海观鲸，觅食的鲸鱼一跃而出，调大光圈定格画面，与“海底霸主”同框，冬季的特罗姆瑟好像五彩“临冬城”，是新艺术运动和结构功能主义的遗珠，体验挪威北部大城市丰富的夜生活。 巡航期间，导游会为你介绍鲸鱼的相关信息，你也能近距离观看到这个伟大的海洋哺乳动物。虽然我们不能保证你一定会看到鲸鱼，但最近的观鲸巡航成功率一直保持在非常高的概率。因此，这将是一次绝妙的难得机会，去观看这些温柔的巨鲸靠近海岸去捕食冬季成群的鲱鱼。

attractions.name_en: Going Out to Sea to Watch Whales
attractions.text_en: The Lyngen strait of the Norwegian Sea, influenced by warm currents, does not freeze over in winter, and large schools of herring pour in, attracting whales to come hunt and breed. We follow the experienced crew to explore the mysterious deep-sea whales. In winter there is a chance to see different kinds of seabed "overlords," such as orcas, humpback whales and fin whales. At times they are also very curious about us, and will try to approach us, giving us the opportunity to observe the whales' activities up close. Every surfacing and diving is so real, no longer the image in our minds or on television.
attractions.text_zh: 挪威海的灵恩海峡受暖流影响，冬季不会冰封，大量鲱鱼群涌入吸引鲸鱼前来捕猎及繁殖。我们跟随经验丰富的船员，探索神秘的深海鲸鱼，冬季有机会看到不同种类的海底“霸主”，比如虎鲸，座头鲸和长须鲸。它们有时对我们也十分好奇，会尝试接近我们，让我们有机会近距离观察鲸鱼的活动，每次出水入水都如此真实，不再是我们脑中想象或是电视里的画面。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, you will be transferred to the airport according to your flight time, take your own flight to Oslo, and conclude this pleasant journey!
[On this day, according to the flight information, transfer service from Narvik to the airport is provided; sightseeing, guide, and other vehicle services cannot be provided. The itinerary ends upon arrival at Evenes Airport.]
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，根据航班时间送至机场，自行乘坐航班到达奥斯陆，结束愉快旅行！
【当天行程根据航班信息提供特纳尔维克到机场的送机服务，无法提供游览、导游及其它车辆服务，到达埃沃内斯机场后结束行程】

accommodation.text_en:
No accommodation
Cost description
accommodation.text_zh:
无住宿
费用说明

attractions.text_en: Located in the heart of Rome, the spectacular Colosseum was built in ancient Rome to please the triumphantly returning generals and soldiers and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was a place reserved for slave owners, nobles and free citizens to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat between slaves, and it is Rome's most famous historical relic. The Colosseum is a masterpiece and marvel that can be regarded as a model in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for its enormous, majestic and spectacular scale. Although only most of its skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and magnificent momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方，是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en:
The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman kings Victor Emmanuel II and Umberto I, among others, rest in eternal peace here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period and a model of the exquisite construction technology of ancient Rome; Michelangelo praised it as "the design of angels."
Note: Since the Pantheon is a religious site, if you need to enter and visit please observe the rules, for example: clothing must not bare the shoulders or back, shorts and short skirts are not allowed (they must cover the knees), and food and drink may not be brought inside.
attractions.text_zh:
万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。
提示：因万神殿属于宗教场所，如果您需入内参观请遵守例：着装不能露肩、露背 短裤、短裙不行（必须 盖过膝盖 ），不可携带饮食进入。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday" and has become a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and beautiful figure seems to have merged with the Spanish Square and with beautiful Rome, becoming a memory people can never shake off. The whole Spanish Square is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The steps total 138 in all and are the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.text_en: Also called the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology, magnificent in momentum and grand in scale. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and if it lands in the water, your dream will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast mottled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and take photos.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a small town on the hills of the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. The Pienza he oversaw rebuilding in 1459 is regarded as a model of the "ideal city," and it is therefore hailed as the "touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other medieval Italian towns, Pienza is unique in that one can look down from the city walls upon the scenery of the World Heritage Site "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hilltop towns; it is a unique convergence of art and nature, holding rich traces of history. Its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the Italian city-state ideal of "good government."
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old city, is filled with the masterpieces of artistic masters and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, criss-crossing cobbled alleys and the deep, hidden courtyards tucked away everywhere, you feel as though you are in the European Middle Ages of a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. For several centuries this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the fourteenth century. Besides its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the making of pastries. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties—almond soft biscuits ricciarelli, nut tarts panforte, peppered spiced nut cakes pan pepato, rice puddings budini di riso, walnut biscuits cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena. Directly facing the square are Siena's town hall and tower, and within the town hall is the civic museum, which houses many paintings of the Sienese School, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is Torre del Mangia; it is the second-tallest tower in Italy, reaching a vertical height of 102 meters, and tourists can reach the top via 55 flights of stairs to take in the beautiful scenery of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.name_en: Cattedrale di Santa Maria del Fiore (Florence Cathedral) (requires queuing to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: The Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is the indisputable symbol of Florence, its iconic red dome dominating the city skyline. The most stunning aspect of this architectural marvel is observing its façade up close—the geometric patterns formed by white, green and pink marble are like a giant inlaid carpet, every piece of stone precisely calculated. Especially when the sunlight strikes at an angle, the green serpentine stone gives off an emerald-like luster, transitioning gently with the pink marble; it can be called the most magnificent "stone embroidery" of the Renaissance period.
attractions.text_zh: 圣母百花大教堂是佛罗伦萨无可争议的象征，其标志性的红色穹顶主宰着城市天际线。这座建筑奇迹最震撼之处在于近距离观察其外立面——白、绿、粉三色大理石组成的几何图案如同巨型拼花地毯，每一块石料都经过精密计算。尤其当阳光斜照时，绿色蛇纹石会泛出翡翠般的光泽，与粉色大理石温柔过渡，堪称文艺复兴时期最华丽的"石头刺绣"。

attractions.text_en: Like an open-air sculpture gallery, it concentrates the political and artistic history of Florence. The Fountain of Neptune in the center of the square is often overlooked by tourists, but when the muscular lines of its bronze mermen and steeds are lit up by spotlights at dusk, they suddenly burst forth with Baroque dramatic tension. And in front of the town hall, where the replica of Michelangelo's "David" stands, is still a gathering place for citizens to this day; over six hundred years the contest between power and art has been frozen here into eternity.
attractions.text_zh: 像一座露天的雕塑美术馆，浓缩了佛罗伦萨的政治与艺术史。广场中央的海神喷泉虽常被游客忽略，但其青铜人鱼与骏马的肌肉线条在暮色中被射灯照亮时，会突然迸发出巴洛克式的戏剧张力。而米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品所在的市政厅门前，至今仍是市民集会的地点，六百年来权力与艺术的角力在此凝固成永恒。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier large-span circular-arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his feelings of longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over several hundred years it has experienced floods, social upheaval and war yet remained standing, and it is one of Florence's famous landmark buildings.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space continuing from the Renaissance to the present day. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian luminaries such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring in detail. Around the square are several cafés and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for holding various cultural activities and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract large audiences. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture and feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间 ， 广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy. Located on the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) on the north side of the city of Pisa in the province of Tuscany, it is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, selected by the UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. According to legend, in AD 1590 Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassland. The Square of Miracles is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square stand four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of San Giovanni, and the Camposanto (Pisa cemetery). The ancient city walls and gates are also preserved around the square. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for these five cliffside villages and towns: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the world's most beautiful hiking routes, about 15–20 kilometers, taking around 5 hours, with the Mediterranean on one side and the mountains on the other, and Italian fishing villages ahead—a destination that countless hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete; it is hailed as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, with hundreds of spires soaring into the clouds and thousands of statues carved on its white marble exterior walls. The interior space is vast, and sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaic paintings on the windows, with hazy light full of solemn religious atmosphere. In the crypt of the church, the remains of the Church of Santa Tecla that originally stood on the site are still preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This cross-shaped glass-vaulted arcade, built in the 19th century, is not only one of the world's oldest shopping malls, but also a city-level model of art and architecture. Here are gathered the flagship stores of Italian luxury brands such as Prada and Gucci, but even if you don't shop, strolling through it is like walking through a museum. At the time-honored cafés at the end of the arcade, such as Caffè Biffi or Savini Milano, you can order an espresso or taste a tiramisu dessert and experience the ease and elegance of the Italian pace of life.
attractions.text_zh: 这条19世纪修建的十字形玻璃拱顶长廊不仅是世界上最古老的购物中心之一，更是一座城市级的艺术与建筑典范。这里汇聚了Prada、Gucci等意大利奢侈品牌旗舰店，但即便不购物，漫步其中也如同穿行于一座博物馆。在长廊尽头的老字号咖啡馆，如Caffè Biffi或Savini Milano，您可点一杯意式浓缩咖啡或品尝提拉米苏甜点，体会意式生活节奏的从容与优雅。

attractions.text_en: Sforza Castle is one of the most important buildings in Milan and a witness to Milan's vicissitudes of history. Viewed from above, the whole castle is like a grand duchy, with high walls on four sides and an exquisitely planned park. It was built as a castle by the Counts Sforza in the 14th century, and later became the residence of the Sforza family, witnessing the whole process from the family's heyday to its decline. The castle has now been converted by the Milan municipal government into museums, including the Museum of Applied Arts and Music, the Archaeological Museum, and the Museum of Ancient Art. Its back gate is the Arco della Pace (Arch of Peace), so named because it was rebuilt by the ruler Francesco.
attractions.text_zh: 斯福尔扎城堡是米兰最重要的建筑之一，是米兰沧桑历史的见证。俯瞰整个城堡像一个大公国，有四面的高墙和精致规划过的公园。在14世纪时由斯福尔扎伯爵作为城堡而建，而后成为斯福尔扎家族的住所，见证了从鼎盛时期到家族衰败的全过程。现城堡被米兰市政府辟为博物馆，其中有应用艺术和乐曲博物馆、考古博物馆、古代艺术博物馆，他的后门是和平门，是统治者费朗西斯科改造得名的。

attractions.text_en: Nestled between the majestic Alps and the fertile Po Valley, Lake Garda is more than just a natural wonder. It is also a treasure trove, gathering charming towns, historical relics, fine cuisine and outdoor activities. Each town has its own charm and unique attractions for tourists to enjoy.
attractions.text_zh: 加尔达湖坐落在雄伟的阿尔卑斯山和肥沃的波河谷之间，不仅仅是自然奇观。它还是一个宝库，汇聚了迷人的城镇、历史遗迹、美食和户外活动。每个城镇都有自己的魅力和独特的景点供游客欣赏。

attractions.text_en: Bolzano, the capital of the province of South Tyrol in Italy, is located in the embrace of the Alps and blends the cultural characteristics of Italy and Austria. This city is famous for its well-preserved medieval old town, rich historical relics and beautiful natural scenery. You can stroll along the cobbled streets of the old town, admire Gothic and Renaissance-style architecture, and experience the blending of the Italian and German languages. Walther Square in the city center is the heart of the city, surrounded by historic buildings and cafés, and is an ideal place to feel the local life.
attractions.text_zh: 博尔扎诺（Bolzano），意大利南蒂罗尔省的首府，位于阿尔卑斯山脉的怀抱中，融合了意大利和奥地利的文化特色。这座城市以其保存完好的中世纪老城区、丰富的历史遗迹和美丽的自然景观而闻名。您可以漫步于老城区的鹅卵石街道，欣赏哥特式和文艺复兴风格的建筑，体验意大利和德国语言的交融。市中心的瓦尔特广场是城市的心脏，周围环绕着历史建筑和咖啡馆，是感受当地生活的理想场所。

attractions.name_en: Church of St. John in Ranui (Lonely Church) (exterior)
attractions.text_en: The Church of St. Magdalena, the lonely church of the Dolomites, is a small wooden church located in the Val di Funes in the Italian Alps, backed by the jagged Geisler Peaks. This Baroque-style church was built in 1744, surrounded by vast pastures and forests, with scenery that varies through the four seasons—lush green in spring and summer, golden in autumn, and covered in white snow in winter. The church has become a popular photography spot for its secluded and isolated location and its excellent mountain backdrop, and it is also an ideal starting point for hiking and exploring the valley. The nearby village of Santa Maddalena offers convenient transportation and viewing angles, allowing visitors to easily admire this iconic landscape of the Dolomites.
attractions.text_zh: 多洛米蒂山脉的马达莱娜孤独教堂是一座小巧的木质教堂，坐落在意大利阿尔卑斯山的富内斯山谷中，背靠锯齿状的盖斯勒峰。这座巴洛克风格的教堂建于1744年，周围是广阔的牧场和森林，四季景色各异，春夏绿意盎然，秋季金黄一片，冬季则被白雪覆盖。教堂因其遗世独立的位置和绝佳的山景背景，成为摄影师的热门取景地，也是徒步探索山谷的理想起点。附近的Santa Maddalena小镇提供便利的交通和观景视角，让游客能轻松欣赏这一多洛米蒂的标志性景观。

attractions.text_en: The town of Ortisei, an elegant town in the Val Gardena, blends the dual cultural characteristics of Italy and Austria. Its cobbled streets, traditional woodcarving crafts and painted houses present travelers with the unique charm of South Tyrol. It is also a famous art and handicraft center in the Dolomites region; you may take a short stroll after lunch, visit the local craft shops, or enjoy a cup of Alpine-flavored hot chocolate at an open-air café.
attractions.text_zh: 奥蒂塞伊小镇，这座位于加尔代纳山谷（Val Gardena）山谷中的典雅城镇，融合了意大利与奥地利的双重文化特色。其鹅卵石街道、传统木雕工艺和彩绘房舍为旅人呈现出南蒂罗尔独有的风情。这里也是多洛米蒂地区著名的艺术与手工艺中心，不妨在午餐后稍作散步，参观当地的工艺店铺，或是在露天咖啡座享受一杯阿尔卑斯风味的热巧克力。

attractions.text_en: Seceda is one of the most iconic peaks of the Dolomites; its unique jagged ridge and vast plateau scenery are breathtaking. Taking the cable car from Ortisei directly to the Seceda ridge is one of the best ways to explore the Dolomites. Seceda is famous for its blade-like peak lines and is a paradise for photographers. The view from the summit is wide open, where you can enjoy a short hike or simply quietly admire the vast alpine meadows and the strange rock clusters of peaks, experiencing the tranquility and grandeur of nature.
attractions.text_zh: 刀锋山（Seceda） 是多洛米蒂最具标志性的山峰之一，其独特的锯齿状山脊和辽阔的高原风光令人叹为观止。从奥蒂塞伊搭乘缆车直达刀锋山脊，是探索多洛米蒂山的最佳方式之一。刀锋山以其刀锋状的山峰线条闻名，是摄影师的天堂。山顶视野开阔，您可享受简短的徒步或只是静静欣赏辽阔的高山草原与奇岩峰丛，体验自然的宁静与壮观。

attractions.text_en:
Alpe di Siusi, located between the Val Gardena and the Sciliar peak, borders the Sciliar-Catinaccio Nature Park to the west. Although it is called a mountain, it is more like an alpine meadow, undulating like waves, forming a drop of about 300 meters. This area has always been excellent pasture, and paired with the iconic dolomite, it is even more eye-catching. Europe's high-altitude alpine meadow is on the Alpe di Siusi plateau in the Dolomites of Italy; in spring and summer this is a sea of flowers, while in winter it is a vast white skiing paradise. Due to its vast area, you can also admire many nearby mountain ranges, such as the Sella group, the Catinaccio (Rosengarten) massif and the Langkofel, and so on.
Note: The Alpe di Siusi plateau cable car is an optional experience item that requires a separate ticket; the related cost is not included in the itinerary, please be aware.
attractions.text_zh:
休斯山，位于加尔代纳山谷和施勒恩峰之间，西部与施勒恩峰-卡提纳自然公园接壤。虽然说它是山，却更像是高山草甸，如波浪般起伏，形成300米左右的落差。这一地区一直是优良牧场，搭配上标志性的白云岩，便更加吸引眼球。欧洲的高海拔高山草甸是在意大利多洛米蒂休斯高原，春夏，这里是一片花海；冬天则是白茫茫的滑雪圣地。由于地域广阔，还能欣赏到附近的很多山脉，比如塞拉山组，玫瑰花园闪族和长石山等等。
注意：休斯高原缆车属于可选体验项目，需另行购票，相关费用不包含在行程内，敬请知悉

attractions.text_en: Piazza San Marco, also called the central square of Venice, has always been the center of Venice's political, religious and traditional festival public activities. St. Mark's Square is a rectangular square enclosed by buildings such as the Doge's Palace, St. Mark's Basilica, St. Mark's Campanile, the Old and New Procuratie buildings, the Napoleonic Wing connecting the two buildings, the quadrangular bell tower of St. Mark's Basilica and the Biblioteca Marciana (St. Mark's Library), as well as Venice's Grand Canal. It is about 170 meters long, about 80 meters wide on the east side, and about 55 meters wide on the west side. The buildings around the square are all exquisite Renaissance structures.
attractions.text_zh: 圣马可广场(Plazza San Marco) 又称威尼斯中心广场，一直是威尼斯的政治、宗教和传统节日的公共活动中心。圣马可广场是由公爵府、圣马可大教堂、圣马可钟楼、新、旧行政官邸大楼、连接两大楼的拿破仑翼大楼、圣马可大教堂的四角形钟楼和圣马可图书馆等建筑和威尼斯大运河所围成的长方形广场，长约170米，东边宽约80米，西侧宽约55米。广场四周的建筑都是文艺复兴时期的精美建筑。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: This magnificent Byzantine-style church, famous for its five onion-shaped domes and golden mosaic decorations, embodies the glorious history of Venice's golden age and its trade with the East. The exterior is rich in detail, blending the artistic languages of East and West, and is a landmark not to be missed in Venice.
attractions.text_zh: 这座拜占庭风格的华丽教堂，以其五座洋葱形圆顶和金色马赛克装饰而闻名，体现了威尼斯黄金时代与东方贸易的辉煌历史。外观细节丰富，融合东方与西方的艺术语言，是威尼斯不可错过的地标。

attractions.text_en: Adjacent to St. Mark's Basilica, it was the former residence of the Doge of the Republic of Venice and the government center. This Gothic building made of pink marble has an exquisite exterior; its arcades and sculptural details are full of power and elegance, and it is a symbol of Venetian politics and art.
attractions.text_zh: 紧邻圣马可大教堂，是昔日威尼斯共和国总督的官邸与政府中心。这座粉色大理石打造的哥特式建筑外观精美绝伦，拱廊与雕塑细节充满力量与优雅，是威尼斯政治与艺术的象征。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the path that death-row prisoners had to take when escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is of early Baroque style, shaped like a house, covered with a vault on top and tightly enclosed, with only two small windows toward the canal side. When a prisoner had received his trial at the Doge's Palace, the serious offender was taken to the dungeon, and when passing over this airtight bridge, he could only look at the blue sky through the small windows; from then on he lost his freedom and involuntarily let out sounds of sighing. It is said that lovers who kiss under the bridge will be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was filmed here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: Pescara is a seaside town full of Mediterranean charm, where sunshine, waves and fine cuisine together weave a lazy and enchanting holiday atmosphere. Pescara's seafood restaurants are an experience absolutely not to be missed. You can taste fresh fish caught that very day, clam pasta drizzled with olive oil and lemon juice, or a whole charcoal-grilled sea bass, paired with a glass of the local specialty Montepulciano wine, turning dinner into a true feast for the taste buds. Whether strolling through the city or lying on the beach sunbathing, you can immerse yourself in the leisure and deliciousness of Italian life.
attractions.text_zh: 佩斯卡拉是一座充满地中海风情的海滨小城，在这里，阳光、海浪与美食共同编织出慵懒而迷人的假日氛围。佩斯卡拉的海鲜餐厅是绝对不能错过的体验。可以品尝到当天捕捞的鲜鱼，淋上橄榄油和柠檬汁的蛤蜊意面，或是炭烤的整条海鲈鱼，搭配一杯本地特产的蒙特普尔恰诺葡萄酒，让晚餐变成一场真正的味觉盛宴。无论是漫步城市还是躺在沙滩上享受日光浴，可以沉浸在意式生活的闲适与美味中。

attractions.name_en: Basilica di San Nicola (Basilica of Saint Nicholas) (exterior)
attractions.text_en: Located in the old city of Bari, Italy, the Basilica of Saint Nicholas was built in 1807. Backing onto the Adriatic seafront, the church was built to commemorate the saint Saint Nicholas. Saint Nicholas is the prototype of today's Christmas Santa Claus; he was a kind bishop who lived in Asia Minor in the 4th century. From the 6th century AD, Saint Nicholas had quite a few believers in Turkey, and later worship also began to spread in churches in Greece and Russia. By the 10th century, Italy as well as Western European countries such as Germany, Britain and France also began to have believers. His holy remains were brought to Bari in Italy in AD 1087 and buried in this church. Today, this church is still a religious holy site of Bari and indeed of Italy.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落于意大利巴里老城里的圣尼古拉大教堂建造于1807年。教堂背靠亚德里亚海滨，是为纪念圣人圣尼古拉斯而建造。圣尼古拉斯就是现在圣诞节圣诞老人的原形．他是一位生活在４世纪小亚细亚的善良主教。公元六世纪开始，圣尼古拉斯在土耳其就有不少的信仰者，后来在希腊与俄罗斯的教堂也开始流传，到了十世纪时，意大利以及西欧的国家如德国、英国、法国也都开始有信仰者。他的圣遗体则于公元1087年被带到意大利的巴利埋葬于此教堂。现在，这座教堂仍是巴里，乃至意大利的宗教圣地。

attractions.text_en: Bari is the capital of the Puglia region of Italy, embracing the scenery of the Adriatic coast, with tree-lined boulevards of tall palm trees, blending historical relics, seaside leisure and authentic cuisine. Among them, the old town has a rich historical atmosphere—medieval tunnels and relics, the Swabian Castle, the Cathedral of San Sabino—where you can feel the "city beneath the city." The most representative is the exterior of the Basilica di San Nicola (Basilica of Saint Nicholas); this 11th-century Romanesque church is a pilgrimage site shared by Catholics and Orthodox Christians, with a solemn and tranquil interior atmosphere. Meanwhile, Bari Vecchia (the old town of Bari), with its narrow winding alleys and mottled white stone walls, is the truest portrayal of southern Italy.
attractions.text_zh: 巴里（Bari）是意大利普利亚大区的首府，坐拥亚得里亚海沿岸风光，高大棕榈树的林荫大道、融合了历史遗迹、海滨休闲和地道美食，其中老城区具有浓郁的历史氛围——中世纪的隧道和遗迹，斯瓦比亚城堡、圣萨比诺大教堂，感受“城市之下的城市”。最具代表性的圣尼古拉大教堂外观（Basilica di San Nicola），这座11世纪的罗马式教堂是天主教与东正教共同朝圣之地，内部气氛庄严宁静。然而巴里老城（Bari Vecchia），这里巷弄狭窄曲折、白石墙面斑驳，是最真实的南意写照。

attractions.text_en: This town atop the cliffs is hailed as the "Mediterranean balcony of Puglia." White houses are built against the rock walls, overlooking the azure Adriatic Sea. Its most famous sight is the Lama Monachile cove of Polignano a Mare—a deeply cut rock gorge mouth connecting a stone arch bridge with natural rock caves, a classic scene for travelers to take photos. In the town one can also see many lines of verse written on walls, doorways and steps, showcasing Polignano's title of the "town of poetry." You can stroll slowly along the city walls, gazing out at the scenery of azure sea and rocks interlacing, or make a brief stop at a sea-view café.
attractions.text_zh: 这座悬崖之上的小镇，被誉为「普利亚的地中海阳台」。白色房屋依岩壁而建，俯瞰湛蓝的亚得里亚海，最著名的景观是波利尼亚诺阿马雷海湾 ( Lama Monachile )—— 一道深切的岩峡口，连接着石拱桥与天然岩洞，是旅人拍照打卡的经典画面。小镇中也可见许多诗句写在墙上、门前、台阶上，展现波利尼亚诺「诗意之镇」的称号。您可沿城墙缓缓漫步，远眺碧海与岩石交错的风景，或在海景咖啡馆短暂停留。

attractions.text_en: Italy's paradise town—the town of Alberobello. Alberobello means "beautiful tree" in Italian, so some also call Alberobello the Town of Beautiful Trees. The Trulli stone-house settlement is Alberobello's most representative architectural landscape in Puglia, famous for its stretches of Trulli (mushroom-shaped white stone houses). The stone houses are built of dry-laid limestone, with conical roofs, white walls and gray tops, in a unique style. The Alberobello area was originally the most barren of wastelands with the worst natural conditions; the earliest stone houses can be traced back to the 12th century, and when people first began to inhabit them is no longer ascertainable. From the 16th century, more and more refugees fleeing natural and man-made disasters fled here and used local limestone to build houses—the conical-domed, coolie-hat-roofed stone houses we see today. In 1797 the refugees petitioned the local King of Taranto to settle legally; as the refugees were numerous and powerful, the king reluctantly agreed, allowing this type of easily demolishable domed stone house to exist legally, forming the unique Trulli village of the Alberobello area. The typical Trulli-style building is one where residents use square limestone blocks to enclose a circular house without pillars or beams, build it to an appropriate height, then stack flat stone slabs upward, each slab gradually narrowing to seal the top into a conical pointed roof—this is one of the most primitive methods of house-building by humankind. Houses of limestone blocks are sturdy, dry, warm in winter and cool in summer.
attractions.text_zh: 意大利的天堂小镇——阿尔贝罗贝洛小镇，Alberobello在意大利语里是“美丽的树”的意思，因此也有人称阿尔贝罗贝洛为丽树镇。Trulli石屋聚落是阿尔贝罗贝洛是普利亚最具代表性的建筑景观，以成片的Trulli（蘑菇型白石屋）而闻名。石屋采用干式石灰岩砌成，屋顶为圆锥状结构，白墙灰顶，风格独特。阿尔贝罗贝洛地区，原是自然条件最差的不毛之地，最早的石屋可追溯至12世纪，何时开始有人居住已无从可考。16世纪开始，越来越多逃避天灾人祸的难民逃到这里，就地取材用石灰岩建屋，也就是我们现在看到的带有斗笠圆顶的石屋。1797年难民向塔兰托当地的旁波国王请愿合法定居，难民人多势众，国王勉为其难，允许容易拆除的这一类型圆顶石屋合法存在，形成了阿尔贝罗贝洛地区独特的陶尔利村落。典型的陶尔利风格建筑，是居民利用方形石灰岩块，围成无柱无梁的圆形房舍，建至适当高度，再用片状岩片向上堆砌，每片逐步收窄封顶，成圆锥形尖顶，这是一种人类最原始的建屋方法。石灰岩块的房舍，坚固、干燥、冬暖夏凉。

attractions.text_en: The characteristic cave restaurants in the Sassi old town of Matera (Sassi di Matera) are mostly converted from original cave dwellings or granaries, retaining natural stone walls, arched structures and dim yellow lighting; they are divided into two areas—Sasso Caveoso and Sasso Barisano. Their buildings are carved out of natural rock and have been inhabited since ancient times, making it one of the oldest inhabited places on Earth. The dishes commonly found at the characteristic cave restaurants include handmade pasta with sauce (such as Orecchiette), goat cheese, roasted vegetables, bean puree, country bread, regional wines (such as Aglianico) or homemade desserts.
attractions.text_zh: 马泰拉Sassi 老城区（Sassi di Matera）中的特色洞穴餐厅多改建自原始洞穴民宅或粮仓，保留天然石壁、拱形结构与昏黄灯光，分为两个区域——Sasso Caveoso 和 Sasso Barisano。其建筑由天然岩石雕凿而成，自古便有人居住，是地球上最古老的居住地之一。特色洞穴餐厅菜色常见包括手工意面配酱汁（如Orecchiette）、山羊乳酪、烤蔬菜、豆泥、乡村面包、地区葡萄酒（如Aglianico）或自制甜点。

attractions.text_en: Positano is a small town located along the Amalfi Coast in the Campania region of Italy. The main part of the town backs onto the mountains and faces the sea. A writer described it this way: Positano is a dreamland; when you are there she is not quite real, but after you leave she becomes vivid and lifelike. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as Europe's beautiful coast; here the coastline winds and turns, with towering mountains and islands rising on the shore, valleys and headlands interlacing, orchards and wild plants coexisting. Amid the pristine natural environment is a rich human history, and many picturesque towns are scattered in the dense mountain forests, the most beautiful of which is called Positano.
attractions.text_zh: 波西塔诺是位于意大利坎帕尼亚大区阿马尔菲海岸‎沿岸的一个小镇。城镇主要部份背山面海，一位作家这样形容：波西塔诺是一个梦乡，你在时，她不是很真切，你离开后，她变的栩栩如生。阿马尔菲海岸被誉为欧洲美丽的海滩，这里的海岸线蜿蜒曲折，岸上山岛耸峙巍峨，山谷与海岬交错，果园与野生植物并存，原生态的自然环境中有丰富的人文历史，浓密山林中散落着许多如诗如画的小镇，而其中较漂亮的那一个叫做波西塔诺

attractions.text_en: The Amalfi Coast, rated by the National Geographic magazine as one of the 50 places most worth visiting in a lifetime, has the most charming coastline of Naples and indeed the whole world. It was also once the capital of the powerful Maritime Republic of Amalfi, a very important city in Mediterranean trade at that time. Amalfi is also inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List. Here are ancient medieval towns famous for their unique culture and architecture. Popular towns include Amalfi, Positano, Ravello and Maiori. In these towns you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers and temples; the history of these buildings can be traced back several centuries, and each building has its own story.
attractions.text_zh: 阿马尔菲海岸，被联合国地理杂志评为一生中最值得去的50个地方之一，拥有着那不勒斯乃至全世界最迷人的海岸线，同时它也曾经是强大阿马尔菲航海共和国的首都，是当时地中海贸易中的一个非常重要的城市。阿马尔菲同时也被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产。这里有着古老的中世纪小镇，这些小镇以其独特的文化和建筑而著名。受欢迎的小镇包括阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和莱马尼。在这些小镇中，你可以看到许多古老的教堂、城堡、钟楼和神殿，这些建筑物的历史可以追溯到几个世纪以前，每个建筑都有着自己的故事。

attractions.text_en: This is a city combining historical depth and beautiful scenery. Salerno is located on the charming Amalfi Coast and has ancient churches, a Norman castle and a picturesque seafront. At the seaside restaurants and local snack shops you can taste local Campanian cuisine featuring fresh seafood and traditional dishes.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一座集历史底蕴与美景于一身的城市。萨莱诺位于迷人的阿马尔菲海岸（Amalfi Coast），拥有古老的教堂、诺曼城堡和风景如画的海滨，在海边餐馆和当地小吃店品尝以新鲜海鲜和传统菜肴为特色的坎帕尼亚当地美食。

attractions.text_en:
The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the world's seven great wonders and is Capri's more famous attraction; the purpose of many people going to Capri is precisely to behold the wonder of the Blue Grotto. You can take a small boat into the Blue Grotto for a tour; due to the special structure of the cave mouth, the seawater inside the cave is a crystalline blue. The surface seawater of the Blue Grotto presents a deep blue color, while the deeper seawater is sky blue, and the seawater makes the rocks in the cave appear all azure as well. On a clear day, the Blue Grotto is exceptionally beautiful and enchanting.
Capri's Blue Grotto is a natural attraction; if there is high tide, wind and waves, or other factors and the local marine meteorological agency announces its closure, then it cannot be entered for visiting. The Blue Grotto tour fee is not included in the tour group; to avoid misunderstanding, please follow local custom and, in addition to the Blue Grotto rowboat boatman's fee, pay a tip of 2–5 euros.
attractions.text_zh:
蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，是卡普里较著名的景点，很多人去卡普里的目的就是为了一睹蓝洞奇观。可乘小船进入蓝洞游览，由于洞口的特殊结构，使得洞里的海水一片晶蓝。蓝洞表层的海水呈现幽幽的深蓝色，而深层海水却是天蓝色的，海水映衬得洞中的岩石也都一片蔚蓝。天气晴朗的时候，蓝洞分外的美丽和妖娆。
卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。 蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

attractions.text_en: The island of Capri is located near the southern mouth of the Bay of Naples and belongs to the Campania region of Italy. On the island are the relics of two medieval castles, Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as a church dedicated to the island's patron saint, San Costanzo; it is one of the famous tourist resorts of southern Italy. Capri's forests, waters, air, sunshine and the island villas more longed for by the world's wealthy have attracted people from all over the world. Among them, the Blue Grotto is an attraction that everyone coming to Capri will definitely visit; when the sky is clear and the air is bright, the sunlight shines into the cave, and every corner inside the deep-blue cave is exquisitely beautiful.
attractions.text_zh: 卡普里岛位于那不勒斯湾南部入海口附近，属意大利坎佩尼亚区。岛上有巴巴罗萨和卡斯蒂利奥内两座中世纪城堡遗迹以及供奉该岛守护神圣科斯坦佑的教堂，是意大利南部著名的游览胜地之一。卡普里岛的森林、水域、空气、阳光和较令全世界富豪憧憬的岛屿别墅，曾吸引了来自世界各地的人们，其中蓝洞是每一个人来卡普里岛一定会参观的景点，天清气朗时，阳光照射入洞穴，深蓝的洞穴内每一处角落都美不胜收。

attractions.text_en: Located in the town of Capri, the Gardens of Augustus record the ten years of Augustus's life living here. One side of the garden is a sheer cliff, and in the distance is the azure seawater. On the left side of the garden are the Lovers' Rocks; legend has it that these Lovers' Rocks were originally lovers who, unable to be together, leapt one after another into the sea to die for love, and afterward became these rocks leaning against and nestling each other.
attractions.text_zh: 位于卡普里小镇上的奥古斯丁花园记录着奥古斯丁在这里居住的十年生活。花园一侧是断壁，远处则是碧蓝的海水。在花园的左侧是情人石，相传这情人石原本是相爱的恋人，因无法恋爱纷纷跳入海中殉情，之后就成了这相依相偎的石头。

attractions.text_en: For most travelers, the sea, the cuisine and the history of Naples are all important reasons that make people reluctant to leave. Naples is the city most beloved by the Italian writer Boccaccio; this is the birthplace of the songs "'O Sole Mio" and "Torna a Surriento," and also the place of origin of pizza. Naples shows a different face to travelers from all over the world throughout the four seasons. Naples is also called "Napoli"; in Italian it is "Napoli." Naples is the capital of the Campania region as well as the province of Naples, and is one of the most populous cities in Italy, rich in lemons and grapes. At the same time, it is also an important tourist city of the Mediterranean, known as the "city of sunshine and joy." This is a source of inspiration for many artists and musicians, perhaps because of Mount Vesuvius, or perhaps because of the simple, rustic charm of Naples.
attractions.text_zh: 对于大多数旅行者而言，那不勒斯的大海、美食及历史都是让人流连忘返的重要原因。那不勒斯是意大利作家薄伽丘最热爱的城市，这里是歌曲《我的太阳》、《重归苏莲托》的诞生地，也是披萨的起源地。那不勒斯一年四季都呈现出不同的面孔展现给来自世界各地的旅行者。那不勒斯也叫“拿波里”，意大利文是“Napoli”。那不勒斯是坎帕尼亚大区以及那不勒斯省的首府，也是意大利人口最多的城市之一，盛产柠檬和葡萄。同时，她也是地中海重要的旅游城市，被称为“阳光和欢乐之城”。这里是许多艺术家、音乐家的灵感之源，或许是因为维苏威火山(MountVesuvius)，又或许是因为那不勒斯的古朴。

attractions.text_en: The Royal Palace of Naples stands in the bustling downtown, close to famous attractions such as the Castel Nuovo and Castel dell'Ovo, and has gone through four dynasties. Its exterior looks quite ordinary, but if you choose to enter and visit, you will certainly be greatly amazed; this palace is extremely luxurious, with the whole color scheme basically gold, yellow and purple, representing the nobility of the royal family. The palace has many, many rooms—the queen's bedchamber, the council hall, the study, and so on—and inside there are also many displays of royal items and paintings of the royal nobility. The most worth mentioning is the throne. The most worth seeing place inside this palace, apart from the various paintings, is it; words such as noble and elegant cannot simply describe it.
attractions.text_zh: 那不勒斯皇宫身处闹市，临近新堡、蛋堡等知名景点，历经四个朝代，外表看上去十分普通，但是，如果选择入内参观，那么一定会让你大吃一惊，这个皇宫非常奢华，整个色调基本就是金色、黄色、紫色，代表皇室的高贵。皇宫有许许多多的房间，王后的寝宫、议政厅、书房等等，里面还有很多皇室用品的展示和皇室贵族的绘画，最值得一提的就是王座。这个皇宫里面最值得一看的地方，除了各类绘画就是它了，用尊贵典雅这一类词是无法简单形容的。

attractions.text_en: Castel Nuovo, also known as Maschio Angioino (the Angevin Castle), was ordered to be built by the first king of the Kingdom of Naples. Castel Nuovo includes the Civic Museum (Museo Civico) as well as the castle ruins. The museum (mainly displaying paintings) is on the first floor, the sea view can be seen from the second floor, and the zero floor is the ruins of the Castel Nuovo, where the ground surface is built of transparent glass—travelers with a fear of heights need to pay special attention—beneath the glass are the ruins of the ancient building as well as human bones. In addition, inside Castel Nuovo there is also a Sala dei Baroni (literally the Hall of the Barons), and the architecture at the top of the hall is very distinctive.
attractions.text_zh: 新堡，又名安茹城堡，是那不勒斯王国第一位国王下令建立。新堡包括公民博物馆(MuseoCivico)以及城堡遗迹。博物馆(主要展示绘画)位于第一层，第二层可以看到海景，零层则为新堡遗迹，地表为透明玻璃建造，有恐高症的旅行者需要特别注意，玻璃底下则为古建筑遗迹以及人的骸骨。另外，新堡内部还有一个SalaDeiBaroni(直译为男爵的房间)，房间顶端的建筑非常有特色。

attractions.text_en: The ancient city of Pompeii was once a small-to-medium-sized town backing onto the mountains and facing the sea, destroyed in an instant by the great eruption of Mount Vesuvius to its northwest. The town's streets and houses were buried by volcanic ash, yet the living scenes of the Pompeians of more than two thousand years ago were completely preserved, and later this vast site was gradually excavated. Besides various architectural relics, there are also some shocking casts. The people who perished when the volcano erupted had their bodies decay until only empty shells remained because they were wrapped in volcanic ash; archaeology injected plaster into these empty shells to make casts, showing the world the tragic state of Pompeii at the time.
attractions.text_zh: 庞贝古城曾是一座背山面海的中小城镇，因西北边的维苏威火山大爆发而毁于一旦。城镇街道、房屋被火山灰掩埋，却完整保留了两千年多前庞贝人的生活场景，后来这座庞大的遗址才被渐渐发掘出来。除各种建筑遗迹外，还有一些触目惊心的铸像。在火山爆发时遇难的人，因被火山灰包裹而身体腐朽得只剩空壳，考古学把这些空壳注入石膏、做成铸像，向世人展示庞贝当时的惨状。

attractions.text_en: This is a historical site within the ancient city of Pompeii. It was once a temple, but due to its great age only crumbling walls and broken remains are left; however, the overall outline of the temple can still be made out.
attractions.text_zh: 这是庞贝古城内的一处历史遗址，这里曾经是一座寺庙，但因为年代久远只剩下残垣断壁了，但寺庙的整体轮廓还是看得出的。

attractions.name_en: Central Forum of the Temple of Apollo
attractions.text_en: Also called the public forum, this was once Pompeii's political, economic and religious center. The square basilica on the forum still retains some brick-built column bases; this place was formerly a court of law and a venue for commercial transactions. Opposite the basilica is a Temple of Apollo, where the 48 Corinthian columns inside are well preserved, and there are also many exquisite frescoes. On the north side of the forum is a Temple of Jupiter with its back to Mount Vesuvius, from where Mount Vesuvius can be clearly gazed upon.
attractions.text_zh: 也称公共广场，这里曾经是昔日庞贝的政治、经济、宗教中心，广场上的方形会堂还残留着一些砖砌的圆柱底座，此处是以前的法院与商业交易场所。会堂的对面是一座阿波罗神殿，里面的48根科林斯式圆柱保存完好，还有许多精美的壁画。广场北侧有一座背对着维苏威火山的丘比特神殿，可以清楚的眺望维苏威火山。

attractions.text_en: Heidelberg Castle was first built in the 13th century. It was struck by lightning twice, in 1537 and 1764, and was severely damaged during the Thirty Years' War and the War of the Grand Alliance, gradually taking on the form it has today. Today, the castle's foremost attraction is the world's largest wine barrel (Grosses Fass); owing to the wars, this is in fact the fourth barrel of similar size to be repeatedly built within the castle. The current barrel was built in 1751 and can hold a total of 221,726 liters of wine. Beside it there is also a so-called "small barrel" (Kleines Fass). The castle also houses a pharmacy museum, displaying pharmacology from centuries ago. In the palace courtyard there is a red triumphal arch which, though modest in scale, carries a romantic flavor because it was built in a single night; it was a gift from Friedrich V in 1615 for his wife's 20th birthday.
attractions.text_zh: 海德堡城堡始建于13世纪，在1537年和1764年两次遭受雷击，并在三十年战争和大同盟战争中损毁严重，逐渐形成今日的格局。如今，城堡第一大看点是世界上第一大的葡萄酒桶(GrossesFass)，因战争原因，这也是城堡内反复建造的大小相似的第四个酒桶。如今的酒桶于1751年建造，总共可装下221726升酒。旁边还有一个所谓的“小酒桶”(KleinesFass)。城堡内另有医药博物馆，展示了数百年前的药学。宫殿庭院中有一座红色的凯旋门，虽然规模不大，却因是一夜间建造的，而颇具浪漫色彩，这是1615年时，Friedrich五世送给她妻子20岁的生日礼物。

attractions.text_en: The Old Bridge's official name is the Karl Theodor Bridge, named after the prince-elector who built this Baroque stone bridge in 1788. It is the ninth bridge to stand on this site since Roman times, and the oldest bridge over the Neckar River in the Heidelberg area today. For most of the time this bridge has been a pedestrian bridge, from which one can look up at the castle. The statues on the bridge are: at the southern end, the prince-elector Karl Theodor; at the northern end, the goddess of wisdom (in praise of the elector's support for art and science). At the southern end of the bridge is the bridge gate; the two 28-meter-high round towers left from the 15th century are the oldest part of the Old Bridge, and the bridge gate was originally used to collect a "bridge toll."
attractions.text_zh: 老桥的正式名字为Karl-Theodor桥，是1788年修建这座巴洛克式石桥的选帝侯的名字。这已是自古罗马时期以来，在这个位置上的第九座桥梁，也是现今海德堡地区内卡河上最古老的桥。这座桥在绝大部分时间里为步行桥，可以仰望城堡。桥上的雕塑南端为选帝侯KarlTheodor，北端为智慧女神(为歌颂选帝侯对艺术与科学的支持)。桥的南端为桥门，15世纪遗留的两座28米高的圆塔是老桥最古老的部分，桥门最早是用作收取“过桥费”的。

attractions.text_en: Heidelberg University, full name Ruprecht-Karls-Universität Heidelberg, was founded in 1386 and is the oldest university in Germany and the third oldest in Europe. Developing from theology, law, medicine and philosophy, it now has nearly thirty thousand registered students across 12 faculties. University Square is the heart of Heidelberg University, and around the square are distributed many university-related buildings, faculties, and the former residences of historically important scholars. By University Square stand the Old University (Alte Universität), built in the early 18th century, and the New University (Neue Universität), built in the early 20th century.
