Not far from the square, at Plöck 107, is the university library, a building blending Germanic Mannerism and Art Nouveau styles; in red brick picked out with gold, it is very beautiful, and inside there are precious books on free display.
attractions.text_zh: 海德堡大学，全称Ruprecht-Karls-UniversitätHeidelberg，始建于1386年，是德国第一，欧洲第三古老的大学，从神学、法学、医学、哲学发展到今天12个学院的近三万名注册学生。大学广场是海德堡大学的核心所在，在广场附近分布着许多大学相关建筑、院系以及历史上重要学者的故居。大学广场边，一幢是十八世纪初建造的老大学(AlteUniversität)，一幢是二十世纪初建造的新大学(NeueUniversität)。在离广场不远的Plöck107号，是大学的图书馆，这是一幢日耳曼风格主义和新艺术风格相糅合的建筑，红砖描金，十分美丽，里面还有免费展出的珍贵书籍。

attractions.text_en: Zurich's Old Town is an experience not to be missed. Here gather traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookshops and flower stalls, as well as jewelry and accessories, fashion boutiques, and of course Zurich's own local brands. Famous streets and lanes such as Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg, Niederdorf and Augustine Lane are all located in the Old Town. Strolling through the Old Town in the evening, you will find it has turned into a place of entertainment for the public.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世的老城区是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰，时尚精品，当然也少不了苏黎世本土品牌。班霍夫大街(Bahnhofstrasse)、伦韦格街(Rennweg)、尼德道尔夫(Niederdorf)与圣奥古斯丁巷(Augustine Lane)等著名街巷都位于老城区。晚上漫步于老城区，会发现这里又变成了民众的娱乐场所。

attractions.text_en: Zurich Cathedral, also called the Twin-Tower Church. This abbey church was first built around the year 1100, and its architectural style is renowned for its Romanesque twin towers, which serve as a landmark of Zurich. Standing across the river from the Fraumünster, this church played a pivotal role in the Swiss Reformation of the 16th century, and both the theology faculty of the University of Zurich and the Reformation Museum were established here. The stained-glass windows inside the church are masterpieces by Switzerland's modern art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂，又称为双塔教堂。这座修道院教堂始建于1100年前后，其建筑风格以罗曼式的双塔闻名，并以此作为苏黎世的地标。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long, with the docks on the lake filled with yachts of all kinds, much like a rich people's club. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center; on the lake, white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere, leisurely and carefree, a harmonious scene. The northern shore of Lake Zurich is the residence of the wealthy, known as the "Gold Coast," while the southern shore is called the "Silver Coast." The end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich, and as a "city of the world's most livable cities," the life of the true people of Zurich is permeated everywhere with tranquility and ease.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located some twenty to thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. Its summit is covered in ice and snow year-round, while at its foot the grass is lush green and the scenery beautiful, making it a famous destination for sightseeing and outdoor sports in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is an Alpine town one must pass through when visiting the Jungfrau. Together with First, Jungfrau, Wengen, Lauterbrunnen and others, it forms the most magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous ski resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hikers; Grindelwald is also very well suited for convalescence, which makes this town of only a few thousand people all the more fascinating.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、劳特布伦嫩（Lauterbrunnen）等一起组成了少女峰地区最为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的滑雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，而格里德尔瓦尔德又非常适合疗养，让这座只拥有几千人的小镇愈发的让人着迷。

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is the green square at the center of Interlaken, Switzerland's famous tourist town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery, and the construction of any buildings is now forbidden here in order to prevent the destruction of this beautiful landscape. This is a great place to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast green there is a fountain, and it is dotted with many benches, so it is also a fine place for a walk. Höhematte is also a landing site for hang gliders; there is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, and after paying, staff will take visitors to a nearby mountain for free flight, allowing one to enjoy the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Because Interlaken does not have a large hinterland, if you want to visit some important sights here, you can use Höheweg Street as the main axis and extend outward, making it quite convenient to see the attractions. Höheweg is the main street of Interlaken, and from the crowds here it seems there are always more tourists than local residents. Shops selling all kinds of goods stretch on for several hundred meters, from high-end European clothing or accessory brands to small souvenir items of local Swiss significance—all can be found on Höheweg Street.
attractions.text_zh: 因特拉肯因为腹地不大，想要在此地参观一些重要景点，可以何维克街为主轴向外延伸，参观景点相当方便。何维克街是因特拉肯最主要的街道，这里的人潮看来，观光客永远要比当地居民多，贩卖各种物品的商店连绵约有几百公尺远，从高级的欧洲服饰或饰品品牌，以至于瑞士当地具纪念意义的小东西，在何维克街上都可以找的到。

attractions.text_en: The Glacier Express runs from St. Moritz in the east to Zermatt in the west, with a total length of 291 kilometers, passing 291 bridges and 91 tunnels along the way, linking the Danube, Rhine and Rhône basins of St. Moritz. The train passes through high mountains and deep valleys along the way, with a difference of 1,429 meters between its highest and lowest points; often it first climbs to a mountaintop and then plunges all the way down the slope, just like a thrilling roller coaster. The red carriages speed among the Alpine peaks, with streams, valleys, waterfalls, pastures and villages forming a picture-perfect, breathtaking landscape. The most spectacular section of all is from Andermatt to Chur, including the Alpine pass; the journey takes less than 3 hours and is not to be missed.
attractions.text_zh: 冰川列车东起圣莫里茨（St. Moritz），西至策尔马特（Zermatt），总长291公里，沿途经过291座桥梁， 91个隧道，串连了圣模里兹的多瑙河流域，莱茵河流域及隆河流域。列车沿途穿越高山深谷，高点和低点的落差达到1429米，常常是先爬升到山顶再一路向山下俯冲简直就像是惊险的过山车，红色的车厢飞奔于阿尔卑斯群山之间，溪流、山谷、飞瀑、田园、村庄风景如画美不胜收。其中最精彩的一段就是从安德马特-库尔，包括了阿尔卑斯山口，行程不到3个小时不容错过。

attractions.text_en: Lake Lucerne has a winding shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms the classic scenery of "lakes and mountains," attracting large numbers of tourists who come to sightsee. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and the piece thereby acquired the title "Moonlight"—although this was not Beethoven's original intention.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩湖 这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.name_en: Water Tower and Flower Bridge (Chapel Bridge)
attractions.text_en: Chapel Bridge. Built in 1332, the Chapel Bridge connects the two banks of Lucerne and is the oldest wooden covered bridge in Europe. It was rebuilt after a fire in 1993, and it leads all the way to Lucerne's most iconic landmark—the octagonal water tower. The Chapel Bridge and the octagonal water tower are the symbolic structures of Lucerne and indeed of Switzerland, frequently appearing on postcards. By day, there are bright and gorgeous flowers on the bridge railings; strolling here at dusk, one can savor a romantic medieval sentiment; at night, the covered bridge and water tower appear especially romantic under the glow of colored lights. So it is also often called the "Flower Bridge and Water Tower."
attractions.text_zh: 卡贝尔廊桥 建于1332年的卡佩尔廊桥连接琉森两岸，是欧洲最古老的木制廊桥，它在1993年的火灾后进行了重建，一直通往琉森最具代表的留念景观——八角型水塔。卡佩尔廊桥和八角型水塔是卢塞恩、乃至瑞士的标志性建筑，经常出现在明信片上。白天，桥栏上有娇艳烂漫的鲜花；黄昏时在此漫步，可以领略浪漫的中古情怀；晚上，廊桥和水塔在彩灯的映照下显得格外浪漫。所以它也常被称为“花桥水塔”。

attractions.text_en: This dying lion sculpture was carved into the natural rock by a Danish sculptor in 1821. This lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies painfully on the ground, a broken spear thrust into its shoulder, with beside it a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms. This sculpture was made to commemorate the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on August 10, 1792, while protecting the safety of Louis XVI's family in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; below the sculpture there is text describing the course of this event. In those days, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, driven by the need to make a living, went off to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave in battle, but honor and money could not mask the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, leaving only the guards serving the Catholic Holy See, namely the famous Swiss Guard. Because of their famed loyalty and valor, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has continued to serve to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "dying lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

attractions.text_en: Located in the middle section of the Glacier Express scenic line and on the north side of the St. Gotthard Pass, it is an important transport hub in southeastern Switzerland. It sits at the eastern end of the narrow Urseren Valley (Urserental); the small Reuss River passes through the town and then plunges into a deep gorge, where the famous Devil's Bridge is built.
attractions.text_zh: 地处观光列车冰河线的中段、圣哥达山口北侧，是瑞士东南部重要的交通枢纽。它坐落在狭小的乌塞伦河谷(Urserental)的东端，细小的罗伊斯河穿城而过后坠入深谷，著名的魔鬼桥即架设于此。

attractions.text_en: The name and founding of St. Gallen are deeply connected with an Irish missionary named Gallus, who built a monastery around the year 612 AD. From the year 747 AD, the Abbey of St. Gallen began to observe the "Rule of St. Benedict," which required believers to devote themselves to the study of books, and it established a library. In the Middle Ages, the small town developed into an important cultural and educational center of Europe. Afterward, the Abbey of St. Gallen gained recognition from the international community and began to flourish. Today, the most famous structures of St. Gallen are the cathedral in the Baroque architectural style and the abbey library, which holds about 140,000 books, some of which are manuscripts spanning a thousand years. The magnificent hall of the abbey library may be the most Rococo-style building in all of Switzerland. In 1983, the entire abbey was inscribed on the World Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 圣加仑的名字和建立与一位叫Gallus的爱尔兰传教士有很深的渊源，他在公元612年左右修建了一座修道院。从公元747年起，圣加仑修道院就已经开始遵守《本笃会规》，要求信徒对书籍进行潜心研究，并设立了一个图书馆。中世纪，小城发展成为欧洲重要的文化和教育中心。此后，圣加仑修道院得到了国际社会的认可，开始蓬勃发展。如今圣加仑最著名的建筑物是具有巴洛克式建筑风格的大教堂和修道院图书馆，图书馆大约有藏书14万本，其中有一部分是历经千年的手稿。修道院图书馆那富丽堂皇的大厅可能是全瑞士最具洛可可风格的建筑。1983年，整个修道院被列入世界遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: Neuschwanstein Castle, full name New Swan Stone Castle, is a building of the late 19th century. Neuschwanstein Castle is a symbol of Germany, and because the Disney castle is modeled on it, some also call it the Cinderella Castle. The castle was built in 1869 and was one of the residences of King Ludwig II of Bavaria. This is the most photographed building in Germany and one of the most popular tourist attractions. The castle's builder, King Ludwig II of Bavaria, had no talent for governance but was full of artistic temperament. He personally participated in the design of this castle, dreaming of building it into a fairy-tale world. The white castle towers atop a high mountain peak, surrounded by mountains and lakes; throughout the four seasons of the year, its scenery is ever different.
attractions.text_zh: 新天鹅堡全名新天鹅石城堡是19世纪晚期的建筑 ，新天鹅城堡是德国的象征，由于迪斯尼城堡以此为原型，故也有人称其为灰姑娘城堡。该堡建于1869年，是巴伐利亚国王路德维希二世的行宫之一。这里是德国境内被拍照最多的建筑物，也是最受欢迎的旅游景点之一。新天鹅城堡的建立者，巴伐利亚国王路德维希二世，其无治世之才，却充满艺术气质。他亲自参与了这座城堡的设计，梦想将城堡建成为一个童话般的世界。白色城堡耸立在高高的山巅，在群山湖泊的环抱之中，一年四季，风光各异。

attractions.text_en: Füssen, also called Fussen, is the endpoint of Germany's famous "Romantic Road," located at the foot of the Alps on the German-Austrian border. Its winding, deep little lanes bear witness to medieval prosperity, and Gothic spired buildings soar as if into the clouds. At the ruins of the old city wall, churches with strikingly different Baroque and Rococo decorative styles are scattered about. This quaint little town is a sacred place for enjoying a comfortable and leisurely holiday, and it is also a place travelers must pass through when taking the train to Neuschwanstein Castle. The vast majority of travelers come here for Neuschwanstein Castle, but the town itself is also very beautiful, tranquil and peaceful.
attractions.text_zh: 菲森也叫福森，著名的德国“浪漫之路”的终点，位于德奥边境阿尔卑斯山脚下，蜿蜒幽深的小巷见证着中世纪的繁荣，哥特式尖顶建筑高耸如入云端。古城墙遗址处，巴洛克和洛可可时期装修风格迥异的教堂错落有致。这座古朴的小城是享受舒适悠闲假日的圣地，也是乘坐火车到新天鹅堡游人的必经之地， 绝大部分旅客都是为了新天鹅堡而来到这里 ，可是小镇本身也是非常漂亮 ，宁静祥和。

attractions.text_en: Strolling through the center of Innsbruck's Old Town, which has weathered 800 years of time, feels like returning to the past. This classic Austrian old town, combining Gothic and Baroque styles, exudes a special charm and complexity, and appears utterly unique at the foot of the Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 漫步在历经800年岁月的因斯布鲁克中心老城区仿佛回到了过去。这座由哥特和巴洛克风格结合的古典奥地利老城散发着特别的魅力和繁复，在阿尔卑斯山脚下显得独一无二。

attractions.text_en: The Golden Roof is the landmark of Innsbruck, Austria, built in 1500 by Holy Roman Emperor Maximilian I and decorated with 2,657 gilded copper tiles. The reliefs on the balcony depict coats of arms, symbols, and other figures from his life.
attractions.text_zh: 黄金屋顶是奥地利因斯布鲁克的地标，由神圣罗马帝国皇帝马克西米利安一世建于1500年，装饰着2657块镀金铜瓦。阳台上的浮雕刻画纹章，符号，以及他生活中的其他人物。

attractions.text_en: Maria-Theresien-Strasse is the oldest and busiest street and a luxury shopping street in Innsbruck. This north-south street is full of exquisitely decorated classical buildings. The famous Golden Roof, the Hofburg, the Hofkirche and the triumphal arch are all on this street, and at its end it leads directly to the high mountains over 2,300 meters in altitude; most famous of all is the Anna Column standing in the middle section of the street.
attractions.text_zh: 玛丽亚特雷萨大街是因斯布鲁克最古老繁华的街道和豪华购物街，这条南北走向的大街满是装饰精美的古典建筑。著名的黄金屋顶、宫廷城堡、宫廷教堂和凯旋门都在这条大街上，尽头直通海拔2300多米的高山，而最著名的是大街中段矗立着的安娜柱。

attractions.text_en: As a typical Baroque-style town of Austria, Salzburg attracts everyone from all over with its magnificent cathedral, distinctive monasteries, broad squares, splendid palaces, and the artistic atmosphere that pervades everywhere.
attractions.text_zh: 作为奥地利典型的巴洛克风格小镇，萨尔茨堡以其宏伟的大教堂、别具一格的修道院、宽阔的广场、壮丽的宫殿以及到处散发的艺术气息吸引着大家从各地而来。

attractions.text_en: Getreidegasse, also called Grain Lane, is the famous pedestrian street of Salzburg's old town, and the Mozart Museum is at No. 9 on this street. The shop signs along the street are made of metal, and the facade of every building clearly marks its year of construction, well preserving the appearance of medieval 16th-century Europe. From international brands to distinctive small shops, all can be found on the street, so it has earned the internet-famous nickname: "Austria's most beautiful shopping street."
attractions.text_zh: 粮食街（Getreidegasse）亦称粮食胡同，是萨尔茨堡老城著名的步行街，莫扎特博物馆就在此街9号。街道商号招牌用金属打造，每栋建筑立面上都清楚标注着建造年代，很好的保留着16世纪欧洲中古时代风貌。从国际品牌到特色小店，都可在街上发现，因此有网红名称：“奥地利最美的购物街”。

attractions.text_en: Mirabell Garden is one of the filming locations of the movie "The Sound of Music." The Mirabell Palace garden in the center of Salzburg has breathtaking views, open vistas, and enchanting scenery where color and form complement one another. There are many varieties of plants here, with open, vibrant areas skillfully blended with quiet and elegant shaded spaces, continually attracting tourists from around the world and local residents alike. The Mirabell Palace garden is truly a gem of landscape gardening. As one of the earliest Baroque gardens opened to the public, the Mirabell Palace garden has numerous statues, fountains and sculptures of great artistic value, and in 2007 it was listed as protected cultural property by the Federal Monuments Office. The garden is open to the public during the daytime year-round (some areas are closed in winter).
attractions.text_zh: 米拉贝尔花园是“音乐之声”电影的取景地之一，萨尔茨堡市中心的米拉贝尔宫花园拥有令人叹为观止的景色、开阔的视野以及色彩与形态交相辉映的迷人景致。这里植物种类繁多，开阔生机盎然的区域与幽静幽雅的绿荫空间巧妙融合，持续吸引着来自世界各地的游客和当地居民。米拉贝尔宫花园堪称名副其实的园林瑰宝。作为最早向公众开放的巴洛克式花园之一，米拉贝尔宫花园拥有众多极具艺术价值的雕像、喷泉和雕塑，并于2007年被联邦文物局列为保护文物。花园全年白天对公众开放（冬季部分区域关闭）。

attractions.text_en: The charm of Hallstatt lies in the perfect fusion of its ancient heritage and the beauty of the Alpine scenery. This village is nestled between the Dachstein Alps and the shimmering Lake Hallstatt, and each season is like a different garment—from a snow-covered, fairy-tale winter to golden autumn. This lakeside village has a history of thousands of years, and the early Iron Age Hallstatt culture (around 800-450 BC) was named after it. Today, it has been inscribed by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site (since 1997), famous for its thousand-year-old salt mine and its well-preserved cultural landscape.
attractions.text_zh: 哈尔施塔特的魅力在于其古老遗产与阿尔卑斯山美景的完美融合。这座村庄坐落在达赫斯坦阿尔卑斯山脉和波光粼粼的哈尔施塔特湖之间，每个季节都如同一件不同的外衣——从白雪皑皑、童话般的冬季到金秋时节。这座湖畔小村落已有数千年历史，早期铁器时代哈尔施塔特文化（约公元前800-450年）也因此得名。如今，它已被联合国教科文组织列为世界遗产（自1997年起），以其千年盐矿和保存完好的人文景观而闻名。

attractions.text_en: Lake Hallstatt is the most spiritual sightseeing destination among the 14 lakes of the Salzkammergut region. In the early morning, the lake surface is often shrouded in a thin mist, and occasionally a small boat is rowed across, the waves it stirs up drawing countless ripples on the calm lake; the lakeshore in the evening is even more enchanting, with red trees and yellow leaves covering the hills and slopes, swans and ducks floating about in search of food, and cafes by the shore festooned with clusters of flowers—all becoming the most beautiful scenery of Hallstatt. Every June, Hallstatt also holds a Corpus Christi procession; because the streets in the town are very narrow, the Mass is usually held by boating on the lake. The salt-transport boats, decorated with flowers, are set with an altar, and there are also a bishop, altar servers and a choir, with church flags hanging on the boats woven with images of people in all kinds of traditional costumes.
attractions.text_zh: 哈尔施塔特湖是萨尔茨卡默古特地区14个湖泊中最富灵性的观光胜地。清晨的湖面不时笼罩着一层薄雾，偶然撑来一叶扁舟，激起的波澜在平静的湖面划出无数涟漪；傍晚的湖岸更是迷人，红树黄叶漫山遍野，天鹅水鸭浮游觅食，还有岸边花团锦蔟的咖啡屋，都成为哈尔施塔特最靓丽的一道风景线。哈尔施塔特每年六月还要举行基督圣体游行，由于市区道路十分狭窄，所以通常泛舟湖上举行弥撒。装饰着花卉的运盐船上设有祭坛，还有主教、辅祭人员和唱诗班，船上挂着教会旗帜，上面织有穿着各式各样传统服装的人们。

attractions.text_en: This small square is the center of the town, surrounded by a ring of old houses and the spire of a Protestant church. The trees beside the houses grow with great character. In the middle of the square there are also sculptures and a fountain.
attractions.text_zh: 这个小小的广场是镇子的中心，周围有一圈古老的房子，还有新教教堂的尖顶。房子边的树长得十分有特色。广场中央还有雕塑和喷泉。

attractions.text_en: The gem-blue lake seen at the opening of the movie "The Sound of Music"—Lake Wolfgang. Lake St. Wolfgang is ten kilometers long and one kilometer wide; although its area is not large, after being carved geologically during the Ice Age, its deepest point reaches 114 meters. The lake surface appears blue or green depending on the season, and it is surrounded by dense forest belts, green spaces and steep mountain ranges. It was inscribed on the UNESCO World Natural Heritage list in 1997.
attractions.text_zh: 电影《音乐之声》开场时看到的那个宝石蓝色的湖泊—沃尔夫冈湖。圣沃尔夫冈湖长十公里，宽一公里，面积虽不大，但地质经冰河时期的切割，最深处可达114公尺，湖面会随着季节不同呈现蓝或绿，周围被茂密的林带、绿地和陡峭的高山群环抱。于1997年列入联合国世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: Munich is unconventional yet has a royal air, where the new and the old, the conservative and the innovative, clash fiercely. It is the capital of the German state of Bavaria and one of Germany's major economic, cultural, scientific and transport centers; at the same time, it also preserves the quaint charm of the former capital of the Kingdom of Bavaria, and is therefore praised as "the village of a million people." Munich's old town, Marienplatz, and the traditional German restaurant the HB beer hall are all places you cannot miss.
attractions.text_zh: 慕尼黑特立独行又有皇家气派，新与旧、保守与革新在这里激烈冲撞。它是德国巴伐利亚州的首府，是德国主要的经济、文化、科技和交通中心之一；同时，它也保留着原巴伐利亚王国都城的古朴风情，因此被誉为“百万人的村庄”。慕尼黑老城区、玛利亚广场、以及德国传统餐厅HB啤酒屋都是您不可错过的地方。

attractions.text_en: The Munich New Town Hall was built in three phases, with construction lasting from 1867 to 1904. The clock tower on the western side of the New Town Hall is also one of Munich's most representative landmark buildings. At the same time, the clock tower of the New Town Hall is the highest point within the old town ring road apart from the Frauenkirche; no other building's height may exceed the clock tower. The "chime dance" on the clock tower is the fourth largest puppet dance in Europe and has long enjoyed great fame. Every day at 11 a.m. and 12 noon and 5 p.m., and from May to October each year also at 5 p.m. and 9 p.m. in the evening, the brightly glazed and colorfully painted little copper figures decorating the upper part of the clock perform a scene of a knights' tournament, while the little copper figures at the lower part perform the dance of the coopers—very beautiful, and those who can catch the viewing times must not miss it.
attractions.text_zh: 慕尼黑新市政厅分三阶段建成，建造时间从1867年持续至1904年。新市政厅西边的钟楼亦是慕尼黑最有代表性的标志建筑之一。同时，新市政厅的钟楼是老城环路内的除玛丽恩教堂外的制高点，其他建筑的标高都不能超越钟楼。钟楼上的“钟鸣舞”是欧洲第四大木偶舞蹈，久负盛名。每天中午11点和12点，17点，每年5月至10月晚17点和21点，届时，钟上部装饰的各色釉彩的小铜人会表演骑士比赛的场景，下部的小铜人则表演箍桶匠们的舞蹈，十分漂亮，能赶上欣赏时间的一定不要错过。

attractions.text_en: This is the royal brewery first built in 1589. Having weathered more than 400 years of vicissitudes, the decor inside the hall is distinctively unique, and the bright colored paintings on the ceiling can make you feel a retro flavor; from time to time the sound of brass-band music drifts through the spacious hall, and savoring the distinctive German beer amid such music, it feels as if body and heart are intoxicated together. The song-and-dance performances with traditional Bavarian ethnic color make you feel as if you are placed in an ancient era; and all of this is perfectly combined with a modern banquet hall that can hold over 1,000 people, leaving people amazed.
attractions.text_zh: 这是始建于1589年的皇家啤酒厂，经历400多年的沧桑，屋里的装饰独具特色，屋顶鲜艳的彩画能使你感觉到一种复古的味道；宽敞的屋里不时传来钢管乐的演奏声，在这样的乐声中品味独特的德国啤酒，仿佛身跟心一起醉了；而那带着巴伐利亚民族传统色彩的歌舞表演更是使你感觉仿若置身于古老的年代，这一切，却与能容纳1000多人的现代化宴会厅完美地结合在一起，使人为之惊叹。

attractions.text_en: In Germany, no large city has kept its ancient city center as authentically intact as Nuremberg. The free spirit characteristic of the new era has swept across the whole city, and the people of Nuremberg live happy, prosperous lives, with hardly any other place able to rival it here. Today, although the world has changed greatly, the people of Nuremberg are still as happy and joyful as before. This city has many famous historical sites worth visiting, and the artistic and cultural wealth here is also unparalleled. Being in this city with its medieval timber-framed houses, sandstone buildings and the Gothic churches of the old town, you will discover many beautiful sights.
attractions.text_zh: 在德国没有一个大城市能像纽伦堡这样，将古老的城市中心保持得如此原汁原味。新时代特有的自由精神吹拂过整座城市，纽伦堡的人们过着幸福、富裕的生活，几乎没有其他地方可以与这里媲美。如今纵然是沧海桑田，但纽伦堡人仍然和以前一样幸福快乐。这座城市有许多值得一游的名胜古迹，这里的艺术和文化财富也是绝无仅有的。身处这座有着中世纪木结构房屋、砂岩建筑物和老城区哥特式教堂的城市里，您会发现许多美景。

attractions.text_en: St. Lorenz Church is a Gothic cathedral built between 1243 and 1477. The most unforgettable features within the church are the chancel with its star-shaped vaulted dome and the suspended wood carving of the Annunciation, which is a masterpiece by another famous German artist, Veit; another of his masterpieces is the Crucifixion of Jesus on the high altar. In addition, the tabernacle created by Adam Kraft can also be counted a treasure. St. Lorenz Church was built on the foundation of an ancient Roman basilica. Between its two Gothic towers is set a circular rose window with a diameter of 9 meters, decorated with countless triangular gables and fragmented roses.
attractions.text_zh: 圣劳伦茨教堂是建于1243年至1477年的哥特式大教堂，教堂中最令人难忘的是星形圆屋顶的圣坛及悬空的天使报喜木雕像，这是德国另一位著名艺术家法伊特的杰作，他的另一件杰作是高坛上的耶稣受难像，另外还有亚当克拉夫创作的圣体安置塔也堪称珍品。圣劳伦茨教堂是在一个古罗马长方形大教堂的基础上兴建起来的。在它的两座哥特式塔之间，装嵌了一扇直径为9米的圆形花窗，并以无数的三角形门和破碎的玫瑰花为装饰。

attractions.text_en: The Imperial Castle is the most iconic medieval building of Nuremberg, also known as Nuremberg Castle, sitting atop a hill at the northern end of Nuremberg's old town. This complex of buildings was first built in the 11th century and only reached its present scale in the 16th century. Every emperor of the Holy Roman Empire once lived here for a period of time. The walls of the Imperial Castle are five kilometers long, built with four main gateways and eighty defensive towers; climbing one of the towers, one can overlook the entire panorama of the city of Nuremberg.
attractions.text_zh: 皇帝堡是纽伦堡最具有标志性的中世纪建筑， 也被称为纽伦堡城堡，坐落在纽伦堡老城北端的山头上。这一片建筑群始建于11世纪，直至16世纪时才建成了现今的规模。神圣罗马帝国的每一任皇帝都曾在这里住过一段时间。皇帝堡的城墙有五公里长，筑有四个主要关口及八十个防御城，登上其中一个塔楼，便可以俯瞰纽伦堡市的全景。

attractions.text_en: The Gothic traditional building Notre-Dame de Dijon was built in the 13th century. On the facade of the church, three rows of beast-shaped false gargoyles are separated by two rows of slender columns, and the church has a 14th-century clock that chimes the hours. For most of the people of Dijon, Notre-Dame de Dijon is a church building full of warmth and intimacy. Over the past few centuries, the cathedral has always been the principal spiritual and emotional comfort of the people of Dijon.
attractions.text_zh: 哥特式的传统建筑第戎圣母院建造于13世纪，教堂门面上三列兽形假排水口由两排纤细的圆柱分开，教堂上有一座14世纪的报时钟。对于大多数的第戎人民而言，第戎圣母院是一座具有亲和力的教堂建筑，在这近几个世纪以来，圣母院一直是第戎人民主要的精神、心灵的抚慰。

attractions.text_en: Located in Dijon in the Burgundy region, the home of wine, the city was the capital of the Duchy of Burgundy from the 11th to the 15th century. It flourished particularly in the 14th and 15th centuries thanks to several outstanding leaders, becoming an important political, economic, cultural and artistic center of Europe at the time. Today the old town of Dijon is still dotted with many historical buildings from different periods. In addition to luxurious palaces, solemn churches, the splendor of glazed-tile roofs and many quaint timber-framed houses, there are also museums and art galleries converted from palaces and monasteries. Fine wine and fine food paired with an artistic atmosphere throughout the city make it a city full of French flavor.
attractions.text_zh: 位于葡萄酒故乡勃艮第地区的第戎，11到-15世纪曾是勃艮第公国的首府，特别在14、15世纪时因几位优秀领导人而盛极一时，成为当时欧洲重要的政治经济和文化艺术中心。如今第戎的老城区仍散布着许多不同时期的历史建筑，除了豪华的宫殿、庄严的教堂、彩釉屋顶的豪华和许多古朴的木框架房屋，也有宫殿和修道院改装成的博物馆和美术馆。美酒、美食搭配满城艺术分为，是非常具有法国风情的一座城市。

attractions.text_en: This destination that combines winemaking and tourism is a place not to be missed by wine lovers, art lovers and food lovers. Choose a Burgundy-product wine estate to visit, where you can see the aging and maturing process of the wine and the storage and fermentation process inside the cellar. If you are lucky, you can witness the winemaking process (depending on the grape harvest season).
attractions.text_zh: 这个集酿酒与旅游于一身的胜地是葡萄酒爱好者、艺术爱好者和美食爱好者所不容错过的地方。选择勃艮第产品的酒庄进行参观，在此可参观葡萄酒的陈酿熟化过程及酒窖内储存发酵过程，运气好的时候可参观葡萄酒的酿造过程（取决葡萄的产期）。

attractions.text_en: Colmar is located in the northeast corner of France, just a stone's throw from Germany, with the waters of the Rhine encircling the small town. Its secluded geographical location and exquisite scenery have earned Colmar the reputation of a picture-perfect town. At the French-German border, Colmar blends the tenderness of the Latin peoples with the diligence of the Germanic peoples. Most of Colmar's houses inherit the architectural characteristics of south-central Germany, with walls covered in alternating horizontal, vertical and diagonal wooden strips, beautiful and exquisite, just like cottages in a fairy tale. Filling the gaps of these tangram-like shapes with various colors is perhaps a romance only the imaginative French could have. It is precisely for this reason that Colmar was honored with the "Street Art Society Award," drawing people who flock to it.
attractions.text_zh: 科尔马地处法国东北角，与德国只有咫尺之遥，莱茵河水环绕小城。隐秘的地理位置以及绝美的景致使得科尔马被称之为画一般的小镇。在法、德交界，科尔马融合了拉丁民族的缠绵和日耳曼民族的勤奋。科尔马的房屋大都承袭了德国中南部的建筑特色，墙身布满横、直、斜相间的木条条纹，漂亮精致，宛如童话中的小屋。而在那形如七巧板的空当儿中添满各种颜色，或许是极尽想象力的法国人才有的浪漫吧。正因如此，科尔马获得了“街道艺术学会奖”的殊荣，让人们趋之若鹜。

attractions.text_en: The House of Heads is located on an ancient 14th-century street. Built in 1609, it is a Renaissance building. The 105 vividly varied human heads carved on its facade make it one of the eye-catching buildings in the old town. The 19th-century bronze statue standing on the rooftop is the work of Bartholdi, the designer of the Statue of Liberty.
attractions.text_zh: 人头屋位于十四世纪的古街道，建于1609年，是文艺复兴时期的建筑，其正面墙壁上雕刻的105颗表情生动各异的人面头像，是老城中惹眼的建筑。立在屋顶的19世纪青铜雕像，则出自自由女神像的设计者——巴托尔迪之手。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Zurich is an experience not to be missed. Here gather traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookstores and flower shops, as well as jewelry, fashion boutiques, and of course Zurich's own local brands. Famous streets and alleys such as Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg, Niederdorf and Augustine Lane are all located in the old town. Strolling through the old town at night, you will find it has become a place of entertainment for the public.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世的老城区是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰，时尚精品，当然也少不了苏黎世本土品牌。班霍夫大街(Bahnhofstrasse)、伦韦格街(Rennweg)、尼德道尔夫(Niederdorf)与圣奥古斯丁巷(Augustine Lane)等著名街巷都位于老城区。晚上漫步于老城区，会发现这里又变成了民众的娱乐场所。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also known as Station Street) is one of the longer shopping avenues in Europe and one of the most expensive shopping avenues in the world. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless center of Zurich where every inch of land is worth its weight in gold, but here are gathered luxury brands from all over the world, with private banks standing in rows. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless tourists feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet is stored a quantity of gold bars said to be among the world's largest, making many people too excited to move their feet. Immersed in it, you can clearly feel the air filled with wealth, opulence and a leisurely atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. The piers on the lake are filled with yachts of various kinds, just like a rich man's club. One end of Lake Zurich extends deep into the city center. White swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere on the lake, carefree and at ease, presenting a harmonious scene. The north shore of Lake Zurich is the residence of the wealthy, known as the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." The end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich. As one of the "world's most livable cities," the lives of the true people of Zurich are infused everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: The twin towers of the Grossmünster are the landmark buildings of Zurich. According to legend, Charlemagne (Charlemagne the Great, king of the Carolingian dynasty of the Frankish kingdom and founder of the Holy Roman Empire) built the twin towers on the graves of Zurich's patron saints Felix and Regula. Other sights worth seeing include: St. Peter's Church, which has the largest clock face in Europe, and the Fraumünster of Zurich, which is famous for the stained-glass windows painted by Giacometti (the great Swiss surrealist-existentialist sculptor and painter) and Chagall (the surrealist painter).
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂的双塔是苏黎世的地标性建筑。根据传说，查理曼（查理曼大帝，法兰克王国卡洛林王朝国王，神圣罗马帝国的奠基人）将双塔建在了苏黎世主保圣人Felix和Regula的墓地之上。其他值得一看的景点还包括：拥有欧洲至大钟面的圣彼得教堂和苏黎世圣母大教堂，该教堂因贾科梅蒂（瑞士超存在主义雕塑大师，画家）和夏卡尔（超现实主义画家）绘制的彩色玻璃窗而闻名。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is the photographers' beloved "dreamy hillside" of Switzerland, a famous postcard photography spot, and also an Alpine town that must be passed through when touring Jungfrau. Together with First, Jungfrau, Wengen, Lauterbrunnen and others, it forms the most magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hikers. Lakesides, green grass and verdant land, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow mountains together make up this captivating little town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头最爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、劳特布龙嫩（Lauterbrunnen）等一起组成了少女峰地区最为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Jungfrau is located about twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow year round, while at the foot of the mountain the grass is lush and the scenery beautiful, making it a famous sightseeing and outdoor sports resort in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was inscribed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Sphinx observation deck is the observation deck atop Jungfrau, the Top of Europe, equipped with Switzerland's high-speed elevator. At an altitude of 3,571 meters is the Sphinx observation deck, from which you can admire the breathtaking panorama of the Alps: the Aletsch Glacier, 23.6 kilometers long and covering an area of 117 square kilometers, the most magnificent glacier in the Alps; and a magnificent part of the Alps in the cantons of Bern and Valais and the Jura mountains region. On clear days, you can even see the Vosges mountains far away in France and the Black Forest far away in Germany.
attractions.text_zh: 斯芬克斯观景是欧洲屋脊少女峰上的观景台，拥有瑞士高速的升降机。在海拔3571米高处是斯芬克斯观景台，由此可观赏到阿尔卑斯山惊心动魄的全景图长23.6公里，覆盖面积达117平方公里的雄奇的阿莱契冰川，它是阿尔卑斯山中壮丽的冰川；有壮丽的阿尔卑斯山在伯尔尼州、瓦莱州及汝拉山脉地区的一部分。天气晴朗的日子，甚至能看到远在法国境内的浮日山脉及远在德国境内的黑森林。

attractions.text_en: The Aletsch region has been inscribed on the World Heritage List by UNESCO. Also called the "Great Aletsch Glacier," the ice here weighs over 1.1 billion tons and is the glacial landform of the Alps. The glacier extends from the northern slopes of the Eiger, Mönch and Jungfrau toward the canton of Valais, and the glacial meltwater flows into the Rhône River through the pristine Massa Gorge. Therefore, various rare plants grow in this region, and it is the habitat of many rare animals, as well as an excellent place for activities such as hiking and skiing, with magnificent scenery that is difficult to describe in words.
attractions.text_zh: 阿莱奇(Aletsch)地区已被联合国教科文组织列入世界遗产名录，又称为“大阿莱奇冰川”，这里冰重超过11亿吨，是阿尔卑斯山脉的冰川地貌。冰川从艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰的北坡向瓦莱州延伸，冰川融水通过原始的马萨峡谷(Massa Gorge)流入罗纳河，因而该地区生长着各种珍稀植物，是许许多多珍稀动物的栖息地，也是徒步和滑雪等项目的绝佳地点，壮丽的风景难以用语言描述。

attractions.text_en: Interlaken is a small town at the foot of Jungfrau, located between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, also known as the town between the lakes. It is famous for its intoxicating scenery throughout the four seasons. Geographically it belongs to the center of the Bernese Highlands.
attractions.text_zh: 因特拉肯是少女峰山脚下的一个小镇，位于图恩湖及布里恩茨湖之间，又名湖间镇，以一年四季的醉人风景著名，在地理上它属于伯尔尼高地的中心。

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is the green-space square in the center of Interlaken, the famous Swiss tourist town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery, and now any construction is forbidden here to prevent damage to this beautiful landscape. This is the best place to gaze at Jungfrau. On the vast green space there are fountains, also dotted with many benches, so it is also a good place for a stroll. Höhematte is also a landing site for hang gliders. There is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, and after paying, staff will take tourists to a nearby mountain for free gliding, allowing you to enjoy the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass train passes through here. It has Switzerland's purest alpine lake water, surrounded by mountains and lush with green grass. The quaint village is scattered along the shore of Lake Lungern, just like a paradise far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口列车就会从这里经过。这里拥有瑞士最为纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Switzerland's GoldenPass train shuttles through the beautiful regions of the Alps, taking in charming lake and mountain scenery all the way. One of the most beautiful stretches is the GoldenPass section from Lungern to Lucerne (Luzren-Lungern Express). Along the way are graceful villages, azure-blue lake water, dense vegetation, vast pastures, leisurely cattle and sheep, and the snow-white Alps. The scenery that changes from the foot of the mountain to the summit makes people marvel that this is a fairyland on earth.
attractions.text_zh: 瑞士的黄金列车穿梭于阿尔卑斯美丽的区域，一路总览迷人的湖光山色。其中美丽的一段就是龙疆（Lungern）到卢塞恩（Luzern）这一段的金色山口列车（Luzren-Lungern Express），沿途秀美的村庄，碧蓝的湖水，茂密的植被，广袤的牧场，悠闲的牛羊，还有白雪皑皑的阿尔卑斯山脉，从山脚到山顶变幻的风景，让人感叹这就是人间仙境。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled against mountains and beside water, Lucerne has the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance palace halls and mansions, as well as century-old shops, long streets and ancient lanes can be found everywhere. The scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the city's beautiful views as if real and illusory, making it an extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small cities. Since the 19th century, it has attracted many princes, nobles and men of letters to visit and reside, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: Lake Lucerne is winding in shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms the typical scenery of "lake and mountain views," attracting large numbers of tourists to sightsee. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and so this piece acquired the title "Moonlight" — although this was not Beethoven's original intention.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩湖这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: This statue of a dying lion was carved into natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground, a broken spear stuck in its shoulder, with a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms beside it. This statue commemorates the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on August 10, 1792, to protect the safety of the family of Louis XVI in the Tuileries Palace in Paris. Below the statue is text describing the course of this event. In those years, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, forced by livelihood, went to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers, brave and skilled in battle, but honor and money could not cover up the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, retaining only the guard serving the Holy See, that famous Swiss Guard. Due to their renowned loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "Dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Standing imposingly in the city center, Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and thousands of statues are carved on its white marble exterior walls. The interior space is broad, and sunlight pours in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, the light hazy and full of a solemn religious atmosphere. The crypt of the church also preserves the remains of the Church of St. Tecla that stood on the original site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most tourists who come here come to sightsee. Under the central arcade is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan. In particular, the window displays are updated daily, and simply standing outside the window admiring them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is full of many high-end restaurants, cafes and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱二世拱廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Sforza Castle is one of the most important buildings in Milan and a witness to Milan's vicissitudes of history. Overlooking the whole castle, it is like a grand duchy, with high walls on all four sides and an exquisitely planned park. It was built as a castle by Count Sforza in the 14th century, and later became the residence of the Sforza family, witnessing the entire process from the family's heyday to its decline. The castle is now turned into a museum by the Milan municipal government, including the Museum of Applied Arts and Music, the Archaeological Museum, and the Museum of Ancient Art. Its rear gate is the Gate of Peace, which was named after being remodeled by the ruler Francesco.
attractions.text_zh: 斯福尔扎城堡是米兰最重要的建筑之一，是米兰沧桑历史的见证。俯瞰整个城堡像一个大公国，有四面的高墙和精致规划过的公园。在14世纪时由斯福尔扎伯爵作为城堡而建，而后成为斯福尔扎家族的住所，见证了从鼎盛时期到家族衰败的全过程。现城堡被米兰市政府辟为博物馆，其中有应用艺术和乐曲博物馆、考古博物馆、古代艺术博物馆，他的后门是和平门，是统治者费朗西斯科改造得名的。

attractions.text_en: This is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room of Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, and to the east rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the public activity center for Venice's politics, religion and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Abbreviated as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe. It is a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and it is also a treasure house with a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route that condemned prisoners had to take when escorted by the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style. The bridge is house-shaped, with the upper part covered by a vault, sealed very tightly, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the felons were taken to the dungeon, and when passing through this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows. From then on they lost their freedom and involuntarily let out a sigh. It is said that if lovers kiss under the bridge, they can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was filmed here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en:
Adjacent to St. Mark's Basilica, it was the former residence of the doges of the Republic of Venice and the center of government.
This Gothic building made of pink marble has an exquisitely beautiful exterior. The arcades and the details of the sculptures are full of power and elegance, making it a symbol of Venetian politics and art.
attractions.text_zh:
紧邻圣马可大教堂，是昔日威尼斯共和国总督的官邸与政府中心。
这座粉色大理石打造的哥特式建筑外观精美绝伦，拱廊与雕塑细节充满力量与优雅，是威尼斯政治与艺术的象征。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five clifftop villages and towns: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together. Built along the coast, it is the most beautiful hiking route in the world, about 15-20 kilometers, taking about 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other are the mountains, and ahead are the Italian fishing villages, making it a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the World Cultural Heritage List by UNESCO.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy. Located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in the province of Tuscany, Italy, it is a world-famous landscape and one of the symbols of Italy, selected as a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. According to legend, in 1590 AD, Galileo once performed a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's view.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square there are four major buildings: Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (Pisa cemetery). Ancient city walls and gates are also preserved around the square. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few churches can be so enchanting. This beautiful church faced with white, red and green granite interprets the classicism, elegance and freedom esteemed in the Renaissance era to the fullest. No wonder it was named "Santa Maria del Fiore" (Holy Mary of the Flower). The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to finally complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才最终建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of an open-air sculpture museum, and it has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a copy of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi (Loggia of the Mercenaries) and many cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also called the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earlier large-span circular-arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the young woman Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over the centuries, it has stood firm through the floods, social unrest and wars it has experienced. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce. This Gothic building is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and the frescoes and sculptures inside are worth savoring carefully. There are many cafes and restaurants around the square, offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for holding various cultural activities and festivals, especially in summer, when open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, experiencing the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum in the center of Rome was built by ancient Rome to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great ancient Roman Empire. It was a place exclusively for slave owners, nobles and freemen to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combats of slaves, and is the most famous historical relic in Rome. The Colosseum is a model masterpiece and miracle in the history of architecture, renowned throughout the world for being huge, majestic and spectacular. Although only most of its skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and boundless momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman kings Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, and others rest here for eternity. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, the son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of ancient Rome's exquisite construction techniques, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Hepburn's fresh and bright figure seems to have already merged with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory people can never erase. The Spanish Steps — the entire Spanish Square is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The entire flight of steps has 138 steps in total and is the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also called the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god in Roman mythology, with majestic momentum and grand magnificence throughout. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and throw a coin over your shoulder, and if it can land in the water, your dream can come true. Starting in 2025, the Rome city hall plans to charge a photography fee at the Wishing Pool. If this bill passes, tourists will need to pay an estimated 2-euro fee themselves to visit and photograph the Wishing Pool.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。自2025年开始，罗马市政厅计划在许愿池收取拍照费用，如该法案通过，则游客需要自行支付预计为2欧元的许愿池参观拍照费用。

attractions.text_en: Trondheim is Norway's third-largest city, home to one of Northern Europe's renowned research universities and full of youthful energy. It is also the coronation site and ancient capital of Norway's first king, and was once the religious and power center of medieval Norway. With the solemnity of Nidaros Cathedral, the colorfulness of the Bakklandet wooden houses, and the clarity of the Nidelva River as its backdrop, it is a city that perfectly blends weighty history with vibrant energy. There is no need to rush from sight to sight; you only need to slow down and feel another profound charm of Norway beyond its natural fjords amid the solemnity of the old church, the colorfulness of the old wooden houses, and the vitality of the university town.
attractions.text_zh: 特隆赫姆是挪威第三大城市，拥有北欧著名的研究型大学之一，充满年轻活力。同时它也是挪威第一任国王的加冕地与古都，曾是中世纪挪威的宗教与权力中心。以尼德罗斯主教座堂的深沉、巴克兰德木屋的缤纷和尼德尔河的清澈为底色，一座将厚重历史与鲜活动力完美融合的城市。您无需匆忙打卡，只需放慢脚步，在古教堂的庄严、老木屋的缤纷和大学城的朝气中，感受挪威除了自然峡湾之外的另一种深厚韵味。

attractions.text_en: Norway's national sanctuary, an important medieval cathedral of Northern Europe and the coronation church of Norwegian kings, with magnificent and imposing architecture. Construction began in 1070, and it sits atop the tomb of Saint Olav, Norway's patron saint. Having survived several fires and rebuildings, it is a rare example in Northern Europe of a cathedral built in pure Gothic style.
attractions.text_zh: 挪威的国家圣堂，北欧重要的中世纪大教堂，挪威国王的加冕教堂，建筑雄伟壮观。始建于1070年，坐落在挪威守护神圣奥拉夫的墓葬之上，历经数次大火与重建，是北欧罕见的一座纯粹哥特式风格的大教堂。

attractions.text_en: This red wooden bridge is often called the "Portal of Happiness," connecting the city center with the traditional district of the old town. Standing on the bridge and looking to one side, you see the colorful warehouses lined up neatly along the riverbank; to the other side, the slowly flowing Nidelva River and its reflections in the water. Early morning and dusk are the most beautiful moments here.
attractions.text_zh: 这座红色木桥常被称为“幸福之门”，连接着市中心与老城的传统街区。站在桥上，向一侧望去，是整齐排列在河畔的彩色仓库；向另一侧，则是缓缓流淌的尼德河与水中倒影。清晨和傍晚是这里最美的时刻。

attractions.text_en: Kristiansund is located on four small islands in the North Sea in western Norway and enjoys beautiful coastal scenery. The opera house in Kristiansund is one of Norway's oldest opera houses; built in 1914, it is a beautiful Art Nouveau-style building and one of the few buildings to survive World War II. The Innlandet district is the old town of Kristiansund, where you can see distinctive and beautiful seaside buildings, and the few buildings that survived World War II have all been well preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 克里斯蒂安松位于挪威西部北海中的4个小岛上，享有美丽的海岸景观。克里斯蒂安松市内的歌剧院，是挪威古老的歌剧院之一，始建于1914年，是一座美丽的新艺术运动风格建筑，是在二战中幸存的少数建筑之一。Innlandet区是克里斯蒂安松的老城区，可以看到独特而美丽的海边建筑，二战中幸存的少数建筑也都得以完善保存。

attractions.text_en: The Atlantic Road is a century-defining piece of Norwegian construction, 36 kilometers in total length, a stretch of route between Kårvåg and Bud. In 2011, the Atlantic Road was named by Britain's The Guardian as one of the world's best road trip destinations. The Atlantic Road not only features ingenious engineering design, but the scenery on both sides of the road is also breathtaking; visitors can take in the beautiful natural landscape and ecological environment of the Atlantic along this road.
attractions.text_zh: 大西洋公路是挪威世纪性建筑，全程36 公里，是从 Kårvåg 到 Bud之间的一段路线。2011年，大西洋公路被英国《卫报》评选为世界最佳公路旅行目的地之一。大西洋公路不仅有其匠心独运的工程设计，公路两旁的风景也令人叹为观止，游客们可以在这条路上饱览大西洋美丽的自然景观和生态环境。

attractions.text_en: The City of the Midnight Sun—Molde lies on the riverbank at the broad mouth of the Romsdalsfjord and is a city in the northwest region of Norway. When Molde is mentioned, the first thing Norwegians think of is jazz. Every July, the International Midnight Jazz Festival is held here, one of Europe's longest-established jazz festivals. During the festival, visitors from countries across continental Europe come for its reputation. Standing on the Varden viewpoint at an altitude of 407 meters, you can take in panoramic views of the city, fjords, and islands, as well as enjoy the Molde panorama famous for its 222 snow-capped peaks.
attractions.text_zh: 午夜阳光之城——莫尔德位于罗姆达尔峡湾（Romsdalsfjord）宽阔河口处的河岸上，是挪威西北部地区城市。提到莫尔德，挪威人首先会想到的就是爵士乐。每年七月，国际午夜爵士音乐节在此举行，这是欧洲历史悠久的爵士音乐节。音乐节期间，来自欧洲大陆各国的游客慕名而来。站在海拔407米的瓦尔登观景台上可以一览城市、峡湾、岛屿的美景还可以欣赏以222座被白雪覆盖的山峰闻名的莫尔德全景 。

attractions.text_en: The Flydalsjuvet cliff viewpoint is a sight that frequently appears on postcards. From the Flydalsjuvet cliff viewpoint, you can take in the entire view of the small town of Geiranger in the valley, the Geirangerfjord, and the cruise ships docked in port. A protruding cliff beside the viewpoint is often called the Geiranger Rock (Geiranger Stone) by travelers, mentioned together with Preikestolen/Pulpit Rock, Kjeragbolten, and Trolltunga.
attractions.text_zh: 弗里达斯悬崖观景台是明信片上经常出现的一个景点，在弗里达斯悬崖观景台可以将峡谷中的盖朗厄尔小城和盖朗厄尔峡湾以及靠港的邮轮尽收眼底。观景台旁一座突出的悬崖经常被旅行者称为盖朗厄尔石(盖朗格石)，与布道石/祈祷峰、奇迹石和山妖之舌一起被提及。

attractions.text_en: Located north of Bergen on the southwest coast of Norway, it is one of the most beautiful and mysterious of Norway's fjords. The fjord is 16 kilometers long, with mountains over 1,500 meters above sea level rising on both banks, making it one of the world's foremost sightseeing destinations. At the head of the fjord is the village of Geiranger, reached only by a 1,000-meter-long road winding down the mountain slope; in summer many tourists come here on foot for vacation. In addition to the Geiranger Fjord Church built in 1842, the village also has the Flydalsjuvet viewpoint frequently visited by photographers and the Dalsnibba viewpoint at an altitude of 1,500 meters.
attractions.text_zh: 位于挪威西南岸的卑尔根北部，是挪威峡湾中美丽而神秘的一处。峡湾全长16公里，两岸耸立着海拔1500 米以上的群山，是世界上数一数二的观光胜地，峡湾顶端是盖朗厄尔村，到该村仅靠一条沿山坡蜿蜒而下的长1000米的道路，夏季徒步前来度假的游客很多。村里除1842年建造的盖朗厄尔峡湾教堂外，还有摄影师经常光顾的弗里达尔斯尤威展望台和海拔1500米高的达尔斯尼巴展望台。

attractions.text_en: The Geirangerfjord is famous for its many waterfalls, and the Seven Sisters Waterfall is the brightest star among them. The Seven Sisters Waterfall (Norwegian: De Syv Søstrene or Dei Sju Systrene or Knivsflåfossen) is the 39th-highest waterfall in Norway and a component of the Geiranger World Heritage Site. Seven distinct falls plunge down through the air together, like sisters dancing in unison. One of the falls has a drop of 250 meters. Opposite the Seven Sisters Waterfall is the Suitor (the Suitor or Frieren), forever pursuing the Seven Sisters without rest. These waterfalls are most spectacular between May and July.
attractions.text_zh: 盖朗厄尔峡湾以瀑布众多闻名，而七姐妹瀑布则是这些瀑布中最亮眼的明星。七姐妹瀑布（挪威语DeSyvSøstrene或DeiSjuSystrene或Knivsflåfossen）是挪威第39高的瀑布，也是盖朗厄尔世界遗产的组成部分。七条明显的瀑布从空中一起飞流而下，像是一起舞蹈的姐妹们。其中一条瀑布有250米落差。七姐妹瀑布的对面，就是求婚者瀑布(thesuitor或Frieren)，永不停歇的对七姐妹展开追求。这些瀑布在5月至7月间最为壮观。

attractions.text_en: The Eagle Road (Ørnevegen) is Route 63 located between Geiranger and Eidsdal, famous for its eleven consecutive hairpin bends. This commanding name comes from the fact that every year, a few days before the road opens, eagles often gather near the viewpoint at the summit of the hairpin bends—Eagle's Wing (Ørnesvingen, 620 meters). The Eagle Road is open year-round, while the rest of the Trollstigen (Troll's Path) section is open to traffic only from May to October. The route has many viewpoints of distinctive architecture (such as Flydalsjuvet, Ørnesvingen, Gudbrandsjuvet, etc.), which are advantageous spots for overlooking the fjord.
attractions.text_zh: 老鹰之路(Ørnevegen)是位于盖朗厄尔和埃兹达尔(Eidsdal)之间的63号公路，以接连11个发夹弯所闻名。这个霸气的名字，是因为每年在公路开放之前几天，在发夹弯的顶峰——老鹰之翼(Ørnesvingen，620米)观景台附近经常有老鹰聚集。老鹰之路常年开放，其余的精灵之路路段只在5月到10月通车。线路都不少很有建筑特色的观景台( 例如Flydalsjuvet , Ørnesvingen, Gudbrandsjuvet等)，是俯瞰峡湾的有利地点。

attractions.text_en: The Briksdal Glacier is a branch of the Jostedalsbreen—the largest glacier on the European continent by volume. Located in Jostedal Glacier National Park, it is one of its especially popular glacier attractions. The Jostedal Glacier covers 486 square meters, reaches up to 400 meters deep at its deepest, and rises 1,950 meters above sea level. The Briksdal Glacier possesses an incomparably spectacular natural wonder; here visitors will see a 1,200-meter-high glacier descending straight into the river channel from top to bottom, set against the lush forest alongside it, magnificent beyond compare.
attractions.text_zh: 布里克斯达尔冰川是欧洲大陆体量占首位的冰川——约斯特达尔布林冰川（Jostedalsbreen）的分支，位于乔斯特达尔冰川国家公园（Jostedal Glacier National Park）中，是其中特别受欢迎的冰川景点。乔斯特达尔冰川占地486平米，深处可达400米深，高于海平面1950米。布里克斯达尔冰川拥有无比壮观的自然奇景，游客在此会看到1200米高的冰川从上到下直入河道，衬着一旁茂盛的森林，无比壮丽。

attractions.text_en: One of the most beautiful and steepest mountain railways in the world, descending from the mountain area of Myrdal at an altitude of 865 meters down to the depths of the Aurlandsfjord—Flåm, a total length of 20 kilometers. Eighty percent of this railway is built on mountain slopes with a 55% gradient. Construction began in 1923 and took 20 years to complete; it is called Norway's greatest engineering miracle. Admiring the picture-like scenery of valleys, waterfalls, cliffs, and snow mountains from the train will surely be one of the most unforgettable experiences of your fjord journey. In the railway museum next to Flåm station, you can learn more about the history of building this railway.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上最美，最陡峭的高山铁路之一，从865米海拔的米达尔(Myrdal)山区直下到艾于兰峡湾的深处——弗洛姆，全长20公里。这段铁路的80％路段建在55％坡度的山坡上。始建于1923年，历时20年完成，被称为挪威最伟大的工程奇迹。在火车上欣赏山谷、瀑布、悬崖、雪山构成的这一幅幅风景画绝对会是您峡湾之旅最难忘的经历之一。在弗洛姆站旁边的火车博物馆里，可以了解到更多关于这段铁路建造的历史。

attractions.text_en: The Sognefjord is Norway's largest fjord and the world's most famous fjord, with a total length of 204 kilometers and a maximum depth of 1,308 meters. The Sognefjord is the most accessible of the four major fjords, and was ranked by National Geographic and travel magazines as the world's best-preserved and most travel-worthy destination, number one. In summer you cannot see glaciers, but there are still waterfalls, calm lakes, and sheer cliffs to dazzle the eye.
attractions.text_zh: 松恩峡湾是挪威第一大峡湾，也是世界上最著名的峡湾，全长达204公里，最深处达1308米。松恩峡湾是四大峡湾中交通最便利的一个，被国家地理和旅游杂志把峡湾排在世界上保存最完好、最值得旅游的目的地第一名。夏天里看不到冰川，但仍有瀑布、平湖、绝壁让人目不暇接。

attractions.text_en: Voss is renowned as one of the most beautiful fjord towns, located in the heart of the fjord region, beside a beautiful small lake, with the railway from Oslo to Bergen passing through here. It is a place in Norway where sports and recreation activities can be found in all four seasons, equipped with most modern leisure and entertainment facilities, only a short distance from many top-tier sports venues, and additionally possessing charming lake and mountain scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 沃斯（Voss）号称最美的峡湾小镇之一，位于峡湾地区的中心，在一座美丽的小湖边，奥斯陆到卑尔根的铁路经过这里。它是挪威一个四季都可以找到运动娱乐项目的地方，配备了大部分现代化的休闲娱乐设施，离很多顶尖的运动场地也只有短短的距离，此外还拥有迷人的湖光山色。

attractions.text_en: The Flåm Railway Museum not only offers a detailed introduction to the construction process of Europe's steepest railway line, but also analyzes the technical challenges encountered during construction and the people behind it. On display in the museum is a genuine El9 locomotive, an old electric turntable engine, and numerous carts used during track surveying. The museum also features a variety of exhibits combining pictures, text, physical objects, and audiovisuals. Visitors can also gain an in-depth understanding of the Flåm train journey through video presentations. The shop at the museum exit carries a variety of souvenirs and merchandise branded with the Flåm Railway.
attractions.text_zh: 弗洛姆铁路博物馆不仅有欧洲最陡峭铁路线的详细建设过程介绍，还会分析修建过程中遭遇的技术挑战和背后的人物。馆内展出真实的El9火车头，古老的电力转线引擎、众多轨道勘测时使用的推车。馆内还有各种图、文、实物和影音并茂的展览。游客还可以借由视频展示，深入了解弗洛姆火车之旅。博物馆出口处的商店内有各色纪念品和印有弗洛姆铁路品牌的商品。

attractions.text_en: Bryggen is a series of Hanseatic League commercial buildings lined up on the eastern side of Bergen's fjord in Norway. Bryggen has been listed as a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage Site since 1979. Its name shares the same origin as the Belgian city of Bruges. Bryggen is the oldest part of the city. In 1360, the Hanseatic League established a trading station here, and Bergen developed into an important trading center. Today, the colorful walls of these old buildings facing the harbor, the labyrinth-like wooden houses, and the commercial streets have become a symbol of the city of Bergen.
attractions.text_zh: 布吕根是排列在挪威卑尔根峡湾东侧的一系列汉萨同盟商业建筑。布吕根自1979年被联合国教科文组织列为世界文化遗产。其名称与比利时城市布鲁日为同一来源。 布吕根为城市古老的部分。1360年，汉萨同盟在此建立贸易站，卑尔根也发展成一个重要的贸易中心。如今，这些老建筑面对海港的彩色墙面，如同迷宫般的木质房屋和商业街道已经成为了卑尔根的城市象征。

attractions.text_en: Bergen is Norway's major port; more than half of Norway's fish catch and processed seafood products are exported to the whole world via the port of Bergen. In addition, this is also a point that must be passed on the Atlantic and Arctic Ocean shipping routes, and all kinds of fresh seafood are sold at the Bergen fish market. Therefore, if you have the chance to come to Bergen, you must come to the fish market for a hearty feast. The Bergen fish market is located right on the wharf on the south bank of Bergen harbor, facing the World Heritage Site Bryggen old town across the inner harbor. The fish market is divided into two parts: an indoor seafood center and an open-air market. You can buy the day's freshest fish, from cod, salmon, lobster, crab, North Sea king crab, scallops, and Arctic sweet shrimp to whale meat—everything is available.
attractions.text_zh: 卑尔根是挪威大港，挪威有超过一半的渔货与海鲜加工制品是经由卑尔根港口外销到全世界。除此之外，这里也是大西洋与北极海航线的必经之路，各种新鲜海产都会在卑尔根鱼市场贩卖。因此，有机会来卑尔根一趟，一定要来鱼市场大快朵颐一番。卑尔根鱼市场就位在卑尔根港南岸的码头边，与世界遗产布吕根老城隔着内港遥遥相对。渔市场有分室内渔货中心与露天市场两个部分。可以买到当天最新鲜的鱼货，从鳕鱼、鲑鱼、龙虾、螃蟹、北海帝王蟹、干贝、北极甜虾到鲸鱼肉，应有尽有。

attractions.text_en: We can take the Fløibanen funicular from the city center, which in just a few minutes brings you to the viewpoint on Mount Fløyen. This funicular will mark its 100th anniversary of operation in 2018. At the summit you can overlook a panorama of the city of Bergen. The harbor, the fjord, and the entire city's neatly arranged wooden houses and the mountains surrounding Bergen all come into view. The mountain also has a children's playground and parent-child activities such as treasure hunts. The funicular's lower city-center station is only about 200 meters from the fish market (Fisketorget).
attractions.text_zh: 我们可以从市中心乘坐弗罗伊索道，几分钟就能将你带到弗罗伊恩山(Fløyen)的观景台。这座缆车在2018年将迎来它运营100岁的大日子。在山顶能够俯瞰卑尔根市的全景。海港、峡湾以及整座城市整齐排列的木房子和环绕卑尔根的山头全部尽收眼底。山上还有儿童游乐场和寻宝等亲子活动。索道的山下市中心站距离鱼市(Fisktorget)仅200米左右。

attractions.text_en: The Hardangerfjord, the gentlest of the four major fjords, is a fjord with pastoral scenery. About 800 years ago, monks came here and planted apple and apricot trees, which blossom every May and bear fruit in summer. Worth seeing are waterfalls, nature parks, glaciers, and more.
attractions.text_zh: 哈当厄尔峡湾，四大峡湾中最为平缓，有田园般风景的峡湾。约800年前僧侣到此地种植了苹果树和杏树，每到5月便开花，夏季结果。值得一看的有瀑布、自然公园，冰河等。

attractions.text_en: It is one of Norway's renowned waterfall areas. The great waterfall located in Norheimsund tumbles mightily down a nearly vertical mountain slope, shrouding the cliff edge in a thin veil-like mist and creating an ever-changing, never-ending rainbow effect that enchants onlookers. Nature lovers can find endless pleasure in the Hardangerfjord. With the magnificent grandeur of the fjords and waterfalls here, there are multiple sightseeing tour itineraries to choose from; you can hike around the fjord, or take a kayak to explore the fjord from a brand-new angle. The mountain road is a sight not to be missed. The mountain road winds up the steep slopes with waterfalls cascading among them, especially spectacular in May and June each year. A must-visit attraction of the Hardangerfjord, the unique feature of this waterfall is that travelers can pass behind it without getting wet at all.
attractions.text_zh: 是挪威闻名的瀑布区之一，位于诺海姆桑德(Norheimsund)的大瀑布从近乎垂直的山坡浩浩荡荡奔腾而下，瀑布使悬崖边笼上一帘轻纱般的薄雾，在营造了一番变幻莫测、永不落幕的虹彩效果，让看客为之陶醉。大自然爱好者可以在哈当厄尔峡湾获得无穷乐趣。这里峡湾和瀑布的雄浑壮美，有多个观光游览行程可供选择，您可在峡湾四周徒步远足，或是乘坐皮艇，从全新的角度探索峡湾。山路是不容错过的景点。山路沿着陡峭的山坡蜿蜒而上，瀑布飞流其间，每年5、6月份的时候尤为壮观。哈当厄尔峡湾必去景点，这座瀑布的独特之处是旅行者可以从后面穿过瀑布，身上却一点都不被打湿。

attractions.text_en: Odda is the gateway town to two of Norway's famous fjords; although small and tranquil, it holds an important status like a "fjord living room" and a unique charm. Odda is located at the deepest part of the Hardangerfjord, surrounded by mountains, waterfalls, and glaciers. It is the gateway base to the Hardangerfjord and the Folgefonna Glacier, as well as the starting point for several classic hiking routes exploring Norway's "Trolltunga." The town's character: tranquil, simple and rustic, full of the spirit of outdoor adventure.
attractions.text_zh: 奥达是通往挪威两大著名峡湾的门户小镇，虽然小巧宁静，却拥有“峡湾客厅”般的重要地位和独特的魅力。奥达坐落在哈当厄尔峡湾最深处，被群山、瀑布和冰川环绕。通往哈当厄尔峡湾和布吕根冰川的门户基地，也是探索挪威“巨人之路” 多条经典徒步路线的起点。小镇的气质：宁静、古朴，充满户外探险精神。

attractions.text_en: Also called the Pulpit, it gets its name from its shape resembling a church preacher's pulpit. Preikestolen is located in the middle section of the Lysefjord; it is a naturally formed giant stone platform suspended in mid-air, with a vertical drop of 604 meters from the platform top to the fjord below. It juts out more than 30 meters from the connecting ridge, standing abruptly upright among the towering mountains deep in the fjord—extremely spectacular and awe-inspiring. The flat surface of the rock has an area of about 600 square meters. The hiking trail leading to Preikestolen is 3.8 kilometers in total length, with about 330 meters of uphill climbing from the starting point. Along the way there are red "T" markings. The round trip from the start takes about 4-5 hours, of medium intensity. Among the world's 50 most magnificent views selected by the travel-and-lifestyle website under America's CNN, Preikestolen ranked first. It is also one of the best places to overlook the Lysefjord and appreciate the beauty of the fjord.
attractions.text_zh: 又叫布道台，由于形状类似教堂牧师的讲台而得名。布道石位于吕瑟峡湾中部，是一块天然凌空形成的巨型石台，台顶与下方的峡湾垂直落差604米，从接连的山脊突出30多米，突兀地直立于峡湾深处的崇山峻岭中，十分壮观，令人惊叹。岩石平面的面积约600平方米。通往布道石的登山径全长3.8公里，从起点开始有大约330米的上坡。沿途都有红色T字标记。从起点来回大概4-5小时，中等强度。美国CNN旗下旅游生活网站评选出的全球50处最壮丽景色，布道台位列第一。也是俯瞰吕瑟峡湾，领略峡湾之美的最佳地点之一。

attractions.text_en: The Lysefjord is far from the sea, reaching deep inland, its water as still as a mirror surface, without the slightest wave. There are no surging billows of the sea here, only the reflections of the high mountains and cliffs in the fjord; sometimes you cannot tell which layer is the reflection and which is the real scene. There is not a single sound, only tranquility. Occasionally a small boat travels through the fjord, its bow pushing open the water surface to form a wave, parting to both sides of the boat, the edge of the wave foaming with tiny white crests; after the small boat passes, the water surface soon returns to calm.
attractions.text_zh: 吕瑟峡湾远离大海，深入内陆，水静得如同镜面，没有一丝波浪。这里没有大海的波涛和汹涌，只有高山悬崖在峡湾中的倒影，有时分不清哪个层面是倒影，哪个层面是实景。没有一点声音，只有宁静。偶尔会有一只小船行进在峡湾中，船头推开水面，形成一道波浪，分在船的两边，波浪的边缘泛着小小的白色浪花，小船过后，水面很快又恢复了平静。

attractions.text_en: Haugesund is located in southwestern Norway and is a city in Rogaland county. It sits on the Karmøy peninsula, facing the North Sea. Haugesund's history can be traced back to the Viking Age, when it was an important trading and seafaring center. The city's name comes from the sea god Hauk in Norse mythology, meaning "the sea god's mountain."
attractions.text_zh: 海于格松位于挪威西南部，是罗加兰郡的一个城市。它坐落在卡尔达伦半岛上，面临北海。海于格松的历史可以追溯到维京时代，当时这里是重要的贸易和航海中心。城市的名字来源于挪威神话中海神海格，意为“海神的山”。

attractions.text_en: The Stavanger Old Town is located on the west side of Stavanger harbor and consists of 173 wooden houses built in the late 18th and early 19th centuries. The wooden houses mainly came from fishing and canning industry workers who settled in Stavanger. However, it is usually the small area on the west side of the harbor known as "Old Stavanger" that is regarded as representative of the entire Stavanger wooden-house town. The town's two Michelin restaurants, Renaa and Sabi Omakase, tirelessly pursue the creation of fresh local cuisine, inspiring other restaurants throughout the Stavanger region.
attractions.text_zh: 斯塔万格老城区位于斯塔万格港西侧，由建于18世纪末19世纪初的173套木质房屋组成。木质房屋主要来自渔业和罐头业工人在斯塔万格定居点。但是，通常是称为“老斯塔万格”的港口西侧那一小块区域被视为整个斯塔万格木屋城的代表。城中的两家米其林餐厅Renaa和Sabi Omakase孜孜不倦地追求制作出新鲜的当地美食，激励着整个斯塔万格地区的其他餐厅。

attractions.text_en: The giant sword monument located by the sea in Stavanger commemorates the "Battle of Hafrsfjord." The sculpture consists of three Viking giant swords over ten meters tall, representing peace, unity, and freedom respectively. Melted into the swords are ancient swords discovered from all over the country, which can be described as "forging swords into swords." It is now also a symbol of the city of Stavanger.
attractions.text_zh: 位于斯塔万格海边的巨剑阵纪念碑，纪念“Hafrsfjord之战”的雕塑由三把十几米高的维京巨剑组成，分表代表和平、统一和自由。剑中熔入了从全国各地发现的古剑，可谓“铸剑为剑”。现在也是斯塔万格的城市标志。

attractions.text_en: Getting to know Norway anew should begin with the Fargegaten district of Stavanger. This colorful district overturns the rigid impression of Norway. The Fargegaten district is utterly different from the equally beautiful old town; the old wooden houses are painted in all kinds of vivid color combinations, making Fargegaten look even more distinctive. Along the street are cafés, restaurants, small bars, and shops of all kinds of gifts and candies—a famous district very much worth touring and sightseeing. It has now become one of the most-photographed streets in Northern Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 重新认识挪威应该从斯塔万格的法格卡腾街区开始，色彩缤纷的街区，颠覆挪威刻板的印象，法格卡腾街区与同样美丽的老城区截然不同，古老的木质房屋被粉刷成各类颜色栩栩如生的组合，使得法格卡腾看起来更与众不同，沿街都是咖啡馆、餐厅、小酒吧和各类礼品、糖果的商店，非常值得观光游览的著名街区。现在已经成为北欧出镜率很高的街头。

attractions.text_en: Kristiansand is a dazzling pearl of southern Norway, renowned for its natural beauty, beaches, and vibrant cultural life. As Norway's fifth-largest city, Kristiansand is a perfect travel destination.
attractions.text_zh: 克里斯蒂安桑（Kristiansand）是挪威南部一颗璀璨的明珠，以其自然美景、海滩和活跃的文化生活而闻名。作为挪威第五大城市，克里斯蒂安桑是一个完美的旅游目的地。

attractions.text_en: Oslo City Hall is a brick-red building, completed in 1950 to celebrate the 900th anniversary of the founding of Oslo. It was finished only after Norway's artists continuously decorated and embellished it from 1900 to 1950. The various halls inside the city hall display works by 323 artists, comprehensively showing people the history and culture of Norway as well as people's work and life. Every room here has special displays, from furniture arrangements to figural murals and the sea views visible through the windows—everywhere lets visitors feel its historical atmosphere. In addition, the Nobel Prize award ceremony is held here every December 10.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆市政厅是一座砖红色的建筑，是于1950年为庆祝奥斯陆建城900年而建成，它由挪威的艺术家们从1900年至1950年间不断地装饰和润色才得以完工。市政厅内部的多个大厅分别展出着323位艺术家的作品，全面地向人们展示了挪威的历史、文化以及人们的工作和生活。这里的每个房间都有特别的展示，从家具摆设到人物壁画以及可以透过窗户看到的海景，无处不让观光客感受到其历史的氛围。另外，每年12月10日诺贝尔奖的颁奖仪式在这里举行。

attractions.text_en: The Oslo Royal Palace (1825–1848) was built in the 19th century and is the working place of King Harald. The palace is built on a high ground, directly facing the main city street—Karl Johans gate. Surrounding the palace are 330 mu of woodland and parks, and the public avenue passing through here leads straight to the commercial district in the city center.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆皇宫（1825年－1848年）建于19世纪，是哈拉尔国王的办公地。皇宫建在一片高地，正对面是市区主要街道-卡尔·约翰大街，环绕王宫的是330亩林地和公园，穿过这里的公共大道直通市中心的商业区。

attractions.text_en: The Oslo Opera House faces the small Oslo fjord directly, with an architectural style resembling a ship. It is, after the Nidaros Cathedral (Nidarosdomen Cathedral) built in Trondheim in the early 14th century, a famous cultural building within Norway. Seen from outside the theater, its most prominent feature is the white sloping stone roof rising straight up from the Oslofjord; visitors can stroll on the roof and take in the beautiful cityscape of Oslo. Sometimes there are free open-air concerts outside the opera house, where visitors can sit on the platform enjoying the sea view while enjoying the music.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆歌剧院正对着奥斯陆小峡湾，建筑风格像一艘船，它是继14世纪初建造于特隆赫姆（Trondheim） 的 尼德罗斯大教堂（Nidarosdomen Cathedral）后，挪威国内著名的文化建筑。从剧院外面看，最显著的特征是白色的斜坡状石制屋顶从奥斯陆峡湾（Oslofjord）中拔地而起，游客可以在屋顶上面漫步，饱览奥斯陆的市容美景。有时候歌剧院室外会有免费的露天音乐会，游客可以坐在平台上一边欣赏海景，一边享受音乐。

attractions.text_en: The Vigeland Sculpture Park is named after the famous master sculptor Gustav Vigeland. The park has a total of 192 sculptures, comprising 650 figure statues in all. The central idea of all the statues in the Vigeland Sculpture Park concentrates on highlighting one theme—"life," expressing the various stages of a person from birth to death, giving visitors much enlightenment about life, and it is therefore also called the "Park of Life's Journey."
