attractions.text_zh: 维尔兰雕塑公园是以著名雕塑大师古斯塔夫.维格兰（Gustav Vigeland）的名字命名的，公园共有192座雕塑，总计650个人物雕像。维格兰雕塑公园里所有雕像的中心思想，集中突出一个主题——“人生”，表 现了人从出生至死的各个阶段，给游客以许多人生启迪，因此也被称为“人生旅途公园”。

attractions.text_en: Construction of Akershus Fortress began in 1299, built by order of King Haakon V, and it has witnessed more than 700 years of Oslo's history. You can stroll among the massive stone walls, towers, and courtyards, feeling the solidity and vicissitudes of the medieval fortress, which has never been conquered in history. Standing on the ancient walls, you can gaze out unobstructed at: Oslo City Hall and the Bygdøy peninsula, the busy Oslofjord and the mountains in the distance, the city-center wharf (Aker Brygge) and the opera house area.
attractions.text_zh: 阿克斯胡斯城堡建造始于1299年，由哈康五世国王下令修建，见证了奥斯陆700多年的历史。您可以漫步在厚重的石头城墙、塔楼和庭院中，感受中世纪堡垒的坚固与沧桑，这座堡垒在历史上从未被攻克过。站在古老的城墙上，您可以毫无遮挡地眺望：奥斯陆市政厅和比格迪半岛，繁忙的奥斯陆峡湾和远处的群山，市中心码头（Aker Brygge）和歌剧院区域。

overview.text_en:
After gathering in the morning, visit the Colosseum (exterior) standing on the ruins of the ancient Roman capital, the Pantheon (exterior), and tour the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). In the afternoon, head to Sorrento to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
【The main attractions within Rome's old city are all located within Rome's vehicle-restricted zone (ZTL). The hotel is conveniently located for exploring the various attractions on foot; the Rome day is a walking tour, with a round-trip walking distance of about 5 kilometers, so please dress in light and comfortable clothing.】
overview.text_zh:
上午集合后，参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。下午前往索伦托酒店入住。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
【罗马古城区内的主要景点，均在罗马车辆禁行区内（ZTL）。酒店所在位置方便步行游览各个景点，罗马当天为步行游览，往返步行行程约为5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。 】

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a top choice for enjoying the sea views of Sorrento, offering magnificent views of the Gulf of Sorrento and Naples. Surrounded by sea views on three sides, it has a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles, and a fully equipped marine spa center. It is within walking distance of the bustling seaside town center, and the hotel's pier is the docking point for sea-bound yachts.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en: An in-depth exploration of Rome, an important cradle of world culture, seeking out thousands of years of accumulated historical civilization among the ancient ruins that occupy roughly half of the city. Whether it is the world-famous architectural ruins formed by the imperial Senate, the triumphal arches, the commemorative columns, the Pantheon, and the Colosseum, or the many exquisite Renaissance-era buildings and art masterpieces housed in hundreds of museums, or even the city's many fountains of myriad poses represented by the Trevi Fountain, as well as the vast public works of roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares, and public baths—all of them freeze art in that wonderful moment. Someone once said "architecture is frozen music," and the architecture of ancient Rome surely plays a magnificent and timeless movement.
highlights.text_zh: 深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马，在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的必然是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum in the center of Rome was built by the ancient Romans to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was a place reserved for slave owners, nobles, and free men of ancient Rome to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat among slaves, and is Rome's most famous historical relic. The Colosseum is a model masterpiece and marvel in architectural history, renowned worldwide for being enormous, majestic, and spectacular. Although only most of its skeleton remains, its grand momentum and majestic presence still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman king Victor Emmanuel II, and Umberto I, among others, rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It is a classic building of the Augustan period and a model of the consummate architectural craftsmanship of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Steps once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday" and became a calling card of Rome known to all. Hepburn's fresh and lovely figure seems to have merged with the Spanish Steps and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. The whole Spanish Square is not large, with the crowds mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The steps have a total of 138 stairs and are the widest in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Fountain," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god in Roman mythology, with a grand and magnificent momentum. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder into the water, your dream will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, embark on a charming full-day boat tour to explore the treasures of the Amalfi Coast. Take a boat to Positano to explore the charming cliffside village, then take a boat to Amalfi to enjoy the panorama of the Amalfi Coast town. Afterwards, return by boat and check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: In the event of extreme weather conditions at sea, for the safety of tourists, the boat company will cancel the sea tour to Positano and Amalfi. Our agency will then arrange a coach tour of Sorrento's old town that day; Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the boat tour fee will be refunded to the tourists.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，踏上迷人游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，然后乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景。之后乘船返回，入住酒店。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a top choice for enjoying the sea views of Sorrento, offering magnificent views of the Gulf of Sorrento and Naples. Surrounded by sea views on three sides, it has a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles, and a fully equipped marine spa center. It is within walking distance of the bustling seaside town center, and the hotel's pier is the docking point for sea-bound yachts.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
[Paradise on Earth]: The Amalfi Coast
The Amalfi Coast is a World Cultural Heritage site, and was named by America's National Geographic magazine as one of the 51 beautiful places one must visit in a lifetime. With its winding coastline and spectacular cliffs, it also hides medieval fishing towns, described as "highly dramatic." Here there are ancient medieval towns, famous for their unique culture and architecture. The most popular towns include Amalfi, Positano, Ravello, and Maiori. In these towns, you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers, and temples, buildings whose history dates back several centuries, each with its own story.
highlights.text_zh:
【人间天堂】：阿马尔菲海岸
阿马尔菲海岸是一处世界文化遗产，更被美国《国家地理》杂志评为一生中必须去的51个美丽的地方之一。这里有蜿蜒的海岸线和壮观的悬崖峭壁，还隐藏着中世纪渔业小镇，被形容为“高度戏剧性”。这里有着古老的中世纪小镇，这些小镇以其独特的文化和建筑而著名。其中最受欢迎的小镇包括阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和莱马尼。在这些小镇中，你可以看到许多古老的教堂、城堡、钟楼和神殿，这些建筑物的历史可以追溯到几个世纪以前，每个建筑都有着自己的故事。

attractions.text_en: It is located on the coast of the Province of Salerno in the Campania region of southern Italy. The town closest to the coast is called Amalfi, from which the area takes its name. Seen as a whole, the place is half sea and half sheer cliff, with winding mountain roads and scattered villas on the cliffs.
attractions.text_zh: 它位于意大利南部坎帕尼亚区萨莱诺省沿海，最接近海岸的小镇叫阿马尔菲(Amalfi)，由此得名。整体看去，这里一半是大海，一半是绝壁，绝壁上是蜿蜒的盘山公路和错落有致的别墅。

attractions.text_en: Positano is a small town along the Amalfi Coast in the Campania region of Italy. The main part of the town backs onto the mountains and faces the sea. One writer described it thus: Positano is a dreamland—when you are there, she does not seem quite real, and after you leave, she becomes vividly lifelike. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as the most beautiful coastline in Europe; here the shoreline winds and turns, with towering majestic mountains and islands rising from the shore, valleys interlacing with headlands, orchards coexisting with wild plants. In this pristine natural environment there is rich human history, and scattered among the dense forests are many picturesque towns, the most beautiful of which is called Positano.
attractions.text_zh: 波西塔诺是位于意大利坎帕尼亚大区阿马尔菲海岸‎沿岸的一个小镇。城镇主要部分背山面海，一位作家这样形容：波西塔诺是一个梦乡，你在时，她不是很真切，你离开后，她变的栩栩如生。阿马尔菲海岸被誉为欧洲最美丽的海滩，这里的海岸线蜿蜒曲折，岸上山岛耸峙巍峨，山谷与海岬交错，果园与野生植物并存，原生态的自然环境中有丰富的人文历史，浓密山林中散落着许多如诗如画的小镇，而其中最漂亮的那一个叫做波西塔诺。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Naples to take a ferry to the port of Capri. That day you may, at your own arrangement, stroll along the seaside and then visit the Blue Grotto, or take a boat around the island on your own to explore the Blue Grotto, or go on your own to the town of Capri to tour the Gardens of Augustus and overlook the entire bay; afterwards take the ferry back to the pier at Naples, then head to Rome to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Rome Palazzo Riverside Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
After landing on Capri, activities are free and at leisure, with no transportation fees included. The recommended route is from the Main Port - Capri Old Town - Gardens of Augustus, a one-way mountain road of about 1.3 kilometers passing three important attractions. There are cable cars and taxis along the way, which require additional payment.
Note: The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction; if there is high tide, wind and waves, or if the local marine meteorological authority declares it closed due to other factors, it cannot be entered for visiting. The Blue Grotto tour fee is not included in the tour package. To avoid misunderstanding, please follow local custom: in addition to the manpower boatman fee for the Blue Grotto, please pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往那不勒斯乘坐渡船到达卡普里岛港口。当天或自行前往海边漫步后前往蓝洞参观，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园，俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船返回那不勒斯码头，随后前往罗马酒店入住。
夜宿：罗马河畔宫殿酒店 或同等4星级酒店
卡布里岛登岛后自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港 -卡布里古城 - 奥古斯都花园单程路线约1.3公里的山路，途径三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车，需要额外付费。
备注：卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

accommodation.text_en:
Rome Palazzo Riverside Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Adjacent to the Borghese Gardens, the Palazzo Riverside enjoys convenient transportation and a prosperous commercial area, making it convenient to tour all the attractions in the center of ancient Rome on foot. The hotel adopts a classic Italian design and is furnished with antique furniture; comfortable and stylish, the guest rooms all feature Art Deco styling, allowing every guest to feel the rich Italian cultural and artistic lifestyle. The hotel provides guests with a large buffet breakfast every day, including homemade pastries, fresh fruit, meats, and cheeses. The many restaurants around the hotel serve classic Italian flavors and Roman specialties.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马河畔宫殿酒店或同等4星级酒店
比邻波格赛公园的河畔宫殿，交通便利商业繁华，方便步行游览古罗马市中心的所有景点，酒店采用了意大利的古典设计并且配置了古董家具，舒适而时尚客房均设有装饰艺术风格，让每位入住的客人感受到浓郁的意大利文化艺术生活，酒店每天为客人提供包括自制糕点、新鲜水果、肉类和奶酪的大型自助早餐。酒店周围诸多餐厅供应经典的意大利风味美食和罗马特色佳肴。

highlights.text_en:
The blue wonder of Capri, the "Blue Grotto"
Since ancient Roman times, Capri has been a famous tourist and health resort. Emperor Augustus landed on this island on his way back after concluding the Eastern campaign, and was so captivated by its beautiful environment and pleasant climate that he did not hesitate to exchange the island of Ischia, four times its size, for Capri to serve as his summer retreat. Capri has a limestone topography, with steep rocks and many peculiar caves among them, the most famous of which is the "Blue Grotto." The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world. The mouth of the Blue Grotto is below the cliff and is very small, accessible only by small boat. Due to the special structure of the cave mouth, on one hand sunlight can enter the cave through the opening, and on the other hand it is reflected back up from underneath the water inside, so the seawater inside the cave is a crystalline blue, mysterious and unfathomable, and even the rocks in the cave turn blue—hence the name "Blue Grotto." To visit the Blue Grotto one must choose the right timing: first, the weather must be clear; second, go at low tide; third, there must be no wind or waves.
highlights.text_zh:
卡普里岛蓝色奇观“蓝洞”
卡普里岛从古罗马时期开始,这里就是著名的旅游疗养胜地，奥古斯都大帝在东方战役结束后的归途中曾在该岛登陆，被这里的优美环境、宜人气候所折服，不惜以4倍的伊斯基亚岛换取卡普里岛，作为自己的避暑之地。卡普里岛属于石灰质地形，岩石峭立，岩石间有许多奇特的岩洞，其中较著名的就是“蓝洞”。蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一。蓝洞的洞口在悬崖的下面，洞口很小，只能乘坐小船才能进入。由于洞口的特殊结构，一方面阳光可以从洞口进入洞内，一方面又从洞内水底反射上来，因此洞内的海水一片晶蓝，神秘莫测，连洞内的岩石也变成了蓝色，故称“蓝洞”。参观蓝洞一定要选择时机:一要天气晴朗;二要在退潮的时候去，三要没有风浪。

attractions.text_en:
The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world and is Capri's most famous attraction; many people go to Capri for the very purpose of beholding the wonder of the Blue Grotto. You can enter the Blue Grotto by small boat. Due to the special structure of the cave mouth, the seawater inside the cave is a crystalline blue. The surface seawater of the Blue Grotto presents a deep, dark blue, while the deeper seawater is sky blue, and the seawater sets off the rocks in the cave so they too are all azure. When the weather is clear, the Blue Grotto is especially beautiful and enchanting.
Note: The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction; if there is high tide, wind and waves, or if the local marine meteorological authority declares it closed due to other factors, it cannot be entered for visiting. The Blue Grotto tour fee is not included in the tour package. To avoid misunderstanding, please follow local custom: in addition to the manpower boatman fee for the Blue Grotto, please pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
attractions.text_zh:
蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，是卡普里较著名的景点，很多人去卡普里的目的就是为了一睹蓝洞奇观。可乘小船进入蓝洞游览，由于洞口的特殊结构，使得洞里的海水一片晶蓝。蓝洞表层的海水呈现幽幽的深蓝色，而深层海水却是天蓝色的，海水映衬得洞中的岩石也都一片蔚蓝。天气晴朗的时候，蓝洞分外的美丽和妖娆。
备注：卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

attractions.text_en: Capri is located near the southern entrance to the Gulf of Naples and belongs to the Campania region of Italy. On the island there are the medieval castle ruins of Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as the church dedicated to the island's patron saint, Costanzo, making it one of the famous tourist destinations of southern Italy. Capri's forests, waters, air, sunshine, and the island villas longed for by the wealthy of the world have attracted people from all over. Among them, the Blue Grotto is an attraction that everyone who comes to Capri will surely visit; on clear days, when sunlight shines into the cave, every corner of the deep-blue cave is exquisitely beautiful.
attractions.text_zh: 卡普里岛位于那不勒斯湾南部入海口附近，属意大利坎佩尼亚区。岛上有巴巴罗萨和卡斯蒂利奥内两座中世纪城堡遗迹以及供奉该岛守护神圣科斯坦佑的教堂，是意大利南部著名的游览胜地之一。卡普里岛的森林、水域、空气、阳光和较令全世界富豪憧憬的岛屿别墅，曾吸引了来自世界各地的人们，其中蓝洞是每一个人来卡普里岛一定会参观的景点，天清气朗时，阳光照射入洞穴，深蓝的洞穴内每一处角落都美不胜收。

attractions.text_en: Located in the town of Capri, the Gardens of Augustus record the ten years of life that Augustine lived here. One side of the garden is a sheer cliff, with the azure sea in the distance. On the left side of the garden are the Lovers' Rocks; legend has it that these rocks were originally a pair of lovers in love who, unable to be together, leapt into the sea one after another to die for their love, and afterwards became these rocks leaning against and snuggling one another.
attractions.text_zh: 位于卡普里小镇上的奥古斯丁花园记录着奥古斯丁在这里居住的十年生活。花园一侧是断壁，远处则是碧蓝的海水。在花园的左侧是情人石，相传这情人石原本是相爱的恋人，因无法恋爱纷纷跳入海中殉情，之后就成了这相依相偎的石头。

overview.text_en:
Head to Pienza, touring the cypress lane and the old town of Pienza, Pienza Cathedral (exterior), and other attractions. Then proceed to Siena, touring the old town of Siena, Siena Cathedral (exterior), the Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall (exterior), and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Afterwards head to the town of San Gimignano for a tour, viewing the exterior of the Torre Grossa, the Town Hall (exterior), and the Piazza della Cisterna (Well Square). That evening, check in at the Florence hotel.
Overnight: Florence Tuscany Villa Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
前往皮恩扎，游览丝柏小路和皮恩扎古城，皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点，随后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳古城，锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观），随后前往圣吉米亚诺小镇游览，外观格罗萨塔楼、市政厅（外观）和水井广场，当晚入住佛罗伦萨酒店
夜宿：佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Florence Tuscany Villa Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is an 18th-century Tuscan-style villa in Florence, offering guests a luxurious Tuscan accommodation experience. The hotel's guest rooms all enjoy authentic Florentine-style decor with antique furniture. The hotel has a beautiful park planted with century-old olive trees and colorful flowers; within the greenery, the Italian garden is reshaped with its elegant geometric forms and flora, complementing the medieval "enclosed garden" (hortus conclusus), even more private and reserved. The typical Tuscan style is perfectly blended with the unique and noble style of the oldest rooms. The hotel offers an outdoor swimming pool and a gym.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店是佛罗伦萨的一栋18世纪的托斯卡纳风格的别墅，为客人提供托斯卡纳奢华的住宿体验。酒店的客房均享有地道的佛罗伦萨风格装饰，配有仿古家具，酒店拥有种植着百年橄榄树和五彩鲜花的美丽公园，在绿地中，意大利花园以其优雅的几何形状和花草树木重新塑造，与中世纪花园“封闭花园”（hortus conclusus）相映成趣，更加私密而内敛。典型的托斯卡纳风格与最古老房间的独特和尊贵风格完美融合。酒店提供室外游泳池、健身房。

highlights.text_en:
San Gimignano
It is a famous medieval hill town in Tuscany, renowned for its well-preserved medieval towers, earning it the nickname "Medieval Manhattan." Walking on the ancient cobblestone streets, with millennia-old stone houses and towering towers on both sides, you feel as if you have returned to medieval Italy. Although the town is not large, it is full of artistic atmosphere. Besides the magnificent townscape, here you can also taste the multiple-award-winning world-champion gelato Gelateria Dondoli and the locally famous white wine Vernaccia. This is one of the most poetic stops in Tuscany.
Nestled in the Elsa Valley of Tuscany, it is like a medieval illusion. After the Etruscans settled, it became a small town in the 10th century, and at its peak it had 72 towers. Stroll among the 14 towers that remain today, visit the fresco-covered collegiate church and the civic museum in the Piazza del Duomo, and you can also climb the 177-foot Torre Grossa to overlook the whole town.
highlights.text_zh:
圣吉米尼亚诺（San Gimignano）
是托斯卡纳著名的中世纪山城，以保存完好的中世纪塔楼而闻名，有“中世纪曼哈顿”之称。走在古老的石板路上，两侧是千年历史的石屋与高耸塔楼，仿佛回到中世纪的意大利。小城虽不大，但充满艺术气息，除了壮丽的城市风貌，还可在此品尝获奖无数的世界冠军冰淇淋 Gelateria Dondoli 和当地著名的白葡萄酒 Vernaccia。这里是托斯卡纳最具诗意的停留地之一。
坐落在托斯卡纳的埃尔莎山谷，就像一个中世纪幻境。伊特鲁里亚人定居之后，10世纪这里成为一个小镇，鼎盛时期拥有72座塔。漫步在现在剩下的14座塔上，参观壁画覆盖的牧师会教堂和大教堂广场的公民博物馆，还可以登上177英尺的托雷格罗萨俯瞰全城。

attractions.text_en: The Torre Grossa is a tower in San Gimignano that is open to the public, and is also the tallest tower, with a total height of 54 meters, first built in the early 14th century. It was once part of the new Palazzo del Podestà, and from the tower one can take in the beautiful views of San Gimignano and the Tuscan hill country.
attractions.text_zh: 格罗萨塔楼是圣吉米亚诺中一个对公众开放的塔楼，也是较高的塔楼，总高为54米，始建于14世纪初。它曾是新的波德斯塔宫宫的一部分，塔楼可以一览圣吉米亚诺和托斯卡纳丘陵山区的美景。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly opposite the square are the Siena Town Hall and tower; inside the Town Hall is the civic museum, which houses many paintings of the Sienese school, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government."
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存最较的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old city, is full of masterpieces by great artists and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing cobblestone alleys and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you are in the European Middle Ages of a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. Over the centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the fourteenth century. Besides its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also preserves a series of traditions, including the making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties—the almond soft cakes ricciarelli, the nut pies panforte, the peppery spiced nut cake pan pepato, the rice puddings budini di riso, the walnut cookies cavallucci, or the walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a small town on the hills of the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. The town he oversaw rebuilding in 1459 is regarded as a model of the "ideal city," and is therefore hailed as a "touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, Pienza's uniqueness lies in being able to look out from the city walls over the World Heritage site "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D’orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of the Tuscan pastoral landscape. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and check in.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

overview.text_en:
Set off in the morning to tour the Cinque Terre, visiting the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs along the Ligurian coast. In the afternoon, head to Pisa to tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli in the historical and cultural center of Pisa.
Overnight: Florence Tuscany Villa Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: If bad weather or factors such as a railway company strike make it impossible to tour the Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically change to touring the coastal towns by coach or in another form.
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村。 下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Florence Tuscany Villa Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is an 18th-century Tuscan-style villa in Florence, offering guests a luxurious Tuscan accommodation experience. The hotel's guest rooms all enjoy authentic Florentine-style decor with antique furniture. The hotel has a beautiful park planted with century-old olive trees and colorful flowers; within the greenery, the Italian garden is reshaped with its elegant geometric forms and flora, complementing the medieval "enclosed garden" (hortus conclusus), even more private and reserved. The typical Tuscan style is perfectly blended with the unique and noble style of the oldest rooms. The hotel offers an outdoor swimming pool and a gym.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店是佛罗伦萨的一栋18世纪的托斯卡纳风格的别墅，为客人提供托斯卡纳奢华的住宿体验。酒店的客房均享有地道的佛罗伦萨风格装饰，配有仿古家具，酒店拥有种植着百年橄榄树和五彩鲜花的美丽公园，在绿地中，意大利花园以其优雅的几何形状和花草树木重新塑造，与中世纪花园“封闭花园”（hortus conclusus）相映成趣，更加私密而内敛。典型的托斯卡纳风格与最古老房间的独特和尊贵风格完美融合。酒店提供室外游泳池、健身房。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a paradise on the cliffs
Along the long Mediterranean coastline, the little train stops at each beautiful fishing village. Watching the sun-bathed beaches, the waves quietly lapping against the rocks, the colorful houses approaching from afar, curiosity to gaze at the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak at the moment of arrival. Walking on foot among the alleys of the fishing villages, the closer you get, the more delightful the surprises. It is like savoring a visual feast of five colorful delicacies, tasting each flavor bit by bit—this scene is so beautiful it is heart-stirring.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线小火车在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for the five cliffside villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together; built along the coast, it is the most beautiful hiking route in the world, about 15-20 kilometers and requiring about 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other the mountains, and ahead are the Italian fishing villages—a destination that countless hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on UNESCO's World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and the square has four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Cemetery. Around the square the ancient city walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa, and cemetery) as a World Heritage site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of the city of Pisa, Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany province of Italy. It is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, selected by UNESCO as a World Heritage site. Legend has it that in the year 1590, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's views.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Florence to visit the world's third-largest cathedral—Santa Maria del Fiore (the Florence Cathedral), the Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and Piazzale Michelangelo in Florence, where you can climb up and take in the scenery of the whole city at a glance. Afterwards, head to Venice to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Venice Voco InterContinental Hotel or Venice Four Points by Sheraton Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥以及佛罗伦萨米开朗琪罗广场，在这您登高俯瞰，全城的风景尽收眼底。随后前往威尼斯入住酒店
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或威尼斯福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Venice Voco InterContinental Hotel or Venice Four Points by Sheraton Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels, with an excellent location, stylish modern design, natural-toned guest rooms, and modern interiors, offering you a comfortable and cozy stay. The hotel provides a hearty breakfast, a fully equipped gym, a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails, and the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian cuisine and international dishes.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或威尼斯福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和国际美食。

highlights.text_en:
The brilliance and prosperity of Florence, the radiant star of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Seek the soul of the Renaissance among the blue skies and white clouds, the brightly colored walls, the dark green shutters, and the deep red rooftops; feel that the Renaissance never ages, in the streets and alleys, the squares and churches, the museums and art galleries. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic soul of Dante Alighieri and the painting soul of da Vinci still drift over the skies of Florence, still continuing to seek the people and events of the European Renaissance..."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利．但丁的诗魂、达．芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....”

attractions.name_en: Santa Maria del Fiore (queue required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: Santa Maria del Fiore is the undisputed symbol of Florence, its iconic red dome dominating the city skyline. The most stunning aspect of this architectural marvel is observing its facade up close—the geometric patterns formed by white, green, and pink marble are like a giant inlaid carpet, with every piece of stone precisely calculated. Especially when the sunlight slants across it, the green serpentine stone gleams with an emerald-like luster, transitioning gently with the pink marble, deserving to be called the most magnificent "stone embroidery" of the Renaissance period.
attractions.text_zh: 圣母百花大教堂是佛罗伦萨无可争议的象征，其标志性的红色穹顶主宰着城市天际线。这座建筑奇迹最震撼之处在于近距离观察其外立面——白、绿、粉三色大理石组成的几何图案如同巨型拼花地毯，每一块石料都经过精密计算。尤其当阳光斜照时，绿色蛇纹石会泛出翡翠般的光泽，与粉色大理石温柔过渡，堪称文艺复兴时期最华丽的"石头刺绣"。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria enjoys the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earliest large-span circular arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the young woman Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over hundreds of years, it has experienced floods, social upheavals, and wars yet stood unwavering. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Located in the southeast of Florence, Piazzale Michelangelo is a famous spot for overlooking the beautiful panorama of the city. In the center of the square stands a replica of Michelangelo's immortal work—"David." From the square you can see the whole city: Santa Maria del Fiore, Giotto's Bell Tower, the Bargello Museum, the Ponte Vecchio, and more, all taken in at a glance. This is also a good spot for watching sunrise and sunset; as the light changes, watch Florence glow with different splendors.
attractions.text_zh: 位于佛罗伦萨东南的米开朗基罗广场是著名的俯瞰城市美丽全景的地点，广场中央安放着米开朗基罗的不朽之作——《大卫》的复制品，广场上可以看到全城的风貌：圣母百花大教堂、乔托钟楼、巴杰罗美术馆、老桥等尽收眼底。这里也是观赏日出和日落的好位置，随着光线的变幻，看佛罗伦萨焕发出不同的光彩。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, freely visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings built on water, together with the winding water alleys, make the romantic charm of Venice linger long and refuse to be shaken off. In the afternoon, head to Milan to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Milan UNA Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，自由参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。下午前往米兰入住酒店
夜宿：米兰UNA酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Milan Central UNA/BW Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the center of Milan, just a 10-minute drive from the Duomo Cathedral and only a few minutes' walk from the metro station and shopping street, making it convenient for guests to reach all the attractions. The hotel's interior is mainly warm Italian style and authentic Milanese style, offering a hearty buffet breakfast as well as high-tech meeting and fitness facilities. The guest rooms feature modern decor in light tones, laid with elegant flooring, and the restaurant serves Italian and international specialties.
accommodation.text_zh:
米兰中心UNA/BW酒店 或同等级4星级酒店
酒店位于米兰市中心，距离米兰大教堂（Duomo Cathedral）仅10分钟车程，距离地铁站以及购物街仅几分钟路程，方便客人前往所有的景点。酒店内装以热情的意大利式款和正宗的米兰风格为主、提供丰盛的自助早餐，还设有高科技会议和健身设施。客房享有浅色调的现代装饰，铺有优雅的地板，餐厅供应意大利和国际特色菜肴。

highlights.text_en:
The world's beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic" still dazzlingly radiant
Venice, as one of the important cities of the Renaissance period, is composed of 118 small islands, connected into one by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands," and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the world's most beautiful squares, "St. Mark's Square," the beautiful Grand Canal, the phoenix-reborn La Fenice opera house, the Bridge of Sighs of which Xu Zhimo wrote sorrowfully, and breathtakingly beautiful colonnades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting, as well as the filming location for many movie scenes. Her unique temperament leaves everyone who visits intoxicated and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂 (外观)
attractions.text_en: It is one of the most renowned cathedrals in the Christian world, with both its exterior and interior decoration magnificent to the point of being breathtaking. The church houses what is said to be a thorn taken from the crown of thorns worn by Christ, and countless gold, silver, and jewels; and the church itself, of such great architectural and artistic value, is an incalculable treasure, deserving to be called the "[gem] of northern Italy."
attractions.text_zh: 是基督教世界最富盛名的大教堂之 一，无论外观还是内部装饰均华丽得令人叹为观止。教堂内收藏着据说是从基督戴的花冠上取下来 的一枚荆棘 ，有无数的金银珠宝 ，而单单这极富建 筑价值和艺术价值的教堂本身 ，就是无法估量的财富，堪称“意大利北部的”。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was the necessary route in ancient times by which the court escorted death-row convicts to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is house-shaped, covered on top by a vault, sealed very tightly, with only two small windows facing the canal side. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and when passing over this airtight bridge they could only glimpse the blue sky through the small window, losing their freedom from then on, and could not help but utter sighs. It is said that lovers who kiss beneath the bridge will be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located in Piazza San Marco, where all the past glory of Venice resides. Inside, you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you walk across the Bridge of Sighs, and can look outside through a small hole, rather than like the many people on the opposite bridge who look toward you at the Bridge of Sighs. Photography is allowed inside, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: St. Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco), also known as the Venice Central Square, has always been the public activity center for Venice's political, religious, and traditional festivals. St. Mark's Square is a rectangular square enclosed by buildings such as the Doge's Palace, St. Mark's Basilica, St. Mark's Campanile, the New and Old Procuratie buildings, the Napoleonic Wing connecting the two buildings, the quadrangular bell tower of St. Mark's Basilica, and St. Mark's Library, together with the Venice Grand Canal. It is about 170 meters long, about 80 meters wide on the east side, and about 55 meters wide on the west side. The buildings surrounding the square are all exquisite Renaissance architecture.
attractions.text_zh: 圣马可广场(Plazza San Marco) 又称威尼斯中心广场，一直是威尼斯的政治、宗教和传统节日的公共活动中心。圣马可广场是由公爵府、圣马可大教堂、圣马可钟楼、新、旧行政官邸大楼、连接两大楼的拿破仑翼大楼、圣马可大教堂的四角形钟楼和圣马可图书馆等建筑和威尼斯大运河所围成的长方形广场，长约170米，东边宽约80米，西侧宽约55米。广场四周的建筑都是文艺复兴时期的精美建筑。

overview.text_en:
Set off after breakfast and freely visit Milan's iconic building, the Milan Cathedral (exterior), and one of Europe's most beautiful commercial arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II.
Depart for the Swiss financial metropolis of Zurich, visiting Zurich's old town, Lake Zurich, Lindenhof Park, and strolling along the Limmat River.
Overnight: Zurich Crowne Plaza Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发，自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。
出发前往瑞士金融大都会苏黎世，参观苏黎世老城，苏黎世湖，林登霍夫公园，漫步利马特河边。
夜宿：苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Zurich Crowne Plaza Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the bustling commercial district of Zurich, with shops, bars, and restaurants all within walking distance. The spacious and stylish guest rooms can relieve the fatigue of a whole day, and the clean and bright interior decor brings guests a good mood for the day. The hotel has complete facilities; guests can enjoy dinner at the hotel's à la carte restaurant or sample snacks and drinks at the hotel bar.
accommodation.text_zh:
苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落于苏黎世热闹的商业街区，步行可达的距离遍布商店、酒吧和餐馆。宽敞时尚的客房能解除您一整天的疲累，简洁明快室内装饰带给客人一天的好心情，酒店设施完备，客人可在酒店内的单点菜肴餐厅享用晚餐或在酒店的酒吧品尝小吃和饮品。

highlights.text_en:
Behold the Milan Cathedral, which took 500 years to build and is famous worldwide for its many exquisite carvings and Gothic spires
First built in 1386, it is the iconic building in the center of Milan. The main body of the cathedral took more than four centuries to be basically completed in 1812, while the detail work continued until 1960, when the cathedral's last bronze door was installed. The years have not only endowed it with the vicissitudes of history but have also created multiple styles for it; Gothic spires matched with Baroque-style carvings, from top to bottom, exhaust every extravagance.
highlights.text_zh:
瞻仰历经500年建成，以众多精美的雕刻和哥特式的塔尖而闻名于世的米兰大教堂
始建于1386年，是米兰市中心的标志性建筑。教堂主体历经4个多世纪才于1812年基本完工，而细节工程则一直持续到1960年安装完成教堂的最后一扇铜门为止。岁月不仅赋予了它历史的沧桑，同时也为它营造出多重的风格样式，哥特式的尖塔搭配巴洛克风格的雕饰，自上而下，极尽奢华。

attractions.text_en: Zurich's old town is a not-to-be-missed experience, gathering traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookshops and flower shops, as well as jewelry, fashion boutiques, and of course Zurich's own local brands. Famous streets and lanes such as Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg, Niederdorf, and Augustine Lane are all located in the old town. Strolling through the old town at night, you will find it has turned into a place of entertainment for the public.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世的老城区是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰，时尚精品，当然也少不了苏黎世本土品牌。班霍夫大街(Bahnhofstrasse)、伦韦格街(Rennweg)、尼德道尔夫(Niederdorf)与圣奥古斯丁巷(Augustine Lane)等著名街巷都位于老城区。晚上漫步于老城区，会发现这里又变成了民众的娱乐场所。

attractions.text_en: Lindenhof, meaning the courtyard of linden trees, is a park located on a small hill covered with linden trees in the center of Zurich's old town. Before you is the Limmat River, making it an ideal place to admire the Zurich Cathedral and the scenery of the right bank. It is also where, at the beginning of the main story of "Crash Landing on You," the perfect frame was captured of the two protagonists brushing past each other.
attractions.text_zh: 林登霍夫(Lindenhof)，意思为菩提树的中庭，公园坐落于苏黎世老城中心一片被菩提树覆盖的小山丘上。眼前就是利马特河，是欣赏苏黎世大教堂和右岸风光的理想之地。也是为《爱的迫降》的正片开始时，定格了两人擦身而过的完美的画面。

attractions.text_en: The Limmat River flows out from the northern end of Lake Zurich, then runs through the center of Zurich, then flows another 35 kilometers to the northwest, and finally empties into the Aare River. Walking along the Limmat, watching the slowly flowing river water, it is another quiet and peaceful day—this is probably what the feeling of tranquil time well spent is like. The swans in the river that inadvertently intrude when tourists take photos add a touch of liveliness and playfulness to this calm river.
attractions.text_zh: 利马特河从苏黎世湖北端引出，然后流经苏黎世市中心，再向西北方流35公里，最后注入阿勒河（Aare）。行走在利马特河边，看着缓慢流动的河水，又是静谧而祥和的一天，这大概就是岁月静好的感觉，河里天鹅在游人拍照时不经意的闯入，又为这平静的河水增添一丝灵动和跳脱之感。

attractions.text_en: Although its name, Duomo, means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was first built in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. It is hailed as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture; hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and the white marble exterior walls are carved with thousands of statues. The interior space is vast, with sunlight streaming in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, the light hazy, full of solemn religious atmosphere. In the cathedral's crypt, the remains of the original Church of San Tecla on the site are still preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en:
This cross-shaped glass-vaulted gallery, built in the 19th century, is not only one of the oldest shopping centers in the world, but also a city-level model of art and architecture.
Here are gathered the flagship stores of Italian luxury brands such as Prada and Gucci, but even if you do not shop, strolling through it is like walking through a museum.
At the time-honored cafes at the end of the gallery, such as Caffè Biffi or Savini Milano, you can order an espresso or taste a tiramisu dessert, and experience the ease and elegance of the Italian pace of life.
attractions.text_zh:
这条19世纪修建的十字形玻璃拱顶长廊不仅是世界上最古老的购物中心之一，更是一座城市级的艺术与建筑典范。
这里汇聚了Prada、Gucci等意大利奢侈品牌旗舰店，但即便不购物，漫步其中也如同穿行于一座博物馆。
在长廊尽头的老字号咖啡馆，如Caffè Biffi或Savini Milano，您可点一杯意式浓缩咖啡或品尝提拉米苏甜点，体会意式生活节奏的从容与优雅。

overview.text_en:
Set off in the morning to tour the lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, listen to the Lion Monument tell that chapter of Swiss loyalty and steadfastness, and visit attractions such as the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower. Afterwards, take the GoldenPass scenic train to Lungern, a journey of about 1 hour, crossing mountains and ridges, enjoying the beautiful scenery along the way, and touring Lake Lungern and the town's scenery. Afterwards, head to visit the town of Interlaken, freely touring Höheweg, Höhematte, the tranquil villages, shaded by green trees and dotted between mountains and waters, with man and nature blending into one. Afterwards, check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Meiringen Nature Park Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点。之后乘坐金色山口观光列车前往龙疆，1小时左右的车程，穿山越岭，一路上欣赏美丽的风景，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。之后前往参观因特拉肯小镇，自由游览何维克街，荷黑马特，宁静的村庄，绿树掩映，点缀在山水之间，人与自然浑然一体。之后入住酒店。
夜宿：迈林根自然公园酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Meiringen Nature Park Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
This Art Nouveau-style hotel, built in 1880, is famous for its connection with Sherlock Holmes, and is located in a tranquil spot in Meiringen in the heart of Switzerland. This four-star bed-and-breakfast hotel has a spacious Belle Époque-style breakfast room, a bright and cozy conservatory, a comfortable hotel lobby, and a warm English/Irish-style bar. Behind the hotel is a beautiful park-like garden; during summer, the garden has various seating, leisure areas, play areas, and barbecue areas.
accommodation.text_zh:
迈林根自然公园酒店 或同等4星级酒店
这家建于 1880 年的新艺术风格酒店，因与夏洛克·福尔摩斯的渊源而闻名，坐落于瑞士中心地带迈林根的静谧之地。这家四星级住宿加早餐酒店拥有宽敞的美好年代风格早餐室、明亮温馨的温室、舒适的酒店大堂，以及温馨英式/爱尔兰式酒吧。酒店后方拥有一个美丽的公园式花园，夏季期间，花园内设有各种座椅、休闲区、游乐区以及烧烤区。

highlights.text_en:
The GoldenPass scenic train
The Golden Line of the GoldenPass scenic train is taking the GoldenPass from Lucerne to Lungern. The towns and villages along the route are all delicate scenery full of fantasy. All the way it travels through the Alps, linking together Switzerland's most beautiful lakes such as Lake Thun, Lake Brienz, and Lake Lucerne. The train is like a red ribbon, stringing together sapphire lakes, snow-capped mountains, and agate-like red-tiled colorful houses, taking you to roam through a wonderful fairyland. Sitting on the train, the panoramic, bright, huge glass windows let you take in all the beautiful scenery along the route from every angle. From the first minute the train starts, you will be drawn into an ever-changing wonderland; you will not bear to blink an eye, fearing to miss every changing view.
highlights.text_zh:
金色山口观光列车
金色山口观光列车的黄金线，是乘坐金色山口号从卢塞恩前往龙疆。沿线的城镇村庄，都是充满奇幻的精致景色。一路穿行于阿尔卑斯山脉之中。串连图恩湖、布里恩茨湖和卢塞恩湖等瑞士境内风光美丽的湖泊。列车如一道红色的彩线，串起蓝宝石的湖泊，白雪皑皑的群山，玛瑙般的红瓦彩屋，带你畅游美妙的神仙境界。坐上列车，全景敞亮巨大的玻璃光窗，让你从各个角度，都能尽揽沿线风光美景。从列车启动的第一分钟起，就会被带入变幻无穷的胜景之中，你不舍得眨一下眼睛，生怕错过每一个变化的景色。

attractions.text_en: Interlaken is a small town at the foot of the Jungfrau, located between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, also known as the town between the lakes. It is famous for its enchanting scenery throughout the four seasons, and geographically it belongs to the center of the Bernese Oberland.
attractions.text_zh: 因特拉肯是少女峰山脚下的一个小镇，位于图恩湖及布里恩茨湖之间，又名湖间镇，以一年四季的醉人风景著名，在地理上它属于伯尔尼高地的中心。

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is the green square in the center of Interlaken, Switzerland's famous tourist town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery, and now the construction of any buildings is forbidden to prevent damaging this beautiful scenery. This is the best place to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast green space there are fountains and many benches, so it is also a good place for strolling. Höhematte is also the landing site for paragliders; at the edge of the lawn there is a reception point, and after paying, staff will take tourists to the nearby mountains for free gliding, where you can admire the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the sky.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking part of Switzerland. Backed by mountains and facing water, Lucerne possesses the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance palaces and mansions, as well as century-old shops and long ancient streets and alleys, everywhere abound. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne even more reflects the city's beautiful scenery in an illusory yet real way, making it the extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small cities. Since the 19th century, it has attracted many princes, nobles, and literati to visit and reside, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: Lake Lucerne, this lake of winding shape, together with the surrounding mountains, forms the typical scenery of "lake and mountain views," attracting large numbers of tourists to come and sightsee. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight on Lake Lucerne, and this piece thus acquired the title "Moonlight"—although this was not Beethoven's original intention.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩湖这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: Situated between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass train passes through here. Here is some of Switzerland's purest alpine lake water, surrounded by mountains, with lush green grass, and the rustic villages scattered along the shores of Lake Lungern, just like a paradise far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口列车就会从这里经过。这里 拥有瑞士最为纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

overview.text_en:
Set off in the morning for the Jungfrau region. You may choose to go by vehicle to Wilderswil to view the red Swiss train, the Swiss fairytale scenery of Lauterbrunnen, and then arrive at Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau. Or, you may also choose to take, at your own expense, Europe's highest-altitude railway, passing through the skiing and hiking holy land of Grindelwald, then ascend the enchanting Jungfrau from Kleine Scheidegg, heading to the "Sphinx Observation Deck" to overlook the snow-capped Jungfrau and Europe's largest and longest "Aletsch Glacier." Afterwards pass through Lauterbrunnen, enjoying the beautiful alpine scenery and the waterfall groups.
Overnight: Meiringen Nature Park Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往少女峰地区，可选择随车前往维尔德斯维尔观赏红色瑞士火车、劳特布龙嫩的瑞士童话风景、随后来到少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德。或者，也可选择自费乘坐欧洲海拔较高的铁路，途径滑雪远足圣地格林德尔瓦尔德，再由小夏戴客（Kleine Schneidegg）登上迷人少女峰，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”上俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰和欧洲较大较长的“阿莱奇冰川”(Aletsch)。之后途经劳特布龙嫩，欣赏美丽的高山风光和瀑布群。
夜宿：迈林根自然公园酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Meiringen Nature Park Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
This Art Nouveau-style hotel, built in 1880, is famous for its connection with Sherlock Holmes, and is located in a tranquil spot in Meiringen in the heart of Switzerland. This four-star bed-and-breakfast hotel has a spacious Belle Époque-style breakfast room, a bright and cozy conservatory, a comfortable hotel lobby, and a warm English/Irish-style bar. Behind the hotel is a beautiful park-like garden; during summer, the garden has various seating, leisure areas, play areas, and barbecue areas.
accommodation.text_zh:
迈林根自然公园酒店 或同等4星级酒店
这家建于 1880 年的新艺术风格酒店，因与夏洛克·福尔摩斯的渊源而闻名，坐落于瑞士中心地带迈林根的静谧之地。这家四星级住宿加早餐酒店拥有宽敞的美好年代风格早餐室、明亮温馨的温室、舒适的酒店大堂，以及温馨英式/爱尔兰式酒吧。酒店后方拥有一个美丽的公园式花园，夏季期间，花园内设有各种座椅、休闲区、游乐区以及烧烤区。

highlights.text_en:
The Jungfrau region
As Switzerland's famous representative tourist destination, the Jungfrau is not a single snow mountain, but a series of different Swiss scenic combinations surrounding the Jungfrau and Interlaken, containing many different snow-mountain experiences, which have made for the splendid and rich scenic areas of Switzerland's Jungfrau, First, Grindelwald, and other attractions. The Jungfrau summit scenic cable cars let you feel 7 different experiences. The First Cliff Walk adventure park, as the originator of aerial adventure tourism projects, and high-altitude paragliding, not only adorns the snow mountains but also brings many thrilling activities to young people.
highlights.text_zh:
少女峰地区
作为瑞士著名的代表性旅游胜地，少女峰不是座雪山，而是围绕着少女峰、因特拉肯的一系列不同的瑞士风景组合，包含多种不同的雪山体验，成就了精彩而丰富的瑞士少女峰 、菲斯特，格兰维尔德等景点旅游景区。 少女峰登顶景观缆车，可以感受7程不同的体验。菲斯特空天冒险乐园，作为空天探险类旅游项目的始祖，而高空滑翔伞不仅仅装饰了雪山，还给年轻群体带来了许多的刺激活动。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the highest peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow all year round, while below the mountain the grass is lush green and the scenery beautiful, making it a famous holy land for sightseeing and outdoor sports in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was inscribed as a World Natural Heritage site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is the famous postcard photography spot of the Swiss "dream slope" most beloved by photographers, and is also the Alpine town one must pass through to tour the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen, Lauterbrunnen, and others, it forms the most magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-watching destination, while in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeside, green grass, waterfalls, dairy cows, and snow mountains together make up this fascinating little town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头最爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、劳特布伦嫩（Lauterbrunnen）等一起组成了少女峰地区最为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Lauterbrunnen is located on the western side of the Jungfrau region. More than 70 waterfalls and streams fall down from the cliffs, so the literal German translation of Lauterbrunnen is "many springs of water," and this town is a waterfall town worthy of its name. Among them, the Staubbach Falls is the town's iconic sight, and the poets Goethe and Wordsworth once wrote poems to praise it. In addition, the Mürren Falls and the Trümmelbach Falls, which rush down from a cave as high as ten stories, must also not be missed.
attractions.text_zh: 劳特布龙嫩(Lauterbrunnen)位于少女峰地区的西面，从山崖上落下来70多个瀑布和小河，所以劳特布龙嫩的德语直译是很多的泉水，这个小镇是名副其实的瀑布镇。其中施陶河瀑布是村子的标志性景观，诗人歌德和伍德·沃斯曾写诗来赞美它。此外还有米伦瀑布和从十层楼高的山洞里飞奔而下的特吕默尔河瀑布，也不可错过。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Lausanne, blooming with flowers in all four seasons, freely touring the Olympic Park and stopping at the Ouchy waterfront, whose shores are lined with cafes, restaurants, and hotels. Afterwards comes the most wonderful part, the scenic Swiss route circling Lake Geneva, a fairytale-like Swiss scenery road, fully enjoying the enchanting scenery of Lake Léman, passing through the rolling Lavaux vineyard terraces—not only beautiful scenery but also a precious World Cultural Heritage. In the afternoon, admire the lonely reflection of the Château de Chillon in Montreux in the lake water; afterwards head to Poligny to check in at the Relais & Châteaux castle hotel.
Overnight: Relais & Châteaux castle hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往四季布满鲜花的洛桑，自由游览奥林匹克公园，停留在乌希码头，沿岸布满了咖啡厅、餐厅和酒店，之后迎来最精彩的环瑞士日内瓦湖，宛如童话般仙境的瑞士景观之路，尽享莱蒙湖的旖旎风光，途径绵延的拉沃葡萄梯田，不仅是美丽的风景更是珍贵的世界文化遗产，下午欣赏蒙特勒的西庸城堡孤独的倒影在湖水之中；随后前往波尔莱斯内入住罗莱夏朵城堡酒店。
夜宿：罗莱夏朵城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Relais & Châteaux castle hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel
As a representative work of French luxury hotels—the Relais & Châteaux castle spa hotel is located in the Park of Jouan, enjoying the beautiful surrounding natural environment. The hotel itself is also an 18th-century castle, where the legendary Michelin chef Steven Naessens runs a Michelin 2-star restaurant, as well as a Zen-filled Caudalie Vinothérapie spa center, offering you a Zen-filled tranquil experience for your travels, while you can also taste the Burgundy cuisine that can be admired.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗莱夏朵城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店
作为法国奢华酒店的代表作——罗莱夏朵城堡Spa酒店位于茹安公园中，享有周围优美的自然环境，酒店本身也是一座18世纪的古堡，由米其林传奇主厨Steven Naessens，在此设有一间米其林2星餐厅以及充满禅意的Caudalie 欧缇丽水疗中心，为您旅行提供充满禅意的宁静体验，同时也可品尝可以欣赏的勃艮第美食 。

highlights.text_en:
Relais & Châteaux castle
As the well-known luxury hotel group—Relais & Châteaux has set up within this castle hotel a Michelin-starred restaurant by the Michelin chef Steven Naessens, as well as a Caudalie Vinothérapie-grade spa center. The hotel offers a Zen-filled tranquil atmosphere and is surrounded by many fine-dining restaurants; one night of the Relais & Châteaux experience lets you feel the unique charm of a French hotel.
Note: Because in 2022 the Relais & Châteaux Maison Jeunet restaurant did not operate the whole year, it was therefore rated a Michelin 2-star restaurant in 2023.
highlights.text_zh:
罗莱夏朵城堡
作为知名的奢侈酒店集团——罗莱夏朵在这家城堡酒店内设置了，由米其林主厨Steven Naessens的星级餐厅，以及一所 Caudalie 欧缇丽级水疗中心，酒店提供的充满禅意的宁静氛围以及被多所美食餐厅环绕，一晚罗莱夏朵的体验，感受法式的酒店的独特魅力。
备注：由于2022年罗莱夏朵 Maison Jeunet 餐厅未全年营业，因此在2023年被评选为米其林2星级餐厅。

attractions.text_en: The Château de Chillon is located at the foot of the Alps, on the shore of the charming Lake Geneva, and is Switzerland's iconic medieval "floating on water" castle. The foundation stones of the Château de Chillon are built on the lake bed, giving the impression of floating on the lake surface, yet the castle looks exceptionally solid. Byron's writing of "The Prisoner of Chillon" made this castle even more renowned.
attractions.text_zh: 西庸城堡位于阿尔卑斯山脚下，充满魅力的日内瓦湖湖畔，是瑞士标志性的中世纪“水上漂”城堡。西庸城堡的基石建在湖底，给人一种漂浮在湖面上的感觉，但城堡看起来异常坚固，拜伦挥笔下的《西庸的囚徒》更是让这座城堡声名远扬。

attractions.text_en: The Lavaux vineyard terraces, inscribed on the World Cultural Heritage List, have a history of 800 years to date. With ample sunshine and the humid lakeside climate, this place not only produces very sweet grapes but has also made the area a famous wine-producing region of Switzerland. In the season when the grapes ripen, the air is permeated with the fragrance of wine.
attractions.text_zh: 被列入世界文化遗产名录的拉沃葡萄园梯田，迄今为止已有800年的历史。凭借充足的阳光和湖畔湿润的气候，不但让这里产出的葡萄非常甘甜，而且还使当地成为瑞士著名的葡萄酒产地。葡萄成熟的季节，空气里都弥漫着葡萄酒的香气。

attractions.text_en: Lausanne is the city designated by Baron de Coubertin, the father of the modern Olympics, as the base for the International Olympic Committee (IOC). To carry on Coubertin's will to spread the Olympic spirit throughout the world, the Olympic Museum was established in Lausanne in 1993, designated by former IOC president Samaranch. The Lausanne Olympic Museum collects and displays tens of thousands of treasures from the first Athens Olympics to the present, and is the world's largest Olympic movement documentation center. The museum is located on the picturesque shore of Lake Geneva, with an excellent environment; from the verdant courtyard or the restaurant's terrace one can gaze at the beautiful lake and mountain scenery of Lausanne.
attractions.text_zh: 洛桑是近代奥林匹克之父顾拜旦（Coubertin）男爵为国际奥林匹克委员会（IOC）根据地所指定的城市，为继承顾拜旦将奥林匹克的精神传播到世界各地的意志，由前任奥委会主席萨马兰奇指定，于1993年在洛桑建立了奥林匹克博物馆。洛桑奥林匹克博物馆（Olympic Museum）收藏并展示了从第一届雅典奥运会至今的上万件珍藏品，是世界较大的奥林匹克运动资料中心。博物馆坐落在风光绰约的日内瓦湖畔，环境极佳，从葱郁的庭院或餐厅的阳台上可以眺望洛桑美丽的湖光山色。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Léman, straddles Switzerland and France, is an important lake of Western Europe, and is also a famous scenic area and health resort. During the day you can take a pleasure boat to tour Lake Geneva, and at night be intoxicated by the twinkling neon lights along the shore, while luxury cruise ships often hold concerts or balls on the lake. You can take a pleasure boat to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shore of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, snow mountains, and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: Lausanne is the capital of the canton of Vaud, located in the center of the northern shore of Lake Geneva, and prospered because it was once a Roman military port. Through continuous development, the modern city of Lausanne has become one of Switzerland's most important railway hubs. Most trains heading to major cities such as Geneva, Bern, and Zurich converge here, and it is also a transportation center connecting Paris and Milan. Lausanne is also called the Olympic capital; the International Olympic Committee and the Olympic Museum are both located here.
attractions.text_zh: 洛桑是沃州的首府，位于日内瓦湖畔北部沿岸的中心，因曾是罗马的军港而繁荣。经过不断地发展，洛桑这座现代化的城市已经成为瑞士最重要的铁路枢纽之一。大多数通往日内瓦、伯尔尼、苏黎世等大城市的火车都在此交汇，它同时也是连接巴黎及米兰的交通中心。洛桑也被人们称为奥林匹克之都，国际奥林匹克委员会和奥林匹克博物馆均在此地。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Dijon, the place of origin of red wine, snails, rose mustard, and white cattle. Visit Dijon's old town, the Dijon Notre-Dame, and the Palace of the Dukes of Burgundy (exterior). After lunch, head to the wine-producing region of the Burgundy area, visiting the courtyard, production workshop, vineyards, and wine cellar of a Burgundy winery, with the winery's professional sommelier responsible for wine service and in-depth explanation. After returning to Paris, check in at the hotel!
Overnight: Paris Mercure Hotel or Novotel Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往红酒，蜗牛，玫瑰芥末及白牛的原产地第戎，参观第戎老城，第戎圣母院，勃艮第公爵馆（外观），午餐后前往勃垦地大区葡萄产区，参观勃艮第酒庄的庭院，生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖，酒庄专业待酒师负责待酒服务和深度讲解。返回巴黎后，入住酒店！
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Paris Mercure or Novotel Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The international chain Mercure classic hotel is located in Paris's famous bustling commercial center—Place d'Italie. The hotel's architecture is in the Haussmann style, and the hotel is adjacent to Paris's two major gourmet districts—the traditional French brasserie gourmet district "Butte-aux-Cailles" and the modern gourmet square "Saint-Émilion."
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店
国际连锁美居古典酒店位于巴黎著名繁华商业中心——意大利广场，酒店的建筑为歌百灵风格，酒店毗邻巴黎两大美食街区——传统法式酒馆美食街区“山鹌之丘”和现代美食广场“圣艾美侬”。

highlights.text_en:
The Burgundy wine route and famous-estate tasting
The Côte de Nuits and the Côte d'Or area of Burgundy are located in the hill country of central France and are an ancient wine-producing region of France. The wines of the Burgundy region are robust and tenacious in body, standing in direct contrast to the smoothness of Bordeaux wines, and are called the "King of French Wines." On this day, visit a famous estate, taste red wine, and explore the production process of how French red wine goes from grape to fine wine in the glass. The winery run by the Romanée family is located in the wine-producing region of La Romanée-Conti, which is also one of the best wine-producing regions of the French estates. The vineyards are the most beautiful production area of the region. Visit the winery's courtyard, production workshop, vineyards, and the wine-storage cellar, with the winery's professional sommelier responsible for wine service and in-depth explanation, tasting three to five glasses of red and white wine—this is a key recommended red-wine art journey experience project on the local wine tourism route.
highlights.text_zh:
勃艮第红酒之路与名庄品鉴
勃艮第的夜丘与金岭地区位于法国中部山丘地区，是法国古老的葡萄酒产区，勃艮第产区的葡萄酒力道浑厚坚韧，与波尔多葡萄酒的柔顺恰相对立，被称为"法国葡萄酒之王"。 当天参观名庄，品鉴红酒，探究法国红酒如何从葡萄到杯中美酒的生产过程。偌梧家族经营的酒庄位于罗曼尼·康帝 （La Romanee Comti）葡萄酒产区，也是法国庄园好的产区之一。葡萄园是该地区漂亮的产区，参观酒庄的庭院，生产工坊、葡萄园和藏酒酒窖，酒庄专业待酒师负责待酒服务和深度讲解，三到五杯红酒及白酒浅尝，是当地葡萄酒旅游路线重点推荐的红酒艺术之旅体验项目。

attractions.text_en: Dijon Notre-Dame was built in the 13th century. The three rows of beast-shaped false gargoyles on the church facade are separated by two rows of slender columns, and on the church there is a 14th-century clock that tells the time. For most of the people of Dijon, Dijon Notre-Dame is a church building full of affinity; over these recent centuries, the Notre-Dame has always been the main spiritual and soulful comfort of the people of Dijon.
attractions.text_zh: 第戎圣母院建造于13世纪，教堂门面上三列兽形假排水口由两排纤细的圆柱分开，教堂上有一座14世纪的报时钟。对于大多数的第戎人民而言，第戎圣母院是一座具有亲和力的教堂建筑，在这近几个世纪以来，圣母院一直是第戎人民主要的精神、心灵的抚慰。

attractions.text_en: Dijon, located in the Burgundy region, the homeland of wine, was the capital of the Duchy of Burgundy from the 11th to the 15th centuries. Especially in the 14th and 15th centuries, it flourished to an extreme thanks to several outstanding leaders, becoming an important political, economic, and cultural-artistic center of Europe at the time. Today, Dijon's old town is still scattered with many historical buildings from different periods. Besides luxurious palaces, solemn churches, the splendor of glazed-tile roofs, and many rustic timber-framed houses, there are also museums and art galleries converted from palaces and monasteries. Fine wine and gourmet food paired with a city full of artistic atmosphere make it a city very much full of French flavor.
attractions.text_zh: 位于葡萄酒故乡勃艮第地区的第戎，11到-15世纪曾是勃艮第公国的首府，特别在14、15世纪时因几位优秀领导人而盛极一时，成为当时欧洲重要的政治经济和文化艺术中心。如今第戎的老城区仍散布着许多不同时期的历史建筑，除了豪华的宫殿、庄严的教堂、彩釉屋顶的豪华和许多古朴的木框架房屋，也有宫殿和修道院改装成的博物馆和美术馆。美酒、美食搭配满城艺术分为，是非常具有法国风情的一座城市。

attractions.text_en: This destination that combines winemaking and tourism is a place not to be missed by wine lovers, art lovers, and gourmet lovers. Choose a winery of Burgundy products to visit, where you can see the aging and maturation process of the wine and the storage and fermentation process within the wine cellar. If you are lucky, you can witness the winemaking process of the wine (depending on the grape harvest period).
attractions.text_zh: 这个集酿酒与旅游于一身的胜地是葡萄酒爱好者、艺术爱好者和美食爱好者所不容错过的地方。选择勃艮第产品的酒庄进行参观，在此可参观葡萄酒的陈酿熟化过程及酒窖内储存发酵过程，运气好的时候可参观葡萄酒的酿造过程（取决葡萄的产期）

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris to tour the Palace of Versailles; in the afternoon, return to the city of Paris, then head to Paris's fashion center, Boulevard Haussmann and the Rue Royale, freely visiting fashion districts such as the Paris Opera (exterior), Printemps department store, and Galeries Lafayette.
Overnight: Paris Mercure Hotel or Novotel Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫；下午返回到巴黎市区，随后前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货，巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等级4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Paris Mercure or Novotel Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The international chain Mercure classic hotel is located in Paris's famous bustling commercial center—Place d'Italie. The hotel's architecture is in the Haussmann style, and the hotel is adjacent to Paris's two major gourmet districts—the traditional French brasserie gourmet district "Butte-aux-Cailles" and the modern gourmet square "Saint-Émilion," with many restaurants and bar-restaurant gourmet areas, within walking distance to tour the commercial district and France's Chinatown.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店
国际连锁美居古典酒店位于巴黎著名繁华商业中心——意大利广场，酒店的建筑为歌百灵风格，酒店毗邻巴黎两大美食街区——传统法式酒馆美食街区“山鹌之丘”和现代美食广场“圣艾美侬”，许多餐厅和酒吧餐厅美食区，步行游览商业街区和法国的中国城。

highlights.text_en:
In-depth explanation of the Versailles selected collection
Built starting from the era of the Sun King, Versailles is a masterpiece at the pinnacle of the Baroque, and is also the starting point of Rococo art. Through the Palace of Versailles, restore the origins of the fashion art of the present, strolling within the cultural palace of architectural art.
highlights.text_zh:
凡尔赛精选专辑深度讲解
从太阳王时代开始修建，凡尔赛是巴洛克的登峰杰作，同时也是洛可可艺术的起点，通过凡尔赛宫还原当下的时尚艺术的起源，漫步于建筑艺术殿堂文化中。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the historical period of French feudal rule. In terms of content, it was not only the French court, but also the administrative center of the state, and the concrete embodiment of the political views and lifestyle of French society at the time. It was the first time since the ancient Roman Empire that Europe demonstrated the power of an autocratic regime capable of concentrating such enormous manpower, material resources, and financial resources. At that time, in order to build it, Louis XIV mobilized more than thirty thousand workers, as well as architects, engineers, and technicians. In addition to solving the complex technical problems arising from constructing large-scale building complexes, they also had to solve problems in various areas such as water supply and roads. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully proves the progress of France's economy and technology at the time and the wisdom of the laboring people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来，第一次表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann is located between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are the two major department stores, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, the author of "In Search of Lost Time," completed most of the writing of "In Search of Lost Time" in his residence at number 102 on this street.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en: The Paris Opera was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861, and is a work of eclecticism at its pinnacle. Its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms such as ancient Greco-Roman colonnades and Baroque. Grand in scale, exquisite and meticulous, resplendent and magnificent, it is hailed as a theater where painting, marble, and gold ornamentation shine in mutual splendor, giving people great enjoyment. It is one of the typical buildings of Napoleon III.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎歌剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，是折衷主义登峰造极的作品，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受。是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, visit the Louvre Museum, the pride of France, where a French national museum guide will give an in-depth explanation on a selected theme; head to tour Notre-Dame de Paris, Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior), and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine River cruise to visit places such as Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), and Place de la Concorde, touring the central Paris attractions all day, and afterwards end the itinerary at the beautiful Place d'Italie in Paris.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，届时、将由法兰西国家馆讲解师，精选主题深度讲解；前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛，埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地参观，全天游览巴黎市中心景点，之后在美丽的巴黎意大利广场结束行程。

highlights.text_en:
Themed in-depth lecture on the Louvre
Value is the true life of an artwork; the Louvre is the home of artworks. The French Louvre national museum guide's "Selected Collection of the Origins of Civilization" lets you understand European history from an artistic perspective.
highlights.text_zh:
卢浮宫主题精讲
价值才是艺术品真正的生命，卢浮宫是艺术品的归宿，法兰西卢浮宫国家馆讲解师《文华起源精选专辑》，以艺术的角度看懂欧洲历史。

attractions.text_en: It is one of the oldest museums in the world and a world-renowned art treasure house. The Louvre's architecture is "U"-shaped, divided into a new part and an old part. The entrance at the glass pyramid in front of the Louvre was designed by the Chinese-American master architect I. M. Pei. Here are treasured more than 400,000 art masterpieces, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing artworks from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria, Rome, to medieval Europe and the various countries of the East, deserving to be called an outstanding palace of art in human history. The itinerary includes ordinary individual-visitor tickets (without a Chinese-language audio guide).
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品、其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。 行程包含普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。

attractions.text_en: If the Louvre witnessed the glory of the Gauls, then the Île de la Cité, Notre-Dame de Paris, and the Paris City Hall wrote down the indissoluble bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Île de la Cité. Without the Île de la Cité, there would be no present-day Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: Notre-Dame de Paris cathedral is located on the Île de la Cité in the center of Paris, and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The church is in the Gothic style, and visitors can climb the towers to visit; although you will not encounter "The Hunchback," you can see the 17th-century great bell, get up close to the mythical beasts on the church's outer walls, and overlook the beautiful scenery of the Île de la Cité and the Seine.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西岱岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，游客可以登上塔楼参观，虽然遇不到“钟楼怪人”，但却能看到17世纪的大钟、近距离接触教堂外壁上的神兽、俯瞰西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the symbol of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en:
The Champ de Mars is a vast strip park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the École Militaire (Military School) to its southeast.
Before the latter half of the 18th century, this was an abandoned open space; it was not until the Military School was established in 1765 that its status gradually rose, when the main purpose was to serve as a place for military training. During the French Revolution, on 17 July 1791, a massacre and bloodshed occurred here. Later, France used this site to welcome several World's Fairs as well as the 1900 Olympic Games.
attractions.text_zh:
战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。
在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次的世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。

attractions.text_en: Take the famous transparent-cabin "Bateaux Mouches" cruise sailing along the banks of the Seine, which blends together many attractions. The 3.2-kilometer voyage of about 1 hour passes famous attractions such as Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées, and the Île de la Cité in Paris. On the surface of the Seine, feel the romantic night view of Paris, the beautiful scenery, and the wonderful music—called "Paris's not-to-be-missed in-depth touring project."
attractions.text_zh: 乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

attractions.text_en: Zurich's Old Town is an experience not to be missed. Here you will find traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookshops and flower stalls, as well as jewelry, fashion boutiques and, of course, plenty of local Zurich brands. Famous streets and lanes such as Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg, Niederdorf and Augustine Lane are all located in the Old Town. In the evening, a stroll through the Old Town reveals that it has transformed into a place of entertainment for the public.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世的老城区是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰，时尚精品，当然也少不了苏黎世本土品牌。班霍夫大街(Bahnhofstrasse)、伦韦格街(Rennweg)、尼德道尔夫(Niederdorf)与圣奥古斯丁巷(Augustine Lane)等著名街巷都位于老城区。晚上漫步于老城区，会发现这里又变成了民众的娱乐场所。

attractions.text_en: The Grossmünster is one of the three main churches of Zurich, Switzerland (the other two being the Fraumünster and the St. Peter Church). Located near the bank of the Limmat River, it was begun around 1100 and inaugurated around 1220. Facing the Fraumünster across the river, this church played a pivotal role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation; the theology faculty of the University of Zurich and the Reformation Museum are both established here. The stained-glass windows inside the church are masterpieces by the modern Swiss art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also known as Station Street) is one of the longer shopping avenues in Europe and one of the most expensive shopping streets in the world. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless heart of Zurich, where luxury brands from all over the world and private banks line the street. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless tourists feel an inexplicable thrill, because beneath their feet lie stores of gold bars said to rank among the largest in the world, exciting many to the point that they can hardly move their feet. Immersed in it, you can clearly feel the air filled with the scent of wealth, luxury and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. Its piers are packed with yachts of all kinds, looking just like a rich people's club. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center, where white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere on the water, leisurely and carefree, a harmonious scene. The north bank of Lake Zurich is where the wealthy live, dubbed the "Gold Coast," while the south bank is called the "Silver Coast." At the end of Bahnhofstrasse lies Lake Zurich. As one of the "world's most livable cities," the life of the true people of Zurich is permeated everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Lindenhof means the courtyard of the linden trees. The park sits on a small hill covered with linden trees in the heart of Zurich's Old Town. Right before you is the Limmat River, making it an ideal place to admire the Grossmünster and the scenery of the right bank. It is also where, at the start of the main feature of "Crash Landing on You," the perfect frame of the two protagonists passing each other was captured.
attractions.text_zh: 林登霍夫(Lindenhof)，意思为菩提树的中庭，公园坐落于苏黎世老城中心一片被菩提树覆盖的小山丘上。眼前就是利马特河，是欣赏苏黎世大教堂和右岸风光的理想之地。也是为《爱的迫降》的正片开始时，定格了两人擦身而过的完美的画面。
