attractions.text_en: The Limmat River flows out from the northern end of Lake Zurich, then passes through the center of Zurich, and continues 35 kilometers to the northwest, finally pouring into the Aare River. Walking along the Limmat, watching the slowly flowing water, it is another quiet and peaceful day. This is probably the feeling of serene, beautiful time passing by. The swans in the river inadvertently intrude as tourists take photos, adding a touch of liveliness and playfulness to these calm waters.
attractions.text_zh: 利马特河从苏黎世湖北端引出，然后流经苏黎世市中心，再向西北方流35公里，最后注入阿勒河（Aare）。行走在利马特河边，看着缓慢流动的河水，又是静谧而祥和的一天，这大概就是岁月静好的感觉，河里天鹅在游人拍照时不经意的闯入，又为这平静的河水增添一丝灵动和跳脱之感。

attractions.text_en: Although it is the capital of a country, Vaduz is in fact more like a small village. Even if you want to stroll and take in the interesting sights here, it takes only 5 minutes to walk from one end to the other. Below the castle, two adjacent main streets, Aulestrasse and the pedestrian-only Stadtle, encircle the town, and anything important in the town happens within this area.
attractions.text_zh: 尽管是一国之都，瓦杜兹(Vaduz)实际上更像一个小村庄。虽然你想一边漫步一边欣赏到这里的有趣之处，但仅需5分钟你就可以从一头走到另一头。城堡下两条相邻的大街Aulestrasse和仅限步行的Stadtle，将小镇围绕其中，城内任何重要的事都发生在这个区域。

attractions.text_en: Vaduz Castle is normally not open to tourists, but the scenery around it is very beautiful. From the ridge near the castle you can gaze at the web-like mountain roads in the distance and overlook a panoramic view of the capital, Vaduz. Every National Day (August 15), the Prince of Liechtenstein invites all his people to his residence for a drink.
attractions.text_zh: 瓦杜兹城堡平时不对游人开放，但它周边的景色非常美丽。在城堡附近的山脊上可以遥望到网状般的山路，并俯瞰首都瓦杜兹的全景。每逢国庆日（8月15日），列支敦士登的王子就会邀请全体国民到他的住所喝一杯。

attractions.text_en: The Glacier Express runs east from St. Moritz to Zermatt in the west, with a total length of 291 kilometers, passing along the way 291 bridges and 91 tunnels, linking the Danube basin, the Rhine basin and the Rhône basin of St. Moritz. Along the route the train crosses high mountains and deep valleys, with a difference of 1,429 meters between its highest and lowest points. It often climbs to a mountaintop first and then plunges all the way downhill, just like a thrilling roller coaster. The red carriages speed among the Alpine peaks, with streams, valleys, waterfalls, pastoral landscapes and villages forming a picturesque, stunningly beautiful scene. The most spectacular section of all is from Andermatt to Chur, including the Alpine pass; the journey takes less than 3 hours and should not be missed.
attractions.text_zh: 冰川列车东起圣莫里茨（St. Moritz），西至策尔马特（Zermatt），总长291公里，沿途经过291座桥梁， 91个隧道，串连了圣模里兹的多瑙河流域，莱茵河流域及隆河流域。列车沿途穿越高山深谷，最高点和最低点的落差达到1429米，常常是先爬升到山顶再一路向山下俯冲简直就像是惊险的过山车，红色的车厢飞奔于阿尔卑斯群山之间，溪流、山谷、飞瀑、田园、村庄风景如画美不胜收。其中最精彩的一段就是从安德马特-库尔，包括了阿尔卑斯山口，行程不到3个小时不容错过。

attractions.text_en:
Lake Lucerne
This lake has a winding shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms a typical scene of "lakes and mountains," attracting large numbers of tourists for sightseeing. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and the piece thus gained the title "Moonlight" — although this was not Beethoven's original intention.
attractions.text_zh:
卢塞恩湖
这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.name_en: Water Tower and Flower Bridge (Chapel Bridge)
attractions.text_en:
Chapel Bridge
Built in 1332, the Chapel Bridge connects the two banks of Lucerne and is the oldest wooden covered bridge in Europe. It was reconstructed after a fire in 1993 and leads to Lucerne's most iconic landmark — the octagonal water tower. The Chapel Bridge and the octagonal water tower are landmark structures of Lucerne and even of Switzerland, frequently appearing on postcards. During the day, brilliant fresh flowers adorn the bridge railings; strolling here at dusk, you can savor a romantic medieval feeling; at night, the bridge and water tower appear especially romantic illuminated by colored lights. That is why it is also often called the "Flower Bridge and Water Tower."
attractions.text_zh:
卡贝尔廊桥
建于1332年的卡佩尔廊桥连接琉森两岸，是欧洲最古老的木制廊桥，它在1993年的火灾后进行了重建，一直通往琉森最具代表的留念景观——八角型水塔。卡佩尔廊桥和八角型水塔是卢塞恩、乃至瑞士的标志性建筑，经常出现在明信片上。白天，桥栏上有娇艳烂漫的鲜花；黄昏时在此漫步，可以领略浪漫的中古情怀；晚上，廊桥和水塔在彩灯的映照下显得格外浪漫。所以它也常被称为“花桥水塔”。

attractions.text_en: This dying lion sculpture was carved into natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground, a broken spear stuck in its shoulder, with a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms beside it. The sculpture commemorates the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on August 10, 1792, protecting the safety of the family of Louis XVI in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; an inscription below the sculpture describes the course of the event. In those days, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, driven by the need to make a living, went to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave in battle, but honor and money could not mask the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, retaining only the guard serving the Catholic papacy — that famous Swiss Guard. Owing to their famous loyalty and courage, this Swiss Guard of the papacy has served right up to the present day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "dying Lucerne lion" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

attractions.text_en: Located in the middle section of the Glacier Express scenic line and on the north side of the St. Gotthard Pass, it is an important transportation hub in southeastern Switzerland. It lies at the eastern end of the narrow Urseren valley (Urserental). The small Reuss River runs through the town and then plunges into a deep gorge, where the famous Devil's Bridge is built.
attractions.text_zh: 地处观光列车冰河线的中段、圣哥达山口北侧，是瑞士东南部重要的交通枢纽。它坐落在狭小的乌塞伦河谷(Urserental)的东端，细小的罗伊斯河穿城而过后坠入深谷，著名的魔鬼桥即架设于此。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Line train passes through here. This place has Switzerland's purest alpine lake water, surrounded by mountains, with lush green grass, and quaint villages scattered along the shores of Lake Lungern, just like a paradise far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口列车就会从这里经过。这里拥有瑞士最为纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located some twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. Its summit is covered with ice and snow year-round, while at the foot of the mountain the grass is lush and the scenery beautiful, making it a famous sightseeing and outdoor sports destination in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is an Alpine town that must be passed through when visiting the Jungfrau. Together with First, Jungfrau, Wengen, Lauterbrunnen and others, it forms the most magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous ski resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts. Grindelwald is also very suitable for convalescence, making this small town of only a few thousand people all the more fascinating.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、劳特布伦嫩（Lauterbrunnen）等一起组成了少女峰地区最为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的滑雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，而格里德尔瓦尔德又非常适合疗养，让这座只拥有几千人的小镇愈发的让人着迷。

attractions.text_en: Lauterbrunnen is located on the west side of the Jungfrau region. More than 70 waterfalls and streams fall from the cliffs, so the literal German meaning of Lauterbrunnen is "many springs," and this town is a veritable waterfall town. Among them, the Staubbach Falls is the village's landmark attraction, and the poets Goethe and Wordsworth wrote poems praising it. In addition, there are the Mürren Falls and the Trümmelbach Falls, which rush down from a cave as high as a ten-story building, also not to be missed. From Lauterbrunnen you can take the WAB railway to Wengen, Kleine Scheidegg, the Jungfrau and other places. At the same time, by taking the cable car via Mürren, you can reach the Schilthorn and other places, taking in the magnificent scenery of the Bernese Oberland.
attractions.text_zh: 劳特布龙嫩(Lauterbrunnen)位于少女峰地区的西面，从山崖上落下来70多个瀑布和小河，所以劳特布龙嫩的德语直译是很多的泉水，这个小镇是名副其实的瀑布镇。其中施陶河瀑布是村子的标志性景观，诗人歌德和伍德·沃斯曾写诗来赞美它。此外还有米伦瀑布和从十层楼高的山洞里飞奔而下的特吕默尔河瀑布，也不可错过。从劳特布龙嫩出发可以乘WAB铁路到达翁根、克莱纳谢德格、少女峰等地。同时，乘坐缆车经米伦，可到达雪朗峰等地，饱览伯尔尼高地的雄伟风光。

attractions.text_en: Kleine Scheidegg is located between the Eiger and the Lauberhorn in the Bernese Oberland of Switzerland. The name means "little watershed," but in fact Kleine Scheidegg is higher than the nearby Grosse Scheidegg. In winter, Kleine Scheidegg is the center of the ski areas around Grindelwald and Wengen, and in summer it is the most popular hiking route in the Alps. At the same time, Kleine Scheidegg is also the starting point of the Jungfrau Railway, and trains to and from the Jungfrau must change here at Kleine Scheidegg.
attractions.text_zh: 小夏戴克位于瑞士伯恩高地的艾格峰和劳伯角峰（Lauberhorn）之间，这个名字的意思是“小分水岭”，但实际上小夏戴克比附近的大戴夏克（Grosse Scheidegg）还来的高。小夏戴克冬季是格林德尔瓦尔德和稳根周围滑雪区域的中心，夏季是阿尔卑斯山最受欢迎的徒步路线。同时，小夏戴克也是少女峰铁路的起点，往返于少女峰的列车必须在小夏戴客换乘。

attractions.text_en: Interlaken is a small town at the foot of the Jungfrau, located between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, also known as the town between the lakes. It is famous for its enchanting scenery throughout the four seasons, and geographically it belongs to the center of the Bernese Oberland.
attractions.text_zh: 因特拉肯是少女峰山脚下的一个小镇，位于图恩湖及布里恩茨湖之间，又名湖间镇，以一年四季的醉人风景著名，在地理上它属于伯尔尼高地的中心。

attractions.text_en: Zermatt is known as the "city of glaciers." Located among the peaks of the Alps, with an elegant environment and fresh air, it offers views of magnificent mountains and glaciers, and is a world-famous mountain tourist destination free of automobile pollution. What is very unique is that Zermatt is a car-free town. To keep the air fresh and to be able to clearly see the Matterhorn, known as the "king of the Alpine winds," the locals prohibit motor vehicles from passing through the town.
attractions.text_zh: 采尔马特有“冰川之城”美称，位于阿尔卑斯山的群峰之中，环境幽雅、空气清新，可以欣赏到宏伟壮丽的山峰和冰川景色，是世界著名的无汽车污染的山间旅游胜地。很独特的是采尔马特是一个无车通行小镇。当地人为了保持空气清新，可以清晰的看到有“阿尔卑斯山风之王”之称的马特宏峰，禁止机动车在小镇通行。

attractions.text_en: The Matterhorn is located in the town of Zermatt in the canton of Valais, Switzerland, at an altitude of 4,478 meters. It is a beautiful peak of the Alps and a symbol of which Switzerland is proud. With its posture of a single pillar holding up the sky, pointing straight to the heavens, its distinctive triangular pyramid shape has become a representative icon of the Alps. Whenever the morning or evening sun shines upon it, the perpetually snow-covered mountain reflects a metallic glow.
attractions.text_zh: 马特宏峰（Matterhorn）位于瑞士瓦莱州小镇采尔马特，海拔 4478 米，是阿尔卑斯山美丽的山峰，也是瑞士引以为骄傲的象征，以其一柱擎天之姿，直指天际，其特殊的三角锥造型，更成为阿尔卑斯山的代表，每当朝晖夕映，长年积雪的山体折射出金属般的光芒。

attractions.name_zh: 马特宏峰冰川天堂（自费）
attractions.text_en: Taking the cable car from the town of Zermatt to the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise, you can overlook the snow-white Alps from a great height. The iconic Matterhorn towers majestically on the horizon, making the glacial landscape an unforgettable experience. This peak is surrounded by 38 awe-inspiring four-thousand-meter summits and 14 magnificent glaciers spanning three countries, with a unique world of peaks that is fascinating. The Glacier Paradise features an impressive glacier palace, a comfortable cinema lounge, an impressive observation platform and the highest Alpine restaurant in Europe, making it an unforgettable place to visit in the Swiss Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 从采尔马特小镇乘坐缆车前往马特宏峰冰川天堂乐园，您可以从高处俯瞰白雪皑皑的阿尔卑斯山。标志性的马特宏峰雄伟地耸立在地平线上，使冰川景观成为令人难忘的体验。这座山峰被 38 座气势磅礴的四千米高峰和横跨三个国家的 14 条雄伟冰川所环绕，其独特的山峰世界令人着迷。冰川天堂乐园有令人印象深刻的冰川宫殿、舒适的影院休息室、令人印象深刻的观景平台和欧洲高山餐厅，使其成为瑞士阿尔卑斯山令人难忘的游览胜地。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Léman, straddles Switzerland and France. It is an important lake in Western Europe, as well as a famous scenic area and health resort. During the day you can take a boat to tour Lake Geneva, and at night be enchanted by the flickering neon lights along the shore. There are also often luxury cruise ships holding concerts or balls on the lake. You can take a boat to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shore of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, snow-capped mountains and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock sits on the shore of Lake Geneva, to the west of the English Garden. The combination of flowers and clockwork showcases Geneva's reputation as the "capital of watchmaking," and it has thus become a symbol of Geneva. Although flower clocks can also be seen in other Swiss cities, the flower clock of Geneva is the true progenitor of the flower clock.
attractions.text_zh: 花钟坐落在日内瓦湖畔、英国花园的西边。鲜花与钟表的结合使得它彰显出了日内瓦“钟表之都”的美名，也因此成为了日内瓦的一个象征。虽然在瑞士的其他城市也能见到花钟的身影，但是日内瓦的花钟才是真正的花钟始祖。

attractions.text_en:
Geneva Fountain
The great fountain is located on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden, and is one of Geneva's most representative landmarks. The great fountain resembles a column of water spouted by a whale, standing 140 meters high with a water output of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away in the city center. At night there is also a chance to see the great fountain illuminated by lights, which is even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh:
日内瓦喷泉
大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦较具代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: Ouchy Pier is located on the shore of Lake Léman in Lausanne and is one of the most important water transport hubs. Along the shore there are some cafés, restaurants and hotels, where you can fully enjoy the charming scenery of Lake Léman. As a well-known tourist attraction and an important transit point, many ferries and cruise ships are moored near the pier, and of course, in wealthy Switzerland, looking around you will also see many private yachts.
attractions.text_zh: 乌希码头位于洛桑莱蒙湖畔，也是最重要的水运枢纽之一。沿岸有一些咖啡厅、餐厅和酒店，可以在这些地方尽情欣赏莱蒙湖的旖旎风光。 作为知名旅游景点和重要的中转站，码头附近停泊着不少渡轮和游轮，当然在富人云集的瑞士，放眼望去还有很多私人游艇。

attractions.text_en: Lausanne is the city designated by Baron de Coubertin, the father of the modern Olympics, as the home of the International Olympic Committee (IOC). In order to carry on Coubertin's will to spread the Olympic spirit throughout the world, the only Olympic Museum in the world was established in Lausanne in 1993 at the designation of former IOC President Samaranch. The Lausanne Olympic Museum collects and displays tens of thousands of treasured items from the first Athens Olympic Games to the present, and is the world's largest center of Olympic movement resources. The museum sits on the picturesque shore of Lake Geneva, in an excellent setting; from the lush courtyard or the restaurant terrace you can gaze at the beautiful lake and mountain scenery of Lausanne.
attractions.text_zh: 洛桑是近代奥林匹克之父顾拜旦（Coubertin）男爵为国际奥林匹克委员会（IOC）根据地所指定的城市，为继承顾拜旦将奥林匹克的精神传播到世界各地的意志，由前任奥委会主席萨马兰奇指定，于1993年在洛桑建立了世界上唯一一座奥林匹克博物馆。洛桑奥林匹克博物馆（Olympic Museum）收藏并展示了从第一届雅典奥运会至今的上万件珍藏品，是世界最大的奥林匹克运动资料中心。博物馆坐落在风光绰约的日内瓦湖畔，环境极佳，从葱郁的庭院或餐厅的阳台上可以眺望洛桑美丽的湖光山色。

attractions.text_en: In German, Bern means "bear," and the bear is the symbol of Bern, so it also enjoys the reputation of the "bear city." The old town of Bern, founded in the 12th century, is not only gentle, tranquil and extremely scenic, but the city also has many unique little touches: more than 100 fountains of various forms, arcaded walkways, soaring towers, the BearPark where bears appear... and an ingeniously designed astronomical clock that strikes on every hour, when the golden rooster atop the clock stretches its neck and crows, a group of little figures emerges in response, and finally the figure at the very top rings the bronze bell — a series of performances that are especially delightful.
attractions.text_zh: 伯尔尼在德语中即是“熊”的意思，“熊”就是伯尔尼的代表，故而也有“熊城”的美誉。始建于12世纪的伯尔尼老城，不但温润静谧、风景极美，而且城中还有很多独特的小巧思：100多处形式各异的喷泉，带拱廊的走道，高耸的塔楼，熊出没的熊苑......还有设计精巧的天文日历钟，每逢整点敲响钟声，钟上的金鸡引颈长鸣，一群小人应声而出，最后，最上面的小人将铜铃敲响，一系列的表演格外有趣。

overview.text_en:
Today in Milan is free for the whole day, and you may arrange your own sightseeing activities. We suggest visiting on your own Milan's iconic building, the Milan Cathedral (exterior), and one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. Afterwards, meet the guide in the Milan city center and proceed to the Milan hotel to check in.
Overnight: Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
当天米兰全天自由活动，可自行安排各项游览活动。当天建议自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。 之后与导游在米兰市区集合，前往米兰酒店入住。
夜宿：皇家花园酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel sits in a lush garden with fountains, palm trees and olive trees, blending classic elegance with a modern style, making it a delightful and relaxing urban resort. The hotel is within walking distance of a nearby large shopping center; its guest rooms are spacious and elegant, featuring large marble bathrooms with bathtubs. The buffet breakfast is abundant and varied, the Captain's Bar serves drinks and snacks all day, and the hotel has the glass-domed Blue Crab Grill restaurant serving international cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
皇家花园酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在郁郁葱葱的花园中，花园内有喷泉、棕榈树和橄榄树，将经典优雅与现代风格融为一体，是一处令人愉悦而轻松的城市度假胜地。酒店可步行至附近的大型商业中心；酒店的客房宽敞而优雅，设有带浴缸的大型大理石浴室，自助早餐丰盛多样，Captain's Bar 全天供应饮料和小吃，酒店设有玻璃圆顶的 Blue Crab Grill 餐厅，供应国际美食。

highlights.text_en:
Behold the Milan Cathedral, built over 500 years and renowned worldwide for its numerous exquisite carvings and Gothic spires
Construction began in 1386, and it is the iconic building of central Milan. The main body of the cathedral took more than four centuries, being basically completed in 1812, while detail work continued until 1960 when a bronze door of the cathedral was installed. The years have not only endowed it with the vicissitudes of history but also created multiple styles for it: Gothic spires paired with Baroque decorative carvings, lavish from top to bottom.
highlights.text_zh:
瞻仰历经500年建成，以众多精美的雕刻和哥特式的塔尖而闻名于世的米兰大教堂
始建于1386年，是米兰市中心的标志性建筑。教堂主体历经4个多世纪才于1812年基本完工，而细节工程则一直持续到1960年安装完成教堂的一扇铜门为止。岁月不仅赋予了它历史的沧桑，同时也为它营造出多重的风格样式，哥特式的尖塔搭配巴洛克风格的雕饰，自上而下，极尽奢华。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most visitors who come here are sightseers. Beneath the central arcade is the Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the very best in Milan; in particular, the window displays are updated daily, and simply standing outside admiring them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is dotted with many upscale restaurants, cafes and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱二世拱廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Towering over the city center, the Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as one of Italy's magnificent Gothic buildings, its hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and thousands of statues are carved into the white marble exterior walls. The interior is vast; sunlight filters in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, the light hazy, full of a solemn religious atmosphere. The crypt of the cathedral still preserves the remains of the Church of Santa Tecla that stood on the site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, depart for the water city of Venice. Upon arrival, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings built upon the water, together with the winding water lanes, make Venice's romantic charm linger for a long time. Here you can also taste a Venetian specialty feast, the three-course cuttlefish-ink pasta (at your own expense).
Overnight: voco Venice or Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往水城威尼斯，到达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝到威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
voco Venice or Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels, with an excellent location, stylish modern design, and guest rooms with natural tones and modern interiors, offering you a comfortable and cozy stay. The hotel offers an abundant breakfast, a well-equipped gym, a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails, and the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serving Italian delicacies and fine cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en:
The world's beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic," still dazzling and radiant
As one of the major centers of the Renaissance, Venice is made up of 118 small islands, connected together by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands," and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the world's beautiful squares, "St. Mark's Square," along with the beautiful Grand Canal, the phoenix-reborn La Fenice opera house, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs of Xu Zhimo's writing, and the breathtakingly beautiful colonnades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting and the filming location of many movie scenes; her unique character leaves every visitor intoxicated and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room of Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, while to the east stand the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the public hub of Venice's political, religious and traditional festival activities.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Known in short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt between 1043 and 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe and a classic masterpiece of Venetian architectural art; it is also a treasure house holding a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside, you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through small holes, rather than being like the many people on the bridge opposite who look toward you at the Bridge of Sighs. Inside you are allowed to take photos, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was the route through which condemned prisoners were once escorted from the court to the prison in ancient times. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered by a dome on top and tightly enclosed, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner had been tried at the Doge's Palace, the felons were taken to the dungeon, and when passing over this airtight bridge they could only glimpse the blue sky through the small windows. From then on they lost their freedom and involuntarily let out sighs. It is said that if lovers kiss beneath the bridge, they can be together forever; and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, depart for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance. Visit the sights of Florence's old town: the world's third-largest cathedral, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore; Piazza della Signoria; the Ponte Vecchio; as well as Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Afterwards, check into the hotel.
Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观佛罗伦萨老城景点：世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后入住酒店。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Hilton Florence hotel is a modern hotel where you can experience the Tuscan style, with an excellent location that provides access to Florence's commercial center, so you can enjoy the bustle of Florence. From the terrace of the hotel's executive lounge you can admire magnificent views of Florence. Each guest room is decorated in a warm, modern style; wooden floors and a spacious marble bathroom provide greater comfort.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会或同等4星级酒店
佛罗伦萨希尔顿酒店是一家体验托斯卡纳风格的现代化酒店，地理位置优越，可前往佛罗伦萨商业中心，享受佛罗伦萨的繁华。酒店行政酒廊的露台上可欣赏到佛罗伦萨的壮丽景色。每间客房均采用温馨的现代风格装饰；木地板和宽敞的大理石浴室可获得较大的舒适度。

highlights.text_en:
The splendor and prosperity of Florence, the radiance of the Renaissance shining bright
In Florence, the world's capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Search for the soul of the Renaissance amid blue skies and white clouds, brightly colored walls, dark green shutters and deep red rooftops; feel the timelessness of the Renaissance throughout the streets and alleys, squares and churches, museums and art galleries. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic soul of Dante Alighieri and the painterly soul of Da Vinci still drift over the skies of Florence, still continuing to pursue the people and events of the European Renaissance period..."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利·但丁的诗魂、达·芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earliest large-span circular-arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his feelings of longing into the "Divine Comedy." Over several centuries it has endured floods, social turmoil and wars, yet stands unfallen. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few churches can be so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets to the fullest the classical, elegant and free ideals esteemed in the Renaissance era; no wonder it was named the "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore lies directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space continuing from the Renaissance period to today. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce, a Gothic building that is the resting place of Italian luminaries such as Michelangelo and Galileo; the frescoes and sculptures inside are worth savoring carefully. Around the square are many cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract large audiences. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, and feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, depart to tour Cinque Terre, traveling along the Ligurian coastline to visit the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs. In the afternoon, go to Pisa to visit the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli in the heart of Pisa's history and culture. Afterwards, proceed to Siena to check into the hotel.
Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: If, due to bad weather or factors such as a railway company strike, it is impossible to tour Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically be changed to touring the coastal cities by coach or in another form.
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。
夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located on a quiet hilltop, surrounded by olive trees and gardens, with a beautiful environment suitable for getting close to nature. The guest rooms are laid with comfortable wooden floors, with a bright design and beautifully arranged stylish interiors. The hotel also has an exquisite restaurant serving classic Italian, local and Tuscan cuisine during dinner hours. The hotel's outdoor pool, fitness center and sauna all provide you with a more relaxing stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，环境优美且适合亲近自然。客房铺设舒适的木质地板，设计明亮，摆设美观的时尚内装，同时酒店配有精致的餐厅，在晚餐时段供应经典的意大利、当地和托斯卡纳美食。酒店的室外泳池、健身中心以及桑拿浴室都为您提供更加放松的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a paradise on the cliffs
Along the long Mediterranean coastline, the little train stops at each beautiful fishing village. Watching the sun-bathed beaches, the waves quietly lapping the rocks, the colorful houses drawing nearer from afar, your curiosity to gaze at the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak the moment you arrive. Hiking through the alleys of the fishing villages, the closer you walk the more delightful the surprises. It is like carefully savoring a visual feast of five-colored delicacies, slowly tasting the flavor within bit by bit; this scene is so beautiful it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线小火车在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa, Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli to the north of the city of Pisa in Tuscany Province, Italy. It is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, designated a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. It is said that in 1590 AD, Galileo once conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also called the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly covered with grass. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and the square has four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (the bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (cemetery). Ancient city walls and gates are also preserved around the square. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five clifftop villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together. Built along the coast, it is one of the world's beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers, taking around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other are the mountains, and ahead are the Italian fishing villages; it is a destination that countless hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, depart for the old town of Siena to visit sights such as Siena Cathedral (exterior), the Piazza del Campo, Siena Town Hall (exterior), and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Afterwards, proceed to the old town of Pienza to visit Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior). Then continue to Rome, taking free photos along the way at the cypress lane, arriving in Rome and checking into the hotel.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma (Sheraton Parco de' Medici) or Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。之后前往皮恩扎古城参观游览二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观），之后前往罗马，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后入住酒店。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma (Sheraton Parco de' Medici) or Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor swimming pool. The hotel has a cutting-edge architectural style and modern interior design; the rooms are furnished with modern or classical decor, and the guest rooms all enjoy views of the garden, the swimming pool or the golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants offering you refined dishes of international flavors and traditional Italian cuisine. The hotel's tranquil environment easily satisfies your varied needs, all making it an ideal choice for relaxing body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The pastoral beauty of the Val d'Orcia and the medieval old town of Pienza
Close your eyes and you will imagine the classic scenery of Tuscany - blue skies and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and grapevines, and finally the wheat fields - this is the perfect portrait of the Val d'Orcia. From the walls of the old town of Pienza, look down upon the scenery of the World Heritage "Val d'Orcia."
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old town, is filled with masterpieces by great artists and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing cobbled lanes and the deep, secluded courtyards hidden everywhere, you seem to be transported to the European Middle Ages of a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you a surprise. For several centuries this city has maintained a complete classical appearance, as if time had stood still here since the fourteenth century. Besides its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also preserves a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, do not forget to taste the local specialties - ricciarelli almond soft cakes, panforte nut tarts, pan pepato peppered spiced nut cake, budini di riso rice pudding, cavallucci walnut cakes, or copate walnut wafers!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: The Town Hall, which forms the base of the square, is the most magnificent example of Gothic architecture in Siena. Inside the Town Hall, the Museo Civico holds exquisite frescoes. The 102-meter-high Torre del Mangia, built in 1297, towers high above the square. The Town Hall was begun at the end of the 13th century, originally as the office of the Republic's government. The lower level of this building is of stone and the upper level of brick; the facade is slightly curved, evenly dotted with neat eye-shaped openings. The middle of the Town Hall's facade has two tiers of Gothic pointed-arch triple windows, and along both sides and the top of the second tier are arranged Lombard-style blind arches. The Town Hall is now the seat of the Municipal Museum, displaying many paintings and sculptures related to the city's history, including the famous series of frescoes "Good Government, Bad Government" in the museum's Sala dei Nove (Hall of the Nine).
attractions.text_zh: 构成广场基础的市政厅是锡耶纳哥特式建筑最辉煌的范例。市政厅内的MuseoCivico藏有精美的壁画。102米高的TorredelMangia塔建于1297年，高高耸立在广场的上方。市政厅始建于13世纪末，原是作为共和政府的办公场所。这座建筑物下层是石造，上层是砖造，立面稍微弯曲，上面均匀分步着整齐的眼洞。市政厅的立面中部有两层哥特式的尖拱三孔窗户，二层两边和顶部都排列着伦巴第风格的盲拱。市政厅现在是市立博物馆的所在地，里面展示着许多与城市历史相关的绘画和雕塑，其中包括博物馆的九人会议厅(LaSaladeiNove)中的著名的系列壁画《好政府，坏政府》。

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a small town on the hills of the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. In 1459 he oversaw the rebuilding of Pienza, which was regarded as a model of the "ideal city," and it was therefore hailed as the "touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, what makes Pienza unique is that from its city walls one can look down upon the scenery of the World Heritage "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypress trees, with its uniquely shaped bends and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypress trees on both sides of the road cast mottled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and take photos.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. The Val d'Orcia of Tuscany is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns; here is a unique convergence of art and nature, holding rich historical traces. Its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance period, embodying the concept of "good government" of the Italian city-states.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, led by the guide, take a walking tour of the world-famous historic and cultural city of Rome. This is the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, and because of its long history it is called the "Eternal City." Visit the Colosseum (exterior) standing on the site of the ancient Roman capital, the Pantheon (exterior), and tour the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Free activity, after which the pleasant journey comes to an end!
Note: Due to the protection of Rome's ancient city architecture, vehicle traffic is prohibited; most areas are pedestrian zones, and all the sights within the city of Rome are inside the ancient Roman city. Touring Rome on foot today, the walking itinerary is about 5-6 kilometers.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，在导游的带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。自由活动，之后结束愉快旅程！
备注： 由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，而罗马市区内的所有景点都在古罗马城内，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth visit to Rome, one of the world's important cradles of culture
Among the ancient ruins occupying about half the area of the city, search for the historical civilization accumulated over thousands of years. Whether it is the world-famous architectural ruins formed by the Imperial Senate, triumphal arches, commemorative columns, the Pantheon and the Colosseum; or the many exquisite Renaissance-era buildings and art treasures held in over a hundred museums; or even the numerous fountains throughout the city in all manner of poses, represented by the Trevi Fountain; and the vast public works of roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares and public baths - all freeze art at its wonderful moment. Someone said "architecture is flowing music," and the architecture of ancient Rome plays a grand and timeless movement.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的就是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman king Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, among others, rest here forever. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of ancient Rome's exquisite construction techniques, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum, located in the center of Rome, was built by the ancient Romans to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great ancient Roman Empire. It was a place exclusively for slave owners, nobles and free men to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat by slaves, and is Rome's most famous historical relic. The Colosseum is a masterpiece and marvel that can be regarded as a model in the history of architecture, renowned worldwide for being huge, majestic and spectacular. Although only most of its skeleton remains, its grand spirit and magnificent momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza di Spagna once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Hepburn's fresh and lovely figure seems to have already merged with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory people can never shake off. The whole Piazza di Spagna is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The entire steps have 138 steps in all, and are the widest steps in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain," or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god in Roman mythology, with an imposing and grand momentum. It is said that if you stand with your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dreams can come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

attractions.text_en: In the Michelin travel guide, Place de la Libération is rated as one of the gourmet attractions that are "not to be missed, worth a detour to visit." It is also the reason Dijon came to be known as the gastronomic capital of France. It was planned and designed to royal standards by the renowned designer Jules Hardouin Mansart, who also designed the Palace of Versailles. On the north side of the square stand the Palace of the Dukes of Burgundy and the City Hall, while the south side features a semicircular arched arcade. Its architectural style is consistent with Versailles, both being exemplary models of Baroque architecture.
attractions.text_zh: 自由广场在米其林旅游指南中被评定为“不可错过，即使绕道也要造访”的美食景点之一。也是第戎得以获得法兰西美食之都的由来，由曾设计凡尔赛宫的著名设计师儒勒·哈杜安·孟萨尔（Jules Hardouin Mansart），按照皇室标准进行规划设计。广场北侧是勃艮第公爵宫和市政厅，南侧是一个半圆的弧形拱廊。建筑风格与凡尔赛一致都是巴洛克建筑的典范。

attractions.text_en: Dijon, the capital of Burgundy—France's great agricultural province—is known as the gastronomic capital of France (ville de gastronomie). To be regarded as a gastronomic capital in France, it is not merely world-famous for its wines; more importantly, Dijon inherited France's classic culinary traditions. Apart perhaps from duck confit and oysters, nearly every representative French dish you know of originates from Dijon! For example, snails baked with parsley, beef bourguignon, jambon persillé (parsley ham terrine), pan-seared duck breast, cream puffs, Charolais beef, Dijon mustard, and French red wine sauce.
attractions.text_zh: 法国农业大省勃艮第的首府城市——第戎被称为法国的美食之都（ville de gastronomie）。能在法国评为作为一个美食之都，不仅仅是以葡萄酒闻名世界，更重要的是第戎继承了法国经典的美食传统。可能除了油封鸭和牡蛎以外，几乎你所知道的法国代表菜肴，都是来源于第戎！比如，香芹焗蜗牛，法式红酒炖牛肉、香芹火腿冻、香煎鸭胸肉，奶油泡芙、沙罗尔牛肉、第戎芥末、法式红酒沙司。

attractions.text_en: Burgundy's core wine region is divided into a northern and a southern part: the north is the Côte de Nuits, and the south is the Côte de Beaune. It would be no exaggeration to say that the Côte de Nuits is a land favored by heaven. Among Burgundy's 33 Grand Cru vineyards, there are 25 red-wine Grand Crus in total, 24 of which fall within the Côte de Nuits. For this reason, it has become the wine region that all of Burgundy takes pride in.
attractions.text_zh: 勃艮第的核心产区分为南、北两个部分，北部为夜丘（ Cote de Nuits），南部为伯恩丘（Cote de Beaune）。如果说夜丘是上天厚爱的土地，那一点也不为过。勃艮第33个特级园里，一共有25个红葡萄酒特级园，其中24个就落在了夜丘，因此，它成为了全勃艮第引以为豪的产区。

attractions.text_en: Annecy is a beautiful little town nestled among the foothills of the Alps in southern France, and its old town has all the charm of a typical European ancient city. Here there is not only beautiful natural scenery but also many well-preserved old buildings. The lake formed by Alpine snowmelt, the canals running through the town, the dark green distant mountains, the rows upon rows of richly colored houses, and the lush trees and flowers everywhere together form a paradise-like scene. It has been named one of the world's six most charming small towns.
attractions.text_zh: 安纳西是位于法国南部阿尔卑斯山麓间的一座美丽小镇，老城更是一派典型的欧洲古城风貌，这里不仅有美丽的自然景观，也有不少保留完好的老建筑，阿尔卑斯山融雪形成的湖泊、穿城而过的运河、青黛色的远山，鳞次栉比、色彩浓烈的房屋，以及满地的绿树繁花，构成了世外桃源般的美景，被评为世界六大魅力小镇之一 。

attractions.text_en: The second-largest glacial lake in France, it is hailed as the purest lake in all of Europe. Its water comes from Alpine snowmelt and rain, stretching for 15 kilometers and shining as emerald blue as jade. Strolling or cycling along the shores of Lake Annecy, or swimming and rowing on the lake while gazing at the rolling Alps in the distance, is undoubtedly one of life's great joys. The French Enlightenment thinker Rousseau once spent the "twelve best years" of his life in Annecy.
attractions.text_zh: 法国第二大冰川湖，被誉为全欧洲纯净的湖泊。湖水来自阿尔卑斯的高山雪水和雨水，绵延15公里，如翡翠般碧蓝耀眼。在安纳西湖畔漫步骑车，或是在湖中游泳划船，眺望远处连绵起伏的阿尔卑斯山脉，无疑是人生一大快事。法国启蒙思想家卢梭曾经在安纳西度过了他一生中"美好的12年"。

attractions.text_en: The Lovers' Bridge is a small bridge spanning the Thiou River. It lies on a path one must take heading toward the northeast of the lake, and to the west of the bridge is a small wharf. This seemingly ordinary little bridge was where the thinker Rousseau and Madame de Warens once had their rendezvous. In his Confessions, Rousseau described the wonderful years of his youth spent in Annecy, and it was here that he encountered and fell in love with the beautiful Madame de Warens. Today this is a favorite spot for the people of Annecy to take walks, and the bridge has also become a place where many couples often come to stroll.
attractions.text_zh: 爱情桥是一座坐落在休河上的小桥，这儿是一条往湖东北走的必经之路，桥西是一个小码头。这座看似较为普通的小桥，却是思想家卢梭和华伦夫人曾经约会的地方，卢梭在《忏悔录》中描写了他在安那锡度过的人生中美好的青年时光，而他就是在这里邂逅并爱上了美丽的华伦夫人。如今这里是安纳西市民们喜欢的散步之地，而这座桥也成了很多情侣们常会去走走的地方。

attractions.text_en: Fontaine de Vaucluse (Spring Town), about half an hour's drive from Avignon, is the largest spring in France and ranks fifth in the world, with an annual spring water flow of as much as 630 million cubic meters. The town is quaint and petite, nestling quietly beside the spring. In the scorching heat of summer, the residents here do not feel the unbearable heat at all; the cool spring water flowing down from the mountains carries away the sweltering air and brings wave after wave of refreshing coolness. In 1339, the famous poet Petrarch, known as the "poet immortal of Europe," once lived here, and his beloved Laura often came to the Spring Town to listen to the "murmuring sound of the spring water." Petrarch left a short verse for this place: The source of the Sorgue has long been famous, and it will become even more famous because of my dwelling here and my hymns of praise.
attractions.text_zh: Fontaine de vaucluse（泉水小镇），离 Avignon 大约半小时的路程，它是法国最大的泉，世界排名第5位，每年泉水的流量有6亿3千万立方米之多。小镇古朴而小巧，静静的依偎在泉水之畔。炎炎夏日，这里的居民却体会不到那份酷暑难当，从山中流淌来的清凉泉水，带走了炙热的空气，送来了一波波爽人清凉。1339年，被称为欧洲诗仙的著名诗人彼得拉克曾在此居住，他的爱人罗拉经常来到泉水小镇聆听这里的”潺潺的泉水声”. 彼得拉克曾为此地留下一句短诗：索格河的源头已经闻名许久了，它将因为我的居住和我的赞美诗而变得更加闻名。

attractions.text_en: Gordes, also called the Stone City, is a typical Provençal town in France built in the Middle Ages. The houses of the entire town are all built up from accumulated granite, clustered together in a terraced formation, looking from afar like a house suspended in the air. Its unique architectural style, combined with its special geographical location, gives this Provençal town a distinctive charm, drawing countless tourists to come and visit.
attractions.text_zh: 高德古城又叫石头城，是一座典型的建于中世纪的法国普罗旺斯小镇，整个小镇的房屋都是由花岗岩累积而成，呈梯形盘踞在一起，远处看上去犹如一座空中的房子。其独特的建筑风格加上特殊的地理位置，使这座普罗旺斯小镇呈现出一种独特的韵味，从而吸引了无数的游客前来观光。

attractions.text_en: Sénanque Abbey is located 2 kilometers north of the Stone City town. It was built in 1148 by the monks of Mazan Abbey. The abbey is in the Romanesque style, plain and unadorned. The entire abbey is hidden in a tranquil valley and is the setting for the book A Year in Provence. This place is called one of the "most beautiful valleys in all of France," and most postcards are shot here. Sénanque Abbey, together with Silvacane Abbey and Le Thoronet Abbey, are jointly known as the "Three Sisters of Provence."
attractions.text_zh: 塞南克修道院位于石头城小镇北方 2 公里处, 它是由 Mazan 修道院的僧侣们修建于 1148 年，修道院采用罗马式风格，朴实无华。整个修道院隐藏在宁静的山谷中，是《山居岁月》一书的故事背景。这里被称为“全法国美丽的山谷”之一，大部分明信片都取景于此。塞南克修道院与西瓦冈修道院和多宏内修道院，并称“普罗旺斯三姐妹”。

attractions.text_en: Valensole boasts the most beautiful lavender fields of the Provence region. Driving from the lavender ocean of Valensole Lavande to Lac de Sainte-Croix (Holy Cross Lake) takes about 40 minutes. National Geographic magazine has selected it as one of the most beautiful places in the world; at the same time, this is also the filming location of Qiong Yao's eponymous novels Yi Lian You Meng (Dream Behind the Curtain) and You Jian Yi Lian You Meng (Dream Behind the Curtain, Again).
attractions.text_zh: 瓦朗索勒拥有普罗旺斯地区美丽的薰衣草花田。开车从瓦朗索勒薰衣草海洋Valensole Lavande 到Lac de Sainte-Croix圣十字湖，大约需要40分钟左右。国家地理杂志评选为世界上美丽的地方之一，同时，这里也是琼瑶同名小说《一帘幽梦》和《又见一帘幽梦》的拍摄地。

attractions.name_en: Verdon Gorge and Lac de Sainte-Croix
attractions.name_zh: 凡尔登大峡谷和圣十字湖
attractions.text_en: The Verdon Gorge is the second-largest canyon in the world. This canyon, 25 kilometers long and 700 meters deep, lies in the Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur region and is renowned throughout Europe for its magnificent scenery. From a commanding, bird's-eye perspective, Lac de Sainte-Croix appears like a smooth piece of emerald set among the mountains. Here there are towering sheer cliffs, murmuring streams, lake water so clear you can see the bottom, and rolling ranges of mountains beyond. Sitting on the cliff-edge viewing platform above the gorge and the lake, in that moment you will forget the entire world.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔登大峡谷是世界第二大峡谷，这座25公里长，700米深的峡谷就在普罗旺斯-蔚蓝海岸大区里，因其壮美的景色而闻名于欧洲。以居高临下独特的视角，圣十字湖仿佛一片平整的翡翠，镶嵌在群山之中。这里有万丈的绝壁，潺潺的小溪，清可见底的湖水，更有连绵的山峦。坐在峡谷于湖面的悬崖景观台上，这一刻会忘记整个世界。

attractions.text_en: Nice's old town has perfectly preserved various styles of ancient buildings dating from the 18th century onward, such as Baroque-style churches and Italian-style buildings. Walking into the maze-like old town, strolling through the winding, undulating, crisscrossing lanes, you can admire the brightly colored buildings of varied styles and hunt for treasures in the distinctive little shops. If you walk to the market on the Cours Saleya square, all sorts of brightly colored fruits, candies, and fresh flowers immediately come into view, leaving you dazzled.
attractions.text_zh: 尼斯的老城区，这里完好地保留了18世纪以来的各种风格的古老建筑，如巴洛克风格的教堂，意大利风格的建筑物等。走进迷宫般的老城区，在高低蜿蜒，纵横曲折的小巷中漫步，欣赏颜色鲜明，风格各异的建筑，在各具特色的小店中淘宝。如果走到萨雷雅的广场集市(CoursSaleya)，各种鲜艳的水果、糖果、鲜花立刻映入眼帘，令人目不暇接。

attractions.name_en: Baie des Anges (Bay of Angels), Nice
attractions.text_en: The Bay of Angels lies right next to the Promenade des Anglais (English Walkway) and gets its name from its resemblance to an angel's wings. The sea here is exceptionally azure blue, making it a wonderful place to spend the summer. Nice's beaches are quite special—they are all covered with pebbles, which prick the feet a little when you step on them, yet offer a unique charm. Climbing up to the castle and overlooking from the east is an advantageous angle for admiring the Bay of Angels.
attractions.text_zh: 天使湾紧邻英国人漫步大道，因形似天使的翅膀而得名，这里的海十分湛蓝，是消夏的好地方 。尼斯的海滩很特别，都是由鹅卵石铺成的，踩上去有些扎脚，却别有一番趣味。 爬上城堡从东面俯瞰是欣赏天使湾的有利角度。

attractions.text_en: It is an ancient stone village built in the Middle Ages, perched on a massive rock by the sea. A small village between Nice and Monaco, it is also known as an eagle's-nest village. Standing at its summit, more than six hundred meters high, you can take in a bird's-eye view of most of the Côte d'Azur, with scenery that is utterly enchanting and spectacular. Strolling along the winding, narrow stone-paved roads, you feel its charming and unique scenery everywhere; the houses built of stone arch over the narrow alleys, meandering upward, with endless allure.
attractions.text_zh: 是一个建于中世纪的古老的石头小镇，地处海边的一块巨大的岩石上，是尼斯和摩纳哥之间的一个小村，也被人称为鹫巢村。站在其六百多米的顶端可以鸟瞰大半个蔚蓝海岸，景色十分迷人壮观。漫步在曲折狭窄的石板路上，处处感受到迷人的独特景致，石块砌成的房屋，拱著狭窄的巷道蜿蜒向上，风情无限。

attractions.text_en: Situated at the foot of the hill of Èze, the International Perfume Museum quietly and serenely tells people the story of perfume. The museum was completed in 1983 and is filled with the flavor of the Mediterranean. This international perfume museum aims to preserve France's renowned perfume industry and to promote the international development of its perfume industry. The museum has exhibition halls in 18th-century architectural style, mainly divided into three principal areas: the production process area, the perfume history area, and the fragrance collection area. Here, people can not only learn about the historical development of perfume, the process of blending perfume, and methods of production, but can also discover some of the world's rarest varieties of perfume.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落在埃兹山下的国际香水博物馆，宁静安详的向人们诉说着香水的故事。该馆于1983年落成，充满了地中海的味道。这座国际性的香水博物馆，旨在保存法国享有盛名的香水工业和促进其香水工业在国际上的发展。馆中有着十八世纪建筑风格的展览厅，主要分三个主要区域：生产过程区，香水历史区和香料收藏品区。在这里，人们不仅可以了解香水的历史发展，香水的调配过程和生产方式，还可以发现世界上少有的香水品种。

attractions.text_en: Monte Carlo in Monaco is a world-famous seaside yacht resort destination. The city scenery is extremely beautiful, with the Prince's Opera House, seaside bathing beaches, and the Hôtel de Paris, as well as various seaside parks and tropical plant gardens. The city is built along the mountain road, with the yacht harbor at the foot of the cliffs. In the central area lies the Monte Carlo commercial center, built on the half-cliff.
attractions.text_zh: 摩纳哥的蒙特卡洛，为世界著名的海滨游艇旅游胜地。城市风景非常优美，有王子歌剧院、海滨浴场及巴黎大酒店。以及各种海滨公园及热带植物公园。城市沿着山道而建立，悬崖下就是游艇停泊港。中心地带则是修建在半峭壁的蒙特卡洛商业中心。

attractions.text_en: Just like the citrus fruits abundantly produced locally, Menton is wrapped in lemon tones. Whether it is the long beaches, the buildings of every variety, or the stretches of citrus orchards, all seem to become nature's palette, dyeing this seaside town a special yellow at the height of summer. Getting lost at the crossroads of Menton's old town, walking through the narrow, quiet streets between light and shadow, admiring the Baroque-style buildings, feeling the sea breeze that weaves between the houses, and setting foot on the "Lemon Road" will make you reluctant to leave.
attractions.text_zh: 和当地盛产的柑橘类水果一样，芒东被柠檬色调所包裹。无论是修长的海滩，各式各样的建筑，还是成片的柑橘果园，仿佛都成为了自然的调色板，在盛夏时节为这座海滨小镇染上了特别的黄色。迷失在芒东老城区的十字路口，走过光与影之间狭窄而安静的街道，欣赏巴洛克式风格的建筑，感受穿梭在房屋之间的海风，踏上“柠檬之路”将会让你流连忘返。

attractions.text_en: The place where the prototype of Romeo and Juliet is set—Saint-Raphaël. The tranquil and peaceful rhythm of seaside life, the lively and bustling commercial districts, the densely crowded carnival celebrations, and the highly popular sea-bathing beaches. Health resort, seaside tourism, and business tourism complement one another, attracting tourists from all over the world.
attractions.text_zh: 《罗密欧与朱丽叶》的原型所在地——圣拉斐尔。宁静祥和的海滨生活节奏，热闹非凡的商业街区，人山人海的狂欢盛典，以及倍受欢迎的海水浴场。疗养胜地、海滨旅游和商务旅游相辅相成，吸引着来自世界各地的游客。

attractions.text_en: Saint-Tropez is a town in the Var department of the Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur region of France, about 100 kilometers from Marseille, the regional capital, and is nicknamed the "City of the Sun." This small city on the Côte d'Azur claims to have the most beautiful beaches in France. The beaches here do not stretch for dozens of kilometers like other tourist destinations; instead, they are composed of nearly a hundred small beaches of around a thousand square meters each. Luxurious hotels and private villas occupy these silvery-sand-covered beaches, and as soon as midsummer arrives, the bays here are filled with long, elegant yachts—especially Italian Riva speedboats in the 1930s style.
attractions.text_zh: 圣特罗佩是法国普罗旺斯-阿尔卑斯-蓝色海岸大区瓦尔省的一个镇，距离大区首府马赛约100公里，别称“太阳城”。这座位于蔚蓝海岸的小城，号称拥有法国美丽的海滩。这里的海滩并不像其他旅游地一样绵延几十公里，而是由近百个近千平方米的小型海滩组成。豪华的酒店和私人别墅占据了这些银沙满地的海滩，一到盛夏季节，那里的海湾便泊满了修长优雅的游艇，尤其以20世纪30年代风格的意大利Riva快艇居多。

attractions.name_en: Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame
attractions.text_en: Built in 1982, it is an important meeting venue for the Cannes Film Festival, and the much-watched Palme d'Or is awarded here. The Palais des Festivals currently has a total exhibition area of 44,000 square meters, containing 15 concert halls. The Walk of Fame is one of the attractions not to be missed when visiting Cannes; located beside the Palais des Festivals, here you can see the handprints that many stars have pressed into the pavement, now accumulating to more than 300.
attractions.text_zh: 建于 1982 年，是戛纳影展的重要会议地点，备受注目的金棕榈奖即在此颁发。电影宫目前总共有 44000 平方米的展览面积，内含 15 个音乐厅星光大道是到戛纳不容错过的景点之一，位于电影宫旁，可以在这里看到许多明星在这里的人行道上按下的手印，现在已经累计了有300 多个了。

attractions.text_en: The Old Port of Marseille is one of the most iconic and historically significant sites of this Mediterranean city. Ever since the ancient Greeks founded Marseille in 600 BC, the Old Port has been the heart of this city. Today, the Old Port is not only a mooring place for fishing boats and yachts, but also a popular gathering spot for local residents and tourists alike. The Old Port is flanked on both sides by beautiful seaside boulevards, lined with cafés, restaurants, and bars—a wonderful place to enjoy Marseille's flavorful cuisine and leisure time. Whether it is the early-morning fish market, the bustling markets, or the lights and music at night, this place is full of distinctive charm and vitality.
attractions.text_zh: 马赛老港是这座地中海城市最具标志性和历史意义的地点之一。自古希腊人于公元前600年建立马赛以来，老港一直是这座城市的心脏。如今，老港不仅是渔船和游艇的停泊地，也是当地居民和游客的热门聚集地。老港两侧环绕着美丽的滨海大道，沿岸布满了咖啡馆、餐馆和酒吧，是享受马赛风味美食和休闲时光的绝佳场所。无论是清晨的渔市、热闹的市场，还是夜晚的灯光与音乐，这里都充满了独特的魅力和活力。

attractions.text_en: Europe has countless churches, but Marseille's Notre-Dame de la Garde is absolutely one not to be missed. The golden statue of the Madonna and Child atop the church is the symbol of Marseille, and at the same time the patron protector of sailors, fishermen, and all the people of Marseille. Notre-Dame de la Garde sits on a small hill 154 meters high, with an outdoor viewing platform, making it an excellent spot to admire Marseille and the Mediterranean islets.
attractions.text_zh: 欧洲的教堂数不胜数，马赛的守护圣母教堂是绝对不能错过的一座。教堂顶上的圣母圣子金像是马赛的象征，同时也是水手、渔民和所有马赛人的保护神。守护圣母教堂座落在一座154米高的小山丘上，外设有观景台，是观赏马赛和地中海小岛的绝佳地点。

attractions.name_en: Parc Ornithologique de Pont de Gau (Bird Park)
attractions.text_en: The Pont de Gau Bird Park is located in the heart of the Camargue wetlands. It is an important flamingo habitat and is famous worldwide for flamingo watching. The flamingos near the salt lake feed on the lake's algae and shrimp, and their feathers also turn a faint pink, vivid and exquisitely beautiful. The withered yellow reed beds, the white herds of horses, the pink salt marshes and flamingos, and the dark marshy lakes are all worth pausing for, to linger amid this unique natural scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 蓬德高鸟类公园位于卡马格湿地中心地带，是重要的火烈鸟栖息地，也因火烈鸟观赏而闻名于世界。盐湖附近的火烈鸟以湖中的藻类和虾为食，羽毛也会变成淡淡的粉红色，灵动唯美。枯黄的芦苇地、白色的马群、粉红色的盐沼和火烈鸟、深色的沼泽湖泊，都值得我们停下脚步，流连于这独特的自然风光。

attractions.text_en: Aigues-Mortes is a town situated between "salt" and "sea." About 90% of France's salt is produced in Aigues-Mortes. You can also take a sightseeing miniature train to tour all the way along; the little train stops at the white salt mountain, where you can climb high and gaze afar at the ancient city, the blue sky, and the pink lake, all setting one another off in a scene of unsurpassed beauty.
attractions.text_zh: 艾格莫尔特是处于“盐”与“海”之间的小镇，法国约90％的盐是从艾格莫尔特生产的，还可以乘坐观光小火车一路浏览，小火车会停靠白色盐山，登高望远，古城、蓝天，粉湖相映相成，美不胜收。

attractions.text_en: The pink salt lake of Aigues-Mortes, like strawberry milk, is full of romance and childlike whimsy. The reason the salt lake appears pink stems from the sunlight and the high salt content, which cause the algae in the lake water to produce abundant beta-carotene. The flamingos that inhabit this place feed on the algae in the lake water, and so their long legs and beaks also take on an enchanting pink color. Taking the little train sightseeing all the way along, you can admire the ancient city, the blue sky and red water, and the romantic town of (Aigues-)Mortes, as well as many adorable flamingos.
attractions.text_zh: 艾格莫尔特的粉色盐湖如同草莓牛奶一样充满浪漫和童趣，盐湖之所以呈现粉色，是源于光照和高含盐量，令湖水里的藻类产生丰富的β-胡萝卜素。栖息在这里的火烈鸟们以湖水中的藻类为食，因此它们的大长腿和嘴部，也有着迷人的粉红色彩。乘坐小火车一路观光，可以欣赏到古城、蓝天红水和浪漫的莫尔特小镇，还有很多可爱的火烈鸟。

attractions.text_en: Palais Longchamp is an arc-shaped building, combining Baroque, Roman, and Oriental styles into one, and is exceedingly magnificent. At its center is a group sculpture and fountain themed "Ode to Water," with a colonnade extending out on each side. Newlyweds often come here to take wedding photos, so young ladies who like to travel with a wedding dress may well pay a visit.
attractions.text_zh: 隆尚宫是一座弧形的建筑，集巴洛克、罗马及东方风格为一体，十分宏伟。它的中央是以“水之赞歌”为主题的群雕和喷泉，两边各延伸出去一段回廊，经常有新人来此拍摄婚纱照，喜欢带婚纱旅游的MM不妨一游。

attractions.text_en: An ancient historic city from the Roman period, Nîmes gathers together so many astonishing crystallizations of ancient Roman ingenuity: the well-preserved ancient Roman amphitheater; the historic-courtyard spring-side park (le Jardin de la Fontaine), as if hinting that Nîmes is a warm city that lives by its spring; and also the ancient Roman watchtower, the Tour Magne (la Tour de Magne), on the hill, from which, climbing high to gaze afar, you can take in boundless scenery in a single sweep.
attractions.text_zh: 古罗马时期的历史古城，尼姆汇集了太多古罗马人令人惊叹的智慧结晶：保存完好的古罗马竞技场；古迹庭院泉边公园(le Jardin de la Fontaine)，像在暗示尼姆即是一座以泉为生的暖城；还有丘陵上的古罗马瞭望塔马涅塔(la Tour de Magne)，登高远望，可将无限风光尽收眼底。

attractions.text_en: The architectural feature of the Maison Carrée is its Corinthian columns. This building is about 17 meters high and 26 meters deep, built in the 1st century BC during the era of Emperor Augustus (Auguste). It preserved the form of a Roman-period temple exactly as it was. After the temple was built, it once served as a city hall building and a church, and now it is an ancient museum (Musée des Antiques).
attractions.text_zh: 方形神殿的建筑特色是科林斯式的圆柱。这座建筑高约17米，深26米，建于公元前1世纪的奥古斯都大帝(Auguste)时代，它把罗马时期的神殿形式原原本本的保留了下来。神殿建成后曾作为市政府大楼和教堂，现在则为古代博物馆(Musee des Antigues)。

attractions.text_en: Built more than a thousand years ago, the Mysterious Garden—the historic-courtyard spring-side park—can be called a great architectural marvel; a well-preserved complex of ancient Roman buildings and landscaped gardens. Because Nîmes at the time was a city that developed with the spring water at its center, people firmly believed that the spring water had a spirit, and the spring-side park was the garden created by the people of that time as an offering to the spirit of the spring water.
attractions.text_zh: 建于一千多年前的神秘花园——古迹庭院泉边公园，堪称一大建筑奇迹；保存完好的古罗马建筑群和林园景观，因当时的尼姆是以泉水为中心发展而成的都市，所以人们深信泉水是有精灵的，而泉边公园就是当时人们为了奉献给泉水的精灵而建造出来的庭园。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping arcade, though most visitors come here for sightseeing. Beneath the central arcade is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays rank among the finest in Milan; the window displays in particular are refreshed daily, and simply standing outside admiring them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is filled with many upscale restaurants, cafes, and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱二世拱廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as a magnificent example of Italian Gothic architecture, hundreds of its spires soar into the clouds, and thousands of statues are carved into its white marble facade. The interior is vast and spacious; sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, casting a hazy light filled with a solemn religious atmosphere. In the cathedral's crypt, the remains of the Church of Santa Tecla, which originally stood on the site, are still preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: Sforza Castle was first built in the 14th century by the Milanese ruler Galeazzo Visconti, and was later rebuilt and expanded by the Sforza family in the 15th century, becoming the residence of the Dukes of Milan. During the Renaissance, master artists such as Leonardo da Vinci and Bramante were invited to take part in decorating the castle, making it a symbol where art and power coexisted.
attractions.text_zh: 斯福尔扎城堡最早建于14世纪，由米兰统治者加莱亚佐·维斯孔蒂修建，后在15世纪被斯福尔扎家族重建和扩建，成为米兰公爵的居所。文艺复兴时期，达·芬奇与布拉曼特等艺术大师曾受邀参与城堡装饰，使其成为艺术与权力并存的象征。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂 （外观）
attractions.text_en: Known simply as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt between 1043 and 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe, a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and at the same time a treasure house with a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located in Piazza San Marco; all of Venice's past glory is here. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through small openings, rather than having so many people on the bridge opposite looking over at you on the Bridge of Sighs. You are allowed to take photos inside, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once described by Napoleon as "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, with the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica rising on its eastern side. Since ancient times, it has been the center of public activity for Venice's political, religious, and traditional festival life.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route by which the court escorted condemned prisoners to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style, shaped like a house, with a vaulted top and very tightly enclosed, having only two small windows facing the canal. After a prisoner had been tried in the Doge's Palace, a serious offender would be taken to the dungeon; passing through this airtight bridge, he could only glimpse the blue sky through the small windows, losing his freedom from that moment and involuntarily letting out a sigh. It is said that if lovers kiss beneath the bridge they can love each other forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in Italy's Liguria region, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five clifftop villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that links the five villages together, built along the coast; it is the most beautiful hiking route in the world, about 15-20 kilometers long, requiring about 5 hours, with the Mediterranean on one side, mountains on the other, and Italian fishing villages ahead. It is a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the free-standing bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy, located on the Square of Miracles to the north of the city of Pisa in Italy's Tuscany province. It is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, and has been selected by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. It is said that in 1590 AD, Galileo performed a free-fall experiment from the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's view.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in Italy's Tuscany region, partly covered with lawn. The Square of Miracles is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square stand four great buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Cemetery. Around the square, ancient city walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Square of Miracles in the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa, and the cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few can be as enchanting as this one. This beautiful church, faced with white, red, and green granite, fully interprets the classicism, elegance, and freedom esteemed in the Renaissance era; no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore stands on the original site of the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture David, and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore lies directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier large-span circular arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing for her into "The Divine Comedy." Over several hundred years, it has stood firm through floods, social upheavals, and wars. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of the city of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian luminaries such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are well worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are many cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and sample local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract large audiences. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, taking in the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间 ， 广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum, located in the center of Rome, was built by ancient Rome at the time to please generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great ancient Roman Empire. It was a place exclusively for slave owners, nobles, and free citizens to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat between slaves, and is Rome's most famous historical relic. The Colosseum is a masterpiece and marvel that can be called a model in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for its enormous size, grandeur, and magnificence. Although only most of a skeleton remains, its majestic bearing and sweeping momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, and the Roman emperors Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, among others, rest here in eternal sleep.
