The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of the exquisite construction techniques of ancient Rome, and was praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: Piazza di Spagna once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Hepburn's fresh and radiant figure seems to have already merged with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. The Spanish Square itself is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The steps total 138 in all, making them the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.text_en:
Also called the "Fountain of the Maidens," or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology, and is altogether grand and magnificent. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dreams will come true.
Starting in 2025, the Rome city hall plans to charge a photography fee at the Wishing Pool; if this bill passes, visitors will need to pay an estimated 2-euro fee themselves to visit and photograph the Wishing Pool.
attractions.text_zh:
又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。
自2025年开始，罗马市政厅计划在许愿池收取拍照费用，如该法案通过，则游客需要自行支付预计为2欧元的许愿池参观拍照费用。

attractions.text_en:
The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world and is Capri's more famous attraction; many people's purpose in going to Capri is precisely to behold the wonder of the Blue Grotto. You can take a small boat into the Blue Grotto to tour it; due to the special structure of the cave mouth, the seawater inside the cave is a crystalline blue. The surface seawater of the Blue Grotto appears a deep, dim blue, while the deeper seawater is sky-blue, and the seawater sets off the rocks in the cave as all blue too. On clear days, the Blue Grotto is exceptionally beautiful and enchanting.
Capri's Blue Grotto is a natural feature; if there is high tide, wind and waves, or other factors, and the local maritime meteorological agency announces a closure, it cannot be entered for touring. The cost of touring the Blue Grotto is not included in the tour package; to avoid misunderstanding, please follow local custom: in addition to the Blue Grotto manual boatman's fee, please pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
attractions.text_zh:
蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，是卡普里较著名的景点，很多人去卡普里的目的就是为了一睹蓝洞奇观。可乘小船进入蓝洞游览，由于洞口的特殊结构，使得洞里的海水一片晶蓝。蓝洞表层的海水呈现幽幽的深蓝色，而深层海水却是天蓝色的，海水映衬得洞中的岩石也都一片蔚蓝。天气晴朗的时候，蓝洞分外的美丽和妖娆。
卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

attractions.text_en: Capri Island is located near the southern mouth of the Gulf of Naples and belongs to Italy's Campania region. On the island there are the medieval castle ruins of Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as a church dedicated to the island's patron saint, San Costanzo. It is one of the famous tourist resorts of southern Italy. Capri's forests, waters, air, sunshine, and the island villas more longed for by the world's wealthy have attracted people from all over the world. Among them, the Blue Grotto is an attraction that everyone who comes to Capri Island will surely visit; on clear days, when sunlight shines into the cave, every corner of the deep-blue cavern is breathtakingly beautiful.
attractions.text_zh: 卡普里岛位于那不勒斯湾南部入海口附近，属意大利坎佩尼亚区。岛上有巴巴罗萨和卡斯蒂利奥内两座中世纪城堡遗迹以及供奉该岛守护神圣科斯坦佑的教堂，是意大利南部著名的游览胜地之一。卡普里岛的森林、水域、空气、阳光和较令全世界富豪憧憬的岛屿别墅，曾吸引了来自世界各地的人们，其中蓝洞是每一个人来卡普里岛一定会参观的景点，天清气朗时，阳光照射入洞穴，深蓝的洞穴内每一处角落都美不胜收。

attractions.text_en: Located in the town of Capri, the Gardens of Augustus record the ten years of Augustine's life living here. One side of the garden is a cliff, while in the distance is the azure sea. On the left side of the garden are the Lovers' Rocks; legend has it that these Lovers' Rocks were originally lovers in love who, unable to be together, threw themselves one after another into the sea to die for love, and afterwards became these rocks leaning against and nestling close to each other.
attractions.text_zh: 位于卡普里小镇上的奥古斯都花园记录着奥古斯丁在这里居住的十年生活。花园一侧是断壁，远处则是碧蓝的海水。在花园的左侧是情人石，相传这情人石原本是相爱的恋人，因无法恋爱纷纷跳入海中殉情，之后就成了这相依相偎的石头。

attractions.text_en: Sorrento is a small town in the Campania region of southern Italy, also known as the "Lemon Town." The town is built upon cliffs by the sea, with beautiful scenery, and the whole town is full of the passionate, intense, and relaxed feel of southern Italy. From here you can easily reach Naples and Pompeii. From Sorrento town you can overlook the Gulf of Naples and gaze at Mount Vesuvius and Capri Island, or you can stroll the streets of Sorrento and taste the limoncello abundantly produced locally.
attractions.text_zh: 索伦托(Sorrento)是意大利南部坎帕尼亚大区的一个小镇，也被称为“柠檬小镇”，城镇建造在海边的崖壁之上，风光秀丽，整座城充满着南意热情浓烈的松弛感，从这里可轻松抵达那不勒斯和庞贝。身处索伦托镇可以俯瞰那不勒斯湾、眺望维苏威火山和卡普里岛，也可在索伦托街头闲逛，品尝当地盛产柠檬酒。

attractions.text_en: The ancient city of Pompeii was once a small-to-medium town backing onto mountains and facing the sea, destroyed in an instant by the great eruption of Mount Vesuvius to its northwest. The town's streets and houses were buried by volcanic ash, yet it perfectly preserved the living scenes of the Pompeians from more than two thousand years ago, and later this vast ruin was gradually excavated. Apart from various architectural remains, there are also some shocking casts. The people who perished when the volcano erupted, their bodies wrapped in volcanic ash, decayed leaving only empty shells; archaeology injected plaster into these empty shells to make casts, showing the world the tragic state of Pompeii at the time.
attractions.text_zh: 庞贝古城曾是一座背山面海的中小城镇，因西北边的维苏威火山大爆发而毁于一旦。城镇街道、房屋被火山灰掩埋，却完整保留了两千年多前庞贝人的生活场景，后来这座庞大的遗址才被渐渐发掘出来。除各种建筑遗迹外，还有一些触目惊心的铸像。在火山爆发时遇难的人，因被火山灰包裹而身体腐朽得只剩空壳，考古学把这些空壳注入石膏、做成铸像，向世人展示庞贝当时的惨状。

attractions.text_en: This is a historical site within the ancient city of Pompeii. It was once a temple, but due to its great age only ruined walls remain; however, the overall outline of the temple can still be made out.
attractions.text_zh: 这是庞贝古城内的一处历史遗址，这里曾经是一座寺庙，但因为年代久远只剩下残垣断壁了，但寺庙的整体轮廓还是看得出的。

attractions.name_en: Forum at the Temple of Apollo
attractions.text_en: Also called the public forum, this was once the political, economic, and religious center of former Pompeii. On the square, the rectangular basilica still has some brick-built column bases remaining; this was the former court and place of commercial transactions. Opposite the basilica is a Temple of Apollo, whose 48 Corinthian columns are well preserved, along with many exquisite frescoes. On the north side of the square there is a Temple of Jupiter with its back to Mount Vesuvius, from which one can clearly gaze at Mount Vesuvius.
attractions.text_zh: 也称公共广场，这里曾经是昔日庞贝的政治、经济、宗教中心，广场上的方形会堂还残留着一些砖砌的圆柱底座，此处是以前的法院与商业交易场所。会堂的对面是一座阿波罗神殿，里面的48根科林斯式圆柱保存完好，还有许多精美的壁画。广场北侧有一座背对着维苏威火山的丘比特神殿，可以清 清楚的眺望维苏威火山。

attractions.text_en: Positano is a small town along the Amalfi Coast in the Campania region of Italy. The main part of the town backs onto mountains and faces the sea. A writer described it this way: Positano is a dreamland; while you are there she is not quite real, but after you leave she becomes vivid and lifelike. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as the most beautiful coast in Europe, where the coastline winds and twists, mountains and islands rise towering and majestic from the shore, valleys and headlands interlace, orchards and wild plants coexist, and within the pristine natural environment there is rich human history. Scattered in the dense forests and mountains are many picturesque towns, and the prettier one among them is called Positano.
attractions.text_zh: 波西塔诺是位于意大利坎帕尼亚大区阿马尔菲海岸‎沿岸的一个小镇。城镇主要部份背山面海，一位作家这样形容：波西塔诺是一个梦乡，你在时，她不是很真切，你离开后，她变的栩栩如生。阿马尔菲海岸被誉为欧洲美丽的海滩，这里的海岸线蜿蜒曲折，岸上山岛耸峙巍峨，山谷与海岬交错，果园与野生植物并存，原生态的自然环境中有丰富的人文历史，浓密山林中散落着许多如诗如画的小镇，而其中较漂亮的那一个叫做波西塔诺

attractions.text_en: The Amalfi Coast, rated by a UN geographical magazine as one of the 50 places most worth visiting in a lifetime, possesses the most enchanting coastline in Naples and indeed the whole world, and was also once the capital of the powerful Maritime Republic of Amalfi, a very important city in Mediterranean trade at the time. The Amalfi Coast is also inscribed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Here there are ancient medieval towns, famous for their unique culture and architecture. Popular towns include Amalfi, Positano, Ravello, and Maiori. In these towns, you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers, and temples, whose history can be traced back several centuries, each building having its own story.
attractions.text_zh: 阿马尔菲海岸，被联合国地理杂志评为一生中最值得去的50个地方之一，拥有着那不勒斯乃至全世界最迷人的海岸线，同时它也曾经是强大阿马尔菲航海共和国的首都，是当时地中海贸易中的一个非常重要的城市。阿马尔菲同时也被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产。这里有着古老的中世纪小镇，这些小镇以其独特的文化和建筑而著名。受欢迎的小镇包括阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和莱马尼。在这些小镇中，你可以看到许多古老的教堂、城堡、钟楼和神殿，这些建筑物的历史可以追溯到几个世纪以前，每个建筑都有着自己的故事。

attractions.text_en: This is a city that combines historical depth and beautiful scenery in one. Salerno is located on the charming Amalfi Coast, possessing ancient churches, a Norman castle, and a picturesque waterfront. At seaside restaurants and local snack stalls, you can taste local Campania cuisine featuring fresh seafood and traditional dishes.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一座集历史底蕴与美景于一身的城市。萨莱诺位于迷人的阿马尔菲海岸（Amalfi Coast），拥有古老的教堂、诺曼城堡和风景如画的海滨，在海边餐馆和当地小吃店品尝以新鲜海鲜和传统菜肴为特色的坎帕尼亚当地美食。

attractions.text_en: Bari is the capital of Italy's Apulia region, commanding the scenery of the Adriatic coast, with tree-lined boulevards of tall palm trees, blending historical relics, seaside leisure, and authentic cuisine. Among them, the old town has a rich historical atmosphere - medieval tunnels and relics, the Swabian Castle, and the Cathedral of San Sabino - where you can feel the "city beneath the city." The most representative is the exterior of the Basilica di San Nicola; this 11th-century Romanesque church is a place of pilgrimage shared by both Catholicism and Eastern Orthodoxy, and its interior atmosphere is solemn and tranquil. As for Bari Vecchia (Bari Old Town), here the alleys are narrow and winding and the white stone walls mottled, the truest portrayal of southern Italy.
attractions.text_zh: 巴里（Bari）是意大利普利亚大区的首府，坐拥亚得里亚海沿岸风光，高大棕榈树的林荫大道、融合了历史遗迹、海滨休闲和地道美食，其中老城区具有浓郁的历史氛围——中世纪的隧道和遗迹，斯瓦比亚城堡、圣萨比诺大教堂，感受“城市之下的城市”。最具代表性的圣尼古拉大教堂外观（Basilica di San Nicola），这座11世纪的罗马式教堂是天主教与东正教共同朝圣之地，内部气氛庄严宁静。然而巴里老城（Bari Vecchia），这里巷弄狭窄曲折、白石墙面斑驳，是最真实的南意写照。

attractions.text_en: This clifftop town is hailed as the "Mediterranean balcony of Apulia." White houses are built clinging to the rock face, overlooking the azure Adriatic Sea. Its most famous sight is the bay of Polignano a Mare (Lama Monachile) - a deeply cut rocky gorge mouth connecting a stone arch bridge and natural rock caves, a classic scene for travelers to photograph. In the town you can also see many lines of poetry written on walls, in front of doors, and on steps, showcasing Polignano's title of "town of poetry." You can stroll slowly along the city walls, gazing into the distance at the scenery where azure sea and rocks intersect, or pause briefly at a sea-view cafe.
attractions.text_zh: 这座悬崖之上的小镇，被誉为「普利亚的地中海阳台」。白色房屋依岩壁而建，俯瞰湛蓝的亚得里亚海，最著名的景观是波利尼亚诺阿马雷海湾 ( Lama Monachile )—— 一道深切的岩峡口，连接着石拱桥与天然岩洞，是旅人拍照打卡的经典画面。小镇中也可见许多诗句写在墙上、门前、台阶上，展现波利尼亚诺「诗意之镇」的称号。您可沿城墙缓缓漫步，远眺碧海与岩石交错的风景，或在海景咖啡馆短暂停留。

attractions.text_en: Italy's paradise town - the town of Alberobello. In Italian, Alberobello means "beautiful tree," so some people also call Alberobello the Town of Beautiful Trees. The Trulli stone-house settlement is Alberobello's, and Apulia's, most representative architectural landscape, famous for its expanse of Trulli (mushroom-shaped white stone houses). The stone houses are built of dry-stacked limestone, with conical roofs, white walls and gray tops, a distinctive style. The Alberobello area was originally the most barren and unproductive wasteland; the earliest stone houses can be traced back to the 12th century, and when people first began living there is no longer ascertainable. From the 16th century onward, more and more refugees fleeing natural and man-made disasters fled here and used local limestone to build houses, which are exactly the conical-roofed stone houses with peaked-hat tops that we see today. In 1797 the refugees petitioned King Bourbon of nearby Taranto for legal settlement; as the refugees were numerous and strong, the king reluctantly allowed this type of easily-demolished conical stone house to exist legally, forming the unique Trulli village of the Alberobello area. The typical Trulli-style building is one in which residents use square limestone blocks to enclose a circular dwelling without columns or beams, build to an appropriate height, then stack flat stone slabs upward, each slab gradually narrowing toward the top to seal it into a conical pointed roof - one of humanity's most primitive house-building methods. The limestone-block dwellings are sturdy, dry, warm in winter and cool in summer.
attractions.text_zh: 意大利的天堂小镇——阿尔贝罗贝洛小镇，Alberobello在意大利语里是“美丽的树”的意思，因此也有人称阿尔贝罗贝洛为丽树镇。Trulli石屋聚落是阿尔贝罗贝洛是普利亚最具代表性的建筑景观，以成片的Trulli（蘑菇型白石屋）而闻名。石屋采用干式石灰岩砌成，屋顶为圆锥状结构，白墙灰顶，风格独特。阿尔贝罗贝洛地区，原是自然条件最差的不毛之地，最早的石屋可追溯至12世纪，何时开始有人居住已无从可考。16世纪开始，越来越多逃避天灾人祸的难民逃到这里，就地取材用石灰岩建屋，也就是我们现在看到的带有斗笠圆顶的石屋。1797年难民向塔兰托当地的旁波国王请愿合法定居，难民人多势众，国王勉为其难，允许容易拆除的这一类型圆顶石屋合法存在，形成了阿尔贝罗贝洛地区独特的陶尔利村落。典型的陶尔利风格建筑，是居民利用方形石灰岩块，围成无柱无梁的圆形房舍，建至适当高度，再用片状岩片向上堆砌，每片逐步收窄封顶，成圆锥形尖顶，这是一种人类最原始的建屋方法。石灰岩块的房舍，坚固、干燥、冬暖夏凉。

attractions.text_en: The distinctive cave restaurants in Matera's Sassi old town (Sassi di Matera) are mostly converted from original cave dwellings or granaries, retaining natural stone walls, arched structures, and dim yellow lighting, divided into two areas - Sasso Caveoso and Sasso Barisano. Its buildings are carved out of natural rock and have been inhabited since ancient times, making it one of the oldest inhabited places on Earth. The dishes commonly seen in the distinctive cave restaurants include handmade pasta with sauce (such as Orecchiette), goat cheese, roasted vegetables, bean puree, country bread, regional wine (such as Aglianico), or homemade desserts.
attractions.text_zh: 马泰拉Sassi 老城区（Sassi di Matera）中的特色洞穴餐厅多改建自原始洞穴民宅或粮仓，保留天然石壁、拱形结构与昏黄灯光，分为两个区域——Sasso Caveoso 和 Sasso Barisano。其建筑由天然岩石雕凿而成，自古便有人居住，是地球上最古老的居住地之一。特色洞穴餐厅菜色常见包括手工意面配酱汁（如Orecchiette）、山羊乳酪、烤蔬菜、豆泥、乡村面包、地区葡萄酒（如Aglianico）或自制甜点。

attractions.text_en: Cosenza, set in the heart of Calabria, is a charming city interwoven from its millennia-old history and a vibrant modern atmosphere. Strolling through the narrow streets of the old town center, you can feel a genuine atmosphere, where ancient stones shine alongside the bright colors of handicraft shops and open-air cafes. Its history is rooted in the era of ancient Greece, as witnessed by archaeological sites and the spectacular Norman-Swabian Castle, which overlooks the whole city and offers stunning scenery of the surrounding valleys.
attractions.text_zh: 科森扎，镶嵌在卡拉布里亚的心脏地带，是一座以其千年历史与充满活力的现代气息交织而成的魅力城市。漫步于古城中心狭窄的街道，能感受到一种纯正的氛围，古老的石头与手工艺品店和露天咖啡馆鲜艳的色彩交相辉映。它的历史根植于古希腊时代，这一点由考古遗址和壮观的诺曼-斯韦沃城堡所见证，城堡俯瞰全城，提供了周围山谷的惊艳景致。

attractions.text_en: Messina is located at the northeastern tip of Sicily, a city possessing a rich historical and cultural heritage, usually regarded as the gateway to Sicily. We especially enjoy visiting the cathedral's astronomical clock and the Fountain of Orion; this Renaissance-era masterpiece attracts many curious visitors every day. The regional museum, which holds works by master artists such as Caravaggio, is also a pleasant surprise.
attractions.text_zh: 墨西拿位于西西里岛东北端，是一座拥有丰富历史和文化遗产的城市，通常被视为通往西西里岛的门户。我们尤其喜欢参观大教堂的天文钟和猎户座喷泉，这座文艺复兴时期的杰作每天都吸引着众多好奇的游客。收藏有卡拉瓦乔等艺术大师作品的地区博物馆也是一个惊喜。

attractions.text_en: Piazza IX Aprile is a square with typical Sicilian style, with distinctive black-and-white floor tiles, and the Ionian Sea and Mount Etna visible in the distance. On the other side of the square are the pre-Gothic Church of Sant'Agostino and the 17th-century Church of San Giuseppe.
attractions.text_zh: 四月九日广场是一个具有典型西西里岛风格的广场，独具特色的黑白地砖，远处可见的爱奥尼亚海和埃特纳火山。广场另一边则是前哥特风的圣奥古斯丁教堂和17世纪的圣约瑟夫教堂。

attractions.text_en: The Greek open-air amphitheatre is a U-shaped theatre built in the 3rd century BC, suspended between sea and sky. It is the second-largest theatre in Sicily after Syracuse, and its unique location makes it one of the most distinctive Greek-style theatres in the world. In summer, this theatre is the venue for the Taormina Arts Festival.
attractions.text_zh: 希腊露天圆形剧场是一座建于公元前3世纪的U形剧院，悬浮于海天之间，是西西里仅次于锡拉库扎的第二大剧院，由于其独特的位置使其成为世界上最具特色的希腊式剧院。夏季，该剧院是陶尔米纳艺术节的举办场所。

attractions.text_en: The town is built high upon the mountains. Beautiful, tranquil, and spotlessly clean. Some call it a pearl by the Ionian Sea. Here, one side is cliff, the other faces the great sea, the city built upon layer after layer of mountain rock, forming its commanding bearing of touching the blue sky above and overlooking the sea below, standing loftily. At night, gazing from afar, its specks of lights merge completely with the stars in the sky, leaving people unable to tell which is heaven and which is the human world. Stroll along Corso Umberto; admire the enchanting scenery of the Ionian coast.
attractions.text_zh: 小镇建在高高的山上。美丽、宁静，一尘不染。有人称它为爱奥尼亚海边的一颗珍珠。这里一面是悬崖，一面临大海，城市建筑在层层山石之上，形成它那上接青天，下临大海，岿然耸立的气势。夜晚，远远望去，它的点点灯火和天上的繁星完全连成一片，使人分不清哪是天上，哪是人间。漫步于科索安不托大道；欣赏迷人的伊奥尼亚海滨风光。

attractions.text_en: Mount Etna is located on the east coast of Sicily, Italy, with an elevation of 3,323 meters and an area of 1,200 square kilometers. It is a large basalt stratovolcano, a composite volcano, with about 700,000 people living around it. Mount Etna is also one of the most active volcanoes in the world. Mount Etna lies at the junction of the Eurasian Plate and the African Plate, nurturing the volcanic-ash geology unique to the surrounding region; combined with the warm climate, this land is fertile and rich. The Mount Etna area has rocks, scrubland, grasslands, and forests; there is even a wetland.
attractions.text_zh: 埃特纳火山（Etna），位于意大利西西里岛东海岸，海拔3323米，面积1200平方千米，是一座大型玄武岩层火山，为成层火山，约有70万人居住。埃特纳火山也是世界上很活跃的火山之一。埃特纳火山处于亚欧板块和非洲板块交汇处，孕育出周边地域独有的火山灰地质，加之温暖的气候，这片土地肥沃而富饶。埃特纳火山地区有岩石、灌木丛、草地和森林；甚至还有一个湿地。

attractions.text_en: It is the most beautiful Frederick castle on the island, its name derived from George Maniakes, the commander who built defensive fortifications during the Byzantine period to defend the southern port of the island. According to research, the castle's walls were originally 18 meters high and 3.5 meters thick, with the main facade facing Ortigia and both sides located over the sea, until the Spanish remodeled it in the 16th century. The vaults, passages, platforms, and battlements within the castle all let one feel the loftiness of this defensive fortification in its day and the staunch role it played in resisting foreign enemies.
attractions.text_zh: 是岛上最美的腓特烈城堡，名字来源于拜占庭时期建筑防御工事、保卫岛南部端口的指挥官乔治•马尼亚切。据考证城堡原先墙高18米，厚3.5米，主立面面向奥尔提伽，两侧面位于海上，直到十六世纪西班牙人对它进行了改造。城堡内的拱顶，通道，平台，垛子都能让人感到这座防御工事当年的巍峨和抵御外敌时发挥的坚挺作用。

attractions.name_en: Fountain of Arethusa (Spring of the Wood Nymph)
attractions.text_en: The Fountain of Arethusa is a freshwater spring. According to records, Aretusa, a wood nymph and handmaiden of Artemis (goddess of the moon and the hunt), was pursued by a river god; she begged Artemis to turn her into a spring of water in order to escape the loathsome river god. Today, the fountain is home to wild ducks, mullet, and papyrus, and is also a tranquil and beautiful scene.
attractions.text_zh: 阿勒图萨喷泉是个淡水泉眼。据记载，阿耳特弥斯(月神和狩猎女神)的侍女——林中仙女Aretusa被河神追逐，她请求阿耳特弥斯将自己变成了泉水，以摆脱掉讨厌的河神。如今，喷泉里是野鸭、胭脂鱼和纸莎草的安身之地，也是一处宁静美丽的风景。

attractions.text_en: The city of Ortigia was once described by Cicero as "the greatest and most beautiful city of Greece." The colonists of that time left within the city many ancient-Greek-style buildings, all with histories of over a thousand years, including the ruins of the Temple of Apollo, the Temple of Athena which has been converted into a cathedral, the beautiful Spring of the Wood Nymph, the broad Greek Theatre, and so on. Beside the Greek Theatre there is a huge cave called the Ear of Dionysius, shaped like an ear, with enormous echoes. In addition, the city also has many churches from the Christian period, mostly Romanesque and Baroque. These buildings of differing eras and styles are all witnesses to the long history of the ancient city; today, they still stand quietly there.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔提伽城曾被西塞罗描述为“希腊最伟大、最美丽的城市”。当时的殖民者在城内留下了许多古希腊风格建筑物，历史都有千年以上，其中包括阿波罗神庙遗址、已被改造成大教堂的雅典娜神庙、美丽的林仙泉、宽广的希腊剧场等等。在希腊剧场旁有一个被成为狄俄尼索斯之耳的巨大岩洞，形如耳朵，回声巨大。另外，城里还有许多基督教时期的教堂，大多是罗马式和巴洛克式。这些年代和风格都不尽相同的建筑物，都是古城悠久历史的见证者，如今，它们依然静静地矗立在那里。

attractions.text_en: The cathedral was once a Greek temple, becoming a church after Sicily was Christianized in the 7th century. The magnificent Baroque facade designed by Andrea Palma in the 18th century AD conceals the former Temple of Athena, but one can still make out the 6x14 Doric columns of enormous scale built in the 5th century BC. It is the square where the heroine frequently appears in the film "Malena" (Malèna).
attractions.text_zh: 大教堂曾经是一座希腊庙宇，7世纪西西里岛基督化后成为教堂。公元18世纪由AndreaPalma设计的华丽巴洛克式外观掩盖了曾经的雅典娜神庙，但还是能够看出公元前5世纪修建的6*14规模巨大的多利克柱式。电影《西西里岛的美丽传说》中，女主角经常出现的广场。

attractions.text_en: Catania is located on the east coast of Sicily, Italy, and is the second-largest city on the island of Sicily. The city sits at the foot of Mount Etna; in history this volcano once brought devastating harm to Catania, but it also made the soil here exceptionally fertile, suitable for growing grapes to make wine. The whole city has elegant architecture and broad avenues, facing the rippling, sparkling Ionian Sea, which also gives this city another kind of flavor.
attractions.text_zh: 卡塔尼亚(Catania)位于意大利西西里岛的东岸，是西西里岛上的第二大城市。城市就坐落在埃特纳火山的山脚下，在历史上这座火山曾给卡塔尼亚带来过毁灭性的伤害，但使得这里的土壤份外肥沃，适合种植葡萄酿酒。整座城市有着典雅的建筑、宽广的大道，面临着碧波粼粼的爱奥尼亚海，也让这座城市有了另一番风味。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Agrigento is a district full of historical charm, famous for its rich ancient Greek relics and medieval architecture. The old town sits upon a towering hill, from which you can overlook the surrounding fields and the Mediterranean Sea. The city's history can be traced back to the 6th century BC, when it was called Akragas, an important city-state of ancient Greece. As time went on, the city underwent many changes, including rule by the Romans, Byzantines, Arabs, and Normans, and the influence of these different cultures left their marks in the city's architecture and urban layout.
attractions.text_zh: 阿格里真托老城是一个充满历史魅力的地区，以其丰富的古希腊遗迹和中世纪建筑而闻名。老城区坐落在一座高耸的山丘上，从这里可以俯瞰周围的田野和地中海。这座城市的历史可以追溯到公元前6世纪，当时称为阿克拉加斯（Akragas），是古希腊的一个重要城邦。随着时间的推移，城市经历了多次变迁，包括罗马、拜占庭、阿拉伯和诺曼人的统治，这些不同文化的影响在城市的建筑和城市布局中留下了痕迹。

attractions.text_en: The Valley of the Temples, more than 2 kilometers outside the town of Agrigento, has been one of the most important archaeological sites in the world since 1998, and is one of UNESCO's World Heritage Sites. On the ridge are preserved many Greek-style temple buildings, first built in the 5th century BC, which have stood upon this land for two thousand years, and this is also one of the most famous groups of ancient Greek architecture outside of Greece. The temples sit upon verdant green hills, overlooking the azure sea and gazing into the distance at the boundless sky.
attractions.text_zh: 距离阿格里真托城镇2公里开外的【神殿之谷】，是自1998年来世界最重要的考古遗址之一，是联合国教科文组织世界遗产之一。在山脊上保留了许多希腊式神庙建筑，始建于公元前五世纪，两千年来一直屹立在这片土地之上，这里也是意大利境外最著名的古希腊建筑群之一。神殿位于翠绿的山峦之上，俯瞰着碧蓝的大海，远望无边界的苍穹。

attractions.text_en: Cefalu is a seaside town in the far north of Sicily, set at the foot of the cliffs of La Rocca. The tranquil town is built by the sea and dwells by the water, with beautiful scenery. This is also a filming location for "Cinema Paradiso." Cefalu was founded by the ancient Greeks. Its name was also given by the Greeks, because to the east of the urban area of Cefalu is a rocky mountain that rises straight up with very steep slopes. Jutting into the Mediterranean Sea, it forms a terrain surrounded by water on three sides. The whole mountaintop looks like a bald-headed person. So the Greeks called this place Cefalu, which in fact means "head" in Greek.
attractions.text_zh: 切法卢位于西西里岛正北部的一座海滨小镇，坐落于洛卡山的悬崖峭壁之下，宁静的小镇临海而建，靠水而居，风光秀丽。这里也是《天堂电影院》的取景地哦。切法卢是古希腊人建立的。名字也是希腊人所取，因为切法卢市区的东侧是一座拔地而起，山势很陡峭的石头山。探入到地中海，形成了一个三面环水的地形。整个山头看起来像一个光头的人。于是希腊人称这里为切法卢，其实就是希腊语“头”的意思。

attractions.text_en: The cathedral, first built in 1184, was finally completed in the 18th century, blending many architectural styles. From the 13th century it came under Gothic influence, and in the 15th century it incorporated Spanish architectural style; the Gothic double-tier pointed-arch windows and arches, the Catalan-style porch and columns, and the Muslim-style geometric patterns of the apse are all perfectly blended together. The interior of the church is a Norman semicircular hall, very large and spacious, and is the burial place of the Norman royal family. The cathedral's underground treasury displays all kinds of jewelry and ornaments.
attractions.text_zh: 始建于1184年的大教堂，至18世纪最后完成，融合了多种建筑风格。13世纪开始受到哥特式影响，15世纪又融合了西班牙建筑风格；哥特式的双层尖顶窗和拱门，加泰罗尼亚风格的门廊和柱子，后殿穆斯林风格的几何图案，都完美地融合在了一起。教堂内部是诺曼式的半圆形殿堂，很大很空旷，是诺曼皇室的墓地所在。教堂的地下宝藏陈列着各种各样的珠宝首饰。

attractions.text_en: The Norman Palace was originally built in the 9th century, when it was an Arab fortress, and was later expanded by the Norman conquerors in the 12th century into a royal palace. This palace was the political and administrative center of the Norman kings, and later also became the royal residence of the Kingdom of Sicily. The palace's architecture blends Arab, Byzantine, and Norman styles, displaying the fusion of multiple cultures.
attractions.text_zh: 诺曼王宫最初建于9世纪，当时为阿拉伯的一个要塞，后来在12世纪由诺曼征服者扩建成为王宫。这座宫殿是诺曼国王的政治和行政中心，后来也成为西西里王国的皇家居所。宫殿的建筑融合了阿拉伯、拜占庭和诺曼风格，展现了多元文化的交融。

attractions.text_en:
The heart of Palermo · the meeting point of Baroque art
Quattro Canti is located in the center of Palermo's old town. The Four Corners is the junction connecting the city's two main north-south and east-west streets, and is hailed as "the heart of Palermo." The square has symmetrical Baroque-style facades on all four sides, each corner decorated with a fountain and statues, symbolizing the four Sicilian patron saints, the four Spanish kings, and the changing of the four seasons. Sunlight falls upon the golden stone walls, the carvings and arched windows reflecting elegant light and shadow, making it the most representative photo spot. Strolling here, it is as if you travel back to the glorious years of the 17th century.
attractions.text_zh:
巴勒莫的心脏 · 巴洛克艺术的交汇点
四角广场位于巴勒莫老城区中心，四角广场是连接城市南北、东西两条主要街道的交汇点，被誉为“巴勒莫的心脏”。广场四面为对称的巴洛克风格立面，每一角都装饰着喷泉与雕像，象征着四位西西里守护圣人、四位西班牙国王、以及四季更替。阳光洒落在金色石墙上，雕刻与拱窗辉映出优雅的光影，是最具代表性的拍照打卡地。漫步此处，仿佛穿越回17世纪的辉煌岁月。

attractions.text_en: Teatro Massimo is one of the famous theatres of Italy and Europe. This theatre is renowned for its magnificent architecture and excellent acoustic design, and is an important venue for the performing arts. Construction began in 1875, and the designer was the Italian architect Giovanni Battista Basile. The building adopts the Neoclassical style; its exterior is majestic and spectacular, especially its enormous dome and rich decorative carvings, making it one of the landmark buildings of the city of Palermo. The interior of Teatro Massimo is equally magnificent, possessing a huge auditorium decorated with gorgeous marble, gold leaf, and exquisite frescoes. The hall is designed in a horseshoe shape and can accommodate nearly 1,400 spectators. Its stage was one of the larger stages in the world at the time, very suitable for grand opera and ballet performances. Teatro Massimo became even more internationally renowned for its appearance in the film "The Godfather Part III."
attractions.text_zh: 马西莫剧院是意大利和欧洲著名的剧院之一。这座剧院以其宏伟的建筑和卓越的声学设计闻名，是表演艺术的重要场所。建设始于1875年，设计者是意大利建筑师乔瓦尼·巴蒂斯塔·巴斯莱（Giovanni Battista Basile）。建筑采用新古典主义风格，其外观雄伟壮观，特别是其巨大的穹顶和丰富的装饰性雕刻，使其成为巴勒莫市的标志性建筑之一。马西莫剧院内部同样壮丽，拥有一个巨大的观众大厅，装饰着华丽的大理石、金箔和精美的壁画。大厅设计成马蹄形，可容纳近1,400名观众。其舞台是当时世界上较大的舞台之一，非常适合大型歌剧和芭蕾舞表演。马西莫剧院因其在电影《教父3》中的露面而在国际上更加知名。

attractions.text_en: Authentic specialty snacks, a market of colorful hues, noisy and bustling crowds; all kinds of spices, nuts, seafood, and enthusiastic vendors shout loudly in the market, inviting you to taste their products.
attractions.text_zh: 地道的特色小吃，色彩斑斓的集市、喧闹忙碌的人群，各种香料、坚果、海鲜、热情的摊贩在市场上大声喊叫，邀请您品尝他们的产品。

attractions.name_en: Church of Santa Maria dell'Ammiraglio (La Martorana)
attractions.text_en: Piazza Bellini and the Church of Santa Maria dell'Ammiraglio, as a UNESCO World Heritage Site, blend Byzantine, Arab, and Baroque architectural styles together with gorgeous Rococo decoration into one, a delight to behold.
attractions.text_zh: 贝里尼广场和海军元帅圣母教堂，作为联合国教科文组织世界遗产，它融合了 拜占庭、阿拉伯、巴洛克的 建筑风格和华丽洛可可装饰为一体，令人赏心悦目。

overview.text_zh:
上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，届时、将由法兰西国家馆讲解师，精选主题深度讲解；
下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛，埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店。

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris Hotel or Novotel Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
Mercure or Novotel Paris is a comfortable four-star hotel under the Accor group. Located near a large shopping mall, it makes dining and shopping convenient for guests. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers a comfortable stay experience, rooted in its distinctive brand traits: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a unique hotel style deeply infused with local character, and a warm, hospitable management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店。
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型四星酒店，酒店位于大型商超附近，方便客人有餐购物，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
Take a Seine river cruise and feel the tenderness and romance of Paris
Board the famous "Bateaux Mouches" cruise with its transparent cabins and sail along the Seine, which weaves together many sights. The roughly 1-hour, 3.2-km voyage passes Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Elysees, the Ile de la Cite and other famous sights. On the surface of the Seine you can take in the romantic nightscape of Paris, the beautiful views and wonderful music. It is hailed as "the in-depth tour of Paris not to be missed."
highlights.text_zh:
乘塞纳河游船，感受巴黎的温柔与浪漫
乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

attractions.text_en: If the Louvre witnessed the glory of the Gauls, then the Ile de la Cite, Notre-Dame de Paris and the Paris City Hall record the inseparable bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Ile de la Cite. Without the Ile de la Cite, there would be no Paris as it is today.
attractions.text_zh: 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: Notre-Dame Cathedral sits on the Ile de la Cite in the center of Paris and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The church is Gothic in style, and visitors can climb the towers; although you won't meet the "Hunchback of Notre-Dame," you can see the 17th-century great bell, get close to the mythical beasts on the exterior walls of the church, and look out over the beautiful scenery of the Ile de la Cite and the Seine.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西岱岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，游客可以登上塔楼参观，虽然遇不到“钟楼怪人”，但却能看到17世纪的大钟、近距离接触教堂外壁上的神兽、俯瞰西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。

attractions.text_en: One of the oldest museums in the world, it is a world-renowned treasure house of art. The Louvre building is in a "U" shape, divided into a new part and an old part. The glass pyramid entrance in front of the Louvre was designed by the Chinese-American master architect I.M. Pei. It houses more than 400,000 works of art, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, spanning ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria, Rome, medieval Europe and the arts of various Eastern nations. It can be called an outstanding palace of art in human history. The itinerary includes the standard individual-visitor ticket (no Chinese audio guide).
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品、其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。 行程包含普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。

attractions.text_en:
The Champ de Mars is a large strip park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, lying between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the Ecole Militaire (Paris Military School) to its southeast.
Until the second half of the 18th century it was an abandoned open ground. It was not until the Military School was established in 1765 that its status gradually rose; at that time its main purpose was to serve as a place for military training. On 17 July 1791, during the French Revolution, a massacre and bloodshed took place here. Later, France used this site to host several World's Fairs as well as the 1900 Olympic Games.
attractions.text_zh:
战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。
在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次的世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the emblem of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en: Board the famous "Bateaux Mouches" cruise with its transparent cabins and sail along the Seine, which weaves together many sights. The roughly 1-hour, 3.2-km voyage passes Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Elysees, the Ile de la Cite and other famous sights. On the surface of the Seine you can take in the romantic nightscape of Paris, the beautiful views and wonderful music. It is hailed as "the in-depth tour of Paris not to be missed."
attractions.text_zh: 乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the fashion heart of Paris, Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, to visit at leisure the Paris Opera (exterior), Printemps department store, Galeries Lafayette and other fashion districts.
In the afternoon, head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris and tour the palace; after the tour, return to central Paris and transfer back to the hotel
Overnight: Mercure Paris Hotel or Novotel Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货，巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。
下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫；游览后返回巴黎市区送回酒店
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris Hotel or Novotel Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Mercure or Novotel Paris is a comfortable four-star hotel under the Accor group. Located near a large shopping mall, it makes dining and shopping convenient for guests. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers a comfortable stay experience, rooted in its distinctive brand traits: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a unique hotel style deeply infused with local character, and a warm, hospitable management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型四星酒店，酒店位于大型商超附近，方便客人有餐购物，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
Boulevard Haussmann in Paris
Boulevard Haussmann is the core area of Paris, home to magnificent Haussmann-style architecture and a bustling commercial atmosphere, as well as a rich artistic ambiance. Galeries Lafayette and Printemps, the Paris Opera, the Hotel de la Paix, the Louvre pyramid, the Rue Sainte-Anne gourmet district. Here you can stroll and feel the commercial vibe of Paris; wandering along Boulevard Haussmann, you can enjoy the delights of fine food, art and shopping.
highlights.text_zh:
巴黎奥斯曼大街
奥斯曼大街是巴黎的核心区域，这里有华丽的奥斯曼建筑群和繁华的商业氛围，以及浓郁艺术气息，老佛爷及巴黎春天，巴黎歌剧院，和平酒店、罗浮宫金字塔，圣安娜美食区，在这里可以漫步感受巴黎的商业气息，穿行在奥斯曼大街上，享受美食艺术和购物的欣喜。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument to the era of French feudal rule. In terms of content it was not only the French court but also the administrative center of the state, and a concrete embodiment of the social and political views and way of life of France at the time. It represents the power of the absolutist regime able to concentrate such enormous human, material and financial resources, unmatched in Europe since the ancient Roman Empire. At that time, in order to build it, Louis XIV mobilized more than 30,000 workers, architects, engineers and technicians; in addition to solving the complex technical problems arising from constructing a large-scale building complex, they also had to solve issues such as water supply and roads. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully demonstrates the economic and technological progress of France at the time and the wisdom of its working people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann lies between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are two major department stores, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, the author of "In Search of Lost Time," completed most of the writing of that work in his residence at No. 102 on this street.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en: The Paris Opera was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861. Its architecture perfectly combines several styles such as the ancient Greco-Roman colonnade and the Baroque; grand in scale, exquisitely detailed and resplendent, it is praised as a theater where painting, marble and gilding shine in concert, offering great enjoyment. It is one of the typical buildings of the Napoleon III era.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎歌剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受。是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for Geneva, the capital of the French-speaking region of Switzerland. After arrival, tour the old town of Geneva, the Lake Geneva area, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau (Grand Fountain), and explore the "Flower Bridge" area where various local delicacies and specialty shops of Geneva gather. Then check in at the Novotel Geneva Centre Annemasse Hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Geneva Centre Annemasse Hotel or Crowne Plaza Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦，到达后游览日内瓦老城，日内瓦湖区，花钟和大喷泉景点，游览云集日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店“花桥”区域。随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店。
夜宿：安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Novotel Geneva Centre Annemasse Hotel or Crowne Plaza Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Novotel hotel opened in 2020 and is a comfortable business hotel under the Accor group, with decor in harmony with its natural surroundings. Inspired by innovative New York hotel concepts, it includes a cafe and bakery area open to hotel guests and the public. The hotel has a restaurant serving healthy seasonal cuisine. At the Rooftop 46 bar on the 8th floor of the hotel, overlook the Alps and the Jura Mountains and enjoy happy hour.
accommodation.text_zh:
安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店
诺富特酒店于2020年开业，是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店的装饰与其自然环境相协调。受到纽约创新酒店概念的启发，它包括一个向酒店客人和公众开放的咖啡厅和面包店区。酒店设有一间餐厅，提供健康的时令美食。在酒店8 层的 Rooftop 46 酒吧俯瞰阿尔卑斯山和侏罗山脉，享受快乐时光。

highlights.text_en:
The old town of Geneva
The upper town on the shore of Lake Geneva, with the picturesque Lake Geneva and the majestic Alps, forms a poetic pastoral landscape. The beautiful scenery of the two countries' borders changes and interweaves continuously along Lake Geneva, with Evian and Annemasse in France on one side and the old town of Geneva on the other. The entire lake region is listed as a World Heritage Site, with one human heritage site after another and remarkably well-preserved medieval towns; the roads are inlaid with stone slabs, and each small town and city has several fountains. Traditional houses and modern, novel shops weave together one exquisite and wondrous experience after another.
highlights.text_zh:
日内瓦古城区
日内瓦湖畔的上城区，风光旖旎的日内瓦湖和雄伟的阿尔卑斯山，构成的诗意田园风光，两国国境秀丽风景沿日内瓦湖不断变化交错、一边是法国依云安娜玛斯一边是日内瓦的旧城，整个湖区被列为世界遗产，一座又一座的人类遗产以及保护得十分完好的中世纪小城，路上镶嵌着一块块的石板，每个小镇、小城都就有多处喷泉。传统的房屋建筑和摩登新颖的店家，交织成一处处美轮美奂的奇妙体验。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Leman, straddles Switzerland and France. It is an important lake in Western Europe and also a famous scenic and health-resort area. During the day you can take a cruise to tour Lake Geneva, and at night be enchanted by the twinkling neon lights along the shore; luxury cruise ships often hold concerts or balls on the lake. You can take a boat to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shores of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, snowy mountains and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Jet d'Eau (Grand Fountain) is located on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden and is one of the more representative sights of Geneva. The Grand Fountain is like a column of water spouted by a whale, 140 meters high with a flow of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away in the city center. At night there is also a chance to see the Grand Fountain illuminated by lights, which is even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦比较具有代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous attraction in Geneva. Switzerland is known as the "Garden Country" and at the same time the "Land of Watches," and what is even more wonderful is that Switzerland's skilled craftsmen have ingeniously combined the beauty of flowers with the craft of watchmaking, creating the "Flower Clock" with great originality.
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称“花园之国”，同时又是“钟表之乡”，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了“花钟”。

attractions.text_en: The upper town on the hillside on the right bank of the Rhone is also called the upper city by local residents because of its relatively high terrain. It is not only a gathering place of churches and historic sites; among the winding alleys there are also many small and charming antique shops, and the former residence of Rousseau, the thinker of the European Enlightenment, is also located in the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Interlaken, located in the center between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun, which are known as "God's left eye and right eye." You may tour at leisure the Hoheweg, the Hohematte, the tranquil village dotted among mountains and waters amid green trees, where people and nature blend as one; or take the coach to the Jungfrau region attractions such as Grindelwald and Wilderswil; or, at your own expense, take the panoramic cable car to the summit of the Jungfrau - the Top of Europe, the highest railway station in Europe - and go to the "Sphinx Observation Deck" and the Aletsch Glacier; or, at your own expense, go to First, the Swiss alpine adventure town, to tour the First Cliff Walk.
Overnight: Sigriswil Snow-Mountain Lake-View Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往有“上帝左眼与右眼”之称的布里恩茨湖和图恩湖中央的因特拉肯，可自由游览何维克街，荷黑马特，宁静的村庄，绿树掩映，点缀在山水之间，人与自然浑然一体；或者随车前往格林德尔瓦尔德及维尔德斯维尔等少女峰山区景点，或者自费乘坐全景缆车登顶少女峰——Top of Europe欧洲较高的火车站，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”及阿莱奇冰川；或者自费前往瑞士高山探险小镇菲斯特，游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道。
夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Sigriswil Snow-Mountain Lake-View Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in a mountain ravine beside the panoramic bridge of Sigriswil. All guest rooms are decorated in an elegant Swiss country style, and the hotel's views satisfy every imagination of Switzerland: rooms enjoy views of Lake Thun, the surrounding mountains, or the village of Sigriswil. Sitting in the hotel restaurant gazing into the distance at the emerald waters of Lake Thun, with the snowy mountains tranquilly reflected, it feels like being in a painting, letting you fully appreciate the idyllic, paradise-like beauty of Switzerland.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于锡格里斯维尔（Sigriswil）全景桥旁边的山涧，所有的客房装饰为瑞士乡村典雅风格，酒店景观满足对瑞士的想象，客房客房享有图恩湖或周围群山或锡格里斯维尔村景致。坐在酒店的餐厅远眺碧绿的图恩湖水，宁静地倒影的雪山，恍然如画中，让人尽情欣赏瑞士世外桃源般的美好景致。

highlights.text_en:
The Jungfrau region
As a famous representative tourist destination of Switzerland, the Jungfrau is not a single snow-capped mountain but a series of different Swiss landscapes around the Jungfrau and Interlaken, encompassing many different snow-mountain experiences, which together create the wonderful and rich scenic areas of the Swiss Jungfrau, First, Grindelwald and other attractions. The Jungfrau summit scenic cable car lets you experience all kinds of different sensations. First's sky-adventure park, as the ancestor of sky-adventure-type tourism projects, and the high-altitude paragliding not only adorn the snowy mountains but also bring many thrilling activities to the younger crowd.
highlights.text_zh:
少女峰地区
作为瑞士著名的代表性旅游胜地，少女峰不是座雪山，而是围绕着少女峰、因特拉肯的一系列不同的瑞士风景组合，包含多种不同的雪山体验，成就了精彩而丰富的瑞士少女峰 、菲斯特，格兰维尔德等景点旅游景区。 少女峰登顶景观缆车，可以感受各种不同的体验。菲斯特空天冒险乐园，作为空天探险类旅游项目的始祖，而高空滑翔伞不仅仅装饰了雪山，还给年轻群体带来了许多的刺激活动。

attractions.text_en: The Hohematte is the green square in the center of Interlaken, the famous Swiss sightseeing town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery, and now any construction on it is prohibited to prevent damage to this beautiful landscape. It is a great place to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast green space there are fountains and many benches dotted about, so it is also a good place for strolling. The Hohematte is also the landing site for paragliders; there is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, where, after paying, staff will take visitors to the nearby mountains for free-flight gliding, allowing you to enjoy the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald, located at the northern foot of the Eiger, is a famous postcard photography spot of the Swiss "dream slope" that photographers love dearly, and is also the Alpine town you must pass through to tour the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen and others, it forms one of the more magnificent and beautiful scenic lines of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking lovers; the lakeside, green grass, waterfalls, dairy cows and snowy mountains together make up this enchanting town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头较为喜爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald First attracts visitors from all directions to admire the magnificent scenery of the north face of the Eiger. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk, anyone will immediately feel as if they are standing at the top of the world. The First Cliff Walk is located at the summit of First and offers a unique panoramic view of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located some 20 to 30 kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow all year round, while at the foot of the mountain it is lush and green with beautiful scenery, making it a famous sightseeing and outdoor-sports resort in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the small town of Lungern, touring Lake Lungern and the town's scenery. Then head to Lucerne, touring the lakes and mountains of Lake Lucerne, listening to the Lion Monument recount that period of history of the Swiss people's loyalty and steadfastness, as well as the Chapel Bridge, the octagonal water tower and other sights. Then head to Zurich.
Overnight: Zurich Limmattal Harry's Home Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。之后前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点。之后前往苏黎世。
夜宿：苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Zurich Limmattal Harry's Home Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is set in the scenic heart of Limmattal, a modern urban residence right next to Switzerland's larger shopping center. The hotel has a bar; the rooms are spacious and tidy, with beautiful parquet floors and modern furniture, large wardrobes, and many small ideas to make life easier. The hotel offers various buffet or continental breakfasts. The lush valleys, rolling hills and the winding Limmat River around the hotel provide you with a comfortable, natural stay experience.
accommodation.text_zh:
苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在风景秀丽的利马塔尔中心地带，现代化的城市住宅，紧邻瑞士较大的购物中心，酒店配备酒吧，客房宽敞整洁，拥有漂亮的镶木地板和现代家具、大衣柜和许多让生活更轻松的小创意。酒店提供各类自助或欧陆式早餐。酒店周边绿意盎然的山谷、连绵起伏的丘陵和蜿蜒的利马特河，为您提供舒适自然的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
The town of Lungern beneath the snowy mountains
As the filming location of the grand-finale happy ending of "Crash Landing on You," where the male and female leads spent "the two happiest weeks of the year," this sickly-sweet idyll of the protagonists, the transcendent beauty of Lake Lungern, seems tailor-made for the show. The lakes and mountains like an earthly paradise, the filter-free beauty of Lake Lungern - if there is a paradise on earth, it must be in Lungern; serene, peaceful days are nothing more than this.
highlights.text_zh:
雪山下的龙疆小镇
作为“爱的迫降”大团圆结局的取景地，剧中男女主角“一年中幸福的两周”都在这里度过，主角甜到齁的世外桃源，超然于世的龙疆湖美景，就像是为该剧量身定做的。人间天堂般的湖光山色，无滤镜的龙疆湖美景，如果有世外桃源，那一定在龙疆，岁月静好也不过如此。

attractions.text_en: Situated between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous Golden Pass Express passes through here. Surrounded by mountains and lush green grass, with the rustic village scattered along the shore of Lake Lungern, it is just like a paradise far from the hustle and bustle.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en:
Lake Lucerne
This lake has a winding, zigzag shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms the classic "lake-and-mountain" scenery that attracts large numbers of tourists. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and this piece thus acquired the title "Moonlight" - although this was not Beethoven's original intent.
attractions.text_zh:
卢塞恩湖
这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled between mountains and water, Lucerne possesses the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance halls and mansions, as well as century-old shops, long streets and ancient lanes are everywhere. The lakes and mountains of Lake Lucerne reflect the beauty of the city as if real and illusory at once, making it an extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful towns. Since the 19th century, it has attracted many princes, nobles and men of letters to visit and reside, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: This dying lion sculpture was carved into the natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This 10-meter-long, more than 3-meter-high lion lies painfully on the ground, a broken spear stuck in its shoulder, with a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms beside it. The sculpture was made to commemorate the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died on 10 August 1792 protecting the safety of the family of Louis XVI in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; below the statue is text describing the course of this event. In those years, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, forced by livelihood, went to various European countries to serve as mercenaries one after another. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave in battle, but honor and money could not conceal the cruelty of the mercenary system; after this incident, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, keeping only the guard serving the Catholic Holy See, which is the famous Swiss Guard. Owing to their famous loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, tour the old town of Zurich: Grossmunster (Zurich Cathedral) (exterior), Lake Zurich, Bahnhofstrasse. Then set off for Milan, the fashion capital. After arrival, visit at leisure Milan's landmark building, Milan Cathedral (exterior), and one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II.
Overnight: Royal Garden Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，游览苏黎世老城景点：苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街。之后出发前往时尚之都-米兰，到达后自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。
夜宿：皇家花园酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Royal Garden Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Set in a lush garden with fountains, palm trees and olive trees, the hotel blends classic elegance with modern style, making it a delightful and relaxing urban resort. From the hotel you can walk to a nearby large shopping center; the hotel's rooms are spacious and elegant, with large marble bathrooms with bathtubs, and the buffet breakfast is rich and varied. The Captain's Bar serves drinks and snacks all day, and the hotel has the glass-domed Blue Crab Grill restaurant serving international cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
皇家花园酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在郁郁葱葱的花园中，花园内有喷泉、棕榈树和橄榄树，将经典优雅与现代风格融为一体，是一处令人愉悦而轻松的城市度假胜地。酒店可步行至附近的大型商业中心；酒店的客房宽敞而优雅，设有带浴缸的大型大理石浴室，自助早餐丰盛多样，Captain's Bar 全天供应饮料和小吃，酒店设有玻璃圆顶的 Blue Crab Grill 餐厅，供应国际美食。

highlights.text_en:
Behold Milan Cathedral, which took 500 years to build and is famed worldwide for its many exquisite carvings and Gothic spires
Begun in 1386, it is a landmark building in the center of Milan. The main body of the cathedral took more than 4 centuries before it was basically completed in 1812, while the detail work continued until the installation of a bronze door of the cathedral was completed in 1960. The years have not only endowed it with the vicissitudes of history but have also created multiple styles for it: Gothic spires paired with Baroque-style carvings, lavish in the extreme from top to bottom.
highlights.text_zh:
瞻仰历经500年建成，以众多精美的雕刻和哥特式的塔尖而闻名于世的米兰大教堂
始建于1386年，是米兰市中心的标志性建筑。教堂主体历经4个多世纪才于1812年基本完工，而细节工程则一直持续到1960年安装完成教堂的一扇铜门为止。岁月不仅赋予了它历史的沧桑，同时也为它营造出多重的风格样式，哥特式的尖塔搭配巴洛克风格的雕饰，自上而下，极尽奢华。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long; the lakeside piers are filled with all kinds of yachts, just like a club for the rich. One end of Lake Zurich extends deep into the city center, and on the lake white swans and wild ducks are everywhere, leisurely and carefree, a scene of harmony. The north shore of Lake Zurich is the residential area of the rich, known as the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." At the end of Bahnhofstrasse lies Lake Zurich; as a "world's most livable city," the lives of true Zurich residents are everywhere imbued with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also called Station Street) is one of Europe's longer shopping avenues and one of the most expensive shopping avenues in the world. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless center of Zurich; it is lined with luxury brands from all over the world, and private banks abound. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless tourists feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet is stored an amount of gold bars said to be among the highest in the world, which makes many people so excited they can hardly tear themselves away; immersed in it, you can clearly feel wealth, luxury and indolence permeating the air.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: The Grossmunster is one of the 3 main churches of Zurich, Switzerland (the other two are the Fraumunster and another church). The church is located near the bank of the Limmat River; construction began around 1100 and it was inaugurated around 1220. This church, facing the Fraumunster across the river, played a pivotal role in the Swiss Reformation of the 16th century; the theological faculty of the University of Zurich and the Reformation Museum are both established here. The stained-glass windows inside the church are a masterpiece of the modern Swiss art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, although most of the tourists who come here come for sightseeing. Under the central arcade is a Prada boutique whose scale and window display are among the very best in Milan; in particular, its window displays are updated every day, and just standing outside the windows admiring them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Emanuele is full of upscale restaurants, cafes and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete; it is hailed as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, with hundreds of spires soaring into the clouds and thousands of statues carved on its white marble exterior walls. The interior space is vast; sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, the light hazy, full of a solemn religious atmosphere. The crypt of the cathedral also preserves the remains of the Church of St. Thecla that stood on the original site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for the water city of Venice. After arrival, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings built upon the water, together with the winding water alleys, make the romantic charm of Venice linger long. Here you can also taste Venice's specialty grand meal, the three-course cuttlefish-ink pasta (at your own expense).
Overnight: voco Venice (InterContinental) Hotel or Hilton Ambassador Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往水城威尼斯，到达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝到威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
voco Venice (InterContinental) Hotel or Hilton Ambassador Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels, with an excellent location, stylish modern design, natural-toned rooms and modern interiors that offer you a comfortable and warm stay experience. The hotel offers a rich breakfast, a well-equipped gym, a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails, and the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian cuisine and fine dishes.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en:
The most beautiful Venice in the world, the "Pearl of the Adriatic" still dazzling and resplendent
As one of the major centers of the Renaissance, Venice is composed of 118 small islands, linked together by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands" and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the world's most beautiful squares, "St. Mark's Square," the beautiful Grand Canal, the Phoenix Opera House reborn from fire, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs written of by Xu Zhimo, breathtakingly beautiful arcades; this is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting, and also the filming location of many film scenes. Her unique temperament leaves everyone who visits enchanted and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Abbreviated as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once a large church of medieval Europe and is a classic work of Venetian architectural art; it is at the same time a treasure house collecting a wealth of works of art.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco, where all the past glory of Venice resides. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like but also medieval weapons; on the way to the dungeon you walk across the Bridge of Sighs, and you can look outside through a small opening, rather than like the many people on the opposite bridge looking over at you on the Bridge of Sighs. You can take photos inside, as long as you don't use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was the route by which the court escorted condemned prisoners to prison in ancient times. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered above by a vault and very tightly enclosed, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, serious offenders were taken to the dungeon; passing across this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small window, losing their freedom from then on, and involuntarily letting out sighs. It is said that if lovers kiss beneath the bridge they can stay together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe" by Napoleon. The square is surrounded on three sides by magnificent palaces, and to the east stand the tall campanile and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the public activity center of Venice's politics, religion and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for the birthplace of the Renaissance - Florence, and tour the old town of Florence: the world's third-largest cathedral - Santa Maria del Fiore (the Florence Cathedral), the Piazza della Signoria, the Old Bridge, the Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), then check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观佛罗伦萨老城景点：世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥、圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后入住酒店。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Hilton Florence Metropole Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Hilton Florence is a modern hotel offering a Tuscan-style experience, with an excellent location that allows you to reach Florence's commercial center and enjoy the bustle of Florence. From the terrace of the hotel's executive lounge you can admire the magnificent views of Florence. Each room is decorated in a warm modern style; the wooden floors and spacious marble bathrooms provide a high degree of comfort.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店
佛罗伦萨希尔顿酒店是一家体验托斯卡纳风格的现代化酒店，地理位置优越，可前往佛罗伦萨商业中心，享受佛罗伦萨的繁华。酒店行政酒廊的露台上可欣赏到佛罗伦萨的壮丽景色。每间客房均采用温馨的现代风格装饰；木地板和宽敞的大理石浴室可获得较大的舒适度。

highlights.text_en:
The glory and splendor of Florence, the shining starlight of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world's art capital and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Amid blue skies and white clouds, brightly colored walls, dark green shutters and deep red rooftops, search for the soul of the Renaissance; in the streets and alleys, squares and churches, museums and galleries, feel that the Renaissance never grows old. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic spirit of Dante Alighieri and the painting spirit of Leonardo da Vinci still drift over the skies of Florence, still continuing to seek out the people and events of the European Renaissance era....."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利．但丁的诗魂、达．芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.name_en: Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few churches can be so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, vividly interprets the classicism, elegance and freedom esteemed in the Renaissance era; no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earlier large-span circular-arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the young Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over the centuries, it has stood unyielding through the floods, social upheavals and wars it has experienced. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian notables such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring in detail. Around the square are several cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract large audiences. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off to tour the Cinque Terre, traveling along the Ligurian coastline to visit the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs; in the afternoon, head to Pisa to tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli at the historical and cultural center of Pisa, then head to Siena to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sheraton Siena Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: If the Cinque Terre cannot be visited due to factors such as bad weather or a railway company strike, the itinerary will automatically be changed to touring the coastal cities by coach or in another form.
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。
夜宿：锡耶纳喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Four Points by Sheraton Siena Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located on a quiet hilltop, surrounded by olive trees and gardens, with beautiful surroundings ideal for getting close to nature. The rooms are fitted with comfortable wooden floors, bright in design and elegantly furnished with stylish interiors; at the same time the hotel has an exquisite restaurant serving classic Italian, local and Tuscan cuisine at dinner. The hotel's outdoor pool, fitness center and sauna all provide you with an even more relaxing stay experience.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，环境优美且适合亲近自然。客房铺设舒适的木质地板，设计明亮，摆设美观的时尚内装，同时酒店配有精致的餐厅，在晚餐时段供应经典的意大利、当地和托斯卡纳美食。酒店的室外泳池、健身中心以及桑拿浴室都为您提供更加放松的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a paradise on the cliffs
Along the long coastline of the Mediterranean, the little train stops at each beautiful fishing village. Watching the sun-bathed beaches, the waves quietly lapping the rocks, the colorful houses growing closer from afar, the curiosity to gaze upon the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak at the moment of arrival; hiking through the alleys of the fishing villages, the closer you walk the more delightful surprises. It is like carefully savoring a visual feast of five-colored delicacies, tasting each flavor little by little; this scene is so beautiful it makes the heart flutter.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线小火车在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy. Built along the winding Mediterranean coastline, it is the collective name for the five cliffside villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking route that strings the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the world's most beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers, requiring around 5 hours, with the Mediterranean on one side, the mountains on the other, and Italian fishing villages ahead - a destination that many hiking lovers flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of Pisa, Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy. It is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, selected by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. It is said that in 1590 AD, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment from the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa; on the square there are four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Cemetery (Camposanto). Around the square the ancient city walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off for the old town of Siena, touring Siena Cathedral (exterior), the Piazza del Campo, Siena City Hall (exterior), the Torre del Mangia (exterior) and other sights. Then head to the old town of Pienza to visit the Piazza Pio II, the Pienza Cathedral (exterior) and other sights, then head to Rome, taking photos at leisure along the cypress lane on the way, and after arriving in Rome check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Sheraton Golf) or Mantegna Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），游览田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。之后前往皮恩扎古城参观游览二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点，之后前往罗马，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后入住酒店。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel (Sheraton Golf) or Mantegna Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor swimming pool. The hotel has a cutting-edge architectural style and modern interior design; the rooms are furnished with modern or classical decor, and all rooms enjoy views of the garden, swimming pool or golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants offering exquisite international-flavor dishes and traditional Italian cuisine; the hotel environment is tranquil, easily satisfying your diverse needs, all of which make it an ideal choice for relaxing body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The idyllic scenery of the Val d'Orcia and the medieval old town of Pienza
Close your eyes and you will imagine the classic scenery of Tuscany - blue skies and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypresses and grapevines, and finally wheat fields - this is the perfect portrayal of the Val d'Orcia. From the walls of the old town of Pienza, look out over the scenery of the World Heritage Site - "Val d'Orcia."
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old town is full of masterpieces of the great artists and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing flagstone alleys and the deep, hidden courtyards everywhere, you seem to find yourself in medieval Europe of a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. Over the centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time had stood still here since the 14th century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of sweets. On your trip to Siena, do not forget to taste the local specialties - the almond soft biscuit ricciarelli, the nut tart panforte, the peppery spiced nut cake pan pepato, the rice pudding budini di riso, the walnut biscuit cavallucci, or the walnut wafer copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: The Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the larger surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly opposite the square are Siena's City Hall and tower; inside the City Hall is the Civic Museum, which houses many paintings of the Sienese school, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government."
