The full name of the tower is the Torre del Mangia; it is Siena's tallest building and Italy's second-tallest tower, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of steps to take in the beautiful views of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳较高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: The City Hall that forms the base of the square is a glorious example of Siena's Gothic architecture. Inside the City Hall, the Museo Civico holds exquisite frescoes. The 102-meter-high Torre del Mangia, built in 1297, towers high above the square. The City Hall was begun at the end of the 13th century, originally serving as the office of the republican government. The lower part of this building is of stone and the upper part of brick; the facade curves slightly, with neat eye-like openings evenly distributed across it. The middle of the City Hall's facade has two stories of Gothic pointed-arch three-light windows, and on both sides and the top of the second story are arranged Lombard-style blind arches. The City Hall is now the location of the Civic Museum, which displays many paintings and sculptures related to the city's history, including the famous series of frescoes "Good Government, Bad Government" in the museum's Hall of the Nine (La Sala dei Nove).
attractions.text_zh: 构成广场基础的市政厅是锡耶纳哥特式建筑辉煌的范例。市政厅内的MuseoCivico藏有精美的壁画。102米高的TorredelMangia塔建于1297年，高高耸立在广场的上方。市政厅始建于13世纪末，原是作为共和政府的办公场所。这座建筑物下层是石造，上层是砖造，立面稍微弯曲，上面均匀分步着整齐的眼洞。市政厅的立面中部有两层哥特式的尖拱三孔窗户，二层两边和顶部都排列着伦巴第风格的盲拱。市政厅现在是市立博物馆的所在地，里面展示着许多与城市历史相关的绘画和雕塑，其中包括博物馆的九人会议厅(LaSaladeiNove)中的著名的系列壁画《好政府，坏政府》。

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a small town on the hills of the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. The Pienza he oversaw rebuilding in 1459 is regarded as a model of the "ideal city" and is therefore hailed as a "touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, Pienza's uniqueness lies in being able to overlook from the city walls the scenery of the World Heritage Site - "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped bends and neatly arranged cypresses, has become one of the symbols of the pastoral scenery of Tuscany. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows under the sunshine, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and check in.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its picture-perfect postcard scenery and hill towns; it is a unique convergence of art and nature, holding rich historical imprints, and its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the concept of "good government" of the Italian city-states.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, led by the guide, tour on foot the world-famous historical and cultural city of Rome. This is the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, called the "Eternal City" for its long history. Visit the Colosseum (exterior) standing on the ruins of the ancient Roman capital, the Pantheon (exterior), and tour the Spanish Steps (Piazza di Spagna) and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Afterwards there is free time, and then this pleasant journey comes to an end!
Note: Due to the heritage protection of the ancient city of Rome, vehicles are prohibited from driving, and most areas are pedestrian zones; since all the attractions in the Rome city area are within the ancient city of Rome, you tour Rome on foot that day, with a walking distance of about 5-6 kilometers.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，在导游的带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。后自由活动，之后结束愉快旅程！
备注： 由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，而罗马市区内的所有景点都在古罗马城内，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth exploration of Rome, an important cradle of world culture
Among the ancient ruins that occupy about half the city area, seek out the historical civilization deposited over thousands of years. Whether the world-famous architectural ruins composed of the Imperial Senate, triumphal arches, commemorative columns, the Pantheon and the Colosseum, or the many exquisite Renaissance buildings and art treasures held in over a hundred museums, or even the many fountains of myriad forms throughout the city, represented by the Trevi Fountain, as well as the vast public buildings such as roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares and public baths, all freeze art at a wonderful moment. Someone said "architecture is flowing music"; then the architecture of ancient Rome plays a vigorous and timeless movement.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的就是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum in the center of Rome was built by the ancient Romans at the time to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great ancient Roman Empire. It was the place where ancient Roman slave owners, nobles and freemen specially watched beast fights or gladiatorial combats of slaves, and is one of Rome's most famous historical relics. The Colosseum can be called a model masterpiece and marvel in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for being huge, majestic and magnificent. Although only most of the skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and imposing momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马较著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved ancient Roman building, with a history of more than 2,000 years; the artist Raphael, the Roman king (king of Italy) Vittorio Emanuele II, Umberto I and others rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, the son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period and a model of the exquisite construction techniques of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday" and became a calling card of Rome that everyone knows. Hepburn's fresh and lovely figure seems to have merged into one with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. The Spanish Square itself is not large; the crowds gather mainly near the Spanish Steps. The Steps have 138 steps in all and are the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the sea god Neptune of Roman mythology returning victorious; the whole is imposing in momentum and grand in scale. It is said that if you stand with your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, if it lands in the water, your dream can come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

attractions.text_en: Iceland's Blue Lagoon geothermal spa sits in one of the regions of the earth with the most frequent underground magmatic activity, and this activity heats the Blue Lagoon, causing the water to steam. The temperature of the lagoon area where you bathe and swim in the Blue Lagoon averages around 40 °C, and the water is rich in minerals. After soaking in the Blue Lagoon you usually feel your skin tighten all over, and that is because silica has skin-care properties. In winter, the surroundings are a world of ice and snow, while steam rises from the lagoon, and the boundless solidified lava is covered with moss, as if the earth were laid with a soft carpet. Even in the winter season when snowflakes drift down, the surface of the lake is still filled with steam, like smoke or mist. Immersed in it, you feel as if you are sinking into a hazy world.
attractions.text_zh: 冰岛蓝湖地热温泉所在地是地球上地下岩浆活动频繁的区域之一，这种活动加热了蓝湖，使得水体蒸腾。蓝湖洗浴和游泳的礁湖地区水温平均在40 ℃左右，水体有丰富矿物质，通常在蓝湖泡完温泉后会感到全身皮肤紧绷，那是因为硅有护肤之功效。冬天，四周一片冰天雪地，而湖里冒着热气，一望无际的火山融岩上长满苔藓植物，像是大地铺上一层软软的地毯。即使在雪花飘飞的冬季，湖面依旧热气弥漫，如烟似雾。融入其中，感觉仿佛沉浸在迷蒙世界里。

attractions.text_en: The national park is one of Iceland's most important historical sites. Þingvellir literally means "assembly plains"; the Icelandic parliament (Alþingi) was established here in 930 AD and continued to operate until 1798. Thingvellir was declared a national park in 1930. On 2 July 2004, Thingvellir National Park was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List. Thingvellir is also famous for its geological features. Here you can see the rift that runs through Iceland's land between the Eurasian Plate and the North American Plate. Because of the continuous drifting-apart movement of these two plates, the land between the plates keeps sinking, and here you can see the geological boundary between Europe and North America. Crustal movement causes this rift to keep tearing open and widening at a rate of several centimeters per year. The area around Thingvellir has frequent volcanic activity, with many newly formed lava fields, including some lava tunnels and volcanic caves. At Thingvellir National Park you can not only learn about Iceland's important historical site, but also explore the natural wonders that are everywhere here
attractions.text_zh: 国家公园是冰岛重要的历史遗址之一。Þingvellir字面意思为“议会平原”，冰岛议会（Alþingi）于公元930年在此成立，并一直持续运作直至1798年。辛格维利尔于1930年被宣布成为国家公园。2004年7月2日，辛格维利尔国家公园被录入联合国教科文组织世界文化遗产名录。辛格维利尔也因其地质特色而出名。在这里，您可以看到穿过冰岛陆地的欧亚板块和北美版块间的裂缝。因这两个板块的持续背离运动，板块间的土地不断下沉，您在这里可以看到欧洲和北美地质上的边界。地壳运动使得这条裂缝每年以数厘米的速度不断张裂扩大。辛格维利尔周边地区火山活动频繁，有许多新形成的熔岩原，包括一些熔岩隧道和火山岩洞。在辛格维利尔国家公园您不仅能了解冰岛重要的历史遗址，也能探索这里俯拾即是的自然奇景

attractions.text_en: The geothermal area around Geysir is a world-famous geothermal area. The English word for an intermittent spring, "geyser," originates from the Geysir intermittent spring here; the English word "Geyser" is derived from the Icelandic word "Geysir." Geysir is located in Iceland's Haukadalur valley, and this geothermal area covers about 3 square kilometers. Most of the geothermal springs are scattered over a strip of land 100 meters wide, flowing in one direction along the plate boundary line, from south to southwest. The Great Geysir has now not erupted for a long time, but its neighbor Strokkur is very active. Strokkur is currently the active geyser in Iceland. It erupts every few minutes, sometimes shooting a scalding column of steam and water up to 40 meters high, though the eruption height is generally between 10 and 20 meters. Each eruption lasts 1-2 minutes, with the water temperature reaching over 100 degrees. In this natural wonder, you can visit geothermal hot springs large and small, watch the geothermal water gush out from the ground, and breathe in the strong smell of sulfur in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 盖歇尔周围的地热区是举世闻名的地热区。英语中间歇泉一词源于这里的盖歇尔间歇泉，英文单词“Geyser”就是从冰岛语“Geysir”衍生而来。盖歇尔间歇泉坐落于冰岛Haukadalur山谷，这个地热区面积约3平方公里。大多数地热泉散布在100米宽的土地上，沿着板块交界线向一个方向流动，从南向西南。大盖歇尔间歇泉现在已久未喷发，但它的邻居史托克间歇泉（Strokkur）却十分活跃。史托克间歇泉是目前冰岛活跃的喷泉。它每隔几分钟喷发一次，有时滚烫的蒸汽水柱高达40米，不过一般喷发高度都在10-20米之间。每次喷发持续1-2分钟，水温高达100多度。在这片自然奇观中，您可以探访大大小小的地热温泉，欣赏地热水从地面喷涌而出，呼吸空气中浓烈的硫磺味。

attractions.text_en: Gullfoss is one of Iceland's well-known waterfalls and a natural sight that no visitor coming to Iceland should miss; its name comes from a free translation of the Icelandic name, "the golden waterfall." Gullfoss's water source, Lake Hvitarvatn, lies on the southeast side of the Langjokull glacier, which is Iceland's second-largest volcanic ice cap after the Vatnajokull glacier. Glacial meltwater pours from Langjokull into the White River (Hvita); the wide White River rushes south for about one kilometer, then turns sharply left and plunges down a broad "three-step staircase," then tilts down from two enormous steps into a deep 32-meter (105-foot) gorge, with the two drops being 11 meters and 22 meters deep respectively. The gorge crevice is about 20 meters wide and 2.5 kilometers long, facing the surging river water plunging straight down. For first-time visitors, because the view in the valley is limited, the waterfall may look as if it is plunging straight toward the center of the earth.
attractions.text_zh: 黄金瀑布是冰岛知名的瀑布之一，是每一个前来冰岛的游客都不能错过的自然景观，名字的由来源于冰岛语名称的意译“金色的瀑布”。黄金瀑布的水源Hvitarvatn湖位于朗格冰川（Langjokull）的东南侧，这是在冰岛仅次于瓦特纳冰川（Vatnajokull）第二大的火山冰盖。冰川水流从朗格冰川涌入白河（Hvita），宽阔的白河向南奔流大约一公里后，急转向左，冲下一个宽阔的“三级阶梯”，再从巨大的两个台阶上倾斜而下落入32米（105英尺）深的幽深峡谷中，两级落差分别达到11米和22米深。峡谷裂缝约20米宽，2.5公里长，正对着汹涌直下的河水。对于首次到访的人，由于山谷视野有限，瀑布可能看起来像是直冲向地心。

attractions.text_en: Seljalandsfoss is right by the roadside of Iceland's Route 1, about 60 meters high, and can be seen from far away on the road. The most striking feature of Seljalandsfoss is that there is a walkable passage behind the curtain of water, so it is also called the "Bridal Veil."
attractions.text_zh: 塞里雅兰瀑布就在 冰岛 一号公路的路边，高约60米，在路上远远就能看见。塞里雅兰瀑布显著的特色就是水幕后面有一条可以步行的通道 ，所以也被称为“新娘面纱”。

attractions.text_en: On 24 November 1973, a U.S. Navy aircraft (C-47) was forced to land on the black sand beach of Sólheimasandur in southern Iceland; the crew all survived, but the wreckage has remained here ever since. The broken plane wreckage and the boundless black sand beach make up a magnificent yet desolately beautiful scene. Justin Bieber also filmed the "I'll Show You" music video here, making this place a niche internet-famous spot in Iceland.
attractions.text_zh: 1973年11月24号，一架美国海军飞机(C-47)被迫降落于冰岛南部Sólheimasandur’s的黑沙滩上，机组人员全部生还，但残骸却一直留在了这里。残破的飞机残骸与一望无际的黑沙滩构成了壮丽而又凄美的景色。斯汀·比伯也在这里拍摄了《I’ll Show You》音乐MV，使该地成为冰岛的小众网红景点。

attractions.text_en: The otherworldly beauty of basalt black sand beaches is unique to Iceland, and the boundless Reynisfjara black sand beach is absolutely one of the most beautiful of them. The rolling white waves of the Atlantic and the jet-black volcanic sand and stone form a dreamlike contrast of colors, with the giant basalt columns standing amid the waves complementing the mysterious black sand beach. As early as 1991, National Geographic listed Reynisfjara as one of the non-tropical beaches worth visiting. Every summer, that is May to August, tens of thousands of puffins also come to nest in the Reynisfjara black sand beach area. The puffins' endearing, naive appearance is lovable, and visitors have the chance to admire their adorable poses up close, but you must remember not to try to touch them, nor to disturb their normal habitat or destroy their habitat. Fierce Arctic terns as well as birds such as fulmars and gulls also circle freely above Reynisfjara black sand beach. Many marine creatures also make Iceland their home, and seals, whales, and dolphins may suddenly appear amid the surging waves of the Atlantic.
attractions.text_zh: 玄武岩黑沙滩的异世之美为冰岛特有，一望无垠的雷尼斯黑沙滩绝对是其中美丽的一座。大西洋的滚滚白浪与黝黑火山砂石形成了梦幻般的色彩对比，于波涛中屹立的巨型玄武岩柱与神秘的黑沙滩相映成趣。早在1991年，《国家地理》就将雷尼斯黑沙滩列为值得游览的非热带沙滩之一。每年夏天，即5～8月，数以万计的海鹦还会来到雷尼斯黑沙滩地区栖居。海鹦憨态可掬的姿态惹人喜爱，游客有机会近距离观赏它们的萌姿，但一定要记得不要尝试去触摸它们，也不要打扰它们正常的栖息、破坏其栖息地。凶悍的北极燕鸥以及暴风鹱、海鸥等鸟类也会在雷尼斯黑沙滩的上空自由盘旋。许多海洋生物也以冰岛为家，海豹、鲸鱼、海豚就有可能在大西洋的惊涛中陡然现身。

attractions.text_en: The Reynisdrangar basalt stands amid the Atlantic Ocean and is the remains of ancient sea cliffs. It is a basalt sea stack formation below Mount Reynisfjall near the village of Vík í Mýrdal in southern Iceland. The rock columns stand proudly amid the waves, facing the cliff walls of Mount Reynisfjall, possessing a unique mysterious wildness and grandeur. Many films and American TV series have been shot here, including the hugely popular "Game of Thrones (A Song of Ice and Fire)." On one side of the coast are tall basalt-column cliffs, and below the cliffs the sea has hollowed out a peculiar basalt-column cave (Halsanefshellir). On the beach, huge basalt columns stand strikingly, having been formed into extremely unique columnar rocks after years of pounding and erosion by the sea. The neatly arranged basalt columns along the coast are like the pipe organ in a church, solemn and dignified. The gloomy weather, the solemn black sand beach, and the masterfully crafted basalt columns, together with the low-roaring white waves, give a kind of violent beauty on the verge of doomsday, making you can't help but wonder whether you have already arrived at the end of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 雷尼斯玄武岩矗立于大西洋中，是古时海崖的遗骸。是位于南部冰岛维克（VíkíMýrdal）村附近的雷尼斯山(Reynisfjall)下的玄武岩 海叠层。岩柱在海浪中傲然挺立，与雷尼斯山的岩壁相对而望，独有一份神秘的野性与壮美。许多电影与美剧都曾在此取景，其中就包括大热的《权力的游戏(冰与火之歌)》。海岸一侧则是高高的玄武岩石柱悬崖，悬崖下被海水掏空形成奇特的玄武岩柱洞穴(Halsanefshellir)。沙滩上赫然屹立着巨大的玄武岩石柱，经过海水多年的冲击、侵蚀，行成了极其独特的柱状岩石。海岸边整齐排列的玄武岩柱就像教堂里的管风琴一样，庄严肃穆。阴沉沉的天气，肃穆的黑沙滩和鬼斧神工的玄武岩柱，再加上低吼的白色海浪，有一种濒临末日的狂暴美感，让你不由自主的怀疑是否已经置身世界的尽头。

attractions.text_en: During the summer of each year, the ice cap glacier slowly melts and fills with glacial meltwater; the meltwater flows beneath the glacier, and in winter it scours and carves out new ice caves. The glacial meltwater passes through a glacier with 900 years of history, carving out the ever-changing natural ice caves that we get to admire, so the ice caves are never exactly the same each year, and everyone's ice-cave experience is unique. Every autumn, the local guides go searching for new ice caves in the area, and the structure and conditions of these ice caves differ from year to year. The guides need to consider safety and weather conditions to decide which ice cave each day's ice-cave tour will visit.
attractions.text_zh: 每年夏季的时刻，冰原冰川慢慢融化，充满冰川融水，融水在冰川下流过，冬季的时候冲蚀雕琢出新的冰洞，冰川融水穿过有着900年历史的冰川，雕琢出了我们观赏到的形态多变的天然冰洞，因此每年的冰洞都不会完全一样，每个人的冰洞体验都是独一无二的。每年秋天，当地向导就会从该地区寻找新的冰洞，这些冰洞的结构和条件在不同年份会有所不同。向导需要考虑安全性和天气条件，决定每一天的冰洞之旅要参观哪一个冰洞。

attractions.text_en: In "Game of Thrones," most of the scenes of the Wall and the lands beyond the Wall were filmed in Vatnajökull National Park. Plants such as angelica and beach pea grow densely, Arctic foxes roam here, landforms such as ice tongues and fjords crisscross, and traces left by ancient volcanic activity are everywhere. The most eye-catching scenery is the ice cap outside the polar regions of the world—the Vatnajökull ice cap. The Vatnajökull ice cap covers about 8% of Iceland's area, with an average ice thickness of 400 meters, reaching a thousand meters at its thickest. To the south of the Vatnajökull ice cap is the Hvannadalshnúkur volcano. The Vatnajökull ice cap has begun to melt in recent years, which may be related to climate change and volcanic activity.
attractions.text_zh: 《权力的游戏》中，绝境长城及长城以北的大部分场景都是在瓦特纳冰川国家公园拍摄的。欧白芷、海湾豆等植物密布，北极狐在这里漫步，冰舌、峡湾等地貌交错纵横，远古火山活动遗留下的痕迹随处可见。令人瞩目的景色便是世界上极地以外的冰盖——瓦特纳冰原(Vatnajökull)。瓦特纳冰原覆盖了冰岛约8%的面积，其冰层平均厚度为400米，厚处达千米。位于瓦特纳冰原的南方是华纳达尔斯赫努克火山(Hvannadalshnúkur)。瓦特纳冰原近年开始融化，这可能与气候变更和火山活动有关。

attractions.text_en: Straw Hat Mountain: The Snæfellsnes Peninsula is recognized as a photography paradise in Iceland, and among its famous sights is Church Mountain. The name of the mountain is translated from Icelandic as "Church Mountain," but because the shape of this mountain looks just like a straw hat, more people call it Straw Hat Mountain. Straw Hat Mountain is about 460 meters above sea level. As for getting to the classic photography spot, you need to walk five minutes along the path from the parking area across the road from Church Mountain, cross the bridge to the other side of the waterfall, and use the Church Mountain waterfall as the foreground.
attractions.text_zh: 草帽山 斯奈山半岛是冰岛公认的摄影胜地，其中有名的就是教会山，从冰岛语将山的名称翻译为“教会山”，但是由于这座山的形状像极了草帽，因此更多人叫它草帽山。草帽山海拔约460米。关于前往摄影经典机位，需要从教会山马路对面的停车区域沿路径走五分钟，过桥到瀑布到另一边，以教会山瀑布为前景。

attractions.text_en: Arnarstapi is a small fishing village on the southern coastline of Iceland's Snæfellsnes Peninsula; the ancient, elegant houses by the sea and the bizarre sea-eroded rocks along the coast are the human and natural features of this small town. Arnarstapi is a small town with a natural harbor; it used to be a bustling trading center, and now it attracts many travelers with its unique natural scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔纳斯塔皮(Arnarstapi)是冰岛斯奈山半岛南海岸线上的一座小渔村，海滨的古老优雅房屋与沿岸的奇诡海蚀岩石是小镇的人文与自然特色。阿尔纳斯塔皮是一座有天然港口的小镇，这里从前是个热闹的交易中心，现在则以独特的自然景观吸引众多旅客的到访。

attractions.text_en: Reykjavik Cathedral is a landmark building of the city of Reykjavik. It is a famous church located in the center of Iceland's capital, Reykjavik. The church has a novel design with a pipe-organ structure, and is one of the tallest buildings in Iceland; you can take an elevator up to the top floor to overlook the whole capital. The interior of the church is snow-white, with simple decoration. Its foundation was laid in 1940, and it was largely completed by the late 1960s.
attractions.text_zh: 雷克雅未克大教堂是雷克雅未克市的地标性建筑。位于冰岛首都雷克雅未克市中心的一座著名教堂。教堂设计新颖，管风琴结构，是冰岛高建筑之一，可乘坐电梯上顶楼俯瞰首都全貌。教堂内部雪白，装饰简洁。于1940年奠基，于20世纪60年代末基本完工。

attractions.text_en: Tjörnin sits peacefully in the heart of Reykjavik, giving the city an eternal composure and calm. On Tjörnin, waterfowl such as swans, terns, greylag geese, and ducks dwell here in both winter and summer, and coming to feed the birds by Tjörnin has also become a great pleasure for Icelanders and travelers alike. In winter, a thick layer of ice forms on Tjörnin, completely allowing one to cross the lake surface, and there are even Icelanders who play football on the ice.
attractions.text_zh: 托宁湖（Tjörnin）就安然坐落在雷克雅未克的中心地带，赋予了这座城市永恒的从容与平静。托宁湖上，天鹅、燕鸥、灰雁、鸭子等水禽无论冬夏栖息于此，来托宁湖边喂鸟也成为了冰岛人与游人们的一大乐趣。冬季，托宁湖上会结上一层厚厚的冰，完全可以横穿湖面，甚至还有冰岛人在冰上踢球。

attractions.text_en: Reykjavik has many sculptures, and the Sun Voyager (Sólfar) is perhaps one of the most famous among them. This sculpture is located on Sæbraut road by the sea in Reykjavik; shaped like an ark, it is "an ode to the sun, containing aspirations for distance, hope, the quest, progress, and freedom." The Sun Voyager sculpture is the winning work of an outdoor art competition commemorating the 200th anniversary of the founding of the city of Reykjavik; it was designed by Jón Gunnar Árnason and unveiled in 1990. This uniquely designed work of modern Icelandic art has also gradually become a landmark of Reykjavik.
attractions.text_zh: 雷克雅未克雕塑众多，太阳航海者（Sólfar）或许就是其中有名的一座。这座雕塑位于雷克雅未克海边的Sæbraut路上，形似方舟，是“一曲对太阳的颂歌，蕴含了对远方、希望、追寻、进步与自由的期许”。太阳航海者雕塑是纪念雷克雅未克建市200周年室外艺术竞赛的获奖作品，由Jón Gunnar Árnason设计，于1990年揭幕。这座设计独特的冰岛现代艺术作品也渐渐成为了雷克雅未克的标志性建筑。

attractions.text_en: Located in District 101 of Reykjavik, the half-cape harbor area of the city center, it is lined with all kinds of boats and exaggerated architectural artworks, and studios from countries all over the world have also flocked here, making the cultural atmosphere of this area increasingly lively. The famous designer Massimo Santanicchia painted dedicated yellow-and-blue paths around the Old Harbor, making the colors of the Old Harbor more cheerful. This project called "Harbor Path" aims to connect different parts of the harbor, and hopes to draw everyone's attention back to some forgotten corners of the harbor area. If you are lucky, sometimes whales will swim to the side of the boats, leaping out of the sea or spouting water.
attractions.text_zh: 位于雷克雅未克的101区，市中心的半角海港区，林立着各种船只和夸张的建筑艺术品，世界各个国家的工作室也纷至沓来，让这一带的文化氛围愈加活跃。 著名设计师Massimo Santanicchia为旧港一带刷上了黄蓝相间的专用路径，让旧港的颜色更加轻快。这个名为“Harbor Path”的项目旨在连接起港口的不同部分，并希望将大家的目光重新引回一些港口一带被遗忘的角落。幸运的话，有时候鲸鱼会游到船边，纵身跃出海面或者喷漆喷水。

attractions.text_en: Reykjavik's Grandi new art district is filled with the meeting of modern art and traditional culture; it is an area where young Icelanders gather, and also a cluster of emerging art venues such as the National Museum of Iceland, the Whale Museum, the Aurora Museum, and Marshall House. This walking route in the seaside new district holds many more surprises—it is a concentrated area of Icelandic bars and restaurants, lined with all kinds of cuisine and music. Along the way there is delicious food, beautiful scenery, as well as a strong artistic and literary atmosphere and street art. This endlessly surprising coastal walking route, connecting Iceland's traditional culture and emerging art, can absolutely take you into the world of Reykjavik.
attractions.text_zh: 雷克雅未克的格蓝地艺术新区，充斥着现代艺术与传统的文化的交接，年轻冰岛人聚集的区域，也是冰岛国立博物馆、鲸鱼博物馆、极光博物馆和Marshall House等新兴的艺术场馆的集合区，这场在海边新区的漫步之路还有多值得惊喜——冰岛酒吧、餐厅的集中区域，邻立着各种美食和音乐，一路上有美食、美景，还有浓厚的文艺气息，街头艺术，这条惊喜无限、连接着冰岛传统文化与新兴艺术的海岸漫步线路，绝对能带你走入雷克雅未克的世界。

attractions.text_en: In the waters around Reykjavik, many species of whales and various fish and birds appear all year round. Common whales include the minke whale and the humpback whale; in addition, the white-beaked dolphin and the Atlantic harbor porpoise are also good friends often seen while whale watching. These species each have their own characteristics, but are all full of charm. There is also a chance to see more species of whales—fin whales, orcas, pilot whales, basking sharks, and the like all live in Faxaflói Bay. The whale-watching activity lasts about 3 hours, with plenty of time to search for these lovely marine creatures at sea. The professional guides on board will also provide comprehensive, professional, and interesting marine knowledge, making the whale-watching experience even more colorful.
attractions.text_zh: 在雷克雅未克周围海域，常年出没着很多种类的鲸鱼和各种鱼、鸟。常见的鲸鱼包括小须鲸、座头鲸，此外白吻斑纹海豚与大西洋鼠海豚也是观鲸时常会见到的好朋友。这些物种各具特色，但都充满了魅力。还有机会看到更多种类的鲸鱼，长须鲸、虎鲸、领航鲸、姥鲨等都生活在Faxaflói湾。观鲸活动约3小时，有充足的时间在海上寻觅这些可爱的海洋生物。船上的专业向导也会提供全面专业且有趣的海洋知识，让观鲸体验更加多采。

attractions.name_en: Harpa Concert Hall and Conference Centre
attractions.name_zh: 哈帕音乐厅和会议中心
attractions.text_en: Harpa Concert Hall and Conference Centre is located at the junction of land and sea in Iceland's capital, Reykjavik; it is Iceland's integrated concert hall and conference center, jointly designed by Icelandic and Danish design firms, with inspiration drawn from the mysterious aurora in the night sky of Iceland's winter nights and the shape of volcanic stone. The building's glass form is like a giant kaleidoscope; thousands of irregular geometric glass bricks reflect myriad colors that put even the rainbow to shame, changing with the color of the sky and the seasons. This top-tier modern building is a venue in Reykjavik for enjoying music and holding important conferences. Here, you can hear the Iceland Symphony Orchestra perform, and watch Icelandic theater and performances of various music genres. The concert hall here can hold 1,800 people, and in addition there are two rehearsal halls, a lounge, a restaurant, a café, a music record store, and a souvenir shop.
attractions.text_zh: 哈帕音乐厅和会议中心位于冰岛首都雷克雅未克的海陆交界处，是冰岛的综合音乐厅、会议中心，由冰岛和丹麦的设计公司联合设计，其灵感来自冰岛冬季夜晚神秘莫测的夜幕极光和火山石的形状。建筑的玻璃外型好比一个巨大的万花筒，上千块不规则的几何玻璃砖随着天空的颜色和季节的变化反射出令彩虹都相形见绌的万千颜色。这座顶尖的现代化建筑是雷克雅未克欣赏音乐和举办重要会议的场所。在这里，你可以听到冰岛交响乐团的演奏，观赏冰岛戏剧和各种音乐流派演出。这里的音乐厅可容纳1800人，此外还设置有两个排练厅、休息厅、餐厅、咖啡店、音乐唱片店及纪念品店。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, gather in Rome and set off for the ancient town of Pienza. Along the way, stop for free photos at the cypress lane, then tour Pienza's Piazza Pio II, Pienza Cathedral (exterior) and other sights. After lunch, head to Siena and visit Siena Cathedral (exterior), the Piazza del Campo, Siena Town Hall (exterior), the Torre del Mangia (exterior) and more.
Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena or a comparable 4-star hotel
Note: [Due to crowd-control limits at the Louvre, and especially peak-season restrictions on in-museum guiding, the in-museum guide fee of 10 euros per traveler will be refunded; for Versailles, if there are fewer than 3 people no official guide is provided and an audio guide is used instead.]
overview.text_zh:
上午罗马集合，出发前往皮恩扎古城游览，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，之后游览皮恩扎二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点，午餐后出发前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。
夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：【由于卢浮宫限流、特别是旺季限制讲解员在馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费10欧元/每位游客， 凡尔赛不足3人无官导讲解，由讲解器代替。 】

accommodation.text_en:
Four Points by Sheraton Siena or a comparable 4-star hotel
The hotel sits on a quiet hilltop, surrounded by olive groves and gardens, with beautiful scenery ideal for getting close to nature. Guest rooms feature comfortable wooden floors, bright design and stylish, tastefully arranged interiors. The hotel also has a refined restaurant serving classic Italian, local and Tuscan cuisine at dinner. An outdoor pool, fitness center and sauna provide an even more relaxing stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，环境优美且适合亲近自然。客房铺设舒适的木质地板，设计明亮，摆设美观的时尚内装，同时酒店配有精致的餐厅，在晚餐时段供应经典的意大利、当地和托斯卡纳美食。酒店的室外泳池、健身中心以及桑拿浴室都为您提供更加放松的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
The pastoral beauty of the Val d'Orcia and the medieval town of Pienza
Close your eyes and you will picture the classic Tuscan scene - blue sky and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and vines, and finally wheat fields. This is the perfect portrait of the Val d'Orcia. From the walls of the ancient town of Pienza, look out over the scenery of the World Heritage Val d'Orcia.
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: A winding, twisting cypress lane - a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses. Its distinctively shaped bends and neatly arranged cypress trees have become one of the icons of Tuscan pastoral scenery. In sunlight the cypresses on both sides cast dappled shadows, creating a serene and poetic atmosphere that draws countless photography lovers and travelers to take pictures.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: Pienza is a town in the Province of Siena in the Tuscany region of central Italy, adjacent to Montalcino. It was the earliest ideal town of the Renaissance, founded by Pope Pius II, who created it to renovate his impoverished hometown and use it as a papal summer retreat. In 1996 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List. The architecture here is Gothic in style and influenced by German style. The town's main square is the Piazza Pio II, which contains its principal 15th-century buildings, such as the cathedral (built 1459-1462), the Piccolomini Palace, the Bishop's Palace, and the town hall with its crenellated tower (built 1462).
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎（Pienza）是意大利中部托斯卡纳大区锡耶纳省的一个市镇，毗邻蒙塔尔奇诺，它是文艺复兴时期最早的理想小镇，由罗马教皇PiusII创立，当时创立的目的是为了翻新给他贫穷的家乡并把此作为罗马教皇的避暑地。1996年，被列入联合国世界遗产名录。这里的建筑呈哥特风，并受德式风格的影响。小镇的主要广场是PiazzaPioII，广场里包含15世纪的主要建筑，如教堂（建于1459-1462）、皮科洛米尼宫（PiccolominiPalace、主教宫、带有锯齿形塔的大会堂（建于1462）。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval town, is filled with masterpieces by great artists and classical medieval architecture. As you wander Siena's ancient, crisscrossing cobblestone alleys and the deep courtyards hidden throughout, you feel transported to the European Middle Ages of a thousand years ago, and every detail brings a surprise. For centuries the city has kept its complete classical appearance intact, as if time has stood still here since the fourteenth century. Besides its unique scenery and art collections, Siena maintains a series of traditions, including the making of sweets. On your trip to Siena, do not forget to taste the local specialties - ricciarelli almond biscuits, panforte fruit-and-nut cake, pan pepato peppered-spice nut cake, budini di riso rice pudding, cavallucci walnut biscuits, or copate walnut wafers!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: The Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly across the square stand the Siena Town Hall and its tower; inside the town hall is the civic museum, which houses many paintings of the Sienese School, including the Allegory of Good Government and the Allegory of Bad Government. The tower's full name is the Torre del Mangia; it is Siena's tallest building and the second-tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can climb 55 flights of steps to the top for a sweeping view of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔，它是锡耶纳较高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns; it is a unique meeting of art and nature, rich in historical traces, and its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance to embody the Italian city-states' ideal of good government.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Pisa and tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli in Pisa's historical and cultural center. Then go to visit Cinque Terre, traveling along the Ligurian coast to tour the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs; afterwards check into the hotel.
Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole or a comparable 4-star hotel
Note: If bad weather or a railway-company strike or similar factors make it impossible to visit Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically change to touring the coastal towns by coach or another means.
overview.text_zh:
上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场。前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；之后入住酒店。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Hilton Florence Metropole or a comparable 4-star hotel
The Hilton Florence is a modern hotel offering a taste of Tuscan style. Its excellent location gives access to Florence's business district so you can enjoy the city's bustle. From the terrace of the hotel's executive lounge you can admire magnificent views of Florence. Every guest room is decorated in a warm, modern style; wooden floors and a spacious marble bathroom offer a high level of comfort.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店
佛罗伦萨希尔顿酒店是一家体验托斯卡纳风格的现代化酒店，地理位置优越，可前往佛罗伦萨商业中心，享受佛罗伦萨的繁华。酒店行政酒廊的露台上可欣赏到佛罗伦萨的壮丽景色。每间客房均采用温馨的现代风格装饰；木地板和宽敞的大理石浴室可获得较大的舒适度。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a Shangri-la on the cliffs
Stopping at each beautiful fishing village along the Mediterranean's long coastline, watching the sun-bathed beaches and the waves quietly lapping against the rocks, the colorful houses coming nearer from afar - the curiosity to gaze upon the lovely fishing villages reaches its peak the moment you arrive. Disembarking, you walk on foot through the alleys of the fishing village, and the closer you get the more surprises there are. It is like savoring a visual feast of five colorful delicacies, tasting each subtle flavor bit by bit - this scene is so beautiful it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，下得船来，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy. It stands on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Province of Tuscany, and is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, named a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. It is said that in the year 1590 Galileo performed a free-fall experiment from the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's view.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly laid with grass. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square stand four major buildings: Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (cemetery). Ancient city walls and gates are still preserved around the square. In April 1987 the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the Italian city of Pisa (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre lies in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy. Built along the winding Mediterranean coastline, it is the collective name for five cliffside villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together, built along the coast - one of the world's beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers, taking around 5 hours, with the Mediterranean on one side, the mountains on the other and the Italian fishing villages ahead. It is a destination that countless hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage list.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, and visit the world's third-largest cathedral - the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (exterior), the Piazza della Signoria, the Old Bridge (Ponte Vecchio), and the Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Then proceed to Venice and check into the hotel.
Overnight: voco Venice Mestre - The Quid or Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre San Giuliano or a comparable 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往文艺复兴发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场，老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
voco Venice Mestre - The Quid or Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre San Giuliano or a comparable 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly refurbished hotels, with an excellent location, stylish modern design, and guest rooms featuring natural tones and modern interiors that offer a comfortable, cozy stay. The hotel provides a hearty breakfast, a fully equipped gym, and a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails. The hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian dishes and delicacies.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en:
The glory and prime of Florence, the starlight of the Renaissance shining
In Florence, the world capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Amid blue skies and white clouds, brightly colored walls, dark green shutters and deep red roofs, seek out the soul of the Renaissance; in the streets and alleys, squares and churches, museums and galleries, feel the Renaissance that never grows old. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic soul of Dante Alighieri and the painting soul of Leonardo da Vinci still drift over Florence, still continue to pursue the people and events of the European Renaissance..."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利·但丁的诗魂、达·芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queue required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few can be as charming as this one. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets to the fullest the classical, elegant and free spirit that the Renaissance esteemed - no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture David, and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and many cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earliest large-span segmental arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the young Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into the Divine Comedy. Over several centuries it has withstood floods, social upheavals and wars without falling, and is one of Florence's famous landmark structures.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza Santa Croce lies in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued since the Renaissance. At the heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian luminaries such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring carefully. Around the square are many cafes and restaurants serving authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. The Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances draw large audiences. The square's open space is well suited to strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, taking in Florence's distinctive atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings built upon the water, together with the winding water lanes, make Venice's romantic charm linger long. Then head to the fashion capital - Milan.
Overnight: Hotel Royal Garden or a comparable 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。之后前往时尚之都——米兰。
夜宿：皇家花园酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Hotel Royal Garden or a comparable 4-star hotel
The hotel sits in a lush garden with fountains, palm trees and olive trees, blending classic elegance with modern style - a delightful and relaxing urban getaway. The hotel is within walking distance of a nearby large shopping center; its guest rooms are spacious and elegant, with large marble bathrooms with bathtubs. The buffet breakfast is rich and varied, the Captain's Bar serves drinks and snacks all day, and the hotel's glass-domed Blue Crab Grill restaurant serves international cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
皇家花园酒店 或同等级4星级酒店
酒店坐落在郁郁葱葱的花园中，花园内有喷泉、棕榈树和橄榄树，将经典优雅与现代风格融为一体，是一处令人愉悦而轻松的城市度假胜地。酒店可步行至附近的大型商业中心；酒店的客房宽敞而优雅，设有带浴缸的大型大理石浴室，自助早餐丰盛多样，Captain's Bar 全天供应饮料和小吃，酒店设有玻璃圆顶的 Blue Crab Grill 餐厅，供应国际美食。

highlights.text_en:
The world's beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic" still dazzling and resplendent
As one of the major cities of the Renaissance, Venice is made up of 118 small islands, linked together by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Isles" and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the world's beautiful squares, St. Mark's Square, the beautiful Grand Canal, the phoenix-reborn La Fenice opera house, the sorrowful Bridge of Sighs of Xu Zhimo's writing, breathtakingly beautiful colonnades, the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting, and the filming location of many movie scenes. Her unique character leaves every visitor enchanted and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: Known in short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the heart of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071, it was once the great church of medieval Europe, a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and at the same time a treasury holding a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum on Piazza San Marco where all of Venice's past glory is gathered. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons; on the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, and you can look out through a small opening, instead of being looked at like the many people on the bridge opposite gazing toward the Bridge of Sighs. Photography is allowed inside, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was the path that in ancient times condemned prisoners had to take when escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style, shaped like a house, covered by a vault on top and tightly enclosed, with only two small windows facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the serious offender was taken to the dungeon, and crossing this airtight bridge he could only look at the blue sky through the small window, from then on losing his freedom and involuntarily letting out a sigh. It is said that lovers who kiss beneath the bridge will be together forever, and the film A Little Romance was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: This is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, and on the east side rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times it has been the center of Venice's political, religious and traditional-festival public activities.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, freely visit Milan's iconic landmark, Milan Cathedral (exterior), and one of Europe's most beautiful commercial arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon, head to Zurich and tour the Grossmünster (exterior), Lake Zurich, Bahnhofstrasse, and stroll along the Limmat River.
Overnight: H+ Hotel Zurich Limmattal or a comparable 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊。 下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观），苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街、漫步利马特河边。
夜宿：苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
H+ Hotel Zurich Limmattal or a comparable 4-star hotel
The hotel is set in the scenic heart of the Limmattal, a modern urban residence next to one of Switzerland's larger shopping centers. The hotel has a bar; the guest rooms are spacious and clean, with beautiful parquet floors and modern furniture, large wardrobes and many small ideas that make life easier. The hotel offers various buffet or continental breakfasts. The lush valley, rolling hills and winding Limmat River around the hotel provide a comfortable, natural stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在风景秀丽的利马塔尔中心地带，现代化的城市住宅，紧邻瑞士较大的购物中心，酒店配备酒吧，客房宽敞整洁，拥有漂亮的镶木地板和现代家具、大衣柜和许多让生活更轻松的小创意。酒店提供各类自助或欧陆式早餐。酒店周边绿意盎然的山谷、连绵起伏的丘陵和蜿蜒的利马特河，为您提供舒适自然的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
Visit the filming location of "Crash Landing on You" and meet romantic Zurich
The opening filming location of the TV drama "Crash Landing on You" is the Lindenhof park in Zurich's old town; as the main story begins, it freezes on the perfect frame of the two leads passing each other by. With the Limmat River in the foreground, the park offers wonderful views of Zurich. The twin-towered building that flashes by in the drama is the Grossmünster, Zurich's acknowledged landmark. Zurich's old town is also a not-to-be-missed experience, gathering traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookshops and flower shops, as well as jewelry and fashion boutiques. Stroll through the old town, wandering and pausing in each of its streets.
highlights.text_zh:
打卡《爱的迫降》取景地，邂逅浪漫的苏黎世
《爱的迫降》电视剧片头取景地就是位于苏黎世老城的林登霍夫公园，正片开始时，定格了两人擦身而过的完美的画面。公园以利马特河为前景可以观赏到苏黎世的美妙景色。剧中闪现的双塔建筑正是苏黎世大教堂，是苏黎世公认的地标建筑。苏黎世老城区也是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰、时尚精品，漫步于老城区，在每个街道里走走停停。

attractions.text_en: Although its name, Duomo, means "dome," Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Praised as one of Italy's most magnificent Gothic buildings, hundreds of spires soar into the sky, and thousands of statues are carved on its white marble exterior walls. The interior space is vast; sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, the light is hazy and full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the cathedral's crypt the remains of the original Church of Santa Tecla are still preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most tourists who come here are sightseeing. Under the central arcade is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan, especially as the window displays are updated daily; simply standing outside admiring the windows is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele is filled with many fine restaurants, cafes and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (Station Street) is one of Europe's longer shopping boulevards and one of the world's most expensive shopping streets. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless heart of Zurich, lined with luxury brands from around the world and private banks. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless travelers feel an inexplicable excitement, because stored beneath their feet is a quantity of gold bars said to be among the world's largest, making many people too excited to move their feet. Standing here, you can clearly sense the air filled with the scent of wealth, luxury and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. Its docks are crowded with all kinds of yachts, like a rich man's club. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center; white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere on the lake, leisurely and carefree, a harmonious scene. The north shore of Lake Zurich is where the wealthy live, called the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." At the end of Bahnhofstrasse lies Lake Zurich; as a "most livable city in the world," the lives of true Zurichers are everywhere imbued with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: The Grossmünster is one of the three main churches of Zurich, Switzerland (the other two being the Fraumünster and St. Peter's). The church is located near the bank of the Limmat River, first built around 1100 and inaugurated about 1220. Facing the Fraumünster across the river, this church played a pivotal role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation; the theology faculty of the University of Zurich and the Reformation Museum are both established here. The stained-glass windows inside the church are masterpieces by the Swiss modern art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for Lucerne to tour the lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, listen to the Lion Monument recount that chapter of the Swiss people's loyalty and resolve, and visit the Chapel Bridge, the octagonal Water Tower and other sights. Then head to the village of Lauterbrunnen to tour Lake Lauterbrunnen and the village scenery. In the afternoon, go to Interlaken, the town at the foot of the "Jungfrau," the roof of Europe.
Overnight: Solbadhotel Sigriswil (alpine lake-view hotel) or a comparable 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点；之后前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光；下午前往欧洲屋脊-“少女峰”山脚下的小镇-因特拉肯。
夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Solbadhotel Sigriswil (alpine lake-view hotel) or a comparable 4-star hotel
The hotel sits in the mountain ravine next to the panoramic bridge of Sigriswil. All guest rooms are decorated in an elegant Swiss country style, and the hotel's views satisfy every imagination of Switzerland - rooms enjoy views of Lake Thun, the surrounding mountains, or the village of Sigriswil. Sitting in the hotel's restaurant, gazing afar at the emerald waters of Lake Thun and the snow mountains tranquilly reflected in it, you feel as if in a painting, free to admire Switzerland's Shangri-la-like beautiful scenery.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于锡格里斯维尔（Sigriswil）全景桥旁边的山涧，所有的客房装饰为瑞士乡村典雅风格，酒店景观满足对瑞士的想象，客房客房享有图恩湖或周围群山或锡格里斯维尔村景致。坐在酒店的餐厅远眺碧绿的图恩湖水，宁静地倒影的雪山，恍然如画中，让人尽情欣赏瑞士世外桃源般的美好景致。

highlights.text_en:
The Shangri-la village of Lauterbrunnen beneath the snow mountains
As the filming location of the grand happy ending of "Crash Landing on You," where the male and female leads spent "the happiest two weeks of the year," the leads' impossibly sweet Shangri-la, the otherworldly beauty of Lake Lauterbrunnen, seems tailor-made for the drama. Heaven-on-earth lake and mountain scenery, the filter-free beauty of Lake Lauterbrunnen - if there is a Shangri-la, it must be in Lauterbrunnen; the quiet, beautiful flow of time is nothing more than this.
highlights.text_zh:
雪山下的龙疆小镇
作为“爱的迫降”大团圆结局的取景地，剧中男女主角“一年中幸福的两周”都在这里度过，主角甜到齁的世外桃源，超然于世的龙疆湖美景，就像是为该剧量身定做的。人间天堂般的湖光山色，无滤镜的龙疆湖美景，如果有世外桃源，那一定在龙疆，岁月静好也不过如此。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass scenic train passes through here. Surrounded by mountains and carpeted with green grass, the quaint village is scattered along the shore of Lake Lauterbrunnen, a veritable Shangri-la far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne lies in central Switzerland, in the German-speaking part of the country. Nestled against mountains and beside water, Lucerne has the unique beauty of the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance halls and mansions, as well as century-old shops and ancient long streets and alleys are everywhere. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the city's beautiful sights so vividly it seems both real and illusory - it is the extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small towns. Since the 19th century it has attracted many royal nobles and literary figures to visit and live, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: This lake has a winding shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms the classic scenery of "lake and mountain views," drawing large numbers of tourists. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once likened the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's 14th Piano Sonata to the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and so the piece acquired the title "Moonlight" - although this was not Beethoven's original intent.
attractions.text_zh: 这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: This sculpture of a dying lion was carved into the natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. The 10-meter-long, more than 3-meter-high lion lies in agony on the ground, a broken spear in its shoulder, with a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms beside it. The statue was made to commemorate the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died on August 10, 1792, defending the safety of the Louis XVI family in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; an inscription beneath the statue describes the course of the event. In those days Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, driven by the need to make a living, went off to serve as mercenaries in various European countries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and fought bravely, but honor and money could not mask the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, keeping only the guards who served the Holy See - the famous Swiss Guard. Owing to their famous loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, visit Interlaken, set in the center between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun (known as the left and right eyes of God). You may choose to freely tour Höheweg, the Höhematte, and the quiet villages, shaded by green trees and dotted among the mountains and waters, where people and nature merge into one; or pay extra to take the Jungfrau panorama cable car to the summit - the Top of Europe, Europe's high railway station, going to the Sphinx Observation Terrace and the Aletsch Glacier; or pay extra to go to the Swiss alpine adventure town of First, to tour the cliffside First Cliff Walk. Then check into the Novotel Geneva Centre.
Overnight: Novotel Annemasse Centre Porte de Genève or Crowne Plaza or a comparable 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午参观有上帝左眼与右眼之称的布里恩茨湖和图恩湖中央的因特拉肯，可选自由游览何维克街，荷黑马特，宁静的村庄，绿树掩映，点缀在山水之间，人与自然浑然一体；或者自费选择少女峰全景缆车登顶——Top of Europe欧洲较高的火车站，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”及阿莱奇冰川；或者自费前往瑞士高山探险小镇菲斯特，游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道。随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店。
夜宿：安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Novotel Annemasse Centre Porte de Genève or Crowne Plaza or a comparable 4-star hotel
The Novotel opened in 2020 and is a comfortable business hotel under the Accor brand, its decor in harmony with its natural surroundings. Inspired by innovative New York hotel concepts, it includes a cafe and bakery area open to hotel guests and the public. The hotel has a restaurant serving healthy seasonal cuisine. At the Rooftop 46 bar on the hotel's 8th floor, overlook the Alps and the Jura mountains and enjoy happy hour.
accommodation.text_zh:
安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店
诺富特酒店于2020年开业，是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店的装饰与其自然环境相协调。受到纽约创新酒店概念的启发，它包括一个向酒店客人和公众开放的咖啡厅和面包店区。酒店设有一间餐厅，提供健康的时令美食。在酒店8 层的 Rooftop 46 酒吧俯瞰阿尔卑斯山和侏罗山脉，享受快乐时光。

highlights.text_en:
Between two jewel-clear lakes, experience the wonder of being a traveler within a painting
God especially favored Lake Thun and Lake Brienz in the Bernese Oberland, leaving here lake waters as beautiful and precious as pupils of the eye. Towns and villages are scattered all about; from near to far, your eyes fill with lush, dripping green, with steep snow mountains in the distance, and the sunlight tickling your nose. The changing of the four seasons does not dim this pastoral beauty in the slightest - between mountains and waters it is all good times.
highlights.text_zh:
宝石般澄澈的两湖之间，体验人在画中游的胜景
上帝特别眷顾伯尔尼高地上的图恩湖和布里恩茨湖，将如眼珠般美丽而珍贵的湖水留在这里。小镇和村庄星罗棋布，由近及远是满眼苍翠欲滴的绿意，远处的雪山挺拔，阳光在人的鼻子上挠痒痒，四季的变化没有让这田园美景减色一分，山水之间都是好时光。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is home to the famous postcard photography spot beloved by photographers, Switzerland's "dreamy slope." It is also the Alpine town you must pass through to tour the Jungfrau, and together with First, the Jungfrau and Wengen it forms one of the more magnificent and beautiful scenic lines of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeshore, green grass, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow mountains together make this an enchanting town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头非常爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald First draws travelers from all directions to admire the magnificent scenery of the Eiger's north face. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk, anyone will instantly feel they are standing at the top of the world. The First Cliff Walk is located at the summit of First, offering a unique panorama of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau lies some twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with snow and ice all year round, while below the mountain the grass is green and the scenery beautiful - it is a famous Swiss sightseeing and outdoor sports destination. The Jungfrau region was inscribed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Höhematte is the green meadow square in the center of the town of Interlaken, Switzerland's famous tourist town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery, and now no construction of any kind is permitted on it, to prevent damage to this beautiful landscape. It is the best place to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast green meadow there are fountains and many benches dotted about, so it is also a good place to stroll. The Höhematte is also a landing site for paragliding; there is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, and after paying, staff will take travelers to a nearby mountain to paraglide freely and admire the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, tour the "Flower Bridge" area beside the hotel, where Geneva's various local delicacies and specialty shops gather; visit Geneva's old town, the Lake Geneva area, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau and other sights. In the afternoon, travel by coach back to Paris.
Overnight: Mercure Paris or Novotel Paris or a comparable 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午游览位于酒店旁的“花桥”区域，这里云集则日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店，参观日内瓦老城，日内瓦湖区，花钟和大喷泉等景点；下午乘车返回巴黎。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris or Novotel Paris or a comparable 4-star hotel
The Mercure or Novotel Paris is a comfortable four-star hotel under the Accor brand, located near a large shopping mall, convenient for guests to dine and shop. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers a comfortable stay, drawing on distinctive brand features: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, hotel styles that deeply capture local character, and a warm, hospitable management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型四星酒店，酒店位于大型商超附近，方便客人有餐购物，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
The old town of Geneva
The upper town on the shore of Lake Geneva, the picturesque Lake Geneva and the majestic Alps form a poetic, pastoral landscape. The beautiful scenery of the two countries' borders changes and intertwines continually along Lake Geneva - one moment it is France's Évian and Annemasse, on the other side is Geneva's old town. The whole lake area is listed as a World Heritage Site, with one human heritage site after another and exceptionally well-preserved medieval towns. The roads are inlaid with cobblestones, and every small town and city has many fountains. Traditional building architecture and modern, novel shops weave together into one magnificent and wonderful experience after another.
highlights.text_zh:
日内瓦古城区
日内瓦湖畔的上城区，风光旖旎的日内瓦湖和雄伟的阿尔卑斯山，构成的诗意田园风光，两国国境秀丽风景沿日内瓦湖不断变化交错、一会是法国依云安娜玛斯一边是日内瓦的旧城，整个湖区被列为世界遗产，一座又一座的人类遗产以及保护得十分完好的中世纪小城，路上镶嵌着一块块的石板，每个小镇、小城都就有多处喷泉。传统的房屋建筑和摩登新颖的店家，交织成一处处美轮美奂的奇妙体验。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Léman, straddles Switzerland and France and is an important lake of Western Europe, as well as a famous scenic and resort area. During the day you can take a boat tour of Lake Geneva, and at night be intoxicated by the flickering neon lights along the shore; luxury cruise ships often host concerts or dances on the lake. Take a boat to take in the beautiful scenery along Lake Geneva's shores, watching the lake water, snow mountains and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Jet d'Eau (Grand Fountain) is on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden and is one of Geneva's most representative sights. The fountain is like a column of water spouted by a whale, 140 meters high with a discharge of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away in the city center. At night there is also a chance to see the fountain illuminated by lights, even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦较具代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous attraction in Geneva. Switzerland is known as the "Garden Nation" and at the same time the "Land of Watches and Clocks." Even more wonderfully, Switzerland's skilled craftsmen ingeniously combine the beauty of flowers with the craftsmanship of clockmaking, creating the original "Flower Clock."
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称“花园之国”，同时又是“钟表之乡”，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了“花钟”。

attractions.text_en: The upper town on the hillside on the right bank of the Rhône, owing to its higher elevation, is also called the upper town by local residents. It is not only a gathering place of churches and historic sites, but also has many small and charming antique shops in its winding alleys, and the former residence of Rousseau, the thinker of the European Enlightenment, is also located in the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, visit the Louvre Museum, France's great pride; at that time a French national-museum guide will give an in-depth, theme-selected commentary;
In the afternoon, head to tour Notre-Dame de Paris, the Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine River cruise to tour Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), the Place de la Concorde and other sights, touring the central Paris sights all day.
Overnight: Mercure Paris or Novotel Paris or a comparable 4-star hotel
Note: [Due to crowd-control limits at the Louvre, and especially peak-season restrictions on in-museum guiding, the in-museum guide fee of 10 euros per traveler will be refunded.]
overview.text_zh:
上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，届时、将由法兰西国家馆讲解师，精选主题深度讲解；
下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛，埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地参观，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：【由于卢浮宫限流、特别是旺季限制讲解员在馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费10欧元/每位游客】

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris or Novotel Paris or a comparable 4-star hotel
The Mercure or Novotel Paris is a comfortable four-star hotel under the Accor brand, located near a large shopping mall, convenient for guests to dine and shop. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers a comfortable stay, drawing on distinctive brand features: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, hotel styles that deeply capture local character, and a warm, hospitable management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店 或同等4星级酒店
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型四星酒店，酒店位于大型商超附近，方便客人有餐购物，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
Take a Seine River cruise, feel the gentleness and romance of Paris
Taking the famous "Bateaux Mouches" cruise with its transparent cabin, sailing along the Seine which blends together so many sights, the 3.2-kilometer, roughly one-hour voyage passes Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées, the Île de la Cité and other famous sights. On the surface of the Seine, feel Paris's romantic night, the beautiful scenery and wonderful music - it is called "a not-to-be-missed in-depth tour of Paris."
highlights.text_zh:
乘塞纳河游船，感受巴黎的温柔与浪漫
乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西黛岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》

attractions.text_en: If the Louvre witnessed the glory of the Gauls, then the Île de la Cité, Notre-Dame de Paris and the Paris City Hall wrote down their inseparable bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Île de la Cité. Without the Île de la Cité, there would be no Paris as it is today.
attractions.text_zh: 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: The Cathedral of Notre-Dame de Paris sits on the Île de la Cité in the center of Paris and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The church is Gothic in style, and visitors can climb the towers; although you will not meet the "Hunchback," you can see the 17th-century great bell, get close to the mythical beasts on the church's outer walls, and overlook the beautiful scenery of the Île de la Cité and the Seine.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西堤岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，游客可以登上塔楼参观，虽然遇不到“钟楼怪人”，但却能看到17世纪的大钟、近距离接触教堂外壁上的神兽、俯瞰西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。

attractions.text_en: It is one of the world's oldest museums and a world-famous treasury of art. The Louvre building is U-shaped, divided into a new part and an old part. The glass pyramid entrance in front of the Louvre was designed by the Chinese-American master architect I. M. Pei. Here are kept more than 400,000 art treasures, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing artworks from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria and Rome to the European Middle Ages and the countries of the East - it can be called an outstanding palace of art in human history. The itinerary includes ordinary individual-tourist admission (no Chinese audio guide).
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品、其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。 行程包含普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。

attractions.text_en:
The Champ de Mars is a large strip-shaped park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the École Militaire (Paris military school) to its southeast.
Before the second half of the 18th century, this was an abandoned open plot; it was not until the military school was established in 1765 that its status gradually rose, its main purpose at the time being to serve as a place for military training. During the French Revolution, on July 17, 1791, a massacre and bloodshed occurred here. Later France used this site to host several World's Fairs and the 1900 Olympic Games.
attractions.text_zh:
战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。
在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次的世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the symbol of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en: Taking the famous "Bateaux Mouches" cruise with its transparent cabin, sailing along the Seine which blends together so many sights, the 3.2-kilometer, roughly one-hour voyage passes Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées, the Île de la Cité and other famous sights. On the surface of the Seine, feel Paris's romantic night, the beautiful scenery and wonderful music - it is called "a not-to-be-missed in-depth tour of Paris."
attractions.text_zh: 乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Paris's fashion center, Boulevard Haussmann and the Rue Royale, and freely visit the Palais Garnier (Paris Opera, exterior), Printemps department store, Galeries Lafayette and other fashionable shopping districts.
In the afternoon, head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris to tour the palace; return to Paris's Place d'Italie to end this wonderful trip.
overview.text_zh:
上午前往前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货，巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。
下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫；返回巴黎意大利广场结束美好行程。

accommodation.text_en: No hotel accommodation on this day
accommodation.text_zh: 当天无酒店住宿

highlights.text_en:
Stroll along Paris's Boulevard Haussmann
Boulevard Haussmann is not in Paris's bustling district, yet it comes alive thanks to two famous department stores: France's Galeries Lafayette and Printemps, which is renowned for its home-decor boutiques. You can stroll alone, taking in the daily-life atmosphere of Boulevard Haussmann; or with a few friends, walking along Boulevard Haussmann and enjoying the delight of shopping.
highlights.text_zh:
漫步巴黎奥斯曼大街
奥斯曼大街不在巴黎繁华的区域内，却因为2幢著名的百货公司而生动起来：法国的百货公司———老佛爷百货(GaleriesLafayette)及以家饰精品著称的春天百货(Printemps)。你可以独自漫步，感受奥斯曼大道的生活气息；也可以与三五好友一起，穿行在奥斯曼大街上，享受购物的欣喜。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the era of French feudal rule. In terms of content it was not only the French court, but also the administrative center of the state, and a concrete embodiment of the political views and way of life of French society at the time. It demonstrated the power of an absolutist regime able to concentrate such enormous manpower, materials and money - the greatest since the ancient Roman Empire in Europe. At the time, in order to build it, Louis XIV mobilized over thirty thousand workers as well as architects, engineers and technicians; besides having to solve the complex technical problems arising from building a large-scale architectural complex, they also had to solve problems such as water supply and roads. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully proves the progress of France's economy and technology at the time and the wisdom of its working people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann lies between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are the two major department stores, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, the author of In Search of Lost Time, completed most of the writing of In Search of Lost Time in his residence at number 102 of this street.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en: The Paris Opera was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861. Its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms such as ancient Greco-Roman colonnades and Baroque; grand in scale, exquisitely detailed, and resplendently golden, it is praised as a theater where painting, marble and gold ornamentation shine upon one another, offering immense enjoyment, and is one of the typical buildings of Napoleon III.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎歌剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受，是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。

overview.text_en:
