In the morning, visit the Louvre Museum, the pride of France, where a lecturer from the French national museum will give an in-depth lecture on selected themes; then tour Notre-Dame de Paris, the Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, after which take a Seine River cruise to view Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), the Place de la Concorde and other sites, spending the whole day touring the central attractions of Paris.
Overnight: Mercure Paris or Novotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，届时、将由法兰西国家馆讲解师，精选主题深度讲解；前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris or Novotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The international chain Mercure classic hotel is located in Place d'Italie, Paris's famous bustling commercial center. The hotel's architecture is in the Haussmann style, and it is adjacent to two of Paris's major gourmet districts - the traditional French bistro district "Butte-aux-Cailles" and the modern food plaza "Saint-Emilion" - with many restaurants and bar-restaurant dining areas, within walking distance for touring the commercial district.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店
国际连锁美居古典酒店位于巴黎著名繁华商业中心——意大利广场，酒店的建筑为歌百灵风格，酒店毗邻巴黎两大美食街区——传统法式酒馆美食街区“山鹌之丘”和现代美食广场“圣艾美侬”，许多餐厅和酒吧餐厅美食区，步行游览商业街区。

highlights.text_en:
Louvre themed in-depth lecture
Value is the true life of a work of art, and the Louvre is the home of art. The French Louvre national museum lecturer presents "Selected Highlights of the Origins of Civilization," helping you understand European history from an artistic perspective.
highlights.text_zh:
卢浮宫主题精讲
价值才是艺术品真正的生命，卢浮宫是艺术品的归宿，法兰西卢浮宫国家馆讲解师《文华起源精选专辑》，以艺术的角度看懂欧洲历史。

attractions.text_en: It is one of the oldest museums in the world and a world-renowned treasure house of art. The Louvre's architecture is U-shaped, divided into new and old sections. The glass pyramid entrance in front of the Louvre was designed by the Chinese-American master architect I.M. Pei. Here are preserved more than 400,000 art treasures, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing art from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria, Rome, to medieval Europe and the various countries of the East - truly an outstanding palace of art in human history.
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品，其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。

attractions.text_en: The Champ de Mars is a large strip-shaped park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, lying between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the Ecole Militaire (military school) to its southeast. Before the second half of the 18th century, this was an abandoned open space; it was not until the military school was established in 1765 that its status gradually rose, when its main purpose was to serve as a site for military training. During the French Revolution, on July 17, 1791, a bloody massacre took place here. Later, France used this venue to host several World's Fairs as well as the Olympic Games of 1900.
attractions.text_zh: 战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the emblem of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en: Board the famous glass-cabin "Bateaux Mouches" cruise boats and sail along the banks of the Seine, which blend together numerous attractions. The 3.2-kilometer, roughly 1-hour voyage passes Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Pont des Arts (lock bridge), the Louvre, the Champs-Elysees, the Ile de la Cite and other famous sights. On the surface of the Seine you can take in the romantic night scenery of Paris, beautiful views and wonderful music - it is called "the in-depth touring experience you cannot miss in Paris."
attractions.text_zh: 乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途经巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道、巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

attractions.text_en: The Cathedral of Notre-Dame de Paris is located on the Ile de la Cite in the center of Paris and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The cathedral is in the Gothic style, with the great 17th-century bell tower, the mythical beasts on the cathedral's exterior walls, and the beautiful scenery of the Ile de la Cite and the Seine to appreciate. (If there is a religious activity or mass, please do not enter and disturb the worshippers. Notre-Dame de Paris has no admission ticket; if you cannot enter, the visit will be of the exterior.)
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西岱岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格和17世纪大钟楼、教堂外壁上的神兽、领略西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。（如遇宗教活动或者弥撒，请勿入场打扰信徒，巴黎圣母院无门票，如无法入内参观则游览外观。）

attractions.text_en: If the Louvre witnessed the glory of the Gauls, then the Ile de la Cite, Notre-Dame de Paris and the Hotel de Ville wrote the inextricable bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Ile de la Cite. Without the Ile de la Cite, there would be no Paris as it is today.
attractions.text_zh: 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

overview.text_zh:
早餐后前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫；
下午返回到巴黎市区，随后前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货，巴黎老佛爷等时尚地区。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris or Novotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The international chain Mercure classic hotel is located in Place d'Italie, Paris's famous bustling commercial center. The hotel's architecture is in the Haussmann style, and it is adjacent to two of Paris's major gourmet districts - the traditional French bistro district "Butte-aux-Cailles" and the modern food plaza "Saint-Emilion."
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店
国际连锁美居古典酒店位于巴黎著名繁华商业中心——意大利广场，酒店的建筑为歌百灵风格，酒店毗邻巴黎两大美食街区——传统法式酒馆美食街区“山鹌之丘”和现代美食广场“圣艾美侬”。

highlights.text_en:
Versailles selected highlights in-depth lecture
Begun in the era of the Sun King, Versailles is a pinnacle masterpiece of the Baroque and at the same time the starting point of Rococo art. Through the Palace of Versailles, trace the origins of today's fashion and art, and stroll through the cultural splendor of this palace of architectural art.
highlights.text_zh:
凡尔赛精选专辑深度讲解
从太阳王时代开始修建，凡尔赛是巴洛克的登峰杰作，同时也是洛可可艺术的起点，通过凡尔赛宫还原当下的时尚艺术的起源，漫步于建筑艺术殿堂文化中。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of France's feudal ruling period. In terms of content it was not only the French court but also the administrative center of the country, and it was the concrete embodiment of the political views and lifestyle of French society at the time. It represents the power of an absolutist regime able to concentrate such enormous manpower, material and financial resources as had not been seen in Europe since the ancient Roman Empire. At that time, in order to build it, Louis XIV employed more than thirty thousand workers as well as architects, engineers and technicians. Apart from solving the complex technical problems arising from the construction of a large-scale building complex, problems of water supply, roads and other aspects also had to be resolved. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully demonstrates the progress of French economy and technology of the time and the wisdom of the laboring people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: The Boulevard Haussmann lies between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are two major department stores, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, author of "In Search of Lost Time," completed most of the writing of "In Search of Lost Time" in his residence at No. 102 on this street.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en: The Paris Opera was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861. Its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms such as the ancient Greco-Roman colonnade and the Baroque - grand in scale, exquisite and meticulous, magnificent and resplendent. It is hailed as a theater where painting, marble and gold ornamentation shine upon one another, offering great enjoyment, and is one of the typical buildings of the Napoleon III era. (If the Paris Opera has an important performance or reception event, it cannot be visited inside; our agency cannot accurately predict the public opening hours, therefore the admission ticket of 15 euros is not included. If it is open for visits, you may purchase the ticket on site yourself.)
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎歌剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受，是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。（巴黎歌剧院如有重要演出活动或接待活动无法入内参观，我社无法准确预测公众开放时间，因此、不包含门票15欧元，如参观接待，可在现场自行购买门票。）

overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往勃艮第大区首府，红酒，蜗牛，玫瑰芥末及白牛的原产地第戎，参观第戎老城，第戎圣母院；
午餐后前往勃垦地葡萄产区,参观勃艮第酒庄的庭院，生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖，酒庄专业待酒师负责待酒服务和深度讲解。随后前往波尔莱斯内入住罗莱夏朵城堡酒店。
夜宿：罗莱夏朵城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Relais & Chateaux castle hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel
As a representative work of French luxury hotels, the Relais & Chateaux castle hotel is set in the Park of Jouan and enjoys the beautiful natural surroundings. The hotel itself is also an 18th-century castle. The legendary Michelin chef Steven Naessens has a 2-star Michelin restaurant here as well as a Zen-filled Caudalie spa, providing a serene experience full of Zen for your travels, while you can also savor Burgundy cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗莱夏朵城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店
作为法国奢华酒店的代表作——罗莱夏朵城堡酒店位于茹安公园中，享有周围优美的自然环境，酒店本身也是一座18世纪的古堡，由米其林传奇主厨Steven Naessens，在此设有一间米其林2星餐厅以及充满禅意的欧缇丽水疗中心，为您旅行提供充满禅意的宁静体验，同时也可品尝勃艮第美食。

highlights.text_en:
Relais & Chateaux castle
As the renowned luxury hotel group, Relais & Chateaux has set up within this castle hotel a starred restaurant by Michelin chef Steven Naessens, as well as a Caudalie-grade spa center. The hotel offers a serene, Zen-filled atmosphere and is surrounded by many gourmet restaurants. A night with Relais & Chateaux lets you feel the unique charm of French hotels.
Note: Because in 2022 the Relais & Chateaux Maison Jeunet restaurant did not operate the entire year, it was rated as a 2-star Michelin restaurant in 2023.
highlights.text_zh:
罗莱夏朵城堡
作为知名的奢侈酒店集团——罗莱夏朵在这家城堡酒店内设置了，由米其林主厨Steven Naessens的星级餐厅，以及一所 Caudalie 欧缇丽级水疗中心，酒店提供的充满禅意的宁静氛围以及被多所美食餐厅环绕，一晚罗莱夏朵的体验，感受法式的酒店的独特魅力。
备注：由于2022年罗莱夏朵 Maison Jeunet 餐厅未全年营业，因此在2023年被评选为米其林2星级餐厅。

attractions.text_en: Located in Dijon in the Burgundy region, the homeland of wine, Dijon was the capital of the Duchy of Burgundy from the 11th to the 15th centuries. Especially in the 14th and 15th centuries it flourished thanks to several outstanding leaders, becoming an important political, economic and cultural-artistic center of Europe at the time. Today the old town of Dijon is still dotted with many historic buildings of different periods - besides luxurious palaces, solemn churches, lavish glazed-tile roofs and many quaint timber-framed houses, there are also museums and art galleries converted from palaces and monasteries. Fine wine and fine food set off by an art-filled city make it a very French city.
attractions.text_zh: 位于葡萄酒故乡勃艮第地区的第戎，11到-15世纪曾是勃艮第公国的首府，特别在14、15世纪时因几位优秀领导人而盛极一时，成为当时欧洲重要的政治经济和文化艺术中心。如今第戎的老城区仍散布着许多不同时期的历史建筑，除了豪华的宫殿、庄严的教堂、彩釉屋顶的豪华和许多古朴的木框架房屋，也有宫殿和修道院改装成的博物馆和美术馆。美酒、美食搭配满城艺术分为，是非常具有法国风情的一座城市。

attractions.text_en: Notre-Dame of Dijon was built in the 13th century. On the church facade, three rows of beast-shaped false gargoyles are separated by two rows of slender columns, and the church has a 14th-century timekeeping clock. For most of the people of Dijon, Notre-Dame of Dijon is an approachable church building; over these recent centuries, Notre-Dame has remained the principal spiritual and emotional comfort of the people of Dijon.
attractions.text_zh: 第戎圣母院建造于13世纪，教堂门面上三列兽形假排水口由两排纤细的圆柱分开，教堂上有一座14世纪的报时钟。对于大多数的第戎人民而言，第戎圣母院是一座具有亲和力的教堂建筑，在这近几个世纪以来，圣母院一直是第戎人民主要的精神、心灵的抚慰。

attractions.text_en: This destination that combines winemaking and tourism is a place not to be missed by wine lovers, art lovers and food lovers. Choose a winery of Burgundy products to visit, where you can see the aging and maturing process of the wine and the storage and fermentation process inside the cellar. If you are lucky, you may even see the winemaking process (depending on the grape harvest season).
attractions.text_zh: 这个集酿酒与旅游于一身的胜地是葡萄酒爱好者、艺术爱好者和美食爱好者所不容错过的地方。选择勃艮第产品的酒庄进行参观，在此可参观葡萄酒的陈酿熟化过程及酒窖内储存发酵过程，运气好的时候可参观葡萄酒的酿造过程（取决葡萄的产期）。

overview.text_en:
In the morning head to Lausanne, blooming with flowers all year round, freely tour the Olympic Park and stop at the Ouchy waterfront, whose shores are lined with cafes, restaurants and hotels; then comes the most spectacular Swiss scenic route around Lake Geneva, like a fairy-tale wonderland, enjoying to the full the charming scenery of Lake Leman, passing along the way the rolling Lavaux vineyard terraces, which are not only beautiful scenery but also precious World Heritage.
In the afternoon admire the lonely reflection of the Chateau de Chillon in Montreux mirrored in the lake; then pass by Lake Thun on the way to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Parkhotel du Sauvage Meiringen or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往四季布满鲜花的洛桑，自由游览奥林匹克公园，停留在乌希码头，沿岸布满了咖啡厅、餐厅和酒店；之后迎来最精彩的环瑞士日内瓦湖，宛如童话般仙境的瑞士景观之路，尽享莱蒙湖的旖旎风光，途径绵延的拉沃葡萄梯田，不仅是美丽的风景更是珍贵的世界文化遗产。
下午欣赏蒙特勒的西庸城堡孤独的倒影在湖水之中；之后途径图恩湖前往酒店入住。
夜宿：迈林根自然公园酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Parkhotel du Sauvage Meiringen or an equivalent 4-star hotel
This Art Nouveau hotel, built in 1880, is famous for its connection with Sherlock Holmes and is set in a tranquil spot in Meiringen, in the heart of Switzerland. This four-star bed-and-breakfast hotel has a spacious Belle Epoque-style breakfast room, a bright and cozy conservatory, a comfortable hotel lobby, and a warm English/Irish pub. Behind the hotel is a beautiful park-like garden; during summer, the garden offers various seating, lounge areas, play areas and a barbecue area.
accommodation.text_zh:
迈林根自然公园酒店 或同等4星级酒店
这家建于 1880 年的新艺术风格酒店，因与夏洛克·福尔摩斯的渊源而闻名，坐落于瑞士中心地带迈林根的静谧之地。这家四星级住宿加早餐酒店拥有宽敞的美好年代风格早餐室、明亮温馨的温室、舒适的酒店大堂，以及温馨英式/爱尔兰式酒吧。酒店后方拥有一个美丽的公园式花园，夏季期间，花园内设有各种座椅、休闲区、游乐区以及烧烤区。

highlights.text_en:
The Chateau de Chillon, the mysterious legend in Byron's writing
Freddie Mercury once sang: "This is heaven." When you stroll along the lakeside and watch the Chateau de Chillon in the setting sun, you know these words are no exaggeration. In 1816, Byron visited the Chateau de Chillon and, moved by its history, created "The Prisoner of Chillon," an immortal poem celebrating freedom. For nearly 200 years Switzerland has not been involved in any war, so many ancient and pristine medieval castles have been preserved. Now the Chateau de Chillon has become the calling card of the town of Montreux, and Byron's poem has also made it famous throughout the world.
The World Heritage Lavaux vineyard terraces
Located between Lausanne and Vevey, the more than 800-year-old town of Lavaux is a beautiful earthly Eden, picturesque as a painting. On one side of the town is the pure Lake Leman, stretching all the way from Geneva to the Alps, and on the other side are the rolling terraced vineyards, listed as World Cultural Heritage, extending about 40 kilometers. The moist air combined with ample sunshine makes it a prime location for growing grapes. Stepping into this distinctive town, strolling along the terraces through the vineyards, you can get a wonderful feel for Switzerland's wine culture.
highlights.text_zh:
拜伦笔下的神秘传说西庸古堡
弗雷迪·墨丘里曾经唱到：“这里就是天堂。”当你站在湖边漫步，看着夕阳西下中的西庸城堡，就知道所言不虚。1816年，拜伦到访西庸城堡（Chateau de Chillon），感叹历史创造出《西庸的囚徒》这首歌颂自由的不朽诗篇。近200年来瑞士没有卷入任何一场战争，于是有很多古老又原始的中世纪城堡得以保存。现在，西庸城堡已经成为小镇蒙特勒的名片，拜伦的诗作也让这里名扬天下。
世界遗产拉沃葡萄梯田
地处洛桑和沃韦之间的有800多年历史的拉沃小镇是个漂亮的人间伊甸园，风景如画。小镇一边是纯净的从日内瓦沿途一直通往阿尔斯山脉的莱蒙湖，一边是获得了世界文化遗产的绵延约40公里的梯田式葡萄园。潮湿水汽搭配充足阳光，是葡萄生长的优选地点。走进这个特色小镇，沿着梯田漫步葡萄园，可以很好地感受瑞士的葡萄酒文化。

attractions.text_en: Lausanne is the capital of the canton of Vaud, located in the center of the northern shore of Lake Geneva, and it flourished because it was once a Roman naval port. Through continuous development, this modern city of Lausanne has become one of Switzerland's most important railway hubs. Most trains heading to major cities such as Geneva, Bern and Zurich converge here, and it is also the transport center connecting Paris and Milan. Lausanne is also known as the Olympic Capital, with the International Olympic Committee and the Olympic Museum both located here.
attractions.text_zh: 洛桑是沃州的首府，位于日内瓦湖畔北部沿岸的中心，因曾是罗马的军港而繁荣。经过不断地发展，洛桑这座现代化的城市已经成为瑞士最重要的铁路枢纽之一。大多数通往日内瓦、伯尔尼、苏黎世等大城市的火车都在此交汇，它同时也是连接巴黎及米兰的交通中心。洛桑也被人们称为奥林匹克之都，国际奥林匹克委员会和奥林匹克博物馆均在此地。

attractions.text_en: Lausanne is the city designated by Baron de Coubertin, the father of the modern Olympics, as the base for the International Olympic Committee (IOC). To carry on Coubertin's will of spreading the Olympic spirit throughout the world, the world's first Olympic Museum was established in Lausanne in 1993 at the designation of former IOC President Samaranch. The Lausanne Olympic Museum collects and displays tens of thousands of treasures from the first Athens Olympic Games to the present and is the center for Olympic movement archives. The museum sits on the picturesque shore of Lake Geneva in an excellent setting; from the lush courtyard or the restaurant terrace one can gaze upon the beautiful lake and mountain scenery of Lausanne.
attractions.text_zh: 洛桑是近代奥林匹克之父顾拜旦（Coubertin）男爵为国际奥林匹克委员会（IOC）根据地所指定的城市，为继承顾拜旦将奥林匹克的精神传播到世界各地的意志，由前任奥委会主席萨马兰奇指定，于1993年在洛桑建立了世界上一座奥林匹克博物馆。洛桑奥林匹克博物馆（Olympic Museum）收藏并展示了从第一届雅典奥运会至今的上万件珍藏品，是奥林匹克运动资料中心。博物馆坐落在风光绰约的日内瓦湖畔，环境极佳，从葱郁的庭院或餐厅的阳台上可以眺望洛桑美丽的湖光山色。

attractions.text_en: The Lavaux vineyard terraces, inscribed on the World Cultural Heritage list, have to date an 800-year history. With ample sunshine and the moist climate by the lake, not only are the grapes produced here very sweet, but the area has also become a famous wine-producing region of Switzerland. In the season when the grapes ripen, the air is filled with the fragrance of wine.
attractions.text_zh: 被列入世界文化遗产名录的拉沃葡萄园梯田，迄今为止已有800年的历史。凭借充足的阳光和湖畔湿润的气候，不但让这里产出的葡萄非常甘甜，而且还使当地成为瑞士著名的葡萄酒产地。葡萄成熟的季节，空气里都弥漫着葡萄酒的香气。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Leman, straddles Switzerland and France and is an important lake of Western Europe, as well as a famous scenic area and health resort. During the day you can take a cruise to tour Lake Geneva, and at night be intoxicated by the shimmering neon lights along the shore; luxury cruise ships often hold concerts or balls on the lake. You can take a cruise to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shores of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, the snow-capped mountains and the blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Chateau de Chillon is located at the foot of the Alps, on the charming shore of Lake Geneva, and is Switzerland's iconic medieval "water-floating" castle. The foundation stones of the Chateau de Chillon are built on the lakebed, giving the impression that it floats on the surface of the lake, yet the castle looks extraordinarily solid. Byron's "The Prisoner of Chillon" has made this castle even more famous.
attractions.text_zh: 西庸城堡位于阿尔卑斯山脚下，充满魅力的日内瓦湖湖畔，是瑞士标志性的中世纪“水上漂”城堡。西庸城堡的基石建在湖底，给人一种漂浮在湖面上的感觉，但城堡看起来异常坚固，拜伦挥笔下的《西庸的囚徒》更是让这座城堡声名远扬。

attractions.text_en: Lake Thun, set in the Bernese Highlands, has deep blue water and is called "the right eye of God." Standing on the shore of Lake Thun, before your eyes are beautiful villages, solemn castles, and at the far end of the lake the gradually emerging Eiger, Monch and Jungfrau peaks. Your gaze shifts between telephoto and wide-angle, freezing each frame of picturesque scenery in your heart.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落于伯尔尼高地上的图恩湖，拥有深蓝色的湖水，被称之为“上帝的右眼”。驻足于图恩湖畔，眼前的美丽村落，庄严的城堡，湖畔尽头的慢慢浮现的艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰，视线在长焦与广角之间切换，在心中定格每一帧如画风景。

overview.text_en:
In the morning set off for the Jungfrau region. You may choose to ride to Wilderswil to admire the red Swiss train and the Swiss fairy-tale scenery of Lauterbrunnen, then arrive at Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau. Alternatively, you may choose to ride (at your own expense) one of Europe's highest-altitude railways, passing the skiing and hiking holy land of Grindelwald, then ascend from Kleine Scheidegg to the enchanting Jungfrau, and from the "Sphinx Observation Deck" look down upon the snow-capped Jungfrau and Europe's largest and longest "Aletsch Glacier." Afterwards pass through Lauterbrunnen, admiring the beautiful alpine scenery and the waterfalls. Then proceed to visit the town of Interlaken, freely touring Hoheweg Street, Hohematte, the tranquil village nestled among greenery, dotted between mountains and water, where man and nature are in perfect harmony.
Overnight: Parkhotel du Sauvage Meiringen or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往少女峰地区，可选择随车前往维尔德斯维尔观赏红色瑞士火车、劳特布龙嫩的瑞士童话风景，随后来到少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德。或者，也可选择自费乘坐欧洲海拔较高的铁路，途径滑雪远足圣地格林德尔瓦尔德，再由小夏戴客（Kleine Schneidegg）登上迷人少女峰，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”上俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰和欧洲较大较长的“阿莱奇冰川”(Aletsch)。之后途经劳特布龙嫩，欣赏美丽的高山风光和瀑布群。之后前往参观因特拉肯小镇，自由游览何维克街，荷黑马特，宁静的村庄，绿树掩映，点缀在山水之间，人与自然浑然一体。
夜宿：迈林根自然公园酒店 或同等四星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Parkhotel du Sauvage Meiringen or an equivalent 4-star hotel
This Art Nouveau hotel, built in 1880, is famous for its connection with Sherlock Holmes and is set in a tranquil spot in Meiringen, in the heart of Switzerland. This four-star bed-and-breakfast hotel has a spacious Belle Epoque-style breakfast room, a bright and cozy conservatory, a comfortable hotel lobby, and a warm English/Irish pub. Behind the hotel is a beautiful park-like garden; during summer, the garden offers various seating, lounge areas, play areas and a barbecue area.
accommodation.text_zh:
迈林根自然公园酒店 或同等4星级酒店
这家建于 1880 年的新艺术风格酒店，因与夏洛克·福尔摩斯的渊源而闻名，坐落于瑞士中心地带迈林根的静谧之地。这家四星级住宿加早餐酒店拥有宽敞的美好年代风格早餐室、明亮温馨的温室、舒适的酒店大堂，以及温馨英式/爱尔兰式酒吧。酒店后方拥有一个美丽的公园式花园，夏季期间，花园内设有各种座椅、休闲区、游乐区以及烧烤区。

highlights.text_en:
The Jungfrau Region
As a famous representative tourist destination of Switzerland, the Jungfrau is not a single snow mountain but a series of different Swiss landscapes surrounding the Jungfrau and Interlaken, encompassing many different snow-mountain experiences, making up the exciting and rich scenic areas of the Swiss Jungfrau, First, Grindelwald and other attractions. The Jungfrau summit scenic cable car lets you experience 7 different journeys. The First Cliff Walk adventure park, as the originator of aerial-adventure tourism projects, and the high-altitude paragliding not only adorn the snow mountains but also bring many thrilling activities to the younger crowd.
highlights.text_zh:
少女峰地区
作为瑞士著名的代表性旅游胜地，少女峰不是座雪山，而是围绕着少女峰、因特拉肯的一系列不同的瑞士风景组合，包含多种不同的雪山体验，成就了精彩而丰富的瑞士少女峰 、菲斯特，格兰维尔德等景点旅游景区。 少女峰登顶景观缆车，可以感受7程不同的体验。菲斯特空天冒险乐园，作为空天探险类旅游项目的始祖，而高空滑翔伞不仅仅装饰了雪山，还给年轻群体带来了许多的刺激活动。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located some twenty to thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow all year round, while below the mountain the grass is verdant and the scenery beautiful, making it a famous sightseeing and outdoor sports destination in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is home to the famous postcard photo spot of the Swiss "dream slope" beloved by photographers, and is also an alpine town that must be passed through when touring the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen, Lauterbrunnen and others, it makes up the most magnificent and beautiful scenic route of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing destination, and in summer a paradise for hiking enthusiasts. The lakeside, green meadows, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow mountains together make this fascinating town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头最爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、劳特布龙嫩（Lauterbrunnen）等一起组成了少女峰地区最为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Lauterbrunnen lies to the west of the Jungfrau region. More than 70 waterfalls and small streams fall from the cliffs, so the literal translation of Lauterbrunnen from German is "many springs," and this town is truly a town of waterfalls. Among them, the Staubbach Falls is the town's landmark sight, which the poets Goethe and Wordsworth wrote poems to praise. In addition, there are the Murren waterfall and the Trummelbach Falls that rush down from a cave ten stories high, which should also not be missed. From Lauterbrunnen you can take the WAB railway to Wengen, Kleine Scheidegg, the Jungfrau and other places. At the same time, taking the cable car via Murren you can reach the Schilthorn and other places, taking in the magnificent scenery of the Bernese Highlands.
attractions.text_zh: 劳特布龙嫩(Lauterbrunnen)位于少女峰地区的西面，从山崖上落下来70多个瀑布和小河，所以劳特布龙嫩的德语直译是很多的泉水，这个小镇是名副其实的瀑布镇。其中施陶河瀑布是村子的标志性景观，诗人歌德和伍德·沃斯曾写诗来赞美它。此外还有米伦瀑布和从十层楼高的山洞里飞奔而下的特吕默尔河瀑布，也不可错过。从劳特布龙嫩出发可以乘WAB铁路到达翁根、克莱纳谢德格、少女峰等地。同时，乘坐缆车经米伦，可到达雪朗峰等地，饱览伯尔尼高地的雄伟风光。

attractions.text_en: Lake Brienz, at the northern foot of the Alps, has water that is blue tinged with green, called "Tiffany high-grade blue," and enjoys the reputation of being "the left eye of God." Lake Brienz has the purest lake water in Switzerland. The book "Around the World (Switzerland)" describes it thus: "An extremely charming, tranquil village, with characterful street architecture, azure-blue lake water, mysterious lakes, dense forests, lovely steam locomotives and a panorama of the Alps - the various charms of Switzerland are condensed here"......
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔卑斯山北麓的布里恩茨湖，湖水蓝中带绿，被称为Tiffany高级蓝的湖水，有着“上帝的左眼”的美誉。布里恩茨湖是瑞士最为纯净的湖水，《走遍全球（瑞士）》书上这么描述：“一个极富风情的恬静村子，富有情趣的街道建筑、蔚蓝色的湖水、神秘的湖泊、茂密的森林、可爱的蒸汽机车和阿尔卑斯全景图，瑞士的各种魅力在这里浓缩”......

attractions.text_en: Hohematte is the green meadow square in the center of Interlaken, Switzerland's famous sightseeing town. This green space was the garden of a former monastery, and now the construction of any building is prohibited to prevent damage to this beautiful scenery. This is the best place to gaze upon the Jungfrau; on the vast green meadow there is a fountain, dotted with many benches, so it is also a good place for a stroll. Hohematte is also a landing spot for hang gliders; there is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, and after payment staff will take visitors to the nearby mountains for free gliding, allowing you to enjoy the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high altitude.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Interlaken is a town at the foot of the Jungfrau, located between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, hence also called the town between the lakes. It is famous for its intoxicating scenery in all four seasons, and geographically it belongs to the center of the Bernese Highlands.
attractions.text_zh: 因特拉肯是少女峰山脚下的一个小镇，位于图恩湖及布里恩茨湖之间，又名湖间镇，以一年四季的醉人风景著名，在地理上它属于伯尔尼高地的中心。

overview.text_en:
In the morning head to Lungern and tour Lake Lungern and the town scenery. Then take the GoldenPass scenic train to Lucerne, a journey of about 1 hour, crossing mountains and ridges and admiring the beautiful scenery all the way. In the afternoon set off to tour the lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, listen to the Lion Monument recount that history of Swiss loyalty and steadfastness, as well as the Chapel Bridge, the octagonal water tower and other sights. Then proceed to Zurich to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Crowne Plaza Zurich or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往龙疆，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。之后乘坐金色山口观光列车前往卢塞恩，1小时左右的车程，穿山越岭，一路上欣赏美丽的风景。下午出发游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点。之后前往苏黎世入住酒店。
夜宿：苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Crowne Plaza Zurich or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in Zurich's lively commercial district, within walking distance of shops, bars and restaurants. The spacious and stylish guest rooms relieve a whole day's fatigue, and the simple, bright interior decor brings guests a good mood for the day. The hotel is fully equipped; guests can enjoy dinner at the hotel's a la carte restaurant or savor snacks and drinks at the hotel bar.
accommodation.text_zh:
苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落于苏黎世热闹的商业街区，步行可达的距离遍布商店、酒吧和餐馆。宽敞时尚的客房能解除您一整天的疲累，简洁明快室内装饰带给客人一天的好心情，酒店设施完备，客人可在酒店内的单点菜肴餐厅享用晚餐或在酒店的酒吧品尝小吃和饮品。

highlights.text_en:
Experience the GoldenPass scenic train, admiring a scroll of Switzerland's natural scenery all the way
The GoldenPass scenic train's golden line is the segment riding the GoldenPass from Lungern to Lucerne. The towns and villages along the route are all filled with fantastic, exquisite scenery. All the way it threads through the Alps. The train is like a red ribbon, stringing together sapphire lakes, snow-capped mountains, and agate-like red-tiled colorful houses, taking you on a wonderful journey through a fairyland. Once aboard the train, the panoramic, bright huge glass windows let you take in the scenery along the route from every angle. From the very first minute the train sets off, you are drawn into the ever-changing splendid views; you can hardly bear to blink your eyes, afraid of missing each changing scene.
highlights.text_zh:
体验金色山口观光列车，一路欣赏瑞士的自然景观画卷
金色山口观光列车的黄金线，是乘坐金色山口号从龙疆前往卢塞恩段。沿线的城镇村庄，都是充满奇幻的精致景色。一路穿行于阿尔卑斯山脉之中。列车如一道红色的彩线，串起蓝宝石的湖泊，白雪皑皑的群山，玛瑙般的红瓦彩屋，带你畅游美妙的神仙境界。坐上列车，全景敞亮巨大的玻璃光窗，让你从各个角度，都能尽揽沿线风光美景。从列车启动的第一分钟起，就会被带入变幻无穷的胜景之中，你不舍得眨一下眼睛，生怕错过每一个变化的景色。

attractions.text_en: Switzerland's GoldenPass train shuttles through the beautiful regions of the Alps, taking in the charming lake and mountain scenery all the way. One of the most beautiful segments is the GoldenPass section from Lungern to Lucerne (Luzern-Lungern). Along the way are graceful villages, azure lake water, lush vegetation, vast pastures, leisurely cattle and sheep, and the snow-capped Alps; the scenery changing from mountain foot to mountaintop makes one marvel that this is a fairyland on earth.
attractions.text_zh: 瑞士的黄金列车穿梭于阿尔卑斯美丽的区域，一路总览迷人的湖光山色。其中美丽的一段就是龙疆（Lungern）到卢塞恩（Luzern）这一段的金色山口列车（Luzren-Lungern），沿途秀美的村庄，碧蓝的湖水，茂密的植被，广袤的牧场，悠闲的牛羊，还有白雪皑皑的阿尔卑斯山脉，从山脚到山顶变幻的风景，让人感叹这就是人间仙境。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled among mountains and water, Lucerne possesses the distinctive beauty of the medieval era: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance halls and mansions, as well as century-old shops and ancient long streets and lanes, are everywhere. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the city's beautiful views in a dreamlike, almost magical way; it is the extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small cities. From the 19th century onward, it has attracted numerous princes, nobles and men of letters to come and visit and reside, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass train passes through here. It has the purest alpine lake water in Switzerland, surrounded by mountains with verdant green meadows; quaint villages are scattered along the shore of Lake Lungern, looking just like a paradise far from the hustle and bustle.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口列车就会从这里经过。这里拥有瑞士最为纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Lake Lucerne has a winding shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms the classic "lake and mountain scenery," attracting large numbers of visitors to come and sightsee. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight of Lake Lucerne, and so this piece acquired the title "Moonlight" - although this was not Beethoven's original intention.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩湖这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: This statue of a dying lion was carved into natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground, with a broken spear plunged into its shoulder, and beside it a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms. This statue was made to commemorate the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on August 10, 1792, protecting the safety of the family of Louis XVI in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; below the statue there is text describing the course of this event. In those days Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, forced by livelihood, went one after another to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave in battle, but honor and money could not mask the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, retaining only the Guard serving the Catholic Holy See - that famous Swiss Guard. Owing to its famous loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served right up to the present. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and hailed the "dying lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Zurich, Switzerland's financial metropolis, and visit the old town of Zurich, Lake Zurich, the Lindenhof Park, and stroll along the banks of the Limmat River.
Then head to Milan and freely visit Milan's landmark building, the Milan Cathedral (exterior), and one of Europe's most beautiful commercial arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II.
Overnight: UNA Hotel Milan or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往瑞士金融大都会苏黎世，参观苏黎世老城，苏黎世湖，林登霍夫公园，漫步利马特河边。
之后前往米兰自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊。
夜宿：米兰UNA酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
UNA Hotel Milan or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the center of Milan, just a 10-minute drive from the Duomo Cathedral and a few minutes' walk from the metro station and shopping street, making it convenient for guests to reach all the attractions. The hotel's interior is mainly in warm Italian style and authentic Milanese style, offers a sumptuous buffet breakfast, and also has high-tech conference and fitness facilities. The guest rooms feature light-toned modern decor with elegant flooring, and the restaurant serves Italian and international specialty dishes.
accommodation.text_zh:
米兰UNA酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于米兰市中心，距离米兰大教堂（Duomo Cathedral）仅10分钟车程，距离地铁站以及购物街仅几分钟路程，方便客人前往所有的景点。酒店内装以热情的意大利式款和正宗的米兰风格为主、提供丰盛的自助早餐，还设有高科技会议和健身设施。客房享有浅色调的现代装饰，铺有优雅的地板，餐厅供应意大利和国际特色菜肴。

highlights.text_en:
Paying homage to the Milan Cathedral, which took 500 years to build and is renowned throughout the world for its numerous exquisite carvings and Gothic spires
Begun in 1387, the Gothic Milan Cathedral took 500 years to complete. The cathedral has a total of 135 spires large and small, each with a statue, so it is also the Gothic church with the most statues in the world, with about 6,000 marble statues in all.
highlights.text_zh:
瞻仰历经500年建成，以众多精美的雕刻和哥特式的塔尖而闻名于世的米兰大教堂
始建于1387年，历经500年时间才完成是哥特式建筑米兰大教堂，教堂上共有135大小尖塔，每个塔上都有一座雕像，因此它也是世界上雕像最多的哥特式教堂，共有大理石雕像约6000多座。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Zurich is an experience not to be missed. Here are gathered traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookshops and flower shops, as well as jewelry and fashion boutiques, and of course Zurich's own local brands. Famous streets and lanes such as Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg, Niederdorf and Augustine Lane are all located in the old town. Strolling through the old town at night, you will find this place transformed into a place of entertainment for the public.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世的老城区是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰，时尚精品，当然也少不了苏黎世本土品牌。班霍夫大街(Bahnhofstrasse)、伦韦格街(Rennweg)、尼德道尔夫(Niederdorf)与圣奥古斯丁巷(Augustine Lane)等著名街巷都位于老城区。晚上漫步于老城区，会发现这里又变成了民众的娱乐场所。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long, with the docks on the lake filled with all kinds of yachts, looking just like a rich people's club. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center, where white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere on the lake, leisurely and content, a harmonious scene. The north shore of Lake Zurich is the residence of the wealthy, known as the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." At the end of Bahnhofstrasse lies Lake Zurich. As one of "the world's most livable cities," the life of true Zurichers is everywhere imbued with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Lindenhof, meaning "the courtyard of linden trees," is a park set on a small hill covered with linden trees in the center of Zurich's old town. Right before you is the Limmat River, making it an ideal place to admire the Grossmunster (Zurich Cathedral) and the scenery of the right bank. It is also where, at the beginning of the feature "Crash Landing on You," the perfect scene of the two protagonists passing each other was captured.
attractions.text_zh: 林登霍夫(Lindenhof)，意思为菩提树的中庭，公园坐落于苏黎世老城中心一片被菩提树覆盖的小山丘上。眼前就是利马特河，是欣赏苏黎世大教堂和右岸风光的理想之地。也是为《爱的迫降》的正片开始时，定格了两人擦身而过的完美的画面。

attractions.text_en: The Limmat River is drawn from the northern end of Lake Zurich, then flows through the center of Zurich, and continues northwest for 35 kilometers, finally emptying into the Aare River. Walking along the banks of the Limmat, watching the slowly flowing river water, is another quiet and peaceful day - this is probably the feeling of serene contentment. The swans in the river inadvertently appearing as visitors take photos add a touch of liveliness and playfulness to this calm river.
attractions.text_zh: 利马特河从苏黎世湖北端引出，然后流经苏黎世市中心，再向西北方流35公里，最后注入阿勒河（Aare）。行走在利马特河边，看着缓慢流动的河水，又是静谧而祥和的一天，这大概就是岁月静好的感觉，河里天鹅在游人拍照时不经意的闯入，又为这平静的河水增添一丝灵动和跳脱之感。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Towering in the city center, the Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and thousands of statues are carved on the white marble exterior walls. The interior space is broad, and sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics of the windows, the light hazy, full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the cathedral's crypt are also preserved the remains of the Church of Santa Tecla that stood on the original site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This cross-shaped glass-vaulted arcade built in the 19th century is not only one of the oldest shopping centers in the world, but also a city-scale model of art and architecture. Here are gathered the flagship stores of Italian luxury brands such as Prada and Gucci, but even if you do not shop, strolling through it is like walking through a museum. At the time-honored cafes at the end of the arcade, such as Caffe Biffi or Savini Milano, you can order an espresso or savor a tiramisu dessert and experience the unhurried ease and elegance of the Italian pace of life.
attractions.text_zh: 这条19世纪修建的十字形玻璃拱顶长廊不仅是世界上最古老的购物中心之一，更是一座城市级的艺术与建筑典范。这里汇聚了Prada、Gucci等意大利奢侈品牌旗舰店，但即便不购物，漫步其中也如同穿行于一座博物馆。在长廊尽头的老字号咖啡馆，如Caffè Biffi或Savini Milano，您可点一杯意式浓缩咖啡或品尝提拉米苏甜点，体会意式生活节奏的从容与优雅。

overview.text_en:
In the morning set off for Venice and visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings constructed upon the water, together with the winding water lanes, make the romantic charm of Venice linger long and refuse to fade away
Overnight: voco Venice or Four Points by Sheraton Venice or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或威尼斯福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
voco Venice or Four Points by Sheraton Venice or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of the newly renovated hotels in Venice, with an excellent location, stylish modern design, and guest rooms with natural tones and modern interior decor, providing you with a comfortable and cozy stay experience. The hotel offers a sumptuous breakfast, a fully equipped gym, a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails, and the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian fine cuisine and international food.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或威尼斯福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和国际美食。

highlights.text_en:
The world's most beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic," still dazzlingly resplendent
Venice, as one of the important centers of the Renaissance, is composed of 118 small islands, linked into a whole by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands" and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the world's most beautiful squares, "St. Mark's Square," the beautiful Grand Canal, the reborn-from-the-fire La Fenice opera house, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs of which Xu Zhimo wrote, and the breathtakingly beautiful arcades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting, and also the filming location of many movie scenes. Her unique temperament leaves every visitor enchanted and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: This magnificent Byzantine-style church is famous for its five onion-shaped domes and golden mosaic decorations, embodying the glorious history of Venice's golden age and its trade with the East. Rich in exterior detail, blending the artistic languages of East and West, it is a landmark of Venice not to be missed.
attractions.text_zh: 这座拜占庭风格的华丽教堂，以其五座洋葱形圆顶和金色马赛克装饰而闻名，体现了威尼斯黄金时代与东方贸易的辉煌历史。外观细节丰富，融合东方与西方的艺术语言，是威尼斯不可错过的地标。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located in Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside there are not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you walk across the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through small holes, rather than the many people on the opposite bridge looking over at you. Photos can be taken inside, as long as you do not use flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route by which the court sent condemned prisoners to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is of early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, with the upper part covered by a vault and very tightly enclosed, having only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner had been tried at the Doge's Palace, the felons were taken to the dungeon, and as they crossed this airtight bridge they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows. From then on they lost their freedom and involuntarily uttered sighs. It is said that if lovers kiss beneath the bridge they can love forever, and the movie "A Little Romance" was filmed here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: St. Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco), also known as Venice's central square, has always been the center of Venice's political, religious and traditional festival public activities. St. Mark's Square is a rectangular square enclosed by buildings including the Doge's Palace, St. Mark's Basilica, St. Mark's Campanile, the New and Old Procuratie buildings, the Napoleonic Wing connecting the two buildings, the four-cornered bell tower of St. Mark's Basilica and the Marciana Library, as well as the Venice Grand Canal. It is about 170 meters long, about 80 meters wide on the east side, and about 55 meters wide on the west side. The buildings surrounding the square are all exquisite Renaissance structures.
attractions.text_zh: 圣马可广场(Plazza San Marco) 又称威尼斯中心广场，一直是威尼斯的政治、宗教和传统节日的公共活动中心。圣马可广场是由公爵府、圣马可大教堂、圣马可钟楼、新、旧行政官邸大楼、连接两大楼的拿破仑翼大楼、圣马可大教堂的四角形钟楼和圣马可图书馆等建筑和威尼斯大运河所围成的长方形广场，长约170米，东边宽约80米，西侧宽约55米。广场四周的建筑都是文艺复兴时期的精美建筑。

overview.text_en:
In the morning set off for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, and visit the world's third largest cathedral - the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, the Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge), and the Piazzale Michelangelo of Florence, where you can climb up and look down upon the whole city's scenery, taking it all in. It is also a great spot to watch the sunrise and sunset; under the cover of sunlight, the city of Florence radiates different splendor.
Overnight: Tuscan villa hotel in Florence or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥以及佛罗伦萨米开朗琪罗广场，在这您登高俯瞰，全城的风景尽收眼底，也是观赏日出和日落的好位置，在阳光笼罩下，佛罗伦萨城焕发出不同的光彩。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Tuscan villa hotel in Florence or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is an 18th-century Tuscan-style villa in Florence, offering guests a luxurious Tuscan stay experience. The hotel's guest rooms all feature authentic Florentine-style decor with antique furniture. The hotel has a beautiful park planted with century-old olive trees and colorful flowers; in the greenery, the Italian garden is reshaped with its elegant geometric forms and flowers and trees, contrasting interestingly with the medieval "enclosed garden" (hortus conclusus), more private and reserved. The typical Tuscan style is perfectly blended with the unique and dignified style of the oldest rooms. The hotel offers an outdoor swimming pool and a gym.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店是佛罗伦萨的一栋18世纪的托斯卡纳风格的别墅，为客人提供托斯卡纳奢华的住宿体验。酒店的客房均享有地道的佛罗伦萨风格装饰，配有仿古家具，酒店拥有种植着百年橄榄树和五彩鲜花的美丽公园，在绿地中，意大利花园以其优雅的几何形状和花草树木重新塑造，与中世纪花园“封闭花园”（hortus conclusus）相映成趣，更加私密而内敛。典型的托斯卡纳风格与最古老房间的独特和尊贵风格完美融合。酒店提供室外游泳池、健身房。

highlights.text_en:
The glorious heyday of Florence, the radiant brilliance of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Among the blue skies and white clouds, the brightly colored walls, the dark green shutters, and the dark red roofs, seek the soul of the Renaissance; in the streets and alleys, squares and churches, museums and art galleries, feel the ageless Renaissance. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic soul of Dante Alighieri and the painterly soul of da Vinci still float over the skies of Florence, still continue to pursue those people and events of the European Renaissance period....."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利．但丁的诗魂、达．芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but very few can be so enchanting. This beautiful cathedral, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets the classical, elegant and free qualities esteemed in the Renaissance era to the fullest. No wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new cathedral, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria enjoys the reputation of an open-air sculpture museum, and has been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earliest large-span circular-arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over several hundred years, it has stood firm through the floods, social upheavals and wars it has experienced. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Located in the southeast of Florence, the Piazzale Michelangelo is a famous spot for overlooking the beautiful panorama of the city. In the center of the square is placed a replica of Michelangelo's immortal work - "David." From the square you can see the whole city's appearance: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, Giotto's Campanile, the Bargello, the Old Bridge and more, all taken in at a glance. This is also a great spot for watching the sunrise and sunset; as the light changes, watch Florence radiate different splendor.
attractions.text_zh: 位于佛罗伦萨东南的米开朗基罗广场是著名的俯瞰城市美丽全景的地点，广场中央安放着米开朗基罗的不朽之作——《大卫》的复制品，广场上可以看到全城的风貌：圣母百花大教堂、乔托钟楼、巴杰罗美术馆、老桥等尽收眼底。这里也是观赏日出和日落的好位置，随着光线的变幻，看佛罗伦萨焕发出不同的光彩。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast set off to tour the Cinque Terre, traveling along the Ligurian coast to visit beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs.
In the afternoon head to Pisa and tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli in Pisa's historical and cultural center.
Overnight: Tuscan villa hotel in Florence or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: If, due to factors such as severe weather or a railway company strike, it is impossible to tour the Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically be changed to touring the coastal cities by coach or other means.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村。
下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Tuscan villa hotel in Florence or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is an 18th-century Tuscan-style villa in Florence, offering guests a luxurious Tuscan stay experience. The hotel's guest rooms all feature authentic Florentine-style decor with antique furniture. The hotel has a beautiful park planted with century-old olive trees and colorful flowers; in the greenery, the Italian garden is reshaped with its elegant geometric forms and flowers and trees, contrasting interestingly with the medieval "enclosed garden" (hortus conclusus), more private and reserved. The typical Tuscan style is perfectly blended with the unique and dignified style of the oldest rooms. The hotel offers an outdoor swimming pool and a gym.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店是佛罗伦萨的一栋18世纪的托斯卡纳风格的别墅，为客人提供托斯卡纳奢华的住宿体验。酒店的客房均享有地道的佛罗伦萨风格装饰，配有仿古家具，酒店拥有种植着百年橄榄树和五彩鲜花的美丽公园，在绿地中，意大利花园以其优雅的几何形状和花草树木重新塑造，与中世纪花园“封闭花园”（hortus conclusus）相映成趣，更加私密而内敛。典型的托斯卡纳风格与最古老房间的独特和尊贵风格完美融合。酒店提供室外游泳池、健身房。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a paradise on the cliffs
Along the long coastline of the Mediterranean, stopping at each beautiful fishing village, watching the sun-bathed beaches, the waves quietly lapping the rocks, the colorful houses coming into view from far to near, your curiosity to gaze at the beautiful fishing villages reaching its peak the moment you arrive. Stepping off the boat, hiking through the small lanes of the fishing village, the closer you walk the more delightful the surprises. It is like savoring a five-colored visual feast of delicacies, tasting the flavors bit by bit; this sight, this scene, is so beautiful it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，下得船来，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in Italy's Liguria region, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for the five cliff-edge villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the world's most beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers, taking around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other the mountains, and ahead are Italian fishing villages - a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage list.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in Tuscany, Italy. It is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, selected as a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. It is said that in the year 1590, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's view.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Piazza del Duomo, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassed. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, with four major buildings on the square: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa cemetery (Camposanto). Ancient walls and gates are also preserved around the square. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off to tour the town of San Gimignano, freely touring the Torre Grossa (exterior), the town hall (exterior), the Piazza della Cisterna (Well Square) and other sights. Then head to Siena and tour the old city of Siena, the Siena Cathedral (exterior), the Piazza del Campo, the town hall (exterior), and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Then head to Pienza and tour the old city of Pienza, after which head to the cypress path for free photography, then proceed to Rome to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: River Palace Hotel Rome or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发游览圣吉米尼亚诺小镇，自由游览格罗塔楼（外观），市政厅（外观），水井广场等景点。随后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳古城，锡耶纳大教堂（外观)，田野广场，市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。随后前往皮恩扎，游览皮恩扎古城，之后前往丝柏小路自由拍照，前往罗马入住酒店。
夜宿：罗马河畔宫殿酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
River Palace Hotel Rome or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Adjacent to the Borghese Park, the River Palace enjoys convenient transport and a bustling commercial area, making it easy to walk to all the attractions in the center of ancient Rome. The hotel adopts Italian classical design and is furnished with antique furniture; the comfortable yet stylish guest rooms all feature Art Deco style, letting every guest feel the rich Italian culture and artistic life. The hotel offers guests a large buffet breakfast each day including homemade pastries, fresh fruit, meats and cheeses. Many restaurants around the hotel serve classic Italian flavors and Roman specialty dishes.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马河畔宫殿酒店或同等4星级酒店
比邻波格赛公园的河畔宫殿，交通便利商业繁华，方便步行游览古罗马市中心的所有景点，酒店采用了意大利的古典设计并且配置了古董家具，舒适而时尚客房均设有装饰艺术风格，让每位入住的客人感受到浓郁的意大利文化艺术生活，酒店每天为客人提供包括自制糕点、新鲜水果、肉类和奶酪的大型自助早餐。酒店周围诸多餐厅供应经典的意大利风味美食和罗马特色佳肴。

highlights.text_en:
San Gimignano
It is a famous medieval hilltop town of Tuscany, renowned for its well-preserved medieval towers, and known as the "Medieval Manhattan." Walking on the ancient stone-paved roads, with thousand-year-old stone houses and towering towers on either side, it is as if you have returned to medieval Italy. Though the town is not large, it is full of artistic atmosphere. Besides the magnificent townscape, you can also taste the multiple-award-winning world-champion gelato of Gelateria Dondoli and the locally famous white wine Vernaccia. This is one of the most poetic stops in Tuscany.
Set in the Elsa Valley of Tuscany, it is like a medieval dreamland. After the Etruscans settled here, it became a small town in the 10th century, with 72 towers at its peak. Stroll among the 14 towers that now remain, visit the fresco-covered collegiate church and the civic museum on the cathedral square, and you can also climb the 177-foot Torre Grossa to look down upon the whole town.
highlights.text_zh:
圣吉米尼亚诺（San Gimignano）
是托斯卡纳著名的中世纪山城，以保存完好的中世纪塔楼而闻名，有“中世纪曼哈顿”之称。走在古老的石板路上，两侧是千年历史的石屋与高耸塔楼，仿佛回到中世纪的意大利。小城虽不大，但充满艺术气息，除了壮丽的城市风貌，还可在此品尝获奖无数的世界冠军冰淇淋 Gelateria Dondoli 和当地著名的白葡萄酒 Vernaccia。这里是托斯卡纳最具诗意的停留地之一。
坐落在托斯卡纳的埃尔莎山谷，就像一个中世纪幻境。伊特鲁里亚人定居之后，10世纪这里成为一个小镇，鼎盛时期拥有72座塔。漫步在现在剩下的14座塔上，参观壁画覆盖的牧师会教堂和大教堂广场的公民博物馆，还可以登上177英尺的托雷格罗萨俯瞰全城。

attractions.text_en: The Torre Grossa is a tower in San Gimignano open to the public, and also the tallest tower, with a total height of 54 meters, begun in the early 14th century. It was once part of the new Palazzo del Podesta; from the tower one can take in the beautiful views of San Gimignano and the Tuscan hill country.
attractions.text_zh: 格罗萨塔楼是圣吉米亚诺中一个对公众开放的塔楼，也是较高的塔楼，总高为54米，始建于14世纪初。它曾是新的波德斯塔宫宫的一部分，塔楼可以一览圣吉米亚诺和托斯卡纳丘陵山区的美景。

attractions.text_en: This World Heritage medieval tower town, though small, condenses the finest scenery of Tuscany. The Piazza della Cisterna (Well Square) is the absolute core; this triangular square is paved with cobblestones, surrounded by 13th-century stone towers and arcades, and the ancient well in the center was once the lifeline of the whole town. Standing here looking up at the densely clustered towers, you can directly feel where the title "Medieval Manhattan" comes from.
attractions.text_zh: 这座被列入世界遗产的中世纪塔城虽小，却浓缩了托斯卡纳最精华的景观。水井广场是绝对核心，这个三角形广场由鹅卵石铺就，四周环绕着13世纪的石塔与拱廊，中央的古井曾是全城命脉。站在这里仰视林立的塔楼，能直观感受“中世纪曼哈顿”的称号从何而来。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval ancient city, is full of the masterpieces of great artists and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing stone-paved lanes and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you are in medieval Europe of a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. For several centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time had stood still here since the 14th century. Besides its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also preserves a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of sweets. On your trip to Siena, do not forget to taste the local specialties - the almond soft cakes ricciarelli, the nut tart panforte, the peppery spiced nut cake pan pepato, the rice pudding budini di riso, the walnut cookies cavallucci, or the walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: The Piazza del Campo (also called Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena. Directly opposite the square are the Siena town hall and tower; inside the town hall is the civic museum, which holds many paintings of the Sienese school, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is the Torre del Mangia; it is Siena's landmark building and the second tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of stairs and take in the beautiful views of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳标志性建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a small town on a hill in the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. In 1459 he oversaw the rebuilding of Pienza, which is regarded as a model of the "ideal city," and is therefore hailed as "the touchstone of Renaissance urban life." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, Pienza's unique feature is that from the city walls one can look down upon the scenery of the World Heritage "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress path, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped bends and neatly arranged cypresses, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere, attracting countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and take photos.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast head to the world-famous historic and cultural city of Rome, the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, called the "Eternal City" for its long history. Visit the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior) standing on the ruins of the ancient Roman capital, and tour the Piazza di Spagna and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). In the afternoon head to Sorrento to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento coast hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: The main attractions in Rome's old city are all within Rome's vehicle-restricted zone (ZTL). The hotel's location is convenient for walking to the various attractions; the touring in Rome that day is on foot, with a round-trip walking distance of about 5 kilometers, so please wear light and comfortable clothing.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后前往世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“ 。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。下午前往索伦托入住酒店。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
备注：罗马古城区内的主要景点，均在罗马车辆禁行区内（ZTL）。酒店所在位置方便步行游览各个景点，罗马当天为步行游览，往返步行行程约为5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento coast hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a fine choice for enjoying Sorrento's sea views, boasting magnificent views of the Bay of Naples at Sorrento. The hotel is surrounded by sea views on three sides, with a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles and a fully equipped marine SPA center. It is within walking distance of the bustling seaside town center, and the hotel pier is the mooring point for the sea-going yachts.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en: An in-depth exploration of Rome, an important cradle of world culture, seeking the historical civilization accumulated over thousands of years amid the ancient ruins that occupy about half of the city's area. Whether it is the world-famous architectural ruins composed of the imperial senate, triumphal arches, victory columns, the Pantheon and the Colosseum, or the numerous exquisite Renaissance buildings and art masterpieces held in hundreds of museums, or even the city's many fountains of myriad postures represented by the Trevi Fountain, as well as the vast roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares, public baths and other public buildings - all freeze art in that wonderful moment. Someone said "architecture is flowing music," and what the architecture of ancient Rome plays must be a powerful and timeless movement.
highlights.text_zh: 深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马，在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的必然是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum located in the center of Rome was built by ancient Rome at the time to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great ancient Roman Empire. It was the place where slave owners, nobles and free men of ancient Rome exclusively watched beast fights or slave gladiatorial combat, and is a famous historical relic of Rome. The Colosseum can be called a model masterpiece and a marvel in architectural history, renowned the world over for being huge, majestic and spectacular. Although only most of its skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and magnificent momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of over 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman king (king of Italy) Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I and others rest here forever. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, the son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of the exquisite architectural techniques of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza di Spagna once appeared in scenes of the movie "Roman Holiday," and has become a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and lovely figure seems to have merged with the Piazza di Spagna and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never erase. The whole Piazza di Spagna is not large in area, with the crowds mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The Spanish Steps have a total of 138 steps and are the widest steps in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲较宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain," or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of the sea god Neptune from Roman mythology, with a grand and magnificent overall momentum. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, if it lands in the water, your dream will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, embark on a charming boat day trip to explore the treasures of the Amalfi Coast. Take a boat to Positano to explore the charming cliff village, then take a boat to Amalfi to admire the panorama of the towns of the Amalfi Coast. Then take the boat back and check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento coast hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: If extreme weather conditions occur at sea, out of consideration for the safety of the tourists, the cruise company will cancel the sea trip to Positano and Amalfi, and our agency will arrange a coach tour that day to visit the old town of Sorrento; Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the sea cruise fee will be refunded to the tourists.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，踏上迷人游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，然后乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景。之后乘船返回，入住酒店。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento coast hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a fine choice for enjoying Sorrento's sea views, boasting magnificent views of the Bay of Naples at Sorrento. The hotel is surrounded by sea views on three sides, with a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles and a fully equipped marine SPA center. It is within walking distance of the bustling seaside town center, and the hotel pier is the mooring point for the sea-going yachts.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
[Paradise on Earth]: The Amalfi Coast
The Amalfi Coast is a World Cultural Heritage site, and was named by the American magazine "National Geographic" as one of the 51 beautiful places one must visit in a lifetime. Here there is a winding coastline and spectacular cliffs and crags, as well as hidden medieval fishing towns, described as "highly dramatic." Here there are ancient medieval towns famous for their unique culture and architecture. Among them, the more popular towns include Amalfi, Positano, Ravello and Maiori. In these towns, you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers and temples; the history of these buildings can be traced back several centuries, and each building has its own story.
highlights.text_zh:
【人间天堂】：阿马尔菲海岸
阿马尔菲海岸是一处世界文化遗产，更被美国《国家地理》杂志评为一生中必须去的51个美丽的地方之一。这里有蜿蜒的海岸线和壮观的悬崖峭壁，还隐藏着中世纪渔业小镇，被形容为“高度戏剧性”。这里有着古老的中世纪小镇，这些小镇以其独特的文化和建筑而著名。其中较受欢迎的小镇包括阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和莱马尼。在这些小镇中，你可以看到许多古老的教堂、城堡、钟楼和神殿，这些建筑物的历史可以追溯到几个世纪以前，每个建筑都有着自己的故事。

attractions.text_en: It is located on the coast of the Province of Salerno in the Campania region of southern Italy; the town closest to the coast is called Amalfi, from which the name comes. Looking at it as a whole, here is half sea and half sheer cliff, on which are the winding mountain roads and the scattered, well-arranged villas.
attractions.text_zh: 它位于意大利南部坎帕尼亚区萨莱诺省沿海，最接近海岸的小镇叫阿马尔菲(Amalfi)，由此得名。整体看去，这里一半是大海，一半是绝壁，绝壁上是蜿蜒的盘山公路和错落有致的别墅。

attractions.text_en: Positano is a small town along the Amalfi Coast in the Campania region of Italy. The main part of the town faces the sea with its back to the mountains. One writer described it thus: Positano is a dreamland; when you are there, she is not quite real, but after you leave, she becomes vivid and lifelike. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as Europe's beautiful beach; here the coastline twists and turns, with mountains and islands rising majestically along the shore, valleys interlacing with headlands, orchards coexisting with wild plants. In the pristine natural environment there is rich human history, and scattered through the dense mountain forests are many picturesque towns, the most beautiful of which is called Positano.
attractions.text_zh: 波西塔诺是位于意大利坎帕尼亚大区阿马尔菲海岸‎沿岸的一个小镇。城镇主要部份背山面海，一位作家这样形容：波西塔诺是一个梦乡，你在时，她不是很真切，你离开后，她变的栩栩如生。阿马尔菲海岸被誉为欧洲美丽的海滩，这里的海岸线蜿蜒曲折，岸上山岛耸峙巍峨，山谷与海岬交错，果园与野生植物并存，原生态的自然环境中有丰富的人文历史，浓密山林中散落着许多如诗如画的小镇，而其中较漂亮的那一个叫做波西塔诺

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to the port of Naples to take a ferry to the port of Capri. That day you may walk along the seaside on your own and then visit the Blue Grotto, or take a boat around the island on your own to explore the Blue Grotto, or go on your own to the town of Capri to tour the Gardens of Augustus and look down over the entire bay; then take the ferry back to Naples, after which return to Rome and end the pleasant journey in the city of Rome!
Overnight: No accommodation
After landing on Capri, free activity; no transport fees are included. The recommended route is the Marina Grande - the old town of Capri - the Gardens of Augustus, a one-way mountain route of about 1.3 kilometers passing three important sights. Along the way there are funiculars and taxis, which require additional payment.
The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction; if there is a high tide, wind and waves, or other factors, and the local marine weather agency declares it closed, then it cannot be visited. The Blue Grotto tour fee is not included in the tour group; to avoid misunderstandings, please follow local custom and, in addition to the Blue Grotto manual boatman fee, pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往那不勒斯码头乘坐渡船到达卡普里岛港口。当天或自行前往海边漫步后前往蓝洞参观，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园，俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船返回那不勒斯，之后返回罗马，在罗马市区结束愉快旅行！
夜宿：无住宿
卡普里岛登岛后自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港 -卡普里古城 - 奥古斯都花园单程路线约1.3公里的山路，途径三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车，需要额外付费。
卡普里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

accommodation.text_en: No accommodation
accommodation.text_zh: 无住宿

highlights.text_en:
The blue wonder of Capri, the "Blue Grotto"
Capri has been a famous tourist and health resort since the era of ancient Rome. On his return journey after the eastern campaign, Emperor Augustus landed on this island and, captivated by its beautiful environment and pleasant climate, did not hesitate to exchange the island of Ischia at four times the value for the island of Capri, as his own summer retreat. Capri is of limestone terrain, with steep crags, and among the rocks there are many strange caves, the most famous of which is the "Blue Grotto." The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world. The entrance of the Blue Grotto is below the cliff; the entrance is very small, and one can only enter by small boat. Owing to the special structure of the entrance, on the one hand sunlight can enter the cave from the entrance, and on the other hand it is reflected up from the bottom of the water in the cave, so the seawater in the cave is a crystalline blue, mysterious and unfathomable, and even the rocks in the cave turn blue, hence the name "Blue Grotto." To visit the Blue Grotto you must choose the right time: first, the weather must be clear; second, you must go at low tide; third, there must be no wind or waves.
highlights.text_zh:
卡普里岛蓝色奇观“蓝洞”
卡普里岛从古罗马时期开始,这里就是著名的旅游疗养胜地，奥古斯都大帝在东方战役结束后的归途中曾在该岛登陆，被这里的优美环境、宜人气候所折服，不惜以4倍的伊斯基亚岛换取卡普里岛，作为自己的避暑之地。卡普里岛属于石灰质地形，岩石峭立，岩石间有许多奇特的岩洞，其中最著名的就是“蓝洞”。蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一。蓝洞的洞口在悬崖的下面，洞口很小，只能乘坐小船才能进入。由于洞口的特殊结构，一方面阳光可以从洞口进入洞内，一方面又从洞内水底反射上来，因此洞内的海水一片晶蓝，神秘莫测，连洞内的岩石也变成了蓝色，故称“蓝洞”。参观蓝洞一定要选择时机：一要天气晴朗、二要在退潮的时候去、三要没有风浪。

attractions.text_en: Capri is located near the southern entrance of the Bay of Naples and belongs to the Campania region of Italy. On the island are the ruins of two medieval castles, Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as the church dedicated to the island's patron saint, San Costanzo. It is one of the famous tourist destinations of southern Italy. Capri's forests, waters, air, sunshine and the island villas most coveted by the world's wealthy have attracted people from all over the world. Among them, the Blue Grotto is the attraction that everyone who comes to Capri will certainly visit; when the weather is clear and bright, sunlight shines into the cave, and every corner of the deep blue cave is exquisitely beautiful.
attractions.text_zh: 卡普里岛位于那不勒斯湾南部入海口附近，属意大利坎佩尼亚区。岛上有巴巴罗萨和卡斯蒂利奥内两座中世纪城堡遗迹以及供奉该岛守护神圣科斯坦佑的教堂，是意大利南部著名的游览胜地之一。卡普里岛的森林、水域、空气、阳光和较令全世界富豪憧憬的岛屿别墅，曾吸引了来自世界各地的人们，其中蓝洞是每一个人来卡普里岛一定会参观的景点，天清气朗时，阳光照射入洞穴，深蓝的洞穴内每一处角落都美不胜收。

attractions.text_en:
The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world and is the most famous attraction of Capri; for many people the purpose of going to Capri is precisely to see the wonder of the Blue Grotto. You can enter the Blue Grotto for a tour by small boat. Owing to the special structure of the entrance, the seawater in the cave is a crystalline blue. The surface water of the Blue Grotto presents a deep, dim blue, while the deeper water is sky blue, and the seawater sets off the rocks in the cave so that they too are all azure. When the weather is clear, the Blue Grotto is exceptionally beautiful and enchanting.
The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction; if there is a high tide, wind and waves, or other factors, and the local marine weather agency declares it closed, then it cannot be visited. The Blue Grotto tour fee is not included in the tour group; to avoid misunderstandings, please follow local custom and, in addition to the Blue Grotto manual boatman fee, pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
attractions.text_zh:
蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，是卡普里较著名的景点，很多人去卡普里的目的就是为了一睹蓝洞奇观。可乘小船进入蓝洞游览，由于洞口的特殊结构，使得洞里的海水一片晶蓝。蓝洞表层的海水呈现幽幽的深蓝色，而深层海水却是天蓝色的，海水映衬得洞中的岩石也都一片蔚蓝。天气晴朗的时候，蓝洞分外的美丽和妖娆。
卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

attractions.text_en: Located in the town of Capri, the Gardens of Augustus record the ten years that Augustine lived here. One side of the garden is a sheer cliff, and in the distance is the azure seawater. On the left side of the garden are the Lovers' Rocks; legend has it that these Lovers' Rocks were originally lovers in love who, unable to be together, threw themselves one after another into the sea to die for love, and afterwards became these rocks leaning on and nestling against each other.
