attractions.text_zh: 位于卡普里小镇上的奥古斯都花园记录着奥古斯丁在这里居住的十年生活。花园一侧是断壁，远处则是碧蓝的海水。在花园的左侧是情人石，相传这情人石原本是相爱的恋人，因无法恋爱纷纷跳入海中殉情，之后就成了这相依相偎的石头。

attractions.text_en: One of the oldest museums in the world, it is a world-renowned treasure house of art. The Louvre building is shaped like a "U", divided into two parts: new and old. The glass pyramid entrance in front of the Louvre was designed by the master architect of Chinese descent I. M. Pei. It houses more than 400,000 artistic treasures, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing artworks ranging from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria, and Rome to medieval Europe and various Eastern countries. It can be called an outstanding palace of art in human history.
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品，其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。

attractions.text_en: The Champ de Mars is a large ribbon-shaped park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, lying between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the École Militaire to its southeast. Before the second half of the 18th century, this was an abandoned vacant lot; it was not until the Military School was established in 1765 that its status gradually rose, when its main purpose was to serve as a site for military training. On July 17, 1791, during the French Revolution, a massacre and bloodshed took place here. Later, France used this site to host several World's Fairs as well as the 1900 Olympic Games.
attractions.text_zh: 战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the landmarks of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the landmark of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en: Take the famous transparent-cabin "Bateaux Mouches" cruise sailing along the banks of the Seine, which weaves together many sights. Over a 3.2-kilometer, roughly one-hour voyage, it passes such famous attractions as Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées, and the Île de la Cité in Paris. On the surface of the Seine you can feel the romantic night scenery of Paris, the beautiful views and the wonderful music; it is hailed as "a not-to-be-missed in-depth tour of Paris."
attractions.text_zh: 乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途经巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道、巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

attractions.text_en: The Cathedral of Notre-Dame de Paris is located on the Île de la Cité in the center of Paris and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The cathedral is in the Gothic style, with the 17th-century great bell tower, the gargoyles on the outer walls of the cathedral, and the beautiful scenery of the Île de la Cité and the Seine to take in. (If there is a religious activity or Mass, please do not enter and disturb the worshippers. Notre-Dame de Paris has no admission ticket; if you cannot go inside to visit, you will view the exterior.)
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西岱岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格和17世纪大钟楼、教堂外壁上的神兽、领略西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。（如遇宗教活动或者弥撒，请勿入场打扰信徒，巴黎圣母院无门票，如无法入内参观则游览外观。）

attractions.text_en: If the Louvre bore witness to the glory of the Gauls, then the Île de la Cité, Notre-Dame de Paris, and the Hôtel de Ville of Paris wrote down the indissoluble bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Île de la Cité. Without the Île de la Cité, there would be no Paris as it is today.
attractions.text_zh: 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the era of feudal rule in France. In terms of its content, it was not only the French royal court but also the administrative center of the state, and a concrete embodiment of the social and political views and way of life of France at the time. It represents the power of an autocratic regime able to concentrate such enormous manpower, material resources, and finances as had not been seen in Europe since the ancient Roman Empire. At that time, in order to build it, Louis XIV mobilized more than thirty thousand workers, as well as architects, engineers, and technicians. Besides having to solve the complex technical problems arising from the construction of a large-scale complex of buildings, they also had to solve problems of water supply, roads, and other aspects. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles forcefully proves the progress of France's economy and technology at the time and the wisdom of the laboring people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann is located between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are two major department stores, the Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, the author of "In Search of Lost Time," completed most of the writing of "In Search of Lost Time" in his residence at No. 102 on this street.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en: The Paris Opera was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861. Its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms such as the ancient Greco-Roman colonnade and the Baroque. Grand in scale, exquisitely detailed, and resplendent in gold, it is praised as a theater where painting, marble, and gilding mutually set each other off, giving people great enjoyment, and is one of the representative buildings of Napoleon III. (If the Paris Opera has important performances or reception activities, it cannot be visited inside; our agency cannot accurately predict the opening hours to the public, therefore the admission ticket of 15 euros is not included. If you wish to visit for a reception, you may purchase the ticket on site yourself.)
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎歌剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受，是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。（巴黎歌剧院如有重要演出活动或接待活动无法入内参观，我社无法准确预测公众开放时间，因此、不包含门票15欧元，如参观接待，可在现场自行购买门票。）

attractions.text_en: Honfleur is located at the gateway of the Flower Coast. With its flowery harbor, its old bell-tower district, and its labyrinthine old town, it is a magnificent scene depicted by many Impressionist painters; this ancient thousand-year-old fishing port is an ideal vacation spot. Honfleur is both a historic city since the Middle Ages in Normandy and an important seafaring port. From Honfleur one can gaze upon the magnificent Pont de Normandie, and strolling along the quaint streets and alleys of the town center, one can experience the refined romance and charm of this seaside city on the Flower Coast.
attractions.text_zh: 翁弗勒尔位于鲜花海岸的门户地带，鲜花海港、古钟楼区和迷宫般的老城，是诸多印象派画师的笔下盛景、这个古老的千年渔港是理想的度假地。翁弗勒尔既是诺曼底中世纪以来历史悠久的城市和重要的航海港口。从翁弗勒尔可以眺望壮观的诺曼底大桥，漫步于市中心的古色古香街道和小巷，可以体会这座鲜花海岸的海滨城市的精致浪漫和迷人之处。

attractions.text_en: Deauville, a city that appears again and again in travel magazines and architecture magazines, possesses the most completely preserved Norman-Anglo architectural complex to this day. In the coastal areas of Deauville, old-style Norman, timber-framed mansions can be seen everywhere; it is a popular high-end summer resort.
attractions.text_zh: 多维尔 (Deauville)这座在旅游杂志和建筑杂志上反复出现的城市，拥有至今保留最完整的诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群，多维尔沿岸地区，处处可见老式的诺曼底样式、木质骨架结构的宅邸，是个热门的夏季高级度假胜地。

attractions.text_en: Trouville, a Norman town set at the mouth of the Touques River, is adjacent to Deauville, yet the styles of the two cities are not quite the same. Deauville is the work of masters and a gathering place of celebrities, appearing courtly and aristocratic, while Trouville has elegance, seaside scenery, and fairy-tale-like colorful castles. Together the two cities form the protected zone of the Norman-Anglo architectural complex.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落在图克河入海口的诺曼底小镇特鲁维尔，毗邻多维尔Deauville，但是两座城市的风格不尽相同。多维尔是大师手笔名流云集，显得宫廷贵气，而特鲁维尔的优雅、海滨景致，童话般的彩色城堡。两城共同构成了诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群保护区。

attractions.text_en: Monet's Garden is located 88 kilometers to the northwest of Paris, in the Upper Normandy province. In 1883, when Monet passed by here on the train, he was captivated by this place, so he moved here to live. Over 43 years, Monet spent half of his life here, creating countless works. Monet called himself the maker of "the garden is my most beautiful work." Today, 85 years after Monet's passing, this place is still maintained according to the original state of Monet's life back then. From the tulips when the garden opens in April, to the most famous water lilies in midsummer, to the chrysanthemums before it closes in October, here you can find the colors in Monet's paintings.
attractions.text_zh: 莫奈花园位于巴黎西北方向88公里，属于上诺曼底省。1883年，莫奈坐火车经过这里时被这里所吸引，于是搬来此居住。43年的时间，莫奈一半的人生在这里度过，创作了无数著作。莫奈自称“花园是我最美的作品”。莫奈走了85年后的今天，这里依旧按照莫奈当年生活的原状维护着。从4月开园时的郁金香，到盛夏最著名的睡莲，10月闭馆前的菊花，你在这里可以找到莫奈画中的色彩。

attractions.text_en: The Pont de Normandie is up to 2 kilometers long, spanning the left and right banks of the Seine near its mouth, connecting Le Havre and Honfleur. The two "V"-shaped guardrails of the bridge are very eye-catching, and the entire bridge is like a giant work of art.
attractions.text_zh: 诺曼底大桥长达2公里，横跨入海口附近的塞纳河左右两岸，将勒阿弗尔和翁弗勒尔连接起来。桥身的两个“V”形护栏非常引人瞩目，整个桥就像一件巨大的艺术品。

attractions.text_en: Mont-Saint-Michel is located on a lone island on the Normandy beach, two kilometers from the coast. With its peculiar landscape of being a sea island at high tide and land at low tide, it has been listed as a World Heritage of Humanity by UNESCO. Mont-Saint-Michel is a famous French historic site and a Christian holy place, located on a small island in the Manche department, two kilometers from the coast. The small island is conical in shape, with a circumference of 900 meters, formed of towering granite. At an altitude of 88 meters, it is often surrounded by large stretches of sandy shore and becomes an island only at high tide. In ancient times this was a place where the Celts worshipped their gods. In the 8th century AD, the Cardinal Aubert built a small chapel-castle at the highest point of the island, dedicating it to the Archangel Michael; today it has become a pilgrimage center, hence the name Mont-Saint-Michel, a "World Cultural and Natural Heritage" site.
attractions.text_zh: 圣米歇尔山位于诺曼底海滩上的一座孤岛上，距海岸两公里，涨潮时为海岛，退潮时为陆地的奇特景观，被联合国教科文组列入世界人类遗产。圣米歇尔山是法国著名古迹和基督教圣地，位于芒什省一小岛上，距海岸两公里。小岛呈圆锥形，周长900米，由耸立的花岗石构成。海拔88米，经常被大片沙岸包围，仅涨潮时才成为岛。古时这里是凯尔特人祭神的地方。公元8世纪，红衣主教奥贝在岛上最高处修建一座小教堂城堡，奉献给天使长米歇尔，如今成为朝圣中心，故称圣米歇尔山，是“世界文化与自然遗产”景点。

attractions.name_zh: 圣米歇尔山修道院（外观）
attractions.text_en: Mont-Saint-Michel Abbey is located atop Mont-Saint-Michel. Mont-Saint-Michel, shaped by the workings of nature, is one of the great wonders of the world, and the abbey and cathedral on the mountain hold a supreme position in the hearts of Christians. Aubert built a small chapel at the highest point of the island, dedicating it to the Archangel Michael, and it became a pilgrimage center. During Napoleon's rule, the abbey also served as a national prison. To this day, although the abbey has been designed and rebuilt by many architects, it still maintains a plain, unadorned, and quaint style.
attractions.text_zh: 圣米歇尔山修道院位于圣米歇尔山上。圣米歇尔山经大自然的造化，是世界的一大奇观，山上的修道院和大教堂更在基督教徒的心目中有着至高无上的地位。奥伯特在岛上最高处修建一座小教堂，奉献给大天使米歇尔，成为朝圣中心。拿破仑执政期间，修道院也曾作为国家监狱。到如今，修道院虽然经诸多建筑师设计改建，但依旧保持着朴实无华、古色古香的格调。

attractions.text_en: Saint-Malo is a well-preserved medieval-style town. It once had to defend against pirate raids, hence it is also called the "Pirate City," and today many ancient sailing ships are still moored in the harbor. Strolling through the old town, the narrow alleys and ancient buildings make one feel as if transported to a medieval old city. You can also climb the city walls to gaze over the vast beach, lie on the beach to sunbathe, play in the waves, and visit the distant reefs. Because this is the river mouth and faces the old town across the sea, there are also dedicated local cruise ships ferrying between the two cities. As a tourist city, Saint-Malo not only has a profound sense of history, but its various souvenir shops, supermarkets, and hotels provide tourists with very convenient modern services, so this is absolutely the best choice for a vacation.
attractions.text_zh: 圣马洛是保存完好的中世纪风格，这里曾经因为要抵御海盗的袭击，故又称为“海盗城”，今天在港口中还停靠着很多古代帆船。漫步在老城中，狭窄的小巷，古老的建筑让人仿佛置身中世纪的古城。还可以登上城墙眺望辽阔的海滩，也可以躺在海滩上晒太阳，踏浪玩耍，还可以去探访远处的礁石。因为这里是入海口，并且和老城隔海相望，当地还有专门的游轮在两个城之间摆渡。作为旅游城市，圣马洛不仅有厚重的历史感，各种纪念品商店超市酒店为游人提供非常方便的现代服务，所以这里绝对是度假的最佳选择。

attractions.name_zh: 圣马洛海滩和海防工事
attractions.text_en: The coastal defenses form a long ring-shaped stretch, a completely preserved medieval coastal defense fortress encircling the old town, gazing toward the Devil's Island and the British island of Jersey, the old slave prison, with large numbers of seabirds circling and sailing ships surging one after another. Going from the city of Saint-Malo into the pedestrian street within the city walls, and then coming here to the beach, is very comfortable. Not far from the beach is a French coastal defense line, a square fortress, which you can walk to on foot at low tide. The whole city of Saint-Malo gives a very comfortable feeling—a medieval pirate city worthy of the name.
attractions.text_zh: 海防工事环形的长长的一片，保持完整的中世纪海防军事要塞、环绕古城、眺望魔鬼导和英国的泽西岛屿，奴隶古监狱，大量的海鸟盘旋和一艘艘帆船涌动，从圣马洛市里进入到城墙中的步行街，再来到海滩这边，非常舒服，离海滩不远处有法国国土防线，为方形堡垒，可以在退潮的时候步行前往，整个圣马洛城给人的感觉很舒服，名副其实中世纪海盗城。

attractions.text_en: Although the old town district of Blois was almost completely destroyed during World War II, the restored city architecture is still very much worth seeing. Especially the bell-and-drum tower of the church, which glitters resplendently under the projection of lights at night. Opposite the church is the House of the Acrobats, decorated with wooden carvings of clowns from medieval farces; it is one of the very few 15th-century ancient houses that survived the war.
attractions.text_zh: 尽管布洛瓦老城区在二战时几乎被毁于一旦，但修复后的城市建筑依然非常值得一看。尤其是教堂的钟鼓楼，在晚上的灯光投影下光彩熠熠。教堂对面是杂技演员之家，装饰着中世纪滑稽戏中的小丑木雕，是战争中幸存下来的为数不多的15世纪古屋。

attractions.text_en: Architecture of the 15th and 16th centuries, with gardens planted full of Mediterranean plants and two massive knights' towers. Strung together by the main keep, a long gallery, a terrace, and round towers, it spans the surface of the Cher River, a tributary of the Loire. It is the most romantic "water castle" among the castle group of the Loire Valley, likened to a ship moored on the Cher River. The Château de Chenonceau is also called the "Castle of Women." Because the successive owners of this castle over several generations were all women—both noble ladies and heroines among women. This is a three-story castle, and its greatest feature is that the castle straddles the river. This precisely matches the tender, water-like gentleness of Chenonceau as the Castle of Women, and from here one can admire the magnificent scenery along the banks of the Loire.
attractions.text_zh: 15世纪和16世纪的建筑，种满地中海植物的花园和两座庞大的骑士塔楼。由主堡垒、长廊、平台和圆塔串联而成，横跨卢瓦尔河支流希尔河河面，是卢瓦尔河谷宫堡群中最富有浪漫情调的"水上城堡"，被喻为停泊在希尔河上的航船。舍农索城堡又被称为“女人堡”。因为这座城堡的几代主人全是女的，既是贵妇又是女中豪杰。这是一座三层的城堡，其最大特色是城堡是横跨河上的。这正好与舍农梭堡是女人堡的柔情似水相吻合，从这里可以观赏到卢瓦尔河畔的壮丽景色。

attractions.text_en: The largest of the castle group in the Loire Valley, with a fairly typical medieval castle layout, it was the hunting lodge of French monarchs. The Château de Chambord was built during the reign of Francis I. In its layout, form, style, and decoration it reflects France's traditional architectural art, while at the same time being influenced by the Italian Renaissance, making it one of the representative works of the French Renaissance period, regarded by the French as a national treasure worth showing off. In 1981, the Château de Chambord was inscribed on the World Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 卢瓦尔河谷城堡群中最大的一个，较为典型的中世纪古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫。香波堡兴建于弗朗斯瓦一世时期。它在布局、造型、风格装饰上反映了法国传统的建筑艺术，同时又受到意大利文艺复兴的影响，成为法国文艺复兴时期的代表作之一，被法国人视为值得炫耀的国宝。1981年，香博堡列入了世界遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: Located in the heart of Rome, the magnificent Colosseum was built by the ancient Romans to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was a place exclusively for slave owners, nobles and free citizens to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combats between slaves, and it is one of Rome's more famous historic relics. The Colosseum is a masterpiece and marvel that can be regarded as a model in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for being huge, majestic and spectacular. Although only a little over half of its skeleton remains, its grand spirit and imposing momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马较著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman king Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, among others, rest here forever. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period and a model of the exquisite architectural skill of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as the "design of angels".
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥·埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday", becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Hepburn's fresh and beautiful figure seems to have merged with the Spanish Square and the beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never erase. The Spanish Steps: the whole Spanish Square is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The steps have a total of 138 levels and are the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Fountain", it takes as its theme the victorious return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology, and is altogether imposing and magnificent. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dream will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined with Italian cypresses on both sides, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of the Tuscan countryside scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast mottled shadows in the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that attracts countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and check in.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: Pienza is a town in the province of Siena, Tuscany, central Italy, adjacent to Montalcino. It was the earliest ideal town of the Renaissance, founded by Pope Pius II. The original purpose of founding it was to renovate his poor hometown and use it as the Pope's summer retreat. In 1996, it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List. The architecture here is Gothic in style and influenced by German style. The town's main square is Piazza Pio II, which contains the main 15th-century buildings, such as the cathedral (built 1459-1462), the Piccolomini Palace, the Bishop's Palace, and the town hall with a serrated tower (built 1462).
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎（Pienza）是意大利中部托斯卡纳大区锡耶纳省的一个市镇，毗邻蒙塔尔奇诺，它是文艺复兴时期最早的理想小镇，由罗马教皇PiusII创立，当时创立的目的是为了翻新给他贫穷的家乡并把此作为罗马教皇的避暑地。1996年，被列入联合国世界遗产名录。这里的建筑呈哥特风，并受德式风格的影响。小镇的主要广场是PiazzaPioII，广场里包含15世纪的主要建筑，如教堂（建于1459-1462）、皮科洛米尼宫（PiccolominiPalace、主教宫、带有锯齿形塔的大会堂（建于1462）。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old city is filled with masterpieces of art masters and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient and crisscrossing cobblestone alleys and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you are immersed in medieval Europe a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. For centuries, this city has maintained a complete classical appearance, as if time had stood still here since the fourteenth century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also preserves a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties - almond soft cakes ricciarelli, nut tarts panforte, peppered spiced nut cakes pan pepato, rice puddings budini di riso, walnut cakes cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: The Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the larger surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly opposite the square are the Siena Town Hall and tower. Inside the Town Hall is the Civic Museum, which houses numerous paintings of the Sienese School, including "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government". The tower, fully named the Torre del Mangia, is the taller building of Siena and the second highest tower in Italy, reaching a vertical height of 102 meters. Tourists can reach the top via 55 flights of steps for a panoramic view of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔，它是锡耶纳较高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns. It is a unique convergence of art and nature, containing rich historical imprints. Its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the concept of "good government" of the Italian city-states.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy. Located on the Square of Miracles to the north of the city of Pisa in Tuscany province, Italy, it is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, and was selected as a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. It is said that in 1590 AD, Galileo performed a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's viewpoint.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in Tuscany, Italy, partly grassland. The Square of Miracles is the center of the city of Pisa. There are four major buildings on the square: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (cemetery). Ancient city walls and gates are also preserved around the square. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Square of Miracles of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for the five cliffside villages and towns of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together. Built along the coast, it is the world's beautiful hiking route, about 15-20 kilometers, taking about 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other side are mountains, and ahead are Italian fishing villages. It is a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (entry requires queuing)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few churches can be so charming. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets the classical, elegant and free style admired in the Renaissance era to the fullest, no wonder it was named the "Madonna of the Flower". The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David", and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earlier large-span circular-arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his feelings of longing into the "Divine Comedy". Over several hundred years, it has stood unfallen through floods, social unrest and wars it has experienced. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza Santa Croce is located in the city center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued since the Renaissance. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce. This Gothic building is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring carefully. There are many cafes and restaurants around the square, offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. The Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural activities and festivals, especially in summer, when open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract numerous audiences. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

attractions.text_en: Abbreviated as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe. It is a classic work of Venetian architectural art and is at the same time a treasure house with a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. When going to the dungeon you walk across the Bridge of Sighs, and you can see outside through small holes, rather than having as many people on the bridge opposite looking toward you at the Bridge of Sighs. You can take photos inside, as long as you do not use the flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the only road by which the court escorted condemned prisoners to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style. The bridge is shaped like a house, with the upper part covered by a dome, and it is very tightly sealed, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. When a prisoner, after being tried at the Doge's Palace, was taken as a serious offender to the dungeon, while passing this airtight bridge he could only look at the blue sky through the small window. From then on he lost his freedom, and involuntarily let out a sound of sighing. It is said that lovers who kiss under the bridge can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon the "beautiful drawing room of Europe". The square is surrounded on three sides by magnificent palaces, and on the east side stand the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the public activity center of Venice's politics, religion and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome", the Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was first built in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Praised as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and thousands of statues are carved on the white marble exterior walls. The interior space is broad, and sunlight pours in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaic paintings on the windows, the light is hazy, full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the church's crypt, the relics of the Church of St. Tecla on the original site are still preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a gorgeous shopping mall, but most tourists who come here come to sightsee. Under the central arcade there is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window display are among the best in Milan, especially the window display which is updated daily. Just standing outside the windows and admiring them is a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele is dotted with quite a few high-end restaurants, cafes and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also known as Station Street) is one of the longer shopping avenues in Europe and one of the most expensive shopping avenues in the world. More precisely, it is not only the truly precious-as-gold center of Zurich; here luxury brands from all over the world abound, and private banks stand in rows. Walking on Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless visitors will feel an inexplicable excitement, because stored beneath their feet is a quantity of gold bars said to be among the world's foremost, making many people too excited to move their feet. Immersed in it, you can clearly feel the air filled with the aura of wealth, luxury and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. The piers on the lake surface are packed with yachts of all kinds, looking just like a club for the rich. One end of Lake Zurich extends deep into the city center. On the lake surface, white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere, leisurely and carefree, a harmonious scene. The north shore of Lake Zurich is the residential area of the rich, dubbed the "Gold Coast", while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast". The end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich. As a "world's livable city", the life of true Zurich people is permeated everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: The Grossmünster is one of the 3 main churches of Zurich, Switzerland (the other two being the Fraumünster and the St. Peter's Church). The church is located near the bank of the Limmat River, first built around 1100 and inaugurated around 1220. This church, facing the Fraumünster across the river, played a pivotal role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation. The theological faculty of the University of Zurich and the Museum of the Reformation are both established here. The stained-glass windows inside the church are masterpieces of the Swiss modern art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Line train passes through here. Surrounded by mountains and with lush green grass, the quaint village is scattered along the shore of Lake Lungern, looking just like a paradise far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the Swiss German-speaking region. Set against the mountains and beside the water, Lucerne has a beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance palaces and mansions, as well as century-old shops, long streets and ancient alleys are everywhere. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the beautiful sights of the city in a dreamlike and real way, making it an extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small cities. Since the 19th century, it has attracted many princes, nobles and literati to visit and reside, and artists have gained endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: This lake has a winding, zigzag shape, and together with the surrounding mountains forms a typical scene of "lake and mountain scenery", attracting large numbers of tourists to come and sightsee. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "14th Piano Sonata" as the moonlight of Lake Lucerne, and so this piece acquired the title "Moonlight" - although this was not Beethoven's original intention.
attractions.text_zh: 这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: This dying lion statue was carved on natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and more than 3 meters high, lies painfully on the ground, with a broken spear stuck in its shoulder, and beside it is a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms. This statue was made to commemorate the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on August 10, 1792, to protect the safety of the family of Louis XVI in the Tuileries Palace in Paris. Below the statue is text describing the course of this event. In those years, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, forced by livelihood, went to various European countries to serve as mercenaries one after another. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave in battle, but honor and money could not cover up the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this incident, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, leaving only the guard serving the Catholic Holy See, which is the famous Swiss Guard. Because of their famous loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "Dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving statue in the world".
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is the famous postcard-shooting location of Switzerland's "dream slope" that photographers love very much, and is also the Alpine town that one must pass through to visit the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen and others, it forms the more magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing destination, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts. The lakeside, green grass, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow mountains together make up this fascinating town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头非常爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald First attracts tourists from all directions to come and admire the magnificent scenery of the north face of the Eiger. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk by Tissot, anyone will immediately feel that they are standing on top of the world. The Cliff Walk by Tissot is located on the summit of First, where you can enjoy a unique panorama of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located about twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow all year round, while below the mountain it is lush green and scenic, making it a famous sightseeing and outdoor sports destination in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was inscribed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is the green park square in the center of Interlaken, Switzerland's famous sightseeing town. This green space was the garden of a monastery in the past, and now the construction of any buildings is prohibited here, in order to prevent the destruction of this beautiful landscape. This is the good place to gaze at the Jungfrau. On the vast green space there are fountains, dotted with many benches, so it is also a good place for strolling. Höhematte is also the landing site for hang-gliding. There is a reception point on the edge of the lawn. After paying, staff will take tourists to the nearby mountains for free gliding, allowing them to enjoy the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high altitude.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lac Léman, straddles Switzerland and France. It is an important lake of Western Europe, as well as a famous scenic area and health resort. During the day you can take a cruise boat to tour Lake Geneva, and at night be intoxicated by the flickering neon lights along the shore. There are also often luxury cruise ships holding concerts or dances on the lake surface. You can take a cruise boat to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shore of Lake Geneva, and watch the lake water, snow mountains and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Jet d'Eau is located on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden and is one of Geneva's more representative sights. The great fountain is like a column of water spouted by a whale, 140 meters high with a water output of 500 liters. Its spectacular sight can be seen from far away from the city center. At night there is also a chance to see the great fountain under the illumination of lights, which is even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦较具代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous attraction of Geneva. Switzerland is called the "country of gardens", and at the same time it is the "home of clocks and watches". What is even more wonderful is that Switzerland's skilled craftsmen ingeniously combined the beauty of flowers with the manufacturing craft of clocks, and originally created the "Flower Clock".
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称“花园之国”，同时又是“钟表之乡”，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了“花钟”。

attractions.text_en: The upper town on the hillside of the right bank of the Rhône, because of its relatively high terrain, is also called the upper town by the local residents. This place is not only a gathering place of churches and historic sites; in the winding small alleys there are also many small, lovely antique shops. The former residence of Rousseau, the thinker of the European Enlightenment era, is also located in the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

attractions.text_en: If it is said that the Louvre witnessed the glory of the Gauls, then the Île de la Cité, Notre-Dame de Paris and the Paris City Hall wrote down their inextricable bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Île de la Cité. Without the Île de la Cité, there would be no present-day Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: The Cathedral of Notre-Dame de Paris is located on the Île de la Cité in the center of Paris, and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The church is in the Gothic style. Tourists can climb the towers to visit, and although they cannot meet the "Hunchback of Notre-Dame", they can see the 17th-century great bell, get up close to the mythical beasts on the church's outer walls, and overlook the beautiful scenery of the Île de la Cité and the Seine.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西堤岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，游客可以登上塔楼参观，虽然遇不到“钟楼怪人”，但却能看到17世纪的大钟、近距离接触教堂外壁上的神兽、俯瞰西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。

attractions.text_en: It is one of the oldest museums in the world and a world-famous art treasury. The Louvre building is "U"-shaped, divided into a new part and an old part. The entrance of the glass pyramid in front of the Louvre was designed by the Chinese-American architect master I.M. Pei. Here are treasured more than 400,000 art treasures, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing artworks from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria, Rome to medieval Europe and various Eastern countries, and it can be called an outstanding art palace in human history. The itinerary includes ordinary individual-visitor tickets (without Chinese audio guide).
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品、其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。 行程包含普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。

attractions.text_en:
The Champ de Mars is a large strip-shaped park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the École Militaire (Military School) to its southeast.
Before the second half of the 18th century, this was an abandoned vacant land, and not until the Military School was established in 1765 did its status gradually rise. At that time the main purpose was to use it as a place for military training. During the French Revolution, on July 17, 1791, a massacre and bloodshed once occurred here. Later, France used this venue to host several World's Fairs and the 1900 Olympic Games.
attractions.text_zh:
战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。
在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次的世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If it is said that Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the symbol of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en: Take the famous "Bateaux Mouches" cruise boat with the transparent cabin, sailing along the banks of the Seine which blend numerous attractions. The 3.2-kilometer voyage of about 1 hour passes by famous sights such as Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées, the Île de la Cité, etc. On the surface of the Seine, feel Paris's romantic night scenery, the beautiful sights and wonderful music. It is called "a not-to-be-missed in-depth tour project of Paris".
attractions.text_zh: 乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the historical period of feudal rule in France. In terms of content, it was not only the French court, but also the administrative center of the country, and was also the concrete embodiment of the political views and lifestyle of French society at that time. It was the despotic-regime power of Europe, capable of concentrating such enormous manpower, material and financial resources, that had been displayed since the ancient Roman Empire. At that time, in order to build it, Louis XIV mobilized a total of more than thirty thousand workers, as well as architects, engineers and technicians. In addition to solving the complex technical problems arising from building a large-scale building complex, they also had to solve various problems such as water diversion and roads. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully proves the progress of France's economy and technology at that time and the wisdom of the working people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann is located between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are the two major department stores of Paris, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, the author of "In Search of Lost Time", once completed most of the writing of "In Search of Lost Time" in his residence at No. 102 on this street.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en: The Paris Opera was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861. Its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms such as ancient Greek and Roman colonnades and Baroque. Grand in scale, exquisite and meticulous, resplendent and magnificent, it is praised as a theater where painting, marble and gilding shine upon each other, giving people great enjoyment. It is one of the typical buildings of Napoleon III.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎歌剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受，是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Tromsdalen is the name of a village, connected to the main island of Tromsøya by a bridge crossing the sea. Because of its higher elevation, from every angle in Tromsø you never miss this beautiful landmark that is pure white, like an iceberg floating on the sea surface—the Arctic Cathedral, and especially the birthplace of the Instagram "blue mood" style—the Tromsø viewing platform (Tromsø Utkikkspunkt). This year-round snow-covered mountain can be climbed to its summit at about 1,250 meters; looking down you can take in a full panorama of the city of Tromsø and the fjord, with especially pristine natural scenery and frequent aurora outbursts—magnificent and beautiful. At the summit there is also an exotic specialty restaurant, an ice-and-snow boardwalk, and a sky viewing platform, bringing you a different visual experience and spiritual journey. According to the description in the travel article, it is the Troll Fjord Town, an alternative name combining the natural scenery related to "trolls" and "fjords." (Both the cable car and climbing on foot have strict weather requirements; in bad weather the cable car will close, and at that time our agency will not recommend climbing on foot.)
attractions.text_zh: 特罗姆斯达伦为村庄名称，跨越跨海大桥与本岛Tromsøya连接。因地势较高，从特罗姆瑟的各个角度都不会缺失这座洁白、犹如海面漂浮的冰山的美丽地标——北极教堂，特别是Ins“蓝调风”的发源地——特罗姆瑟景观台（Tromsø Utkikkspunkt） 这座终年积雪的山脉，向上攀登大约1250米即可登顶，往下眺望便是特罗姆瑟城市和峡湾全景一览无余，自然景色尤其纯正，极光爆发频频，美轮美奂。山顶上还有异国风情的特色餐厅，冰雪栈道，空中观景台，给您带来不一样的视觉感受和心灵体验。根据旅游文章中的描述为山妖峡湾镇，是与“山妖”和“峡湾”相关的自然景观结合别称。（缆车和自行登顶都对天气条件要求严苛，天气不佳缆车将关闭，届时我社将不推荐自行攀爬）

attractions.name_zh: 特罗姆瑟大桥 Tromsø Bridge
attractions.text_en: Built in 1958, the Tromsø Bridge is a spectacular structure within the Arctic, spanning the island of Tromsøya and the town of Tromsdalen. It is a landmark of Tromsø; on one side of the sea-crossing bridge lies a distinctive, vividly snow-peaked little mountain town, and many of the postcards about Tromsø are photographed here.
attractions.text_zh: 建于1958年的特罗姆瑟大桥是北极内壮观的建筑，横跨特罗姆索伊岛和特罗姆斯达伦镇，是特罗姆瑟的标志性建筑，跨海大桥的一侧是雪山峰式外形别致鲜明雪山小镇，许多关于特罗姆瑟的明信片都是在此拍摄。

attractions.text_en: Located in the city center across the sea-crossing bridge, the Arctic Cathedral, built in 1965 in the shape of a snow-covered mountain, is a landmark of Tromsø. The cathedral is a modern church designed to organically combine the winter and the aurora of Tromsø; in it, between the 12-meter-high, 6-ton stained glass window—one of the largest in Northern Europe—at the rear of the church, stands Jesus with arms outstretched, the heavy and steady, beautiful light it radiates is soul-stirring. If you happen upon an Arctic Sea Cathedral concert, quietly admiring it before the beautiful painted glass will be a very special experience.
attractions.text_zh: 位于市中心跨海大桥对面的，建于1965年雪山造型的极地教堂是特罗姆瑟的标志建筑。教堂将特罗姆瑟的冬天和极光有机结合而设计的具有现代感的教堂，其中教堂后部高12米重6吨的北欧大的彩色玻璃窗之间是张开双臂站立的耶稣，那重厚沉稳散发出的美丽光芒令人心魄，如遇北极海大教堂音乐会，在美丽的彩绘玻璃前静静欣赏将是一种很特别的体验。

attractions.text_en: Hailed as having "Arctic charm," Tromsø is a city that blends vibrant nightlife, Nordic culture, polar scientific research, and Sámi tradition—here! The long winter nights (September to the following April) greatly increase the chances of encountering the aurora, while the summer midnight sun (May to July) brings 24 hours of daylight for round-the-clock outdoor sightseeing. Tromsø is renowned for its bustling nightlife and its many restaurants offering fresh Arctic produce. Tromsø is a thriving multicultural city, bringing together residents from more than 100 countries, offering both local specialty cuisine and plenty of new-style small restaurants serving local fare. Although the city of Tromsø was founded only about 200 years ago, humans had already settled in this region thousands of years ago. After its founding, Tromsø quickly became the hunting center of the Arctic region, and at the dawn of the 20th century it was also the departure point for expeditions to the Arctic, earning it the name Gateway to the Arctic.
attractions.text_zh: 被誉为“北极魅力”的特罗姆瑟，融合活力夜生活、北欧文化、极地科研与萨米传统的城市，这里！漫长冬夜（9月-次年4月）大幅提升极光邂逅概率，夏季极昼（5月-7月）24小时白昼，全天候户外游览。特罗姆瑟以熙熙攘攘的夜生活和各种供应北极生鲜物产的餐厅著称。特罗瑟姆多元文化鼎盛，汇集了来自100多个国家的居民，既供应当地特色美食，也不乏供应当地美食的新式小餐馆。虽然特罗姆瑟城建立至今仅200年左右，但早在数千年以前就已经有人类定居在这一地区。建城后，特罗姆瑟很快成为了北极地区的狩猎中心，而且在20世纪之初，这里还是前往北极地区考察的出发点，并因此得名的北极门户。

attractions.text_en: Lying under the cover of the aurora belt, Narvik, at 68 degrees north latitude, is a fjord town surrounded by mountains and a famous ski resort in Norway. Along the route extending north from Abisko, the scenery changes endlessly, from the boundless white ice plains to the typical fjord landscapes—all making one marvel at how gentle the daylight of the Arctic Circle is. In particular, Narvik railway station is one of the northernmost railway stations on Earth, reaching the northern end of human railways. At the same time, here you can taste an extremely abundant variety of seafood, including whale meat, large halibut, purple sea urchins, and other specialty delicacies, which therefore attracts quite a few tourists.
attractions.text_zh: 位于北极光带笼罩下的纳尔维克，北纬68度，被群山环绕的峡湾小城，是挪威著名滑雪胜地，从阿比斯库往北延伸的路途中风景变化多端，由一望无际的白色冰原直到典型的峡湾风光，无不令人赞叹北极圈的日色如此温柔，特别是纳尔维克火车站，是地球靠北的火车站，抵达了人类火车的北端。同时、在这里可以品尝到极为丰富的海鲜，包含鲸鱼肉、大型比目鱼、紫色海胆等特色美食，因而吸引了不少游客。

attractions.text_en: Svolvær is the capital city of the Lofoten Islands, and likewise an important port city of Lofoten. With the magnificent views of the cold ocean and the vast vistas of snow-white mountains, the panorama from anywhere in the city is unparalleled. The lively wharf is crowded with people coming one after another, and every restaurant carefully displays its catch of the day. Various small shops make this place full of vitality. The wharf of the Hurtigruten expedition cruise has become a sacred spot for tourists to take photos, and the Anker Brygge water cabin hotel on a solitary island in the city center also attracts many photographers who come here to visit and take pictures.
attractions.text_zh: 斯沃尔维尔是 罗弗敦 群岛的首府城市，同样也是 罗弗敦 重要的港口城市，冰冷海洋的壮丽景色和白雪皑皑的山脉的广阔景色，城市中任何地方的全景都是无与伦比，热闹的码头人群熙熙攘攘接踵而至，每一家餐厅都精心拿摆出自己当天的渔获，各式各样的小商店让这里生机勃勃，海达路德探险邮轮的码头成为游客取景的圣地，城市中心独岛安克尔布里嘉水屋酒店也有很多摄影师来这里参观拍照。

attractions.text_en: Heading from the steep Reine mountain pass is the vantage point for admiring Reine, after which you proceed to the village of Hamnøy. This small village has only one restaurant and one fishermen's cabin, and is likewise one of the classic photography scenes. The bridge to the west of the village entrance leading toward Reine is the advantageous shooting angle. If on the day, due to weather reasons, physical reasons, or because children are unable to climb Reine mountain, you will go to Hamnøy village to take photos that day; here you can also capture classic themes such as the sea, fjords, snow mountains, and fishing villages.
attractions.text_zh: 从陡峭的雷纳山口前往,是欣赏雷纳有利地点,随后前往哈姆诺伊村（Hamnøy）这条小村只有一家餐厅及一个渔民小屋，同样也是摄影的经典场景之一，在村口西面前往雷讷的桥上就是有利的拍摄角度，当天如果因为天气原因、体力原因、或儿童无法攀雷纳山，当天前往哈姆诺伊村拍摄，在这里也能拍到海水、峡湾、雪山、渔村等经典主题。

attractions.text_en: Hamnøy Fishing Village is one of the three beautiful, pristine fishing villages on the island of Moskenesøya. When you stand inside the Hamnøy Fishing Village of Lofoten, there is a feeling of serene, otherworldly time travel. Among the world-stunning photographs of 2014, the Hamnøy Fishing Village was one of them.
attractions.text_zh: 哈姆诺伊渔村（Hamnoy）是莫斯克斯内斯岛上三个美丽的原生态渔村之一，当你站在罗弗敦 哈姆诺伊渔村 里面的时候，有一种恍如隔世般宁静穿越的感觉。在2014年全球震撼的照片里， 哈姆诺伊渔村 渔村就位列其中。

attractions.text_en: Å is the town with the shortest name in the world; "Å" is the last syllable character in Norwegian, representing a place of the end and the restart of everything. Å lies at the very end of the Lofoten Islands highway and is a protected traditional fishing village. It is also a paradise for photographers. Upon first arriving at the town of Å, one is immediately drawn to the red Norwegian fishermen's cabins in the town. These fishermen's cabins, built in the 19th century and still preserved to this day, have their exterior walls painted dark red; some are single-story bungalows and some are two-story buildings, all constructed entirely of wood, standing out very conspicuously on the Lofoten islands.
attractions.text_zh: 奥镇（Å）世界上名字短的小镇，“Å”在挪威语中是最后一个音节字符，代表着一切的结束和重启之地。奥镇在罗弗敦群岛公路的尽头，是一个受到保护的传统渔村。这里也是摄影师的天堂，初到Å小镇时，立刻会被镇上红色的挪威渔人小屋建筑所吸引。这些建于十九世纪仍保存到现在的渔人小屋样式，外墙漆着深红色的颜色，有单层的平房，也有双层的建筑，全数都是以木头建造，十分显眼地伫立在罗弗敦岛上。

attractions.text_en: Henningsvær is a fishing village located on the Lofoten Islands of Norway. Because of its traditional fishing-village architecture, it attracts many tourists from all over the world. The village lies about 20 kilometers (12 miles) southwest of the town of Svolvær.
attractions.text_zh: 亨宁斯韦尔是坐落挪威的罗弗敦群岛上的一个渔村，由于它的传统渔村的建筑，吸引着全世界的许多游客。该村位于约20公里斯沃尔韦尔镇（12英里）西南。

attractions.text_en: This small fishing village of only 500 people even possesses a football pitch, located on a reef islet, surrounded by beautiful fjords and azure waters, adding a touch of tranquility and exquisite beauty. The origin of the football pitch was that it was built to fulfill the wish of a local child of 14, which, while making people yearn for it, also makes one envy the innocence and kindness of the Norwegian people.
attractions.text_zh: 这个仅有500人的小渔村还拥有一座的足球场，位于一处岛礁之上，被优美的峡湾和湛蓝的海水所包围，多了一番宁静和唯美。足球场的由来是为了当地一个14孩子的心愿而建，可谓让人心生向往的同时又无比羡慕挪威人的纯真与善良。

attractions.text_en: Yellow houses: located on Lofoten's famous island of Sakrisøy, this island is renowned for the contrasting scenery formed by rows upon rows of yellow fishing cabins dotted with other colors amid the snowstorms. Most of the houses on the island are painted in bright, glossy yellow fishing cabins; the dazzling colors reflected on the calm sea surface of the fjord, if paired with a white blizzard backdrop, will make a beautiful postcard of Lofoten.
attractions.text_zh: 黄房子：位于罗弗敦著名的岛屿 Sakrisøy ，这个岛屿以一排排黄色渔屋点缀着其他的色彩在暴风雪中形成的反差风景而闻名，岛上大部分的房屋都涂上颜色鲜艳油亮色黄色渔屋，炫丽的色彩倒影在峡湾的平静海面上，如果配合白色的暴雪背景，将是罗弗敦美丽的明信片。

attractions.text_en: Senja is a shining pearl of northern Norway. Because the island possesses every kind of landscape found in Norway, it is hailed as a "miniature" of Norway. Senja is renowned for its magnificent natural scenery, its long aurora-outburst season, its abundant wild marine animals, and Norway's uniquely tranquil fishing villages, making it a paradise for adventure lovers and nature lovers.
attractions.text_zh: 塞尼亚岛（Senja）是挪威北部的一颗璀璨明珠，因为岛上拥有挪威的各种地貌，被誉为挪威的“缩影”。塞尼亚岛以其壮丽的自然风光、长时段的北极光爆发期、丰富的野生海洋动物、挪威独特的宁静的渔村而闻名，是探险爱好者和自然爱好者的天堂。

attractions.text_en: Known as the Eagle's Claw Fjord, Ofotfjorden is located at Evenskjer, which is the gateway road leading to the Senja islands. Driving along the fjord, you will admire more postcard-beautiful scenery; you will enjoy magnificent views and admire the snow mountains overlooking the sea.
attractions.text_zh: 被称为鹰爪峡湾的奥福特峡湾（Ofotfjorden）位于伊温斯科尔（Evenskjer)，这里是通往塞尼雅群岛的门户之路，将沿着峡湾行驶，欣赏更多如明信片般美丽的风景，您将欣赏壮丽的景色，欣赏俯瞰大海的雪山。

attractions.text_en: Sommarøy: "a place without time." Each year from November to the following February is Sommarøy island's long polar night. At this time, a thick black curtain seals the sky over the entire island, letting through not the slightest light. Fortunately, the cold nights of Sommarøy often see gorgeous auroras, adding a touch of brilliance to the lightless darkness. The aurora scenery that many people must travel through many transfers to witness is a beautiful sight within the locals' easy reach. Corresponding to the polar night is the polar day; each year from May to July, the Earth's rotational axis tilts toward the north, the hours of sunlight in the Northern Hemisphere grow longer, and coupled with the special geographical location, one can see the sunrise and sunset within 30 minutes. Many tourists choose to come to Sommarøy island at the times of the polar day and polar night, to truly feel the sensation of escaping the control of time. With its clear blue sky, fjords surrounded by mountains, and scattered colorful little cabins, Sommarøy island is the easiest place in the whole world to see the aurora. That brilliant, deep-green light blooms in the sky, cutting through the silent darkness, and shines in mutual reflection with the warm-toned island, making one feel as if they have arrived in a fairy-tale world. When the night is tinged with hazy light and snow color, holding a cup of hot coffee, listening to the crackling of the campfire, in this place with no concept of time—even though it departs from one's original way of life, it also enhances people's sense of happiness.
attractions.text_zh: 索马洛伊：“一个没有时间的地方”。每年11月到次年2月，是索马洛伊岛漫长的极夜时间。这时，浓浓的黑幕封住了整座小岛的天穹，透不出丝毫光亮。幸运的是，索马洛伊岛的寒夜常常会出现绚丽的极光，为暗无天日的黑夜增添几分光彩。许多人几经辗转才能见到的极光美景，是当地人触手可及的美好画面。与极夜对应的就是极昼，每年5月到7月，地球自转轴倾斜偏向北方，北半球的日照时间变长，再加上特殊的地理位置，在30分钟内看见日出与日落。许多游客会选择极昼和极夜之际来到索马洛伊岛，去真正感受摆脱时间控制的感觉。澄澈的蓝天、群山环绕的峡湾、错落有致的五彩小屋，索马洛伊岛是全世界最容易看见极光的地方。那道绚烂的幽绿色光芒在天空绽放，划破沉寂的黑暗，与暖色调的小岛交相辉映，让人仿佛来到了童话世界。当夜色染上朦胧的灯光与雪色，捧着一杯热咖啡，听篝火噼啪作响，在这个没有时间概念的地方，即使背离了原本的生活方式，却也增强了人们的幸福感。

attractions.text_en: The Tungeneset lookout is located at the tip of the cape between Steinsfjord and the Elf Fjord (Ersfjord). This stretch of footbridge, made of Siberian larch, spans the rocks, allowing you to admire the sharp peaks of the Okshornan range on Senja island in northern Norway, also known as the "Devil's Teeth."
attractions.text_zh: 奇迹山峦瞭望台（Tungeneset） 位于 斯坦斯峡湾（Steinsfjord） 和精灵峡湾（ Ersfjord） 之间的岬角顶端。这一段被西伯利亚落叶松制成的人行桥横跨岩石，可欣赏到位于挪威北部 塞尼雅岛上的欧克斯曼群峰 （Okshornan） 的锋利山峰，也被称为“恶魔之齿”。

attractions.text_en: The Bergsbotn viewpoint, set amid the picturesque scenery of Skaland, Norway, is a must-visit for all nature lovers and travelers wishing to immerse themselves in magnificent scenery. This scenic viewing point is situated on high ground in the surrounding terrain, offering a vantage point that showcases the stunning natural beauty of the area. Visitors can admire magnificent views of the fjords, mountains, and lush green vegetation, making it an ideal place for photography, picnics, or simply immersing oneself in the tranquil atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh: 贝格斯景观台（Bergsbotn）坐落在挪威斯卡兰风景如画的风景中，是所有自然爱好者和想要沉浸在壮丽景色中的旅行者的必游之地。这个风景优美的观景点位于周围地形的高处，提供了一个展示该地区令人惊叹的自然美景的有利位置。游客可以欣赏峡湾、山脉和郁郁葱葱的绿色植物的壮丽景色，使其成为摄影、野餐或只是沉浸在宁静氛围中的理想场所。

attractions.text_en: A dreamlike beach with white sands, located in a sheltered bay, where you can relax and immerse yourself in the tranquil beauty of this pristine beach with its fine white sands and crystal-clear waters. This is the perfect spot to relax and take exquisite photos. Don't forget to visit the unique golden toilet and take a quirky photo to add a touch of fun to your adventure.
attractions.text_zh: 梦幻般的海滩，有白色的沙滩，位于一个受庇护的海湾中，在这里您可以放松身心，沉浸在这片原始海滩的宁静美景中，这里有细白的沙滩和清澈的海水。这是放松身心和拍摄精美照片的完美地点。别忘了参观独特的金色厕所，拍一张奇特的照片，为您的冒险增添一丝乐趣。

attractions.name_zh: 波特汉姆极地峡湾渡轮
attractions.text_en:
Along the way you admire on one hand the beauty of the Arctic fjord scenery, and on the other the grandeur and shock of the Arctic Ocean. The sky changes its colors according to different moods, with birds and fish schools following along the way; the deep blue of the fjord corresponds with the vast white of the Arctic Ocean's enormous glaciers, and at sunset it becomes beautiful scenery.
Botnhamn Polar Fjord Ferry: In the event of extreme weather, strikes, statutory holidays, or maritime bans, as well as when fully loaded, it will not be possible to take this ferry, and the itinerary will automatically change to: taking a coach to tour the fjord along the coastline, with no refundable price difference!
attractions.text_zh:
沿途欣赏一遍的北极峡湾风景的秀美，另外一遍北冰洋的壮观与震撼，天空根据不同的心情而更改色彩，沿途的鸟类与鱼群跟随，深邃的峡湾蓝色与白茫茫的北冰洋巨大冰川对应，落霞时，成为美丽的风景。
波特汉姆极地峡湾渡轮：如遇极端天气、罢工、法定假期或海事禁令以及满载的情况下，将无法乘坐该渡轮， 行程将自动更改为：乘坐大巴车沿着海岸线游览峡湾，无可退差价费用！

attractions.text_en: Storgata has consistently played an important role in many of history's great polar expeditions. On the Storgata old town district promenade in the town of Tromsø, you can see the view from the water to the Arctic Cathedral, and the unique polar architecture—Tromsø's buildings are mainly Viking-style wooden houses, while also adding many pragmatist-style buildings. Statues and monuments reveal Tromsø's nickname "Gateway to the Arctic" on the statue of Roald Amundsen. Walking through the Tromsø Storgata district where Viking culture gathers, with its beer, food, art, and the wharf and concerts by the street, turns this place into a Nordic city that never sleeps.
attractions.text_zh: 斯托加塔在许多历史上伟大的极地探险中始终发挥着重要作用，在特罗姆瑟镇斯托加塔老城街区步行道上，可以看到水面到北极大教堂的景色，独特的极地建筑，特罗姆瑟的建筑以维京式木屋为主，同时增加了许多实用主义风格建筑，雕像和纪念碑发现特罗姆瑟的绰号“通往北极的门户”罗尔德阿蒙森的雕像上。行走在维京文化聚集的 特罗姆瑟 斯托加塔 街区集合啤酒，美食，艺术和街边的码头和音乐会，把这里变成一个北欧不夜城。

attractions.text_en: The Lyngen Strait of the Norwegian Sea, influenced by warm currents, does not freeze over in winter, and large schools of herring pour in, attracting whales to come and hunt and breed. We follow the experienced crew to explore the mysterious deep-sea whales; in winter there is a chance to see different kinds of seabed "overlords," such as orcas, humpback whales, and fin whales. They are sometimes very curious about us too, and will try to approach us, giving us the chance to observe the whales' activity up close; each time they surface and dive is so real, no longer the images in our imagination or on television.
attractions.text_zh: 挪威海的灵恩海峡受暖流影响，冬季不会冰封，大量鲱鱼群涌入吸引鲸鱼前来捕猎及繁殖。我们跟随经验丰富的船员，探索神秘的深海鲸鱼，冬季有机会看到不同种类的海底“霸主”，比如虎鲸，座头鲸和长须鲸。它们有时对我们也十分好奇，会尝试接近我们，让我们有机会近距离观察鲸鱼的活动，每次出水入水都如此真实，不再是我们脑中想象或是电视里的画面。

attractions.text_en: Oslo City Hall is a brick-red building, completed in 1950 to celebrate the 900th anniversary of the founding of Oslo. Norwegian artists decorated and embellished it continuously from 1900 to 1950 until it was finally finished. The various halls inside the City Hall display works by 323 artists, comprehensively presenting Norway's history and culture as well as the work and life of its people. Each room here has a special display, from furniture arrangements to figurative murals and the sea views visible through the windows, everywhere making visitors feel its historical atmosphere. In addition, the Nobel Prize award ceremony is held here every year on December 10.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆市政厅是一座砖红色的建筑，是于1950年为庆祝奥斯陆建城900年而建成，它由挪威的艺术家们从1900年至1950年间不断地装饰和润色才得以完工。市政厅内部的多个大厅分别展出着323位艺术家的作品，全面地向人们展示了挪威的历史、文化以及人们的工作和生活。这里的每个房间都有特别的展示，从家具摆设到人物壁画以及可以透过窗户看到的海景，无处不让观光客感受到其历史的氛围。另外，每年12月10日诺贝尔奖的颁奖仪式在这里举行。

attractions.text_en: The Royal Palace in Oslo (1825-1848) was built in the 19th century and is the working residence of King Harald. The palace is built on an elevated piece of land, directly facing the city's main thoroughfare - Karl Johans gate. Surrounding the palace are 330 mu of woodland and parkland, and the public avenue passing through here leads straight to the commercial district in the city center.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆皇宫（1825年－1848年）建于19世纪，是哈拉尔国王的办公地。皇宫建在一片高地，正对面是市区主要街道-卡尔·约翰大街，环绕王宫的是330亩林地和公园，穿过这里的公共大道直通市中心的商业区。

attractions.text_en: The Oslo Opera House faces the small Oslofjord, with an architectural style resembling a ship. It is, after the Nidaros Cathedral (Nidarosdomen Cathedral) built in Trondheim in the early 14th century, Norway's most famous cultural building. Seen from outside the theater, its most striking feature is the white sloping stone roof rising up out of the Oslofjord; visitors can stroll on the roof and take in the beautiful cityscape of Oslo. Sometimes there are free open-air concerts outside the opera house, where visitors can sit on the platform enjoying the sea view while listening to music.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆歌剧院正对着奥斯陆小峡湾，建筑风格像一艘船，它是继14世纪初建造于特隆赫姆（Trondheim） 的 尼德罗斯大教堂（Nidarosdomen Cathedral）后，挪威国内著名的文化建筑。从剧院外面看，最显著的特征是白色的斜坡状石制屋顶从奥斯陆峡湾（Oslofjord）中拔地而起，游客可以在屋顶上面漫步，饱览奥斯陆的市容美景。有时候歌剧院室外会有免费的露天音乐会，游客可以坐在平台上一边欣赏海景，一边享受音乐。

attractions.text_en: Vigeland Sculpture Park is named after the famous master sculptor Gustav Vigeland. The park has a total of 192 sculptures, amounting to 650 figure statues. The central idea of all the statues in Vigeland Sculpture Park focuses on highlighting one theme - "life" - depicting the various stages of a person from birth to death, giving visitors much inspiration about life, and for this reason it is also known as the "Park of the Journey of Life".
attractions.text_zh: 维尔兰雕塑公园是以著名雕塑大师古斯塔夫.维格兰（Gustav Vigeland）的名字命名的，公园共有192座雕塑，总计650个人物雕像。维格兰雕塑公园里所有雕像的中心思想，集中突出一个主题——“人生”，表 现了人从出生至死的各个阶段，给游客以许多人生启迪，因此也被称为“人生旅途公园”。

attractions.text_en: The castle was built in 1299 and is located next to the City Hall. During the reign of Christian IV, the castle was converted into a royal residence. During the 17th and 18th centuries, the castle gradually fell into decline, and restoration and reconstruction work only began in 1899. Here visitors can experience the history of Oslo, and from the heights one can also overlook the harbor of Aker Brygge, with very beautiful scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 城堡建于1299年，坐落在市政厅旁。克里斯蒂安四世在位期间把城堡改造成皇家的官邸。在17和18世纪期间，城堡逐渐走向衰落，而维修重建的工作在1899年才开始。游客在这里可以感受奥斯陆的历史，登高处还可以俯瞰AkerBrygge的海港，景色十分优美。

attractions.text_en: Built in the 16th century, Aalborghus Castle was originally a defensive fortress and later became a residence of the Danish royal family. Today, although only part of the buildings and the underground passages remain, as a symbol where royal and urban history are interwoven, its tranquil courtyard and waterside location still attract many visitors to take photos, picnic and stroll.
attractions.text_zh: 建于16世纪的奥尔堡城堡原为防御性要塞，后成为丹麦王室官邸。如今，虽然仅余部分建筑和地下通道，但作为一段王室与城市历史交织的象征，其宁静庭院与临水位置仍吸引众多游客拍照、野餐与漫步。

attractions.text_en: Founded in the 14th century, it is one of the most important churches in Aalborg. With a typical Gothic architectural style, the church's tower stands above the skyline of the city center. The interior has an exquisite pipe organ and stained glass, making it a place not to be missed by lovers of religion and architecture.
attractions.text_zh: 始建于14世纪，是奥尔堡最重要的教堂之一，典型哥特式建筑风格，教堂塔楼矗立在市中心天际线之上。内部有精致的管风琴与彩绘玻璃，是宗教与建筑爱好者不可错过之地。

attractions.name_en: Duhuven Old Street and Pedestrian Street
attractions.text_en:
Duhuven Old Street: This is a fairytale-like alley, with colorful low houses arranged neatly, and flower pots and sculptures placed on the windowsills, as if walking into an Andersen fairy tale. Although its location is low-key, its charming appeal has made it a hidden hotspot for photography and strolling.
Duhuven Pedestrian Street: The main commercial district of Aalborg, it preserves a large number of brick-and-timber structure buildings from the 16th to the 19th century, combining shopping, gourmet food, coffee and art shops in one. It is a place where visitors' everyday sightseeing and locals' lives converge. Street performers and outdoor markets are common on the street, and during festivals there are even colored-light decorations and traditional balls, making it the best window for experiencing the local cultural atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh:
杜赫芬老街：这是一条童话般的小巷，色彩斑斓的低矮房屋排列整齐，窗台摆放着花盆与雕塑，仿佛走入安徒生童话。虽然地理位置低调，但其迷人魅力使其成为摄影与散步的隐藏热门地。
杜赫芬步行街：奥尔堡的主要商业街区，保留了大量16世纪至19世纪的砖木结构建筑，集购物、美食、咖啡与艺术小店于一体，是游客日常游览与本地人生活交汇之地。街上常见路边艺人表演和户外市集，节庆期间更有彩灯装饰与传统舞会，是体验本地文化氛围的最佳窗口。

attractions.text_en: Masthugget Church is located on a small hill in Gothenburg; from the platform in front of the church you can see half of Gothenburg's cityscape, making it the perfect choice for overlooking Gothenburg. The church was completed in 1914, and its interior looks like an upturned ship. It is considered a well-preserved building in the nostalgic national-romantic style of the medieval and Viking periods within Sweden, its hallmark being a church bell tower over 60 meters high. This is one of Gothenburg's eye-catching buildings, and together with the Lipstick Building and the statue of the sea god Poseidon, they are known as the three major landmarks of Gothenburg.
attractions.text_zh: 马斯塔盖教堂位于哥德堡的一座小山坡上，从教堂前的平台上可以看到哥德堡半个城市的风景，是俯瞰哥德堡的不二选择。教堂于1914年竣工，内部像个倒扣着的船，被认为是瑞典境内保存完好的中世纪和维京时期的怀旧民族浪漫风格建筑，其标志是60多米高的教堂钟楼。这是哥德堡引人注意的建筑物之一，和口红楼，海王波塞冬雕像，并称为哥德堡三大地标。

attractions.text_en: Completed in 1931, the statue is a symbol of Sweden's maritime supremacy and the age of navigation. The Poseidon statue is heroic and extraordinary, displaying graceful masculine curves, and is one of Gothenburg's most famous statues.
attractions.text_zh: 雕像完成于1931年，是瑞典海上霸权和航海时代的象征。波塞冬雕像英武不凡，展现出优美的男性曲线，是哥德堡最著名的 雕像之一。

attractions.text_en: Avenyn Boulevard in the city center of Gothenburg is a main thoroughfare of the city of Gothenburg. Both sides of the street are lined with shops, cafes, restaurants and the like, and at the end of Avenyn Boulevard are the Poseidon statue and the Gothenburg Museum of Art, so this has also become Gothenburg's main sightseeing boulevard.
attractions.text_zh: 哥德堡的市中心的-Avenyn大道，是哥德堡市的一条主干道。街道两旁都是商铺、咖啡馆、餐厅等，在Avenyn大道的尽头是波塞冬雕像和哥德堡艺术博物馆，因此这里也成为了哥德堡的主要观光大道。

attractions.text_en: The Hans Christian Andersen Museum - a dreamlike space where fairy tales and reality intertwine; in 2021 the new building designed by the Japanese architectural master Kengo Kuma opened, and it is the well-deserved cultural heart of Odense; two-thirds of the building is underground, while above ground is a labyrinth-like green garden, as if "an oasis where reality and imagination are interwoven". Inspired by "The Tinderbox", it creates an immersive experience from the tiny world to the macrocosmic universe; 18 themed exhibition rooms display more than 2,000 manuscripts, letters, drawings and personal items, including Andersen's old patched leather suitcase, top hat and walking stick. In the multimedia room you can listen to translations of Andersen's fairy tales in 96 languages from 68 countries; the 8 circular murals in the 11th cylindrical grand hall reproduce important scenes of his life.
attractions.text_zh: 安徒生博物馆——童话与现实交织的梦幻空间；2021年由日本建筑大师隈研吾设计的新馆开幕，是欧登塞当之无愧的文化心脏；建筑三分之二位于地下，地上是迷宫般的绿意花园，仿佛“真实与想象交织的绿洲”。以《打火匣》为灵感，创造从微小世界到宏观宇宙的沉浸体验；18间主题陈列室，展出2000余件手稿、信件、画稿及私人物品，包括安徒生那只有补丁的旧皮箱、礼帽、手杖。多媒体室可聆听68国96种语言的安徒生童话译本；第11间圆柱形大厅的8幅环形壁画，再现其人生重要场景。

attractions.text_en: Located at No. 3 Munkemollestraede, this small yellow house of only 18 square meters is where Andersen was born in 1805 and where he spent his childhood. Those who lived nearby were mostly the lowest of society - soldiers, dock workers, and people living on relief. The shoemaker's son who came out of this slum eventually became an honored guest of European royalty; the interior of the former residence is rather small, but standing in front of the house and imagining how that sensitive boy went from here out into the world is the most moving way to understand Andersen.
attractions.text_zh: 位于蒙基莫莱街3号，这座仅18平方米的黄色小屋，是安徒生1805年诞生的地方，他在这里度过童年，周边居住的多是社会最底层——士兵、码头工人、靠救济度日者。从这片贫民窟走出的鞋匠之子，最终成为欧洲王室的座上宾；故居内部较小，但站在屋前，想象那个敏感的少年如何从这里走向世界，是理解安徒生最动人的方式。

attractions.text_en: This is a Gothic cathedral built in the 14th century, and it well reflects the wealth and status of Odense in the medieval period. The interior is pure white, with an elaborately decorated Rococo pulpit, a dazzling 16th-century altar carving, and more than 300 sculptural works. The Danish King Knud was assassinated at St. Alban's Church in 1086, and was later buried in this church named after him.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个建于14世纪的哥特式大教堂，它很能反映出欧登塞在中世纪时期的财富和地位。内部是纯白色的，有个精心装饰的洛可可式讲道坛、一个让人眼花缭乱的16世纪的圣坛雕刻以及300多个雕塑作品。丹麦的国王Knud于1086年在圣阿班教堂遇刺，后来就被埋葬在以他命名的这个教堂里。

attractions.text_en: The Funen Village - the Funen open-air museum, located in an old-style cluster of buildings. These are rural buildings left over from the 18th and 19th centuries, which were later reconstructed into a complete village. The inside really does look like a small village, with livestock pens, a duck pond, apple trees and gardens. It presents Denmark's original ecological way of life, like a complete panorama of rural life. Visiting here, you can not only experience Danish country life but also take part in it personally, getting close to nature and animals. The attitude to life that Denmark expresses - living in harmony with nature - can be seen in the Funen Village. During holidays, many activities recreating history are also held here. When you see the people living here, dressed in old folk costumes and toiling industriously, it can make you mistakenly think you have returned to a manor in Andersen's era.
attractions.text_zh: 菲英村——菲英岛露天博物馆，位于一个老式的建筑群中。这些是18世纪和19世纪遗留的乡村建筑，后来被重建成一个完整的村庄。里面看起来的确像一个小乡村，有畜栏、养鸭塘、苹果树和花园等。呈现出丹麦原生态的生活风貌，如同一个完整的乡村生活的全貌。来此参观不仅能够体验丹麦的乡村生活，还能亲身参与进去，亲近自然和动物。丹麦所表达的与自然和谐共处的生活态度能在英菲村里看得出来。假日期间，这里还会举行很多重现历史的活动。当看到生活在这里的人们穿着古老民服，辛勤劳作，会让人误以为回到了安徒生时代的庄园。

attractions.text_en: The Little Mermaid statue is located on the harbor rocks of Langelinie Park in Copenhagen, Denmark, and is one of Copenhagen's famous sightseeing spots. The Little Mermaid statue was commissioned in 1909 by Carl Jacobsen, son of the founder of Carlsberg, because he was fascinated by a ballet themed on the fairy tale. So in 1912, the Danish sculptor Edvard Eriksen sculpted this Little Mermaid statue based on Andersen's fairy tale and modeled on his wife Eline Eriksen.
attractions.text_zh: 美人鱼雕像位于丹麦哥本哈根长堤公园的港口岩石上，是哥本哈根著名的观光景点之一。 美人鱼雕像在1909年时受到嘉士伯创办人的儿子卡尔·雅布克森的委托，因为他以童话故事为题材的芭蕾舞感到着迷。 于是在1912年，丹麦雕塑家爱德华·艾瑞克森根据安徒生童话并以妻子爱琳·埃里克森为蓝本，雕塑了这尊美人鱼雕像。

attractions.text_en: In Langelinie Park at the harbor of Copenhagen, the Gefion Fountain is as world-famous as the Little Mermaid bronze statue. The fountain is composed of a group of bronze sculptures of the goddess Gefion, four oxen, a plow and so on.
