Here gather the flagship stores of Italian luxury brands such as Prada and Gucci, but even if you do not shop, strolling through it is like walking through a museum. At the old-established cafés at the end of the gallery, such as Caffè Biffi or Savini Milano, you can order an espresso or taste a tiramisu dessert, experiencing the composure and elegance of the Italian pace of life.
attractions.text_zh: 这条19世纪修建的十字形玻璃拱顶长廊不仅是世界上最古老的购物中心之一，更是一座城市级的艺术与建筑典范。这里汇聚了Prada、Gucci等意大利奢侈品牌旗舰店，但即便不购物，漫步其中也如同穿行于一座博物馆。在长廊尽头的老字号咖啡馆，如Caffè Biffi或Savini Milano，您可点一杯意式浓缩咖啡或品尝提拉米苏甜点，体会意式生活节奏的从容与优雅。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en:
This magnificent church in Byzantine style is famous for its five onion-shaped domes and golden mosaic decorations, embodying the glorious history of Venice's golden age and its trade with the East.
The exterior is rich in detail, blending the artistic languages of East and West, and it is a landmark of Venice not to be missed.
attractions.text_zh:
这座拜占庭风格的华丽教堂，以其五座洋葱形圆顶和金色马赛克装饰而闻名，体现了威尼斯黄金时代与东方贸易的辉煌历史。
外观细节丰富，融合东方与西方的艺术语言，是威尼斯不可错过的地标。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located in Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside, what you can see is not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons; on the way to the dungeon you walk across the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through small holes, rather than having as many people on the opposite bridge looking over at you. Inside you are allowed to take photos, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route that death-row prisoners had to pass when being escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, with its upper part covered by a vault and very tightly enclosed, having only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a convict was tried at the Doge's Palace, the serious criminal would be taken to the dungeon, and when crossing this airtight bridge, he could only look at the blue sky through the small windows. From then on he would lose his freedom and could not help letting out a sigh. It is said that lovers who kiss beneath the bridge can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), also called the central square of Venice, has always been the center of Venice's political, religious, and traditional festival public activities. St. Mark's Square is a rectangular square enclosed by the Doge's Palace, St. Mark's Basilica, the St. Mark's Campanile (bell tower), the New and Old Procuratie buildings, the Napoleonic Wing connecting the two buildings, the four-sided bell tower of St. Mark's Basilica, the Marciana Library, and other buildings, together with the Grand Canal of Venice. It is about 170 meters long, about 80 meters wide on the east side, and about 55 meters wide on the west side. The buildings surrounding the square are all exquisite Renaissance architecture.
attractions.text_zh: 圣马可广场(Plazza San Marco) 又称威尼斯中心广场，一直是威尼斯的政治、宗教和传统节日的公共活动中心。圣马可广场是由公爵府、圣马可大教堂、圣马可钟楼、新、旧行政官邸大楼、连接两大楼的拿破仑翼大楼、圣马可大教堂的四角形钟楼和圣马可图书馆等建筑和威尼斯大运河所围成的长方形广场，长约170米，东边宽约80米，西侧宽约55米。广场四周的建筑都是文艺复兴时期的精美建筑。

attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and magnificent churches in the world, but very few can be so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red, and green granite, interprets to the fullest the classicism, elegance, and freedom esteemed in the Renaissance era — no wonder it was named "Santa Maria del Fiore" (Saint Mary of the Flower). The original site of Florence Cathedral was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria enjoys the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and for several centuries it has been the center of the city's political life. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and numerous cafés and bars. The famous Florence Cathedral is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earlier large-span circular-arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his feelings of longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over several hundred years, it has stood unfallen through floods, social upheavals, and wars it has experienced. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Located to the southeast of Florence, Piazzale Michelangelo is a famous spot for overlooking the beautiful panorama of the city. In the center of the square is placed a replica of Michelangelo's immortal masterpiece — "David." From the square you can see the appearance of the whole city: Florence Cathedral, Giotto's Campanile, the Bargello Museum, the Old Bridge, and more all come into view. This is also a good position for viewing sunrise and sunset; as the light changes, watch Florence glow with different splendor.
attractions.text_zh: 位于佛罗伦萨东南的米开朗基罗广场是著名的俯瞰城市美丽全景的地点，广场中央安放着米开朗基罗的不朽之作——《大卫》的复制品，广场上可以看到全城的风貌：圣母百花大教堂、乔托钟楼、巴杰罗美术馆、老桥等尽收眼底。这里也是观赏日出和日落的好位置，随着光线的变幻，看佛罗伦萨焕发出不同的光彩。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for these five clifftop villages and towns: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking route that strings the five villages together, built along the coast — it is one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 kilometers, taking about 5 hours; on one side is the Mediterranean, on the other side are the mountains, and ahead are the Italian fishing hamlets, making it a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the World Cultural Heritage List by UNESCO.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa in Italy. It is located on the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Province of Tuscany, Italy. It is a world-famous sight and one of Italy's symbols, and was selected as a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. Legend has it that in the year 1590, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the view of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, part of which is grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa; on the square are four great buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (Pisa cemetery). Around the square, ancient walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa, and the cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Torre Grossa is a tower in San Gimignano that is open to the public, and is also the taller tower, with a total height of 54 meters, begun in the early 14th century. It was once part of the new Palazzo del Podestà; from the tower one can take in the beautiful scenery of San Gimignano and the hilly mountain area of Tuscany.
attractions.text_zh: 格罗萨塔楼是圣吉米亚诺中一个对公众开放的塔楼，也是较高的塔楼，总高为54米，始建于14世纪初。它曾是新的波德斯塔宫宫的一部分，塔楼可以一览圣吉米亚诺和托斯卡纳丘陵山区的美景。

attractions.text_en: Although this medieval tower city inscribed as a World Heritage Site is small, it concentrates the finest scenery of Tuscany. The Piazza della Cisterna is the absolute core; this triangular square is paved with cobblestones, surrounded by 13th-century stone towers and arcades, and the ancient well in the center was once the lifeline of the whole city. Standing here and looking up at the densely standing towers, you can directly feel where the title "Medieval Manhattan" comes from.
attractions.text_zh: 这座被列入世界遗产的中世纪塔城虽小，却浓缩了托斯卡纳最精华的景观。水井广场是绝对核心，这个三角形广场由鹅卵石铺就，四周环绕着13世纪的石塔与拱廊，中央的古井曾是全城命脉。站在这里仰视林立的塔楼，能直观感受“中世纪曼哈顿”的称号从何而来。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval ancient city, is filled with masterpieces of artistic masters and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing flagstone alleys and the deep, secluded courtyards hidden everywhere, you seem to be placed in medieval Europe a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you a pleasant surprise. For several centuries, this city has maintained an intact classical appearance, as if time had stood still here since the 14th century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, do not forget to taste the local specialties — almond soft cakes ricciarelli, nut tarts panforte, peppery spiced nut cakes pan pepato, rice puddings budini di riso, walnut cookies cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena. Directly facing the square are the Siena City Hall and its tower; inside the City Hall is the Civic Museum, which holds numerous paintings of the Sienese school, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is the Torre del Mangia; it is the iconic building of Siena, and also the second-tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height reaching 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of steps and take in the beautiful scenery of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳标志性建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a small town on a hill in the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. In 1459 the Pienza he oversaw rebuilding was regarded as a model of the "ideal city," and so it is hailed as "the touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, Pienza's unique feature is that from the city walls you can look down upon the scenery of the World Heritage "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress path, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows under the sunshine, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that attracts countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and take photos.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum, located in the center of Rome, was built by ancient Rome at the time to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to extol the great ancient Roman Empire. It was a place exclusively for slave owners, nobles, and freemen of ancient Rome to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat by slaves, and is a famous historical relic of Rome. The Colosseum can be called a model masterpiece and a marvel in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for being huge, majestic, and magnificent. Although only a little more than half of its skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and grand momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years to this day. The artist Raphael, the Roman king Vittorio Emanuele II, and Umberto I, among others, rest in eternal sleep here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period and a model of the consummate building technology of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: Piazza di Spagna once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and bright figure seems to have already merged into one with the Piazza di Spagna and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never erase. The whole Piazza di Spagna is not large in area, and the crowds mainly gather near the Spanish Steps. The entire flight of steps has 138 steps in total, and is one of the wider flights of steps in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲较宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain," or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, god of the sea in Roman mythology, with an overall imposing grandeur and magnificence. It is said that if you stand with your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dream can come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

attractions.text_en: Trondheim is Norway's third-largest city, home to one of Northern Europe's renowned research universities and full of youthful vitality. It is also the coronation site and ancient capital of Norway's first king, and was once the religious and political center of medieval Norway. With the solemnity of Nidaros Cathedral, the vivid colors of the Bakklandet wooden houses, and the clarity of the Nidelva River as its backdrop, it is a city that perfectly blends weighty history with lively energy. There is no need to rush from sight to sight; simply slow down and, amid the gravity of the old cathedral, the colors of the old wooden houses, and the freshness of a university town, feel a different kind of profound charm that Norway offers beyond its natural fjords.
attractions.text_zh: 特隆赫姆是挪威第三大城市，拥有北欧著名的研究型大学之一，充满年轻活力。同时它也是挪威第一任国王的加冕地与古都，曾是中世纪挪威的宗教与权力中心。以尼德罗斯主教座堂的深沉、巴克兰德木屋的缤纷和尼德尔河的清澈为底色，一座将厚重历史与鲜活动力完美融合的城市。您无需匆忙打卡，只需放慢脚步，在古教堂的庄严、老木屋的缤纷和大学城的朝气中，感受挪威除了自然峡湾之外的另一种深厚韵味。

attractions.text_en: Norway's national sanctuary and one of Northern Europe's most important medieval cathedrals, it is the coronation church of Norway's kings and is grand and magnificent in its architecture. Begun in 1070, it stands over the burial site of Saint Olav, Norway's patron saint. Having survived several fires and reconstructions, it is a rare example in Northern Europe of a cathedral in pure Gothic style.
attractions.text_zh: 挪威的国家圣堂，北欧重要的中世纪大教堂，挪威国王的加冕教堂，建筑雄伟壮观。始建于1070年，坐落在挪威守护神圣奥拉夫的墓葬之上，历经数次大火与重建，是北欧罕见的一座纯粹哥特式风格的大教堂。

attractions.text_en: This red wooden bridge is often called the "Portal of Happiness," connecting the city center with the traditional district of the old town. Standing on the bridge and looking to one side, you see the colorful warehouses neatly lined up along the riverbank; to the other side is the gently flowing Nidelva River and the reflections in its water. Early morning and dusk are the most beautiful moments here.
attractions.text_zh: 这座红色木桥常被称为“幸福之门”，连接着市中心与老城的传统街区。站在桥上，向一侧望去，是整齐排列在河畔的彩色仓库；向另一侧，则是缓缓流淌的尼德河与水中倒影。清晨和傍晚是这里最美的时刻。

attractions.text_en: The Atlantic Road is a landmark engineering achievement of the century in Norway, running a total of 36 kilometers along a route between Kårvåg and Bud. In 2011, the Atlantic Road was named by Britain's The Guardian as one of the world's best road-trip destinations. The Atlantic Road is notable not only for its ingenious engineering design but also for the breathtaking scenery on both sides of the road; travelers can take in the beautiful natural landscapes and ecological environment of the Atlantic along this route.
attractions.text_zh: 大西洋公路是挪威世纪性建筑，全程36公里，是从 Kårvåg 到 Bud 之间的一段路线。2011年，大西洋公路被英国《卫报》评选为世界最佳公路旅行目的地之一。大西洋公路不仅有其匠心独运的工程设计，公路两旁的风景也令人叹为观止，游客们可以在这条路上饱览大西洋美丽的自然景观和生态环境。

attractions.text_en: The City of the Midnight Sun—Molde sits on the riverbank at the broad mouth of the Romsdalsfjord and is a city in northwestern Norway. When Norwegians think of Molde, the first thing that comes to mind is jazz. Every July, the international Midnight Sun Jazz Festival is held here, one of Europe's long-established jazz festivals. During the festival, visitors from countries across continental Europe come drawn by its reputation. Standing on the Varden viewpoint at an altitude of 407 meters, you can take in the beauty of the city, the fjord, and the islands, and also admire the Molde panorama, famous for its 222 snow-covered mountain peaks.
attractions.text_zh: 午夜阳光之城——莫尔德位于罗姆达尔峡湾（Romsdalsfjord）宽阔河口处的河岸上，是挪威西北部地区城市。提到莫尔德，挪威人首先会想到的就是爵士乐。每年七月，国际午夜爵士音乐节在此举行，这是欧洲历史悠久的爵士音乐节。音乐节期间，来自欧洲大陆各国的游客慕名而来。站在海拔407米的瓦尔登观景台上可以一览城市、峡湾、岛屿的美景还可以欣赏以222座被白雪覆盖的山峰闻名的莫尔德全景。

attractions.text_en: Kristiansund is located on four small islands in the North Sea off western Norway and enjoys beautiful coastal scenery. The opera house in Kristiansund is one of Norway's oldest opera houses, built in 1914. It is a beautiful Art Nouveau building and one of the few structures to survive World War II. The Innlandet district is Kristiansund's old town, where you can see unique and beautiful seaside architecture; the few buildings that survived World War II have all been well preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 克里斯蒂安松位于挪威西部北海中的4个小岛上，享有美丽的海岸景观。克里斯蒂安松市内的歌剧院，是挪威古老的歌剧院之一，始建于1914年，是一座美丽的新艺术运动风格建筑，是在二战中幸存的少数建筑之一。Innlandet区是克里斯蒂安松的老城区，可以看到独特而美丽的海边建筑，二战中幸存的少数建筑也都得以完善保存。

attractions.text_en: The Briksdal Glacier is a branch of the Jostedalsbreen, the largest glacier on the European mainland by volume. Located within Jostedal Glacier National Park, it is one of the especially popular glacier sights there. The Jostedal Glacier covers 486 square kilometers, reaches depths of up to 400 meters, and rises 1,950 meters above sea level. The Briksdal Glacier boasts incomparably spectacular natural wonders; here visitors will see the 1,200-meter-high glacier plunging from top to bottom straight into the watercourse, set against lush forest alongside—magnificent beyond compare.
attractions.text_zh: 布里克斯达尔冰川是欧洲大陆体量占首位的冰川——约斯特达尔布林冰川（Jostedalsbreen）的分支，位于乔斯特达尔冰川国家公园（Jostedal Glacier National Park）中，是其中特别受欢迎的冰川景点。乔斯特达尔冰川占地486平米，深处可达400米深，高于海平面1950米。布里克斯达尔冰川拥有无比壮观的自然奇景，游客在此会看到1200米高的冰川从上到下直入河道，衬着一旁茂盛的森林，无比壮丽。

attractions.text_en: The Flydalsjuvet cliff viewpoint is a sight that frequently appears on postcards. From the Flydalsjuvet cliff viewpoint you can take in the entire view of the little town of Geiranger in the gorge, the Geirangerfjord, and the cruise ships at port. A jutting cliff beside the viewpoint is often called the Geiranger Rock by travelers, mentioned together with Pulpit Rock/Preikestolen, Kjeragbolten, and Trolltunga.
attractions.text_zh: 弗里达斯悬崖观景台是明信片上经常出现的一个景点，在弗里达斯悬崖观景台可以将峡谷中的盖朗厄尔小城和盖朗厄尔峡湾以及靠港的邮轮尽收眼底。观景台旁一座突出的悬崖经常被旅行者称为盖朗厄尔石(盖朗格石)，与布道石/祈祷峰、奇迹石和山妖之舌一起被提及。

attractions.text_en: Located on the southwest coast of Norway, north of Bergen, it is one of the most beautiful and mysterious of Norway's fjords. The fjord stretches 16 kilometers in length, with mountains over 1,500 meters above sea level rising on both shores, making it one of the world's foremost sightseeing destinations. At the head of the fjord is the village of Geiranger, reached only by a 1,000-meter-long road that winds down the mountainside; in summer many tourists come here to hike and vacation. Besides the Geiranger Fjord Church built in 1842, the village also has the Flydalsjuvet viewpoint frequently visited by photographers and the Dalsnibba viewpoint at an altitude of 1,500 meters.
attractions.text_zh: 位于挪威西南岸的卑尔根北部，是挪威峡湾中美丽而神秘的一处。峡湾全长16公里，两岸耸立着海拔1500米以上的群山，是世界上数一数二的观光胜地，峡湾顶端是盖朗厄尔村，到该村仅靠一条沿山坡蜿蜒而下的长1000米的道路，夏季徒步前来度假的游客很多。村里除1842年建造的盖朗厄尔峡湾教堂外，还有摄影师经常光顾的弗里达尔斯尤威展望台和海拔1500米高的达尔斯尼巴展望台。

attractions.text_en: The Geirangerfjord is famous for its many waterfalls, and the Seven Sisters Waterfall is the brightest star among them. The Seven Sisters Waterfall (Norwegian: De Syv Søstrene or Dei Sju Systrene or Knivsflåfossen) is Norway's 39th-highest waterfall and a component part of the Geiranger World Heritage Site. Seven distinct falls plunge down through the air together, like sisters dancing in unison. One of the falls has a drop of 250 meters. Opposite the Seven Sisters Waterfall is the Suitor waterfall (the Suitor or Frieren), forever pressing his courtship of the seven sisters. These waterfalls are most spectacular between May and July.
attractions.text_zh: 盖朗厄尔峡湾以瀑布众多闻名，而七姐妹瀑布则是这些瀑布中最亮眼的明星。七姐妹瀑布（挪威语DeSyvSøstrene或DeiSjuSystrene或Knivsflåfossen）是挪威第39高的瀑布，也是盖朗厄尔世界遗产的组成部分。七条明显的瀑布从空中一起飞流而下，像是一起舞蹈的姐妹们。其中一条瀑布有250米落差。七姐妹瀑布的对面，就是求婚者瀑布(thesuitor或Frieren)，永不停歇的对七姐妹展开追求。这些瀑布在5月至7月间最为壮观。

attractions.text_en: The Eagle Road (Ørnevegen) is Route 63 located between Geiranger and Eidsdal, famous for its eleven consecutive hairpin bends. This commanding name comes from the fact that, in the days before the road opens each year, eagles often gather near the viewpoint at the summit of the hairpins—Eagle Bend (Ørnesvingen, 620 meters). The Eagle Road is open year-round, while the rest of the Trollstigen (Troll's Path) section is open to traffic only from May to October. The route features many viewpoints with distinctive architecture (for example Flydalsjuvet, Ørnesvingen, Gudbrandsjuvet, etc.), which are advantageous spots for looking down over the fjord.
attractions.text_zh: 老鹰之路(Ørnevegen)是位于盖朗厄尔和埃兹达尔(Eidsdal)之间的63号公路，以接连11个发夹弯所闻名。这个霸气的名字，是因为每年在公路开放之前几天，在发夹弯的顶峰——老鹰之翼(Ørnesvingen，620米)观景台附近经常有老鹰聚集。老鹰之路常年开放，其余的精灵之路路段只在5月到10月通车。线路都不少很有建筑特色的观景台( 例如Flydalsjuvet , Ørnesvingen, Gudbrandsjuvet等)，是俯瞰峡湾的有利地点。

attractions.text_en: One of the most beautiful and steepest mountain railways in the world, it runs from the mountain area of Myrdal at 865 meters above sea level straight down into the depths of the Aurlandsfjord—Flåm—over a total length of 20 kilometers. 80% of this railway is built on slopes with a 55% gradient. Begun in 1923 and completed after 20 years of work, it is called Norway's greatest engineering marvel. Admiring from the train the picture after picture of scenery formed by valleys, waterfalls, cliffs, and snow-capped mountains will surely be one of the most unforgettable experiences of your fjord journey. In the railway museum beside Flåm Station, you can learn more about the history of building this railway.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上最美，最陡峭的高山铁路之一，从865米海拔的米达尔(Myrdal)山区直下到艾于兰峡湾的深处——弗洛姆，全长20公里。这段铁路的80％路段建在55％坡度的山坡上。始建于1923年，历时20年完成，被称为挪威最伟大的工程奇迹。在火车上欣赏山谷、瀑布、悬崖、雪山构成的这一幅幅风景画绝对会是您峡湾之旅最难忘的经历之一。在弗洛姆站旁边的火车博物馆里，可以了解到更多关于这段铁路建造的历史。

attractions.text_en: The Sognefjord is Norway's largest fjord and the most famous fjord in the world, with a total length of 204 kilometers and a maximum depth of 1,308 meters. The Sognefjord is the most accessible of the four major fjords, and was ranked by National Geographic Traveler magazine as the number one best-preserved and most worth-visiting destination in the world. You won't see glaciers in summer, but there are still waterfalls, calm lakes, and sheer cliffs that leave the eye dazzled.
attractions.text_zh: 松恩峡湾是挪威第一大峡湾，也是世界上最著名的峡湾，全长达204公里，最深处达1308米。松恩峡湾是四大峡湾中交通最便利的一个，被国家地理和旅游杂志把峡湾排在世界上保存最完好、最值得旅游的目的地第一名。夏天里看不到冰川，但仍有瀑布、平湖、绝壁让人目不暇接。

attractions.text_en: Voss is reputed to be one of the most beautiful fjord towns, located at the heart of the fjord region, beside a beautiful little lake, where the Oslo-to-Bergen railway passes through. It is a place in Norway where sports and recreation can be found in all four seasons, equipped with most modern leisure and entertainment facilities and only a short distance from many top-class sports venues; in addition it boasts charming lake-and-mountain scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 沃斯（Voss）号称最美的峡湾小镇之一，位于峡湾地区的中心，在一座美丽的小湖边，奥斯陆到卑尔根的铁路经过这里。它是挪威一个四季都可以找到运动娱乐项目的地方，配备了大部分现代化的休闲娱乐设施，离很多顶尖的运动场地也只有短短的距离，此外还拥有迷人的湖光山色。

attractions.text_en: The Flåm Railway Museum not only offers a detailed account of the construction of Europe's steepest railway line, but also analyzes the technical challenges encountered during construction and the people behind it. On display in the museum is a real El9 locomotive, an old electric line-shifting engine, and numerous trolleys used during track surveying. The museum also has all kinds of exhibits combining maps, text, physical objects, and audio-visual material. Visitors can also gain an in-depth understanding of the Flåm train journey through video presentations. The shop at the museum exit carries an assortment of souvenirs and merchandise bearing the Flåm Railway brand.
attractions.text_zh: 弗洛姆铁路博物馆不仅有欧洲最陡峭铁路线的详细建设过程介绍，还会分析修建过程中遭遇的技术挑战和背后的人物。馆内展出真实的El9火车头，古老的电力转线引擎、众多轨道勘测时使用的推车。馆内还有各种图、文、实物和影音并茂的展览。游客还可以借由视频展示，深入了解弗洛姆火车之旅。博物馆出口处的商店内有各色纪念品和印有弗洛姆铁路品牌的商品。

attractions.text_en: Bryggen is a series of Hanseatic League commercial buildings lined up along the eastern side of Bergen's fjord in Norway. Bryggen has been listed as a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage Site since 1979. Its name shares the same origin as the Belgian city of Bruges. Bryggen is the oldest part of the city. In 1360, the Hanseatic League established a trading post here, and Bergen developed into an important trading center. Today, these old buildings, with their colorful walls facing the harbor and their labyrinth of wooden houses and commercial streets, have become a symbol of the city of Bergen.
attractions.text_zh: 布吕根是排列在挪威卑尔根峡湾东侧的一系列汉萨同盟商业建筑。布吕根自1979年被联合国教科文组织列为世界文化遗产。其名称与比利时城市布鲁日为同一来源。 布吕根为城市古老的部分。1360年，汉萨同盟在此建立贸易站，卑尔根也发展成一个重要的贸易中心。如今，这些老建筑面对海港的彩色墙面，如同迷宫般的木质房屋和商业街道已经成为了卑尔根的城市象征。

attractions.text_en: Bergen is a major Norwegian port; more than half of Norway's fish catch and processed seafood products are exported to the world via the port of Bergen. In addition, it is also a necessary passage on the Atlantic and Arctic Ocean shipping routes, and all kinds of fresh seafood are sold at the Bergen fish market. Therefore, if you have the chance to visit Bergen, you must come to the fish market for a hearty feast. The Bergen fish market is located on the wharf along the south bank of Bergen harbor, facing the World Heritage Bryggen old town across the inner harbor. The fish market is divided into two parts: an indoor seafood center and an open-air market. You can buy the freshest fish of the day, from cod, salmon, lobster, crab, North Sea king crab, scallops, and Arctic sweet shrimp to whale meat—everything you could want.
attractions.text_zh: 卑尔根是挪威大港，挪威有超过一半的渔货与海鲜加工制品是经由卑尔根港口外销到全世界。除此之外，这里也是大西洋与北极海航线的必经之路，各种新鲜海产都会在卑尔根鱼市场贩卖。因此，有机会来卑尔根一趟，一定要来鱼市场大快朵颐一番。卑尔根鱼市场就位在卑尔根港南岸的码头边，与世界遗产布吕根老城隔着内港遥遥相对。渔市场有分室内渔货中心与露天市场两个部分。可以买到当天最新鲜的鱼货，从鳕鱼、鲑鱼、龙虾、螃蟹、北海帝王蟹、干贝、北极甜虾到鲸鱼肉，应有尽有。

attractions.text_en: We can take the Fløibanen funicular from the city center, which in a few minutes brings you to the viewpoint atop Mount Fløyen. This funicular celebrated 100 years of operation in 2018. From the summit you can look down over the panorama of the city of Bergen. The harbor, the fjord, the wooden houses neatly arranged throughout the city, and the mountain peaks surrounding Bergen are all taken in at a glance. On the mountain there are also children's playgrounds and treasure-hunt and other family activities. The funicular's lower city-center station is only about 200 meters from the fish market (Fisketorget).
attractions.text_zh: 我们可以从市中心乘坐弗罗伊索道，几分钟就能将你带到弗罗伊恩山(Fløyen)的观景台。这座缆车在2018年将迎来它运营100岁的大日子。在山顶能够俯瞰卑尔根市的全景。海港、峡湾以及整座城市整齐排列的木房子和环绕卑尔根的山头全部尽收眼底。山上还有儿童游乐场和寻宝等亲子活动。索道的山下市中心站距离鱼市(Fisktorget)仅200米左右。

attractions.text_en: The Hardangerfjord, the gentlest of the four major fjords, is a fjord with pastoral, idyllic scenery. About 800 years ago monks came here and planted apple and almond trees, which blossom every May and bear fruit in summer. Worth seeing are waterfalls, nature parks, glaciers, and more.
attractions.text_zh: 哈当厄尔峡湾，四大峡湾中最为平缓，有田园般风景的峡湾。约800年前僧侣到此地种植了苹果树和杏树，每到5月便开花，夏季结果。值得一看的有瀑布、自然公园，冰河等。

attractions.text_en: It is one of Norway's renowned waterfall areas. Located in Norheimsund, the great waterfall surges mightily down an almost vertical slope, draping the cliff edge in a gauze-like fine mist and creating an ever-changing, never-ending rainbow effect that enchants onlookers. Nature lovers can find endless delight in the Hardangerfjord. With the majestic grandeur of the fjord and waterfalls here, there are multiple sightseeing itineraries to choose from; you can hike around the fjord, or take a kayak to explore the fjord from a brand-new angle. The mountain path is a sight not to be missed. The mountain path winds up the steep slope with the waterfall cascading among it, especially spectacular in May and June each year. A must-visit attraction of the Hardangerfjord, what makes this waterfall unique is that travelers can pass behind it without getting wet at all.
attractions.text_zh: 是挪威闻名的瀑布区之一，位于诺海姆桑德(Norheimsund)的大瀑布从近乎垂直的山坡浩浩荡荡奔腾而下，瀑布使悬崖边笼上一帘轻纱般的薄雾，在营造了一番变幻莫测、永不落幕的虹彩效果，让看客为之陶醉。大自然爱好者可以在哈当厄尔峡湾获得无穷乐趣。这里峡湾和瀑布的雄浑壮美，有多个观光游览行程可供选择，您可在峡湾四周徒步远足，或是乘坐皮艇，从全新的角度探索峡湾。山路是不容错过的景点。山路沿着陡峭的山坡蜿蜒而上，瀑布飞流其间，每年5、6月份的时候尤为壮观。哈当厄尔峡湾必去景点，这座瀑布的独特之处是旅行者可以从后面穿过瀑布，身上却一点都不被打湿。

attractions.text_en: Odda is a small town in Norway's Hardangerfjord, where the orchards are listed as a World Cultural Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 奥达（Odda）是挪威哈当厄尔峡湾中的一座小镇，其中的果园被列入世界文化遗产。

attractions.text_en: Also called the Pulpit, it gets its name from its shape resembling a church preacher's pulpit. Pulpit Rock is located in the middle of the Lysefjord; it is a naturally formed giant stone platform suspended in the air, with a vertical drop of 604 meters from the platform top to the fjord below. Jutting more than 30 meters from the connecting ridge, it stands abruptly upright amid the lofty mountains deep in the fjord—extremely spectacular and awe-inspiring. The flat rock surface has an area of about 600 square meters. The hiking trail to Pulpit Rock is 3.8 kilometers in total length, with about 330 meters of climb from the starting point. Red "T" markers line the way. The round trip from the starting point takes about 4-5 hours, of moderate intensity. Among the 50 most magnificent scenic spots in the world selected by the travel-and-lifestyle website under the US CNN, Pulpit Rock ranked first. It is also one of the best places to look down over the Lysefjord and appreciate the beauty of the fjord.
attractions.text_zh: 又叫布道台，由于形状类似教堂牧师的讲台而得名。布道石位于吕瑟峡湾中部，是一块天然凌空形成的巨型石台，台顶与下方的峡湾垂直落差604米，从接连的山脊突出30多米，突兀地直立于峡湾深处的崇山峻岭中，十分壮观，令人惊叹。岩石平面的面积约600平方米。通往布道石的登山径全长3.8公里，从起点开始有大约330米的上坡。沿途都有红色T字标记。从起点来回大概4-5小时，中等强度。美国CNN旗下旅游生活网站评选出的全球50处最壮丽景色，布道台位列第一。也是俯瞰吕瑟峡湾，领略峡湾之美的最佳地点之一。

attractions.text_en: The Lysefjord is far from the sea, reaching deep inland, its water still as a mirror without a single wave. There are none of the sea's billows and surges here, only the reflections of the high mountains and cliffs in the fjord—sometimes you can't tell which plane is the reflection and which is the real scene. There is not a single sound, only tranquility. Occasionally a small boat travels through the fjord, its bow parting the water surface to form a wave that splits to both sides of the boat, the wave's edges flecked with tiny white spray; after the boat passes, the water surface soon returns to calm.
attractions.text_zh: 吕瑟峡湾远离大海，深入内陆，水静得如同镜面，没有一丝波浪。这里没有大海的波涛和汹涌，只有高山悬崖在峡湾中的倒影，有时分不清哪个层面是倒影，哪个层面是实景。没有一点声音，只有宁静。偶尔会有一只小船行进在峡湾中，船头推开水面，形成一道波浪，分在船的两边，波浪的边缘泛着小小的白色浪花，小船过后，水面很快又恢复了平静。

attractions.text_en: Haugesund is located in southwestern Norway and is a city in Rogaland county. It sits on the Karmøy peninsula, facing the North Sea. Haugesund's history can be traced back to the Viking Age, when it was an important center of trade and seafaring. The city's name comes from the sea god Hauger in Norse mythology, meaning "the sea god's mountain."
attractions.text_zh: 海于格松位于挪威西南部，是罗加兰郡的一个城市。它坐落在卡尔达伦半岛上，面临北海。海于格松的历史可以追溯到维京时代，当时这里是重要的贸易和航海中心。城市的名字来源于挪威神话中海神海格，意为“海神的山”。

attractions.text_en: The giant sword monument located by the sea in Stavanger, commemorating the "Battle of Hafrsfjord," is a sculpture composed of three Viking swords each more than ten meters tall, representing peace, unity, and freedom respectively. Ancient swords discovered from all over the country were melted into the swords—truly "forging swords into a sword." It is now also a symbol of the city of Stavanger.
attractions.text_zh: 位于斯塔万格海边的巨剑阵纪念碑，纪念“Hafrsfjord之战”的雕塑由三把十几米高的维京巨剑组成，分表代表和平、统一和自由。剑中熔入了从全国各地发现的古剑，可谓“铸剑为剑”。现在也是斯塔万格的城市标志。

attractions.text_en: Getting to know Norway anew should begin with Stavanger's Fargegaten district. This colorful district overturns the stiff impression of Norway. The Fargegaten district is entirely different from the equally beautiful old town; the old wooden houses are painted in all kinds of colors in vivid, lifelike combinations, making Fargegaten look all the more distinctive. Along the street are cafés, restaurants, small pubs, and shops of all kinds of gifts and candies—a famous district very much worth sightseeing. It has now become a very photographed street scene in Northern Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 重新认识挪威应该从斯塔万格的法格卡腾街区开始，色彩缤纷的街区，颠覆挪威刻板的印象，法格卡腾街区与同样美丽的老城区截然不同，古老的木质房屋被粉刷成各类颜色栩栩如生的组合，使得法格卡腾看起来更与众不同，沿街都是咖啡馆、餐厅、小酒吧和各类礼品、糖果的商店，非常值得观光游览的著名街区。现在已经成为北欧出镜率很高的街头。

attractions.text_en: Kristiansand is a shining pearl in southern Norway, famous for its natural beauty, beaches, and lively cultural life. As Norway's fifth-largest city, Kristiansand is a perfect travel destination.
attractions.text_zh: 克里斯蒂安桑（Kristiansand）是挪威南部一颗璀璨的明珠，以其自然美景、海滩和活跃的文化生活而闻名。作为挪威第五大城市，克里斯蒂安桑是一个完美的旅游目的地。

attractions.text_en: Stavanger Old Town is located on the west side of Stavanger harbor and consists of 173 wooden houses built in the late 18th and early 19th centuries. The wooden houses mainly came from fishing and canning workers who settled in Stavanger. However, it is the small area on the west side of the harbor usually called "Old Stavanger" that is regarded as representative of the entire Stavanger wooden-house town. The city's two Michelin restaurants, Renaa and Sabi Omakase, tirelessly pursue the creation of fresh local cuisine, inspiring other restaurants throughout the Stavanger region.
attractions.text_zh: 斯塔万格老城区位于斯塔万格港西侧，由建于18世纪末19世纪初的173套木质房屋组成。木质房屋主要来自渔业和罐头业工人在斯塔万格定居点。但是，通常是称为“老斯塔万格”的港口西侧那一小块区域被视为整个斯塔万格木屋城的代表。城中的两家米其林餐厅Renaa和Sabi Omakase孜孜不倦地追求制作出新鲜的当地美食，激励着整个斯塔万格地区的其他餐厅。

attractions.text_en: Oslo City Hall is a brick-red building, completed in 1950 to celebrate the 900th anniversary of the founding of Oslo. It was finished only through Norway's artists continuously decorating and refining it from 1900 to 1950. The several halls inside the City Hall display works by 323 artists, comprehensively presenting Norway's history and culture as well as the people's work and life. Each room here has its special display, from furniture arrangements to figural murals and the sea views seen through the windows—everywhere makes sightseers feel its historical atmosphere. In addition, the Nobel Prize award ceremony is held here every December 10.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆市政厅是一座砖红色的建筑，是于1950年为庆祝奥斯陆建城900年而建成，它由挪威的艺术家们从1900年至1950年间不断地装饰和润色才得以完工。市政厅内部的多个大厅分别展出着323位艺术家的作品，全面地向人们展示了挪威的历史、文化以及人们的工作和生活。这里的每个房间都有特别的展示，从家具摆设到人物壁画以及可以透过窗户看到的海景，无处不让观光客感受到其历史的氛围。另外，每年12月10日诺贝尔奖的颁奖仪式在这里举行。

attractions.text_en: The Royal Palace in Oslo (1825-1848) was built in the 19th century and is the working seat of King Harald. The palace is built on a height, directly facing the city's main street—Karl Johans gate. Surrounding the palace are 330 acres of woodland and parks, and the public avenue passing through here leads straight to the commercial district in the city center.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆皇宫（1825年－1848年）建于19世纪，是哈拉尔国王的办公地。皇宫建在一片高地，正对面是市区主要街道-卡尔·约翰大街，环绕王宫的是330亩林地和公园，穿过这里的公共大道直通市中心的商业区。

attractions.text_en: The Oslo Opera House faces the small Oslofjord, and its architectural style resembles a ship. It is, after the Nidaros Cathedral (Nidarosdomen Cathedral) built in Trondheim in the early 14th century, Norway's most famous cultural building. Viewed from outside the theater, the most striking feature is the white sloping stone roof rising from the Oslofjord; visitors can stroll on the roof and take in the beautiful views of the city of Oslo. Sometimes there are free open-air concerts outside the opera house, where visitors can sit on the platform admiring the sea view while enjoying the music.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯陆歌剧院正对着奥斯陆小峡湾，建筑风格像一艘船，它是继14世纪初建造于特隆赫姆（Trondheim） 的 尼德罗斯大教堂（Nidarosdomen Cathedral）后，挪威国内著名的文化建筑。从剧院外面看，最显著的特征是白色的斜坡状石制屋顶从奥斯陆峡湾（Oslofjord）中拔地而起，游客可以在屋顶上面漫步，饱览奥斯陆的市容美景。有时候歌剧院室外会有免费的露天音乐会，游客可以坐在平台上一边欣赏海景，一边享受音乐。

attractions.text_en: The Vigeland Sculpture Park is named after the famous master sculptor Gustav Vigeland. The park has a total of 192 sculptures, amounting to 650 figure statues. The central idea of all the statues in the Vigeland Sculpture Park focuses on highlighting a single theme—"life"—portraying the various stages of a person from birth to death and giving visitors much inspiration about life, which is why it is also called the "Park of Life's Journey."
attractions.text_zh: 维尔兰雕塑公园是以著名雕塑大师古斯塔夫.维格兰（Gustav Vigeland）的名字命名的，公园共有192座雕塑，总计650个人物雕像。维格兰雕塑公园里所有雕像的中心思想，集中突出一个主题——“人生”，表 现了人从出生至死的各个阶段，给游客以许多人生启迪，因此也被称为“人生旅途公园”。

attractions.text_en: Construction of Akershus Fortress began in 1299, ordered by King Haakon V, and it has witnessed more than 700 years of Oslo's history. You can stroll among the heavy stone walls, towers, and courtyards, feeling the solidity and the weathering of a medieval fortress—a fortress that was never captured in its history. Standing on the ancient walls, you can gaze unobstructed at: Oslo City Hall and the Bygdøy peninsula, the busy Oslofjord and the mountains in the distance, the city-center wharf (Aker Brygge), and the opera house area.
attractions.text_zh: 阿克斯胡斯城堡建造始于1299年，由哈康五世国王下令修建，见证了奥斯陆700多年的历史。您可以漫步在厚重的石头城墙、塔楼和庭院中，感受中世纪堡垒的坚固与沧桑，这座堡垒在历史上从未被攻克过。站在古老的城墙上，您可以毫无遮挡地眺望：奥斯陆市政厅和比格迪半岛，繁忙的奥斯陆峡湾和远处的群山，市中心码头（Aker Brygge）和歌剧院区域。

attractions.text_en: Built in the 16th century, Aalborghus Castle was originally a defensive fortress and later became a residence of the Danish royal family. Today, although only part of the building and the underground passages remain, as a symbol of a history where royalty and the city are intertwined, its tranquil courtyard and waterside location still attract many visitors to take photos, picnic, and stroll.
attractions.text_zh: 建于16世纪的奥尔堡城堡原为防御性要塞，后成为丹麦王室官邸。如今，虽然仅余部分建筑和地下通道，但作为一段王室与城市历史交织的象征，其宁静庭院与临水位置仍吸引众多游客拍照、野餐与漫步。

attractions.text_en: Founded in the 14th century, it is one of the most important churches in Aalborg, in a typical Gothic architectural style, with the church tower rising above the city-center skyline. Inside are an exquisite organ and stained glass—a place not to be missed by lovers of religion and architecture.
attractions.text_zh: 始建于14世纪，是奥尔堡最重要的教堂之一，典型哥特式建筑风格，教堂塔楼矗立在市中心天际线之上。内部有精致的管风琴与彩绘玻璃，是宗教与建筑爱好者不可错过之地。

attractions.name_en: Hjelmerstald Old Street and the Pedestrian Street
attractions.text_en:
Hjelmerstald Old Street: This is a fairy-tale-like little lane, with colorful low houses neatly arranged, flower pots and sculptures set on the windowsills, as if you have walked into an Andersen fairy tale. Although its location is understated, its charming appeal has made it a hidden favorite for photography and strolling.
Hjelmerstald Pedestrian Street: Aalborg's main commercial district, it has preserved a large number of brick-and-timber buildings from the 16th to 19th centuries, combining shopping, cuisine, coffee, and art boutiques in one—a place where tourists' everyday sightseeing meets locals' lives. Street performers and outdoor markets are common on the street, and during festivals there are colorful light decorations and traditional dances, making it the best window for experiencing the local cultural atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh:
杜赫芬老街：这是一条童话般的小巷，色彩斑斓的低矮房屋排列整齐，窗台摆放着花盆与雕塑，仿佛走入安徒生童话。虽然地理位置低调，但其迷人魅力使其成为摄影与散步的隐藏热门地。
杜赫芬步行街：奥尔堡的主要商业街区，保留了大量16世纪至19世纪的砖木结构建筑，集购物、美食、咖啡与艺术小店于一体，是游客日常游览与本地人生活交汇之地。街上常见路边艺人表演和户外市集，节庆期间更有彩灯装饰与传统舞会，是体验本地文化氛围的最佳窗口。

attractions.text_en: Masthugget Church is located on a small hill in Gothenburg; from the platform in front of the church you can see half the city of Gothenburg, making it the best choice for looking down over Gothenburg. The church was completed in 1914, and its interior is like an inverted ship. It is considered a well-preserved building in the nostalgic National Romantic style of the medieval and Viking periods within Sweden, its hallmark being the church bell tower over 60 meters high. This is one of Gothenburg's most eye-catching buildings, and together with the Lipstick building and the statue of the sea god Poseidon, it is known as one of Gothenburg's three major landmarks.
attractions.text_zh: 马斯塔盖教堂位于哥德堡的一座小山坡上，从教堂前的平台上可以看到哥德堡半个城市的风景，是俯瞰哥德堡的不二选择。教堂于1914年竣工，内部像个倒扣着的船，被认为是瑞典境内保存完好的中世纪和维京时期的怀旧民族浪漫风格建筑，其标志是60多米高的教堂钟楼。这是哥德堡引人注意的建筑物之一，和口红楼，海王波塞冬雕像，并称为哥德堡三大地标。

attractions.text_en: Completed in 1931, the statue is a symbol of Sweden's maritime supremacy and the age of seafaring. The Poseidon statue is heroic and extraordinary, displaying graceful masculine contours, and is one of Gothenburg's most famous statues.
attractions.text_zh: 雕像完成于1931年，是瑞典海上霸权和航海时代的象征。波塞冬雕像英武不凡，展现出优美的男性曲线，是哥德堡最著名的雕像之一。

attractions.text_en: Avenyn Boulevard in the center of Gothenburg is a main thoroughfare of the city. Both sides of the street are lined with shops, cafés, restaurants, and so on, and at the end of Avenyn Boulevard are the Poseidon statue and the Gothenburg Museum of Art, which is why it has also become Gothenburg's main sightseeing boulevard.
attractions.text_zh: 哥德堡的市中心的-Avenyn大道，是哥德堡市的一条主干道。街道两旁都是商铺、咖啡馆、餐厅等，在Avenyn大道的尽头是波塞冬雕像和哥德堡艺术博物馆，因此这里也成为了哥德堡的主要观光大道。

attractions.text_en: The Andersen Museum—a dreamlike space where fairy tale and reality intertwine. In 2021 the new building, designed by Japanese master architect Kengo Kuma, opened, and it is the well-deserved cultural heart of Odense. Two-thirds of the building is underground, while above ground is a labyrinth-like green garden, like an "oasis where reality and imagination intertwine." Inspired by "The Tinderbox," it creates an immersive experience from the tiny world to the macroscopic universe. Eighteen themed exhibition rooms display over 2,000 manuscripts, letters, drawings, and personal items, including Andersen's old patched leather suitcase, top hat, and walking stick. In the multimedia room you can listen to translations of Andersen's fairy tales in 96 languages from 68 countries; the eight circular murals in the cylindrical 11th hall recreate important scenes from his life.
attractions.text_zh: 安徒生博物馆——童话与现实交织的梦幻空间；2021年由日本建筑大师隈研吾设计的新馆开幕，是欧登塞当之无愧的文化心脏；建筑三分之二位于地下，地上是迷宫般的绿意花园，仿佛“真实与想象交织的绿洲”。以《打火匣》为灵感，创造从微小世界到宏观宇宙的沉浸体验；18间主题陈列室，展出2000余件手稿、信件、画稿及私人物品，包括安徒生那只有补丁的旧皮箱、礼帽、手杖。多媒体室可聆听68国96种语言的安徒生童话译本；第11间圆柱形大厅的8幅环形壁画，再现其人生重要场景。

attractions.text_en: Located at No. 3 Munkemøllestræde, this yellow little house of only 18 square meters is where Andersen was born in 1805. He spent his childhood here, and most of those living around were from the very bottom of society—soldiers, dock workers, and people getting by on relief. This cobbler's son who came out of this slum eventually became an honored guest of European royalty. The interior of the former residence is rather small, but standing in front of the house and imagining how that sensitive boy went out from here into the world is the most moving way to understand Andersen.
attractions.text_zh: 位于蒙基莫莱街3号，这座仅18平方米的黄色小屋，是安徒生1805年诞生的地方，他在这里度过童年，周边居住的多是社会最底层——士兵、码头工人、靠救济度日者。从这片贫民窟走出的鞋匠之子，最终成为欧洲王室的座上宾；故居内部较小，但站在屋前，想象那个敏感的少年如何从这里走向世界，是理解安徒生最动人的方式。

attractions.text_en: This is a Gothic cathedral built in the 14th century, and it well reflects Odense's wealth and status during the medieval period. The interior is pure white, with an elaborately decorated Rococo pulpit, a dazzling 16th-century altar carving, and more than 300 sculptural works. Denmark's King Knud was assassinated in St. Alban's Church in 1086, and was later buried in this church named after him.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个建于14世纪的哥特式大教堂，它很能反映出欧登塞在中世纪时期的财富和地位。内部是纯白色的，有个精心装饰的洛可可式讲道坛、一个让人眼花缭乱的16世纪的圣坛雕刻以及300多个雕塑作品。丹麦的国王Knud于1086年在圣阿班教堂遇刺，后来就被埋葬在以他命名的这个教堂里。

attractions.text_en: The Funen Village—the Funen open-air museum, located among an old-style cluster of buildings. These are rural buildings left over from the 18th and 19th centuries, later rebuilt into a complete village. Inside it really does look like a small village, with livestock pens, a duck pond, apple trees, gardens, and so on. It presents Denmark's native way of life, like a complete picture of a full rural life. A visit here not only lets you experience Danish rural life, but also lets you take part in it yourself, getting close to nature and animals. The attitude toward life that Denmark expresses—living in harmony with nature—can be seen in the Funen Village. During holidays, many history-reenactment activities are also held here. When you see the people living here wearing old folk costumes and toiling diligently, it makes you feel as if you have returned to a manor in Andersen's time.
attractions.text_zh: 菲英村——菲英岛露天博物馆，位于一个老式的建筑群中。这些是18世纪和19世纪遗留的乡村建筑，后来被重建成一个完整的村庄。里面看起来的确像一个小乡村，有畜栏、养鸭塘、苹果树和花园等。呈现出丹麦原生态的生活风貌，如同一个完整的乡村生活的全貌。来此参观不仅能够体验丹麦的乡村生活，还能亲身参与进去，亲近自然和动物。丹麦所表达的与自然和谐共处的生活态度能在英菲村里看得出来。假日期间，这里还会举行很多重现历史的活动。当看到生活在这里的人们穿着古老民服，辛勤劳作，会让人误以为回到了安徒生时代的庄园。

attractions.text_en: An artificial canal built between 1669 and 1673, it brought seawater directly into Kongens Nytorv (King's New Square), thereby promoting economic development. It is made up of many brightly colored residences (built in the 17th and early 18th centuries), bars, cafés, and restaurants, which is why it has also become a landmark tourist spot in Copenhagen. Although the place is not large, Nyhavn in summer is exquisitely beautiful—the glittering river surface, with all kinds of boats on both sides and the colorful houses reflecting one another.
attractions.text_zh: 建于1669年至1673年间的一条人工运河，她将海水直接引进国王新广场，从而促进了经济的发展。它由许多颜色鲜艳住宅（建造于第17和18世纪初）、酒吧、咖啡馆和餐馆所构成，因此也成为哥本哈根地标性的旅游场所，地方虽不大，但夏天的新港美不胜收——波光粼粼的河面，两边各式的船只和彩色的房子交相辉映.

attractions.text_en: The Little Mermaid statue is located on a harbor rock in Langelinie Park in Copenhagen, Denmark, and is one of Copenhagen's famous sightseeing attractions. The Little Mermaid statue was commissioned in 1909 by Carl Jacobsen, son of the founder of Carlsberg, because he was fascinated by a ballet based on the fairy tale. So in 1912, the Danish sculptor Edvard Eriksen sculpted this Little Mermaid statue based on Andersen's fairy tale and modeled on his wife Eline Eriksen.
attractions.text_zh: 美人鱼雕像位于丹麦哥本哈根长堤公园的港口岩石上，是哥本哈根著名的观光景点之一。 美人鱼雕像在1909年时受到嘉士伯创办人的儿子卡尔·雅布克森的委托，因为他以童话故事为题材的芭蕾舞感到着迷。 于是在1912年，丹麦雕塑家爱德华·艾瑞克森根据安徒生童话并以妻子爱琳·埃里克森为蓝本，雕塑了这尊美人鱼雕像。

attractions.name_en: Changing of the Royal Guard at Amalienborg Palace
attractions.name_zh: 阿美琳堡宫皇家卫队换岗
attractions.text_en: The guards pacing back and forth on the square outside Amalienborg Palace wear tall black hats and shoulder rifles, walking expressionlessly from one corner to another and then back again. They look very adorable—if you want to take a photo with them, remember to keep a distance of 1.5 meters!
attractions.text_zh: 阿美琳堡宫外在广场上来回走动的卫兵，他们带着高高的黑色帽子，扛着枪，面无表情的从这个街角走到那个街角，然后再从那个街角走回来。看起来非常萌，如果要和他们合影，记得保持1.5米的距离哦！

attractions.text_en: In Langelinie Park at Copenhagen harbor, the Gefion Fountain is as famous worldwide as the Little Mermaid bronze statue. The fountain is composed of a group of bronze sculptures of the goddess Gefion together with four oxen and a plow. The inspiration for this fountain comes from a beautiful folk legend: Gefion asked heaven to grant her a piece of land for survival. Heaven said, however much land you can plow in one day, that is how much I will give you. So the goddess Gefion turned her four sons into mighty oxen and plowed the land day and night without rest.
attractions.text_zh: 在哥本哈根港口的长堤公园里，吉菲昂女神喷泉和小美人鱼铜像一样闻名于世。喷泉由吉菲昂女神和四条牛及套犁等一组铜塑组成，这座喷泉的灵感来源于一个美丽的民间传说：吉菲昂请求上天赐予他一片土地以求生存，上天说，你一天能犁多少地，我就送你多少，于是吉菲昂女神把他的四个儿子都变成了猛牛，日夜不停地犁地。

attractions.text_en: Frederik's Church is Denmark's most famous verdigris-green domed church, facing Amalienborg Palace across the road. Because of the extensive use of marble produced in Denmark and Norway, locals call it the "Marble Church." The Marble Church was begun in 1779, but due to financial problems it was not completed and opened until 1894. The church's enormous interior dome, 31 meters in diameter, is supported by 12 columns, and the dome is painted with portraits of Jesus' 12 apostles; the entire interior decoration and paintings are solemn, grand, dignified, and sacred. The tall figural sculptures on the church's exterior give the church an even greater sense of historical weathering.
attractions.text_zh: 腓特烈教堂是丹麦最著名的铜绿色圆顶教堂，与阿美琳堡王宫隔路相望。由于大量使用了丹麦和挪威出产的大理石，因此当地人称之为“大理石教堂”(MarbleChurch)。大理石教堂始建于1779年，但由于资金的问题，直到1894年才得以竣工和开放。教堂内部直径为31米的巨大圆顶是由12根圆柱支撑的，圆顶上绘有耶稣的12个使徒的画像，整个内部装饰与绘画庄重、大气、威严，神圣。教堂外部高大的人物雕塑，使得教堂更加具有历史的沧桑感。

attractions.text_en: This was once a Nordic defensive fortification and has now become a modern Danish military base. Its exterior is in the shape of a five-pointed star, very conspicuous on the map. Right next to it is the Little Mermaid statue, so this is a necessary passage to reach the Little Mermaid and can be considered a landmark building as well. Because it involves military matters, visitors may only tour and take photos in public areas, and must observe the icon instructions within the fortress.
attractions.text_zh: 这里曾是北欧的防御工事，现在成为丹麦的现代军事基地，外观呈五角星形，在地图上非常明显。其隔壁就是小美人鱼雕像，所以这里是到达小美人鱼的必经之地，也算是地标一样的建筑。由于涉及到军事方面，所以游客只可以在公共区域进行参观和拍照，并要遵守城堡内的图标指示。

attractions.text_en: The Round Tower (Rundetårn) was built by Christian IV and is the first part of the Trinitatis Church complex. For 17th-century scholars, it combined the three most important facilities in one: an observatory, a student church, and a university library. Europe's oldest observatory still in use—the observatory at the top of the Round Tower houses an excellent astronomical telescope, where anyone can gaze at the starry sky during the winter months or at certain times in summer. This observatory was originally built for the university and long served as a place for astronomical observation and tracking comets; after 1861 it was moved to a newer, more modern observatory.
attractions.text_zh: 圆塔(Rundetårn)由克里斯钦四世修建，是三一教堂建筑群的第一部分，对17世纪的学者来说，它集三种最重要的设施于一身：天文台、学生教堂和大学图书馆。欧洲古老的仍在使用中的天文台——位于圆塔顶部的天文台里容纳了一个极佳的天文望远镜，在这里任何人都能在冬天的几个月或者夏天的某些时间凝视星空。这座天文台原本是为大学修建，一直作为天文观测以及追踪彗星的场所，1861年以后搬去更新更现代的天文台。

attractions.text_en: The Royal Library is one of the most important landmark buildings on the Copenhagen waterfront. Its surface is clad in black granite, with clean, crisp lines and a gleaming facade, and it is acclaimed by the world as the "Black Diamond"—one of Copenhagen's architectural treasures. The library has seven floors and a basement. The solid black cube is split in two by a huge glass atrium, which houses most of the public functions. This central space allows you to enjoy a panoramic view of the waterfront, and also serves as an important source of daylight, distributed throughout the entire building. If you are interested in architecture and history, you can go to the Royal Danish Library for a cup of coffee and experience the water view.
attractions.text_zh: 皇家图书馆是哥本哈根滨水最重要的标志性建筑之一。表面覆盖着黑色花岗岩，线条简洁利落、立面闪闪发亮，被世人誉为“黑钻石”，是哥本哈根的建筑瑰宝之一。图书馆有七层和一个地下室。实心的黑色立方体被一个巨大的玻璃中庭一分为二，中庭容纳了大部分公共功能。这个中心空间，可以欣赏滨水的全景，也作为一个重要的日光来源，分散到整个建筑中。如果您对建筑和历史感兴趣，您可以前往丹麦语皇家图书馆喝杯咖啡，体验水景。

attractions.text_en: If the Louvre bears witness to the glory of the Gauls, then the Île de la Cité, Notre-Dame de Paris and the Hôtel de Ville de Paris record the indissoluble bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Île de la Cité. Without the Île de la Cité, there would be no Paris as it is today.
attractions.text_zh: 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: The Cathedral of Notre-Dame de Paris is located on the Île de la Cité in the heart of Paris and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. Built in the Gothic style, it allows you to take a close-up look at its appearance during the reconstruction following the great fire.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西堤岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，可近距离一睹历经大火后重建中的风貌。

attractions.text_en: It is one of the oldest museums in the world and a world-renowned treasure house of art. The Louvre building is shaped like a "U", divided into a new part and an old part. The entrance at the glass pyramid in front of the Louvre was designed by the master Chinese-American architect I. M. Pei. Here are treasured 25,000 art treasures, with as many as over 400,000 exhibits, encompassing artworks from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria and Rome to the European Middle Ages and the countries of the East. It can be called the greatest palace of art in human history.
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着2.5万件艺术珍品，展品更是多达40余万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上大的艺术殿堂。

attractions.text_en: Located in the middle section of the Champs-Élysées, on the north bank of the Seine, it is the most renowned square in France. The square was built in the 18th century, originally constructed by order of Louis XV to proclaim his supreme imperial power. Originally named "Place de la Révolution", it witnessed the dark and bloody history before and after the French Revolution and the people's tenacious struggle.
attractions.text_zh: 位于香榭丽舍大道中段，塞纳河北岸，是法国最负盛名的广场。广场建于18世纪，最初由路易十五下令营建，以昭示自己至高无上的皇权。原名为”革命广场“，见证了法国大革命前后的黑暗血腥的历史与人民的顽强抗争。

attractions.text_en: The Champ de Mars is a large strip-shaped park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, lying between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the École Militaire of Paris to its southeast. Before the latter half of the 18th century, this was an abandoned plot of empty land. It was not until the École Militaire was established in 1765 that its status gradually rose, when its main purpose was to serve as a place for military training. During the French Revolution, on 17 July 1791, a massacre and bloodshed once took place here. Later, France used this site to host several World Expositions as well as the 1900 Olympic Games.
attractions.text_zh: 战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。 在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次的世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the symbol of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en: Take the famous "Bateaux Mouches" cruise boats with transparent cabins, sailing along the banks of the Seine which blends together numerous sights. Over a 3.2-kilometre journey of about 1 hour, it passes such famous landmarks as Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées and the Île de la Cité. On the surface of the Seine you can feel the romantic night scenery of Paris, the beautiful views and the wonderful music — it is called "the in-depth tour of Paris not to be missed".
attractions.text_zh: 乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西黛岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the period of France's feudal rule. In terms of content it was not only the French court, but also the administrative centre of the state, and a concrete embodiment of the social and political views and the way of life of France at that time. It was the first time since the ancient Roman Empire that Europe demonstrated the power of an autocratic regime capable of concentrating such enormous manpower, material resources and financial resources. At that time, in order to build it, Louis XIV employed more than thirty thousand workers as well as architects, engineers and technicians. Apart from having to solve the complex technical problems arising from constructing a large-scale building complex, they also had to solve problems in all aspects such as water supply and roads. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully proves the progress of France's economy and technology at that time and the wisdom of the labouring people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来，第一次表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann lies between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are the two great department stores of Paris, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, the author of "In Search of Lost Time", once completed the greater part of the writing of "In Search of Lost Time" in his residence at No. 102 on this street.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大道位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en: The Paris Opera was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861. It is a consummate masterpiece of eclecticism, its architecture perfectly combining several architectural forms such as the ancient Greek and Roman colonnade and the Baroque. Grand in scale, exquisite and meticulous, resplendent and magnificent, it is acclaimed as a theatre in which painting, marble and gilded ornament shine upon one another, giving people the greatest enjoyment. It is one of the typical buildings of Napoleon III.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎歌剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，是折衷主义登峰造极的作品，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受，是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the fashion capital Milan and visit Sforza Castle (exterior); then tour the Milan Cathedral and stroll through the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon, travel to Lake Garda to enjoy the lake and mountain scenery at the foot of the Alps, then continue to Trento to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往时尚之都米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观）；随后游览米兰大教堂，漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色，之后前往特伦托入住酒店。
夜宿：NH特伦托酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in Trento's ultra-modern Le Albere science and culture district, a green hotel that combines sustainability with design. Designed by the Italian master architect Renzo Piano, it features not only clean and elegant exterior lines but also eco-friendly materials and energy-saving systems inside, reflecting a dual respect for nature and the city. Just steps from the hotel is the Trento science museum MUSE. Strolling along the Adige River, you can easily reach Trento's old town to explore the magnificent Trento Cathedral and charming medieval alleys. The surrounding dining options are rich and varied: you can visit Michelin-recommended restaurants to taste creative northern Italian cuisine, or enjoy authentic Trento flavors at local restaurants.
accommodation.text_zh: NH特伦托酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店坐落在特伦托现代感十足的阿尔达通科学文化区（Le Albere），是一家兼具可持续理念与设计感的绿色酒店。酒店由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计，不仅外观线条简约优雅， 内部也 采用环保材料与节能系统 ，体现 了对自然与城市的双重尊重。走出酒店几步之遥就是特伦托科学博物馆MUSE。沿着阿迪杰河散步，还能轻松抵达特伦托老城区，探索宏伟的特伦托大教堂和迷人的中世纪街巷。 周边美食选择丰富，既可前往米其林推荐餐厅品尝创意北意料理，也能在本地餐厅享用地道特伦托风味佳肴。

highlights.text_en:
Lake Garda (Lago di Garda)
A lake within Italy, it spans the three regions of Lombardy (Lombardia), Veneto (Veneto), and Trentino-Alto Adige (Trentino-Alto Adige). Here lakes and mountains converge, with a mild and pleasant climate, making it one of the Italians' most beloved holiday destinations. Like a sapphire set at the foot of the Alps, it quietly sparkles with clear lake water and the languid light of Southern Europe. It is also a treasure trove, gathering charming towns, historical sites, cuisine, and outdoor activities. Each town has its own charm and unique attractions for visitors to admire.
highlights.text_zh:
加尔达湖 Lago di Garda
意大利境内的湖泊，横跨伦巴第（Lombardia）、威尼托（Veneto）与特伦蒂诺-上阿迪杰（Trentino-Alto Adige）三个大区，湖光山色交汇，气候温和宜人，是意大利人心中钟爱的度假胜地之一。它如同一颗镶嵌在阿尔卑斯山脚下的蓝宝石，静静闪耀着清澈湖光与南欧的慵懒光影。它还是一个宝库，汇聚了迷人的城镇、历史遗迹、美食和户外活动。每个城镇都有自己的魅力和独特的景点供游客欣赏。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete; it is hailed as one of Italy's magnificent Gothic structures, with hundreds of spires soaring into the clouds and thousands of statues carved on its white marble facade. The interior is vast and spacious, with sunlight filtering through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, casting a hazy light full of solemn religious atmosphere. In the crypt of the cathedral, the remains of the Church of Santa Tecla, which stood on the original site, are still preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: Built in the 19th century, this cross-shaped glass-vaulted gallery is not only one of the world's oldest shopping malls, but also a city-scale model of art and architecture. Here you will find the flagship stores of Italian luxury brands such as Prada and Gucci, but even without shopping, strolling through it is like walking through a museum. At the old-fashioned cafes at the end of the gallery, such as Caffe Biffi or Savini Milano, you can order an espresso or sample tiramisu dessert, experiencing the composed and elegant pace of Italian life.
attractions.text_zh: 这条19世纪修建的十字形玻璃拱顶长廊不仅是世界上最古老的购物中心之一，更是一座城市级的艺术与建筑典范。这里汇聚了Prada、Gucci等意大利奢侈品牌旗舰店，但即便不购物，漫步其中也如同穿行于一座博物馆。在长廊尽头的老字号咖啡馆，如Caffè Biffi或Savini Milano，您可点一杯意式浓缩咖啡或品尝提拉米苏甜点，体会意式生活节奏的从容与优雅。

attractions.text_en: Sforza Castle is one of Milan's most important buildings and a witness to Milan's eventful history. Viewed from above, the entire castle resembles a grand duchy, with high walls on four sides and a meticulously planned park. Built in the 14th century by the Count of Sforza as a castle, it later became the residence of the Sforza family, witnessing the whole process from the family's heyday to its decline. The castle has now been converted by the Milan municipal government into a museum, housing the Museum of Applied Arts and Musical Instruments, the Archaeological Museum, and the Museum of Ancient Art; its rear gate is the Arch of Peace, named for the renovation by the ruler Francesco.
attractions.text_zh: 斯福尔扎城堡是米兰最重要的建筑之一，是米兰沧桑历史的见证。俯瞰整个城堡像一个大公国，有四面的高墙和精致规划过的公园。在14世纪时由斯福尔扎伯爵作为城堡而建，而后成为斯福尔扎家族的住所，见证了从鼎盛时期到家族衰败的全过程。现城堡被米兰市政府辟为博物馆，其中有应用艺术和乐曲博物馆、考古博物馆、古代艺术博物馆，他的后门是和平门，是统治者费朗西斯科改造得名的。

attractions.text_en: Lake Garda lies between the majestic Alps and the fertile Po Valley, and is far more than just a natural wonder. It is also a treasure trove, gathering charming towns, historical sites, cuisine, and outdoor activities. Each town has its own charm and unique attractions for visitors to admire.
attractions.text_zh: 加尔达湖坐落在雄伟的阿尔卑斯山和肥沃的波河谷之间，不仅仅是自然奇观。它还是一个宝库，汇聚了迷人的城镇、历史遗迹、美食和户外活动。每个城镇都有自己的魅力和独特的景点供游客欣赏。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the old town of Bolzano and stroll through the old town's streets and alleys. Then travel to the town of Ortisei, where you can take the cable car to the summit of Seceda to look down on the Dolomite peaks, or head to the Alpe di Siusi plateau meadows to admire the alpine meadow scenery. After that, travel to the Funes Valley to photograph from outside the Church of St. John in the village of Santa Maddalena (the Lonely Church); after the tour, return to the hotel.
Overnight: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Because the Seceda and Alpe di Siusi cable cars are located in the high alpine areas of the Alps, in the event of extreme weather or routine maintenance, operations will be suspended for safety maintenance and inspection. In such cases, the cable car cannot be ridden, and the cable car fee will be refunded to the traveler.
overview.text_zh:
上午前往博尔扎诺老城漫步 于老城街巷。 随后前往奥蒂塞伊小镇，可乘缆车登顶刀锋山俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群，或前往休斯山高原草甸欣赏高山草原风光。之后前往富内斯山谷，外观打卡圣马达莱娜村的圣约翰教堂（孤独教堂），游览结束后返回酒店。
夜宿：NH特伦托酒店 或同等4星级酒店
注意：由于刀锋山和休斯山缆车位于阿尔卑斯山脉高山区域，如发生极端天气或例行检修，将暂停营运，以保全安全维护和检修。在此情况下，缆车将无法乘坐，缆车费用将退还给游客。

accommodation.text_en: NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in Trento's ultra-modern Le Albere science and culture district, a green hotel that combines sustainability with design. Designed by the Italian master architect Renzo Piano, it features not only clean and elegant exterior lines but also eco-friendly materials and energy-saving systems inside, reflecting a dual respect for nature and the city. Just steps from the hotel is the Trento science museum MUSE. Strolling along the Adige River, you can easily reach Trento's old town to explore the magnificent Trento Cathedral and charming medieval alleys. The surrounding dining options are rich and varied: you can visit Michelin-recommended restaurants to taste creative northern Italian cuisine, or enjoy authentic Trento flavors at local restaurants.
accommodation.text_zh: NH特伦特酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店坐落在特伦托现代感十足的阿尔达通科学文化区（Le Albere），是一家兼具可持续理念与设计感的绿色酒店。酒店由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计，不仅外观线条简约优雅， 内部也 采用环保材料与节能系统 ，体现 了对自然与城市的双重尊重。走出酒店几步之遥就是特伦托科学博物馆MUSE。沿着阿迪杰河散步，还能轻松抵达特伦托老城区，探索宏伟的特伦托大教堂和迷人的中世纪街巷。 周边美食选择丰富，既可前往米其林推荐餐厅品尝创意北意料理，也能在本地餐厅享用地道特伦托风味佳肴。

highlights.text_en:
Take the Seceda cable car to admire the magnificent jagged mountain scenery
The Seceda cable car takes you quickly up to one of the magnificent peaks in the Dolomites - Seceda, famous for its peculiar, sharp ridges and vast alpine meadows. As you ride the cable car, the views of breathtaking valleys and peaks fill the windows; upon reaching the summit, the view opens up, allowing you to overlook the rolling mountains and tranquil villages. Whether hiking in summer or skiing in winter, the natural beauty and pure air of Seceda make it hard to leave; it is a paradise for nature lovers.
highlights.text_zh:
乘坐刀锋山（Seceda）缆车，欣赏锯齿状的壮丽山景
刀锋山缆车带你快速登上多洛米蒂山脉中壮丽的山峰-刀锋山，这里以奇特的锐利山脊和广阔的高山草甸闻名。乘坐缆车时，窗外尽是令人屏息的山谷和峰峦景色，抵达山顶后，视野开阔，可以俯瞰连绵起伏的群山和宁静的村庄。无论是夏季徒步还是冬季滑雪，刀锋山的自然美景和纯净空气都让人流连忘返，是大自然爱好者的天堂。

attractions.text_en: Bolzano (Bolzano), the capital of Italy's South Tyrol province, lies in the embrace of the Alps and blends Italian and Austrian cultural characteristics. The city is famous for its well-preserved medieval old town, rich historical sites, and beautiful natural scenery. You can stroll along the cobblestone streets of the old town, admire the Gothic and Renaissance architecture, and experience the blending of the Italian and German languages. Walther Square in the city center is the heart of the city, surrounded by historic buildings and cafes, an ideal place to feel the local life.
attractions.text_zh: 博尔扎诺（Bolzano），意大利南蒂罗尔省的首府，位于阿尔卑斯山脉的怀抱中，融合了意大利和奥地利的文化特色。这座城市以其保存完好的中世纪老城区、丰富的历史遗迹和美丽的自然景观而闻名。您可以漫步于老城区的鹅卵石街道，欣赏哥特式和文艺复兴风格的建筑，体验意大利和德国语言的交融。市中心的瓦尔特广场是城市的心脏，周围环绕着历史建筑和咖啡馆，是感受当地生活的理想场所。

attractions.text_en: The Maddalena Lonely Church in the Dolomites is a small wooden church, nestled in the Funes Valley of the Italian Alps, backed by the jagged Geisler peaks. This Baroque-style church was built in 1744, surrounded by vast pastures and forests, with scenery that varies through the four seasons - lush green in spring and summer, golden in autumn, and covered in white snow in winter. Because of its secluded and isolated location and the superb mountain backdrop, the church has become a popular spot for photographers, as well as an ideal starting point for hiking and exploring the valley. The nearby town of Santa Maddalena offers convenient transportation and viewing angles, allowing visitors to easily admire this iconic landscape of the Dolomites.
attractions.text_zh: 多洛米蒂山脉的马达莱娜孤独教堂是一座小巧的木质教堂，坐落在意大利阿尔卑斯山的富内斯山谷中，背靠锯齿状的盖斯勒峰。这座巴洛克风格的教堂建于1744年，周围是广阔的牧场和森林，四季景色各异，春夏绿意盎然，秋季金黄一片，冬季则被白雪覆盖。教堂因其遗世独立的位置和绝佳的山景背景，成为摄影师的热门取景地，也是徒步探索山谷的理想起点。附近的Santa Maddalena小镇提供便利的交通和观景视角，让游客能轻松欣赏这一多洛米蒂的标志性景观。

attractions.text_en: The town of Ortisei, an elegant town located in the Val Gardena valley, blends the dual cultural characteristics of Italy and Austria. Its cobblestone streets, traditional woodcarving craft, and painted houses present travelers with the unique charm of South Tyrol. It is also a renowned art and handicraft center of the Dolomite region; after lunch, you may take a short stroll, visit the local craft shops, or enjoy an Alpine-flavored hot chocolate at an outdoor cafe.
attractions.text_zh: 奥蒂塞伊小镇，这座位于加尔代纳山谷（Val Gardena）山谷中的典雅城镇，融合了意大利与奥地利的双重文化特色。其鹅卵石街道、传统木雕工艺和彩绘房舍为旅人呈现出南蒂罗尔独有的风情。这里也是多洛米蒂地区著名的艺术与手工艺中心，不妨在午餐后稍作散步，参观当地的工艺店铺，或是在露天咖啡座享受一杯阿尔卑斯风味的热巧克力。

attractions.text_en: Seceda (Seceda) is one of the most iconic peaks in the Dolomites; its unique jagged ridge and vast plateau scenery are breathtaking. Taking the cable car straight from Ortisei to the Seceda ridge is one of the best ways to explore the Dolomites. Seceda is famous for its blade-like mountain ridge lines and is a paradise for photographers. The summit offers an open view, where you can enjoy a short hike or simply quietly admire the vast alpine meadows and bizarre rocky peaks, experiencing the tranquility and grandeur of nature.
attractions.text_zh: 刀锋山（Seceda） 是多洛米蒂最具标志性的山峰之一，其独特的锯齿状山脊和辽阔的高原风光令人叹为观止。从奥蒂塞伊搭乘缆车直达刀锋山脊，是探索多洛米蒂山的最佳方式之一。刀锋山以其刀锋状的山峰线条闻名，是摄影师的天堂。山顶视野开阔，您可享受简短的徒步或只是静静欣赏辽阔的高山草原与奇岩峰丛，体验自然的宁静与壮观。

attractions.text_en:
The Alpe di Siusi, located between the Val Gardena valley and the Schlern peak, borders the Sciliar-Catinaccio Nature Park to the west. Although it is called a mountain, it is more like an alpine meadow, undulating like waves and forming a drop of around 300 meters. This area has always been excellent pasture, and paired with the iconic dolomite rock, it is all the more eye-catching. Europe's high-altitude alpine meadow is the Alpe di Siusi plateau in the Dolomites of Italy; in spring and summer, it is a sea of flowers, and in winter it is a snow-white ski paradise. Because of the vast terrain, you can also admire many nearby mountain ranges, such as the Sella group, the Rosengarten massif, and Langkofel, among others.
Note: The Alpe di Siusi plateau cable car is an optional experience requiring a separate ticket; the related fees are not included in the itinerary, please be aware.
attractions.text_zh:
休斯山，位于加尔代纳山谷和施勒恩峰之间，西部与施勒恩峰-卡提纳自然公园接壤。虽然说它是山，却更像是高山草甸，如波浪般起伏，形成300米左右的落差。这一地区一直是优良牧场，搭配上标志性的白云岩，便更加吸引眼球。欧洲的高海拔高山草甸是在意大利多洛米蒂休斯高原，春夏，这里是一片花海；冬天则是白茫茫的滑雪圣地。由于地域广阔，还能欣赏到附近的很多山脉，比如塞拉山组，玫瑰花园闪族和长石山等等。
注意：休斯高原缆车属于可选体验项目，需另行购票，相关费用不包含在行程内，敬请知悉

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the water city of Venice. Upon arrival, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). After that, travel to Rimini to check in at the hotel. In the evening, freely explore the Rimini city center, immerse yourself in the lively local nightlife, and taste the local cuisine!
Overnight: Hotel Fellini Parco or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往水城威尼斯，到达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观）。之后前往里米尼 入住酒店 ，晚上自由游览里米尼市区，融入当地热闹的夜生活，品尝当地美食！
夜宿：费里尼帕尔科酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Hotel Fellini Parco or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in the heart of Rimini, Italy, adjacent to the famous Federico Fellini Park (Parco Federico Fellini), and just steps from the Adriatic Sea beach. In the morning you can enjoy a hearty breakfast in the Grand Hotel's historic lobby or on the garden terrace. The hotel has Rimini's private beach, with a beach restaurant and bar where guests can have lunch or aperitifs at sunset. In addition, the hotel's "La Dolce Vita" spa center is equipped with a heated whirlpool, sauna, Turkish bath, and fitness area, offering an all-round relaxation experience. The hotel is surrounded by rich attractions, and within walking distance you can reach the Rimini Ferris wheel (La Ruota di Rimini) and the Fountain of the Four Horses (Fontana dei Quattro Cavalli). There are several recommended restaurants near the hotel. "La Casina del Bosco" is famous for its traditional Italian flatbread and fresh local ingredients. "Osteria e Pataca" offers authentic Emilia-Romagna regional dishes.
accommodation.text_zh: 费里尼帕尔科酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店坐落于意大利里米尼的心脏地带，毗邻著名的费德里科·费里尼公园（Parco Federico Fellini），距离亚得里亚海海滩仅数步之遥。早晨您可以在Grand Hotel历史悠久的大厅或花园露台上享用丰盛的早餐。酒店拥有里米尼的私人海滩，设有海滩餐厅和酒吧，宾客可在此享用午餐或日落时的开胃酒。此外，酒店的“La Dolce Vita”水疗中心配备加热按摩泳池、桑拿、土耳其浴和健身区，提供全方位的放松体验。酒店周边景点丰富，步行即可到达里米尼摩天轮（La Ruota di Rimini）和四匹马喷泉（Fontana dei Quattro Cavalli）。酒店附近有多家值得推荐的餐厅。“La Casina del Bosco”以其传统的意式薄饼和新鲜的本地食材而闻名。“Osteria e Pataca”提供地道的艾米利亚-罗马涅地区菜肴。

highlights.text_en:
The world's beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic," still dazzlingly radiant
Venice, as one of the important cities of the Renaissance period, is made up of 118 small islands, connected into one by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands," and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the world's beautiful squares, "St. Mark's Square," along with the beautiful Grand Canal, the phoenix-reborn La Fenice opera house, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs of which Xu Zhimo wrote, and breathtakingly beautiful arcades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting, and also the filming location of many movie scenes; her unique temperament leaves every visitor enchanted and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: St. Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco), also known as Venice's central square, has always been the center of public activity for Venice's politics, religion, and traditional festivals. St. Mark's Square is a rectangular square enclosed by buildings such as the Doge's Palace, St. Mark's Basilica, St. Mark's Campanile, the new and old Procuratie buildings, the Napoleonic Wing connecting the two buildings, the square campanile of St. Mark's Basilica, and the Marciana Library, together with Venice's Grand Canal. It is about 170 meters long, about 80 meters wide on the east side, and about 55 meters wide on the west side. The buildings surrounding the square are all exquisite Renaissance-period structures.
attractions.text_zh: 圣马可广场(Plazza San Marco) 又称威尼斯中心广场，一直是威尼斯的政治、宗教和传统节日的公共活动中心。圣马可广场是由公爵府、圣马可大教堂、圣马可钟楼、新、旧行政官邸大楼、连接两大楼的拿破仑翼大楼、圣马可大教堂的四角形钟楼和圣马可图书馆等建筑和威尼斯大运河所围成的长方形广场，长约170米，东边宽约80米，西侧宽约55米。广场四周的建筑都是文艺复兴时期的精美建筑。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: This magnificent Byzantine-style church, famous for its five onion-shaped domes and golden mosaic decorations, embodies the glorious history of Venice's golden age and its trade with the East. Its exterior is rich in detail, blending the artistic languages of East and West; it is a landmark not to be missed in Venice.
attractions.text_zh: 这座拜占庭风格的华丽教堂，以其五座洋葱形圆顶和金色马赛克装饰而闻名，体现了威尼斯黄金时代与东方贸易的辉煌历史。外观细节丰富，融合东方与西方的艺术语言，是威尼斯不可错过的地标。

attractions.text_en: Adjacent to St. Mark's Basilica, it was the former residence of the Doge of the Republic of Venice and the center of government. This Gothic building crafted from pink marble has an exquisitely beautiful exterior, with arcades and sculptural details full of power and elegance; it is a symbol of Venetian politics and art.
attractions.text_zh: 紧邻圣马可大教堂，是昔日威尼斯共和国总督的官邸与政府中心。这座粉色大理石打造的哥特式建筑外观精美绝伦，拱廊与雕塑细节充满力量与优雅，是威尼斯政治与艺术的象征。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was, in ancient times, the only route by which condemned prisoners were escorted from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, with a vaulted top covering it, sealed very tightly, with only two small windows facing the canal side. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and as they passed over this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows, losing their freedom from then on, and involuntarily letting out sounds of sighing. It is said that if lovers kiss beneath the bridge, they can be together forever; and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
