attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head south along the coast from Rimini, passing through Pescara in the Abruzzo region. In the afternoon, travel to Bari in the Puglia region to check in, freely visiting the Basilica of San Nicola (exterior), or stroll through the flagstone streets and alleys of the old town and the pedestrian shopping street, to feel the relaxed pace of southern Italy.
Overnight: Mercure Bari or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早晨从里米尼沿海南下，途经阿布鲁佐大区佩斯卡拉。午后前往普利亚大区巴里入住，自由参观圣尼古拉大教堂（外观），或漫步于老城区石板街巷，购物步行街等感受南意的松弛感。
夜宿：巴里美居酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Mercure Bari or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The Mercure Bari sits in an old park, surrounded by greenery, and is adjacent to: "Old Bari," the Petruzzelli Theatre, the seaside promenade, the shopping street, and the bar street. The hotel has a large outdoor swimming pool and a fitness center with a gym, sauna room, and Turkish bath. The hotel offers a restaurant with an open kitchen, serving Puglia-style cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh: 巴里美居酒店 或同等4星级酒店 巴里美居酒店坐落在古老的公园中，周围绿荫环绕，酒店毗邻："老巴里"、Petruzzelli 剧院、滨海长廊、购物街和酒吧街。酒店配有大型室外游泳池，设有健身中心，内设健身房、桑拿房和土耳其浴缸。酒店提供带开放式厨房的餐厅，供应普利亚风味美食。

highlights.text_en: Pescara is a seaside town full of Mediterranean charm, where sunshine, waves, and cuisine together weave a languid and enchanting holiday atmosphere. Pescara's seafood restaurants are an experience absolutely not to be missed. You can taste fish caught that day, clam pasta drizzled with olive oil and lemon juice, or a whole charcoal-grilled sea bass, paired with a glass of the local specialty Montepulciano wine, turning dinner into a true feast for the palate. Whether strolling through the city or lying on the beach sunbathing, you can immerse yourself in the leisure and deliciousness of Italian life.
highlights.text_zh: 佩斯卡拉是一座充满地中海风情的海滨小城，在这里，阳光、海浪与美食共同编织出慵懒而迷人的假日氛围。佩斯卡拉的海鲜餐厅是绝对不能错过的体验。可以品尝到当天捕捞的鲜鱼，淋上橄榄油和柠檬汁的蛤蜊意面，或是炭烤的整条海鲈鱼，搭配一杯本地特产的蒙特普尔恰诺葡萄酒，让晚餐变成一场真正的味觉盛宴。无论是漫步城市还是躺在沙滩上享受日光浴，可以沉浸在意式生活的闲适与美味中。

attractions.text_en: Pescara is a seaside town full of Mediterranean charm, where sunshine, waves, and cuisine together weave a languid and enchanting holiday atmosphere. Pescara's seafood restaurants are an experience absolutely not to be missed. You can taste fish caught that day, clam pasta drizzled with olive oil and lemon juice, or a whole charcoal-grilled sea bass, paired with a glass of the local specialty Montepulciano wine, turning dinner into a true feast for the palate. Whether strolling through the city or lying on the beach sunbathing, you can immerse yourself in the leisure and deliciousness of Italian life.
attractions.text_zh: 佩斯卡拉是一座充满地中海风情的海滨小城，在这里，阳光、海浪与美食共同编织出慵懒而迷人的假日氛围。佩斯卡拉的海鲜餐厅是绝对不能错过的体验。可以品尝到当天捕捞的鲜鱼，淋上橄榄油和柠檬汁的蛤蜊意面，或是炭烤的整条海鲈鱼，搭配一杯本地特产的蒙特普尔恰诺葡萄酒，让晚餐变成一场真正的味觉盛宴。无论是漫步城市还是躺在沙滩上享受日光浴，可以沉浸在意式生活的闲适与美味中。

attractions.text_en: Located in the old town of Bari, Italy, the Basilica of San Nicola was built in 1807. The church backs onto the Adriatic coast and was built in memory of the saint San Nicola. San Nicola is the prototype of today's Christmas Santa Claus; he was a kind-hearted bishop who lived in 4th-century Asia Minor. From the 6th century AD, San Nicola already had many believers in Turkey, and later he began to spread through churches in Greece and Russia; by the 10th century, Italy and Western European countries such as Germany, England, and France also began to have believers. His holy remains were brought to Bari, Italy, in 1087 AD and buried in this church. Today, this church is still a religious holy site of Bari and indeed of Italy.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落于意大利巴里老城里的圣尼古拉大教堂建造于1807年。教堂背靠亚德里亚海滨，是为纪念圣人圣尼古拉斯而建造。圣尼古拉斯就是现在圣诞节圣诞老人的原形．他是一位生活在４世纪小亚细亚的善良主教。公元六世纪开始，圣尼古拉斯在土耳其就有不少的信仰者，后来在希腊与俄罗斯的教堂也开始流传，到了十世纪时，意大利以及西欧的国家如德国、英国、法国也都开始有信仰者。他的圣遗体则于公元1087年被带到意大利的巴利埋葬于此教堂。现在，这座教堂仍是巴里，乃至意大利的宗教圣地。

attractions.text_en: Bari (Bari) is the capital of Italy's Puglia region, enjoying the scenery of the Adriatic coast, with tree-lined boulevards of tall palm trees, blending historical sites, seaside leisure, and authentic cuisine. Among them, the old town has a strong historical atmosphere - medieval tunnels and ruins, the Swabian Castle, San Sabino Cathedral - giving you a sense of the "city beneath the city." The most representative is the exterior of the Basilica of San Nicola (Basilica di San Nicola); this 11th-century Romanesque church is a pilgrimage site shared by both Catholics and Eastern Orthodox, with a solemn and tranquil interior atmosphere. And then there is the old town of Bari (Bari Vecchia), where the lanes are narrow and winding and the white stone walls are mottled - it is the most authentic portrait of southern Italy.
attractions.text_zh: 巴里（Bari）是意大利普利亚大区的首府，坐拥亚得里亚海沿岸风光，高大棕榈树的林荫大道、融合了历史遗迹、海滨休闲和地道美食，其中老城区具有浓郁的历史氛围——中世纪的隧道和遗迹，斯瓦比亚城堡、圣萨比诺大教堂，感受“城市之下的城市”。最具代表性的圣尼古拉大教堂外观（Basilica di San Nicola），这座11世纪的罗马式教堂是天主教与东正教共同朝圣之地，内部气氛庄严宁静。然而巴里老城（Bari Vecchia），这里巷弄狭窄曲折、白石墙面斑驳，是最真实的南意写照。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set out from Bari to the cliff town of Polignano a Mare, then travel to the fairy-tale white stone town of Alberobello. In the afternoon, arrive at the stone ancient city of Matera, explore the "Sassi" old town of Matera, and take a deep stroll through classic Puglia scenery.
Overnight: UNA Hotel Matera or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午从巴里出发，前往悬崖小镇滨海波利尼亚诺，随后前往童话白石小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛，下午抵达石头古城马泰拉，探索马泰拉的「Sassi」老城区，深度漫步普利亚经典风光。
夜宿：马泰拉UNA酒店 或同级4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: UNA Hotel Matera or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The UNA Hotel is set within a 5-hectare park on the Lucanian hills; from the hotel's terrace and every corner of the garden, you can admire the lush park surrounding the entire hotel. Here, the azure sky and the verdant green of the surrounding mountains complement each other, forming a picture of exquisite beauty. The hotel has indoor and outdoor pools as well as a spa area, and the hotel's 5 restaurants of different styles offer signature delicacies to satisfy your taste buds.
accommodation.text_zh: 马泰拉UNA酒店 或同级4星级酒店 UNA酒店坐落于卢卡尼亚山丘上占地 5 公顷的公园内，从酒店的露台和花园的每个角落，都能欣赏到环绕整个酒店的葱郁公园。在这里，蔚蓝的天空与周围群山的翠绿交相辉映，构成一幅美轮美奂的画卷。酒店设有室内外泳池以及SPA区域，酒店不同风味的 5 间餐厅，为您提供满足味蕾的特色美食。

highlights.text_en:
World Cultural Heritage - the Alberobello mushroom houses
Alberobello (Alberobello), located in the Puglia region of southern Italy, is a charming town that seems to have walked out of a fairy tale, famous worldwide for its unique Trulli (Trulli) architecture. These stone houses with white walls and grey conical roofs date back as early as the 14th century, and were listed as a World Cultural Heritage site by UNESCO in 1996. Such buildings are stacked with dry stone masonry, without using cement to bond them, and the roofs are mostly painted with mysterious symbols; they are representative of the traditional folk dwellings of southern Italy. Freely stroll around the town at ease, photographing the fairy-tale scene of rows of Trulli stone houses set against the evening glow.
highlights.text_zh:
世界文化遗产-阿尔贝罗贝洛磨菇屋
阿尔贝罗贝洛（Alberobello）位于意大利南部普利亚大区，是一座仿佛从童话中走出的迷人小镇，以其独特的特鲁利（Trulli）建筑而闻名于世。这些白色墙体、灰色圆锥形屋顶的石屋，最早可追溯至14世纪，1996年被联合国教科文组织列为世界文化遗产。此类建筑以干式石砌叠成，无使用水泥黏合，屋顶多画有神秘符号，是意大利南部传统民居的代表。自由在镇区内轻松散步，拍摄成排Trulli石屋与晚霞交映的童话画面。

attractions.text_en: This cliff-top town is hailed as the "Mediterranean balcony of Puglia." White houses are built against the rock walls, overlooking the deep blue Adriatic Sea. The most famous scene is the Polignano a Mare bay (Lama Monachile) - a deeply cut rocky gorge mouth, connected by a stone arch bridge and natural caves, a classic picture for travelers to photograph. In the town you can also see many lines of poetry written on walls, in front of doors, and on steps, showcasing Polignano's title as a "town of poetry." You can stroll slowly along the city walls, gazing into the distance at the scenery where blue sea and rocks intertwine, or pause briefly at a sea-view cafe.
attractions.text_zh: 这座悬崖之上的小镇，被誉为「普利亚的地中海阳台」。白色房屋依岩壁而建，俯瞰湛蓝的亚得里亚海，最著名的景观是波利尼亚诺阿马雷海湾 ( Lama Monachile )—— 一道深切的岩峡口，连接着石拱桥与天然岩洞，是旅人拍照打卡的经典画面。小镇中也可见许多诗句写在墙上、门前、台阶上，展现波利尼亚诺「诗意之镇」的称号。您可沿城墙缓缓漫步，远眺碧海与岩石交错的风景，或在海景咖啡馆短暂停留。

attractions.text_en: Italy's paradise town - the town of Alberobello. Alberobello in Italian means "beautiful tree," so some people also call Alberobello the Beautiful Tree Town. The Trulli stone house settlement is Alberobello's most representative architectural landscape in Puglia, famous for its swathes of Trulli (mushroom-shaped white stone houses). The stone houses are built with dry-stone limestone masonry, with conical roof structures, white walls and grey tops, in a unique style. The Alberobello area was originally a barren land with the worst natural conditions; the earliest stone houses date back to the 12th century, and when people first began to live there is no longer traceable. From the 16th century, more and more refugees fleeing natural and man-made disasters fled here, using local limestone to build houses - which are the stone houses with conical, hat-like roofs we see today. In 1797, the refugees petitioned the local King of Taranto to legally settle; with the refugees being numerous and powerful, the king reluctantly allowed this type of easily demolished conical-roofed stone house to legally exist, forming the unique trullo village of the Alberobello area. The typical trullo-style building has residents using square limestone blocks, enclosed into a round house without columns or beams; built to a suitable height, they then stack flat stone slabs upward, each slab gradually narrowing toward the top, forming a conical pointed roof - this is one of humanity's most primitive house-building methods. Limestone-block houses are sturdy, dry, warm in winter and cool in summer.
attractions.text_zh: 意大利的天堂小镇——阿尔贝罗贝洛小镇，Alberobello在意大利语里是“美丽的树”的意思，因此也有人称阿尔贝罗贝洛为丽树镇。Trulli石屋聚落是阿尔贝罗贝洛是普利亚最具代表性的建筑景观，以成片的Trulli（蘑菇型白石屋）而闻名。石屋采用干式石灰岩砌成，屋顶为圆锥状结构，白墙灰顶，风格独特。阿尔贝罗贝洛地区，原是自然条件最差的不毛之地，最早的石屋可追溯至12世纪，何时开始有人居住已无从可考。16世纪开始，越来越多逃避天灾人祸的难民逃到这里，就地取材用石灰岩建屋，也就是我们现在看到的带有斗笠圆顶的石屋。1797年难民向塔兰托当地的旁波国王请愿合法定居，难民人多势众，国王勉为其难，允许容易拆除的这一类型圆顶石屋合法存在，形成了阿尔贝罗贝洛地区独特的陶尔利村落。典型的陶尔利风格建筑，是居民利用方形石灰岩块，围成无柱无梁的圆形房舍，建至适当高度，再用片状岩片向上堆砌，每片逐步收窄封顶，成圆锥形尖顶，这是一种人类最原始的建屋方法。石灰岩块的房舍，坚固、干燥、冬暖夏凉。

attractions.text_en: The distinctive cave restaurants in the Sassi old town of Matera (Sassi di Matera) are mostly converted from original cave dwellings or granaries, preserving the natural stone walls, arched structures, and dim amber lighting, divided into two areas - Sasso Caveoso and Sasso Barisano. Its buildings are carved from natural rock and have been inhabited since ancient times, making it one of the oldest inhabited places on Earth. Common dishes at the distinctive cave restaurants include handmade pasta with sauce (such as Orecchiette), goat cheese, roasted vegetables, bean puree, country bread, regional wine (such as Aglianico), or homemade desserts.
attractions.text_zh: 马泰拉Sassi 老城区（Sassi di Matera）中的特色洞穴餐厅多改建自原始洞穴民宅或粮仓，保留天然石壁、拱形结构与昏黄灯光，分为两个区域——Sasso Caveoso 和 Sasso Barisano。其建筑由天然岩石雕凿而成，自古便有人居住，是地球上最古老的居住地之一。特色洞穴餐厅菜色常见包括手工意面配酱汁（如Orecchiette）、山羊乳酪、烤蔬菜、豆泥、乡村面包、地区葡萄酒（如Aglianico）或自制甜点。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Salerno and take a boat to tour Positano, exploring the colorful town on the cliffs, passing by the most charming coastal pearl of southern Italy - Amalfi. Stroll among the blue sea, white sand, and romantic streets and alleys, then take the boat back to Salerno and travel to Sorrento to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: In the event of extreme weather at sea, out of consideration for traveler safety, the cruise company will cancel the boat tour of Positano. We will arrange for visiting Salerno or the old town of Sorrento by coach that day, and Positano cannot be visited; the boat tour fee will be refunded to the traveler.
overview.text_zh:
上午前往萨勒诺，乘船游览波西塔诺，探索悬崖上的彩色小镇，途经意大利南部最迷人的海岸明珠-阿马尔菲。漫步蓝海、白沙与浪漫街巷，随后乘船返回萨勒诺，前往索伦托入住酒店。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺活动，我社将安排当天乘坐车参观萨勒诺或索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

accommodation.text_en: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is a top choice for admiring the Sorrento sea view, with magnificent views of the Sorrento-Naples bay. The hotel is surrounded by sea views on three sides, with a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles, and a fully equipped marine spa center. It is within walking distance of the lively seaside town center, and the hotel's pier is the docking point for sea-going yachts.
accommodation.text_zh: 索伦托海岸酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
The bright pearl of the Amalfi Coast - Positano
Positano sits on the cliffs of the Amalfi Coast in southern Italy; it is a colorful, romantic, and enchanting seaside town. The tiered houses are built along the mountain, with pink-orange, bright yellow, and azure blue interweaving into a gorgeous Mediterranean scroll. Strolling among the winding flagstone alleys, the air is filled with the fresh fragrance of lemons and sea breeze; walking down to the sea, the golden beach and the azure water complement each other - it is a superb place for vacationing, taking photos, and enjoying leisurely time. Positano is not only a dreamy paradise for photographers and couples, but also the best place to experience Italy's slow life.
highlights.text_zh:
阿马尔菲海岸的明珠亮-波西塔诺
波西塔诺坐落在意大利南部阿马尔菲海岸峭壁上，是一座色彩斑斓、浪漫迷人的海滨小镇。层叠的房屋沿山而建，粉橙、明黄、湛蓝交织成一幅绚丽的地中海画卷。漫步在蜿蜒的石板小巷间，空气中弥漫着柠檬与海风的清香；走到海边，金色沙滩与碧蓝海水交相辉映，是度假、拍照与享受悠闲时光的绝佳之地。、波西塔诺不仅是摄影师和情侣的梦幻天堂，更是感受意大利慢生活的最佳去处。

attractions.text_en: Positano is a town located along the Amalfi Coast in the Campania region of Italy. The main part of the town backs onto the mountains and faces the sea; one writer described it this way: Positano is a dreamland - while you are there, she does not seem very real, and after you leave, she becomes vivid and lifelike. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as one of Europe's beautiful beaches; here the coastline winds and twists, with mountains and islands towering majestically along the shore, valleys and capes interlacing, orchards and wild plants coexisting. Within this pristine natural environment there is a rich human history, and scattered among the dense mountain forests are many picturesque towns - and the most beautiful of them is called Positano.
attractions.text_zh: 波西塔诺是位于意大利坎帕尼亚大区阿马尔菲海岸‎沿岸的一个小镇。城镇主要部份背山面海，一位作家这样形容：波西塔诺是一个梦乡，你在时，她不是很真切，你离开后，她变的栩栩如生。阿马尔菲海岸被誉为欧洲美丽的海滩，这里的海岸线蜿蜒曲折，岸上山岛耸峙巍峨，山谷与海岬交错，果园与野生植物并存，原生态的自然环境中有丰富的人文历史，浓密山林中散落着许多如诗如画的小镇，而其中较漂亮的那一个叫做波西塔诺

attractions.text_en: The Amalfi Coast, rated by the National Geographic magazine as one of the 50 places most worth visiting in a lifetime, has the most charming coastline in Naples and indeed the whole world. It was also once the capital of the powerful Maritime Republic of Amalfi, a very important city in Mediterranean trade at the time. Amalfi is also a UNESCO World Heritage site. Here there are ancient medieval towns, famous for their unique culture and architecture. Popular towns include Amalfi, Positano, Ravello, and Maiori. In these towns, you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers, and shrines; the history of these buildings can be traced back several centuries, and each one has its own story.
attractions.text_zh: 阿马尔菲海岸，被联合国地理杂志评为一生中最值得去的50个地方之一，拥有着那不勒斯乃至全世界最迷人的海岸线，同时它也曾经是强大阿马尔菲航海共和国的首都，是当时地中海贸易中的一个非常重要的城市。阿马尔菲同时也被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产。这里有着古老的中世纪小镇，这些小镇以其独特的文化和建筑而著名。受欢迎的小镇包括阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和莱马尼。在这些小镇中，你可以看到许多古老的教堂、城堡、钟楼和神殿，这些建筑物的历史可以追溯到几个世纪以前，每个建筑都有着自己的故事。

attractions.text_en: This is a city that combines historical heritage and beautiful scenery in one. Salerno is located on the charming Amalfi Coast (Amalfi Coast), with ancient churches, a Norman castle, and a picturesque waterfront. At seaside restaurants and local eateries, you can taste the local Campania cuisine featuring fresh seafood and traditional dishes.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一座集历史底蕴与美景于一身的城市。萨莱诺位于迷人的阿马尔菲海岸（Amalfi Coast），拥有古老的教堂、诺曼城堡和风景如画的海滨，在海边餐馆和当地小吃店品尝以新鲜海鲜和传统菜肴为特色的坎帕尼亚当地美食。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Sorrento and stroll through the small city built on the seaside cliffs; then take a ferry from Sorrento to the island of Capri. That day, you may go on your own to stroll by the sea and then visit the Blue Grotto, or take a boat on your own to circle the island and explore the Blue Grotto, or go on your own to the town of Capri to tour the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) and look down over the entire bay; after that, take a ferry to the Sorrento pier and ride the coach back to the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往索伦托，漫步筑于海滨峭壁上的小城；之后在索伦托坐渡船前往卡普里岛。当天或自行前往海边漫步后前往蓝洞游览，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园（外观），俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船抵达索伦托码头，乘车返回酒店。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is a top choice for admiring the Sorrento sea view, with magnificent views of the Sorrento-Naples bay. The hotel is surrounded by sea views on three sides, with a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles, and a fully equipped marine spa center. It is within walking distance of the lively seaside town center, and the hotel's pier is the docking point for sea-going yachts.
accommodation.text_zh: 索伦托海岸酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
The blue wonder of Capri island - the "Blue Grotto"
The island of Capri has been a famous tourist and health resort since ancient Roman times. The Emperor Augustus, on his way back after the eastern campaign ended, once landed on this island; impressed by the beautiful environment and pleasant climate here, he did not hesitate to exchange four times the island of Ischia for the island of Capri, to use as his summer retreat. The island of Capri is of limestone terrain, with steep rocks, among which there are many peculiar caves; the most famous of them is the "Blue Grotto." The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the world's seven great wonders. The entrance of the Blue Grotto is at the bottom of a cliff; the cave mouth is very small, and one can only enter by small boat. Because of the special structure of the cave mouth, on one hand sunlight can enter the cave through the mouth, and on the other hand it is reflected back up from the bottom of the water inside the cave, so the seawater inside the cave is a crystal blue, mysterious and unfathomable - even the rocks inside the cave turn blue, hence the name "Blue Grotto." To visit the Blue Grotto, you must definitely choose the right timing: first, the weather must be clear; second, you must go at low tide; and third, there must be no wind or waves.
highlights.text_zh:
卡普里岛蓝色奇观“蓝洞”
卡普里岛从古罗马时期开始,这里就是著名的旅游疗养胜地，奥古斯都大帝在东方战役结束后的归途中曾在该岛登陆，被这里的优美环境、宜人气候所折服，不惜以4倍的伊斯基亚岛换取卡普里岛，作为自己的避暑之地。卡普里岛属于石灰质地形，岩石峭立，岩石间有许多奇特的岩洞，其中较著名的就是“蓝洞”。蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一。蓝洞的洞口在悬崖的下面，洞口很小，只能乘坐小船才能进入。由于洞口的特殊结构，一方面阳光可以从洞口进入洞内，一方面又从洞内水底反射上来，因此洞内的海水一片晶蓝，神秘莫测，连洞内的岩石也变成了蓝色，故称“蓝洞”。参观蓝洞一定要选择时机:一要天气晴朗;二要在退潮的时候去，三要没有风浪。

attractions.text_en:
The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the world's seven great wonders and is Capri's most famous attraction; many people go to Capri precisely to behold the wonder of the Blue Grotto. You can take a small boat into the Blue Grotto to tour it; because of the special structure of the cave mouth, the seawater inside the cave is a crystal blue. The surface seawater of the Blue Grotto shows a deep, dim blue, while the deeper seawater is sky blue, and the seawater sets off the rocks in the cave so that they too are all azure. When the weather is clear, the Blue Grotto is exceptionally beautiful and enchanting.
Capri's Blue Grotto is a natural attraction; if it is closed by the local marine meteorological agency due to high tide, wind and waves, or other factors, then it cannot be visited inside. The Blue Grotto tour fee is not included in the tour package; to avoid misunderstanding, please, according to local custom, in addition to the Blue Grotto boatman's labor fee, pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
attractions.text_zh:
蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，是卡普里较著名的景点，很多人去卡普里的目的就是为了一睹蓝洞奇观。可乘小船进入蓝洞游览，由于洞口的特殊结构，使得洞里的海水一片晶蓝。蓝洞表层的海水呈现幽幽的深蓝色，而深层海水却是天蓝色的，海水映衬得洞中的岩石也都一片蔚蓝。天气晴朗的时候，蓝洞分外的美丽和妖娆。
卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。 蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

attractions.text_en: The island of Capri is located near the southern entrance of the Gulf of Naples, belonging to the Campania region of Italy. On the island there are the ruins of two medieval castles, Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as a church dedicated to the island's patron saint, San Costanzo; it is one of the famous tourist resorts of southern Italy. Capri's forests, waters, air, sunshine, and the island villas most coveted by the wealthy of the world have attracted people from all over the globe. Among them, the Blue Grotto is the attraction that everyone visiting Capri must see; when the sky is clear, sunlight shines into the cave, and every corner of the deep blue cave is incomparably beautiful.
attractions.text_zh: 卡普里岛位于那不勒斯湾南部入海口附近，属意大利坎佩尼亚区。岛上有巴巴罗萨和卡斯蒂利奥内两座中世纪城堡遗迹以及供奉该岛守护神圣科斯坦佑的教堂，是意大利南部著名的游览胜地之一。卡普里岛的森林、水域、空气、阳光和较令全世界富豪憧憬的岛屿别墅，曾吸引了来自世界各地的人们，其中蓝洞是每一个人来卡普里岛一定会参观的景点，天清气朗时，阳光照射入洞穴，深蓝的洞穴内每一处角落都美不胜收。

attractions.text_en: Located in the town of Capri, the Gardens of Augustus record the ten years of life that Augustus spent living here. One side of the garden is a sheer cliff, while in the distance there is azure seawater. On the left side of the garden are the Lovers' Rocks; legend has it that these Lovers' Rocks were originally a pair of lovers in love who, unable to be together, leapt one after another into the sea to die for love, and afterwards became these rocks leaning close against each other.
attractions.text_zh: 位于卡普里小镇上的奥古斯丁花园记录着奥古斯丁在这里居住的十年生活。花园一侧是断壁，远处则是碧蓝的海水。在花园的左侧是情人石，相传这情人石原本是相爱的恋人，因无法恋爱纷纷跳入海中殉情，之后就成了这相依相偎的石头。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city of Pompeii and learn about the former Pompeian civilization. After that, travel to Naples to tour the old town of Naples, visiting the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and the Castel Nuovo (exterior). In the afternoon, travel to Rome to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Hotel Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明。之后前往那不勒斯游览那不勒斯老城，参观那不勒斯皇宫（外观）、新堡（外观）。下午前往罗马入住酒店。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Hotel Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course, and an outdoor swimming pool. The hotel has cutting-edge architectural style and modern interior design, with rooms furnished in modern or classical decor, and all guest rooms enjoy views of the garden, swimming pool, or golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants offering exquisite international-flavor dishes and traditional Italian cuisine; the hotel's tranquil environment easily meets your varied needs and will be your ideal choice for relaxing body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh: 罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店 酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The ancient city of Pompeii | Asleep for a thousand years, still splendid and glorious when it awakens
The ancient city of Pompeii is located in the Campania region near the city of Naples in southern Italy. It was once a small fishing village; because it was close to an important Mediterranean port, with convenient transportation and gathered merchants, by the 8th century BC it had already developed into the second-largest city of the ancient Roman world. However, in 79 BC, with the eruption of Mount Vesuvius, volcanic ash and scorching magma instantly buried the ancient city of Pompeii, and the disaster claimed countless lives overnight. After more than a thousand years, the ancient city of Pompeii finally saw the light of day again.
highlights.text_zh:
庞贝古城丨沉睡千年，醒时依旧灿烂辉煌
庞贝古城位于意大利南部那不勒斯市附近的坎帕尼亚大区，曾经是一个小渔村，由于靠近地中海的重要港口，交通便利，商贾云集，在公元前8世纪，就已经发展成了古罗马城的第二大城市。然而在公元前79年，随着维苏威火山的爆发，火山灰与炽热的岩浆瞬间掩埋了庞贝古城，灾难让无数生灵一夜之间丧生。历经一千多年之后，庞贝古城方得重见天日。

attractions.text_en: For most travelers, the sea, cuisine, and history of Naples are all important reasons that make people reluctant to leave. Naples was the most beloved city of the Italian writer Boccaccio; this is the birthplace of the songs "'O sole mio" and "Torna a Surriento," and also the birthplace of pizza. Naples presents different faces in all four seasons of the year to travelers from around the world. Naples is also called "Napoli," which in Italian is "Napoli." Naples is the capital of the Campania region as well as the province of Naples, and is also one of the most populous cities in Italy, abundant in lemons and grapes. At the same time, she is also an important tourist city of the Mediterranean, known as the "city of sunshine and joy." This is a source of inspiration for many artists and musicians - perhaps because of Mount Vesuvius (Mount Vesuvius), or perhaps because of the rustic simplicity of Naples.
attractions.text_zh: 对于大多数旅行者而言，那不勒斯的大海、美食及历史都是让人流连忘返的重要原因。那不勒斯是意大利作家薄伽丘最热爱的城市，这里是歌曲《我的太阳》、《重归苏莲托》的诞生地，也是披萨的起源地。那不勒斯一年四季都呈现出不同的面孔展现给来自世界各地的旅行者。那不勒斯也叫“拿波里”，意大利文是“Napoli”。那不勒斯是坎帕尼亚大区以及那不勒斯省的首府，也是意大利人口最多的城市之一，盛产柠檬和葡萄。同时，她也是地中海重要的旅游城市，被称为“阳光和欢乐之城”。这里是许多艺术家、音乐家的灵感之源，或许是因为维苏威火山(MountVesuvius)，又或许是因为那不勒斯的古朴。

attractions.text_en: The Royal Palace of Naples stands in the bustling downtown, close to famous attractions such as Castel Nuovo and Castel dell'Ovo. Having gone through four dynasties, its exterior looks quite ordinary, but if you choose to go inside to visit, it will definitely amaze you. This palace is extremely luxurious; its overall color scheme is basically gold, yellow, and purple, representing the nobility of royalty. The palace has many, many rooms - the queen's bedchamber, the council chamber, the study, and so on - and inside there are also many displays of royal items and paintings of royal nobility, and the most noteworthy of all is the throne. The most worth-seeing place inside this palace, aside from the various paintings, is it; words like noble and elegant cannot simply describe it.
attractions.text_zh: 那不勒斯皇宫身处闹市，临近新堡、蛋堡等知名景点，历经四个朝代，外表看上去十分普通，但是，如果选择入内参观，那么一定会让你大吃一惊，这个皇宫非常奢华，整个色调基本就是金色、黄色、紫色，代表皇室的高贵。皇宫有许许多多的房间，王后的寝宫、议政厅、书房等等，里面还有很多皇室用品的展示和皇室贵族的绘画，最值得一提的就是王座。这个皇宫里面最值得一看的地方，除了各类绘画就是它了，用尊贵典雅这一类词是无法简单形容的。

attractions.text_en: Castel Nuovo, also known as the Angevin Castle, was ordered to be built by the first king of the Kingdom of Naples. Castel Nuovo includes the Civic Museum (Museo Civico) as well as the castle ruins. The museum (mainly displaying paintings) is on the first floor; the second floor offers sea views; and the ground floor is the Castel Nuovo ruins, where the surface is built of transparent glass - travelers with a fear of heights need to take special care - beneath the glass are the ruins of ancient buildings as well as human bones. In addition, inside Castel Nuovo there is also a Sala Dei Baroni (literally "the Barons' Hall"); the architecture at the top of the hall is very distinctive.
attractions.text_zh: 新堡，又名安茹城堡，是那不勒斯王国第一位国王下令建立。新堡包括公民博物馆(MuseoCivico)以及城堡遗迹。博物馆(主要展示绘画)位于第一层，第二层可以看到海景，零层则为新堡遗迹，地表为透明玻璃建造，有恐高症的旅行者需要特别注意，玻璃底下则为古建筑遗迹以及人的骸骨。另外，新堡内部还有一个SalaDeiBaroni(直译为男爵的房间)，房间顶端的建筑非常有特色。

attractions.text_en: The ancient city of Pompeii was once a small-to-medium town backing onto the mountains and facing the sea, destroyed in an instant by the great eruption of Mount Vesuvius to its northwest. The town's streets and houses were buried by volcanic ash, yet it completely preserved the living scenes of the Pompeians from more than two thousand years ago; later this vast ruin was gradually excavated. Besides various building remains, there are also some shocking casts. The people who perished when the volcano erupted, their bodies wrapped in volcanic ash, decayed until only an empty shell remained; archaeology injected these empty shells with plaster to make casts, showing the world the tragic state of Pompeii at the time.
attractions.text_zh: 庞贝古城曾是一座背山面海的中小城镇，因西北边的维苏威火山大爆发而毁于一旦。城镇街道、房屋被火山灰掩埋，却完整保留了两千年多前庞贝人的生活场景，后来这座庞大的遗址才被渐渐发掘出来。除各种建筑遗迹外，还有一些触目惊心的铸像。在火山爆发时遇难的人，因被火山灰包裹而身体腐朽得只剩空壳，考古学把这些空壳注入石膏、做成铸像，向世人展示庞贝当时的惨状。

attractions.text_en: This is a historical site within the ancient city of Pompeii; it was once a temple, but because of its great age only ruined walls remain, though the overall outline of the temple can still be made out.
attractions.text_zh: 这是庞贝古城内的一处历史遗址，这里曾经是一座寺庙，但因为年代久远只剩下残垣断壁了，但寺庙的整体轮廓还是看得出的。

attractions.name_en: Forum at the Temple of Apollo
attractions.text_en: Also called the public square, this was once the political, economic, and religious center of former Pompeii. The square basilica still retains some brick-built column bases; this place was the former court and venue for commercial transactions. Opposite the basilica is a Temple of Apollo, in which the 48 Corinthian columns are well preserved, and there are also many exquisite murals. On the north side of the square is a Temple of Jupiter facing away from Mount Vesuvius, from which you can clearly gaze at Mount Vesuvius.
attractions.text_zh: 也称公共广场，这里曾经是昔日庞贝的政治、经济、宗教中心，广场上的方形会堂还残留着一些砖砌的圆柱底座，此处是以前的法院与商业交易场所。会堂的对面是一座阿波罗神殿，里面的48根科林斯式圆柱保存完好，还有许多精美的壁画。广场北侧有一座背对着维苏威火山的丘比特神殿，可以清楚的眺望维苏威火山。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, begin touring the world-famous historic and cultural city of Rome. This is the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, and because of its long history it is known as the "Eternal City." Visit the Colosseum and the Pantheon standing on the site of ancient Rome's old capital, tour the Spanish Square and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), and after that conclude this wonderful itinerary.
[The main attractions within the ancient city area of Rome are all within the Rome traffic-restricted zone (ZTL). The ancient city of Rome is toured on foot that day; the round-trip walking distance is about 5 kilometers, so please wear light and comfortable clothing.]
overview.text_zh:
上午开始游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“ 。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场、万神殿，游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观），之后结束美好行程。
【罗马古城区内的主要景点，均在罗马车辆禁行区内（ZTL）。罗马古城当天为步行游览，往返步行行程约为5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。】

accommodation.text_en: No hotel accommodation that day
accommodation.text_zh: 当天无酒店住宿

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth visit to Rome, an important birthplace of world culture
Among the ancient ruins that occupy about half of the city area, you can search for the historical civilization that has accumulated over thousands of years. Whether it is the world-famous architectural ruins formed by the Imperial Senate, triumphal arches, commemorative columns, the Pantheon, and the Colosseum, or the many exquisite Renaissance-period buildings and art treasures held by the hundreds of museums, or even the countless fountains in the city of myriad postures represented by the Trevi Fountain, as well as the large-scale roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares, public baths, and other public buildings - all of them freeze art at that wondrous moment. Someone said "architecture is flowing music"; then the music played by the architecture of ancient Rome must surely be a magnificent and timeless movement.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的必然是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum located in the center of Rome was built by ancient Rome at the time to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to praise the great ancient Roman Empire; it was a place exclusively for slave owners, nobles, and freemen of ancient Rome to watch beast fights or gladiatorial combat between slaves, and is Rome's most famous historical relic. The Colosseum can be called a model masterpiece and a marvel in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for being huge, majestic, and spectacular. Although only the better part of a skeleton remains, its majestic spirit and grand momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en:
The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years to this day; the artist Raphael, the Roman emperors Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, and others rest here in eternal sleep. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to honor the gods of Mount Olympus; it can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of the exquisite architectural technique of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as the "design of angels."
Note: Because the Pantheon is a religious site, if you need to go inside to visit, please observe the rules: dress may not be shoulder-baring or back-baring; shorts and short skirts are not allowed (they must cover the knees); and you may not bring food or drink inside.
attractions.text_zh:
万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。
提示：因万神殿属于宗教场所，如果您需入内参观请遵守例：着装不能露肩、露背 短裤、短裙不行（必须 盖过膝盖 ），不可携带饮食进入。

attractions.text_en: The Spanish Square once appeared in scenes from the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome that everyone knows. Hepburn's fresh and lovely figure seems to have already merged into one with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never wipe away. As for the Spanish Steps, the entire Spanish Square is not large in area, and the crowds mainly gather near the Spanish Steps. The whole flight of steps has 138 steps, and is the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain," or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the sea god Neptune of Roman mythology returning victorious; the whole is full of grandeur and majestic momentum. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and if you can toss it into the water, then your dreams can come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。
